Name: Kenya Wine Agencies Limited - KWAL
Description:
We are KWAL. We make it GREAT for everyone through Quality, Delight and Value.

Since 1969, when KWAL was incorporated with the objective of providing an avenue for importation and distribution of wines and spirits and enable indigenous Kenyans to participate significantly in this sector; we have delighted consumers across Eastern Africa with award winning and quality beverages.

As a beverage company dealing with both alcoholic drinks – wines and spirits – and non-alcoholic ones including grape juice and syrup, our business includes manufacture, import, distribution, sale and export of alcoholic and non-alcoholic beverages. We are continuously committed to quality in all aspects of our business.

To learn more about the delight, value and quality KWAL brings to it's valued stakeholders and clientele, visit our website ; www.kwal.co.ke

Name: Grupo Peñaflor
Description:
Grupo Peñaflor es el mayor productor de vino de la Argentina y uno de los primeros diez productores de vinos a nivel mundial. Exportamos actualmente a más de 90 países en los cinco continentes, y año tras año, los vinos de nuestras bodegas reciben más de un centenar de premios por su calidad y reconocimiento internacional. 

Con una trayectoria de bodegas de más de 100 años y más de 2.800 empleados, nuestra filosofía de negocios está basada en la calidad de nuestros productos y una fuerte orientación por comprender y satisfacer las necesidades y tendencias de los consumidores locales y globales, a partir de una profunda raíz argentina.

Name: Sula Vineyards
Description:
Sula Vineyards is India's #1 premium wine producer and one of India's top 3 international wine and spirits importers through its arm Sula Selections. We are proud to lead the Indian Wine Revolution and are committed to producing and delivering an excellent product and experience to our consumers in every bottle! Our vineyards are located in Maharashtra and Karnataka. We are the pioneers in wine tourism in India, with our luxury vineyard properties - The Source at Sula and Beyond by Sula - and The Tasting Room based in Nashik, just 3 hours outside of Mumbai. We are proud partners in sustainable grapegrowing, winemaking and viticulture, and are committed to ensuring sustainable growth and development for our farmers, communities and the local environment. 

Sula also imports and distributes leading international wines and spirits such as Le Grand Noir, Torres, Trapiche, Hardy's, Beluga Vodka, and more!

We are committed to fostering a workplace built on strong values of challenge, innovation, accountability, fairness and excellence, and look forward to taking the Indian wine industry to even greater heights!

Name: KWV
Description:
From its earliest roots in 1918 as a small co-operative of growers - Proud Pioneers with the vision to improve wine industry standards and quality in South Africa - KWV has grown into a global producer of over 100 products.

Our wines and grapes are sourced from the most sought-after viticultural regions of South Africa and grown from the world’s oldest earth. Our cellars, one of the largest complexes in the world and featuring the world-famous Cathedral Cellar, have produced an award-winning range of products. Our brands have a solid foundation in tradition, while innovating with contemporary tastes. Over the decades they have earned KWV a loyal following of discerning consumers both locally and abroad. 

Our commitment to quality in all aspects of our business has earned us multiple local and international accolades, with our brands having collectively earned over 300 awards in the past year alone. We also celebrate our success in sustainability – we are one of the leading black empowered companies in the wine and spirits industry and are dedicated to our role as founding member of the Association for Responsible Alcohol Use (ARA). 

KWV is present in over 100 markets globally, with key focus markets including Scandinavia, Germany, the Americas, Japan, and South Africa. We place a high value on our relationships with our international partners, who ensure that our brand presence extends across national and cultural borders.

Name: Radico Khaitan Limited
Description:
Radico Khaitan Limited (“RKL”) is among the oldest and one of the largest manufacturers of Indian Made Foreign Liquor (“IMFL”) in India. Formerly known as Rampur Distillery, RKL commenced its operations in 1943 and over the years emerged from a major bulk spirits supplier and bottler to other spirit manufacturers to the originator of four millionaire labels and over fifteen organically grown brands.

Radico Khaitan Limited is also one of the largest providers of branded IMFL to the Canteen Stores Department (“CSD”), which has significant business barriers to entry. The company has been successfully building its brand equity in international markets and currently exports its products to over 85 countries.

The Company currently has two distilleries- Rampur Distillery in Rampur (Uttar Pradesh) and Radico NV Distilleries Maharashtra Limited, a joint venture with RNV in Aurangabad (Maharashtra). The company has a total capacity of over 157 million litres and operates 28 bottling units spread across the country.

Our flagship brand portfolio includes Rampur Single Malt, Jaisalmer Gin, Magic Moments Vodka, Magic Moments DAZZLE, 8PM Premium Black Whisky, 1965 Spirit Of Victory Rum, Morpheus XO Brandy, Royal Ranthambore Whisky, Contessa Rum to name a few.

Name: KRUG Champagne
Description:
Krug has always lived up to its reputation as the first and still the only Champagne House to create exclusively prestige Champagnes every year since its foundation.

The House was established in Reims in 1843, by Joseph Krug, a visionary non-conformist with an uncompromising philosophy. Having understood that the true essence of Champagne is pleasure itself, his dream was to offer the very best Champagne every single year, regardless of annual climate variations. Paying close attention to the vineyard’s character, respecting the individuality of each plot and its wine, as well as building an extensive library of reserve wines from many different years allowed Joseph Krug to fulfil his dream.

With a very original approach to Champagne making, he decided to go beyond the notion of vintage to create the fullest expression of Champagne, every year. Thus, he founded a House in which all Champagnes are of the same level of distinction.

Six generations of the Krug family have perpetuated this dream, enriching the founder’s vision and savoir faire. Today, Krug is one of the 25 unique Houses that form Moët Hennessy, the wines and spirits division of LVMH.

The House of Krug gives time to the unforgettable: with a spirit that is different but always refined, it accepts no compromise on craftsmanship, goes beyond perfection in the pursuit of pleasure and fosters a strong connection with its international community of Krug Lovers.

Please do not forward or share with anyone underage. Enjoy Responsibly.

Read our T&Cs and Privacy Policy here : vu.fr/biTX

Name: Castel Frères
Description:
Castel Frères is the historic wine trading business created by Pierre Castel with his brothers and sisters in 1949. Over time, we have created a comprehensive range including not only brand leaders and successful innovations, but also châteaux wineries and grand cru wines. Third largest in the world market, Castel Frères is today "the most important place for French wine in the world" for professionals and consumers worldwide.
***Castel Frères is part of CASTEL Wine International***

Name: AdVini
Description: AdVini (266M€ de CA, 900 collaborateurs,) est le leader français des vins de terroir. Son siège est implanté à St-Felix de Lodez (34 / 30 kms de Montpellier). Alliant tradition et modernisme, AdVini est implanté au cœur des régions viticoles françaises les plus renommées et en Afrique du Sud. Avec 2.333 hectares de vignobles détenus en propre, ses 30 Vignobles & Châteaux, Maisons de négoce et centre de vinification ; AdVini bénéficie d’une notoriété et d’une reconnaissance internationale en constante progression. Présent dans plus de 110 pays, AdVini poursuit son fort développement commercial grâce à un plan stratégique orienté digital et avec pour objectif de développer ses activités sur l’ensemble des circuits de distribution classiques et e-business.

Name: VSPT Wine Group
Description:
En VSPT Wine Group contamos con una larga trayectoria vitivinícola. Estamos dentro del Top 20 de productores a nivel mundial (18 Millones de cajas anuales), dentro del Top 10 de productores en el mercado doméstico argentino y somos líderes en ventas de vino y espumantes Premium en Chile. 

Con nuestras marcas transformamos momentos cotidianos en experiencias a través de vinos producidos con orgullo y pasión, exportamos nuestros productos a más de 80 países,  posicionándonos como grandes referentes en mercados de relevancia mundial. 

Promovemos la pasión por el vino y el consumo consciente, cultivamos la diversidad y la excelencia en armonía, el respeto por las personas, el vino y nuestra tierra.

Buscamos ser un grupo vitivinícola de escala mundial, basado en la fuerza de nuestras marcas estratégicas y liderados por la gestión innovadora y sustentable de un equipo humano de excelencia. 

Solo faltas tú!

Name: Kavaklıdere Şirketler Grubu
Description:
Kavaklıdere Wines, the first private sector wine producer in Turkey, is founded by Cenap And in 1929 in Ankara, it has steadily developed to become Turkey’s leading wine producer.

Our company owns 617.5 hectares of vineyards in the most important wine-producing area of Anatolia, where our professional wine growers strives to maintain the perfect grapes-soil-climate equation and increase the potential of the vines that produce the grapes that have been successful in the production of Anatolian wines for hundreds of years and to introduce wines from international grape varieties grown in Anatolia’s varied micro-climates to achieve their best potential when they are transformed in to wine.

Name: Wine-Searcher
Description:
Find, compare and buy wines, beers and spirits using the world’s #1 wine and spirits resource. Thanks to new and developing technology, Wine-Searcher brings the world's wines, beers and spirits prices together on both mobile and desktop. Find the best prices of exactly what you’re looking for.

Search quickly and easily

Find out about products, grape varieties, producers and regions, access pricing information across vintages, and even see how critics have scored it.

Pick the best deal for you 

Find out the wine store closest to where you currently are, as well as what wines are the best value locally. Buy wines online and get them shipped through the merchant’s site, drop in and pick up or make a call to the store directly through the app. 

Expand your wine knowledge

Access Wine-Searcher’s encyclopedia of wine regions and grape varieties – from your cheerful cheapie to the rare and expensive.

And we are not just wine, you can search whisky, bourbon, cognac, gin, rum, tequila, and beer.

Wine-Searcher makes finding wine as enjoyable as drinking it.

“Thanks to Wine-Searcher, the most successful, and seriously useful, price comparison website, everyone should now be paying the right price for the wines they buy.” – Jancis Robinson MW

“There is no better tool than Wine-Searcher.com. It offers the world’s most comprehensive database of wines available for sale online.” – Alder Yarrow, Vinography

“Whether you’re looking for something as ubiquitous as Mouton Cadet Bordeaux or something as rare as a Riesling TBA from Egon Müller in Germany, Wine-Searcher will point you to the right place and show you the prices.” – The New York Times

Name: Global Drinks Intel
Description:
Global Drinks Intel is the fastest-growing news and insights platform for the global drinks industry.

We focus on wine and spirits, delivering curated, high-impact analysis for senior decision-makers who want to cut through the noise and understand the trends shaping tomorrow’s market.

From exclusive interviews with industry leaders to deep dives on emerging categories, our print and digital platforms serve as the go-to resource for C-suite executives and brand innovators alike. Read in 130 countries

 Want insight with impact?
Subscribe, connect, or drop us a line:
 editorial@drinks-intel.com
 Commercial enquiries: kate@drinks-intel.com

Something BIG is coming to the global drinks industry
Register your interest now to be the first to hear what’s coming.
 globaldrinksawards.com 

#SpiritsIndustry #WineAndSpirits #DrinksBusiness #MarketIntelligence #GlobalDrinksIntel

Name: Bernard Magrez
Description:
Forty years of passion for wine and excellence! 

"More than forty vineyards acquired worldwide. I ruled nothing out. Especially the impossible. I wanted better, I wanted more, I relentlessly wanted to offer wine lovers fine wines with different styles, flavors, and pleasures. In order to answer their needs, I decided to add my signature to each of my bottles, to privilege rare wines for the pleasure of wine lovers.
My main goal is to pass on excellence."

Discover the magic of 4 Grands Crus Classés, exceptional wines around the world, initiatives in wine tourism and patronage in contemporary art.

- http://www.bernard-magrez.com
- https://lagrandemaison-bordeaux.com/
- https://www.institut-bernard-magrez.com/

Name: Santa Rita Estates
Description:
Fundados en 1880, hoy nos posicionamos como uno de los principales grupos vitivinícolas en Chile y de mayor tradición, reuniendo a las viñas Santa Rita y Carmen en nuestro país, y a Doña Paula en Argentina. 

Contamos con más de 4.000 hectáreas plantadas en emblemáticos valles y una importante presencia en más de 70 países. 

Asimismo, en Viña Santa Rita poseemos un relevante patrimonio histórico y cultural que nos ha llevado a posicionarnos como la mejor experiencia enoturistica de Chile.

De esta manera, buscamos ser referente en el desarrollo y crecimiento sustentable de la vitivinicultura, cautivando a consumidores alrededor del mundo a través de la experiencia, innovación y calidad que distingue a cada una de nuestras marcas y el trabajo de excelencia de nuestras personas. 

Súmate a nuestro equipo!
Location: Las Condes, Región Metropolitana de Santiago

Name: Mast-Jägermeister SE
Description:
Mast-Jägermeister SE is producer and marketer of well-known spirit brand Jägermeister. The company is privately held and family owned, located in Wolfenbüttel, Germany. The herbal liqueur is sold in 129 countries worldwide. This has made Jägermeister one of the most successful premium brands worldwide and consolidates the 8th place in Impact International's definitive Top 100 Premium Spirit Brands. 

In the company founded by Wilhelm Mast in 1878, his son Curt Mast created the herbal liqueur Jägermeister based on a secret recipe of 56 natural ingredients like herbs, blossoms and roots over 80 years ago. Nowadays Mast-Jägermeister has succeeded in combining the great traditions of a family-owned company with innovative and exciting marketing strategies.
The first overseas branch of Mast-Jägermeister SE is opened 2014 in Camberley, United Kingdom. 2015 Mast-Jägermeister SE took over its US importer, Sidney Frank Importing Company, and set up a subsidiary in the USA. Now, the company independently manages all of its three largest markets – the USA, Germany and the United Kingdom. 
Today, over 900 people work for Mast-Jägermeister SE around the world. 

As a family company, Mast- Jägermeister is aware of their responsibility to the people who consume the products and therefore are committed to the responsible marketing and advertising. Jägermeister pays special attention to ensure that sales, marketing, communication, and advertising activities promote the responsible enjoyment of the products by adults of legal purchase age who choose to enjoy Jägermeister.

Name: Château de Pommard
Description:
Every year, consumers and professionals from more than 80 countries around the world visit Château de Pommard to learn about the world of wine from Wine and Spirit Education Trust (WSET) professionals and taste the purest expressions of Chardonnay and Pinot Noir from villages along the Route des Grands Crus. From the grape to the glass, guests experience Clos Marey-Monge, a geological marvel, and home to distinct soil compositions, now protected as one of the world heritage Climats of Burgundy by UNESCO.

Founded in 1726, Château de Pommard combines three hundred years of savoir-faire and the innovative vision of Famille Carabello-Baum for the future. Wine lovers and critics agree the conversion to biodynamic viticulture is producing honest, energetic wines infused with an unmistakable sense of place while preserving the planet where we all live.

You must be of the legal drinking age to follow us.
Please drink responsibly.

Name: Glazer's Distributors
Description:
The company began in 1909 in Dallas, Texas, where Louis Glazer opened the Jumbo Bottling Company, which distributed a line of flavored soda waters from the back of horse-drawn wagons. Glazer’s Distributors, as the company is known today, was established on Sept. 3, 1933 by Max and Nolan Glazer, two of Louis Glazer’s sons. By 1966, Glazer’s had expanded beyond Texas to three additional states. And our energized growth continues today, as we are now located in 15 states, Canada and the US Virgin Islands.

Our commitment to building brands, our strategic focus on marketing and the company’s passion for outstanding service drive our high performance, results-producing culture. Partnering as a valued resource to our customers and suppliers, we are committed to being the industry’s preferred provider of beverage alcohol products in each of our markets.

People are what make Glazer’s Inc. a great place to work. Glazer’s employees are ambitious, creative and passionate individuals working in areas of sales, marketing, administration, distribution, operations and finance. Every team member has an important role to play in serving our customers and contributing to the business.  We are a family-owned company that believes that all of our employees are just that...family.

Come join our family!

Name: Aspri Spirits
Description:
Aspri was formed in 2004 with a belief that brands are build by developing markets together with principals through teamwork, the identification of new opportunities and relevant insights into changing market trends and preferences. 

Aspri has developed one of the Largest Sales and Distribution Networks for imported alco-bev across India and ISC and constantly develops and adapts its systems and processes to the unique and dynamic needs of the Indian alco-bev industry.


Aspri’s growth has been founded on a consistent philosophy of delivering the range and quality of products consumers demand.

Name: Millesima
Description:
𝐒𝐩𝐞́𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐞 𝐝𝐞𝐬 𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐬 𝐯𝐢𝐧𝐬 𝐞𝐭 𝐝𝐞 𝐥𝐚 𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐞 𝐞𝐧 𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐦𝐞𝐮𝐫𝐬 𝐚̀ 𝐁𝐨𝐫𝐝𝐞𝐚𝐮𝐱 𝐝𝐞𝐩𝐮𝐢𝐬 𝟏𝟗𝟖𝟑.
Millésima a pour premier engagement de proposer à ses clients des vins achetés exclusivement à la propriété. Chaque caisse proposée n’a ainsi connu que deux chais : celui des propriétés et le nôtre, un chai bicentenaire garantissant une conservation idéale de chaque bouteille. En choisissant Millésima vous avez ainsi l’assurance de l’origine des vins et de conditions de conservation parfaites, garanties indispensables lors de l’acquisition de grands vins, notamment dans de vieux millésimes. 

𝐂𝐡𝐨𝐢𝐱 𝐞𝐱𝐜𝐞𝐩𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐧𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐯𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐞
L’histoire de la Maison de négoce Millésima est fortement liée aux grands vins de Bordeaux et la Place de Bordeaux dont elle est un acteur important. Pour autant, notre passion des grands vins ne souffre pas de frontières et les 2 500 000 de bouteilles tous formats qui vieillissent dans nos chais proviennent en partie des grandes régions françaises comme la Bourgogne , la Champagne , la Vallée du Rhône , la Loire , l’Alsace … Nous élargissons par ailleurs régulièrement notre gamme avec de grands vins en provenance d’Italie , d’Espagne, d’Australie et d’autres pays producteurs incontournables ! Au sein de cette impressionnante sélection, Millésima possède une vinothèque qui a pour nom la Bibliothèque impériale, une collection de 12 500 flacons grands formats (double-magnums, jéroboams, impériales…) unique au monde !

Name: FECOVITA
Description:
Somos la mayor cooperativa vitivinícola de América y uno de los grupos vitivinícolas más importantes del país.

Llevamos más de 35 años fortaleciendo el espíritu y los valores del cooperativismo,  apoyando el esfuerzo serio, cotidiano y esforzado, de miles de productores.

Trabajamos por una vitivinicultura sustentable mediante la inversión genuina, el aporte de tecnología, la mejora continua de la calidad y la proyección internacional de nuestros productos, de la mano de marcas emblemáticas.

Name: Bodegas Bianchi
Description:
Somos una bodega con herencia familiar que se proyecta con sus valores de tradición, calidad, prestigio, innovación y contemporaneidad en la vitivinicultura argentina. Somos parte del patrimonio y la riqueza de nuestra tierra, apoyados en la calidad y la excelencia irrenunciable en cada uno de los vinos que elaboramos.
Situados en nuestro histórico terruño de San Rafael y en el privilegiado Valle de Uco, provincia de Mendoza, somos la bodega patrimonio de la Argentina, elegida por los consumidores y reconocida internacionalmente por nuestra larga trayectoria de más de 90 años elaborando vinos y espumantes de excelencia.
A lo largo de cuatro generaciones la familia Bianchi mantuvo intactos sus valores y su legado histórico, representados en vinos que resaltan el carácter y la identidad de nuestros viñedos y la impronta de nuestra bodega.
Bodegas Bianchi es hoy una marca global con presencia en más de 40 países, que cosecha continuamente importantes puntajes y galardones representando los valores y la calidad del vino argentino en todo el mundo.
Somos una empresa inspirada en las personas que consumen y eso se traduce en una política interna de investigación para alinear los desarrollos en enología con el conocimiento profundo del paladar de los consumidores.

¿Querés formar parte del equipo de trabajo que llevó a Bodegas Bianchi al lugar que hoy ocupa? 
Conoce más sobre la bodega en www.bodegasbianchi.com.ar.

Name: Marchesi Frescobaldi
Description:
Una famiglia fiorentina dedita da trenta generazioni alla produzione di grandi vini toscani, 5000 ettari di proprietà, oltre 1000 di vigneti, nove tenute in Toscana e una distribuzione di qualità in oltre 65 paesi del mondo.

Uno stile Frescobaldi, che coniuga da sempre tradizione e innovazione.

Con l'obiettivo di essere il più prestigioso produttore toscano di vino, Frescobaldi crede nel rispetto del territorio, punta sull'eccellenza delle proprie uve, investe in comunicazione e nella professionalità delle risorse umane

Name: Alexandrion Group
Description:
Alexandrion Group is the spirits and wine markets leader in Romania, and the only producer of single malt whisky in the country and in the region.

Our Alexandrion Saber Distilleries 1789 is one of the largest and most modern production facilities in southeastern Europe. We also own vineyards and wine production facilities in Romania, located in the Dealu Mare (Big Hill) region. Our Rhein & CIE 1892 Cellars, located in Azuga, are the place where the oldest sparkling wine in Romania, Rhein Extra, has been produced without interruption for more than a century. Rhein Extra has particular historical and cultural significance and has been the official supplier to the Royal House of Romania since 1904. 

Alexandrion Group is headquartered in Romania and has offices and subsidiaries in the USA, Bulgaria, Greece, Cyprus, Brazil and UAE. 

Our global distribution network covers more than 50 countries and is rapidly expanding. We are also building a state-of-the-art distillery in New York (USA), another distillery in the Kavala region (Greece) and we are planning to make investments in several other distilleries in Romania and in other countries. The Group is also expanding its distribution network, by opening distribution companies, wine & spirits stores under the name “Alexandrion Experience”, as well as e-commerce websites, in all the countries where we identify opportunities.

Name: Quintessential Brands Group
Description: Pioneering Spirits since 1761, Quintessential Brands is an independent, international spirits company with a portfolio of world-class spirits brands and manufacturing capabilities across Europe. International Spirits Challenge Gin Distiller of the Year five times in six years between 2014 and 2020.

Name: Compagnia dei Caraibi
Description:
La storia di Compagnia dei Caraibi è una storia fatta di tempo, di esperienza, di avventura, di passione e di curiosità. È una storia che affonda le sue radici in un piccolo paese del Piemonte, viaggia in lungo e in largo alla ricerca della qualità, abbraccia i paesi esotici, si apre a tutto il mondo e poi ritorna a casa, pronta a raccontare - e a offrire - tutto ciò che di migliore ha incontrato.

Compagnia dei Caraibi è un'azienda nata a Vidracco (To) nel 1995, attiva nell'importazione e distribuzione di spirits e soft drinks provenienti da ogni parte del mondo tra cui Rum, Gin, Vodka, Whisky, Tequila, sodati, acque e champagne. Il portafoglio si compone principalmente di prodotti 'Premium e 'Super Premium'.

Oggi Compagnia dei Caraibi seleziona e importa centinaia di referenze da 51 Paesi - tra cui alcuni dei brand più di tendenza presenti sul mercato: Rum Planteray, Citadelle Gin, El Dorado, Champagne Frerejean Freres, etc - e produce direttamente una decina di marchi. Ma sono numeri in continua crescita.

Lo spunto per la nascita della Compagnia dei Caraibi arriva in modo casuale. Parte da un’azienda di famiglia che produceva alimentari e da un viaggio premio dedicato agli agenti. Nel corso di un viaggio a Cuba, Tigre Ciliegio, fondatore dell'azienda, conobbe il manager responsabile dell’import export di un’azienda di birra locale. Scoprì nel conversare che producevano anche rum e così la “storia” ha avuto inizio.
Ultimo capitolo di questa storia in ordine di tempo è la nascita del progetto Elemento Indigeno. 
Un'idea incentrata sul vino in cui si fondono ancora una volta la ricerca, l’amore per il viaggio, per le differenti culture e per la qualità, la passione e la storia.

Name: Fever-Tree USA
Description:
We start with the idea that, if ¾ of your drink is the mixer, then you should use the best. Our founders Charles and Tim went back to the history books to find the finest sources for our ingredients; since we put the lid on our first bottle of our Premium Indian Tonic Water in 2005, we haven’t wavered in this single-minded mission to bring quality, flavor and choice back to mixers. Our award-winning mixers are now available in 74 countries and proudly served in 9 of the world's top 10 restaurants. 

Fever-Tree first entered the U.S. market in 2007. The new Fever Tree USA organization is helmed by the company’s North American CEO, Charles Gibb. The former president and CEO of Belvedere Vodka, Gibb joined Fever Tree in 2017, first as global strategist before taking the executive position in December. The U.S. office officially launched in June of 2018 overseeing imports, warehousing, distribution, sales, marketing, and consumer relations.

Name: The Fladgate Partnership
Description: One of the leading quality Port producers. The owner of three historic Port houses: Taylor’s (1692), Fonseca (1815), and Croft (1588), each with its own distinctive tradition and wine style.

Name: Bodegas Salentein
Description: El objetivo de Bodegas Salentein es claro: elaborar vinos de la más alta calidad, comprometidos con la tierra en la que nacen. Durante su elaboración, Salentein respeta la naturaleza y, al mismo tiempo, se involucra con la comunidad de la zona; porque la gente se convierte en un componente esencial que se refleja en la expresión de los vinos

Name: Enotria
Description:
Enotria is the UK’s leading wine and spirits distributor. 
We pride ourselves on delivering inspiring wines and spirits from around the world through an industry-leading supply chain and a highly trained network of dedicated account managers. 
Enotria is the UK’s only distributor to service all channels of the drinks industry. Our expertise spans the on-trade (our traditional heartland), off-trade and direct-to-consumer channels (through specialised e-commerce retailer The Great Wine Co.). Our direct-to-consumer offer aligns a physical store presence, online editorial content and curated events. 
Drawing on this wide-ranging expertise, we have unrivalled consumer and trade customer data, which enables us to provide superior trend information and insights to deliver a more inspired and tailored service for each of our customers.
Enotria is also unique in that we have complete ownership of our supply chain, from start to finish, which allows us to be flexible and agile when delivering to the highest required standards. This together with our position as the only UK distributor to be able to offer WSET Levels 1-3 Wine & 1-2 Spirits training to our customers; a Market-leading portfolio, with over 6,000 live and active SKUs covering 64 countries; and industry leaders for Sustainability, puts us in the ideal position to work closely with our customers in partnership to identify solutions for their business to grow sales.
In short, we love what we do and we’re passionate about what you and your customers drink. That’s what makes us different, and that’s why people continue to choose us.

Name: Associazione Italiana Sommelier
Description: L'Associazione italiana sommelier è una organizzazione senza scopo di lucro fondata a Milano il 7 luglio 1965. Successivamente, il 6 aprile 1973, con decreto n. 539 del presidente della Repubblica, ha ottenuto il riconoscimento giuridico da parte dello stato italiano. Si prefigge lo scopo di qualificare la figura professionale del Sommelier e di valorizzare la cultura del vino, svolgendo prevalentemente attività di carattere didattico ed editoriale per diffondere la conoscenza e l'apprezzamento delle bevande alcoliche, dei prodotti alimentari tradizionali e tipici e della tecnica di abbinamento cibo-vino.

Name: Kopke Group
Description:
The Kopke Group is a global wine company with roots in the Douro. Founded in the 1990s, the group brings together a number of leading brands in Port and DOC Douro wine, such as Kopke, Barros, Burmester, Calém, Velhotes, Quinta da Boavista and São Luiz.

With four estates in the Douro - São Luiz, Boavista, Arnozelo and Bairro - and a total of 430 hectares (250ha of vineyards), the group produces around 9.5 million bottles a year. The Kopke Group's wines reach more than 60 international markets.

Distinguished internationally, the Kopke Group operates with a firm commitment to sustainability, preserving the unique character of the Douro, the oldest demarcated region in the world.

“To Honour & Challenge” is the principle that guides our every step. Only in this way we can continue to make history with our wines and brands, in Portugal and around the world.

Name: Cellar Vinhos
Description:
A Cellar foi fundada em 1995 pelo mítico importador Amauri de Faria, que construiu ao longo dos anos um dos melhores portfolios de vinho do Brasil. 

Em 2019, o Amauri decidiu passar o bastão da Cellar para um novo time de sócios. Mudamos de sede, temos adicionado produtores incríveis ao portfólio e trabalhando para que a experiência dos nossos clientes seja cada dia melhor.  

Todo o nosso trabalho é dedicado a construir uma curadoria cuidadosa para você. Escolhemos nossos vinhos a dedo e construímos com cada um dos nossos produtores uma relação próxima e de muita confiança, o que nos confere o privilégio de ter no portfólio nomes exclusivos, que representamos com muita honra.

Assim como nossos produtores, nós somos movidos à paixão absoluta: o vinho não faz parte das nossas vidas, ele É nossa vida. Queremos levar nossa paixão e emoção até você. 

Nossa missão é transformar o mercado de vinhos no Brasil, ajudando as pessoas a beberem melhor gastando certo. Vem com a gente? 

Vamos Tomar Vinho!

Name: Wines and Spirits S.A.
Description:
Wines and Spirits S.A. nace en setiembre del 2006. Empresa dedicada al negocio de importación y comercialización de bebidas premium. Nos enfocamos en la atención directa a clientes que los gestionamos como cuentas claves. Representamos marcas de empresas multinacionales con las cuáles construimos alianzas para la gestion del Mercado local. 

Las categorías
- Whisky y Spirits
- Vinos 
- Aguas 
- Aguas saborizadas
- Energizantes
- Té

Name: Cork Supply
Description:
For more than four decades, Cork Supply has been redefining quality through innovation, superior service, and expertise. The company offers premium closure products to the global wine industry, including natural corks, technical corks, bartops, Nomacorc synthetic corks, tin and polylaminate capsules, wirehoods and foils, and screwcaps. 

Cork Supply  operates production facilities in all corners of the globe, including the United States, Europe, Australia, Argentina, China and South Africa, providing services to wineries in more than thirty countries. See more at: www.corksupply.com

Name: Cartuxa
Description:
A marca Cartuxa é um dos principais ativos da Fundação Eugénio de Almeida e atual marca umbrela da Adega Cartuxa, do Lagar Cartuxa e do Enoturismo Cartuxa. 

A insígnia traduz a identidade dos vinhos EA, Foral de Évora, Cartuxa, Scala Coeli e do mítico Pêra-Manca, bem como dos azeites Álamos, EA e Cartuxa Gourmet. 

Excelência, qualidade e individualidade - num estilo muito próprio que marca a diferença e define um clássico do Alentejo -, são estes os valores reconhecidos pelo público à marca Cartuxa. A força do nome e a associação positiva ao mesmo, faz com que quem experimente se torne automaticamente num leal consumidor. 

O vinho, o azeite e o projeto de Enoturismo Cartuxa, traduzem igualmente estes mesmos valores. A aposta da Fundação Eugénio de Almeida na criação de produtos de excelência tem sido reconhecida ao longo dos últimos anos com diversos prémios.

Name: Angostura Limited
Description: Angostura is one of the Caribbean's leading rum producers with a superb collection of rum brands and is the world's market leader for bitters. These include: rum brands like Angostura 1824, Angostura 1919, Angostura Single Barrel Reserve, White Oak, Forres Park Puncheon, Black Label, Royal Oak, Angostura Reserva, Angostura 5 year old, Angostura 7 year old rum and; the Angostura  aromatic bitters and a signature beverage Angostura Lemon Lime and Bitters. Angostura aromatic bitters is now celebrating 187 years since the first bottle was introduced to the world.

Name: JancisRobinson.com
Description:
Benefit from the advice of the world's most influential wine critic and her team of 15 experts around the world, including seven Masters of Wine.

Visit our our award-winning Purple Pages for full access to:

    - Sound, independent advice
   - Thousands of articles
   - Over 200,000 tasting notes
   - Informative Members' forum
   - World Atlas of Wine maps
   - Exclusive, online Oxford Companion to Wine

Name: Opus One Winery LLC
Description:
Opus One is the story of a shared dream of two great men of wine: Baron Philippe de Rothschild of Château Mouton Rothschild and renowned Napa Valley vintner Robert Mondavi. By combining the great winemaking traditions and innovations of both families, the founders’ singular goal was to create an exceptional wine in the heart of the Napa Valley.

Situated 60 miles north of San Francisco in the Oakville appellation, Opus One’s vineyards comprise 169 acres and are planted to the traditional grape varieties of Bordeaux: Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Cabernet Franc, Malbec and Petit Verdot. Offering about 25,000 twelve-bottle cases each year, the winery remains dedicated to uncompromised quality. Opus One’s sole purpose is to express the vision and passionate spirit of its founders for generations to come.

Name: Sogevinus Fine Wines, S.A.
Description:
We are leaders in Port wine in our own country, Portugal, and worldwide leaders in Colheitas, the noblest category of Tawny Port wine. Colheitas are single harvest Tawny Ports aged in oak barrels and bottled prior to release when they are ready for drinking.

Sogevinus Group is also increasingly recognised for the quality of its DOC Douro wines, an area it has invested in since 2006 and that now represents 1.2 million bottles per year. The DOC Douro wines we produce– made with the same care and standards as our Port wines – are gaining international recognition with critics and wine press the world over.

Our cellars offer the best Portuguese welcome to our many friends and clients. The Cálem cellars, are the most visited tourist destination in Vila Nova de Gaia with more than 300,000 visitors per year.

Name: Buffalo Trace Distillery
Description: Buffalo Trace Distillery is an online shop that provides clothing, body care, foods and drinks

Name: Havana Club
Description:
The Havana Club International S.A. joint venture was established in November 1993 by the Cuban company Cuba Ron S.A., responsible for rum production, and the French Pernod Ricard Group, with the goal of developing the Havana Club brand internationally via Pernod Ricard’s strong international distribution network.

Since 1994, Havana Club has been a priority brand for Pernod Ricard, and today it is one of the Group’s top 13 key spirits brands.

Since 2003, Havana Club International S.A. has also been in charge of the domestic distribution of the Havana Club brand in Cuba, along with key international brands from the Pernod Ricard portfolio.

In 2007, Havana Club International S.A. inaugurated its new rum distillery in San José to meet the increasing demand for aged rums.

Havana Club is the number three international rum brand in the world outside the US and the worldwide leader in super premium and above rums. Havana Club ranked twenty-second in the Impact Top 100 and reached 4.6 million cases in 2018.

The company is based in Havana and exports to over 120 countries, excluding the US, where Cuban products are banned due to the trade embargo.


www.havana-club.com

Name: CAMUS COGNAC
Description:
The leading family-owned and independent cognac house, the House of CAMUS has cultivated a passion for exceptional cognacs since 1863 with the singular ambition of helping others discover the infinite richness of its land.

Reaping the rewards of the innovative and strategic initiatives introduced in 2003 by the current President, Cyril Camus, the House of CAMUS is looking towards the future, more than ever, with strong values: the pursuit of excellence, the affirmation of a distinctive style, and the passing on of know-how. 

A true ambassador of the French “Art de vivre”, Camus sells distinctive, authentic and high quality products in nearly every country in the world. The group has successfully expanded its portfolio and has become the distributor and local retailer of a wide variety of acclaimed fine wines, champagnes and spirits. Camus Wines & Spirits offers an inspiring work environment with an international footprint. 

As our goal is to provide our clients with the means to enjoy the finest things in life we are dedicated to helping our people to achieve excellence, by emphasizing ethics, cohesion and fairness in our People development programs.

Name: Vinos Concha y Toro & DG México
Description:
“Vinos Concha y Toro & DG México”, un joint venture formado por Concha y Toro S.A. y Digrans S.A. quienes comenzaron a operar a partir del primer trimestre del 2012.
“VCT&DG México” nació bajo una división de Marketing y Ventas con dedicación exclusiva para el mercado mexicano, con el objetivo de invertir en el desarrollo de sus marcas y potenciar su presencia en todo el territorio a nivel nacional. 
Digrans, es una empresa Mexicana con más de 50 años de experiencia en las áreas de comercialización, distribución y logística de productos alimenticios y vinos con presencia a nivel nacional.
Viña Concha y Toro ocupa una destacada posición con Viñedos en Chile, Argentina y California. Posicionándose entre las compañías vitivinícolas más importantes nivel mundial con presencia en más de 135 países. 
Ha sido elegida por quinto año consecutivo como “La marca de vino más admirada del mundo” por Drink Business Magazine (UK).
Hoy el socio mexicano Digrans, integra al portafolio un vino de origen mexicano.

Name: Winc
Description: Winc is a modern winery with a direct connection to the consumer, building a portfolio of brands for the next generation of wine drinkers. After launching in 2011 with the goal of making discovering great wine easy, Winc continues to disrupt the $220BN wine industry. Driven by the vision of a great bottle on every table and a great story in every bottle, Winc seeks to create more custom experiences for its members and bring ease and exploration to the process of buying and enjoying wine. The company's unrivaled access to consumer insights has helped shape the development of iconic brands like Summer Water, the viral hit embodying the rosé state of mind, and Folly of the Beast, the supremely accessible Pinot Noir of uncompromising quality. In addition to its online subscription service, Winc’s sought-after brands are available in progressive restaurants and premium retailers nationwide.

Name: Oé
Description:
Oé est une entreprise à mission créatrice de produits et d'expériences pour prendre soin des gens et de la planète. Concrètement, on produit des vins, du champagne et des sodas botaniques (les Essences d'Oé). Tout ça est bio, B Corp et travaillé avec beaucoup d’authenticité. On est acteur du changement, dans le cadre d’un projet systémique où on travaille la circularité et la régénération.

Notre mission est de transformer l'agriculture, la consommation et l'entreprise au service du bien. On est pionnier du réemploi des bouteilles en France et on finance la transition agro-écologique dans le Domaine Oé et sur les vignobles des vignerons partenaires. C'est cette grande cohérence qui fait de nous une entreprise B Corp depuis 2017. 

Thomas Lemasle et Fx Henry ont cofondé l'entreprise fin 2015.
L'équipe compte 21 personnes en 2025. 

On vous partage ici toute l'aventure et on vous invite à embarquer avec nous :
en mouvement !

Name: PrimeDrinks
Description:
A Primedrinks é uma empresa familiar, com um núcleo acionista sólido, coeso e determinado a potenciar o crescimento sustentável. 
Temos um portfolio que abre “portas” e uma capacidade de influência relevante, com um papel ativo em todas as vertentes da indústria, incluindo a dinamização da responsabilidade social e da autorregulação. Somos uma equipa diferenciada, com uma gestão profissional, aliada a um grande conhecimento dos sectores em que operamos, do consumidor, da restauração e do mercado noturno, do retalho e do canal armazenista especializado. Temos uma capacidade financeira e de tesouraria determinantes no contexto atual e futuro.
 A nossa missão é fundamentalmente a prestação de um serviço de distribuição, promoção e marketing a empresas e marcas com potencial, nos sectores do vinhos e das bebidas  espirituosas. Privilegiamos inequivocamente a criação de valor. Temos solidificado a nossa liderança de forma continuada, e ampliado o nosso âmbito de atuação, num mercado em consolidação, e no qual nos pautamos por uma intervenção diferenciadora e com inúmeras sinergias – geográficas, regionais, de canais de distribuição e de marcas. A nossa inovação, coerência e rigor comerciais são fundamentais no mercado de hoje e do futuro.
Mais que tudo, estamos e trabalhamos para consumidores e clientes que se movimentam num ritmo de mudança continuada e acelerada, ao nível dos perfis, dos padrões e dos níveis de exigência - e isso é o que sabemos fazer melhor. É a nossa paixão.

Name: Foley Family Wines & Spirits
Description:
Established by Bill Foley in 1996, Foley Family Wines & Spirits (FFWS) is a portfolio of highly acclaimed wines and spirits from some of the world’s greatest estates. The company owns more than 25 wineries and distilleries, each with its distinct style, legacy, and approach to hospitality.
FFWS has expanded its portfolio significantly since its founding, now including such storied brands as Chalk Hill Estate Winery, Sebastiani, Roth, Banshee, Ferrari-Carano, Chateau St. Jean, and Lancaster in Sonoma County; Merus, Silverado, and Foley Johnson in Napa Valley; Lincourt, Firestone, and Foley Estates in Southern California; Chalone Vineyard in Monterey County; Four Graces and Acrobat in Oregon; and Three Rivers in Washington. Foley Family Wine & Spirits import wines include Lucien Albrecht in France, Nieto Senetiner in Argentina, and 14 wine brands spanning three of New Zealand’s most acclaimed winegrowing regions: Marlborough, Central Otago, and Martinborough. The growing global spirits portfolio includes Minden Mill Distilling, Charles Goodnight Texas Straight Bourbon Whiskey, New Zealand’s Lighthouse Gin, El Mexicano Tequila, The Loch Lomond Group in Scotland, Two Stacks Irish Whisky and Killowen.

Name: Douglas Laing & Co.
Description:
Established in 1948, Douglas Laing & Co is globally regarded as a leading independent Scotch Whisky Distiller, Blender and Bottler based in Glasgow, Scotland. The company has a premium, award-winning collection of brands that are enjoyed worldwide including Old Particular Single Casks, Provenance Single Malt and the King of Scots Blended Scotch Whisky. 

Our ever popular range of Regional Malts includes Big Peat Islay Malt, Scallywag Speyside Malt, Timorous Beastie Highland Malt and Rock Island Malt.

With over 75 years industry expertise and experience, this family-run company is now in its third generation of Laing’s at the helm and continues to specialise in unique and specialist craft Scotch Whiskies.

Our founder, Fred Douglas Laing, was a true entrepreneur and innovator and to this day, his spirit is still very much at the heart of everything we do. Today the company is headed up by Fred's son, also Fred, and his grand-daughter Cara. 

We blend (where appropriate) and bottle all our specialist, artisan Scotch Whisky with such care and devotion that we’ve earned ourselves an enviable reputation for style and taste, one which we continuously strive to enhance. 

Thus our goal is to build on this reputation and continue to exceed the expectations of our customers and end consumers around the world by offering the most innovative and hand-crafted premium Scotch Whiskies

You can also follow our progress and product updates on Facebook and Twitter.

https://www.facebook.com/douglaslaingwhisky

https://twitter.com/DLaingWhisky

Name: LAVINIA
Description:
LAVINIA was created in 1999 to introduce a revolutionary concept into the world of wine distribution: a space going beyond the traditional wine cellar as it approaches wine from a cultural perspective, focused on the end consumer, with a philosophy combining teaching, purchase experience and respect for wine.

In practice, LAVINIA has developed this idea in shops with a wide range of references - more than 6,500 - where design is created thinking of the wine: the temperature and humidity conditions, bottle exposure, lighting, etc., are coherent with a maximum respect for the product integrity.

https://www.lavinia.com

Name: ONEHOPE Wine
Description:
ONEHOPE is a Napa Valley winery built on hope and rooted in purpose. Every bottle of wine supports a meaningful cause with over $9M donated to date.

Produced by our head winemaker Mari Wells Coyle in collaboration with Robert Mondavi Jr. and some of the most acclaimed winemakers in the industry, ONEHOPE provides award-winning wine with a measurable social impact. 

Our commitment to high-quality wine is as important as our commitment to the causes we support. Through the sale of every bottle, ONEHOPE has donated $9 million+ to causes around the world. We’ve built a school in Guatemala, funded 19,000+ days of clinical trials for breast cancer research, planted a forest in Indonesia, provided 3 million+ meals for children in need, found 80,000+ pets a forever home, and delivered 190,000+ vaccines to end tropical diseases - and these are just to name a few.

Name: PRIMO APERITIVO
Description:
Check out our website on www.primoaperitivo.com

Range of Classic Italian Aperitivo cocktails,
Inspired by Italy's famed pre-dinner ritual of unwinding with a drink in hand and enjoying life's special moments, designed to deliver the best Aperitivo experience wherever you are.

Blend of unique ingredients specifically produced for us, using only natural ingredients and 100% renewable energy. 

Salute!

Name: Etiklass
Description:
Produciamo accessori, etichette in metallo, sughero, pendagli in vari tessuti e finiture esterne per il packaging di vino, birra e spirits.
Chiedici il tuo additional tag!
Hai un idea per il restyling? Per una nuova collezione? Forti di un'elevata esperienza nei settori moda e service siamo in grado di soddisfare qualsiasi progetto o idea per valorizzare il tuo prodotto!

Name: Château Les Rambauds
Description:
L'histoire commence en 1912 pour Château Les Rambauds et Château d'Auzanet. Mr Cazade Bernard viticulteur Artisan 
et ex sportif de haut niveau en compétition MOTO GRAND PRIX gère cette exploitation viticole de 75 HA situé dans l'entre 2 mers 
dans notre beau Sud-Ouest de la France. 

Le vignoble est réparti en vin biologique et reconversion en AOC Bordeaux, Bordeaux Supérieur et IGP Atlantique. 

La particularité de nos vins se distinguent avec l'utilisation des 
cépages suivant : SYRAH ; COT ; Malbec ; Merlot Noir ; Cabernet Sauvignon. 

La méthode de production repose sur la fabrication de vins originaux
 et authentiques se distinguant des standards des vins Bordelais.

La technique de vinification est aussi unique et valorisé par l'utilisation 
d'un système très performant de thermoflash qui consiste à une chauffe et refroidissement rapide de la vendange. 
Le but étant de pasteuriser et d'optimiser les extractions en limitant au maximum l'utilisation de sulfites.

Name: Aude Oenologie
Description:
Aude Œnologie vous conseille et vous propose son savoir-faire dans les domaines suivants:

- Le matériel vinicole et les services. Etude et réalisation des installations.
- Les consommables, les produits œnologiques et d'hygiène de cave.
- Le matériel d'embouteillage et de conditionnement du vin.
- Produits d'emballage et articles de chai.
- Pièces détachées, SAV toutes marques et livraison.
- Location et vente de matériels d'occasion

Name: Maison Beyerman
Description:
Founded in 1620, Beyerman is today the oldest trading house still in activity. For 4 centuries, we have been selling Bordeaux fine wines around the world, building strong bonds with the estates at the same time.
We distribute the most prestigious appellations from Bordeaux, both right bank (as Saint-Emilion, Pomerol) and left bank (Medoc). This is one of the finest offerings of 1855 Grands Crus Classés wines, across a broad selection of vintages. We use the expertise acquired over the centuries to discover new wines, all of them worthy representatives of the appellations of Bordeaux, other French areas, and wine regions from around the world.

Name: Maison Dutier
Description:
Maison Dutier combine boissons récréatives et chanvre pour des créations hautes en couleur.

Nous développons des boissons innovantes artisanales, biologique et 100% faites en France.

Name: Knightor Winery
Description:
Knightor is a working winery, wedding and events venue, nestled above St Austell Bay and a stones throw from the Eden Project. 
From our historic granite barns and 4 acres of Cornish hedgerows, pasture and orchard, we host feasts and celebrations in the best way we know - with only the finest local produce and superb award winning English wine.

Name: Distillerie Isle de France
Description:
La Distillerie d’Isle de France, c’est l’histoire d’une distillerie artisanale et créative, fondée
par trois amis hédonistes dans une ferme de Seine et Marne. C’est en 2016 que la distillerie
est créée, avec une idée simple : concevoir un produit à l’identité unique, en circuit court,
tout en privilégiant l’agriculture de conservation et le développement local.

Name: DUNAMIS PREMIUM SPIRITS
Description:
Dunamis Premium Spirits was forged from the lifelong pursuit of greatness by Founder, Victor Young. Born to humble beginnings, Young was reared to accomplish excellence in every enterprise. And so it was…Victor’s grand quest to create “Premium Spirits for Extraordinary People” led to the extraordinary creation of Dunamis, the highest level of greatness and grandeur.

*** YOU MUST BE 21 TO VISIT THIS PAGE ***

Name: Right Coast Brands
Description: We are bespoke beverage crafters, helping emerging brands reach their launch and expansion goals by providing retail-ready finished goods on a nanoscale.

Name: Highland Moon Ltd
Description:
Made from Scottish Honey 

Highland Moon Ltd was established in 2020.
Birthed on the banks of the Tay, this small moonshine business echoes 100 years of history. Taking influence from the 1920’s prohibition era, a time where British brewers were capitalising on the illegal trade across the Atlantic. The need for a good time and a strong drink in your hand was in high demand. A situation we are all too familiar with a century later. We aim to put a jar in everybody’s hand, eclipse the bad memories and look forward to the future.

Name: Di-Vine Cellars Maldives Pvt Ltd
Description:
Di-Vine Cellars is the indian sub-continent’s largest importers, distributors, stockists and marketers for fine and boutique wines, based in the Republic of Maldives.

Part of the Caerus Group, we are a family owned company, with a global wine portfolio carefully constructed over the last three decades of trading. 

For Maldives, we supply hotels and resorts locally from our bonded warehouse in Male airport with a total capacity of 2 million bottles.

Name: Milam & Greene
Description: Milam & Greene Whiskey is made by some of the world’s most experienced whiskey professionals, including CEO, master blender, and author, Heather Greene and 30-year veteran and master distiller, Marlene Holmes. The Milam & Greene team distills in Blanco, Texas on small 300- and 1,000-gallon pot stills as well as in Kentucky on classic column stills, using its proprietary yeast and grain recipes. Aging takes place in rickhouses located in four states in different casks for a variety of flavors resulting in the most thorough array of casks made and collected by any craft distiller. These casks become the ingredients from which its award-winning American whiskey range is batched to create perfection. Milam & Greene Whiskey believes in using the best people and ingredients to create delicious, award-winning whiskey for whiskey lovers. For more information visit milamandgreenewhiskey.com

Name: Azienda Agricola Cavalchina
Description: L'Azienda Agricola Cavalchina nasce agli inizi del secolo scorso con l'acquisizione del primo nucleo di vigneti, la cantina fu costruita successivamente ed in parte fu destinata a distilleria di vinaccia, impianto che rimase in attività fino al 1967.Il fatto storico più importante legato all'Azienda Agricola Cavalchina nell'ambito vitivinicolo è senz'altro l'invenzione del Custoza, nel senso che la Cavalchina nel 1962 fu la prima a chiamare Custoza il vino bianco della zona, ottenuto dai vitigni di Fernanda, Trebbiano e Garganega e a portare questo vino ad affermarsi nei mercati, allora più importanti, come Roma e Milano.

Name: Quinta da Sequeira
Description:
Quinta da Sequeira is a traditional family-owned estate located in Vila Nova de Foz Côa, in the Douro Superior Region. It was founded in 1899 and it remains in the same family until today. Its prime location gives unique qualities to the grapes, which lead to excellent wines! Everything is produced, aged and bottled on the estate, without external intervention. Just like the quality control which respects high standards of demands. The result of all of this is the unique taste and scent of all Quinta da Sequeira wines!

To know more about Quinta da Sequeira and its wines, please visit our website or contact us by phone or e-mail.


https://quintadasequeira.com/en/

+351 932 469 456
+351 937 465 756

geral@quintadasequeira.com 
mariotcardoso@quintadasequeira.com

Name: Vancouver International Wine Festival
Description:
The Vancouver International Wine Festival is Canada's premier food & wine event, and among the biggest, best and oldest wine events in the world. VanWineFest attracts some of the biggest industry names and is a rare opportunity to meet owners, winemakers and senior representatives from wineries around the globe.  It features wine tastings and pairings, gourmet dinners and luncheons, educational seminars and culinary competitions.
For either the experienced wine lover or the novice, the festival has something to please every palate and pocketbook.

 Vancouver International Wine Festival is a fundraiser for Bard on the Beach Theatre Society.

Name: Château d'Arsac
Description: Château d'Arsac is a vineyard based near Bordeaux, in Arsac, France

Name: World Wine Estates
Description:
World Wine Estates (WWE) is a wine importer and distributor that was established in 1988 as the import and wholesale arm of the Ultimo Wine Centre, Sydney’s famous premier wine retailer. WWE specialised in imported wines, especially French. The current owner and director, James Johnston, joined WWE in 1999. In 2005 by a mutual amicable agreement, WWE became a separate company to Ultimo Wine Centre.

Since 2005, James Johnston has continued to grow World Wine Estates and has added premium Australian and New Zealand agencies to its portfolio whilst maintaining the specialist French wine focus. All our wines are carefully chosen to ensure that we offer our customers high quality wines to suit every type of business: bars, pubs, restaurants, retailers…

World Wine Estates’ sales team and distribution now extends from New South Wales into Victoria, SA the ACT and Queensland. Direct contact details for your local representative can be found on our website.

Name: Origin Wines
Description:
Since 2006, Overhex Wines International has been a proudly South African, family-owned company. We offer smart, innovative solutions to global wine trends. Our wines are refined in taste and bold in presentation. We source grapes from carefully selected vineyards across the Cape Winelands. Our team creates and evolves new wine experiences – from our own collection to the brands that we craft for our buyers. We move beyond tradition to exceed modern expectations.

Quality is always our top priority. It’s this recipe for success that has delivered our wines to more than 45 countries all over the world. Our Balance range was not only the top-selling South African wine in China in 2018/19, but also the 3rd most favoured brand in Switzerland.

If we have proven anything during our time, it’s that nothing is impossible when it’s approached with passion, commitment and ingenuity and this is why we are now proudly one of the top 10 of exporters by volume, and the 5th largest exporter of bottled South African wine.

Name: Edwards Beers & Wine Supplies LTD
Description: Formed in the early 1980’s Edwards Beers & Wine Supplies have progressed from initially being a local supplier of beer and soft drinks into a regional wholesale drinks company offering a full portfolio of products to the licensed trade. Our range of products includes both national and regional brands that will enable your business to thrive together with regular promotional activity on a wide selection of popular products.

Name: Giuliani Vini
Description: Since an ancient family story in the wine field and from the passion for their work and traditions, the GIULIANI company continues its evolution aimed at enhancing the primitive DOC Gioia del Colle and other native vines for the production of quality wines.

Name: Corning & Company
Description: Corning & Company serves Brand Owners and Distiller Entrepreneurs in the incubation, launch and scaling of distilled spirits brands. Guided by a deep tradition in spirit that began more than 150 years ago, we support you in taking your vision to market.

Name: Tamayo & CIA
Description:
Nos dedicamos a la importación y distribución de productos de consumo masivo
100% 
+18 Bebe con moderación

Name: Ferro13
Description:
Ferro13 is an atypical winery, made by people linked by a strong passion for wine and creativity. Alberto, cosmopolitan, always smiling, great wine enthusiast, his mission the satisfaction of all our customers. Marco great expert in the production of quality wines, a staple. Gabriele Social Hipster for him wine is drunk only in company, and Alberto great wine culture and superfine palate, pure energy.
Every Ferro13 wine has a story and represents us and the excellence of Italian wine from Northern to Southern Italy.

Name: Quinta São Gião
Description:
[PT] Situada em Guimarães, a Quinta São Gião é uma propriedade familiar dedicada à produção de vinhos verdes desde 1972. A ligação à arte expressa nos nossos rótulos serve de inspiração à produção de vinhos verdes de reconhecida qualidade.

[EN] Located in Guimarães, Quinta São Gião is a family-run estate that has been producing white wines since 1972. The connection to art expressed in our labels inspires the production of white wines of recognised quality.

Description:
Alcohol Traditions (Ukrainian: Алкогольні Традиції) is a part of Bayadera holding. The company was reorganized in 2012 from National Alcohol Traditions and is responsible for marketing and PR functions for all of Bayadera brands manufactured in the Ukraine.

Name: Wijnhuis de Paap
Description:
Sfeervolle wijnwinkel in het hart van Papendrecht. 125 m2 aan wijnen uit heel de wereld en daarnaast bijzondere delicatessen en een cadeaushop met unieke (wijn/spijs) cadeau's.
Wijnhuis de Paap is sterk in het leveren van (huis)wijnen aan de horeca en het volledig verzorgen van luxe catering. Wij bezorgen onze wijnen in de Drechtsteden zonder bezorgkosten.

Name: E-WINES
Description:
E-wines is an online webshop for delicious gourmet wines! We like to take you on a journey, through vineyards in Europe and beyond. We bring you the story of grape varieties and viticulture, from the small winegrower to big producers and brands. 

With E-wines you get access to the world of gastronomic wines, carefully selected by wine experts and to be found on the wine list of your favourite restaurant. Taste the wine at the restaurant en order it directly in our webshop!

Name: Clovendoe Distilling Co.
Description: Clovendoe brings the craft and integrity of distilling to our range of non-alcoholic and low-alcohol distilled spirits. Infused with 21 unique botanicals, handcrafted and distilled small-batch on the Gold Coast.

Name: Ownroot Collective
Description:
The winemakers we feature are the backbone of the wine industry,
making and selling the wine you already love.
At wineries across America, people you will never meet are making the wines you love to drink. At each of these wineries there is someone who spends a hard-earned paycheck designing their own smaller wine brand.

These are the undiscovered superstars of the wine industry, with boots on the ground at some of the most popular and prestigious brands in the country. 

Ownroot Collective is a group of people driven by passion, curiosity, and devotion to the annual challenge of creating something delicious, complex and alive from these tiny little berries.

Name: COLESEL SPUMANTI SRL
Description:
Dal cuore del Cartizze una selezione speciale di spumanti Valdobbiadene, quella della famiglia Bortolin, da cinque generazioni coltivano e vivono in simbiosi con la vite prosecco sotto il marchio storico dell’azienda Colesel Spumanti.
Già dai primi freddi invernali iniziamo a prenderci cura delle nostre vigne di proprietà, 5 ettari lavorati all’interno del prestigioso cru Cartizze e 30 in Valdobbiadene Docg.
Nel corso dell’anno addetti specializzati sotto la cura del nostro enotecnico si prendono cura della materia prima a noi così preziosa, l’uva.
Ad estate inoltrata procediamo con la vendemmia, provvedendo a tutto il ciclo lavorativo, dalla raccolta fino alla presa di spuma ed imbottigliamento. 
La nostra azienda, Colesel,  lavora con le tecnologie più avanzate nel campo spumantistico, nel qual tempo con la più umile tradizione contadina che distingue questa nostra terra. 

Nel 2001 dalle nostre uve cartizze è nato il primo Cartizze in versione Brut, ed oggi rappresenta l’eccellenza dei nostri prodotti.
La varietà di prodotti sono 10, divisi tra Superiore di Cartizze, Valdobbiadene docg, Prosecco doc, Pavana Rosè e Cuvèe.

Name: Proper No. Twelve Irish Whiskey
Description: Proper No. Twelve’s Triple Distilled Irish Whiskey is an ultra-smooth blend of golden grain and single malt with hints of vanilla, honey and toasted wood for a rich complexity.

Name: RABOTVINS NV/SA
Description:
RABOTVINS is één van de belangrijkste Belgische bedrijven van wijnen en aperitieven. Vanuit Gent en in samenwerking met DE MOUR, haar vestiging in Margaux (Frankrijk), is Rabotvins zowel op de Belgische als op de buitenlandse markt actief. Daarbij wordt de totale productie van 5 eigen domeinen, gecommercialiseerd. Daarnaast verzekert Rabotvins de verdeling op exclusieve basis van meer dan 600 kwaliteitswijnen en alcoholen uit de meeste belangrijke wijnlanden en van een aantal aperitieven van eigen productie.
Wij zijn op zoek naar een:
COMMERCIEEL VERTEGENWOORDIGER in dienstverband of op zelfstandige basis (m/v)
Als verantwoordelijke voor uw sector staat u in voor het verder uitbouwen van de regio en dit door prospectie en actieve contacten met de klanten.
Profiel:
- affiniteit met wijnen
- ervaring vereist van de horeca in uw sector
- u bent commercieel, betrouwbaar, ambitieus, doorzetter
- woonachtig in de regio waar u werkzaam bent.


Bij interesse: info@rabotvins.com

RABOTVINS est une des sociétés belges les plus importantes dans le secteur vins et apéritifs. Depuis son siège à Gand et en collaboration avec G. De Mour & Fils, sa maison à Margaux (France), Rabotvins est actif aussi bien sur le marché belge qu’à l’export. La société commercialise la production de cinq propriétés et assure la distribution exclusive de plus de 600 vins et alcools de qualité de la plupart des pays producteurs et de ses propres marques d’apéritifs.

Nous recherchons :
DÉLÉGUÉ COMMERCIAL (m/f)
Fonction:
En tant que responsable du secteur, votre prospection ciblée vous permet d’étendre rapidement notre part de marché (restaurants, traiteurs, cavistes, entreprises…).
Profil :
- parfaitement bilingue
- passioné de vin
- expérience indispensable de la restauration dans votre secteur
- ambitieux et commercial
- vous habitez la région


Intéressés: info@rabotvins.com

Name: Foundations Marketing Group
Description: We provide turnkey U.S. market solutions for the global wine & spirits industry as we are your on-the-ground representation to press, trade & consumers. Foundations Marketing Group (FMG) is brand development agency providing integrated communications, strategic marketing solutions to the international CPG sector, with special emphasis on wines, spirits and luxury goods. Whether you are looking to go global or local, our New York based company offers comprehensive marketing strategies to help you succeed.  Located in the hub of media activity for the sector, we are well positioned to deliver your story to target journalists and key media outlets domestically or internationally.  As sales and marcom professionals with years of experience in multiple facets of the industry, we rely on personal relationships with leading writers, editors of trade and consumer publications. Our importer-wholesaler networks provide a nationwide, key-market footprint for brands.  We understand the growing competitive landscape and the demands of not only creating a great product but differentiating it from others in the market.  Given our industry knowledge and activities, we are able to contextualize your product among global competitors and guide you to success.

Name: bby6 Vinhos
Description:
Como profissionais atuantes há mais de 20 anos no mercado de vinhos, sabemos que bons vinhos chegam ao consumidor final com preços exorbitantes.

Acreditamos que bons vinhos podem ser vendidos a preços mais justos. Queremos que os consumidores tenham a possibilidade de trazer seus rótulos de qualquer parte do mundo sempre pelo melhor preço.

Como fazemos isso? Eliminamos intermediários, trabalhamos com conceito LOWCOST, não temos estoque e nem manuseio dos produtos. Os vinhos saem do produtor direto para os consumidores, permitindo que os vinhos cheguem com preços até 70% mais baratos em comparação aos canais tradicionais.

Com a bby6 você bebe vinhos melhores, pagando menos.

Name: Gialdi vini SA
Description: Gialdi vini SA is a wine and spirits company based out of Switzerland.

Name: Biodyvino
Description:
Biodyvino is a pioneer and expert in organic, biodynamic and natural wine import in Belgium. As an importer we work under organic certification, which means all of our wines are labelled organic and/or biodynamic. Life isn't fair, but our wine is!

Our company is driven by social and environmental values. Biodyvino started to import organic wines in 1993, long before organic became a trend.

We have a clear mission: ‘Excel in what we do, in harmony with our environment’. 

Our infrastructure, suppliers, distribution network, and work procedures are carefully monitored in order to achieve our goals.

www.biodyvino.be

Name: VAAR Merchants
Description: The aim of Vaar is to connect and establish trade between producers of Wine & Spirits and international Importers and Distributors. Whether you are an importer looking for some of the best wine &spirits brands or a producer looking to establish your brand globally, contact us. www.vaar.co.za

Name: BELTION S.R.L.
Description: Produzione di latte di mandorla, liquori, estratti per liquori e sciroppi.

Name: Cellar Angels
Description:
Thanks for stopping by Cellar Angels Linkedin page. After 13 years of promoting the most amazing artisan wineries from the world famous Napa and Sonoma wine regions, the Angels have retired their wings. We still encourage you and all wine lovers to buy direct from the small wineries, as it's the best way to ensure not only their success, but their very existence. If you need to reach a member of our retired team, please contact us at customercare@cellarangels.com .

COMPANY DESCRIPTION:

Cellar Angels is an online marketplace and wine club that connects wine lovers with the most unique, exciting, and totally under-the-radar wines coming out of the famous Napa and Sonoma wine regions. We solely showcase rare and little-known wines from Wine Country’s most talented limited-batch winemakers. Browse the Cellar Angels online marketplace or join the wine club for the very latest treasures and trophies, delivered directly to your door. 

Start Something New. Register for our free weekly virtual event - SIP Wine Tasting & Education and join us as we learn from industry professionals and winemakers. 

This is Wine Country: Undiscovered!

Name: BATTIFARANO VINI
Description:
Siamo un’azienda agricola della piana del metapontino, con una storia aziendale ininterrotta di 500 anni. La Masseria Battifarano appartiene alla famiglia da più di cinque secoli durante i quali si è sempre coltivata la terra. Prima per l’autosussistenza, poi come azienda e oggi anche per raccontare attraverso il vino millenni di storia dell’Enotria. 
Le tenute, con un’estensione totale di circa 100ettari, destinati a vigneti, oliveti e frutteti, si trovano sulla costa ionica della Basilicata, la terra conosciuta nell’antica Grecia come “Enotria” con riferimento alle “persone della terra dei vigneti - Οἰνωτρία. 
 
La nostra produzione esprime un interessante mix tra il territorio e i più rinomati vitigni internazionali, combinando vitigni locali quali Primitivo e Greco con vitigni internazionali quali Chardonnay, Merlot, Cabernet Sauvignon. Spaziamo infatti dai vigorosi rossi fatti dal Primitivo, a rossi e rosè più amabili, fino a dei bianchi fruttati e freschi.

Name: Bodegas Monte la Reina
Description: Monte La Reina is a modern and exclusive wine tourism estate managed by a multidisciplinary team whose objective is to make the world of wine known through different approaches, but with a single common objective: that each client enjoy a unique experience. In Monte la Reina there are a thousand plans to enjoy, alone or accompanied, the best wine tourism activities. From take a walk through our vineyards, visiting the winery and tasting our DO Toro wines, staying in our 19th century castle that now is our Boutique Hotel, to celebrating your wedding or any event in our different spaces. Come and discover that wine is the best partner for your most special moments.

Name: International Cool Climate Wine Show
Description:
The ICCWS is recognised as the Southern Hemispheres foremost show for inspirational cool climate wines. Many of them are from smaller vineyards where grapes are handpicked and wines handcrafted by winemakers with a passion for exploring terroir and the true expression of the grape.
Each year the ICCWS attracts more than 700 wines from around the world, in 36 competition classes, including sparkling wines, Chardonnay, Sauvignon Blanc, Pinot Gris, Riesling, Pinot Noir and Shiraz. The wines are judged by highly credentialed and experienced judges.
We have introduced a trophy for the best organic / bio dynamic wine, as we have had keen interest, worldwide, for this method of production, to be judged in association with the other classes.
The wines are assessed by a team of experienced and highly credentialed panel of judges, currently working within the industry, from both Australia and overseas.
For winemakers, this is an opportunity to benchmark in a show where "like is judged against like"; where elegant wines with restrained fruit are seen at their best; and where diversity is encouraged and rewarded.
For fine wine retailers, restaurateurs, sommeliers, wine writers, wine media, wine educators, wine students and wine enthusiasts, here is an opportunity to taste an extraordinary breadth and depth of cool climate wines, which gives great exposure and opportunities for marketing and promotion, of the wines entered.
2021 International Cool Climate Wine Show has been postponed to 2022.
Due to the ever changing nature of restrictions for public events, with judges not able to come from overseas, possible issues with interstate judges requiring quarantine without warning, and possible delivery / shipping issues for wineries, it was the decision of the ICCWS Inc Committee of Management, that it was better to be safe than sorry, and postpone the 2021 event.
Planning for 2022 is well under way and we are looking forward to seeing everyone in May 2022.

Name: The Grange
Description: In 2011, overlooking the crystal-clear waters of the River Itchen, fifty-two thousand vines and ten years later we have now created the finest Award winning English sparkling wine, on land beloved by the family for generations.

Name: Gesthuizen Wijnen

Heerlijke wijnen | Wijncursussen | Proefboxen | Relatiegeschenken | Dinerbox met Wijnspijs tips | Wijnproeverijen
