Today we are famous for some our Top limited edition Cru from Domini Veneti collection www.dominiventi.it and for the best performing wines in Off Trade market like Appasimento and Ripasso.

Name: Silverado Vineyards
Description:
*By following this page, you represent that you are 21 years of age or older.* 

Nestled in the hills on the northwest side of the Stags Leap District, Silverado Vineyards winery has been a favorite wine country destination and home to some of the Napa Valley's most-recognized wines for over 40 years.

Name: Le Macchiole
Description: Le Macchiole is a winery that sells wines and spirits.

Name: Cave Saint-Desirat
Description:
La cave de Saint-Desirat réunit les caveaux de Saint-Desirat et de Sarras. Sur notre site, vous pourrez découvrir et acheter en ligne nos vins AOC saint joseph.
Depuis 1960, nous sommes situés sur les terrasses qui bordent la rive droite du Rhône, dans l’AOP Saint-Joseph.
Au plaisir de vous accueillir très prochainement !

Name: Cambridge Wine Merchants
Description: A major independent shipper, wholesaler and merchant of fine wines and spirits.

Name: Lynmar Estate
Description:
Where family values & eco-friendly practices meet the genius grape growing region of the Russian River Valley. 

Located in the heart of Russian River Valley, Lynmar Estate is a preeminent producer of Pinot Noir and Chardonnay wines. Resident proprietors Lynn and Anisya Fritz are intimately woven into daily operations, sharing overarching values of sustainability, world-class winemaking, locally sourced food, and community. Always more than the sum of its parts, Lynmar Estate is comprised of four touchstone vineyard parcels in Russian River Valley, beginning with Quail Hill Vineyard established by the family in 1980.

Name: William Fèvre
Description: Le Domaine William Fèvre, plus grand propriétaire de Grands Crus, s’étend sur 78 hectares soit 90 parcelles distinctes en plein cœur du vignoble chablisien. Depuis près de 20 ans, le Domaine est engagé dans une démarche environnementale forte. Certifiée HVE3 depuis 2014, la majorité du vignoble est exploitée en biodynamie.

Name: Cincinnato Wines
Description: Nestled on the slopes of Cori, Cantina Cincinnato was established in 1947. Today, it stands as a leading winery in the Lazio region, thanks to its significant research efforts and a rigorous quality project focused on indigenous grape varieties: Nero Buono, Bellone, Malvasia Puntinata, Cesanese, and Greco.

Name: Cantina Il Poggio
Description: Riscopriamo vinificazioni antiche e l’arte originaria del trasformare l’uva in vino, pura da preconcetti e sofisticazioni, parte della nostra cultura e del nostro essere italiani. Portiamo tutto questo direttamente al futuro attraverso l’enologia d’avanguardia, usando le mani e la passione tra cantina e vigneto.

Name: Sofia Wine Walk
Description: Sommelier guided wine walking tours in Sofia, Bulgaria. Tastings of Bulgarian wines from indigenous grapes made of small, boutique wineries in limited editions.

Name: Matchbook Wine Company
Description: East of Napa, Left of Center: Matchbook Wine Company is a winery with 1600 acres of estate vineyards tucked away in Northern California's gently rolling Dunnigan Hills.  Family owned and operated by the Giguiere family, Matchbook produces a unique family of wines that showcase the flavor and potential of the Dunnigan Hills.  The Matchbook flame is an homage to the Giguiere brothers’ youthful fascination with fire.  The Giguiere family pioneered grape growing in this region in 1981 when they planted their first vineyard.  By 1993, the Giguieres had succeeded in making the Dunnigan Hills a nationally recognized American Viticultural Area. Over 35 years ago, the Giguieres started as a small family owned winery and vineyard and grew it into a 750,000 case winery producing noted brands like RH Philips and Toasted Head.  In 2004, the Giguieres retired from RH Philips to start Matchbook Wine Company.  For more information, please visit www.matchbookwines.com.

Name: Love Cork Screw
Description:
LCS Entertainment, Inc. is a WBENC-certified wine and lifestyle company delivering exceptional experiences through wine, entertainment, and curated products. Our flagship brand, Love Cork Screw, offers a diverse line of wine varietals designed to delight both sophisticated and novice wine enthusiasts. Each bottle is vibrant, whimsical, and fun, reflecting our commitment to making wine approachable and memorable.

We are excited to introduce our newest line, The Lampley Wine, expanding our collection with premium offerings that combine elegance, depth, and craftsmanship for a truly elevated experience.

Our products and experiences engage all five senses — from the taste and aroma of carefully selected grapes to the tactile and visual appeal of our bottles. Sourced from premier vineyards, our wines are crafted for complexity, balance, and flavor intensity, making them a favorite choice for a wide range of occasions.

Name: Applejack Wine & Spirits
Description: Applejack has the best selection and largest variety of wine, beer, and spirits at the lowest possible prices.  We specialize in fine wines, craft beers, and premium spirits.  Since 1961 we have been serving Denver and surrounding counties offering unsurpassed customer service.   With over 100,000 square feet of retail space presenting over 17,000 different products, there is absolutely no comparison.  Customers can purchase in-store, online, or over the phone and can request delivery to several Colorado mountain communities and any state that allows liquor shipments.  Our experienced party planners can save you time and money by suggesting beverages and organizing the bar for your event. Stop by Applejack and let us show you why we are the best.

Name: Cuvée 3000 S.L.
Description:
Cuvée 3000 es una empresa dedicada a la compra en origen y posterior distribución de vinos nacionales y extranjeros, con vocación de servicio y pedagogía.
Misión
"Somos una organización con vocación de servicio. En nuestra cartera de clientes se incluyen los centros gastronómicos, sommeliers y tiendas especializadas de mayor reconocimiento.
Nuestra identidad cultural es la del vino, por eso cuidamos también a nuestros proveedores con riguroso respeto a su personalidad, recogiendo sus vinos siempre en origen y climatizando su almacenaje y transporte hasta llegar a su destino.
Distribuimos vinos principalmente de la vieja europa, donde hemos sabido encontar más diversidad de intenciones."
Joan Valencia
Descripción de la empresa
Cuvée 3000 es una empresa dedicada a la compra en origen y posterior distribución de vinos nacionales y extranjeros. Dispone oficinas en Madrid, Valencia y Barcelona, así como una red de distribuidores en el resto de provincias españolas, y desde sus inicios está dirigida por la misma persona.

Name: Yousef Haddad Co & Partners
Description:
Yousef M. Haddad Company & Partners began as the sole distributor and agent for its mother company, Eagle Distilleries in 1973. In later years it also added imported products to its portfolio.

Today, YHC is the largest importer and distributor of alcoholic beverage in Jordan

Name: CHOZAS CARRASCAL
Description:
Chozas Carrascal, es una apuesta decidida por crear vinos de pago al más alto nivel internacional con un marcado acento mediterráneo. 

CHOZAS CARRASCAL is a family winery, and 1 of the 15 wineries in Spain with its own appellation, which is to say: "Vino de PAGO"(Pago Wine).

We produce excelent ecological wines with a strong personality, paying attention to our autochthonous grape: BOBAL.
Being "Vino de Pago"certifies  the uniqueness of a vineyard's soil and microclimate, making it exclusive and differentiated from surrounding sites, producing single estate wines with distinguishing and exceptional features."Pago" is the highest established category for Spanish wine.

Name: Viña Las Niñas
Description:
Viña Las Niñas ubicada en Apalta, valle de Colchagua fue fundada por familias francesas en 1996. Con 160 hectáreas y varios reconocimientos, produce -de la mano de un comprometido y excepcional equipo- vinos de alta gama para el mercado nacional y extranjero. Dentro de su portafolio, una completa línea de orgánicos.
Abierta al turismo, tiene programas guiados y zonas de picnic ubicados dentro de los viñedos.
Casona Patronal para directorios, Parques para convenciones, eventos y matrimonios.

Name: MAENNERHOBBY Brennerei
Description: MAENNERHOBBY Brennerei: Echte Manufakturspirituosen, über hundertfach prämiert!  Premium- und Private-Label-Produkte.

Name: Fazio Wines - Casa Vinicola in Erice
Description:
La storia dell'Azienda Fazio racconta di una famiglia che da quattro generazioni interpreta con passione e dedizione l'arte della viticoltura e della vinificazione.
Girolamo e Vincenzo Fazio, insieme all'enologo Giacomo Ansaldi,  sono gli artefici della trasformazione della proprietà di famiglia in una moderna ed efficiente azienda vinicola ubicata nel comune di Erice nel quadrante nord occidentale della provincia di Trapani.
Fazio crede nel rispetto del territorio, punta sull'eccellenza delle proprie uve, investe nella professionalità delle risorse umane. E' caratterizzata da uno  stile che coniuga da sempre tradizione e innovazione. 
La sua azione è stata determinante nell'ottenere il riconoscimento della D.O.C. Erice che rafforza il legame tra produzione e un territorio dalle caratteristiche geologiche e climatiche uniche.

The history of our family business goes through four generations that have practiced viticulture
and winemaking with passion and dedication.
Girolamo and Vincenzo Fazio, with wine maker Giacomo Ansaldi,  have turned the family business into a modern and effective winery in the surroundings of Erice, in the north-western Trapani area.
Fazio believes in respecting the territory, focusing on their own grapes, and investing in the professional of human resources. And 'characterized by a style that brings together tradition and innovation.
The Fazio Family has played a key role to obtain legal recognition of the Erice DOC certification,
which strengthens the relationship between production and a land having unique
geological and climatic characteristics. DOC means ‘controlled denomination of origin’, and
it is a quality assurance label for some Italian food products, which certifies that a particular
product originates from a specific region.

Name: MAISON JOLLIOT PAULIN
Description:
Négociant en vins fins, et grands crus classés, acteur incontournable de la région bordelaise depuis plus de 150 ans, nos vins sont sélectionnés parmi les meilleurs crus bordelais. Nous proposons à notre clientèle de particuliers, restaurateurs, cavistes, grossistes, une large gamme vins , rouges, blancs secs, liquoreux, de grands noms de Champagnes, ainsi que des rosés pour vos plus beaux étés. 
Nos vins, “mis en bouteilles au château”, sont stockés dans nos chais bioclimatiques, plus que centenaires, ce qui leur confère une conservation d’excellence !
C’est donc dans nos chais à Margaux , que 2 à 3 fois dans l’année, nous invitons nos clients pour des ventes / dégustations privées. Ainsi pour quelques heures, ils voyagent à travers le temps et se laissent emporter par l’art de la dégustation.
Nous restons à votre écoute pour toute information complémentaire sur nos vins. n'hésitez pas à nous contacter !

Name: Wine & Beer Supply, LLC
Description: Wine and Beer Supply provides creative solutions to the challenges faced by the winery, brewery and cidery industries. We pride ourselves in building value for our clients and customers, helping them to save time and money. Our products include bottles, tasting glasses, carriers, shippers, corks, vineyard supplies and other products used by craft beverage producers with a focus on the eastern half of the United States. We work hard to reduce operating costs for wineries and breweries in order to improve the profitability and growth of their businesses and the industry as a whole.

Name: Votto Vines Importing Inc.
Description: We are a wine importer and wholesaler focusing on both small production Italian varietals as well as national music brands such as AC/DC and BB King.  We self- distribute in CT and we utilize a network of distributors in other states to sell our wine.

Name: Brasserie MaltCo
Description: Microbrasserie située à Québec. Nos bières sont distribuées dans près de 1000 points de vente en province. Bières accessibles brassées dans une usine à la fine pointe de la technologie.

Name: Brasserie Guihery - La Côale & Griffe Brewing
Description: Microbrasserie indépendante en Anjou

Name: Vinoteca S.A
Description:
Empresa de Comércio e Distribuição de vinhos e bebidas espirituosas na zona norte de Portugal desde 1986. 

Começou como uma loja de vinhos no Largo São Domingos, que hoje se encontra na Rua Mouzinho da Silveira (Vinoteca de Copo & Alma), onde encontra uma grande selecção de vinhos portugueses e bebidas espirituosas. Neste espaço temos também um wine bar com vinho a copo e alguns petiscos além de provas de vinhos regulares.
Em 2001 abriu o Cash & Carry na Maia, de onde diariamente é feita a distribuição para restauração e hotelaria.

Podem encontrar-nos também no Mercado do Bom Sucesso (Vinoteca Bom Sucesso), com duas bancas de vinho a copo.

Name: Moreau Œnologie Conseils & Analyses
Description:
Sous l’impulsion du fondateur Thierry Moreau, Moreau Œnologie Conseils a été fondée sur 3 piliers :

Ecoute, Expertise, Fiabilité

Là où la concurrence mondiale impose qualité et excellence, le hasard n’a pas sa place.

Conscient des réalités économiques et des exigences des marchés, nous proposons un suivi analytique rigoureux, des conseils œnologiques sur-mesure et des produits œnologiques adaptés aux problématiques du vinificateur et de son encépagement.

Dans cette optique, nous travaillons de telles sortes à créer des vins à votre image, reflétant votre personnalité et celle de votre terroir. A cette fin, nous mobilisons notre fond commun d’expériences, de connaissances, de méthodes et d’outils issus de nos collaborateurs et partenaires.

Depuis 2015, la nouvelle génération menée par Sarah Moreau fait évoluer sa philosophie vers une approche globale alliant viticulture et œnologie, centrée sur le respect de l’environnement. 

S’il y a quelques années encore certains professionnels restaient dubitatifs face au réchauffement climatique, aujourd’hui, toute la profession a pris conscience du phénomène.

Par conséquent, nos conseils évoluent et s’adaptent pour répondre à toutes viticultures : traditionnelle, raisonnée, intégrée, biologique ou encore biodynamique.

Champs de compétences :

- Analyses : classiques, export, fines
- Conseils pluri-agricultures
- Produits œnologiques
- Filtration sur-mesure

4 laboratoires :

- Chablis
- Nuits-Saint-Georges
- Meursault
- Chassey-le-Camp

Une question sur la micro-oxygénation ? A la recherche d’un point de vue extérieur et neutre sur la dégustation d’un vin ? Ou un doute sur une cuvée potentiellement « Brett » ?

Nous sommes là pour vous.

Name: Shadybrook Estate Winery
Description:
Shadybrook Estate Winery at the historic Rapp Ranch property offers an enchanting experience that blends best-in-class vineyard management techniques, an emphasis on small-lot wine production and the rustic elegance of our equestrian heritage. Our estate is a sanctuary for wine enthusiasts and horse lovers alike, where every moment is crafted to inspire and delight.

The story of Shadybrook Estate is a testament to Alice and David Alkosser’s enduring passion for the land and their deep love for fine estate wines. Their journey began with a profound appreciation for wine and a commitment to understanding its roots. After traveling the globe and exploring various wine-producing regions, they found their hearts drawn to the allure of Napa Valley in 2005.

The need for a dedicated space to nurture production led the Alkossers to purchase the historic Rapp Quarter Horse Ranch in February 2016. Located in the heart of Coombsville, this hidden treasure boasted a state-of-the-art winery, an indoor tasting room, a commercial kitchen, and a luxurious 4,000-square-foot outdoor tasting patio. Overlooking 12 acres of premium vineyard, it was the ideal home for Shadybrook Estate Winery.

Name: Liberation de Paris Wines
Description:
Liberation de Paris was created after the meeting of two families, the Delaunay and the Bonneté, who fell into a wonderful friendship when they met for the first time at a fundraising event in Houston. Back in 2014, Nathalie and Jean-Francois Bonneté were organizing a fundraiser for children and adults with special needs, specifically with Down syndrome. It was a major event made alongside Spec’s, a well-known wine and spirit retailer in Texas as well as a French foundation, which leads in adults and children with down syndrome.

Included in the delegation from France that came to support this event was the person responsible for providing the amazing Grand Cru wines from Burgundy that were to be auctioned off: Laurent Delaunay. Laurent and Jean-Francois instantly developed a very strong connection and realized they had the same vision when it came to wine, winemaking and where French wines needed to evolve to in the US market. That day, both couples decided to partner up and work together to execute this common vision.

Name: VIGNOBLES BOUDAT-CIGANA
Description:
Les Vignobles BOUDAT-CIGANA sont répartis sur 3 propriétés au Sud de Bordeaux : Graves, Entre-deux-Mers et Sainte-Croix-du-Mont. 

Depuis plus de 5 générations, notre famille a su développer l'exploitation et produit, aujourd'hui, des vins rouge, blanc et rosé sur une dizaine d'appellations différentes.
 
Récompensés chaque année, nos vins reflètent notre savoir-faire et notre travail quotidien dans le respect de l'environnement.

Name: Maurice Richard GmbH
Description: Maurice Richard GmbH is a producer and distributor of Swiss premium spirits. We also distribute specially selected add-on and health products.

Name: Bordiga 1888
Description:
La scelta di Cuneo e dettata da fattori ovviamente sentimentali, è il capoluogo d’origine dei Bordiga, ma è anche e soprattutto la sua posizione geografica che giocano un ruolo di rilievo nella scelta della sede:
Cuneo è alle porte della Terra di Langa da dove provengono gli ottimi e ben conosciuti vini del Piemonte (tra i quali i rinomati Barolo e Barbaresco), ed è ai piedi delle vallate Alpine dove spontaneamente crescono erbe officinali che grazie alla vicinanza del mare Mediterraneo sono particolarmente ricche di oli essenziali. Vino, erbe officinali e pregiate spezie d’oriente costituiscono la base del Vermouth di Torino, il prodotto con cui nasce la Bordiga. Negli anni la Bordiga cresce e soprattutto grazie alla genuinità ed alla qualità dei sui prodotti diventa il punto di riferimento oltre che per i Vermouth, anche per i liquori ed i distillati, sopratutto quelli alpini, ma non solo; agli inizi del 900 negli alambicchi della Bordiga viene prodotto un distillato di ginepro che nulla invidia ancora oggi ai gin più conosciuti al mondo. I secoli passano, i tempi cambiano, la grande crisi degli anni venti ma soprattutto il secondo dopo guerra vedono grandi cambiamenti; anche la produzione in genere degli opifici liquoristici risente di questi cambiamenti. Ormai grazie anche alla sintesi e alla produzione di aromi artificiali si possono produrre alti quantitativi a prezzi economici, ovviamente di qualità mediocre se non addirittura bassa. I piccoli artigiani soffrono di questa nuova situazione: o si trasformano e diventano delle enormi realtà industriali o sono poco a poco destinati a chiudere. Bordiga non si adatta a questa evoluzione, la produzione resta quella delle origini, la difficoltà è enorme (testimoniano le innumerevoli chiusure di noti marchi) ma non vengono tradite la filosofia e la qualità che animavano il fondatore. Pur con norme difficoltà si continua a produrre sempre partendo da materie prime selezionate e di qualità.

Name: Paulk Vineyards
Description:
We are America’s #muscadine #vineyard, helping you find our #georgiagrown #muscadines, #berries & #wine so you can enjoy a full life.

Paulk Vineyards was started by Jacob W. Paulk, Sr. in 1970. From the first 5 acres he planted, we now grow over 800 acres of muscadines and are the largest grower of muscadines in the world. We are best known for supplying the fresh fruit industry with muscadines every August and September.

Today, we are also the genuine, estate-bottled, Georgia Grown family of wine. We offer 20 wines that range from semi-dry to sweet. Our wines are currently distributed throughout Georgia and expanding into other regions.

Name: Iconic Wineries of British Columbia
Description:
Iconic Wineries of British Columbia is a carefully curated collection of the region’s finest wineries, each a means to discover the diverse microclimates of the Okanagan Valley.

The Iconic Collection provides an educational portal for anyone interested in discovering more about British Columbian or Canadian wines.

Name: Abacchus
Description:
L'offre de formation autour du vin est très peu digitalisée. Beaucoup de bouquins, quelques cours d'initiation à l'oenologie, ... un peu de blog... la progression pour apprendre les bases se fait assez lentement au hasard. 
Abacchus s'est donné comme mission d'accompagner les personnes qui veulent comprendre un peu mieux ce qu'ils ont dans le verre, sans abandonner le côté hédoniste : pour beaucoup, apprendre le vin doit rester ludique sans recherche de diplôme !
Avec Abacchus une personne peut donc apprendre à son rythme :
 la théorie grâce au Quizz et à la Base de données Encyclopédique de l'Appli mobile (2700 questions, le plus gros Quizz sur le vin), 
 la pratique grâce aux  coffrets dégustations thématiques ou les coffrets par abonnement (box)  : équilibre des vins, régions, cépages, accords mets-vins, etc. il y a forcément un thème à apprendre. 
Les box à recevoir chez soi pendant 3 ou 6 mois sont de véritables programmes de formation au vin, à faire chez soi, avec des vins sélectionnés par notre caviste-sommelier, hors de question d'enlever la notion plaisir !

Name: Cantine MIALI
Description:
4th generation of wine producers, proudly established in Puglia in 1886.
a Family, a History, a Passion.

Name: Cantina Mazzarosa Devincenzi
Description:
Every day we put passion, care, and expertise into our work, like the real craftsmen: our products are the result of daily dedication, and a tradition started over 150 years ago and passed on from father to son. 

Our wines are produced exclusively with the grapes cultivated and harvested on the estate’s properties. Each phase of the production is followed and taken care of with accuracy and attention.

Name: Tequila Enemigo
Description: Tequila Enemigo is redefining the world of ultra-premium Tequila with its award-winning expressions crafted in the heart of Jalisco, Mexico. Brought to life in 2017 by Robin Clough, Sebastian Gonzalez, and Max Davies-Gilbert, the trio set out to change the status quo of Premium Tequila. Bringing together traditional Mexican craftsmanship with European luxury, and made with 100% of the finest Blue Weber Agave and filtered mineral-rich water of the Volcán de Tequila, Enemigo has garnered international acclaim with over 60 global awards. The brand’s incredible momentum, including its 2023 acquisition by MadaLuxe Group, one of the largest luxury companies in America, has secured their position in top venues worldwide - from Mexico City to London, New York to Dubai, Los Angeles to Milan - offering sippers a refined, additive-free experience that sets a new industry standard.

Name: Executive Bev
Description:
Executive Bev is a wine sales and marketing company that represents a portfolio of products designed to capitalize on the latest consumer trends. Our wines are sourced from a network of small to mid-sized wineries that are located around the world. This allows us to offer a suite of products that connect with wine enthusiasts spanning multiple generations, geographies, and price points – while never sacrificing quality or value.

https://linktr.ee/ExecutiveBev

Name: L'Avenir Wine Estate
Description:
Proudly South African with a touch of French flair. 
Owned by the French leader of terroir wines, AdVini. 
Tasting Room open 7 days a week.
We are based in R44 Klapmuts Rd, Stellenbosch.


Fièrement Sud-Africain avec un style français. 
L'Avenir fait parti du groupe de vin français AdVini. 
Notre salle de dégustation est ouverte 7 jours par semaine. 
Nous sommes basé à R44 Klapmuts Rd, Stellenbosch.

Name: Mielżyński Sp. z o.o.
Description: Since 2004, we have been importing wines from all over the world to Poland. In addition, we offer spirits (cognac, whisk(e)y, grappa), fortified wines (sherry and port), gastronomic specialities (such as olive oil and balsamic vinegar) and top-quality wine accessories. Each store is run by a team of specialists ready to share their experience and give you professional advice.

Name: Ice Tropez
Description:
Created in 2005 by Grégoire Chaix, Ice Tropez is the signature cocktail of Saint-Tropez that distils the taste of summer all year long. 

Delicately sparkling, with fruity and sweet notes, the perfect recipe seduces a clientele always in search of something new. 

This refreshing drink, based on wine and aromas of white peach and red fruits, embodies the crisp and sweetness of the south, all in an original 27.5cl bottle with a contemporary design. 

A thirst-quenching experience that, since 2009, can also be enjoyed by non-alcohol drinkers, with the Ice Tropez 0% version. A fruity soft drink, which comes in the same bottle and diffuses fresh and subtle aromas. 

Ice Tropez has conquered hearts across the globe. Today, this beverage from Saint-Tropez is enjoyed in more than 35 countries and will continue to delighting them thanks to the launch of a new flavour as well as a new format. 

Indeed, from the beginning of 2022, Ice Tropez bottle is available, in a one litre format (for the original version and the 0% alcohol). 

Moreover, A new flavour comes spice things up. A tropical version with a more pronounced character. Ice Tropez Ginger is the new cocktail made from our wine, infused with ginger, spices, citric, and exotic notes. Only available with 6.5% alcohol, for the moment

Name: Franz Wilhelm Langguth Erben
Description:
Seit sieben Generationen lebt und arbeitet die Familie Langguth in der Welt des Weins. Neue Rebsorten, neue Techniken, ein globalisierter Markt und neue Weine - die Entwicklung und der Erhalt der Stellung von Langguth als ein Erzeuger von Spitzenweinen für den Weltmarkt hat eine mehr als 200 Jahre andauernde Tradition. Mit einem Absatz von mehr als 50 Millionen Flaschen pro Jahr haben Verbraucher aus aller Welt ihre Anerkennung für die ausgezeichnete Qualität des gesamten Weinangebotes zum Ausdruck gebracht.
Heute ist die Weinkellerei Franz Wilhelm Langguth Erben fest im Herzen Europas verankert und bietet neben Weinen aus den eigenen Mosel Steillagen auch Sorten aus berühmten Weinanbauregionen Deutschlands und der Welt an.

Besuchen Sie uns: http://www.langguth.de/

Name: Domaine Puech
Description:
Vigneron indépendant depuis 5 générations sur le village de Saint Clément de Rivière, à seulement 10km au nord de Montpellier, nous travaillons avec passion nos cuvées dans le plus grand respect de notre terroir.
Privilégiez le circuit court en venant chez votre vigneron de proximité, au cœur du village. Ainsi protégez le paysage de vignobles qui valorise notre cadre de vie.
Un grand choix de vins pour satisfaire vos envies : Rouge, Rosé et Blanc en AOP Languedoc ou Grés de Montpellier pour des envies de vins faciles et plaisants et des assemblages plus recherchés pour vous offrir des cuvées plus structurées : Cuvées Noémie, Les Grand Devois… et le vin aromatisé à l’orange, recette des ancêtres Puech.

Name: Accent Wine Packaging
Description:
Local and Imported Packaging Specialist.  Wood, Card, Paper, Leather,  PU Leather and Tin.
Independent Sleeving Applicator. Empty or Full. Applying sleeves from any supplier.
Screen Printing of Bottles.  Empty or full bottles.
Overseas Packaging Project Management

Name: SACCHETTO SRL
Description:
The Sacchetto company was established in the early ‘900s, in the Veneto region where the wine was an integral part of the history, culture and economy. 

Mixing the prestigious wine tradition with today’s taste means using the own experience in an innovative way.

Our experience leads us to express always in a different way the warmth and unicity of our native land.

For this reason the wine-making and refining process are thought to create wines that really speak the universal language of the palate. Wines with a clear personality, to be siped with an open soul, for an ideal tasting.

This is the result of the cooperation with a tight-knit team, and involves Sacchetto family and the oenologists, that follow analysis, research and development, balancing every day precision and creativity.

Name: Reh Kendermann GmbH Weinkellerei
Description:
Mit Enthusiasmus und einer Leidenschaft für gute Weine gründete Carl Reh im Jahr 1920 an der Mosel ein Handelsunternehmen für Trauben, Most und Wein. Wenige Jahre später baute er dort seine erste große Kellerei. Innovativ und stets auf beste Qualität bedacht, wuchs das Unternehmen zu einer der größten Kellereien Deutschlands. Der Zusammenschluss der Kellereien Carl Reh, Leiwen, und Hermann Kendermann, Bingen, machte die Reh Kendermann GmbH Weinkellerei zu einem der führenden Weinexporteure Deutschlands.
Noch heute ist die Kellerei in Familienbesitz von Andrea und Carl Reh – mittlerweile in der dritten Generation. Carl Reh fühlt sich den Werten seines Großvaters, qualitativ hochwertigen Wein zu produzieren und zu vertreiben, verpflichtet. 
Reh Kendermann ist eine der modernsten Weinkellereien Deutschlands und führend in der Konzeption und Produktion von Markenweinen und Premium-Own-Label Produkten. Zum Markenportfolio zählt vor allem Black Tower, die erfolgreichste Weinmarke aus Deutschland mit aktuell ca. 14  Mio. verkauften Flaschen weltweit. Reh Kendermann vertreibt exklusiv die original gefüllten Marken Espiritu de Chile, Lindeman’s aus Australien sowie die italienischen Marke CANTI.
Der Hauptsitz der Reh Kendermann GmbH Weinkellerei mit Geschäftsleitung, Vertrieb, Verwaltung, Kellerei, Abfüllung und Weinlager ist in Bingen angesiedelt, weitere Standorte finden sich in Leiwen, Gau-Bickelheim und Böchingen. Am Standort Oprisor, im Südwesten Rumäniens, stehen 252 Hektar Rebfläche im Ertrag. Im April 2017 hat die Reh Kendermann GmbH zudem das südafrikanische Weingut Napier Vineyards übernommen.

www.reh-kendermann.de/impressum

Name: Alianta Group
Description:
ALIANTA GROUP was founded in Moscow in 1993 and remains one of the biggest players on the Russian market with the wide range of wines from both Old and New worlds, and distribution build across the country.
The portfolio of the company includes the respected international bestsellers as well as the prestigious on-trade labels.
АЛИАНТА ГРУПП - ведущий импортер вин и спиртных напитков с 1993 года. Компания стояла у истоков формирования современного винного рынка России и сегодня является одним из его признанных лидеров. Среди клиентов компании – ведущие сети, крупные магазины, лучшие рестораны и бутики, а так же частные и корпоративные клиенты. Общий штат компании составляет более 500 сотрудников, включая главный офис в Москве, филиалы в Санкт-Петербурге и Краснодаре.

Name: MonteRosola Winery
Description: With six hundred years of history and a new winery, MonteRosola transforms the ancient Tuscan art of wine making into a new fantastic adventure that combines technological innovation, environmental sustainability, mastery and passion. In the heart of Tuscany, near Volterra, MonteRosola is a gravitational eco-cellar that produces organic wines of extraordinary quality. Our wines, both white and red, are obtained from grapes picked by hand in the vineyards of the estate. The wines are an expression of passionate dedication, outstanding know-how and a very unique terroir. In addition to wine, MonteRosola produces extra virgin oil with an elegant and pleasantly spicy taste. The winery is at your disposal for wine and olive oil tastings, tours, picnics in the vineyards, private events, weddings, music, art and more. We have created our Tuscan dream here at MonteRosola, and we want to share it with you!

Name: GANAU America
Description: Ganau combines nine decades of experience with the latest technology to produce the finest corks possible. Focusing on sustainable practices, stringent quality control standards, and innovative production techniques, Ganau is the first choice of successful winemakers who value purity, performance, and reliability.

Name: Sakebon French Cocktail
Description:
Je suis un jeune entrepreneur marseillais qui lance un nouveau cocktail « made in France ».

Ce cocktail est à base de saké mais le « vrai », celui que l’on appelle le vin japonais et non pas l’eau de vie qui utilise faussement le même nom.
 
Ce cocktail individuel de 30 cl pour seulement 12.5% vol. est destiné aux établissements haut de gamme (restaurants, hôtels, épiceries fines, etc) mais aussi aux particuliers qui veulent consommer un produit d'exception chez eux et/ou entre amis.

Avec un packaging très luxe, un goût frais et sucré, litchi – framboise, il ravira à coup sûr tous les consommateurs.
 
Sa marque, « Sakebon », rendra le produit incontournable dans les esprits car «c’est ça qu’est bon !»

Name: Georgian Wine Association
Description: The Georgian Wine Association (GWA) is the voice of the Georgian wine sector on national and international markets, working to increase public awareness of Georgian wine and to promote and market Georgian wine internationally. The GWA seeks to nurture local wine traditions and wine making methods, the planting and vinification of endemic varietals, support for scientific research and education in viticulture and wine making, and the development of the wine tourism sector in Georgia.

Name: Castelnau Wine Agencies
Description:
Over 40 years of successful business importing and selling wine in the UK thanks to the commitment and professionalism of our team and the strong relationships we have with our customers and suppliers. 

We have been travelling the world since 1981 dedicated to sourcing wines to service all areas of the UK wine trade: our philosophy is to work with ambitious and forward thinking producers who are committed to developing brands that will help make our customers more profitable. 

We have been under the helm of resident MW, Keith Isaac since 1987 and we are a subsidiary of Champagne Castelnau in Reims.

Name: Weingut In den Zehn Morgen
Description:
Das WEINGUT IN DEN ZEHN MORGEN erzeugt expressive Herkunftsweine aus den besten Parzellen des ehemaligen VDP. Weinguts August E. Anheuser rund um Bad Kreuznach.
Wir stehen für einen puristischen, festen, langlebigen Weinstil - jenseits des Mainstreams. 

Seit 2016 werden die Weinberge naturnah bewirtschaftet, seit 2022 ist das Weingut Bio-zertifiziert. Mit Einsaaten und gutem Kompost wurde das Bodenleben der Weinberge gestärkt. Durch die schonende Art des Weinbaus und die Stärkung der Reben von innen heraus wird auch das Gärverhalten der Weine gesteigert.

Der alte Rebbestand, ergänzt um Neupflanzungen mit Chardonnay und Pinot Noir, versetzt uns in die glückliche Lage, große Weine rund um die historische Weinstadt Bad Kreuznach zu keltern.

Name: Az. Agr. Paolo Cottini
Description:
"Az. Agricola Paolo Cottini" è il nome con cui Paolo Cottini e Sara Riolfi, giovani produttori di vino, hanno voluto esprimere la loro personale identità abbracciando il settore enologico tipico della Valpolicella.
La passione del padre trasmessa poi al figlio Paolo, che insieme a sua moglie, rappresentano la terza generazione di artigiani dediti alla viticoltura. Si propongono di tramandare l'arte di famiglia producendo vini di qualità nel rispetto della tradizione pur avendo uno sguardo innovativo. Caratteristiche che più rappresentano i nostri vini.
L’azienda si colloca ai piedi della collina di Fumane, luogo incantevole dove si trova il nostro fruttaio, la nostra barricaia e dove è possibile degustare la nostra collezione, ammirando la vallata maestosa davanti alla cantina.

Name: HOXXOH Champagne
Description: A fabulous blanc de blancs, grand cru champagne, in a luminous bottle.

Name: RGNY Wine
Description: We are a family of winemakers with a deep regard for our heritage. Our Mexican roots bring a unique perspective to our business. We value our family’s tradition of wine-making and aim to foster the Rivero González legacy as we enter this new chapter. The Rivero González family is characterized by being true to their values including quality, heritage, craft, innovation, and community. The result is a new, but thoughtful, take on winemaking.

Name: Perez Cruz Wines
Description: Pérez Cruz es una viña especializada en vinos tintos producidos y embotellados en origen, que reflejan el carácter e identidad del Maipo Alto. Ubicada sobre el piedemont de la Cordillera de los Andes, sus suelos son profundos, pedregosos y bajos en nutrientes. El clima es mediterráneo, con veranos secos de gran luminosidad y amplitud térmica. Combinación ideal para producir vinos de alta calidad.

Name: First Growth Brands
Description: First Growth Brands (FGB) was founded in 2018 by Edward Holl, a 30-year Private Equity veteran and current FGB Chairman and CEO.  First Growth Brands is the producer of Faire La Fête sparkling wine from Limoux, France.  Faire La Fête is a méthode traditionnelle French bubbles brand that is low sugar, vegan friendly, gluten free, and absolutely delicious.

Name: Morris of Rutherglen
Description:
Australia’s most awarded wine and whisky brand, Morris of Rutherglen, has earned its reputation from over 165 years of dedication to craftsmanship. The Morris family has been producing world-renowned and award-winning fortified wines since 1859 and has passed down this legacy through six generations today. This history and mastery in blending, aging, and creating exceptional flavour can now been seen in our Australian Single Malt whisky.

Our commitment to using 100% Australian ingredients, combined with Rutherglen’s unique climate of hot summer days and cool nights, provides ideal conditions for ageing and flavour development. These elements contribute to the distinct character that defines every Morris expression, from our celebrated wines to our award-winning whiskies.

Come and visit our recently renovated destination Cellar Door and Distillery in Rutherglen, in the heart of North-Eastern Victoria, where we can offer you a unique experience to enjoy both our award-winning fortified wines and the whisky expressions they have influenced in addition to a tour of our production facilities, all under one roof.

Name: Staglin Family Vineyard
Description: Staglin Family Vineyard is a family owned and run winery producing sought after wines from their historic estate located on Rutherford Bench.  As stewards of this land the Staglin’s farm their vineyard organically and harness the suns energy to power their winery, home and offices.  With their guiding motto “great wines for great causes”, the Staglin’s have helped generate over $700 Million for charities throughout the country.

Name: FMS Food & Beverages SA
Description:
FMS creates private brands as a turnkey service since 2014. These encompass wine, champagne, beer, spirits. We export premium branded wines from South Africa since 2000, including our own brand, New Beginnings. As from 2017 we supply local and foreign producers with bulk or unlabelled wines and MCCs for their own brands.

We export wine, whisky, cognac, champagne and spirits from France, Ireland, Scotland and Spain directly to your preferred port or warehouse. 

As international trading house we consolidate your order into a single consignment on any Incoterms basis.  We can handle logistics for your own products with ease.

FMS is the official reseller of winesave  for keeping opened wine, champagne and whisky perfect for 10 weeks plus. Winesave is totally inert and consists of 100% Argon gas – 2½ times heavier than air, settling on top of the wine, sealing it off from the oxygen. 

Coffee, Rooibos tea, olive oil and cheese form part of our regular branded and private label portfolios. With many years of industry experience we can supply you dried fruits, fresh fruits and garlic directly from various countries.

Contact us @FMSWineMarketing to discuss your project. Just what you need since 23 years. 

Oh, don't forget, place your order at info@fms-wine-marketing.co.za and relax, help is on its way.

WHY SHOULD YOU TRUST FMS?

Everyone at FMS is most passionate about wine and the service of its clients, following every project and consignment conscientiously. We rely on repeat business for profitability, not on once-off deals. Our reputation is backed by extensive qualifications and constant re-orders from clients.
With fast decision making ability and in-depth knowledge of the market, it is easy to do business with us. Relying on proven wineries and reputable service organizations we are able to guarantee 100% satisfaction within the client’s budget and time frame. 

Let’s do the same for you!

And after reading all of that you deserve a glass of good wine. Chin!
Location: Sea Point, Cape Town, Western Cape

Name: The Indiana Whiskey Company
Description:
The Indiana Whiskey Company is an independent, disabled veteran-owned, artisan distillery located in South Bend, Indiana. We proudly brew, distill, and bottle on-site our award-winning, small-batch whiskey, responsibly and at a reasonable price, from Indiana grain.

Located in a warehouse in the manufacturing district of South Bend, Indiana, The Indiana Whiskey Company has been producing the state's premier small-batch whiskey from Indiana corn since 2013. Our signature Silver Sweet Corn Whiskey can be found at near 100 bars, restaurants, and retailers throughout Michiana, the Indianapolis and Bloomington areas, and in our own on-site distillery and tasting area at 1115 West Sample Street in South Bend.

In addition to award-winning whiskey, we also offer the Whiskituity, a bottle of premium Indiana whiskey every year for the rest of your life for just $350. Learn more about this unique program on our website at http://inwhiskey.com.

To get in on the conversation, follow us here, as well as on Twitter @inwhiskey and Facebook http://facebook.com/inwhiskey.

Name: London Sommeliers Club
Description:
"Preserving, Improving and Promoting the Art of Wine & Food Matching"

In this time of wine and food globalisation, a negative short-term profit culture prevails at the expense of both diners' enjoyment and the long-term stability of the restaurant industry. The art of Wine & Food Matching is at the very heart of the latter. Furthermore, it can become an integral part of the UK's wine and food culture.

In order to preserve, improve and spread knowledge and appreciation of it, the Alterocca London Sommeliers Club aims to provide the industry with a pool of professional and educational expertise of the highest level for consultancy, discussion and exchange of ideas.

Name: The Wine Cellar & The Food Cellar
Description:
Off Trade Winners - Rioja Wine Month 2021

Family owned local business for 30 years and now in its second generation of operation. With over 850 wines in store (and with access to thousands more), beers, spirits and liqueurs we pride ourselves on our range, experience and ability to provide excellent customer service.

Name: Maison Turin
Description: Maison Turin élabore des liqueurs étonnantes, des anisés contemporains et des spiritueux d’exception en éditions limitées, numérotées dont certaines en petit lot. A la fois distillerie et liquoristerie, notre maison sublime les arômes et invente de nouvelles sensations gustatives.

Name: Belondrade
Description:
BELONDRADE nació en 1994 de la mano de Didier Belondrade con un concepto francés de “Vin de  Château”, un vino elaborado únicamente con las uvas de la Finca Quinta San Diego.  Son ya 20 años de apuesta firme por el terruño de la meseta de La Seca. Belondrade busca la complejidad de la expresión de sus diferentes terruños, a través de fermentaciones espontáneas. La apuesta de Didier Belondrade por el potencial de envejecimiento de la uva verdejo  se hizo aún más patente con la inauguración, en el año 2000, de una bodega propia en el término municipal de La Seca (Valladolid), diseñada por el arquitecto Vincent Dufos du Rau. Desde el año 2012, la finca ,Quinta San Diego, cuenta con una nueva sala de barricas y una espectacular sala de catas suspendida en el aire con vistas a los viñedos de La Seca y al valle del Duero, diseñada por el estudio de arquitectos ODImásP.

BELONDRADE  cuenta con 41 hectáreas de viñedo propio repartidas en 24 parcelas diferenciadas en cuanto a la composición de su suelo, orientación, densidad, porta injertos y clones. Hoy cuenta con la certificación ecológica. La uva se recoge a mano, con una doble selección en el viñedo y en la bodega.  Se busca un rendimiento medio, inferior a 5.500 kilos por hectárea (30 a 35 hectolitros por hectárea).  Al trabajar en mono-varietal verdejo, se busca  la  complejidad que aportan los diferentes suelos (con distintos porcentajes de arena, arcilla y canto rodado), la fermentación espontánea y  la crianza en barricas de roble francés, de diferentes bosques, tonelerías y años.

BELONDRADE es más que un vino, es una filosofía,.

Description: Bebidas Zago encerrou suas atividades no início de 2023. Fechado por tempo indeterminado.

Name: Wine, Spirit & Liquor Industry - Consulting
Description:
“We consult on all matters of the Wine & Liquor Trade”

We are a Wine and Liquor Industry Consultancy, founded by Bob Powell in 2012.

We also facilitate your complete recruitment process from selection to negotiation to engagement.
 
"PICKING THE BEST CROP FOR YOU" - facilitation of recruitment from selection to negotiation & engagement. We also offer an ongoing mentoring, review and troubleshooting service for all your staff.

Name: Lina Corporation Inc.
Description: Lina Corp es una compañía panameña dedicada a la distribución y comercialización de productos de consumo masivo a nivel nacional. Contamos con más de 15 años de experiencia ayudando a desarrollar marcas en el mercado local. Distribuidores autorizados de: whisky Macallan,  agua Fiji , gaseosas Postobon , vodka Stolichnaya , cerveza Bavaria y Hollandia , vinos Gato Negro, Té Hatsu, Hawaiian Tropic, rasuradoras Schick , baterías Energizer &  mucho más...

Name: ELA Vinhos
Description:
A ELA, Lda. é uma empresa de prestação de serviços na área dos vinhos. Mantendo a liderança de mercado em Portugal apostou na exportação dos seus serviços para Espanha.

Fundada em 1982, a ELA, Lda. foi pioneira na Península Ibérica, na Prestação de Serviços Enológicos, com a primeira unidade móvel de Estabilização Bitartárica.

A inovação desta atividade foi a possibilidade de deslocar a unidade, numa viatura de transporte pesada, até às instalações do Cliente, reduzindo custos com os processos enológicos, com flexibilidade e comodidade.

A ELA, Lda. ampliou a sua gama de serviços  na área de enologia em 1997 com Engarrafamento e de Acabamento (Rotulagem) e em 2007 Engarrafamento a Quente.

O objetivo dos nossos  serviços é permitir  engarrafar e rotular o vinho dos Produtores Engarrafadores, cujas quantidades produzidas não justificam economicamente a aquisição de equipamentos próprios, ou quando têm necessidades pontuais de aumento de capacidade  e ou avaria dos seus equipamentos.

Estando consciente da responsabilidade inerente a estes serviços e da confiança depositada na ELA, Lda., as questões de Qualidade e de Segurança Alimentar tiveram desde o início, uma importância vital.

A implementação do Sistema de Segurança Alimentar e de Gestão da Qualidade da ELA, Lda. foram reconhecidos externamente com a Certificação pela Norma ISO 9001 desde 2012 pela APCER e pela AENOR desde 2018.

Atualmente com 15 Unidades Móveis, a ELA, Lda. presta serviços em Portugal e Espanha, em todas as regiões vitivinícolas.

Os nossos clientes reconhecem-nos como parceiros de negócios, pela flexibilidade, disponibilidade e qualidade dos serviços que prestamos, assim como pela competência técnica dos seus colaboradores.

Name: DAGAZ Winery
Description: Somos una Viña ubicada en el valle de Colchagua

Name: Links Concept Family Wine Merchants
Description:
Links Concept was founded in 2000, and like many of the wineries we represent, we are 100% family owned. Being a family owned company, we are 100% committed to our customers and we strive to give you the best wines from around the world.
We are proud to represent some of the finest and leading wineries from the best producing wine regions. From your daily drinking wines to some of the finest wines produced in the world, look no further than Links Concept.

Name: Tamburlaine Organic Wines
Description:
Tamburlaine was established in 1966. In 1985 the Hunter winery was purchased by a small group of friends and relatives led by Managing Director, Head of Grape and Wine Production, Mark Davidson. Mark has built his long-term winemaking philosophy around Contemporary Organic practices in the vineyard and the winery. After challenging years of research and development, we have become one of Australia’s largest producer of organic wines with vineyards in the Hunter Valley and Orange region. 

Named after Christopher Marlowe's famous play and character ‘Tamburlaine the Great’, we work to lead the way with our Contemporary Organics vision, successfully producing award-winning organic, vegan-friendly, low sulphur and no added sulphur wines.

Name: LA VINTAGE COMPANY
Description:
We maintain long-lasting and trustworthy business relationships with the main players in Bordeaux. 
We promote the values and culture of great Bordeaux wines around the world. 
Our priorities are business ethics, long-term commitment, transparency and sound advice.

Name: Monteverro Srl
Description:
Fine wines, southern Tuscany.
Organic certified since 2019.

Name: Domaine Tropez
Description:
We would like to welcome you to Domaine Tropez, and to discover this careful selection of our award-winning wines from Saint Tropez, in Côtes de Provence. 

Domaine Tropez is a family-owned modern vineyard created in 1996 and since then it has assembled a number of AOC Côtes de Provence vines, covering over 40 hectares. 

The dominant vines grown around the property are the grenache, to give structure and aroma, tibouren, a specific vine from the Golfe of Saint-Tropez to bring elegance and finesse, and other complementary vines such as, cinsault for the rosé, rolle and semillon for the white and syrah and cabernet for the red. 

Our Domaine is certified with the highest level of environmental practices. Level 3. HVE (High Environmental Value) 

In line with the principles of organic farming, all vine growing procedures are wisely thought through: regular mechanical weeding is performed to limit chemical weed control, using certified organic fertilizers. Harvesting is done at a low temperature to obtain white and rosé wines with elegant and complex aromas, also creating crisp. light-colored wines. 

Domaine Tropez wines are known for their distinctly Provence character, boasting lively, full-bodied flavours that are the result of exceptional circumstances, the strong maritime influence of the clay and limestone soils along with the sandy Med iterranean climate. 

Walking in our vineyard is a unique opportunity to interpret, what we are all about. For the moment, we invite you to have a full immersion tasting our products and feeling the unique touch we give to each of our vintages

Name: Dunrobin Distilleries Limited
Description: Welcome to the captivating world of Dunrobin Distilleries, a Canadian gem born from the rich soil of an organic farm. With a deep-rooted understanding of the importance of quality ingredients, this distillery has harnessed the power of nature to create exquisite spirits that have garnered international acclaim. From its humble origins to its current standing as an award-winning distillery, Dunrobin Distilleries is proud to bring the true essence of Canadian craftsmanship to the rest of the world.

Name: Sovereign Distilleries Ltd.
Description: Sovereign Distilleries Limited is engaged in the manufacture of Extra Neutral Alcohol (ENA) and Indian Made Foreign Liquor (IMFL). The distillery is the largest in South India with a production capacity of 1,80,000 litres of ENA and 18,000 cases of IMFL per day in its state of art facility located near Singapur village, Sindhanur taluk of Raichur district in Karnataka

Name: Elicité
Description:
Elicité is your personal online sommelier. A contemporary online wine retailer designed for modern consumers who want to experience wine before purchasing it.

We are born out of the realisation that the world of wine can be intimidating and is often perceived as traditional or exclusive.

From the beautifully rich culture and distinct heritage, to the fascinating stories from the experts in the wine industry, our aim is to uncover this world through inspiring digital content and personal assistance from our dedicated team of Personal Wine Advisors.

Name: Wine Profit
Description:
Wine Profit (www.wineprofit.com) è una realtà ibrida innovativa che si posiziona a metà tra le società di investimento e i commercianti di vino. 

Nata nel 2018 come progetto all’interno di Moneysurfers (www.moneysurfers.com), con cui condivide la sede a Chiasso, in Svizzera e il team multidisciplinare di 20 professionisti appassionati di vino ed esperti di investimenti alternativi, Wine Profit possiede circa 65.000 bottiglie di vino a magazzino, con un valore economico di oltre 7 milioni di euro. 

La nostra mission è affiancare i collezionisti e gli investitori nella scelta e nella conservazione delle migliori bottiglie di vino, affinché raggiungano l’apice della bontà dal punto di vista gustativo e del valore economico, per poi liquidarle con profitto.

Name: EL SUPREMO RUM
Description: El Supremo Rum is a premium, aged handcrafted rum perfected for the discerning drinker. The best agricole rum you’ll ever taste that's of the utmost quality, stemming from a unique Paraguayan heritage. Its character will linger in your memory as a result of its authenticity derived from where it is distilled and the philosophy of those who have been distilling it for over 300 years.

Name: The Independent Wine Education Guild (IWEG)
Description:
The Independent Wine Education Guild (IWEG) is a not-for-profit organization dedicated to providing excellence in wine, spirits and sake education to professionals in the trade and enthusiasts. 

The Independent Wine Education Guild is the original and only Canadian school to offer all programs and qualifications of the Wine & Spirit Education Trust (WSET) — including the flagship “WSET Level 4 Diploma in Wines” program — leading to internationally recognized certification in wine, spirits and sake.

WSET programs, widely considered the "Gold Standard" in wine education, are now offered in more than seventy countries across the globe. IWEG is the recipient of the prestigious WSET Lifetime Achievement Award for spearheading establishment of the WSET program in Canada and for excellence in wine and spirit education since 1977.

IWEG also offers Wine Scholar Guild's French Wine Scholar (FWS) and Italian Wine Scholar (IWS) courses, and Wines of Chile Academy and Wines of Portugal Academy certifications. IWEG is the 2017 Italian Wine Scholar Program Provider of the Year. Our unique Ontario’s Brave New Wines course, now in it’s fifth year, leads to Ontario Wine Specialist certification.

Our scheduling is diverse and flexible, offering in-class or online study; day or evening classes; and condensed or less intensive formats as well as custom corporate programming.

With over forty years of operation, IWEG is passionate about helping our students achieve their personal or professional goals. Our instructors are subject-area experts and professionally trained educators, dedicated to student engagement and success. For more information about IWEG’s wine, spirits and sake courses and events, visit iweg.org.

IWEG is a Canadian Registered Charity with Business Number 10808 4682 RR0001. Courses offered are HST exempt and tuition tax receipts are issued annually.

Name: Asconi Winery
Description:
The Winery was founded in 1994 and to this day remains a family business. Our aim is to make the best possible wine we can, using the best available technology, while maintaining the traditions of our people. We also want to share everything we have accomplished with our visitors, local or foreign!

Any wine starts with the grapes and having a vineyard is required for any winery. That is why we have planted over 500 hectares (1230 acres) over the course of 10 years. All of our vineyards are located in the vicinity of the Geamana village, in the county of Anenii Noi, at a distance of approximately 10 kilometers from the winery.

At the winery you will also be able experience the culinary traditions, in a an ambiance that will allow you to explore the Moldovan heritage.

Name: albicchiere
Description: Albicchiere is an innovative system which enables wine lovers to drink a single glass of wine at the perfect temperature, whenever they want, and without the waste associated with glass bottles.

Name: Kingscote Estate
Description:
Kingscote Estate & Vineyard is a family-owned vineyard tucked into a beautiful corner of the Kingscote Valley between the historic Bluebell steam railway and the Weirwood reservoir close to East Grinstead in West Sussex.

We offer wine tours, hospitality and events, as well as country pursuits such as fishing and long walks.

Our beautiful 15th century Tithe Barn was saved from destruction, brought in piece by piece from its original location in Kent, and lovingly rebuilt in its current picturesque location. It is now a café and shop selling our finest English wines and serving up great food – and also a venue for events and exhibitions. 

Currently, we produce: two white wines – the Bacchus and Chardonnay; a Rosé, which is a blend of Bacchus and Regent; and an English sparkling wine. We also produce a high-quality cyder using the Original (Champagne) Method with apples from our orchard.

All drinks can all be ordered via our Kingscote shop online, or at the Tithe Barn wine shop.


The vineyard is formed from part of the original estate created by renowned Victorian gardener, William Robinson, the other half now belonging to our neighbours Gravetye Manor, a Michelin-starred hotel and restaurant.

Name: VinHill Fine Wine Trading (Shanghai) Co., Ltd.
Description:
VinHill Fine Wine Trading (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., is a company dedicated to promoting not only German wine but also German wine culture in China. We do not only want to sell wines but also bring the German wine culture to China to give our customers a deep understanding of the German wine world.
Wine is not only a business, it's a passion! 

Currently, we are offering a variety of around 70 different kinds of high quality wines and we are the official importer for Rotkäppchen (German sparkling wine) and Nordhäuser (vodka and corn schnapps).

Moreover we offer high quality brands such as
- Ziegler - which is known in Germany as on of the best distilleries,
- Rudolf Fürst - also called the god father of Pinot Noir 
- as well as the internationally awarded Weingut Horst Sauer. 

Within nearly 10 years of experience, we are a professional Chinese team which does not only know the German wines but the Chinese market too. We carry out customizable, exclusive wine activities and services, such as wine and beer festivals, professional wine tastings, wine dinners and wine trainings.


No matter if for companies or privat persons!
We distribute our wines to several channels: Online-Distributors, Bars, Hotels, Restaurants and Direct. With our young, dynamic and service-orientated team, we are eager to fullfill all wishes of our customers.

Name: SinoDrink
Description:
As a member of Generali Group, one of the largest insurance companies in the world, SinoDrink is the most comprehensive and professional Italian wine importer in China. We are exclusive distributor for over 400 Italian fine wines, liqueur, mineral water and glassware. We are also specialized in wine investment, wine event organization, fine wine collection and winery tour.
In 2010, SinoDrink is proud to be the official wine supplier of Italian Center of Shanghai Expo and Intercontinental Expo Hotel. Since 2009, we are also greatly honored to be the official partner of Italian National Day Ceremony in Italian Embassy.
Since 2011, SinoDrink has been a strategic partner of Gambero Rosso in China. We successfully launched the 1st and 2nd Chinese Edition of the famous wine guide “Vini d’Italia” and the 1st Chinese Edition of Grandi Cru D’italia, and held grand wine tastings of Tre Bicchieri wines in Shanghai Fairmont Peace Hotel. Over 300 media invited by SinoDrink were present, and over 1,700 VIP customers joined the tasting in 2012. This monumental event marked a new era of Italian wines in China.

Name: ANGELO ROCCA & FIGLI SRL
Description:
Welcome to the international ROCCA VINI Linkedin page.

Since 1880, when ancestor Francesco founded “Vinicola Rocca”, wine business is a Rocca Family issue.
The Company’s growth basis on the experience matured over five generations, the passion for producing deserving wines, a consumer-oriented service and an excellent quality/price ratio.

Our core business consist in production, bottling, sales and marketing of quality italian wines throughout the world.

Our Company takes pride in the art of producing quality wines for both national and international markets. 
The headquarter in Agrate Brianza ( next to highway direction to Milan) holds two bottling facilities, equipped with the latest state of the art bottling installations, able to produce all different DOC,DOCG and IGT formats. 
Our production vineyards are situated in the heart of Salento in Puglia, sorrounded by the breathtaking beauty of the Ionic Coast.
A 5000 square meter underground wine cellar serves to preserve and stock our wine at optimal levels of temperature and humidity,

"Our Mission, across four generations, is to impart the art and passion for good wine making, with notable products, which are highly acclaimed within the global market."

Name: Cognac PLANAT & Co
Description: Cognac Planat & Co. – l’unique maison de cognac 100% bio, Cognac Planat & Co. est aujourd’hui la propriété de deux familles : la famille Soerlie (Norvège) et la famille Nau (France). Maison Fondée en 1828 à l’âge d’or du cognac par un jeune entrepreneur, Abel Planat, qui, avec son fils Oscar, développèrent à la fois leurs affaires et apportèrent énormément à leur communauté. Ils furent tous deux maires de cognac et député de la Charente. Aujourd’hui, le Cognac Planat est le promoteur principal d’une filière cognac bio en charentes, travaillant main dans la main avec une vingtaine de viticulteurs bio.

Name: Thorn-Clarke Wines
Description:
Find our latest corporate offers at thornclarkewines.com.au/corporate-offers.

The Thorn-Clarke family already has a long history in the Barossa - six generations of involvement in the region's world famous wine industry.

We take a long-term view of the future and our goal is unashamedly to be still growing grapes and making wine for another six generations.

We recognise and value the role that our suppliers, distributors, retailers and customers play in this goal and we seek to develop sustainable partnerships based on loyalty, trust and quality.

Name: Vinícola Zanella
Description: A Vinícola Zanella é uma empresa familiar que tem por objetivo a elaboração de vinhos finos e espumantes diferenciados e originais. Os produtos são desenvolvidos sob o conceito de "terroir" da região de Antônio Prado, local de transição entre a tradição da Serra Gaúcha e novo mundo dos Vinhos de Altitude. A principal característica da Vinícola Zanella é a utilização de vinhedos próprios, cultivados em pequenas parcelas e distribuídos de acordo com a adaptação de cada tipo de uva.
Location: Antônio Prado, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Pont des Arts
Description:
Member of ART DE VIVRE GROUP
http://www.artdevivre-group.com/

When fine Art meets fine wine…

OUR STORY
Pont des Arts is an exclusive, limited collection of fine wines and spirits. It is the first international high end brand of French wines, building a bridge between Art and Wine, Bordeaux and Burgundy, the East and West and collectors and newcomers alike. 

BRIDGING WORLDS
When founders, Arthur de Villepin and Thibault Pontallier, met in Hong Kong, they shared a common goal: to promote abroad what France does best.
Arthur was passionate about art and loved wine, Thibault was passionate about wine and loved art. The project combines their French roots and lifestyle with different cultures and talents.

PERFECT PAIRING
Every bottle produced adorns carefully selected pieces of art, chosen together with the artist, to match the flavor profile of each of our wines. 

WHERE BEAUTY HAPPENS
The bottles are beautifully designed with distinctive lithographic quality paper, all have been engraved in Cognac, France, and have a unique shape including magnum formats. The quantities of each wine are engraved on the back of every bottle, exhibiting the exclusivity of the experience.

All of our wines come with distinguished packaging and includes a booklet about the artists and wines, taking you on a pioneering journey into the worlds of Art and Wine.

In the constant search for beauty, pleasure and quality, we are proud to present the “Pont des Arts experience”.

Name: Dourakis Winery
Description:
A boutique award winning green solar-powered winery, tucked into a beautiful quaint village called Alikampos, just a short 20 minutes drive from Rethymno & 30 minutes from Chania.
Open year round for tours and wine tastings!
tel.0030 2825051761

Name: Callaway Vineyard & Winery
Description:
Sitting high atop a 1600 foot plateau overlooking the beautiful Temecula Valley, Callaway Winery was the first commercial winery to open it's doors in southern California's Temecula Valley A.V.A. by golf magnate, Ely Callaway. Approachable, flavorful and extremely well-balanced wines are synonymous with the Callaway name.

The time honored, Callaway tradition of using unusually cold temperatures during fermentation to slow and prolong the process, allows our wines to retain their natural fruit flavors and aromas. The result - wines that are fruit forward, food friendly and the perfect complement to today's eclectic lifestyles. Wines made to be enjoyed. From our vineyards to your table. 

Our wines are only sold direct to consumer and are not available through any retail outlets. Callaway Winery offers visitors a top-notch customer service experience with educational winery tours, award-winning wines and an alfresco, farm-to-table fine dining experience from our onsite restaurant, Meritage at Callaway. We invite you to experience the passion, quality and excellence.

Name: WWWINE
Description:
Néophyte, amateur ou professionnel en devenir, atteignez vos objectifs à votre rythme et devenez un expert en vin ! 
Nos formations sont sur wwwine.net

Imaginées par des professionnels du vin avec l’aide de nombreux vignerons, nos formations vous font entrer de plain-pied dans le monde fascinant de la viticulture française.

Toujours désireux d’en savoir plus sur le monde du vin ?
WWWINE est un organisme de formation certifié QUALIOPI. Faites vous financer la formation par votre OPCO. Pour tous renseignement => 33 (0)4 26 78 64 82 ou sur celestin@wwwine.net

Name: SAFA DISTRIBUTION
Description:
Safa Distribution est une entreprise spécialisée dans la création et la distribution de spiritueux pour le secteur CHR/Caviste. Mais SAFA est aussi une agence commerciale sur les boissons et les produits d'épiceries pour les grandes surfaces.

PLUS EN DÉTAILS : 
Aujourd'hui, SAFA produit et distribue ses propres marques sur l'ensemble du pays à travers un réseau de 40 agents sur les secteurs CHR et cavistes : Liqueur La Capricieuse, Vodka La Philosophe, Le Whisky des Français, ou la gamme de mixers Co-lab'.

Fort de son expérience en distribution et de son réseau sur son secteur géographique de prédilection (région Centre Val de Loire), SAFA est aussi agent commercial ou négociant pour des marques partenaires : Domaine de champagne Henri Giraud, Maison Ferroni, Distillerie Tessendier, Whisky Aikan, Domaine de Laballe ... 

Plus récemment, SAFA s'est construit un portefeuille de produits pour répondre aux besoins des consommateurs et des chefs de rayons des grandes surfaces : Vins médaillés à prix accessibles (gamme Oenovitis), rhums arrangés bio, limoncello en partenariat avec un chef italien etoilé... *

L'entreprise s'est aussi lancée dans la production de mixers pour l'univers cocktail (limonade, ginger beer, ginger ale, tonic water).

SAFA DISTRIBUTION a la saveur d’une société moderne avec l'esprit start-up, où il fait bon vivre, mêlant professionnalisme, tendance et naturalité.

Name: Mampe Spirituosen GmbH
Description:
Mampe Spirituosen GmbH – Berlin-Tradition trifft Handarbeit

Seit 1831 steht unsere Marke für Berliner Spirituosenkultur mit Charakter. In der historischen Manufaktur im Herzen von Kreuzberg produzieren wir hochwertige Destillate und Liköre – maximal regional, handgemacht und voll Berliner Geschichte.
Mission:
Wir entwickeln eine Traditionsmarke weiter – mit Fokus auf Qualität, Authentizität und urbane Identität. Produkte sollen nicht nur schmecken, sondern Geschichten erzählen.
Werte:
Herkunft & Tradition – unsere Wurzeln liegen seit 1852 tief in Berlin und seit 1831 in unserer Heimatstadt Stargard im heutigen Polen.

Handwerk & Premiumqualität – alle Produkte unserer    Manufaktur-Linie sind 100 % handgemacht mit natürlichen Zutaten. 

Regionalität & Transparenz – wir verwenden hochwertige regionale Weizendestillate und laden Besucher*innen ein, unsere Produktion zu erleben. 

Produkte & Dienstleistungen:

Spirituosen (Liköre, Gin, Vodka, Rum) mit Berliner Charakter. 

Erlebnisformat: Besichtigungen, Tastings, Workshops in unserer Manufaktur. 

Individuelle Personalisation: Eigene Flaschen, eigene Etiketten („Configurator“) als Geschenkoption.

Name: Gazosa1883 Sagl
Description:
Gassosa (auch Gasosa, Gazosa oder Gazzosa; ital. für „die Gashaltige“) ist eine klare, alkoholfreie, gesüßte, kohlensäurehaltige Zitronenlimonade aus Italien und aus dem Kanton Tessin in der Schweiz.
.
12 Geschmacksrichtungen: LIMONE, MANDARINO, MELA VERDE, POMPELMO ROSA, SANGUINELLA,MIRTILLO AMARA, GINGER, LAMPONE, MOSCATO CETRIOLO & Nov - März MELA CANNELLA.

Name: Château Arton
Description:
Temple of Single Casks, Château Arton is dedicated to the pursuit of natural perfection, aiming for the most unadulterated expressions of Armagnac. Their commitment to crafting a pure, unblended eau-de-vie leads them to excellence. In 2017, Château Arton's Armagnacs received the Excellence Award at the Paris Agricultural Competition.

Emphasizing the essence of fruit and grape, Château Arton is the birthplace of AOC Blanche Armagnac, which doesn't age in casks. This unoaked Armagnac enhances wine aromas thanks to the distinctiveness of the Armagnac still, preserving the vitality of the original wine.

Château Arton is home to the Haut-Armagnac AOC appellation. This confidential terroir, wiped out by phylloxera in the 19th century, came back to life in Lectoure in 1991, thanks to the Montal-Montesquiou family, heir to the famous Musketeer d’Artagnan. Today, the 220-acres family estate owns over half of the vines of this terroir dedicated to the production of Armagnac.

At Arton, the most faithful expression of the terroir relies on permaculture. From vine to wine and from wine to Armagnac, the vineyard's conversion to biodynamics puts the living back into the heart of its agriculture. Driven by innovations in viticulture, Château Arton is committed to revealing the modernity of Armagnac to the world.

Name: 10 cl - Un grand cru au verre
Description:
Déguster un grand vin sans ouvrir une bouteille, c'est désormais possible !


Que ce soit pour apporter une attention particulière à vos partenaires, remercier vos collaborateurs pour les challenges relevés ou tout simplement faire plaisir à vos clients, 10 cl vous propose des coffrets contenant 6 flacons de vin, ayant chacun l'équivalence d'un verre de vin. L'occasion de découvrir de grands crus français tout en vivant une nouvelle expérience oenologique.

Name: SHARE A SPLASH wine co.
Description:
Founded in 2006 as Cannonball Wine Company SHARE A SPLASH wine co. produces and manages a portfolio of wines that echo a simple belief: that wine, like life, is best enjoyed when shared. Today, the SHARE A SPLASH portfolio offerings range from premium - luxury wine brands, including Cannonball, Angels & Cowboys, High Dive Napa Valley, Atelier, Roshambo, and imports including New Zealand’s Astrolabe Wines and José Maria da Fonseca’s Twin Vines. 
From their base in Healdsburg, California, the SHARE A SPLASH wine co. wines are present in 48 United States and 30 international markets and on a mission to “Share a Splash” in every glass! 
https://app.ludus.one/sasallbrandsportfolio2025withvideo

Name: Freeman Vineyard & Winery
Description:
From the steep, windswept slopes of the extreme Sonoma Coast to the coolest reaches of the Russian River Valley, the wines of Freeman have earned acclaim for their grace, complexity and uncompromising  commitment to quality. These soulful, cool-climate wines speak of balance, refinement and sense of place in ways that have helped redraw the map for great New World Pinot Noir and Chardonnay.

Since 2001, Freeman has been one of the great pioneers of cool-climate Pinot Noir and Chardonnay, charting a course to the western edges of California winegrowing, where the influence of the Pacific Ocean shapes the character of the wines. In doing so, the winery has helped to define a more balanced, sophisticated and thoughtful style of winemaking—a style that has been embraced by connoisseurs and collectors around the world.

Visit our website to learn more about our story, our wines, or to join our wine club. freemanwinery.com

Name: CHÂTEAU DE SANTENAY
Description: The Château de Santenay is a magnificient estate, producer of Great Burgundy Wines, spread over the most beautiful "terroirs" on the wine coast. The heritage of the Château constitutes an exceptional wine tourism place.

Name: Distillerie Ambix
Description:
Implantée au cœur des Alpes, à Vizille en Isère, la distillerie artisanale Ambix est née en 2012 de la passion de Laurent Pernet pour l’art de la distillation traditionnelle.

Ambix élabore des eaux-de-vie et liqueurs de caractère à partir de trois alambics centenaires chauffés au feu de bois et à feu vif, un savoir-faire rare qui confère aux spiritueux profondeur, complexité et authenticité.

La distillerie développe aussi bien des créations originales, comme l’eau-de-vie de miel ou la liqueur de framboise, que de grands classiques tels que la Poire Williams, la Mirabelle ou le Génépi, pensés pour répondre aux exigences des professionnels de la restauration et du bar.

Des spiritueux artisanaux conçus pour sublimer une carte, accompagner un dessert ou signer une expérience client authentique et différenciante.

Name: Mark Herold Wines
Description:
For those that know him, Mark Herold is a larger than life, exuberant person who lives with gusto and possesses a depth of interest and lust for life that is contagious to those around him. His wines embody that same spirit!

Mark Herold’s first personal wine project, Merus, was a labor of love. For many years this wine was made in his home garage in downtown Napa and focused on premium Cabernet Sauvignon. Eventually his luxury brand was sold and because of a non-compete agreement, Mark was unable to make a Cabernet under his name for a period of time.

This did not deter Mark from embarking on a new adventure of producing non-Cabernet wines. His inspiration came from the great wines of France and Spain which influenced his palate and his personal wine collection over the years. Mark ventured to the pioneering grape growing regions of Lodi, Mendocino and Lake County even going so far as to bring budwood from Pingus in Ribera del Duero and planting that Tempranillo here in California for his Acha and Collide brands. Mark’s quest was to produce incredible blended wines that possess amazing character; wines that would please the everyday Cabernet drinker. This was the birth of Flux, Acha & Collide.

Never venturing far from his first muse, Cabernet Sauvignon, Mark began making Cab again in 2010. Immediately out of the gate, the wines garnered amazing press. Having maintained his vineyard relationships from the Merus days, Mark quickly went to work with top quality growers in Coombsville, Atlas Peak and Oakville. Herold Cabernets express the terroir and character of their appellations and their vineyard sites.

In 2018, Mark and his wife, Gianna, redesigned their downtown tasting room with a focus on Herold Cabernets. “We wanted to create a tasting environment that reflected our personality—eclectic, modern and approachable, with a few twists of the unexpected. People visit Wine Country to enjoy world-class wine and fabulous hospitality. We wanted to offer those things

Name: Vins i Licors Grau SA
Description:
Fundada en 1977, Vinos y Licores Grau dispone actualmente de una plantilla de más de 50 trabajadores. Su trayectoria ascendente, con más de 9.000 referencias entre vinos, licores y destilados tanto del ámbito nacional e internacional, le ha convertido en una de las empresas líderes del sector.

Las instalaciones, inauguradas en 2003, ocupan una superficie de 15.000 metros cuadrados, de los cuales 9.000 están dedicados a la nave de almacén y distribución, equipada con los últimos avances tecnológicos. Los 3.000 restantes los ocupan la zona de oficinas, un almacén climatizado para vinos y la Vinoteca, que con 1.200 metros cuadrados es una de las más grandes de Europa.

En 2009, se inicia la venta online por Internet con la página: www.grauonline.com. El cliente puede escoger cualquiera de las 9.000 referencias entre vinos y licores, y tenerla en casa en menos de 48h a cualquier punto de España o de Europa. Para apoyar y promocionar este nuevo proyecto, se realiza un spot publicitario con la modelo malagueña Elisabeth Reyes, Miss España 2006 y Reina del Cava 2009 La campaña se difunde por televisión en Antena 3, Cuatro, TV3, C33 y también en radio de ámbito estatal. En los últimos años, el proyecto ha recibido diferentes reconocimientos y se ha consolidado como una de las tiendas virtuales de referencia en su sector.

Name: Vini Frasa
Description:
L’azienda vitivinicola Fratelli Carlo e Luca Frasa è stata fondata nel 2008 dal Padre Roberto ed è situata a Rodi Fiesso.

La gestione è prettamente famigliare, e il tempo libero di ognuno viene dedicato alla cura dei vigneti, condizione fondamentale per ottenere uve sane e di qualità; che garantiscono la produzione di ottimi vini.
