Attualmente l’azienda coltiva circa 1 ettaro di vigneti di Merlot (a pergola e filare) situati nella bassa Leventina, nei comuni di Bodio e Giornico. Il terreno di queste regioni è costituito da granito e gneiss. La buona acidità e mineralità dei terreni conferiscono ai vini carattere ed una buona attitudine all’invecchiamento.

L’azienda dispone di una cantina sotterranea la quale garantisce durante tutto l’anno una temperatura e un umidità costante, clima ideale per l’invecchiamento dei vini.

Name: Axia Spirit
Description:
Axia is an extra-dry Mediterranean spirit like no other. Distilled from the aromatic resin of the Mastiha tree, found on the rugged hillsides of Chios in Greece, Axia reimagines millennia-old Mastiha-making techniques for the modern palette.

Its complex botanical profile is both distinctive and approachable, making it a versatile choice for cocktails or sipping neat.

Axia is for those who savour culturally rich, vibrant experiences that take them off the beaten path.

Name: The Veraison Project
Description:
Veraison is the period in wine growing where the grape berries change color. It marks the transition from berry growth to berry ripening. We felt Veraison was an apt metaphor of what needs to happen within the wine industry. 

We’re a non-profit comprised of volunteer wine industry professionals who are committed to making the wine industry more equitable through wine education + wine certification sponsorship, mentoring, and networking for BIPOC.

Name: Big Red Liquors
Description: Big Red Liquors Indiana’s Premier Beer, Wine & Spirits Retailer. Founded in 1972 in Bloomington, Indiana, Big Red Liquors has been serving Indiana for more than 50 years. What began as one store offering incredible selections, value and service has become a group of four esteemed brands proud to operate 103 retail locations and employ more than 700 Hoosiers in five major markets.

Name: Distillerie Rémy Piron
Description:
Depuis 1951, la SAS Distilleries Rémy Piron, basée à Angeac-Champagne en Grande Champagne, au cœur de l’appellation d’origine contrôlée Cognac, est une entreprise partenaire de la viticulture et du négoce.
Autour d'une vision éco-responsable, nous travaillons les eaux-de-vie de nos partenaires avec l’ambition de préserver à la fois le produit et l’environnement.

Name: Bodegas Sel D'Aiz
Description:
En el corazón de los valles pasiegos, en Castillo Pedroso a una altitud de 500 m, en uno de los territorios de mayor atractivo del norte de España y situado  a tan solo 40 Km de Santander se encuentra Bodegas Sel d’Aiz  una empresa familiar gestionada por Asier y Miriam dentro de la Indicación Geográfica Protegida Vino de la Tierra Costa de Cantabria. Procedentes del mundo científico combinan el saber hacer tradicional con innovaciones tecnológicas que permiten obtener productos diferenciados, de alta calidad y respetuosos con el medio ambiente
Allí cultivan 7 hectáreas de viña, variedades  Riesling, Albariño y Godello orientadas hacia el Sur- Sureste en un relieve contrastado y enérgico, una naturaleza exuberante y un paisaje con fuerte personalidad, donde las condiciones para la viña tanto edafológicas, como climatológicas, son inmejorables
En la actualidad elaboran tres vinos diferentes bajo el nombre de Yenda “nombre con el cual eran  conocidas la variedades blancas de Cantabria”. Yenda Albariño Godello,  Yenda Riesling  y Yenda Spicata. Vinos frescos, afrutados reflejo del suelo y el paisaje.
La bodega está abierta a las visitas para que podáis conocer los procesos de vinificación y los viñedos. Disfrutaréis de un paisaje encantado donde,  al fondo,  las montañas nos recuerdan que estamos al norte, un norte de colinas y paisaje verde, de aire limpio y cielos infinitos. Podréis degustar los vinos obtenidos bajo la aplicación de técnicas de Producción Integrada y se podrá ver los diferentes sistemas de conducción y poda, así como conocer los trabajos que se realizan cada temporada en estos viñedos sobre el  Valle del Pas.
La visita  continuará en la Bodega, visitando la cabaña pasiega restaurada y conociendo todos  los pasos en la elaboración de los diferentes vinos. Y para terminar, podréis disfrutar de una cata comentada, con diferentes posibilidades.
Horario de visitas:

Name: Mazarus
Description: Un Blanc de Blancs éclatant et raffiné, symbole d'un savoir-faire unique du cépage Chardonnay.

Name: Grupo DKE Brasil
Description: O Grupo DKE Brasil é importador e distribuidor de bebidas Premium. Fundado em 2015, somos responsáveis pelos produtos Vodka Ministry, Gin Mozaiki e Whisky Lemac e também fazemos a distribuição de outras bebidas.

Name: Klein Constantia Wine Estate
Description:
Dating back to 1685 and described as one of the world’s most beautiful wine estates, Klein Constantia is set amidst ancient trees on the upper foothills of the Constantiaberg, with views across False Bay. The perfect location for cool climate wines, Klein Constantia produces some of South Africa’s top wines, including one of the world’s best natural sweet wines, Vin de Constance.

Our tasting room offers an array of tasting options, including vineyard and cellar tours.

Situated alongside our tasting room is The Bistro @ Klein Constantia, offering guests a unique wine and food experience. Focusing on fresh locally sourced seasonal ingredients, our menu embodies the ‘farm to table & head to toe’ theme.

Name: Icenine Drinks
Description: Icenines are something you have never experienced before - a flavour explosion in your mouth. Icenines are bite-sized ice cubes filled with spirits, that change the way you drink with your friends.

Name: Lauffener Weingärtner eG
Description:
The Lauffener Weingärtner eG (cooperative) comprises of 880 ha (approx. 2,200 acres) of member vineyards and 1200 shareholders/members. The turnover 2017 was 24,2 Mill. Euro (approx. 32 Mill. US-$) and is the largest independent cooperative in the winegrowing region of Württemberg/Germany. 
The “Lauffener Katzenbeißer” is one of Germany`s largest single vineyard designated wine brands. 
About 106 ha (260 acres) of its vineyards are steep slopes, and the Lauffen cooperative is one of the largest terraced vineyards operators in Württemberg. Core grape varieties planted are Schwarzriesling (Pinot Meunier), Trollinger, Samtrot, Lemberger, Riesling and Grauburgunder (Pinot Gris). 
Its quality wines have been awarded with several accolades, such as DLG, Berliner Wein Trophy, Mundus Vini und Selection Gold awards and was the winner of the 2012 European VINUM wine cooperatives contest.

Name: Domaine de Haute Perche
Description:
Situé au cœur de la Vallée de l’Aubance, à seulement 10 km d’Angers, sur les terroirs de l’Anjou noir, le domaine de Haute Perche s’étend sur 35 hectares de sols vivants, travaillés en biodynamie, et avec amour !

Créé dans les années 1960 et repris en 2019 par un amoureux de l’art de vivre à la française et du bon vin, Haute Perche est par excellence, le révélateur du terroir de l’Aubance. La douceur de la rivière se mêle à la force du schiste.

Fort du savoir-faire de femmes et d’hommes engagés en faveur d’une viticulture durable, le domaine produit et vinifie des raisins destinés à des vins francs et droits, biologiques et biodynamiques, subtils et élégants, uniques et reconnus. 

Les vignes se répartissent autour de trois îlots composés de terroirs riches et singuliers, définis par leur exposition, leur sous-sol et leur pente. 

A chaque lieu, ses spécificités. Alors nous observons et accompagnons chaque parcelle de vignes. Nous essayons, améliorons et rendons chaque geste utile, puis évident.

Name: Gerstl Weinselektionen AG
Description:
Gerstl Weinselektionen gehört mit einem erstklassigen, in allen Facetten aussergewöhnlichen Sortiment, mit einer hochqualifizierten, persönlichen Beratung und einer überaus fairen Preispolitik zu den renommiertesten und schon seit Jahrzehnten erfolgreichen Weinhandlungen in der Schweiz.

Unsere ganze Leidenschaft gehört grossen Weinen von kleineren Gütern aus den bedeutendsten Weinregionen Europas. Vor allem aus Frankreich (Bordeaux, Burgund etc.), Italien (Piemont, Toscana etc.), Spanien (Priorat, Rioja etc.), Portugal (Dão, Douro), Deutschland (Mosel-Saar-Ruwer bis Rheingau; Riesling, Spätburgunder), Österreich (Burgenland bis Wachau; Blaufränkisch, Zweigelt etc.) und der Schweiz (praktisch alle Spitzenwinzer).

Unsere Wein-Enthusiasten pflegen enge, partnerschaftliche Beziehungen zu «unseren» Winzerinnen und Winzern, sie besuchen sie teils mehrmals im Jahr persönlich. Dank dieser Nähe können wir Ihnen auch gesuchte Raritäten, Exklusivitäten und Entdeckungen zu fairen Preisen anbieten.

An unseren grossen Degustationen können Sie die Winzer persönlich kennenlernen und ihre köstlichen Weine probieren. Auf Wunsch senden wir Ihnen unsere informativen Broschüren und Newsletter zu. Wir beraten Sie auch sehr gerne kompetent und individuell am Telefon – ob Sie nun privater Weinliebhaber oder anspruchsvoller Gastronom bzw. Wiederverkaufspartner sind.

Auf dieser Website finden Sie alles über unsere Weine und Winzer, über unseren Webshop und Newsletter, über unsere Raritäten und Restposten, über unsere Events und Partner, über unsere Services und Gutscheine – und natürlich über uns als Team voller Weinpassion.

Wir heissen Sie mit einem genüsslichen «Santé» herzlich bei uns willkommen!

Max Gerstl, Roger Maurer, Pirmin Bilger & das ganze Gerstl-Team

Name: Syndicat AOC Corbières
Description: En Corbières, on mise tout sur le vin

Name: Le Bout du Monde
Description:
Brasserie artisanale
Rhum arrangés
 Sodas artisanaux

Name: Herdade da Rocha
Description:
Herdade da Rocha - Boutique Lodge is a 8 room country house which is distinguished by the decoration, which is all olive - inspired. 
Situated in a 52 acres property with vineyard, olive trees, winery, golf and animals, the main aim of our friendly staff is to offer our guests a very unique stay, in which they have the chance to interact with the nature at its best.
Wine tastings and visits to the winery are something guests will have the chance to do with our winemaker who’s always around.
Our “taylor made” complimentary breakfast is made with most products from the Alto Alentejo region and could be served in our restaurant, the guest room, or at their own balcony with breathtaking views to our vineyard.
The dining experience at “Herdade da Rocha - Boutique Lodge” is a regional/nouvelle cuisine tasting accompanied, by wines, olive and olive oil produced on the site. We encourage guests to take a chance and integrate our chefs *Sericaia workshop - (a regional dessert*) or go walking in the cultural Crato village but specially, we want all guests to feel the peace and charm of the amazing “Alto Alentejo”.

Name: Lorimar Winery
Description:
Located in Temecula Valley's Wine Country "Where the Sun Shines Through the Mist," Lorimar Winery has taken advantage of the valley’s unique growing conditions. Situated between 1,400 and 1,600 feet above sea level, Temecula Valley's 3,000 acres of vineyards provide ideal conditions for growing Lorimar’s premium wine grapes.

A dry, moderately warm daytime climate, evenings cooled by breezes from the Pacific Ocean 22 miles to the west, and well-drained decomposed granite soils have helped to create Lorimar’s collection of exquisite wines with remarkably fresh fruit character and true varietal flavor.

Name: Skånska Spritfabriken
Description: Skånska Spritfabriken produces and sells Gin, Whiskey and Apple Brandy based on local raw materials. We are a family-owned company with roots from the wine industry.

Name: Wine Mage
Description:
Premium wine merchant - Events & tastings - Wine club

We attract, inspire, and service connoisseurs by connecting winemakers with their target audience.

At our unique showroom inside the stunning location at MY GARAGE, we invite you to an experience like no other.

Name: Continental Vineyards and Winery
Description: Continental Vineyards and Winery brings together the diverse expressions of Paso Robles through our three brands: Broken Earth, CV, and Pull. Each brand reflects a distinct aspect of winemaking, from bold, rugged blends to refined, premium vintages. Rooted in craftsmanship and a deep connection to the land, our wines are made with precision and integrity, offering a true reflection of the region.

Name: MistralGin
Description: First Provencal rosé gin

Name: Souboz Distillerie
Description: Souboz Distillerie est une entreprise familiale, qui produit des spiritueux écoresponsables et de qualité depuis 2014. Soucieux de l’alimentation d’aujourd’hui et de la santé de l’environnement dans lequel on vit, notre distilelrie veut démontrer qu’il est possible de consommer local, tout en ayant de bons produits et une traçabilité irréprochable.

Name: Sorby Adams Wines
Description:
The Barossa is Australia’s most famous wine region and is believed to have the oldest continually bearing Shiraz vines in the world.

Thankfully it has also been Simon ‘Sorby’ Adams’ home since 1980. Sorby Adams Wines is a family brand (Anna Louisa Sorby married Augustus Crichton Adams in the early 1800s in Hertfordshire and has been our family name ever since) and the family are proud to produce wines that showcase their heritage as well as their sense of place in the esteemed Barossa Valley.

Sorby Adams Wines is based on the philosophy that great wines are made in the vineyard. Winemaker Simon Adams sources fruit from vineyards high in the Barossa Hills and also from a selection of wonderful growers around the Barossa. Sorby Adams places enormous emphasis on careful tending of vines with minimal intervention ensuring that they have access to the highest quality fruit.

Simon's wine cred stems from more than 40 years working with some of Australia's leading labels including as chief winemaker at Yalumba and Dorrien Estate. His skills are shown off through drops such as the Morticia Sparkling Shiraz and The Thing Old Vine Shiraz.

Wines are personally crafted to reflect the European style which allows the wine’s character to shine through, optimising fruit and enhancing longevity.

Name: Cave de Sancerre
Description: La Cave de Sancerre, unique coopérative de l'appellation Sancerre rassemble près de 80 vignerons.

Name: Elderton Wines
Description: Elderton Wines is a premium wine company based in the Barossa, South Australia. Family owned and operated by the Ashmead family for 44 vintages, we pride ourselves on creating premium wines from distinguished vineyard sites. Our flagship wines, the Command Shiraz and Ashmead Cabernet Sauvignon are renowned single vineyard wines, sourced from vineyards that date back to 1894 and 1944 respectively.

Name: Reveilo, Vintage Wines Pvt.Ltd
Description:
India’s leading ‘premium wine’ brand

Parent company: Vintage Wines.

Reveilo incorporated in 2002 with the primary objective of making quality wines

First Indian winery to have collaboration with Italian group ‘Enofly’ for technology as well as wine making expertise

Family landholding of 215 acres at Niphad, Nashik, of which 100 acres are dedicated to wine variety grapes, with plans to expand

A 32,000 sq.ft., state-of-the-art winery at Niphad, Nashik

Presence in Mumbai, Pune, Nashik and Bangalore, Delhi, Calcutta, Jaipur, Goa, with plans to expand to Chennai and Hyderabad (INDIA)

Name: Bodega Najar
Description:
Con más de 171 años de historia, Bodega Najar sigue siendo sinónimo de tradición y excelencia. Hoy, seis generaciones después, la familia Muñoz Najar continúa destilando autenticidad, pero con una mirada puesta en el futuro, innovando su portafolio con piscos, vinos, espumantes y nuevos licores que reflejan el espíritu creativo y evolutivo de la marca.
Una historia que honra su legado, pero no deja de reinventarse.

Name: Vignobles Bardet
Description:
L’Histoire des Vignobles Bardet débute sur les berges de la Dordogne en 1704. Les Vignobles Bardet sont certifiés comme exploitation de « Haute Valeur Environnementale » de niveau 3 Cette certification prend en compte des critères qualitatifs relatifs à la biodiversité, à la stratégie phytosanitaire, à la gestion de l’eau et de la fertilisation ;

Les Vignobles bénéficient également de la certification collective ISO 14001.

Nous produisons également plusieurs vins sans sulfite ajoutés. Depuis juillet 2012 nous utilisons le principe de la « bio régulation » dans notre chai pour la vinification et l’élevage.

Les Vignobles Bardet possèdent 4 châteaux en appellation Saint-Émilion Grand Cru : Château Val d'Or, Château Franc le Maine, Château Pontet-Fumet et Château du Paradis.

Name: Familia Martinez Bujanda, Est. 1889
Description:
Familia Martínez Bujanda es una de las históricas familias bodegueras de Rioja. Nuestro bisabuelo Joaquín que ya era viticultor, fundó la bodega en 1889 y desde entonces, somos también bodegueros. El vino se hace en la viña y el cultivo de nuestros viñedos nos convierte en responsables de principio a fin de nuestras diferentes elaboraciones en Rioja, Rueda y La Mancha.
 
Durante generaciones hemos explorado los mejores terruños y concentrado los viñedos en pagos con una identidad propia, de los que obtenemos vinos con la personalidad del paisaje y con el concepto que Familia Martínez Bujanda transmite a sus elaboraciones: vinos elegantes, sutiles y frescos, que perduran más allá de las modas, y que aspiran a obtener lo mejor de nuestros diferentes terruños.
 
Familia Martínez Bujanda cree en el esfuerzo y en la dedicación diaria, hecho que explica que, hoy, la cuarta y quinta generación sigan al frente de un proyecto más que centenario. Esfuerzo que, año a año, pedimos también a nuestros viñedos hincados algunos de ellos, en zonas límite para el cultivo, sobre suelos recios y pedregosos en los que las plantas tienen que trabajar cada campaña para ofrecernos el mejor fruto con la identidad de cada paisaje en el que se integran.
 
Porque, para nosotros, la naturaleza manda y, si algo hemos aprendido en estos más de 130 años, es que cuidarla, incluso mimarla, es la principal garantía del futuro de nuestros viñedos y, por lo tanto, de Familia Martínez Bujanda.

Name: Weingut Esterházy
Description: 100% Herkunftsweine aus dem Weinbaugebiet Leithaberg, biologisch erzeugt und mit unverwechselbarer Handschrift.

Name: La Vinoteca
Description:
Empresa dedicada a la venta al por menor de vinos y productos delicatesen. También asesoramiento de sumillería a restauración.
Organizo catas de vino regularmente tanto en mis instalaciones como fuera de ellas.
Todo lo relacionado con el mundo del vino nos incumbe.

Name: Tooth & Nail Wine Co
Description:
We are Tooth & Nail Wine Company, a collective group of unique wines, produced in Paso Robles. Our winemaking team’s ability to develop signature wines of character and nuance, comes by sourcing fruit from our respected vineyards. We strive to showcase each vineyard’s specific terroir, all while showcasing each brand’s creativity. The results are wines that are as adaptive and exciting as the journey we take in crafting them.
The Tooth & Nail Winery castle is where you’ll find the tasting room and event venue. We add variety to the Paso Robles winery neighborhood both in wines and ambiance. Our House of Wine meets industrial tasting room is based in history but modern, much like our labels and our wines. We embrace the fun space that it is, while keeping wine quality at the core of everything we do.

Name: Naveen Distillery
Description:
Naveen Distillery (formerly know as Anand Distillery), is a family owned and operated contract beverage manufacturer and bottler based in the southern region of the state in Goa, India.

We offer a range of services from private label product development to co-packing, manufacturing, and warehousing of shelf stable alcoholic beverages.

We cater to a wide market segment from start-ups just getting off the ground to well established larger players and provide a suite of equipment that allows us to fulfill a broad range of projects.

We hold ourselves up to the highest of standards, and have been part of this industry since 1962. We have an immense amount of knowledge from years of experience as a liquor manufacturer, and continue to expand our practices each and every day. We supply many domestic companies with a variety of innovative products & services, created with the greatest degree of precision and care.

With a strong focus on customer satisfaction and wealth of in house technical and industry knowledge we strive to deliver great results and build lasting partnerships with our customers and suppliers.

Name: Château Mauvinon
Description:
Château Mauvinon est une propriété viticole familiale de 6,5 hectares située sur la prestigieuse appellation de Saint Emilion. 

C’est avant tout l’histoire d’une famille, celle des Tribaudeau, réunis par un amour commun de la viticulture. L’histoire de bâtiments du 19ème siècle à la fois maison de famille, chai de vinification et d’élevage. C’est enfin l’histoire de vins de grande qualité  produits de manière confidentielle et authentique dans le respect du fruit et du terroir.

Le domaine est conduit en Agriculture Biologique dans le respect de la structure des sols et dans une volonté de transmettre aux générations futures une terre saine et vivante. 

Le partage et la transmission fondent la richesse des Tribaudeau. Gabriel Lauzat, l’arrière-arrière grand-père fut l’un des premiers viticulteurs en Algérie Française et transmit aux générations qui lui ont succédé son esprit pionnier.

Brigitte Tribaudeau dirige aujourd’hui avec beaucoup de dynamisme Château Mauvinon. Des travaux d’ampleur débutés à son initiative  donnent à Mauvinon un souffle nouveau.

Name: Azienda Agricola Albino Piona e Figli
Description: The winery Albino Piona has been producing and selling wine with passion and skill for four generations. Founded in the year 1893, it is located in the area of the hills around Custoza: a land rich in history, culture and wine tours, close to Lake Garda and just a few kilometers from Verona. Right in the heart of the production area of Custoza D.O.C. and Bardolino D.O.C. In the framework of such a landscape, modeled by a mild climate, vine growing has been intertwined with history for centuries. The headquarter in Prabiano di Villafranca, Località Casa Palazzina, is the company’s beating heart. Here is where tradition and innovation meet thanks to a constant commitment and the restyling strongly wanted by brothers Silvio, Monica, Alessandro and Massimo, that is the sons and daughter of the owner Albino, named after the founder. Surrounded by a picturesque landscape, among vineyards and a gorgeous nature, the headquarter serves as a visitor center as well, where you can experience wine, local food, art and culture. There, visitors and customers may profit from a point of sale of the wines produced by the vinery, decorative objects and a wide choice of gift baskets (deliveries both in Italy and abroad directly from the company). A relaxation area is also available, where you can enjoy your wine tastings and a good book. Last but not least: a special area is dedicated to cultural, art and wine and food events in spring and summer (consult our website). Guided tours through the vinery and its key places are possible upon request, as well as tastings and ad hoc services (all upon prior booking). For four generations, the winery Albino Piona has been handing down its love for wine and a strong respect for the environment, along with new experiences and in a convivial atmosphere.

Name: Maison PALMA
Description:
La MAISON PALMA est une entreprise française de production d'identité visuelle qui met en lumière vos produits.

Votre priorité est de créer des vins d'exception, la nôtre est de les révéler.

Name: Vins Kressmann
Description:
Kressmann has been a wine merchant in Bordeaux since 1871 and has expertise in all aspects of wine production, from sourcing in the vineyard to distribution in fifty countries.
The company initiated its first partnerships with winegrowing families in the 19th century and today has exclusive distribution of more than thirty Châteaux, representing the remarkable diversity of Bordeaux’s vineyards. Committed to a more environmentally-friendly approach, over the next three years, 100% of our portfolio of brands and châteaux will have some form of environmental certification, mostly in Organic Agriculture (AB).
The company is also a leader in the blending of brand name wines, of which Edouard Kressmann was a pioneer with the creation of Kressmann Monopole in 1897, one of the first Bordeaux brands. Today, Thomas Drouineau continues to deploy this expertise with the development of authentic wines for contemporary tastes that bring people together to enjoy the simple pleasure of sharing.

Name: Hazlitt 1852 Vineyards
Description:
There are two stories here — ours and yours.

Our story goes something like this.

Back in 1852, David Hazlitt bought 153 acres of fruit trees and vineyards here in Hector, NY. Over the next six generations, various Hazlitts farmed the land, raised families and made wine. OK, we don’t know for sure that they all made wine, but given the great grapes that grow here and the current generation’s track record for producing amazing wine, we’ve got a feeling they did.

We do know for sure that in 1985, Jerry and Elaine Hazlitt founded Hazlitt 1852 Vineyards. Today, our family keeps the tradition going. Our grapes make award-winning wines. Our wines make us new friends. And we love making both.

Did it start with dinner with friends at one of those chic little restaurants in the Finger Lakes, with us at the horseshoe bar in our tasting room or with a special someone on a first-date picnic? Maybe it was our Cabernet Franc that made you a Hazlitt fan. Or a Riesling or a Sauvignon Blanc. Was it love at first sip with our legendary Ice Wine or did our Red Cat bring on a different sort of romantic mood? Everybody’s got a Hazlitt story—and if you don’t, click on our website to get started.

We work hard to create quality products, and we want people to enjoy them responsibly. Hazlitt does not condone or encourage any irresponsible use of our products, and no words, images or information on this website should be construed otherwise. Alcoholic beverages can only be purchased by people 21 years of age or older.

Hazlitt 1852 Vineyards, Hector, NY 14841

Name: VINS+VINS
Description:
Né de la Passion pour le vin et basé à Bordeaux, VINS+VINS est un Négociant-Spécialiste Leader en France dans les Cadeaux d’affaires (Vins et Champagnes) aux entreprises et aux Comités d’entreprise.

Fort de ses 4 500 références composant un stock de 3 millions de bouteilles de tous les plus grands vignobles français dont 400 000 Grands Crus Classés.
VINS+VINS fournit aussi les grossistes, les cavistes et les sites internet spécialisés.

En s’appuyant sur une logistique nationale très performante, VINS+VINS livre également n’importe quel particulier d’une simple bouteille à une palette complète.

Expertise, qualité de la relation et réactivité sont nos maîtres-mots.

Name: Carboy Winery
Description: Since 2016, our award-winning wines have helped lift the Colorado wine industry into prominence as a wine region ripe with possibilities. Through ambitious winemaking and innovation with new varietal wines, sparkling wines, and wine seltzers, we have helped turn a state known for its beer into one that creates exciting and adventurous wines. We craft impactful wines that reveal the extraordinary terroir, and unmistakable typicity of Colorado's Grand Valley and Washington's Horse Heaven Hills AVA's.

Name: Spirits & Colori srl
Description: Creata nel 2016, Spirits & Colori, che e il segmento di Vino & Design , dedicato a i Spirits Super Premium, importazione di Brands da tutto il mondo e distribuito su tutto il territorio nazionale italiano.

Name: Pieroth UK
Description:
A warm welcome to Ferdinand Pieroth!

The House of Ferdinand Pieroth has always been synonymous with German viticulture, strong family tradition and quality of life. Excellent customer service and the expertise acquired over many years have made us the undisputed market leaders in direct wine sales all over the world.

At the heart of the extensive range of wines offered by Ferdinand Pieroth are German quality wines from the Nahe and adjacent wine-producing regions. In addition, due to our close network of winemakers from around the world, we are regarded as a reliable authority on international wines.

Why not convince yourself of the excellent quality of our wines by visiting us, or simply make an appointment to arrange a personal wine-tasting?


325 years of family tradition

The history of the Pieroth family dates back to 1675. In fact, the company is still headquartered at our home, the original mansion house built in Burg Layen in 1731,  where friends of Pieroth wines can visit our traditional wine estate and small wine museum.

In 1953, the idea first proposed by Elmar and Kuno Pieroth underwent a further revolution: the introduction of personal home wine-tastings. This innovation laid the foundations for the company's rise to its current size and international reputation.

Name: Domaine du Cinquau
Description:
Havre de calme et de verdure à 10 minutes de Pau, le domaine du Cinquau, producteur de vins AOC Jurançon et Jurançon sec raflant régulièrement les éloges de la presse spécialisée, vous accueille dans un cadre unique, un site d’exception entre vallons verdoyants, vignes et théâtre de verdure.

Au cœur des chais, que l’on aperçoit par une splendide baie vitrée, une salle à l’acoustique parfaite et au spectaculaire plafond de bois vous ouvre de nombreuses possibilités devant l’immense cour d’accueil donnant sur les vignes baignées de lumière.

Avec son architecture traditionnelle, la salle des Cadets, de dimension plus modeste, est prolongée par la terrasse Cyrano dominant les vignes de Petit Manseng.

L’équipe du Domaine est à votre écoute et vous accueillera avec plaisir pour vous faire découvrir ses espaces dont vous avez déjà un aperçu sur ces pages !

Nous pouvons également vous aider dans l’organisation de votre évènement : différentes animations autour du vin (dégustations, visites), conseils de prestataires de qualité, élaboration d’une carte des vins sur mesure…

Name: One Bar Group
Description:
One Bar Group leverer eksklusive barløsninger til alle typer events - uanset størrelse. Vores speciale er cocktailcatering, men vi leverer lige så gennemførte løsninger på komplette barløsninger med vin, øl etc. Se vores eksklusive og innovative barsetups her: www.onebargroup.dk/barsetups

Vi er distributør af G-Rack moduler i Skandinavien.

Vi har et inspirerende netværk af ligesindede bag os, og har igennem årene skabt en stærk række af serviceydelser og barløsninger, som kan skaleres til både store virksomheds- og privatfester, festivaler eller venues. 

Vi bruger eksklusive G-Rack barmoduler som vores primære barsetups men vi har også containbarer og barvogne. Vi hjælper gerne festivaler og byfester med at afvikle barer så de kan driftes effektivt og uden for meget svind. Til festivaler og gadefester har forskellige variationer af 20 fods containere med tilhørende udendørsmiljøer. Vi har efter logistikteam samt 90 bartendere, barchefer og barsupervisorer.

Name: Good Spirits Distributing
Description: Good Spirits Distributing is not an ordinary beverage distributor. Over the years we have distinguished ourselves by bringing a small town feel to the booming Las Vegas market. With a combination of a great team, a sense of community, and a dedication to our brands, we have made it our mission to help craft distillers, breweries and wineries break into and thrive in the Las Vegas market.

Name: Quinta da Marmeleira
Description: A região do Alenquer que é considerada “Cidade Europeia Dos Vinhos”. Neste paraíso europeu, pode-se ver o espaço amplo e desfrutar da beleza natural. As montanhas onduladas e o clima agradável, atribui as Uvas, uma cor uniforme e uma qualidade superior. A equipa técnica batalhadora, trabalha na produção de um vinho, a Quinta da Marmeleira localiza-se em Portugal, na cidade de Lisboa, mais precisamente de uma fragância rica e um sabor sem fim.

Name: Spottswoode Estate Vineyard & Winery
Description: First planted to wine grapes in 1882, Spottswoode Estate Vineyard & Winery was established by the Novak family in 1982. Now stewarded by second generation sisters, Beth Novak and Lindy Novak, Spottswoode crafts an elegant, balanced and age-worthy Cabernet that captures the character of the vintage and the complexity of the legendary estate vineyard. Spottswoode has been noted as “one of Napa Valley’s First-Growth wines and vineyards.”

Name: Académie Amorim
Description:
Créée en 1992, l’Académie Amorim est constituée de personnalités à la recherche du « vin juste » . 
Elle organise chaque année un concours doté de 5 000 à 10 000 euros.
Tous les ans, elle remet son « Grand-prix Sciences & Recherche » à un chercheur pour des travaux de thèse de doctorat ayant permis d’améliorer les connaissances sur le vin et son environnement. 
Les années paires, l’institution décerne également son « Grand-Prix Innovation & Développement » à un jeune entrepreneur ayant réalisé un projet novateur dans le domaine du vin. 
L'événement annuel de Remise de Prix de l’Académie Amorim est l’occasion pour ses Membres d’ouvrir le débat sur les grands thèmes d’actualité du monde vite-vinicole.

Name: Zorzettig Vini
Description: ZORZETTIG VINI

Name: Vigna Rampante Wines
Description:
Ogni etichetta Vigna Rampante racconta un pezzo della nostra storia, della nostra filosofia e delle nostre ambizioni.
Lo spirito di Vigna Rampante è libero e frizzante anche nel suo lato più brado, indomabile e impetuoso.
Facciamo scelte dirompenti, controcorrente, creando prodotti nuovi che rispettino le radici ma che guardino alla novità anche fuori dagli schemi.

Name: Château de Chantegrive
Description:
Si vous aimez les belles histoires, en voici une ... La nôtre débute en 1966, lorsque Henri et Françoise Lévêque décident de créer ce qui deviendra plus tard le Château de Chantegrive. 

Françoise et Henri formaient ce qu'on pourrait appeler "un duo de choc". Un couple de passionnés, visionnaires et amoureux du vin. Ils croyaient en ce magnifique terroir de Graves, c'est ce qui les décidera à vendre leur précieuse collection de timbres pour acquérir leurs deux premiers hectares. 

La suite est une success story, un travail acharné toujours tourné vers l'avenir et les nouvelles technologies ainsi qu'un besoin d'être toujours présent auprès de leurs employés et de la vigne. "C'est le travail de toute une vie, c'est un rêve que l'on pousse toujours plus loin"

55 ans après et 96 hectares plus loin, Chantegrive a laissé place à la nouvelle génération. Les cinq enfants ont repris le directoire aux côtés de leur mère et Marie-Hélène Lévêque continue avec passion le travail de ses parents.

Membre de  l’Union des Grands Crus de Bordeaux depuis 1985, le domaine connaît une réelle impulsion dès 2006 grâce aux conseils avisés de M. Hubert de Boüard. 

Limiter l'impact de la production sur l'environnement a toujours été une priorité au Château de Chantegrive. En juillet 2017, la certification HVE 3 vient apporter la preuve du travail réalisé et la volonté d'améliorer de façon continue les performances environnementales de la propriété.

Name: Franklin's Wine
Description:
Franklin’s Wine is a vibrant wine bar located in the heart of Notting Hill, offering a thoughtfully curated selection of wines from medium-priced gems to exclusive high-end bottles. Our inviting space is perfect for casual gatherings, intimate dates, and special celebrations. Guided by our expert in-house sommeliers, we provide memorable wine-tasting experiences and personalized recommendations to suit every palate. Whether you’re a seasoned wine enthusiast or simply looking to unwind, Franklin’s Wine promises a warm, welcoming environment to enjoy quality wines with friends, family, or colleagues.

We offer:
- Curated selection of wines in an inviting wine bar setting
- Expert guidance and wine-tasting experiences
- Private hire for events and special occasions

Name: Livermore Valley Wine Community
Description:
With more than 50 award-winning wineries, championship golf courses, renowned restaurants and accommodations to suit every taste, we offer you a relaxing wine country experience and a personality that makes guests feel like old friends.

Location:  In the San Francisco Bay appellation, 30 miles east of San Francisco. Both the Livermore Valley and San Francisco Bay appellations are within the larger Central Coast appellation.

Appellation: Livermore Valley boasts one of the original U.S. appellations granted by the BATF way back in October, 1982. This designation was largely based on the unique, gravel-based soils and the marine winds that are drawn into the valley every afternoon from San Francisco Bay.

Geography: The Livermore Valley has an east-west orientation, making it unique among northern California winegrowing regions. It is 15 miles long (east to west), 10 miles wide (north to south), and surrounded by coastal range mountains and foothills.

Climate: The east-west orientation of the valley allows the coastal fog and marine breezes to come in from the Pacific Ocean and the San Francisco Bay and cool the valley’s warm air, resulting in warm days and cool nights ideal conditions for producing fully-ripened, balanced fruit.

Soil: Primarily gravel with excellent drainage, a soil type that reduces the vines’ vigor and increases flavor concentration in the grapes.

Name: BRASSERIE PAGE 24 - SAINT GERMAIN
Description: Brasserie produisant des bières artisanales dans la région des Hauts-de-France.

Name: Los Dos Tequila
Description: Los Dos is a 100% agave tequila and the only tequila with “no additives” approved to be on the label. Crafted at nom 1414 in Arandas, Los Dos is made with traditional methods. Los Dos is one of the best tequila’s you’ll ever taste. On tequilamatchmaker.com (the ratings you should really care about), Los Dos is one of the top rated active base blanco’s with a panel rating of 90 and community rating of 93. Los Dos has a mission to educate consumers that quality tequila exists and it’s what they should be drinking. The team is based in NYC and currently fully focused on NYC.

Name: Sa'd Abujaber & Sons Co. Ltd.
Description: Agent distributor and supplier of the world’s finest selection of wines, spirits, liqueurs, and beers.

Name: Cellar2Cellar
Description:
𝐻𝑎𝑛𝑑-𝑝𝑖𝑐𝑘𝑒𝑑 𝑤𝑖𝑛𝑒𝑠 𝑓𝑜𝑟 𝑦𝑜𝑢𝑟 𝐻𝑜𝑚𝑒 𝐶𝑒𝑙𝑙𝑎𝑟.

Following your buying trends, we will keep your home cellar not only filled with the best wines in South Africa but also build value through helping you invest in great wines.

We shall also help advising you to ensure your wines are kept under the best possible condition when storing them and when the best time or occasion will be to open these special bottles.

Your fantastic wine journey will be extended to food and other lifestyle experiences 𝗶𝗻 𝘆𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗛𝗼𝗺𝗲 through our lifestyle partners. By joining us, these partners will offer exceptional value to you and the more you invest in your wine journey, the more you will be rewarded through our 𝗹𝗼𝘆𝗮𝗹𝘁𝘆 𝗰𝗹𝘂𝗯!

Name: Champagne Delphine REVILLON
Description:
Marque Champagne contemporaine qui affirme sa délicatesse par des cuvées féminines et raffinées. 
La Maison de Champagne Delphine REVILLON cultive ce plaisir de vous faire ressentir la Région Champagne.
Elle déniche et sélectionne le meilleur de ce terroir d'exception, pour en révéler toute sa richesse et sa diversité. Véritable signature d'une jeune maison au style audacieux, ses cuvées tout en raffinement composées par le Chef de Cave, Richard DAILLY, révèlent la diversité d'assemblages des plus beaux cépages Champenois. Expression d'un plaisir pur, les notes fines et gourmandes des 4 cuvées vous transportent pour un instant de dégustation accessible et magnétique.

Name: Mornington Peninsula Wine
Description:
One hour south of Melbourne, 200 vineyards and 55 cellar doors open to showcase  Pinot Noir, Chardonnay, Pinot Grigio and Shiraz. Annual event calendar available. Industry association of winemakers and grape growers. 

The Mornington Peninsula Vignerons Association Inc (MPVA) is the official industry association representing Mornington Peninsula Wineries.

The current plantings in the region started in 1972...

The Mornington Peninsula Wine Region is a special place where vines thrive in sheltered undulating valleys nurtured by a cool maritime climate creating elegant, personality-packed award-winning wines - predominantly Pinot Noir and Chardonnay with Pinot Grigio and Shiraz a smaller presence.

Mornington Peninsula's signature wine? It is supple & alluring, coaxing elegant and delicate varietal characters from the locally grown Pinot Noir. Appropriately, the region's wines show great finesse but don't be fooled by any apparent delicacy, as these wines are packed full of intensity, structure & texture.

Name: Sociable Cider Werks LLC
Description: Tucked into a quiet nook of Northeast Minneapolis, Sociable Cider Werks started small, but has steadily grown over the years to be a big name in the Minneapolis craft brew scene. Sociable brews fresh-pressed apples with fruits, grains, hops  spices for innovative libations best shared with a friend. It's a decidedly different approach to cider... and that's why we like it!

Name: WhataHoot Distillery
Description: WhataHoot Distillery

Name: Blackbird Vineyards
Description:
Blackbird Vineyards is an artisanal producer of Bordeaux-inspired
wines from the Napa Valley.

Name: La Huaracha Casa Destiladora
Description:
We’re a distiller house that produces agave spirits. We cultivate agaves in our fields located in Western Mexico, just the way that we have been doing it for many generations.

An ancient Mexican legend says, that the goddess Mayahuel gave agave spirits to men to make them happy, and we know that different beverages derived from agave have been made for many centuries. 

Our mission is to bring these spirits to the world, delivering a premium product. We’re vertically integrated since we grow, produce and distribute our own product, making us your most reliable partner.

We have expertise in the B2B sector, offering you bulk and bottling solutions. We can produce all kinds of tequila:
-Tequila 100% agave
-Tequila
-Mezcal 

We have a sustainable business model, taking care of our land and the community that supports us is our priority. Our processes are backed up by national and international certifications.

Name: AOC Touraine
Description:
L’Appellation d’Origine Contrôlée (AOP) Touraine, née en 1939, est l’une des appellations viticoles les plus importantes du Val de Loire. Entre Chambord et Azay-le-Rideau, en passant par Chenonceaux et Chaumont-sur-Loire, le vignoble de l’AOP Touraine s’étire paisiblement au fil de la Loire et de ses affluents. Au cœur du jardin de la France, 5 000 hectares de vignes se déploient en surplomb de la Loire, le long du Cher, dans les départements de l’Indre-et-Loire (37) et du Loir-et-Cher (41).

L’AOP Touraine comprend cinq dénominations géographiques, qui enrichissent chacune la personnalité des vins et soulignent la spécificité des terroirs :
- Touraine-Amboise
- Touraine Azay-le-Rideau
- Touraine-Chenonceaux
- Touraine- Mesland
- Touraine-Oisly

L’AOP Touraine produit depuis son origine des vins en 4 couleurs :
- Vins blancs aromatiques et floraux,
- Vins rouges tendres et fruités,
- Vins rosés légers et délicats,
- Fines bulles blanches et rosées pleines de légèreté.

Name: Champagne MANDOIS
Description:
The “birth certificate“ of the Mandois vineyards dates back to 1735 when the family decided to acquire some vineyards in Champagne. 
At that time, Jean Mandois, a contemporary of Brother Oudart, possessed and worked a few plots of vines on the hillsides of Epernay. 
1860 was a revolutionary year in the long family history. This was the year when Jean Mandois’ great-grandson, Victor Mandois, a visionary and trailblazer, took the decision that he would vinify and sell the wines of Champagne in Epernay.

Thanks to Victor’s passion for his craft, shared by the ensuing generations inspired by his work, Champagne Mandois is now available around the world and is reputed to be among the great Champagne Houses.

In 2015, 2/3 of the production is exported and the Champagne House is today overseen by Claude Mandois (born 1961). 
Representing the 9th generation since Jean Mandois, it is now his turn to safeguard the interests of the family shareholders. 
As an independent Champagne House, Mandois has the freedom to make the right decisions for the long term and is able to ensure the perennity of the style and quality of its Champagnes. Combining tradition and modernity, the Mandois family therefore remains faithful to the time-honored values of the Champagne Houses.

Name: Off Hours Spirits
Description: Off Hours Bourbon is meant to engage our senses and change perceptions. It’s not about preconceived notions of artisanal cocktails and dimly lit bars. It’s for everyone, everywhere.

Name: COVIP - Companhia de Vinhos Portugueses
Description:
A COVIP nasceu no ano de 2016 com o objectivo de reunir um portefólio de grande qualidade de vinhos nacionais e estrangeiros, aos quais juntámos destilados e cervejas artesanais. Criámos também a nossa marca própria “Plano” que aborda quatro regiões vitivinícolas: Alentejo, Bairrada, Dão e Douro.

Fizemos também uma selecção criteriosa de vinhos estrangeiros, com castas internacionais e autóctones, do Chile à África do Sul, passando pela Nova Zelândia, Israel, EUA, Argentina, Itália e França. Representamos em Portugal alguns dos melhores produtores de cada um destes países.

Mas o portefólio da COVIP estende-se muito para além dos vinhos, pois comercializamos Cognas, Armagnacs, Rum e algumas das melhores cervejas artesanais do mundo.

Principais marcas comercializadas: Quinta do Pégo, Castello Banfi, Lhéraud, Doña Paula, Klein Constantia, Kendall-Jackson, Dezzani, Santa Rita, Plaisir de Merle, Darling Cellars.

Name: Newport Vineyards
Description:
Founded by John & Paul Nunes in 1995, Newport Vineyards is the largest grower of grapes in New England. The winery produces over 30,000 cases of estate-grown wine each year through sustainable farming methods on nearly 100-acres of historically preserved farmland. In 2015 Newport Vineyards completed a multi-million dollar renovation and 30,000-square foot expansion; including Brix Restaurant, Taproot Brewing Company (opened 2018), the Marketplace at Newport Vineyards, a new fermentation tank room and barrel room, and an event venue.

The vineyard today boasts a fully farm-to-table and 100% scratch cooking program amongst their two restaurants and full in-house catering department. The events team produces over 150 private events a year from weddings, to corporate functions, private tours and tastings, luncheons, and more. Tour, taste and dine in our winery, Taproot Brewery and Brix Restaurant. Shop in our Marketplace, or enjoy a lively entertainment program from live music, to festivals, cooking classes, comedy shows and more.

Name: Domaine Vincent Girardin
Description: Situé à Meursault, le domaine Vincent Girardin couvre 32 hectares parmi les plus beaux terroirs de la côte de Beaune avec une diversité unique sur les villages de Meursault, Chassagne-Montrachet, Pommard, Puligny-Montrachet, Saint-Romain et Volnay. Les parcelles de vignes sont conduites selon les principes de la biodynamie. En cave, le maître mot est la non-intervention afin de magnifier les grands terroirs de la Bourgogne. « Les vins sont l’aboutissement d’une recherche de pureté et d’équilibre. »

Name: KEVAS
Description:
KEVAS est né de l'association de deux amis, Kevin & Valentin, qui partagent une passion commune : le rhum arrangé.

Spécialisés dans la conception, fabrication et commercialisation de rhum arrangé haut de gamme, nous proposons un produit unique qui marie un assemblage et une macération de précision. Le parfait équilibre de nos recettes est issue d'un savoir-faire artisanal 100% naturel.

Un objectif : faire renaître les saveurs du rhum arrangé des terroirs français d'outre-mer.

Name: Samai Distillery
Description:
Samai Distillery is a Handcraft Rum & Spirits Distiller, the first local brand to produce Premium Rum in Cambodia. We use only the finest Cambodian raw materials, such as top-quality molasses, Kampot Pepper (the most aromatic and delicious pepper in the world), between many others.

Samai Distillery is open to the public on Thursdays, giving you a chance to experience the first batch of our Premium Rums, including:
- Samai White Rum.
- Samai Gold Rum.
- Samai Kampot Pepper Rum.
- Samai PX Rum Liqueur.
- other new products in the pipeline.

Name: DOMAINE RINAUDO
Description:
Depuis cinq générations, notre famille cultive la vigne à Ramatuelle, au cœur de la presqu’île de Saint-Tropez.
En 2022, nous, Guillaume et Damien Rinaudo, avons décidé de concrétiser notre projet en créant notre propre domaine viticole. Les débuts se sont faits modestement, avec la vinification de 4 hectares dans le garage familial.
En parallèle, nous avons entamé la conversion vers l’agriculture biologique et lancé la construction de notre domaine, qui s’est achevée en 2024. Aujourd’hui, nous cultivons 16 hectares de vignes et sommes fiers de proposer des vins labellisés biologiques sous l’appellation Côtes de Provence. Nos cuvées incluent des rosés, blancs et rouges.
Nous avons également ouvert un espace dédié aux dégustations, visites, et événements privés, tels que des mariages, des anniversaires, des baptêmes etc.

Name: Greek Wine Cellars D. Kourtakis S.A.
Description:
“Greek Wine Cellars – D. Kourtakis S.A.” was established in 1895 by Vassilis Kourtakis (1865 – 1946),
the first Greek oenologist in contemporary Greece with degree in oenology.
In the late 1960’s, Vassilis Kourtakis, the third generation of the Kourtakis family and today’s Chairman
and Managing Director of “Greek Wine Cellars – D. Kourtakis S.A.”, took over the company’s
reins. 
In the mid-1980’s Vassilis Kourtakis created a state-of-the-art winery in Ritsona, Viotia. The company
adopted cutting-edge winemaking methods and engaged in the production of a new range of
non-resinated wines. In 1985, the company launched its Apelia range.
In 1992, due to rapid pace of growth of the export, occurred the need to expand its wine portfolio,
thus it led the company to collaboration with Calliga winery. “Greek Wine Cellars” would take over
both the production and sales of the Calliga products in Greece and abroad, thus adding a premium
quality range of wines to its own portfolio. The thrive of exports expanded over 32 countries around
the world. In 2000 exports accounted for nearly half of the company’s annual turnover. Rapidly the
“Greek Wine Cellars” expanded; through strategic and carefully planned collaborations.
In 2004, the company bought 50% of the share capital of “Oenoforos S.A.”, consequently selling
the “boutique” wines of the noted and respected winemaker, Angelos Rouvalis.                 
In late 2009 “Greek Wine Cellars” began a co-operation with the group “Grands Chais de France”
to distribute the GCF products in Greece. Subsequently, “Greek Wine Cellars” added to its product
range a renowned selection of imported wines, that were previously entirely absent, thereby
complementing the company’s own portfolio of Greek wines.
● In 2010, “Greek Wine Cellars” became the sole distributor of the Babatzim products in both Greece
and abroad. Anestis Babatzimopoulos is a gifted winemaker who produces the famous ouzo and tsipouro

Name: The Bordeaux Distilling Company
Description:
The Bordeaux Distilling Company is an urban distillery located on the shores of the river Garonne in the northern district of Bacalan.

All our products are carefully designed, crafted, and bottled on-site in small batches with passion and without dogmatism.

Come and see for yourself.

Name: Voluptatem
Description:
Voluptatem est une communauté d’investisseurs, emmenée par deux hommes, hédonistes et engagés, Fabien Revol et Guillaume Mauffrey, rassemblée dans le but de faire vivre ou revivre de beaux terroirs bios français ou européens. 
La communauté s’est constituée en 2019, autour d’un premier projet, le rachat du Domaine de Brau, près de Carcassonne. 

Sous l’impulsion de Fabien et Guillaume, ce vignoble bio d'exception, pionnier de l’agriculture biologique, a su éveiller l’intérêt de cinquante investisseurs venus du monde entier. Si ses vins et spiritueux ont déjà acquis une renommée internationale, le projet consiste à déployer Brau et faire connaître ses caves et ses collections au-delà de ses marchés actuels, auprès du plus grand nombre d’amateurs de vins accessibles bios et bons.   

Le Domaine de Brau constitue la première étape de l’aventure Voluptatem. 
Ce qui les anime ? Le plaisir de bien faire, de faire du bon et de voir mûrir durablement leur investissement.  


Voluptatem is a community of investors, led by two men, hedonists and committed, Fabien Revol and Guillaume Mauffrey, brought together with the aim of bringing to life or reviving beautiful organic French or European terroirs.

The community was formed in 2019, around a first project, the takeover of Brau wine estate, near Carcassonne in the South of France.

Under the leadership of Fabien and Guillaume, this exceptional organic vineyard, a pioneer of organic farming, has aroused the interest of fifty investors from all over the world. While its wines and spirits have already acquired international fame, the project consists of deploying Brau and making its cellars and collections known beyond its current markets, to the greatest number of amateurs of accessible organic and good wines.

Brau is the first step in the Voluptatem adventure. . What drives them? The pleasure of doing well, doing something good and seeing their investment mature over time.

Name: The House of Somrus
Description: SomruS, meaning "Nectar of the Gods," has roots dating back to 2600 B.C. as a divine beverage which, when drunk by humans, was purported to prevent the body from degeneration. Although SomPriya has not cracked the code for immortality, the company's modern interpretation is created using an intricate blend of eastern spices, nuts & cream to produce an authentic liquescent taste of the Indian subcontinent, all housed in a custom gold-coated, UV protected glass bottle inspired by an ancient Indian decanter. Using proprietary techniques, SomPriya artfully blends pure dairy cream & hand-crafted Caribbean Rum with the luscious flavors of cardamom, saffron, almonds, pistachios & rose to create a 21st century incarnation of SomruS – The Original Indian Cream Liqueur. Meant to be enjoyed on its own, mixed in a cocktail, baked in a dessert or added to a cup of chai, SomruS reinvents the taste, tranquility & euphoria of drinking the mythical elixir of the Gods.

Name: The Warehouse, Hanoi, Vietnam
Description: Oldest wine importer and distributor in Vietnam of Wines and Beverages, The Warehouse get actually the best portfolio in South-Est Asia.

Name: Grands Crus Paris
Description:
Depuis bientôt 20 ans, la société Grands Crus Paris propose une gamme de vins d'allocations français et internationaux issus des domaines parmi les plus prestigieux. 

Avec plus de 100.000 bouteilles en stock et 2.500 références différentes, Grands Crus Paris s'impose comme un leader de la vente de vins fins en France. 

1 Société, 4 Métiers :

Caviste Parisien : Notre métier historique
Notre établissement "La Cave de Sèvres" est localisé au 123 rue de Sèvres à Paris (6ème).

E-Commerce :  Nous avons lancé notre site internet www.crus.fr, cherchant à répondre aux demandes des collectionneurs de vins français.

Vente CHRs : Nous représentons auprès des professionnels de restauration des vignerons Français et Étrangers :
- André Brunel | Les Cailloux - Rhône
- Château Fleur Cardinale - St Emilion
- Lopez de Heredia - Rioja - Espagne
- Passopiciaro - Etna - Italie

Cadeaux d'Affaires : Nous développons une offre de Cadeaux d'affaires sur mesure pour répondre à tous les besoins :
- Motiver et récompenser vos collaborateurs (Offre dédiée CSE)
- Remercier vos fournisseurs
- Fidéliser et tisser des liens privilégiés avec vos clients

Quelques domaines en allocations directs chez Grands Crus Paris:

Bourgogne > Domaine Leroy, Domaine d’Auvenay, Domaine Ponsot, Vincent Dauvissat, Etienne Sauzet, Jean-Louis Trapet, Domaine de Villaine, Buisson-Charles,  Jean-Marc Millot, Dugat-Py, Clos de Tart,  Domaine des Lambrays …

Rhône Sud > Henri Bonneau,  Beaucastel, Clos des Papes, Janasse, St Prefert

Rhône Nord > Jaboulet, Yann Chave, Vincent Paris, Alain Graillot

Loire > Coulée de Serrant, Vincent Pinard, Antoine Sanzay, Guiberteau

Champagne > Savart, Agrapart, Bérèche, Philipponnat, George Laval, Krug, Don Perignon, Bollinger

Bordeaux > Lafite-Rothschild, Haut-Brion

Autres régions > Ganevat (Jura), Foillard (Beaujolais),

Name: Familia Belasco Wineries
Description:
Grupo La Navarra is a Spanish family owned group of wine and liquor producing companies. The mother Company is Destilerias La Navarra S.A. It was established in the eighteen hundreds. We make and commercialise fruit liquors. We are leaders of the sector in Spain. Currently, the following companies belong to our Group:
 
Destilerías La Navarra:  fruit liquors
Bodegas Marco Real:  wine D.O. Navarra - Spain
Señorio de Andión:  wine D.O. Navarra - Spain
Viñedos de Villaester:  wine D.O. Toro – Spain
Viña del Sopié:  wine D.O. Rueda - Spain
Bodega Belasco de Baquedano: wine from Mendoza - Argentina
 
Juan Ignacio Belasco is the President of the Group and his passion is wine.   In the beginning of the 90’s Mr. Belasco acquired  most of the shares of Bodegas Marco Real located in D.O. Navarra. This was the first step in the creation of the wine division in the La Navarra Group, known today as Familia Belasco. 

Our main export markets are United States, Germany, Holland, United Kingdom, Brazil, France, Switzerland, Belgium, Japan, China.

Name: Castell d'Or
Description:
Castell d’Or is the legacy of the first cooperatives founded at the end of the 19th and turn of the 20th century. Today, we are a total of 16 cooperatives, representing more than 2,200 families who work the land with love and respect for nature.
United by a shared objective, to build a common business with value, character, tradition... a real “Castell d’Or” (Golden Castle), which enables the development of the activity of our members, who are the direct beneficiaries of their work.

At Castell d’Or we have been selecting the finest vines and using modern facilities to create exclusive, Premium category wines since 2005.

------------------------------------------------------------
Castell d’Or és l’herència de les primeres cooperatives fundades a finals del s. XIX i principis del s. XX. En l’actualitat, som un total de 16 cooperatives, que representen a més de 2.200 famílies pageses que treballen amb amor i respecte a la natura.
Units per un objectiu, construir un projecte comú amb valor, amb caràcter, amb tradició... un veritable Castell d’Or, que
afavoreixi el desenvolupament dels nostres socis, beneficiaris directes del seu esforç.
Des de 2005, a Castell d’Or, seleccionem les millors vinyes i comptem amb modernes instal·lacions per crear un producte exclusiu, amb personalitat i de categoria Prèmium.

Name: Ravine Vineyard Estate Winery
Description:
With 150 years of farming activity, the Lowrey Farm and Ravine Vineyard Estate Winery encompass a historic streetscape of restored and recreated buildings highlighting a significant architectural period. We have a variety of structured venues and spaces to accommodate your group in an intimate and extraordinary setting as well as offer a more customized and spontaneous venue to suit your creativity! 
For corporate and social booking inquiries of any size, please contact our hospitality sales team at 905.262.8463 or by email at events@ravinevineyard.com.

Name: Washington Wine Academy
Description: The Washington Wine Academy (WWA) was founded in 1999 and is a 501c3 Virginia non-profit, dedicated to the promotion and furtherance of wine education.  The WWA is the premier wine school in the region, educating more than 1,000 wine enthusiasts a month and hosts more than 300 wine and beer events a year.  Our founder has a passion for wine and recognized a growing need for wine education in our area.  Over the last twelve years, we have educated more than 150,000 people from both the wine and hospitality industry, to the casual consumer who wants to understand more about their favorite varietal or wine growing region.  Our instructors are extremely knowledgeable and teach to any skill level.  Our classes include introduction to wine, a series of classes focused on different wine producing regions, wine and food pairings classes, as well as three of the top certifications within the wine industry.  In 2009, we were named one of the “Five Best Wine Schools” in the country by Food and Wine magazine.

Name: FAMILLE BOUGRIER
Description:
FAMILLE BOUGRIER est l’une des dernières Maisons familiales et indépendantes à couvrir l’ensemble des vignobles de la Vallée de la Loire du Muscadet jusqu’à Sancerre.
Depuis 1885 et aujourd’hui 6 générations, nous sommes propriétaires de Domaines en Touraine et négociant éleveur-vinificateur: Grâce à notre 3 caves de vinification en Muscadet, Anjou-Saumur et Touraine, nous produisons des vins sur les principaux vignobles de la Vallée de la Loire et nous maîtrisons l’ensemble du processus de vinification depuis la grappe jusqu’a la mise en bouteille. 
FAMILLE BOUGRIER sélectionne les plus beaux raisins provenant de nos meilleurs terroirs pour créer des vins subtils et variés. Que votre plaisir à les déguster soit le reflet de la passion que nous avons mise à les créer.


FAMILLE BOUGRIER is one of the last family owned company covering the whole Loire Valley vineyard from Muscadet to Sancerre since 1885 and now 6 generations. We are vineyards owner (100 Ha in Touraine) and as well winemaker on a large scale thanks to our 3 wineries on the most prestigious Loire Valley vineyards: Muscadet, Anjou, Saumur, Touraine, Vouvray, Sancerre…
Since 133 years, six generations of BOUGRIER have mastered the art of Wine making in Loire Valley, creating delicate and subtle wines while working in the utmost respect of land and people… We wish you a great pleasure tasting our wines.

Name: Omtis Group
Description:
Few companies in Hong Kong have as much experience in the luxury product market as Omtis Limited, a family owned business renowned for the distribution of luxury goods across Asia.

Its roots trace back to Shanghai in 1919, when the Company’s founding father, Mateo Beraha boarded a ship in Marseilles and headed east. He was soon followed by nephews Dario and Albert and together they built a trading company that in 1954 became the Omtis group.

In true entrepreneurial spirit, Omtis developed and invested in businesses as diverse as one of the first cinemas in Shanghai, a semi-industrial operation carving semi-precious stones and up-scale retail jewelry outlets. In 1932, the Company became the sole distributor in China of Omega and Tissot and quickly earned its reputation as the leading distributer of Swiss luxury watches in North Asia.

In 1949, the business was transferred to Hong Kong, with its Headquarters now located in Admiralty Centre, at the heart of Hong Kong's Central District. Established over nearly a century, Omtis group is now a diversified and dynamic company with divisions in Property and Business Services, Financial Investments and Fine Wine.

Name: TEQUILA Studio
Description:
Tequila Consulting for Global Markets.

Research, Trends, Insights and Strategy.

Want to keep on top of the next trend? Follow us!

Name: Ehlers Estate
Description: Ehlers Estate produces world-class Bordeaux varietals from their estate vineyard located on the renowned loamy bench soils just north of the town of St. Helena. Bold, authentic, terroir-driven wines, and one of the best “off the beaten path” visitor experiences in the Napa Valley. 100% of the vineyards are certified organic and biodynamic. Cabernet Sauvignon "1886"

Name: Verschueren & Bermond Alcools
Description:
Verschueren&Bermond Alcools has been manufacturing 100% natural spirits in Paris since 2018.

Our dream? Craft exceptional flavored spirits from natural and local ingredients that everyone will appreciate.

Aurouze, our first Artemisia Umbelliformis liqueur was released in June 2019.

With its unique and floral scent, Aurouze was nominated during the London Spirits Competition in 2020!
Their feedback was overwhelming: "Aurouze is beautifully designed from packaging to taste, nothing has been left out, it's a success!

Our story? Two friends, passionate about the world of wines & spirits, decided to live for their passion: the manufacture of artisanal liquor.

For a year, our two entrepreneurs visited the four corners of France in search of herbs, wood and smells to elaborate new spirits that could be used in any occasion.


Our distribution areas? France / Austria / China & more.

What's next? Nazca. 
A spirit secretly made that will revolutionize the art of cocktails!

For the pleasure of amazement,

Name: Pago de Cirsus Bodega
Description:
Bodega, Hotel y Restaurante Pago de Cirsus. Nuestra misión es el buen hacer con honestidad, compromiso y ganas de crecer. Trabajamos en un ambiente de compañerismo y dinamismo. Gracias a nuestro esfuerzo, hemos conseguido estar dentro de nuestra propia D.O.P. Pago Bolandin, lo cual nos llena de orgullo a nivel nacional e internacional. 

Creemos en el cuidado del medioambiente y apostamos por un mundo con menos contaminación y más consciencia. Cada paso que damos es en pro a nuestros principios de sostenibilidad.

Name: Vignobles Austruy
Description:
Passionné de vins et très avisé dans ses choix, Philippe Austruy a progressivement constitué un groupement de propriétés viticoles à fort potentiel, singulières mais complémentaires. « Réveiller de belles endormies », tel est l’objectif que poursuit depuis maintenant 15 ans le groupe Philippe Austruy, grâce à des investissements, une politique qualitative et un savoir-faire désormais reconnu par tous les spécialistes de la filière vins.

Les Vignobles Austruy regroupent 5 domaines viticoles :
- La Commanderie de Peyrassol à Flassans-sur-Issole (83), en AOP Côtes de Provence
- La Bernarde à Flassans-sur-Issole (83), en AOP Côtes de Provence
- Château Malescasse à Lamarque (33), en appellation Haut-Médoc Crus Bourgeois Exceptionnel
- Tenuta Casenuove en Toscane (Italie), en IGT Toscane et Chianti Classico
- Quinta da Côrte dans le Douro (Portugal), en DOC Douro pour les vins tranquilles et les Portos d'exception

Name: VINSOLITE - Vins & Champagnes
Description:
Boutique de vente de vin sur internet.
Leader français de la vente en ligne de vin de la vallée du Rhône.

Name: Belhara Estate
Description: Belhara Estate is a family winery nestled in the Uco Valley Mendoza of Argentina, The estate is comprised of 3 estate vineyards with altitude between 850 and 1400 meters. Belhara Estate focuses on crafting artisanal red blends and single vineyard wines with their 300 hectares of planted vineyards

Name: ODG Touraine
Description:
L’Appellation d’Origine Contrôlée (AOP) Touraine, née en 1939, est l’une des appellations viticoles les plus importantes du Val de Loire. Entre Chambord et Azay-le-Rideau, en passant par Chenonceaux et Chaumont-sur-Loire, le vignoble de l’AOP Touraine s’étire paisiblement au fil de la Loire et de ses affluents. Au cœur du jardin de la France, 5 000 hectares de vignes se déploient en surplomb de la Loire, le long du Cher, dans les départements de l’Indre-et-Loire (37) et du Loir-et-Cher (41).

L’AOP Touraine comprend cinq dénominations géographiques, qui enrichissent chacune la personnalité des vins et soulignent la spécificité des terroirs :
- Touraine-Amboise
- Touraine Azay-le-Rideau
- Touraine-Chenonceaux
- Touraine- Mesland
- Touraine-Oisly

L’AOP Touraine produit depuis son origine des vins en 4 couleurs :
- Vins blancs aromatiques et floraux,
- Vins rouges tendres et fruités,
- Vins rosés légers et délicats,
- Fines bulles blanches et rosées pleines de légèreté.

Name: Mazurska Manufaktura S.A.
Description:
Mazurska Manufaktura Alkoholi swą siedzibę ma w historycznym browarze w Szczytnie założonym w 1898 roku na rogu ul. Adama Mickiewicza i ul. Bartna Strona, nad brzegiem Jeziora Domowego Dużego. To tutaj wykorzystujemy zarówno tradycję jak i nowoczesne technologie, co znajduje odzwierciedlenie w unikalnym charakterze naszych produktów.

Historia naszej manufaktury to także burzliwe dzieje tego regionu. Zniszczenia wojenne, późniejsze odbudowy czy przemiany ustrojowe nie ominęły naszego kompleksu budynków, który mimo wszystko nie stracił na swoich wartościach i i jest wyjątkowy w skali kraju.

Doceniając wartość architektoniczną i historyczną naszej siedziby, Wojewódzki Konserwator Zabytków w Olsztynie objął ją ochroną prawną, wpisując do rejestru zabytków nieruchomych województwa warmińsko-mazurskiego

Name: Vinos de La Luz
Description: Vinos de La Luz es el grupo vitivinícola que integra las marcas Iluminado, Pagos de Valcerracín, Callejón del Crimen, Valpincia, Cinema, Cinema Italia y Campo Luz.

Name: I Giusti & Zanza Vineyards
Description:
I Giusti & Zanza Vineyards was born in 1996 from the restoration of a historical winery in the Fauglia hills.
Our wines nurtured with a lot of love grow on 17 hectares of vineyards surrounding the small Tuscan village in the Pisa area not far from the Mediterranean Coast.
We follow organic agriculture principles using solely organic and biodynamic compounds. 
The result of our work is a significant variety of wines selected with great passion and a successful story behind every label. 
The awards that our wines get worldwide are proof of our passion and dedication to high-quality standards.

Name: Charles Rolaz, HAMMEL - Terres de Vins
Description:
La maison Hammel – Terres de Vins compte parmi les producteurs de vins les plus renommés de Suisse. Propriété des familles Rolaz & Hammel, l'entreprise est dirigée par Charles Rolaz, représentant la 4ème génération. 

Propriétaire de prestigieux Domaines situés sur les meilleurs terroirs dans les cantons de Vaud et Valais, la société a constitué au fil du temps un patrimoine exceptionnel représentant une collection unique de Domaines, Clos et Châteaux : 1er GC et GC des Domaines de Crochet, Montet, Muraz, Ovaille, Clos de la George et  Clos du Châtelard

La philosophie de la maison est bâtie sur 4 piliers :

Tradition: La famille Rolaz est issue de la grande tradition viti-vinicole. Ses racines vigneronnes remontent au XVème siècle. Sa vocation est de préserver la somme des savoir-faire ancestraux, tout en apportant une créativité et une passion destinée à être transmise  aux générations futures. 

Qualité:  Depuis 1990, Charles Rolaz a fait œuvre de pionnier dans le canton de Vaud en diversifiant de manière importante l’encépagement en sélectionnant des cépages nobles très qualitatifs. Reconnu parmi les meilleurs producteurs de Suisse (Guide meilleurs vignerons - Gault Millau Suisse, membre Mémoire des Vins Suisses et Arte Vitis), l’ambition est d’élaborer des vins d’excellence. Chaque année, les vins sont récompensés par les plus hautes distinctions dans les concours nationaux et internationaux. 

Innovation:  La maison Hammel  se distingue par son esprit d’innovation basé sur une approche scientifique de recherche et développement. Au début des années 90, Charles Rolaz a fait œuvre de pionnier en pays de Vaud en diversifiant de manière importante l’encépagement en sélectionnant des cépages nobles très qualitatifs 

Vitiviniculture durable : 30 ha de vignobles sont cultivés en biodynamie, En choisissant de suivre cette voie, l’objectif est d’affiner encore la démarche qualité en recherchant une symbiose optimale entre la terre, le climat, la vigne et l’homme.

Name: ARPEPE
Description:
Siamo una famiglia di viticoltori che da oltre 150 anni si dedica con passione alla coltivazione del Nebbiolo, un vitigno raro che ha saputo nei secoli adattarsi alla Valtellina: un territorio unico dove tutto viene ancora fatto a mano. Da 5 generazioni “il giusto tempo di attesa” scandisce i ritmi delle nostre scelte ed è così che cerchiamo umilmente di fare un vino che sia l’espressione più pura e sincera della terra e degli uomini che con dedizione la coltivano, come ci ha insegnato nostro padre Arturo, senza lasciarci condizionare dalle mode e dai gusti convenzionali.

Siamo convinti che il Nebbiolo delle Alpi, per la sua spiccata originalità, meriti un posto d’onore nel mercato internazionale del vino di qualità: un riconoscimento fondamentale per rendere economicamente sostenibile un’attività secolare che difficilmente si sposa con le logiche produttive moderne.

Name: Belgian Owl Whisky
Description: The Wisdom of Nature, distilled.

Name: Château Coutet Saint-Emilion
Description:
Domaine viticole familial depuis 14 générations, la famille DAVID BEAULIEU s'attache depuis 400 ans à produire un Grand Vin de Saint Emilion dans le plus grand respect du terroir et de la nature environnante. 

Etablit sur le premier « coup de rein » du relief Saint Emilionnais, COUTET s’étend sur 16 hectares, dont 12,5 ha de vignes, à la pointe ouest du plateau de Mazerat. Le vignoble dessine un triangle dont les cotés sont les deux Maynes (Grand & Franc), les deux Beauséjour (Bécot & Duffau), et Angélus : le ‘Triangle d’or’. 

A moins d’un kilomètre du village, Coutet a la particularité de bénéficier des 3 types de terroirs sur ses terres : 
- 1/3 Sur le plateau de Saint Martin de Mazerat - Sol Calcaire ;
- 1/3 Sur la côte de Franc - Sol argilo-calcaire ;
- 1/3 Le pied de côte - Sables anciens.

De très anciens vestiges, des tulipes sauvages et des glaïeuls de Byzance laissés par les romains, atteste d'une occupation du domaine dès l'époque romaine mais aussi de la préservation de la Biodiversité des terres par la non-utilisation de produits chimiques.

Certifié “Agriculture Biologique” Château Coutet vous invite à venir découvrir ce terroir exceptionnel et déguster son vin au cours d’une visite de son vignoble et découvrir un joyau parmi les les crus historiques de Saint-Emilion.

Name: L&L Spirits
Description:
L&L, based in south west France was founded in 1984. One of France’s leading manufacturers of fine French spirits, fruit liqueurs, Armagnacs and Cognacs, including the iconic Alizé range of fruit spirit liqueurs.

High quality, purpose built facility located close to Bordeaux, Armagnac and Cognac regions with an over 1 million case capacity and state-of-the –art R&D capabilities for the creation of new liquids.

Combines a heritage in fine fruit liqueur spirit production as well as fine Cognacs, brandies and French vodka, offering services for branded products and private label and contract manufacturer in new and complex spirits.
The company guarantees thereby a policy of confidentiality and discretion.

To satisfy the demands and specific needs of its clients, L&L have implemented a clear and transparent policy of quality. L&L is certified ISO 9001: 2015, ISO 22000: 2005, BRC, IFS (food security) and AEO (Authorized Economic Operator).

L&L is part of Quintessential Brands Group, an independent and international Group with an exciting and diverse portfolio of premium brands and world-class production capabilities in the UK, Ireland and France.

Name: Champagne Charles Mignon
Description: With modernity and family tradition, the Charles Mignon House produces precise champagne wines. Enhancing their terroirs and three grape-varieties (Chardonnay, Pinot Meunier, Pinot Noir) through exceptional champagnes has earned them, since 2003, to be listed beside the greatest and most prestigious houses of champagne with UMC – the Union of Champagne Houses.

Name: Interbrands Denmark
Description: Interbrands Wines & Spirits is one of the leading privately owned premium wine and spirits distributors operationg in the Nordic Region. Interbrands wishes to be the preferred supplier to our customers and the best nordic solution to our brand partners.

Name: Distillerie de Biercée
Description:
Du fruit à lʼeau-de-vie, une élaboration effectuée dans la plus pure tradition sans compromis. Une gamme variée dʼeaux-de-vie et liqueurs dʼune finesse incomparable. Un savoir-faire à découvrir auprès de nos Maîtres Distillateurs. Des conférences, séminaires, mariages et autres soirées à organiser dans un cadre unique.

Van fruit naar Eau-de-Vie, de distilleerkunst volgens pure traditie en zonder compromissen. Een gevarieerd gamma van likeuren en Eaux-de-vie vol verfijnde smaken en aroma’s. Het vakmanschap van onze Meester-Distilleerders. Meetings, seminaries, huwelijken en andere evenementen in een uniek kader. 

From fruit to eau-de-vie, a process carried out strictly according to tradition. A varied range of eaux-de-vie and liqueurs of an incomparable finesse. Discover the know-how of our master distillers. Organise , conferences, seminars, weddings and evening events in a unique setting.

Name: Les Terrasses de l'Arago
Description:
For over 20 years, Les Terrasses de l'Arago have been striving to provide the finest tasting French wine.
Our vineyards located in the historical wine region of Roussillon (in the sunny South) enable us to offer our customers unique, high quality wines.

Name: MEGAVINS
Description:
MEGAVINS - AUX GRANDS VINS DE FRANCE

CAVISTE implanté à Montpellier depuis 1944 et GROSSISTE au service des professionnels. Une équipe de cavistes sommeliers professionnels à votre service dans 4 caves à Montpellier et Mauguio (France). Une grande variété de vins, liqueurs, whisky, rhum, cognac et spiritueux avec plus de 1.500 références. Notre métier est de savoir dénicher des vins de terroir afin de proposer une sélection des meilleurs crus de chaque région.

GROSSISTE et vente de vins en gros. Un service spécialisé pour les professionnels de la restauration ( wine-bar, bar à vins, café, restaurant, brasserie, traiteur...) et les professionnels du vin (caviste, sommelier...)

3 CAVES à Montpellier :
- Ecusson : 3 rue de l'Argenterie
- Polygone : Niveau bas du centre commercial 
- Antigone : Halles Jacques Coeur - 599 Bd d'Antigone

1 WINE DRIVE-IN à Mauguio : 
- MEGAVINS à Fréjorgues Mauguio : 257 rue Hélène Boucher

Name: Abrau-Durso
Description: Abrau – Durso is the leading Russian producer of sparkling wine, which uses traditional champagnoise method, maintaining the priceless values of classic French Champagne making. Name: OENO TECNOLOGÍA
Description:
OENO Tecnología nace para ser el apoyo de los profesionales en la ardua carrera por alzarse por el máximo reconocimiento para su vino.
En escenarios cada vez más competitivos, como es el mundo de la Enología, OENO Tecnología quiere acompañar a las bodegas en todo el proceso de elaboración, desde la llegada de la uva hasta el etiquetado de la botella. Para ello, ofrece un asesoramiento completamente personalizado: te escuchamos, lo estudiamos, proponemos y aplicamos.
