Name: Ponting Wines
Description:
Ponting Wines is  a collaboration between one of Australia’s most celebrated modern-day cricketer, Ricky Ponting and Ben Riggs, an award-winning Australian winemaker known for uncompromising, high quality wines. Masters of their craft, their partnership has been forged to celebrate their dedication and achievements.

Each wine reflects Ricky’s remarkable life and has been carefully crafted by Ben to ensure flavour, structure and complexity are of the highest quality.

Name: Château Bas d'Aumelas
Description:
Au cœur du Languedoc, dans un cadre idyllique et mystérieux se trouve le Château Bas d'Aumelas. Construit au 14e siècle, ce monument historique appartient à la famille D'Albenas depuis 200 ans. En 2002, Jean-Philippe et Geoffroy D'Albenas ont repris le domaine avec pour unique vocation de redorer le blason du château comme un lien de partage, d'échange et de joie.

Au cœur de la garrigue, sur le plus haut terroir de l'AOC Grès de Montpellier, les deux frères ont replanté la vigne alors oubliée. En accord avec le cadre naturel du Château, les vignerons sont imprégnés d'une philosophie respectueuse de l'environnement. Depuis 2006, le domaine est labellisé agriculture biologique. Jean-Philippe et Geoffroy travaillent les vignes en harmonie avec le patrimoine naturel qui les entoure (installation de 200 ruches, éco-pâturage des moutons, agroforesterie...). Venez échanger sur cette passion qui les anime lors d'une visite du domaine.

Depuis 2006, les frères d'Albenas ont investi le Château pour consolider les parois riches d'histoires et reconstruire les mûrs abandonnés, pour dévoiler un lieu de réception singulier et féérique. Par son jardin à la française, sa vue sur un parc naturel classé, sa salle en pierres authentiques, le château est un lieu de vie où le temps s'arrête pour vivre pleinement le moment présent. Imprégniez-vous de ce lieu hors du temps, l'espace d'un instant, pour votre mariage ou votre séminaire.

Name: Winefinder.com
Description: Oberoende distanshandel med fokus på kvalitetsviner. Winefinder ApS blev den 15 oktober 2007 det första företag som hos Skatteverket fick registrering som distansförsäljare av vin till svenska privatpersoner. Winefinder AB som grundades 2005 är en svensk verksamhet med inriktning på vinrelaterade arrangemang samt försäljning till den svenska Horeca-sektorn.

Name: Cantina di Solopaca
Description:
La Cantina di Solopaca, è una tra le più antiche della Campania. Con oltre 150 mila ettolitri di vino prodotti è ai primi posti nella produzione regionale.

Le aziende agricole	sono ubicate non solo nel comune di Solopaca ma anche in 16 comuni limitrofi, per un totale di circa 1300 ettari di superficie vitata. 

La storia	del Solopaca non può essere disgiunta dalla storia della cittadina Solopaca, che si stende alle falde del Monte Taburno, in provincia di Benevento, che con le sue stupende colline da sempre è vocata all'agricoltura. Nasce qui il favoloso "Solopaca Doc" la cui storia si perde nella notte dei tempi...persino  Gioacchino Murat, generale francese e Re di Napoli, che ad assaggiare il vino di Solopaca, si esaltò al punto di paragonare la stravolgente potenza del vino a quella del cognato Napoleone.

Dai vigneti delle ridenti colline solopachesi (vigne vecchie, ceraselle, cesine, santianni, tore, ecc.) le uve coltivate vengono convogliate alla cantina della cooperativa ove, previa meticolosa scelta sono vinificate con procedimenti tradizionali antichissimi, perfezionati dalle moderne tecniche enologiche. Dalla produzione della Cantina oggi nascono non solo il maschio e seduttore Rosso D.O.C., ma anche il corposo e vellutato Aglianico, il frizzante e delicato Amabile, la misteriosa e allegra Falanghina, fino alla nobiltà dell'aristocratico Spumante "Solopaca D.O.C."

Name: Top 100 LBC Beers
Description:

The list of judges was drawn from leading retail chains, wholesalers, distributors, and on-trade groups across a variety of channels and disciplines including multiple retailing, convenience stores, cash and carries, specialist retailers, casual and fine dining, hospitality and the travel industry.

Name: ERTUS GROUP
Monte Creek Winery
Description:
Located 10-minute outside of Kamloops, Monte Creek Winery produces award winning wines right here in the Thompson Valley. We strive for innovative concepts and collaboration, while continuing to be a voice and leader for sustainable practices in the industry. 

Our mission is to create a harmonized sense of place, that is showcased through each sip of wine. With a combination of our love for sustainability, passion for the process, and tranquility at our winery, we hope to share these feelings within each product we produce.

Name: Tattersall Distilling Company

Known as one of the most sustainable distilleries in the country, Tattersall has taken home top honors for its broad portfolio of spirits from wards the San Francisco World Spirits Competition, American Craft Spirits Association Awards, American Distilling Institute Awards and more. Name: KRSMA Estates Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
OUR STORY:

The foundation for KRSMA was laid when I was a 17-year-old undergraduate student, living in Guntur, a town in Andhra Pradesh that is famous for its chilies. The local Bishop allowed me to taste the wines that he was importing from Italy. While the wines were nothing excellent, they heralded the beginning of my love affair with wines.

I began making wine as an amateur hobby which started with buying a few kilograms of grapes and placing them in a glass jar but quickly evolved into a more serious pursuit as I imported yeast, nutrients and corks from England. When I was married in 1982, my wife, Uma, was shocked to see an entire bedroom in my apartment converted into a mini-winery filled with demi-johns. However I was fortunate that she was a microbiologist and was eager to take up a new challenge. While we were both passionate about our hobby, life caught up with us and we became busy starting our venture, a pharmaceutical company as well as raising our children.

Our vision is to create extraordinary wines that incorporates our broad exposure of wines and offers a distinctive taste. Instead of setting up our winery within the predominant wine regions in India, we decided to set up our winery near Hampi, a UNESCO World Heritage Site,in Karnataka. While the winery was not in a conventional location, we both felt the site was special and presented us with endless opportunities.

We have spent the past several years developing and nurturing our wines. Our goal has been to develop exquisite wines that also capture the unique characteristics of the land we have found. We feel privileged to share our wines with other wine aficionados.

- Uma Chigurupati and Krishna Prasad Chigurupati

Name: 1000 Hectos

The modern, discerning consumer seeks more than small volume production to be deemed craft. They demand distilling & aging expertise, best-in-class flavors, and a keen awareness of use in cocktails. Name: Quist Wine
Description:
Quist Wine

Vi har gennem mange år haft en lidenskab for de italienske vine og køkken. Dette har givet os mange spændende oplevelser i støvlelandet. Specielt er vores kærlighed faldet for områderne Toscana og Veneto. På disse rejser har vi besøgt et utal af byer, hvor vi har smagt specialiteter som lokale oste, salami, oliven, tapanader og sidst men ikke mindst vin fra topproducenter.

Vores vision med Quist wine er, at vi vil ”plukke” et udvalg af producenter, hvor kvaliteten og kærligheden til håndværket vægtes højere end kvantiteten - Vinmagere som ligger vægt på at leverer det ypperste til den rigtige pris og som alle har en historie at fortælle med deres vin.

Fælles for de producenter vi arbejder sammen med er, at Quist Wine ønsker en tæt kontakt med disse, lige fra deltagelse i vinhøsten til årlige besøg hos dem, for at følge med i udviklingen af deres vine.

Disse skønne oplevelser vil vi gerne dele med andre som sætter pris på et glas italiensk kvalitets vin, og som ønsker at blive betaget, overrasket og forkælet på smagsløgene. see less

Name: Caruso e Minini
Description:
Four generations who have consistently engaged with the care of the land.

Vineyards on the hills of Trapani where the Mediterranean wind blows.

Reinventing the canon of Sicilian wines with freshness and elegance.
______________________

Our winery is in Marsala, on the western tip of Sicily, in a traditional stone farmhouse dating from 1904, which has now been renovated with artisanal and technological tools and know-how.
Our wines today come from the work of four generations of winemakers and express the specific character of our hilly vineyards, where low yields allow for more intense flavors. These wines are the expression of a Mediterranean landscape made of wind, salt, and of all the different cultures that have met in Sicily in the past and will always meet.


UP IN THE HILLS

The vineyards are on the hills of Marsala, between 200 and 450 meters above sea level, where the low yields (about 80 quintals per hectare) concentrate the flavors. Here, the gaze can follow the horizon down to the coast. The wind coming from the sea “touches” the plants, and we recognize it in the slightly salty notes of the wines.


TECHNOLOGICAL CRAFT

The work in the cellar is minimalist. We want our wines to be the genuine expression of our hills, maintaining the balance of the grapes and their connection with the landscape where we have our roots.


BEHIND THE LABELS

The labels are designed by Laboratorio Zanzara, a social cooperative in Turin that promotes integration and creativity for people with mental disabilities, under the artistic curation of Gianluca Cannizzo. 
The illustrations are the result of a research process on the local fauna and flora, the Marsala landscapes, and the Sicilian imagery. They develop from elements collected on-site, including photos and botanical illustrations. The simple, playful, and materic style refers to Matisse but also reflects the expressiveness of the people for whom Zanzara is a creative home.

Name: SWIG
Description: Swig is a leading independent wine online retailer, and wholesaler to many of the UK's best restaurants, hotels, companies. We supply wine lovers who buy to drink and to cellar. We also do wine gifts and corporate events.

Name: WIT France

Whatever the wine, it is always the result of a passionate commitment of the men and women who work on it. This is why we bring all our skills and a care of each moment to respect and preserve your product.

Name: Château des Ravatys

Château des Ravatys is located just next to Mont Brouilly, in Saint-Lager, France.

Name: Himalayan Waters
Description:
Himalayan is the first Water Purifier Company that introduced the Copper Filter Technology in UAE, this Technology is good for healthier life, contains immunity booster helps to improve immunity. Our body is 75% of water and relies on the many minerals it contains for a number of functions including respiration, digestion, and elimination. A lot of water is also lost when performing these functions, so it's important to stay hydrated to live a happy and healthy life. But the state of the water bodies in the world today is very bad. Increased pollution makes drinking water toxic and unfit for human consumption. Drinking such water in raw form can cause various life-threatening diseases.

For this reason, We, Himalayan strives to provide consumers with a world-class filtration process and purify drinking water of these suspended and mixed contaminants without losing the essential minerals it contains. This makes the water feel like a natural elixir dripping straight from the Himalaya Mountain. It uses improved technologies that also ensure that water loss in the filtration process is minimum, thus also contributing to a healthier environment.

Name: Rubin AD
Description:
Rubin Company is located in Serbia, in the south-east part of Europe, on the terrain which is ideal for viniculture, at the latitude where the world’s most famous wineries and wine-growing areas are found - Bordeaux in France and Tuscany in Italy. It is the biggest manufacturer of grapes, wine and hard liquor in the country, with a tradition of over 60 years. It owns the largest surfaces of vineyards in the season’s harvest - 1200 hectares, and the largest number of wines with protected geographical origin in the country. The advantage of the company is the full circle of wine production: from personal vineyards, to cooper workshop where barrels are made, to the production of wine of top-notch quality. 

The wine cellar of the Company has the capacity of 22.5 million liters, whereas the capacity of the wine brandy cellar is 15 million liters, from which 6 million is in oak barrels (12,000 oak barrels of 500 l for ripening of distillate), which makes it one of the largest wood cellars in Europe.

Rubin’s portfolio includes wines and hard liquor, with more than 80 products. In the wine category there are table, quality and vintage wines, as well as sparkling wines. Rubin’s brandy, vodka and  liqueurs for cocktails are renowned names in the category of hard liquor. New tin-products are a significant innovation in the production: Spritzer and Brandy-cola.

The company's annual sales exceed 17 million liters of alcoholic beverages. The products are exported in more than 20 world countries, from the USA to Australia. On foreign markets, one can compete exclusively with quality, and they have recognized the quality of the Rubin products, and the most used are barrique wines, among other vintage wines and Brandy, which have also been distinguished as significant categories for export to this countries.

Name: 10 International
Description:
10 International is a dynamic sales & marketing wine company established by two highly experienced wine trade professionals Bill Rolfe & Toby Hancock.

The company was formed after identifying a need in the main wine consuming countries for wines that give consumers a simple, clear message without losing the little mystique that makes wine what it is.

We work with carefully chosen producers from the 10 main wine producing countries to sell a high quality collection of wines to markets all over the world. Using these strategic alliances combined with our own extensive marketing and sales experience we offer a highly focussed wine range, which includes our own specially developed unique brands.

Name: Champagne Bernard Lonclas
Description:
The Maison Lonclas was founded by Bernard Lonclas in 1976, and is set in the heart of the typical village of Bassuet surrounded by slopes whose precious soil is perfect for growing Chardonnay grapes. With the help of his daughter Aurélie, Bernard Lonclas, a man with a passion for the earth and wine, distinguishes himself by rigorously selecting his grapes during harvest-time as well as carefully choosing his different batches. They grow the three Champagne grape varieties – Chardonnay, Pinot Noir and Pinot Meunier.

This entrepreneurial spirit and the passion and attachment bringing together enthusiasm, modernity and respect for tradition have made the Lonclas brand one of the Champagne region’s benchmarks. Vinification is a major art in this family-run business. Traditional know-how is unashamedly combined with modern technology. Avant-garde equipment is used for pressing and in the thermo-regulated stainless steel fermentation vats.

Once a year, the wines are skilfully blended in an almost ritualistic fashion by Aurélie, Bernard and other members of the team. Each of them expresses their tastes, sensations and emotions to attain the subtlety and originality that make the Bernard Lonclas style unique.

The cosseted wines are then sent down to the cellars where, in the cool darkness, they peacefully await full maturity.

Please drink reponsibly.

Name: Three Wrens Distillery
Description:
Our master distiller and owner, Nick, has spent 20 years in the drinks & spirits industry. His career started in Manchester where he was award winning mixologist, running high end bars and competing in cocktail competitions all over the world. Nick then became a cocktail bar owner, and more recently held the position of brand manager for a global, award-winning gin. 

Nick has harboured a long standing ambition to create his own brand of gin for most of his working life and finally took the plunge to open the Three Wrens distillery in August 2019. The gins are inspired by the beautiful village of Wrenbury, where his family of three reside. Hence the name ‘Three Wrens Gin’ 

Wrenbury is famous for its fields of Wrens, and can trace its history back to 1100 AD. Our distillery is based in the adjacent village of Cholmondeley, opposite a stunning castle, famous for its amazing gardens. 

We are incredibly lucky to be surrounded by outstanding countryside. Ancient woodlands with up to 50 edible plant varieties of roots, shrubs and flowers, are all within a few minutes walk. We are able to grow our own herbs and flowers to use in the gins we make, and we pick them from literally right outside our doors. 

Nick’s background in mixology and gin, enabled him to successfully turn his hand to distillation. Much of the skill set needed has been acquired over time with his experience of carefully pairing flavours together to create inventive cocktail menus. After an intensive period of study, distillers courses, trial distillations and exams, Nick made the first batch of Three Wrens in June 2019, and knew he had made something truly special.

Visiting our Distillery
We are based in a new 5000 sq foot premises surrounded by Cheshire countryside. Come and see us for a tour, tasting or join our weekly gin school where you can distil your own gin!

Name: Dream Big Darling

Empowered women, empower women!

La sélection parcellaire, la vinification selon le calendrier lunaire en fûts de chêne, amphores et Dame Jeanne ou encore le vieillissement sur lattes créent des champagnes de terroir élégants, gourmands et insolites.

Le domaine en conversion biologique se développe également en polyculture bio (éco-pâturage ovin, haies et vergers…) et en oenotourisme immersif.

Name: Agave Amigo
Description:

As a global hub, we provide a platform where members can explore and exchange information about tastes, ratings, and pricing, while accessing premium products. 

We bridge the gap between producers and consumers, enhancing direct engagement and education, thus streamlining the supply chain to make traditional craftsmanship more profitable. 

Committed to sustainability, Agave Amigo promotes environmentally friendly agave production practices globally, connecting like-minded producers and consumers who value and support this philosophy. Join us in celebrating the rich heritage and sustainable future of agave spirits!

Name: Llano Estacado Winery

Name: ASEBOR
Description:
ASEBOR, ASOCIACIÓN EMPRESARIAL DE BODEGAS ACOGIDAS A LA DENOMINACIÓN DE ORIGEN RIBERA DEL DUERO.
Desde su inicio, ASEBOR ha luchado por la defensa del interés de las bodegas de Ribera del Duero en general y de sus miembros asociados en particular.
En el 2001 se materializó una idea gestada durante largo tiempo por una serie de bodegueros que ha culminado con la constitución y puesta en marcha de ASEBOR (Asociación de Bodegas acogidas a la D.O Ribera del Duero). 
De todos es conocido que los comienzos de cualquier proyecto son los más duros. Hay que ganarse la confianza y el respeto mediante actuaciones que consoliden el rumbo de una asociación, y ASEBOR ha dado los primeros pasos en este sentido, pues ha ido paulatinamente aumentando su labor de representación sectorial, siendo éste unos de los principales objetivos marcados desde sus inicios.
Sus funciones pueden resumirse de forma esquemática en:
•    Representación institucional.
•    Información periódica y constante.
•    Asesoramiento General.
•    Firma de acuerdos comerciales.
•    Formación.
•    Organización de Conferencias, jornadas Técnicas.
•    Plataforma comercial.
•    Foro de debate
•    Apoyo interasociativo.

Description:
L'Azienda Agricola di Graziano Prà nasce a Monteforte d'Alpone nel 1983. Oltre ad un Soave di alta qualità, produce dal 2006 i vini rossi veneti più tradizionali biologici.
Riassiumiamo nell seguenti parole, di Wendell Berry, la nostra filosofia:
...il produrre cibo è un atto gastronomico. Per essere fonte di piacere il cibo deve essere buono ma anche pulito e giusto: deve essere frutto di una agricoltura sostenibile, rispettosa dell'ambiente e della dignità dei lavoratori. Quando compriamo il cibo scegliamo anche un modello agricolo. Si tratta di una questione fondamentale che determina il futuro del pianeta, la sua sopravvivenza o la sua distruzione.

Name: Azienda Agricola San Salvatore
Description:
L'Azienda Agricola San Salvatore nasce nel cuore del Parco nazionale del Cilento, ai piedi dell’antico borgo medievale di Giungano. La nostra filosofia è far conoscere i prodotti tipici del territorio in tutto il mondo, promuovendo la cultura enogastronomica cilentana. L’ amore per la nostra terra, e la passione per la natura incontaminata, ci rende un azienda unica, rispettosa dell’ambiente che ci circonda. Sono queste le armi vincenti che rendono i nostri vini unici nel loro genere

The winery San Salvatore was founded in heart of the Cilento National Park, at the foot of the medieval village of Giungano. Our aim is to promote the wine and food culture of Cilento around the world, offering our wines like special products .The love for our land, and passion for nature, makes us a company attentive and environmentally friendly. These are the winning features that make our wines unique

Description: Rocky Pond is a family-owned, estate-grown winery that welcomes it guests into a casual, but sophisticated wine and culinary experience. Visit our tasting rooms in downtown Lake Chelan and Woodinville.  “It’s all about the experiences…”

Name: Wine Ventures
Description: Wine Ventures is a Portuguese company focused on the international consumer. Our team believes in a disruptive approach to the wine market and innovative ways of consumption. We are passionate about bringing wine closer to the public, without losing its soul. Our concept of Wine by the Glass encourages people to discover new flavors and invites them on a journey into the wine world.

Name: Distillerie Wabasso
Description:
Wabasso, c’est la rencontre de la passion et de la fierté. Pour le métier, pour l’histoire, pour le respect du terroir.

C’est un retour à l’essence québécoise : son eau pure et soyeuse, sa  botanique indigène aux saveurs boréales et parfumées, son savoir-faire authentique, franc et légèrement casse-cou.

Wabasso, c’est la fierté de travailler le produit avec les mains de l’artisan et l’esprit de l’aventurier.

C’est l’envie de créer des rencontres d’exception et de surprendre par leur
élégante simplicité.

Name: Shorts Boy Distillery Ltd
Description:
Founded in 2018 with the mission to create beverages that celebrate and elevate. Shorts Boy Distillery is an advocate and supporter of coastal rewilding projects.

Our first product The Tidal Rum is an award winning gold rum infused with Pepper Dulse foraged at low tide in Jersey.

Shorts Boy Distillery is a Brand Partner of P&O Cruises and in collaboration created Golden Tide. Golden Tide is an invitation to savour the essence of a golden-aged spiced rum, infused with coastal botanicals foraged from sea and shore – including Sea Spaghetti and Rock Samphire.

Please get in touch if you would like to discuss stocking our products info@tidalrum.je

Name: Cavas Reunidas S.A.
Description:
Pioneros en la cultura del vino, primera empresa chilena dedicada a la distribución e importación de vinos y licores, fundada en 1999 por socios chilenos y franceses. Centrada en el objetivo de obtener una cobertura nacional integra y otorgar posicionamiento de marca de nuestros representados

Misión
Somos socios estratégicos de nuestros proveedores y nuestros clientes

 Desarrollamos servicios integrales en comercialización, logística y marketing de nuestras marcas.
 Agregamos valor a nuestros clientes a través del conocimiento profundo de nuestros productos y de la eficiencia en nuestros servicios.
 Nuestro enfoque hacia productos y servicios de calidad está orientado a generar relaciones comerciales de largo plazo.
 Respetamos profundamente a nuestro equipo humano y creemos en su desarrollo individual como aporte a la organización.
Visión
Consolidar Cavas Reunidas en base a un equipo ético y comprometido, logrando beneficios operacionales a través de la eficiencia e innovación. Buscando satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes con productos y servicios de calidad.

Name: IXSIR - Wines of Lebanon
Description:
The name IXSIR derives from “Iksir”, the original Arabic word for “Elixir”, a word common to many languages, defining the purest form of all substances, a secret potion that grants eternal youth and love.

The vision behind IXSIR is to reveal the best terroirs of Lebanon, some forgotten long since. Cultivated with respect to sustainable agriculture, IXSIR’s vineyards are spread in the mountains of Lebanon on clay-calcareous and limestone soil, from Batroun to Jezzine, benefiting from the unique microclimates Lebanon has to offer. IXSIR’s vineyards culminate at an altitude of 1,800 m, making them the highest in the Northern Hemisphere.

Winemaking occurs in a winery located on the hills of Batroun where 17th century traditional Lebanese house presides over a contemporary winery with sustainability at its core. Recognized several time for its green credentials, the IXSIR winery was named by CNN as one of the greenest building in the world, and won the international Architizer A+ Award as well as the Good Green Design award and the Green Mind MENA Award.

Carefully handcrafted by IXSIR’s winemaker, the wines reflect the purity and freshness of the Lebanese mountains, through richness, elegance and complexity.

Description:

Name: WINE 4 TRADE
Description:
Notre expérience
30 années d'expérience dans la mise en relation de vignerons français avec des opérateurs professionnels nous ont donné l'expertise pour vous accompagner dans votre prospection, en France et à l'export. 
Nous suivons les tendances des marchés, et mettons en adéquation les offres des producteurs avec les besoins des acheteurs.

Name: Distillerie Les Fils d'Emile Pernot
Description:
Fondée en 1890 par Emile Pernot à Pontarlier, la distillerie "Les Fils d'Emile Pernot" est  installée au pied du château de Joux où elle jouit d'une situation exceptionnelle. 
Vous y trouverez des liqueurs, des eaux de vie mais aussi du Vieux Pontarlier (apéritif réalisé à partir d'anis vert, accompagné d'une douzaine de plantes aromatiques et médicinales, distillé dans des alambics en cuivre datant de 1905) et bien sûr l'absinthe encore aujourd'hui distillée selon les recettes ancestrales.

Distillerie labellisée "Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant", label attribué aux entreprises françaises aux savoir-faire artisanaux et industriels d'excellence.

/EN. 
The Distillery Les Fils d'Emile Pernot: an old lady who's ageing well! 
Founded in 1890 in France, Pontarlier, the historical cradle of Absinthe spirit, the Distillery Les Fils d'Emile Pernot is a traditional yet innovative company which perfectly masters the art of sublimating its flagship product: Absinthe.
Recognized leader in the field of spirits, the Distillery sells its absinthes to the best bars and restaurants worldwide. Consumers taste it both in traditional way, with the famous Absinthe fountain, and in a more trendy way with en vogue cocktails.

Name: Time to Wine
Description: Time to Wine is ontstaan uit pure passie voor kwaliteitswijnen en specialiseert zich in de fijnste wijnen (waaronder directe import) uit enkele van ’s werelds beste wijngebieden met de focus op Italië. De veelal kleinschalige familiebedrijven/wijnboeren zijn door ons zorgvuldig gekozen. Deze passie voor mooie wijnen delen we graag met jullie! In de webshop vind je dan ook een mooie selectie kwaliteitswijnen tegen een betaalbare prijs.

Name: Philadelphia Distilling
Description:
About Philadelphia Distilling: 

Opened in 2005, Philadelphia Distilling is the first craft distillery built in Pennsylvania since the Prohibition era. Company founders Andrew Auwerda and Timothy Yarnall believe strong spirit drinkers appreciate high-quality, American-crafted spirits. Thus, Philadelphia Distilling educates the public through its historically-based brands, while delivering the finest handcrafted premium spirits and botanicals. 

The distillery's flagship brand, Bluecoat American Dry Gin, has been the recipient of numerous awards including the coveted "BEST GIN" and "DOUBLE GOLD MEDAL" from the San Francisco World Spirits Competition, along with critical acclaim from The Wall Street Journal, Time Magazine, Wine Enthusiast, Imbibe Magazine and GQ Magazine. 

Philadelphia Distilling products include:

    ·   Bluecoat American Dry Gin – 2006
    ·   Penn 1681 Rye Vodka – 2008
    ·   Vieux Carre Absinthe Superieure – 2008
    ·   The Bay Seasoned Vodka – 2013
    ·   Bluecoat Barrel Finished Gin – 2015
 
For more information, visit www.philadelphiadistilling.com. 
Email: info@philadelphiadistilling.com
Phone: (215) 671-0346

Name: Woody Creek Distillers
Description: At Woody Creek Distillers we believe that great spirits are born from a sense of place and purpose. Nestled in the heart of Colorado, our distillery is surrounded by the majestic Rocky Mountains and pristine landscapes that inspire our craft. As a proud women-owned business, we bring a unique perspective and dedication to every bottle we produce.

Name: The Ghentist
Description:
The Ghentist is a new gin launched by two brothers as a dedication to their hometown Ghent. They made sure every detail of the gin refers to a city characteristic.

Visit our website to find a link to our Facebook and Instagram profile!

Name: Andersen Winery
Description:
Andersen Winery has a vision of producing world-class sparkling wines based on the best fruits and berries Denmark can offer. Our sparkling wines are served at some of the best restaurants in Denmark and abroad.

Andersen Winery was founded in December 2015 but dates back to 2009 when the team started experimenting with production of sparkling wine, using the traditional method. 

Andersen Winery is owned by winemaker Mads Groom Andersen, food specialist Frantz Maurice Scott Lundby and entrepreneur Morten Rinder Stengaard.

Name: Vignobles Reynaud
Description:
Le vignoble du Château des Places naît à Arbanats au XIXe siècle, au cœur d'une terre riche en Histoire : les Graves.
Depuis 5 générations, le Château des Places s'épanouit et s'étend aujourd'hui sur 65 hectares. Des parcelles sélectionnées avec soin avec pour objectif de constituer une mosaïque de sols embrassant toute la diversité des Graves.
Les Vignobles Reynaud produisent des vins rouges, blancs et rosés de grande qualité sous les appellations Graves et Bordeaux Supérieur.
Aujourd'hui, le domaine vit selon les valeurs insufflées par Philippe et Fabrice Reynaud : convivialité, prestige, respect du terroir et de l'environnement.

Name: Bodegas La Divisa
Description:
A mas de 1300 metros de altura, entre la Sierra Nevada y el Mar Mediterráneo, en la Alpujarra Granadina, termino de Torvizcon, nace La Divisa y Piedras Blancas …… una cultura de naturaleza, esfuerzo, paciencia y sentimientos.
Un sueño, una Ilusión, un espacio y el mismo fin…. 
Un sueño que nace en el permanente retorno al terroir durante muchos años, la ilusión de incursionar en un proyecto ambicioso para revalorizar una zona en plena expansión y de poca atención, un espacio donde el horizonte se pierde en las aguas del Mediterráneo y una altura que hace que nuestras viñas se eleven a lo mas alto de la Europa continental, y el fin de elaborar los vinos mas prestigiosos, orgánicos y de altura.
2017 es el año y la Sierra de la Contraviesa en Las Alpujarras de Granada el lugar, que une a una personalidad local con gran experiencia y dos foráneos, con sueños de pertenencia, de una de las vistas mas paradisiacas del Mar Mediterráneo.
Filosofía
Somos una bodega que desarrollamos vinos orgánicos totalmente naturales y de altura, ya que nuestros viñedos se ubican dentro de los mas altos de la Europa continental.
El compromiso con la naturaleza y el medio ambiente, hacen de nuestros vinos una condición única de personalidad y calidad que se ven identificadas en denominación de origen Granada, como Vinos Orgánicos.
La Divisa, ubicada en Andalucía, una tierra con historia en permanente movimiento durante el trascurso de los siglos, un crisol de razas, una fusión de culturas, que en la actualidad busca en nuestros vinos, una identidad propia.
Las Viñas
Nuestras viñas ubicadas en el termino municipal de Torvizcon, a una altura de entre 1200 y 1300 metros, están compuestas por mas de 25 hectáreas de las variedades, Tempranillo, Garnacha, Garnacha Tintorera, Cabernet Suavignon, Cabernet Franc, Syrah, Petit Verdot, Merlot, Graciano, Moscatel, Viognier, Chardonnay, Jaén Blanco, Montua y la autóctona Vigiriega.

Name: LAURENT & ROMAIN
Description:
LAURENT & ROMAIN, 
It’s the story of a friendship around the same passion: WINE! Owners of châteaux, wine estates and merchants of wine in the Bordeaux, Languedoc and Rhône Valley regions, 
LAURENT & ROMAIN is: 
- More than 50 passionate collaborators
- Bottling capacities in each region
- A production capacity of 20 million bottles 
- A quality service ensuring traceability and conformity of products 
- Dedicated logistics per region to control flows and offer order tracking.

LAURENT & ROMAIN is a range of products bringing together three profiles: 
- Châteaux and Estates - behind this profile are hidden our jewls, châteaux and estates that are neighbors of the greatest classified growths. 
- Wines by Nature - the best of nature, sulphite-free wines and organic wines to be enjoyed all year round. 
- The Passion of Wine - discovering new horizons without volume limits and constant quality.

Name: Ferrer Miranda
Description:
Ferrer Miranda es un grupo vitivinícola que está formado por:  Valdubón (D.O. Ribera del Duero), Vionta (D.O. Rías Baixas), Solar Viejo (D.O.Ca. Rioja) y Finca Ferrer en Argentina (Valle de Uco-Mendoza). Ferrer Miranda también elabora en las D.O.s Navarra, Rueda, Toro y Monterrei, con lo que está presente en ocho denominaciones de origen distintas. 

Ferrer Miranda is a family owned group of wineries which produces and distributes wines from Rioja, Ribera del Duero, Rueda, Rias Baixas, Navarra, Monterrei, Toro and Argentina (Valle de Uco - Tupungato).

Name: Merry Edwards Winery
Description: Merry Edwards Winery, founded in 1997, produces terroir-driven, critically acclaimed Pinot Noir, Sauvignon Blanc and Chardonnay on 80 acres of Certified Sustainable estate vineyards in the Russian River Valley. Adhering to the winegrowing tradition established by our founder, we remain committed to producing balanced wines of exceptional depth and elegance.

Name: Réseau International Global Vins & Spiritueux
Description:
At Global, passion is at the heart of everything we do. A passion for products, business, service, vintage, marketing and excellence… This passion is what fuels and inspires us, what pushes us to exceed expectations.
 We direct this passion into finding, promoting and spotlighting products that consumers will love to discover and rediscover, into generating greater success for you.
 To do so, we have developed finely honed market expertise that can be adapted for each wine, port wine or other alcoholic beverage that we choose to represent.
 You will be well served by Global – and so will your products. We have been devoting ourselves to this task, with no compromises and plenty of passion, to the benefit of our business partners, since 1995.

Name: Nelson Wine Co.
Description:
Hello! We are Nelson Wine Company and we love good wine. We stock everything, from beautiful Beaujolais to a cool climate Chardonnay, and are super proud of our range of home-grown and imported wines. 

We are your go-to wholesale wine distributor operating in Victoria, Queensland, New South Wales, Canberra, and South Australia.  

Our mantra is quality over quantity - we don’t have visions of being the biggest wholesale wine distributor in Australia, just the best.

Name: Montirius, le Domaine
Description:
Situated in the southern Rhône Valley, our 58 hectare domain with vine classifications in Vacqueyras, Gigondas and Côtes du Rhône has been converted to Bio-Dynamic culture since 1996.

Since then, we have enriched our range with our Cotes du Rhone our Vin de Pays du Vaucluse, all made from Biological and Biodynamic grapes.

Name: Spirits Wine Group
Description:
SWG es una empresa panameña, agresiva y de rápido crecimiento, especializada 100% en la distribución y mercadeo de bebidas alcohólicas y no alcohólicas en Panamá.

Compañía de capital privada, distribuye a nivel nacional a través de su propio sistema de distribución, hoy en día es uno de los 3 protagonistas del mercado de bebidas Premium.

Name: Sokolin LLC
Description:
Sokolin was founded in 1934 by David Sokolin upon receiving one of the first liquor licenses issued by New York State after the repeal of Prohibition. Today, Sokolin is run by Dave Sokolin, grandson of David, and is an internationally renowned luxury retailer specializing in fine wine from long-established wine-producing regions as well as emerging viticultural areas.

Recognized as America's premier fine wine merchant, we offer an incomparable inventory of world-class wines almost guaranteeing that you will find exactly what you are looking for at the best prices on the market. Our unmatched “white glove” customer service model brings a level of professionalism and complimentary concierge services that is offered by only the world's finest retailers.

For three generations we have delivered unrivaled selection, availability and low-pricing through an extensive inventory and an unparalleled level of concierge and consultative services to ensure that you have an exceptional experience with us as you grow and manage your collection.

Name: Agricole Gussalli Beretta
Description: The Gussalli Beretta family has been active in the industry sector for over five hundred years. Their history ensures that the same values they embrace, the same level of quality and the same distinctive precision are carried over into the protection and enhancement of the winegrowing areas that host the Agricole Gussalli Beretta Group. The Group is made up of seven agricultural estates that reflect the quintessence of seven great Italy’s DOCG appellations. They are Lo Sparviere, the historic family wine estate in Franciacorta; Castello di Radda on the striking hillslopes in Chianti Classico; Orlandi Contucci Ponno located in the rich Mediterranean scrubland of the Colline Teramane; ForteMasso in the Langhe of Barolo, a newly-designated UNESCO World Heritage Site; Weingut Steinhaus, among the beautiful alpine landscapes of South -Tyrol; Fabio Motta in the prestigious wine-growing area of Bolgheri and Specogna in the amazing Colli Orientali del Friuli.

Name: GABE Vinhos
Description:
Uma empresa jovem formada por um paladar aguçado, um nariz envolvente e idéias frescas.
A partir do primeiro contato com seu vinho, do primeiro gole, queremos oferecer a melhor experiência em serviço e sabor. Te transportando através dos sentidos à diversas regiões famosas produtoras de nosso elixir favorito.

Nascida da paixão pelo vinho, seus sabores e histórias, chegamos para levar a história de cada garrafa até você. Saúde!

Name: Testarossa Winery
Description:
Testarossa produces world-class Chardonnay and Pinot Noir in the historic Novitiate Winery of Los Gatos where we blend centuries-old winemaking techniques with state-of-the-art technology. 

Testarossa’s location at the historic Novitiate Winery in the heart of Silicon Valley, California is a state of the art working winery. The old stone cellars and beautiful grounds of the state’s fourth oldest continuously operating winery house provide an amazing venue for private events.

Situated 55 miles south of San Francisco in the town of Los Gatos, Testarossa produces today about 30,000 twelve-bottle cases each year and has consistently produced more than 1,000 different wines earning Outstanding scores of 90+ points.

Rob and Diana Jensen’s passion for fine wine and food lead to the development of Testarossa Winery. They met while Electrical Engineering students at Santa Clara University. While both went on to pursue careers in high tech, a weekend winemaking hobby eventually turned into the dream of owning a winery in 1993. This was possible due to Rob’s twenty-year high tech career in sales and marketing.

In 2018, they celebrated 25 years of living the dream.

Since 2000, Rob and Diana Jensen have been working closely with Director of Winemaking Bill Brosseau. 

The old Novitiate Winery was originally built in 1888 by Jesuit Fathers and Brothers from Santa Clara College (now Santa Clara University); it was intended to help fund their new seminary college, built on the grounds the same year. The term Novitiate means ‘house of the novices’, the name used for seminary students. For nearly 100 years, the Jesuits made altar wines, as well as sweet, fortified wines at the Novitiate Winery. 

The original 19th Century, three-floor, gravity-flow winery is still in use today to make Testarossa wines. However, the original structure is now mostly hidden from view by the many expansions the winery went through during the first half of the 20th Century.

Name: Ocam Vinhos
Description:
Importadora e distribuidora que conecta apaixonados por vinhos

- Curadoria exclusiva, sustentável e autêntica
- 20 anos criando laços fortes
- Entrega em até 48h no RJ 

Descubra nossa seleção no site!

Name: Landon Winery
Description: Landon Winery is a wine and spirits company based out of 101 N Kentucky St, McKinney, Texas, United States.

Name: Adega São Mamede da Ventosa
Description:
A Adega São Mamede da Ventosa é uma estrutura cooperativa que se dedica à produção e comercialização de vinhos numa paisagem única, a oeste de Portugal. Fundada em 1956, é uma referência na história desta região de tradição vitivinícola. Com uma extensão total de 1800 hectares de vinha, produz vinhos de excelente relação qualidade-preço e é a adega cooperativa com maior produção a nível nacional.

Localizada no Concelho de Torres Vedras, a 30 minutos de Lisboa e a 10 minutos do extenso areal da praia de Santa Cruz. Nesta região, de forte paisagem rural e de influência atlântica, destacam-se os vinhos tintos e brancos e, muito em especial, os vinhos leves. Um terroir único, numa terra única.

Name: Anna Bonnici, Distillery Ambassador at Glengoyne Distillery
Description: Glengoyne Distillery is a wine and spirits company based out of Dumgoyne, Glasgow, United Kingdom.

Name: MAISON BERTRAND RAVACHE
Description:
La Maison Bertrand Ravache est une société de négoce de vins créée par Bertrand Ravache après l’acquisition de la Maison Malet Roquefort 

Les valeurs de la Maison reposent sur l’audace et l’excellence.

Name: VESTA Resource Center
Description: The VESTA Resource Center seeks to be the preferred destination for resources and services that will advance the U.S. Grape and Wine Industry (GWI).  An alliance of educational institutions, non-profit organizations, and private industry working together with different levels of government offers a unique way to address the deployment of Science Technology Engineering and Math (STEM) opportunities in the GWI and other high-technology fields across the country.

Name: TEANUM
Description:
Le Cantine Teanum nascono da un progetto di rivalorizzazione di una storica cantina degli anni ’70, situata a San Paolo di Civitate.
Oggi il brand Teanum è presente nella maggior parte dei mercati più importanti del vino, con una produzione annua di 1,5 milioni di bottiglie.

Name: CAGI Cantina Giubiasco SA
Description:
La Cantina di Giubiasco sorge nel cuore di una pregiata regione viticola collinare. Qui storia e tradizione hanno lasciato la loro impronta sul territorio: ne sono una testimonianza i castelli di Bellinzona, dichiarati dall’UNESCO patrimonio dell’umanità.

Con le uve selezionate, di oltre 350 viticoltori, la Cantina di Giubiasco vinifica all’incirca un decimo dell’intera produzione del Ticino. Da molti decenni la Cantina conduce un’accurata valorizzazione di vecchi vigneti collinari situati in diversi Comuni che circondano la capitale Bellinzona, con le sue mirabili fortificazioni medioevali, i castelli, le mura merlate e le torri.

La cura dei vigneti di collina contribuisce alla conservazione dell’ambiente ed al mantenimento di un bene paesaggistico di grande pregio. È in questo territorio che dal vitigno Merlot, coltivato da oltre un secolo, nascono vini davvero unici, apprezzati da tutti gli estimatori. Questi vini raccontano la storia della loro terra di origine.

Name: Framingham Wines
Description:
In a cluttered wine landscape where so many seem the same, we do things differently.  

With some of the oldest Riesling vines in Marlborough, we planted our first Wairau Valley vines back in 1981. And we’ve been making wine we love to drink ever since.

Name: Dezo
Description: We are revolutionizing the drinking experience by providing a vitalizing alternative to traditional alcoholic beverages. We envision a world where people truly feel good about what they are putting into their bodies without sacrificing the enjoyment that comes with drinking alcohol. A world where anybody can find balance in socializing and productivity.

Name: NEED WINE
Description:
NEED WINE est le 1er Club dédié aux professionnels du vin et du tourisme. Déjà 110 membres.

Les Missions du Réseau NEED WINE:
+ Fédérer un puissant réseau de professionnels du vin et du tourisme.
+ Se rencontrer dans la convivialité, favoriser les synergies entre les membres et faire émerger des opportunités d'affaires.
+ Promouvoir et valoriser énergiquement les offres et produits proposés par nos membres.

En rejoignant le Club NEED WINE, les membres peuvent:
+Participer aux rendez-vous du club organisés tous les deux mois (3 conférences de 20 minutes puis un cocktail déjeunatoire).
+Accéder à une plateforme de ressources en ligne alimentée par de nombreuses vidéos d'experts.
+Référencer leurs salles sur notre plateforme location-chateaux.com
+Présenter et faire déguster leurs vins sur les événements Wine & Pro que nous organisons en partenariat avec 14 club et réseaux d'entreprises bordelais.
+ Présenter leurs vins sur les dégustations que nous organisons à l'occasion de congrès médicaux.
+ Accéder à l'application mobile NEED WINE

www.need-wine.com

Name: Ricominciare Bodega de Familia
Description:
En 1902 llega a Argentina, desde Italia, Nicolás Catena. Su destino es Mendoza. Allí en su Finca: La Libertad arraiga una antigua tradición en tierras nuevas. Jorge, 
su nieto, recibe este legado transmitiendo a su familia 
la pasión por el cultivo de la vid. Hoy Jorge y su familia, continúan la tradición por caminos propios.

Name: Eleanor Wine
Description:
A young, ambitious and innovative B2B software company. 
Eleanor is a verified distribution platform, connecting Chateaux with international markets.

Name: Saint Wine
Description: Established in 2018, Saint Wine is a young and energetic wholesaler and importer of exceptional, quality-driven wines from Australia, USA, New Zealand, Italy and France. We’re passionate about working with wineries responsible for authentic, delicious wine that speaks of place, with an emphasis on environmental, social, and economic sustainability. With operations in NSW, QLD, VIC, SA and WA, Saint Wine has built a solid reputation for not just a unique and outstanding portfolio, but for also being great people to work with, across all sectors of the trade. We pride ourselves on excellent customer service, communication and approachability, while delivering great results (and wine!).

Name: Happenstance Distilling Co.
Description:
“At Happenstance, we're raising a new generation of whiskey lovers who celebrate life's moments that happen by chance.” 

Happenstance is a premium whiskey spirit that celebrates life's moments that happen by chance. Carefully crafted in Nashville and 100% female owned and operated, Happenstance pays homage to the tradition of American bourbons that have come before us, but with an unexpected punch of today’s most sought out flavor.

Name: Jackson Distillers Ltd
Description: The Jackson Distillery, born out of Charlesfield Farm in the Scottish Borders, will be the first, and only Scottish Borders based producer of single grain whisky spirit and grain neutral spirit using 100% Scottish water and cereals of proven traceable origin.

Name: La Ruche à Vin
Description:
La Ruche à Vin développe des solutions pour rendre vos expériences œnologiques parfaites et vous offrir des moments uniques.

Pour ce faire, nos solutions accompagnent, garantissent et valorisent les qualités de vos bouteilles de vin tout en vous donnant les clés pour créer des moments de dégustation uniques, dont vos invités se souviendront.

Il existe une solution La Ruche à Vin pour chaque partie de la vie de vos bouteilles, pour l'accompagner et la protéger en toutes circonstances.

Name: Viñedos y Bodegas Campos de Solana
Description:
Campos de Solana, the leader in Bolivian wine, is driven by the concept of using the unique aspects of the elevation of the Tarija Valley to create world-class products.
Through the leadership of the Granier family, with a long-standing trajectory in viticulture that dates to 1925, Campos de Solana emerged as the Bolivian wine producers par excellence.
The grand quality of Campos de Solana wines, and their position as industry leaders, is a result of the location of their vines, their highly qualified personnel, and their constant drive to innovate. 
Campos de Solana cultivates its vines in the highest wine-producing region of the world. Located at more than 6,397 feet above sea level, the vines in the Tarija Valley receive more sun than the traditional grape-growing regions. This change manifests in a product with richer taste and aroma. 
To this incomparable natural resource, Campos added a team of dedicated workers, international consulting professionals, and the latest French technology, making Campos one of the most modern wineries in South America. 
The value of these attributes is exposed in the quality for which Campos de Solana wines earned international acclaim; from being heralded for producing one of the best 20 wines in Latin America, to numerous awards and medals in prestigious international contests like the Concours Mondial de Bruxelles.

Name: BRASSERIE DU PAVE
Description:
Nos PVL sont brassées en Pévèle… ça ne s’invente pas. 

Ici, dans ce petit bout des Hauts-de-France, nos équipes élaborent avec talent et goût du travail bien fait des bières artisanales d’exception, en privilégiant le plus possible approvisionnement local et partenaires de proximité. Des produits de qualité portés par un vrai savoir-faire et l’envie de vous faire partager et découvrir saveurs authentiques et recettes inédites. 

De nos classiques à nos séries spéciales et éphémères, en 33 cl ou en 75 cl, avec nos étiquettes uniques et nos bouchons mécaniques, c’est sûr : si vous ne venez pas en Pévèle, c’est la PVL qui viendra à vous !

Name: Château Talbot
Description: Le Château Talbot est un vignoble de 110 hectares en appellation Saint-Julien. Domaine historique et reconnu par la qualité de ses vins, il devient 4ème Grand Cru Classé en 1855.

Name: Chateau Font du Broc
Description: Amidst the rolling hills and the fragrant backdrop of the mountains of the mid and upper Var region of France, in the heart of the Cotes de Provence appellation, between the Esterel coastal mountain range and gulf of Saint Tropez, the Chateau is surrounded by the perfumes of Provence and its exuberant vegetation. The property consists of over 250 acres, all where the harmonial traditions of Provence come together in its vineyards, olive groves and horses.

Name: Château des Demoiselles
Description: Le Château des Demoiselles est un domaine viticole situé à la Motte, dans le Var. Il produit des vins AOP Côtes de Provence déclinés dans les trois couleurs. Une impressionnante bâtisse, datant de 1830, est aujourd'hui une sublime Maison d'hôtes dotée de 5 chambres disponible à la location.

Name: Bimmerle Private Distillery
Description: Bimmerle Private Distillery is a spirit producer in the Black Forest, Southern Germany.

Name: Distillerie LEHMANN
Description:
Distillerie LEHMANN
Depuis 1850 – Obernai, Alsace
Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant

La Maîtrise se fait Création.

Fondée en 1850 par Joseph LEHMANN au cœur de l’Alsace, la Distillerie LEHMANN perpétue, depuis cinq générations, l’art rare et exigeant de la distillation familiale. Transmis de père en fils, ce savoir-faire ancestral s’exprime dans chaque flacon, entre tradition préservée et audace créative.

Ici, chaque geste compte. Chaque recette est l’aboutissement d’un travail de précision, de patience et de passion.

Maître distillateur, Yves LEHMANN signe des spiritueux d’exception : whiskies français, whiskies IGP Alsace, gin, eaux-de-vie, vodka et liqueurs — élaborés dans le respect des pratiques séculaires, avec une rigueur constante, au service de la quintessence des arômes, révélée par le temps et l’alchimie de la distillation.
________________________________________

Un savoir-faire reconnu.

Labellisée Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant, la distillerie fait partie des maisons d’excellence qui incarnent l’âme du savoir-faire français.
Cette distinction, décernée par l’État, témoigne de l’authenticité et de la rareté de nos procédés de fabrication, ainsi que de notre engagement à préserver et transmettre un patrimoine vivant.
________________________________________

Une quête de justesse.

Portée par une vision exigeante et résolument contemporaine, la Distillerie LEHMANN cultive un art de vivre singulier, où chaque création raconte une histoire : celle d’un territoire, d’une lignée, et d’un geste inspiré.

Un équilibre subtil entre tradition, transmission et création.

« Mon engagement est de préserver ce savoir-faire, de l’approfondir chaque jour, et d’en faire une signature d’excellence. »
— Yves LEHMANN

Name: Time For Wine and More
Description:
Time for Wine began in 1980 out of a small store front in Tampa Florida by German immigrants. They started a home wine tasting business showcasing wines of "European traditions." Most of their wines were from Germany and quickly caught on through out Florida. They were the originator of "the taste before you buy wine" business. 43 years later the company has grown and changed with the times and palettes of Americans. What was predominately sweet German wines has morphed into wines from around the world, touching every great wine region. We still continue the in home wine tastings but also do many fun informational events for corporations, community and hospitality centers. If you want to get together with friends to learn about aromas, palettes, regions, productions, winemakers, etc. then we will gladly join you in that experience. 

Are you looking for a fun and informational way to enjoy wine? 
Do you want to discover new wines from around the world and learn how they are made? 
If so, then you need Time for Wine!

Time for Wine is also a leader in Gourmet Wine Gift Baskets, Customized Private Labels, and exclusive Wine Club Memberships of every budget and palette. 

Are you looking for a thoughtful and elegant gift for someone special? Whether it's a birthday, anniversary, holiday, or any other occasion, gourmet wine gift baskets are the perfect way to show your appreciation and celebrate in style. 

Showcase your brand, event, or personal style with Gift Baskets, Customized Private Label or a Wine Club Membership for your clients or partners.

Order today and get ready to WOW your recipients with a gift they will never forget!

Name: Quinta da Boeira
Description:
.The Quinta da Boeira wine brand dates back to 1850. It differentiates itself 
  with small details and with the quality of their wines. From sui generis 
  bottles to the specifics of corks, it is a brand designed for a wine consumer 
  who appreciates authenticity, with a touch of innovation. Their wines Douro 
  DOC and Port Wine Boeira can be found in different markets around the 
  world.
Location: Vila Nova de Gaia, Vila Nova de Gaia

Name: BluePearl Distillerie
Description: BluePearl Distillerie est une nouvelle microdistillerie à Montréal qui produit des spiritueux artisanales au look moderne, et au goût unique.

Name: Bold Move Beverages
Description: What's your bold move?

Name: Montesquieu Winery
Description:
Who We Are

Montesquieu Winery is a full-service winery/importer/retailer that sources top quality wines from all over the world, bringing them directly to clients.  We are very discriminating, choosing to work mainly with boutique, family-owned, organically-farmed vineyards whose wines reflect unique terroir and local culture.  Our talented and experienced winemaking/buying team includes world-renowned winemaker-consultant Stéphane Derenoncourt,  winemaker Hélène Mingot, and Co-founder and President Fonda Hopkins.

Our in-house wine brokers are passionate connoisseurs of fine wine, working on a personalized, one-on-one basis to get to know their clients’ tastes and needs intimately.  They also consult on cellaring, food pairing, and other key components of a well-rounded wine experience.  Our clients are wine lovers from all over the US.

What We Believe

That wine is essential to the art of living.  That wine, along with food and the arts, is a beautiful way to elevate one’s quality of life.  That your own journey, preferences and experiences are the most important factors in wine appreciation, rather than those of critics and their ratings.

Name: VIGNON
Description:
Per ampliare il numero dei potenziali clienti a volte bisogna andare oltre il modo di pensare convenzionale.

Vignon è il primo servizio italiano di ricondizionamento di vino e alcolici pensato per supportare tutti gli attori impegnati nella formazione, promozione e vendita.
Il contenuto della bottiglia scelta tra i formati normalmente in commercio è frazionato in mignon di vetro da 3 e 5 cl. Le Vignon  ottenute sono leggere e resistenti ed evitano gli sprechi perché consentono di fare assaggiare la stessa bottiglia contemporaneamente a più persone in luoghi diversi. 
Tutto il processo di ricondizionamento avviene in atmosfera protetta per rispettare il grande lavoro dei produttori e garantire il mantenimento delle caratteristiche organolettiche del prodotto di origine.
L’idea nasce durante la primavera 2020 per trovare una via alternativa alle attività di promozione e formazione realizzate in presenza e per potenziare la comunicazione da remoto con degustazioni reali.

Name: Cape Mentelle
Description:
Established by winemaking legend David Hohnen in 1970, Cape Mentelle is
one of the founding five Margaret River wineries that today sets the
region’s benchmark for quality wines. 

Thanks to their determination and the award of prestigious wine trophies in the Estate’s early years, Cape Mentelle has contributed significantly to putting Margaret River on the global wine map. 

Over the years, the award-winning winery has cultivated a sustainable
winemaking philosophy driven by a thirst for experimentation and a
desire to showcase the potential of the pristine Margaret River region. 

With an unconventional and pioneering spirit, Cape Mentelle has
become renowned for crafting vibrant, elegant and expressive wines - particularly Cabernet Sauvignon - that are a true reflection of their distinctive origins.

Name: Visselulles Vinbar ApS
Description:
Sønderborgs første vinbar
Visselulles Vinbar finder du på den gamle brostenshavn på Sønder Havnegade i Sønderborg, hvor vinbaren har åbent hele året, men hvor gæsterne i sommerhalvåret kan nyde udeservering med smuk udsigt over Alssund og Dybbøl Mølle. Vinbaren er opkaldt efter byens første kvindelige havnearbejder fra slutningen af 1800-tallet. 

Et prisvindende vinkort
Visselulles Vinbar blev i 2024 anerkendt med prisen 'Best By the Glass' i Danmark af Star Wine List efter at have været nomineret to gange tidligere. Vinbaren har også tidligere været nomineret i kategorien 'Best Digestif List' i 2023 og 2024 grundet et stort udvalg af et spiritussortiment, der repræsenterer en global smagspalette og inkluderer en af landets største samlinger af åbne The Macallan flasker. Vinkortet er også kendt for et omfattende udvalg af Louis Roederer, KRUG, Domaine Armand Rousseau og Domaine De La Romanée Conti. Du kan også nyde cidere, cocktails, øl, te og kaffe. 

Events & smagninger 
I løbet af året kan du udforske et spændende udvalg af events & smagninger. Test dine vinfærdigheder til blindsmagning i april, deltag i roséfesten i juli, Aperol Spritz event i september, The Macallan-whiskysmagning i november eller afslut året med stil, når der i december afholdes champagne- og kaviarsmagning. Udover spændende events som afholdes i vinbaren, laver vi også skræddersyede "ude-af-huset" arrangementer og samarbejder med virksomheder. 

Kontakt information:
Tlf. +45 29 36 36 32
 visselulle@visselulles-vinbar.dk
 www.visselulles-vinbar.dk

Name: Luen Heng F&B Sdn. Bhd.
Description:
Since 1956 our company has been in the distribution business of premium consumer products. Today, we are one of the leading suppliers in our field throughout East and West Malaysia with a growing business in other parts of the Asian region.
 
Temperature controlled warehousing, strategically located distribution centres, fleet of delivery vehicles & experience in handling sensitive products such as wine in a tropical country, 

Our drivers are the people employed who will continue to be our strongest assets. We have a diverse group of people who are experts in their role as well as multitasked to back up their team members. Our core culture has cultivated a strong team of players ready to surpass our competitors and strive for corporate and personal excellence in every way. Our people are dedicated, motivated and passionate and will ensure due diligence in every way.
 
Core business
In Malaysia we represent many leading international companies in the beverage industry to market and distribute our strong partner's diverse product portfolio in beer, wine and spirits.
 
We are also one of the few importers and distributors to carry a wider selection of products to include tobacco, sugar, non-alcoholic beverages, premium glassware, wine accessories, personal care products and many other leading products in synergy with our distribution network.
 
Our distribution network spans the whole country in off trade retail supermarkets and hypermarkets, convenience stores and petrol marts. We also supply modern on-trade hotels, resorts, restaurants, bars, discos, karaoke and traditional trade like coffee shops, food halls, etc. In Duty free we also have direct supply covering all sectors of duty free trade in Malaysia including airports, boarder shops and duty free zones throughout Malaysia. To assist our streamlining in limited reach we have developed a strong partnership with dealers throughout the country.

Name: Moreno Wines
Description:
Moreno Wines are dedicated to sourcing unique wines from all over the world.

The producers we work with are what our reputation is built upon. We love what they do and the wine they make, which is why we work with them. To explore their world of wine have a look on our suppliers map.

The Moreno team works closely with a variety of customers all over the UK – large or small, from cutting edge restaurants to regional wholesalers. We are a knowledgeable, professional, but most importantly, friendly and passionate team.

Name: O.W. Loeb & Co ltd
Description:
Fine Wine Merchants since 1874

Based in Mayfair, O.W. Loeb are renowned specialists of the wines of Burgundy, Rhône and Germany.

We look after restaurants, hotels, merchants and private clients.

With services including tutored tastings, private wine events, cellar plan, masterclasses, we believe wine is more than just fermented grape juice but rather what brings people together.

We’re all about making craft beer for everyone. An XPA, a Red Ale and a Lager: our easy-drinking gems will be your session favourites. Shout a jug at the pub, be the hero who brings the tinnies to the BBQ, don’t take yourself too seriously. Have fun times with good mates on us.

Quality ingredients. Great Beer. No Bull$#!&.

Seductively Beer

Name: Vallegre Porto & Douro Wines
Description:
Vallegre Porto & Douro Wines is a Portuguese company with centuries-old tradition which has embraced the continuity of a family business for five generations - shareholders and managers represent the fifth generation of a family deeply rooted in the Douro region. 

Producer and exporter of high quality and prestigious Port Wine, DOC Douro and DOC Moscatel Douro wines. Highlights not just the results of the expansion and modernisation over the years, but also how the family-rooted ancient wisdom has been preserved.

Nowadays, the wines are sold and enjoyed in over twenty seven countries and the countless prizes and distinctions achieved in several international competitions prove the excellence of our quality.

Name: Trentodoc
Description:
Trentodoc, bollicine di montagna, è la diretta espressione del territorio da cui proviene. I vigneti sono posti in altitudine in una terra, quella trentina, che presenta le varietà climatiche ideali per il metodo classico. Con queste particolari condizioni (clima, altitudine, forti escursioni termiche, natura del terreno) possono maturare uve ideali per il vino base spumante, che esprime dopo la rifermentazione in bottiglia tutte quelle caratteristiche esclusive, come sapidità, acidità e profumi, che rappresentano la qualità di un metodo classico capace di fare la differenza.

Dalla vite all’imbottigliamento, la filiera di Trentodoc è guidata dai principi della produzione viticola integrata. Ottenere cioè la migliore qualità possibile nel rispetto dell’operatore agricolo, dell’ambiente e del consumatore. Si tratta di un fattore fondamentale e determinante per il quale, fin dagli anni Ottanta, si è pervenuti ad un Protocollo d’Intesa promosso dalla Provincia autonoma di Trento, seguito da tutti gli spumantisti. 

La sua storia affonda nel passato. Sono trascorsi più di cento anni da quando Giulio Ferrari ebbe l’intuizione di coltivare l’uva Chardonnay in Trentino. La D.O.C. TRENTO è stata fra le prime al mondo ad essere assegnata, per un metodo classico. 

Trentodoc può fregiarsi oggi di una “carta di identità” che certifica la sua origine e il suo legame con il territorio, frutto di una ricerca della Fondazione Mach di San Michele all’Adige, in collaborazione con il Ministero dell’Agricoltura e con l’Università degli Studi di Modena e Reggio Emilia.
La qualità di Trentodoc “bollicine di montagna” è affidata al disciplinare di produzione, che fissa rigidi canoni e controlli lungo tutta la filiera. 

Tutte le case spumantistiche associate sono pubblicate sul sito. Se vi va, potete seguirci su Instagram.

Name: Caves Wengler SA
Description: Wengler Châteaux et Domaines is a family business that exclusively imports Wine, Champagne, Spirits and Beer in Luxembourg, embracing a wide portfolio of iconic high quality brands. With 120 years of experience we ensure a true understanding of our customers and an application of market-specific strategies that meet each customers’ needs. We identify the most valuable opportunities, using our expertise to supply our brands effectively and efficiently. At the heart of everything we do is our passion to create value for our consumers, while providing a positive contribution to the society.

Name: Tre Amici Wines
Description:
Tre Amici is a family owned and operated wine and spirit importing service passionate about delivering exceptional bottles directly to your doorstep. We’ve spent nearly two decades working with small, family owned wineries and distillers to ensure that our extensive portfolio is composed entirely of unique brands not found at the LCBO. Our team takes pride in helping you discover your personal wine style by developing your palate through one-of-a-kind tasting experiences and curated crates at every price point.

Like us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/treamiciimports/

Name: La Cave d'Irouleguy
Description:
Située au Pays Basque (Sud-Ouest), la Cave d'Irouleguy est l'une des plus petites coopératives viticoles de France en vignoble de montagne. Créée en 1952 sous l'impulsion de 9 viticulteurs passionnés, elle représente aujourd'hui  environ 50% des surfaces plantées de l'AOC Irouléguy.

Plongez dans son univers grâce à sa boutique scénographiée, située au coeur de la Cave ! Des visites et expériences oenologiques vous sont proposées toute l'année pour découvrir les vins et le quotidien de ses vignerons.

Les entreprises ne sont pas en reste ! La Cave d'Irouleguy tient à diposition deux salles de réunion, accueillant jusqu'à 65 personnes. L'équipe est à votre écoute pour construire un évènement sur-mesure, avec des ateliers œnologiques originaux.

Partageons ensemble un moment unique ! #elgarrekin
Location: SAINT ETIENNE DE BAIGORRY, PYRÉNÉES ATLANTIQUES

Name: Menaud
Description: At Menaud, the meticulous savoir-faire, the respect for each product and our master brewers – distillers’ fierceness and desire to reinvent themselves, inspires us a little more every day to offer you unique products. As the first distillery-brewery in the Charlevoix region, we wish to share our passion and guide craftsmen as well as amateurs.

Name: Bodegas de Logroño
Description: Una enópolis con 8 bodegas para visitar en las que descubrir la historia y la cultura del vino de la DOCa Rioja, porque en Logroño el vino es capital.

Name: Patriarche Père et Fils
Description:
Négociant éleveur de grands vins de Bourgogne, notre entreprise familiale vous invite à visiter l'une des plus grandes caves de la région au cœur de Beaune.
Vous trouverez plus de 300 références de vins à la vente et de vieux millésimes.
Venez découvrir les mystères de 5 kilomètres de cave et de 230 ans d'histoire !
L'ABUS D'ALCOOL EST DANGEREUX POUR LA SANTÉ, À CONSOMMER AVEC MODÉRATION - Vous devez avoir 18 ans ou plus pour accéder à cette page.

Name: La Tordera
Description:
LA TORDERA is a family winery from the hills of Valdobbiadene.  The hills of Valdobbiadene are the original home of Prosecco and unquestionably the home to the best Prosecco.
Since July  2019 the Prosecco Hills of Conegliano and Valdobbiadene are officially the 55th Italian UNESCO "World Heritage Site”.

The Vettoretti family have been grape farmers for four generations; until 2001 the family sells their  grapes to others and then they bravely decided to build their own brand: LA TORDERA.  This name sake is of an ungrafted rootstock vineyard planted in 1918 that we still farm today and is located on the CARTIZZE hills, few km far from the winery. Today we call our wines by the names of the vineyards we farm.

We call our style “Natural Balance”.  Rare in the world of Prosecco, we are 100% hand harvested and 100% estate grown and bottled.  This allows us to make a wine with a lower content of sulfites.  We believe fewer sulfites and less sugar, allows us to make an easy-to-drink, balanced, clean and healthy wine.

La Tordera believes in preserving the values of hillside agriculture; on promoting family businesses and local economies; on the authentic expression of the aromas and flavors of our land.

We believe it is this land, the way we farm this land and maintaining the traditions of this land that make the difference. We are one of the few winery in Italy that has obtained in 2018 the Casa Clima Wine certification: this certificate evaluates the environmental compatibility of the building and its “comfortable living”, of the energy and water consumption in the production of the wines, of the choice of packaging (our bottle is only 700gr) as well as the consequences of transportation. The winery covers 70% of its energy demand by using renewable sources. Moreover, we have joined the innovative Rafcycle programme, a recycling system for label scraps.

Name: Brix & Co Limited
Description:
Brix & Co - 100% New Zealand family owned beverage manufacturing company with full winemaking specialist capabilities.  

30+ years (global & domestic) experience in engineering, packaging & contract manufacturing in the NZ Food & Beverage industry (including infant formula & nutritional products).  

Drawing on our expertise and capability, we support small but growing business as their innovation and manufacturing partner while they focus on the sales.

Willkommen bei WirWinzer, dem führenden Marktplatz für exzellente Weine . Winesave allows wine lovers to enjoy any wine one glass at a time at home.

It also gives wine professionals the easiest and most affordable way to eliminate wastage when serving wines by the glass.

Name: The Good Wine Shop Ltd
Description:
The Good Wine Shop is an independent wine merchant. We also sell craft beers and artisan spirits. We are in locations across West London with shops in Kew, Chiswick, Richmond and Teddington. In addition we also offer a variety of wines and spirits through our website at: http://www.thegoodwineshop.co.uk.

Our range is unique and we champion small, family producers from around the world. We were delighted to have the quality and depth of our range recognised by being named Best London Neighbourhood Wine Shop in 2020 as well as Best London Wine Shop 2019 by the Decanter Awards.

The Good Wine Shop is experienced at delivering corporate tasting events and helping businesses with corporate gifts. Whatever you’re looking for we can help – ranging from bespoke tasting events for small & large groups to volume orders of gift packed champagne or wine sent around the world  – just tell us your brief, budget and deadline and we can take the strain for you.

Name: Koerner Distributor Inc.
Description:
Family owned and operated since 1982, Koerner Distributor, Inc. has grown to become one of the largest beverage distributors of beer, wine, liquor and non-alcoholic beverages, in the great state of Illinois.  The headquarters are located in Effingham, IL with satellite offices in Carterville, New Baden, and Champaign, IL.  Within these four locations Koerner has a handle on 60 counties of 102 that Illinois houses.

The key factors that have been proven in the successful growth of Koerner Distributor, Inc. have been the dedicated relationships we have formed in conjunction with our suppliers, the products they provide, and the community that we distribute to.  Because of the passion and confidence that we have in the products that we contract with our supplier partners on, we have become a direct stake in the success of the brands that we represent.  Community involvement is not just another success, but at Koerner Distributor, Inc., a way of life.  We are all members and contributors of the communities we serve.  We want to know you as much as you need to know us.  Our sales team is here to give detailed support in each marketplace under our belt.

In house we utilize modern technology inventory systems to ensure product availability and to maintain our competitive advantage in the markets we serve.  The focus of our company is to source our customers with quality products that work to build a long-term success for all.  We firmly believe that the foundational goals we have set will guide the efforts of our sales and management teams to preserve and sustain a future of beverage distribution above and beyond any other in our area.

Name: Smith & Smith Ltd.
Description: Mit viel Leidenschaft, Sachkenntnis und Neugier haben Markus Lichtenstein und sein Team ein bemerkenswertes Sortiment zusammengestellt. Vorerst sind insbesondere Weingüter aus Frankreich, Italien und Spanien vertreten – weitere werden folgen. Man darf gespannt darauf sein, denn schon jetzt finden sich darunter echte Trouvaillen, Weingüter in Familienbesitz, die der Tradition, Herkunft und Qualität verpflichtet sind. Dass herausragende Weine nicht unerschwinglich sein müssen, zeigen z.B. die diskreten, femininen Baroli von Burlotto.

Name: Domaine de Terrebrune
Description:
Owned by Reynald Delille, son of the Estate's founder and winemaker, and Jean d'Arthuys, a man of the media and entrepreneur with a passion for wine, the Estate, considered today as one of the greatest wines in the South of France, tirelessly pursues its quest for excellence.

With 35 hectares of vines planted in terraces facing the Mediterranean Sea and in organic farming, Domaine de Terrebrune produces wines whose identity and character are forged by this magical Triassic terroir and this grape variety so typical of Bandol, Mourvèdre.

In 2021, the "Guide Vert des Meilleurs Vins de France", La Revue du vin de France's yearly wine guide, has awarded three stars to Domaine de Terrebrune. Only three estates in the Provence region have attained this rank.
(La Revue du vin de France is "France's only serious wine magazine" according to wine critic Jancis Robinson).

Name: Ampersand Estates
Description:
In Western Australia’s Pemberton region, Ampersand Estates offers a winery, accommodation, wedding venue and Australia’s first single harvest distillery. The estate is a marriage of luxury and unrivalled natural beauty, where guests can enjoy Ampersand’s premium wine, spirits, and picnics while surrounded by the majestic Donnelly River and the ancient karri forests of Easter National Park.


PREMIUM WINERY

Ampersand Estates produces a range of light, approachable wines suitable for immediate enjoyment and styled to be paired with picnics, barbeques, and other special occasions. Crafted by the region’s top wine makers, Ampersand Estates’ wines are outstanding expressions of the regions’ unique beauty and outstanding terroir.


PRIVATE ACCOMMODATION

The estate has three luxury accommodation sites, each self-contained and privately situated amidst their own lawns, gardens, and orchards for the ultimate private escape into nature.


LUXURY WEDDINGS

The estates’ outstanding natural beauty, extending over 56 hectares of vines, fields, river frontage, ponds, and natural bush, serves as the backdrop for two luxury wedding venues. These include a timber barn, with a unique history stretching back over 100 years, and outdoor terrace in the bend of the Donnelly River and overlooking the old growth trees of Easter National Park.


GOURMET PICNICS

Ampersand Estates curates gourmet picnic baskets composed of a range of fresh regional produce and artisanal cheeses, bread, charcuterie, and chocolates. Picnics can be enjoyed across the entire estate.


UNIQUE SPIRITS

Ampersand Estates produces estate-distilled spirits that exemplify the nature, botanicals, and essence of the region’s ancient Karri forests, rolling hills, and pristine lakes and rivers. The 2021 spirit vintage comprise 6 unique spirits each reflecting a different aspect of the region.

Name: VERT DE COEUR
Description: VERT DE COEUR is a food production company based out of 121 Chemin de la Gay - Lieu dit Combe - 42155 St Jean St MAURICE SUR LOIRE
