Location: Saint Jean saint maurice sur Loire, Loire

Name: Howard Park Wines
Description:
Howard Park is one of Western Australia’s pioneering family-owned wineries, specialising in the state’s premier grape-growing regions of Margaret River & the Great Southern. 

Encompassing a 30-year history and overseen by two generations of the Burch family, Howard Park is a multi-regional endeavour with two vineyards in each province, as well as a winery and an architecturally awarded Cellar Door in Margaret River. 

Since its inception in 1986, Howard Park’s philosophy has centred on an uncompromising commitment to quality and a focus on crafting wines that are not only expressive of the region’s terrior, but are balanced, elegant and subtle.

Name: Weingut TESCH
Description:
Das Weingut TESCH aus Langenlonsheim an der Nahe hat gezeigt, dass man in der deutschen Weinbranche sehr erfolgreich neue Wege gehen kann. Die Wein-Auswahl ist straff und übersichtlich. Nur drei verschiedene Rebsorten werden angebaut: Riesling, Weißburgunder und Spätburgunder. TESCH-Weine sind markant und trocken. Der Kern des Angebotes sind die fünf Lagen-Rieslinge und der populäre RIESLING UNPLUGGED. Alle Flaschen sind mit praktischen Drehverschlüssen verschlossen.

The TESCH winery from Langenlonsheim in the Nahe-Region has shown that it is possible to break new ground in the German wine industry very successfully. The wine selection is tight and clear. Only three different grape varieties are cultivated: Riesling, Pinot Blanc and Pinot Noir. TESCH wines are distinctive and dry. The best known  wines are the five single-site Rieslings and the popular RIESLING UNPLUGGED. All bottles are closed with practical screw caps.

Name: Vogelsanger Weine AG
Description: Vieles hat sich in den über 20 Jahren, in denen wir im Weinhandel tätig sind, verändert. Geblieben ist das Wichtigste: die Freude am Produkt. Was im Kleinen begann, hat sich bis heute bewährt: Wir importieren direkt vom Winzer und schätzen den direkten Kontakt zum Produzenten, aus dem schon manche Freundschaft entstand. Persönliche und genussorientierte Beratung gehört bei uns zum guten Ton. Das Wichtigste bleibt dabei aber Ihr ganz eigener Geschmack: unser ganzes Sortiment steht Ihnen jederzeit zur Degustation bereit. Überzeugen Sie sich selbst!

Name: Cave Lusa | Wines & Spirits
Description:
Cave Lusa | Cave Lusa Premium | Prestige Drinks 

 Fundada em 2011, a Cave Lusa é uma referência no mundo dos vinhos e bebidas espirituosas. Desde o início, o nosso compromisso é claro: encontrar as melhores soluções para satisfazer as necessidades dos nossos clientes, sempre com um acompanhamento próximo e especializado.

 Com uma equipa jovem, dinâmica e profissional, focamo-nos em três pilares principais:
Consumidor Final 
Canal HoReCa (hotéis, restaurantes e bares) 
Exportação Internacional 


 Loja Online: Possuímos uma enorme loja online de fácil navegação, com entregas em 48 horas e preços abaixo da média do mercado.
 Loja física, sediada em Viseu, a nossa garrafeira física é um espaço moderno e arrojado, repleto de charme e uma seleção cuidadosamente pensada para todos os gostos.
 Além disso, promovemos eventos exclusivos, como provas de vinhos comentadas e visitas vínicas, proporcionando aos nossos clientes momentos únicos.

 Visite-nos e descubra o que torna a Cave Lusa uma experiência inigualável no universo dos vinhos e bebidas premium!

Name: Vinicola Decordi
Description:
The Decordi Winery was established in 1921 as a family-run tavern, where wines were bottled for friends and people of the Region and served with traditional local food. 

The success obtained with these products inspired the Decordi family to take a greater interest in wine-making: they started with the creation of a new range of wines, the enlargement of the production facility and the installation of the first automated industrial bottling system.

Nowadays,the Decordi Winery has a modern and prestigious facility, but it still maintains its ties with the place of its origins: the old tavern remains the place where the Decordi family love to welcome and entertain guests, as well as prestigious customers. Therefore, the traditional atmosphere, which has a deep-rooted connection with the territory and its flavors, continues to be the hallmark of the Decordi Winery.

The almost centennial experience, together with the accurate traceability of each phase of the production and the great capacity and productive flexibility, allow the Decordi Winery to create and produce specific and personalized product lines, fulfilling all the requirements of each market and of each distributor and always guaranteeing the quality and excellence of the products.

Name: The Lane Vineyard
Description:
Since 1993, The Lane Vineyard has been home to an enviable piece of pristine Adelaide Hills terroir. Perched 450 metres above sea level with views across the Onkaparinga Valley, our vineyards flourish in the region’s signature mild days and cool nights — ideal conditions for crafting elegant, cool-climate wines.
Just three kilometres from the historic village of Hahndorf and 30 minutes from the city of Adelaide, The Lane is more than a vineyard. Our 300-acre estate is a place where wine, food, and landscape come together seamlessly. Visitors are welcomed into our contemporary tasting room and award-winning restaurant, where sweeping views provide the backdrop for immersive wine and dining experiences.
The Lane is proudly Adelaide Hills and family owned, led by CEO and co-owner Jared Stringer alongside a passionate team of winemakers, chefs, and hospitality professionals. Together, we are united by a belief that wine is a catalyst for connection — bringing people together to share moments and create lasting memories.
Our vineyards are sustainably managed and certified by Sustainable Winegrowing Australia, reflecting our commitment to caring for the land and safeguarding its future. Every vine is nurtured with respect for balance, biodiversity, and the long view of generational stewardship.
For more than three decades, our philosophy has been simple: to craft wines of purity and character that speak of the Adelaide Hills and our single vineyards. Each bottle tells a story of place — vibrant flavours, refined textures, and an unmistakable sense of elegance.
Whether you join us at the estate or enjoy our wines at home, every experience with The Lane reflects our commitment to authenticity, sustainability, and the joy of bringing people together.

Name: VOGELVINS SA
Description:
Vogel vins est une entreprise familiale basée à Grandvaux et spécialisée dans l'importation et la distribution de vins qui tiennent à cœur à l'ensemble de notre équipe. 

Apprenez à nous connaître:

Depuis toujours très différents, les enfants des fondateurs dirigent aujourd’hui la société. Anne-Christine Erlekam-Vogel en assure la Présidence et gère au quotidien les aspects logistiques, administratifs liés aux achats et à la vente de nos grands crus et pépites. Julien-Vincent-Amédée Vogel, directeur de la société s’occupe lui du marketing, de la vente et des finances.

Le professionnalisme de nos équipes, une réactivité à toutes épreuves et l’excellence de notre assortiment sont les bases de notre positionnement et de notre réputation.

Tous les vins sont sélectionnés par le sacro-saint « comité de dégustation » qui ne laisse rien au hasard. Ces nez, ces bouches, ces yeux font de notre assortiment la fierté de notre entreprise.

Les vigneron.nes que nous représentons sont toutes et tous des amis, des gens qui portent une philosophie importante à nos yeux. Ils respectent leurs terres, les raisins puis les vins qu'ils élaborent mais aussi et surtout leurs clients et ceux qui dégustent et boivent leurs nectars.
De grandes familles font confiance à l'équipe de Vogel Vins depuis des dizaines d'années. Champagne Taittinger, Prince Robert du Luxembourg (Château Haut-Brion, Château Mission Haut-Brion, Château Qvintus), Famille Chapoutier, Morgan Meier (Domaine des Landions), Simon Vogel (Domaine Croix Duplex), Pascal Jolivet, etc.

Depuis plus de 30 ans, les grandes tables et restaurants de ce pays font confiance à notre expertise. C’est aussi un gage de la qualité de notre sélection que nous offrons également à la vente à notre clientèle privée au travers de notre site internet.

Name: Top 100 On-Premise Spirits
Description:
Top 100 On-Premise spirits is a celebration of 100 top spirits at the Bartender Spirits Awards. Uniquely, the T100Spirits are selected from votes made by top Bartenders and On-Premise spirits buyers of USA.


Subscribe here to get the results 1 week before it goes live and get exclusive access to the top 100 on-premise spirits and their suppliers.


Includes a complimentary detailed guide on how to grow your on-premise spirits sales with real tactics and insights from top bartenders and on-premise buyers who have done it.

Name: Col d'Orcia Brunello di Montalcino bio
Description:
Welcome to  Col d'Orcia, organic producer of Brunello
 
Col d’Orcia literally means the hill overlooking the Orcia River. The Orcia River marks the South West border of the Brunello di Montalcino territory and the name of the farm is intrinsically linked to the physical location were the vineyards are planted. It is the mission of Col d’Orcia to produce the best possible wines that the exceptional combination of soil and climate of this part of Montalcino can achieve.

Name: Elena Walch
Description: Elena Walch is a leading Alto Adige wine estate, in family hands, and belongs to the elite in Italian wine production, with international success.
Location: Termeno sulla strada del vino, Trentino-Alto Adige

Name: Brasserie de la Seillonne
Description:
La brasserie de la Seillonne est une brasserie artisanale créée en 2015 avec au lancement une gamme de 4 types de bières : blonde, blanche, ambrée et brune.

Très vite le bio s’est imposé comme un critère majeur à prendre en compte et nous avons choisi de proposer des bières 100% bio.

Aujourd'hui nous proposons entre 17 et 20 bières artisanales bio.
La gamme se développe avec des bières sans alcool et des softs, bio également.

Découvrez notre gamme de bières sur notre site web.

A déguster sans attendre !

Name: Laithwaites Wine for Business
Description:
Looking for wine for clients, staff members or customers … you’re in the right place. Laithwaites Corporate Team is here to provide those special wines, along with outstanding service for all organisations, no matter how big or small.

We’re wine nuts, pure and simple. We’ve been exploring the world on a mission to find great wine for the last 50 years. We leave the beaten track to find the unsung and unexpected, because they have the best stories and wines. When we’re not out there finding great wines, we’re enjoying them just like our customers. 

Contact the Laithwaites Corporate Team today. Email wineforbusiness@laithwaiteswine.com or visit www.laithwaites.co.uk/business.

Name: LABORATOIRES DUJARDIN SALLERON
Description: Laboratoires Dujardin-Salleron conceive, manufacture and distribute analysis instruments and measurement devices for oenology and spirits.

Name: Mas de l'Oncle
Description: Our wood-clad winery was designed in the heart of our vineyard by architect Rudy Ricciotti. The buildings fade away in front of the splendor of the landscape and highlight the process of transformation of the grape, from the vine to the wine. Our vines, richness of the Pic Saint Loup lands, are cultivated in Organic Agriculture in order to preserve the vineyard. The harvest of the grape, is also done in the greatest respect of the fruit since we make our grape harvests with the hand and in boxes not to damage the bunches. The conception of the wines is then done with the greatest care in order to offer wines of superior quality. The diversity of our vintages is also the strength of the Mas de l'Oncle, offering wines that can seduce the greatest number of people. You will have understood that wine and the work of the vineyard are the passion of our team and it is through our products that we try to transmit this passion.

Name: Doña Felisa Winery - Chinchilla Red Wine
Description:
Bodega Doña Felisa es una empresa dedicada a la elaboración y crianza de vinos de la máxima calidad en Ronda (Andalucía).Está enclavada en plena Serranía Rondeña, en el paraje denominado "CHINCHILLA", en las proximidades de la ciudad romana de Acinipo, donde se puede disfrutar del turismo enológico en una emergente D.O. Sierras de Málaga. 
Los distintos vinos son la expresión de una zona exclusiva y estudiada durante siglos para la obtención de vinos de la más alta calidad. Nuestra elaboración está basada en una cuidada y limitada producción del viñedo, trasmitiendo al vino la expresión del "Terroir" donde se encuentra. 
Nuestros vinos se elaboran mediante un proceso controlado, que comienza en el cuidado del viñedo, recogida, elaboración, aportando una gran carga conceptual y un diseño exclusivo.

Name: Distillerie LEHMANN
Description:
Distillerie LEHMANN
Depuis 1850 – Obernai, Alsace
Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant

La Maîtrise se fait Création.

Fondée en 1850 par Joseph LEHMANN au cœur de l’Alsace, la Distillerie LEHMANN perpétue, depuis cinq générations, l’art rare et exigeant de la distillation familiale. Transmis de père en fils, ce savoir-faire ancestral s’exprime dans chaque flacon, entre tradition préservée et audace créative.

Ici, chaque geste compte. Chaque recette est l’aboutissement d’un travail de précision, de patience et de passion.

Maître distillateur, Yves LEHMANN signe des spiritueux d’exception : whiskies français, whiskies IGP Alsace, gin, eaux-de-vie, vodka et liqueurs — élaborés dans le respect des pratiques séculaires, avec une rigueur constante, au service de la quintessence des arômes, révélée par le temps et l’alchimie de la distillation.
________________________________________

Un savoir-faire reconnu.

Labellisée Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant, la distillerie fait partie des maisons d’excellence qui incarnent l’âme du savoir-faire français.
Cette distinction, décernée par l’État, témoigne de l’authenticité et de la rareté de nos procédés de fabrication, ainsi que de notre engagement à préserver et transmettre un patrimoine vivant.
________________________________________

Une quête de justesse.

Portée par une vision exigeante et résolument contemporaine, la Distillerie LEHMANN cultive un art de vivre singulier, où chaque création raconte une histoire : celle d’un territoire, d’une lignée, et d’un geste inspiré.

Un équilibre subtil entre tradition, transmission et création.

« Mon engagement est de préserver ce savoir-faire, de l’approfondir chaque jour, et d’en faire une signature d’excellence. »
— Yves LEHMANN

Name: Bottlebooks GmbH
Description:
What if there was a standard way to exchange wine data?

Bottlebooks makes it easy for businesses to exchange comprehensive wine information in a standard format.

Name: FOOBESPAIN, S.L.U.
Description: We represent wineries from Spain to develop the export markets worlwide. We work with our importers in order to increase the sales of our wineries . Not only sales but also promotion.

Name: Altavis Fine Wines
Description:
Altavis’ mission is to be one of the leading China importers and distributors of fine wines from around the world.  Its founder David Chow has crafted an outstanding portfolio of wineries with the aim to deliver the highest value for money at every level of quality. 

Altavis is building a growing portfolio of worldwide wines from France, Italy, Spain, Germany, Chile, Argentina, USA, New Zealand, Australia and many other wine regions to come. Its selection features amongst others an impressive array of top star winemakers such as Château Grand-Puy Ducasse, Château Rayne-Vigneau, Château Bonalgue, Domaine de Montille, Domaine de Beaurenard, Roberto Voerzio and Clarendon Hills.

With a dedication to supply restaurants, hotels, and specialized retail shops, Altavis continues to assemble a great reputation for its high quality wine selection and its strong professional expertise.

Name: Ace Wija (PT. Ace Wija Internasional)
Description:
Our Story

Started in a garage, a humble place for our ambitions and dreams, in the middle of the pandemic. Against all odds, within a few years, Ace Wija has blossomed into Indonesia's fastest growing tech-enabled beverage company, with over a million bottles delivered to our happy customers.

Putting a Ding in the Universe

Fueled by our grand vision to be Indonesia's first >10B$ beverage company, and drawing upon the power of WIJA (Water, Innovation, Joy, and Alcohol), we're on a mission to revolutionize the drinks industry, one sip at a time.

What Makes Us Unique

Our unique approach in product development combines continuous innovation & process improvement with rigorous QC & QA practices in our pipeline, ensuring that we deliver high-quality beverages at affordable prices.

Revolutionizing the Industry

We're also not shy about embracing the future. Harnessing the power of technology - think AI and data analytics - we are able to maximize efficiency across all aspects of our business. From sales and distribution to logistics, inventory management, and production - we're reinventing every step of the process.
Our strategic approach doesn't stop there. We craft compelling stories in collaboration with leading agencies, influential personalities, and major media outlets. Our branding, marketing, and advertising strategies are not just about getting our brands out there; they're about building meaningful connections and engaging experiences.

Our Superpower

Our strength lies in our passion for excellence. Our dynamic team excels across the board, from branding and design to engineering, R&D, and the operational realms of sales, inventory, logistics, and distribution. This wide-ranging expertise fuels our rise as Indonesia's fastest-growing alcoholic beverage brand, showcasing our commitment to innovation and quality.

Name: Four Brix Winery
Description: California based winery focusing on limited-production varietal blends.  Our wines are fashioned after our favorite wine regions around the world:  Italy, France, Spain and California.  Each wine is blended with producing a wine that will ready to drink when the consumer purchases.  Some are ideal for aging, but drinkable at time of purchase.

Name: Central de Licores Unidos de Venezuela, C.A.
Description:
Fundada en el año 1997 Central de Licores Unidos de Venezuela, C.A. (Celiveca), inició como una empresa importadora de productos de casas licoreras como: Quality Spirit International, Bodegas Cousiño Macul, Viña Morandé, Bodegas Bianchi, entre otras.

Nuestro objetivo siempre ha estado claro, ofrecer al paladar venezolano excelentes opciones para compartir en familia, satisfaciendo todos los gustos y apalancados en valores humanos esenciales como lo son:

- Responsabilidad laboral y social.
- Trabajo en equipo.
- Innovación, constancia y disciplina.
- Calidad y pasión.
- Solidaridad y honestidad
- Trato respetuoso.
 
Tras años de árduo trabajo, en el 2002, salieron al mercado nuestras dos primeras marcas nacionales: Sangría Madrileña y el vino espumante Tentación.

Hoy son más de veinte años en el mercado, en donde hemos ampliado nuestro portafolio a 26 marcas, con más de 60 productos donde los consumidores pueden encontrarse con: Whisky Sir Xpecial y Old 63, Vodka & Ginebra Relative y Bajo Cero, Espumantes como Tentación y Viude Denise, Sangría Madrileña, Licores Dulces de la Línea Toscana, Licores Secos como Pedro I, Copa Real, Maverick y Kingdom 18, Rones como Ron Barrica (Premium y Reserva), Crema de Ron Barrica, Crema de Ron y Cacao Xocolat, Ron Ultra Añejo Caballo Viejo, B.E.S. Alambique, mixers como Agua Gasificada Eco Fresh, entre otros; con la más alta calidad en cuanto a sabor y presentaciones.

En Celiveca, hemos demostrado nuestra capacidad de desarrollar productos de la más alta calidad, como nuestra línea de Rones Añejos Barrica, portadora del exclusivo sello D.O.C. Rones de Venezuela, obtenido en 2016, y galardonada internacionalmente, por otra parte, hemos dejado en claro que somos una empresa versátil e innovadora, cualidades que quedaron demostradas en el 2018 con el lanzamiento de Sir Xpecial, un whisky hecho en Venezuela.

Apostamos por la creación de productos de calidad con sello venezolano.

Name: Winetraders UK Ltd
Description: Winetraders UK Ltd is the leading specialist importer of high-quality estate wines from Italy, Spain,  and Germany and was founded in 1997 by Michael Palij MW.  A Canadian, Michael emigrated to the UK in 1989 after reading English and Philosophy in his home city of Toronto.  He qualified as a Master of Wine in 1995 at the age of just 29.  A career in retail was brought short when he was recruited as the wine buyer and sent on his first buying trip to Italy.  He promptly fell in love with both the country and its wines and has subsequently visited Italy on more than 100 occasions.  Winetraders works globally but the majority of its business is in the UK where it supplies the prestige on-trade, regional wholesalers, Majestic and Waitrose.

Name: Wine Growers Ontario
Description:
We are generations of winemakers as well as new entrepreneurs. We cultivate vast acreages of grapes and smaller vineyards too. Together, we are proud of our international acclaim for award winning wines produced from the beautiful, rich and diverse Wine Country of Ontario.

Most of all, we are passionate about the grape and wine industry and truly committed to its continued success at home, in Canada and around the globe.

Name: Alpha Box & Dice
Description:
Alpha Box & Dice is a boutique winery based in McLaren Vale, South Australia. 

AB&D are embarking on creating an Alphabet of Wine, where every letter of the alphabet is represented by a different wine style. 

AB&D specialise in alternative varietals and experimental winemaking using small batch, minimal intervention and vegan-friendly winemaking methods; respecting the environment and integrity of the fruit to create wines that have soul and a sense of place.

Name: Côtes de Bourg
Description:
Situés sur la rive droite de l’estuaire de la Gironde, à 35km de Bordeaux, les Côtes de Bourg s’étendent sur 15 communes. Surnommée « petite Suisse Girondine » de par sa morphologie accidentée, ses vallons et ses coteaux chatoyants, les Côtes de Bourg profitent d’un climat privilégié et d’un terroir majoritairement argilo-calcaire.

Reconnue d’origine contrôlée depuis 1936, l’appellation s’est engagée, depuis de nombreuses gé-nérations, dans une démarche « qualité ». À base de merlot, de malbec, de cabernet sauvignon ou de cabernet franc, les rouges, au tempérament fruité et chaleureux mais aux styles de plus en plus variés, dominent la production. Confidentiels par les volumes mais emblématiques, les blancs de l’appellation sont issus d’une large palette de cépages.

Un savoir-faire de générations en générations, garantissant qualité et authenticité. L’identité Côtes de Bourg est synonyme de partage et d’accueil, dans le respect du terroir et de son environne-ment. L’appellation détonne dans un vignoble bordelais au sein duquel elle cultive une vivifiante singularité.

Name: AGIVI
Description:
AGIVI, Associazione Giovani Imprenditori Vinicoli Italiani, nasce nel 1989 dalla volontà di un gruppo di giovani imprenditori, già appartenenti all’Unione Italiana Vini e alla Confederazione della Vite e del Vino, di unirsi per accrescere i valori, l’intesa e lo spirito di coesione fra le aziende del settore. Grazie al lavoro svolto sin dalla sua fondazione, l’associazione ha registrato nel tempo una costante crescita e visibilità, affermando il proprio ruolo di portavoce della nuova generazione degli imprenditori vitivinicoli, che oggi sono alla guida di alcune delle più importanti aziende italiane.

Educazione e Formazione: per la tua crescita professionale
Promozione: per comunicare e diffondere la cultura del vino
Sistema: per creare sinergie e confrontarsi con altri giovani imprenditori del nostro settore

AGIVI è strettamente collegata ad Unione Italiana Vini, rappresentandone il ramo giovane, una sorta di “palestra” dove allenarsi alla vita istituzionale e politica del domani. Non a caso, il Presidente ed alcuni Consiglieri, siedono anche nel Consiglio di UIV e AGIVI collabora con loro in diversi progetti per promuovere e diffondere una corretta cultura del bere nel mondo. Tra le numerose attività portate avanti dall’Associazione: i corsi di aggiornamento e formazione, finalizzati alla crescita professionale dei soci, i Weekend alla scoperta dell’Eccellenze vitivinicole del nostro paese, i viaggi studio all’estero, le sinergie con altri settori e l’impegno nella promozione di una corretta cultura del Bere.

Name: MOSTOS VINOS Y ALCOHOLES, SA
Description:
MOSTOS VINOS Y ALCOHOLES, SA (MOVIALSA) se dedica principalmente a la: 

- Elaboración de vinos de calidad, blancos ( Airén, Macabeo, Verdejo, Sauvignon Blanc, Chardonnay, … ), tintos ( Tempranillo, Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Syrah, Cabernet Franc, … ) y rosados.

- Producción de mostos, mostos azufrados, mostos concentrados y mostos concentrados rectificados.

- Producción de aguardientes y holandas de vino, alcoholes destilados, alcoholes rectificados y brutos.

Name: Domaine Mathis Bastian (Domaine Viticole)
Description: Bastian Mathis (Domaine Viticole) is a family owned wine estate situated at the very heart of the vineyards in Remich (Luxembourg)

Name: The Drinks Club
Description:
The Drinks Club Ltd (TDC) specialise in high-end drinks supply to the on trade. With one of the most dynamic and efficient wholesale models in the industry TDC are able to offer our customers exceptional levels of customer service while maintaining market-leading prices. 

TDC showcase a large portfolio of drinks products ranging from champagne to water. The company is sourcing new products on a daily basis, so if you need anything that is not on your price list please get in contact.

Name: 10th Mountain Whiskey & Spirit Co.
Description: The 10th Mountain Whiskey and Spirit Company is an extension of the mountain lifestyle, bringing together the old with the new. Generation after generation, men and women alike, all share this same passion, enjoying it for a day, a weekend, a lifetime, or somewhere in between. No matter how long it’s embraced the combination of friends, mountains, memories and spirits, bring people together like no other. To encourage these relationships, to embrace the mountain lifestyle and to honor the 10th Mountain soldiers who inspired our way of life, we created a tribute spirit company in Vail, Colorado. Not only is it a tribute to the 10th Mountain soldier, but it is also a tribute to those that enjoy the mountain lifestyle, living it fully, every day.

Name: By The Glass International B.V.
Description:
By The Glass

By The Glass International is a global leader in professional wine dispensing and preservation equipment most widely recognised for its innovative By The Glass Technology that allows you to raise the quality and selection of wines served By The Glass. 

Wine is a high profit margin product. Therefore, the sale of wine can be more rewarding than other products. The margins are higher for high quality wines per glass than for regular house wines. 

Our individual solutions for trade, on-trade and industry clients result from a decade of close cooperation with wine professionals around the world. That's why we rely on local partners for sales and service. Contact us for a partner nearby or visit www.bytheglass.eu 

The By The Glass Wine Dispenser will support you in selling quality wines By The Glass. The customer will be rewarded with an increase in service, you will be rewarded by a higher turnover.

By The Glass makes everybody a winner!

Name: Empson USA
Description:
Vision Statement  
At Empson USA, we are committed to showcasing wines and spirits of the world that genuinely express their unique terroirs. As a fine wine company for over fifty years, our journey began with a focus on Italy, which holds a piece of our heart, and a curated portfolio of top Italian wineries. Guided by a philosophy that values quality, diversity, and excellence above all else, we have continued to broaden our range of offerings to include talented producers from four continents.
 
Mission Statement 
Family-owned since its foundation in 1991, Empson USA is an enterprising fine wine and spirits importer with a dynamic portfolio of distinctive estates from Italy, Argentina, Chile, New Zealand, and the USA. Our mission is to seek out and champion carefully selected top-tier producers worldwide, and to share the “Art of Fine Wine” with our customers and partners in the US market.

Name: LA MINE D'OR DISTILLERIE
Description: Créée par Stéphane KERDODÉ en 2016, la distillerie La Mine d’Or propose des produits de qualité, respectant des règles strictes d’élaboration artisanale. Ce fut d’abord la naissance du Gin SEIZH, puis une gamme de Craft Spirit SPEAKEASY et à l’été 2022, le lancement du whisky GALAAD, véritable single malt français, distillé, vieilli et assemblé en Bretagne dans la distillerie La Mine d’Or. Véritable distillerie familiale, venez découvrir nos secrets lors d’une visite de nos installations.

Name: BRASSERIE PAGE 24 - SAINT GERMAIN
Description: Brasserie produisant des bières artisanales dans la région des Hauts-de-France.

Name: Cognac Monnet
Description: Founded in 1838, Monnet has been one of the many great historical houses of Cognac throughout time. Its leaders were innovators, and real visionaries. Jean-Gabriel Monnet, founder of the very first wine cooperative in France, developed his company and built revolutionary cellars in Cognac, and his son Jean Monnet, who was the founding father of the European Union and recipient of the very first Presidential Medal of Freedom for his efforts stopping the war.

Name: Viña La Recova
Description:
Viña Boutique - Valle de Casablanca

Posee viñedos propios y bodega con tecnología de punta en el sector más frio del Valle de Casablanca. Empezó actividad en el año 2013, actuando anteriormente como proveedor de uvas para la producción de vinos premium de otras viñas.

Name: Uruguay Wine
Description: Official account of Uruguay Wine - National Wine Institute. Welcome, #storytasters.

Name: Power Brands Ltd
Description:
Power Brands is one of the leading distribution and brand building companies in Bulgaria.It has built its competencies through the years of expertise gained while distributing and managing ones of the leading brands in the f.m.c.g sector in the country.Please, visit our new web site soon to better know us, our values, our portfolio, future plans and initiatives. We will be happy to share with you our expertise and elaborate on opportunities to grow business further.

Our values are: 
Courage – we embrace change and set the trends
Excellence – we deliver best-in-class services
Integrity – we are honest with our consumers, clients and partners
Determination – we always walk the extra mile
Team Work – we collaborate for best results
Entrepreneurship spirit – We think and act as owners and stand by our own decisions and results.
Power Brands has more than 260 employees focused in Sales, International Sales, Marketing and Logistics.

Name: Christopher Stewart Wine & Spirits (Asia)
Description: Christopher Stewart Wine & Spirits Asia specializes in imports of fine wines, beer, and spirits from around the world. Working directly with our producers, we source only the finest brands from each region, and only brands that represent both the highest quality and the best value.

Name: Ekhi
Description:
Ekhi est la 1ère marque de vin dédiée à la promotion du travail et du savoir-faire des vigneronnes françaises.

30% des chefs d'exploitations viticoles sont des femmes. Vous ne le saviez peut-être pas mais elles sont bien présentes et l'ont en réalité toujours été. Partez à leur rencontre, le temps d'une bouteille de vin.

Name: Elevated Spirits, LLC
Description: The Elevated Spirits Company is the producer of Cierto Tequila – authentic, 100% natural, additive-free, luxury tequila made in Jalisco, Mexico. Cierto means “True,” the perfect word to describe this remarkable award-winning family of tequilas – patiently crafted expressions of pure Highlands agave, harvested by fourth and fifth generation agaveros at peak maturity. The Elevated Spirits portfolio includes the Cierto Private Collection Blanco, Reposado, Añejo and Extra Añejo, as well as the Cierto Reserve Collection Blanco, Reposado, Añejo and Extra Añejo. Due to their character, complexity and luxuriously smooth taste, these eight agave expressions are widely acknowledged by tequila connoisseurs as “The World’s Finest Tequila” and some of the best tequilas ever made. Since inception, Cierto has won more than 1,000+ international medals and awards, making it The Most Awarded Tequila in History.

Name: Il Vinaiolo e C. sas
Description:
Il vinaiolo di Andrea Marchesi e C. sas è una società giovane specializzata nella vendita di vino in bag in box.
Oltre al vino in bag in box abbiamo una selezione di etichette e di prodotti di alta qualità.

Name: LS Cream
Description: Inspired by one of the most iconic beverage from the pearl of the Caribbean, known as cremas, LS Cream is a rich blend of fresh cream and island spices that exudes style and luxury while staying true to it’s exotic heritage.

Name: CIATTI EUROPE
Description: Créée en 1971, la société CIATTI est leader dans le courtage en vins, mouts, concentrés et spiritueux. Notre expertise et notre connaissance du marché vous assure de recevoir une information pertinente et adaptée à vos besoins. Avec huit bureaux internationaux, CIATTI vous procure un service de courtage complet pour vos besoins.

Name: Flora Springs Winery
Description: Named one of Napa’s best-kept secrets, Flora Springs is a serene sanctuary of beauty and balance, where architecture honors the quiet rhythm of nature and every curve echoes the land. From our sun-drenched courtyard to the cool, dramatic wine caves, guests are invited to explore a distinctive range of wines and olive oils that reflect the richness of Napa Valley, all set against the vivid backdrop of the Mayacamas Mountains. At the heart of our portfolio stands Trilogy, our flagship red blend. An iconic demonstration in the artistry of winemaking with a legacy of innovation and elegance that continues to define Flora Springs through every vintage.

Name: Maison Wineted
Description:
Maison de négoce dans les vins rares et iconiques.
Wine merchant in rare and iconic wines.

Name: Bimbadgen
Description: Bimbadgen is one of the leading wine producers situated in Hunter Valley Wine Country.  The Estate comprises of two vineyards, an expansive Cellar Door, award-winning Esca Bimbadgen Restaurant set among the vineyards, a Café, outdoor amphitheatre, modern tasting rooms and accommodation. The Estate is also well known for hosting ‘A Day On The Green’ concert series each year.

Name: Starla Wines
Description: Better-for-you Non-Alcoholic Wines   A sexy fusion of lux California wines and lavish botanicals sans alcohol, calories, sugar and regrets

Name: "Goygol Wine Plant" OJSC
Description:
Goygol Wine Plant OJSC, which has 160 years of history, is the oldest wine, cognac, champagne, vodka and non-alcoholic beverage producer in Azerbaijan. The foundation of the Goygol Wine Plant, one of the oldest wine-making farms in the South Caucasus, was laid in 1860 by Schwab Germans, who were then inhabited Yelenendorf, by present-day Goygol.
Now the company is a modern winery, combining classic technology and the latest technical achievements. All equipment and technological lines have been renewed and replaced with modern ones.
As a technological device, in the plant operates a wine cellar, built in the middle of the XVIII century, with no analogues in the Caucasus, has a depth of 15 meters, a length of 800 meters and a total area of 6,000 square meters. This cellar stores classic-style collections of champagne, Madeira and high-quality table wines.
At present, products of the company are sold in large markets, hotels and restaurants in domestic market, as well as are exported to different countries. Our main export directions are Russia, Belarus, and China. We are working to create and expand new contacts with other countries.
Products of the plant have repeatedly been awarded high awards at international competitions, important international alcoholic and food products exhibitions
Today, our wines are a high quality products derived from an ancient history, great tradition, classic recipe and unity of modern technologies.

Name: GinTing - RumTing
Description:
The mission was to create Premium, Fresh, Fruity Spirits using the finest ingredients & then flavour or infuse them with Natural Flavours, No added Sugars, No Allergens, Just Deliciousness!!
Hand crafted & produced in small batches to ensure uncompromising quality to enhance our passion for well made Gin & Rum.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Life is better when you colour outside the lines.
When you stop your day-to-day getting too black and white. When you veer left because it feels right.
And start heading for a horizon you like the look of, rather than the places you know too well.

So steer yourself into unexpectedly awesome waters.
Because every day seems sweeter when you’re master of your own paddle board, Even if you slip off now and again.
This is a glass half full plus ice and tonic state of mind.
A life lived in full colour.

So laugh out loud,
And live out loud.
Like it, share it, share all of it.
No need for filters when you’re having this much fun.

With GinTing/RumTing, we brought together the tastes we love most from the places we love most.
We’ve won awards and we’ve won fans,
not by being fusty or fussy or fancy or fake.
By being unashamedly full of colour and full of flavour. Just like you.

GinTing / RumTing - BRING YOUR TING.

Name: Colio Estate Wines & Thornbury Village Craft Cider and Beer
Description:
ABOUT COLIO ESTATE WINES: 
Established in 1980, Colio Estate Wines received the first winery license granted in Southwest Ontario following prohibition. The Colio Estate Wines story is one of patience, determination, and perseverance – qualities that still remain at the heart of our winemaking practices and spirit. It was along the sunny shores of Lake Erie, the southernmost and warmest wine region of Ontario, where three Italian bricklayers named Alfredo, Enzo and Tiberio decided to fulfill their life dream of building a world-class winery. 

Over 35 years later, consumers continue to enjoy the rewards of the hard work and craftsmanship that are poured into every bottle of Colio Estate wines. The picturesque winery is located in Harrow in the heart of the Essex/Pelee Island Coast Wine Country.  Our wines are available at LCBO stores and any of the 14 Colio Wine Boutiques across the province.   More at: coliowinery.com

www.coliowinery.com 
..................................
ABOUT THORNBURY VILLAGE CRAFT CIDER AND BEER:
Established in 2007, nestled in the famous Blue Mountains, the heart of Canada’s apple country, Thornbury Village Craft Cider House has been proudly producing premium apple cider in a century old historic apple storage facility.  Thornbury cider is traditionally crafted, in no particular hurry, in small batches from local apples.  
The Thornbury Village Craft Brewery is a proud Ontario Craft Brewer producing award-winning, small-batch crafted European style pilsners and lagers. Authentically created, we take an extra step in our process to ensure we create richer tasting beer. As one of the only decoction brew houses in Canada, we are committed to brewing stylistically true, ultra-premium beer.  Come taste for yourself as see why “True Craftsmanship is at our Core”. 
www.thornburycraft.com

Name: Dardania Wine AB
Description: Dardania Wine är ett företag som specialiserar sig på import av exklusiva viner från Kosovo. Vi är stolta över att vara pionjärer och vara de första på den svenska och nordiska marknaden när det kommer till att erbjuda viner från Kosovo.

Name: Les Vignerons du Jurançon
Description: Association des 65 Vignerons indépendants du Jurançon

Name: PIZZATO
Description:
Owned by Plínio Pizzato family, is located at the Vale dos Vinhedos, southern Brazil. Plínio is the grandson of Antonio Pizzato, an Italian immigrant
who came to Bento Gonçalves in 1875 from the Veneto region of Italy and brought with him the proud winegrowing tradition. He was a pioneer on
on using VSP (Vertical Shoot Positioning) trellising in Serra Gaúcha by the mid- 1980s for Merlot, Chardonnay, Tannat and Egiodola grapes.

With a solid experience in grape-growing, the family established the winery in 1999 with the objective ofmaking world class estate grown and bottled wines
from their own vineyards. 

Since its first ever made wine, a very successful Merlot that helped to fix this red varietal as the one with the best results in Brazil, the company is dedicated to make exclusively premium fine wines under its 3 brands, PIZZATO, FAUSTO and ALLUMÉ. The family grows 57 hectares (140 acres) of prime vineyards located in two viticultural areas, both within the so-called Serra Gaúcha region: 
* Vale dos Vinhedos, Bento Gonçalves, the first geographical indication (GI) ever in Brazil, now a D.O. (Santa Lucia vineyard, PIZZATO brand)
* Doutor Fausto de Castro, Dois Lajeados (Dr Fausto vineyard, FAUSTO brand). 

The wines from both areas, Vale dos Vinhedos and Doutor Fausto (also from other regions - ALLUMÉ brand), are 100% made under Pizzato family winegrowers management.

Name: Future Drinks Expo
Description:
Future Drinks Expo is an annual Trade Show & Conference, Organized by Beverage Trade Network on May, 2024. With the tagline 'Moving Drinks Industry Forward', Our aim is to help build the bridge between cutting-edge technology and our beloved drinks industry.

If you have a solution that will help your customer grow revenue, save money, be more efficient, or a solution that the drinks industry needs to know, then you should exhibit.

Anyone curious about the future of the drinks industry, or looking for new and better solutions for their business from all 3 tiers of the drinks industry is invited to attend the show.

Name: International Whisky Competition
Description:
The International Whisky Competition is an independent platform dedicated to the structured, blind evaluation of whisky using a consistent and repeatable tasting methodology.

The competition focuses on objective sensory analysis, clear descriptors, and comparative assessment across styles and origins. Whiskies are evaluated without brand influence, marketing context, or price bias, with the goal of providing a reliable reference grounded in rigor, consistency, and transparency.

Entries are assessed individually under a double blind protocol. Judges are presented with one whisky at a time to ensure focused evaluation, reduce palate contamination, and allow for in depth sensory analysis. Detailed tasting notes are recorded for every entry using a fixed evaluation framework.

Results are communicated through a restrained medal structure designed to convey quality outcomes clearly, without promotional language or editorial interpretation.

Name: Excelsior Wines
Description:
Excelsior Wine Company exclusively distributes the Chilean wines of Concha y Toro as well as its Argentine property, Trivento, and the newly acquired Little Black Dress and Five Rivers lines of California wines. Expanding on a decades-long relationship, Banfi Vintners and Concha y Toro formed this sales and marketing venture for the US, revolutionizing the way brands are brought to the market.

Founded in 1883, Viña Concha y Toro is Latin America’s leading producer and occupies an outstanding position among the world’s most important wine companies, currently exporting to 135 countries worldwide. Uniquely, it owns around 9,500 hectares of prime vineyards, which allows the company to secure the highest quality grapes for its wine production. Concha y Toro’s portfolio includes a wide range of successful brands at every price point, from the top of the range Don Melchor and Almaviva to the flagship brand Casillero del Diablo. The Company has 3,162 employees and is headquartered in Santiago, Chile.

Name: Spirit Hound Distillers
Description:
In 2011, after having struck gold with one of his home-brewed beer recipes, Craig began dreaming up new creations, this time with a higher proof.

As it turned out, other like-minded, spirit-loving friends in the town of Lyons, Colorado had similar aspirations. They formed a scrappy pack caught a whiff of opportunity in the form of an old motorcycle repair shop that had just gone up for sale.

The small-town Colorado shop soon transformed into a distillery and this pack of friends formed Spirit Hound and began creating exceptional gins, vodkas, and other clear liquors while waiting for their first run of single malt whisky to age.

Rocky Mountain snowmelt was paired with locally sourced botanicals like wild Juniper berries hand-picked in their surrounding river basin. It wouldn’t be long before word would spread about the little distillery making big waves throughout Colorado, the surrounding region and internationally.

Today, the endless pursuit of what’s possible makes Spirit Hound proud to offer 14 (and counting) varieties of craft spirits, each with its own Rocky Mountain inspired unique flair.

Name: SICSOE
Description:
Depuis 1985, SICSOE accompagne les propriétés et les négociants de la filière viti-vinicole en proposant des solutions logistiques sur mesure.

Basée à Cénac, aux portes de Bordeaux, notre entreprise offre une gamme complète de services :
• Vin-cuverie
• Embouteillage
• Logistique
• Plateforme d’achats

Notre engagement en faveur de la qualité et de l’environnement est reconnu par plusieurs certifications, dont l’ISO 14001. Nous sommes fiers de valoriser les vins de nos clients en garantissant traçabilité, sécurité et performance à chaque étape.

Chez SICSOE, notre force repose avant tout sur une équipe engagée, animée par des valeurs communes : écoute, respect et excellence opérationnelle.

Nous croyons que l’esprit d’équipe et la passion du vin sont les moteurs d’un service de qualité, toujours au plus près des besoins de nos partenaires.

Name: Mosnel - Franciacorta
Description:
Nel cuore della Franciacorta, a Camignone, si trova la secolare residenza con le cantine cinquecentesche e le terre annesse, che testimonia la lunga tradizione vitivinicola che i Barboglio ereditarono nel 1836. 
Tale vocazione fu sviluppata grazie alle intuizioni di Emanuela Barboglio con l'impianto dei primi vigneti specializzati e nel 1968 con l'adozione della neonata DOC Franciacorta. 
Alla guida de Il Mosnel c'è ora la quinta generazione di vignaioli, i figli di Emanuela Barboglio: Giulio Barzanò che segue la parte tecnica, produttiva e commerciale; mentre Lucia Barzanò si occupa del marketing, delle relazioni esterne e dell'amministrazione. La famiglia si avvale della collaborazione di uno staff altamente preparato e di consulenti agronomi ed enologi di grande esperienza che seguono costantemente la produzione ed il suo evolversi. I 41 ettari di vigneto di proprietà sono condotti con il metodo biologico ai sensi del Reg (CE) 834/2007 e 889/2008, controllati da Valoritalia al fine di ottenere la massima qualità della materia prima.· l'uva.
Gli antichi locali aziendali, ora adibiti a cantine, sono stati attrezzati per ottenere una vinificazione che metta in risalto la qualità del prodotto di campagna: infatti le uve, dopo la raccolta manuale, vengono sottoposte ad una spremitura soffice ed i mosti portati a fermentazione in vasche di acciaio a temperatura controllata, o in carati di rovere nelle fresche cantine storiche; completa il ciclo di maturazione una permanenza in bottiglia nella nuova cantina sotterranea, ambiente ideale per la conservazione dei Franciacorta D.o.c.g. 

Franciacorta Brut
Franciacorta Brut Rosé
Franciacorta Pas Dosé
Franciacorta Brut Nature
Franciacorta Brut Satèn 
Franciacorta Pas Dosé Rosé “Parosé” 
Franciacorta Extra Brut “EBB” 
Franciacorta Pas Dosé Riserva 
IGT Sebino Passito “Sulif”

Name: Good Spirits Bottling Ltd.
Description:
In a fully bonded warehouse, the new and purposely built units at GSB are at the forefront of the industry, housing the latest in blending & bottling equipment. 

The newly commissioned bottling line offers adaptable and bespoke bottling solutions for your individual bottling and unique labeling needs. 

The blending plant is equipped with regulatory approved precise and accurate control systems as well as on site laboratory for testing in process and finished goods. 

GSB is a team with many years of beverage industry experience, dedicated to quality, safety and care of product.

Name: International Whisky Competition
Description:
The International Whisky Competition reaches out to an exciting whisky fan community on various social media channels and unique medals are designed to promote each of the winning whiskies.

Our goal is to bring as many whiskies from around the world to be tasted and rated by our professional tasting panel. Unlike other competitions,  since 2015, our tasting panel are presented with one whisky at a time, to ensure each whisky gets the proper attention. In-depth notes are taken at every step for review ultimately to be compiled by the tasting panel.

Unique medals! Only 3 medals (Gold, Silver & Bronze) per category. Just like in the Olympics, we believe not everyone can be a winner.

Name: Murray McDavid
Description:
Murray McDavid - Crafters of Inspired Scotch Whisky

 About Us:
Established early in 1994, Murray McDavid has quickly become a leading Scotch whisky bottler that's redefined whisky maturation.

 The Art of Maturation:
Maturation is paramount in creating exceptional Scotch whisky. We challenge conventions with innovative techniques, sourcing the finest oak casks worldwide.

 Inspired Scotch Whisky:
Our vision for Inspired Scotch Whisky leads us to explore unconventional maturation. We carefully select casks to enhance the spirit's character, creating something extraordinary.

 Global Collaboration:
We establish connections with producers of exceptional drinks, importing their freshly emptied casks for additional maturation, resulting in whiskies with exceptional depth of flavour.

 Our Belief:
At Murray McDavid, we firmly believe that the oak cask is the most vital component in crafting balanced and delicious whisky. We're committed to pioneering the Art of Maturation.

Name: ColleMassari Estates
Description:
ColleMassari Estates is a Tuscan wine group united by a shared vision: crafting wines that reflect the identity of their land, in a continuous pursuit of excellence.
It brings together four organically farmed estates – ColleMassari, Grattamacco, Poggio di Sotto, and San Giorgio – across three of Tuscany’s most iconic appellations: Montecucco, Bolgheri, and Montalcino.
A collective commitment to sustainability, craftsmanship, and the authentic expression of place.

Name: Ashes & Diamonds Winery
Description:
Ashes & Diamonds Winery is a love letter to Napa Valley as it was when it took the world stage in the 1960s, revealing itself, along with Santa Cruz, as a geological wonderland capable of world-class wines. 

Located at the gateway of Napa Valley, along its main artery, Highway 29, Ashes & Diamonds Winery’s mid-century approach extends to its architecture. As an homage, the iconic zig-zag roof and portholes are a few of the iconic references to the heritage of California mid-century modern design, seamlessly integrated with a state-of-the-art wine production facility surrounded by light, airy landscapes and playful, rolling berms.

Ashes & Diamonds Winery is the ultimate convergence of modern and old-school flavors, committed to offering a wide-ranging group of wines that adhere to an ethos of light-handed winemaking and transparency of terroir.

Name: Enrico Serafino 1878
Description: Dal 1878, Enrico Serafino è una cantina familiare che produce vini artigianali come voi fareste per i vostri cari.

Name: Wineries of Niagara-on-the-Lake
Description:
The Wineries of Niagara-on-the-Lake is a marketing cooperative of 20 wineries nestled below the Niagara Escarpment amidst a landscape of vineyards and orchards stretching from the picturesque Niagara River Parkway.

The aim of the Wineries of Niagara-on-the-Lake is to work collectively to attract wine-involved visitors seeking an authentic wine experience to Niagara-on-the-Lake Wine Country. The captivating events, innovative campaigns and other initiatives executed by the Wineries of Niagara-on-the-Lake have made the group leaders in Ontario wine and culinary tourism, as well as in the tourism industry in the Niagara Region.

Our Signature Touring Pass programs are month-long celebrations pairing seasonal wines with seasonal tastes. Taste the Season is Niagara-on-the-Lake’s must-do event in November - tour pass holders celebrate the season’s bounty with exceptional VQA wines and Holiday-inspired food pairings. January’s Icewine Festival and February’s Chocolate & Cheese are a great way to embrace winter’s chill in Niagara. May’s Sip & Sizzle touring program celebrates spring offering visitors a premium wine and food pairing focused around grilling.

Dig Our Roots is one of our new and exciting initiatives. A celebration of the Niagara-on-the-Lake appellation. Visit our wineries and immerse yourself in our appellation while you unearth what makes this place and our wines so very special. Don’t miss this opportunity to explore the birthplace of Canadian winemaking and experience the history, diversity and quality we have to offer.

Name: Maguey Spirits co.
Description:
Founded with passion in 2013, Maguey Spirits is a boutique house of premium agave derivatives. With a careful balance between tradition and innovation, we focus on crafting quality Mexican products that embody the richness of our land and foster a sustainable industry for generations to come.

At Maguey Spirits, we believe achieving superior results requires doing things differently.

Name: V. Sattui Winery
Description:
V. Sattui Winery is a family-owned property located in the heart of Napa Valley that was founded in 1885 and makes more than 60 different wines with dozens of 90+ point rated wines among its current vintages. V. Sattui wines are only sold direct to consumer and the winery features three beautiful tasting rooms where customers can find and purchase their favorites.  It is a stunning, must-see Napa Valley destination for picnics, weddings and events, offering an impressively robust Cheese Shop with more than 200 selections. Executive Chef Gerardo Sainato and his staff create mouthwatering salads, sandwiches, paninis, and entrees in the Deli.  V. Sattui also makes house-cured meats from its own Salumeria, and gelato and sorbetto from its own Gelateria. The sprawling estate includes two-dozen picnic tables nestled beneath ancient Valley Oak trees and tri-level terraces that overlook beautifully manicured gardens and vineyards.

V. Sattui Director of Winemaking, Brooks Painter, has been recognized as “Winemaker of the Year” in 2015 by the American Fine Wine Competition.  He was previously awarded “Winemaker of the Year” at the San Francisco International Wine Competition in June of 2013.  In 2015 V. Sattui was named “Winery of the Year” for the fourth year in a row at the Winemaker’s Challenge, and received the title a second time in the Critic’s Challenge International Wine Competition.  In addition, V. Sattui has earned the title of “Wine of the Year” in 2015 for two wines: 2012 Mt. Veeder Cabernet Sauvignon at the Monterey Wine Competition, and 2011 Paradiso at the Critic’s Challenge International Wine Competition.

 V. Sattui wines are sustainably farmed and are sold exclusively from the winery, direct to consumer. The winery welcomes visitors daily for wine tastings between 9 a.m.- 6 p.m. daily (9 a.m.-5 p.m. during the winter months), as well as barbeque on weekends in the warmer months of the year.

Name: Domaines Richard
Description:
Richard : A wine family since 1892

Henri Richard, the founder, started his wine career at age 22. He rapidly developed the family business in the 1930s: Vins Richard was born! As wine blenders, the Richard family members were also pioneers in bottling wine for Parisian bistrots and restaurants, a rare practice at the time. This naturally lead them to explore the rich viticultural regions across France, on the look out for talented winemakers, historical architectural treasures and unique terroirs. Since their first acquisition in the 1950s, Domaines Richard have grown steadily and today represent over 600 hectares dotted around three emblematic wine regions: Rhône, Beaujolais and Bordeaux.

Name: Ribafreixo Wines
Description:
A Ribafreixo Wines é uma empresa de carácter inovador, com visão para o futuro e ambiciosa que atua no coração da Região do Alentejo e que tem como principal atividade a produção de vinho. Desde 2007  que a empresa tem-se focado na produção de vinhos tintos e brancos de excelência.
A nossa missão é continuar a produzir vinhos de excelência a preços competitivos, que possam ir de encontro às exigências do mercado Nacional e Internacional. Num mundo em que os vinhos portugueses começam a ser reconhecidos pela sua diferença, temos como principal ambição afirmar e reforçar o nosso posicionamento nos mais variados e exigentes mercados externos, tal como os Estados Unidos, a China, o Canadá e o Reino Unido, por exemplo. Um trabalho árduo que se conjuga com a presença no mercado doméstico, ponto essencial na estratégia de comunicação da nossa marca.
Num universo vinícola cada vez mais competitivo, acreditamos ter fatores bem vincados de diferenciação, como por exemplo o nossa ênfase nas castas portuguesas. Esse fator faz-nos ter uma visão sustentável do futuro. Ato indispensável para qualquer empresa dos nossos dias.
O objetivo primordial da Ribafreixo Wines foi criar um projeto de Enoturismo que complementasse o projeto vinícola, sendo que este deveria estar fortemente integrado no potencial turístico da região da Vidigueira, assim como Beja e Évora. Foi com este intuito que construímos a nossa nova adega – um edifício moderno e de linhas contemporâneas- e a inaugurámos em 2012. O projecto Enoturístico surgiu em 2014, com a inauguração da ampla e moderna área social multiusos, que pode ser utilizada para vários efeitos (eventos, reuniões empresariais, conferências, etc). Esta área de vocação turística alberga a Loja de Vinhos, onde os visitantes podem adquirir os nossos vinhos aos melhores preços de mercado, a Sala de Provas onde poderão ser degustados os nossos vinhos com o devido acompanhamento de um profissional e o Restaurante panorâmico da Adega.

Name: Brother Justus Whiskey Co.
Description:
Brother Justus is Minnesota's Premiere Whiskey Company. Our whiskey is crafted with conviction. A product of hard work, innovation, and love for the land. It honors Minnesota's rebellious, bootlegging monk who believed that good whiskey - expertly made - is a blessing. 

Each of our whiskeys is a different expression of "American Single Malt" which means it's crafted at one distillery (ours), from 100% malted barley, and aged in new custom-charred American white oak barrels. 

Brother Justus American Single Malt, patent-pending Cold-Peated(TM)  American Single Malt, and Silver Single Malt can be found at 200+ locations in the Twin Cities and Minnesota.

Name: Premium Brands Chile
Description:
Premium Brands es una compañía perteneciente a Viña Montes, creada en el año 2009 con el objetivo de representar marcas Premium de champagne, espumantes y destilados del Grupo Moët Hennessy en el mercado chileno.
 
Hoy abarcamos segmentos de vinos, champagne, espumantes, destilados, aguas, cervezas, bebidas y otros, especializándonos en estrategias de comercialización, distribución y posicionamiento de marcas.

Name: 5StarWines - the Book
Description:
5StarWines – the Book is the wine selection organized by Veronafiere in collaboration with Assoenologi. One wine selection with two points of view: first, the event, a three-day blind tasting with an international jury of wine professionals; second, the official 5StarWines – the Book guide, containing all wines with a score of 90 points or more. 

THE GUIDE
5StarWines – the Book is the Guide to the wines selected during the event, a useful tool for wineries both on the promotional and commercial side. It introduces the wines of the selected wineries to industry experts, international buyers, and wine lovers from around the world, promoting them with tasting notes written by the judges of the selection. The Guide acts as a quality guarantee for the wines it contains and certifies their value in the global marketplace. It is available in digital format on the website and the platform, and in print.

THE JUDGES 
All the wines participating to 5StarWines will be tasted by a panel of highly qualified, international experts, having been selected among Masters of Wine, Master Sommeliers, WSET Diploma holders, VIA Experts and Ambassadors, oenologists, and journalists. The different geographical backgrounds, the variety of professional profiles of the judges, and the blind tasting process guarantee objectivity to the selection.

Name: Beam Global Asia
Description:
Beam Global Spirits & Wines, Inc. is the leading American Spirits company and the fourth-largest premium spirits company in the world. With some of the best-known brands in the world, Beam Global has centuries of experience in selling spirits. Our flagship brand, Jim Beam, dates back to 1795, and collectively our brands account for more than 2,000 years of craftsmanship and quality.

Beam Global Asia Pte Ltd, formerly known as Maxxium Singapore Fine Wines & Spirits Pte Ltd, is presently in eight South East Asian markets, namely Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam, Laos, Cambodia, Indonesia, Philippines, and Singapore as the Asian Hub.

As one of the market leaders within the drinks industry highly regards for our efficient services, strong brand-building capabilities and business innovation, we currently occupy at least one of the top three positions in every SEA market that we operate in.

Headquartered in Deerfield, Illinois, Beam is traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol BEAM and is included in the S&P 500 Index and the MSCI World Index.  For more information on Beam, its brands, and its commitment to social responsibility, please visit www.beamglobal.com and www.drinksmart.com.

Name: Champagne Pierre Mignon
Description:
La Maison Pierre Mignon est située à Le Breuil .Le vignoble engagé HVE niveau 3 est situé dans les meilleurs crus de la Champagne: Côte des Blancs, Vallée de la Marne et autour d’Epernay.Issue d'une longue lignée de Vignerons, depuis 5 générations, la Maison Pierre Mignon élabore des Champagnes d'Exception et envisage ses Champagnes comme de Grands Vins .
La Maison a ouvert à Epernay un Tasting room très elegant où officie un Chef sommelier.

Name: Château d'Issan
Description:
« Regum Mensis Aris que Deorum » which means « For the Table of the Kings and the Altar of Gods » is the historical motto of Château d’Issan, 3rd Classified Growth in the 1855 Classification. 
Located in the heart of the magical Margaux appellation, the wines have always been recognized in the world for their exceptional finesse and delicacy 
Thanks to its unique terroir mainly composed of gravels on the surface and clay in the deep subsoil, the wines are always highlighting delicate and subtill aromas.  
The microclimate, regulated thanks to its proximity from the ocean and the Estuary, offers to the vineyard ideal conditions to grow vines.
The History of the estates dates back to the XIIth Century, when the wine from the property was served for the wedding of Eleanor of Aquitaine with the future King of England, Henri Plantagenet, on May 18th of 1152.
The current castle was built in the XVIIth Century with a singular wall to surround the single vineyard. The « Clos d’Issan » built in 1644 represents 30 hectares of vines out of 45 hectares in total. The grape varieties are composed of Cabernet Sauvignon and Merlot.
Château d’Issan represent also a long family heritage and continued transmission. Today, the Cruse family who acquired the estate in 1945, are sharing this adventure since 2013 with the Lorenzetti family (owner of the Châteaux Pedesclaux in Pauillac and Lilian Ladouys in St Estephe)

Name: Argaux
Description: Your partners in wine. Our sommeliers are consultative, thoughtful partners for any business looking for creative and productive ways to meet business goals through food & wine.

Name: The Dram Club
Description: Whisky and Premium Spirts tasting , appreciation and education platform. Rare & limited edition spirits.

Name: Bonacquisti Wine Company
Description:
Established in the fall of 2006, Bonacquisti Wine Company is a family-owned, urban winery located Denver’s Northside just south of I70 on Pecos. We make wine and play music. Home of Denver Wine Radio, Vinny No Neck and Bella Risa. 

About Paul Bonacquisti: 
Owner and winemaker Paul Bonacquisti is a second generation Italian American, born in Denver. Bonacquisti’s knowledge of and passion for winemaking stemmed from his father, an entrepreneur and jeweler who was a passionate winemaker on the side. Bonacquisti spent years working alongside his father, assisting him with making wine in their small garage at the house where he grew up in Brighton, CO. In 2006, he earned his Level 2 Sommelier certification from the International Wine Guild. From there, he merged them with his own personal, more modern approach with the art of winemaking to creating and customize his own wine blends. His extensive experience combined with his wine education is what has catapulted the recognition of his wines, earning international and regional accolades. Paul creates wine in various styles to give guests new ways to experience wine. 

About Judi Diaz Bonacquisti, EdD:
Dr. Judi Diaz Bonacquisti, owner and education advocate, is passionate about driving Bonacquisti Wine Company’s community involvement in local education and art development. Working in higher education for more than 20 years, Judi has engaged the winery in a number of local partnerships with nonprofit organizations including the Denver Scholarship Foundation, CESDA Colorado Educational Services and Development Association, the Latin American Education Foundation and others. Bonacquisti Wine Company’s core philosophies have supported local education and local art since our inception in 2006.

Vinny No Neck and Bella Risa are named in honor of our children. 

Label artist: Daniel Luna

Bonacquisti Wine Company, 4640 Pecos St, Unit I, Denver, CO 80211 303-477-9463

https://www.bonacquistiwine.com/

Name: Stellenbosch Vineyards
Description: Stellenbosch Vineyards is the smart solutions and innovation hub of Advini South Africa, based on the historic Welmoed Farm on the slopes of the Vlaeberg mountains in Stellenbosch. With access to vineyards throughout Stellenbosch from 15 dedicated growers, this winery is also the house of brands for global commercial wine brands, including Welmoed and Arniston Bay, as well as the specialised, single vineyard and niche crafted wines.

Name: Iconic Brewing Company
Description: Iconic Brewing Co. is a close knit company situated in the heart of downtown Toronto. Specializing in innovation, Iconic Brewing Co. thrives in the fast paced beverage alcohol industry and has become one of the leading “trend-setting” beverage companies in Canada. We are a proven leader in formulation, branding and bringing #1 ready-to-drink beverages to market in Canada.

Name: Somm Vinhos
Description:
Somm é uma marca de vinhos em lata, vegana e com vinhos feitos a partir de uvas selecionadas e 100% brasileiras provenientes do Rio Grande do Sul e Vale do São Francisco (Nordeste). 

Somos o vinho sem regras e acreditamos em mundo com autenticidade, acessibilidade e inclusão. Onde você pode ser quem ou como quiser e tomar vinho como e quando quiser, sem regras.

Nosso manifesto e valores :

Somos criadores das nossas próprias regras
Protagonistas das nossas próprias histórias
Somos altos, baixos, médios, ele, ela, elxs, pretos, brancos, amarelos

Não somos iguais a todos mundo
Não somos iguais todos os dias
Evoluímos e mudamos a cada momento

Façamos um brinde
Porque somos aqueles que veem o copo sempre meio-cheio ou a lata

Somos de casa, da rua, do bar, da praia, da festa de qualquer lugar que a gente queira estar.

Somos nossos próprios sommeliers
Ué, por que não?

Sabemos o que é bom
E que é bom não ter regras

Somos o som das taças, das latas, dos copos americanos fazendo tim-tim

Somos o som do novo

Somos Somm
O Vinho Sem Regras

Name: Distillery 291
Description:
Distillery 291 is a globally acclaimed small batch whiskey distillery nestled in the shadow of Pikes Peak. From grain to barrel to bottle, 291 Colorado Whiskey is Hardmade the Colorado Way, proud of its humble roots and excited about its new frontiers. 291 Colorado Whiskey has earned bushels of national and international awards for its spirits with the unique character and flavor of a bygone era, awarded World’s Best Wheat 2021 and World's Best Rye 2018 from the World Whiskies Awards and nine Liquid Gold awards from The Whiskey Bible. 291 Colorado Whiskey embodies traditions of the past married with the boldness of the future.

Rugged  |  Refined  |  Rebellious

Name: Vintec
Description: With a passion for innovation, design, functionality and - of course - wine, Vintec is a wine storage specialist with the modern lifestyle in mind. Our wine cabinets and cellars offer climate-controlled storage for anywhere between 20 to 4,000 bottles and recreate the perfect conditions found in the best natural underground cellars. Owners of Vintec cabinets and cellars are welcome to the Vintec Club, a physical and digital community offering exclusive experiences around wine. With over 20,000 members to date, the club is growing around the world!

Name: Livio Felluga
Description:
Livio Felluga, the “Patriarch of Friulian Wines”, set up the winery in Brazzano in 1956, sealing his love for the hill country with the far-sighted purchase of the first vineyards at Rosazzo.
His leadership is characterized by an absolute and obstinate dedication to the land. He knows every step of his estate. He lives and breathes the land, because over the years, with patience and determination, he was able to interpret it at best. At a time when there were no designations, Livio Felluga chooses a map as label to show, in Italy and in the world, the origin of his wines: these are the Map Label wines. The vineyards on the Hills of Friuli are the proud testimony of it, since 2011 Rosazzo is a DOCG area.
The production of the winery is marked by the steady and rigorous pursuit of quality: a choice made by Livio Felluga, who just recently turned 101 years old, and carried on by his children who are now managing the winery with the same commitment and devotion of their father.
Quality that can be recognized immediately in all the winery’s products: in the elegant varietal wines and in the refined blends like Terre Alte, among the most prestigious Italian white wines, Sossó, with carefully selected Merlot and Refosco dal Peduncolo Rosso grapes, together with a small percentage of Pignolo, and Abbazia di Rosazzo, produced from the historical vineyard of the Abbey.

Name: Long Shadows Vintners
Description:
Long Shadows Vintners was founded in 2002 by Washington wine visionary Allen Shoup, who as President and CEO of Chateau Ste. Michelle from 1984-2000 forged partnerships with internationally acclaimed vintners Piero Antinori (Col Solare) and Dr. Ernst Loosen (Eroica Riesling). Long Shadows Vintners now builds upon those successes by bringing some of the world’s most celebrated winemakers from the finest wine regions around the globe to Washington in order to create world class wines that showcase the viticultural excellence of Washington State's Columbia Valley.

Each vintner partners individually with Shoup and resident winemaker Gilles Nicault on a distinct winemaking program to produce a single “best of type” wine under a unique label.  These include: Pedestal Merlot by Michel Rolland (international consultant and owner Le Bon Pasteur, Pomerol); Sequel Syrah by John Duval (formerly of Penfold’s Grange, South Australia); Poet’s Leap Riesling by Armin Diel (Schlossgut Diel, Nahe, Germany); Pirouette by Agustin Huneeus (Quintessa, Napa Valley) and Philippe Melka (Vineyard 29, Hundred Acre, Napa Valley); Chester-Kidder by Gilles Nicault (former winemaker at Woodward Canyon, Walla Walla Valley) and Allen Shoup; Feather Cabernet Sauvignon by Randy Dunn (Dunn Vineyards, Napa Valley, formerly of Caymus); and Saggi by Ambrogio & Giovanni Folonari (Cabreo, Nozzole, from Chianti Classico and La Fuga, Brunello di Montalcino, Tuscany).

Long Shadows is named in tribute to the stature of this select group of individuals, who continue to shape the wine industry with their benchmark wines and wineries.

Name: Post Meridiem Spirit Company
Description:
PM is the first line of cocktails in 100mL cans in the country and is disrupting the alcoholic RTD market via authenticity - real ingredients, right proportions and full strength. PM cocktails are crafted and canned at our manufacturing facility in Atlanta, GA. 

Awarded Best of Class for the Classic Cocktail RTD category at the San Francisco World Spirit Competition, the most prestigious award in Spirits.

Atlanta's Hometown Cocktail Company

Name: Famille Ducourt
Description:
En 1858, notre famille s'installe au Château des Combes à Ladaux, petit village rural au sud est de Bordeaux. Au fil du temps les générations se succédant, la passion pour le vin devient un métier, le savoir faire et le vignoble se transmet et s'enrichit progressivement.
Chaque génération a su préserver la philosophie dictée par nos aînés: tirer le meilleur de chaque terroir en alliant le bon-sens d’autrefois aux techniques actuelles, afin d’y élaborer des vins de plaisirs, authentiques et abordables mais aussi respectueux de l'environnement et des attentes de nos clients.
Aujourd'hui la famille Ducourt constitue l'une des plus grandes unités viticoles indépendantes de la région: 450 ha de vignobles répartis sur 14 Châteaux à la fois dans l'Entre-Deux-Mers et dans le Saint Emilionais. Nous gérons par ailleurs 100 ha de surface agro-environnemental.

In 1858, our family made its home at Château des Combes, an estate with a few hectares of vines in Ladaux, a small country village south-west of Bordeaux. Over the years, our passion for wine became a professional vocation, and both the ‘savoir-faire’ and the vineyard were successively handed down and expanded.
Today, the Ducourt family possesses one of the largest independant vineyard holdings in the region : 440 hectares of vines, spread out over 13 châteaux in the Entre-Deux-Mers and Saint-Emilion appellations, which produce 2.5 million bottles per year. We also manage 100ha of biodiversity area.
Each generation has managed to adhere to the philosophy dictated by our elders : to get the best out of each ‘terroir’ through a combination of traditional common sense and current techniques to produce ‘pleasure’ wines which are both authentic and affordable. Respecting the environment and our customers’ expectations is also essential to our work ethic.

Name: Consorzio di Tutela del Primitivo di Manduria
Description:
Il Consorzio di Tutela del Primitivo di Manduria è nato nel 1998 con una partenza di dieci aziende tra cooperative e private e ha ottenuto il riconoscimento legislativo nel 2002. L’aerale riguarda 18 comuni tra Taranto e Brindisi e la sua produzione è suddivisa in Primitivo di Manduria Dop, Primitivo di Manduria Dolce Naturale Docg e Primitivo di Manduria Dop Riserva.
Negli anni i produttori del Consorzio hanno fatto conoscere questo pregiato nettare in tutto il mondo, vinificando con l’uso delle più avanzate tecnologie e permettendo agli amanti dei grandi vini di apprezzare la nobiltà di questo grande “Rosso Mediterraneo”.
L’export rappresenta il 60-70% della produzione vendibile. Il volume d’affari si aggira intorno a 80 milioni di euro (consumo interno circa 30 milioni ed estero circa 50 milioni di euro).
Il Consorzio ha ottenuto dal Ministro delle Politiche Agricole e Forestali l’attribuzione in via esclusiva dell’incarico di coordinare le funzioni di tutela, promozione, valorizzazione, vigilanza, informazione del consumatore e cura generale degli interessi: ecco il riconoscimento “Erga Omnes” per il Primitivo di Manduria Doc e per il Primitivo di Manduria Dolce Naturale Docg. Attraverso questo strumento tre agenti vigilatori, in qualità di pubblici ufficiali e in collaborazione con l’Istituto Centrale Qualità Repressione e Frodi, potranno effettuare controlli anche sui vini già posti a scaffale per tutelare il consumatore e i produttori da irregolarità o anomalie relative al prodotto che non rispetta i dettami del Disciplinare di produzione.
Il Consorzio di Tutela, oltre al ruolo di supportare le aziende per penetrare nei mercati esteri, partecipa ai grandi eventi e fiere internazionali per rafforzare la sua presenza.
Altra attività è l’assistenza ai soci sulle normative che regolano la produzione del vino e mira a valorizzare l’immagine dell’ente sul territorio e a livello internazionale, diventando punto di riferimento per i produttori e per le Istituzioni.

Name: Tonnellerie Allary
Description:
Depuis sa création en 1953 la tonnellerie ALLARY perpétue le meilleur du savoir-faire français : l'art et la tradition. Fabrications de barriques (225L- 700L), des cuves tronconiques de 10 HL à 450 HL, et des Foudres ronds, ovales et ovoïdes de 10 HL à 80 HL destinés à l'élaboration du vin ou alcool. Atelier de petite tonnellerie : Fûts de 1L à 28L- 55L-110L. Vinaigriers en chêne (3L-6L-10L). Bag in box. Sceaux à champagne-à glace... 
La tonnellerie ALLARY exporte dans plus de 30 pays sur les 5 continents.

Name: Maison MAYE
Description:
Aujourd'hui, propriétaire d'une trentaine d'hectares de vignes situés dans les plus beaux parchets, dont le célèbre "Clos de Balavaud", la maison MAYE, fondée en 1889, est un des plus anciens commerces de vins du Valais.

La Maison MAYE joue un rôle important dans l'encavage des récoltes de toute la région. Sa renommée est due à la qualité de leur production, et son nom est estimé de tous les connaisseurs et amateurs de grands vins.

Name: Deluxe Distillery
Description:
Founded in 2014, Deluxe Distillery in no time had a number of exclusive firsts under its belt.

Driven by a strong spirit of innovation and a deep, enduring passion for experimentation, we were the first to add boldly unusual ingredients such as cubeb pepper and black teas to our Blind Tiger range of handcrafted gins. One of these unique herbal gins contains no less than 15 botanicals – including a secret Belgian botanical! – adding extra depth and complexity to its subtly refined character.

With Mary White, we released the very first high premium Belgian vodka.
