Named after a notorious historical character, the uncrowned ‘Queen of the Bootleggers’ during the American Prohibition era, this true and daring original is squarely aimed at female consumers. Hence also the elegant white bottle with a luxurious marble motif and gold details.

Add to this something entirely different: Sūpāsawā, our premium sour cocktail mixer. Saving time, space and money, this really is a sweet blessing – even if it comes disguised as a ‘super sour’ one – for all bartenders and mixologists looking to enhance their magic potions. For as we all know, the magic is in the mix. And Sūpāsawā might just add that clear and perfect balance your mix so desperately needs.

Name: Une Petite Mousse
Description:
De la fourche à la pinte, Une Petite Mousse est une communauté de plus de 90 000 membres avec une box de bières dont la sélection change chaque mois, une brasserie médaillée d'or au Brussels Beer Challenge moins de 11 mois après sa création et la 1ère houblonnière Bio de l'Isère.

Parmi les 87 entreprises labellisées Pass French Tech en 2017, la collecte des centaines de milliers d'avis de nos abonnés (couplée à notre analyse chimique des bières par chromatographie) nous permet d'apprendre sur les goûts pour élaborer des recettes de bières, suggérer des bières et améliorer nos sélections de box ou calendrier de l'avent/après.

Envie de travailler avec nous pour un cadeau d'entreprise (coffret de bières, calendrier 24 bières, kit de brassage), une bière élaborée en fonction des goûts de vos clients, une location de tireuse avec bière en fût ? Envoyez nous un email à contact@unepetitemousse.fr

Name: Mom Juice + KT Winery
Description:
KT Winery Inc. creates CPG products focused on shifting wine culture and community.

Our flagship brand, Mom Juice, launched as a DTC wine and has quickly become a community-driven brand, expanding into non-alcoholic wines and a podcast.

We intend to enhance younger consumers’ experiences with our sustainably produced wines and marketing they can see themselves in.  

Based on community requests and data, we create gluten-free, low-sugar, and vegan consumables and 100% recycling-friendly non-consumables to further connection and conversation without the BS.

A brand you can trust creating products that fit your lifestyle.

Name: Toggenburg Distillery GmbH
Description: Getüftelt, designt und 2018 als BERMONTIS GmbH gegründet, stehen wir heute für auserlesenen flüssigen Kräutergenuss aus dem Toggenburg. Ob in Form von “BERMONTIS – Fruchtiger Kräuterlikör”, “BERMONTIS – Kräuterfondue” oder jetzt auch neu mit “TOGGIUS – Bio Dry Gin”, stets mit dem Handwerk und der Regionalität vor Augen. Produziert im wunderschönen Toggenburg, von welchem wir uns auch immer wieder für unsere Produkte inspirieren lassen. Als Toggenburg Distillery GmbH durften wir im Frühling 2023 im gleichen Gebäude wie die Brauerei St.Johann in Neu St.Johann unsere eigene Distillery und Eventlocation eröffnen.

Name: Barone Pizzini
Description:
Barone Pizzini was the first winery to produce Franciacorta from certified organic viticulture, that is, using only natural substances or substances that man can obtain with simple processes for the cultivation and nourishment of the vines.

“Organic is the means, the end is quality”.
This is how Silvano Brescianini, founding partner and Director of Barone Pizzini, usually repeats, underlining how the primary objective of the company is to produce quality wines, closely linked to the territory.
The organic approach is cultural, it involves choices and values and is the starting point of a study and innovation path.

Among the most important projects:
- Bioclimatic solutions in the cellar,
- Ita.Ca to reduce the carbon footprint,
- Biodiversity Friend certification to enhance biodiversity in the vineyard,
- Biopass to measure biodiversity,
- Study and rediscovery of Erbamat, an ancient native vine.

Name: Oxbow Rum Distillery
Description:
SINCE 1859, our family estate has raised sugarcane on the banks of an ancient Mississippi River oxbow in Pointe Coupée, Louisiana. This sharp bend in the river has made for fertile land, sweet sugarcane and enchanting rum. Generations have farmed this land. This estate rum is a tribute to them.

Made from 100% Grade A sugarcane molasses, these fine sipping rums embody the essence of Louisiana’s sugarcane harvest. Unfiltered and distilled in small batches, Oxbow Rum has no sweeteners or additives. Experience the bright, smooth taste of sugarcane in every sip.

Name: Clop Wines
Description:
It is under this premise that the Clop brothers, Gustavo and Rubén, decide to resurrect the family business that was founded by their great grandfather, José Clop, and boosted by his father, Don Eraclio Ricardo Clop.
Following their vision, the number one priority was to find the best site for the production of premium wines of great depth and unique personality. This way, the brothers decide to invest mostly in the two oases where the best vines are grown: Agrelo and Valle de Uco.

Name: Spirit-Brothers
Description: Spirit-Brothers offre un écrin d'expression et une visibilité aux talents d'exception pour créer une gamme de spiritueux contemporains, au caractère singulier et super premium.

Name: MARC Destilaria e Empório
Description:
Produzimos as Cachaças Premium de Alambique MARC Carvalho Americano, MARC Amburana e MARC Clássica.
Saiba mais em DestilariaMARC.com.br
e instagram.com/MARC.cachaca

Name: TiM S.A.
Description:
Spółka TiM S.A. jest importerem i dystrybutorem win z całego świata. W naszym portfolio znajduje się ponad 300 indeksów, w tym marki takie jak:
- Cono Sur (Chile)
- Portada (Portugalia)
- Ponte Portugal (Portugalia)
- Panul (Chile)
- Oak View (Kalifornia)
- Le Grand Noir (Francja)
- Passiamo (Włochy)
- Calliente (Hiszpania)
- Finca La Estacada (Hiszpania)
- Africant (RPA)
- Cudgee Creek (Australia)
- Aurvin (Mołdawia)
- Gamziri (Gruzja) 

... i wiele innych.

Ponadto, spółka posiada w swoim wolumenie sprzedażowym Miody Pitne, które w ofercie firmy goszczą od zawsze i zajmują swą odrębną część w konsolidowanym biznesie oraz linię Cydr Polski. Nie zapominamy także o najmłodszych – Trele Morele to propozycja właśnie dla nich.

TiM S.A. istnieje na rynku polskim od 1990 roku i może pochwalić się imponującym wynikiem sprzedażowym 15 milionów butelek w ujęciu rocznym dającym około 10-12 proc. udział w rynku. Nasze wina znajdą Państwo zarówno w sklepach rynku tradycyjnego, jak i w sieciach handlowych. 

Naszą misją jest popularyzacja kultury picia wina, zapewnienie miłośnikom win najlepszej możliwej oferty przy zachowaniu doskonałej relacji ceny do jakości produktu. Edukujemy i inspirujemy konsumentów oraz promujemy ekologiczne zachowania w codziennej działalności... a wszystko to z miłości do wina…

Name: Chateau Puech-Haut
Description: Producteur de grands vins du Languedoc en agriculture Biologique et HVE

Name: Union des Maisons de Champagne
Description:
Les Maisons de champagne sont à l’origine de la notoriété et du prestige des vins de Champagne dans le monde.
L’Union des Maisons de Champagne rassemble les maisons élaborant de Grandes Marques (parfois en faible volume) à partir de raisins achetés aux vignerons et issus de crus sélectionnés pour composer l’assemblage de leur Marque.
Dès 1882, les Maisons créent le Syndicat du commerce des vins de Champagne (devenu l’Union des Maisons de Champagne). Ce syndicat se préoccupe en particulier d'assurer la défense du mot « champagne ». Il a diligenté en France et à l’étranger des actions judiciaires, couronnées de succès, pour lutter contre les usurpations du mot « champagne ». Sans cette action, « champagne » serait devenu un mot générique synonyme d'une méthode d'élaboration pour les vins mousseux.
La lutte contre le phylloxera a été un autre motif d’organisation collective. Les Maisons créent l’Association Viticole Champenoise pour mutualiser leurs moyens et aider leurs partenaires vignerons à éradiquer ce fléau. Cette double mission régalienne (défense de l’appellation et technique vitivinicole) est aujourd’hui assumée paritairement par les Vignerons et Maisons de Champagne au sein du Comité Champagne (CIVC).

L’Union des maisons de Champagne rassemble les maisons élaborant de Grandes Marques (parfois en faible volume) à partir de raisins achetés aux vignerons et issus de crus sélectionnés pour composer l’assemblage de leur marque.

Name: Flakon
Description: Contact us: pro@flakon.fr

Name: WISPERTS - The Wine & Spirits Online Fair
Description:
The Wine & Spirits permanent online fair, focused on Sustainable Business.
 
Primera feria permanente online para la industria de vinos y bebidas espirituosas, enfocada en negocios sostenibles, bajo los lineamientos de los ODS.

Name: Jarvis Estate Winery
Description: The Jarvis Estate Winery is dedicated to producing the highest of quality wines from its estate vineyards in Napa, with all aspects of production taking place in a unique 45,000 square foot cave facility. William and Leticia Jarvis founded the winery in 1990 as the culmination of their life-long passion for the culture of wine-making.

Name: Bodega y Viñedos Clément
Description:
We are a family business founded in 1999 by Carlos Clément, a renowned businessman from Mendoza, passionate about the main produce of his homeland.

After a successful career as a customs agent, in which he created one of the largest foreign trade companies in Cuyo, Clément embarked on the adventure of planting vines in one of the driest areas of Mendoza.

In 1999 the company acquired the field where it would plant the first vines: Finca “La Cielito”, in Santa Rosa.

Soon after, new vineyards in Santa Rosa were incorporated, completing a total of 260 planted hectares.

Two decades later, her daughter Lis, a wine marketing and communications specialist, joined the company to expand and strengthen the family business.

Coincidentally with her incorporation, the company takes its next great leap, acquiring a 10 million liter capacity winery, with the vision of creating wines that defy convention with grace and elegance.

Name: Gary Farrell Vineyards & Winery
Description:
At Gary Farrell Winery, we are driven by the power of curiosity, the joy of discovery, and the inspiration within adventure. As a result, we forge our own path and believe the journey is as exciting as the destination. The best things in life are worth seeking out, and we seek to showcase the exquisiteness of Pinot Noir and Chardonnay from the Russian River Valley and beyond.

OUR LEGACY
Beginning in the late 1970s, our founder Gary Farrell was a visionary who was instrumental in showcasing the world-class Pinot Noirs and Chardonnays of the nascent Russian River Valley AVA. He made his first wine under the Gary Farrell label in 1982 and built the winery into one of the most acclaimed producers of small-lot Pinot Noirs and Chardonnays in the region. 

Today, Gary Farrell Winery continues to craft wines of elegance, balance, and site specificity, and maintains collaborative relationships with many of the same growers we’ve worked with for over 40 years. Nurturing the legacy of Gary's iconic wine style is Winemaker Brent McKoy, who started in 2005 as Cellar Foreman working directly with Gary and rose through the ranks to become Winemaker in 2023 under the tutelage of winemaker Theresa Heredia, who transitioned to Consulting Winemaker in 2024.

Name: Sprit & Co | B Corp
Description:
Vi importerer og sælger kvalitetsspiritus og barudstyr til hoteller, restauranter, cocktailbarer samt vin- og spiritusforhandlere i Danmark.
Kontakt os på: info@sprit-co.dk

Name: Consorzio Vino Chianti Official
Description:
Terra, sudore, sacrificio, coraggio, ingegno, tradizione, verbo, natura: non esiste un momento preciso della storia in cui si è mostrato il legame indissolubile tra la campagna lavorata dall’uomo ed il necessario per produrre vino “Chianti”. 

Nel 1927, un gruppo di viticoltori costituisce il “Consorzio del Vino Chianti”, una delle prime associazioni di produttori di vino del nostro paese, con la missione di tutelare e promuovere il vino Chianti D.O.C.G. “quale per tradizione antichissima è conosciuto in Italia e all’estero”. Il territorio ricadente sotto l’egida del Consorzio è dal 1932 composto da sei province, punteggiate da città d’arte e cultura tra le più belle del mondo: Firenze, Siena, Arezzo, Pisa, Pistoia, Prato. 

Questa “love story” tra l’uomo e la natura, ad oggi coinvolge circa 3.000 aziende disseminate su una superficie vitata di circa 15.500 ettari, che ogni anno esprime una media di produzione rasente i 100 milioni di bottiglie. Avete letto bene: centomilioni di bottiglie l’anno.

Land, sweat, sacrifice, courage, ingenuity, tradition, knowledge, nature: we have no indication of a precise moment in history when the indissoluble link between the fields tended by man and everything necessary to produce “Chianti” became apparent.

In 1927, a group of winegrowers founded the “Consorzio del Vino Chianti”, one of the first associations of winemakers in Italy. Its mission was to protect and promote Chianti D.O.C.G. wine “as it is known in Italy and abroad by ancient tradition”.

Since 1932, the territory falling under the aegis of the Consortium has consisted of six provinces, home to some of the world’s most beautiful cities: Florence, Siena, Arezzo, Pisa, Pistoia and Prato.

This “love story” between man and nature now involves about 3,000 wineries spread across an area of about 15,500 hectares of vineyards, with an average annual production of about 100 million bottles. That’s right: One hundred million bottles a year.

Name: Cafés1984
Description: Nuestro objetivo final es el de proporcionar el mejor servicio a nuestros clientes de todo el mundo. La especial dedicación al cliente, la optimización de servicios y el desarrollo continuado han logrado que la firma haya conseguido un posicionamiento relevante en el mercado.

Name: LIQUID SPIRITS
Description: Liquid Spirits - The Fine Art of Drinks

Name: Indigo Wine
Description: Indigo Wine is an agency business supplying high quality wines to the on-trade and retail sectors. We specialise in fresh and balanced wines with a sense of place from family-run estates in Spain and France, with some real gems from Portugal, Italy, Austria, Australia and South Africa. We now work with some of the most renowned winemakers in Spain, from the well-established to up and coming ground breakers creating one of the best selections of Spanish Wines in the country.

Name: Cantina Giovanni Ederle
Description:
“When I look at one of my bottles I see the hard work, the efforts, the friendship of those who helped me, the experience of those who suggested me and the patience of those who supported me”.

Giovanni Ederle’s Winery means tradition, growth and closeness to wine lovers.

When we talk about this small and young reality founded in 2006, we talk about 7 hectares of vineyards and 6 hectares of olive oil. Synthetic chemical phytosanitary products haven’t been used since 2009, in favour of the natural ones as sulphur and copper. 
In short, the farm is officially run by an organic system embracing the Guyot’s French technique which allows to get the best from all the planted grapes.

Close to the Winery there is also the Agriturismo handled by Giovanni’s family. A lot of themed accommodations guide the wine lovers to a peaceful and deep experience into the farm world, the way it once was.
The jewel on the crown? Enjoying honey, jams, eggs, milk and goat cheese: everything here is homemade!

A quick focus on the winegrower: Giovanni was able to turn his childhood passion into his job. He produces wines which speak about him and his beloved land. Like in a movie, the first fermentation process was made in his own garage and this is what starting from zero means. Anyway, harvest by harvest Giovanni improved knowledge and techniques coming to realize the wine that is the best expression of the area.


Stay tuned following us on Instagram as well: cantina_giovanni_ederle

Name: OENOFOROS GROUP
Description:
Oenoforos är ett av Sveriges mest innovativa företag i vinbranschen.
Vi importerar, producerar, marknadsför och distribuerar förstklassiga viner från de viktigaste vinländerna i världen. I portföljen finns ett brett urval av
viner från Europa och nya världen med länder som Sydafrika och Australien.
Med mottot "väl valda viner” & prisvärdhet som ledstjärna erbjuds kvalitetsvin från hela världen.

VD och grundare av Oenoforosgruppen är Takis Soldatos. Takis utnämndes till ”Årets Dryckesprofil 2010” för sitt arbete som pionjär och innovatör i den svenska vinbranschen och år 2002 vann han även Allt om Mats stora utmärkelse ”Gyllene Glaset”.

I Oenoforosgruppen ingår även importören Carovin och Vintedge som representerar vinagenturer från välrenommerade producenter från hela världen, samt Nordic Sea Winery, en av världens mest moderna vinanläggningar. 

OENOFOROS  & NORDIC SEA WINERY 
2008 startade Oenoforosgruppen Nordic Sea Winery i Simrishamn med syfte att skapa ett ultramodernt vineri och produktionsanläggning. På Nordic Sea Winery förädlas, lagras och buteljeras viner från hela världen innan de släpps på marknaden. 
I juni 2014 öppnade Nordic Sea Winery upp för allmänheten för att tillmötesgå det stora intresset som finns av att lära sig mer om vinproduktion. Besökarna erbjuds guidade turer av vineriet, vinprovning samt möjlighet att ta ett glas vin och äta i restaurangen.

Name: Château Grand Corbin-Despagne
Description:
À Saint-Émilion depuis toujours,
Vignerons depuis des siècles,
À Grand Corbin-Despagne depuis 1812.
Grand Cru Classé conduit en agriculture biologique

Name: Herzog Wine Cellars
Description: California-based Herzog Wine Cellars is a division of Royal Wine Corporation, a family-owned company and one of the largest producers of kosher wines in North America. Specializing in sustainable viniculture, Herzog offers more than 25 grape varieties in its award-winning wines, including brands like Baron Herzog and Jeunesse. The craftsmanship of Herzog wines is attributed to a 150-year legacy of wine making, passed down for nine generations from Czechoslovakia to the United States and now led by head winemaker Joe Hurliman.

Name: Chateau la Levrette
Description:
Le Château la Levrette est une petite propriété cultivée en agriculture biologique. Nous produisons des vins élégants et fins qui se bonifient avec le temps.

Située à 55 km de Bordeaux, face au Médoc, dans la région de Blaye sur la rive droite de l’estuaire de la Gironde. Nous produisons des vins en AOC Blaye Cotes de Bordeaux Blanc et rouge, Bordeaux Supérieur, Bordeaux Blanc et Bordeaux Rosé.

Réparties sur 8 hectares, nos vignes sont idéalement placées dans le "triangle d’or" du Blayais – compris entre Cars, Saint-Genès de Blaye et Saint-Seurin de Cursac.

N'hésitez pas à nous contacter pour plus d'informations.

Name: Association VINEA
Description:
VINEA est la référence pour l’organisation de concours, parmi lesquels  le Mondial des Pinots et du Merlot, ainsi que le Grand Prix du Vin Suisse. Plus de 6000 crus seront ainsi notés, cette année, dans ces diverses épreuves. Plateforme de communication des vins de notre pays, VINEA a également initié le Guide des Vins Suisses qui en 4 éditions s’est imposé comme l’ouvrage le plus complet et le plus crédible pour le consommateur. Ce Guide a aujourd'hui évolué vers une application i-Phone afin de s'adapter aux nouvelles exigences des consommateurs et d'avoir une information toujours actualisée.

Die Geschichte der VINEA begann im September 1994, als erstmals 20 Walliser Winzer ihre Gewächse an Degustations-Ständen im Zentrum der Stadt Sierre präsentierten. Heute nehmen an diesem Anlass bereits über 150 Winzer aus dem Wallis, zunehmend aber auch aus anderen Weinbauregionen der Schweiz teil. Zusammen verwandeln sie das Stadtzentrum von Sierre für ein Wochenende zur grössten Freiluft-Vinothek der Schweiz.

VINEA has today developed into an important centre of excellence for the Swiss wine industry. It is the principal organizer of respected wine competitions, including the Mondial des Pinots  and the Mondial du Merlot, as well as the Grand Prix du Vin Suisse. More than 6,000 wines will be judged this year in these different competitions.

Name: Kruger, vins et spiritueux
Description:
La mission de Kruger Vins et spiritueux consiste à :
offrir des boissons alcoolisées de qualité à prix compétitifs, tant sur les marchés locaux qu’internationaux.

Cette mission s’articule principalement autour des activités suivantes : 

- importation
- vinification, élaboration, production
- développement de marques renommées
- commercialisation, représentation et mise en -- marché
- exportation
- embouteillage à forfait
- viticulture
- vente de vin en vrac

Name: LICORERA DEL SUR
Description: Somos una empresa mexicana dedicada a la elaboración, distribución y comercialización de bebidas alcohólicas desde 1986, con el propósito de brindar una gran variedad de diferentes productos y proporcionando el mejor servicio a nuestros clientes para que el consumidor disfrute de un producto con los más altos estándares de calidad.

Name: Ervideira, Sociedade Agrícola
Description:
Ervideira é uma empresa produtora de vinhos de qualidade e excelência na região do Alentejo, em Portugal, com cerca de 160 hectares de vinha e desde 2002 a nossa própria Adega, na Herdade da Herdadinha, na Vendinha, perto de Reguengos de Monsaraz.
 
Produzir Vinhos Alentejanos, com um carácter profundo e marcante, mas que sejam conhecidos e reconhecidos pelo consumidor.
 
----
 
Ervideira is a producer of wines of quality and excellence in the region of Alentejo, in Portugal, with about 160 hectares of vineyards, and since 2002 with an our own winery, in the estate of Herdadinha in Vendinha near Reguengos de Monsaraz.
 
Producing wines from Alentejo, with a deep and remarkable character, but which are known and recognized by the consumer.

Name: Quinta de S. Sebastião
Description:
Step into a place where time seems to have stood still, where history and tradition intertwine in a sublime way. Quinta de S. Sebastião, with origins dating back to the 18th century, is more than just a property; it is a legacy that spans generations, filled with stories of devotion and miracles that echo since 1755.

In the heart of Arruda dos Vinhos, stands an imposing Portuguese manor house, a silent witness to centuries of history. Beside it, a centuries-old chapel holds secrets and legends that speak of pilgrimages and miraculous events, from a time when faith shaped daily life. 

The privileged location, in the Lisbon region, benefits from a unique microclimate where the maritime breeze, softened by the mountains, and the constant presence of water streams create perfect conditions for producing excellent wines. At Quinta de S. Sebastião, we do more than produce superior quality wines. Each bottle reflects the character and unmistakable identity of this land.

Our mission is to share with the world the best of what Portugal has to offer, as well as the essence and soul of this extraordinary place. Discover our wine collection, where each tasting is a journey through time, a celebration of the heritage and love for a land that has been dedicated to the art of winemaking for centuries.

This is an invitation to a unique experience, where elegance and tradition come together in perfect harmony.

Name: Château Olivier
Description:
Au cœur d'un vaste domaine composé de forêt, de prairies et de vignes, le Château Olivier émerge de son écrin de verdure tel un joyau de pierre, témoin d'une histoire multiséculaire. 

Propriété familiale depuis 1886, sa belle architecture, ses plans d’eau et la qualité des bâtiments annexes, en font un site exceptionnel en pleine nature, à onze kilomètres seulement de Bordeaux au cœur de l’appellation Pessac-Léognan.

Sur 230 hectares, on compte 60 hectares de vignes. 
Le vignoble est placé sur deux terrasses glacières ce qui en fait sa richesse et son unicité.
Actuellement en conversion biologique, isolé des autres vignobles et protégé par les forêts, Château Olivier est un poumon vert au milieu de la ville.

Les vins de Château Olivier, classés en blanc et en rouge, présentent un style très pur et précis, sans artifice. 
Un savoir-faire unique que l’équipe experte et minutieuse du Château Olivier tend à faire transparaître à travers des vins de qualité qu’elle cherche à améliorer millésime après millésime.

Name: HEDONIST Spirits
Description:
HEDONIST SPIRITS is a boutique spirits business.
Creativity and innovation is the heart of what we strive for.
We operate across different categories building our brands in every part of the world.
We believe in shaping things differently and go further than what already exists. We imagine and create things differently. That’s why our very simple vision statement is “Reshaping Spirits”. Our core brands include HEDONIST, a liqueur of Cognac with a fine touch of ginger together with vanilla. And HEE JOY, a Spiced Rum blended from Jamaican, Trinidad and Guyana rums. Each brand is actually developing its own product range. We are also developing a new rum brand for the off-trade, Guns

Name: China Wines & Spirits (CWS)
Description:
China Wines & Spirits (CWS) is a subsidiary of the ELAN Group. The ELAN Group is based in Bordeaux, France, and operates in 4 countries. It has 20 years of experience in the distribution of fine wines and spirits. Through a centralized sourcing, logistics and purchasing center, the ELAN Group distributes over 400 brands from 22 countries throughout Eurasia, with very strong market shares in the countries it operates in. It serves more than 4,000 customers, with over 2.5 million bottles sold.

CWS was created in 2006, and has built a very wide and strong network of customers across China in the On Trade, Wholesale, Digital, Private and Corporate channels throughout the years. With 5 offices and warehouses, CWS can ensure a very responsive, flexible and professional service for all its customers. Thanks to its presence in Shanghai, Beijing, Chengdu, Guangzhou and Shenzhen, CWS covers most of the first and second tier cities in China.

With a portfolio that includes over 150 wine and spirit brands and over 1,000 products, CWS has one of the most complete assortments of wines in Mainland China. From the most prestigious estates in the world to some hidden and carefully selected gems, CWS boasts products for all types of demands and channels. With products from France, Italy, Spain, Portugal, England, Scotland, Ireland, Germany, China, Chile, Argentina, USA, New Zealand, South Africa, Brazil and Cuba, to name some, CWS covers most of the wine and spirit producing countries in the world.

Name: Prizm Brewing Co.
Description: Prizm Brewing Co. est une jeune brasserie installée à Vendargues, dans l’agglomération Montpelliéraine, depuis août 2020. Sa philosophie est de faire découvrir la bière à travers un prisme aux notes houblonnées et à l’aromatique forte. Riche d’un savoir-faire artisanal, la brasserie crée d’abord la marque « Prizm », une gamme composé de recettes inédites et éphémères conditionnées dans un format cannette. La gamme « VNDL » a été créée en mars 2021. Conditionnée en bouteille, elle allie tradition et modernité. Elle est complémentaire à « Prizm » et se décline sur une gamme fixe qui permet aux curieux de s’initier à la bière artisanale.

Name: Rescue Dog Wines
Description: At Rescue Dog Wines our goal is to produce exceptional world class wines from locally sourced  grapes. While enjoying these fantastic wines, know that 50% of our profits go to support rescue dog charity organizations.

Name: AccademiaVino
Description:
AccademiaVino is the leading wine academy and WSET (Wine and Spirit Education Trust) Approved Programme Provider in Italy.

Courses are held in Milan, Rome, Turin, Genoa and other locations throughout Italy

With schools in over 60 countries around the world, WSET qualifications are universally recognized as the benchmark for professional wine education. The combination of high standards and a practical, fun approach also attracts an increasing number of consumers.

Our current range of WSET courses includes:

    WSET Level 1 Foundation Award in Wines
    WSET Level 2 Intermediate Award in Wines and Spirits
    WSET Level 3 Advanced Award in Wines

   WSET Level 1 Award in Wine Service

   WSET Level 1 Award in Spirits
   WSET Level 2 Award in Spirits

    We also offer an extensive program of exclusive courses and tastings delivered in Italian, available through our Italian website (www.accademiavino.it/).

Description:

Our relationship with international wineries, importers and distributors is highly regarded, and we continue to service more markets each year.

Wine brokerage, marketing support, and export promotion of primarily Australian producers.

Co brand specialists for private label buyers

One stop market and advice for the best wines for your region.

Description: Based in Edinburgh, we make Wee Smoky Scotch Whisky. Finished in peated casks and with a dash of Scottish flair, we actively invite non whisky drinkers.

Name: Paradise Spirits Inc
Description:
Paradise Spirits leverages worldwide industry network and business experience to produce and distribute high quality spirits globally. We inject working capital to build brand awareness, secure new markets and invest in infrastructure to support growth. 

Our goal is to become a game-changer in the spirit industry by applying our proven experience and knowledge from multiple industries and business sectors.

Name: Ladoga Group
Description:
The LADOGA Group  was founded in 1995 in St.Petersburg, Russia.  Nowadays LADOGA is one of Top-10 biggest spirits companies in Russia. The company has its own distillery, which is one of the biggest and the most modern factory in the north-west of Russia
     The factory is equipped with the newest high-tech European equipment and raise the rate of production. At the moment LADOGA produces about 100 SKUs of spirits, bitters and liqueurs, which are distributed all over Russia  and are also exported to more then 40 countries of the world including the CIS, Middle East, Africa, Asia and Latin America

LADOGA's leading vodka brand Tsarskaya/Imperial was the fastest growing vodka brand in the world in 2016 and has reached a 3.3 million case sales level in 2024
Leading Gin brand Barrister in 2024 years has reached the level of 1.3 million 9-L cases and was inaugurated as the Gin Brand Champion 2024

Name: Giertz Vinimport AB
Description: Giertz Vinimport AB is a wine and spirits company based out of 4A Blasieholmsgatan, Stockholm, Stockholm County, Sweden.

Name: Ron Montero S.L.
Description: Somos una empresa familiar que produce rones premium desde 1963. Estamos ubicados en el sur de España, en la ciudad de Motril (Granada), donde hemos establecido nuestra reputación a través de la lealtad de nuestros clientes. La esencia de nuestro ron se remonta a sus raíces, por lo que ahora está en su quinta generación de patrimonio de caña de azúcar. Nos enorgullecemos de ser puritanos y mantenemos los más altos niveles de integridad en nuestros productos. Comenzamos eligiendo alcoholes de primera calidad cuidadosamente destilados para conservar su esencia de caña de azúcar y envejecer nuestros rones en barricas de roble americano con soleras de 48 años.

Name: Norex Selected Brands OY
Description: Suomalainen alkoholialan asiantuntija ja perheyritys toisessa sukupolvessa. Norex Selected Brands Oy maahantuo laadukkaat alkoholijuomat ympäri maailmaa Alkolle, ravintoloille, tukuille ja Duty Free -toimijoille.

Name: European Cellars
Description: European Cellars is a US-based importer of wines from France, Spain, Switzerland, Chile, Lebanon, Macedonia, & Germany and is home to three portfolios – Eric Solomon Selections, Indigo Wine, and Jon-David-Headrick Selections

Name: Hellwege Spirituosen und Wein-Vertriebs GmbH
Description:
Hellwege ist dein Zwischenhändler und Partner für qualitative Spirituosen, Champagner und Weine in nahezu allen Preissegmenten. Zu unserem Portfolio zählen bewährte Fachhandelsmarken, Raritäten und Sonderausstattungen sowie exklusive Spirituosenmarken, die du ausschließlich bei uns erhältst.
Neben einem vielfältigen Warenangebot mit regelmäßigen Aktionen, haben wir es uns zur Aufgabe gemacht, unseren Kundinnen und Kunden als vertrauensvoller Partner zur Seite zu stehen. Deshalb steht für uns eine kompetente Beratung und ein umfassender Service durch unser gesamtes Team im Vordergrund.

Name: Wet Canteen Bottling Company
Description:
Wet Canteen Bottling Company, offering custom labelled Australian made liquor.

Victoria Liquor Licences: 33779632; 36306682

Info@wetcanteenbottlingco.com.au

Name: Château Moncets & Château de Chambrun - Lalande de Pomerol
Description:
Les Domaines de Moncets rassemblent 4 propriétés viticoles réparties sur 40 hectares et trois AOC : Lalande-de-Pomerol, Montagne-Saint-Émilion et Saint-Émilion
Ancrés dans l’histoire au cœur du Château Moncets à Néac, nous cultivons des valeurs fortes : la biodiversité, un engagement pour « un mieux-vivre ensemble », et la volonté de redécouvrir l’essence même de la viticulture française

Château Moncets
Cette propriété est la plus ancienne de nos vignobles. Créée en 1770, elle porte le nom du Général de Moncets qui l’aurait acquise en 1872. 

Château de Chambrun
Parcelles d’argiles et graves sur le rare plateau de Pomerol-Néac bénéficie depuis 2016 d’un itinéraire vinicole totalement adapté pour révéler le crémeux de ce magnifique terroir.

Château La Bastidette
Vin issu de nos parcelles de Merlot situées sur la zone ouest « argiles noires » de la commune de Montagne St Emilion. Elle représente aujourd’hui la pureté de ce cépage sur un des plus beaux terroirs de la rive droite.

Château La Voûte
C’est un jardin de 3.93 hectares, dont 1.42 hectares implantés sur le point culminant de Saint-Étienne-de-Lisse, au cœur de l’AOC Saint-Émilion. Perché à 91 mètres d’altitude, c'est un terroir historique et exceptionnel!

UN IMPORTANT PROJET D’INVESTISSEMENT TECHNIQUE
En 2015, le Chateau Moncets s’est doté d’un cuvier gravitaire et parcellaire en cuves bétons Italiennes. Un outil indispensable pour maîtriser par inertie nos vinifications « à basses températures » et sans soufres. INFUSION 

Œnologues conseils :
2012-2017 : Michel Rolland 
Depuis 2018 : Thomas Duclos 

L’OENOTOURISME AU PREMIER PLAN
Le Château Moncets est ouvert au public depuis 2017, plusieurs formules de visite sont proposées.
Pour accompagner ce développement oenotouristique, la rénovation intégrale du château historique a pris fin en juin 2023. Elle permet ainsi de diversifier les activités de la propriété avec 3 suites premium, une salle de réception pour les dégustations professionnelles et mariages

Name: Agence Les frères Spirit
Description:
Fondée en 2020 par des passionnés de spiritueux, Les frères Spirit est une agence de représentation de spiritueux et autres boissons alcoolisées, travaillant principalement sur le territoire québécois.

Notre mission est de dénicher à travers le monde des produits inédits et de qualité tout en créant un lien étroit entre les producteurs que nous représentons, les amateurs d’alcool, les restaurateurs et les tenanciers de débits de bars qui voudront garnir leur cellier de nos découvertes.

Name: Vanguard Luxury Brands
Description:
Established by James France in 2008, Vanguard Luxury Brands is Australia’s leading importer, marketer and distributor of premium spirits.

We cater to the best bars, liquor stores, restaurants and hotels across Australia and are very proud to have won Australia’s top award: the ALIA award for On-Premise Supplier Of The Year in 2018, 2015 and 2013, as well as being Highly Commended for this award in 2014, 2016, 2017 and 2019.

Name: Spiritsland
Description:
Spiritsland está formada por un conjunto de profesionales con una dilatada experiencia en el sector de la importación y la exportación de espirituosos. Dada esta experiencia hemos seleccionado bebidas de la más alta calidad, trabajando directamente con productores de reconocido prestigio internacional. El resultado es una amplia gama de productos Premium capaces de satisfacer a los paladares más exigentes.

- Experiencia: más de 15 años en el sector.
- Conocimiento del producto: desde la siembra de la materia prima hasta el embotellado.
- Asesoramiento al cliente: impuestos, normativas, legislación del sector, etc.
- Logística y distribución optimizadas: para efectuar pedidos de forma rápida y eficaz.
- Asesoría profesional: a través de un equipo humano altamente cualificado.
- Máxima calidad: en todos nuestros productos y servicios (certificaciones de calidad ISO 9001 e ISO 22000).

Hoy en día contamos con clientes repartidos entre Europa, EEUU y el resto de América, entre otras áreas; siendo nuestras principales mercados: Italia, Francia, Centro de Europa y Países Escandinavos.

Name: A Wine Adventure
Description: A new way to approach wine tasting using gamification concept, fun wine accessories, wine tasting masterclasses based on sensorial games and quizz and even a murder mystery / police investigation.

Name: Liquori dell'Alchimista
Description: The Liquori dell'Alchimista are born in Belpasso, a town on the slopes of Etna, from the passion of a young Pharmacy student for the art of liqueurs who, after having customized and meticulously refined the ancient recipes, managed to give a unique and unmistakable taste to its products. A slow maceration process and a long and laborious processing, the best raw materials, natural and rigorously selected, to preserve the inimitable flavor of the ancient recipes of liqueur. A centuries-old art, which relives through the Liquori dell'Alchimista, whose products tell a story of unmistakable aromas and inimitable tastes, born from the passion for simplicity and tradition.

Name: Elephant Gin | B Corp
Description:
Premium artisan dry & sloe gins, handcrafted and distilled in Germany, inspired by Africa and in support of African elephant conservation. World Spirits Award 2021.

www.elephant-gin.com
www.satao-gin.com

The founders of Elephant Gin have dedicated themselves to combining a great passion for gin with the love for the African wildlife. 

In 2013, they developed the award-winning Elephant London Dry Gin (45%) that uses rare African botanicals and focuses on resolutely artisan production methods. In December 2015, the company complemented its portfolio with an aromatic Elephant Sloe Gin (35%), in 2017, introduced an overproof Elephant Strength Gin (57%), and in 2022 they launched the Elephant Orange Cocoa Gin (40%).

Name: Entrecanales Domecq e Hijos
Description:
Con más de 125 años de experiencia en la Crianza y Elaboración de vinos de alta calidad, Entrecanales Domecq e Hijos es uno de los grupos vitivinícolas más relevantes de España. 
 
Con viñedos y bodegas circunscritos a las Denominaciones de Origen más prestigiosas del país, y con más de 400 hectáreas en propiedad, en Entrecanales Domecq e Hijos conformamos nuestra identidad con vinos excepcionales, como Cosme Palacio, Secreto, Caserío de Dueñas, La Tula y El Aeronauta; en las D.Os de Rioja, Ribera del Duero, Rueda, Jerez y Valdeorras, respectivamente.
 
Asimismo, con presencia en más de 40 países, y desde alianzas estratégicas con otros grupos bodegueros de referencia, trabajamos en la internacionalización de nuestras marcas de prestigio a nivel global con el fin de dar respuestas eficaces y de calidad a un mercado que se mantiene siempre dinámico.
 
Todo ello, con la sostenibilidad como guía esencial para cada una de nuestras actuaciones. Comprometidos con el entorno, nuestras bodegas fueron pioneras en España en ser neutras en carbono y utilizar energía 100% renovable.
___

Entrecanales Domecq e Hijos is one of Spain's most important wine companies, with more than 125 years of experience in the production and ageing of high quality wines that are recognised by national and international wine critics.

With wineries and vineyards in Spain's most prestigious Designations of Origin, and more than 400 hectares of its own vineyards, Entrecanales Domecq e Hijos has shaped its identity through exceptional wines of the highest quality, including Cosme Palacio, Secreto, Caserío de Dueñas, and El Aeronauta; in the Rioja, Ribera del Duero, Rueda and Valdeorras D.O.s, respectively.

Entrecanales Domecq e Hijos is firmly committed to sustainability, which guides each and all of its activities. Its wineries were pioneers in Spain in gaining Carbon Neutral certification and using 100% renewable energy.

Name: Next Century Spirits
Description:
Next Century Spirits (NCS), headquartered in Zebulon, North Carolina, is a full-service distilled spirits company, building a strategically developed portfolio of owned brands and offering private label solutions, co-packing, and bulk supply. 

NCS seeks to redefine what's possible in spirits production with its patented Spiranova process, which accelerates flavor transformation using natural ingredients.

Its portfolio includes Nue Vodka, Blue Chair Bay Rum, Numbskull—a cool mint and chocolate-flavored whiskey, Bear Fight Whiskey, Creek Water American Whiskey, Caddy Clubhouse Cocktails, Calamity Gin, and Henderson Whiskey. 

NCS-owned brands have earned over 35 gold medals in industry competitions, and the company was named North Carolina Distillery of the Year in 2023 by the New York International Spirits Competition.

Don't believe us? Come taste the difference.

Name: Brasserie BAPBAP
Description:
BAPBAP c’est la brasserie de bière artisanale qui inonde l’Ile-de-France depuis 7 ans. IPA, bières acides, NEIPA, Lagers, brunes… Nous sommes une 30aine de passionnés qui produisons toutes ces recettes dans un bâtiment atypique de 1800 m2 en plein Paris (11e) ou dans notre brasserie dans le Grand Paris.

 Notre mission ? Démocratiser la bière artisanale en France avec des recettes originales, ultra quali et multi-médaillées ! Toutes nos bières sont disponibles en restaurant, bar, caviste, eshop et dans certaines grandes surfaces.

Name: Château Dauzac
Description: Château Dauzac, a 5th growth Grand Cru Classé Margaux wine according to the 1855 classification, has the enormous privilege of having a one-block 49-hectare vineyard: 45 hectares with the Margaux appellation and 4 hectares with the Haut-Médoc appellation. Located near the Gironde estuary whose influence on the vineyard’s ecosystem is critical, the property is protected from ocean winds thanks to 120 hectares of meadows and forests. This agronomic bubble and unique terroir have made it possible to develop precision farming, highlighting the exceptional characteristics of this Grand Cru Classé wine.

Name: The Clydeside Distillery
Description: The Clydeside Distillery is a distinctive Single Malt Scotch Whisky distillery & visitor experience in the heart of Glasgow.

Name: Yerevan Brandy Company
Description:
Yerevan Brandy Company
Yerevan Brandy Company (YBC) is the exclusive producer of ARARAT brandies and the direct successor of Armenian brandy making traditions established back in 1887. Today YBC is the key player in the economy of the country and the biggest taxpayer of the sphere. With the staff of around 350 people (excluding the number of grape growers), it operates in Yerevan by its main entity as well as in three regions of Armenia (Armavir, Aygavan, and Tavoush) and produces world’s n1 exported Armenian brandy (ranked in the top 3 of imported brandies worldwide).
YBC is one of the first companies that have been practicing the S&R approach in its 360 degrees range in Armenia.   Yerevan Brandy Company is the one that has been pioneering Responsible Consumption and focuses the public’s attention to issues of Responsible Drinking. 
In 1998, the Yerevan Brandy Company became part of Pernod Ricard Group, the world’s n°2 in wines and spirits, which gave ARARAT brandies new opportunities to develop on the international market. While remaining faithful to the traditions of the Armenian brandy business, Yerevan Brandy Company introduced new quality standards and gained access to the best equipment allowing to create the world's best Armenian brandy. 

Tribute to Armenia 
Throughout its entire history has ARARAT been always representing Armenia with its history and culture by paying tribute to the richest heritage of the country’s traditions. 

Legendary Armenian Brandy ARARAT
The process of creating ARARAT brandy is a true art. It is born thanks to the generous union of human talent and the richness of Armenian nature. 

ARARAT encourages responsible drinking.

Name: Granvinhos
Description: Eficiência, inovação e sustentabilidade na produção de grandes vinhos portugueses e experiências de enoturismo diferenciadoras.

Name: Domaine Clarence Dillon
Description:
Founded in 1935, the family company Domaine Clarence Dillon, chaired by HRH Le Prince Robert de Luxembourg, owns several prestigious wine estates including, First Growth Château Haut-Brion, Château La Mission Haut-Brion and since 2011, Château Quintus, one of the very finest wines of Saint Émilion. In 2005, the company created the Bordeaux Fine Wine Merchant, Clarence Dillon Wines, one of Bordeaux’s most significant fine wine merchants. In the same year, Clarendelle was launched, thereby creating Bordeaux’s first super premium family of wines. Domaine Clarence Dillon also owns a Parisian residence, truly an embassy for the French art of living so highly prized by its Chairman and CEO, Prince Robert of Luxembourg. The building houses the two-starred gastronomic restaurant, Le Clarence (proclaimed one of the 50 best Restaurants in the World for 3 consecutive years) and La Cave du Château, an exceptional retail and e-tail shop selling the finest wines and spirits from France’s terroirs (www.lcdc.wine). In 2018, Domaine Clarence Dillon was invited to join Primum Familiae Vini (PFV), an international association bringing together twelve families, owners of prestigious estates and domains producing some of the world’s finest wines. 
Domaine Clarence Dillon has been involved, in France and internationally, in patronage activities and philanthropic donations that promote the cultural influence of French heritage and the arts. The group gives its support to the Grand Palais by contributing to the restoration of the statuary along the Avenue Franklin D. Roosevelt frontage, which includes ten of the monument’s most emblematic sculptures.
In 2023 and 2024, Clarendelle & Domaine Clarence Dillon were named Official Wine Partners of the Academy Museum of Motion Pictures and the Exclusive Red and White Wines Poured at the 95th and 96th Oscars.  2024  also marked the launch of Klara, the new organic Clarence Dillon family of southern French wines.

Name: Salcombe Distilling Company
Description:
Inspired by the coastal vitality of Salcombe and its shipbuilding heritage, Salcombe Distilling Co.'s collection of exceptional spirits are distilled and crafted at their waterside distillery on Island Street, Salcombe; one of the world’s only distilleries directly accessible by boat. 

Drawing influence from the famous 19th century Salcombe Fruit Schooners and their precious cargo, Salcombe Distilling Co. use only the finest fresh citrus fruits and spices to create their range of multi-award winning Salcombe Gins, each led by flavour and inspired by history. 

New London Light is their bold collection of contemporary non-alcoholic spirits and aperitifs, crafted by SDCo.’s expert distillers to challenge the process and bring innovative flavour combinations into a new era of drinking without alcohol. 

Every bottle sold makes our oceans healthier. We donate 1% of every bottle sold, to the Marine Conservation Society to help protect and regenerate precious ocean habitats.

Name: Imperial Beverage
Description:
Imperial Beverage is a long-standing member of the Michigan beverage distribution community. Established in 1933 after the repeal of prohibition and purchased by Kalamazoo’s Cekola family in 1984, Imperial has grown from a one county beer distributor to a top 10 statewide beer, wine & spirits wholesaler. With 300 employees and 4 locations in Kalamazoo, Livonia, Ishpeming, and Traverse City, Imperial provides statewide coverage that serves every Michigan County, every week, all year long. 

Our knowledgeable staff works with our customers to fulfill our passion statement “Helping People Succeed,” by building profit and identity in their restaurants and retail locations through the selection of fine wines, craft beers, ciders, spirits, sodas and mixers from our diverse portfolio. 

We offer Health Insurance, 401k Match, Volunteer Program, Internship Opportunities, and more to Imperial Beverage staff. Interested in joining the Imperial Beverage family? Visit imperialbeverage.com/careers to learn more!

Name: Hatch Mansfield
Description:
UK specialists in premium wines made by independently-owned wine companies from around the world. Established in 1994, Hatch Mansfield remains fiercely independent and today represents a selection of top wine companies with a 50-strong team. With a genuine love of wine, we are passionate about developing wine knowledge through tastings, events and out in the field.

Our producers all own a significant vineyard base, first-class winemaking facilities and cellars giving them quality control from grape to bottle. They all have a story to tell about heritage, provenance and authenticity.

We are also focused on sustainable practice: we were the first UK wine agency to achieve ISO 14001 and we work with the Woodland Trust to mitigate our impact on the environment. 

Our brands:

Champagne Taittinger
Louis Jadot
Joseph Mellot
C.V.N.E
Errazuriz
Caliterra
Domaine Carneros
Résonance
Robert Oatley
Villa Maria
Esk Valley
Vidal
Kleine Zalze
M. CHAPOUTIER
Zuccardi
Gaja

Name: Marchesi Mazzei
Description:
For over six centuries, the Mazzei family has dedicated itself to winemaking, with a passion and commitment that have been handed down from one generation to the next.
The continuing search for new quality horizons has led us to extend our activities on various enological fronts, branching out from our historic roots, at the Castello di Fonterutoli, in the heart of the Chianti Classico, towards two new and promising locations, in the Maremma region of Tuscany and in Zisola, in southeastern Sicily. We intend to enhance their expressive potential through the application of our winemaking expertise, while respecting the unique characteristics of each of these splendid “terroirs”.
Our constant adherence to these values is reflected in the quality of all our wines, satisfying the palates of “connaisseurs” the world over, who know they can rely on the name Mazzei to be one of the leaders of the Italian winemaking world.
This is the spirit with which we work, in the hope of continuing to merit the esteem of our clients, now and in the future.

Name: Grupo Megalicor
Branca USA
Description: Tradition, Quality and innovation since 1845.

Name: Aubert & Mathieu
Description: WE ARE TWO FRIENDS MAKING WINE IN THE SOUTH OF FRANCE. MORE AUTHENTIC, MORE SUSTAINABLE AND MORE COMMITTED TO THE PLANET. LET’S MAKE THINGS HAPPEN.

Name: Schlafly Beer - The Saint Louis Brewery
Description: Schlafly Beer - The Saint Louis Brewery is proud to be MO's largest locally owned independent brewery; brewing over 70 styles of craft beer each year. When we opened our doors in 1991 we had no business plan but we did have a vision: To make great beer and great food and try to have fun doing it. Twenty-plus years on, our business plan is still almost as simple as our original vision: To make a wide variety of great beers, sell as much as we can in our local market, and throw great parties. We are first and foremost a local brewery selling within roughly a 300 mile radius from the breweries. This gets our trucks there and back in a day, keeps the beer at its freshest and creates minimum carbon footprint. For now, Schlafly Beer is available in Missouri, Nebraska, Kansas, Oklahoma, Illinois, Wisconsin, Michigan, Indiana, Ohio, Kentucky, Tennessee, Virginia, Maryland, Pennsylvania, New York, New Jersey, and Washington DC.

Name: Isle of Barra Distillers Ltd
Description:
The Isle of Barra Distillers is a young family run business and is home to the award-winning Barra Atlantic Gin. Located on the Island of Barra, you'll find Scotland's most westerly distillery. Born from the island, every drop is distilled, bottled and labelled right here on the Isle of Barra.

ISLAND BORN, FEARLESS SPIRIT.

Name: Yealands Wine Group
Description:
Since launching in 2008 the Yealands Wine Group (YWG) has established itself as one of New Zealand's pre-eminent wine exporters.

The company has been recognised globally for its sustainable practices, (Green Company GC-Mark certified, International Green Awards, Drinks Business Green Awards), the quality of its wines, (NZ Wine Producer of the Year, International Wine & Spirit Competition 2014) and its business model processes (American Chamber of Commerce - Exporter of the Year).

Whilst much has been achieved in a short space of time, the group's ambitious approach - best encapsulated by their philosophy 'Think boldly, tread lightly and never say it can't be done', targets strong sustained growth and development of a truly global business.

SUPPLY
-	85% Sauvignon Blanc. Other varietals: Pinot Gris, Riesling, Gewurztraminer, Gruner Veltliner, Viognier,     Chardonnay, Albarino, Pinot Noir, Merlot, Syrah, Tempranillo, Cabernet Franc, Port
-	Over 100 Parcels of Sauvignon Blanc vinified separately
-	Regional Blends through to sub regions, single vineyard and single blocks

Name: Lipman Brothers / R.S. Lipman Company
Description:
About Lipman Brothers
Established in 1939, Lipman Brothers was the first distributor of wine and spirits in Tennessee. With an extensive wholesale portfolio of wine, spirits, beer, bottled water, mixers, Riedel crystal and cigars; Lipman Brothers has proven leadership in the marketplace for more than 80 years. Lipman Brothers’ corporate headquarters is located in Nashville, TN, with additional facilities in East Tennessee. The company services all trade channels including retail, grocery, convenience and bars/restaurants, delivering to 74 of the 96 Tennessee counties, representing over 77% of the state's population. As a family-owned and operated enterprise, Lipman Brothers serves as an educational resource for both trade and consumer markets. Lipman is committed to being the Distributor of Choice to three important constituencies: retailers, suppliers, and consumers.

RSL Holdings is the parent company for Lipman Brothers LLC (distributor), R.S. Lipman Company (supplier) and R.S. Lipman Brewing Company (breweries). With President and CEO Robert S. Lipman at the helm, RSL Holdings operates nationwide as well as internationally.

Name: Intercaves, l'enseigne caviste en franchise de la famille Richard
Description:
Intercaves est un acteur de référence dans l’univers du vin, de la bière, des spiritueux et de l’épicerie fine. Depuis 1978, nous cultivons un modèle unique, fondé sur la passion, l’expertise et la convivialité.

Implantés en périphérie de ville, nos points de vente de 100 à 150 m² avec parking offrent une expérience d’achat chaleureuse et immersive. 

Notre positionnement allie exigence et accessibilité, séduisant une clientèle en quête de qualité, de conseils personnalisés et de moments de plaisir. Ce modèle éprouvé nous permet d’afficher le plus fort panier moyen du secteur.

Intercaves s’adresse aussi bien aux particuliers qu’aux professionnels, avec une attention constante portée à l’accueil, à l’écoute et à la proximité. Dans chaque Intercaves, un caviste engagé accompagne ses clients avec des conseils sur-mesure, dans un esprit d’échange et de confiance.

En 2024, notre concept, entièrement repensé pour renforcer encore l’expérience client, a été récompensé par le label Janus du Commerce, distinction prestigieuse décernée par l’Institut Français du Design.

Notre promesse : rendre accessible l’achat des vins, bières et spiritueux à travers une expérience client unique, des conseils personnalisés et des prestations adaptées aux besoins de chacun.

Intercaves, c’est bien plus qu’un lieu d’achat : c’est un lieu d’échange, de confiance et de plaisir partagé.

Name: J. Wray & Nephew
Description:
J Wray & Nephew UK Ltd. is a distributor and brand builder of premium spirits with experience in the UK market.

Originally founded in 1992 to distribute and market the Appleton range of rums, J. Wray & Nephew UK Ltd. has grown to become a professional and creative independent distributor. We manage sales, marketing and distribution for a growing portfolio of award-winning brands, including liqueurs & whiskies.

London based, the company has a first class marketing department and national sales team which operates successfully in all sectors of the UK's drinks industry. For more information on any of our brands or if you are looking for a new distributor for your premium drinks brand in the UK, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Name: Teremana Tequila
Description: Teremana is a brewery manufacturing company that specializes in producing a wide range of tequila products along with an online store.

Name: Empathy Wines
Description: We want people to pay less for great, authentic wines by delivering them direct to their door, while shining a spotlight on top-tier grape growers, the unsung heroes of the wine world.

Name: MONARQ - Drinks Distribution & Marketing Group
Description: Full-service import, distribution and marketing group of alcoholic beverages in the Americas for Spirits, Beers, RTDs’, Mixers & Wines.

Name: Château Troplong Mondot
Description:
Château Troplong Mondot is a Saint-Emilion first classified growth, elegantly distinguished by the identity of its wine, its eco-responsible management of the vineyard and its way of welcoming visitors to the estate.

Established on the highest point of the appellation, this 43-acre estate benefits from ideal exposure and geological conditions. The unique diversity of its soils is revealed through powerful and elegant, complex, and precise wines. 

Owned since 2017 by the reinsurance company SCOR, Troplong Mondot is managed by Aymeric de Gironde with the ambition of making it one of the best wines in the region.

Name: Rhône Valley Vineyards
Description:
The reputation of the Rhodanian vineyards is solid in terms of red wines; white and rosé wines also deserve to be highlighted.
In the Rhône Valley, large reputable AOCs rub shoulders with real gems that everyone will love to discover, with this characteristic that forges the DNA of our vineyard: the diversity of terroirs, grape varieties and blends. This vineyard, from its northern part to its southern territory offers you a beautiful promise: the taste of hospitality.

Name: Whisky Partners
Description:
£100M+ in assets · £4.6M paid
2,462 exits · 43,933 members strong
Start your journey

Name: Irish Whiskey Association
Description: Working to secure the position of Irish whiskey as one of the world’s leading spirit categories, built on a vibrant and sustainable industry.

Name: Amorim Cork Italia
Description:
Amorim Cork Italia, fondata l’11 novembre 1999 a Conegliano (TV), è la filiale italiana del gruppo portoghese Amorim, leader mondiale nel settore del sughero.
Specializzata in enologia di precisione, sviluppa soluzioni tecniche su misura per ogni tipologia di vino, integrando ricerca scientifica, controlli di qualità avanzati e tecnologie brevettate.
Pioniera in ambito ambientale, Amorim Cork Italia ha pubblicato il primo Report di Sostenibilità del settore (2007) e promosso progetti di economia circolare come ETICO e SUBER, per il riciclo del sughero post-consumo.
 Produzione e HQ: Conegliano (TV)

Name: Stirling Distillery
Description: The smallest whisky distillery in Scotland producing award-winning craft spirits in the historic ‘Old Smiddy’, Stirling’s first legal distillery on the castle rock. Made from locally foraged Stirlingshire nettles, Stirling Gin can be found in Coop supermarkets across Scotland from May 2024.

Name: Vinos L.A. Cetto
Description: Vinos L.A. Cetto desde 1928, la vinícola más importante de México, con 89 años de experiencia adquirida por 3 generaciones y más de 480 premios internacionales que reconocen la gran calidad, tradición y prestigio de nuestros productos.

Name: Duncan Taylor Scotch Whisky Limited
Description:
Duncan Taylor Scotch Whisky Ltd are family owned, luxury whisky merchants. With origins dating back to 1864, the company selects and matures casks from distilleries across Scotland and currently owns one of the world's largest private collections of vintage Scotch whisky.

With a multi award winning brand portfolio, Duncan Taylor Scotch Whisky Ltd harnesses generations of expertise to deliver the finest whisky without compromise.

Duncan Taylor's portfolio includes:

Peerless: Single malt and single grain whiskies aged for a minimum of 40 years. Each unique release is the product of a single cask and is bottled at natural strength, offering incomparable luxury and scarcity to the true connoisseur.

Rare Auld: A range of cask strength single malt and single grain whiskies aged between 17-39 years, offering the most comprehensive overview of Scotland's distilleries.

The Octave: The small cask with the bigger whisky. Each release in the Octave collection has been matured for a secondary period in a traditional 1/8th size Octave cask. Increased wood-to-spirit contact in the Octave gently expands the profile of the spirit without masking it, resulting in a bigger, bolder whisky.

Black Bull: Duncan Taylor's flagship range of deluxe blended whiskies, the multi award winning Black Bull range dates back to 1864 and has acquired a worldwide reputation for its uncompromised quality. The Black Bull brand is currently sold as 12 year old, 40 year old and Special Reserve expressions.

Name: VP Brands International
Description:
VP Brands International  is a leading Bulgarian producer of high quality wines and high-alcoholic drinks. The company develops, produces and establishes world-class products of high quality distillates, developed in conformity with the consumers’ demands and preferences, on the national market.    

VP Brands International  continuously invests in the expansion, renovation and modernization of its production capacity, as a result of which today it possesses the most contemporary production centres in the country. They are located in the heart of Southern Bulgaria – the town of Peshtera, the town of Saedinenie and the village of Katunitsa. 

VP Brands International  is the first company in the sector with modern market policy, based entirely on the innovations in the contemporary marketing and PR. The company implies the best world practices in business management and development; it is also one of the biggest employers and advertisers in Bulgaria.

WHAT MAKES US DIFFERENT

VP Brands International  is a modern and dynamic company, leader in the industry. The mission of the company is to offer to the consumers and its partners alcoholic beverages and wines with guaranteed high quality, produced with the precise control of the whole process – from the addition of the raw materials to the sales launch of the final product. Therefore the company invests constantly in its material and manufacturing equipment, product development, modernization, human resources and capacity.

The managing body of the company believes that the closeness to the consumers and knowing their needs and expectations, the high level of control over the production, the excellent quality and the modern vision of the products are the key to keeping and holding the leading positions on the market.

Name: Lipman Brothers / R.S. Lipman Company
Description:
About Lipman Brothers
Established in 1939, Lipman Brothers was the first distributor of wine and spirits in Tennessee. With an extensive wholesale portfolio of wine, spirits, beer, bottled water, mixers, Riedel crystal and cigars; Lipman Brothers has proven leadership in the marketplace for more than 80 years. Lipman Brothers’ corporate headquarters is located in Nashville, TN, with additional facilities in East Tennessee. The company services all trade channels including retail, grocery, convenience and bars/restaurants, delivering to 74 of the 96 Tennessee counties, representing over 77% of the state's population. As a family-owned and operated enterprise, Lipman Brothers serves as an educational resource for both trade and consumer markets. Lipman is committed to being the Distributor of Choice to three important constituencies: retailers, suppliers, and consumers.

RSL Holdings is the parent company for Lipman Brothers LLC (distributor), R.S. Lipman Company (supplier) and R.S. Lipman Brewing Company (breweries). With President and CEO Robert S. Lipman at the helm, RSL Holdings operates nationwide as well as internationally.

Name: La Collina dei Ciliegi Srl
Description:
La tenuta, nelle colline della Valpantena, si estende per circa 45 ha tra Grezzana e Verona. Un’area di forte fascino, vicina alla città scaligera, ad un’altura compresa fra i 450 e i 750 m.s.l.m. Nell’antico borgo di Erbin sono ospitate le foresterie, la cappella ed i porticati. Una parte del borgo è destinata ad un’attività alberghiera, la Collina dei Ciliegi Country Resort. Accanto al borgo, una stalla edificata negli anni ’70, che ospita circa 100 bovine da latte.
La proprietà è interamente situata nella DOC Valpolicella, sulle colline che si alzano a nord sulla città di Verona.
Dall’attenta selezione delle migliori uve di 12 ha nascono attualmente i prodotti dell’azienda, a cui si aggiungeranno, nei prossimi anni, le uve provenienti da ulteriori 11 ha di vigneti impiantati più recentemente e da altri 23 ettari coltivati nelle zone limitrofe.
Il terreno prevalentemente calcareo, con suolo ricco di minerali, unitamente alle escursioni termiche estive, facilita l’evoluzione degli aromi tipici di questa area, dando ai vini una freschezza e un carattere inconfondibile.

Name: Ackerman
Description:
Leader des vins fins et fines bulles de Loire
Nos Maisons, Châteaux et Domaines incarnent la diversité et l’élégance des vins fins et fines bulles du Val de Loire, une véritable référence pour nos partenaires, clients et consommateurs. Engagés vers une nouvelle viticulture respectueuse de l’environnement et des vignerons, nous avons pour mission de révéler la richesse et le caractère de nos terroirs. Notre savoir-faire ancestral nous inspire depuis 1811 pour faire de nous, le spécialiste des vignobles de Loire.

Name: ICON SPIRITS
Description:
ICON SPIRITS (previously Renaissance Spirits Iberia), is a luxury spirit brands importer and distributor in Spain & Portugal. 
And more than just an importer, ICON SPIRITS is a brand building company with a strong and qualitative Route to Market. We represent brands we beleive in and put all our energy and passion behind them. Our focus is to build 360 innovative and customized sales and marketing plans. 
We cover all distribution channels and have special emphasis in On-Premise. 

We love spirits, we love brands, we love to play!

Brands : G'vine Gin, Nouaison Gin, June Gin Liqueur, No.3 London Dry Gin, La Quintinye Vermouth, Belaire, Bumbu Rum, Chairman’s Rum, Flaming Pig Whisky, Excellia Tequila, La Guilde du Cognac

Name: McWilliam's Wines
Description:
McWilliam’s Wines has been at the centre of Australian family winemaking industry since 1877 and is still privately owned and operated. With a pioneering spirit which has driven innovation and a relentless focus on quality we expect excellence in everything we do and focus on delivering exceptional service to our customers, respecting our communities and working collaboratively with our colleagues.

Operating in key global markets and nationally in Australia we craft, produce and market the multi awarded McWilliam’s and Barwang wine brands.

Name: Mission Hill Family Estate
Description:
Welcome to Mission Hill Family Estate, situated in the heart of British Columbia's breathtaking Okanagan Valley wine country, one of the Pacific Northwest's undiscovered gems.

Making great wines and providing a special place where people can enjoy them has been Anthony von Mandl, Proprietor's, dream and life's work. Now, it's a reality, one that he and his family want to share with everyone who visits.  

Mission Hill Family Estate is much more than simply a place to craft award-winning wines. Located in the heart of British Columbia’s pristine Okanagan Valley, our family-owned winery is a refuge from the hurried pace of daily life. Majestic mountains, scenic lakes, and lush vineyards encase the winery's dramatic architecture and culminate in a setting that celebrates fine wine, cuisine and the arts. Established in 1981 by Proprietor Anthony von Mandl, Mission Hill Family Estate is part of VMF Estates, the von Mandl Family’s collection of prestigious wineries and estate vineyards in the Okanagan Valley.
 
The heart and soul of Mission Hill is our people – a passionate team of professionals committed to providing world-class visitor experiences. With an uncompromising focus on quality, we are proud to be leading and shaping the Canadian Wine Industry in further developing wine, cuisine, and agri-tourism.

Name: Domaine LAFAGE
Description:
Domaine Lafage is located at the heart of Roussillon in the south of France, stretching from the village of Canet by the Mediterranean, up to the foothills of the Pyrenees. 

Following on from six generations of grape growers, Jean-Marc and Éliane both trained as winemakers, and gaining a rich international experience, returned to France to create Domaine Lafage. 
Dynamic and innovative, they and their qualified and motivated team, search every corner of the Roussillon to select and nurture plots in exceptional locations, forever exploring new viticultural techniques and winegrowing ideas.

Name: Kjær & Sommerfeldt
Description:
Passion for vin siden 1875.

Kjær & Sommerfeldt er grundlagt i 1875 af Charles Christian Kjær og Wilhelm Ferdinand Sommerfeldt, siden 1928 med hovedsæde på Gl. Mønt 4. 

 I 2008 blev Kjær & Sommerfeldt igen et privatejet selskab, da Adm. Direktør Mads Stensgaard sammen med 2 eksterne investorer og ledende medarbejdere købte K&S. 

Kjær & Sommerfeldt er en dynamisk og kundeorienteret virksomhed, hvor mere end 130 års erfaring kombineret med høje krav til kvalitet og service har skabt stor tillid hos både leverandører og kunder. Vi er en af landets mest betydningsfulde leverandører til hotel & restaurations-sektoren og erhvervslivet, og vi leverer vin til mere end 1.200 virksomheder og 1.500 hoteller, restauranter og caféer.

Kjær & Sommerfeldt beskæftiger i dag 40 personer, heraf 25 i salg og marketing, som er fordelt på det kommercielle hovedkontor på Gl. Mønt, og i en moderne business support med domicil i Odense. 

Kjær & Sommerfeldt åbnede 22. november 2013 vinværksted og showroom i Århus, og 1. maj 2014 flyttede Business Support til nye og større lokaler i Odense.

Name: Biddenden Vineyards Ltd
Description:
Biddenden Vineyards, Kent’s original commercial vineyard, prides itself on being a family run vineyard with the second and third generation of the Barnes family managing the estate.

Originally home to a 40 acre apple orchard, the Barnes family started to consider diversifying the farm in the late 1960s. After listing to a radio feature on English vineyards being replanted, Mrs. Barnes was inspired to turn to viticulture. In 1969, one third of an acre of vines was planted and Biddenden Vineyards was born.
Today the single estate vineyard spans 23 acres of gentle south facing slopes situated in a sheltered valley, just outside the picturesque Wealden village of Biddenden. 11 different grape varieties are grown here to produce its array of award winning White, Rosé, Red and Sparkling English wines.

The knowledge which the family has built up through experience over the years can be seen in the quality and consistency of the wines produced year on year. Biddenden also produces an array of award-winner ciders and juices.

Crafted using the Barnes’ family recipe, which has been perfected over the last 40 years, all Biddenden’s ciders are made from the juice of carefully selected culinary and dessert apples. This gives its cider a more wine like style than those found in the West Country produced from bittersweet apples.
Biddenden’s much loved, classic, farm-pressed apple and pear juices are naturally full of sweetness and with no added sugar. Working closely with local farmers Biddenden ensures all its apples and pears are sourced right from the Garden of England.

Biddenden Vineyards is open to the public throughout the year, with free admission and tastings. For those just passing, there is a self-guided tour route around the vines for you to take a stroll at your leisure. For a more in-depth experience and to learn more about the history of the vineyard, the wine and the cider making process visitors can pre-book group and private guided tours.

Name: Conseil Interprofessionnel des Vins du Languedoc
Description:
Nous sommes le Conseil Interprofessionnel des Vins du Languedoc (CIVL). 

Notre mission est d'accroître la connaissance et l'intérêt pour les vins du Languedoc pour les publics professionnels et consommateurs. 

Nos activités couvrent un large champ d’action allant de la diffusion d'information certifiée sur l'industrie du vin du Languedoc, l’intelligence économique, la mise en oeuvre des actions de promotion ON et OFF line,  l'organisation de dégustations, la participation à des salons professionnels, des visites presse dans les régions viticoles du Languedoc, des séminaires éducatifs, mais aussi tout ce qui concerne la R&D.

Name: Speakeasy Co.
Description: Speakeasy Co. is a technology company and e-commerce platform for the Wine & Spirits industry. We ship your beverage alcohol brands directly to consumers in 31 US states for spirits and 48 states for wine. We enable your brands to sell directly to consumers from your website without disrupting the three tier system, giving you, the brand the opportunity to own the user experience from beginning to end which allows you to own the data and analytics of your customer.

Name: The Boatyard Distillery
Description:
The Boatyard Distillery was founded in 2016, making it Fermanagh’s first legal distillery in 130 years. Set up as a gin distillery our goal is to be at the forefront of premium Irish gin distillation, whilst giving our team their best possible experience.
The five years since those first bottles were produced has seen Boatyard grow from being a regional product to one of international recognition. We take great pride in seeing Boatyard being used by some of the most awarded bars on the planet, all the time promoting our home in Fermanagh.

Name: McLaren Vale Grape, Wine & Tourism Association
Description:
The McLaren Vale Grape, Wine & Tourism Association (MVGWTA) is the peak representative body for the McLaren Vale Wine Region; having evolved from the McLaren Vale Winemakers Group that started in the region over 56 years ago.

Since McLaren Vale Grape, Wine & Tourism’s inception, brand ‘McLaren Vale’ has achieved world recognition.

MVGWTA provides the major industries of the McLaren Vale region – wine, food and tourism – with a vision for the future in both domestic and international markets. It acts as a broker and representative of those industries and is the driving force behind their development. MVGWTA plays a crucial role in securing the region’s economic and environmental sustainability.

MVGWTA is funded by members, sponsors, industry partners and fundraising activities and is governed by a Board of volunteer directors from within the McLaren Vale grape, wine and tourism fraternity. The team is comprised of a small group of highly experienced professionals, dedicated to the ongoing development of 'Brand McLaren Vale', reinforcing us as one of the world's leading, and most dynamic wine regions.

Name: Pariente Tradición Familiar
Description:
Bodegas José Pariente es una bodega situada en la D.O. Rueda, fundada en el año 1998 por la enóloga Victoria Pariente. 

La historia de nuestra bodega comienza con José Pariente. En la década de 1960, José Pariente inició la producción de vinos blancos artesanales con una materia prima de extraordinaria calidad: la uva verdejo procedente de sus viñedos de Rueda.
José Pariente practicaba una viticultura minuciosa y creía en su tierra, en la calidad y en el placer de hacer vino.  Su anhelo, elaborar grandes vinos blancos, es el objetivo de la bodega actual, que su hija Victoria Pariente fundó en 1998 y a la que dio el nombre de JOSÉ PARIENTE en homenaje a su padre.

La innovación, la pasión por nuestra tierra y el deseo de elaborar grandes vinos han inspirado nuestra actividad desde el primer día. 
Tanto en bodega como en el viñedo, Victoria Pariente mantiene una continua búsqueda de la excelencia. Hoy, Martina e Ignacio Prieto Pariente, llevan las riendas de la bodega con la misma ilusión y valores.


***
Bodegas José Pariente is a family winery located in the Appellation D.O. Rueda, founded in 1998 by winemaker Victoria Pariente. With passion, respect, technology and innovation, we aim to make high quality wines with the grape varieties Verdejo and Sauvignon Blanc. In the winery, as well as in the vineyard, Victoria Pariente maintains the commitment of her father, José Pariente; the search for excellence in her work. Today her children Martina and Ignacio Prieto Pariente, have joined the family business.

Name: WineShop At Home
Description:
This is the official LinkedIn company page for WineShop At Home. 

1-800 WineShop.Com, Inc. DBA WineShop At Home, is a licensed, bonded California winery. 

WineShop At Home is a whole new way to learn about, experience and shop for great wines. Our Independent Wine Consultants throughout the country present in-home Wine Tastings where guests can taste our wines and learn about, experience and buy wines directly from the winery. WineShop At Home epitomizes a whole new generation of direct selling – offering an exceptional consumer experience, as well as an unparalleled and exciting business opportunity.

OUR VISION

At WineShop At Home, our vision is to provide the best wine lifestyle experience in the world. We envision a world where the enjoyment, education and purchasing of wine is a pursuit and pleasure available to everyone. We aspire to be recognized worldwide as the most innovative, fun and accessible in-home Wine Tasting and buying experience in the marketplace, with a wine career opportunity second to none. In addition, we foster the education, responsible enjoyment and healthy consumption of wine and food.

Name: Shortcross Rademon Estate Distillery
Description:
At Rademon Estate Distillery we are proud to be Northern Ireland’s First Award Winning Craft Distillery. Distilling Shortcross Gin and Irish Whiskey.

Our small batch philosophy ensures that every aspect of our gin and whiskey meets our exacting vision.  Everything is crafted and perfected by hand.

Shortcross Gin is a classical Gin with a bold Juniper front, floral meadows, wild berries and grassy notes.  It is highly aromatic with an exceptionally long and smooth finish.
