As a proud independent family distillery we commenced whiskey production in 2015, our first whiskey, Shortcross Whiskey, we hope to release soon. 

Our distillery is now open for distillery tours, with a dedicated visitor centre and distillery shop. 

To Book a distillery tour click the link below. 
https://rademonestatedistilleryshop.com/

Distillery opening hours are 
Monday - Friday 10am - 5pm

Name: DISTILLERIA F.LLI CAFFO S.R.L.
Description: - PRODUZIONE DI LIQUORI, BRANDY, GRAPPA, AROMI.

Name: IOC
Description:
Suivi de vinification, analyse des vins, conseils œnologiques personnalisés, produits œnologiques innovants, procédés originaux et prestations adaptées ... Depuis 1890, IOC accompagne ses clients tout au long de l’élaboration de leurs vins, de la vendange à la mise en bouteille.

Grâce à une équipe composée de + de 50 œnologues, un large réseau de laboratoires (dont 5 certifiés COFRAC) ainsi qu’un laboratoire Contrôle et Développement, IOC est un acteur incontournable dans le domaine œnologique et l'élaboration de vins effervescents & tranquilles. La pluridisciplinarité et la présence internationale des équipes IOC permettent d’apporter une expertise optimale aux vinificateurs du monde entier, et ainsi d’atteindre les différents objectifs qualitatifs et organoleptiques.

Name: Montelvini
Description: A family-run winery led by the Serena’s 5th generation. Ambassador of Asolo Prosecco Superiore DOCG, the Italian rarest and most exclusive Prosecco denomination.

Name: Elixir Distillers
Description: Elixir Distillers is a creator, blender and bottler of fine spirits. We create brands where we believe there is a niche in the market, and seek to combine aesthetically beautiful design with delicious, characterful spirits.

Name: The Cooper Spirits Company
Description:
QUALITY. INTEGRITY. LEGACY.

Cooper Spirits Co., Founded in 2006 by Katie Cooper and the late Robert J. Cooper, a third-generation distiller, is an independent producer of innovative, integrity-driven spirits. 

The company was founded with the introduction of St-Germain, an artisanal French liqueur made from fresh elderflower blossoms, heralded as one of the most influential cocktail components of the last decade by the New York Times. 

Today, Cooper Spirits produces a portfolio of innovative, artisanal products, including 
Slow & Low Rock & Rye and Slow & Low Coffee Old-Fashioned, both straight rye whiskey based bottled and canned cocktails; Lock, Stock & Barrel, one of the world’s finest and oldest expressions of 13 year, 16 year, 18 year, 20 and 21 year straight rye whiskey; and Crème Yvette, a modern aperitif handcrafted in France and called for by name in vintage cocktail books dating back to 1890. 

We are Innovators. We are Brand Builders.
We are makers of rare and fine spirits.

Name: Desert Door Distillery
Description:
Tequila’s smoother, more sustainable cousin. ‘Sotol’ is both the name of our unique spirit and the plant we make it from. Our sotol is wild harvested, not farmed meaning there’s no fertilizers, pesticides or water used (except from mother nature herself). A true ranch-to-glass spirit that tastes unquestionably of the land with no added sugars, artificial flavors or colors. Smooth enough to sip straight or over ice and versatile enough to enjoy in your favorite cocktail. 

Veteran Founded, American Made - Drink Different. Drink Desert Door.

Name: Glencairn Crystal Studio Ltd
Description:
For over four decades, Glencairn Crystal Studio, based in Scotland, has gained an international reputation for fine crystal and glassware. As a family business, Glencairn Crystal Studio is responsible for the design of the famous Glencairn Glass – the official glass for whisky. Follow @GlencairnGlass on Twitter for more.

As a leading manufacturer of bespoke crystal and glass, Glencairn is in a unique position to meet customer demands, from the smallest personal order through to orders of global proportions.

At Glencairn we have built our business on a commitment to personal service and quality workmanship. The company has grown through a truly innovative approach to their market.

From the initial discussion through to the final order, we believe in challenging ourselves to deliver a product that not only reflects the customer’s requirements and expectations – but exceeds them.

Design, packaging, with more than a dash of innovative product development, has ensured that Glencairn Crystal has secured pole position as the largest supplier of crystal to the Scottish Whisky industry, as well as supplying their products to over 60 countries in the global market.

In addition to every Scottish whisky producer, our client list reads like a “who’s who” of international business, many examples of which can be found in this website. However, we are proud that our family business is flexible enough to respond to individual as well as corporate needs.

We are at the forefront of innovation with the company leading the world in the development of premium decanters for some of the most rare and expensive liquid (spirit) ever sold.

Name: Asia Wine Service and Education Centre (AWSEC)
Description:
Established since 1994, AWSEC are Asia's premier provider of wine education providing internationally recognised wine qualifications, wine courses for wine lovers and corporate wine events. We are the only WSET Approved Programme Provider in Hong Kong running all courses and examinations including Level 4 Diploma. We are also the first wine education centre accredited by ISO with 9001:2008 certificate in Hong Kong. 

It is our honour to be the first and only winner of the “WSET Educator of the Year” trophy in Asia and have received 15 WSET global awards in 5 consecutive years, including:

- World’s highest mark WSET Level 4 Diploma graduate
- 3 of the top 5 WSET Level 4 Diploma graduates in the world
- Greater China’s highest mark WSET Level 3 graduate
- Hong Kong & Macau’s highest mark WSET Level 3 graduate
- Hong Kong’s highest achieving WSET Level 3 graduate
- World’s highest achieving WSET Level 2 graduate outside of U.K.

AWSEC is the exclusive programme provider authorised by various prestigious wine organisations around the world to launch and run their official courses in Hong Kong, including:

- WSET Level 4 Diploma
- A+ Australian Wine School Courses
- Barossa Wine School Courses
- French Wine Scholar Qualification (exclusive in Asia, except Singapore)
- Sud de France Master-Level Programme
- Wines of Chile Academy Courses

We also provide the below courses in the region:
- WSET Qualifications Level 1 to 3 (including Sake)
- Bordeaux Wine School Courses
- Bourgogne Wine School Courses
- Sake Sommelier Association Courses
- AWSEC Courses
- Corporate and Private Wine Events
- Wine Tasting & Tutored Tasting Workshops

Name: Escorihuela Gascón
Description:
Fundada en 1884, la bodega destina gran parte de su producción al mercado interno y exporta a varios países del mundo. Ofrece varias líneas de vinos: Miguel Escorihuela Gascón Single Vineyard, DON . Escorihuela Gascón, MEG . Escorihuela Gascón, Pequeñas Producciones . Escorihuela Gascón y Rosaura . Escorihuela Gascón. También las clásicas líneas insignia: Escorihuela Gascón y Escorihuela Gascón . Gran Reserva.

Su histórico edificio en el centro de Godoy Cruz, Mendoza, es un legado en sí mismo incluyendo la inigualable propuesta gastronómica del restaurante “1884 - Francis Mallmann”, con el sello del reconocido chef.

En Cordón El Cepillo, en el departamento de La Consulta, San Carlos, Valle de Uco, la bodega posee 64 hectáreas de viñedos a una altitud de 1200 a 1300 metros sobre el nivel del mar. Esta ubicación garantiza un clima fresco, amplia amplitud térmica y buena insolación, condiciones ideales para obtener uvas de alta calidad. En su finca de Agrelo, Luján de Cuyo, se encuentra una moderna bodega dedicada exclusivamente a la producción de sus etiquetas de alta gama en 150 hectáreas de viñedos.

Name: Susana Balbo
Description:
De espíritu intrépido y emprendedor, Susana Balbo es sinónimo de innovación, excelencia, sostenibilidad y el arte por la elaboración de vinos de alta calidad. Desde principios de los años ochenta, en Cafayate, Salta, cuando creó el primer Torrontés de clase mundial, hasta nuestros días al pie de los Andes, en Mendoza, la visión de Susana Balbo marca un camino que nos posiciona como productores en lo más alto de la cima. Un deseo apasionante que traspasó generaciones. Hoy, convertida en un equipo de casi cien personas, conforman junto a sus hijos, Ana y José, una familia completa. Liderazgo y coherencia sostienen las cuatro líneas: Crios, Susana Balbo Signature, Nosotros y BenMarco. Clásico y moderno, este es un portfolio de vinos sentidos desde la viña.
_._._._._._._._._._._._._._._._._._._._._._._._._

With an intrepid and entrepreneurial spirit, Susana Balbo is synonymous with innovation, excellence, sustainability and the art of creating wines of outstanding quality. Since creating the first world-class Torrontés in the early 1980s in Cafayate, in the Salta province, to the present day at the foot of the Andes in Mendoza, Susana Balbo’s vision has forged a path that has positioned us at the pinnacle of wine producers. That passion has spanned generations and passed to her children Ana and José, along with a nearly hundred-strong team that completes the family. Leadership and a common mission sustain the four lines: Crios, Susana Balbo Signature, Nosotros and BenMarco. Both classic and modern, this wine portfolio is inspired by the vineyard.

Name: Oregon Wine Board
Description:
The Oregon Wine Board is a semi-independent Oregon state agency managing marketing, research and education initiatives that support and advance the Oregon wine and wine grape industry. The Board works on behalf of all Oregon wineries and independent growers throughout the state's diverse winegrowing regions. The Oregon wine grape and wine industry contributes more than $3.3 billion in economic activity to the state economy each year, including more than 17,000 wine-related jobs and $527 million in wages.

All wines come from someplace, but the best wines can only come from an extraordinary place. Oregon is a world-class wine region with 18 approved winegrowing regions and more than 800 wineries producing 100 varieties of grapes. Come visit to see and taste for yourself what the wine writers and restaurateurs are rhapsodizing about. Oregon's vintners are waiting.

When Oregon's wine pioneers looked out across the state's varied landscape they saw what others didn't; a perfect place for wine.

They were right. Today, the suitability of Oregon for great wine is unquestioned. There's a home in Oregon for any wine grape, from Arneis to Zinfandel. If you were a wine grape, you'd want to be planted in Oregon.

If you are a wine lover, you'll want to visit Oregon and seek out our world class wines where ever you are.

Name: Just Enough Wines
Description: A more conscious drinking experience. Pleasure forward, perfectly portioned, consciously canned wine.

Name: Cellier des Demoiselles
Description: Cellier des Demoiselles, une cave au caractère unique. Un héritage centenaire, des vins de partage pour tous les moments, et un engagement vibrant pour le terroir et les générations à venir.

Name: DuMOL Winery
Description:
Founded in 1996, DuMOL was built on a simple conviction: that a very specific place, carefully understood over time, could produce wines of uncommon depth and longevity. We focus our work in a narrow stretch of the western Russian River Valley, near the Sonoma Coast—where uplifted marine Goldridge soils, coastal fog, and the chill of the Pacific Ocean create ideal conditions for Pinot Noir and Chardonnay. Redwood forests thrive here. So do cool-climate vineyards. 

We farm around 100 acres, sustainably and organically, with an internal team that lives with the vineyards year-round. Every block is worked by hand, observed closely, and guided—not forced—through the season. By limiting our geography and our varietals, we gain something far more valuable than scale: intimacy. Over time, we come to understand how fog moves, how soils drain, how each vintage asks something slightly different of us. That knowledge compounds. It shows up in the glass. 

Our winemaking is quiet by design. Gentle, precise, and patient. We aim to reveal what the land gives us, not overwrite it. Each bottle is meant to age, to evolve, and to reward attention—but it’s also meant to be enjoyed now, at a table, with new friends and people you care about. 

“Wine makes daily living easier, less hurried, with fewer tensions and more tolerance.” 

—Benjamin Franklin 

We believe that idea matters more today than ever. In a world optimized for speed and volume, DuMOL stands for slowing down, paying attention, and choosing depth over distraction. Wine, at its best, creates space—for conversation, for connection, for reflection. That’s what we’re really crafting. 

When you buy a bottle of DuMOL, you’re not just buying wine. You’re supporting a way of working that values place, patience, trust, and long-term thinking. You’re choosing something worth keeping—and better shared. 

We’d be honored to be part of your table.

Name: Serena Wines 1881
Description: Serena Wines 1881 è un’azienda familiare da 5 generazioni con una lunga tradizione nella produzione di vino. Situata a Conegliano, nel cuore del territorio DOCG del Prosecco, è fra i primi 10 produttori su un totale di oltre 2.000 aziende. Una storia che dura da 140 anni.

Name: Good Pair Days
Description:
For the all wine lovers who enjoy a great bottle but don't want to get academic about it, Good Pair Days helps them discover exceptional value bottles of wine they wouldn't normally pick for themselves by combining expert curation with personalisation technology to pair them their very own wine journey each month.

Good Pair Days are the ones where you're feelin' yourself. Things are going your way, matching up. Maybe you're sitting in a park with a nice bottle and a light late afternoon breeze. Maybe the couch. Maybe with mates. You've got total comfort and contentment, with top notes of excitement. Pairing you to good wine. Pairing wine to good food. Enriching the good pairs you've paired for yourself. That's what we do.

Name: Octaga Green Power and Sugar Co.Ltd.
Description:
Octaga Green has strategically conceptualized and designed the project of:

•Distillery (40 KLPD) + 1MW Power to produce absolute alcohol/Rs/ENA from sugar cane juice, molasses and gain.
•Bagasse based co-generation Power Plant (16MW).
•Sugar Plant (3000 TCD) in Kolhapur and Belgaum district. 
Our entire company's approach is green. And with diminishing traditional energy sources, Octaga Green will play an instrumental part in renewable energy and it’s futuristic impact, globally. 
  
Furthermore, with renewable energy being the main sustainable source for future power generation, the real impact of this project will only be enhanced over time.  

Our Commitment 
  
1.    Non-conventional energy is our only sustainable future.  
  
2. OCTAGA GREEN POWER & SUGAR ensures a carbon and water neutral footprint in all its projects as its  
  commitment to the Environment. 
    
3. Drawing on its four decades of expertise in the alcohol and sugar industries, OCTAGA produces the  
  highest grade of potable and industrial grade spirits. 
    
4. Best practices and Zero Effluent Technology have enabled OCTAGA to engage local farmers and stakeholders in Kolhapur, the heart of India's sugar belt, with potash rich water harvesting for their own agricultural benefits. 
    
5. Our own Label- OCTAGA GREEN a portfolio of Premium triple-distilled grain alcohol made by the best,  
  for the best.

Name: spiritsEUROPE
Description:
spiritsEUROPE acts as the European representative body for producers of spirit drinks with a membership comprising of 31 national associations representing the industry in 24 countries as well as a group of 10 leading spirits producing companies.

We proudly represents the most valuable European agri-food export sector (€10bn in exports in 2015, representing a trade surplus of over €9bn). Distilled spirits are as diverse as the EU itself, spanning 46 product categories and including a host of geographically-specific products that contribute to the culture of their regions.

spiritsEUROPE’s mission is to encourage the development of an environment in which producers and distributors can meet the expectations of individual customers and society at large, while competing effectively for sustained growth.

Name: AOC Conseils - France
Description:
Depuis 2006, et sa création par Olivier Antoine Gény, AOC Conseils (équipe de 12 consultants formateurs) accompagne les entreprises du monde viticole dans leurs développements en France et à l’international. Premier pôle d’expertise national dédié au monde du vin, AOC Conseils est un réseau dynamique et en pleine expansion. Avec ses bureaux au cœur du vignoble, AOC Conseils couvre toutes les régions viticoles de France. 

AOC Conseils analyse avec ses clients la globalité de l’entreprise viticole. La complémentarité des compétences d’AOC Conseils a permis d’accompagner plus de 350 acteurs (Châteaux, négoces, caves coopératives...) dans l’optimisation de leurs points forts et de transformer leurs faiblesses en atouts. 

La force d’AOC Conseils est de fédérer un ensemble de compétences sectorielles. Les domaines d’expertise couverts sont le management, la gestion financière, la commercialisation et le marketing du vin.

Name: Hedonism Wines
Description: Established in August 2012 & located in the heart of London’s Mayfair, Hedonism is a fine wine & spirits boutique which has already become the most talked about wine project of recent times.

Name: Brasserie La Débauche
Description:
Née d'une passion commune pour les bons produits et ceux qui les consomment, la brasserie artisanale La Débauche est l'aventure d'un couple amateur de bière ayant souhaité partager leur culture de l'une des plus vieilles boissons au monde.
Ouverte en 2013 à Angoulême, notre brasserie compte aujourd’hui environ 200 recettes différentes depuis sa création.

Name: Maison Saint Aix
Description:
At Maison Saint Aix, we craft premium wines that embody the purity of Provence.
Nestled in the heart of this iconic region, our vineyard produces AIX Rosé, celebrated globally for its refined elegance, perfect balance, and vibrant freshness.
Rooted in tradition and driven by innovation, we are committed to sustainable practices that honor the land and create wines that bring people together, transforming simple moments into cherished memories.
From the sun-drenched vineyards of Provence to tables around the world, Maison Saint Aix celebrates the art of living, meaningful connections, and the timeless charm of French winemaking.

Name: Bestheim | Vins & Crémants d'Alsace
Description:
Cave Coopérative labellisée « Vignerons Engagés »

Bestheim est bien plus qu'une simple cave coopérative. Nous représentons l'union de plus de 300 familles de vignerons d’Alsace, toutes unies par une passion commune pour l'art de la viticulture.

En tant que producteurs de vins et crémants d’Alsace, nous sommes les gardiens de la riche tradition et de la culture viticole de notre région. Notre engagement va au-delà de la simple préservation : nous innovons continuellement pour répondre aux défis contemporains, tout en honorant l'héritage de nos ancêtres.

Située à Bennwihr, sur la célèbre Route des Vins d’Alsace et à proximité de Colmar, notre coopérative incarne l'excellence et la diversité des terroirs alsaciens. 

Rejoignez-nous pour découvrir une histoire de passion, de savoir-faire et de dévouement au service du vin.

Name: Last Bottle, Inc.
Description:
Last Bottle Inc. is the parent company of three much-loved wine retail brands: Last Bottle Wines, First Bottle Wines, and Last Bubbles.

Last Bottle Wines is your daily online purveyor of fine wines. As a member of our newsletter, we offer you one hand-picked wine per day until it sells out (often in hours). New day, new email, new wine. Always at incredible prices— we're talkin' 30%-70% off retail. We’re not a wine club, there is no subscription — what you see is what you get!

Name: H.J. Hansen Vin A/S
Description:
H.J.Hansen Wine Ltd. is founded in 1829 and still family owned (Danish family) which is quite unusal in the wine business today. We are regarded as one of the leading wine retailers if not THE leading wine retailer in Denmark when it comes to quality wines. Experience and tradition play a main role in this more than 180 year old success story, although foresight and vision are cast for support. 
Through the years, the key words have remained the same: QUALITY, CHOICE AND SERVICE.
We import wines from all over the world through very close contacts/ relationships with a very well developed producer network with the very best wines from f.ex. France, Italy, Spain, Chile, Argentina, the US, South Africa, Australia and New Zealand.
We supply the hotel, restaurant and catering sector as well as the business-to-business sector and private customers. Private customers are mainly supplied through our own two H.J. Hansen shops in Odense and Copenhagen and through the voluntary shop chain Vinspecialisten where we have more than 50 shops all over Denmark.

Name: Santos e Seixo Wines
Description:
Santos & Seixo was born from the entrepreneurial vision of Pedro Seixo and Alzira Santos who, in 2014, decided to challenge the status quo of the sector and create a wine company with international ambition.

Since then, Santos & Seixo has established itself as a multi-regional benchmark in the Portuguese wine universe. Present in the main wine regions of Portugal — Douro, Tejo, Alentejo and Vinho Verde — we own around 120 hectares of vineyards across our estates: Quinta do Outeiro and Quinta de Cevêr (Douro) and Encosta do Sobral (Tejo). We offer a comprehensive portfolio of brands and an integrated operation that combines agility with scale.

Portfolio:
• Encosta do Sobral
• Duas Famílias
• Santos da Casa
• Perspectiva
• Cevêr
• Pena Vermelha
• Rotas de Portugal

Mission: To create wines of recognised excellence that express the authenticity and diversity of Portugal to the world.

Vision: To affirm Santos & Seixo as a national benchmark producer — with a portfolio of wines designed for different consumer profiles and occasions, with a distinctive identity and international ambition that values its origin and projects Portuguese wine with authenticity.

Differentiation Factors:
a) Multi-regional approach with clear criteria and vision — each vineyard is selected for its unique character.
b) Strategic and market-oriented portfolio.
c) Solid scale, flexible and agile structure; bottling capacity of up to 3 million bottles per year.
d) International presence supported by a strong domestic market base — exporting to more than 25 markets, with strategic focus on Brazil and Poland.
e) A culture of consistency, proximity and responsibility.

Certifications & Sustainability: Santos & Seixo has obtained the National Sustainability Certification Standard for the Wine Sector — IVV | ViniPortugal. All vineyards operate under integrated production; we implement soil and water conservation practices and around 90% of the bottles used are lightweight bottles.

Name: Varela Hermanos.
Description:
La historia de Varela Hermanos S. A., se remonta a 1908 cuando Don José Varela Blanco, un joven emigrante español, funda en Pesé el Ingenio San Isidro, primer ingenio azucarero en la recién formada República de Panamá.

El pueblo de Pesé, establecido a mediados del siglo XVIII, se encuentra en un fértil valle en el centro de Panamá, donde la principal actividad de su población de cerca de 10,000 habitantes es el cultivo de la caña.

En 1936, accediendo a los deseos de sus 3 hijos mayores, José Manuel, Plinio y Julio, Don José inicia la destilación del jugo de caña para la elaboración de licores, y se distingue desde el principio por productos de extraordinaria calidad.

Desde entonces, Varela Hermanos S. A. ha mantenido el liderazgo en la industria de licores de Panamá, y hoy día produce aproximadamente un millón de cajas anuales, que representa el 90% del mercado nacional de licores. En la empresa laboran 700 trabajadores permanentes, con funciones que van desde el corte de la caña hasta la promoción y venta de los productos terminados.

Hoy, casi un siglo después de que Don José iniciara operaciones en Pesé, una tercera generación y siguiendo la misma tradición familiar, dirige Varela Hermanos S. A., la principal industria licorera de Panamá. Con una sólida infraestructura de producción, y la pasión y dedicación de todo el personal que trabaja en la empresa, nos preparamos para una mayor presencia en el mercado internacional como exportadores de finos licores y rones.

Name: UNION CHAMPAGNE - CHAMPAGNE DE SAINT-GALL
Description:
The richness of interactions among men is the foundation of the values of UNION CHAMPAGNE, a union created in 1966 of 14 Champagne winegrowing cooperatives. For 50 years, they have been united by passion, the sense of
sharing and guardianship of a true treasure that they are as committed to preserving as revealing. Under the brand DE SAINT-GALL, the cuvées reveal themselves thanks to the altruism of these “makers of bubbles” who work each day to magnify the most beautiful terroirs of Champagne.
Day after day, more than 2,000 growers work hand in hand, driven by a common goal: aiming for excellence. Cellar masters, oenologues, all of the different talents of this union complement each another and are reflected in CHAMPAGNE DE SAINT-GALL: diversity at the service of rarity.

Name: Brown Brothers Milawa Vineyard
Description:
Brown Brothers, a family-owned winery established in 1889, is one of Australia’s most loved and trusted wine brands. Adventure is in the DNA of the company – the pioneering spirit of the family, the history of innovation, the forward looking approach to winemaking and the passion of the people who work with us. 

With premium wines from Victoria, Tasmania and most recently the Yarra Valley, the Brown Brothers family of wines has grown to five brands – Brown Brothers, Devil’s Corner, Pirie, Tamar Ridge and Innocent Bystander. We have market-leading wines in multiple segments and varietals, and the business continues to expand rapidly - today our wines are sold in 23 countries worldwide.  

With our head office located at the winery site in Milawa Victoria, and staff based at vineyards and state offices throughout Australia, Brown Brothers employs a total of 240 permanent employees across functions including Winemaking, Viticulture, Cellar Door, Sales and Marketing, Supply Chain and Administration.

Our Cellar Door at Milawa is the ideal place to explore Brown Brothers wines, where our knowledgeable and friendly staff can guide visitors through the entire Brown Brothers range.

For more information visit www.brownbrothers.com.au

Name: Mestrezat Grands Crus
Description:
For more than 200 years working in the intimate atmosphere of Bordeaux fine wines, Mestrezat has been acknowledged as a reference among negociants.

Mestrezat has developed genuine expertise in trading Grands Crus by establishing close ties with Bordeaux’s top-end châteaux, making them one of the main recipients of en primeur allocations from the Place de Bordeaux.

Name: Kimov Winery
Description: Kimov Winery is a Macedonian owned and operated family business. We have a clear vision and are committed to producing World-class Estate wines from Macedonia’s finest wine region (Tikves Wine Region).

Name: Caves de Rauzan
Description:
* Caves de Rauzan is a  cooperative winery located 40 km from Bordeaux & 15 km from Saint Emilion
* 3600 ha of vineyard with 340 winegrowers 
* We produce 200 000 hl of AOC wines per year, it represents 10% of Bordeaux appellation.
* Appellations : Bordeaux all colours, Bordeaux Supérieur, Crémant de Bordeaux, Entre-deux-Mers
* Strong ethical & sustainable commitment
* Large offer of Sustainable winegrowing / Vegan / organic wines
.

Name: Hensol Castle Distillery
Description: South Wales' first full scale gin distillery, visitor experience, gin school and bottling plant.

Name: SOVEX GRANDSCHÂTEAUX
Description:
Founded in 1982, Sovex Grands Châteaux is a wine merchant that has established itself for 35 years on the national and international market by promoting its wines to professionals.

Specialist in grands crus, we are involved with passion and precision: vigorous selection, assiduous accompaniment, regular wine tastings, active marketing for a common goal: shared success. 
Our wines are bought directly from the castles and wineries and are stored in our 15,000m2 cellars. Our stock of 65 million euros allows us to optimize our offer and our reactivity.

In the image of the great wines of Bordeaux, which have travelled all over the world since the 18th century, Sovex Grands Châteaux has made international wines its raison d'être: today, we are present in more than 55 countries.

Name: North South Wines Ltd | B Corp
Description:
North South Wines is a dynamic, young-at-heart, and forward-thinking wine distributor. We set out in 2014 with a clear goal: to 'do things differently' by championing better business practices within the UK wine trade.

We source and supply wines that deliver exceptional quality and value to customers across the on-trade and off-trade. 

As a company part-owned by three prestigious wine businesses, we operate with a modern, streamlined edge, enabling us to provide superior service and value. This is further supplemented by our strong partnerships with over 40 top wineries globally.

Our mission is rooted in positive impact. In 2023, we became the first UK wine distributor to achieve B Corp certification. This drives our focus on:

Exceptional Customer Service and building strong partner relationships.
Investing in Workplace Well-being.
Actively Minimising our Environmental Impact.
Ethical Sourcing, prioritising family-owned, organic, ethical, and sustainable wineries wherever possible.

Our dedication to better business practices has led to industry recognition, including:

'Distribution Company of the Year 2023' (The Drinks Business)
'Medium Agent of the Year' (IWC Awards 2025)

Name: DRINKS | Silverbogen AG
Description: In 2010, the distribution and Brand building company Silverbogen AG was founded, whose portfolio today includes numerous brands, including high-calibre brands such as Gin Mare, Centenario and De Kuyper. While the Swiss spirits market largely takes place offline and is characterised by tradition, the company relied on digititalization and launched in 2014 the online platform DRINKS.CH a new distribution channel that was unique in the market at the time. Today DRINKS.CH distributes over 5'000 different articles and grew to the largest online shop for alcoholic beverages in Switzerland and supplies private individuals as well as numerous HoReCa accounts and specialist dealer. At the beginning of 2019 Silverbogen launched with DRINKS.DE the counterpart for Germany.

Name: VINTUS
Description:
In April 2004, Michael Quinttus founded VINTUS based on his desire to develop a focused portfolio of exceptional, family-owned, estate-based producers of hand-crafted wines.  One of wine’s most thrilling dimensions is the seemingly endless range of aroma, flavor and texture profiles it offers, depending on vineyard sites, grapes used, climate and vinification.  As wine consumers and professionals become more experienced with wine, they relish this diversity and savor new flavor and style experiences.

In this context, it is the goal of VINTUS to assemble a diverse, international range of "wines of place" produced by passionate personalities driven to extract the maximum expression from their estates. Our producers are intensely attuned to their environments, emphasizing biodynamic, organic or sustainable viticulture and winemaking. 

VINTUS is not just the embodiment of its remarkable estates. It is also a team of young, dynamic and highly motivated professionals in sales, marketing and operations who share the VINTUS vision and its standards of excellence and service.

Our work, with our partners, is to match the passion and rigor of our producers with the sophistication and determination necessary to make an impact in the fine wine industry.

Name: Muscadet Vins de Nantes
Description: La Fédération des Vins de Nantes représente les AOC de Nantes, Muscadet, Gros Plant du Pays Nantais et Coteaux d'Ancenis,  vins d'appellation produits par plus de 400 vignerons de Nantes.

Name: Enoport Wines
Description:
Enoport Wines is one of the leading Portuguese producers, offering wines of several regions, awarded in national and international competitions.

The Group owns 10 single estates spread through the several Portuguese regions with more than 500 ha of land and 4 vinification centers.

Besides its presence in the domestic market, the Group is currently present in 42 countries having shown a strong growth in foreign markets during the last decade, namely in countries such as the USA, Canada, Brazil, Angola, Germany, United Kingdom, France and China. World Wine - Comércio de Bebidas is the company in the Group responsible for the expansion of its brands in the world. 

Following its internationalization process, the Group has adopted a strategy of creating local distribution companies: Enoang – Comércio de Bebidas - Angola, Prime Wines Shangai Corporation - mainland China and Exclusive Selection Trading - Southern China and the Asian continent. 

The Group Enoport United Wines aims to achieve the highest quality levels. Its production factory, Enoport - Produção de Bebidas, ruled by HACCP method is certified by NP EN ISO 9001: 2015 and by BRC GLOBAL STANDARD (Bristish Retail Consortium) at its maximum level.

Enoport United Wines has been recognized by the exceptional quality of its wines. In 2013, Enoport wines have won 140 medals. Every year, several wines in  national and international competitions are awarded   

Other awards of recognized merit are those attributed to the group Enoport United Wines that have been distinguished as:

•	“EUROPEAN PRODUCER OF THE YEAR”, by the German competition, Mundusvini in 2012
•	“BEST PORTUGUESE PRODUCER OF STILL WINES”, by the German competition Berliner Wine Trophy in 2011, 2012 e 2013
•	“AWARD FOR EXCELLENCE” by the Tejo Wine Region in 2011 e 2013

Name: ENOSENS
Description:
Quatre laboratoires et l'URAB se regroupent sous la marque Enosens.

Acteur historique depuis plus de 70 ans dans le Bordelais et le Bergeracois, Enosens est implanté à Cadillac, Coutras, Grézillac et Saint-Savin.

Les laboratoires sont accrédités par le COFRAC depuis 25 ans selon la norme ISO 17 025 pour la réalisation d’analyses officielles, expertises, concours, exportations et organismes de contrôle. L'URAB est agrée pour l’activité de conseil indépendant des produits phytopharmaceutiques.

Véritable précurseur dans le conseil, l’assistance technique, l’analyse fine, l’accompagnement et la formation auprès des viticulteurs en France et à l’international, Enosens répond à toutes les problématiques de ses clients, coopératives, caves particulières, viticulteurs, négoces, courtiers.

La proximité et la forte présence sur le terrain de plus de quarante collaborateurs et collaboratrices facilitent les échanges entre tous les professionnels de la filière. Enosens fédère aujourd’hui plus de 2000 adhérents et coopère avec les meilleurs acteurs de la filière : ISVV, IFV, CA, CIVB…

Enosens, le sens de l'expertise viti-vinicole.

 contact@enosens.fr

Name: Seppeltsfield
Description:
Seppeltsfield was established in the Barossa Valley by Joseph and Johanna Seppelt just 15 years after the European settlement of South Australia. Steeped in rich Barossan heritage, the estate is considered a true national treasure which helped shape the history of the Australian wine industry.

In 1850, Joseph Seppelt, an emigrant of Silesia, purchased 158 acres of land in the Hundred of Nuriootpa from Hermann Kook, farmer of Tanunda, at £1 an acre. Designating it ‘Seppeltsfield’, Joseph’s original intention was to farm tobacco, with later Seppelt generations concentrating the estate’s efforts on grape growing and winemaking.

Seppeltsfield flourished into the 20th century, as part of the Seppelt family’s expanding interests in the liquor industry. Along with wine, the Seppelt stable included spirits such as Brandy, Gin and Vermouth, as well as an assortment of cordials, vinegars and essences.

Regarded as one of Australia’s most successful wine dynasties, the Seppelt family maintained ownership of their wine interests, including Seppeltsfield, until 1985. B Seppelt & Sons went on to evolve into a period of corporate ownership which extended nearly three decades.

The estate returned to private ownership in 2007, led by current proprietor Warren Randall.

Seppeltsfield is most famed for the Centennial Collection - an irreplaceable and unbroken lineage of Tawny, every vintage from 1878 to current year. The estate remains the only winery in the world to release a 100 year old, single vintage wine each year. 

More recently, the recommissioning of the 1888 Gravity Cellar has revitalised the estate’s prowess with still wines. Super premium Barossa red varietals are once again passed through the Gravity Cellar

Seppeltsfield is a marriage of Barossan history, community and fine winemaking endeavour. A new golden era now sees contemporary art and design, beauty and gastronomic excellence contribute to an exciting renaissance of Australia’s iconic wine estate.

Name: T. Edward Wines & Spirits
Description:
T. Edward is a New York based importer and national distributor of fine wines and spirits.

We're driven by a simple yet powerful idea: to bring authentic, sustainably crafted wines and spirits from family-owned endeavors around the world to your table. 

We're not just importing; we’re fostering a community of quality, diversity, and integrity, reshaping the industry through innovation and purpose-driven practices.

At T. Edward, we celebrate a rich tapestry of culture, intertwining the timeless traditions of renowned wine and spirit regions from around the world. 

Join us on our journey as we champion small iconic producers where every individual is valued, respected, and empowered.

Name: Château Cazebonne, vins en biodynamie
Description:
Le Château Cazebonne est un domaine de 45 hectares (dont 38 hectares en production), dans les Graves, sur la commune de Saint-Pierre de Mons.

Le domaine est conduit dans une démarche respectueuse des terroirs et de la biodiversité : pas de traitements, pas de désherbage chimique. Notre démarche agronomique consiste à rétablir un écosystème riche permettant à la vigne de tirer le meilleur de son terroir.

Au niveau des vinifications, nous utilisons également intrants, et utilisant du soufre volcanique naturel, pour proposer des vins avec un minimum de soufre, bien en dessous des doses permises pour les vins bios.

Nous plantons par ailleurs, sur le domaine, une vingtaine de cépages qui ont fait l’histoire des vins de Bordeaux, mais qui ne sont aujourd’hui plus autorisés (pour la plupart) dans les décrets de l’appellation : Mancin, Saint-Macaire, Castets, Bouchalès, Enrageat, Penouille, Carménère, Blanc Auba, Sauvignonasse...

Name: Djin Spirits
Description:
DJIN SPIRITS a été créée en 2019 par Romuald Vincent. Il s’agissait initialement de répondre à une demande croissante de la part des professionnels du bar et des consommateurs français pour un « spiritueux sans alcool » de qualité supérieure capables de satisfaire les exigences les plus élevées.

La fabrication s’appuie sur une technique innovante d’extraction aromatique développée artisanalement par le Maître-Liquoriste dans son atelier. La production se déroule toujours dans la maison de famille de Saint-Brice, petite commune du Cognaçais située en bordure de la Charente.

Les esprits qui sortent de nos alambics possèdent un goût unique et toutes les qualités organoleptiques des plus grands spiritueux sans aucun des effets imputés à l’alcool. Bio, vegan, sans sucre et sans gluten, ils se consomment purs sur glace ou en cocktails.

Name: Quinta de Pancas
Description: Quinta de Pancas was established in 1495. It is located next to the village of Pancas (Alenquer) 45 kilometers northwest of Lisbon. The lands of Alenquer extend between the Serra de Montejunto and the flatlands of the right bank of the Tagus river. With a total area of 73 hectares, Quinta de Pancas has 50 hectares of vineyards located 35 kilometers east of the Atlantic Ocean. The vines are planted on a landscape of mountains, hills and valleys protected by Serra de Montejunto. From this unique terroir we produce intense, complex and elegant wines. Quinta de Pancas was pioneer in the plantation of French grape varieties in Portugal, proud producers of fine Cabernet Sauvignon and Chardonnay wines.

Name: Mondodelvino
Description:
La storia del gruppo Mondodelvino comincia nel 1991 con la fondazione di MGM, a cui negli anni si sono unite le tenute Barone Montalto in Sicilia, Poderi dal Nespoli in Romagna, Ricossa e Cuvage in Piemonte. 
La visione del gruppo unisce tradizione e storicità con innovazione e ricerca, identità e cultura con gusto e passione, fedeltà alle radici e sguardo verso il futuro.
Nel 2021 Mediobanca ha confermato per il sesto anno consecutivo la posizione del gruppo tra le prime 10 aziende vinicole private Italiane in base al fatturato.

Name: Maison Colin Seguin
Description:
Fondée en 2005 par Pierre Colin, vigneron à la forte fibre sociale, Maison Colin Seguin est un Groupe employant aujourd’hui 140 salariés, principalement en région Bourgogne-Franche-Comté.

Grâce au dynamisme de Domaines & Villages, son enseigne commerciale, le Groupe, qui a diversifié ses activités, est devenu leader de la commande groupée de vins et de bières en vente directe, et connaît actuellement une expansion soutenue. 

En phase avec la volonté de ses collaborateurs, le Groupe s’est par ailleurs doté au printemps 2021 d’un outil pour accompagner et soutenir les associations porteuses de projets à fort impact social, local et environnemental, la Fondation Maison Colin Seguin, qui incarne à l’externe les valeurs à l’œuvre au sein du groupe. 

En phase avec son époque, marquée par une quête de sens au travail et l’affirmation d’une éthique environnementale, le Groupe Maison Colin Seguin s’emploie actuellement à bâtir pour les futures générations un modèle de gouvernance d’entreprise social et responsable dans lequel ces dernières pourront non seulement prendre place mais aussi donner toute leur mesure.

Name: Breckenridge Distillery
Description:
Breckenridge Distillery, among the largest independent-craft producer and marketers of whiskey in the United States. Awarded Colorado Whiskey Distillery of the year in 2013, 2015, 2019 and the Whiskey's of the World, ICON's of Whiskey 2018, 2020 - 2022.

Founded in 2008 by Bryan Nolt, the distillery is in the ski town of Breckenridge, CO. 

Our products are distributed throughout the United States and four continents.

Let us be your mountain spirit.

Name: Veuve Ambal
Description: Veuve Ambal est une Maison de vins familiale, plus que centenaire, installée depuis sa création au cœur de la Bourgogne.

Name: Descorchados
Description:
Descorchados was published for the first time in Chile in 1999. That was back when the Chilean wine scene had just begun to awaken through new grapes, new areas and new interpretations, so Descorchados was fortunate to appear at that time and portray that energy. We tasted some 600 wines that year, all Chilean. Today, we have expanded to cover the wines of Argentina, Brazil and Uruguay, the four key countries in the production of wines in South America.
Our Philosophy
First, I should say that we feel that objectivity does not exist in the world of wine (or in many other worlds as well), and apart from the technical aspects of quality related to a well-executed technique, everything else is subject to discussion, which in simple terms means that what I like, as the author of the Descorchados, does not have to please you. In this guide we do not offer averages—the opinion of many palates that would supposedly give us the truth about a bottle, the verdict of the average. No. We don’t believe in that. What you’ll find here is the opinion of one person, with all of the subjectivity that that implies. It’s not the truth; it’s just a vision.

Our System
There are two parts to the Descorchados tasting process. First, we meet with most of the producers in Argentina, Brazil, Chile, and Uruguay and taste the wines with them, something like an interview. Because time constraints make it impossible to interview or visit them all, sometimes we ask for samples. These tastings aren’t blind and allow us to enrich the tasting notes of the wines that truly stand out. We like the idea of going beyond a merely gustatory description to tell you about where a wine comes from, how it was produced, and a bit about its history. But while this part is amazing and entertaining, in the second stage we put all the top-scoring wines together and taste them again—blind this time—without the presence of the producer and with very little information about the samples—usually just the origin and the

Name: LA PASSION DES TERROIRS
Description:
La Passion des Terroirs is one of the 15 main "maison de négoce" -wine merchant- in Bordeaux, and benefits from a presence in all appellations in the Bordeaux region. Its head office is located on the La Winery site in Arsac, near to Margaux.
La Passion des terroirs markets the wines of the whole Lurton family (first and second wines) with exclusive distribution agreements for certain wines, Grands Crus Classé, as well as his own creations for the market.

Name: Tryon Distributing Co
Description: Tryon Distributing is a family-owned fine wine and craft beer wholesale distributor headquartered in Charlotte, NC.

Name: Beveland Distillers
Description:
It is the small details that make the difference, details that make us different, make us unique.

Beveland Distillers, with an extensive experience, has a wide range of products. Focusing its efforts on a selection of its most premium products, products that have been carefully looked after down to the last detail  to achieve excellent results, even for the most demanding palates.
 
Here you will be updated about all of that, premium products selected for their exquisite mix of exoticism, innovation, tradition and art, qualities that define our most exclusive products, making them unique.

Discover the secrets of  Beveland’s most premium liqueurs and distillations.
Location: Begudà - Sant Joan les Fonts, Girona

Name: Kosta Browne Winery
Description: Kosta Browne is a highly allocated winery located in Sebastopol, Sonoma County, California.  The winery produces appellation Pinot Noirs and Chardonnay as well as single vineyard Pinot Noirs sourced from coveted vineyards across three appellations in California: Sonoma Coast, Russian River Valley and Santa Lucia Highlands.  Kosta Browne’s wines can be acquired primarily through the winery’s mailing list, in addition to select restaurants throughout the United States and abroad.  Kosta Browne Winery is not open to the public; however, appointments can be made by active members of the list.  There is currently a two-to-three-year waiting list for the appellation wines and a three-to-five-year waiting list for the single vineyard wines.  For more information, visit www.kostabrowne.com.

Name: The Conker Distillery
Description:
We’ve reinvented Coffee Liqueur for people who love great coffee, but never at the cost of our environment and the farmers that produce it.

Conker Coffee Liqueur is a bold, smooth and not-so-sweet premium Coffee Liqueur bringing the joys of ethical craft coffee from the coffee cup to the cocktail glass. 

We stand by truthful craftsmanship and the best possible ethical ingredients to distil the excitement and integrity of small batch spirits into the glass.

Established in 2014 as Dorset’s first gin distillery, authenticity is our lifeblood. 
We take risks, have fun and innovate in the restless pursuit of exciting new ground.

Roast for the Toast!

Name: Società agricola I SABBIONI
Description:
I Sabbioni è parte del Gruppo Dino Zoli, azienda Made in Italy che fonda le proprie radici e i propri successi in Romagna, i nostri sono territori unici e affascinanti dove convivono storie magiche e antichi saperi. Da questa ricchezza antica nascono l’entusiasmo e la passione con cui svolgiamo il nostro lavoro e curiamo la qualità dei nostri prodotti.
In Italia, in quella regione patria dell’ospitalità e della tavola che è l’Emilia Romagna, colline dal profilo dolce e dalla terra gialla e sabbiosa caratterizzano un territorio originario e originale. Attorno alla torre di Oriolo si colloca un luogo esclusivo, in cui il Sangiovese è unico, perché elegante, sapido e ricco di beva; l'olio d'oliva tra mare e terra come succede in Romagna, è nelle nostre radici e nel nostro quotidiano, testimone prezioso di quello che siamo e di quello che possiamo portare nel mondo.
•
“I Sabbioni” is part of the Dino Zoli Group, a Made in Italy company whose roots and success are firmly set in Romagna, a unique and fascinating territory. From the richness of this land comes the enthusiasm and passion with which the Dino Zoli Group carries out its work and fosters the quality of its products.
Our territories are unique and fascinating, where magic fables and ancient wisdom coexist. This wealth of traditions engenders the enthusiasm and passion with which we do our work and ensure the quality of our products. 
In Italy, in the region of Emilia-Romagna that is home to hospitality and good food, there lies an authentic and original territory set among gently rolling hills with sandy, yellow soil.
The exclusive territory surrounding the Oriolo Tower produces a Sangiovese that is unique for its elegance, sapidity and richness in the mouth, the olive oil, sublimely balanced between land and sea like Romagna itself, is an essential part of our roots and our daily life, bearing witness to what we are and what we can bring to the world.

Name: Distilleuses.
Description:
Bienvenue chez Distilleuses, l'association audacieuse et féminine dédiée aux #spiritueux ! Fondée en 2020 par trois femmes passionnées, Distilleuses s'engage à briser les clichés et à révéler l'héritage riche des femmes dans le monde des spiritueux.

Découvrez avec nous l'histoire fascinante des femmes qui ont marqué l'univers des spiritueux à travers des portraits captivants. Chez Distilleuses, nous sommes bien plus qu'une simple communauté – nous sommes une célébration de la diversité, de la créativité et du savoir-faire féminin dans le domaine des alcools fins.

Que cachent les Distilleuses ? 
 Une expérience unique mêlant découvertes, dégustations, et histoires envoûtantes de spiritueux. 
 Explorez avec nous des recettes originales, découvrez les meilleures adresses pour savourer ces délices.
 Plongez dans l'univers fascinant des femmes qui laissent leur empreinte dans le secteur à travers nos séries de portraits.

Rejoignez la première communauté féminine & francophone dédiée aux spiritueux en vous inscrivant à notre newsletter !  

#Distilleuses #FemmesEtSpiritueux #CommunautéDesEspritsCurieux

@ : distilleuse@gmail.com

Name: Bodega Andrés Iniesta
Description:
Descubre el esfuerzo de una familia por llevar a cabo un proyecto de la tierra, de pura tradición y dedicación. Algo que nos une a nuestros orígenes a través del gusto por los buenos vinos. Lo tradicional y lo moderno se unen en la elaboración de unos caldos que suponen una auténtica experiencia para todos los paladares, incluso aquellos más exigentes! 

Una historia llena de ilusión y de cariño hacia aquello que hacemos. Conoce Bodega Iniesta, conoce a la familia Iniesta Luján.

Name: United Wineries
Description:
We are one of the leading independent international groups in today’s fast-developing global wine industry.

As a specialist wine group, our main focus is not in owning hard assets, but building up global brands with international distribution in the premium wine market.

Unlike most wine importers, local distributors and exclusive agents, we own all the wine brands marketed by us in over 57 countries worldwide. 

Our portfolio has 100+ products coming from different wineries located in famous appellations such as DOCa Rioja, DO Cava, DO Ribera Del Duero, DO Catalunya and DO Rueda.

Name: Happy Head Brewery Private Limited
Description:
At HAPPYHEAD, our sole purpose is to make you feel good, make you feel happy. That's all. Too much going on all over the place, too much clutter, too much noise.  Once in a while, you need to lean back and chill. Watch the monkeys swing by, birds fly and wild life rampage through stuff. All we care about is that when you sip our beer, you feel the passion we've put in brewing a world class beer.  And, it should blow your head, as it did ours!

COOLHEAD
The Better Beer
TAKE IT EASY. TAKE IT SLOW.
Big brother's Coolhead is a Belgian-style wheat ale brewed to achieve the perfect  balance of taste, carbonation and color. Gently crafted from select malts, hops, and a whiff of spice, Coolhead is the perfect 'anytime-beer'. 
Big brother isn't kidding around; much like his golf. Take a sip. Take it easy. Take it slow.  Let it do its magic.

LIGHTHEAD
LOSE CALORIES, NOT TASTE!
Little brother's Lighthead is a Hefeweizen brewed with great passion to hold on to the taste while chipping away on those pesky calories.
Lighthead retains the magical trio of full wheat favor taste, carbonation and color; but reduces the alcohol content (a tad bit) along with around 40%  calories. 



Pouring at:
 Delhi- The Beer Cafe (All Delhi Outlets), Delhi Golf Club (Dr. Zakir Hussain Road), Delhi Gymkhana Club (Safdarjung Road), Delhi Club House (RK Puram), The Irish House (IGI Airport), Friends Club (Friends Colony), Roshanara Club (Shakti Nagar), Junkyard Cafe (Saket), The Suryaa (New Friends Colony), Press Club of India (Raisina Road), The Flying Saucer Cafe (Nehru Place), Lord of the Drinks ( CP & Nehru Place), Teddy Boy (CP), Open House Cafe (CP) and Warehouse Cafe (CP).

 Mumbai- The Beer Cafe (All Mumbai Outlets).

 Pune- The Beer Cafe (All Pune Outlets).

Name: LangeTwins Family Winery and Vineyards
Description:
LangeTwins is a family-owned and  farm-first winery in the Lodi and Clarksburg appellations of California, committed to cultivating a lasting impact.

Behind a glass of our wine is a legacy of responsible land stewardship and forward-thinking sustainable winegrowing practices ensuring the unique estate vineyard blocks we’ve farmed for generations are preserved for the future. 

For more information, visit us at www.langetwins.com

Name: Theis Vine
Description:
Hos Theis Vine arbejder vi med vin, fordi vi ikke kan lade være. Vi er 20 engagerede medarbejdere, der hver dag går på arbejde, fordi vi tror på, at vi med vores passion for vin kan give kunderne en unik oplevelse. Derfor arbejder vi også hele tiden med vores sortiment, der både rummer det klassiske og det moderne.

Bourgogne er en uhyre vigtig del af Theis Vines dna. Vi forhandler vine fra nogle af de vigtigste - ikke nødvendigvis største - domainer og har cementeret vores position som vinfirma med et stort udvalg af ganske enestående agenturer. Mængderne er ofte små, men vinoplevelserne kæmpestore. Både blandt de hvide og de røde finder du perler, der bekræfter, at ingen vinområder i verden kan frembringe så feminine, fløjlsbløde og forførende vine som Bourgogne.

Vi har en holdning til den vin, vi har på hylderne, hvad enten det er krydret og kraftig Ribera del Duero, elegant Champagne eller moden Bourgogne. Derfor prøver vi også at beskrive alle vores vine bedst muligt på theis-vine.dk, ligesom den personlige betjening i vores butikker betyder meget for os.

Theis Vine har et nært forhold til landets bedste restauranter, som helt oplagt ønsker at matche deres sublime gastronomi med verdens bedste vine. Vi rådgiver om sammensætning af mad og vin og hjælper gerne med at opbygge restauranternes vinkort. Det kan vi, fordi personalet har mange års erfaring i vin- og restaurationsbranchen - og fordi vi selv oplever en glæde i at få vin og mad til at gå op i en højere enhed.

Også erhvervsvirksomheder servicerer vi - både med udvikling af gaveløsninger, opbygning af virksomhedsvinkældre og levering af vin til firmaernes kantiner. Vi gør meget ud af at udbrede vores passion for vin til andre og afholder derfor løbende vinsmagninger og foredrag for firmaer og personaleforeninger.

Name: Østjysk Vinforsyning | B Corp
Description:
Østjysk Vinforsyning blev stiftet i 1976. Lige fra den første dag byggede vores idé på at bibringe vininteresserede danskere en række helt unikke oplevelser. Kvaliteten har altid været i højsædet. Lige fra den spæde start i en garage på landet, til nu i det moderne domicil på Fanøvej i Hinnerup. I 2009 åbnede vi et stort vincenter i Krystalgade i hjertet af København.

Østjysk Vinforsyning arbejder i dag målrettet med kvalitetsvine og spiritus. Vi sætter overliggeren meget højt i vor konstante søgen efter produkter, der udtrykker personlighed og typicitet. Sortimentet, der er et af de største i den danske vinbranche, indeholder vine fra alle betydende vinlande samt spiritus fra øverste kvalitets-skuffe.

Kunderne findes indenfor segmenterne Hoteller & Restauranter, erhvervsvirksomheder samt vinhandlere. I den sidstnævnte gruppe samarbejder vi meget tæt med den landsdækkende VINOBLE kæde.
 
Vi driver virksomheden ud fra en række sunde principper om personlig service, partnerskab og professionel rådgivning. Vore kunder og forbrugere ønsker en vinøs oplevelse, men på konkurrencedygtige vilkår. Derfor spiller effektivitet og logistik også en stor rolle.

På denne side vil vi gerne informere om og skildre virksomhedens identitet og sjæl - samt fremfor alt, inddrage dig i vores spændende univers!

Name: BrandEvolution-LLC
Description:
Brand Evolution is a partnership formed between two beverage industry veterans who have extensive experience in National Accounts.  

They co-founded Brand Evolution to provide strategically focused national channel representation for their clients.

We collaboratively assume management of all facets of the National Channel for our clients.  Service includes a comprehensive consult to help identify gaps and opportunities for your beverage brand.  We offer a project plan with timelines to elevate your brand to a national account level. Our individualized plans are made up of quality services that will help you get there quickly and smoothly. 

More than just bringing “relationships”;       
Our deep understanding of the stress points at each level of the 3-tier system, allows us to streamline the gap between our clients, distributors & buyers.                              All resulting in a more efficient way of working. 

We provide...
~All Encompassing National Account Management 
~Distributor Strategy, Alignment & Engagement
~Business Intelligence/Analysis & Category Management
~Top Level Relationships with Distributor & Account Leadership 

Added value...
~360 Marketing Plans & Strategy 
~Trade Marketing Customized Program Development
~Control Label Development, Sourcing & Bottling
~Brand Standards Development and Distributor Education
~3rd Party Partnerships: Black Apple (Data Analytics) & Windy Hill Brands (Marketing)

Name: Enopiave srl
Description:
Il Gruppo Enopiave opera dal 1984 nel settore enologico, offrendo un’ampia gamma di prodotti selezionati e la propria competenza nella consulenza e nei servizi per assicurare il successo dei propri clienti.

I nostri mercati di riferimento sono il Veneto, Trentino Alto Adige, Friuli Venezia Giulia ed Emilia Romagna. Siamo particolarmente presenti in Veneto, con diversi punti vendita dislocati nelle zone più vocate quali zona Piave, Conegliano-Valdobbiadene, oltre a disporre di un deposito a Caprino Veronese dedicato al vetro cavo.

Lo staff interno è composto da Laureati, Enologi, Enotecnici e consulenti di vendita qualificati per affiancare i clienti nel trovare soluzioni innovative e rispondere alle diverse esigenze del mercato, aggiornati e formati in maniera costante, come tutto lo staff tecnico.

Il Gruppo Enopiave collabora con alcune tra le più importanti aziende, italiane ed estere del settore selezionando le migliori soluzioni ed affidandosi a partner leader mondiali in termini di qualità dei prodotti, di affidabilità dei servizi e del post vendita. L’assistenza analitica di “EnopiaveLab” e la stessa collaborazione tra Enopiave, i Fornitori ed i Clienti porta ad un continuo scambio di informazioni volto allo sviluppo e all’affinamento di nuovi prodotti e servizi.

Nel nostro portafoglio possiamo trovare: prodotti enologici, capsule e chiusure tecniche, chiusure in sughero, Bag-In-Box, soluzioni di codifica per la tracciabilità  e l’identificazione dei prodotti, strumenti per il laboratorio e per l’analisi multiparametrica, botti, tini e barriques, adesivi e colle per etichettaggio ed imballaggio, pavimenti e rivestimenti speciali per l’industria alimentare, keg in PET, tecnologie e gas alimentari, microfiltrazione e strati filtranti, reagenti e consumabili per il laboratorio, articoli da negozio.

Enopiave e le sue filiali sono certificati UNI EN ISO 9001 dal 2004.

Name: FEW Spirits
Description: FEW Spirits is a micro/craft distillery in Evanston, Illinois and produces small batch spirits from Midwestern grains. FEW Rye Whiskey is Whisky Advocate Magazine's Craft Whisky of the Year, and we have been named one of the top craft distillers in the world by multiple critics.

Name: Industrias Vinicas S.A.
Description:
Desde 1965 Vinicas realiza servicios de filtración y retiro programado de borras liquidas, orujos y vinos a la Industria Vitivinícola, siendo la única empresa recicladora de estos subproductos en Chile, para luego fabricar productos alimenticios, farmacéuticos, enológicos y agrícolas.

Es la mayor productora de Ácido Tartárico, Cremor Tártaro, Aceite de Pepita de Uva, Compost Orgánico, Brandy, Alcohol Etílico Neutro y Aguardiente de origen Vínico de Chile.

Vinicas es la mayor comercializadora y distribuidora de productos enológicos, maquinarias e insumos de especialidad para la industria vitivinícola nacional. 
Representa a más de 20 empresas extranjeras especializadas en el rubro enológico, de productos, insumos y servicios tanto para jugos como vinos.

Con socios chilenos y japoneses, Vinicas continuamente ha invertido en la modernización de sus líneas de producción, lo que a su vez le ha permitido obtener exigentes certificaciones para sus productos y procesos.

Vínicas cuenta con las siguientes certificaciones:

ISO-9001:2015
ISO-14001:2015
HACCP
HALAL
Star-K Kosher, Halal, USP-NF/FCC, EP, JP, KP
100% GRAPE BASED GMO FREE

Name: Maison Noilly Prat
Description: Cette maison centenaire propose bien plus qu’une simple façade. En ouvrant les portes du Chai des Mistelles, les visiteurs acceptent de plonger dans l’histoire d’un savoir-faire centenaire qui fait la réputation de toute la région. Les amateurs de vermouth, des plus novices aux plus aguerris, pourront approcher les mythiques tonneaux exposés en plein air et découvrir l’art de l’assemblage, du dodinage, comment le vin se transforme en Vermouth. Des immersions dans l’histoire du vermouth qui se terminent toutes par des dégustations, certaines expériences proposent même des cours de mixologie pour réaliser son propre cocktail dans le bar privé de la Maison : au shaker ou à la cuillère, le Dry Martini n’aura plus aucun secret pour les visiteurs ! Enfin, pour ceux désireux d’aller encore plus loin, la boutique de la Maison, où sont proposés tous les vermouths, permet également de rendre chaque bouteille unique grâce à une graveuse sur verre personnalisant ainsi votre cadeau souvenir avec le texte de votre choix !

Name: The Balkans International Wine Competition & Festival
Description:
THE BALKANS INTERNATIONAL WINE COMPETITION (BIWCF) is a first of its kind. It celebrates the millennial wine-making tradition of the Balkan Peninsula as expressed in its modern Balkan wines – daily savored and loved by locals and more and more preferred by wine lovers worldwide. Dedicated exclusively to regional wines, this annual competition aspires to draw the attention of the global wine community to the unique range of flavors that this interesting region has to offer. The competition is open to wine producers from all Balkan countries, from the Black Sea region, and from all over the world. The Balkan wine festival that will follow the competition is open to the wine-loving public.

In 2023 the 12th BIWCF will be split again between two countries! 

For the 12th consecutive year, The Balkans International Wine Competition and Festival (BIWCF) is looking for and promoting the best Balkans wine. The event will be held in two countries in June 2023. From June 1-3 June, Bistrita-Nasaud, Transylvania, Romania will  host the Competition, and in the period 22-24 June under the open sky in the heart of Sofia “The Wine Town” will rise, bringing together the best cellars from the Balkans.

Galina Niforou, BIWC Managing Director
E-mail: niforou@balkanswine.eu
Mob: +359 885 731 331

Igor Lukovic, BIWC Chairman
E-mail: punajedra@gmail.com


Ivana Tsakova, BIWC Event Manager 
E-mail: ivana@balkanswine.eu
Mob: +359 899 838 668

Tickets: tickets@balkanswine.eu

Name: Cedar Ridge
Description:
In a world weary of “craft” this and “small batch” that, Cedar Ridge Distillery is a refreshing change. In 2005, Jeff Quint -- ninth-generation farmer and fermenter -- followed his heart from accountancy back to his distilling roots when he and his wife Laurie opened Cedar Ridge, the first licensed distillery in the state of Iowa since Prohibition. In the ten short years since their first release, Cedar Ridge whiskeys have won national and international acclaim, led by their Iowa corn Bourbon Whiskey, made of corn from their own fields.

Cedar Ridge Distillery is set amid rolling corn fields in bucolic Swisher, Iowa, which is located about a ten-minute drive from both Cedar Rapids and Iowa City. The distillery is a favorite local attraction for tours and tastings, as well as excellent yet casual dining including brick-oven wood-fired pizzas; local vegetables, cheeses and charcuterie; and a popular Friday Night Grill. Live music generally plays on Friday evenings and Sunday afternoons, and other events include yoga, dinner theatre, and open air painting, to name a few. The distillery is frequently rented for weddings and corporate events, with options including an event hall, the tasting room, a board room, several patios, and even the lawn.

Cedar Ridge whiskeys are defined by a notably clean, subtle taste profile, which is achieved by fermenting off the grain (separating the fresh wort from the grain immediately after mashing), and double-distilling the resulting wash to 148-150 proof (vs. the more common 134-136 proof), which removes impurities and further contributes to the whiskeys’ pure, approachable character.

The tasting room and gift shop are open year-round, as are dining options; free tours are offered on Saturdays and Sundays at 1 pm and 3 pm. There is always something new to see at Cedar Ridge Distillery: Cedar Ridge just wrapped up constructing its own sustainable stillage reclamation waterway and an additional 1,800-barrel rick house.

Name: PFITSCHER
Description: Fired with enthusiasm for a century and a half with no signs of slowing. Three generations live, work and make wine together here. We stand for clean, straightforward wines coming from high altitude vineyards. Thanks to the cool climate they get expression, finesse and their own identity.

Name: Consejo Regulador Denominación de Origen Bierzo
Description:
Bierzo county is located in the northwest of the province of León, in the Castilla y León region, and covers an area of 2954.28 km, which accounts for 18% of the provincial area. Geographically it borders the provinces of Ourense, Lugo and Asturias and it is a main connection between Galicia, León and Asturias. 

Bierzo's vineyards is characterized by fragmentation of parcels and smallholder plots, vines on slopes, from 450 to 800 meters whose are oriented to the four cardinal points. 

Bierzo vineyard's soil stabilise from  Miocene materials coated by a layer of Quaternary. Texture is silt loam, moderately acidic, its pH is close to 5.5, with the absence of carbonates, typical of humid climates. The soils on slopes are made of a mixture of minerals, quartzite and slate. 

The Bierzo is a very special and suitable microclimate for vine growing. The natural barrier of Sierra de los Ancares calm the force of the Atlantic storms and produces a continental climate with the influence of the Ocean. The annual rainfall is 721 mm and the average temperature of 12.3 ° C, recorded minimum temperatures of 3.6 ° C in the cold months and maximum of 23.6 ° C in the hottest months. The annual average insolation is estimated between 2,100 and 2,200 hours of sunshine.

Name: Skinny Girl Cocktails LLC
Description:
Founded by Bethenny Frankel and David Kanbar, Skinny Girl Cocktails LLC launched the Skinnygirl Margarita in September 2009 and was sold to Fortune Brands (NYSE: FO; now Beam Suntory) in March 2011.

This company no longer owns or operates the Skinnygirl Cocktail business, which is now owned by Beam Suntory.

Name: Origami Sake Company
Description:
Located in Hot Springs, Arkansas, Origami Sake is nestled amidst the Ouachita Mountains, sourcing its famous mineral water. 

The brewery is located within miles of our grower in the heartland of U.S. rice country. 

Using 100% Arkansas-grown rice varieties selected for quality and character, every bottle of Origami Sake reflects our commitment to sustainability from farm to bottle.

Name: Hunter Laing & Co Ltd.
Description: Blenders and bottlers of Scotch Whisky for three generations. A family business since 2013.

Name: SakeOne
Description:
SakeOne is America's premium sake company. Our focus is on producing Oregon craft sake and importing select Japanese sake brands. 

We produce Oregon craft sake under the Momokawa, Moonstone, G, Yomi and Naginata brands; and import fine Japanese sake from Hakutsuru (Hyogo prefecture), Murai Family (Aomori prefecture), Kasumi Tsuru (Hyogo prefecture), Kibo (Iwate prefecture), SakeMoto (Hyogo prefecture), Yoshinogawa (Niigata prefecture) and Daikoku Masamune (Hyogo prefecture). We also import Tombo shochu as a complement to our sake selection.

Our products are distributed throughout North America, South America, and the Caribbean islands.

SakeOne's corporate offices, kura (brewery) and tasting room are located in Forest Grove, Oregon just west of Portland.  

Visit sakeone.com for more information.

Name: Bahia Etanol Holding S.A
Description: Somos uma destilaria que respeita o meio ambiente e se compromete a alavancar o crescimento regional autossustentável e a valorizar os tradicionais produtores de cana-de-açúcar, sempre investindo em recursos de gerenciamento, otimizando processos com constantes atualizações operacionais e agrícolas, e contando com o apoio e a expertise de profissionais altamente qualificados.

Name: Roust Russia
Description:
Roust is the largest integrated spirits producer and distributor in Central and Eastern Europe and the second-largest vodka producer by volume in the world, with over 30 mln 9l cases sold annually in more than 80 markets. 

Roust owns production facilities and distribution centres across Poland, Hungary, Russia and Italy. 

Roust’s extensive portfolio includes flagship vodka brands Russian Standard, Green Mark, Parliament and Zhuravli, as well as the legendary Polish vodka Żubrówka. 

Roust also owns Gancia, the legendary Italian company that created the first Italian sparkling wine.

Name: Wine Bouquet | Société d'accompagnement à l'international | Marketing & Sales | Sourcing
Description:
Aurélie Voillot Robaldo | Bâtisseuse et inspiratrice, je transforme les idées en projets concrets à fort impact. Avec un mélange unique de vision stratégique, de créativité structurée et de leadership bienveillant, j’orchestre des initiatives qui fédèrent les équipes et créent des résultats durables. Mon moteur : bâtir, guider et inspirer pour que chaque projet devienne une réussite partagée.

Je prends en main votre développement à l’international grâce à un service export externalisé, agile et opérationnel. Avec notre collectif de marques - engagées - complémentaires, je mise sur l’intelligence collective pour gagner en visibilité et en impact.  

Wine Bouquet, c'est également du consulting pour des entreprises engagées autour des affaires, du commerce, de l'international, des stratégies marketing ou commerciales, l'accompagnement dans la création de marque, de contenu, de storytelling ou encore de la création graphique et de supports de communication.

Let's talk about your project !? aurelie.voillot(@)winebouquet.fr

Name: Pinhal da Torre
Description: Pinhal da Torre is a family-owned boutique winery in Portugal's Tejo region, dedicated for generations to crafting premium, terroir-driven wines. We manage 43 hectares of estate vineyards across four properties with rigorous sustainable practices, ensuring the health of our soils and the purity of our grapes. Our artisanal approach focuses on precision, elegance, and expressing the unique character of each varietal and our Tejo terroir. Recognized for distinctive and refined wines, Pinhal da Torre is expanding its global presence, partnering with international distributors and professionals who share our commitment to sustainable excellence and authentic, high-quality wines.

Name: Stockport Gin
Description:
Made by husband and wife team Paul and Cheryl, Stockport Gin is a small batch craft gin distillery based at our town centre distillery in Stockport. 

Stockport Gin is the first Gin to be made in Stockport and together we are involved in all aspects of the business from selecting and weighing the botanicals, making the gin, bottling and labelling the gin by hand and then selling and delivering it.

Our gin is available to buy via our website or in a number of local and national stockists both on the high st and online. Check our website for more details!

Name: Torbreck Vintners
Description:
SINCE 1994 TORBRECK HAS BEEN COMMITTED TO CREATING EXCEPTIONAL RHONE STYLE RED AND WHITE WINES REFLECTING THE VERY BEST VINEYARDS IN AUSTRALIA’S FAMOUS BAROSSA.

Provenance is everything to us. We believe the Barossa is the most exciting place to make wine in the world, with its gentle Mediterranean climate and 175 years of Silesian and English commitment to winemaking and grape-growing.

There is a European sense of tradition here that means vines planted in the 1840s – many of them Rhone varieties such as Shiraz, Grenache, Mourvédre – still thrive and bear fruit of unique concentration and flavour.

Torbreck pays tribute to these vineyards with minimal intervention, creating wines of richness, structure and length that age gracefully.

The multi-generational growers, whose descendants arrived here nearly two centuries ago, are the backbone of Torbreck’s winemaking aspirations. Without their knowledge of the seasons and the soil, we would not have such a precious resource of fruit to work with.

Torbreck has also been fortunate to have the opportunity to invest in the protection of some of the Barossa’s most precious vineyards, after accepting fruit from them over many years. The historic Hillside Vineyard at Lyndoch, The Laird Vineyard in the sub-region of Marananga and the Greenock Keller Vineyard owned by the Schultz family, are all now under the custodianship of Torbreck. 


In 2008 this long-term commitment to the Barossa was cemented when we completed our winery and bottling line, enabling us to achieve maximum quality control through 100% estate vinification, maturation and packaging.

Our latest development was the 2017 expansion of our original settler’s cottage cellar door to become an international guest centre, where we are proud to welcome our many friends and collectors from the USA, Asia, Europe and Australia. 

Torbreck has achieved a lot in less than three decades, but the journey is a long way from complete.

Name: Soilair Selection
Description: SoilAir Selection infuses into the US market unique wines from small to medium size wineries capable of producing top-notch wines undiscovered from the domestic and international critic. Our portfolio is also dedicated to the classic producers from the main wine regions of the world that through the years have established a solid brand. Our goal is to reach every customer appreciative of quality wine at a good value. We still believe that good wine has to be part of our everyday life.

Name: Harland Beer
Description:
A Labor of Beer.
San Diego, California.

Name: Landmark Vineyards
Description: Nestled at the base of the Mayacamas Mountain Range in the Sonoma Valley, Landmark Vineyards epitomizes the rustic grace and beauty of Sonoma County.  Since 1974, Landmark has been dedicated to producing handcrafted, ultra-premium Chardonnay and Pinot Noir sourcing grapes from unique vineyard sites throughout California to create rich, balanced wines.  Their signature wine, the Overlook Chardonnay, has appeared on The Wine Spectator Top 100 list seven times.  Landmark’s wines may be purchased via select wine shops and restaurants, or directly from Landmark’s Tasting Room, on-line store, or through membership in the Wine Society.

Name: Mohan Goldwater Breweries Limited
Description:
Mohan Goldwater Breweries Limited plant at Unnao, spread across 12 acres. A brewery unit with global standards using modern ways of brewing beer and equipped with best of machineries. The brewery brews high quality beer exclusively for Carlsberg.

It is the third largest brewery in India with the capacity to brew 0.7 million HLPA (Hectolitre per annum) of beer, 750,000 cases (650 ml) per month and 15,000 bottles per hour through its state-of-the-art, fully automated bottling and canning unit. Modern and automated techniques help in ensuring that the beer is produced under hygienic conditions, free from any external impurities.

The distillery & brewery plants are equipped with modern technology and designed to maintain zero effluent discharge.

Name: Querciabella
Description:
Founded in 1974, Querciabella enjoys global acclaim for its exquisite range of Fine Wines from Tuscany. 

With over 100 hectares of vineyards in Chianti Classico and Maremma (Southern Tuscany), Querciabella makes wines that exemplify with precision the mindful preservation of viticultural traditions through forward-thinking winemaking. 

An unmistakable thread of elegance and territorial character are the signature traits of its iconic wines – Batàr, Camartina, Palafreno, Querciabella Chianti Classico and Querciabella Chianti Classico Riserva, Turpino and Mongrana – celebrated by the critics and sought after by discerning wine lovers and collectors around the world.
