In its uncompromising pursuit of quality and authenticity, Querciabella continually perfects its approach to viticulture: pioneering organics since 1988 and biodynamics since 2000, the estate has developed a unique, plant-based winemaking that completely avoids the use of animal-derived products, both in the vineyards and in the cellar.

Name: Herdade da Figueirinha
Description:
The best wine is the one that is shared. Shared for generations, shared with friends, shared with Portugal and the world. Our cellar was born in 2003, through the fusion of all the passion for wines and great flavors. In 2006 the mill was born and the oil was born with a fruity, smooth flavor and a spicy touch. This is what Herdade da Figueirinha, Adega e Lagar is all about: excellent work, top quality products and, above all, love for wine, olive oil and family.

We invite you to be part of this family!

Name: Groth Vineyards & Winery
Description:
Founded in 1982, Groth Vineyards & Winery is lauded as the first in the U.S. to craft a 100-point wine. Our family-owned Napa Valley winery has deep roots in Oakville, one of the world’s most renowned Cabernet-growing regions.

Dennis and Judy Groth made a life-changing investment in 1981 when they bought a vineyard on Oakville Cross Road, in the heart of Napa Valley, with hopes it would produce world-class Cabernet Sauvignon. It didn't take long for their intuition to be proven right. Robert Parker of the Wine Advocate gave the Groth 1985 Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon the distinction of being California's first 100-point wine.

Today, with Dennis and Judy's daughter, Suzanne Groth, as President & CEO, Groth sustainably farms two estates totaling 165 acres with the dual goals of producing the highest-quality, most elegant wines we can while caring for our estate for future generations. The winery produces critically acclaimed Cabernet Sauvignon, Sauvignon Blanc and Chardonnay.

Name: The Malt Gallery
Description: Opening soon in Beirut, Lebanon. The Malt Gallery offers all whisky lovers a unique and eccentric experience to discover its wide range of finest single malts and malts from around the world. For more information please email info@themaltgallery.com or join our social media platforms @themaltgallery

Name: Fast Penny Spirits - Amaricano
Description: Fast Penny Spirits is a distillery in Seattle, Washington focusing on creating high-quality amaro using organic and wild-crafted ingredients under the Amaricano brand. Rooted in complexity, but encouraging ease, Amaricano is a perfect intersection of tradition and modernity. Fast Penny is defined by everyday decisions that impact the greater good through sustainability and empowerment of women and community.

Name: Top 100 On-Premise Wines
Description:
Top 100 On-Premise wines is a celebration of 100 top wines at the Sommeliers Choice Awards. Uniquely, the T100Wines are selected from votes made by top Sommeliers and On-Premise wine buyers of USA.

Subscribe to get the results 1 week before it goes live and get exclusive access to the top 100 on-premise wines and their suppliers. Includes a complimentary detailed guide on how to grow your on-premise wines sales with real tactics and insights from top sommeliers and on-premise wine buyers who have done it.

Sign up from https://t100wines.com/

Name: Maison Benjamin Kuentz
Description: La Maison Benjamin Kuentz est une jeune entreprise française qui a lancé une gamme de whisky français au printemps 2017. Créée par Benjamin Kuentz, passionné de whisky depuis toujours et amoureux de la France, son ambition est de participer à l’écriture du whisky français en proposant des whiskies qui reflètent le terroir et le savoir-faire français.

Name: Octopus Group
Description:
Octopus Group is an entrepreneurial, dynamic family of companies specialising in the import, distribution and marketing of beverages in South East Asia. Our extensive portfolio represents local and international brands that have a well-known provenance, heritage and history and resonate with all trade and consumer sectors - from high-end cocktail bars to local hawker centres.

Established in 2002, we’re a fully independent group, which allows us to respond with innovation and agility to an ever changing market. As a result, the business continues to grow at pace, spanning a full spectrum of services: world class logistics and warehousing, outstanding infrastructure, sales and marketing expertise, wholesaler management, brand management and activation.

Our business strategy rests on three core pillars: growth, efficiency and sustainability. We’re focused on delivering growth for our company and our partners. We do this through effective use of resources, plus investment in our infrastructure, allowing us to grow with the highest levels of efficiency. We’re also committed to entering into sustainable growth partnerships and to implementing solutions for a sustainable planet.

In short, through long-term relationships. we’re all about unlocking potential for our partners.

Name: DrinxSjøbeck ApS
Description:
Hos DrinxSjøbeck har vi alle de varer, der skal til for, at du kan skabe en god forretning – og vi leverer med stor sikkerhed, både i det daglige, og når det brænder på. 

Vi har landets bredeste og stærkeste udvalg af spiritus, vin, øl, bitter, vand, tobak, barudstyr og rengøringsprodukter af høj kvalitet; fra tandstikkere og rengøringsklude til store farverige flasker og gulvvaskemaskiner, og alt det der imellem. Du behøver derfor kun at handle ét sted og på den måde optimere dine indkøb.

Når du handler med os, er du ikke bare et nummer i køen. Vi følger vores kunder hele vejen og kender deres indkøb. Vi er kendt for vores fleksibilitet, vores leveringssikkerhed og vores strukturerede tilgang til kundeservice. Det er vores service, som gør os unikke – og det er vi stolte af.

DrinxSjøbeck har hovedsæde i Frederikshavn og en afdeling på Sjælland med salgskontor og lager på begge lokationer. Vi er mere end 110 medarbejdere inden for kundeservice, salg, indkøb, lager og administration, som står klar til at hjælpe dig døgnet rundt.

Name: Bodegas Carmelo Rodero
Description:
Los sueños sí pueden cumplirse y, en ocasiones, saben a vino. Con la tinta de las uvas se escribe la historia de la familia Rodero, el fiel reflejo de la constancia, de vivir una pasión y compartirla. Esta bodega, situada en la localidad ribereña de Pedrosa de Duero, nació del amor de Carmelo por las tierras por las que transcurre su infancia. En el año 1991 los vinos bajo esta firma salían al mercado, vinos elaborados con mimo con sus “perlas negras”, vinos tintos con carácter, complejos, que lograron descorchar en las hijas de Carmelo y Elena, Beatriz y María, el deseo de dar continuidad a este proyecto familiar. Esta segunda generación bebió del trabajo de sus padres y dio un toque personal al proyecto, concibiendo la ciencia de las uvas y haciendo del vino arte. Ellas son las responsables que están detrás de esta bodega de la denominación de origen Ribera del Duero. Beatriz es la encargada de la parte técnica, la autora de los elegantes vinos españoles que son la viva imagen de la calidad de sus racimos. María es la narradora, aquella que da voz a las memorias embotelladas de la familia Rodero. Este nuevo tándem ha logrado posicionar la marca en el lugar que les corresponde, manteniendo vivo el legado de su padre y de su madre, e innovando por extraer de sus viñas el alma que reposa en cada uno de sus vinos.

#tomatetutiempo #carmelorodero #riberadelduero

Name: Don Sebastiani & Sons
Description:
Rooted in tradition, driven by innovation, and headquartered in the Napa Valley, Don Sebastiani & Sons makes and markets a robust portfolio of adult beverages, including the leading premium ready-to-serve margarita in the United States, Flybird, imported from Jalisco, Mexico and made with 100% Blue Weber agave wine. Donny Sebastiani is fourth-generation proprietor of this family-owned and run business.  

If you’re looking for a rewarding environment in which to build a fulfilling career using your special skills and talents, you might just be one of the passionate individuals we’re looking for.

Name: Wine is Social
Description:
Wineissocial es el primer club de vinos que permite descubrir vinos adaptados al paladar de cada persona. De la mano del reconocido sumiller Ferran Centelles, nuestro proyecto quiere hacer disfrutar del mundo del vino tanto a neófitos como a los más expertos, ideando un sencillo lenguaje basado en símbolos geométricos que permite clasificar los diferentes estilos de vino, para que cada persona pueda reconocer fácilmente sus gustos y acertar a la hora de elegir vino en la tienda o restaurante.

Además, Ferran Centelles, junto con un equipo formado por los mejores expertos del país, nos propone mensualmente 3 experiencias de cata con vinos excepcionales y, a menudo, poco conocidos. El socio de Wineissocial recibe cada mes una caja con 2 vinos de pequeños productores adaptados a sus preferencias y una ficha didáctica coleccionable para ampliar sus conocimientos sobre el mundo del vino. Después de catar estos vinos, puede compartir en la web sus valoraciones y opiniones con el resto de la comunidad. 

Un club de vinos online para aprender y descubrir pero, sobre todo, para disfrutar.

Name: Supervin.dk
Description:
VORES AMBITION er at være Danmarks største, bedste og billigste online supermarked for kvalitetsvine.
Den er også at drive Jyllands største fysiske og mest velassorterede specialforretning for vin og spiritus.

VI GIVER DIG EN HELT UNIK GARANTI:
Hvis du ikke er tilfreds med vinen, tager vi alle flasker retur på vores regning, det gælder også den første, åbnede flaske, og krediterer hele beløbet. (Dog maks. 1 måned efter levering). 

Vi leverer fra dag til dag på hverdage. Ordrer over kr. 1.000,- leveres fragtfrit.

TIL VIRKSOMHEDER tilbyder vi flere forskellige ydelser -bl.a.:

→ Vingaver og gavekurve til repræsentation og julegaver

- Du køber online
- Vi kan pakke i gaveemballage 
- Vi kan skrive personligt kort fra dig
- Vi leverer på modtagers adresse

→ Gruppekøb til din virksomhed og dine ansatte

- Du får dit eget univers på Supervin.dk med skarpe priser på udvalgte vine
- Vi leverer på virksomhedens adresse
- Vi fornyr sortimentet hvert kvartal

→ Månedligt nyhedsbrev med tips & tricks samt interessante artikler fra vinens verden.
→ Overblik over og invitationer til vores vinsmagninger.
→ Specielle tilbud på storkøb.

Kontakt evt. Mireille Soa på  mso@supervin.dk el. tlf.: 81611638

SOM PRIVAT kan du tilmelde dig vores nyhedsbrev på https://www.supervin.dk og modtage de bedste tilbud og kampagner. Eller du kan tilmelde dig vores blog. https://blog.supervin.dk og få tips og tricks samt interessante artikler fra vinens verden.

VI GIVER DIG DE BEDSTE TILBUD:
Vi er købmænd og har rigtig meget fokus på at holde vores omkostninger nede. Vi har næse for, og økonomi til, at slå til, når en god handel byder sig. Vi køber det, markedet efterspørger, på det rigtige tidspunkt, i den rigtige mængde, i den rigtige kvalitet - og til den helt rigtige pris! 
DERFOR kan vi lave de bedste og billigste tilbud til dig.

Vi ser frem til at byde dig velkommen hos Supervin eller på https://www.supervin.dk

Name: COSMICO TEQUILA
Description:
Proveniente del Valle de Tequila, producimos en pequeños lotes que reflejan la exclusividad de nuestro producto, además del compromiso y respeto por estas tierras. 

Somos apasionados de los productos de agave y trabajamos con materia prima de una calidad insuperable, manos mexicanas trabajan con nosotros para hacer magia y crear Tequila Cosmos y Tequila Cosmico.

Cada trago es un viaje multisensorial lleno de sorpresas que se descubren segundo a segundo.

Nuestro fin, es acompañarte a crear momentos inolvidables, mientras redescubres el sabor del Tequila para degustar y disfrutar.

Name: Drinks & Wine Bouquet | Société d'accompagnement à l'international | Marketing & Sales | Sourcing
Description:
Aurélie Voillot Robaldo, champenoise d’origine et bordelaise d’adoption, j’ai fondé en 2019, Drinks & Wine Bouquet qui est avant tout, une société d’accompagnement à l’international. J'accompagne des vignerons dans leurs premiers pas à l'Export ou dans leur développement à travers une solution hybride d’externalisation des forces commerciales. Mes prestations s’adressent à des vignerons engagés, produisants des vins d’excellence certifiés Biologique ou Biodynamique. 

Wine Bouquet, c'est également du consulting pour des entreprises engagées autour des affaires, du commerce, de l'international, des stratégies Marketing, l'accompagnement dans la création de marque, de contenu, de storytelling ou encore de la création graphique et de supports de communication.

--

Aurélie V. Robaldo, originated from Champagne, married to a Burgundian and from Bordeaux by adoption since 2012, I founded Drinks & Wine Bouquet in 2019. Drinks & Wine Bouquet is an international support company for committed french winegrowers or producers producing Organic or Biodynamic certified beverages or wines. 

I am an outsourced and shared Export Sales Manager for them. I am not an agent either a wine merchant, I assure you a direct collaboration with each of them and independently.

Name: Viña Los Vascos SA
Description:
It’s a secret the locals have known for generations: the land of Los Vascos benefits from an ideal microclimate with plenty of sun, water, semi-arid soil, no frost, thanks to the high Andes mountains that act as a backdrop, offering the perfect conditions to produce exceptional wines. 

Back in the 18th century, it was a Basque family that first planted grape vines in this lush part of Northern Chile. When Domaines Barons de Rothschild Lafite purchased Viña Los Vascos in 1988, they were amongst the first European families to acquire a vineyard in the region. 

Extensive land surveys were conducted to identify the best terroirs, vineyards were restructured, and the bodega was restored to meet the new requirements for quality winemaking and ageing. Over the years, the people of Los Vascos have managed to tame the boundless forces of the surrounding nature to create a unique ecosystem where men and nature live together harmoniously. 

Los Vascos has its own approach to winemaking combining Chilean traditions with the DBR Lafite heritage and knowhow, and never following trends. Proud of its ecosystem and people, the Los Vascos community is happy to share wines that reflect the specificities of their unique terroir.

Name: Buzzkill Wines
Description:
Non-alcoholic wine needed an intervention. 

Tell us you haven’t been in this position: it’s Friday (or Monday, or Wednesday…geez, we used to drink a lot), and the choice is either, be hungover the next day, or drink seltzer water with lime. (Cue the questions about why you’re not drinking.)

So we did something about it. We decided to embrace being a Total Buzzkill.

The process starts with REAL WINE (please, we are adults…), made with grapes harvested, crushed, and fermented by renowned California growers. We then gently heated it to remove the alcohol and preserve everything else we hold sacred – taste, mouthfeel, legs, and all. 

Voila. We are Total Buzzkills, and we are proud of it.

Can’t wait for you to get un-lit with us,
.
Molly & the Buzzkill Team

Name: J Vineyards & Winery
Description: The varietal and sparkling wines of J Vineyards & Winery are the result of the finest Russian River Valley cool-climate fruit combined with gentle, respectful winemaking. Whether you are raising a glass every night around the family table or choosing wines for a special event, we hope our J Wines will enhance those special moments in your lives. Our Pinot Noir, Chardonnay and sparkling wines elevate any occasion with the essence of style.

Name: Distillerie Montebello
Description:
Située à Petit-Bourg, la distillerie Montebello offre depuis plus de 90 ans des rhums agricoles de grande qualité. La famille Marsolle continue génération, après génération à perpétuer le savoir-faire et promouvoir l’excellence de ce grand rhum guadeloupéen. 

Passionnée par la tradition, la distillerie Montebello a su conserver son authenticité tout en s’adaptant et se modernisant au fil du temps. 

Notre rhum est à la hauteur des hommes et des femmes qui, chaque jour, s’efforcent de le faire vivre avec passion.

Name: Vinarija Tarpoš
Description: “Kod naziva vinarije Tarpoš nisam se dvoumio ni jednog trena, jer me je to ime opčinilo čim sam ga prvi put čuo. Naime, „tarpoš“ je naziv za jednu starinsku srpsku žensku kapu, iz koje se nekada davno nudilo baš grožđe putnicima namernicima. Nekadašnji vinski trgovci su govorili i da je neko vino toliko dobro da ‘može u tarpošu da se nosi’. Imao sam sreće da pod tim prelepim, pa pomalo i mističnim imenom, ubrzo dobijem i jedno veoma dobro vino, koje je dalje pronosilo priču o ovom imanju u selu Vrbica pokraj Aranđelovca i o ovoj vinariji u samom srcu vinograda…”

Name: #FANDECHENIN
Description:
#FANDECHENIN regroupe tous les amateurs du cépage chenin, ainsi que les producteurs des AOC de Chenin du Val de Loire. Elle fait la promotion de la diversité d'expression de ce cépage (vins blancs secs, moelleux, fines bulles) à travers ses différents terroirs. 
#FANDECHENIN a été créé et est animé par la Fédération Viticole Anjou-Saumur.

Name: Wonderland Distilling
Description:
WONDERLAND DISTILLING CO.
DISTILLED FOR THE ADVENTUROUS SOUL

It begins with the lake. It always does for Michiganders. The story of who we are, and how we got here is connected to the adventure and activities that only makes sense in the context of the Great Lakes that formed us.

If you’re looking for a land of adventure, you don’t have to look far. Wonderland Spirits are born and blended in Michigan, crafted from the desire to embrace the splendor of these great lands and surrounding seas, created for those who want to live a life untethered.

We founded Wonderland in our hometown, Muskegon, on Michigan’s lakeshore and the gateway to forests, dunes and thousands of lakes—an outdoor paradise. We love Muskegon, and we want to help it grow and thrive.

Each of our spirits are an ode to Michigan’s natural beauty – the clear waters, the soaring forests and the fields. The landscape forms the flavors. We aim to be intentional with every aspect of Wonderland, from sourcing local ingredients, to our Michigan-made distilling equipment, to the thought and care we put into our brand.

At Wonderland, we celebrate the adventurous lifestyle of Michigan’s great outdoors. Wonderland’s spirits are hand-crafted or blended from high-quality, locally sourced ingredients whenever possible.

We are Wonderland, and we distill craft spirits for the adventurous soul.

Wonderland is proudly affiliated with, or a member of, the American Craft Spirits Association, the American Distilling Institute, the Michigan Craft Distillers Association, and the Muskegon Lakeshore Chamber of Commerce.

Registrations: Federal Distilled Spirits Plant DSP-MI-20136; Michigan Small Distiller License

Name: Coole Swan
Description: Coole Swan is a Premium Irish Cream Liqueur.  Only Coole Swan uniquely combines single-malt Irish whiskey, Belgian white chocolate and fresh Irish cream to deliver a distinctive, fresh, smooth, velvety, long lasting, creamy taste experience that lingers for you to savour and enjoy.

Name: RNDC Michigan
Description: RNDC Michigan. RNDC operates in 23 states across the US in both Fine Wine and Fine Spirits. RNDC is one of the largest Distributors in the country.

Name: Pix
Description: Pix is the world’s first wine discovery platform with a simple matchmaking mission: to pair people with bottles that bring them joy. With a surprisingly clever search engine alongside bottle reviews and articles from trusted voices in wine, you’re just a click and a clink away from your new favorite bottle. Join us at Pix.wine

Name: The Dram Club
Description: Whisky and Premium Spirts tasting , appreciation and education platform. Rare & limited edition spirits.

Name: Distillerie du Vercors
Description:
Located in a former silkworm farm in the Royans valley at the bottom of the Vercors, is the Distillerie du Vercors distilling its organic Single Malt Whisky... which is 100% French!
We only use organic barley, some of which grows in the fields below the Distillery to produce our homemade cuvée.
The name of our Whisky pays homage to the giant Sequoia tree in the middle of the Distillery's courtyard.
All of our products are brewed, distilled, aged, and bottled on site.

  www.facebook.com/distillerieduvercors/ 
  www.instagram.com/distillerievercors/

Name: Trente et Quarante
Description:
Embouteilleur indépendant de Calvados, Trente et Quarante a été créé en 2015 par Thibault Patte et Vincent Béjot, deux amis passionnés se donnant pour mission d’explorer ces terroirs injustement oubliés. Sillonnant sans relâche la région, ils chassent les meilleurs fûts chez les producteurs les plus réputés. Leurs blends mélangeant plusieurs eaux-de-vie issues de terroirs et de distillations différentes proposent de nouvelles expressions du Calvados, riches et originales. Les fûts les plus exceptionnels sont quant à eux commercialisés sous forme d’embouteillages exclusifs “single cask” pour préserver au maximum leur valeur documentaire. Cette démarche audacieuse est appuyée par un processus rigoureux de sélection et de classification des eaux-de-vie. 
Trente et Quarante propose ainsi une cartographie transversale du Calvados soutenue par une gamme qui met en lumière les quatre étapes-clés de la naissance d'une grande eau-de-vie : la fabrication des cidres, la distillation, le vieillissement et l’assemblage.

Name: Morrell and Company
Description:
Morrell Wine & Spirits is one of the nation’s premier wine and spirits organizations. 

Founded in 1947 as Morrell Fine Wines and Spirits, a neighborhood retail shop on Manhattan’s East Side, today the Morrell Wine Group includes its flagship store, Morrell Fine Wine & Spirits, Morrell Wine Bar & Café, and Vintage Wine Warehouse. 

Morrell Fine Wine & Spirits the flagship retail store is located in Rockefeller Plaza on 49th Street. With its unmatched selection, Morrell’s has become a destination wine merchant for discerning buyers seeking the best bottles from the best properties. 

Thanks to long-term relationships with the best producers, Morrell’s has unique access to the most sought-after wines from Europe, the US, and the New World. While carrying wines in a full range of prices, Morrell specializes in limited-release and highly allocated wines. An extensive selection is showcased in the store’s spectacular rare wine vault. 

Morrell Wine Bar & Café, the pioneering wine bar in New York City, next to the store at 1 Rockefeller Plaza, offers over 100 wines by the glass and over 1,000 wines by the bottle, many of them available for purchase at the store. 

Vintage Wine Warehouse is the oldest and largest wine storage facility in New York.  From temperature controlled to secured storage, Vintage stores your wine properly.

As a fully integrated multi-service wine and spirits merchant, Morrell Wine Group can fill all client needs in wine at the highest level, whether they are collecting, entertaining, selling, investing, or simply enjoying.

Name: Domaine Della Winery
Description: Domaine Della is an acclaimed artisan Sonoma County wine producer of Pinot Noir and Chardonnay sourced from the finest vineyards in the Russian River Valley and Sonoma Coast. David Hejl is the proprietor and winemaker for Domaine Della, former CEO of Kosta Browne, with their inaugural 2012 vintage released in 2014. These wines are extremely limited production.

Name: Global Wines Distribution
Description:
Global Wines Distribution is an established wine import & distribution company headquartered in Raleigh North Carolina. Global has attained unparalleled growth and branded market presence throughout the country.  In less than 3 years Global has gone from having operations in the state of Alabama and sales in one metro market to becoming the Number 1 wine distributor of South American Wines, and are the Fastest Growing Wine Distributor in the country. We having 14 Independent Territory Owners operating territories in 16 states, representing 8 Wine Markets, promoting wine from 40 different wineries, with 300 exclusive labels that were each handpicked only after they passed Global’s proprietary Wine Grading process. Global and its Territory Owners have a vast network of Sales Consultants in the field, spanning over 50 major markets and 100 minor markets in the states of AL, NC, SC, FL, GA, S TX,  N TX, CT, OH, VA, DC, MD, DE, MD, CO & IA. 

Global Wines Distribution strives to bring our customers the best of international wineries and varietals available in the USA. From our handpicked selections of Argentinean Malbecs, and Torrontes, to our very rich selections of Cabernet’s, Chardonnay’s, and Merlot’s, we always work to provide our customers with the perfect option for any occasion and every season.

Please contact us if you are interested in owning a Global Wines Distribution business. Limited states available.

Name: Château de Camensac
Description:
Château de Camensac : Une solide tradition d’innovation

Sur le coteau le plus beau et le plus élevé du Médoc, sur le flanc de la commune de Beychevelle, le relief se relève pour atteindre un sommet : Camensac.
La discrétion et l’élégance mesurée de la Chartreuse du XVIII ème siècle participent au charme bucolique des lieux. Le Château de Camensac s’illustre dès ses débuts comme un grand vignoble réputé pour la qualité de ses vins qui le hisse au rang de grand cru classé en 1855.

Name: Orange River Cellars
Description:
The Orange River and the Kalahari Desert bound Upington, the biggest town in the warm, dry North Western Cape. This is also the main office of the Orange River Cellars, the largest wine cooperative in South Africa and the Southern Hemisphere, as well as the second-largest in the world, according to the number of tons harvested. In the early 1900s vineyards were planted in the Lower Orange valley for raisin production.
Since the early seventies, the wine production activities have been extended significantly with the addition of cellars at Groblershoop, Grootdrink, Kakamas, and Keimoes. Grape juice production is managed from a separate, specialised facility at Kanoneiland, and is also done at the wineries of Grootdrink and Kakamas. In the land of contrasts flows the Orange River, which is the life source of this arid landscape. Together with the red Kalahari Desert soil and the thundering roar of the Augrabies Falls, the huge variety of succulents give the barren area its natural beauty. In 1966 the Orange River Scheme was put into operation and to this day this irrigation canal is the nutritive source of a flourishing wine region.
The intake of the cellars has grown from 5182 tons in 1968 to a record of 184 000 tons in 2004. Not much of the original distilling wine scheme survived. The production of good wine goes hand in hand with marketing and here Orange River Cellars had great success with its products. Originally only three wines were produced, but the product list has grown to over 30 different products. A large number of awards over the last couple of years indicates the quality of these products. To date, we have received national and international awards and recognition for our wines, the latest being 5 medals at the 1999 Veritas. With the growing demand for grape juice concentrate, Orange River Cellars established juice cellars at Kanoneiland and Grootdrink and in 1996.

Name: Distillerie NOROI
Description: NOROI est le mariage parfait entre la distillation traditionnelle et notre méthode unique de distillation à froid. Nous pouvons ainsi vous offrir des produits innovants et raffinés, avec ou sans alcool. Disponibles en SAQ et à notre distillerie située à Saint-Hyacinthe.

Name: WENGLER
Description: A family business, embracing the art of sourcing, importing and distributing authentic wines and spirits in Luxembourg. The portfolio embraces a unique authentic selection of 1700+ wines, 70+ bubbles and 800+ spirits for everyone, sourced from 27 distinct countries and spanning across 56 wine regions. From small refined producers to noble wine houses, curated with true passion for quality and sharing products that are nuanced, pure, and representative of terroir. Celebrating craftsmanship and legacy, Wengler is dedicated to breaking boundaries and bringing a fresh, contemporary approach to the wine industry. The mission is straightforward: to celebrate the best of wine and spirits culture, selling products reflecting terroir and artisanal craftmanship.

Name: Perlage Winery SB
Description:
Perlage is a pioneering organic winery in the Conegliano Valdobbiadene Prosecco Superiore DOCG area since 1985. It's a family business, born and raised in the heart of an area rich in history, culture and beauty, and which aspires to UNESCO recognition. The adventure began when the 7 Nardi brothers, with their father Tiziano and mother Afra, decided to convert one of their oldest vineyards, Riva Moretta, to organic farming.
Perlage’s attention to sustainability in viticulture embraces the entire production process: from the choice of the perfect soil, to final attention to the consumer. Starting from a healthy vineyard with the constant presence of  specialized consultants, Perlage also achieves important results in vinification, from the reduction of sulphur in wines to a focus on vegan-friendly wines.
The Perlage brand is synonymous with quality and elegant organic wines, business knowledge and the passion of the people who work there, its heritage and respect for the future.

Name: Tenute Barone di Valforte
Description:
Tenute Barone di Valforte: una tradizione di famiglia.

La storia della famiglia Sorricchio di Valforte e il legame con le colline teramane risalgono al XIV secolo. Nonostante le opere e la fama dei propri avi abbia travalicato i confini regionali, la famiglia è sempre rimasta profondamente connessa alla propria terra d'origine e si è adoperata per lo sviluppo del proprio territorio.

L'amore per la terra e, in special modo, la passione per la coltura della vite hanno caratterizzato la storia familiare e nel 2005 si è deciso di commercializzare la prima bottiglia a marchio «Barone di Valforte».

L'Azienda oggi è guidata dai fratelli Guido e Francesco, insieme alla figlia di Guido, Annamaria.

Name: Ultra Pure, LLC
Description:
Ultra Pure is the #1 U.S. based bulk alcohol supplier. We source consistent, high quality bulk ethanol & high proof spirits for varying uses and industries including but not limited to the following: beverage & distilleries, spirits brand owners, food & flavor, hospitals, labs & universities, botanical extractors and industrial & personal care companies.

Our Alcohols and High-Proof Spirit bases are sourced globally and delivered from eight US distribution centers for a variety of services:

•	Distilleries,Bottlers, and Blenders
•	Spirit Brand Owners
•	Foods & Flavors
•	Botanical Extraction
•	Hospitals, Labs, and Universities
•	Industrial and personal care  

With a corporate focus on streamlined distribution and excellent, personalized customer service, Ultra Pure has established itself as a highly competitive force within the Ethanol and Distilled Spirits markets as we work to reach the most beneficial and profitable solution for each company's specific needs. 

Please Call Us or Visit our Website for further information: (203) 662-9761 / www.ultrapure-usa.com or http://ultrapure-usa.com/contact/

Name: Arapuru Gin
Description:
Arapuru is a gin infused with Brasil. A carbon neutral, premium gin infused with exotic ingredients from all 5 regions of the country.

Natural botanicals sourced from small producers and indigenous tribes. Imbiriba, a Brazilian version of cinnamon, puxuri, a nutmeg substitute from the Amazon, pacová, a cousin to cardamom from the Atlantic rainforest - all macerated in an artisanal process developed with the famous master distiller Rob Dorsett. 

Arapuru is a challenger brand with strong commitment to social impact and sustainability.

Name: Crucial Drinks
Description:
Crucial Drinks is a boutique drinks business based in Scotland. Innovation is at the heart of what we do. We operate across different spirits categories building our brands in every corner of the world. 

We don’t believe in doing the same things as others. We try and do things differently. That’s why our very simple vision statement is “Reimagining Spirits”

Our core brands include the Lost Distillery Company and Six Saints Rum. You can find our brands on our eShop https://shop.crucial-drinks.com/ 

Using our whisky making team and the painstaking research of our archivists, The Lost Distillery Company creates modern day interpretations of legendary malt whiskies from long silent distilleries.

www.facebook.com/LostDistillery
http://www.lost-distillery.com

The devout islanders of Grenada have been quietly hand crafting rum for over 200 years. Named after the Caribbean isle's six saintly parishes, we distil divine natural rum, the way it always has been. Using only the most hallowed ingredients it's been matured in once used bourbon barrels and presented at 41.7% - the perfect sipping strength. You might say Six Saints is a truly immaculate conception! 

www.facebook.com/6SaintsRum 
http://www.sixsaintsrum.com

Name: Ingénieurs en Génie des Matériaux et Procédés _FSTG
Description: les ingénieurs de la  filière génie des Matériaux et Procédés au service des entreprises, grâce à une formation polyvalente, solide, la filière forme des ingénieurs générales dans les domaines de Matériaux et Procédés

Name: All Things Nice
Description:
All Things Nice is India's leadi service that offers specialized services in wine and spirits. It is the platform to educate Indian consumers on wines, cognacs, single malts and craft beer as well as fine cheese, charcuterie and gourmet food. Conceptualized by Nikhil Agarwal, the aim has been to bring together the right consumers and brands that deserve recognition through superior consultancy services and world-class experiential events.

The company works with large corporates in the financial and luxury sector in their client engagement & acquisition activities by putting together decadent events for their clients. We also work with some of the very best restaurants, hotels, retail chains, airlines and Indian and international brands in the luxury food and drink sector. Additionally, we work with wine and spirit companies globally to promote their brands. We are also involved in new winery setup -   from wine making to the ultimate sales and distribution process. Recently, the company launched the The Wine Cellar, their retail arm.

Nikhil Agarwal writes extensively on fine spirits and wine for eminent publications. CNBC featured him as ‘one of India’s most enterprising businessmen’ in their show Young Turks. Nikhil won the Wine Australia scholarship and Wine Australia made him their A+ Wine Educator for India while Verve magazine nominated him as one of the Top 10 Movers and Shakers in India.

All Things Nice has pioneered The Indian Wine Consumer’s Choice Awards as well as Wine Week – two of the largest event properties that propel wine culture in India to new heights. Our members have been classified as Super HNIs.

All Things Nice also co-organises ProWine Mumbai, a subsidiary of the reputed ProWein Dusselfdorf wine trade show.

Name: Isle Of Skye Distillers
Description:
Watched over by the commanding peaks of the Black Cuillin Mountains, Skye is a place like no other – rugged and beautiful, wild and welcoming.   

From our family home in Portree, we have created a spirit which we are proud to call our own.  Distilling our beautiful craft gin anywhere but here on Skye was never in question.  Provenance is everything – that abiding sense of belonging and community.  In creating Misty Isle gin, we took inspiration from the local landscape, the Old man of Storr, and the Cuillin mountain range.  All of our gin is made locally in Portree using the crystal clear spring waters from the Storr Lochs and is infused with the right balance of the finest botanicals.

Proud of our unique bottle, label and branding designs, the bottle shape represents the elements on the Isle of Skye; our mountainous landscape and turbulent seas. The Isle of Skye Distillers is 100% independent.  

The distillery is not open to the public but has a beautiful shop in Portree and the Misty Bottle in Breakish, south of the island.

Name: Maison Le Star
Description: Maison Le Star, producteur avec 2 Châteaux et près de 300 hectares de vignes, compte aujourd’hui parmi les entreprises de tout premier plan à Bordeaux. Maison Le Star dispose d’un portefeuille large et dynamique de propriétés exclusives, de châteaux suivis et de marques. Elle bénéficie d’un savoir-faire reconnu dans la distribution de vins en Grande Distribution en France ainsi qu’à l’Export.

Name: Quarantini Gin
Description:
Wir von QUARANTINI GIN aus Frankfurt stehen seit 2020 für besonders aromatisch-fruchtige Gins und „trinken für den guten Zweck“. Denn mit jeder verkauften Flasche versorgen wir einen Menschen in Sambia für ein Jahr mit sauberem Trinkwasser.

Auch die Herstellung unseres Gins ist besonders: Inspiriert von edlen Parfums werden die frischen Botanicals alle einzeln als „Geiste“ destilliert. Zusammen mit unserem Basis-Gin mit leichter Wacholdernote und klassichen Gin-Botanicals wird so jedes Batch aufs Neue mit Basis-, Herz- und Kopfnoten komponiert. So erreichen wir eine intensive Aromatik, welche die Quarantini Gins so einzigartig macht.

Name: Qualistatus Analítica e Consultoria
Description:
A Qualistatus foi pioneira no Sul do país a ser credenciada em análise de bebidas pelo Ministério da Agricultura, Pecuária e Abastecimento (MAPA).
Também possuímos acreditação na Norma ABNT NBR ISO/IEC 17025: 2017 – CGCRE/INMETRO o que garante total credibilidade e confiabilidade metrológica.
O laboratório é especializado em análises físico-químicas nas matrizes: não alcoólicas, cervejas, vinagres e bebidas fermentadas (vinhos, espumantes, kombucha, etc), para fins de controle de qualidade do produto e atendimento às demandas da fiscalização.
Se você é produtor, importador ou exportador, venha conhecer nosso trabalho, garantimos agilidade na liberação dos resultados e possuímos localização estratégica para os principais portos do sul do Brasil.

Name: Longo un Mondo di Specialità Srl
Description:
Siamo specialisti nella regalistica enogastronomica aziendale dal 1961.  
Da oltre 60 anni affianchiamo le imprese nello studio di progetti ad hoc, trasformando il dono in uno strumento strategico di relazione, capace di rafforzare i legami con clienti, partner e collaboratori.
Alla personalizzazione uniamo una profonda competenza nella selezione di prodotti gastronomici di qualità e delle migliori eccellenze vinicole, per creare confezioni che trasmettono qualità, identità aziendale e cura dei dettagli.

Name: Domaine Belargus
Description: Through a unique collection of grands crus, single-plots and monopoles, Domaine Belargus explores Anjou through all its micro-climates, using Chenin as its only instrument.

Name: Tilaknagar Industries Ltd.
Description:
Tilaknagar Industries is a leading alcoholic beverage company in India. Founded in 1933 by Shri Mahadev L. Dahanukar as Maharashtra Sugar Mills, the company was then engaged in the manufacture of sugar and allied products. TI now has over 75 years of excellence in the consumer goods category.

The Dahanukar family continues to be the promoter of TI sharing the same vision and values as the founders. Under the current leadership of Shri Amit Dahanukar the company has built a strong and diverse portfolio of brands in various liquor categories including brandy, whisky, vodka, gin and rum.

Name: Planète Bordeaux
Description: Au cœur des appellations Bordeaux et Bordeaux Supérieur, découverte du vignoble, dégustation de vin et bien plus encore...

Name: Rock and Storm Distilleries Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Nestled with novelty,  Rock & Storm Distilleries had started its journey a decade ago in 2010. We began manufacturing the finest spirits from our first ever manufacturing plant and distillery gloriously perched on the heart of Sangrur District in Punjab. Our state-of-the-art machinery with 7 automatic lines crafts palette soothing whiskies to rum. Our imported Russian filtration machine brings the highest triple distilled vodka.
The Indian palette is known to acknowledge and relish a kaleidoscope of fine flavours. Obsession for the finest of arts, rarest of gems, intellectual excellence, and the finest spirits are a hallmark of this land of connoisseurs. We at Rock & Storm keeping those facts in mind never compromise on your choice of fine spirits matching your unique persona. Our sparkling spirits hum an ode to your heart’s desire.

Name: Four Feathers Wine Services
Description:
Four Feathers Wine Services enables partners to create and build Washington brands at scale by offering best-in-class custom winemaking, grape sales, and packaging services.

We are a vertically integrated, family-owned winemaking company that farms 3,500 acres of wine grapes and makes and packages custom premium wines for nearly 300 clients nationwide at our state-of-the-art facilities in Washington State. 

Whether you’re a start-up winery producing your first vintage or an established national brand producing thousands of cases annually, Four Feathers Wine Services will help you create a finished wine that you are proud to call your own.

Name: Cognac Godet
Description:
Maison familiale et indépendante, à La Rochelle depuis 1588.

Reconnue par le roi Henri IV, la Maison Godet, ancêtre du cognac, voit le jour au 16ème siècle à La Rochelle, face à l’océan Atlantique. 

Cinq siècles et quinze générations plus tard, la Maison est toujours résolument familiale. Les trois frères, Jean Édouard, Maxime et Cyril Godet, perpétuent un savoir-faire artisanal sublimant des cépages rares. Ils créent des cognacs nets et cristallins, subtilement infusés par l’air iodé.

Avec un réseau de plus de 60 distributeurs à travers le monde, la maison Godet est présente en Europe, au Moyen-Orient, en Asie et aux Etats-Unis.  

Outre ses collections de cognacs, la Maison Godet produit également le Gin Rivage et le Whisky Osokyé.

Name: Fresh Vine Wine
Description: Fresh Vine Wine makes low-carb, low-calorie and gluten-free premium alternative wines. Enjoy responsibly! Note: A statement of average analysis for each of our wines can be found here https://freshvinewine.com/faq/ on our website.

Name: Distillerie du St. Laurent
Description:
La Distillerie du St. Laurent produit le Gin St. Laurent, un mystérieux Gin aux algues fièrement distillé à Rimouski, Canada. 

The St. Laurent Distillery produces the St. Laurent Gin, a mysterious seaweed Gin proudly distilled in Rimouski, Canada.

Name: Vegan Wines
Description: Vegan Wine Distribution and Sustainable Hospitality Consulting.

Name: Kingston Estate Wines
Description:
Established in 1985 by Bill Moularadellis, Kingston Estate Wines has grown to become one of Australia’s largest wineries, producing wines from commercial through to ultra-premium and exporting them to all corners of the globe. Over 5,000 acres of own vineyards in South Australia and Victoria supplement our grape intake, ensuring we provide the quality, consistency, reliability and continuous improvement from vine to bottle that our global customers require.

Our winery is located in the township of Kingston-On-Murray, near the banks of the River Murray, around 220kms from Adelaide in the state of South Australia. Founded on the vineyard property Bill’s parents planted in 1965, the state of the art winery is two wineries in one: the ‘old winery’ - where it all started -  is where we make our small batch high end wines, while the other side of the winery is for our larger volume wines.

Our extensive vineyard holdings are centred on our Kingston Vineyard, opposite the winery, which is famously planted with what it considered the largest single planting of Petit Verdot in the world.  We are especially excited about our Limestone Coast vineyards – dry grown and cool climate, they produce wonderful grapes for our high end wines.

As a solutions focused exporter we are always creating new and innovative ways to help our customers achieve their goals. It is our people that drive this each and every day, energised by a ‘can do attitude’ and helped along by some good old Aussie ingenuity.

Name: Vinventions Sudamérica
Description:
Nuestro propósito: cuidar los vinos que tapamos y el medio ambiente al mismo tiempo.
Cierres sustentables para vino tranquilo.
#NomacorcGreenLine

Name: L&C VINS
Description: Matthieu and Jean are two brothers from families of Bordeaux winegrowers! Their family origins? The Chateau de Sales in Pomerol and the Chateau Sigalas Rabaud in Sauternes. Both are passionate about wine both for its historical and cultural aspect and for its intrinsic quality revealed by a terroir and highlighted by a winemaker. In 2015, they launched L&C Vins, their own distribution company.

Name: Duxton Vineyards
Description:
Duxton Vineyards is one of Australia’s largest vineyard holders, operating across 1,400+ hectares in the Mildura and Sunraysia regions of NSW. Founded in 2015 and managed by Duxton Capital Australia, we produce over 40,000 tonnes of grapes annually, and processed 52,000 tonnes in the 2025 vintage, accounting for approximately 3% of Australia’s total grape production.
 
With 10 varietals on vine, and owned brands such as Pete’s Pure, Rewild and Solara, we supply both bulk and bottled wine to customers across Australia and around the world. Our goal is clear: to be the trusted partner of choice for those seeking high-quality, large-scale wine solutions backed by consistency, capability, and care.
 
Sustainability is at the heart of everything we do. As one of Australia’s largest certified members of Sustainable Winegrowing Australia (Viticulture and Winery), we are proud to lead the way in regenerative agriculture, renewable energy adoption, biodiversity preservation, and waste reduction – proving that scale and sustainability can go hand in hand.

Name: DIVA Beaune
Description: DIVA Domaines & Distilleries, distributeur France et export, spécialiste des vins et spiritueux depuis 1979. Notre aventure a plus de 40 ans et continue de s’écrire avec une famille d’experts et de passionnés réunis au Chalet Saint-Paul, demeure de la Belle Epoque nichée au coeur de Beaune, terre d’excellence des Climats de Bourgogne.

Name: Bodega Del Rio Elorza
Description:
La Patagonia Argentina es considerada uno de los lugares más hermosos de esta tierra. 
En este entorno nace Bodega Del Río Elorza,  en el Alto Valle de Río Negro.
Terrenos arcillosos, amplia diferencia térmica entre las mañanas y las noches, gran cantidad de horas de sol y la abundante disponibilidad de agua convierten este terroir en una zona privilegiada para la vitivinicultura.
Son estas condiciones más la pasión por el vino y su mundo, la inspiración  del sueño de la Familia Del Río Elorza, elaborar vinos con identidad, vinos que expresen lo mejor del terroir. 
Se cuenta con 40 hectáreas de viñedos, y  una  pequeña bodega, equipada con tecnología de vanguardia, para asegurar el cuidado en cada una de las etapas de la elaboración de sus vinos.
Para realizar este preciado proyecto sumaron la capacidad y pasión del wine maker Alberto Antonini y del vineyard manager Marcelo Casazza, logrando producir vinos que representan una verdadera expresión de la excelencia vitivinícola de este privilegiado pago de la Patagonia  Argentina.

BODEGA y VIÑEDOS
La Bodega Del Río Elorza cuenta en la actualidad con 20 ha plantadas con Malbec, Pinot Noir, Merlot, Chardonnay, Sauvignon Blanc, Cabernet Sauvignon y Cabernet Franc.
El proceso de elaboración se basa en garantizar el máximo cuidado de las uvas y en un completo control de todas las etapas.

Name: DIVA Domaines & Distilleries
Description: DIVA Domaines & Distilleries, distributeur France et export, spécialiste des vins et spiritueux depuis 1979. Notre aventure a plus de 40 ans et continue de s’écrire avec une famille d’experts et de passionnés réunis au Chalet Saint-Paul, demeure de la Belle Epoque nichée au coeur de Beaune, terre d’excellence des Climats de Bourgogne.

Name: A3 - Les agences de vins, bières et spiritueux
Description:
Fondée en 1969, A3 vise à promouvoir les intérêts des agences de vins, bières et spiritueux et de leurs fournisseurs. L'association représente plus de 95% des produits vendus à travers le réseau de distribution de la Société des alcools du Québec (SAQ).

A3 Québec organise annuellement divers événements destinés aux professionnels de l'industrie et/ou au grand public, dont La Grande Dégustation de Montréal qui est la plus grande foire vinicole de l'Est du Canada : www.lagrandedegustation.com.

Name: CyberCellar
Description:
CyberCellar.com is South Africa’s favourite online drinks destination.
Founded in 1998 CyberCellar.com is the oldest online store in South Africa, built in the (very!) early days of the internet with the simple vision of supporting local wine producers through sales of their wines online.

We have evolved into a sophisticated e-commerce operation, our purpose today to provide an expertly curated selection of established brands, hidden gems and exclusive releases in both wines and spirits.

Together with an accessible and safe shopping experience we make it easier for more people to shop their favourites, discover new producers, support independents and learn more about the world of wine and
spirits.

Rather than the widest selection we prefer to offer a curated choice within each category, and our assortment
always includes: curated cases to help you discover new producers, noteworthy deals & new releases, a comprehensive variety of styles (wine & spirits) and a range of price points to suit every customer

We handle all our own fulfilment together with a single reliable courier partner and offer free delivery on all orders anywhere in South Africa.

Name: Benchmark Drinks
Description:
Founded in 2018 by Paul Schaafsma, Benchmark Drinks is a leading UK drinks company specialising in the development, marketing and distribution of premium and celebrity wine brands.
The company has created an award-winning portfolio including Kylie Minogue Wines, Gordon Ramsay Wines, Gary Barlow Wines .
 With a focus on quality, authenticity and innovation, Benchmark Drinks brings together exceptional winemaking and distinctive storytelling to build brands that resonate with consumers worldwide.

Name: Cockorico
Description:
Cocktail premium français  
#uncocktailunvrai 

Des cocktails premium prêts à déguster !

Cockorico est le spécialiste français dans la confection et l'embouteillage de cocktails, dont les recettes sont élaborées à partir d'une sélection d'alcools et d’ingrédients de qualité.

Name: Echos de Bordeaux
Description:
Communication and Marketing Wine and Tourism
Communication et Marketing, Filière 
Gestion de contenu Internet pour dans les secteurs Vin, Tourisme et Gourmandises. Gestion de sites, de lettres d'information. Community Management. E-Mailing. Promotion, animation en ligne.

Name: XChateau Wine Business
Description:
Follow this page for updates on new podcast episodes as well as job opportunities in the wine industry.  We hope it becomes an interactive community for our listenership and the industry!  Please recommend others follow as well. 

A podcast delivering wine perspectives ex-chateau. Insights, analysis, and perspectives on news and trends in the wine industry beyond winemaking, such as marketing, finance, and consumer trends. From noted wine blogger Robert Vernick (IG@wineterroir) and leading wine business consultant and author of Luxury Wine Marketing Peter Yeung (IG@winebizguy), this podcast navigates the business of wine with unique perspectives and insights.

Name: Xanadu Wines
Description:
Established in 1977, Xanadu Wines is a highly accoladed wine producer in the Margaret River region of Western Australia.

It’s easy to see today what first inspired the creation of Xanadu in 1977. A place radiating with promise and potential. Named for an ancient, otherworldly paradise, the Xanadu of today remains a source of inspiration.

Some places are so filled with life and energy that they draw you in, sometimes in unexpected ways. This is the magnetic pull of Margaret River, where for almost half a century, we’ve crafted wines that bottle the vibrancy of this place, so that no matter where you are, you too can experience the vitality of our region.

Name: Grand Cercle des Vins de Bordeaux
Description:
Le Grand Cercle des Vins de Bordeaux est une association qui rassemble des viticulteurs, de la rive droite et de la rive gauche de Bordeaux, qui dans leur quête d'excellence partagent les valeurs traditionnelles de la vigne et du vin.

Dans la diversité de leurs 26 appellations d'origine, les 110 Châteaux membres du Grand Cercle démontrent qu'à Bordeaux sont produits de très beaux vins élaborés avec éthique et passion.

Des crus de qualité qui s'adaptent à toutes les occasions et à toutes les bourses : la référence pour "des vins de tous les jours" - "The everyday drinking housewines".

Name: ADVID - Associação para o Desenvolvimento da Viticultura Duriense
Description:
A ADVID é uma associação empresarial privada e sem fins lucrativos, empenhada no estudo, experimentação, demonstração e divulgação de técnicas adequadas à valorização da Vitivinicultura Nacional, em especial na Região Demarcada do Douro. 

Fundada em 1982 pelas principais empresas de vinho do Porto, é seu objetivo contribuir para a modernização e aumentar a rentabilidade das vinhas, ao mesmo tempo que promove a melhoria da qualidade dos vinhos, impulsionando a sua competitividade nos mercados internos e externos.

Reconhecida oficialmente como “Entidade Gestora e Dinamizadora do Cluster da Vinha e do Vinho” em 2017, o título de CoLAB da Vinha e do Vinho foi atribuído à ADVID no ano seguinte, fruto da sua aposta na investigação, cujo objetivo é promover o Desenvolvimento Sustentável da Vitivinicultura Nacional.  Foi ainda reconhecida, pela  Agência Nacional de Inovação, a idoneidade da ADVID para a prática de actividades de investigação e desenvolvimento nos  domínios técnico-científicos água e ambiente e agro-alimentar.

A ADVID conta actualmente com cerca de 180 associados, essenciais para todo o trabalho desenvolvido ao longo dos anos e os grandes responsáveis pelo seu sucesso. Entre eles estão entidades incontornáveis do sector, como a Sogrape, a Symignton, a Gran Cruz, a José Maria da Fonseca e outros. Personalidades como Fernando Bianchi de Aguiar e Nuno Pizarro Magalhães são algumas das distinguidas pela ADVID, enquanto Associados Honorários, pelo seu mérito na área da Vitivinicultura.

Enquanto plataforma de dinamização da transferência de tecnologia e conhecimento, a ADVID promove a criação de redes de trabalho com produtores, instituições científicas e organizações profissionais nacionais e internacionais. 

Tornar o sector mais eficiente e sustentável é o seu objetivo, razão pela qual é parceira de entidades de renome mundial como o INRA, PTVE e a Universidade de Bordéus, e também membro do CEEV, da Euromontana, da OILB e, através da CNOIV, da OIV.

Name: EL GRIFO
Description:
Lanzarote, 1775
250 años de tradición y modernidad vitivinícola

Name: MG Destilerías
Description:
WHO WE ARE:
Created in 1835 in Barcelona, MG Destilerias is an independent company creating premium-class distilled spirits based on expertise, quality and innovation.

As an independent family business, The 7th Generation continues to live its Spanish tradition of craftsmanship by creating and producing spirits and soft drinks.
The company is nowadays distributed in more than 50 countries around the World.

OUR BRANDS:
MG Destilerias is the leading producer and co-owners of the top bestselling spirits around the world: 
Ron Barceló and Gin Mare.

#LE TRIBUTE: 
We re-think formulas to create future icons.
A tribute to pioneers, processes and heritage. Old but new
A range of Gin, Mezcal, Tonic water, Giner Ale, Ginger Beer

#MASTER'S
Mastery isn’t an act, but a habit.
Gin prepared following the London Dry Gin method. Based on 5 botanicals.

#GIN MG
Gin prepared following the traditional London Dry Gin method. Classic. Extra-dry. Elegant.

#MG SPIRIT
Ready to drink. At any time. In any place.
Combinations of Vodka, Rum, Gin and Whisky with natural juices and soft drinks.

Name: Fourth Wave Wine
Description:
Founded in 2009 as a different kind of wine company; consumer-focused and committed to innovation, Fourth Wave leads Australian wine in maintaining relevance and recruiting the next wave of consumers.

Fourth Wave delivers a diverse portfolio of relevant and unique wine brands of marketing leading scale matched to an unrivalled pipeline of innovation. We will continue to meet the wine industry's challenges and engage and excite current and future consumers whilst having fun and growing a talented team along the way.

Name: German Winegrowers' Association (DWV)
Description: The German Winegrowers’ Association (Deutscher Weinbauverband e.V., abbreviated DWV) is the professional organisation of german winegrowers. Its purpose is to represent its members’ overall interests before international and national institutions and organisations and to safeguard and promote the professional interests of german winegrowers.

Name: Vranken Pommery Italia
Description:
Commercializzazione Champagne & Vini in Italia - 

Filiale italiana della Società Vranken-Pommery Monopole con sede a Reims (France)

Sito Ufficiale - www.vrankenpommery.it

seguiteci su www.facebook.com/PommeryItalia

l'Art du Champagne - l'Art de Bien Vivre - l'Art d'Offrir -

Name: Sainte Marguerite en Provence
Description: For 46 years, Sainte Marguerite in Provence has been a success story, but above all, it is a story of passion: that of the Fayard family, whose sole objective since 1977 has been quality. In addition to raising the bar on quality, Sainte Marguerite en Provence has been a forerunner, setting the standard very early on for rosé wines characterized by their finesse, freshness and crystalline color, anticipating new customer expectations. Sainte Marguerite en Provence wines have been certified organic since 2003. In 2022, on the basis of shared values and convictions, the Fayard family and the Pernod Ricard group are joining forces to pursue the development of Sainte Marguerite in Provence, in France and internationally. For the iconic Fantastique Rosé - Château Sainte Marguerite and the emblematic Symphonie Rosé - Maison Sainte Marguerite, the story continues and promises to be even more beautiful...

Name: York Drinks | York Gin | York Distillery
Description:
York Gin is a small independent distiller of some of the world’s finest gins. It is York's first distillery and was named England Gin Distillery of the Year at the New York International Spirits Competition. Good Housekeeping Best Gin for 2024.

The company began as an idea cooked up in one of York’s finest independent pubs, The Swan. A group of friends (and the landlord) decided it was time for the city to have its own gin company.

Since its launch in 2018, York Gin has created a range of six gins that have won gold medals at the world's top spirits competitions. The name York Gin is synonymous with the finest quality. 

We also make beautiful gift sets available online at yorkgin.com and in our 16th Century shop in the historic city centre opposite the famous Shambles. 

Inspired by York’s incredible history and with a desire to make York proud, the York Gin Company launched in 2018 under the motto ‘History in the Tasting’.
York's Roman past, its infamous villains and ghosts, and the city's chocolate heritage are just some of the inspirations for our gins.

Sustainability and responsibility are at the heart of everything we do. 
From the outset, the distillery has been powered by 100% green energy. The company’s two vehicles are both emission-free and electric. Moves to reduce our carbon footprint include investing in Yorkshire-made bottles and ensuring our neutral grain spirit is made in Yorkshire from grain that's grown on Yorkshire farms. 

And from paying the Living Wage to supporting local charities and community groups, York Gin continues to be true to our values of treating the planet, our people, partners and community with the utmost respect and kindness.

Name: Brasserie NEPO
Description:
La Brasserie NEPO (“OPEN” à l’envers) est née de la volonté de produire localement des bières françaises de spécialité tout comme des bières de nouveaux styles venus d’Angleterre et des USA.

Chez NEPO, nous privilégions les circuits courts, la qualité de nos produits et sommes transparents sur l’origine de nos ressources. Nous mentionnons d’ailleurs nos recettes sur toutes les bouteilles et canettes.

Name: Meukow Cognac
Description:
Strength, Elegance and Suppleness.

Our family brand established in 1862 and represented by the panther is part of the Compagnie de Guyenne group since 1979. Meukow is distributed in more than 80 countries thanks to its wide selection of products. 

More than 150 years of experience enable us to share our history and expertise through an initiation and tasting tour, along with culinary workshops where you will discover food pairings with cognac, cocktail master classes, and other activities. 

Meet us in our renovated former ageing cellar right in the city center of Cognac in France. 

http://www.meukowcognac.com/ 
Find us on Facebookk "Cognac Meukow" and Instagram "MEUKOW COGNAC OFFICIAL"

Name: Samson & Surrey
Description:
Samson & Surrey unites the very best craft brands in the world as one family. 

Real brands made by real people with real stories. 

We believe in the supremacy of the human touch. That's what craft is really all about. Inspiration, perspiration and some luck. All of this experienced and shared by real people. 

We are so proud to represent FEW spirits of Chicago, Bluecoat Gins of Philadelphia, Widow Jane Whiskies of Brooklyn New York, Brenne French Single Malt of Cognac and Mezcal Vago of Oaxaca. 

If you like what we do and would be like to part of our family please don't hesitate to reach out. 

Thank You

Name: Thelema Mountain Vineyards
Description: Thelema Mountain Vineyards is a wine and spirits company based out of South Africa.

Name: Barr Hill by Caledonia Spirits
Description:
"Search the seven seas if you must, but you won't find a more enchanting set of spirits than that of the honey-laced gems from Caledonia."- Robert Plotkin, American Cocktails

Our craft distillery is located in Montpelier, Vermont and inspired by the views from atop the nearby Barr Hill Nature Preserve. Caledonia Spirits was founded on a vision to support working landscapes and local agriculture by making Barr Hill craft spirits from regional raw materials.

Name: Lanchester Wines
Description:
Lanchester Wines has been supplying the highest quality wines and spirits nationwide since 1980. 

We’re an independent, family-owned wine business which allows us to be both flexible and fast-moving.
Established 37 years ago, we’ve never lost focus on what’s important and that’s consistently over-delivering on quality and service.

Our portfolio is relevant and credible with over 3,000 SKUs providing our customers with wines and spirits to meet every requirement, from some of the finest wines in the world through to award-winning house wines.

Lanchester Wines is  powered almost completely by renewable wind and solar energy. This also offsets our transport fleets’ carbon footprint with any excess power feeding into the National Grid making us the greenest liquor company in the world and also the only Carbon Minus one.

Lanchester Wines is part of the Lanchester group of companies which comprises five businesses spanning different areas of expertise within the UK wine sector and its supporting industries: Lanchester Wines, Greencroft Bottling, Lanchester Gifts, Lanchester Energy and Lanchester Properties. Each business within the Lanchester portfolio compliments the other businesses providing a unique full service for customers.

To learn more about the Lanchester Group, please visit www.LanchesterGroup.com

Name: Mas de Daumas Gassac
Description: Within half a century, Mas de Daumas Gassac has reached the rare status of “cult wine” that is only granted to a few exceptional estates.

Name: Maison Wessman
Description:
It took Robert Wessman, fervent wine connoisseur and world traveller, over fifteen years to find what he was looking for. 
12th century Château de Saint-Cernin, home to wine production for centuries with exceptional vineyard micro-parcels in the Bergerac appellation, is the result of this journey and the beginning of our story.

With a clear vision of the incredible potential of Château de Saint-Cernin and an ambitious plan to realise it, Robert Wessman and his partner Ksenia Shakhmanova set out to revive and reinvent the Estate’s ancient wine-making heritage. And so Maison Wessman was born.

Today, we continue to develop the potential of Château de Saint-Cernin, while fulfilling a wider ambition: to craft world class wines from select French terroirs to delight connoisseurs.

Name: Liber Wines
Description:
Buscamos inspiração nos deuses romanos para dar nome à nossa paixão. O deus romano Liber Pater foi tido como deus da viticultura, fertilidade e liberdade. Ele é o deus das festas e da colheita, surgiu antes de Baco e se opôs à servidão, remetendo ao ritual de se oferecer uma bebida e de beber por prazer.

Sendo assim, a Liber Wines é uma importadora que nasceu da paixão pelo vinho, do respeito e da admiração às seculares vinícolas que possuem o dom de transformar uma videira em arte. Vinícolas que se preocupam mais com a qualidade do que com a quantidade, produzindo vinhos que merecem reverência. 

Desde que surgimos em 2019, selecionamos nosso portfólio a partir de uma curadoria que leva em consideração toda a cadeia de produção do vinho. Prezamos por produtores familiares que favorecem os pilares da sustentabilidade em sua relação com a terra e com a comunidade em que estão inseridos, que têm uma história a contar e cujos rótulos são resultado de um árduo trabalho que une tradição e modernidade. 

Buscamos representar cada vinho com exclusividade, pois queremos apresentar a você um mundo novo através de cada garrafa ainda desconhecida. Queremos que se surpreenda e que a cada gole vivencie uma nova experiência. Queremos lhe proporcionar um momento único a partir da degustação de um vinho de qualidade inigualável, obtido com atendimento de excelência, acompanhado de informações precisas e com uma procedência de confiança. 

Assim, somos uma equipe unida em torno de um propósito: que você abra a mente ao novo e compartilhe do espírito Liber Wines. 

Seja bem-vindo. Será um prazer compartilhar com você o nosso mundo e ter você conosco!

Name: Tequila Trujillo
Description:
En 2018 se presenta Trujillo Crystal, El Primer Tequila Blanco Cristalino rompiendo los esquemas tradicionales de las marcas tequileras. 

Tequila Trujillo es una marca de 3 años con increíble crecimiento y fortaleza en Los Altos de Jalisco, expandiendo su presencia en todo Jalisco con enfoque en Vallarta, Los Cabos, Guadalajara, León y otras ciudades con gran crecimiento de nuestro México.

Name: Boas Quintas
Description:
Sociedade Agrícola Boas Quintas was born in the year of 1991, in the recognized wine region of Dão. It all began when Nuno Cancela de Abreu, representative of the 4th generation of a family with farming and winemaking tradition of more than 130 years, decided to devote all of his experience and all of his knowledge in viticulture and oenology, to the service of the project that would allow him to create high quality wines, full of character and personality.

With a new leadership since 2010, by the partners Nuno Cancela de Abreu and Rui Brandão, the company has expanded  to other regions: Bucelas, Setúbal Peninsula, Alentejo, Porto and Douro.

Boas Quintas is now represented in 27 countries and has been distinguished as the Best Wine Company 2016 by Revista de Vinhos. Nuno Cancela de Abreu was recognized as "Winemaker of the Year 2016" in the W Awards, by Aníbal Coutinho. 

With the plurality of wine regions, the philosophy of Boas Quintas is based on diversity and, therefore, believes that each wine carries its own nature and identity.

We firmly believe that the wine begins in the vineyard, being the reflex of the surrounding natural conditions. That's the reason why we are especially careful in dealing with (and respecting) nature.

Brands: Fonte do Ouro, Quinta da Giesta,  Agenda da Vinha, Herdade de Gâmbia, Pica Peixe, Cytisus,  and others.

Name: Vias Imports Ltd
Description:
Vias Imports Ltd., established in 1983, represents the most comprehensive portfolio of Italian wines in the United States. Our portfolio highlights a vast array of over 200 native indigenous varietals that embody the distinct character and terrain of each of Italy’s diverse regions. Our wineries actively maintain and preserve age-old techniques to produce wines of the utmost quality.
Wine education is a pillar of our company’s philosophy and a thread that runs through every element of our work. We strive to educate our customers on the wide range of indigenous Italian varietals by highlighting the history, and uniqueness of the people and places behind these exceptional wines.
Vias Imports is renowned for its long-standing partnerships with wineries of differing sizes throughout Italy and is proud to craft strong relationships. In New York and New Jersey, Vias is both an importer and distributor. In addition to Italy, our portfolio includes wines from Argentina, Austria, France, Lebanon, Spain, and the United States.

Name: Château Latour-Martillac
Description: Château Latour-Martillac, Grand Cru Classé de Graves, AOC Pessac-Léognan

Name: Cave de Lugny
Description:
La Cave de Lugny occupe une place de choix dans le monde viticole. Premier producteur de vins de Bourgogne, elle est également le premier producteur de Mâcon-Villages avec un tiers de la production du Mâconnais. C’est également un opérateur incontournable en Crémant de Bourgogne.

Nous agissons pour une coopérative nouvelle génération, où la priorité est de placer l’homme et son évolution au cœur du développement durable. Nous portons les personnalités et les singularités au service de projets collectifs, nous innovons dans nos métiers, nous poussons la curiosité et les idées originales.

Le bien-être des vignerons et salariés, les perspectives d’avenir, la transmission du patrimoine, l’éthique et le respect des partenaires, tout ceci est notre challenge au quotidien, en prenant le plus grand soin de ne pas dégrader notre Terre, seul véritable gage d’avenir et de durabilité.

Name: Casa Natima
Description:
Distillery of contemporary Mexico inspired by our land of origin, Amatitán, Jalisco. 

Casa Natima, tequilera de origen.

From the heart of the Agave landscape, we establish Casa Natima, a business unit of Grupo Solave, with the vision of bringing a world-class spirit to Mexico and the world. 

We honor every part of the tequila process, from its planting by the hard-working hands of our people in Zona Valles to creating a unique spirit thought for our customers and consumers worldwide.

Name: 8 Doors Distillery
Description:
An independent scotch whisky micro-distillery and visitor centre due to open in late 2021. Located in the Highland village of John O'Groats we will be the UK's most northerly mainland whisky distillery.
Whisky. From the Edge.
To celebrate our launch we've created the 874 Club which offers a limited number of cask and bottle packages that have been developed with Master Whisky Maker John Ramsay.  Founders casks have already sold out, but bottle packages are still available to order through our website.

Name: Almaviva Winery
Description: Almaviva is a wine making company that offers a wide range of handcrafted wines.

Name: GoBar
Description:
Somos la cadena de tiendas de vinos y spirits N.º 1 de la Argentina. Con más de 20 años de trayectoria, nacimos en Mendoza como una empresa joven y dinámica, y hoy lideramos el mercado a nivel nacional con más de 70 sucursales en 14 provincias.

Llegamos a consumidores y empresas a través de cuatro canales de venta: on premise, minorista, mayorista y distribución. Actualmente operamos en Mendoza y distribuimos nuestros productos en todo el país, en el marco de un plan de expansión que sigue creciendo año a año.

Name: Adega Cooperativa de Vidigueira, Cuba e Alvito, CRL
Description:
The Vidigueira, Cuba and Alvito Winemaking Cooperative was founded in 1960, but its chronology goes far beyond its 60 years of existence. It was created to protect the vineyards, the wine and the millennial lifestyle of this wine sub-region and to bring even more renown and quality to the wine produced here.

Over the years, an intense effort has been made to protect the grape varieties and the production techniques, so that, in the Winery's wine heritage, indigenous grape varieties have been discovered, perfected from generation to generation, among which Antão Vaz stands out. This grape variety, recognised as the grape variety of Vidigueira and the Winery's inspirational muse, gives rise to an exceptional white wine whose fame has earned it the title « Alentejo’s White Wine».

With an approximate production of 4.7 million bottles of wine per year and 8 million kilos of grapes per harvest, resulting from the exploration of around 1,500 hectares of vineyard by its around 300 partners, today it is a modern and prominent winery. Never forgetting its origins, it projects itself into the future supported by the people and the quality of the terroir of the wine sub-region.

Name: Champagne Carbon Official
Description:
Champagne Carbon OFFICIAL
 Exclusive partnership with Bugatti.
 DTM’s official champagne.
Shop now  free delivery
www.champagnecarbon.com

Name: Winefully Srl
Description:
Winefully originates from our passion for fine wines and the desire to celebrate their complexity and charm. Our cellar is committed to support the aging of most prestigious and rare bottles, keeping their temperature and humidity constant with a natural environment (an historic basement dated 1800). We store any bottle size including very large formats - Magnum (1.5L), double Magnum (3L) and else - as a further guarantee of quality and longevity of the wine.
We provide a tailor-made service in delivering our precious wines all over the world.
The presence of our sommeliers, always willing to provide professional advices, will enhance your shopping experience.
Based on our professional background in wine trading, we can support your investments, advising your choice and, eventually, storing your bottles in our dedicated area.
The term "Winefully has been coined by Ernest Hemingway in his book “A Farewell to Arms” (1929): this term well represents the emotional dimension we want to convey and share with those who choose to be part of our wine community.

Name: PERLINO S.P.A.
Description:
Perlino SPA is one of the historical major producer of Vermouth and  sparkling wines, operating in Asti since more than a century.
It all started in 1905, in Castello D' Annone, a town near Asti, where Giuseppe Perlino had the idea to begin trading in the finest Asti wines.
In 1930’s, thanks also to additional investments,  the historic production of sparkling wines and vermouths began, joining the piedmontese wines and becoming, over time, the real strength of the company. 
Perlino Vermouth rapidly grew in both domestic and international markets because of its unique recipe. It is now a benchmark for this classic, traditional piedmontese aperitif.  The same has happened with the Sparkling Wines: with over 70 years experience in supplying high quality sparkling wines all over the world, Perlino produces wines that are perfectly in tune with world consumer tastes and trends!

Name: Puklavec Family Wines
Description:
Puklavec Family wines 
Puklavec Family Wines is a family owned winery located in one of the best wine regions of the world: Slovenia. Together with friends and farmers, the family makes white and red wines in the middle to upper range and does so with a true passion. 
Absolute pride and dedicated craftsmanship combine during the production of our high quality wines, made by our family owned winery with an insuppressible power to constantly delight and surprise. Together we work hard to make the best wines, all with the purpose to have as many people as possible enjoy our wines. Because, after all, the best things in life are shared with others.

Currently producing over 4 million liters of wine, Puklavec Family Wines is one of the largest exporter of wines in Slovenia. We offer a wide range of wines in more than 20 markets for different channels. Available on the international market are: puklavec & friends, Seven Numbers and Estate Selection. Within our domestic market (Slovenia) we offer Jeruzalem Ormož. 
For more information visit Puklavec Family Wines at www.puklavecfamilywines.com.

Name: VEEV Spirits, LLC
Description:
About VEEV Spirits
VEEV Spirits LLC was founded by brothers Courtney Reum and Carter Reum in Los Angeles in 2007. What started as a two-man start-up grew into one of the best-selling independent liquor brands in the U.S. VEEV Spirits was ranked amongst the 250 fastest growing companies and brands in the U.S. by Inc. Magazine (September 2011) and won the Technomic Fast 50 Award in 2013.  VEEV is an active member of 1% for the Planet where 1% of topline sales are donated to environmental organizations worldwide. In 2012 VitaFrute Cocktails by VEEV was launched as the first line of organic and all-natural superfruit ready-to-drink premium products under 125 calories per serving and that taste great, naturally. The newest addition to VitaFrute Cocktails by VEEV, Coconut Colada joins the array of flavors including Margarita, Lemonade and Cosmopolitan. In July 2014 VEEV Spirits unveiled VEEV 2.0 with its reformulation from 60 to 70 proof and new positioning as the better alternative to Vodka.  For more information, visit VEEVlife.com and Facebook.com/VEEV, or follow @VEEV on Twitter and @VEEV on Instagram.  A Better Way to Drink.

Name: POURED Inc
Description:
POURED is the most advanced AI-powered SaaS platform on the planet serving the three-tier system of alcohol distribution.  

We exist to solve a $400 million dollar problem – that’s the amount spent each year across the three tiers on manual surveys related to product data collection. With POURED, a few snapshots from your phone yields 360⁰ visibility into product placements across all markets in real time. 

As the overall market for alcohol beverages rapidly changes from all sides, POURED enables beverage distributors to enhance relationships with customers and suppliers alike in far less time by making data collection from restaurants and retail quick, efficient and unobtrusive for distributors of any size. Our platform effectively increases the amount of data collected by 70x, in 80% less time vs. manual collection.
