The beverage industry has been fraught with inadequate data reporting for decades. POURED brings the competitive advantage back to our users, empowering them to operate on the forefront of broad market trends and granular nuances not captured by current data solutions.   

In today’s highly competitive (and now primarily remote) business landscape, productive sales meetings are paramount to success. Through countless conversations with stakeholders at every level of production, distribution, marketing and sales, we created a tool that is valuable to every level of the sales chain.

POURED’s holistic approach to sales accountability not only brings back volumes of data points that salespeople simply walk by every day, but it also allows leadership to easily pass institutional knowledge along to your current and future sales team, helping them be more prepared to make a lasting impact with customers and prospects. 

Collecting and analyzing your product data shouldn’t be an exercise in futility. With POURED, it's as easy as taking a snapshot from your phone.

Name: Chambers & Chambers Wine Merchants
Description: Importer & Distributor of Fine Wine, Spirits, and Sake with offices in California and Hawaii. Since 1973, Chambers & Chambers offers an outstanding portfolio of both domestic and import wines from family-owned estates focusing on quality and sustainability. We employ a passionate, knowledgeable and dedicated staff, while creating a company culture that fosters trust, open communication and personal growth.

Name: Sainte Marguerite en Provence
Description: For 46 years, Sainte Marguerite in Provence has been a success story, but above all, it is a story of passion: that of the Fayard family, whose sole objective since 1977 has been quality. In addition to raising the bar on quality, Sainte Marguerite en Provence has been a forerunner, setting the standard very early on for rosé wines characterized by their finesse, freshness and crystalline color, anticipating new customer expectations. Sainte Marguerite en Provence wines have been certified organic since 2003. In 2022, on the basis of shared values and convictions, the Fayard family and the Pernod Ricard group are joining forces to pursue the development of Sainte Marguerite in Provence, in France and internationally. For the iconic Fantastique Rosé - Château Sainte Marguerite and the emblematic Symphonie Rosé - Maison Sainte Marguerite, the story continues and promises to be even more beautiful...

Name: GameDay Vodka
Description: Our team at GameDay is fueled by a genuine passion for people, community, creativity, and fun. We combined our love for sports, commitment to excellence, and industry knowledge and developed an All-American vodka for the fans. The result is a cleaner, better vodka in a package that captures the true essence of the game. Handcrafted in small batches & distilled 6 times in Charleston, South Carolina, this gluten free vodka is as smooth and crisp as they come.

Name: VOK Beverages
Description:
Vok Beverages was established in 2002 as an independently owned and operated alcohol company and has consistently been one of Australia’s fastest growing beverage companies.  As a sister company to Bickfords Australia, established in 1874, Vok Beverages shares the driving passion for producing outstanding quality beverages.

Today VOK Beverages owns an impressive, highly awarded portfolio of brands across wine, cider, spirits and ready to drinks. Other key assets founding owner and Managing Director Angelo Kotses has acquired include the Step Rd Winery in Langhorne Creek, South Australia, a state of the cellar door and 31 hectares of super-premium vineyards in the picturesque McLaren Vale and the Beenleigh Distillery in Queensland, the oldest registered  Rum distillery in Australia, established in 1884.

From humble beginnings Vok has built the reputation of building brands and returning brands to growth. Vok has leveraged our lead brand, Vok cocktail Liqueurs, to launch products into major spirit segments including Vok 2 litre Ready to Serve Cocktails, Vickers Gin, Rebellion Bay Spiced Rum, Beenleigh Dark Rum, Inner Circle Dark Rum, Bearded Lady Bourbon, Real McCoy Bourbon and our popular Infused Rush ready to drink range.
VOK is your Australian multi beverage solution.

Name: Wine South Africa
Description:
Wine SA is based in Cape Town, South Africa. Our team is proud to have coverage of South Africa as a whole, however the wine farms of the country are pretty much all situated in the Western Cape, with a few exceptions.

To buy wine, buying enquiries and orders, please email us here: buy@wine-sa.com or visit our FAQ page.

Interested in becoming part of our content writing team? Email us at content@wine-sa.com.

Any other queries? Get hold of our Support Team at support@wine-sa.com.

Name: CHATEAU DE FRANCE
Description:
Vignoble familial en PESSAC LEOGNAN depuis 50 ans.
40 hectares de vignes aux portes de Bordeaux. Les vins produits : CHATEAU DE FRANCE - CHATEAU COQUILLAS - LE BEC EN SABOT.
Une gamme de beaux vins rouges et blancs à boire ou à garder.
Certifiés Haute Valeur Environnementale de Niveau 3, nous sommes très sensibles à l'environnement.

Name: Hood River Distillers, Inc
Description:
About Hood River Distillers
Founded in 1934 and headquartered in Hood River, Ore., Hood River Distillers is the Northwest’s largest and oldest importer, distiller, producer, and marketer of distilled spirits. Timberline Vodka, Forthwest Whisky, Big Gin, Batanga Tequila, Easy Rider Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey, Trail’s End Finished Small Batch Bourbon, DeGroff Bitter Aperitivo and New World Amaro, Clear Creek, McCarthy’s Oregon Single Malt, Old Delicious, Sinfire Whisky, Lucid Absinthe Supérieure, ULLR Nordic Libation, Yazi Ginger Vodka, Lewis and Clark, HRD Vodka and the complete line of Monarch distilled spirits are distributed across the country. For the complete product portfolio and more information, visit www.hrdspirits.com

Name: Domaines De Guzzo Palmieri
Description:
Domaines De Guzzo Palmieri It has two distinct lines of business, the Estates and branded wine, united under a single management in the same pursuit of excellence.

The company manages four classified growths in the Ciro appellation. 

The Group owns Ponta, Feudo, Val di Casa and Difesa all producing the best quality of Gaglioppo grape in the region.

Name: Cristo di Campobello
Description:
Dopo decenni trascorsi a coltivare vendemmie, nasce la visione di un nuovo percorso enologico, alla ricerca della qualità assoluta. Con la consapevolezza di avere le risorse giuste, il luogo adatto, uno straordinario microclima e le persone qualificate. Prende così vita l’idea del Baglio del Cristo di Campobello, in un luogo incontaminato, dalle infinite sfumature ambientali, vocato alle tradizioni religiose locali e coltivato con passione e dedizione, con sapienza ed esperienza dai suoi tre “padri di famiglia”. Alla ricerca, con ogni vendemmia, di nuovi traguardi, di una nuova opportunità di miglioramento.

Trenta ettari di vigna della Sicilia agrigentina, organismo unico di dieci microaree, proprietà accorpata di cinquanta ettari a Campobello di Licata. Terreno profondo, misto calcareo e gessoso, di giacitura collinare, tra i 230 e i 270 metri sopra il mare e a 8.000 metri dalla costa. Prevalentemente 5.000 piante per ettaro tutte da primigenio patriarcale della propria terra-madre e tutte vendemmiate a mano, in piccole cassette.

Produzione limitata all’andamento dell’annata, vendemmia a mano solo dopo la piena maturazione, vinificazione individuale per ciascun vigneto, rispetto di un territorio unico e prezioso. Sono solo alcune delle scelte del Baglio del Cristo di Campobello, in una filosofia che privilegia, fin dalle origini, la qualità. Grazie alla tenacia di donne e uomini, alle loro braccia, alla loro testa, al loro cuore, al loro lavoro  – giorno per giorno, tutto l’anno.

Name: Shafer Vineyards
Description: Shafer Vineyards has produced opulent Napa Valley wines since 1978.

Name: Maison Barrière
Description:
Maison Barrière, a renowned wine merchant, has specialized in the Grands Crus Classés of Bordeaux and the world’s finest wines for nearly a century. Established in 1932 as Barrière Frères and now known as Maison Barrière, the company oversees the commercial operations of Grands Millésimes de France—a venture owned by Suntory and Castel, proprietors of Château Beychevelle and Château Beaumont.
Rooted in rich heritage, Maison Barrière curates an exclusive selection of Bordeaux’s most prestigious Grands Crus alongside exceptional wines from around the globe. 
With a presence in over 80 countries, it stands as a symbol of excellence and tradition, offering wines that transcend borders and continue to captivate connoisseurs and collectors worldwide.

Name: Grupo Solar de Samaniego
Description:
Grupo bodeguero familiar con medio siglo de historia, cuenta con viñedos y bodegas propios en dos de las Denominaciones de Origen más reconocidas:
• Bodegas Solar de Samaniego, situada en Laguardia (Álava), dentro de la D.O.Ca. Rioja, es una bodega de arquitectura industrial típica de los años 70, cuyos espectaculares ambientes han sido interpretados para convertirlos en un singular espacio cultural enoturístico.

• Bodegas Durón, en Roa (Burgos) y dentro de la D.O. Ribera del Duero, es un tradicional château rodeado de viñedos, fundado en 1989 y situado en un entorno de gran riqueza histórica y larga tradición enológica.

Además, el Grupo cuenta desde 1980 con uno de los clubs de producto más importantes de España: la Cofradía Solar de Samaniego. Con más de 65.000 miembros, este singular club de vinos ofrece al Cofrade la oportunidad de sentirse como un auténtico bodeguero, además de servicios y propuestas enoturísticas únicas enmarcadas en nuestro proyecto Beber Entre Líneas, que fusiona las culturas del vino y la literatura.

Name: 13 Cent 20
Description:
Distributeur de vins de toute France basé sur Angers.
Nous vous proposons des vins de propriété, vous y retrouverez des vins bio, biodynamie, terra vitis, nature.
Plus de 500 références…. Une large gamme de vins du vignoble français qui régaleront vos palais.
13 Cent 20 c’est goûter, chercher, sélectionner, découvrir, entreposer, livrer auprès des PROFESSIONNELS, Cavistes, Restaurateurs, Epicerie Fines, Hôtels

Name: 13 Cent 20
Description:
Distributeur de vins de toute France basé sur Angers.
Nous vous proposons des vins de propriété, vous y retrouverez des vins bio, biodynamie, terra vitis, nature.
Plus de 500 références…. Une large gamme de vins du vignoble français qui régaleront vos palais.
13 Cent 20 c’est goûter, chercher, sélectionner, découvrir, entreposer, livrer auprès des PROFESSIONNELS, Cavistes, Restaurateurs, Epicerie Fines, Hôtels

Name: BRASSERIE DU COMTE
Description:
La Brasserie du Comté a été créée en 2012 à Saint Martin Vesubie dans le Mercantour.
Fortement attachés à notre patrimoine, passionnés par le brassage et ayant la chance de bénéficier d'eau de source naturelle, élément essentiel pour la fabrication de la bière, nous souhaitons mettre toutes ces ressources en valeur en proposant des bières artisanales Bio de qualités, aux goûts uniques. Les bières que nous vous proposons sont réalisées dans la tradition des brasseurs artisans. Contrairement à la plupart des bières industrielles, nos bières sont non filtrées et non stérilisées pour permettre d’apprécier tous les arômes à la dégustation. 
De plus la refermentation en bouteille permet à nos bières de s'affiner dans le temps à l'instar du vin, elles se bonifient avec l'âge.

Name: Fauve Craft Bière
Description: French craft microbrewery based in Paris (brewpub) and Montpellier (brewery & taproom). We brew create tasty beers served in colorful cans, all illustrated by different artists!

Name: Corsair Artisan Distillery
Description:
Childhood friends, Darek Bell and Andrew Webber, began homebrewing beer and wine in Darek and Amy Lee Bell’s garage. They hit a snag while working on a prototype bio-diesel plant, causing Andrew to remark that making whiskey would be much more satisfying. The idea stuck, and the two soon found themselves studying distilleries and spirits.

Soon after, in 2008, Corsair Distillery was founded in Bowling Green, KY. By 2010, Corsair set its marks where it all started, becoming the first craft distillery in Nashville since prohibition. Corsair’s spirits have been praised in publications like Food and Wine, Saveur, Imbibe, Whisky Magazine, Whisky Advocate, the Atlantic, Time Out New York, and Maxim.com. Corsair’s innovative and adventurous spirits have won over 800 medals at national and international spirits competitions.

As Nashville has grown, Corsair has grown with it. With two Nashville natives at the head of the business, Corsair has expanded greatly since its arrival in 2010. In January 2016, Corsair opened its doors to a second Nashville location, the WeHo Headquarters. Not only did this move create office spaces and more barrel storage, but it allowed for the creation of craft whiskey on a higher production scale. This gave Corsair the opportunity to produce more small batch craft beers at, what is now called, the Marathon Village Brewstillery.

Now, not only can you get craft spirits from Corsair, but also craft beers. Utilizing local farms and Corsair’s local malthouse and smokehouse, we strive to put “Nashville in a bottle”. And as tourism booms and more and more people are moving into Nashville, we only continue to grow around the city we love. To get a closer look at what we are doing here at Corsair, stop by one of our locations for a tour. Handcrafted small batch ultra premium American Booze – Find your Spirit!

Name: Breakthru Beverage South Carolina, formerly Ben Arnold Beverage Company
Description:
On January 4th, 2016, Wirtz Beverage Group and Charmer Sunbelt Group joined together to form Breakthru Beverage Group.  Our local name will change but the same diverse portfolio of premier wine, spirits and beer brands remains and our mission to be “The Distributor of Choice” is our commitment!

Breakthru Beverage Group (BBG) is the most progressive distributor in the state of South Carolina. Formed in 1935, as Ben Arnold Beverage Co., BBG provides for the wine and spirit needs of the state through its distribution locations in Columbia, Greenville, Charleston, Myrtle Beach, and Hilton Head.  The company employs approximately 400 associates and distributes over 2.5 million cases per year. 

Breakthru Beverage Group of South Carolina is a member of the Breakthru Beverage Group, a group of privately held companies. BBG operates local distributor and/or brokerage houses in 22 markets, one of the nation’s leading distributors of fine wines, spirits, beer, and other beverages.

Name: Château Lamothe-Bergeron
Description:
Propriété viticole située dans le Médoc entre les célèbres appellations de Margaux et Saint-Julien, le Château Lamothe Bergeron reçoit les professionnels pour des journées Team Building, des séminaires et des soirées d'affaires. 

Le château dispose de plusieurs espaces dans sa bâtisse du XIXème siècle entièrement rénovée ainsi que dans ses chais.

Récompensée aux Best Of Wine Tourism, la propriété propose également un parcours de visite ludique, interactif et pédagogique: une expérience unique dans le vignoble bordelais pour un séjour inoubliable.

En février 2020, le château Lamothe Bergeron intègre le nouveau classement 2020 des Crus Bourgeois du Médoc ! Ce classement est la promesse d’un savoir-faire, hérité de l’audace et de l’exigence qualitative de vignerons et de professionnels passionnés.

Name: Beyond Wines Ltd.
Description: We are a small but ambitious team, dedicated to putting our customers and consumers first. We make exciting and differentiated wine brands and pull inspiration from outside the traditional linear wine environment. Innovation, proactiveness, exploration and a willingness to say yes are at our core...

Name: Domaine de la Mongestine
Description:
Located in Artigues, between Rians and Esparron, north of the Sainte Victoire mountain, the estate is the highest vineyard of the Coteaxu d’Aix-en-Provence appellation. Fully replanted since 2001, the estate has been certified organic since 2014. The vines enjoy a privileged microclimate, late and ventilated by the mistral, slightly sloping to the south to a mountain that ensures the necessary hygrometry. The diversity and quality of the grape varieties favor the complexity of the cuvées, whether in IGP or protected appellation AOP Coteaux d'Aix-en-Provence. The estate has renewed its production facilities since the acquisition of the property, with a powerful cooling group, stainless refrigerated steel tanks to enable better vinifications of the selected plots. In addition to the large concrete tanks, a legacy of the old cellar, concrete egg tanks and a set of new barrels will complete the equipment. There are many projects underway. The estate now offers a traditional cuvée, "Les Monges", in the three colors,  a more prestigious one, the "M" range, issued from older plots, as well as a few very limited and restricted cuvées made as pure natural wine.

Follow the news on the Domaine de la Mongestine and add your clicks and comments on Facebook https://www.facebook.com/lamongestine/  and Instagram #domainedelamongestine,

And come and see us in the marvelous and protected region !

Name: WEINVOGEL SA
Description:
Seit Jahrzehnten für Sie da.

Seit mehr als hundert Jahren ist die Familie Vogel mit Südtirol und seinen Weinen verbunden. Urgrossvater Oskar Vogel (1877-1956) baute für das damals bedeutende Bozner Weinhaus Cembran den Schweizer Absatzmarkt auf. Zunächst von Buchs SG, ab 1924 von Zürich aus. Sein Sohn Georg (1909-1996) gründete 1934 die Weinimportfirma in Zürich, welche auch heute noch seinen Namen trägt. 1969 trat dessen Sohn Marco in die Firma ein und seit 2007 ist mit Sebastian die vierte Generation im Weinhandel mit Südtirol & Italien & Österreich tätig.

Die Firma Weinvogel SA führt Weine aus hauptsächlich aus den Anbaugebieten des Südtirols und sowie eine Auswahl an Weinen aus Italien und Österreich. Solide Verbindungen zu bewährten Spitzenproduzenten garantieren authentische Weine mit unverkennbarem Terroir-Charakter. Da die Familie Vogel auf dem Premstallerhof in St. Magdalena bei Bozen selber Rebbau betreibt, werden die Partner und ihre Weine mit Sachverstand ausgesucht.

Name: Baron Francois
Description:
Baron Francois was founded in 1982 by Adrien Baron, and rapidly became well known as a key supplier of the finest restaurants in New York city.
In March 2000, Adrien has turned over the company to the Lesgourgues family, a vintner and distiller family for three generations.

The Lesgourgues produce and distribute, among other fine estates, the acclaimed Château de Laubade Bas Armagnacs and the rising star of the Graves, Château Haut Selve (Bordeaux).
Currently, Denis Lesgourgues leads Baron Francois Ltd and its team of hard working and passionate employees.

Almost 100% of the wines in Baron Francois’ extensive portfolio are single vineyard wines, from independent wine producers with whom the company maintains faithful relations vintage after vintage.

Baron Francois’ Selection Committee has the objective to select only very elegant and well-balanced wines at a reasonable price.

Name: Grupo Bodegas Olarra
Description:
El Grupo Bodegas Olarra nace en 1973 con la construcción, a las afueras de Logroño, de una bodega para grandes vinos de Rioja. Técnicas modernas, bajo una cultura tradicional. En 1985 surge Bodegas Ondarre, que exprime al máximo la tipicidad de los viñedos y la diversidad de suelos de Viana. Allí se elaboran vinos de larga crianza y los primeros cavas del grupo. En el año 2000, se inicia el proyecto de Bodegas y Viñedos Casa del Valle que, con la misma filosofía que los vinos de pago, sigue el clásico modelo Château.

Bodegas Olarra is located on the outskirts of Logroño, right in the heart of the Denominación de Origen Calificada Rioja and within the prestigious Rioja Alta sub-district.
 
Since it was founded in 1973, Olarra has been characterised by the beauty and complexity of its facilities, known as the Cathedral of Rioja, with its unique 'Y' shaped ground plan, as well as its 111 hexagonal "egg box" domes.

Name: Taster Wine A/S
Description:
Taster Wine A/S is the biggest privatly owned and independent wine and spirits company in Denmark. We import wine and spirits from all over the world both in bottle as well as in bulk. Our facilities include both storage, production and bottling of the products we import.

Our customers  can be found in all segments of the Danish market: restaurants, fine wine shops, supermarkets, etc.

Name: inquilino vinhos
Description:
Somos o inquilino vinhos, um movimento em prol da democratização do consumo do vinho brasileiro. Esse complexo de vira-lata é brega demais, e o vinho brasileiro tem provado isso nos últimos anos.

O trabalho do inquilino é árduo, porém simples: garimpamos pequenos produtores artesanais Brasil afora e criamos rótulos exclusivos e limitados, pensando em um público mais jovem e em busca de um vinho sem tantas formalidades. 

Atualmente, trabalhamos em conjunto com 5 pequenas vinícolas familiares, que plantam, colhem e vinificam saborosos e acessíveis vinhos tintos, brancos, rosés e espumantes.

Name: Bodegas Sonsierra
Description:
En Bodegas Sonsierra, creada en 1961, siempre hemos sido una marca vanguardista en el contexto del vino de Rioja en el que, desde nuestra fundación, hemos luchado por empujar los límites más allá, buscando la innovación con nuestros vinos y con proyectos como el desarrollado con el diseñador David Delfín, con los que hemos revolucionado el sector.
 
Fuimos la primera cooperativa en Rioja que comenzó a comercializar vinos embotellados y a poner en valor la calidad y la singularidad de los excepcionales viñedos de la subzona de Rioja Alta, siendo los pioneros en indicar esta procedencia en sus etiquetas.

En nuestras instalaciones elaboramos los vinos que han comenzado a hacerse en el viñedo prestando la misma atención al detalle y utilizando tanto técnicas tradicionales como los últimos avances tecnológicos para controlar la máxima calidad durante el proceso.
Location: San Vicente de la Sonsierra, La Rioja

Name: Domaines Laujac
Description:
Domaines Laujac, propriété familiale au cœur du Médoc. 

Le vaste domaine de Laujac, au cœur du Médoc, s’étend sur une superficie totale de 400 hectares dont 75 hectares de vigne.

Il englobe deux vignobles classés crus bourgeois en 1932 : celui de Laujac sur la belle croupe de graves filtrantes, assurant un excellent drainage naturel, et celui de Laffitte dans les sols argilo-calcaires proches du village de Bégadan.

La proximité de l’estuaire de la Gironde et de l’océan Atlantique créent un microclimat très favorable au vignoble et à la bonne maturation des raisins.

Au pied des vignes, s’étendent les grasses prairies du polder endigué où pacagent paisiblement le troupeau de bovins limousines et les chevaux de selle français élevés à Laujac.

Name: Singani Casa Real
Description:
Singani Casa Real is the result of an initiative undertaken by the Sociedad Agroindustrial del Valle Ltda. (SAIV) to produce the best singanis in the valley of Tarija.  
Inspired by a long family tradition, Don Luis Granier Ballivián founded the SAIV with the intention of expanding his father-in-law’s development, which was the establishment of the first industrialized distillery in the Valley of Cinty, close to Tarija. 
SAIV designated Santa Ana la Nueva, 11 miles from Tarija, as the ideal location for the new endeavor.  
The determination to cultivate the vines in Santa Ana was the result of research which showed that the site was optimal for grape-growing; The combination of a benign and dry climate and an altitude of 6,562 feet, give Santa Ana high sun exposure, which in turn creates a natural microclimate that results in grapes with a especial aroma, quality and taste. Casa Real uses these grapes to distill its singani. 
Today, the Granier family continues to build upon their fourth generation of excellence in wines and singanis. Being an industry leader, Casa Real knows that without vision and effort, their privileged natural location would not yield the distinction they sought for on its own. Thus the SAIV complements the natural elements of the Santa Ana Valley with constant human development, which lead to skilled workers, and high capital development to bring latest in French technology, including French alembics and grafted vines brought form southern France.

Description:

Name: Opteam Spirit - groupe La Martiniquaise-Bardinet
Description:
Depuis plus de 16 ans, Op’team Spirit est la force de vente supplétive, experte et innovante dans la commercialisation de boissons festives, alcoolisées comme non-alcoolisées en Grande Distribution. 

 Nous sommes fiers de distribuer pour le groupe La Martiniquaise-Bardinet & Marie Brizard Wine and Spirit, leader des boissons festives en France, des marques connues et reconnues dans le monde entier : 
Les vodkas Poliakov et Sobieski, le gin Gibson’s, les rhums Saint James et Old Nick, le whisky William Peel, la cachaça Aguacana, les jus Caraïbos et encore bien d’autres marques iconiques pour tous les moments de joie et de partage.

 Op’team Spirit c’est également des partenariats. Toute marque cherchant à se développer en grande distribution peut faire appel à notre force de vente. La brasserie Castelain (bières Ch’ti, Jade, etc.) et la coopérative Jaillance nous confient déjà la commercialisation de leurs produits sur le circuit proximité.

 La force de vente Op’team Spirit en 2024, c’est un gain de DN de plus de 35 000 références, c’est 5 000 mises en avant réalisées et c’est plus de 1 300 dégustations effectuées en magasin. 

 Cette excellence est possible grâce à l'agilité de notre équipe de 37 commerciaux sur le terrain. Celle-ci est spécialisée sur 2 circuits : 
-	Les supermarchés : sur toute la France
-	Les commerces de proximité : Expert sur ce circuit depuis 2008 

 Chez Op'team, nous accompagnons quotidiennement nos collaborateurs dans le développement de leur carrière professionnelle. La plupart de nos profils sont juniors, sortis d’école et au début de leur carrière. Notre volonté est de les former, les accompagner et les faire évoluer au sein de notre groupe. 

 Candidats ou partenaires potentiels, prenez part à l’aventure et rejoignez-nous ! contact@opteam-spirit.fr

Name: Mähler-Besse
Description:
Maison Mähler-Besse has been established in the heart of Bordeaux's Chartrons district since 1892. Renowned for its unique cellar of exceptional wines - Grands Crus Classés, old vintages - it cultivates a special relationship with the Châteaux. The House also stands out for its emblematic properties, such as Cheval Noir and Château Picard, and exclusive cuvées. 
Backed by its long-standing expertise, Mähler-Besse offers a cutting-edge selection of spirits, enhanced by a 50-year partnership with the Glenfarclas distillery.

Name: R&B Distillers
Description:
R&B Distillers are headquartered in Edinburgh. In September 2017, we opened our first distillery on the Isle of Raasay in the Inner Hebrides. 

The company was co-founded in 2014 by Scottish entrepreneurs Bill Dobbie and Alasdair Day, with the ambition of becoming Scotland’s leading artisanal distiller.

As one of the few Scottish-owned Scotch whisky companies, run by a team of innovators, we have the independence and imagination to create exciting new Scotch whisky styles and provenance. 

Our current portfolio includes:
Isle of Raasay Hebridean Single Malt Scotch Whisky
Isle of Raasay Hebridean Gin
The Tweeddale – super premium historic blend established in Coldstream in 1820.

Name: Whisky Rozelieures
Description:
Rozelieures, c’est l’histoire un peu folle d’une famille visionnaire qui a su transformer l’exploitation familiale en fer de lance du whisky français. Mieux que cela, c’est aujourd’hui l’une des rares marques de whisky au monde qui possède en propriété et maîtrise 100% de sa fabrication. 
Céréales, maltage, brassage, distillation et vieillissement, tout est fait maison-autonomie énergétique incluse-dans un rare et unique modèle d’intégration verticale.
Bienvenue à la ferme …. Du XXIeme siècle !

Name: Holladay Distillery
Description:
It all started with the limestone spring. First discovered in what would become Weston, Missouri, by Lewis and Clark during their 1804 expedition, a pure limestone spring was a rarity whose potential was recognized by two enterprising young brothers by the names of Ben Holladay and Major David Holladay. After visiting the site, which was then a meat-packing house, the Holladay brothers divined an even greater purpose for that limestone spring: Bourbon. 
Together, they founded this distillery in 1856.  

The Holladay Distillery evolved as the decades passed, changing ownership and names a number of times before ultimately becoming known as McCormick Distilling Company in 1942. Acquired in 1993 by Ed Pechar, Mike Griesser, and a small group of private investors, the distillery has since grown in size and expanded its portfolio of products. In 2016, the distillery commemorated 160 years of rich history and paid homage to its founders by going back to its bourbon-making roots and bearing the proud name of Holladay Distillery, operated by McCormick Distilling Company.

Name: Montauk Distilling Co.
Description:
When we set out in 2013 to create a new spirit brand, we had three clear words firmly in our mind:  SMOOTH SOPHISTICATED & SUPREME 

Montauk Distilling Company was founded in August 2013. It’s a small craft distillery located in Riverhead NY on the north shore of Long Island. We handcraft, distill and bottle in small batches yielding an exclusive taste. This is where our artists and entrepreneurs pursue their vision without budgeting for regret. We could be nowhere else. From seed to sip, inside Montauk Distilling, you’ll witness the creation of modern spirits. These spirits don’t come to life until they’re shared, the easy sociability of our tasting room and event center, it holds the complete the experience. Our Mission is to make world class spirits for world class
individuals.
Our award winning spirits are available through Opici Family Distributors NY, CT, DC, NJ, DE & MD.

Name: CHEVAL QUANCARD
Description:
Viticulteur et négociant-éleveur depuis 1844, Cheval Quancard est une maison historique de Bordeaux, familiale et indépendante.
A La tête d’une dizaine de domaines répartis sur la Rive Droite (Lalande de Pomerol, Montagne Saint Emilion…) et la Rive Gauche (Haut Médoc Cru Bourgeois, Saint Estèphe…), Cheval Quancard cultive aussi un savoir-faire de Négociant-Eleveur : à l’aide d’achats soignés et de partenariats noués avec plusieurs vignerons nous signons des cuvées de classe représentatives de leur AOC, avec un élevage maison dans nos chais pour proposer un rapport qualité/prix/plaisir toujours maximal. 
Les Cuvées Clémence & Hortense en Entre Deux Mers et notre Cheval Quancard Réserve sont les symboles de ce savoir-faire !
Enfin nous distribuons des exclusivités/domaines partenaires ainsi qu’une sélection de Grands Crus Classés (Primeurs & Livrables)
• Certification IFS depuis 2009 au niveau supérieur
• Certification BIO en tant que transformateur depuis 2007
• Norme ISO 14001, Système de Management Environnemental (SME)

Name: Bodega Chakana
Description:
Bodega Chakana nació el 2 de mayo de 2002 y está ubicada en Agrelo, Luján de Cuyo, provincia de Mendoza. Su fundador, Juan Pelizzatti, la inauguró ese día sin saber que coincidía con el comienzo del nuevo año agrícola de las culturas andinas, y que es cuando la Cruz del Sur (a la que los pueblos originarios de los Andes centrales llaman “Chakana”) asume una posición vertical respecto al Polo Sur.

Su objetivo es crear vinos que basados en el espíritu y sabiduría de las antiguas civilizaciones de la zona andina, apuntando a un público que disfrute de su consumo como un ritual y de las nuevas experiencias. Los vinos Chakana se dividen en tres rangos: Chakana Yaguareté Collection, Chakana Reserve y Chakana State Collection; cada uno de ellos ha recibido diversos premios tanto nacionales como internacionales.

Name: Vins du Monde
Description:
Vins du Monde est une société pionnière dans l’importation et la distribution de vins prestigieux en France depuis 1995. Inspirés par nos sens pour ouvrir la France aux vins du monde par la découverte des plus beaux terroirs.
Nous représentons 70 vignerons, de 22 pays différents avec une gamme de 350 cuvées.
.
Vins du Monde is a pioneer Wine importer of the finest wines of the world since 1995. Over the years, the company has been able to build trust with both wine estates an french on-trade actors.
Inspired by our senses to open France to foreign wine through the worlds most beautiful terroirs.
We represent 70 winemakers from 22 different countries with a range of 350 wines.

Name: Château Canon
Description: On the limestone plateau overlooking Saint-Émilion, Château Canon. A sunny estate, vineyards running, joy in the garden, an eye on the river beyond. A guardian of brilliance and exception. Dive into a land of legendary wines.

Name: Feddie Ocean Distillery
Description: We are a whisky distillery at Fedje, an island out west in Norway. We aim to contribute to growth and new opportunities on the island of Fedje, and we’re committed to working towards a bolder and more equal future.

Name: Tonnellerie Damy
Description: La Tonnellerie Damy, représente le savoir-faire et la passion de 3 générations successives au service des grands vins du monde entier.

Name: Jean Geiler
Description:
Créée en 1926 par 36 vignerons, issus d’Ingersheim et des villages avoisinants, la Cave Jean Geiler est aujourd’hui, fière de regrouper 235 vignerons dans cet élan coopératif et solidaire. Elle dispose d’un extraordinaire patrimoine : un vignoble de 650 hectares répartis sur une mosaïque de sols et de terroirs… dont pas moins de 14 terroirs classés en Alsace Grands Crus et de grande réputation.

La passion des vignerons, leur patience, l’attachement à notre région, à nos racines ont toujours été les piliers de la philosophie de la Cave et leur dévotion sans faille se traduit par ces principes simples et immuables : la quête de l’excellence et d'authenticité et le partage de leur passion pour nos terroirs à travers les cépages d’Alsace.

La Cave Jean Geiler se distingue par la spécificité de son vignoble et la diversité de ses Vins et Crémants d’Alsace. L’empreinte du terroir, la passion de ses Hommes confère aux Vins d’Alsace Jean Geiler une touche à la fois singulière et complexe. Une riche gamme de vins d’Alsace, de vins de terroirs, d’Alsace Grands Crus et de Crémants d’Alsace, qui restent accessibles à tous et dont le rapport qualité/prix/plaisir a fait l’excellente réputation.

Name: Schenk family Italia
Description: Schenk Family Italia è tra le più significative realtà vitivinicole a livello nazionale. Fondata nel 1952 a Reggio Emilia, nel 1960 l’azienda ha trasferito la propria sede a Ora (BZ), dove è nata la prima cantina legata al territorio di produzione.

Name: Château EDMUS
Description: Created 10 years ago with Stéphane Derenoncourt on a fine gravel vein, Château EDMUS is a small treasure of only 6,000 bottles per year. Converted to organic, it begins its conversion to biodynamics on its 1.6 hectares of Merlot and Cabernet Franc. Always well rated, it has even already obtained 93pts / 100, identical to the "Grand Cru Classés". The 2014 vintage has just been launched. It guarantees immediate pleasure and will continue to improve for many years.

Name: CedarCreek Estate Winery
Description:
We are rooted in connection—to the land we care for and to the Okanagan Valley we call home. From the earth, to our hands, to your table, each wine forges a long line of connection that brings us all closer together.  From our 50-acre property along the shores of Lake Okanagan, winemaker Taylor Whelan is building upon three decades of winemaking history and defining a new chapter with bright, expressive, North Okanagan Pinot Noir, Chardonnay, and aromatic white wines. 

Our Wine
Through thoughtful viticulture and considerate winemaking, we craft bright, expressive, and innovative Pinot Noir, Chardonnay, and aromatic white wines that—year after year—show the vibrancy and life in the Okanagan. We capture a unique combination of season and site and bottle it for you to enjoy.  

We are among the first in the Okanagan to produce single-block wines that are vineyard-led. This approach tells the story of the unique blocks in our vineyards that naturally produce more intense, complex fruit, which our team isolates, picks, ferments, and bottles separately to capture their distinct character.

Our Land
On our fifty-acre Home Block Vineyard, situated along the shores of Lake Okanagan, we are building upon three decades of winemaking, and defining a new chapter with completely organic farming. To do this, we are nurturing a natural ecosystem and farming holistically. Our land is a web that all works together—plants and insects, chickens, worm and bees—all call this place home and each plays a role in getting the best quality out of the grapes. This vibrant ecosystem creates a crucial balance, preventing the need for herbicides and pesticides—giving you a completely natural expression of our land in every glass.

Name: Robiza Rosé
Description:
Eco-luxury wines inspired by magic nature promoting holistic well-being. Boutique Winery from 1870

Name: cocacola 234

Creating a World Without Waste
The interconnected global challenges of packaging waste and climate change have made this a focus for our business and we are taking a hard look at the packaging we use and how we can drive change.

Name: Champagne Edouard Duval
Description:
Champagne Edouard Duval is a family-owned Champagne house rooted in a historic 28-hectare monopole, Sainte-Eulalie, located in the heart of the Côte des Bar.

Our vineyards are planted on Kimmeridgian limestone soils, identical to those of Chablis, giving our wines precision, depth, and a strong gastronomic identity. Each cuvée is shaped by time, terroir, and a meticulous approach to viticulture and vinification.

Committed to sustainable practices, the estate is HVE Level 3 and VDC certified, reflecting our long-term vision for responsible Champagne growing.

Edouard Duval Champagnes are crafted for the table and trusted by top restaurants, fine wine merchants, and premium hospitality partners. Today, the house is distributed in 27 countries worldwide, working closely with importers and distributors who share our values of authenticity, craftsmanship, and excellence.

A grower’s Champagne, designed for gastronomy and international markets.

Name: ETS Laboratories
Description:
ETS Laboratories is an independent, ISO-accredited wine and spirits laboratory headquartered in Saint Helena, CA. We've worked since 1978 to develop new and innovative tools to support winemakers locally and across the globe. 

Our commitment to our customers, rigorous quality control, and dedication to cutting edge technologies continue to make ETS the nation's leading wine laboratory.

Name: Salon des Vins de Loire
Description: Créé en 1987, le Salon des Vins de Loire reste centré sur une expérience unique, cœur de Loire, sur et pour le territoire, en mettant en avant les multiples facettes du vignoble et de la production, ainsi que la diversité des modes de consommation.

Name: Freixenet Mionetto USA
Description:
Welcome to Freixenet Mionetto USA, one of the largest sparkling wine companies in the U.S. Freixenet Mionetto USA is a culmination of devotion to the art of winemaking. With global success drawn from an equal blend of quality, passion, and innovation, Freixenet and Mionetto have joined forces to provide a one-stop shop to meet industry and consumer needs for all-things-sparkling wine.

Both family-owned companies with deep-rooted traditions from our native lands, Freixenet and Mionetto are proven masters of their craft. Freixenet’s story stems from the Penedès region of Spain, where our first Cava was released in 1914. With similarly humble roots, Mionetto’s heritage sprouted in the heart of the Italian Prosecco region in 1887 and was the brand that introduced Prosecco to the United States in 1998. Today, we both continue our tradition of innovation and providing quality, premium wines.

Name: Fratelli Vineyards
Description:
Fratelli is one of India’s leading wine producer and largest privately owned wine estate.
Fratelli which means ‘brothers’ in Italian, is a shared dream between 3 families and a Tuscan winemaker with an experience of over 50 vintages.

The idea was always to be an estate owned vineyard allowing us to produce great quality wines from Indian terroir.
Our vineyards of 240+ acres are located in Akluj, which is 3 hours south of Pune in the Sholapur region of Maharashtra state.

Our 5mn capacity winery  is a first of its kind structure for any Indian wine company which is embellished with state of the art plant and machinery.
It has and installed capacity of over 2 million litres and equipped with multi-capacity tanks especially imported from Velo, Italy -a first by any wine company in Asia. 

We produce and bottle about 28 different labels across various categories. Our wines have won 60+ awards and medals including  the prestigious Decanter world wine, Decanter Asia wine, SWA, Wine enthusiast and many more.

Welcome to the world of Fratelli

Name: Vinatis.com
Description:
La société VINATIS a été créée en 2002 par une jeune équipe de professionnels du vin et de l'internet. Rapidement, VINATIS s'est entouré des meilleures compétences afin d'assurer à ses clients les meilleures sources d'approvisionnement, de stockage, de logistique et de ventes pour devenir aujourd'hui un leader du marché de la vente de Vins & Champagnes par correspondance sur le marché français.

VINATIS développe aujourd’hui une forte culture de la vente 'on-line' et est reconnu comme l'un des principaux acteurs du marché. Nous offrons des garanties optimum :
- Livraison express en 24 H ou standard sous 3 jours sur toute la France et plus de 15 pays en Europe. Tarifs de transport parmi les plus bas en France.
- Paiement sécurisé en ligne, par tel, par chèque et par virement.
- Service clientèle parmi les plus performants (96 % des clients attendent moins de 11 s. sur notre standard téléphonique) 
- Prix compétitifs (Vinatis vous rembourse la différence si vous trouvez le même produit moins cher sur un autre site internet)
Véritable conseiller dans vos choix et opportunités d'achat, nous nous imposons un travail de sélection draconien. Chaque jour, nous dégustons, recherchons et sélectionnons les meilleures opportunités du marché. Chaque jour, nous allons au contact des producteurs, des négociants, des nouveautés, pour vous offrir toujours plus au meilleur prix possible.

Name: London Competitions
Description:
The London Competition looks to recognise, reward and help promote wine, beer, and spirit brands that have successfully been created to identify with and target a specific drinker. For any brand to earn its place on a retailer’s shelf or a restaurant’s wine/beer/spirits list -  and then vitally stay there - they need to be marketable and consumer driven and not just produced in the general hope it can find enough people willing to sell and buy it.

That is why the London Competition is different. It will single out and shine the spotlight on those wine, beer, and spirit brands that consumers really want to buy and have a clear market value for trade buyers.

Name: Grand Royal Group International
Description:
Founded in 1995, Grand Royal Group (previously IBTC Group of Company) quickly established a reputation for providing customers and consumers with exceptional products and outstanding service.

Our first brands, Grand Royal Whisky and Royal Dry Gin were followed by Eagle Whisky, Grand Royal Special Reserve Whisky and Double Gold Whisky, each of which is now an iconic brand in Myanmar.

Our mission is to be the most admired Consumer Products company in Myanmar with clear market leadership, through a constant focus on our Consumers and Innovation, whilst being responsible towards our communities.

We are an ISO certified Distillery in Yangon awarded Environmental Management System (EMS) certification under ISO 14001:2004 and the "First distillery in Myanmar to be Certified."

Find us on:
Facebook: www.facebook.com/GrandRoyalGroup
Instagram: www.instagram.com/grandroyal.enjoylife
Location: Man Aung Ward, Tamwe Township, Yangon, Myanmar., Yangon

Name: MONIN Europe Middle-East Africa
Description:
Our internationally-acclaimed, premium French brand delivers innovative, gourmet flavour solutions built on a bedrock of more than a century of traditional artisanal beverage know-how. Having remained a family-owned company since 1912, MONIN is now a trusted partner and a brand of choice for hospitality professionals in more than 150 countries.

Today, with the third generation of the MONIN family driving the company forward, we champion premium-quality, creativity and innovation, while remaining faithful to our French heritage. A dynamic market leader and major player on the international stage of the drinks industry, we offer an unrivalled product portfolio. Our six ranges include syrups, fruit mixes, sauces, frappes, liqueurs and smoothies. They are available in more than 150 flavours and in nineteen different formats. Combined with our local knowledge and five production facilities worldwide, this means that our international product development is second-to-none.

MONIN is more than a drinks solution, it’s a way of living… a genuine brand experience based on our centenary brand values. It’s about giving pleasure and enjoyment by using only the best natural ingredients in the most exciting and creative way. It’s about authentic taste sensations and consistently high-quality, first-rate consumer experiences, achieved with a respect for our environment.

Our personality is open-minded, gourmet, passionate, curious and expert: we are the best we can be, open to new ideas, always pushing the boundaries, constantly asking questions, seeking to endlessly inspire.
Don’t just take our word for it! When we polled our customers, they referred to us as “expert”, “trusted leader”, “a premium brand” and described our products as “authentic” and as “offering the broadest range ever”.

Name: Bodegas Barbadillo S.A.
Description: wines and spirits company born in 1821 in Sanlucar de Barrameda, Cádiz. nowdays one of the most important winery in Spain

Name: Adega Mayor
Description:
VINHOS DE UM ALENTEJO MAYOR.
O sonho antigo do comendador Rui Nabeiro ganhou vida pela mão de Siza Vieira, um dos mais reputados arquitetos portugueses. A Adega Mayor, a primeira adega de autor em Portugal, surpreende a planície alentejana de Campo Maior com um edifício imponente e minimalista. 

Aqui produzem-se vinhos premiados e reconhecidos pela crítica nacional e internacional. A sua forte personalidade alentejana é desenhada numa terra marcada pelo clima, solo e castas, originando o caráter e perfil único dos nossos vinhos.

Name: Whiskies du Monde
Description:
Ancien directeur des ventes France d’une grande maison de Cognac, Alain Pontoizeau débute son activité de distribution de whiskies en obtenant l’exclusivité de quelques belles marques. Le catalogue s’étoffe vite et face au développement de l’entreprise, Arnaud, son fils, jeune diplômé à l’époque, le rejoint rapidement. 

Ensemble, ils développent l’activité et assurent la pérennité du groupe «Les Whiskies du Monde» en proposant chaque année de nouvelles marques. En 2010, Arnaud tente l’aventure japonaise en allant sur place à la rencontre de producteurs de whiskies notamment. Il reviendra de ce premier voyage conquis par la qualité des whiskies et par cette formidable aventure humaine au pays du Soleil Levant. Les Whiskies du Monde obtiendront la distribution exclusive, sur toute l’Europe, des marques qui lui seront confiées. Face à ce succès sans précédent, sa sœur Florence, riche de ses différentes expériences commerciales, rejoindra également l’entreprise familiale. Avec une attention portée sur chaque détail, Florence apporte un regard novateur sur ce marché avec une réelle volonté de s’affranchir des codes traditionnels du whisky.

TROIS PERSONNALITÉS. LA MÊME PASSION !

Name: INNO'VIN
Description: INNO'VIN est le cluster de la filière vitivinicole. Ses trois missions sont l'animation d'un réseau d'entreprise, l'ingénierie de projets et les services personnalisés à ses adhérents. Il accompagne les entreprises dans leurs projets de R&D. Plus d'infos sur www.innovin.fr

Name: Italian Wine Brands S.p.A.
Description: We are one of the largest private Italian wine groups, the first to be listed on the Milan stock exchange. We produce quality wines from the best-known Italian wine-making regions, and we distribute them globally through various sales channels.

Name: Bottega S.p.A.
Description:
Bottega is a successful family company located in Bibano, Treviso (45 km North of Venice) that produces and distributes typical Italian premium quality beverages and food products to a global market. 
Bottega is a third generation business, today led by Barbara, Sandro, and Stefano Bottega. Headquarters are located in a 17th-century farmhouse, renovated to preserve the original architectural and environmental characteristics, surrounded by 10 hectares of vineyards. 
The group also manages a winery in Valpolicella and two in Montalcino: here, the great red wines of the Veneto and Tuscany, including Amarone and Brunello, are produced.
The company manages several different brands, amongst which are Alexander, Bottega and Cantina dei Poeti. With the goal of producing and distributing the best Italian wine, grappa, spirits, and food all over the world, Bottega advocates Quality (Italian taste and authenticity), Design (expression of the excellent aesthetic character of being made in Italy) and Social Responsibility towards the environment and the community.

Name: Nova Aliança Vinícola Coop.
Description:
A Nova Aliança Vinícola Cooperativa une a força, a experiência e a solidez de uma história de 95 anos de cinco tradicionais cooperativas vitivinícolas da Serra Gaúcha: Cooperativa São Victor, Cooperativa São Pedro, Cooperativa Linha Jacinto, Cooperativa Aliança e Cooperativa Santo Antônio. Juntas, decidiram se transformar em uma única família, reunindo pessoas, valores e histórias para formar a Nova Aliança Vinícola Cooperativa, que tem a missão de criar experiências positivas para a sociedade por meio da uva de seus cooperados e um futuro de oportunidades e desenvolvimento com o firme propósito de ser referência em seus segmentos de atuação e reconhecida pela atitude cooperativa e sustentabilidade.

A busca do novo faz parte do dia a dia da Nova Aliança Vinícola Cooperativa. Sempre atenta às demandas do mercado e mantendo seus princípios de cooperação, desenvolvimento sustentável e de inovação, tem em sua infraestrutura com fortes investimentos em tecnologia uma de suas fortalezas aliado ao atendimento aos rigorosos padrões nos processos de produção. Possui uma das maiores e mais modernas plantas industriais de suco de uva integral da América Latina, localizada na matriz, em Flores da Cunha, que conta com uma área construída de 24 mil metros quadrados e processa cerca de 40 milhões de quilos de uva por ano.
Location: Flores da Cunha, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: The Whisky Exchange
Description:
The Whisky Exchange is the largest online specialist retailer of whiskies and fine spirits in the world. We’re very proud of our range – more than 4,000 whiskies and counting – as well as our diverse collection of spirits and sparkling wines.

We make it easy for our customers to find the right bottle, whether it’s a smoky single malt, a rich dark rum or an elegant vintage Champagne, and we understand the pleasure of sharing a bottle of something special. Our size and reputation in the industry means we are first in the queue when it comes to allocations of limited-edition whiskies; we also have a huge range of old and rare products.

Our shop in Covent Garden is a treasure trove for spirits lovers, with an entire floor dedicated to whisky, and run by a team of experts keen to help customers find something special. We’re passionate about drinks, and this thirst for knowledge runs through the heart of the company.

Being recognised with awards is very satisfying, too; we’re delighted that our website and shop have won plenty of them, the most recent being 2016 Online Retailer of the Year at the Drinks Retailing Awards.

You can also find us on:
Facebook: https://facebook.com/thewhiskyexchange
Twitter: https://twitter.com/whiskyexchange
Instagram: https://instagram/whiskyexchange

Name: Amber Beverage Group
Description:
Amber Beverage Group is a rapidly growing global spirits company, whose products are found in millions of households and venues across the globe. ABG core brands are Moskovskaya Vodka, Rooster Rojo Tequila, KAH Tequila, The Irishman Whiskey, Writers’ Tears Whiskey, Riga Black Balsam, Cross Keys Gin and Cosmopolitan Diva. ABG produces, bottles, markets, distributes, exports, and retails a comprehensive range of beverages of which it owns more than 100 and is responsible for marketing and distributing 1,300 third-party drinks brands, spanning everything from premium vodka and sparkling wines to speciality Mexican tequilas and Irish whiskeys.

The company has grown from its original core production business established in 1900, to a global spirits industry player that unites around 2,050 employees in almost 20 companies in the Baltic States, Austria, Australia, Germany, Ireland, Mexico, and the United Kingdom.

Name: Empire Distributors, Inc.
Description: Empire is a wholesale beverage distributor home to over 1,600 teammates across four states: Georgia, North Carolina, Tennessee and Colorado. Representing 4,500+ brands from around the world, our mission is simply to be the very best at 𝑩𝒖𝒊𝒍𝒅𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝑩𝒓𝒂𝒏𝒅𝒔 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝑫𝒆𝒗𝒆𝒍𝒐𝒑𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝑷𝒆𝒐𝒑𝒍𝒆.  We are committed to offering our customers quality products at an outstanding value with exceptional service and consultation. We are NOW HIRING!!

Name: Nova Aliança Vinícola Coop.
Description:
A Nova Aliança Vinícola Cooperativa une a força, a experiência e a solidez de uma história de 95 anos de cinco tradicionais cooperativas vitivinícolas da Serra Gaúcha: Cooperativa São Victor, Cooperativa São Pedro, Cooperativa Linha Jacinto, Cooperativa Aliança e Cooperativa Santo Antônio. Juntas, decidiram se transformar em uma única família, reunindo pessoas, valores e histórias para formar a Nova Aliança Vinícola Cooperativa, que tem a missão de criar experiências positivas para a sociedade por meio da uva de seus cooperados e um futuro de oportunidades e desenvolvimento com o firme propósito de ser referência em seus segmentos de atuação e reconhecida pela atitude cooperativa e sustentabilidade.

A busca do novo faz parte do dia a dia da Nova Aliança Vinícola Cooperativa. Sempre atenta às demandas do mercado e mantendo seus princípios de cooperação, desenvolvimento sustentável e de inovação, tem em sua infraestrutura com fortes investimentos em tecnologia uma de suas fortalezas aliado ao atendimento aos rigorosos padrões nos processos de produção. Possui uma das maiores e mais modernas plantas industriais de suco de uva integral da América Latina, localizada na matriz, em Flores da Cunha, que conta com uma área construída de 24 mil metros quadrados e processa cerca de 40 milhões de quilos de uva por ano.
Location: Flores da Cunha, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Proost Beer (Grano69 Beverages)
Description:
Proost Beer by Grano69 Beverages, established in the summer of 2017, is setting a new standard in the Indian beer market. With a passion for exceptional taste, we've embarked on a global journey to craft a beer that truly embodies the spirit of "Cheers!"

Our Proost Beer stands out with its smooth, non-bitter taste, setting it apart from other Indian brands. Thanks to its lower bitterness and affordable pricing, it offers high drinkability, making it perfect for enjoying in larger quantities. We are committed to providing premium quality at an accessible price, positioning Proost as a mass premium beer brand.

Currently available in over 300 cities across 6 states—including Delhi, Punjab, Uttar Pradesh, Jharkhand, Karnataka, and Kerala—Proost is rapidly emerging as a key player in the Indian beer market. We were featured on Shark Tank India Season 2.

Name: Domaine Faiveley
Description:
Sept générations au service de vins d’exception. 

C’est au cœur de la Bourgogne, à Nuits-Saint-Georges, que le Domaine Faiveley fut fondé en 1825. Dès lors, sept génerations se sont succédées afin de façonner un patrimoine viticole unique, mosaique des plus grands terroirs bourguignons. 

Certifié en agriculture biologique sur l'intégralité de son vignoble,  le Domaine Faiveley est aujourd’hui une référence incontournable parmi les grandes signatures de la région. 

« Notre volonté est de révéler les plus grands terroirs de Bourgogne dans un style alliant puissance, finesse et élégance » Erwan FAIVELEY

Name: Centaurus International UAE
Description:
CENTAURUS INTERNATIONAL is a global leader in a general trading. The company has been committed to providing integrated end-to-end partnering relationships of well renowned international brands to consumers within the UAE.  With imported products globally to meet demands of clients whose needs extend beyond local markets, whilst our strong expat influence provides us with unique insight into the western culture.

Our company innovatively shapes the inspiration of employees and through our creative abilities to delight not
only our staff but more importantly each and every client. 

The company was established in the year 1998 with offices at the Twin Towers in Dubai and now headquartered at Electricity Road near RAK Customs Department. The maiden project of Centaurus Group of companies was founded from the ground up and is based on the premise of a new competitive marketplace, all thanks to our dynamic and technology-enabled workforce. 

Apart from Al Jazeerah Sea Port Headquarters in Ras Al Khaimah and a medium-range retail shop in Ras Al Khaimah Sea Port, we have Companies operating in Jebel Ali, Dubai, Ras Al Khaimah Free Zone and Fujairah Free Zone and just recently in Oman, Jordan, Philippines. Our warehouse space exceeds 2000 sq.m and is placed in strategic locations capable of handling all our logistical needs. The company is remarkably the controlling company of a group of businesses all involved with the sales and distributions of alcoholic drinks, both in the UAE and around the world.

For more information call our team or visit our website @ www.centaurusint.net

We look forward to talking to you real soon. 
Don't forget to meet us at the business council meetings and events to speak to our marketing team. 

Furthermore, we would like to thank every customer for their referrals, don't forget to follow up on free gifts and vouchers.

Thank You for your support!
Centaurus International Team

Name: Grover Zampa Vineyards
Description:
India's longest-standing wine producer and leading exporter, Grover Zampa Vineyards (GZV) has wineries and vineyards located in Nandi Hills, Karnataka, and in the Nashik Valley in Maharashtra.

With over 30 years in the trade, the company maintains the most impressive pedigree in the Indian wine industry through its sustainable viticulture practices, selective hand harvesting, and winemaking carried out by a team of local oenologists directed by international French wine consultant Michel Rolland and French winemaker Mathias Pellisard.
 
The company's 180 international awards are the result of an age-old commitment to carry forward a fine heritage and an uncompromising focus on quality. From being recognised as the winery of the year at the Asian Wine Review to bagging medals at SAKURA Japan Women's Wine Awards, Decanter Wine Awards, Hong Kong International Wine & Spirit Competition, and many more, Grover Zampa's premium wines aim to carefully capture the essence of the Indian terroir in every sip. 

The dual location of the wineries and vineyards open to the public for its popular guided tours and tastings allows visitors to reveal the story of wine's provenance and learn about the company's history, winemaking, and viticulture traditions from the winemakers and sommeliers.

Name: Monika Alcobev Limited
Description:
Monika Alcobev is a leading importer, distributor, and marketer of premium alcoholic brands across the Indian Subcontinent. As India’s largest independent importer in the spirits segment, We provide end-to-end solutions, covering all channels including HORECA, Retail and Travel Retail. The company is also a preferred GTR partner for globally renowned Indian brands as well.

We proudly hold exclusive selling rights for iconic brands such as Jose Cuervo, Remy Cointreau, Choya, Ron Diplomatico, the VSPT Group, and more. Our portfolio features over 100 world-renowned brands, serving the diverse tastes of Indian consumers.

Our dedication is to excellence and innovation, bringing #OnlyTheBest beverage experiences to the region. With a robust distribution network, we continue to raise industry standards, drive premiumization, and introduce unique global brands to Indian consumers. Monika Alcobev remains at the forefront of India's evolving alco-beverage landscape, delivering international quality, service, and variety for all occasions.

Name: Champagne Barons de Rothschild
Description: Created in 2005, Champagne Barons de Rothschild was born from a unique and unprecedented alliance between the three branches of the Rothschild Family, today represented by Baron Philippe Sereys de Rothschild (Château Mouton Rothschild), Baron Benjamin and his wife Ariane (Château Clarke - Groupe Edmond de Rothschild), Baron Eric and his daughter Saskia (Château Lafite Rothschild). Faithful to the values of the “CONCORDIA - INTEGRITAS - INDUSTRIA” family motto, their shared vision of excellence with respect for know-how and the terroir is now expressed through this great champagne.

Name: Cotswolds Distillery
Description:
The first full-scale distillery ever in the Cotswolds, we produce the award-winning Cotswolds Single Malt Whisky made by using 100% locally grown Cotswold barley which is traditionally floor malted at nearby Warminster Maltings, one of Britain’s oldest working maltings. In addition, we also produce Cotswolds Dry Gin, distilled with nine carefully considered botanicals, including locally sourced lavender from Snowshill and fresh hand-peeled lime and pink grapefruit zest, as well as a range of other artisanal spirits. 

Our distillery is uniquely located in a designated rural Area of Outstanding Natural Beauty in South Warwickshire and has been founded by American businessman Daniel Szor, who now lives in the Cotswolds.

We’re proud to be part of village life here – our team live locally, our neighbours help with the bottling and fruit peeling, and the spent grains from our mash go to feed the local cows. It’s all about being an active part of this beautiful region. There are some fantastic things to see around us; from Blenheim Palace to the home of Shakespeare in Stratford-upon-Avon, and all the beautiful villages in between.

Name: Luxco, Inc.
Description:
Luxco is a leading producer, bottler, importer and marketer of beverage alcohol products with an outstanding portfolio of brands and a spirited legacy.

Some of our core brands include Yellowstone Bourbon Whiskey, Rebel Bourbon Whiskey, Ezra Brooks Bourbon Whiskey, Everclear, Juarez Tequila, El Mayor Tequila, Dos Primos Tequila, The Irish Man Irish Whiskey, and Saint Brendan's Irish Cream among many others.

Name: Quinta do Vallado
Description:
A Quinta do Vallado, construída em 1716, é uma das quintas mais antigas e notórias do Vale do Douro.

Pertenceu à lendária Dona Antónia Adelaide Ferreira e mantém-se até hoje na posse dos seus descendentes. Situa-se nas margens do Rio Corgo, um afluente do Rio Douro, perto da localidade de Peso da Régua.

Durante cerca de 200 anos a Quinta do Vallado teve como principal actividade a produção de vinhos do Porto, comercializados posteriormente pela Casa Ferreira. Em 1993, já sob a direcção de Guilherme Álvares Ribeiro e sua mulher Maria Antónia Ferreira, a empresa decidiu alargar a sua actividade à produção, engarrafamento e comercialização de vinhos com marca própria.

Hoje a Quinta do Vallado conta com mais de setenta hectares de vinha, dos quais cerca de um terço são vinhas velhas com mais de cem anos. Em paralelo com uma estratégia de protecção e renovação deste seu património, do qual faz parte também a Quinta do Orgal no Douro Superior, a Quinta do Vallado conta com duas unidades de Enoturismo de excelência, que propagaram a marca a um elevado patamar de reconhecimento internacional.

Name: Isle of Arran Distillers Ltd
Description:
The Isle of Arran is both beautiful and unique. With its mountains, lowlands, glens, lochs and royal castles, it has all the scenery of Scotland and is affectionately known as ‘Scotland in Miniature’. 

Isle of Arran Distillers remains the only whisky producer on the island and they are the proud owners of two stunning Single Malt distilleries, Lochranza in the north and Lagg in the south of the island. Our first, Lochranza Distillery, was built in the foothills of the village of Lochranza in 1994 and the first spirit ran from the stills on 29th June 1995, bringing legal distillation back to Arran after more than 150 years. The Distillery was a brand-new enterprise and since that first day in June 1995 when the first ever cask was filled, it has gone on to produce the world-class Arran Single Malt Whisky which has won international acclaim. 

Lagg Distillery opened in June 2019 and is home to the heavily-peated Lagg Single Malt, of which two highly-anticipated core expressions were released in the summer of 2023 - the Lagg Kilmory and the Lagg Corriecravie.

Name: Banfi Official
Description:
Banfi, a family-owned wine producer, based in Tuscany, is celebrated worldwide as “Builders of Brunello.” The Mariani family, firmly established as leading importers of fine wine in the US, founded their Banfi vineyard estate in Montalcino in 1978.  
They assembled a contiguous estate of 2,830 hectares, one-third of the property is under specialized vine, and the balance is shared between olive groves, wheat fields, plum trees, truffle stands, forest, and scrub. 
The medieval Poggio alle Mura Castle crowning the estate, part of Banfi estate since 1983, is lovingly restored as a pioneering beacon for regional hospitality.
Just over a year after the founding of Banfi in Montalcino, the Mariani acquired the historic Piedmontese winery Bruzzone, today known as Banfi Piemonte. Since its inception, Banfi Piemonte has undergone constant growth, interspersing an inherent typicity with technological innovation and a distinct vocation for quality sparkling wines. 
Recently Banfi has approached new Tuscan territories, among the most renowned in the region, such as Bolgheri, Maremma, Chianti, and Chianti Classico.
Cristina Mariani-May, third family generation, is the CEO of Banfi.

Name: World Wine
Description:
Parte do Grupo La Pastina, a World Wine foi fundada em 1999, com o propósito de difundir a cultura do vinho no Brasil.

Tornou-se uma das maiores empresas de vinhos do país, com um portfólio de mais de 1500 mil rótulos e 200 marcas de 13 países.

Seu Centro de Distribuição, em São Paulo, é um dos maiores da América Latina e o único com 5 câmaras frias.

Possui um modelo de varejo multicanal, atualmente com 17 lojas próprias e distribuidores por todo Brasil, além de televendas e e-commerce.

Name: Global Spirits India
Description:
Global Spirits, the one-stop solution in spirits solutions for brands in the northeastern crown of India. We are service providers and leaders in the fields of distribution, marketing, brand value generation, establishment, and market share capturer, and we can assist you with end-to-end solutions in every demographic in the northeastern region.
To mention a few, we have Macallan, Bushmills, Cutty Sark, Bira, White Owl, Fratelli, Torres, Old Tom, Stranger & Sons, Greater Than, and many more still to join the Global Family.

Name: Champagne Canard-Duchêne
Description:
This story began in 1868 when two avant-garde souls, Léonie Duchêne, a winegrower, and Victor Canard, a barrel maker, combined their know-how and brought their names together to create Canard-Duchêne Champagne.
Rooted from the start in the Premier Cru village of Ludes in the heart of the Montagne de Reims terroir,  Canard-Duchêne views nature as a rich resource and inspiration.
It greatly values the connections between people and endeavours to pass on this heritage from one generation to the next, developing well-balanced, fresh and fruity Champagnes that bring out the best in Pinot Noir, the signature grape variety of its terroir.

Name: Les Domaines Barons de Rothschild Lafite
Description:
Domaines Barons de Rothschild Lafite is a close family of wine estates, each diverse in terroir and distinct in character, but all sharing in the same spirit. Firmly rooted in the very soil it cultivates, and dedicated to the art of exemplary winemaking since their first day at Château Lafite Rothschild in 1868, the DBR Lafite family has grown to include Château Duhart-Milon (Grand Cru Classé in Pauillac), Château Rieussec (Premier Grand Cru Classé in Sauternes), Château L’Évangile (Pomerol), Château Paradis Casseuil, as well as range of Bordeaux wines – Les Légendes R.
Beyond the Bordeaux region, the family extends to Viña Los Vascos (Chile, 1988), Domaine d’Aussières (Languedoc, 1999), Bodegas CARO (Argentina, 1999), Domaine de Long Dai, in the Shandong region of China (2008) and Domaine William Fèvre (Chablis, 2024).
With a sensitivity to each terroir’s unique demands, DBR Lafite champions a shared commitment to working hand in hand with the land that gives rise to each of its wines and has been certified B Corp in 2024.

Name: Virginia Distillery Co.
Description:
The late Dr. George G. Moore had a great passion for single malt whisky and his adopted home in Virginia. A native Irishman, George came to the U.S. in the 1970’s to seek new opportunities. In 2011, after many years of building successful businesses in both the U.S. and Ireland, George finally had the chance to combine his two passions when he started Virginia Distillery Company. Today, George’s wife, Angela Moore and their son, Gareth Moore, along with his wife, Maggie Moore, have taken the helm to continue building George’s dream.

“Have the courage of your convictions,” was a saying George often repeated to friends and family. His credo became our core principle and the name of our newest American Single Malt whisky line, Courage & Conviction.

From the impeccable quality of the ingredients we source, to the years spent perfecting our maturation process, we make whisky the right way – our way – never sacrificing the best for the easier, safer path.

At Virginia Distillery Company, we carry George’s legacy forward by reinventing American Single Malt whisky. Every barrel is a culmination of the world’s finest distilling, aged to perfection in the ideal climate of Virginia’s Blue Ridge Mountains. While inspired by time-honored traditions, we forge traditions of our own- making whisky more than what has been, while remaining true to ourselves and our home.

The result: a whisky that George would’ve been proud of.

Name: Summergate
Description:
Summergate stands out as a formidable force in the drinks market across Greater China, having laid its foundations back in 1999. In a momentous move, Summergate joined forces with Wajiu China in 2023, in a combined acquisition that also brought Torres China into the fold. 

With a robust presence established through nine registered offices scattered across Mainland China, complemented by two affiliated branches in Hong Kong and Macau, Summergate takes pride in its role as the exclusive representative of more than 100 illustrious brands stemming from 19 top-tier drinks producing nations around the globe.

Wajiu: A Pinnacle of Viniculture and Innovation in China

Nestled in the vibrant heart of a country experiencing a wine renaissance, Wajiu emerges as a symbol of elegance, heritage, and forward-thinking in China’s dynamic wine industry. Conceived to meet the soaring demand for premium wines in Asia, Wajiu has swiftly ascended to become one of the leading wine distributors in China, seamlessly connecting the finest global winemaking traditions with the sophisticated palates of the East.

At the core of Wajiu’s success is a groundbreaking business model focused on providing top-notch wines at competitive prices to B2B resellers. Our comprehensive platform goes beyond transactions, offering full operational and logistic services to empower B2B resellers in navigating the complexities of the wine trade. This unique approach has solidified our reputation and set us apart in the competitive landscape.

Wajiu harnesses the power of cutting-edge technology, unparalleled market acumen, and a profound respect for viticulture to ensure that each bottle we select and offer tells a story, carries a legacy, and delivers an extraordinary experience. From the historic vineyards of Bordeaux to the lush landscapes of Napa Valley, our mission is steadfast: to curate and deliver the world’s most exquisite wines to the discerning aficionados of China.

Name: Caymus Vineyards
Description: The Wagner family comes from a long line of grape growers and winemakers, with a history in Napa Valley dating back to the 1850s. In 1972, Chuck Wagner started Caymus Vineyards with his late parents, Lorna and Charlie Wagner Sr., establishing Caymus Cabernet as one of the region’s most celebrated wines. Today, Caymus remains entirely family-run, and two of Chuck’s children, Charlie and Jenny Wagner, work alongside him. Together, they are proud to offer a wide range of varietals under different labels.

Name: Crimson Wine Group
Description: At Crimson Wine Group, we are the guardians of 1,000 acres of pristine vineyards, iconic estates, vital forests, and wildlife habitats along the West Coast. Our success stems from the wide range of perspectives that our team brings to every single one of our wines – from vine to bottle and beyond. Our portfolio is cultivated to elevate any occasion and to simply make life better.

Name: Château Angelus
Description:
The vineyard of Château Angelus is situated in a natural amphitheatre overlooked by the three Saint-Emilion churches. In the middle of this special site, the sounds were amplified and the angelus bells could be heard ringing in the morning, at midday and in the evening. They cadenced the working day in the vineyards and villages, calling the men and women to stop their labours for a few minutes and pray.

Less than a kilometre from the famous Saint-Emilion bell tower, situated on the much-vaunted south-facing “foot of the hill”, Angelus has been the life work of eight generations of the Boüard de Laforest family.

In the first-ever classification of Saint-Emilion wines in 1954, Château Angelus was a Grand Cru Classé. Already at the time, it benefitted from a solid reputation, which helped it survive the Bordeaux wine crisis of 1973 and take part in the oenological renewal of the 1980’s. This was the context in which Hubert de Boüard de Laforest, a graduate oenologist from Bordeaux University, took advantage of this marvellous wine’s illustrious past, while being resolutely turned towards the future and launched and continued to implement an ambitious, innovative policy in favour of achieving excellence in wine growing and making.

Angelus is henceforward helmed by Stéphanie de Boüard-Rivoal. She represents the eighth generation of the Boüard de Laforest family. After Catherine Sophie de Boüard de Laforest and Eugénie Chatenet, Stéphanie de Boüard-Rivoal is the third woman to preside over the fortunes of this estate, where she was born and grew up. She has an almost physical relationship with Angelus, living with the land and drawing from it the courage and determination she needs to keep on course. It gives her emotional and spiritual strength, and she sees herself as an integral part of this ecosystemic whole.

Name: CIVP - Vins de Provence
Description:
Depuis le 1er janvier 2004, le Conseil Interprofessionnel des Vins de Provence (CIVP) regroupe tous les vignerons et négociants des appellations Côtes de Provence, Coteaux d’Aix-en-Provence et Coteaux Varois en Provence (ce qui représente 96% du volume des vins d'appellations d'origine de la Provence), permettant ainsi de :
• renforcer le poids de la filière viticole provençale
• avoir des moyens d’actions et financiers plus importants
• valoriser les spécificités de chaque appellation ou dénomination de terroir.

Les Vins de Provence (AOC Côtes de Provence, AOC Coteaux d'Aix-en-Provence, AOC Coteaux Varois en Provence), c’est : + de 600 producteurs (560 caves particulières et 60 caves coopératives) et + de 100 sociétés de négoce qui produisent chaque année plus de 1,2 million d’hectolitres, soit l’équivalent de 170 millions de bouteilles (89% en rosé, 7% en rouge et 4% en blanc), sur une superficie totale de 27 000 hectares.

La Provence est la 1ère région en France productrice de vins rosés AOC avec 38% de la production nationale. Elle fournit 4,2% des rosés du monde.
