Name: Bardinet España
Description:
Bardinet, S.A. es una empresa fabricante de bebidas espirituosas que desde 1857, y a partir de su emblemática marca Negrita, se ha convertido en un símbolo de la tradición ‘ronera’ en el mundo.

La actividad original, que tuvo sus inicios en la sabia mezcla, añejamiento y preparación de los rones que llegaban desde distintas partes del Caribe, ha dado lugar con el paso del tiempo a un grupo de empresas dedicadas a la elaboración y comercialización de las principales bebidas espirituosas que existen en la actualidad.
Hoy en día, gracias al enorme trabajo realizado hasta el momento, podemos proponer una amplia gama de productos adaptados a todos los mercados.

Nuestra compañía pertenece al Grupo La Martiniquaise con sede central en París y plantas elaboradoras en esta ciudad, y también en Le Havre, Bordeaux,  Fort de France, Guadeloupe y Barcelona, entre otras. 
Bardinet S.A. se ocupa de la elaboración y/o comercialización de los productos del Grupo en el mercado español. Para ello, cuenta con unas instalaciones  que ocupan 24.000m cuadrados en su planta de Gelida, algo menos de 100 colaboradores y una posición de liderazgo consolidado en el mercado de bebidas espirituosas en España. 
Tiene capacidad para elaborar en su planta productiva más de 20 millones de botellas al año, 38 modelos de botellas y, en la actualidad, más de 350 referencias vivas.

Nuestra oferta de productos abarca todas las categorías del segmento de bebidas espirituosas: ron, whisky, pastis, licores, ginebra, vodka, tequila, armagnac, cognac , brandy, porto y cavas.

Las principales marcas en España son Cutty Sark, Ron Negrita, Giró Gin, Gecko, Yachting, Pujol, Sir Edward’s, Prado, Lacrima Baccus, Bonet, Saint James, Gibson’s, Bandeira, Label 5, etc.

Name: Taylors Wines / Wakefield Wines
Description:
Since establishing their winery three generations ago, the Taylor family’s unique blend of ‘old world’ estate philosophy, ‘new world’ winemaking innovation and zealous attention to detail has seen Taylors Wines awarded more than 5,500 medals and trophies at prestigious wine shows the world over.  Taylors Wines has been recognised as one of the 'Top 5 Most Awarded Wineries in the World' by the World Association of Wine Writers and Journalists for the fourth year running (2013-2016).
 
The Taylors portfolio now includes eight wine ranges – The Pioneer, The Visionary, St Andrews, Jaraman, Taylors Winemaker's Project, Taylors Estate, 80Acres and Promised Land. 
 
The family’s vineyard is situated in South Australia’s beautiful Clare Valley, in the sub-region of Auburn and stretches to the Watervale border. It is 350 metres above sea level and the climate is often described as ‘Mediterranean’ due to the cool maritime breezes originating from the Gulf of St Vincent situated only 60 kilometres to the west. 
 
The Taylor family is committed to preserving the local environment and operating in a responsible and sustainable manner, having launched the world’s first carbon neutral wine range compliant to the international standard for life cycle assessment (ISO14044) –100% carbon neutral 80 Acres.

Taylors is also proud to be one of Australia's leading family-owned wineries and is a founding member of Australia's First Families of Wine. The organisation of 12 family-owned and operated wineries represent 16 Australian regions across four states and between them, have more than 1,200 years of winemaking experience.

As the official wine sponsor of the Qantas Wallabies, Taylors Wines have a strong presence at all Wallabies matches and major events.

Taylors Wines operates as Wakefield Wines in most regions outside of Australia & New Zealand.

Name: VDP.Die Prädikatsweingüter
Description: Wer sich für Wein wirklich begeistern kann, kommt an den Flaschen mit dem VDP.Adler nicht vorbei. Denn das Markenzeichen des VDP signalisiert durchweg Ausnahmequalitäten. Unser Kanal bewirbt alkoholhaltige Getränke und richtet sich an Erwachsene & soll nicht an Minderjährige weitergeleitet werden.

Name: ABC Fine Wine & Spirits
Description: Founded by Jack Holloway in 1936 in Orlando, Florida, ABC Fine Wine & Spirits is America's largest family-owned wine and spirits retailer. With over 130 locations from Destin to Miami, ABC Fine Wine & Spirits offers thousands of spirits, wines, gourmet foods and craft beers in bottles, cans and growlers, as well as walk-in humidors home to hundreds of fine cigars. ABC Fine Wine & Spirits has the selection, lower prices and expertise you need to Always Be Celebrating. Find more information and start celebrating online at www.abcfws.com.

Name: MISA Imports Inc.
Description: MISA Imports Inc. is a global wine and spirits importer and distributor headquartered in Dallas, TX. Founded in 1998, MISA pioneered the beverage industry with its transparent model, innovative solutions, and sourcing capabilities. Through its extensive US network and 9 US locations, MISA strives to disrupt the industry with its leading best practices whilst keeping to its family like business values; honesty, integrity, and respect.

Name: La Europea México
Description:
Desde 1953 líder en el mercado nacional de vinos, licores, bacalao y alimentos gourmet. Promovemos la cultura del vino y del buen vivir. Calidad y Precio.

Estamos comprometidos con la innovación y la diferenciación de nuestros competidores incorporando marcas tanto exclusivas como propias, y conceptos de comercialización modernos.

Trabajamos día a día para cumplir con oportunidad y precisión los compromisos con nuestros clientes, proveedores, colaboradores y accionistas; asegurando una rentabilidad que nos permita ser una fuente de trabajo estable y con futuro para nuestros colaboradores, como un empresa socialmente responsable.

Name: WX Brands
Description:
WHAT WE DO 
WX develops exclusive brands of wine for retailers around the world. We also offer our own unique portfolio of proprietary wine brands that are sold globally. Products are sourced from 17 countries and sold in 12 countries resulting in over 6 million cases sold worldwide.

NATIONAL BRANDS include Bread & Butter Wines, Chronic Cellars, Jamieson Ranch Vineyards portfolio of wines, Our Daily Wines, Jelly Jar Wines, Reckless Love, and Sunday Funday. 

EXCLUSIVE BRAND clients include Kroger, Whole Foods, Tesco, Total Wine & More, Rite-Aid, Cost Plus World Market, Aldi, Safeway/Albertsons, Sainsbury, CVS, and Trader Joe’s. 

CONTRACT PRODUCTION SERVICES 
WX provides custom product development and complete procurement and production services.

Name: Skurnik Wines & Spirits
Description: Skurnik Wines & Spirits is an importer and distributor of fine wines and spirits headquartered in the heart of New York City. We represent a high-quality, diversified portfolio of wines and spirits from around the world. The company began with just a handful of relatively unknown estates in 1987, and has since grown to represent over 500 estates, most of which are family-owned-and-operated. We are a national importer, and also have direct wholesale distribution network to 9 states: New York, New Jersey, Connecticut, Pennsylvania, Rhode Island, California, Ohio, Kentucky, and Indiana.

Name: Vinoteca Mexico
Description:
BIENVENIDOS A VINOTECA

Propósito: Celebrar y Enriquecer tus experiencias diarias.

Misión: Ofrecer productos y servicios de gran valor, que generen experiencias para nuestros consumidores, que contribuyan a fomentar su cultura y consumo adecuado.

Visión: Ser la cadena de tiendas y distribución preferida en productos del buen vivir a través del conocimiento del cliente y/o consumidor.

NUESTROS VALORES

TRABAJO EN EQUIPO: La unidad es nuestra base de éxito. Todo conocemos nuestras virtudes y debilidades, y por ellos nos brindamos el apoyo necesario para dar buen ritmo al desarrollo de nuestras actividades. Somos uno.

INTEGRIDAD: Somos personas de bien; somos compañeros y ante todo amigos que basamos nuestra relación cotidiana en la honestidad. Con nuestras acciones brindamos confianza y nuestro trabajo se enmarca en la honestidad.

CONSTRUIR RELACIONES A LARGO PLAZO: Siempre podemos dar más por los demás; nos cuidamos y ayudamos, nos corregimos positivamente, pues somos una gran familia. Nos brindamos un trato cálido y compartimos el gusto por estar juntos bajo un mismo objetivo.

ACTITUD DE SERVICIO: Damos lo mejor de nosotros, brindamos una cálida sonrisa a nuestros clientes y compañeros. Siempre somos propositivos y gustamos de hacer las cosas bien.

EVOLUCIÓN CON PROPÓSITO: Nos fijamos metas claras y buscamos juntos el camino adecuado para superarlas. Brindamos nuestro esfuerzo en alcanzar cada objetivo.
Location: San Pedro Garza García, Nuevo León

Name: Champagne CATTIER
Description:
La Maison Cattier, à Chigny-les-Roses, est une des rares Maisons de Champagne encore familiale et indépendante. Depuis 2011, la Maison est dirigée par Alexandre Cattier, représentant de la 13ème génération, épaulé par son père Jean-Jacques et ses cousines Agathe et Marie.

La famille Cattier est propriétaire de vignes depuis 1650 et cultive aujourd’hui 33 ha majoritairement Premier cru dans la Montagne de Reims. Très attachée à l'environnement, chaque parcelle est cultivée selon le principe de la viticulture raisonnée. En 2015, la Maison Cattier a été certifiée « Haute Valeur Environnementale », au niveau maximal. La Maison est également propriétaire depuis 1951, d’un des rares clos historiques de la Champagne, le Clos du Moulin d’où sont issus ses champagnes de prestige : le Clos du Moulin brut et le Clos du Moulin rosé.

Les caves, situées à Rilly-la-Montagne, sont creusées dans la craie sur 3 niveaux, chacun représentant un style architectural différent: Renaissance, Roman et Gothique. Elles comptent parmi les plus profondes de la Champagne (27 m), permettant le vieillissement des vins dans des conditions idéales de conservation: à température constante et à l’abri des turbulences extérieures.

En 2006, Alexandre et Jean-Jacques Cattier lancent la marque de luxe Armand de Brignac, une innovation sans pareil dans l’univers du Champagne de par son excellence (assemblage de millésimes), et son packaging novateur. Le succès d’Armand de Brignac est immédiat, spectaculaire et planétaire. Il est aujourd’hui reconnu mondialement comme un des plus prestigieux champagne.

La Maison Cattier est présente dans de nombreux pays à travers le monde. Elle réalise 60% de ses ventes à l'international.

Les vins sont élaborés par Jean-Jacques et Alexandre Cattier, œnologues, qui ont à cœur de proposer des vins d’excellence: frais, généreux, souples et fruités, caractérisés par une finesse et une élégance exceptionnelles.
Crédit photos : M. Bernanos - L. Rodriguez

Name: Morande Wine Group
Description:
Morandé Wine Group was founded in 1996 by Pablo Morandé: winemaker and Chilean wine legend, responsible for many advances within the industry. As his legacy, the company carries on the same pioneering spirit and work ethic through constant innovation. 
MWG is part of Yarur Group, one of the most influential economic holdings in Chile, it has 1000 owned hectares from North to South and more than 300 clients in 60 countries.
Its most relevant brands: Morandé, Mancura, Vistamar and 7 Colores allow the company to deliver a diverse product portfolio with offerings tailored to a wide range of consumers, aligned with market trends and demands. The company has three production facilities - 2 located in Pelequen and 1 in Isla Maipo - each of them is equipped with cutting edge technology and a team of experts. An infrastructure designed to secure supply of quality and innovative products.  
MWG is driven by Pablo Morandé’s legacy: true passion for excelling winemaking, reason why it has been awarded more than 1.200 scores above 90 Points in respectable publications in the US - including 4 titles of Winery of the Year in Wine & Spirits - and over 1.750 scores above 90 in wine competitions around the globe.

Name: The Glenturret
Description:
Crafted at Scotland’s Oldest Working Distillery since 1763 entirely by hand in exclusive small batches, The Glenturret Single Malt is defined by its outstanding quality and exquisite taste. 

Located in the ‘Hosh’, Crieff, surrounded by the beautiful Perthshire countryside, The Glenturret offers daily distillery tours, whisky flights at the Lalique Bar, a dedicated retail store including an exclusive Lalique Boutique, and The Glenturret Lalique Restaurant, the Two Michelin starred gastronomic experience set in the heart of the distillery. 

In spring 2024, The Glenturret opened Aberturret Estate House, an elegant rural estate located on the grounds of the distillery.

Name: wine2wine
Description:
Nato nel 2014, wine2wine Business Forum è ormai diventato uno dei più importanti forum sul business del vino in Italia. 

Obiettivo dell'evento è quello di offrire a professionisti del wine business l’opportunità di incontrarsi e scambiare idee e punti di vista su un mercato del vino in continua evoluzione. 

 Dopo l'edizione 2025 a Chicago, wine2wine Business Forum, il Forum di riferimento per il business e la comunicazione del vino, approda a New York il 26-27 Ottobre 2026, presso il Pier 36.

Name: Emiliana
Description: Located in the main wine valleys of Chile, Emiliana is characterized by producing only organic and biodynamic wines, in such a way that it helps to preserve the natural balance of life, human beings, and the environment. Producing wines in this manner makes them ultimately healthier, unique, and of better quality.

Name: HOTALING & CO.
Description: Hotaling & Co., the leading San Francisco importer & distiller, offers the finest curated portfolio of premium artisanal spirits including Luxardo Liqueurs, Nikka Whisky, Kavalan Whisky, HINE Cognac, Denizen Rum, and HIRSCH Selected Whiskeys. Hotaling & Co., originally named Anchor Distilling Company, was established in 1993 and is credited with releasing America’s first craft whiskey (Old Potrero) and American craft gin (Junipero Gin) after Prohibition. In 2010, Anchor Distilling Company was sold to a business partnership that included Tony Foglio and London's oldest wine and spirit merchant, Berry Bros. & Rudd and began expanding to incorporate a collection of super-premium artisanal spirits imported from around the world. In 2017, Anchor Distilling became Hotaling & Co. The new name is a nod to one of Anchor Distilling’s most beloved small batch whiskies (Old Potrero Hotaling’s Whiskey) and to the San Francisco legend A.P. Hotaling, who came out West during the Gold Rush and quickly became one of the most reputable spirits dealers in the country. Today, Hotaling & Co. celebrates exciting growth and achievements; marking its 26th year of distilling and its 10th year of commercially uniting artisan distillers from around the world and sharing their stories to discerning consumers. HotalingandCo.com

Name: Doña Paula Wines
Description:
Fundada en 1997 en Mendoza, Doña Paula es una bodega que cuenta con más de 700 hectáreas de viñedos propios. Esto garantiza que todos sus vinos sean Estate, elaborados exclusivamente con uvas de sus fincas. Actualmente, posee tres establecimientos ubicados en las principales zonas vitivinícolas de Luján de Cuyo y el Valle de Uco.
Fiel a su compromiso con la sustentabilidad y la innovación, Doña Paula produce vinos aptos para veganos y celíacos, con un enfoque constante en la investigación y el entendimiento del terroir.

Founded in 1997 in Mendoza, Doña Paula is a winery with over 700 hectares of estate-owned vineyards, ensuring that all its wines are Estate, made exclusively from its own grapes. It currently operates three estates located in the main wine-producing regions of Luján de Cuyo and the Uco Valley.
Committed to sustainability and innovation, Doña Paula produces wines suitable for vegans and people with celiac disease, with a constant focus on research and understanding of the terroir.

Name: Brown Family Wine Group
Description: Family owned Australian wine business; Brown Brothers, Devil's Corner, Tamar Ridge, Pirie and Innocent Bystander.

Name: WES BRANDS
Description:
Founded in 2021, WES BRANDS develops, markets, and sells innovative brands in the beverage alcohol category. 

The entrepreneurial and employee-owned company pairs high-potential brands in expanding categories with brand partners to drive awareness. The portfolio currently includes Flecha Azul Tequila and BSB Flavored Whiskey, with new innovations to come.

Name: Hiram Walker & Sons Ltd
Description:
At Hiram Walkers & Sons Distillery, tradition blends with innovation. Since its foundation in the 1850s, the Hiram Walker & Sons method is a tried and tested one. Selecting the highest quality grains. Fermenting the corn, barley, rye, and wheat separately. Distilling all the different liquids at their individual boiling points.

And as the old saying goes, it takes a village. From pipefitters to electricians to production associates— from the warehouse floor to the office—every single employee’s contribution is more than just necessary. It’s instrumental, the lifeblood of the company’s beating heart. 

Hiram Walkers & Sons values expertise that every member of their talent pool brings to the distillery process. And from flex work policies to fun events held onsite, Hiram Walkers & Sons is committed to displaying that gratitude in countless ways. Every holiday season, management even sends each worker home with a Christmas turkey!

With over 430 employees that call the campus home, the company is committed to ensuring that their family remains an open, welcoming one. Hiram Walkers & Sons maintains extensive diversity and inclusion initiatives, and is committed to driving change by inspiring acceptance, inclusion and industry diversification. 

The campus on Riverside Drive also contains more than just a distillery. Hiram Walkers & Sons contains extensive departments, including Information Technology for North and South America, Research and Development, Procurement, Human Resources and Finance for North America.

Want to learn more about Hiram Walkers & Sons? Their rich history? Their extensive brewing process? Then feel free to browse the website—or, better yet, come on down for a tour!

You can’t miss them.

Name: Bodegas y Viñedos Tabernero
Description:
Bodegas y Viñedos Tabernero, fue fundada en 1897, convirtiéndose en la bodega pionera que se establece en Chincha, Ica, Perú. Actualmente, somos líderes en la producción y venta de vinos y piscos en el mercado peruano, con un portafolio superior a cincuenta etiquetas que reúne piscos, vinos y derivados de la uva como: bebidas listas para beber, cremas de pisco, mistela, oporto, entre otros. Tabernero está presente en todas las regiones del país y en todos los continentes.
Más de 125 años de experiencia nos respaldan, siempre buscando mantener los altos estándares en calidad y desarrollo. Hoy en día, Tabernero responde a un Grupo Empresarial que lidera una amplia gama de etiquetas nacionales e importadas, así como, una plataforma de e-commerce bajo el nombre de “Bodega T”.

Name: Vinfolio
Description:
Vinfolio is your trusted partner in fine wine. Created by passionate collectors with decades of experience, Vinfolio fully understands and embraces the needs of the wine aficionado. We combine proprietary technology with exceptional service to help serious collectors manage every aspect of their wine collection.

Vinfolio sells and buys collectible fine wine, operates the only truly full-service wine storage facility in the United States and provides the free, online, VinCellar cellar management platform. Our cellars services team can help manage your home wine storage solution, whether it be 500 or 5,000 bottles. We can help plan and manage the design of an entirely new cellar, then organize, map, and periodically update your home inventory to ensure complete accuracy across your entire collection. Additionally, Vinfolio's Marketplace is the first and only platform available for collector-to-collector wine sales.

We understand that fine wine needs to be treated seriously and we handle your collection with great care from purchase through storage and delivery. Our services are available to both domestic and international wine collectors.

Name: Château Pichon Longueville Comtesse de Lalande
Description:
Indépendance d’esprit, détermination, recherche d’excellence, ainsi se caractérise l’esprit Pichon Comtesse depuis 1850. 2nd Grand Cru Classé en 1855 et idéalement située à Pauillac, aux abords de l'estuaire de la Gironde, la propriété jouit d'un terroir exceptionnel de 102 hectares. Depuis 2007, Champagne Louis Roederer est propriétaire de Pichon Comtesse ; avec l’ambition de porter toujours plus haut la réputation de ce Grand Cru Classé. De la restructuration de son vignoble à la construction d'installations techniques modernes, tout est fait pour permettre au terroir de Pichon Comtesse de s'exprimer pleinement : un grand vin de Pauillac, fait d'élégance et d’équilibre entre puissance et raffinement. 

Vous devez avoir l'âge légal dans votre pays pour nous suivre. Nos vins sont à consommer avec modération.

Name: Mezzacorona Group
Description: WINE AND SPUMANTI PRODUCTIONS

Name: Locals Only Vodka
Description: We make California small batch, gluten free vodka that originated in San Diego, CA. Our spirit is distilled using grain corn and California grown grapes to create a perfectly balanced and smooth vodka, with a slightly sweet finish. We also use an eco-friendly coconut charcoal filtration method for optimal purity. 1% of our total revenue goes towards For The Planet non profits. Live Like A Local wherever you are!

Name: Mexcor International
Description:
Mexcor International is a vertically integrated beverage and spirits company with more than a century of rich heritage rooted in Hispanic family values.

As a national importer of leading Hispanic brands, Mexcor specializes in the direct importation, brand development, and commercialization of authentic spirits and beverages across all 50 states. Our portfolio reflects the depth, craftsmanship, and cultural significance of Hispanic-owned and Hispanic-inspired brands from around the world.

Through our vertically integrated model, we steward brands from origin to market with intention, discipline, and long-term vision. Grounded in heritage and driven by execution, Mexcor connects culture, quality, and scale to build enduring brands in the U.S. marketplace.

Enjoy responsibly.

Name: VINOVAE
Description:
Thanks to an innovative and patented process, Vinovae is able to turn any kind of still wines and spirits bottles into 20ml samples: the « Vinottes  ». 
We guarantee that the organoleptic properties are perfectly preserved as in the initial bottle. To make sure of this, we have been closely working with John Euvrard, elected Best Sommelier of France in 2007. 
The innovation allows every professional of the wine industry (education wine schools, cellar men, wine merchants, wine-growers, wine importers, websites, department stores…) to give their customers a chance to easily taste any wines. This pratical and cost-efficient tool allows tastings to take place anywhere at any time with the perfect dose.

Name: Mom Water
Description: Mom Water is Spirit-Infused Still Water.  4.5% ABV, 90 calories, zero carbs and zero carbonation!  Crafted by moms, enjoyed by everyone.

Name: Belfast Distillery Company - McConnell's Irish Whisky
Description: Belfast Distillery Company presents McConnell's Irish Whiskey, Northern Ireland's oldest whisky brand

Name: Château Montrose
Description:
Château Montrose is a wine and spirits company based out of France.

Established as a Second Growth in the 1855 classification, Château Montrose enjoys an exceptional geographical situation in Saint-Estèphe, facing the Gironde estuary. Its 95-hectare (235-acre) vineyard thus benefits from the influence of the vast expanse of water nearby, moderating temperatures during very hot summers and frosty springs. Its unsegmented terroir is a rare and priceless advantage in the region. The soil, made up of deep gravel over a clay sub-soil, favours natural drainage and allows for slow and regular water supply to the vine from underground reserves.
An extensive renovation programme with very strict environmental objectives has been carried out at the estate since it was acquired by Martin and Olivier Bouygues in 2006, reflecting the new owners’ determination to preserve the natural riches of Montrose, perpetuate the quality of this Grand Cru Classé and make it a model for wine-production techniques and sustainable development. 
This forward-looking global approach is particularly reflected in the practice of sustainable viticulture throughout the vineyard, respecting the terroir, the environment and people. It is also expressed through a set of green measures promoting the biodiversity of the estate and the systematic recycling of all it produces, from the vineyard to the cellar. 
Under the direction of Hervé Berland since 2012, the property has 75 employees, all sharing the same philosophy in their daily work: respect for the terroir and a constant quest for excellence. This is reflected in the meticulous working of the soil, very precise plot selection at harvest, and blending the best of the crop for the first wine, Château Montrose. With the same rigour, the subsequent selections are used to make La Dame de Montrose, and then Le Tertio de Montrose.

Alcohol abuse is dangerous for your health. Consume in moderation.

Name: Green River Distilling Company
Description: Green River Whiskey is a legacy revived. Originally founded in 1885 by J.W. McCulloch, Green River Distilling Co. (DSP-KY-10) is the 10th oldest licensed distillery in Kentucky. Reestablished in 2022, Green River Distilling Co. is a proud citizen of Owensboro, Kentucky and serves as the westernmost outpost of the Kentucky Bourbon

Name: The Charmer Sunbelt Group
Description: The Charmer Sunbelt Group (CSG) is one of the nation’s leading distributors of fine wines and spirits.  A group of privately-held companies, CSG operates local distributor and/or brokerage houses in 15 markets – Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Connecticut, Delaware, Florida, Maryland, Mississippi, New Jersey, New York (Metro and Upstate), Pennsylvania, South Carolina, Virginia, and The District of Columbia.  Together, these companies employ more than 7,000 associates who bring to market some of the most valuable and well-known consumer brands in the world.  CSG is a family-owned business that proudly serves as the critical link between wine and spirit suppliers, and the retail outlets where alcoholic beverage brands are legally and responsibly sold and enjoyed.  For more information about CSG, please visit www.charmer-sunbelt.com.

Name: HALL Family Wines
Description:
About HALL Family Wines
HALL Family Wines is a family-owned winery known for crafting world-class wines from premier vineyards in California, Oregon, and Champagne, France. Founded by Craig and Kathryn Hall 30 years ago, the portfolio includes HALL, WALT, BACA, and Michel Foch, producing acclaimed Cabernet Sauvignon, Pinot Noir, Zinfandel, Champagne, and other varietals. The winery features six tasting rooms across Napa Valley, Sonoma, Palm Springs, and Healdsburg, offering immersive winetasting experiences. Winemaking is led by Megan Gunderson, with a focus on expressing each vineyard’s unique terroir. HALL Family Wines farms twelve estate vineyards across California’s most celebrated winegrowing region. All estate vineyards are certified sustainable, with select sites organically certified. Sustainability milestones include LEED Gold Certification for HALL St. Helena in 2009 and its gravity-flow winemaking facility in 2014, plus rooftop solar panels that offset over nine hundred metric tons of CO₂ annually. Learn more at hallwines.com, waltwines.com, bacawines.com, and michelfochwines.com. Follow @hallwines, @waltwines, @bacawines, and @michelfochchampagne.

Name: Hinch Distillery
Description:
About Hinch Irish Whiskey:
Hinch Irish Whiskey is a distinguished Irish whiskey and Irish Gin distillery located in County Down in north of the island of Ireland. With a passion for crafting exceptional spirits, Hinch Irish Whiskey combines traditional Irish distilling methods with innovative techniques to create whiskies of exceptional quality and character. Each expression is carefully crafted using the finest ingredients and aged to perfection, resulting in a range of whiskies that captivate the senses and delight whiskey connoisseurs worldwide.

Name: Boisset la Famille des Grands Vins
Description:
Nous sommes heureux de vous accueillir au sein de « la famille », une collection de Maisons et Domaines originaux dont les racines plongent dans l’histoire des terroirs les plus prestigieux. Dépassant les frontières traditionnelles, Boisset La Famille des Grands Vins embrasse l’audace et l’innovation et réunit en son sein l’Ancien et le Nouveau monde, offrant une étonnante exploration des terroirs et des héritages. Si les océans nous séparent, les grands vins nous rapprochent !

Nathalie & Jean-Charles Boisset

Name: Ravasqueira
Description:
Ravasqueira has been linked to the José de Mello family for several generations. Located in the municipality of Arraiolos, about an hour’s drive from Lisbon, the estate occupies a vast area of typical Alentejan landscape. 

The excellent geological conditions and the climate are well suited to the production of some of the best wine that the Alentejo has to offer. A great deal has been invested in planting vines and also in modern winemaking equipment and in meteorological and plant-health facilities. Investment at Ravasqueira has also been directed at the infrastructures of an wine tourism project.

Ravasqueira is committed to the production of distinctive quality wines, and some of the most admired portuguese wine brands such as Guarda Rios, Coutada Velha, Mocho Galego and Dona Vitória.

Name: MPL Brands
Description: As one of the fastest growing beverage companies in the United States, MPL has established itself in the wine and spirits industry by using a proprietary process with 100% Blue Agave to innovate within the growing ready-to-drink spirits category. Along with developing and launching their own brands with nationwide distribution such as Rancho La Gloria Ready to Drink Margaritas, Texas Ranch Water Company Hard Seltzer and Magave Tequila. MPL products are made for and sold in every major retailer including Costco, Target, Walmart and Whole Foods, among others.

Name: obe Cocktails
Description:
o’ be is India's first Ready-to-Drink Craft Cocktails #AllMixedUp

Nitesh Prakash, the Founder and CEO of o' be cocktails, embarked on a passionate pursuit of the ultimate cocktail experience, established a mini-experiment lab in his kitchen for tastings and experiments with friends. His unwavering dedication led him to source the finest spirits, visit distilleries, and meticulously handpick the crème de la crème of liquors and liqueurs. Leaving no detail untouched, he prioritized authentic, all-natural flavors and even chose the purest water. This journey ultimately gave birth to o' be, India's pioneering Ready-to-Drink Craft Cocktails brand.

o' be cocktails presents a quartet of meticulously crafted libations, each designed to elevate your drinking experience. "o' be Lively" emerges as the life of the party, blending premium vodka, white rum, gin, and agave to create a spirited fusion that's perfect for lively evenings. Then comes "o' be Fab," capturing the essence of the Cosmopolitan with premium vodka as its base, promising a fun and vibrant cocktail. For those seeking refreshment, "o' be Zesty" offers a cool breeze in a glass, crafted with premium white rum and minty freshness. Lastly, recognizing the timeless allure of the Gin & Tonic, the team introduces "o' be Suave," a masterful combination of premium gin and top-tier tonic water, offering a suave and satisfying twist on a classic. These cocktails reflect o' be's commitment to using the finest ingredients and artisanal craftsmanship to provide consistently exceptional drinks for every occasion.

And there you have it, the birth of o' be cocktails, where meticulous craftsmanship meets premium ingredients to deliver crafted classics for any occasion.

Name: Comité interprofessionnel des Vins d'Alsace
Description: Le Comité Interprofessionnel des Vins d’Alsace (CIVA) est l’interprofession de tous les vins AOC (Appellations d’Origine Contrôlée) d’Alsace. Il réunit plus de 950 opérateurs (caves particulières, coopératives, négociants), assure des missions de service à la viticulture (études économiques, informations techniques, obligations réglementaires et déclaratives) et de promotion des vins et du vignoble d’Alsace en France et à l’étranger (publicité, relations publiques, formation, soutien à l’export)

Name: Woodsmen Mountain Whiskey
Description:
Ginglani Distillers is an underdog whiskey start-up, igniting the sparks of a craft whiskey movement in India. Driven by a young founder, Shivam Ginglani and a team of passionate and fearless individuals, we're on the journey to establish "Himalayan Whiskey" as the face of India in the global whiskey industry.

We believe whiskey is only as good as the water that's used in making it. And the water that goes into crafting Woodsmen Mountain Whiskey comes from one of the purest water sources in the world - the springs of the Himalayan Mountains. It's this, coupled with our constant hunger to innovate, push boundaries, and cheekily push back the status quo, that makes us think we'll go on to create whiskey history.

Name: Gulf Brands International
Description:
A name synonymous with the liquor industry in Bahrain, Gulf Brands International are a leading importer, retailer and distributor of alcoholic beverages operating in the on-trade, retail and home delivery sectors.

We are a wholly owned subsidiary of Gulf Hotels Group, a company established in Bahrain in 1969 that owns and operates several iconic properties across the region.

Watch our corporate video to find out more about us: https://youtu.be/3Y0knI2TByk

Name: MontGras Winery
Description:
A winery with soul. That is MontGras and that’s the way it has been forged since the onset with one clear objective: consistently create world-class wines from Chile’s best terroirs. 

Brothers Hernán and Eduardo Gras gave life to the winery in 1993, combining state of the art technology with the talent and passion of a very special group of people.

With the inspiration of Hernán, who had a long winemaking trajectory in Canada, along with the entrepreneurial vision of his brother Eduardo and Cristián's pragmatic businesses view, they made a perfect combination that has converted MontGras into one of the major wine groups of Chile, with presence in the main wine regions of the country – Colchagua, Maipo and Leyda-, along with a high participation in international markets.

Name: Bodega y Viñedos Renacer
Description:
Situada en Luján de Cuyo - Mendoza al pie de la cordillera de los Andes y con presencia en más de 40 países, Renacer fue fundada en el año 2003. Desde entonces, ha logrado posicionarse como una de las bodegas boutiques referentes de la zona no sólo por sus vinos, sino también por su distintiva arquitectura y paisajismo de estilo toscano.
Los pilares básicos que sustentan al equipo de trabajo de la bodega son la búsqueda constante de la alta calidad, la innovación, el espíritu familiar, la sustentabilidad y la especialización en la elaboración de Malbecs y Cabernets.

Name: Distillerie De La Tour - DDLT
Description:
Founded in 1989 in the heart of France’s Cognac region, Distillerie de la Tour is the largest brand-independent winery & distillery - delivering scalable, sustainable and customized bulk solutions to global brands. 

By leveraging our long-standing supplier partnerships, strong inventory and economies of scale, we supply bulk wine, cognac, brandy, wine distillates, spirits, liqueurs, neutral alcohols and private-label services—at competitive rates without compromising on quality, compliance & confidentiality.

What we produce & supply
• Bulk wine
• Bulk cognac: VS, VSOP, XO, XXO + custom age profiles
• Bulk wine distillates & bulk brandy (multiple age profiles)
• Bulk neutral alcohols: Grain Neutral Spirits (GNS)
• Bulk spirits: vodka, gin, rum, whisky
• Bulk liqueurs
• Private-label: R&D, formulation, aging, contract bottling

Facilities & Capacity
Sites: 12+ ha, ~20,000 m² cellars and >50M L storage across Charentes & Gascony. 
Inventory: 25M L wine, 16M L cognac & brandy, 10M L spirits — guaranteeing consistent year-round supply.

Laboratories & quality assurance
Our in-house labs and teams oversee testing, traceability and compliance. 
ISO 9001 (quality), ISO 22000 (food safety) and ISO 14001 (environment) certified; ensuring every batch meets regulatory & customer requirements.

Operations & logistics
We coordinate freight, export documentation and regulatory compliance, managing customs, sanitary paperwork and destination-specific requirements for smooth global distribution.

Why partners choose us
• 360° support: sourcing, winemaking, distillation, aging, blending, shipping
• Proven systems: ISO 9001, ISO 22000, ISO 14001, CTPAT, Organic, Kosher, non-GMO
• Expert team with embedded sustainability
• Confidential, tailor-made private-label & global logistics
• Global reach: clients in 25+ countries on 5 continents

Need high-volume supply, custom blends or private-label? Contact us for a proposal. 

Let’s craft the next generation of wines & spirits together.

Name: Annandale Distillery
Description: Experience the spirit of individuality with Annandale Distillery, dedicated to crafting the world’s finest Single Cask Single Malt Scotch Whisky.

Name: Purple Brands
Description: Purple Brands is dedicated to creating extraordinary wine and distilled spirit experiences that surprise and delight. Founded by Derek Benham in 2001, the company produces branded wines as well as custom and private label wines for major U.S. and International retailers and restaurateurs. Purple Brands is based in Petaluma, California, the southern gateway to Sonoma County. The Company operates satellite wineries in the Russian River Valley and in American Canyon, located in Napa County.  In 2014, Benham broke ground on a distillery in the small, west Sonoma County town of Graton, where Benham's Gin and Redwood Empire Whiskey are produced. In addition to these new spirit brands, Purple Brands wine portfolio includes Avalon Winery, Four Vines, Scattered Peaks and Raeburn Winery, one of America’s fastest growing wine brands.  Sustainability is a key facet of Purple’s operating principles. Over the past decade the Company has made great strides in water and energy conservation and both the Graton and American Canyon wineries are certified sustainable by the California Sustainable Winegrowing Alliance.

Name: Casa Loy
Description: Tequilera de Los Altos Don Manuel distillery was created to immortalize Don Manuel Loy, the founding member of OMEX, who began working at a young age and created a commercial group that leads today in many commercial areas of the food industry in Mexico,such as Agave, livestock, poultry, agriculture and forestry .

Name: Firriato
Description: In the early 80 'in Trapani (Italy, Sicily), the passion for wine by Salvatore Di Gaetano and his wife Vinzia Novara Di Gaetano, born Firriato. Sicilian winery that has managed to combine tradition with innovation and technology, always respecting nature and who is its guardian.

Name: Davos Brands
Description: Our mission is to build and develop the highest quality, best in class wine and spirits brands that create a valuable and lasting connection with consumers.  We do this through teamwork, innovation, entrepreneurial spirit, and relentless perseverance. The Davos Brands team members are recognized to be amongst the best performers in the industry; the team operates in a collegiate, open-structure, and dynamic mode.  Our team thinks out of the box and finds ways to obtain outstanding results through an entrepreneurial focus.  The Davos Brands premium portfolio is currently composed of TY KU Sake, Aviation Gin, Sombra Mezcal, and Astral Tequila.

Name: Australian Grape & Wine
Description:
Australian Grape & Wine is the national peak industry body for Australia’s winegrape and wine producers, achieving policy, trade and business outcomes that drive our industry forward.

We are the first point of contact for Government and the avenue through which the industry’s views are heard on policy and funding issues. 

Our members set our agenda and fund our activities. Membership is open to all Australian grape and wine producers, and affiliate membership is offered to associated businesses.

On behalf of the Australian wine sector, Australian Grape & Wine is working to deliver a more diverse and equal wine community that allows all participants to fulfil their potential, delivering benefits to individuals, companies and broader society. This will present the wine sector as a leader in the area of meeting consumer expectations in terms of product, services and behaviour.

Name: QUALITY SPIRITS INTERNATIONAL LIMITED
Description:
Quality Spirits International is a wholly owned subsidiary of the largest independent Scotch Whisky Company.

We are located near Glasgow, Scotland at the centre of the company’s operations, and offer a wide range of brands and spirits products. QSI was established in 1992 to manage Own Brand and Private Label business for the Group. Globally, QSI are the No.1 Private Label Scotch supplier with customers in over 75+ countries.

In addition to Scotch Whisky, we also offer Irish Whiskey, Bourbon and Gin.

Name: La Madrileña SA de CV
Description:
La Madrileña S.A. de C.V. es un empresa 100% mexicana dedicada a la producción, distribución y venta de vinos y licores desde 1911.


A partir de 1995, La Madrileña, comenzó a establecer relaciones comerciales con grandes compañías extranjeras para distribuir en el mercado mexicano sus marcas y productos. Actualmente, es una de las empresas con mayor exportación de Tequila a Estados Unidos.


Nuestras marcas se distribuyen a diversos países como: Estados Unidos, Costa Rica, Guatemala, El Salvador, Honduras, Panamá, Colombia, Bolivia, Corea del Sur, Dinamarca y Alemania. La Madrileña es uno de los más grandes importadores de vino en México. 


La Madrileña busca promover mejores relaciones con sus clientes y consumidores, satisfaciendo sus necesidades y superando sus expectativas como uno de los líderes en venta y distribución de vinos y licores.

Name: Wally's Wine & Spirits
Description:
Wally’s Santa Monica, Beverly Hills, Las Vegas, and Culver City combine the best of several worlds – a dazzling array of wines & spirits, a gourmet cheese shop, and exceptional cuisine in a sophisticated yet relaxed restaurant setting. Our award-winning wine list, featuring 120+ wines by the glass, lets you discover something delicious to pair with our California-French inspired menu, while our unrivaled selection of spirits and artisan cocktails will please any palate.

As a leading expert in the wine and food world for over 50 years, the foundation of our success is now on display for all to see. When seeking a rare, special vintage, you are invited to enter The Vault, where the world becomes your wine cellar. For your everyday needs, our team of experts will guide you to a curated array of the best values and highest quality products on earth.

We don’t have everything, just the best of everything.

Name: Big Machine Distillery
Description:
Big Machine Distillery has become a powerhouse in the spirits industry, producing a diverse lineup of award-winning products, including Borchetta Bourbon, Big Machine Vodka, Spiked Coolers, and most recently, the acquisition of Nashville’s #1 hometown vodka – Pickers Vodka.

Big Machine Distillery offers premier experiences across three unique locations in Tennessee, perfect for hosting unforgettable private events, social gatherings, or corporate functions.

Name: Independent Stave Company
Description:
Independent Stave Company is a family-owned, dynamic, global company reaching customers in over 40 countries and cooperages around the world. Every day, millions of people enjoy beverages aged in our wine and whiskey barrels. 

A century since the company's founding, Independent Stave Company still embraces the core values of family, innovation, community, and hard work. Total commitment to quality and service has made us the leading cooperage company in the world, thanks to the unfailing support of our satisfied customers.

Name: Western Spirits Beverage Company
Description:
A bold vision in spirits - Welcome to Western Spirits Beverage Company. We are proud of the spirits and brands we have crafted. Please drink responsibly.

Brands:
Bird Dog Whiskey
Calumet Farm Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey
Sam Houston Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey
Lexington Bourbon Whiskey
Twenty Grand Vodka
KRU Vodka
Bokeelia Rum

Name: Bouchard Père & Fils
Description:
Fondée en 1731 et installée au Château de Beaune, la Maison Bouchard Père & Fils est propriétaire d’un prestigieux domaine de Côte d’Or en Premiers et Grands Crus. 
Engagée depuis près de 15 ans dans une démarche de culture raisonnée de son vignoble, Bouchard Père & Fils a acquis en 2015 le niveau le plus exigeant de la certification environnementale des exploitations nommée "Haute Valeur Environnementale 3".

Founded in 1731 and located in the Château de Beaune, Bouchard Père & Fils owns a prestigious estate in the Côte d'Or of Grands Crus and Premiers Crus. Practicing « reasoned » (sustainable) growing in its vineyard for almost 15 years, Domaine Bouchard Père & Fils obtained in 2015 the highest level within the environemental certification named « High Evironmental Value 3 » for wine domains.

Name: Rodney Strong Vineyards
Description:
Rodney Strong Vineyards is a family-owned wine company committed to crafting world-class wines that capture the essence of Sonoma County. Rodney Strong farms 11 sustainable-certified estate vineyards and produces wines from Sonoma County’s finest appellations. The winery was founded in 1959 by Sonoma County wine pioneer Rod Strong as the 13th bonded winery in the county. Led by the Klein family since 1989, Rodney Strong Vineyards is a family of passionate people committed to crafting premium wines, great experiences and delivering a vision for sustainability in Sonoma County. We are united by our passion for wine and the belief that nothing brings people together better than sharing a great bottle of Rodney Strong wine.

Just south of the quaint town of Healdsburg, our winery and tasting room are nestled in the sweeping vineyards of Russian River Valley. Experience Sonoma County – taste the exceptional quality of our wines, indulge in our Food & Wine Pairing experience or join us for one of our many events held throughout the year.

Name: Breakthru Beverage Virginia
Description: Breakthru Beverage Virginia is a wholesaler and brokerage operation formerly known as Associated Distributors. Serving as the critical link between wine and spirits suppliers and retail outlets, the company was formed in 2006 when Sunbelt acquired a 50 percent interest in the company from its now former partners, the Rogers family.

Name: Château Beauregard
Description: L'histoire de Beauregard remonte au XIIe siècle et aux chevaliers Hospitaliers de Saint Jean de Jérusalem, à qui l'on doit la célèbre Croix des Templiers, emblème de Beauregard. C'est au milieu du XVIIe siècle que Beauregard passe de la polyculture à la viticulture. Au fil des décennies, ses propriétaires successifs contribuent à son développement et à sa classification au rang des meilleurs vins de Pomerol. Propriété des familles Moulin et Cathiard depuis 2014, le Château Beauregard renaît autour de sa fonction première : produire un grand vin de Pomerol au coeur d'un lieu historiquement dédié à la résidence de ses hôtes.

Name: eProvenance
Description:
A Franco-American company, eProvenance offers advanced, patented technology to monitor and analyze the temperature, humidity and geolocation of wine, art and other fine and perishable goods during transit and storage.

Our in-depth research shows that when wine is exposed to high temperatures for an extended period, accelerated chemical reactions begin to degrade color, aroma and aging ability. We use our proprietary algorithm to determine the eProvenance Score (1-100), which clearly indicates whether a shipment has been damaged, not just whether it has experienced problematic temperature conditions. 

With eProvenance solutions, our clients can measure, improve and validate the conditions of their distribution channels. Our objective expert analysis (including reports, statistics, alerts and benchmarks) helps our clients deliver perfect provenance, create value and build market share. Monitoring shipment and storage conditions lowers instances of damage and thus protects wines and brands.

We know monitoring shipments and storage conditions lowers instances of damage. Let us help you protect your wines and your brand.

Name: Dillon Bass
Description: Dillon Bass is a well known name in the Northern Ireland drinks industry. For over 35 years we have been distributing our brands and working in partnership with our customers. With share holders Pernod Ricard and Moet Hennessy behind us we have an enviable portfolio of wines and spirits.

Name: Maison AL
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page Linkedin de Maison AL ! 



Maison AL est une société d’embouteillage indépendante créée par Arnaud Lintilhac, entrepreneur passionné par l’univers des spiritueux français.

Maison AL vous propose des spiritueux modernes aux saveurs uniques (Rhums, Whiskys et autres à venir…) 100% français issus du savoir-faire de nos régions !

Name: Encostas de Alqueva - Grupo Abegoaria
Description:
Uma história que nasce na margem esquerda do Guadiana,
no Alentejo interior, mas que hoje se expande para outros territórios no país e no mundo. Sempre com a mesma filosofia e a mesma determinação, de contribuir para a preservação do melhor
da identidade portuguesa e de valorizar as suas gentes.

Name: Arrington Vineyards
Description:
Our vineyard is located about 25 miles south of Nashville. We want to make your experience in Nashville’s Wine Country enjoyable and memorable for you. We offer plenty of outdoor seating areas for you to enjoy while you’re here. 

Our Pavilion is open daily, where you can purchase AV wines, self-guided wine tasting flights, merchandise, and snacks. Come experience the beauty and tranquility of our vineyard while enjoying some delicious wine. 
We can’t wait to welcome you here!

Name: DEERNESS DISTILLERY LTD
Description: Orkneys first distillery in over 130 years! Multi award winning gin, vodka and liqueurs handcrafted in the beautiful Orkney islands. commence your sensory journey with Deerness Distillery spirits

Name: Blue Ice Wine UK Ltd
Description:
Blue Ice Wine UK Ltd is a veteran owned importer, distributor and retailer of wine working with small family owned vineyards and wineries. Our initial selection of wines is sourced from Croatia but during 2021 will be offering wines from further afield. 

We support two excellent military charities - The Grenadier Guards Colonel's Fund and Combat Stress. We make a donation of 20p for each bottle of wine sold (10p to each charity). So drinking wine at the same time as making a charitable donation couldn't be easier.

Croatia has a 2000 year history of wine production and we are pleased to introduce you to some of these wines including some of the indigenous grapes varietals such as Plavac Mali, Teran, Malvazija and Posip.

Name: Champagne MARC
Description:
Skill Subtlety And Creativity.
"The perfect blend at the heart of Champage Marc" 

In keeping with the nobility and passion that have shaped its history, the House of Marc has stayed true to the traditional knowledge of its ancestors whilst at the same time adopting emerging technology to guarantee the very best quality in its wines.

All our history on http://www.champagne-marc.fr/en !

Name: Champagne-Philippe-Gonet
Description: Artisan de Champagne depuis 7 générations. Un style plaisir et minéral de grands Champagnes Blanc de Blancs. . Une gamme de 6 blanc de blancs, 1 rosé et 2 assemblages créés par Chantal et son frère Pierre Gonet.

Name: Sweet Cheeks Winery
Description:
Nestled in the Southern Willamette Valley, Sweet Cheeks winery has made a mark with award-winning wines, friendly wine servers and a  beautiful view from the patio. We opened our doors on Thanksgiving weekend 2005 and have continued to provide delicious wines in a fun, relaxing atmosphere. Open every day year-round you can walk through our doors and enjoy complimentary tastings while chatting with our knowledgeable staff.  Enjoy a picnic with your favorite glass of wine either on the sunny patio atop the vineyard or next to the cozy fire on a rainy day. Throughout the year we do host signature events with specialty foods and entertainment giving you even more time to soak in the breathtaking view and grab some of our select wines.

While our vineyard has been producing Pinot Noir, Riesling, Pinot Gris and Chardonnay for over 30 years we have expanded our wine selection beyond the estate grown wines.  Forging loyal relationships with other vineyards throughout Oregon, we now produce a wide selection of warmer climate varietals helping to quench your craving or surprise you with a lesser known varietal like Tempranillo.

Name: Château de Beaupré
Description: Château de Beaupré is one of the historics wineyards of Aix-en-Provence. Since 2013, Phanette Double is leading the wineyard in Organic Agriculture. Château de Beaupré is producing white, red and rosés wines but is also welcoming and organizing business seminars, privatizations and events.

Name: Tonton Lucien
Description:
Tonton Lucien is your online wine shops, always here when you need it. 

With our pick-up points in downtown Paris, get great wines delivered to your door, via our partners: Deliveroo and UberEats.

Our ambition is to become the #1 wine shop in Paris, one bottle at a time. 

For more information, contact us by email : bonjourtontonlucien@gmail.com

Name: Klovis Calvados
Description:
We believe that calvados is a love story between mankind and the nature of Normandy. Yet, all lovers should work on their relationship and reinvent themselves from time to time, right?

That's the idea behind Klovis. To highlight a wonderful product through a modern interpretation of our father's know-how, in order to make it live forever.

Name: Itasca Wines / Penncroft Vineyards
Description: Itasca Wines, a Hampshire Vineyard and Winery based on Conservation Agriculture.16,000 vines of Chardonnay, Pinot Noir, Pinot Meunière & Bacchus. With enhanced winery capacity offers contract winemaking services “Vine to Bottle” to other Vineyards.

Name: TanninTime
Description:
TanninTime: a wine blog and e.commerce.
Tastings are always central of our blog.
Every collector, enthusiast or consumer of wine wants to know what to buy, learn how already-released wine are developing, and what to expect in terms of quality, typically, and value – nothing offers more comfort than reliable tasting note.
I’m a sommelier but I’m not a professional wine expert … I am simply a wine and good food lover, always curious to discover new products.
I enjoy listening to winemakers stories in there cellars. I also love to talk and write about wine, its nuances and the emotions it creates.
I yearn to discuss wine wines, relay my emotions, experiences, and inform all those who read my blog.

I do not like to define myself because I am basically like wine, constantly evolving!

Hotel training, a subsequent degree in economics and then becoming an accountant.

I’m a sommelier but I’m not a professional wine expert … I am simply a wine and good food lover, always curious to discover new products.

I enjoy listening to winemakers stories in there cellars. I also love to talk and write about wine, its nuances and the emotions it creates.

Alessandro Ingrosso

Name: Simone International
Description: We keep things fresh. By creating unique and innovative products, Simone International continues to consistently over-deliver on the quality and value of our products.  We combine our teams talents along with years of market intelligence to become a company who no longer just sells product, rather builds lasting brands.

Name: Domaine Amiot-Servelle
Description: A shared family passion at the Domaine Amiot-Servelle in Chambolle-Musigny, jewel of the Côte de Nuits

Name: Arpo Gin
Description:

EM LUGARES QUE NÃO APARECEM NO CARTÃO-POSTAL,
