Name: Copper Rivet Distillery
Description: The Copper Rivet Distillery is an exciting and dynamic Medway based craft distillery. Drawing upon the area's rich tradition of innovation and craft, the team will toil together to produce small batches of exceptional gins, whiskies and vodkas from scratch in bespoke stills, with the same skill that local craftsmen once fashioned world-class ships.

Name: Chateau La Croizille
Description:
Château La Croizille, acquired by the De Schepper family in 1996, is in an outstanding location in the heart of the legendary Saint-Émilion appellation. The vineyard consists of a single block of vines grown on slopes on the Saint-Émilion clay-limestone plateau, nestled in a cirque 30 to 70 metres above sea level, adjacent to Château Tour Baladoz, in Saint-Laurent des Combes, between Tertre Roteboeuf and Troplong Mondot.
Since acquiring Château La Croizille, the family have focused on producing an outstanding wine combining a great terroir with state-of-the-art technology and traditional expertise. In April 2013, a new cellar was completed at Château La Croizille, which meets the strictest technical specifications and features a tasting room overlooking the valley, showcasing the superb surrounding landscape.

Name: Marnier Lapostolle Inc
Description: Marnier‑Lapostolle Inc. is the U.S.-based arm of the historic French brand that produces Grand Marnier. Its role includes managing U.S. distribution, marketing, and operations of Grand Marnier and related products. The parent company, Société des Produits Marnier‑Lapostolle, has maintained its identity and legacy in fine spirits since the 19th century, albeit now under the umbrella of Campari

Name: LCC vins et spiritueux
Description: Agence de représentation de vins et spiritueux établie en 1985.  LCC vins et spiritueux représente plus de 125 marques de vins et spiritueux vendues à la SAQ et en importation privée au Québec.

Name: Enologo Valerio Coltellini
Mega Wine and Spirits
Description:
Mega Wine and Spirits is a private company founded in 1982 and currently under new ownership since 2014. We sell liquor, wine, and beer at 11 locations located in South Florida. 
Mega Wine and Spirits is committed to providing a wide variety of wine, spirits and beers with the best prices and accompanied by excellent customer service.  
Check us out on Instagram, Facebook, and Twitter!

Name: Collector Wines
Description: Collector Wines is a fine wine brand based in the Canberra wine region, Australia. Its Cellar Door is in Collector, NSW.

Name: DTC Wine Workshops
Description: DTC Wine Workshops works with wineries large and small across the US to grow direct to consumer wine sales, expand brand awareness and retain loyal customers by implementing proven consumer engagement strategies. Whether you are setting up a new DTC sales team or want to augment your capabilities on a project-by-project basis, our consultants can help you implement the ideal blend of process and technology to achieve robust sales and increase customer retention. Onsite and in-person workshops tailored with customized curriculum and breakout sessions.

Name: IrishWhiskey.com
Description:
Promoting Irish Whiskey Globally.

Irish Whiskey.com is an exclusive Irish Whiskey Connoisseur owned Online Irish Whiskey Shop specialising in rare, unusual and premium Irish Whiskey and Irish Whiskey Gifts and Products. These are the Irish Whiskies that we enjoy collecting and drinking here ourselves in Ireland.

Irish Whiskey.Com have partnered with several respected Irish Whiskey distillers and providers to share a very wide range of premium whiskeys from Ireland as well as an of exclusive range of unusual exclusive and specially selected Irish Whiskey gifts all of which you can order online through our Irish whiskey online sales partners, the well known and trusted Whisky Exchange.

An exclusive Irish Whiskey Connoisseurs team led by our site developer and Irish Whiskey connoisseur, Stuart McNamara has teamed up with world renowned online whiskey seller the Whisky Exchange to bring you an exclusive range of drinkable and  affordable Irish Whiskey and also rare and premium Irish Whiskeys for collecting and drinking on special occasions.  Stuart, whose own personal Irish Whisky favourites include, Green Spot, Midleton Rare, Black Bush and Tullamore Dew is a highly experienced Irish Whiskey Connisseur and has recently been honoured with the title of "Stillman" by Midleton Distillery in Cork.

Stuart has put together a very special range of exclusive and rare special edition filled Whiskey Decanters, Whiskey Books and Beautiful Irish Whiskey Gifts, many of which will become valued in years to come by discerning Irish Whiskey fans and all of which would make ideal Birthday or Special Gifts for the Irish Whiskey Connoisseur in your life.

Name: Swizzle Delivery
Description:
We help you pick the perfect bottle of beer, wine, or spirits and deliver it to your doorstep. Our tailored advice is based on your occasion, budget, taste profile and preferences.  

We're live in London!

Download the app now: https://download.swizzledelivery.com/

Name: DIVIN NOLOW
Description: DIVIN NOLOW a été fondé en 2018 par Les Vignobles Villebois et débute cette exploration du monde des vins sans alcool. C’est une quête d’innovation avec un regard résolument avant-gardiste autour des cépages ligériens. Forts de plusieurs années de recherche et développement et le succès de sa gamme Origine, DIVIN poursuit son développement avec le lancement d’une gamme Vigneron offrant des vins désalcoolisés singuliers, ouvrant à une expérience de dégustation unique. Ce projet audacieux est nourri par une passion viti-vinicole combinant des techniques de vinification artisanales avec des méthodes modernes de désalcoolisation.

Name: Piémont Causses & Cévennes
Description:
Depuis le 24 janvier 2024, les caves SAINT MAURICE, Le Piémont des Cévennes et CASTELBARRY Montpeyroux s’unissent pour bâtir un pacte coopératif, éthique et durable ancré sur deux territoires viticoles, dans le respect de l’ADN de chacun : PIEMONT CAUSSES & CEVENNES.
Ce rapprochement fait sens après dix années côte à côte à s’inscrire dans une démarche engagée de développement durable et responsable au cœur des enjeux environnementaux, sociétaux et économiques (RSE ISO 26000-Vignerons Engagés).
Ce qui nous lie nous fait grandir ! … Désormais cette synergie permet de proposer une palette de vins du haut Languedoc aux Cévennes, où se côtoient IGP Cévennes, IGP St Guilhem le désert, IGP d’Oc, AOP Languedoc, AOP Terrasses du Larzac et AOP Montpeyroux.
Entre influences septentrionales (Piémont des Cévennes) et Languedoc d’altitude (Piémont des Causses), les deux gammes de vins sont complémentaires, sous l’ombrelle d’une démarche éthique, durable et vivante de la vigne au verre.

Name: Spirit of Hven
Description: Handcrafted, Premium spirits, Made on the island of Hven

Name: JN Wine
Description:
JN Wine is based in Crossgar, Northern Ireland but supplies winelovers across the UK and Ireland. We offer home delivery and supply many of the top restaurants and hotels the length and breadth of the country and have done so since 1977. James Nicholson prides himself on presenting the finest and most innovative wines from around the world, tasting events to excite the senses and second to none, multi-award winning expertise.
 n 2017, James Nicholson  celebrated 40 years in the business. Wine lovers far and wide trust James’s knowledge, passion and dedication to bring them the best the world has to offer. James’s respect throughout the wine industry is renowned, having won the International Wine Challenge Regional Merchant of the Year an astonishing 28 times since 1988. Look out for loads of great events and special offers in 2019.

James Nicholson has been part of the wine scene in Northern Ireland for over 40 years.  Starting out in the restaurant trade, James’ keen interest in wine, combined with an independent spirit, set him on the path which gradually evolved into the JN Wine you see today.

The wholesale side of the business came first.  James was doing what no one else in Ireland was doing at the time; going out to the vineyards and sourcing his own products, only purchasing wines he tasted and felt he could stand over.  It’s a liberating way to do business, but with great freedom comes great responsibility – there is no one to hide behind.  James still spends a lot of time visiting vineyards, developing decades long relationships with some of his longest standing suppliers while sourcing new talent and exciting products.  He’s been in Bordeaux every spring since 1982 for the en primeur campaign too.  The selection of wines you will find in our portfolio is a reflection of the winegrowing world as it is today – each bottle selected by hand and carrying the James Nicholson seal of approval.

Name: Domaine Alône
Description:
À chaque fois que Pascale et moi passions devant, nous étions captivés par un magnifique chêne, à l’entrée de cette propriété viticole. La présence de cet arbre multi-séculaire sur une terre aussi sableuse augurait de la qualité unique d’un terroir.

Vingt ans plus tard nous avons acquis ce lieu fascinant pour fonder notre domaine. Un coup de cœur insensé...seulement en apparence !

Name: querciamatta
Description:
Querciamatta è un mondo, una passione, una condivisione di progetti idee e sensazioni. Il borgo è il cuore della tenuta, gli oliveti ed i vigneti ne sono l'anima... e tutto gira intorno a loro e a noi. 

"ANNO ZERO" è la nostra collezione di olio extravergine di oliva realizzato in regime biologico. I nostri volti, i nostri caratteri, ognuno di loro racconta fieramente i diversi modi di esprimersi del nostro territorio.

Name: VinPilot
Description:
VinPilot - WFT offers solutions for professional wine fermentation as well as systems for sugar monitoring using digital refractometers and other process control systems for winemaking and wooden barrel cellar humidification, 
WFT Winetechnology is an internationally renowned company founded in 1998 by Klaus Deschka. With its oenological know-how and innovative VinPilot products, VinPilot offers the world's most advanced fermentation control and other innovative solutions for wine producers.

VinPilot is represented and distributed by numerous partners around the world. Retailers and customers trust in the quality and reliability of the VinPilot product range.

Name: Askaneli • ასკანელი
Description:
Company "Askaneli" was founded in 1998 by brothers Chkhaidze. The name “Askaneli” is associated with the small, magical village of Askana, located in the beautiful region of Guria, where the old cellar, built by their ancestor – Antimoz Chkhaidze still stands. 

Antimoz and his whole family was in love with vine and the divine fluid obtained from the grapes. They made their wine according to the old Georgian method, indigenously in clay vessels - called Kvevri. All members of the family were involved in this activity, especially the grandchildren who hosted guests with clay Jugs and little terracotta cups. 

Antimoz Chkhaidze's cellar and several pitchers dating back to 1880 are still preserved in the village of Askana. Tradition of this beautiful family was revived by brothers Chkhaidze. 

The founder of the company Gocha Chkhaidze has been working for years to revitalize Georgian viticulture, preserve and recover unique grape varieties. The company owns hundreds of hectars of vineyards, two winemaking facilities in Kakheti and Tbilisi and one fruit distillery in Guria. In addition of producing more than 60 denominations of wine, company produces aged brandy, chacha and brut. “Askaneli” is one of the largest organizations in Georgia, which is in the top three winemaking company ratings of wine production and vine farming.

Name: Vignobles Baron de Montfort
Description:
Vignobles Baron de Montfort is an Independent Maison in Bordeaux running two organic red wine Estates:

Château du Rocher | Château Lagrange-Monbadon.

Follow us on Instagram @chateaudurocher

Name: Hong Kong International Wine and Spirit Competition
Description:
The Hong Kong International Wine & Spirit Competition has been the guide to quality international wines and spirits for the booming Asian market. Sister competition of the London-based IWSC, the competition is led by renowned experts in the global drinks industry: Debra Meiburg MW, Asia’s first Master of Wine, and Wine Consultant for Cathay Pacific Airways and Cathay Dragon and the Conversion Group. 
Judges comprise Asia’s top industry experts - including Masters of Wine and Master Sommelier, VIP International wine and spirit judges, leading F&B professionals, wine educators, importers, critics and journalists.
The competition offers winners year-round marketing support, including an on-going package of promotions and tastings at many of Asia’s most important trade and consumer events, as well as focused tastings with key decisions makers and buyers. 
The awards offer Asian consumers and trade buyers the ultimate guide to purchasing wine and spirits chosen specifically for the Asian consumer by Asia’s top wine professionals.

Name: Nauer Weine
Description:
Nauer Weine in Bremgarten ist seit 1893 im Besitz der Familie Nauer. Mittlerweile wird die Firma in der 4. Generation von Patrik Nauer geleitet. Das Unternehmen beschäftigt sich mit der Weinproduktion in der Schweiz und dem Weinhandel. Durch die Verbindung der eigenen Weinproduktion und dem Handelshaus entsteht ein reger Austausch, was das gegenseitige Know how und Verständnis stärkt. 

Da Nauer Weine selber ein Familienunternehmen ist, wird immer direkt bei den Produzenten eingekauft und man arbeitet ausschliesslich mit Familienunternehmen. Damit entsteht eine enge Vertrauensbasis, was die nötige Kontinuität für die Zukunft bringt. Schlussendlich ist man der Tradition verpflichtet! Im Handelshaus Nauer befinden sich viele exklusive Vertretungen für den Schweizer Markt. Bei der Selektion der Weine steht die Qualität der Produkte im Vordergrund. Von irgendwelchen Bewertungen lässt man sich nicht verführen.

Nauer Weine bedient in der Schweiz einen grossen Kundenkreis von Restaurants und Händlern. Für die Privatkundschaft stehen die Türen der Vinothek in Bremgarten offen. Darin findet man ein grosses Sortiment an Weinen, Spirituosen und Ölen. Sehr bekannt ist Nauer’s Weinfestival im Frühling und im Dezember in der hauseigenen Kellerei zwischen den Holzfässern mit einer wunderbaren Ambiance. Dabei sind jeweils verschiedene Winzer vor Ort. 

Auf dem rund 15'000 m2 grossen Areal in Bremgarten hat Nauer Weine viel Platz für die Lagerung hochwertiger Weine. Denn es wird noch nach alter Tradition Wein bis zur Trinkreife gelagert. Die Lagerräumlichkeiten sind voll klimatisiert, damit die Reifung der Weine optimal erfolgen kann. Mit 35 Mitarbeitern ist Nauer Weine gut gerüstet für die Zukunft, denn man investiert auch in die Jungend, indem verschiedene Lehrberufe angeboten werden.

Name: Grupo Martúe
Description:
Tres bodegas distintas: VIÑEDOS DE NIEVA, BODEGAS MARTÚE y SEIS QUINTAS. 

Bodegas Martue: Martúe tiene un entorno especial sin el cual no habría podido nacer. Este entorno es La Guardia de Toledo. Una fortaleza sin la cual no podría haberse conseguido el sueño, los viñedos. 

Y una estrella, su gente. Gente que forma un equipo con una clara y firme filosofía de constancia y dedicación, perseverancia y cariño. Solo esta es la formula posible para elaborar un vino que expresa tanto sentimiento como lo hace Martúe. 

Viñedos de Nieva; situada junto a la ciudad de Segovia, tiene un terruño único que produce vinos de excepcional calidad, complejos, frescos y elegantes. 

Después de conocer sus vinos y sus bodegas es en Nieva donde se sorprende de la excepcionalidad de sus vinos. En el año 2009 Martue y su equipo desembarcan en Viñedos de Nieva, para elaborar vinos blancos de Rueda manteniendo la filosofía Martue, pequeñas producciones de vinos de máxima calidad al mejor precio. 

Seis Quintas:El entusiasmo por crear y conocer es lo que llevó a Martúe a iniciarse en un proyecto en el Alto Douro y en 2007, entre colinas y laderas, nace Seis Quintas Martúe. Una Bodega diseñada a imagen y semejanza de sus hermanas Viñedos de Nieva y Bodegas Martúe. 

 El Grupo Martue es el primero español que invierte en el Douro, siendo la D.O.C. Douro la denominación más antigua del mundo y una de las de mayor prestigio internacional por la calidad de sus vinos.

Name: San Simone Winery
Description: The Friulian winery San Simone, founded in 1915, is the result of the tradition and oenological culture of the Brisotto family. Today, Chiara, Anna, and Antonio Brisotto continue together with passion and tenacity. San Simone has been committed for years to applying both productive and organizational techniques that address a green process, intended not only as an environmental defense but also as a rediscovered style. We focus on a sustainable approach to vine cultivation to obtain quality wines of extreme expressive strength, which transmit the most important characteristics of our territory.

Name: Hepple Spirits Co.
Description:
Hepple Spirits Company was founded to share the breath-taking character of our home with drinkers around the world, all through their cocktail glasses. Wild moors, intense juniper, and silent mists.

Welcome to Hepple.

At our estate in the remote Northumbrian hills we distil local wild botanicals using cutting edge technology, combining nature with science to transport you into the untamed beauty of our backyard. Explore the pure flavours of our home, with tastes like no other, in our multiple award-winning Hepple Gin, Douglas Fir Flavoured Vodka and Sloe & Hawthorn Gin.

Happy Heppleing.

Name: Les Affiches Vins
Description:
Les Affiches est une maison d’édition de “ vins d’auteurs ”.
Une “ winery nouvelle génération ”, née de la rencontre des artisans vignerons qui font le vin et des amateurs qui le dégustent. Ensemble, au sein de l’atelier Les Affiches, ils explorent et co–créent des cuvées en phase avec les aspirations et l'expression des plus beaux terroirs.

Name: Molly Morgan Wines
Description:
Discover Molly Morgan Wines in Lovedale, Hunter Valley. Recently revitalized by two Novacastrians, this historic 60-year-old winery celebrates its legacy and the pioneering spirit of Molly Morgan. Established in 1963, the vineyard produces exceptional Shiraz, Chardonnay, Rosé, Semillon, and Sparkling wine under Chief Winemaker Daniel Binet.  

In late November 2024, Molly Morgan Wines will be opening a refreshed cellar door, offering a fun and unique wine-tasting experience right in the heart of the vineyard. 

Join the Mates of Molly Morgan for exclusive wine deals, events, and a complimentary annual getaway. Stay in one of our three luxurious villas with stunning views of the Brokenback Range. Experience the new charm of Molly Morgan Wines as you Sip. Savour. Stay. with us.

Name: B&A, Bu et Approuvé
Description:
Parce qu’il est difficile de choisir et de parler du vin, B&A- laboratoire d’expressions des goûts du vin, propose aux passionnés du vin, néophytes et amateurs de vivre des expériences sensorielles à l’aveugle pour découvrir, apprendre et déguster avant d’acheter. 

Participez à nos ateliers et offrez-vous enfin les vins que vous aimez ! 

Partagez vos pépites avec nous et rejoignez notre communauté de 450 dégustateurs !

Rencontrez nos vignerons engagés pour échanger sur leur savoir-faire et leurs enjeux.

Name: Weingut & Privatkellerei Bimmerle
Description: Genießen Sie Spitzenweine die beigeistern. Unsere Qualität macht den Unterschied. Ein Stück Baden mit genussvoller Tradition. Das Weingut & Privatkellerei gehört heute zu den Top100 Weinerzeugern Deutschlands und blickt auf mehr als 80 Jahre erfolgreiche Wein geschichte. Die erlesenen Weine aus der Ortenau (Baden) wurden in nationalen und internationalen Wettbewerben oft prämiert. Genießen Sie Spitzenweine mit hohem Anspruch an Qualität. Diese steht für Siegbert Bimmerle an erster Stelle. Er verbindet Erfahrung, Wissen und qualitätsorientierte Kellertechnik mit Freude, Engagement und Liebe zum Beruf. Erleben Sie den Unterschied und gönnen sich Zeit für erstklassige Weine aus Bestlagen."

Name: Cana's Feast Winery
Description: We make wines to cultivate community and celebration. The passion we pour into each handcrafted wine matches our commitment to inspire gatherings where the Cana's Feast Family joins yours around the table.

Name: Fosters Wine Estates - Stags Leap Winery
Description: On one of California’s earliest wine estates, a unique terroir and ideal microclimate support a classical standard of viticulture, land use, and winemaking that is as relevant today as it was over a century ago. Located in an intimate valley within the greater Napa Valley, Stags’ Leap is a place of natural beauty, storied buildings and gardens, a lively history, and a reputation for elegant wines showing finesse and intensity.

Name: Marseille Winery
Description: Marseille Winery, c’est l’histoire d’un voyage et d’une création, celle du vin, en France, à Marseille. Venus de Grèce, les Phocéens fondent en l’an -600 Massalia « qui deviendra Marseille. Porteurs d’un art de vivre, ils y importent la technique de la vinification et donnent ainsi naissance aux premiers vignobles français. Notre winery urbaine fait renaitre depuis 2018 l’activité viticole marseillaise avec sa gamme de vins GYPTIS en hommage à la légende de Gyptis & Protis.

Name: Boekenhoutskloof Winery Pty Ltd
Description:
Located in the southernmost corner of the beautiful Franschhoek valley, Boekenhoutskloof was officially established in 1776 - one of the oldest farms in Franschhoek. 

Today, the Boekenhoutskloof farm belongs to Boekenhoutskloof Investments (Pty) Ltd, who since 1996 have re-introduced wine production to the property.  Lead by Cellar Master Marc Kent (South African Winemaker of the Year, 2007), the winery is now regarded as one of SA’s top producers. 

As a producer, Boekenhoutskloof is a Syrah specialist, with its premium Boekenhoutskloof range selling out on release each vintage, and The Chocolate Block - a Syrah based blend - is probably the most successful new wine offering to come out of South Africa in the modern era. 

In 2009, Boekenhoutskloof acquired the old “Company of Wine People” cellar, Helderberg Winery on Winery Road, Stellenbosch. The existing production facilities were revamped and modernised to suit the growing requirements. Today, Porcupine Ridge, The Wolftrap as well as a few export exclusive brands are produced here. Also, The Chocolate Block barrel maturation cellar has been moved here to ensure optimal storage conditions. 

Other recent acquisitions were the Porseleinberg and Goldmine properties in the Swartland, each of which have their unique brand propositions in their own right, but also serving as important sources of grapes for the Boekenhoutskloof brand portfolio.

Name: SWISSCAVE AG
Description:
SWISSCAVE meets the highest standards when it comes to storing and maturing wine, resulting in perfect pleasure when drinking it.

For optimal wine presentation and temperature control in hotels, restaurants and wine shops (HORECA).
Also great for ageing your finest bottles over the years at home. Whether in the kitchen, the lounge, storeroom or basement.

SWISSCAVE used wine connoisseurs with extensive expertise to design and test its wine cellars and coolers . SWISSCAVE is famous for its high standards in functionality and practicality, and its simple, pure design. We paid special attention to the materials used to construct our products: glass, stainless steel, wood – plastic components are notable by their absence.


Key Indicators:

- simple, purist appearance
- active, electronic humidity management system
- optimal arrangement: up to 200 Bottles
- wooden pull-out racks on steel ball bearings. smoothly shifting and lockable.
- low vibration – for optimal long-term storage
- low noise! 
- glass 
- stainless steel 
- genuine hightech components
- quality wooden shelves
- classy look and feel
- low power consumption


SWISSCAVE hat sich auf die Produktion von exklusiven Weinklimaschränken und Zigarrenhumidoren spezialisiert, die sowohl beim Geniesser zuhause, als auch in der Gastronomie uum Einsatz kommen. 

In enger Zusammenarbeit mit ausgewählten Fachpersonen hat SWISSCAVE seine Technologien für die langfristige Lagerung sowie die optimale Temperierung von Wein und Zigarren perfektioniert 

SWISSCAVE Weinkühlschränke und Humidore schützen Ihre Trouvaillen vor jeglichen äusseren Einflüssen. Das optimale Klima lässt sich in den vibrations- und strahlungsfreien Kühlzonen unkompliziert einstellen und überwachen. 
Selbstbewusst, aber doch in puristischer Zurückhaltung steht er zeitlos wie ein Monolith im Raum - ein echter SWISSCAVE.

Name: Adega da Vermelha
Description:
A Adega da Vermelha que desde 1963 acumula experiência no mercado dos vinhos leves, tem também nos últimos anos vindo a alargar e melhorar a gama de vinhos dentro da marca Mundus. Conta agora com variadas referências de vinhos tintos, brancos, espumantes e licorosos, reconhecidos nacional e internacionalmente.
 
Dispomos de uma loja física nas nossas instalações e de uma loja online que poderá visitar em https://www.vermelhawineshop.pt/.


Instagram: @acvermelha
https://pt-pt.facebook.com/adegadavermelha/

Name: Millésime86
Description:
Millésime 86 est un grossiste en vins, bières, cidres et spiritueux biologiques, basé à Carpentras, dans le Vaucluse. 

Créée en 2017, la société est une filiale du groupe Relais Vert qui s’est spécialisée dans la distribution de vins biologiques et autres alcools en faisant la belle part à la Biodynamie et aux sans sulfites.

Engagés pour le respect de l’environnement, tous nos produits sont en agriculture biologique, ce qui exprime toute la sincérité et la spécificité de nos valeurs. Nous travaillons avec exigence et engagement afin de préserver la biodiversité qui nous entoure. 

Actuellement, Millésime 86 propose plus de 600 références à son catalogue 2022 et travaille avec plus de 800 magasins spécialisés bio à l’échelle nationale.

Name: TRDS International Trading DWC Dubai
Description:
Travel Retail & Diplomatic Supplies (TRDS) is your go to partner with a established long term position in the Travel Retail & Diplomatic marketsi across Middle East , Africa & Indian Sub-continent focusing on quality, innovative business expansion and strong customer service.

With a turnover in excess of $20m we are delivering high quality distribution for our brand partners with total transparency of stock movement in the market  territory. 

Founded in the year 2020 by Ajay Bhatia an ex-veteran of Duty Free Travel Retail in the region and honorary Keeper of the Quaich the company is focused on being agile and continues to grow at a face pace whilst ensuring a superior distribution model and distribution network across the regions specially hard to reach dry countries.

We operate a complete sales, marketing & logistic model in each of our designated markets with the support of our local partners. 

As we continue to expand we continue to put our customers foremost. We distribute across a range of duty free operations and services including Sea ports , border shops , navy , military and regular land border shops. Our operations span across Djibouti for Sub-Saharan African region , JAFZA Dubai for Middle East & Indian Subcontinent region. 

Our Head quarters and commercial offices are based in Dubai South 

We have one foot firmly on the accelerator while another carefully ensuring that we are careful to deliver continued excellence for our principals 

Send price quotes , supply requests on info@trdsdubai.com

For logistics updates please contact logistics@trdsdubai.com

Name: Domaine de Chambleau
Description:
Fils et petit-fils de vigneron, Louis-Philippe Burgat a grandi entre les ceps de Chambleau, au rythme des saisons de la vigne. Après une maturité commerciale, des études supérieures d’œnologie et une maîtrise fédérale de viticulteur, il reprend l’exploitation familiale en 2001, secondé par son épouse Valérie.

Depuis 2006, la récolte est encavée au domaine dans un nouveau chai. Ce magnifique espace entièrement dédié à l’élevage du vin vaut le détour !

Le domaine est officiellement reconverti en viticulture biologique depuis 2018. Toutefois, cela fait déjà 18 ans que Louis-Philippe Burgat pratique du bio parcellaire en augmentant les surfaces progressivement afin de permettre une transition en douceur et de conserver ainsi la qualité et la signature des vins. Pour Chambleau, le passage en Bio est un véritable challenge. Pionnier, le domaine cultive deux cépages naturellement résistants aux maladies de la vigne : le Solaris et le Divico.

C’est toutefois le Pinot Noir qui règne en maître sur les sols graveleux du domaine. Chambleau le décline en trois crus différents : Le Pinot noir classique, la Cuvée Charlotte et le Pur Sang, icône du domaine. Le Métissage (assemblage de Gamaret et de Garanoir) est également un des produits phare du domaine.

Une belle palette de vins blancs agrémente également la gamme. Nous pourrions citer parmi les plus représentatifs le Chardonnay et la Blanche Loye (Chasselas élevé sur lies).

Name: Livimport Bebidas
Description: Liv Import is not just a beverage retailer, but a tailor-made service provider specializing in events - whether it's a dinner party or a wedding reception. For this, the professionals of Liv Import serve the customers individually, with scheduled time, and during the tasting, clarify all type of doubt regarding the drinks of the party. In addition to suppliers, they act as real consultants, helping in harmonization and the ideal quantity of beverages in relation to the number of guests. To ensure the quality that sets them apart, Liv Import often goes to the field to research, at international fairs and wineries the best producers, with whom it makes a point of maintaining a close relationship. Throughout the process, winemakers in the house evaluate the wines and sparkling wines that are sold and accompany their production from the harvest until the second fermentation. Not surprisingly, Liv Import has a wide range of unique labels and is always providing better cost / benefit conditions and news inside and outside Brazil. Other differentials are the investment in partnerships with the best party professionals of Rio de Janeiro and Lagos Region and the supply on consignment. Now Liv Import brings a cool new thing: a budget consultant, not only budgeting, but calculating the ideal amount of drink in relation to the number of guests and providing a detailed description of each label available at the distributor. Thus, the LIV extends the quantitative calculation service to its digital service. The payment is made in an easy way: 50% of the value at the closing of the contract and the remaining balance is settled after the event, by consumption, considering the contract price, with up to 50% of the quantity of beverages available for consumption on consignment .
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Château Camparnaud | Provence
Description:
About an hour north from the flamboyant Côte d’Azur you’ll find a beautiful 16th century estate, deeply rooted in the sloping hills, forests and green heart of Provence. For centuries, these meticulously nurtured vineyards have woven their magic, giving rise to signature wines of pure excellence.

We invite you to discover the magic of Provence.

Name: Tenuta il Quinto
Description:
Tenuta il Quinto is a family owned winery, situated in southern Tuscany, Maremma. 
We believe that by respecting time and nature, we can extract the very essence of our lands to create exceptional wines.

Name: Big Wave Brands Ltd
Description:
It's not Gin, it's not Rum... It's Aloha 65! 
Beautifully crafted over a month, Aloha 65 is made only from fresh ingredients with no colourants and nothing artificial. That’s no mean feat and why it took 65 goes to get the balance just right. 27% ABV, vegan-friendly and versatile. It's an invitation to live life to the full.

Name: Wm Cadenhead Ltd
Description: We select and bottle the finest whiskies from around Scotland and make them available through a network of retail shops within the UK and beyond. We also distribute our whiskies, gins, rums and other spirits internationally by working with valued partners in export markets.

Name: Grapeworks |  Tanium
Description:
Grapeworks offers beverage makers a complete range of winemaking, cider and brewing consumables and supplies. Specialising in high end top of bottle packaging and closures.

Grapeworks (TANIUM) supplies, installs and services a complete range of fruit handling, receival, processing, bottling, disgorging & packaging machinery and equipment for the beverage industry.

Name: WineTube
Description:
Apparteniamo ad uno dei più antichi produttori del vino al mondo: l'Italia. Abbiamo selezionato le migliori aziende per portarvi vino di qualità.

We belong to one of the oldest wine producers in the world: Italy. We have selected the best Companies to bring you quality Italian wine.

Name: Dorchester Brewing Company
Description:
Founded in 2014, Dorchester Brewing Company was created by a team of Boston professionals with an unnatural love of craft beer, to meet production demands for the local craft beer industry while  supporting the economic development of Dorchester. We realized that there was a gap in the industry – and in Boston proper – for local, small to medium-sized craft beer brands and regional brewers to produce their product in a predictable, high-quality, cost-effective manner if they didn't have their own large-scale brewery. So, naturally, we built an expensive, massive brewery with a pretty sweet tasting room so you don't have to.

Dorchester Brewing Company is a partner brewing facility with a public Tap Room serving partner and in-house brews on tap in Boston, MA. DBco was created by a team of Boston professionals with an unnatural love of craft beer, to meet production demands for the local craft beer industry while supporting the economic development of Dorchester. We realized that there was a gap in the industry — and in Boston proper — for local, small to medium-sized craft beer brands and regional brewers to produce their product in a predictable, high-quality, cost-effective manner if they didn’t have their own large-scale brewery. So, naturally, we built an expensive, massive brewery with a pretty sweet tasting room so that others didn’t have to.

More info at: www.dorchesterbrewing.com

Name: Le Verre à Mélange
Description:
Le Verre à Mélange conseille et accompagne les restaurateurs et les hôteliers sur la partie boissons de leurs établissements grâce à:
- Réorganisation/ création de cartes cocktails
- Mise en cohérence de la carte boissons avec la partie food
- Accompagnement et formations des équipes
- Formations techniques, produits & upselling dans le secteur du bar
- Renforcement de l'esprit d'équipe / Team building
- Formation Barista
- Création de cartes café

Nous travaillons également avec des marques de spiritueux ou présent dans l'univers FOOD:
- Drink Strategy 
- Brand Activation
- Advocacy

Name: Jean Juviniere Ltd
Description:
We’re a unique wine merchants pure and simple, that deal in fine wines and specialized corporate gifts. We’ve been exploring Europe on a mission to find fab fine wine in the last 50 years.  Our USP is that we are a traditional family business and we breed that into our sourcing as we only deal with smaller producers in the countries of origin so we get that quality, care and love go into the wine making and service - that you just can't get elsewhere 

If we are not sourcing great wines, we’re enjoying them just like our Jean Juviniere family - we say that once you have had the JJ Wines experience you are then part of the JJ family.

Name: Fabrizia Spirits LLC
Description: Fabrizia handcrafts all natural products using REAL ingredients including lemons from Italy!

Name: PAUL SAPIN
Description:
Paul SAPIN is a great French wine merchant founded in southern Burgundy in 1889, the same year the Eiffel Tower was built.

Paul SAPIN has always dealt in fine quality wines. A strong culture of innovation and an unmatched openness to the finest terroirs in France and the world (Spain, Italy, New Zealand, Australia, South Africa, Chile, and California) are part of its genetic make-up.

The wines we make or develop in the framework of close partnerships, whether in small bottles for the airline industry and snacking, markets on which Paul SAPIN has a clear lead, or on more traditional distribution channels, can be found in approximately 50 countries.

For further information, check our website www.paul-sapin.com and our YouTube Channel http://youtu.be/4xYFgWgsq_0

Name: PengWine - The Power of Wine
Description:
PengWine, is a luxury boutique wine from the Maipo Valley of Chile, home to some of the world’s most 
prestigious wines. The estate vineyard is snuggled between the Andes and Chile’s lush Pacific coast, 
and bedded in rich soils.

With each wine named after the resilient South American penguins that make their home along the coast, it has been producing a distinguished line since 2003, with a strong focus on premium wine production. 

All of our wines are handcrafted in small lots with limited production. Each step of the process is devoted the level of care and attention that requires expertise, talent, and above all, time. We pre-cellar our wines for 2-5 years before we release them to the public. Only 2% of the wineries in the world practice this level of dedication.

Questions? Get in touch with us. concierge@pengwine.com

Name: Wine Dreamers srl
Description:
Wine Dreamers is an italian agency specialized in Communications & Marketing of Wine created to support the Sell Out. 

The team is composed of Professionals with long experience in the field and consolidated results.

www.winedreamers.com
www.facebook.com/winedreamers

Name: Viña del Mar Wines
Description:
IMPORTERS & WHOLESALERS 

Expressing a respect for tradition, a sustainable vision for the future, quality at fair pricing and creativity, Viña del Mar wines are truly special. We are one of the newest wine importers and wholesalers in the United States to specialize in artisanal wines from unique territories. Our mission is to introduce great wines to our clients and deliver impeccable customer service.

We have recently partnered with award-winning Bodega Zifar in Peñafiel, Spain to introduce extraordinary wines previously unknown to the US.

Treat yourself... Drink Ribera. Drink Spain.

Viña del Mar is owned and operated by Michael Rowe and Janice Reinhart, whose travels to global wine regions have influenced their passion to offer world-class wine made by small producers from all corners of the world. By leveraging their expertise from former careers and the wisdom of industry professionals who share advice, Michael and Janice have launched their boutique wine importing and wholesale company in Ft. Lauderdale Florida. 

Michael and Jan have recently partnered with award-winning Bodega Zifar in Peñafiel, Spain to introduce extraordinary wines previously unknown to the US. We invite you to taste and learn about these truly amazing wines that are priced fairly.

Name: Tepacheria Sazón
Description:
Tepache Sazón se produce en la costa del pacífico Mexicano en el pueblo de San Pancho, rodeado de plantaciones de frutas tropicales como piña, mango, guayaba, lichi, melón y maracuyá. Nuestros campos de piña están ubicados a corta distancia de nuestra tepacheria. La única planta de producción de este tipo en la región.
 
Detrás de cada botella de tepache está nuestro dedicado equipo de tepacheros que inculcan su pasión y amor por esta rica bebida. Estamos orgullosos de elaborar una bebida tradicional mexicana y compartir el sabor de nuestra cultura con el mundo. Juntos somos embajadores del auténtico tepache.
Location: San Francisco, Bahia de Banderas, Nayarit

Name: Aalto Bodegas y Viñedos | Ribera del Duero
Description:
After 16 years, AALTO is widely regarded as one of the leading wineries in Ribera del Duero. Our wine AALTO PS has been elected the Spain’s Best Wine several times and the winery has been selected in Paris as one of the best 100 wineries in the world in Michel Bettane’s and Thiery Dessauve’s book.
----------------------------
Tras 16 años de andadura, AALTO Bodegas y Viñedos se ha convertido en una referencia en la Ribera del Duero. Nuestro vino AALTO PS ha sido elegido varias veces por votación el Mejor Vino Tinto de España y la bodega ha sido elegida en París como una de las 100 mejores bodegas del mundo en el libro publicado por los prestigiosos críticos Michel Bettane y Thiery Dessauve.

Name: Vite - Storie di Vino e di Donne
Description:
Vite Storie di Vino e di Donne è un'associazione e un progetto di comunicazione ed empowerment femminile. 

È il luogo online che raccoglie le storie e i vini delle produttrici vitivinicole italiane e li promuove entrambi attraverso cofanetti degustazione che contengono: un vino, la storia della sua produttrice e una degustazione guidata che permette l’incontro tra una donna che ama il vino e la donna che lo ha prodotto.

Name: The Cocktail Co
Description:
Offering a renowned range of 11 ready-to-drink cocktails, we expertly craft our cocktails to epitomise convenience without compromising on quality. 

Launched in 2020 we spotted a gap in the on-trade market after 10 years in the industry and began to bring our idea life during the infamous Lockdown. 

We now have a range of 11 RTD Cocktails, with both hot and cold offerings which are listed in supermarkets and farm shops but predominently sold in the On-trade sector.

Name: Salem Brewing Co.
Description:
Persuadés que c’est par le grain que tout commence, nous avons à cœur
de proposer à nos clients des washs de qualité et un accompagnement
personnalisé. Travailler sur vos attentes grâce à un partenariat riche
d’échanges nous permet de créer la recette qui rendra votre whisky unique.

Céréales, levures, fermentation sont autant de cordes sensibles sur lesquelles il est possible de jouer pour apporter style et typicité.

Il est désormais temps de les laisser s’exprimer.

Name: Currently Wine Co.
Description:
Our Ethos

WHAT WE DO
We make it easier for people to do good today.

HOW DO WE DO IT?
By making delicious sustainable wines that bring people together so they can enjoy the present moment.

WHY DO WE EXIST?
To empower people to make individual choices that add up to collective positive impact.

Name: Le Donne del Vino Fvg
Description:
L’Associazione Nazionale Le Donne del Vino è stata presentata ufficialmente durante Vinitaly 1988: allora era costituita da una ventina di socie che ben presto videro radunarsi intorno a sé decine di altre protagoniste del mondo del vino, fino a raggiungere più di 800 socie. Scopo del sodalizio promuovere la conoscenza e la cultura del vino attraverso il contributo di esperienze e conoscenze di donne impegnate in questa mission in settori diversi, ma complementari. L’impostazione trasversale fu anticipatrice dell’evoluzione successiva della presenza femminile nel mondo del vino e oggi a tutti gli effetti possiamo considerarla un’idea fortemente innovatrice.

Per essere ammesse nell’associazione occorre avere un vissuto professionale legato alla vigna e alla cantina e da qui alla tavola, quindi produttrici, ristoratrici, sommelier, enologhe. E inoltre giornaliste di settore, carta stampata e blogger, responsabili della comunicazione e del marketing di aziende vinicole. L’ammissione di quest’ultima categoria la dice lunga sull’importanza della comunicazione nella prospettiva delle attività dell’Associazione Nazionale Le Donne del Vino.

Name: Cartagena
Description:
Cartagena Inc. is a licensed producer of fine spirits, located in the province of Quebec, Canada. Our head offices are located in the multicultural city of Montreal.

We are committed to crafting the best drinking experience by providing exquisite products to our clients. We are truly passionate about what we do and we know that many of our valued customers feel the same way. Our reputation is protected by the quality of our spirits, as well as the strong relationship forged with our clients.

Cartagena was founded with a mission to expand the operations of our highly respected Mexico-based group, Licorera Del Sur. Established as an independent company in Montreal, Cartagena aims to serve the global market with its expertise in the production of a unique selection of blends. 

With the experience of three generations in the spirits industry, our Mexican family is the reason behind our success story. By following the same clear vision, Cartagena has been successfully sailing towards international expansion.

Our expert consultants and our dedicated production team have access to three state-of-the-art distilleries and thirteen bottling plants across Mexico and Canada, and are actively striving to support our vision and yours.

Name: Champagne Bonnaire
Description:
Founded in 1932, Bonnaire house is specialized in providing fine wines from Champagne. Located in Cramant, Grand Cru village of Champagne, the house is well recognized for elaborating one of the creamiest Chardonnay wines the world has ever seen.

Wishing to stay independent, the house owns today 22 hectares of vineyard in the best locations of the Champagne area, where it has a total control from wine growing to wine making.

Name: VASONGROUP USA
Description:
JUCLAS USA is the US branch of the VASONGROUP, Italy’s leading supplier of products and equipment for the wine and beverage industries.
Our Napa team offers the same unparalleled proprietary products, adjuvants, equipment and services to the US market.
Our innovative fermentation and winemaking products, equipment and services are user friendly and focus on improving quality.
Our mission is to share the expertise we have accumulated over 50 years and provide winemakers with the most innovative solutions available.

Name: Crawler Beverage Co.
Description: This light & refreshing new take on porch crawler is the first beverage of its kind. NATURALLY FLAVOURED SPARKLING WATER blended beautifully with premium local VODKA, GIN & a splash of crisp light BEER. No preservatives. Just fun.

Name: Yarm Distillery
Description: Yarm Distillery is a wine and spirits company based out of Eaglescliffe, United Kingdom.

Name: Les Trois Toits Winery
Description:
Already renowned for its rigor and discretion, Domaine Les Trois Toits is a benchmark in the commune of Vertou. After 25 years of passionate work, Hubert Rousseau is handing over the estate to Vincent Barbier and Cécile Perraud. 



The estate is ready to welcome new energy for the implementation of sustainable production methods and the development of export markets. The goal is to promote Muscadet internationally, while remaining a local leader, close to the people of Vertou and a driving force in environmental transition. 



Every day, we work to reveal our soils and grape varieties in the glass we proudly offer you. Our innovative agroecological practices and free vinification methods accompany this long process of transforming grapes into wine, drawing on the energy of our soils.

Name: VINIV Bordeaux
Description:
Have you ever dreamt of being a winemaker? Since 2009, VINIV offers a select few the opportunity to immerse themselves in an insider Bordeaux winemaking experience and create their own limited-edition fine wine. 

VINIV members create their own wine story with personal guidance from the winemaking experts of Château Lynch-Bages and the advisor to the region’s most famous 1st Classified Growths, direct access to vineyards from Bordeaux’s most prestigious appellations and an award-winning design team to create a personal brand and label. 

At VINIV, our raison d’être is to empower wine lovers to chart their own winemaking pursuit and develop meaningful insider relationships.

Name: Commonwealth Wine School
Description: Located in the heart of Harvard Square in Cambridge, Massachusetts, Commonwealth Wine School is dedicated to providing you the best in wine, spirits and sake education. Whether you are a beginner, connoisseur or industry professional, our dedicated and knowledgable instructors share their expertise and passion to provide you with a fun and engaging experience. We offer a wide variety of workshops, classes and private events, as well as certification level programs from the WSET (Wine and Spirits Education Trust) and the Wine Scholar Guild.

Name: Vinexpert
Description:
Infiintata in 1999, VINEXPERT contribuie la dezvoltarea culturii vinului în România iar cuvintele care au exprimat in toata aceasta perioada filozofia companiei sunt: experienta, pasiune, inovatie si inspiratie.

VINEXPERT a devenit in scurt timp principalul lant de magazine specializat in importul si vanzarea de vinuri premium, bauturi spirtoase fine si accesorii pentru vin. In prezent VINEXPERT detine un magazin de prezentare si un wine bar unde clientii au ocazia sa deguste vinurile importate direct de catre Vinexpert.
Magazinele noastre ofera o selectie exclusivista de vinuri si o colectie bogata destinata iubitorilor, cunoscatorilor si colectionarilor. Aici este locul unde gasesti cea mai buna selectie de vinuri romanesti, marile Chateau-uri din Franta, marci internationale bine cunoscute, sau cele mai bune vinuri din Lumea Noua, impreuna cu vinuri vechi si rare din colectii renumite.

Iar pentru ca vinurile bune se beau din pahare speciale, VINEXPERT este reprezentantul celebrelor pahare si decantoare RIEDEL in Romania.

Name: Osca Wineries - Bodegas Osca
Description: Wines from DO Somontano, Bodegas Osca: we make our wines inspired by autochthonous species, such as Garnacha, Moristel or Tempranillo. Our different wines are inspired by our region: Osca Wines, we make young wines, aging wines and limited edition wines are the Osca Reserva Monovarietales Wines: Merlot, Syrah, Moristel and our Osca Reserva Gran Eroles (Cabernet Sauvignon) of great quality at an excellent price. Mascun Wines: this line of wines is dedicated to Garnacha, they are 100% Garnacha wines, young red and crianza (superior quality), white and pink Garnacha. We have obtained gold and silver medals every year at the Grenache du Monde contest. Mascun wines also house the Gewurztraminer variety of white wine and our Cava Brut Nature. Other wines that we produce are L'Ainsa and Impar wines. Our vineyards are cultivated in dry land and we try to carry out sustainable agriculture. Our winery dates from the year 1480, the 15th century, the oldest in Somontano and possibly in Spain. Our wineries are open to everyone, where you can breathe essences of barrel, leather, and stone. Small-production family winery, giving an excellent quality to our wines. We make young red, rosé and white wines, which coexist with crianza and oak, reserva and, the only Gran Reserva del Somontano, the result of the most elaborate coupage

Name: Viansa Winery and Marketplace
Description:
Idyllically situated on a hilltop at the entrance to the legendary Sonoma Valley, Viansa Winery & Marketplace naturally embodies the proud history of local winemaking. With its distinctive Italian atmosphere and charming Old World architecture, Viansa Winery & Marketplace is a tribute to the early Italian immigrants who brought their winemaking traditions to Sonoma Valley. Surrounded by vineyards, flower gardens and olive groves, and modeled after the charming, centuries-old villas that dot the Tuscan landscape, the main winery building appears to have been magically transported from the Italian countryside. Painstakingly crafted from authentic materials and boasting signature details like hand-painted interior frescoes depicting peasant life in the Tuscan countryside, Viansa’s Villa has the power to whisk visitors away to romantic Italy – if only for an hour or two. Meticulously landscaped grounds planted with imported Italian cypresses and stone pines, lovely terraces overlooking Sonoma Valley, and classic imported Italian statuary beautifully complete the picture.

As in Italy, here at Viansa it is all about the marriage between great food, great wine and great people. It is the perfect spot to enjoy award-winning Sonoma wines (over 267 wine competition medals were won over the past 5 years and our wines are only available at the winery), Italian delicacies and the warmth and joy of our staff.

Name: Bergman's Bourgogne - Appetite for Burgundy
Description:
Bergman's Bourgogne - Appetite for Burgundy is a website dedicated to all things Burgundy - wine, food, people etc.

Bergman's Bourgogne has more than 12 000 readers worldwide every month. 40 per cent of these readers are in the US and Canada, 40 per cent in Europe and 20 per cent in the rest of the world (mainly Japan, China, Hong Kong and Taiwan).

Name: PARCE RUM
Description:
Parce rum was started by Chicago brothers Jim, Patrick, & Brian Powers, with longtime Medellin friend Jaime Uribe, as a way to build a business that would combine their deep appreciation for Colombia and outstanding spirits. The idea was born in 2011, in a finca high above the Rio Cauca valley, about a three hour drive from Medellín.
Parce is our earnest, and admittedly idealistic, attempt to bottle our deep
affection for a beautiful culture, land, and people, and share it with the rest
of the world. To us, this meant nothing less than producing the very best aged rums in the sipping style embraced by the Colombian people and blended to provide the drier, whiskey-like finish we favor. Thanks to Bogota Master Blenders Arthur and Brojen Fernandes Domecq for our blend and everyone else who has helped make our award-winning rum possible.

We are also very proud of the 30,000 native species trees Parce has planted to date in Colombia as a result of our initial One bottle=One Tree campaign in partnership with Contreebute.com, and we continue to have trees planted with profits from purchases of parce. Learn more at: www.Parcerumtrees.com

As a true testament to Parce’s dedication and craftsmanship, every batch of our exclusive 8 and 12-year Colombian rums is a meticulous blend of 100% real aged, premium rum. Our signature 8 Year expression offers an artfully balanced blend of rich flavors that warm and entice the palate, while the complex, rich profile and lingering finish of our 12-year sipping rum is perfect for the most discerning taste.  Whether a casual rum drinker or ultra premium spirits aﬁcionado, we warmly invite you to enjoy our award-winning rum. Made con gusto.

Description: SERVICIOS PROFESIONALES Y TÉCNICOS, FABRICACION Y COMERCIALIZACION DE MEZCAL A NIVEL NACIONAL E INTERNACIONAL.

Name: Vinum Nobile Winery
Description:
We are so excited to join the LinkedIn world of professional connections, inspiration and new business opportunities. 

Robert Louis Stevenson said: " Wine is bottled poetry" we absolutely love this one.

Would you join us to read our story of Vinum Nobile Winery “bottled poetry”?

We deeply appreciate that our wines are year by year being accomplished with international success awards ( Vinalies Paris, Bacchus Madrid, Texas International Wine Competition LYON International Competition, Sakura Tokyo, China Wine & Spirits Awards, AWC Vienna, Women's International Trophy, Prague wine trophy and many more.)

We do care about the destiny of Slovak winemakers especially during this very tough pandemic time- therefore we accepted being part of the call to the solidarity to support local Slovak wine #FridayofLocalFairSlovakWine

Name: Ron Botran Añejo
Description:
Esta… es una historia de compromiso. 

Compromiso con la tierra. 

Tan rica y única que se encuentra solo en el 2% del mundo. Allí, nace la dulzura única de Guatemala. 

Compromiso con una herencia centenaria.  

Que nace en una tierra volcánica a la que con mucho orgullo llamamos hogar.

Compromiso con el alma.

La miel virgen que da vida al Ron de Guatemala y solamente al 3% de ron en el mundo.

Esta… es nuestra historia.

#CommitYourself

Name: Nosio S.p.A.
Description: Nosio S.p.A. is a vino e liquori company based out of Via del Teroldego 1/E, Mezzocorona, Trentino-Alto Adige/Südtirol, Italy.

Name: Vodka Brands Corp
Description:
Vodka Brands Corp owns the super premium award winning BLUE DIAMOND Vodka Brand.
Other brands are in development.
Vodka Brands strives to develop and produce exceptional quality spirits with recognizable brand namesand expand distribution nationally and internationally.

Name: Moncaro
Distilleria Bertagnolli 1870
Description:
Distilleria Bertagnolli is the oldest family-distillery in Trentino Alto-Adige. The Distillery is in the heart of the Piana Rotaliana, a landscape described by Goethe as the "most beautiful vineyard in Europe", situated at the foot of the Brenta Dolomites - UNESCO World Heritage. Here the climate is ideal for growing exquisite and aromatic grapes, and it’s precisely from these grapes that Bertagnolli obtains Grappa which is rich in flavour and taste.
Its origin dates back to 1870 when the landowner Giulia de Kreutzenberg, of Austrian aristocratic descent, married Edoardo Bertagnolli, forebear of the family and heir to an established pharmaceutical business. Giulia's passion combined with Edoardo's experience in distilling with discontinuous steam alembics gave birth to Distilleria Bertagnolli in Mezzocorona (Trento) and the production of distilled spirits of excellent quality.
Today, the cousins Livia and Beppe Bertagnolli represent the 4th generation of the dynasty. With pride and ambition, they continue to manage their family company: a distillery with over 145 years of history, tradition, innovation, and exceptional quality.
Since its founding in 1870, Gran Grappino Bertagnolli has been produced by the Distillery, and it is its best-selling product of all the time. It is obtained by the distillation of pomace of Teroldego, the most traditional and popular red grape of Trentino characterized by its intense aromas of blueberry and other local berries, and the pomace of other grapes from the vineyards of Trentino that complement its aromatic bouquet. Gran Grappino impresses its enthusiasts and admirers due to its organoleptic features, its harmony and its ability to sincerely represent the magical terroir it comes from. Every year, since 1989, it has been awarded with the Gold Medal at ‘Alambicco d’Oro’ Spirit Award by ANAG (National Association of Grappa Tasters) and branded ‘TrentinoGrappa’ by the Istituto Tutela Grappa del Trentino.

Name: #incontriorganicwine
Description: I principi della Carta della Terra sono alla base di ogni attività svolta all’interno dell’azienda. Per la progettazione e gestione generale dell’attività vengono applicati gli antichi metodi dell’agricoltura biologica dinamica. La cantina è situata in località Fossoni a Suvereto. Ogni anno vengono prodotte dalle sole uve di proprietà un numero limitato di preziose bottiglie di vino. Tutti i processi di lavorazione rispettano totalmente l’ambiente e tutto ciò che ne fa parte quindi sono a zero impronta carbonica. I vini sono certificati biologici, adatti al consumo vegan e senza solfiti aggiunti.

Name: Kōloa Rum Company
Description:
A drink is not just a drink when it reflects the history and flavor of a place.

Kauai is the natural home for the Kōloa Rum Company. Sugar cane came to Hawaii with ancient Polynesian voyagers in their migration from the South Pacific. Commercial sugar production in Hawaii was first established in the town of Kōloa in 1835. The initial harvest in 1837 produced two tons of raw sugar, and talking story with old timers reveals that rum production began around this time as well.

The legacy of the sugar and rum in Hawaii lives on today through Kōloa Rum. Our award-winning rums are distilled in a vintage copper-pot still, using only the finest local ingredients. Pure cane sugar, pure mountain rainwater, and much Aloha come together to produce single-batch rums with remarkably rich flavors and smoothness that capture the essence of the Garden Isle. Kōloa Rum Company was founded to create world-class Hawaiian rum. We are the first and only licensed distillery on the island of Kauai, where sugarcane production has been a traditional way of life. Our first batch of premium Hawaiian rum was distilled and bottled in September 2009, which coincided with the opening of our Tasting Room and Company Store at Kilohana Plantation in Lihue. Come, taste the history and Aloha spirit of Kōloa Rum today!

Name: Vignobles & Compagnie
Description: For more than 50 years, Vignobles & Compagnie is committed alongside its partner winegrowers. A boutique Winery and a Rhône ambassador towards QUALITY WINES and BOLD BRANDS. Discover Vignobles & Compagnie which dares, innovates and has continuously committed itself since 1963, for RECOGNITION and DEVELOPMENT of the Rhône Valley wines.

Name: The Tasting Alliance
Description: Our blind tasting competitions are the most respected in the world and can make a wine, spirit or beer brand in to a household name : see Tito’s, Skrewball, Henry McKenna etc!

Name: AIDV-IWLA
Description: A Legal Approach to the Global Wine Sector by a specialized professional network

Name: Prodégustation
Description:
Fondée en 2001, Prodégustation est le N°1 des cours et des animations œnologiques en France. Présents dans 25 villes de France, au Luxembourg et en Belgique, nous avons formé à la dégustation et diverti plus de 150 000 particuliers et entreprises.

Prodégustation a créé la méthode VOG (Visuel Olfactif Gustatif) au terme d'un processus de développement de 6 ans. S’appuyant sur les sens indispensables à la dégustation, cette méthode exclusive est au cœur de l’apprentissage dans nos cours.

Des stages d'œnologie "académiques" pour apprendre la dégustation en 3 niveaux, en passant par les ateliers ludiques autour de 10 thématiques diverses et variées (au cœur de la Bourgogne, du Bordelais, de la Champagne…), jusqu’aux dégustations prestiges de Grands Crus et dîners accords mets et vins. 

Prodégustation vous accompagne dans l’organisation d’animations lors de vos réceptions privées entre collaborateurs, clients, amis et famille.

Pour les professionnels, nous proposons des formations courtes, sur-mesure, certifiantes et entièrement financées par le CPF ! Prodégustation dispense la formation œnologique VOG académique ou encore le Wine & Spirit Education Trust, internationalement reconnue.   

Notre équipe de professionnels de l’œnologie, forts d’une solide expérience pédagogique et de capacités d’adaptation à chaque public, forment et animent nos différents cours. Les qualités majeures des formateurs et formatrices sont l'humilité et l'aptitude à transmettre simplement leur savoir.

Besoin de plus d’informations ? Contactez-nous !

Name: Robinson & Sinclair
Description: We market our portfolio to established distributors and importers world wide, our wines are featured in Supermarkets, Speciality retail stores, wine boutiques, restaurants, wine bars and hotels across the world. We also have an excellent standing in the dominant Monopolies of the wine world.

Name: Erik Sørensen Vin
Description:
Erik Sørensen Vin er en kvalitetsbevidst og anerkendt vinhandel med både online- og butikssalg til B2B, B2C og HoReCa. Vores mission er at give danskerne mulighed for at drikke god vin fra producenter, der brænder for den vin, de laver. Vi er passionerede omkring vin og ønsker at dele den passion med andre gennem gode vinoplevelser, personlig rådgivning og højt serviceniveau. Vi er den fortrukne vinformidler for en lang række anerkendte restauranter og virksomheder samt tusindvis af privatkunder.

Web: www.eriksorensenvin.dk 
Facebook: www.facebook.dk/eriksorensenvin
Instagram: www.instagram.com/eriksorensenvin

Name: Quinta da Vineadouro - Family Vineyards & Wine Hotel
Description:
Quinta da Vineadouro - Family Vineyards & Wine Hotel is a secular property with unique characteristics in the Douro Superior region, between the medieval castle of Numão and the “sublimated Douro” of Miguel Torga (Portuguese writer), offering an idyllic setting to celebrate the wine culture, for its absolute tranquility and breathtaking landscape.

The vineyard occupies just over 4 hectares, spread over several parcels and has more than 22 grape varieties. The “Coitadinha” parcel is the ex-libris of the property: a centennial vineyard, planted in terraces, with the grape varieties mixed in a typical Douro field blend, where it is possible find varieties like Bastardo, Carrega Branco, Casculho, Cornifesto, Folgasão, Gouveio, Grand Noir, Malvasia Fina, Malvasia Rei, Moreto, Marufo, Rabigato, Rufete, Síria, Tinta Amarela, Tinta Carvalha, Tinta Roriz, Touriga Franca, Touriga Nacional or Trincadeira Branca.

Name: Caves Santa Cruz
Description:
www.cavessantacruz.com.br

Nasce então em 2012 a Caves Santa Cruz, a importadora que veio para materializar esse sonho. Desde o início prezando pela qualidade e excelência, acreditando em experiências e que o vinho é capaz de unir pessoas e criar laços. Na busca constante por esses valores, o Sr. Ramiro sempre esteve à frente da escolha de fornecedores, onde muitas vezes viajava até os produtores para entender e conhecer de perto os processos envolvidos na produção do vinho, desde a preparação do solo até o momento do envase.

Mesmo com o crescimento e fortalecimento da empresa, esses valores foram passados ano a ano e se mantêm até hoje. Sempre que um novo rótulo é inserido no catálogo de produtos da Caves Santa Cruz, Sr. Ramiro e sua filha Anna Cruz viajam até o fornecedor para conhecer o produtor e o vinho, tudo para garantir a melhor experiência de nossos clientes ao abrir um de nossos vinhos. 

Em 2019 batemos a marca de 150 rótulos selecionados cuidadosamente, vindos dos principais países produtores: Portugal, Espanha, França, Itália, Argentina e Chile. 

Somos orgulhosos em dizer que não somos apenas especialistas em vinhos de qualidade, mas também somos especialistas em criar laços com nossos clientes, apresentando-os um novo mundo cheio de experiências e riquezas que só um bom vinho – e uma boa história – são capazes de proporcionar.

Name: ColleMassari Estates
Description: ColleMassari is a Wine and Spirits company with its head office in Cinigiano, Tuscany. Owned by the Tipa Bertarelli family the group encompasses 4 luxury wine estates: Castello di ColleMassari (Montecucco DOC), Grattamacco (Bolgheri DOC), Poggio di Sotto and San Giorgio (Montalcino DOC).

Name: Europvin
Description:
Europvin was founded by Christopher Cannan in 1978 on a simple yet astute concept: select a unique portfolio of the finest estate wines in Europe and bring it to the attention of discerning importers and opinion makers around the world.  Today Europvin is directed and managed by a dynamic team of professionals who combine a passion for working with “terroir driven” wines along with an extensive knowledge of distribution channels and the marketing expertise required in both emerging as well as established markets.

Whilst pursuing the development of our prestigious portfolio selections, we have paid particular attention to sourcing a range of wines that represent genuine value for the consumer as well as maintaining the strict quality criteria for which Europvin is renowned.

Name: Esprits de Vins
Description: Depuis 1991, nous assurons les formations aux diplômes internationaux du WSET en connaissance des vins du monde.

Name: Pago de Tharsys
Description: PAGO DE THARSYS SL is a wine production company based in REQUENA, Valencia, Spain.

Name: Bodegas Monje
Description:
The use of volcanic soil and traditional grape varieties is reflected in the unique, fresh taste of our wines. 

We wanted to go beyond the frontiers of wine: jams, chocolates, vinegars, and exclusive Packs (few units left!) to surprise the most demanding palates. 

Join us on our Bodegas Monje online shop (https://bit.ly/2qYKKI4) or visit us in Tenerife.

Name: Langley’s Gin | Certified B Corp
Description:
At Langley’s we have strong feelings about gin. From where to source the best juniper and what to do with it, to how it should be created with people and planet at heart. We know because we’ve made it our business to find out.
 
By taking the best parts of gin craftsmanship into the future, and always leaving room in the glass for you to add your own spirit to the mix, we’re now in 30+ markets and counting.
 
One day, we’ll be the world’s most accessible, responsible gin that feels good for everyone.
 
In the meantime, we’re here to get the liquid right. What you do next is up to you. 

Made our way so you can make it yours.

Name: Licence Commercialisation à l'International des Vins et Spiritueux - Reims
Description:
Une formation en lien direct avec la réalité professionnelle :
- Plus de 40 interventions de professionnels et visites d'entreprises
- Projet tuteuré en entreprise (150 heures) : soutien des entreprises viticoles (négoce, coopérative, viticulteurs à l'export)
- 4 mois minimum de mission en entreprise à l'étranger (Avril à Août) ou au sein de l'entreprise d'apprentissage : importateurs, filiale de distribution, agence de communication spécialisée dans les vins et spiritueux, comités interprofessionnels
- Présence des entreprises lors des simulations d'entretien d'embauche et des soutenances de mémoires
- Gestion de projet via l'organisation d'une vente aux enchères et un voyage d'études à l'étranger
- Préparation au WSET level 2 ou 3 et TOEIC (compris dans la formation)
- Un partenariat entre une structure universitaire (UFR Sciences de Reims) et le milieu professionnel (Avize Viticampus et de nombreuses entreprises partenaires)

Un programme de formation pour répondre aux attentes des professionnels :
Marketing export, Techniques de Commerce International, Langues (anglais, allemand, espagnol), Développement commercial, Construction Projet Professionnel, Gestion de Projet, Informatique, Management, Droit du Travail et Filière Champagne...

Name: Millstone Spirits Group
Description: Millstone Spirits Group is an award-winning, independent, spirits organization based in Philadelphia and Trumbauersville, PA. With a passion for integrity, superior quality, and collaboration, we are dedicated to creating the greatest spirits in the region. Driven by an entrepreneurial spirit, we embrace innovation and bold ideas to help shape the future of the spirits industry. We question norms, listen carefully, and anticipate trends. Our portfolio of distinctive brands includes Kinsey, New Liberty, FABER, Liberty Belle, Escape Goat, Single Prop, Common Well, and ALCO Ready-to-Drink Cocktails. In 2022, we were awarded Distillery of the Year by the American Distilling Institute.

Name: Superdrop
Description:
Independently owned and locally operated, Superdrop manages a portfolio of premium drinks brands including Idle Hour Vodka, Delgados Tequila Soda and Tequila Soldada.

Superdrop exists to create ideas that connect deeper and mean more to drinkers and servers alike. We call them Boundless Brands; they are high quality, culturally relevant, consumer resonant, and future focussed.

We work with strategic partners to create and bring to market award-winning drinks that meet the needs and tastes of the contemporary drinker. Innovation sits at the core of what we do. The pursuit of new concepts, benefits, flavours, formats and partnerships are prioritised above all else.

Name: La Spinona
Description:
We are an Italian family business of wine makers and farmers in Barbaresco, Piedmont for 5 generations. 

The family is now run by Pietropaolo Berutti, enologist and expert wine maker with the support of his father Gualtiero, who runs the vineyards.

The family owns 20 hectars of vineyards in the town of Barbaresco devoted for Nebbiolo for Barbaresco, Nebbiolo, Barbera, Dolcetto and Chardonnay and one single vineyard of 4 hectars in the town of Novello for the Nebbiolo for Barolo. 

The wines produced are: Langhe Chardonnay DOC, Dolcetto d'Alba DOC, Langhe Nebbiolo DOC, Barbera d'Alba Superiore DOC, Barbaresco Secondine DOCG (new release), Barbaresco Bricco Faset DOCG, Barolo Bergera DOCG, Barolo Sorì Gepin DOCG.  All the wines are 100% La Spinona made.

The wines are available to be purchased directly at our winery in Barbaresco, Piedmont, or are distributed worldwide.  You can also book a visit and a wine tasting at the winery. For info log on to our web site (link in bio) and send us your inquiry.

La Spinona is a name associated with the land and originates from part of the family’s life history: the still-vivid memory of the dog, Baica, a Spinone Italiano.  Along the path that led to the development of the winery, Baica is a symbol that still has pride of place on the company logo and, throughout the world, represents the history of a winery that makes high-quality wine through meticulous work and attention to nature, to obtain wines that are clean, elegant and unique. 

CLEAN WINES: our respect for the environment enables us to produce wine with zero-waste.
ELEGANT WINES: the intense and enveloping fragrance of the must is preserved in the wine through a careful process combining tradition and innovation in the initial stages, before allowing the aging time to do the rest. 
UNIQUE WINES: the depth of the structure, classic taste and balance provides us with a wine that is ideal for aging.

Name: Fantinel
Description: A three-generation family of winegrowers in Friuli Venezia Giulia. Born in 1969 as a small agricultural company, today Fantinel is an internationally prestigious winery, ambassador of Friulian winemaking art at global level.

Name: Vinart d.o.o.
Description:
The Vinart team gathers creative and focused individuals who work together towards promoting wine culture in Croatia, as well as better recognition of Croatian wine in the world. 
By specializing in wine promotion and marketing, organizing events and tasting seminars, publishing reviews and articles, we thrive to elevate the standard for wine in Croatia, while creating a better terrain on which wine culture can continue to grow and prosper.

Name: SPIRITBRIDGE
Description:
Helping drinks brands run smarter — with outsourced support that feels in-house.
 Order Processing |  eCommerce & CRM |  NPD & Liquid Development |  Production & Procurement |  Regulatory & Compliance |  Marketing Support |  Bookkeeping

⸻

A customised solution for brand owners with new or growing drinks brands. Whether you’re developing your first liquid or scaling international sales, we give you the operational firepower to move faster, plan better, and build sustainably.

At Spiritbridge, we provide outsourced support across:

 Customer service & global order processing

 New product and liquid development
 Production planning & procurement

 Marketing execution & asset management
