We’re not consultants, we’re collaborators — rolling up our sleeves alongside your team to get stuff done. From startup to scale-up, from RTDs to rare spirits, we’ve seen it all and solved it all.

 Drop me a message or visit spiritbridge.io to book a discovery call.

Name: Tenute Rubino
Description: Tenute Rubino’s roots date back to the 1980s when Tommaso Rubino, an avid supporter of Apulia’s viticultural and oenological potential, created a foundation for production divided between five estates.  The goal was to express the best of local viticulture through hand-crafted wines showcasing Puglia’s native varieties, including Primitivo, Negroamaro, and the revival of Susumaniello, which was on the verge of extinction. In 1999, Tommaso teamed up with his son Luigi and daughter-in-law Romina to create the brand Tenute Rubino, based in Puglia’s Brindisi region. Today, the Tenute Rubino winery produces an array of authentic, terroir-driven wines which have revitalized the reputation of Apulian wines across the globe. In March 2022 the company has obtained the Equalitas, Sustainable Organization Module, Certification, the standard that promotes the sustainability culture in the agricultural and viticultural industry on an international basis.

Name: IBest Wines
Description: IBest Wines is changing the way the wine industry looks, feels, talks, and tastes, offering a portfolio of both fine and approachable wines for the modern-day wine drinker. IBest Wines offers consumers an opportunity to experience quality driven wines from Stellenbosch, South Africa, a world-renowned and underrepresented wine region.

Name: Wine-of-the-Month
Description:
𝐖𝐢𝐧𝐞-𝐨𝐟-𝐭𝐡𝐞-𝐌𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐡 𝐂𝐥𝐮𝐛

Wine-of-the-Month Club is 𝐒𝐨𝐮𝐭𝐡 𝐀𝐟𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐚’𝐬 𝐥𝐨𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐬𝐭-𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐥𝐚𝐫𝐠𝐞𝐬𝐭 𝐰𝐢𝐧𝐞 𝐜𝐥𝐮𝐛, established in 𝟏𝟗𝟖𝟔.

𝐅𝐨𝐫 𝐟𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐝𝐞𝐜𝐚𝐝𝐞𝐬, our focus has remained simple and unchanged:
to help people discover 𝐛𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐰𝐢𝐧𝐞, 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐟𝐢𝐝𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞.

Wine can be intimidating. Too much choice. Too little guidance. And too much risk of spending good money on something disappointing. That’s where we come in.

Each year, our 𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐩𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐭𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐩𝐚𝐧𝐞𝐥 𝐨𝐟 𝟏𝟐 𝐰𝐢𝐧𝐞 𝐞𝐱𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐭𝐬 𝐛𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐝-𝐭𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐬 𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫 𝟑,𝟎𝟎𝟎 𝐒𝐨𝐮𝐭𝐡 𝐀𝐟𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐧 𝐰𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐬. Only the best are selected.

Blind tasting matters — it ensures decisions are based purely on 𝐰𝐡𝐚𝐭’𝐬 𝐢𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐠𝐥𝐚𝐬𝐬, not labels, marketing, price, or reputation.

The result?
𝐏𝐚𝐧𝐞𝐥-𝐬𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐰𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐬 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐜𝐚𝐧 𝐭𝐫𝐮𝐬𝐭.

Members choose:
Their budget
Red, white or mixed cases
Delivery frequency
6 or 12 wines per delivery

We then deliver those wines 𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭 𝐭𝐨 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐝𝐨𝐨𝐫, at 𝐜𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐚𝐫-𝐝𝐨𝐨𝐫 𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐞𝐬 (𝐨𝐫 𝐛𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫).

Every delivery includes:
Panel-selected wines
SA Connoisseur (your insider guide to wine)
Individual neck tags with tasting notes, food pairing suggestions, origin, and drinking windows

Why join the Club?
No commitment — pause, change or cancel anytime
Money-back guarantee
Expert selection, made simple

𝐏𝐚𝐧𝐞𝐥-𝐬𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐞𝐝 · 𝐐𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐠𝐮𝐚𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐞𝐝 · 𝐃𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐝 𝐭𝐨 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐝𝐨𝐨𝐫 · 𝐒𝐢𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝟏𝟗𝟖𝟔

Name: Double Cross Vodka
Description:
A luxury spirits start-up and producer of the award-winning Double Cross Vodka

TASTE: 
Silky minerality, creamy mouthfeel, citrus, with white chocolate aroma and a long dry finish."

ABOUT:
- 13th Century Slovakian distillery
- 11th Generation Distiller
- Locally Sourced, Organic Winter Wheat: citrus on pallet and sweetness on nose
- Tatra Mountain Spring Water: naturally filtered through granite and limestone, providing a silky minerality.
- 7X Distilled: Column distilled to 99.9% Purity
- 7X Filtered: Diamond Dust filtration is a physical barrier that removes the remaining .01% of impurities but allows flavonoids to pass through, preserving flavor and aroma. 

TOP AWARDS:
- 1 of the 3 highest rated vodkas in the world. IWSC
- 1 of only 2 brands to receive the highest vodka rating [95pt, "Outstanding"] from Wine Enthusiast. 
- Unprecedented two GOLD medals -- for taste and package design -- at the 2008 San Francisco World Spirits Competition.
- FOUR STARS/"Highly Recommended", F. Paul Pacult's Spirit Journal
- 91-point "outstanding" review from Anthony Dias Blue in Tasting Panel magazine.
- Awarded a "classic" by Chris Carlsson in the Spirits Review.

Name: Terra Cellars
Description:
Terra Cellars, con base en Cataluña, España, es una embotelladora y comercializadora de vinos y sus derivados, creada en agosto de 2022 a partir de la adquisición de los activos de Reserva de la Tierra por parte de Sherpa Capital. 

Nuestras principales marcas en España son Elegido y Emparrado, y pueden ser encontradas en las principales cadenas de alimentación, desde hace más de 40 años. Además, a nivel internacional nuestros productos llegan a diferentes mercados como el Asiático, Europeo y Norteamericano, entre otros.  

Contamos con un amplio portafolio, especialmente creado para atender la demanda de los mercados más exigentes, con productos que van desde los más clásicos hasta los más innovadores.   

Dinamismo, transparencia y calidad son los pilares que sustentan y guían todas nuestras áreas, para seguir impulsando estos mercados, satisfaciendo las necesidades de nuestros clientes y consumidores.   

Únete a nosotros! Somos un equipo multidisciplinar, con profesionales especializados en cada una de las áreas involucradas en la creación y comercialización de vinos.

Name: AVINCIS
Description:
On the hills of the VILA DOBRUSA estate, where vineyards have been grown for thousands of years, the modern AVINCIS Winery creates elegant, complex and balanced wines. Cramposie Selectionata and Negru de Dragasani from AVINCIS are two wine varieties that have their origins in the Dragasani area. These two wines are a perfect pair for the holiday dishes. 

Cramposie Selectionata was named Best White Wine, 92 points out of 100, within the Gault & Millau Romania Wine Guide, which contains the best Romanian Wines for 2019.

Name: SIRIUS RUM COMPANY
Description:
SAS SIRIUS RUM COMPANY Créateur de Spice Rhum France INSIDER
est une société de fabrication et de distribution de boissons spiritueuses, Entrepositaire Agrée n°FR018 002E9933 Capital social de 7500€ immatriculée au RCS DE NANTES 842 804 007 TVA INTRACOMMUNAUTAIRE FR42 842 804 007

Name: Chateau Soucherie
Description:
Surplombant la vallée du Layon, le Château Soucherie vous accueille au milieu de ses vignes.
Domaine viticole, salle de réception, chambres d’hôtes, gîte****, ses nombreuses facettes sauront vous séduire et vous ressourcer.
Certifié en Agriculture Biologique par Ecocert, nous serons heureux de vous faire découvrir notre philosophie et nos vins.
Notre équipe est à votre écoute pour rendre votre séjour inoubliable.

Name: Wines of the World
Description:
Africa, home to 54 countries and spanning 12 million square miles, has diversity of terroir and climate that provides the perfect venue for creating wines well-suited for a variety of palates. 

Heritage Link Brands carefully selects its Continent Collection from a wide range of varietals, including honey wine from east Africa, palm wine from west Africa, and grape varietals from Northern, Central, and Southern Africa

Name: Darnley's Gin
Description:
Darnley's Gin began as a Wemyss family adventure, a brother and sister with a background in whisky and wine but were fascinated by the endless combination of botanicals you could use in gin making and the impact this could have on flavour. Now, six years on, we've got another exciting journey ahead as we move production to Scotland and more specifically to Fife, the Wemyss family home.

Darnley's Gin is made in a traditional pot still using the London Dry method which has been around for centuries. We chose to make our gin this way as it pulled on the heritage and skills of our master distiller and ultimately produces a gin with uncompromising quality and flavour.

Name: Maison Lestapis & Cie
Description: Marchand de Vin fondé en 1818 et situé dans le cœur historique des Chartrons à Bordeaux.

Name: Mumm Napa Winery
Description:
Today, Champagne-born master winemaker Ludovic Dervin leads the way, using his international experience to craft balanced, distinctive wines in the acclaimed méthode traditionelle. 

Continuing the long tradition of handcrafted wine, each cluster of grapes is carefully selected and transported in small baskets. The harvest is then gently pressed using only the first, most pure, pressing to go into our sparkling wines. To ensure character in the style of méthode champenoise, every bottle is fermented separately. And, equally important, our grapes are still sourced entirely from Napa Valley.

Name: Mitys
Description: Nous sommes une jeune entreprise avec un projet familial et nous avons fait un constat : les jeunes boivent majoritairement de l'alcool fort qu'ils diluent en ajoutant une boisson sucrée (soda, jus de fruits, Red Bull, etc.), que ce soit en soirée ou pour accompagner de succulents repas, l'acidité du vin n'est en effet pas adaptée à leur palais.

Name: Whitehaven Wine Company
Description:
Established in 1994 in the heart of the internationally renowned Marlborough winegrowing region, Whitehaven Wines is the realisation of the White family's vision to create quality, award-winning wine, and a critically acclaimed and respected winery. 
Today the company is headed by Sue White, an enthusiastic advocate of the region, who continues to make the dreams she shared with her late husband Greg a reality.
Sue leads a small, talented, committed team who together are carving global recognition for the Whitehaven label, showcasing elegant, single varietal Marlborough wines to over a dozen countries.

Name: Tosti1820
Description:
Tosti1820 is the italian sparkling wine specialist since 1820. Based, in Canelli, the cradle of italian bubbles (both Champenoise and Charmat methods has started here) and UNESCO site for its vineyards beauty.
The company is in the heart of the Langhe, in Piedmont, blessed land for wine growing with a strong winemaking tradition.
Tosti 1820 belives in bubbles connection and italian joy of life and wants to bring it all over the world. 
Great quality of wines is displays in a unique packaging: Tosti1820 bottle is the only on in the world with a belly button. Beauty and heritage to see, touch and taste.
Cheers!

Name: Stobi Winery
Description:
STOBI WINERY is the newest and most modernly designed Macedonian winery, located in the Tikvesh wine region, in the municipality of Gradsko, next to the ancient site Stobi, where it gets its name from. 

Committed to creating wines of superb and impeccable quality, we work according to the most contemporary standards and apply the latest technological advancements in the overall production process.

In order to ensure top quality, our production is based exclusively on grapes grown on our own vineyards, which extend over an area of 600 hectares and include traditional varieties such as Vranec, Kadarka, Kratoshija, Stanushina, Zilavka, Zupljanka, Smederevka, Temjanika, Plavec, as well as international wine varieties.

In order to maintain and preserve the quality of the grapes, we nurture it with the most modern methods in agriculture and strictly control the fertility and the yield. We cut out every vine correctly and accurately to match the growth and maturation. Stobi wines are clean and non-contaminated concerning pesticides, heavy metals, residues and contaminants.

The use of SO2 is 30 to 50% lower compared to the average. Therefore, the pleasure in our wines does not cause any headaches, but just pleasant bliss.

And since the end crowns the work, bottles and corks with top and highly controlled quality are used for the wines of Stobi, which ensure complete preservation of the rich and sumptuous flavours and aromas of each wine.

Enjoy STOBI wines - passion for life!

Name: RHUM KARUKERA
Description: Productrice de rhum blanc et de rhum vieux agricoles, à partir des distillats de la fermentation du jus de la canne à sucre, la Rhumerie Karukera est une véritable ambassadrice des saveurs des petites Antilles. Reconnue unanimement par les professionnels, les rhums Karukera participent ainsi à la reconnaissance des rhums agricoles de la Guadeloupe.

Name: Azores Wine Company
Description: At Azores Wine Company we produce unique wines, full of identity, pure, fresh, challenging and with a touch of salt... as life should be! We work in the recovery of an endangered grape variety and in the recovery of the Pico Island Vineyard Landscape, one of the 14 wine regions classified by UNESCO as World Heritage. Volcanic wines, born at the base of the largest volcano in Portugal, in the middle of the Atlantic, are wines of pure volcanic terroir. The soils are rocky and defy the very definition of agricultural soil. In the crevices of the rocks by the sea, which forces the vineyard to be protected by walls (currais), from the strong and saline winds of the Atlantic, where nothing else could grow, the grapes matured as much as the brave Azorean climate allowed.

Name: Today's Wine
Description:
Today’s Wine is dedicated to finding the best deals on wine. We source wine from around the world through our local distributors.  This allows us to give our customers access to top producers and emerging brands with preferred pricing between 30 to 60% off retail.

We liked the idea of the flash sale, one wine at a time simplifies and greatly reduces the time to make a buy or buy and try decision with the only risk being it might sell out.  The ability to purchase the wine at a decent price made us less hesitant to try something new.   
 
Out of this desire to provide a relaxed and easy way to discover and try new wines, Today's Wine was founded.  The best way to keep you interested is to have you help us to make the decisions of which wines to offer each day. We do this with our wine request program. It's easy to use, click the Request a Wine Tab and tell us about wines you would like to buy.  To maintain the quality and variety, we decided to sell only quality wines with a rating of 88 higher from recognized and respected sources or wine that we or our tasting panel have actually tried. This reduces the risk of buying a disappointing wine at what appears to be a great price.  
 
For orders of four or more bottles, (sometimes two or three) our posted prices are inclusive and final, nothing is added at checkout, including taxes, shipping and handling. For smaller orders a shipping charge is added at checkout.

We not only search, locate and buy the wines you want, we present them as they are in our inventory as we receive them, we ship Monday through Thursday to your home or business using FedEx.  We stay in touch by sending you a preview of the next offering, so you won't miss out on a wine you are interested in having.  Finally, we are here in the Midwest at the crossroads of America ideally located to offer you great wine at a great price up to 60% off every day.
 
We look forward to helping you find a great bottle of wine at a great price,

Name: Cave Lusa | Wines & Spirits
Description:
Cave Lusa | Cave Lusa Premium | Prestige Drinks 

 Fundada em 2011, a Cave Lusa é uma referência no mundo dos vinhos e bebidas espirituosas. Desde o início, o nosso compromisso é claro: encontrar as melhores soluções para satisfazer as necessidades dos nossos clientes, sempre com um acompanhamento próximo e especializado.

 Com uma equipa jovem, dinâmica e profissional, focamo-nos em três pilares principais:
Consumidor Final 
Canal HoReCa (hotéis, restaurantes e bares) 
Exportação Internacional 


 Loja Online: Possuímos uma enorme loja online de fácil navegação, com entregas em 48 horas e preços abaixo da média do mercado.
 Loja física, sediada em Viseu, a nossa garrafeira física é um espaço moderno e arrojado, repleto de charme e uma seleção cuidadosamente pensada para todos os gostos.
 Além disso, promovemos eventos exclusivos, como provas de vinhos comentadas e visitas vínicas, proporcionando aos nossos clientes momentos únicos.

 Visite-nos e descubra o que torna a Cave Lusa uma experiência inigualável no universo dos vinhos e bebidas premium!

Name: La Insoportable
Description: La Insoportable is spearheading the emergence of brands led by a new breed of enthusiasts, a wave of championing the use of Mexican raw materials for the elaboration of craft products and the implementation of world class knowledge in fermentations and distillations to provide unique experiences from Mexico to the world.

Name: Bodegas Elías Mora
Description:
En el corazón de la D.O. Toro, cultivamos mucho más que viñedos centenarios: cultivamos historias, amistad y un amor profundo por nuestra tierra. Fundada por Victoria Benavides, enóloga con espíritu libre y manos que entienden la vid como pocos, en Elías Mora hacemos vinos que hablan claro: potentes, honestos, elegantes… como el buen carácter castellano.

Creemos en lo auténtico, en la paciencia, y en el sabor de las cosas bien hechas. Nuestra bodega combina tradición vitivinícola con una visión moderna, sostenible y abierta al mundo. Aquí cada botella cuenta una historia, y cada sorbo lleva el sello de una pasión compartida.

¿Buscas un vino con personalidad? ¿Una marca con alma? ¿Un equipo con el que brindar por los buenos momentos?
 Estamos aquí. En Toro, en tu copa, y ahora también... en tu feed de LinkedIn

Name: Les Frères Vives
Description: Les frères Vives, enfants du Minervois, ensoleillent les tables des restaurateurs avec leurs vins complexes et riches d'assemblages de cépages méditerranéens.

Name: Punch Club
Description:
Punch Club is an award-winning beverage company. We are focused on making organic, low in sugar and environmentally friendly artisan cocktails.

Our mission is to facilitate unique moments in life while building a sustainable future. Following our slogan “Artisan drinks for mindful hedonists” we’ve become one of the most innovative drinks companies in the Nordic region.

Our innovative tap cocktail solution enables our partners to serve premium cocktails 5x faster with consistent quality while being 20x more environmentally sustainable.


Welcome to the club: https://punchclub.com

Name: Castello di Monsanto
Description: Castello di Monsanto is located in the central west side of the Chianti Classico Denomination. The winery, founded in 1700, has grown with the Bianchi family’s passion and love for wine since 1962. They are pioneers of the first Chianti Classico cru and own the biggest archive of vintages from the renowned Il Poggio label. The family are constantly looking for new and innovative ways to express the best of the terroir, in its many different guises, all the while staying true to important traditions and values: courage, ambition, respect, patience, dedication, identity and recognition. Being revolutionary through tradition is the Castello di Monsanto philosophy.

Name: Yapp Brothers Ltd
Description:
“There are wines at Yapp Brothers that you simply can not find anywhere else.”
Daily Telegraph.

Founded in 1969, Yapp Brothers Wine Merchants is widely recognised as the UK's leading importer of French regional wines. The company is rated as one of the 'Top Ten Online Wine Merchants in the UK' by The Independent.

Our agencies include world-famous domaines such as Jean-Louis Chave, Georges Vernay, Patrick Jasmin, Auguste Clape, Alain Graillot, Le Vieux Donjon, Trévallon and Jasper Hill.

From its premises in Sparkford, Somerset Yapp Brothers runs a busy wine counter, mail order and internet operation. As well as providing wine, cellaring and advice to private customers, Yapp Brothers supplies many of the best restaurants in the UK encompassing over 70 Michelin stars.

Shop & Office opening hours: Monday – Friday, 9am – 5pm.

Salut!

Name: Johan Lidby Vinhandel
Description: På Johan Lidby Vinhandel väljer vi ut, importerar och marknadsför högkvalitativa vin- och spritsorter från producenter med stark profil och personlig prägel på sina produkter. På denna värdegrund har vi de senaste tio åren byggt upp relationer med små och medelstora familjeföretag på alla kontinenter. Vår målsättning har aldrig varit att vara en heltäckande importör utan däremot att skapa ett utbud av viner och spritsorter som kompletterar varandra och där kunderna skall kunna känna en röd tråd genom hela utbudet även om det skiljer stort i både prisbild och ursprung mellan produkterna. Efter 15 år i branschen har vi glädjen att kunna representera drygt 70 producenter från alla världens hörn - utan att göra avkall på vår värdegrund!

Name: Two Hands Wines
Description:
Founded in September 1999, by two friends with a shared passion.  
The original aim they shared was to make the best possible Shiraz-based wines from prized Shiraz growing regions throughout Australia. Their intention was, and still is, to showcase the diversity of Australian Shiraz by highlighting regional characteristics and allowing the fruit to be the primary feature of the wines. Two Hands refers to the very personable approach taken with each parcel of grapes, no matter how big or small. The wines are carefully guided through the viticulture and winemaking process by Michael Twelftree.
Two Hands' first vintage was in 2000, starting with just 17 tonnes of fruit. In 2004 a state-of-the-art winery was built in the picturesque Barossa Valley in South Australia, specifically designed for small batch handling. To maximise the individual regional and varietal characteristics and to allow for greater quality control, every parcel of fruit, no matter how small, is handled separately from crushing through to fermentation and oak maturation. Premium fruit is now sourced from six of the finest Shiraz growing regions in Australia, and Two Hands work closely with their own vineyards and band of growers to ensure the full potential of each vineyard is reached. 
From the outset, Two Hands set out to be unique. This approach is reflected in everything from the names of the wines through to innovative packaging and, not least, the wines themselves. Two Hands has grown to be a clear market leader and now exports wines to over 24 countries around the world. From small beginnings, the winery has been able to manage its growth organically whilst maintaining an absolute quality focus. 
'Quality without compromise' is a core value that drives all Two Hands decisions so, not surprisingly, the wines have received international acclaim from respected wine critics, with Robert Parker proclaiming Two Hands as '...the finest negociant operation south of the equator...'

Name: Les Celliers de Sion - L’Oenoparc au coeur du Valais
Description:
Les Celliers de Sion invites you on a unique discovery of the history and wines of the Bonvins and Varone estates. Our Oenotourism Centre has been designed to offer you an experience that is completely unprecedented in Switzerland. You’ll also get the chance to discover every facet of our majestic hillside, which benefits from dramatic views over the Rhône Valley. Come to one of our original tastings and learn all about our wines and their flavours, right in the heart of our cellar...

A unique and entertaining sensory experience awaits you at our new centre. You’ll discover an innovative and modern site that truly has something for everyone !

Name: Tenuta Casenuove
Description:
LA TENUTA
Situata in Toscana, nei pressi di Panzano in Chianti e nel cuore del Chianti 
Classico, Tenuta Casenuove si estende su una superficie di 120 ettari, in 
un susseguirsi suggestivo di colline e vallate. Philippe Austruy acquista la 
proprietà nel 2015 e sedotto dal luogo e dal suo enorme potenziale, avvia 
grandi lavori per ristrutturare la Tenuta, restaurare i paesaggi antichi fatti 
di muretti a secco e terrazzamenti e soprattutto produrre vini eccezionali.

I VINI
Casenuove si trova al centro di una delle zone vitivinicole più conosciute della Toscana, il Chianti Classico. Le denominazioni presenti in questo territorio garantiscono tipicità e qualità dei vini prodotti: Chianti Classico, Riserva, Gran Selezione, IGT. Ziik Rosé è l'ultimo arrivato della gamma di Tenuta Casenuove,
un vino spumante 100% Sangiovese.

TERRITORIO E INNOVAZIONE
Sotto la guida di Alessandro Fonseca, l’entusiasmo del team di giovani che 
lavora tutti i giorni presso Casenuove, è il mix che consente alla Tenuta di intraprendere progetti ambiziosi finalizzati a innovare il settore vitivinicolo. Il passaggio a una produzione biologica ne è un esempio emblematico. La transizione a processi di vinificazione biologici ha avuto inizio nel 
2018, anno nel quale Casenuove è entrata a far parte dell’Unione 
Viticoltori di Panzano, il primo bio-distretto vitivinicolo d’Italia.
Un’altra opera messa in atto in nome dell’innovazione e della volontà di 
esaltare le caratteristiche naturali del territorio è il progetto “Le Terrazze”, che consiste nel restauro dei terrazzamenti semi-abbandonati che scendono lungo la collina verso il fiume Pesa.

ARTE E VINO
L’arte è da sempre il filo conduttore di tutti i progetti vitivinicoli di Mr 
Austruy e con la collaborazione di Galleria Continua nasce l’intento 
di narrare un luogo in continuo fermento: per questo vengono inaugurati "Le Radici dell'Arte" e “Il Vino dell’Arte” dove arte e vino si fondono incarnando l'anima della Tenuta.

Name: GROUPE PACKING : SOBEMAB - 3S - NINOT & FILS
Description:
3 acteurs complémentaires dans le travail de cave, le conditionnement, le stockage et la préparation de commande des vins.

Nous accompagnons nos partenaires à chaque étape clé : de la préparation des vins à la préparation de commande, en leur apportant expertise, réactivité et solutions sur mesure .

Name: Tintin Vinhos - Consultoria & Entretenimento
Description:
A Tintin Consultoria e Entretenimento reverencia as sensações singelas e provoca o exagero dos sentidos. Queremos descomplicar e encantar com as coisas simples e misteriosas, como gostar de comer e beber. Apreciamos o vinho como parte do cotidiano. Cuidamos de detalhes para estimular os 5 sentidos, causar surpresas e trazer confiança aos nossos clientes. Nos envolvemos para que nossos serviços seduzam, causem prazer intenso e sejam compartilhados.

Taís de Souza e João Renato uniram suas vivências na gestão de alimentos e bebidas, marketing e vendas para grandes marcas multinacionais e nacionais e criaram produtos e serviços diferenciados e customizados.

TinTin Consultoria
Eventos: garimpamos as melhores opções de vinhos que caibam no seu orçamento e na quantidade exata para agradar seus convidados e clientes. 
Brindes: vinhos quando bem embalados com comentários de especialistas e dicas seduzem e causam um ótimo impacto. A Tintin se orgulha de cuidar destes detalhes para que a sua ação seja memorável.
Premiação: estruturamos projetos customizados utilizando o vinho como opção para premiação em planos de incentivo.
Vinhos: para a Tintin vinhos são um presente para se investir na emoção dentro do racional. Porque o vinho tem um  valor inestimável! A Tintin tem o prazer de representar a seleção de vinhos da reconhecida importadora Decanter, com 12 anos de mercado e 100 produtores em 12 países.

TinTin Entretenimento
Confraria do João é uma experiência inédita, desenvolvida para você, amante das coisas boas da vida, que pensa em mergulhar em um universo cheio de história, prazer e romantismo. Estimula os sentidos em um contexto informal e intimista, através da combinação inspiradora de 3 elementos: vinho, gastronomia e cultura.  A idéia é se divertir, sem complicação! Aqui na Tintin a gente personaliza os eventos para a sua empresa, porque acreditamos na força da experimentação temática, em eventos únicos. Conheça mais: http://tinyurl.com/confrariadojoao

Name: Cuvée France
Description: We aspire to bring to everyone what the world of wines & spirits bring to us: an art de vivre nourished by the passion and know-how of our winemakers and sustainably harvested from exceptional terroirs.

Name: RHUM BIELLE
Description:
Marie Galante, l’île aux 100 moulins, a toujours été l’île de la Canne.

C’est à la fin du XIXème siècle que la Distillerie BIELLE a été fondée. Elle a su évoluer au fur et à mesure de ses propiétaires successifs.

La fabrication du sucre, devenue obsolète dans les petites « sucrottes », a laissé sa place aux distilleries de rhum agricole.

La Distillerie BIELLE perpétue une vieille tradition de fabrication de rhum agricole (Rhum Bielle) au pur jus de canne.

Name: Proof Wine & Spirits
Description: Proof Wine & Spirits is a North Carolina wine and beer distribution company founded to represent the boutique classical expressions of wine and well-crafted beer. We are wine lovers and foodies. We are fortunate and grateful to work with people who grow and produce some of the world’s finest wines. We represent producers whose devotion to excellence in the cellar and the vineyard allows us to offer wines that are best in class.

Name: Spina Wines
Description:
A Spina Wines é uma empresa da Serra Gaúcha que produz e envasa espumantes, vinhos e drinks em LATAS e BARRIS!

Nascida para oferecer uma solução para aqueles que precisam de praticidade, qualidade e economia.

Name: Carpenè Malvolti Spa
Description: Passion and tradition, research and innovation, handed down from father to son for over 140 years: this is Carpenè Malvolti, the first company to submit quality Prosecco to the sparkling process, and a brand that is a leader in this field both in Italy and abroad.

Name: Henri Ehrhart
Description:
C’est à Ammerschwihr, au cœur de la route des vins d’Alsace, que l’histoire du domaine familial prend sa source. Notre famille y travaille la vigne depuis huit générations.

Ce village, ce terroir, ces cols, ces lacets qui serpentent de villages en villages, ce sont nos racines.
C’est ici que notre père Henri Ehrhart, a appris le travail de la vigne auprès de notre grand-père, lequel tenait son métier de son père.
Et c’est ici qu’Henri nous a transmis la passion de la vigne et du vin.

De saisons en saisons, la vigne évolue et poursuit son cycle immuable, imperturbable.
Du vert éclatant de l’été à la robe dorée de l’automne, le terroir vit, s’exprime.
De génération en génération, nos parents, grands-parents transmettent à leurs descendants leur amour de ce terroir qu’ils habitent, et qui les habite.

Ce terroir est un lieu unique, préservé, hors du temps et riche de son histoire.
La mémoire des anciens est là, dans chacun des murets en pierres sèches façonnant les mosaïques de parcelles de vignes, dans chacune des pierres des châteaux forts qui surplombent nos vignobles.
Elle se manifeste chaque jour, dans le travail de la vigne, dans l’art de la table et dans notre art de vivre.
Elle est notre bien le plus précieux, notre héritage.

C’est dans ce terroir, qu’aujourd’hui, nous inscrivons nos pas dans ceux de nos parents, Henri et Raymonde avec pour ambition de faire partager au plus grand nombre, l’héritage de nos ancêtres et d’écrire à notre tour une nouvelle page de l’histoire familiale.

Nous souhaitons que nos vins accompagnent les moments privilégiés de tous les amoureux du terroir alsacien, aux quatre coins du monde.

Name: Casa Vinicola Natale Verga SpA - Verga Vini
Description: Azienda italiana che da oltre un secolo imbottiglia e distribuisce vini italiani di qualità. Fondata nel 1895, oggi si estende su una superficie di 30000 mq, con una capacità di stoccaggio di oltre 40000 hl. La cantina offre un'ampia gamma di tipologie di vino, dai rossi Montepulciano d'Abruzzo al Nero d'Avola ai bianchi Grecanico e Pinot Grigio.

Name: federal
Description:
Since 2001 we have been working hard to build a reputation as a successful, NZ owned, and customer orientated independent beverage distributor.  Proud to be 100% New Zealand owned and run since day one.

Federal Merchants & Co. is committed to working with high profile and award winning brands. We have over 60 brands within our multi-beverage portfolio. Our philosophy has always been to align ourselves with international and domestic brands with potential for growth, and who are leaders in excellence and consistency within their categories. Our portfolio is the result of hard work, passion, and devotion to creating a product range that’s enjoyed by consumers not only right now, but for many years to come.

Name: Résidence Wijnen
Description:
Résidence Wijnen importeert en levert wijnen uit alle delen van de hele wereld aan horeca- en retailbedrijven in Nederland. Van grote merken tot unieke cultwijnen. We onderscheiden ons door een assortiment dat niet is gebaseerd op volume maar op kwaliteit en service; we willen niet de grootste zijn, liever de beste.

We zijn 365 dagen per jaar bezig met het verkennen van de markt onder producenten en consumenten, om onze positie in zowel de B2B als de B2C markt te versterken. Via ons eigen retailkanaal – Wijnkoperij De Gouden Ton – staan we dagelijks in contact met consumenten die ons hun wensen en interesses toevertrouwen. De kennis en inzichten die we daarmee vergaren, delen we met onze B2B klanten in de horeca en retail. Zo leveren we een relevante bijdrage aan het uitbouwen van de business van onze klanten en de manier waarop hun klanten wijn beleven.

Om de juiste partner te zijn en te blijven, zijn we op alle gebieden voortdurend bezig met vernieuwen en verbeteren. De voortdurende vernieuwing is een waardevol onderdeel van onze strategie om onze plek in de markt te verstevigen en uit te bouwen. Zodat we onze klanten kunnen blijven verrassen met kennis en producten waarmee zij het verschil kunnen maken.

Name: Sierra Madre GmbH
Description:

Sierra Madre ist einer der führenden deutschen Importeure und Distributoren für hochwertige Spirituosen. Name: Kondrat Wina Wybrane
Description: Kondrat Wina Wybrane is a company founded by Marek Kondrat. We are importing and distributing wine in Poland. Our aim is to provide best quality product and help to grow wine culture. We are an exclusive distributor of all wines in our portfolio in Poland which allows us to guarantee competitive prices and various promotional activities. Kondrat Wina Wybrane is a strong brand on the local market, being a pioneer in wine commerce and IT tools. We have been a wine expert for most important business partners and restaurants in Poland for more than 10 years. You can visit us in one of our wine shops or on-line: www.marekkondrat.pl

Name: Bodegas Elias Mora
Description:
La Bodega Elías Mora pertenece a la D.O. Toro (España) y produce tintos de fama internacional como 2V Premium, Gran Elías Mora, Elías Mora Crianza, Viñas Elías Mora y el vino tinto dulce Benavides.

Fundada en el año 2000 y actualmente dirigida por Victoria Benavides, toma el nombre del antiguo propietario del Viñedo, Elías Mora. Bodega Elías Mora ha conseguido situarse entre los mejores exponentes de la cultura tradicional del vino en España.

Name: Bricoleur Vineyards
Description:
Bricoleur Vineyards, which launched its first vintage in 2017 and opened its tasting room in 2020, is tucked away in Sonoma’s Russian River Valley – just south of Healdsburg. Founded by the Hanson family, Bricoleur Vineyards can be found at the end of a winding road in the charming, bucolic town of Windsor, only an hour north of San Francisco – and very close to the Santa Rosa airport. The distinctive name, “Bricoleur,” is French for one who starts building something with no clear plan, adding bits here and there, cobbling together a whole while flying by the seat of their pants. 

Bricoleur is known for their truly unique wine and food pairings, created by their Culinary Advisor, James Beard Award-winning Chef Charlie Palmer and Executive Chef, Thomas Bellec. Their six-course Rooted tasting perfectly pairs Bricoleur’s elegant wines with inventive small plates, and changes every two months to express the seasonality of the estate’s sustainably-farmed culinary garden. Chefs Palmer & Bellec also draw upon Bricoleur’s garden for their robust dinner series, The Seasons. The Hanson Family is happiest when they bring friends together over exceptional wine and food, so whether they’re enjoying a casual family-style dinner, or Rosé and bocce in the estate’s rose garden, Bricoleur’s guests make lasting memories.

Bricoleur Vineyards produces two families of critically-acclaimed, award-winning wines – “Bricoleur” and “Flying by the Seat of Our Pants.” The wines are crafted by veteran Winemaker Cary Gott and Assistant Winemaker Tom Pierson. In addition to Bricoleur Vineyards, the Hanson family also owns Kick Ranch Vineyard in Sonoma County’s Fountaingrove District AVA. 

Bricoleur Vineyards is open Thursday – Monday, 10 a.m. – 5 p.m. by appointment only and reservations can be made by visiting www.bricoleurvineyards.com or by calling 707-857-5700. Bricoleur Vineyards is located at 7394 Starr Road in Windsor, California and can be found on Instagram @bricoleurvineyards.

Name: Vinicola Santa Augusta
Description:
Elegância, qualidade e expressão. Vinhos e espumantes finos de altitude com a assinatura única Vinícola Santa Augusta. Vinícola Santa Augusta está localizada na Linha Santa Barbara, S/N, interior, Videira-SC, Brasil.

Elegance, quality and expression. Fine wines and sparkling wines with the unique signature of Santa Augusta Winery. Vinicola Santa Augusta is a wine company based out of Linha Santa Barbara, S/N, Videira, Santa Catarina, Brazil.

Name: D'Aria Winery
Description:
One of the oldest and most significant farmlands in what is now known as the greater Cape Town or "Sauvignon Blanc Country"

D'Aria consistently produces award-winning wines by effortlessly combining history, tradition, nature’s bounty and the delicate craft of winemaking.

We draw inspiration from 'the muse' resplendent on each bottle of wine – a youthful, joyful, free-spirited character who embodies the philosophy espoused in our name: D’Aria (a harmony of the senses)

Name: Jobs For Wine
Description:
Serving the North American Wine Industry, WWW.JOBSFORWINE.COM links Wine Industry Employers to Job Seekers with the skills & experience they are looking for. 


Typically employers & job seekers alike use the “shotgun approach” to recruiting, and job search, wasting time and money. WWW.JOBSFORWINE.COM allows Job Seeker and Wine Industry Employer to post and search by category, eliminating the hassle of searching through all the “wrong” resumes, reducing the time-to-hire and gaining that much sought-after competitive advantage; and for the Job Seeker, matching his/her skills to the right employer for them.

Description: Somos una pequeña empresa dedicada principalmente a la importación y distribución de vinos y licores calidad premium en el mercado Nicaragüense. Atendemos Hoteles, Restaurantes, Licorerías, Bares y Cadenas de Supermercados. Name: TERRISSON WINES
Description: We aspire to bring to everyone what the world of wines & spirits bring to us: an art de vivre nourished by the passion and know-how of our winemakers and sustainably harvested from exceptional terroirs.

Name: BROWN | Napa Valley
Description: Brown Estate Vineyards is a private family-owned and -operated estate winery in St. Helena CA. We have been in the Napa Valley for 40+ years, growing grapes for 35+ years, and producing ultra-premium wines for 25+ years.

Name: Chet Valley Vineyard
Description: John and Bridget Hemmant have diversified their family farmland in South Norfolk to plant a vineyard  on 5 acres in 2011. The land is tended using sustainable techniques that John learnt from his farming background plus knowledge and skills from attending the Plumpton College of wine and spending time with viticulturalists and winemakers in Europe. The permaculture on the vineyard helps sustain a diverse range of wildlife, from Bees, and other insects and birds to the occasional Hare. The hand picked grapes are taken a few yards to our new purpose built winery where they are pressed at cool temperatures to maintain flavours and aromas. Then the must (Grape juice) is fermented in stainless steel vats. The wine destined to become sparkling wine is fermented a second time in a bottle with yeast for a couple of years or more to develop the biscuity buttery flavours so distinctive of English Sparkling wines & Champagne. When the winemaker decides the time is right the bottles undergo riddling to separate the sediment towards the neck of the bottle which is then cooled,  the pellet of yeast disgorged and the bottle topped up with the "liqueur d'expédition". A further 10 acres of vines were planted in the last 3 years and the production of wines through our winery will expand as a result. The grapes from these newly planted vines are due to become ready for harvest in the next season around October 2020. We welcome visitors and groups on our tours which take 2 hours led by John who describes the techniques he uses to tend the vines and shows the various grape varieties. He then explains the wine making process in the new winery, demonstrating our state of the art equipment. This is followed by a wine tasting with charcuterie and cheese. We welcome people who wish to become more involved in the vineyard and to join the harvest in October. We have a wine club and offer the opportunity to Lease vines. We have a holiday cottage on the vineyard - The Vine House (sleeps 6).

Name: Domaine Ménard-Gaborit
Description: Dans le vignoble de Nantes, notre famille cultive ses vignes dans le respect de l'Agriculture Biologique. Nous vous invitons à découvrir la grande diversité des terroirs du Muscadet sur notre page ou encore mieux au domaine autour d'une dégustation !

Name: KRITER BRUT DE BRUT
Description: KRITER BRUT DE BRUT is a wine and spirits company based out of Route de Challanges, Beaune, Burgundy, France.

Name: Bodega Piccolo Banfi
Description:
Ubicada en el corazón del Distrito Agrelo, Luján de Cuyo, Piccolo Banfi es un proyecto que se extiende a través de 25 hectáreas fértiles, con viñedos propios, ubicados entre los 950 y 1030 metros sobre el nivel del mar. Las variedades de uva plantadas son Malbec, Cabernet Franc, Cabernet Sauvignon, Petit Verdot, Sauvignon Blanc y Semillón.

La bodega tiene como asesor enológico al prestigioso winemaker francés Michel Rolland. El equipo enológico está liderado por Matias Ibañez, quien cada año se esfuerza por elaborar vinos únicos, de alta gama, cuidando cada detalle a la perfección.

Name: Cantina Strappelli - Organic Cellar
Description:
Come in vigna anche in cantina vogliamo accompagnare le uve nel processo di vinificazione, applicando i concetti del biologico e adottando le tecnologie più all’avanguardia durante l’intero ciclo produttivo. 
Lavoriamo seguendo passo dopo passo tutte le lavorazioni dal vigneto alla vinificazione in cantina, fino all’imbottigliamento perché crediamo che ogni fase, ogni processo sia fondamentale per ottenere i vini di qualità di cui andiamo fieri, nella consapevolezza che i nostri vini siano qualcosa di vivo e che parlino di noi ai tanti estimatori.

Name: Distillerie Stadaconé
Description:
Oser des spiritueux aux ingrédients inattendus.

Sans véritable hasard, notre distillerie est située à mi-chemin entre le village de Stadaconé et le campement de Jacques Cartier lors de son arrivée en 1535.

Nous vous invitons à venir y vivre une expérience immersive unique, entièrement développée sous le thème des premières rencontres en Amérique du Nord. Qui sait les rencontres étonnantes que vous pourrez faire autour d’un verre de gin…

Fraîchement implantée dans l’effervescent quartier Limoilou, à Québec, Stadaconé propage le plaisir d’explorer en osant des spiritueux aux ingrédients inattendus.

Name: Oenops Wines
Description: OENOPS WINES was founded in late 2015 by Nikos Karatzas and friends and it is the most recently established winery in the region of Drama, in northern Greece. Our main purpose is to produce high quality wines with minimal intervention in limited quantities. The grapes are mostly Greek varieties and come from selected vineyards mostly from the region of Macedonia from our team of grape growers.

Name: PT Sumber Anggur Sejahtera
Description:
As a newcomer in the lifestyle beverage industry, we at SAS wanted to establish
a reputation for a new way of trading, not just being another importer counting the number of units sold.

Beyond quantity, our goal is to deliver high service quality. We want to guarantee that each of our partners – both brand owners and retail outlet owners – are achieving their targets. Delivering quality products with good service has always been our principle; we want to do more than just ‘business as usual’.

Name: La Winerie
Description:
1er Chai Urbain à Paris  Nous créons des Vins fins Parisiens . 
1st Urban Winery in Paris. Fine wines made in the heart Of Paris

Name: Artelium Wine Estate
Description: An English Vineyard and Winery in Sussex. Crafting exceptional English wines through collaboration with celebrated winemakers. We grow Chardonnay, Pinot Noir, Meunier and Pinot Gris across our two vineyards in East and West Sussex.

Name: Tenuta di Castellaro
Description:
Tenuta di Castellaro nasce dall'accurata selezione dei vitigni autoctoni dell'arcipelago eoliano e dal recupero di una parte di quel territorio che, negli anni, era stato abbandonato.
In un ambiente magico ed incontaminato, dipinto dai colori che solo la natura può regalare, proponiamo esperienze sensoriali da vivere a fior di pelle.

Tenuta di Castellaro è la realizzazione di passione e sogno che si sono fusi in un connubio perfetto, dando vita ad un'eccellenza unica nel suo genere. Il millenario alberello, coltivato biologicamente nei 20 ettari di vigna, custodisce il prezioso frutto che fa nascere vini ricercati dal gusto unico, pura espressione del territorio vulcanico di Lipari, luogo incontaminato che ci ha accolto con le sue naturali avversità.

Name: Sab's By Alambic Bourguignon
Description: Independant craft distillery - Distilling Marc & Fine de Bourgogne, Gin, brandies

Name: Champagne Le Brun de Neuville
Description:
[Fr]
Depuis son origine, Le Brun de Neuville s’est construit autour d’une histoire d’hommes et de femmes, de familles de vignerons, animés par la volonté commune de révéler la Côte de Sézanne et l’identité généreuse et solaire de ses Chardonnays.

[En]
Since its origin, Le Brun de Neuville has been built around a history of men, women and families of winegrowers with a common desire to reveal the Côte de Sézanne along with the generous and solar identity of its Chardonnays.

Name: Armin Armagnac
Description:
ARMIN, L'ARMAGNAC LIBRE.
Ce n'est pas souvent que l'on vous parle d'Armagnac. Car on en produit peu, en Gascogne uniquement, fief d'Armin soldat du Roi des Francs Clovis. C'est pourtant le plus ancien spiritueux français, produit depuis 700 ans. Et malgré son grand âge, il est bien vivant. Avec ou sans glaçon, sec ou allongé, en cocktail à la cuillère ou au shaker : 700 ans et presque autant de manières de déguster Armin.
IG: @armagnac_armin

Name: Wine4u Luxembourg
Description:
Nous sommes des amateurs de bons vins et de bonnes chaires, en un mot des épicuriens.
Nous voulons avant tout vous faire découvrir la qualité et la diversité des vins de Moselle.
En plus du vin nous voulons vous raconter et vous faire connaître les vignerons qui ont œuvré à l’élaboration de ces beaux nectars que vous allez déguster...

Name: Bodega Marco ZUNINO Wine Estate
Description:
Marco ZUNINO : : The dream of 4 French partners in Argentina who have created a modern winery in the San Rafael region, in the heart of the Mendoza Province. 

Young, honest, expressive wines, a testament to their great Argentinian terroir. A modern and novel winery covering over 25,000 square feet, built using solely the region’s natural ressources. The state of the art cellar is equipped with the latest generation material imported from Europe (Della Toffola, Marzola).

The production capacity is of 500,000 litres spread into 25 ciment tanks and stainless steel vats. Equipped with its own bottling line, allows us great reactivity and adaptability.

The vineyards covering a total 30 hectares are situated at the foothills of the Andes. The soil is a mix of clay and chalky limestone, with a great climate for wine. This added to the altitude (over 650 metres) ensures the best possible quality for our grapes.

The first range of Marco ZUNINO wines : : Our aim was to make these wines youthfull vibrant wines highlighting the San Rafael terroir through  generous fruit aromas and a rich palate. We keep the use of sulfites below 50mg/ litre. Malbec, Bonarda and Cabernet Sauvignon full of character with a presentation mixing a feminine and modern touch. A Chardonnay pure and mineral, with a perfect acidity offering a great backbone to its distinguished fruit. Our Bonarda rosé is one of a kind in Argentina dry and delicately fruity.

The wines offer an excellent price-quality ratio and are already sold in Europe (Belgium, France and Switzerland), UK, Mexico, Honduras, Peru, Canada, USA, China and Australia.

Name: Thistly Cross Cider
Description:
Born as a collaboration between a farmer and an artist-turned-cidermaker, Thistly Cross has grown to become Scotland's leading cider producer making a range of Traditional and Real Fruit Ciders on our Fruit Farm in Dunbar, East Lothian. 

Thistly Cross specializes in handmade ciders from good quality local fruit, slow fermented and long matured for a clean, crisp natural flavour. Thistly Cross ciders are now widely distributed throughout the UK in BIB, Bottle and Keg, and internationally to more than 15 different countries, including more than 40 American States. Thistly invests in good quality ingredients and time spent making cider properly, to create a portfolio of award winning ciders with international appeal.

Name: Les Vins Brunin-Guillier
Description:
Les vins Brunin-Guillier, maison familiale depuis 1890, sont spécialisés dans le négoce de vins et spiritueux.
Le groupe Brunin-Guillier représente plusieurs sociétés dont le siège se trouve à Gaurain-Ramecroix (77, Grand route), un magasin à Tournai (La Cave st-Jacques) un autre en France La Cave Touquettoise (Le Touquet-Paris-Plage) et enfin la Cave de Wimereux (Wimereux)

Name: La QV
Description:
L’agence de vin La QV a été créée en 2007. Aujourd’hui, nous sommes présents dans presque 300 restaurants à travers la province, du café-bistro au restaurant gastronomique.

La QV compte représente un peu plus de 80 vignerons, principalement européens mais de plus en plus de partout dans le monde. Nous sélectionnons des producteurs qui travaillent dans le respect de la nature, que ce soit en culture biologique, en biodynamie ou en vinification naturelle. Notre priorité est cependant de travailler des vins droits et nets, qui sortent parfois des sentiers battus tout en demeurant accessibles.

Name: Viniturismo - Vinhos e Enoturismo - o Site dos Bons Vinhos
Description:
A ViniTurismo é uma empresa direccionada para a organização de actividades relacionadas com o Vinho, tendo em funcionamento 3 áreas distintas - o Enoturismo, a Formação e a Comercialização de Vinho.

A Viniturismo desenvolve há 15 anos diversas actividades relacionadas com o vinho, como a comercialização de vinhos online, através do nosso Clube de Vinho ou distribuindo no retalho, acções de formação e de enoturismo.

Os nossos clientes podem ser particulares, sócios e não sócios do nosso Clube de Vinhos ou empresas que querem fidelizar os seus melhores clientes ou premiar os seus colaboradores.

São sempre pessoas que apreciam bons vinhos e boa gastronomia e desejam aprender e contactar directamente com produtores e enólogos e que pretendam participar em actividades outdoor.

Promovemos visitas a caves, provas e cursos de vinhos, participação nas vindimas pisando as uvas no lagar, percursos pedestres nas vinhas, provas "cegas"

Name: Bodegas Benjamin de Rothschild & Vega Sicilia
Description: Bodegas Benjamin de Rothschild & Vega Sicilia

Name: Ron Matusalem
Description:
After arriving in Cuba from their native Spain, Benjamin and Eduardo Camp, and partner, Evaristo Alvarez, founded Matusalem Rum in 1872.  

Matusalem Rum was the preferred rum in Cuba for its exquisite taste and smoothness. Matusalem's reputation spread the world over when Cuba became the destination of choice for celebrities and trendsetters from the 1930's through the 1950's.  However, with the rise of the Castro revolution, Matusalem Rum manufacturing was stopped in Cuba and eventually moved to the Dominican Republic. 

Known as the cognac of rums, Matusalem Rum is produced using the original recipe. The company's President is Dr. Claudio Alvarez III -- a direct descendant of Evaristo Alvarez.
Matusalem Rum distillation and blending principles come from the Solera Aging System, originally developed for the production of sherry and brandy. The Solera technique, in which rums of various ages and characters are matured in select oak, enabled Matusalem to craft products that were not only superior to other rums in Cuba, but were equal in quality and refinement to the finest spirits in the world.

Matusalem Rum remains unchanged. Matusalem Rums are still produced in the same Cuban tradition, using the family's secret formula and according to the same exacting standards established by the brand's founders over a century ago in Santiago de Cuba.

Matusalem Rum, A Cuban Original.

Name: Calabria Company Limited (Makers of Novellino Wines)
Description:
Calabria Company Limited  is the maker of Novellino Wines, the market leading wine brand in the Philippines. 

More and more Asians are drinking wine as a natural expression of their evolving lifestyle which is characterized by their increasing sophistication and aspiration for the finer things in life… including wine. Novellino seeks to satisfy this growing appreciation for wine by delivering a taste that’s in tune with the general Asian taste preference for wine –light, soft, fruity and refreshingly delightful!

Launched in 1999 to fill the need of the growing local market of wine drinkers, Novellino offers a line of good value red and white wines tailored to the taste preference of Filipinos and Asians in general.

Novellino wines are made from pure and natural 100% vitis vinifera grapes harvested from select vineyards all over the world. Great care and attention is put behind the selection of the vineyards and the grapes to ensure consistency in our wines’ quality. Rich soil, hilly landscape and a cool yet sunny climate are just some of the factors that we consider to make each bottle of Novellino special.

Follow us on Facebook, Twitter, & Instagram!
www.facebook.com/novellinowines
Twitter & Instagram handle: @novellinowines

Name: Cask 88
Description:
We are a family-owned company and among the world’s foremost experts in rare and old whisky, serving clients around the world from our offices in Edinburgh, Hong Kong and Singapore. 

Our reach and library of liquid is unrivalled and we've spent the past decade taking great pride in helping clients find a whisky that perfectly suits their individual needs.

Whether a unique cask you wish to enjoy now, a newly distilled expression that will age with time or a limited edition bottle release finding the right whisky should be an experience.

Our passionate team of whisky experts have, between them, over 100 years of knowledge and are perfectly placed to take you on a journey, a journey through Scotland and a journey from cask to glass.

Name: Brancaia Winery
Description:
Brancaia is a contemporary Tuscan winery known for producing high-quality wines, with a strong connection to the land and a deep respect for nature.
Located in the Chianti Classico area and in the Maremma, Brancaia unites Swiss precision and Italian style to create elegant, balanced wines that express their unique terroir. Sustainability is a core value across all stages of production – from vineyard management to winemaking – and is an essential part of the estate’s identity.

Brancaia also offers curated wine experiences, including guided tastings, estate tours, exclusive stays, and refined food & wine pairings at its Osteria and Bar in Tuscany.

Name: GROUPE BERNARD BORDEAUX
Description:
Depuis 4 générations notre Groupe développe sa passion pour le vin. 
Le raisin est notre ADN et du nectar nous puisons notre force. Depuis le fruit jusqu’à sa quintessence, le temps long nous rappelle que passion et patience sont indissociables. Ce sont aussi ces valeurs que nous voulons transmettre à travers nos métiers. Et le sens de l’engagement garde pour nous une place toute particulière.

Le Groupe Bernard repose aujourd’hui sur 3 activités complémentaires dans le secteur des vins et spiritueux :
- la production & le négoce de spiritueux avec nos sociétés Lucien Bernard et Valdronne,
- le négoce de grands vins avec Millésima et Sobovi
- les propriétés viticoles: Le Domaine de Chevalier et Château Peyrabon

La direction générale du Groupe, présidée par Jean Bernard, assure la cohésion et l’équilibre de la stratégie de développement des différentes activités.

Name: Château Ksara
Description:
Château Ksara began life in 1857 when Jesuit Fathers inherited and began farming a 25 hectare plot of land to produce Lebanon’s first non-sweet red wine. In doing so, they laid the foundations of Lebanon’s modern wine industry.

It is worth remembering however that Lebanon’s oldest winery is merely continuing a 5,000-year-old trading tradition. Lebanon sits on the site of ancient Phoenicia, one of the world’s oldest merchant civilizations and one of the first to sell its wines to other nations. 

The Jesuits accidental discovery of a grotto, stretching over 2 kilometers, gave the religious men a perfect storing area, which was not too humid and at ideal temperature . It is dug in a limestone rock and it is believed that the grotto dates back to the roman period but its use by the ancient civilization is still unknown. 

The cave comprising 6 tunnels which cover 2 km under Ksara, were discovered in 1898 and represent perfect conditions for storing wines, as temperature remains between 13 and 15 C all year round.

100.000 tourists per year wind down into the dark, dank grotto peering at ancient tools and bottles entombed in dust and mildew. The cellars contain approximately 900.000 bottles ranging from last year’s vintage to a few final examples of the 1918 vintage.

Name: Vivanco Cultura de Vino
Description:
In 2004, our family decided to apply their enthusiasm and dedication to making a life-long dream come
true in Briones, La Rioja: to share with the whole world our passion for the Wine Culture.

VIVANCO IS FAMILY
With humble, simple origins in the vineyard, wine has been our driving force for four generations and 100 years of work and commitment. With a pioneering spirit and limitless enthusiasm, it was time to share this vocation, returning to wine all that wine had given us.

VIVANCO IS MUCH MORE THAN WINE
With a winery where wine is understood from a demanding, dynamic, up-to-date vision. A contemporary winemaking project with different, unique wines. The true expression of a land full of curiosities

VIVANCO IS MUCH MORE THAN CULTURE
A Foundation where the past and present are one. An exciting journey through knowledge and history, with a unique Museum where you can
discover the essence of wine through experience, sensitivity and innovation.

VIVANCO IS MUCH MORE THAN EXPERIENCES
We seek to transport you to a new universe of sensations where the wine takes centre stage. 9,000 m2 of emotions and activities around culture, art, cuisine, flavour and fun. The meeting point between knowledge and the enjoyment of wine.

Today at Vivanco we understand wine as a way of life from an innovative, energy-filled perspective, offering you a unique, exclusive experience around the Culture of Wine. Winery, Foundation and Experiences are a faithful reflection of the commitment of the Vivanco family to “giving back to wine what wine has given us”, which we invite you to discover.

Name: Domaines Francis Abécassis - ABK6
Description: "We are convinced that blending eaux-de-vie coming from a Single Estate gives the Cognac its inimitable character and depth. To extract the fruit of our terroirs, we have decided to master each step of production on our estates. This is why we have build a highly qualified team whose members fulfill their task with the required skills, care and love. We hope to have the pleasure to welcome you on our estates in the near future." - Francis Abécassis

Name: General Beverage and Beer Sales Companies
Description: Established in 1933 and family owned ever since, General Beverage is the largest wholesale distributor of wine, distilled spirits, beer and non alcoholic beverages in Wisconsin. We have grown to 1000 employees by treating people like family. We consult with, sell to, and service over 11,400 licensed beverage retailers located in all of Wisconsin's 72 Counties from our offices located in Barron, Chippewa Falls, LaCrosse, Little Chute, Madison - HQ, Milwaukee, Oshkosh and Stevens Point.

Name: BOTTER SPA
Description: Botter SPA was founded by Carlo Botter in Fossalta di Piave, in the province of Venice in 1928. Firstly born as a resale of bulk wines and demijohns, it became an entrepreneurial business model already in the late post-war period. Today Botter SPA is one of the largest producers and exporters of Italian wines: out of 20 bottles of Italian wine exported to the world, 1 is produced by Botter.

Name: Bodegas Riojanas, SA Grupo
Description:
Bodegas Riojanas es una empresa dedicada a la elaboración y comercialización de vinos de calidad, especializada en vinos de larga de crianza, dentro de la Denominación de Origen Calificada Rioja, ubicada en la localidad riojana de Cenicero.

Aunque sus instalaciones datan del siglo pasado, el crecimiento constante ha llevado a adoptar distintos planes de inversión dirigidos a mejorar y perfeccionar sus sistemas de elaboración, crianza y envejecimiento de los vinos.

En el año 2000 se decide apostar por la DO Toro, creando Bodegas Torreduero, con la convicción de elaborar vinos vanguardistas pero elegantes.

Cabe destacar la creciente internacionalización, con el desarrollo de la sociedad Bodegas Riojanas USA Corporation, así como oficinas comerciales en Reino Unido, Alemania, México y China.

La gama actual de productos que ofrecemos al mercado: DOCa RIOJA: Monte Real, Viña Albina, Gran Albina, Albina Essencia, Puerta Vieja, Canchales, El Lago y Cuppedia; DO TORO: Viore, Marqués de Peñamonte y Peñamonte., DO RUEDA: Viore, Viña Albina; DO RÍAS BAIXAS: Veiga Naúm; RIBERA DEL DUERO: Viore; DO PENEDES: Alacer; DO CAVA: Cvm Lauve; DO CHAMPAGNE: RobertPierrel y Marquis de La Fayette., junto con algunos otros específicos para algún país exterior.

Name: Levantine Hill Estate
Description:
A magnificent vineyard estate, winery, cellar door and restaurant in the Yarra Valley

Levantine Hill is the perfect merger of two vineyards right in the heart of the Yarra Valley. On the one side, a vineyard producing superior grapes since the 1990s; on the other, lovingly planted family blocks right alongside a Truffiére surrounding our Homestead. Together, this combined estate is pure testament to the passion and toil of dedicated human hands and man’s tenuous relationship with the nurturing love of Mother Nature.

It all began against the odds, with experts saying the terrain was far too steep and the concealed underlying rocky outcrops would make it impossible to plant vines in such an elevated location. But we saw the possible. The location was incredible, the soil profile was perfect. So with unwavering determination, and the use of a diamond-tipped drilling rig to core through the remove rocks, Levantine Hill began to take perfect shape. Today, the difficult terrain is the key strength of this family vineyard, which will only ever bottle premium wines in impeccable years.

Name: SAS PAURAUX
Description: SAS PAURAUX est une société marketing, spécialisée en Animations et Conseils en Vins.

Name: Tres Leones I.C.S.A.
Description:
MAESTROS EN DESTILADOS PARAGUAYOS DESDE 1962.

13 premios Top Of Mind 2012 - 2024
Gran Premio del Ranking de marcas 2022 - CAP
Reconocimiento a la CALIDAD DE SERVICIO, IMAGEN, ATENCIÓN E INNOVACIÓN en la categoría CAÑA en los premios Prestigio 2022. 

60 años de historia y trayectoria, nos llevan a ser líderes del mercado paraguayo en todos los ámbitos. Gracias a nuestra marcada filosofía basada en valores que trascienden mucho más allá del estricto sentido mercantilista. Volviéndonos, Rey de Cañas.

Name: Domaines Bournet-Lapostolle
Description:
One of the oldest vineyards of Cabernet Sauvignon and Carmenère in Chile, if not in the world, is the origin of this story. Tucked away in the Colchagua Valley, near the town of Santa Cruz, the Apalta Valley was the place selected by the visionary family Bournet-Lapostolle. The region's particular soil and climate conditions make for very elegant, complex wines with great structure, depth, color and an excellent aging potential.

True to the demands of the family, their ambition was to produce an exceptional wine and to pave the way for the qualitative development of the country's fine wines. Recognized as “New World Winery of the Year" by Wine Enthusiast in 2008, Lapostolle is considered as one of the most premium winery in Chile.

Currently, the team behind the creation of Clos Apalta and Lapostolle is led by the son of the founders and Seventh Generation of the Bournet-Lapostolle family, Charles de Bournet.

Name: EGIATEGIA
Description:
EGIATEGIA is the pioneer for subsea winemaking, the first Winereef implanted in 2007. 
 
At the beginning it was a crazy bet, a nice impertinence tinted with poetry: to make wine under water in the Bay of Saint-Jean-de-Luz. 
A wine, maritime and Basque adventure with only one horizon: Freedom! 

After a fisrt vinification on earth, our wines will naturally and deeply experience a second alcoholic fermentation in very specific physical conditions.
Our underwater fermentation tanks are submerged for several months at a depth of 15 meters.

The white, red and rosé wines produced in this way are slightly sparkling and have unique aromas.

Name: ALLIANCE LOIRE
Description:
Créée en Janvier 2002, Alliance Loire est le premier producteur de vins AOP du Val de Loire. Son activité englobe plus de 4 000 ha de vignes du Pays Nantais à la Touraine.

Alliance Loire est portée par des valeurs simples et fortes : solidarité, partage, respect et créativité. Ces valeurs sont guidées par un véritable esprit d'équipe, qui enrichit chaque étape de l'élaboration des vins.

Name: Grupo Altasur
Description: Altasur es la representante exclusiva de DIAM para toda sudamérica. Además brinda otras soluciones enológicas de alta calidad y garantía certificada para que tengas la tranquilidad de alcanzar los resultados que estás esperando.

Name: St. Supéry Estate Vineyards & Winery
Description: St. Supéry Estate Vineyards and Winery is a 100% Estate Grown, Napa Valley sustainably farmed winery. We are located in the renowned Rutherford growing region in the heart of Napa Valley. Our vineyards and winery are certified Napa Green. We are proud to be recognized for our exceptional Cabernet Sauvignon, Sauvignon Blanc and estate red and white blends. All of our wines are estate grown, produced and bottled. Visitors and their well-behaved dogs are invited to explore our extensive grounds, art gallery, pétanque courts and especially our unique wine tasting experiences, including farm-to-table culinary offerings from our Estate Chef, by prior appointment. Please follow if you are 21 or older and enjoy responsibly.

Name: Black Fly Beverage Company
Description:
Black Fly Beverage Company is Canada's first Craft RTD producer founded by husband and wife Rob Kelly and Cathy Siskind-Kelly in May 2005. Having spent the summers of his youth in Muskoka, Rob drew the name Black Fly from the reputation of the small but determined Canadian insect that like this small-business can come in under the radar but deliver a mighty bite. 

Originally housed in an historic bank building in the heart of downtown London, Black Fly Beverage Company moved it's operations in May of 2008 to a state-of-the-art production facility located in the city's leading industrial quarter. The production team at Black Fly is comprised of a diverse team of skilled team members that ensure the highest quality product enters the market daily.   

Black Fly can be found across Canada in 10 provinces and 2 territories with Black Fly staff on the ground representing the brand in 5 of these markets and agency partners in others.  In addition to Canadian markets Black Fly can be found in 11 US states currently and active exploration of other export markets are continuous. 

The mission for Black Fly is to deliver innovative products that offer consumers Less Sweet and excellent tasting RTD products in various formats at a competitive price.

Name: G.D. VAJRA - BAROLO
Description:
The Vajra family has farmed Bricco delle Viole, the highest cru in Comune di Barolo, since the XVII century.
At the young age of fifteen, Aldo Vajra embraced the dream to revive his family legacy. Displaying a vision and commitment belying his young age, he took over the estate in 1968, turning a new page. 
Aldo soon acquired the first organic certification of the region (1971), created private biotype selections (selezioni massali) of Nebbiolo and Dolcetto, pioneered the renaissance of Freisa (a noble yet forgotten local grape, in 1980) and the cultivation of Rhine Riesling in Piemonte (1985). 
High elevation vineyards are a unique factor to the Vajra wines, for their attitude to express finesse and remarkable complexity over power. Attention to details and humility towards the nature, uncompromised efforts and humanity: so are Aldo and Milena, now joined by their children Giuseppe, Francesca and Isidoro, and by an amazing team of young professionals. G.D. Vajra is an independent winery, entirely family-owned.

Name: Poggio Antico - Montalcino
Description:
Poggio Antico is a winery tucked away in one of Montalcino’s most elevated estates. Working with painstaking attention to detail and very low yields, we produce great wines that are truly unique in their elegance and complexity.
We take immense pleasure in sharing the work, love and energy that we pour into each and every one of our bottles. Visitors are always warmly welcomed to tour our vineyards and taste a selection of our wines. 
At an average elevation of 480 metres above sea level, Poggio Antico’s vineyards are among the highest in the Brunello region. The lofty altitude, combined with the close proximity of the Tyrrhenian Sea, ensures that there is always a steady breeze – which has a beneficial effect etheir in dry or rainy seasons. Thanks to this unique and blessed spot, Poggio Antico wines are characterised by their elegance.
The total property comprises 200 hectares, with 33 hectares under vine. Most of these plantings are Sangiovese, the hallmark grape for the Brunello appellation. The vineyards are situated so as to enjoy South/Southwest exposure. All the Poggio Antico vineyards are contained within a single estate, and all of the wine is produced from our own grapes.
The cellar is located at the heart of the property, allowing us to process the grapes quickly and truly produce the best wine that our fantastic site affords.
Low yields, together with hand pruning, harvest and selection, help to guarantee high quality production. A recent conversion to a parcel management system will allow each micro-terroir to truly express its best.
As of 2017, the winery has been managed using organic practices. We are proud to say that we are currently working towards our organic certification.

Name: Distillerie de Lyon
Description: Façonné par une ville à la gastronomie de renommée mondiale, la Distillerie de Lyon incarne cet univers bon vivant, cosmopolite et éternel.

Name: Grup Sumarroca
Description:
Our wine-making roots can be traced back to the hamlet of Llimiana, in Pallars Jussà. That is where multiple generations of the Sumarroca family dedicated their lives to cultivating vineyards and continue doing so to this day in the region of Penedés.

The Molí Coloma country estate in Subirats, and the Heretat Sabarté country estate in Banyeres del Penedès, were purchased.

In 1999, the former residence of the Marquis of Monistrol, the largest country estate in the region of Penedés, was renamed Finca Sumarroca (Sumarroca country estate).

Name: Blue Ridge Spirits & Wine Marketing
Description:
Blue Ridge Spirits & Wine Marketing is a sales and marketing company, representing a diverse portfolio of premium wines and spirits from around the world. Blue Ridge creates brands from scratch and represents partner brands, providing a strong sales force with established distributor and retailer relationships nationwide.

Founded in 2015 and headquartered in Atlanta, GA; CEO, Carlos J. Carreras, VP Sales, Rene Armas spearheaded the company representing 3 spirits brands. Today, Blue Ridge Spirits & Wine Marketing is proud to represent 14 spirits brands, 4 wine brands & 5 liqueurs with 

The company’s spirits portfolio comprises of Big 5 Rum, Florida-made, Cuban inspired rums, Rebecca Creek Distillery, Royal Dutch Distillers, Hooten Young American Whiskey and Brockmans Gin based out of London, UK, to name a few.

Blue Ridge's wine portfolio includes Luna Nuda, Italian wines made by 4th generation winemaking family, the Giovanetts at Castelfeder Winery in Alto Adige, Italy. Chakras Malbec made by Bodega Argento winery in Mendoza, Argentina and Lake & Vine wines from Lake County, CA made by industry veteran, Jed Steele. New to the portfolio as of 2020 is ChocoVine, the original chocolate wine from Royal Dutch Distillers.

The team has over decades of experience combined in the industry and is committed to fostering and promoting quality brand building nationwide. Valued partnerships with suppliers, retailers and distributors is key to achieving our success.

Name: Bodegas Alianza
Description: Somos una empresa comercializadora y distribuidora en vinos y licores, con más de 75 años en el mercado, ofreciendo la mejor variedad de productos en puntos de venta de vanguardia a través de diferentes canales de distribución.

Name: Alagna vini
Description:
The company is a family-run business with more than 60 years of activity in the wine sector. The company is specialized on the trade of wine in bulk and in the production of typical sicilian products.
Our wines have been awarded in many national and international competition for their quality because all our team is committed to create the best possible products of our clients

Name: VICAMPO
Description:
Wir glauben daran, dass Genuss kein Zufall ist. Sondern entsteht, wenn Wissen und Gespür für besondere Momente Hand in Hand gehen - und deshalb jeder Mensch den Wein bei uns findet, der genau seinem Geschmack entspricht.

Wir verbinden tiefe Expertise über Geschmack mit digitaler Technologie, um Menschen und Weine zu verbinden. Als Genusskuratoren schaffen wir Orientierung in einer Welt voller Möglichkeiten - mit Leidenschaft, Präzision und der Freude daran, den Unterschied zu machen.

Unser Anspruch ist es, nicht nur gute Weine auszuwählen, sondern sie erlebbar zu machen. Qualität, Authentizität und das, was wirklich zählt, stehen für uns im Mittelpunkt: ein Wein, der berührt, begeistert und bleibt.

Mit dieser Überzeugung, unserem Know-how und unserer Leidenschaft verbinden wir Menschen und Weine wie kein anderer. Wir sind: Die Weinkönner.


Datenschutzerklärung: https://www.vicampo.de/datenschutzerklaerung

Name: Wein Wolf Gruppe
Description:
Wir – die Wein Wolf Gruppe – stehen für den exklusiven Import und die Distribution internationaler Spitzenweine, Champagner und Spirituosen.

Über unsere Partner in Gastronomie, Fachhandel und Lebensmittelhandel bringen wir außergewöhnliche Genussmomente zu Menschen, die mehr als nur ein Glas Wein suchen.

Unser Portfolio vereint Ikonen und Entdeckungen wie Champagne Taittinger, Ferrari, Antinori, Miguel Torres, Penfolds, Vega Sicilia, Baron de Ley, Dreissigacker, Jacopo Poli und viele weitere.

 Lassen Sie uns gemeinsam Genuss neu definieren – vernetzen Sie sich mit uns und entdecken Sie die Welt der Weine & Spirituosen!

Name: Wijnhuis Rosmalen
Description: Wijnhuis Rosmalen is de specialist op het gebied van wijn, bier en distillaten. Met een team van "vakidioten" willen wij iedereen kennis laten maken met de gastvrijheid en service van Wijnhuis Rosmalen. Onze eindeloze ambitie zorgt ervoor dat we u op alle fronten kunnen helpen. Van wijn spijs combinatie tot bier uit Estland. 6 dagen per week staan we voor u gereed.

Name: Château Carbonnieux
Description:
Le Château Carbonnieux est l'un des plus anciens vignobles de la région de Bordeaux, France. Il produit des vins blancs secs et des vins rouges réputés depuis le 13ème siècle. Aujourd'hui, ce domaine est dirigé par la famille Perrin.
Château Carbonnieux is one of the oldest vineyards in the Bordeaux région, France. It has been producing famous dry white and red wines since the 13th century. Today this estate is run by the Perrin family.

Name: TN COOPERS
Description:
Tonelería Nacional, empresa de fabricación, exportación y distribución de barricas y alternativos para la industria vitivinícola fue creada en 1995 por Alejandro Fantoni, en Santiago de Chile. Hoy en día cuenta con 65 empleados en Chile (Casa Matriz) y está presente en más de 10 países. TN cuenta con filiales en Estados Unidos, Argentina, Sudáfrica e Italia y distribuidores en Francia, España, Portugal, Brasil, Uruguay, Australia y Nueva Zelanda.

En algo más que una década TN ha pasado de ser otro productor más, a incorporar el top 10 mundial de toneleros, entendiendo las necesidades de los viñateros: ser cada día mejores más creativos y más eficientes. Tonelería Nacional está basado en tres valores: innovación, flexibilidad y excelencia que son fundamentales para mantenerse siempre un paso adelante, para ayudar a sus clientes a ser más competitivos.

Nuestro compromiso es desarrollar productos y servicios  para apoyar a los enólogos en la creación de vinos con identidad que puedan sorprender a los consumidores y diferenciarse de sus competidores

Name: Gloria Ferrer Caves & Vineyards
Description:
Gloria Ferrer is the first winery to produce world-class sparkling wine in Carneros and an icon of Sonoma Valley. We embrace the diversity of our area, the beauty of our natural surroundings, and the spirit of approachable elegance, along with our unique blend of Californian, Spanish, and Mexican heritage. The appreciation for life and all of its moments, both big and small, is the essence of the Sonoma lifestyle.

Our Pinot Noir-driven sparkling and still wines are a direct reflection of our two unique estates – nestled at the base of the Sonoma Mountains and Wildcat Peak, respectively – which protect us from the strongest Carneros breezes and supply alluvial soils that nourish our Chardonnay and Pinot Noir vines. Our terroir is exceptional and distinctive – it’s defined by the bay breeze, the soft hillside air, the bright sunshine, and the cooling fog.

The genetic diversity of our vines is the foundation for our unique blends that come together to make our remarkable wines. As we like to say, our careful vineyard practices allow us to capture the essence of our site in every bottle, and our thoughtful winemaking practices ensure that we do.
