Today, Gloria Ferrer is a highly awarded winery with over 500 gold medals and fifty 90+ ratings. We have 335 acres under vine, including the Circle Bar Ranch, a historic property just south of our main estate.

We are committed to human and environmental sustainability, continuously working to improve and update our practices to protect the land for generations to come. Gloria Ferrer has been certified sustainable by the California Sustainable Winegrowers Alliance since 2016.

Name: Château d'Arche, Grand Cru classé en 1855
Description: Château d’Arche was created in 1580 by Henry d’Arche, dean of the city of Bordeaux. At the time, his wines were already some of the most famous Sauternes. During the 1789 Revolution, the Château was taken over by the state and it was another two centuries before the estate was reunified. Château d’Arche joined the Grand Cru Classé classification of 1855.

Name: Companhia Espirituosa
Description:
Our mission is to provide a professional Distribution, Promotion and Marketing services to Brands with great potential in the Spirits industry.

Since the beginning of its operation, Companhia Espirituosa holds the national distribution of Licor Beirão, the number one spirit brand in Portugal, ensuring its complete route to market.

Name: Vietti
Description:
Almost 150 years have passed since its foundation. It was the end of 1800 when Carlo Vietti started the Vietti winery, right in the heart of the Langhe, on the highest point of the medieval village of Castiglione Falletto. In the very same place where it is located today. 

Commitment and vision, culture and passion. These are the keywords that have contributed to the growth of the Vietti winery and brand, universally recognized today among the best Italian wine labels. The path of quality is traced, thanks to the respect for tradition and careful experimentation, where man and earth have always been able to dialogue. 

As the seasons progressed, the company also grew and the focus on improvement soon became a real distinctive style of the winery. Just like the selection and care in the vineyard. Today, Vietti counts, within its heritage, some of the finest and most representative vineyards of the Barolo and Barbaresco areas.

As in the past, Vietti maintains those founding values, the same that animated Carlo Vietti at the beginning, and all his successors then. It looks towards the future with even more promising and stimulating prospects. Each wine is the result of artisanal work and the profound understanding and interpretation of each individual terroir. Vietti is thus the place where the intelligence of the hands, applied in the vineyard and the cellar, meets the vision.

Name: Fincas Patagonicas. Tapiz | Zolo | Wapisa and Club Tapiz Hotel&Restó
Description:
Bodega Tapiz es una de las bodegas tecnológicamente más avanzadas de la Argentina, que combina los mejores viñedos del país con una vasta experiencia en la elaboración de vinos. Los viñedos de la Bodega están ubicados en la región del Valle Uco y Agrelo en la provincia de Mendoza y en Yacochuya, Cafayate en la provincia de Salta. 

La Compañía se centra en la producción de vinos de alta calidad para exportar a los principales mercados en Norte América, Europa y Asia. Recientemente, también ha decidido reforzar su posición en Argentina, posicionándose rápidamente entre los productores líderes del país.

Capacidad en tanques de acero inoxidable: 2.100.000 litros.
Capacidad en barricas de roble: 320.000 litros (30% americanas y 70% francesas)

Tapiz Winery is one of the most technological wineries in Argentina, that combined with the best terroirs in Agrelo and the Uco Valley in Mendoza and in Cafayate, Salta, delivers superb wines to the market. 

The Company focuses on the production of high quality wines for the leading markets in North America, Asia and Europe. Recently, it has also decided to strengthen its market share in Argentina, quickly positioning itself among the leading producers in the country.

Stainless steel tanks capacity: 2.100.000 litres.
Oak barrels capacity: 320.000 litros (30% American; 70% French)

Name: Trajectory Beverage Partners
Description:
We are a "new" company that's actually been in the beverage alcohol industry in Canada since 1988. We're new in that we've transformed significantly in the past year alone - new vision, new mission, new leadership, new ways of doing business and yes - a new name.

We work with a select group of Canadian and international beverage alcohol partners that produce some of the world's most iconic, successful brands - providing energy and focus on building market success through meaningful insights, analytics, and discipline. 

As one of a small number of national, 100% Canadian-owned and operated marketing & sales agencies in the Canadian beverage alcohol industry, we are fully invested in the spirit and principles of partnership, with minimal product/category conflicts to ensure maximum focus, commitment and dedication.

Name: Scout Distribution
Description: An independently owned craft beer and wine distributor focused on building brands and providing excellent customer service. San Diego, Ca.

Name: LAMOTHE-ABIET
Description:
𝗪𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗼𝘃𝗲𝗿 𝟭𝟰𝟬 𝘆𝗲𝗮𝗿𝘀 𝗼𝗳 𝗲𝘅𝗽𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝘄𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗹𝗮𝗯𝗼𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗼𝗿𝗶𝗲𝘀, 𝘄𝗶𝗻𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗲𝘀, 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝘄𝗶𝗻𝗲 𝘁𝗿𝗮𝗱𝗲𝗿𝘀, 𝗟𝗮𝗺𝗼𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗔𝗯𝗶𝗲𝘁 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝘃𝗶𝗱𝗲𝘀 𝗿𝗲𝗹𝗲𝘃𝗮𝗻𝘁 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗶𝗻𝗻𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗼𝗲𝗻𝗼𝗹𝗼𝗴𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝘀𝗼𝗹𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀.

This beautiful heritage provides inspiration to imagine the future with a 𝗻𝗮𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗮𝗹 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝘀𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗻𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝗮𝗽𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗮𝗰𝗵. 

At Lamothe-Abiet, for 5 generations, 𝗺𝗲𝗻 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝘄𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗻, all driven by 𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗵𝗼𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗮𝘀𝗺 and 𝗽𝗮𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻, have been working to bring knowledge to cellars around the world to 𝗲𝗻𝗵𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝘃𝗮𝗹𝘂𝗲 𝗼𝗳 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗶𝗿 𝘄𝗶𝗻𝗲𝘀.  

𝗢𝘂𝗿 𝘃𝗮𝗹𝘂𝗲𝘀: 
Our DNA is to 𝗶𝗻𝗻𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗲 by striving for 𝗲𝘅𝗰𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲 . To achieve this, we encourage dialogue in a climate of 𝘁𝗿𝘂𝘀𝘁 and 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝘅𝗶𝗺𝗶𝘁𝘆, favoring teamwork and 𝗰𝗮𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗴.

We adapt with 𝗿𝗶𝗴𝗼𝗿, 𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗶𝘁𝘆, and 𝗽𝗿𝗮𝗴𝗺𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘀𝗺 to always 𝘀𝗲𝗿𝘃𝗲 𝘆𝗼𝘂 𝗯𝗲𝘁𝘁𝗲𝗿. 

  𝗟𝗮𝗺𝗼𝘁𝗵𝗲-𝗔𝗯𝗶𝗲𝘁, 𝗮𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗵𝗲𝗮𝗿𝘁 𝗼𝗳 𝘆𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝘄𝗶𝗻𝗲.  

Contact us for more information: contact@lamothe-abiet.com | +33 05 57 77 92 92

Name: Wine & Spirits
Description: De specialisatie van Wine & Spirits is exclusieve import, marketing, verkoop en distributie van wijnen, champagne, port, gedistilleerd, geschenkverpakkingen en functionele dranken. Daarnaast heeft Wine & Spirits zich de laatste jaren meer gericht op het ontwikkelen van eigen producten en concepten en het bouwen van merken. Kwaliteit en innovatie staan hierbij centraal.

Name: Bodegas Viñas de Oro
Description:
Somos una empresa peruana que se especializa en la producción de Pisco Premium desde el año 1993, nos ubicamos en la Hacienda Hoja Redonda, en el Km. 213 de la Panamericana Sur en Chincha - Ica. Producimos 11 variedades de pisco con 6 cepas de uva pisquera, además contamos con un Brandy Reserva 100% uva Quebranta. 

Viñas de Oro es una marca de pisco de alta calidad con presencia en EE.UU, Colombia, Chile, Argentina, Inglaterra, Alemania, España, Emiratos Árabes, China, Taiwán, Australia, Nueva Zelanda, entre otros. Pertenecemos al grupo Breca, un conglomerado empresarial que se inició en el Perú y que cuenta con más de cien años de existencia. Sus fundadores don Fortunato Brescia Tassano, de origen italiano, y su esposa doña María Catalina Cafferata constituyeron una familia que tuvo cuatro hijos y destacó por su vocación por el trabajo, el ahorro y el cariño al Perú, que fueron trasmitidos a sus descendientes, haciendo de esto un ejemplo de vida. Es así como los apellidos Brescia y Cafferata dan origen al nombre Breca, que recoge el orgullo y recuerdo de sus fundadores.

A partir de la década de 1950, los hermanos Pedro y Mario Brescia Cafferata tomaron la posta de sus padres y, con el respaldo constante de sus hermanas, continuaron desarrollando los negocios familiares. Actualmente, la conducción de Breca está a cargo de su Directorio, el cual está integrado por sus Co-Presidentes Alex Fort Brescia y Pedro Brescia Moreyra, así como por Rosa y Ana María Brescia Cafferata, y por Fortunato y Mario Brescia Moreyra. La gerencia general está a cargo de Jaime Araoz Medanic.

Name: Citizen Wine
Description:
Tradition, heritage, history… these are not words that particularly inspire us at Citizen Wine. We prefer words like excitement, enjoyment, change.

Citizen Wine was set up in 2020, mid lock-down, by a close-knit group of industry experts (including several Masters of Wine) to breathe some much needed life into an all-too-often rigid and stuffy wine sector.

 With over 100 years of combined experience at the top of the profession Citizen Wine aims to place you, the citizen, at the very forefront of every winemaking decision.  We believe wine should be made with just one purpose in mind; to be enjoyed not revered.

Citizen Wine was set up in 2020, mid lock-down, by a close-knit group of industry experts (including several Masters of Wine) to breathe some much needed life into an all-too-often rigid and stuffy wine sector. 

With over 100 years of combined experience at the top of the profession Citizen Wine aims to place you, the citizen, at the very forefront of every winemaking decision.  We believe wine should be made with just one purpose in mind; to be enjoyed not revered.

Name: Adega de Redondo
Description:
Adega de Redondo is well known in Portugal and worldwide, especially through the brand Porta da Ravessa, a name that has become a true ambassador for the quality and authenticity of Alentejo wines.

But besides this flagship brand, Adega de Redondo produces a diversified set of references, positioned among the market leaders in different price segments. Anta da Serra, AR, Real Lavrador, Maré Viva, Latitude or Longitude, are some of the main ones, having obtained numerous distinctions in national and international contests.

In an average year, the Adega de Redondo produces about twelve million liters of wine, 75% of which is red wine. Modern and well-equipped winemaking and bottling facilities allow the winery to take full advantage of the quality of the grapes received, under the supervision of winemaking director Mariana Cavaca.

The Portuguese market is the destination for the vast majority of the wines produced at Adega de Redondo, but increasing exports is a strategic goal to take our wines to the four corners of the world, currently representing 10% of global sales. France, Brazil, United Kingdom, Canada, Switzerland, Luxembourg, Belgium and the United States are the main foreign markets.

Name: International Wine Challenge
Description: The International Wine Challenge (IWC) is the world’s most rigorous, impartial and influential wine competition, offering an unrivalled benchmark of your wine. Medal winners get huge credibility amongst trade and consumer buyers due to the incredible brand exposure from our global PR campaign.

Name: CWSA
Description:
CWSA - The Ultimate Accolade

With decades of recognition, CWSA serves the world's leading wineries to celebrate excellence.

Judged by Buyers - CWSA gives the opportunity to be awarded by decision makers with total independence in Triple Blnd Tastings.

Competition results and international press coverage are used as the ultimate reliable reference for industry purchasing decisions throughout the year.
CWSA official website: https://cwsa.org/cwsa-2022-results-cwsa/. 

Two Major Competitions Annually:

CWSA Best Value - Held Every Spring
CWSA Best Value celebrates the best wines and spirits across various price points. Products, whether they are at the highest-end or entry-level, are Triple Blind Tasted and awarded to highlight exceptional value. This gives brands of all scales an equal opportunity to gain significant commercial advantage. CWSA Best Value awards are a vital market indicator, renowned for revealing what products offer the best quality for the price.
For more information: https://cwsa.org/enter/

CWSA Annual Autumn Competition
Taking place every Autumn, the CWSA focuses on discovering wines and spirits that have the potential to be major hits. Both boutique and established brands benefit from heightened visibility and recognition, thereby increasing their sales potential.
For more information: https://cwsa.org/enter/

To engage in real-time conversations with the CWSA team, a LiveChat service is available on the official website : https://cwsa.org/.

For more details, please visit CWSA Official Website: https://cwsa.org/

Name: Bickford's Australia
Description:
Bickford’s is one of Australia’s oldest and most treasured brands. Founded over 175 years ago we remain an Australian family owned and managed business, with our head office and operations centre based in Adelaide.

Our proud history of premium cordials and other refreshing beverages began in 1839 in a small apothecary shop. From these humble beginnings, a truly great Australian icon has grown but our original values of integrity and quality remain true to this day.

In our state-of-the-art operations centre a team of experts crafts unique and innovative cordials, juice, waters and syrups. Not only are they custodians of our traditional recipes, they continually work to excite and delight our customers with innovative and delicious beverages.

Every Bickford’s product shows our commitment to excellence. Our products taste incredible, some offer functional health benefits and all contain the full flavour the world has come to expect from our iconic brand.

Bickford’s is one of the few bottling companies in the world to have invested in sterile filtration technologies. This means that many of our products are considered natural in that they are free of preservatives and do not need to be pasteurised.

As a beverage company, a vital ingredient in all our products is water. Naturally, purity is supremely important so we invested in a sophisticated water treatment plant that uses reverse osmosis technology. Before being used in our products all water passes through a series of filters to remove the impurities.

Our final water product is pristine and can be legally labelled as ‘pure water’. The Aqua Pura website has more information about the filtration process.
 
In our high-tech operations facility, we run a flexible 5-line production system able to fill many different bottle and container types at high speed. In conjunction with the 5-line system, we also run a PET packaging and filling plant. It can blow, decorate, fill and pack a range of still and hot PET bottles.

Our advanced technological environment gives us ample capacity to support our valued retail partners, and to meet the demands and deadlines of national and international stockists.

The design of our facility centres on versatility, flexibility and speed in both product type and packaging. Our container capability ranges from 170ml glass to 5-litre HDPE, and our product viscosity ranges from water to iced coffee, cordials and juices.

Name: Robert Mondavi Winery
Description: Robert Mondavi established his namesake winery in 1966 with a vision to create Napa Valley wines that would stand in the company of the world’s finest. He chose To Kalon Vineyard in the heart of Napa Valley as the home for Robert Mondavi Winery. This first-growth vineyard, located in Oakville, California, is renowned for producing some of the finest Cabernet Sauvignon wines in the world, as well as for its Sauvignon Blanc grapes, from which Mr. Mondavi crafted his signature wine, Fumé Blanc.

Name: G3 Spirits
Description:
In more than 20 years of successful entrepreneurship, G3 Spirits developed and nurtured a culture with deeply anchored core values as leading marketers and distributors to focus on distilled spirits. 

Our mission is to join the power of internationally established brands with our local expert knowledge, which generates sustainable value for our customers and consumers. 

The unique combination of distributing, innovative marketing, best trading practices with the highest organizational standards of renowned international brands enables our company to operate successfully in its selected markets but always applying socially responsible practices and standards. 

G3 Spirits Group, as one of the leading representatives and distributors of alcoholic beverages and global brands in the region, is represented with own organizations in five domestic markets – Slovenia, Croatia, Bosnia & Herzegovina, Serbia, and Montenegro – and we collaborate with exclusive partner companies in three export markets – Albania, Macedonia, Kosovo.

With the Group headquarter in Ljubljana and local Management of each company, we ensure an efficient combination of centralized solutions and local flexibility.

Name: Lobenbergs GUTE WEINE
Description:
1992 verschickte ich als ein glühend begeisterter Wein-Autodidakt meine ersten Weinangebote als ein fotokopiertes Basisprogramm. Ich hatte beschlossen, mein großes Hobby und meine Leidenschaft zu meinem Beruf und meiner Berufung zu machen und selbstständiger Weinhändler zu werden. Und ich wollte der qualitativ beste Händler des Landes werden. Dabei folgte ich immer meiner eigenen Vision eines perfekten Weinprogramms, kreiert nur nach meinem Geschmack. Selbst und ständig als Einzelkämpfer im Ladengeschäft und abends zur Post, um die Bestellungen zu versenden.

Seit damals hat sich viel verändert, viele Mitarbeiter unterstützen mich heute in meiner Leidenschaft und Vision. Lobenbergs GUTE WEINE ist immer noch ein relativ kleiner Nischenhändler der qualitativen Oberklasse, aber mittlerweile der größte, noch vom ursprünglichen Inhaber geführte Weinhandel Deutschlands. Und, wie ich hoffe, inzwischen auch der qualitativ Beste. Alle zwei Jahre  veröffentliche ich meinen - inzwischen auf über 1000 Seiten  angewachsenen - Katalog. Die „Weinbibel“. Darin präsentiere ich Teile der über 750 Weingüter und über 4500 Weine. Über meinen neuen Onlineshop und dem dazugehörigen Magazin biete ich meinen Kunden ein bequemes und vor allem auch informatives Einkaufserlebnis, angereichert mit unzähligen Wein- und Weingutstexten, Reiseberichten und Erzählungen. In meinem Blog kommen auch viele befreundete Journalisten zu Wort und vor allem auch meine Winzer, sozusagen live aus dem Weinberg und Keller.

Und immer noch ist der Antrieb meine eigene Begeisterung für die Weine dieser Welt. Kein Wein kommt unprobiert und ohne meine Zustimmung ins Programm. Trotz der Größe, alles handverlesen. Kein Wein ohne „vibrations“. Oder um es mit dem berühmten Weinjournalisten Jens Priewe zu sagen: „Bei Lobenberg steht das L für Leidenschaft!“

Lobenbergs im Web:

Shop: https://www.gute-weine.de/
Magazin: https://www.gute-weine.de/magazin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/LobenbergsGuteWeine/

Name: Wine Business Club
Description:
Fondé en 1991 à Paris par Alain Marty, le Wine & Business Club constitue le premier réseau européen réunissant des chefs d’entreprise et professions libérales amateurs de vins, autour d’une triple thématique : « Economie, gastronomie et vins ».

Fort de son succès à Paris, le Club développe son concept en France et en Europe depuis 2007.

Les membres du Wine & Business Club sont aujourd’hui répartis en 13 clubs dans 12 villes : 3 clubs à Paris (Hôtel Le Bristol, Shangri-La Hotel et Cercle de l’Union Interalliée), Bordeaux, Lille, Lyon, Marseille, Montpellier, Nantes, Reims, Toulouse, Genève, Luxembourg et Monte-Carlo.

Ce Club privé se réunit chaque mois et propose l’intervention d’une personnalité de l’économie (Christine Lagarde, Jean-Marie Messier, Baudoin Prot, Matthieu Pigasse, Jacques Attali, Jean-François Cirelli, Patricia Barbizet, Michel-Edouard Leclerc, Jean-Claude Trichet, Charles Beigbeder, Henri de Castries, Xavier Fontanet, Louis Gallois, Bruno Lafont, Gilles Pélisson, Pierre-André de Chalendar, Patrick Pouyanné, Pierre Gattaz…), suivie d’un dîner – dégustation de grands crus.

Les dîners, réalisés par des chefs prestigieux, se déroulent en présence de vignerons et d’experts en vins de renom.

Name: Frog's Leap Winery
Description:
Frog’s Leap was founded by John Williams in 1981. Started on a shoestring budget even the name itself was ‘borrowed’ by combining Stag’s Leap, where John started his Napa Valley winemaking career, and the Frog Farm, where the early vintages were made.

The winery was relocated in 1994 when John and his family moved Frog’s Leap to the historic Red Barn in the heart of the Rutherford appellation. This grand and welcoming building was built in 1884 as the Adamson Winery and sits amongst some of our 200 acres of estate grown vineyards. 

Over the past 40 years Frog’s Leap has earned an enviable reputation with our unique combination of a whimsical label, sincere dedication to sustainable principles and our small, handcrafted production of wines. Over the years to come, we look forward growing and learning more about ourselves, our wines and how we can share it all with honesty and genuine hospitality.

Name: Viva Wine Group
Description: Fast growing entrepreneurial entity in the beverage industry. The leading wine group in the Nordics, with a strong position in the European e-commerce market for wine. Pioneer in organic and ethically sourced wine. Climate efficient transports and packaging.

Name: Hope Family Wines
Description: The Hope family has been farming in Paso Robles for more than 30 years. When they arrived in this barely-discovered region, they planted apples and grapes. Little did they know that the rolling, oak-studded terrain of Paso Robles would one day become a viticultural terroir of significance and one of the top winegrowing regions for quality red wine within the Central Coast of California.

Name: Ovinia
Description:
More than an online merchant, we are a platform where passion, expertise and exacting selection meet.

 Discover our offers :
- 𝗖𝗶𝗿𝗰𝘂𝗶𝘁 𝗰𝗼𝘂𝗿𝘁: Direct access to winemakers, with no unnecessary middlemen. We select authentic estates and cuvées that tell a story, for a privileged link between producer and connoisseur.
- 𝗩𝗶𝗻𝗼𝘁𝗵𝗲̀𝗾𝘂𝗲: Rare vintages, iconic bottles and grands crus preserved in optimal conditions. A selection designed for collectors and enthusiasts in search of the exceptional.
- 𝗠𝗮𝗿𝗸𝗲𝘁𝗽𝗹𝗮𝗰𝗲: An innovative digital space to buy from a selection of over 50,000 references. Certainly the world's largest wine marketplace.
- 𝗖𝗹𝘂𝗯: privileged access to allocations from estates selected by Ovinia for their quality, love of terroir and expertise.

𝗢𝘃𝗶𝗻𝗶𝗮 Commitment
 0.5% of our sales are donated each year to associations working for social and environmental causes in the wine world.
 Rigorous selection from trusted producers.
 Customized customer service, attentive to the needs of wine lovers.

Name: Wine-Port
Description:
WinePort - Representamos Champanhe, Vinhos e destilados no Mundo.
30 anos de percurso no sector fabril têxtil por António Deville, dão a confiança necessária aos parceiros para apostarem em soluções conjuntas.
17 anos de experiência de Cláudio Pedras, como Formador, Consultor e Gestor de Projetos dão segurança e certeza a todos os parceiros. Licenciado em Informática de Gestão, Universidade do Algarve e Profissional de ensino, Universidade Aberta. 
Certificado em SAP B1 e Primavera BSS. 
Prémio da Cultura CM Albufeira – “Projeto Cidades do Futuro” e Prémio “Rockie Office of the Year” – VI Convenção Esinow - Lagoa.

Name: Darioush
Description:
Influenced by tradition and energized by modern technique, Darioush is recognized for creating wines of distinction, complexity, and refinement from its estate vineyards in southern Napa Valley.  Robert Parker’s Wine Advocate describes the 2016 Signature Cabernet Sauvignon as ‘a total rock star,’ while asserting Darius II ‘sparks both hedonistic and cerebral appreciation’ – bestowing both vintages with 96+ and 99 points, respectively. Visit Darioush.com to browse these limited offerings and other discovery-worthy finds.

Planning a visit to the Napa Valley?  Join Darioush for a unique wine experience rooted in world-class hospitality.

Name: MezcalTrascendente
Description:
There is a very special bird in our mystical Mexico, known for delivering good wishes from a place to another, from the earth and from the afterlife: it is the hummingbird, which also, pollinates our magueys in Oaxaca.
Hummingbirds are considered Gods’ messengers: with our Mezcal and our hummingbird we send you our best wishes for a life full of spiritual connections, wisdom and health, a Transcendent life.
Find us on: 
Facebook: Mezcal Trascendente
Instagram: @MezcalTrascendente
email: Piercarlo@mezcaltrascendente.com or pbianciardi95@gmail.com

Name: Wine & Spirits
Description: De specialisatie van Wine & Spirits is exclusieve import, marketing, verkoop en distributie van wijnen, champagne, port, gedistilleerd, geschenkverpakkingen en functionele dranken. Daarnaast heeft Wine & Spirits zich de laatste jaren meer gericht op het ontwikkelen van eigen producten en concepten en het bouwen van merken. Kwaliteit en innovatie staan hierbij centraal.

Name: Miller Family Wine Company
Description:
With regional roots dating back over 100 years, the Miller Family has been key to the agricultural and viticultural development of California’s Central Coast.

MIller Family Wine Company includes the management of French Camp Vineyard in Paso Robles, acclaimed national wine brands including J. Wilkes, Ballard Lane, Barrel Burner, and Smashberry, Control Label brands with prominent retailers across the U.S., and the leading regional winery facilities in Santa Maria and Paso Robles.

Name: Sundial Cocktails
Description:
Sundial Cocktails are made with premium rum and natural flavors. Each cocktail is carefully crafted with unique flavors all set to a tropical vibe and experience. 

Our Cocktails:

Island Rum Punch: The Island Rum Punch is the perfect party beverage. A fun, fruity cocktail with hints of citrus and coconut in every sip.

Tropical Mai Tai: The Tropical Mai Tai embraces a Caribbean vibe with hints of pineapple and coconut.

Sunset Mojito: The Sunset Mojito captures both the textures and taste of a classic Mojito with a twist. A slight hint of chocolate makes this the perfect sunset cocktail.

Spiced Rum & Ginger: The ultimate nautical cocktail is made with a blend of spiced and white rum. This delicate balance gives this beverage its refreshing taste and distinct golden color.

In-Stores/Restaurants:
Central Massachusetts
South East Florida
Connecticut
New York City
New Hampshire

Name: Bodega Mauricio Lorca - Autor de Vinos
Description:
Bodega Mauricio Lorca Autor de Vinos es la prueba de que siempre se puede ir más allá de un objetivo, innovando, soñando, conociendo, manteniéndose en constante movimiento. Es el resultado de una misma pasión, el vino, y la  
certeza de que el mejor maridaje se logra cuando lo compartimos con quienes queremos y disfrutamos de la vida.

La filosofía de Mauricio Lorca se basa en asegurar una gestión moderna del viñedo. Busca embotellar exactamente lo que la naturaleza nos brinda. 

En nuestros vinos encontrarás el fiel reflejo de nuestro terruño.

La bodega está ubicada en Perdriel, Luján de Cuyo. Desde 2008, Mauricio y su dedicado equipo de profesionales producen vinos premium para las etiquetas Foster y Lorca.

Name: Black Short India
Description:
Since 2017, We started our journey with two beer brands Black Short, HAGSHIP, and SCOTSMAN. Earlier we used to export and tried to land with Indian states as well. so here, We are to brief you on something about us.

 

 Since here with, We are a young company with entrepreneurial spirit and determination. We are a Aspiring global leader in beverage alcohol with an outstanding collection of brands across spirits and beer.

In addition to selecting great Whisky, we also put forward the importance of quality human interaction. Our work building relationships between distributors, retailers, restaurants, and consumers is just as important as building a portfolio of great Whisky.

 

We are a company with determination and will to serve our consumers like no other. If there’s one thing that we prioritize as much as developing excellent brands of alcoholic beverages, it is the need to build quality human interaction in the form of long-term relationships that we have with our consumers, retailers, restaurants, and distributors.

 

We pride ourselves on our extensive range of alcoholic beverages offered by our brands including Whisky, Vodka, Beer, and Rum. We have developed a superior understanding of our production process, achieving efficiency while still maintaining the utmost quality. Years of work that we put into the distillation process has given us an edge at producing our alcohol with a taste that is unique to Black Short. We have made sure to source the raw materials from only the best places for our beverages so whenever you pick up a bottle coming from Black Short, you know you’re having the best.

Name: Clos des Quarterons - Domaine Amirault
Description: Located in Saint-Nicolas-de Bourgueil in the Loire Valley - FRANCE, Clos des Quarterons is a 92-acre vineyard that is farmed according to the precepts of biodynamic viticulture.  The domaine has been in the Amirault family for six generations and is currently managed by Xavier Amirault and his wife, Agnès.  The estate is 100% certified organic by Ecocert and certified biodynamic by Demeter.  The biodynamic methods focus on both the environment and the terroir:  soil, place, climate, varietal and the methods of farming.  The goal is to achieve a natural balance across the 53 plots of mostly Cabernet Franc and Chenin Blanc planted at the estate.  Our main focus is to offer unique and living wines, vintage after vintage.
Location: Saint Nicolas de Bourgueil, Centre - Val de Loire

Name: Lehmann Reims • France
Description:
• Verres à dégustation et accessoires pour le service des vins & spiritueux • 

Grâce à des designers passionnés, des maîtres verriers talentueux et des techniques de fabrication novatrices, la Maison Lehmann façonne chaque jour des verres à dégustation et des outils de service uniques.

Mariage entre élégance & œnologie, les courbes contemporaines des verres de la marque célèbrent l’excellence des vins du monde et s’inscrivent dans les codes de l’art de vivre à la Française.

• Des Collections Signature •
Depuis plusieurs années, Lehmann imagine et conçoit des collections Signature avec les plus grands professionnels du monde de la gastronomie, des vins & spiritueux.

• Des verres à dégustation « Ultralight » •
Après deux années de recherche et développement la marque dévoile en 2021 sa nouvelle technologie «Ultralight» alliant finesse d’exception et légèreté optimale. 
Cette innovation s’applique aux collections soufflées bouche et soufflées machine, techniques de fabrication artisanales et industrielles de la société.

• Professionnels : une solution pour chacun de vos projets •
Marque Française de verres à dégustation, gamme complète d'accessoires, décoration, création sur-mesure & solution de sourcing : la Maison Lehmann dispose d'un service à 360° afin de conseiller et de répondre aux exigences de ses clients professionnels.

Name: Vinattieri Ticino SA
Description:
Vinattieri è stata fondata nel 1985 da Luigi Zanini nel comune di Ligornetto, una regione tradizionalmente legata alla coltivazione della vite e alla produzione di vino. Insieme al figlio Luigi Jr. e utilizzando le tecnologie più avanzate, Luigi Zanini ha sempre puntato a produrre il miglior vino possibile, prendendo a modello e come punto di riferimento i grandi vini Merlot dei migliori châteaux di Bordeaux. La famiglia Zanini ha sempre portato avanti l’azienda con la massima cura, un solido know-how e tanta passione fino al 2020, e da gennaio 2021 ha consegnatole redini dell’azienda nelle mani fidate di Michele Conceprio.

Ligornetto, a sud delle Alpi, beneficia di un clima mediterraneo che favorisce la viticoltura. Il vitigno di Merlot che cresce su un terreno calcareo si esprime alla perfezione nei vini della Vinattieri. La filosofia dell’azienda è sempre stata quella di coltivare le proprie uve, che oggi crescono su una superficie di 100 ettari. Le principali varietà coltivate sono il Merlot e il Cabernet Sauvignon tra le uve rosse, mentre la base delle uve bianche è costituita da Chardonnay, Sauvignon Blanc e Semillon. Grazie ad un lavoro mirato nel vitigno, alla vendemmia manuale, a una cura estrema nella vinificazione e all’utilizzo di barrique, la Vinattieri ha raccolto grande esperienza nel corso degli anni, creandosi un nome nell’ambito della produzione di vini di prima qualità. I vini, ovvero Vinattieri Bianco, Roncaia e Ligornetto, incarnano la linea seguita dalla cantina e dal 1985 sono la testimonianza inconfondibile di un’azienda in continua evoluzione. Vinattieri Rosso, il portabandiera dell’azienda, non teme certo il confronto con i migliori vini a taglio bordolese del mondo.
Contact : info@vinattieri.ch

Name: Loire Propriétés
Description:
Implantée dans le Val de Loire depuis 1872, Loire Propriétés produit et commercialise une grande diversité de vins de Loire. Reconnue pour la qualité de ses vins souvent médaillés et pour sa capacité à innover, Loire Propriétés est un acteur incontournable dans le vignoble.
L’ensemble de la filière est maitrisé de la vigne au verre dans le respect des hommes et de l’environnement.
Riche  d’un  savoir-faire  connu  et reconnu depuis 1872, Loire Propriétés  est  un  groupement  de  sociétés  qui  s’articule  autour  de  4 caves coopératives, d’une distillerie, et  d’une  société  de  négoce. Plus largement, la société fait partie du groupe des Coopératives de Thouarcé fédérées autour de l’Union Agricole du Pays de la Loire* spécialisée dans l’agrofourniture et la production de graines (330 millions de CA pour 450 salariés).

Name: Eight Pm
Description:
In business or personal life we often come across some intersting characters. They offer there expereinces and tell there stories. There is a few untold stories that we believe often come out while sharing a drink or two over a quiet time. In our experience that quiet time is at eight pm. Long after the hustle of days work and family commitments. Its a time when you can truly relax and enjoy something diffrent with a friend or on your own, for some quiet contemplation. 

We often receieve some great business tips or that helping hand which is not given in expectation of money. This is where we can help you give that gesture back. Choose from our extensive range or make it simple by gifting one of our Gift Vouchers and let them choose.

Name: Maison Gilliard
Description:
Eleveur de grands vins depuis 1885, la Maison Gilliard symbolise la tradition familiale et la fidèle expression du terroir valaisan. 

A eux deux, le Fendant "Les Murettes" et la "Dôle des Monts" illustrent la renommée du nom de Gilliard. Au cours d'un siècle d'histoire, le domaine s'est agrandi et les appellations se sont diversifiées. Elles se comptent aujourd'hui en une large gamme de vins blancs, rosés et rouges, qui tous expriment le génie de terroirs privilégiés et de cépages racés. Encavés, élevés et mis en bouteilles dans les caves familiales, les vins Gilliard reflètent l'âme du Valais, terre de feu, roc et contrastes.

Name: Club W
Description:
Winc's story began in 2012 when we founded Club W: the world's first personalized wine club. We made the process of discovering and buying wine easier than ever — and as we expanded to other facets of the experience, we became so much more than a club.

Winc is reimagining every aspect of wine, from the art and science of winemaking to packaging and transport to how wine is sold, distributed, and ultimately enjoyed. We're doing all this as part of our quest to improve the experience for consumers, create a platform for artisanal winemaking, and build a grape-to-glass supply chain that's sustainable for the planet.

We are driven by the desire to make great wines with passion and pride, and to bring transparency, honesty, innovation, and curiosity to an industry dominated by opaque, entrenched conglomerates. Our team is an extremely driven and creative group of people with a dedication to sharing our passion and constantly challenging everything around us.

Name: Pere Ventura Family Wine Estates
Description:
PERE VENTURA FAMILY WINE ESTATES is a family business founded by the wine grower and businessman Pere Ventura in 1991, currently exporting its Estate wines and high-end Cavas to over 50 countries.

Leading the mid and premium segment of Cava globally, Barcelona-based PERE VENTURA FAMILY WINE ESTATES is a collection of three wineries specialised in high-quality estate wines: PERE VENTURA (DO Cava), CAN BAS Domini Vinícola (DO Penedès) and MERUM PRIORATI (DOQ Priorat).

Name: Blisswater Industries Pvt. Ltd
Description:
Blisswater Industries Pvt Ltd

First ever Indian sensibilities Alcobev

Blisswater aims to bring to you innovative and unique blends in Alcobev focused on traditional sensibilities and drawing inspiration from our age old civilization. We make products that are an expression of India's artistry and diversity. 

Blisswater's flagship product Rahasya Vodka is crafted from the finest Indian flavours to capture the essence of India in a bottle as we see it. Inspired by the mysticism and heritage that is India

Name: Altos Planos Collective
Description: Mijenta is an artisanal small batch tequila from the highlands of Jalisco, offering a unique super premium proposition. The spirit was created by a passionate collective who believes in doing well by doing right, and is crafted by Mexico based Maestra Tequilera Ana Maria Romero. Inspired by legends, Mijenta celebrates the best of the land, culture and people of Mexico, exclusively using fully mature, certified Blue Weber Agave from the highlands of Jalisco, a region renowned for its rich red soils and microclimate. Mijenta launched in September with its first expression, Blanco, followed by Reposado in December 2020. Mijenta is available online at shopmijenta.com and reservebar.com and at fine retailers in selected states.

Name: Bodegas Lozano
Description:
[ES]
En 1853 la familia Lozano planta sus primeros viñedos en Villarrobledo. Desde entonces, han sido cuatro generaciones las que han abanderado un sólido y continuo camino de aprendizaje.

Contamos con dos bodegas; una en Villarrobledo y otra en Rioja Alavesa, donde los viñedos se emplazan en un paisaje montañoso que acoge actividades de enoturismo llevadas a cabo por la bodega. 

Respaldados por un gran equipo compuesto por más de 100 personas, producimos vinos de calidad que han llegado a más de 50 países, manteniendo siempre la tradición y los orígenes de la familia.

Cualquier duda no dudes en consultarnos o visitarnos.       

Te esperamos! 

[EN]
In 1853 the Lozano family planted their first vineyards in Villarrobledo. Since then, four generations have been heading up a solid and continuous path of learning.

We have two wineries; one in Villarrobledo and the other in Rioja Alavesa, where the vineyards are located in a mountainous landscape that hosts wine tourism activities carried out by the winery.

Supported by a great team made up of more than 100 people, we produce quality wines that have reached over 50 countries, always keeping the tradition and origins of the family.

Any question, do not hesitate to consult us or visit us.      

We are waiting for you!

Name: Craggy Range Vineyards Ltd
Description:
Established in 1998, Craggy Range is a family-owned winery situated in the shadow of the spectacular Te Mata Peak in the premium wine-growing area of Hawke's Bay, New Zealand. With an unrelenting focus on quality, Craggy Range produces a collection of iconic wines from their exceptional estates in Hawke's Bay, Martinborough, and Marlborough. 

When Craggy Range owners Terry and Mary Peabody first set out to start a winery with world class aspirations, their search quickly brought them to New Zealand.

Looking down from Te Mata Peak onto the land where Craggy Range now stands, they were clear that they wanted to create a winery and an experience which truly evoked the unique landscapes and heritage of the region.

To ensure a firm commitment, Terry Peabody honoured the original promise of leaving a legacy for the family still to come and established a 1000 year trust, meaning the winery can never be sold. What has followed in the last 20 or so years has been the development of an iconic New Zealand winery which has never lost sight of its sense of place, or its family ties.

Name: Sipello Aperitif
Description:
The aperitif where ingredients and their terroir matter. 

Sipello marries a gooseberry-led blend of local fruits & ingredients with sustainably sourced botanicals from around the world. Hand picked, wild harvested & served in the world’s finest cocktail bars.

Sipello has been enjoyed in the prestigious Claridges hotel, The Savoy, Tayer+Elementary, Michelin starred restaurants and Schofield's.

Beautiful neat, refreshing as a long drink and a delightful, natural twist to many classic & contemporary cocktails.

Name: Representaciones Continental S.A.S.
Description: Desde 1977 Representaciones Continental comercializa marcas líderes, es el aliado confiable en la construcción y comercialización de marcas en el mercado de productos de consumo masivo colombiano.

Name: Champagne R FAIVRE
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page du Champagne R. Faivre qui a pour objectif de vous partager ma passion et mon quotidien riche et intense en tant que vigneron manipulant. 
Je suis David Faivre, vigneron de champagne situé à Belval-sous-Châtillon, dans la vallée de la Marne.
Vous pourrez suivre avec moi toutes les étapes et les métiers de la vigne : la culture, la conduite et la mécanique des tracteurs, la vinification, la rencontre avec le client, ou encore tout le travail en cave. 
Depuis quelques années nous avons pour objectif d’élaborer des vins de terroir 100% Belval-sous-Châtillon empreints d’une véritable identité en cohérence avec nos convictions et pratiques environnementales. Nous sommes en pleine reconversion vers une exploitation 100% Viticulture Biologique.  
A bientôt ! 
David Faivre
Retrouvez-nous également sur notre site web ci-dessous :
www.champagne-faivre.com

Name: Union Wine Company
Description:
Union Wine Company is proudly based in Oregon with a commitment to crafting wines of exceptional quality at extraordinary prices from the fruit grown in the wine regions of the Northwest. Not willing to sacrifice taste or value, we challenge our team to balance tradition with the latest technology to deliver wines that people will enjoy having at their table and sharing with friends and family.

Union Wine Company is a growth oriented, family centered business that operates on a set of values that reflect the values of our close-knit team: work hard, be kind, laugh often, be responsible, act with honesty and integrity, don’t take yourself too seriously, and treat others with respect. We strive to create and sustain a work environment that compels our employees to embrace the passion and commitment that we have for the products that we make, and the manner in which those products are delivered to our customers. In return, our promise is to work every day to make Union a place that respects and promotes the balance between work and life, where initiative is expected, tolerance and respect of our individual differences is demanded, and hard work yields rewards.

Name: Puerta del Lobo Mx
Description:
Tourism Development, where viticulture and enology are promoted. 
We have a space of 180 hectares where a tourist development is currently being built, dedicated to the vine, wine, gastronomy, nature and entertainment. We have wine lines recognized worldwide for winning awards such as the Concours Mondial Bruxelles in 2019, Bacchus Spain, among others.

Name: Wine of Moldova
Description:
Oficiul Național al Viei și Vinului (ONVV) este o instituție publică organizată în baza parteneriatului public-privat, creat în 2013 prin Hotărârea Guvernului Republicii Moldova.
În scurta perioadă de la crearea sa, ONVV a reușit să devină expertul nr. 1 în sectorul vitivinicol, care contribuie la reglementarea și dezvoltarea domeniului, servind drept platformă pentru acțiunea comună a tuturor celor implicați în creșterea competitivității
produselor vinicole, valorificarea autenticității și orientarea spre consumator.
Printre obiectivele principale ale ONVV se numără elaborarea și implementarea politicilor de stat în sectorul vitivinicol, promovarea vinurilor moldovenești prin programul național și brandul național vinicol „Vinul Moldovei. O legendă vie” pe piața internă și piețele internaționale, administrarea producției de vinuri cu IGP și DOP, precum și acordarea de asistență și consultanță industriei vinului din Moldova.

Name: Woodman Wines and Spirits
Description: Woodman Wines & Spirits is one of Canada's most diversified and successful midsized private beverage companies focused on the alcohol beverage sector. Founded in 1990, WW&S grew organically from a one-man (and one-dog) wine importing business to a highly respected distributor of fine wine and premium spirits. In addition, the Agency proudly distributes many leading International wine and spirits brands, providing seamless services from producer to consumer across Canada through their trusted Agency network.

Name: Alcobrands
Description:
We love building & distributing brands in the drinks industry, combining the best of the big with the best of the small. Our approach is personal & our team multi-talented, deeply connected & invested. Once you’re in, you’re in all the way. 

At Alcobrands, you’re in good company.

Name: MONTALBERA
Description: Montalbera tra Monferrato e Langhe. Di proprietà della Famiglia Morando, è una tenuta che si estende tra i comuni di Castagnole Monferrato, Montemagno e Castiglione Tinella, centodieci ettari coltivati a Ruchè, Barbera, Grignolino, Viognier, Nebbiolo, Moscato d’Asti, Chardonnay e Merlot. Da generazioni la famiglia Morando crede e investe nella viticultura piemontese. Da anni si dedica con passione alla valorizzazione prettamente dell’autoctono Ruchè, del Grignolino d’Asti con vinificazioni sperimentali ed innovative come il “progetto Anfora” e della Barbera d’Asti che interpreta con alte punte qualitative grazie alla propria barricaia costituita da più di 400 unità.  Rigore e progettualità, interpretazione e terroir, sono queste le basi della filosofia produttiva di Montalbera, uno sforzo teso alla maggiore espressività di ogni profilo varietale, nel rispetto del territorio senza dimenticare di immaginarne l’evoluzione nel tempo.

Name: Ferimp
Description:
Somos un Grupo líder en la importación y distribución de vinos finos, destilados y productos gourmet en México"

Grupo Ferimp está formado por más de 7 empresas que hacen posible llevar las mejores etiquetas de vinos y destilados del mundo a todos los mexicanos:

Ferrer y Asociados: Importadora y distribuidora de Vinos, constituida en 1994. Hoy en día representa más de 50 Bodegas de 7 países del mundo y tiene en su portafolio más de 350 etiquetas diferentes. www.ferrer.com.mx  

Importaciones Interamericana: Importadora y Distribuidora de Vinos, destilados y Mezcales, constituida en 2001. En la actualidad representa a 40 Bodegas de 7 países del mundo y tiene en su portafolio más de 250 etiquetas diferentes y las marcas de Remy Countreau. www.interamericana.mx 

En total, son más de 90 marcas/bodegas  y más de 800 referencias de diferentes países como Francia, España, Portugal, Italia, EE.UU, Chile, Argentina, México y Australia. 

Algunas marcas de prestigio de nuestro portafolio: Louis Roederer, Taittinger, Remy-Cointreau, Louis Jadot, Famille Perrin, Hugel, CVNE, Undurraga, Viña Montes, Rutini, Penfolds, Agua evian, etc.

De manera adicional, el grupo a través de la empresa Rustic Pan produce panadería artesanal sin la utilización de conservadores ni aditivos de ningún tipo y con Ingredientes Verdes comercializa y distribuye quesos y productos orgánicos.

Name: Teichenné, S.A.
Description:
TEICHENNÉ, S.A. is a family-owned company with over six decades of experience in the production of spirits. It was founded in 1956 by the grandfather of the current manager, Marc Teichenné.

With a catalog of over 100 products, our commitment to quality and innovation drives us to conquer new markets, with a presence in over 50 countries.

Our mission is to delight our customers with spirits of the highest quality, offering an authentic and memorable experience with every sip. Welcome to the Teichenné family!

Name: WINE ADORE
Description:
Wine Adore was founded in 2020, and we quickly cultivated a culture of creative innovation, determination, and unwavering resolve, resulting in significant growth.

Join us on our journey as Wine Adore becomes a global icon and a household name.

Warm regards,

Luiz Pinheiro & Gustavo Pinheiro
Co-founders

Name: The Single Cask
Description:
The Single Cask has a passion for unique spirits. Our mission is to provide the purest form of spirit available, straight from an individual cask. We also aim to educate everyone we meet in what this means and why the national drink of Scotland is known as ‘the water of life’.

We specialise in sourcing the best whiskies in the world and ensuring they get all the way to the glass in their purest form: without filtration, colouring or blending. This means that each of the whiskies you find in our bottles is exactly as we found it in the cask.

It also means we can help you at whichever stage of a whisky’s journey you are most interested in, be it discovering the perfect bottle for a friend or a wholesale option for your business, securing an entire cask from Scotland, or finding a newly filled cask to call your own as an investment for the future.
Location: Unit 11, Buko Industrial Estate, Glenrothes, Fife, KY6 2SE, Scotland

Name: Manzanos Enterprises
Description:
Manzanos Enterprises, es la empresa matriz de la familia Fernández de Manzanos. Inició su actividad con la elaboración de vino a partir de sus viñedos en 1890. Desde entonces y gracias al paso de varias generaciones de la familia Manzanos, ha ido creciendo y en la actualidad son varias las empresas que la familia posee y regenta. Ya es la 5ª generación de empresarios de la familia Manzanos y esta, más si cabe, ha apostado por la expansión internacional y la diversificación como estrategia para seguir creciendo.

Las empresas de Manzanos cuentan con un equipo humano de 166 personas, caracterizado, como su dirección, por su juventud, formación internacional y pasión por su trabajo. Estos son los ingredientes de la receta del éxito y la consiguiente expansión de las empresas Manzanos.
Manzanos Enterprises aúna las siguientes empresas:
Bodegas Manzanos
MIneraqua
Manzanos Mobility 
DBoat Spain & US
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Manzanos Enterprises is the first business that Manzanos family set up in 1890. They started elaborating wine from their own vineyards. Ever since and because of the several generations of the family running the business, the company has grown and now they own and run some more businesses. This is the 5th generation in charge of the business and this one has specifically focused on international growth and diversification to continue growing.
Manzanos enterprises have the support of talented human resources that, as well as the management team, is characterized by their youth, their international education and the passion they work with. These are the ingredients of the receipt for success and the subsequent growth of Manzanos enterprises.
The following are different companies, part of Manzanos Enterprises:
Bodegas Manzanos
Mineraqua
Manzanos Mobility
DBoat Spain & US

Name: DISTILLERIE DES MOISANS
Description:
DISTILLERIE DES MOISANS is a family owned cognac house based out of 9 IMP DES CHAIS, Sireuil, Nouvelleaquitaine, France.
The company was founded by Roland Bru in the 60's and now it belongs to Véronique Legaret, the creator's daughter.

Name: Global Brands Panamá
Description:
Fundada en 1996 y de propiedad familiar, somos una de las principales empresas de distribución de bebidas en Panamá y la región. Nos hemos caracterizado por desarrollar marcas de prestigio mundial, una excelente administración corporativa y una completa dedicación a satisfacer y exceder las expectativas de nuestros clientes.

En Panamá, operamos a través de cuatro centros de distribución ubicados en Ciudad de Panamá, Divisa y David. Contamos con una extensa cobertura de clientes que alcanza a más de 5 mil puntos de venta en todo el territorio nacional. Atendiendo todo tipo de clientes, desde mayoristas, cadenas de supermercados, mini-supers y tiendas de conveniencia, hasta hoteles, restaurantes, bares, discotecas y eventos.

Nuestras oficinas principales están ubicadas en Vía Brasil, además contamos con operaciones en la Zona Libre de Colón, Nicaragua y Uruguay.

Name: Distillerie de la Seine
Description: Créateur de spiritueux artisanaux, inspirés par le terroir qui longe la Seine, de sa source à l’embouchure.

Name: Champagne Lanson UK
Description: Founded in 1760, Maison Lanson is one of the oldest Champagne Houses. We are proud to have maintained our family traditions and independent organisation, and to have remained faithful to the values that have guided us for 260 years.

Name: FAMILLE RAVOIRE
Description:
FAMILLE RAVOIRE est une entreprise familiale indépendante spécialisée dans les vins de la Vallée du Rhône et de la Provence. Héritière d’un savoir-faire séculaire, notre entreprise exporte aujourd’hui dans près de 50 pays.

RAVOIRE & FILS is an independent family-owned company specialised in wines from the Rhône Valley and Provence regions of France. Heir to secular savoir-faire, today our establishment exports to approximately 50 countries.

Name: AZUL Y ROJO IMPORT - EXPORT, SL
Description:
Azul y Rojo Import-Export, is a trading company founded in 1999 specializing in the international trade and commercialization of spirits and wines. Our efforts are supported by a highly experienced and professional staff dedicated exclusively to the global spirits and wine sector.

Our company has an important portfolio of more than 100 clients primarily located throughout Europe , the USA & Latin America, in addition to other markets.

Name: Wine News GR
Description:
Online magazine for the wine and the vineyard. Find out more informations: www.WineNews.gr
The magazine is available free in digital version. It is a leading trade publication serving the Greek Wine Industry. It has designed specifically for today's serious wine business professional. WineNews.GR is a valuable tool for keeping up with the new trends in wine marketing, finance, production technology and vineyards.

Name: Bouchard Finlayson
Description: Exceptional cool-climate wines crafted with care in the Hemel-en-Aarde Valley, South Africa. We invite you to step inside the evolution of Bouchard Finlayson at our Pop Up in Hermanus. Join us as we redefine a South African icon for the world stage.

Name: Weingut Weber
Description: Wein-Lifestyle im Breisgau am Rande des Schwarzwaldes. WE  TO ENTERWINE YOU

Name: Madison Auction
Description:
Since 2018, we’ve proudly hosted 48 live and online auctions tailored to the Asia-Pacific region, connecting key markets such as Mainland China, Hong Kong (China), Macau (China), Taiwan (China), Seoul, Singapore, Bangkok, Kuala Lumpur, and more. Over six years, we’ve achieved HKD 650M+ in total sales, with an average sold-through rate of 90% and over 15,000 lots sold—including fine wines, rare spirits, cigars, luxury handbags, and artworks. Our hammer prices consistently exceed industry standards by 10–30%. 

We offer professional and accessible services: engaging a diverse audience from premium collectors to emerging enthusiasts, providing expert valuation and transparent market appraisals, and executing proven marketing strategies to maximize sales. Our seamless auction platform synchronizes live and online bidding, supported by comprehensive logistics including insured, climate-controlled storage in Hong Kong (China). With personalized multilingual customer support across diverse channels, we deliver efficient, tailored service at every step.

Name: Brasserie La Vertueuse
Description: Brasserie artisanale en agriculture biologique située dans le Parc régional du Perche en Normandie.

Name: Palacio de Villachica
Description: Las Bodegas de Palacio de Villachica se fundan bajo la premisa de buscar la mejor tierra, para producir un vino gourmet exclusivo de alta gama a nivel internacional. Es por esto que nuestros productos cuentan con denominación de origen en Toro, Ribera y la Rioja. Zonas óptimas para la cosecha de la uva, en las que trabajamos garantizando el equilibrio con la tierra y la preservación del entorno; apostando por una producción sostenible, ecológica y libre de químicos. Porque creemos que la excelencia se logra cuidando cada detalle.

Name: spiritsBULGARIA - producers, importers, traders of spirits drinks
Description:
spiritsBULGARIA proudly represents the spirits producers and importers industry in Bulgaria. 
Founded in 2005, we are an independent voluntary self-governing organization.

Our mission is to encourage the development of an environment where producers and distributors can meet the expectations of individual customers and society at large, while competing effectively for sustained growth.

spiritsBULGARIA credo: Be the model for responsible and sustainable growth.

www.spirits.bg | www.konsumirai-otgovorno.bg 

What we do:
•	Protect the interests and ethics of the environment for the producers, importers and traders of spirits drinks in Bulgaria
•	Present and promote our members and products on market and around the world in the best way
•	Develop a national policy for the spirits sector in Bulgaria 
•	Work against excessive, dependent and illegal alcohol use
•	Lead social responsibility programs with government and non-government stakeholders
•	Support our members with information, consultations and resources, and assist a variety of programs in financing spirits producers in Bulgaria

spiritsBULGARIA is a member of spiritsEUROPE, Branch Council for "Food Industry" at  Economy Ministry, National Council for Food and Beverages at Ministry of Agriculture, Food and Forestry, National Council for Self-regulation, Union for Private Economic Enterprise.

Name: Rootstock Vinhos
Description: Rootstock Vinhos is a company that specializes in exclusive wines from Macedonia, Slovenia, Austria, Georgia, and 16 other countries. The company is dedicated to providing good wine for good people, ensuring that all products are for those of legal drinking age and are consumed responsibly. Rootstock Vinhos offers a variety of wines, including the Don Guerino Reserva Tannat, which features high-intensity ruby red coloration and aromas of cherry, plum, vanilla, black olives, and coffee.

Name: Rogue Vintner
Description:
Wine has become more than a drink; it’s a cultural phenomenon with its own language, its own rules and traditions evolved over centuries. But while traditions are to be respected, sometimes you have to give them a shake to take a step forward and push the boundaries. 
 
Enter the Rogue Vintner. The Rogue Vintner plays by his own rules. A non-conformist by nature, he brings a sense of the playful and mischievous to the art of making wine. Unrestricted by traditional norms, wines are described in plain language rather than industry buzzwords. There are no board meetings, no ties to regions, no restrictions, no limits; the only rules are flavour, balance and intrigue. 
 
There’s a bit of rogue in all of us. Come and find yours today

Name: VINISSIMO Weinhandelsgesellschaft mbH
Description:
Vinissimo steht für den professionellen Vertrieb hochwertiger italienischer Weine in Deutschland.

Seit über 40 Jahren vertreten wir ausgewählte Weingüter aus ganz Italien – persönlich, zuverlässig und mit tiefem Verständnis für den Fachhandel, die Gastronomie und Eventformate. Unsere Kunden profitieren von einem leistungsstarken Vertriebsnetz, individueller Beratung und direktem Zugang zu aktuell 16 renommierten Weingütern.

Ob Direktbezug ab Weingut oder Lieferung aus unserem Speditionslager – wir bringen authentischen Weingenuss auf kürzestem Weg dorthin, wo Qualität zählt.

Vinissimo – Ihr Partner für italienische Spitzenweine. Persönlich. Fachnah.

Name: Broken Spoke Cider Co.
Description: Premium hard cider proudly crafted on the prairies of Alberta.

Name: Domaine du Haut Montlong
Description:
La marque HM met un point d’honneur sur le travail et les relations humaines. Le domaine du Haut Montlong se compose d’une équipe jeune et dynamique. Le quotidien des vignerons est transmis en image et vidéo, sur les réseaux sociaux. Rejoignez notre communauté, nous sommes + de 3500 abonnés 

Vin biologique 

Depuis plusieurs années le domaine utilise des méthodes de cultures raisonnées. Des cuvées totalement Bio sont en ventes depuis 2020.

DE NOUVEAUX CHALLENGES

Laurence et Philippe se lance un nouveau pari, pour le Côtes de Bergerac rouge du Domaine, la récolte se fera entièrement à la main ! C’est une première pour le domaine viticole. Vous pourrez savourer cette cuvée 100% traditionnelle et haut-de-gamme prochainement.
Pour les impatients, rendez vous sur le site www.haut-montlong.com pour découvrir notre gamme complète.

Name: Rola Wines
Description:
A Filosofia deste projeto passa por criar vinhos "que realmente tenham uma origem", nascidos em vinhas específicas, com pouca ou nenhuma intervenção. Vinhos verdadeiros e honestos... mas sempre com a elegância como pano de fundo! 

Associada à sua melhor amiga, Helga Rodrigues, arquiteta e duriense e a José Serpa Pimentel, partiram em busca de vinhas únicas com o objetivo final de criar vinhos com personalidade própria. Vinhos de grande qualidade e com personalidades distintas. O produto da dedicação aplicada em todos os métodos e procedimentos.

O principal objetivo da empresa é explorar ao máximo - em benefício da originalidade e complexidade dos seus vinhos -, a combinação das diferentes castas tradicionais do Douro, provenientes de parcelas separadas e os diferentes estilos que resultam da variedade geológica dos seus solos.  

A Quinta de Remostias, propriedade de Ana Rola - situada no vale de Remostias, entre a Régua e Santa Marta de Penaguião -, funciona como o "Verdadeiro Atelier" para as suas criações em que a uma pequena e moderna adega chegam uvas brancas e tintas da propriedade, a que se juntam outras, provenientes de vinhedos escolhidos nas melhores zonas do Douro.

São vinhos de autor, criados em pequenos lotes, com imagem e requinte, em perfeita sintonia com a qualidade de cada Vinho pensado para um consumidor moderno e esclarecido, que aprecia a qualidade do produto e a sua imagem, disponível para a compra de um vinho de qualidade.

Name: 9diDANTE
Description: Sinful Vermouth inspired on Dante's La Divina Commedia

Name: PININO Srl Soc.Agr.
Description:
Four friends united by a passion for winemaking

Founded in 1874, the PININO winery produces Brunello and Rosso di Montaclino from Sangiovese grapes in Montosolis hills, north of the historic center of Montalcino.

The families Hernandez & Gamon combine tradition and innovation since 2003 to produce PININO’s elegant wines - created for the joy of indulging.

PININO's brand reflects the winery's renaissance: The historical emblem harmonizes with the fresh branding as does the contemporary elegance of the new wines with the long history of its terroir.

PININO produces Brunello di Montalcino DOCG and Rosso di Montalcino DOC from Sangiovese grapes sourced exclusively from our vineyards situated in two locations in Montalcino. 
The cultivation, vinification, and aging all follow the strict guidelines of the "Consorzio del Brunello". Moreover, Brunello di Montalcino DOCG Riserva wines are produced in exceptional vintages.

Name: Champagne Philizot & Fils Afrique
Description:
Philizot et Fils est une marque de Champagne dont les propriétaires français se nomment Stéphane et Virginie PHILIZOT. Ce sont deux (02) artisans dotés d’une grande expertise. Le Champagne Philizot et Fils est issu d’un un savoir-faire authentique qui remonte à quatre (04) générations. C’est un Champagne qui a traversé le temps et l’espace. 
En Afrique il est exclusivement importé et distribué par la société NEWKO SARL basée à Abidjan ( Côte d’Ivoire) 
Il est de qualité supérieure, et est fait du «brassage» de plusieurs qualités de vin, d’une sélection enveloppante de raisins de différentes régions viticoles de la Région Champenoise de Reuil ( France ) : (Vallée de la Marne, Côte des Blancs, Montagne de Reims et Aube). 

Les valeurs du Champagne Philizot et Fils sont au nombre de quatre (04). Ce sont : PRESTIGE, DYNAMISME, OUVERTURE ET TRADITION . 

Il est disponible en Afrique en trois (03) sélections : 
- Le Brut 
- Le Démi sec 
- Et le Rosé 
Et en bouteille de 75 cl et 37.5 cl uniquement pour le brut. 

Médaillé d’or du concours « Effervescents du monde version 2010 », c’est un champagne de prestige que vous avez l'occasion de découvrir sur cette page. 

Facebook.com/champagnephilizotafrique?ref=hl
Twitter : @PhilizotEtFils

Name: Dois Carvalhos
Description: Pequeno Produtor de vinho Reserva tinto, este vinho está presente na restauração e pequenas garrafeira, não se encontra à venda em grandes superfícies.

Name: Venha Vinho Wine House
Description:
Venha Vinho Wine Tours  WineTourism Portugal.

                                                                            Venha Vinho is your House of Wine.
                                   Ensuring you go to the right wine hotels, restaurants and wine bars in Portugal. 
                                                            We take you to the best rated Portuguese wine estates. 
                                                             Prepare dream Portuguese wine tastings and courses.
                                                                     Get you the best wine deals to take home.

Name: Wine Investments
Description: Fondée en 2013, wine-Investments s’est développé pour devenir un acteur majeur du marché dans l’investissement de vins pour les clients privés, avec des bureaux à Paris, Londres, Genève, Hong Kong et à Singapour.

Name: Víno Nichta
Description:
Sme rodinné vinárstvo sídliace v Čajkove. Naša obec je známym vinohradnícko-vinárskym centrom regiónu Tekov. Od nášho založenia v roku 1997 sme postupnými krokmi rozširovali svoju produkciu. Naše vína pochádzajú výhradne z našich vlastných vinohradov, ktoré pestujeme na ploche 30 hektárov. 

Kvalita pre nás znamená všetko, a preto sme radi, že naše vína sú úspešné na súťažiach doma aj v zahraničí. Dúfame, že výsledky našej práce oslovia aj vás.

Name: Querido Tequila
Description:
A Tequila with a contemporary twist.

We wanted to create a tequila brand that would combine the essence of their heritage and Adventure. Our Tequila needed to be cutting-edge, elegant, modern, environmentally friendly, and sustainable. 

Querido Tequila is made from the finest 100% Blue Weber Agave in three expressions, mango, tamarind, and spicy watermelon.

Name: Top Italian Wine
Description:
Franciacorta, Vino Passito, Vin Santo: organizzato in negozi monotematici, Top Italian Wine è un originale portale di eCommerce  in grado di offrire una profondità di offerta di una stessa tipologia di prodotto inimmaginabile altrove. 

Ideato da  Stefano Grancini, Top Italian Wine intende diventare il punto di riferimento per quanti, intenditori o semplici appassionati, vogliano conoscere e degustare prodotti di alta qualità, ma di non facile reperibilità, realizzati principalmente da piccoli e medi produttori italiani. 

Su Top Italian Wine sono di qualità anche i contenuti, grazie all’aiuto di docenti universitari che spiegano come il vino protagonista di ognuno dei negozi viene prodotto e alle schede produttore e di degustazione appositamente realizzate da giornalisti specializzati. 

Correlati ai negozi monotematici, sono il blog (https://magazine.topitalianwine.net/) e la newsletter, dove  è possibile attingere più informazioni e curiosità sui territori, sui produttori e sulle etichette che mano a mano verranno proposte su Top Italian Wine. Ad arricchire ulteriormente l’offerta “social”, ci sono Facebook  e LinkedIn, un modo per essere sempre in contatto con noi, commentare i nostri post, effettuare richieste e accedere ad alcuni vantaggi.

Name: Heritage Wine & Liquor
Description:
Heritage Wine & Liquor, A Colorado Classic
Family Owned & Operated Since 1974

As you walk around our 14,000 square foot store, you will discover a vast selection of wines, spirits and beers – from local distillers and breweries, across the country and around the world. Shop in store or online for delivery or pickup!

We know that our customers have many choices of where to shop, including retail chains from out of state. 

Now is a great opportunity to say THANK YOU from our family to yours, for your patronage. When you shop at local, family-owned businesses you keep your dollars in Colorado and also help provide jobs for members of our community. 

So thank you for your loyalty. We promise we’ll keep doing our part to provide the best prices, service and selection in the area and keep Heritage Wine & Liquor as your favorite spot to “Find Your Bottle Inside!”

~The Heritage Wine & Liquor Family

Name: Bourke & Travers
Description:
Bourke & Travers began in 1996 when David Travers purchased 44 hectares of land in the north western Clare Valley, between Sevenhill and Armagh, and began planting it to Rhone-style varietals. He planted 4 hectares of Shiraz in 1998, 0.7 hectares of Mourvèdre in 2016 and 1 hectare of bushvine Grenache in 2021. He is passionate about farming and continues to grow fruit for other wine companies. Our shiraz has been in Penfolds St Henri, Penfolds 389, Leasingham Classic Clare and Kilikanoon Oracle. Our philosophy is quite simple – grow the best possible fruit in the vineyard and don't over complicate it in the winery.

Our approach (which is minimalist and sustainable) means not using herbicides, pesticides or insecticides in our vineyards. We use what is called integrated pest management (or IPM) where good bugs are encouraged to eat bad bugs. We occasionally use organic fungicides, but only when required.

We took this minimalist philosophy into the winery when we began making wine in 2010. This means hand picking, whole bunch, foot stomping, gentle de-stemming, natural yeast, small open top fermenters, hand plunging and basket pressing are among the tools and techniques we deploy.

Name: Cake Wines
Description: We’re Cake Wines, a relatively new winery, created by a couple of young wine makers and young wine lovers who share a collective love for the world and culture of wine. Started literally out of the back of a truck by Mike Smith and Glen Cassidy, together with wine making friends Sarah and Tim Burvill, and now a growing list of exciting young wine makers, we set out on a journey to do something different, to see how far we could push things, to see what we could discover. We make wines predominantly from the Adelaide Hills but don't believe in a "one size fits all" viticultural approach. We love wine. We love making wine, drinking wine, talking wine…but to us, creating a winery like Cake is about more than just…the wine. We want to support and celebrate all the awesome things that wine is a part of, stuff that makes the world a more interesting place. We get involved in a heap of things around the country - head to cakewines.com to see what we've been up to lately.

Name: Bien Boire en Beaujolais
Description:
Bien Boire en Beaujolais, c'est le salon professionnel des Vins du Beaujolais qui a lieu tous les ans.
