Description: One of Iowa's largest wineries. Tassel Ridge Winery located in Leighton, Iowa, was founded in 2006, and currently offers a large variety of award-winning wines, from sweet to dry, red to white. Follow us on Twitter! www.twitter.com/tasselridge  Follow us on Pinterest at http://www.pinterest.com/tasselridgewine/. Follow us on Facebook at http://www.facebook.com/tasselridgewinery

Name: Premium Spirits Brands
Description: Company owns the Staritsky&Levitsky brand. Our product is a unique premium vodka Reserve Vodka, which is produced and bottled in the picturesque region of Western Ukraine. Sales are carried out on the local Ukrainian market, and sales and export channels have been established to some European countries.

Name: Distillerie Grand Dérangement
Description:
Suivant ses convictions profondes et stimulée par ses idées surprenantes, la distillerie Grand Dérangement se veut un mouvement rassembleur qui s'anime autour d'expériences gustatives, culturelles et festives.

Première microdistillerie de Lanaudière, l'entreprise de taille humaine crée et produit des spiritueux de qualité supérieure à partir d'ingrédients exceptionnels.

Name: Wine In Time
Description: Verkauf von exklusiven Raritäten  Beste Weine & Champagner  Der moderne Weingenuss  Schnell & einfach: In 30 Minuten bei dir! Wir liefern in ganz Wien bis zu deiner Haustür von 18 – 22 Uhr. Umweltfreundlich mit dem Fahrrad.

Name: Dalla Terra Wine Bar
Description:
An unreformed Italian wine & cocktail bar. Found in a beautiful, hidden oasis in the heart of Covent Garden. No traffic or annoying street-performers and their crass crowds. We have serviced covered outside tables in a traffic free, quiet and tranquil square, just like you find in Italy and can’t find at home.
 
We can always accommodate parties of up to 50 and can arrange wine tastings and food pairing menus upon request.

Name: Simply Vino
Description:
Heeft u zin in een (h)eerlijk glas wijn of wilt u iemand verwennen met een leuk cadeau, dan bent u bij Simply Vino op het geschikte adres. 
Bij Simply Vino vind je een ruim assortiment aan kwaliteitswijnen en bubbels die zorgvuldig geselecteerd worden door onze huis sommelier. Bestel éénmalig of maandelijks via één van onze abonnementen.

Name: Cooperative Winery of Nemea
Description:
The Cooperative Winery of Nemea was founded in 11/05/1937 and originally had 70 members. 

In 1959, in collaboration with the Greek Wine Institute, the Cooperative Winery made the first experimental bottling of Agiorgitiko. After 76 years of operation and located in the new facilities, the Cooperative Winery has more than 1,000 members - growers of the native red grape variety "Agiorgitiko" – and it has the potential to vinificate up to 10,000 tons of grapes, which makes it one of the largest producers nationwide.

Its primary objective is to preserve and spread the tradition of Agiorgitiko, which forms an integral part of the cultural heritage of the town. At the facilities, situated on 33 acres of land with a building area of 8500 m2, there are indoor stainless steel tanks (Inox) of a total capacity of 10,000 tons. With 3 production lines, the annual bottling capacity is of 6,500,000 bottles of 0,75 L and 3.000.000 L in Bag-in-Box. For the aging of the wine there is an underground, air-conditioned wine cellar with 427 French oak barrels.

The Cooperative Winery exports the famous and awarded wine Nemea (V.Q.P.R.D.) to more than 23 countries, where the most usual packaging is the glass bottle of 187mL, 375mL, 750mL and 2000 mL. Also available is the commercial packaging Bag-in- Box in 3 L, 5 L, 10 L, 20 L and heavy duty PET bottle for the local Instant Consumption Channel and the Small Take Home outlets. With more than 40 (SKU's) product codes in the Greek Market it has presence in all the large Organized Trade chains and has Retail Partners for nationwide distribution covering the HO.RE.CA. channel.

It is also the largest seller of bulk wine to other wine industries in Greece and abroad that bottle the Agiorgitiko variety.

Name: VIDA Wine & Spirits GmbH
Description:
VIDA Wine & Spirits Österreich ist ein österreichisches Unternehmen in der Wein & Spirituosen Branche mit einem Online Shop sowie einem physischen Shop in der Gumpendorferstraße 6, 1060 Wien. Unsere Leidenschaft gehört den österreichischen, mittel- und osteuropäischen Weinen. Mit zwei weiteren Standorten in Großbritannien und Bulgarien. 

VIDA Wine & Spirits Austria is an Austrian company in the wine & spirits industry with an online store as well as a physical store at Gumpendorferstraße 6, 1060 Vienna. Our passion belongs to Austrian, Central and Eastern European wines. With two additional locations in the UK and Bulgaria.

Name: The Vineyards at Dodon
Description:
Established in 2007, our vineyards are fortuitously situated on rolling hills just south of Davidsonville, Maryland. When we began our first experiments with 150 vines, the goal was clear: to practice sustainable agriculture and produce exceptional wines. As ninth generation custodians of this historic farmland, and as demanding winemakers, we are committed to using viticultural practices and winemaking techniques that permit full expression of the unique deep sandy loam ‘Dodon Series Soils’ that lend our wines distinctive aromatics and subtle minerality.

Using only grapes grown on our farm, our vineyard and winemaking techniques emphasize individual attention to each cluster and protecting the quality of the fruit. We believe that our deep soils and abundance of Southern Maryland sun are the keys to producing rich, balanced, aromatic wines. In other words, it is the unique qualities of the site that determine the product (“vins de terroir”), not a winemaker with a strong stylistic vision (“vins d’effort”). The result is a combination of old world and new world style that is particular to this area of Southern Maryland.

We invite you to share our vision and develop a relationship with the farm, with our vineyard, and with our wines.

Name: Hemisphere Brands Ltd.
Description:
Hemisphere Brands Ltd. is exclusively & globally responsible for the production, sales, marketing and distribution of the only cream liqueur made in Scotland.  Magnum Scotch Malt Whisky Cream Liqueur, crafted and bottled in Edinburgh, now exports to three continents.

Provenance & packaging is what makes Magnum premium.  Speyside single malt scotch whisky & cream presented in a unique stainless steel, quick-chill 100% recyclable & reusable flask.

Founders/Directors;

Steve Horne.  Steve is a senior international sales manager.  He has extensive, practical experience of selling and developing global brands, in key leadership roles, in both mature and emerging markets.  Based in the Middle East, the Far East and Africa for 15 years, he held market management positions and ran strategic business units for BAT and Imperial Tobacco in diverse markets such as Saudi Arabia, South Africa, Angola & Myanmar. 

Lee Schofield.  Formerly a senior sales manager over 15 years with Imperial Tobacco, her role at Hemisphere is to form, set and direct the business, market entry & investment strategy at the global level.  Now based in the Company's core market Canada, she creates national, regional and territory specific infrastructure, appoints and manages resources & investment in support of the Company’s commercial ambitions.

Name: Vice Versa Wines
Description: Vice Versa Wines is a high end Cabernet Sauvignon winery based in Saint Helena, Napa Valley, California.

Name: Chrysalis Vineyards
Description: Working to restore our region’s agricultural heritage through responsible land stewardship at The Ag District, and celebrating the crafting of world-class wines from Norton, Virginia’s native gem, along with European varietals that thrive in our Virginia sun.

Name: Compagnie des Courtiers jurés-experts piqueurs de vins de Paris
Description:
Le premier acte officiel fondateur de notre Compagnie reste l’ordonnance de Charles IV le Bel du 12 mars 1322.

A l'époque, la région parisienne est l’héritière d’une grande tradition viticole, puisque qu’elle a été le premier bassin viticole de France pendant des siècles et sa surface en vignes a atteint 42 000 hectares au 18ème siècle.

La Compagnie des Courtiers Jurés Experts Piqueurs de Vins de Paris est elle même la mémoire de cette tradition de production et de commercialisation du vin.

Aujourd'hui reconnue d'utilité publique, la Compagnie est composée de professionnels bénévoles et indépendants. Par leurs actions au sein de la Compagnie, ils s'efforcent de faire perdurer cette longue tradition de femmes et d'hommes au service du vin "loyal et marchand".

Les principales activités de la Compagnie sont notamment :
- La publication annuelle de la Carte officielle des millésimes
- L'organisation régulière des Lauréades, concours de dégustation reconnu par  l'OIV
- La réalisation d'expertises, d'inventaires et la participation et l'organisation de dégustations pour le compte des tribunaux de commerce, des administrations, des comités interprofessionnels, des commissions d’agrément, des concours nationaux…..

Name: Boeger Winery
Description:
Specialties

This picturesque and quaint winery sits on an enchanting gold rush era homestead and is the oldest commercial winery in the county. Founded in 1972, Boeger has built a reputation on innovative and unusual varietals and blends with a special emphasis on Barbera. Awarded the Wine Lifetime Achievement Award in 2018 from the CA Sate Fair, Boeger continues to pioneer innovative wines and provides a community hub and gathering place for locals and visitors alike. If you are looking for the best in wine and ambiance please join us in our intimate tasting room and enjoy our charming, historic grounds and gardens.

History

Established in 1972.

The Boeger Winery estate was homesteaded during the gold rush. Greg and Sue Boeger bought the property in 1972, decades after the last winery in the county was shut down due to Prohibition. Boeger was the first modern day (post-Prohibition) winery in the El Dorado AVA. Greg Boeger experimented with underdog varietals such as Barbera, Carignane, Refosco, Charbono, and Aglianico, just to name a few of the over thirty varietals that the winery produces. Barbera emerged as the winery's golden child early on and has garnered hundreds of awards over it's lifetime under the Boeger label. As the founder of the El Dorado commercial wine industry, promoter of unique varietals and life-long advocate for farm life and agricultural rights, Greg Boeger was awarded the Wine Lifetime Achievement Award in 2018 by the California State Fair. Joining the ranks of other California greats such as Robert Mondavi, Jerry Lohr, Bob Gallo and University of California, Davis.

Name: Sake Social
Description:
Sake Social is the largest online retailer of premium Japanese sake in the United States (US). 

Sake Social only sells sake, shochu, and curated gifts through our online store at www.sakesocial.com. We are the top ranked website/search destination for most of the search terms consumers use in searching for sake including: buy sake, buy sake online, japanese sake, heating sake, etc. We also do extensive digital advertising and brand building to help drive additional customer awareness.

Our current website is optimized for mobile (40% of our total traffic is mobile) and includes: 

- A sophisticated sake selector app that helps consumers pick their perfect sake
- A sake learning section that takes readers through the past/present/future of sake
- Pre-selected sake pairing collections
- Hand-picked sake starter kits to help get customers acclimated
- In-depth product descriptions/customer reviews/and sophisticated tagging and similar product suggestions
- A sake of the month club where we ship 2 bottles per month to customers
- A blog about sake
- A newsletter and promotion/coupon engine
- We also have large Facebook groups/Twitter/Instagram followings to help drive the social elements of sake

Name: Dr Wine Selection
Description:
English Below

Née d’une amitié et d’une passion commune entre les associés fondateurs Jean-Philippe Girard et Antoine Prudent, la société Dr Wine Selection a pour activité principale la sélection et l’allocation de grands vins de vignerons pour une clientèle de particuliers passionnés. Implantée au cœur de la Bourgogne, à Dijon, les fondateurs et l’équipe ont noué et entretiennent des relations de confiance avec les vignerons les plus renommés de Bourgogne. Cette coopération installée, l’équipe a étendu ses relations dans d’autres régions viticoles françaises toujours à la recherche de talent et de passion ! Aujourd’hui Dr Wine Selection  travaille avec plus de 150 producteurs à travers la Bourgogne, la Vallée du Rhône, la Champagne, le Bordelais, la Loire, l’Alsace ou encore le Sud de le France.


Born from a friendship and a common passion for wines between the founders Jean-Philippe Girard and Antoine Prudent, Dr Wine Selection has for main activity the selection and allocation of fine wines for passionate individuals. Based at the heart of Burgundy, in Dijon, they developed and maintained trustful relationships with the finest winemakers of the region. Once these partnerships were well established, they extended their relationships in other French wine regions, always looking for talented and passionate people. Today, Dr Wine Selection works with more than 150 producers in Burgundy, Rhone Valley, Champagne, Bordeaux, Loire Valley, Alsace, and South of France.

Name: Ehrmanns Wine
Description: Ehrmanns Wine is a wine and spirits company based out of 6/18 Northampton Street, London, United Kingdom.

Name: Domaine Lévéjean
Description:
Vignerons de père en fils depuis 1947.
Le domaine Lévéjean est situé dans le Sud de la France, à 10km de Béziers, sur l'ancien lit de l'Orb à Thézan-lès-Béziers. Le domaine familial s'appuie sur un terroir de graves et de semi-coteaux argilo-calcaire réchauffés par le soleil méditerranéen. Depuis trois générations la famille Prades est guidée par sa passion pour le travail de la terre et du vin. 
Entre tradition et modernité, le Domaine Lévéjean est ancré dans l'histoire mais a le regard résolument tourné vers le futur. Les méthodes de production innovantes et vertueuses ainsi que l'architecture moderne du caveau témoignent de cet esprit novateur. 
Les vins de cépages d'Indication Géographique Protégée Pays d'Oc, sont caractérisés par leur élégance et leur fraîcheur. 

Tous nos vins sont certifiés HVE (Haute Valeur Environnementale), certification qui répond au travaux du Grenelle de l'environnement. Il s'agit d'une démarche volontaire basée sur les principes de l'agro-écologie. 

Nous sommes Vignerons Indépendants. La présence de ce label atteste que le vigneron cultive sa vigne et qu'il élève et commercialise lui-même son vin. Il assume totalement la qualité de son travail, l'exécute avec soin et compétence.

Name: Chateau Carsin
Description:
Chateau Carsin is a family winery & farm in Rions, 30km south from Bordeaux. The vines, fruits and veggies are all certified organic and we produce our wines in a very authentic way. We also produce barrel aged balsamic vinegar, non-alcoholic sparkling grape juice and jams from our own fruit. The winemaker is Nea Berglund. 

We also organise plenty of events at Carsin, we do private parties and weddings too and we have a cozy Carsin Cottage on premises that can sleep nicely 6 people. 

The visits of the winery need to be reserved in advance - don't hesitate to contact us at bonjour(a)carsin.com.

Name: vina valdivieso s a
Description: Grupo Valdivieso is a winery that produces and sells wine and spirits.

Name: Ti'Bio-Les Arrangés
Description:
Partez dans une évasion gustative avec des rhums arrangés qui ont du sens. Certifié Bio. Fabrication artisanale.
Création de rhums arrangés 100% bio et la valorisation de la filière commerce équitable!

Name: Trerè Azienda Vitivinicola e Agriturismo
Description: Nasce sulle colline di Faenza come Azienda agricola con Valeriano Trerè nel 1960 e diventa Agriturismo nel 1996. Dalla volontà di promuovere sempre di più il "territorio", abbiamo deciso (Morena Trerè 2° e Massimiliano Fabbri 3° generazione) di dedicarci non solo al vino, ma anche alla cucina e alle tradizioni per offrire ai nostri ospiti un'esperienza a trecentosessantagradi sulla nostra fantastica Regione. L' accoglienza in camere e appartamenti immersi fra vigneti di Albana e Sangiovese completeranno il vostro percorso - Vino, Cucina, Camere - . Trascorrere una vacanza alternativa all'insegna della cultura Enogastromica in una regione, l' Emiliaromagna, ricca di tradizioni , miti, prodotti tipici, arte, cultura e sopratutto carica di quello spirito romagnolo che dell' ospitalià ne fa la sua radice più profonda.

Name: ''Valentino Platinum'' Ltd
Description: Established in 2012, Valentino Platinum specializes in producing and launching our own premium brands - "Fabio Gartino" Collezione wine, "Fabio Gartino" Sparkling collection, Aqua "Valentino Platinum" range, RTD "VXL" cocktails , and "Valentino Deluxe" vodka - while offering expert import-export, distribution, and wholesale services for beers, wines, sparkling, and spirits. With a focus on inspired quality, traceability, and innovation, we partner with wholesalers and importers across EU/UK for under-bond solutions. Contact us for exclusive lines and competitive partnerships.

Name: Château Gaudrelle
Description: Château Gaudrelle est un domaine viticole situé dans le berceau de l'AOC Vouvray. En conversion bio depuis 2017. Nos vignes, plantées sur les plus belles parcelles vouvrillonnes nous permettent d'élaborer des vins blancs fines bulles et tranquilles.

Name: One Life Spirits
Description: One Life Spirits is a federal alcohol importer and was founded by a group of guys from the Midwest in 2017 in St. Louis, MO. We only import brands we have developed from the ground up. Through our current relationships in both Mexico and the US we have made Una Vida Tequila a household brand in our current markets of Missouri, Kansas, Oklahoma and Texas. We are now pleased to offer our customers our newest agave product El Trago 1873 Blanco and Extra Añejo.

Name: Winemakers of Rutherglen
Description:
The Winemakers of Rutherglen are an inspiring collective of 19 wineries from one of Australia’s most historic and iconic wine regions – Rutherglen.

Situated in “God’s Country”, protected by the Great Dividing Range, Rutherglen is blessed with cool nights, warm days and gloriously long, dry autumns. In essence, the ideal viticultural conditions for pioneering varietals that are uniquely Australian in charm and in spirit.

With Durif and Muscat at its heart – representing both innovation and tradition – Rutherglen is a region unlike any other. More than 160 years of winemaking heritage combined with a range of familiar and distinctive varietals, will see you discover Rutherglen wines as versatile, brave and joyful.

Name: Padstow Distilling
Description: Grain-to-Glass Distillery, Bar

Name: Himbrimi Gin
Description:
Himbrimi Gin is a handcrafted gin, made from pure Icelandic water, juniper berries, wild angelica flowers, and arctic thyme.

Himbrimi Old Tom Gin is based on early 18th-century gin recipes and won "World's Best Gin" at the World Gin Awards 2019 in the category of compound gins. 

Our London Dry Gin, Himbrimi Winterbird, is distilled in a bespoke still that uses the heat of Icelandic geothermal water to heat up the still. 5% of the revenue of each bottle sold is donated for nature conservation in Iceland.

Name: BON Import BV
Description:
BON IMPORT BV is importeur en groothandel op het gebied van wijn en overige dranken. Wij zijn een jonge, dynamische en snel groeiende groothandel met lef. Onze stijl is professioneel maar ongedwongen, vriendelijk en behulpzaam. Hierdoor creëren wij een zeer prettige samenwerking met onze klanten.
Ons assortiment aan wijn, gedestilleerde dranken en speciale bieren en frisdranken worden met passie op uw wensen afgestemd. De wijnen die wij importeren komen o.a. uit Spanje, Hongarije, Duitsland, Portugal en natuurlijk Frankrijk.

Bekend van TV
In 2016 kwam BON IMPORT groots in het nieuws met de Pasion Blue van het Spaanse wijnhuis Santa Margarita. De kranten stonden er vol mee, landelijke televisie en radio kon niet om ons heen. Meer dan 200.000 flessen Pasion vlogen er in deze zomer over de toonbank.

De zomer van 2018 begint meteen goed. In het opvallende programma Ollolai van RTL4 waar koppels voor maar 1 euro een huis kunnen kopen maakt 1 van de stellen een likeur genaamd Limonello Twist. Dit koppel kiest voor een samenwerking met BON IMPORT.

Name: Domaine Merieau
Description:
l’origine du Domaine c’est une femme, Georgina, qui se retrouve veuve après la seconde guerre mondiale et débute seule la production de vin, sa fille Paulette se marie avec Jean, et prendront soin ensemble de développer économiquement le domaine viticole.

C’est ensuite, leur fils Jacky qui permet au domaine de lui donner une belle renommée grâce à la qualité de ses vins et de son amour pour la terre, il a aussi contribué aux constitutions du domaine tel qu’il est actuellement avec son lot de plantations et de restructuration du vignoble.

Jean François a repris le domaine familial en 2000 après avoir étudié à Bordeaux et travaillé en Afrique du sud.

Depuis son installation il s’attache à redécouvrir les terroirs du Loir et cher, travaillant les sols au labour, taillant sévère et vendangeant à la main.

L’exploitation s’étend aujourd’hui sur plus de 35 hectares .A flanc de coteaux sur la rive gauche du Cher, les vignes bénéficient en majorité d’une exposition sud, sud-est.
Ces terroirs riches et complexes permettent la production d’une gamme de vin variée et riche en couleurs, issues de jeunes et de vieilles vignes allant jusqu’à 100 ans pour certains Pineau d’Aunis.

Name: AP John Coopers
Description: The AP John cooperage has been making barrels in the Barossa since the 1880s. Our talented team handcrafts a range of premium French, American and Hungarian barrels. We distribute Tonnellerie Remond barrels in Australia and New Zealand. And we have an extensive portfolio of oak additives as well as a bespoke range of distillery casks.

Name: Piernas Largas Winery
Description: Y ahí está el Piernas Largas, disfrutando de la vida. Para él, no hay nada como la amistad y una buena conversación acompañada de un vino.

Name: Cantina Cherri D'Acquaviva
Description:
The picturesque village of Acquaviva Picena, famous for its medieval fortress, lies on a hilltop of Tronto river valley, in the south of Marche region. The winery estate is located on the gentle hills around the Medieval village walls. It overlooks the Adriatic Sea on the east and faces Appeninies Mountains on the south-east side. Our winery is almost one hundred years old and is devoted to viticulture and winemaking. Mr Paolo Cherri represents the third generation of the Cherri family and manages the company with the same passion and expertise of his predecessors. The grapes and wines draw their superior and unmistakable characteristics from the good temperature fluctuations and the soil composition of the site. The microclimate and the well balanced composition of the land, give to our grapes and wines those superior characteristics that are obtained only in an area of absolute “vocation” to wine agriculture. Our respect of the vine varieties as result  of the natural synergic pact between man and the land guarantees the high quality of Cherri wines. ROSSO PICENO, ROSSO PICENO SUPERIORE and FALERIO are our DOC wines, while OFFIDA PECORINO, OFFIDA PASSERINA and OFFIDA ROSSO wines recently gained DOCG recognition. The enfolding aroma and genuine character of our wines convey the ancestral power of Picenian land. Inviting you to an exciting journey in time and space, Cherri wines will bring you pleasure and wonder.
Our retail store is in Acquaviva Picena, via Roma 40. Opening time: Monday to Saturday 08:30-13:00 15:30-20:00.

Name: Vingineers
Description:
Vingineers fuses high-resolution drone imagery with artificial intelligence to provide the most advanced vineyard analytics available.

Vingineers partners with local drone companies to provide vineyard analytics services to local vineyards with a focus on quality, repeatability, and ROI.

Vingineers if focused on bringing deep learning mechancs to the hands of all viticultural consultants to enhance our ability to improve vineyard profitability and sustainability.

Name: Borambola Wines
Description:
Borambola Homestead is a majestic and gracious home dating back to the 1880’s offering 360-degree district views.   

Borambola Wines was established in 1995 and offers 100% estate grown wines from the Gundagai wine growing region.  Our range includes, VIII Sparkling Brut, Bunya Bunya Chardonnay, Wishing Well Sauvignon Blanc, Double Joy dry Rose’, Hiraji's Spell Shiraz and Moonlight Cabernet Sauvignon.  
Our beer and cider brand, Tuckerbox produces a sessionable Hoppy Lager, Session Pale Ale, IPA, as well as a Craft Apple Cider.  We use local ingredients from Tumut & Barellan New South Wales.
The Cellar Door is open Tuesday to Sunday 11am to 5pm (or by appointment) for wine tastings and charcuterie boards, and the venue is able to host:

•	Conferences
•	Dinners & Cocktail Functions
•	Exhibition & Trade Shows
•	Meetings
•	Movie Nights
•	Seminars & Workshops
•	Weddings

Amenities include:
•	Audio Visuals
•	Offsite bar
•	Onsite Restaurant catering
•	Wheelchair accessible

We offer a wellness program including Pop up Yoga sessions at the Cellar Door, and group corporate bookings available.

Online orders welcome: www.borambola.com
Follow us on Facebook & Instagram @borambolawines

Name: Stift Klosterneuburg Wine Estate
Description:
The history of Klosterneuburg Monastery and its wine estate begins in 1114. The winery cultivates 108 hectares of vineyards today. Klosterneuburg is situated near the river Danube, 10 kilometres north of Vienna, and owns vineyards in selected top locations in Klosterneuburg, Vienna, Gumpoldskirchen and Tattendorf. The various soils and the different microclimates in these 4 regions provide for the possibility to cultivate each grape variety in the ideal terroire. The product range is divided in two wine-lines: The „Stiftsweine“ are youthful, fresh, radiantly fruity wines, reflecting the typicity of each grape.The Single-vineyard wines are made from the best grapes from individual top locations and represent wines of distinctive character that are suitable for maturation.

Since the year 2009 it is the first carbon neutral wine estate in Europe.

Name: Mezcal Santo Infierno
Description:
Santo Infierno is a mezcal that has citrus tones; followed by a light flavor of herbs and spices. Legends say that mezcal is the elixir that is born from the Gods themselves. Human nature descends from them, that which from its essence implies the balance that characterizes us. 

Premium Mezcal

Name: Schu-Wein
Description: Wein ist in aller Munde und heutzutage auch fast überall zu erhalten. Aber wo gibt es schon Weine aus den verschiedensten Anbaugebieten und Jahrgängen, die nicht nur von höchster Qualität sind, sondern auch noch die optimale Trinkreife haben? Richtig, bei uns! Wir teilen unsere Leidenschaft für Wein für Ihre maximale Trinkfreude.

Name: 47 Anno Domini
Description:
Lungo la Treviso Mare contornata dal Sile e dal Piave: una cantina di qualità e design che associa la produzione vitivinicola e la qualità del prodotto. Location polifunzionale per eventi.

Immersa tra cesellati filari di vigneti, l’azienda è un esclusivo “Wine Creative Lab”

“Wine by Design”. Molto più di un concetto. Un Lifestyle. Ogni elemento dell’azienda ne è contraddistinto, dall’elegante architettura della location ai tecnologici profili dei macchinari impiegati. Simbolo di un’innovativa impostazione concettuale, che associa la produzione vitivinicola e la qualità del prodotto alle idee di Bellezza, Lusso, Relax. Risultato: un’azienda unica, originale dall’inconsueta identità.

Name: Dabbler Depot
Description:
Dabbler Depot is a new craft beer, cider, spirits, and wine-focused liquor store and to-go coffee shop opening in St. Paul, Minnesota. Founded by the same team as Beer Dabbler, we offer a highly curated selection of craft beverages from the best makers in Minnesota, the Midwest, and around the globe. Stop into our West 7th Street location for an experience, unlike any other liquor store. 

No warm beer. Incredible selection of cider and wine. Superb spirits. And the best rewards program around.

Name: Millésimes et Tradition
Description:
Since 1994, we are spirit maturers and merchands, specialized in vintage and high quality Armagnacs . We work with a little over twenty producers. Vintage Armagnacs mature slowly in their native Domain. Our Cellar Master watches over our spirits during the aging process. In order to share their memories with you, he selects them to create the character of our finest Armagnacs.

Armagnac is the oldest French Spirit. The personality of this drink is a clever blend of terroirs, grape varieties, weather conditions and, of course, the ancestral traditions of Gascony. This is why there is a bottle for each amateur and expert. It is a perfect allegory of the Gascon diversity of characters.

Name: WAYS Energy
Description:
Our goal is to provide a product that recognizes the day-to-day sacrifices that the real heroes make to help us all.  Service members, first responders, and volunteers serve their fellow human beings every day.  We think there should be a product out there that caters just to them; something that brings them even a moment of relief or refreshment after a long, hard day on the job.  
WAYS Energy wants to thank these amazing individuals by not only designing a product that celebrates who they are and what they do but makes a commitment to them through charitable partnerships that are there for them when they need assistance.  WAYS Energy will donate a portion of the sale from every drink we sell to support the people that make this planet a better place and dedicate themselves to being there when we need them most.

Name: Garrafinhas S.A.
Description:
A empresa Garrafinhas S.A. foi fundada a 26 de Setembro de 1984 com um objetivo definido e um propósito determinado: fomentar a prospeção, a comercialização e a distribuição de bebidas alcoólicas de mais alta qualidade, capaz de se ajustar às tendências do mercado e à exigência dos clientes mais rigoristas.
Ao longo destas três décadas tem vindo a desenvolver um trabalho exímio na seleção dos produtos que fazem do seu portfólio uma referência nacional e uma empresa de renome no sector do comércio de bebidas.
A capacidade de arriscar e de lutar por aquilo que acreditamos são as premissas que norteiam a nossa atuação, mantendo uma forte flexibilidade na adaptação aos ambientes e contextos diferentes que vão surgindo da imposição da sociedade e do empreendedorismo exigido pela economia do mercado.
Cientes que os esforços desafiam as impossibilidades, decidimos criar uma loja online que se ajuste à realidade das novas tecnologias com o objetivo principal de encontrar soluções ajustadas às verdadeiras necessidades de um público cibernauta cada vez mais exigente, sem desprimor aos nossos clientes fiéis da Horeca e do sector empresarial que têm mantido total confiança no trabalho por nós desenvolvido.
É neste contexto que apresentamos com rigor o nosso portfólio, um registo individual e completo de cada produto que informa e esclarece todas as particularidades, desde a origem à composição, ao teor alcoólico, relação qualidade/preço, tudo o que precisa para satisfazer a sua curiosidade e surpreender os melhores amigos.
Convictos de merecer a honra da v/ preferência resta-nos afirmar que a diferença na qualidade dos produtos que comercializamos e a distribuição personalizada e eficiente que prestamos, são valores intemporais que sempre pautaram a nossa conduta e nos fazem acreditar que a escolha certa está aqui:
“A sugestão é nossa, a escolha é sua!”

Obrigado pela preferência,

Saudações Cordiais

Garrafinhas S.A.

(Não hesite em contactar-nos para qualquer esclarecimento)

Name: Single Malt Club China
Description:
Single Malt Club China Is a commercial company established in March 2005; also a membership club of single malt enthusiasts, with close to 8,000 members throughout China.

Single Malt Club China currently operates three business units, along with running the membership club. The three business units are: the import and distribution unit, the Bar and the whisky auction unit. On the premise of the SMCC Headquarters is also located The Whisky Experience Centre, which is a venue open to all single malt related organisations, groups and individuals.

As the longest established single malt specialist in China, we continue to strive to be the most professional, both in terms of knowledge and business practices. We represent 13distilleries, brands and independent bottlers from Scotland, building their prominence and consumer base in the Chinese market. We operate the first and only whisky auction website in China and provide guidance and consultancy to investors in whisky. Single Malt Club China is also heavily involved in education and training in single malt knowledge, for both the food and drink industry and for consumers.

Name: Velis Vineyards
Description:
Velis Vineyards is a winemaking project that transcends borders and unites cultures. It all started with the discovery and re-cultivation of a small parcel of old vines in Bulgaria's upper Thracian Valley. Now we have over 36 hectares of vineyards. 

Our vineyards are located in Bulgaria's upper Thracian Valley and in Rheinhessen, Germany. Our wines from the collections Velis Vineyards and Heaven's Door are produced exclusively in our modern winery in Flörsheim-Dalsheim, Germany. Grapes harvested in Bulgaria are cooled down and transported in temperature-controlled trucks to Germany, where they are vinified. 

Our wines from the series Villa Velis are produced entirely in Bulgaria in our Villa Velis winery, which opened its doors in summer 2021 and quickly established itself as a home to fine wine and modern art.

Name: La Cave de Pauline
Description:
Tu veux des bonnes bouteilles de vin pour ton dîner entre amis ?
La Cave de Pauline s'engage durablement et te propose des Box de vins éco-responsables : des vins dénichés au quatre coins de la France et des matériaux durables.
Nos vins sont 100% Biodynamiques et Bio afin de valoriser une agriculture éthique. Nous livrons en France entière !

Name: Ingenius Construk
Description: Distribuidora de Licores, bebidas, jugos y productos de aseo.

Name: Siesta Key Rum

Notre raison d'être :
- Permettre l’épanouissement dans notre SCOP d’une équipe de 
femmes et d’hommes engagé.e.s dans la transmission de leurs

Name: Domaine Saint Nicolas
Description: Le Domaine Saint Nicolas est un vignoble situé entre Brem-sur-Mer et L’Ile d’Olonne. Sur des sols argilo-schisteux et quartz, bordé par l’océan, la forêt, les marais, il bénéfice d’un terroir unique et microclimat exceptionnel. Le tout mis en valeur par la Biodynamie adoptée en 1995 et la polyculture. Depuis trois générations, la famille Michon œuvre pour la renaissance des vins de Brem. Hautement qualitatifs, les vins blancs, rosé et rouges sont issus des cépages Pinot Noir, Négrette, Cabernet Franc, Gamay, Chenin, Chardonnay et Groslot Gris.

Name: Vinícola Calza
Description:
Desde 1995, a Vinícola Calza, introduz um conceito familiar de fazer vinhos e espumantes, sempre priorizando a qualidade e as características regionais do terroir gaúcho. 

A indústria também trabalha no segmento de subprodutos do vinho, direcionados para o ramo de medicamentos. Instaurando uma cultura sustentável na industrias vitivinícola.
Location: Monte Belo do Sul, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Gifts International (UK) giftsinternational.net
Description:
Our mission is to get Gifts to the right person, at the right place, on the right day.  We work tirelessly with our suppliers to ensure that this happens.  We pride ourselves on serving our clients with proper human interaction.  We do not have a "call centre" we have engaged employees answering the phone (including the Directors) thus ensuring our whole team are involved in simplifying the way Clients order and send their gifts.  We have been online since 1999 and, from a very small home based operation, have grown to the brand we are today fully able to help you with the logistics of sending gifts in an increasingly global marketplace! 
We are the first port of call for many FTSE 100 and Fortune 500 companies.  We don't shout about being the best in the industry, we let our Customers do that!  We use EKOMI for our Customer reviews because every review can be traced back to an original order.  We pride ourselves on our transparency.
We send luxury Champagne, Hampers, Fine Wines and Luxury Gifts. Our experience of over 30 years in Mail Order and other industries means we know how to ensure your orders are delivered, often to multiple locations in the UK and Internationally - taking the stress away from you when organising events or celebrations.  We offer different types of Company Branding on packaging and in gift cards and will work with you to achieve the impact you want.  We also have access to very rare and fine wines, if you can't find what you are looking for simply call us and we will do whatever we can to source for you.

Name: North 42 Degrees Estate Winery and Bistro 42
Description:
North 42 Degrees Estate Winery welcomes you to discover our passion for winemaking and the natural beauty of our surroundings as you experience our warm Southern hospitality.  Led by, Martin and Suzanne Gorski , both 3rd generation farmers of European farming heritage, wine flows deep within our ancestral roots. 

We invite you to join our journey in the business of wine, explore our terroir's outstanding flavour profiles and the ultimate expression of farming.

Name: Bubbles Inc.
Description:
Hos Bubbles Inc. sælger vi unikke oplevelser, om det er via en af vores private smagninger, eller når du køber en flaske i shoppen.

Store smagsoplevelser fra familieproducenter der leverer masser smag, sjæl og historie, hvilket vi har specialiseret os i at servere for dig.

Om det er til privaten eller i firmaet, så kommer vi gerne forbi og giver jer en skræddersyet boblesmagning.

Name: Australian Pinot Noir Challenge
Description:
The Australian Pinot Noir Challenge celebrates
Pinot Noir in all its forms.
Australia is home to pinot noir growers and makers persistently seeking a more pure expression of their sites and the variety.

The advancement the Australian wine community has made in understanding all the variables which make pinot noir in Australia something truly remarkable, is outstanding.
Over three decades, the pinot noir community across regions has been brought together by a shared passion to improve, innovate and learn how to achieve pinot noir wines of superior quality. They have become a cohesive, intimate community determined to bring Australian pinot noir to a level which is world class.

The Australian Pinot Noir Challenge celebrates this achievement and all the elements which makes Australian pinot noir such a captivating, ethereal and elegant wine.

The challenge will bring the best of Australia’s pinot noirs to the attention of industry and consumers and help inform wine lovers about what makes Australian pinot noir distinctive and remarkable.

Name: YBY International
Description:
What is YBY?
YBY is a premium quality sparkling wine, brought to life by Stephan Claus in 2020. We believe that every day is worth celebrating, and that’s why our sparkling wine is more affordable and more accessible than ever before.

What is it that makes our YBY Crystal sparkling wine so incomparable?
“Méthode rural”, or the processing of the grapes in the “rural way”, creates a significant difference compared to traditional sparkling wine production. And this starts with the grape harvest. The grapes are harvested by our winegrowers only when they have reached full maturity, because only then do they carry the maximum aroma. Next, the grape must go directly to the winery. Here it is fermented in only one process and thus retains the intense aroma that later characterises our YBY Crystal. The sparkling wine is therefore not produced in the conventional method with a second fermentation from finished base wine by subsequently adding a tirage of sugar and yeast. Only when the sparkling wine has the desired sweetness for our Crystal, dry or semi-dry, the yeasts are filtered out. In this way, we stop the fermentation in a completely natural way. The sweetness that remains in the sparkling wine is perceived by the sparkling wine lover as a particularly fruity sweetness – a real treat to your palate.

What exactly happens in the Rural Method?
With this method, the natural sugar breaks down into sucrose and fructose with the latter providing an extremely pleasant taste. During alcoholic fermentation, the yeasts first convert sucrose (which tastes rather unpleasant) into alcohol and CO2 and only then is the fructose converted. In the Rural method, fermentation is stopped while the sparkling wine still has sweetness, so the fructose is largely retained and with it the special pleasant taste.

Name: LES VINS MONVOISIN

L'agence commerciale Les Vins Monvoisin, a été créée en 2005 par Patrick Monvoisin. Il représente exclusivement 34 maisons de Vins, Champagnes et Caviars sur le département de la Loire-Atlantique (44). Les services de l'agence répondent aux besoin des professionnels: restaurateurs, cavistes, revendeurs, épiciers, hôteliers, grossistes, ... 
Grâce à son expérience dans le monde du vin Patrick saura au mieux vous conseiller pour la sélection de vos vins. 

Les fournisseurs de vins proviennent de différentes régions : Bourgogne, Bordeaux, Corse, Champagne, Loire, Provence, Rhône, Roussillon, Savoie, Jura, Sud-Ouest, Beaujolais ainsi que quelques vins étrangers (Italie, Californie, Espagne, Nouvelle-Zélande,...).

Name: Casa Rondeña Winery
Description: Casa Rondeña is a fully-working winery located in Albuquerque's North Valley. Year after year we continue to produce award winning wines, which are sold both at the winery and throughout New Mexico. Visitors to our property not only enjoy our wines, but our beautiful architecture and peaceful atmosphere as well. We are open to the public daily from 12-7pm.
Location: Los Ranchos de Albuquerque, New Mexico

Name: Pisco Torrentera
Description: Nuestra misión es compartir el Pisco perfecto con el resto del mundo.

Name: Singapore China Baijiu Pte Ltd
Description: The official distributor of premium China Baijiu: Kweichow Moutai, Wuliangye and National Cellar 1573. Visit our websites for more info.

Name: Jack From Brooklyn
Description:
Makers of Sorel Artisanal Hibiscus Liqueur. Hand-crafted in Brooklyn. 

Made in small batches, we combine Moroccan hibiscus. Brazilian clove. Nigerian ginger. Indonesian cassia. Indonesian nutmeg, pure cane sugar and the finest 100% organic New York grain alcohol. The resultant libations offer a unique aromatic profile and a distinctive flavor, creating vast new options for both consumer and mixologist.

Name: Pure Wines
Description: Pure Wines is an online natural wine shop located in London; importers and distributors of the world's finest natural wines available to order from the comfort of your home.

Name: Gyre & Gimble
Description: Zero waste cocktail bar serving creative innovative drinks, complimented by Norwich's city centre eco friendly distillery. NEW for 2022, the Gyre & Gimble Gin Academy & spirit and wine shop in The Royal Norwich Arcade.

Name: Weingut Heiligenblut
Description:
Seit 1924 leben und arbeiten wir, Familie Hannemann, auf dem Weingut Heiligenblut in nun 4. Generation. 
Wir stehen für Natur- und Kulturverbundenheit und für in Einklang mit der Natur produzierte Weine, die unsere Passion und Lebensfreude in sich tragen.

Since 1924 do we, the Hannemann family,  live and work in the Heiligenblut estate, now in the 4th generation. 
We stand for the unity of culture and nature and for wines that carry our deep passion and are produced in accordance with nature.

Name: LABELS SRL - Wine Agency
Description:
Labels è un’agenzia specializzata esclusivamente in rappresentanza e commercio internazionale di vino italiano di qualità. Siamo una team di agenti esperti nei propri mercati da oltre 10 anni.

Labels is an agency  focused on international trading and brokerage of fine italian wine. We are a market-oriented team of sales professionals with over 10 years of extensive experience.

Name: Château Laffitte-Teston
Description:
Une qualité de vin très régulière et une gamme variée où les cuvées haut de gamme représentent 60 % de la production.

Un style de vin gourmand et très bien équilibré grâce à une maîtrise du cépage Tannat avec des vignes situées sur des terroirs remarquables et très bien exposés.

Un univers guidé par des valeurs et une véritable passion.
Un savoir-faire: Une région, un art de vivre et nos appellations chevillées au corps.
Un travail dans le plus grand respect des consommateurs épicuriens qui nous honorent de leur amitié. 

Un site remarquable avec ses chais souterrains et une vue panoramique surplombant un cirque de vignes et un lac collinaire. A venir, 2 salles de séminaire pouvant accueillir des groupes, pour découvrir l'œnotourisme, avec des vues magnifiques sur les chais et les vignes.

Un esprit de convivialité et une qualité d’accueil qui est notre âme.

Domaine certifié HVE niveau 3 depuis 2019.

Name: Hornbeam Brewery
Description:
Welcome to hornbeambrewery.com. We are a small microbrewery in Manchester with an enviable reputation for producing great beers. The brewery was started in June 2007, but that’s history. We look for opportunities to create new innovative beers, we produce a monthly Special every month, with innovation being placed front and centre during development. Not every monthly special is a roaring success but many have made their way into our bottle range, by being raved about. Beers like Dusseldorf Altbier, White swan, Champagne Ale, Lemon Blossom and Galaxy pale ale started life as monthly specials. We are a local supplier of cask beers around the brewery, and where Possible use local suppliers to obtain what we need to operate as a brewery. Kevin recently appeared on radio Manchester’s business programme To talk about using the excellent local businesses that exists on the doorstep.

The beers are now made by Anthony Lewis the brew master. Anthony started brewing at Hornbeam Brewery in 2010 and since then has not lost a single batch of beer. David Lauer will be joining the brewing team for 4 weeks in August. David helps run a community brewery in Germany. This will be his second visit and we hope to see some interesting beers during his visit.

Name: The Tasting Room
Description:
The Tasting Room est une société d’importation et de distribution de vins fins en provenance des pays du Nouveau Monde. 
 
Elle commercialise actuellement une large gamme de vins de qualité sud-africains issus de domaines pour lesquels elle a obtenu l’exclusivité d’importation soit pour la Belgique, soit pour la Wallonie et Bruxelles.
 
La société travaille principalement avec des petits producteurs-récoltants qui produisent de grands vins.

L’objectif de The Tasting Room est de proposer des produits authentiques qui sont le reflet d’un terroir et l’expression d’une philosophie de vie.   La société vous invite ainsi au voyage, à dépasser les frontières géographiques et psychologiques, et  à savourer autre chose qu’à l’ordinaire. 

Ces  vins de qualité proviennent  de domaines ayant une démarche respectueuse de l’environnement. Tous ont reçu une certification attestant de leur engagement actif pour protéger la biodiversité, pratiquer une viticulture intégrée ou encore une vinification raisonnée.

La première préoccupation de The Tasting Room étant l’entière satisfaction de ses clients, la société s’engage à leur présenter  un choix varié, exclusif et renouvelé. Tous les vins commercialisés sont issus d’une sélection rigoureuse, résultat de nombreuses dégustations lors des diverses visites des domaines.

Name: Chapel Dome Distillery
Description:
Chapel Dome offers two complete brand lines of distilled spirits.
3 Wire Whiskey is our sourced line of products and will be released in 1QTR 2022
Chapel Dome Bourbon is our inhouse line of products that will begin the aging process in 1QTR 2022 with an initial release date of 2025 and 2026.

Name: [Prototype] Gin
Description: Each batch of [Prototype] is hand-crafted for a unique London flavor with a subtle New York City twist. Started on the NYC High Line in 2021, curated over the next year and distilled in London in the Winter of 2022.

Name: OTnet.net
Description:
Destilerías Roniwesk fue creada por J A Bernal Mrcia, fabricante de licores y aguardiente mas antigua de España. Con especial renombre en la elaboración de Brandys gran reserva.

La primera actividad se inicia en 1.870 con la fabricación de Coñac y aguardientes. En 1.958 pasa a manos de D. José Antonio Bernal Murcia que cambia de ubicación a las actuales instalaciones y ampliando el numero de Barriles de Roble Americano hasta 540 unidades donde envejecen las soleras que tenemos en existencias. En esta época es cuando la calidad de sus Brandys y licores lleva a Destilerías Bernal Murcia a expandirse por todo el territorio nacional. En el año 2005 cesa en su actividad, a causa de una enfermedad del Sr. Bernal Murcia y es cuando   D. José Antonio Bernal Murcia ( hijo ) cuida celosamente  hasta que   la familia Pérez Martínez, entra en acción y  sociedad al 50%.. y al final se la quedan.con unos caldos envejecidos durante años y años y el conocimiento transferido de generación en generación con el objetivo de dar un toque diferente mezclando antigüedad y productos innovadores. por José Antonio Bernal Hijo.

Durante la historia de la empresa, fabricó  más de 60 productos diferentes, su conocimiento permitió crear prácticamente la mayoría de productos en el mercado.
A fecha de Septiembre 2024.. Diós impartirá justicia ;-)

Name: Casa das Hortas
Description:
The curves that shape the Douro region are the inspiration for an unparalleled passion that links the Casa das Hortas to its origins. Founded in 1995, and having always focused on quality wines
from Baião, Casa das Hortas is one of the oldest companies in the region.
With the Azeredo family´s third generation already being integrated into the company´s management, Casa das Hortas is bigger, better equipped and with a broader vision in dedicating
itself to the production, bottling and distribution of wines from Douro and Vinho Verde regions.
Baião, the land that bridges the peak of the Serra do Marão to one of the most beautiful reservoirs of the Douro River, is home to this rich history and immeasurable heritage.

Name: Empório Prime
Description: O Empório Prime conta com uma extensa variedade de produtos nacionais e importados, selecionados por especialistas renomados. Adega subterrânea com mais de 700 rótulos, bebidas especiais, queijos, orgânicos, hortifrúti tradicional e exótico, especiarias e muito mais, proporcionando a você a sutileza das descobertas de cada seção.

Name: Bureau LÉVÊQUE & Associés

Name: Morgan Winery
Description:
With more than thirty years’ experience, Dan Lee and the Morgan label have been synonymous with artisan, vineyard-centric wines from the Santa Lucia Highlands and Monterey. 

In 1982, Dan and Donna Lee opened the doors of Morgan Winery. Their very first Monterey Chardonnay earned a Gold Medal at the LA County Fair and a Platinum Medal from Wine & Spirits Magazine. Since then, Morgan has become one of the Central Coast’s most recognized labels, earning “Winery of the Year” honors from Wine & Spirits in 1996 and from the San Francisco Chronicle in 2003. In 2005, Dan introduced a second label, Lee Family Farms – intended to provide a fun outlet for his exploration of “alternative” varietals.

Name: Human Resource Business Partners, Inc.
Description:
At Human Resource Business Partners (HRBP), we understand how to increase the competitive advantage of your company and we will partner with you to create an effective hiring strategy that will put the right people in the right positions.

In today’s competitive wine marketplace, talented individuals are purposefully seeking more than just a paycheck. They desire an environment where they can advance in their careers, while simultaneously increasing the profits of your  company.

Employees are the most valuable asset to your organization. Staffing your organization with key talent, Employee/Management Development and Coaching are crucial to the long-term growth of your business.

We specialize in beverage recruiting for: executive search, performance management and coaching, management development, interim human resources, and all aspects of staffing for your company.

Name: Nebb Whisky Barrels Pty Ltd
Description:
At NEBB Whisky Barrels, we take the hard work out of barrel sourcing, offering you a wide selection of quality casks from a variety of Australian wineries. No matter your distilling needs, our barrels deliver a depth of flavour and quality you can trust.

With strong connections into the Australian wine industry, our family-owned business sources quality wine and fortified oak barrels for whisky distilleries in Australia and overseas. Our high-quality, provenance-tracked casks will take the guesswork out and give you precisely what you need.

From Australia to Scotland, our whisky barrels carry the rich history and flavours of some of the world’s best vineyards. Whether you’re after the vibrancy of a freshly emptied red wine barrel, the distinctive flavour of a fortified wine finish, or a rare, aged cask steeped in history, our expertly crafted barrels will ensure your whisky has the right environment to develop its finest character.

Name: Terindah Estate
Description:
As you drive down McAdams Lane to the entrance of Terindah Estate, you gain glimpses of the breathtaking views awaiting you. Terindah is a boutique winery situated on the Bellarine Peninsula, located between Drysdale and Portarlington. Terindah is the place for anyone interested in visiting a vineyard with beautiful views, award-winning wines and delicious food. 

Terindah Estate was crowned Dark Horse of the Year 2016 and rated a 5-star winery by James Halliday. It produces Sparkling, Pinot Gris, Chardonnay, Rose, Pinot Noir, Zinfandel & Shiraz. The property is home to large number of fruit trees, including over 100 fig, quince and citrus trees and grows crops on rotation: wheat, barley & canola.

Visit one of Victoria's most exciting venues, taste delicious wine and food, see the mussel farmers in the local waters, take a stroll through the fig trees or along the private beach and experience Terindah. As per its name - Terindah is Indonesian for 'most beautiful'. 

Terindah Estate is located at 90 McAdams Lane, Bellarine, Victoria. The Shed @ Terindah and the Cellar Door are open daily from 10am to 4pm. For group bookings phone 03 5251 5536.

spécialisée dans le vin, ce domaine viticole produits des grands vins de Cahors, fais principalement à base de Malbec, cépage emblématique.

Description:

F***ING GOOD WINE. A collection of 3 slightly punk scandalous wines. Fresh, fruity, and vegan. www.fgwine.com

Name: Master 2 Droit Gestion et Commerce des Spiritueux
Description:
Le site universitaire de Segonzac accueille une formation de Master professionnel M2 Droit, gestion et commerce des spiritueux, délivré par la Faculté de droit et des sciences sociales de l'Université de Poitiers. Les étudiants ont également la possibilité d'obtenir durant leur année de formation le Master professionnel M2 Commerce international, délivré par l'IAE de l'Université de Poitiers.
La formation trouve sa place dans une région dédiée à l’économie des vins et spiritueux dans toute son étendue : domaines viticoles, distillateurs, négociants, entreprises de packaging, tonnellerie, logistique, entreprises de design ….
Le secteur d’activité représente 25 % de la production française des spiritueux, 15 % des emplois de la filière française. A l’échelle de la France, il se situe au troisième poste de la balance commerciale de la France. Doté d’un savoir-faire reconnu, le potentiel économique de la filière reste fort pour des produits comme le cognac ou les spiritueux premiums.

Name: The Crop Candle Company
Description:
A sustainable and economically priced frost protection solution for UK vineyards and fruit growers. Proud member of Wines of Great Britain.

The Crop Candle Co. want to support UK Vineyard and Orchard growers, by providing them with more cost-effective candles than are currently available in Europe.

Last spring some UK vineyards and orchards suffered badly from frost, with over half of the crop destroyed. Many UK vineyard managers choose to light candles to prevent to raise the temperature of the environment around the fruit trees and vines.

Crop Candle's 12-Hour candles will protect your fruit for up to three frosts. However, it is advisable to have additional candles ready in storage should another late frost arrive. The shelf life is a good five years, so if you don’t use them; they will be good for the following year. An insurance worth having.

We offer an estimated burn time of 8-hour 5ltr container (approx. 4.6kg) and the new 12-hour 6ltr container (approx. 5.5kg) candles (Bougie). The weight difference is due to the higher compound used in the formula between the 8 hour and 12-hour burn. These candles are made from 100% Vegetable Wax ( NOT PARAFFIN) which acts as a heater raising the air temperature over your crops thus protecting against frost. Crop candles are already known in the industry as the most cost-effective and efficient way to protect fruit cultivation from the increasing spring frosts.

Name: Tokki Soju
Description:
Our goal is to make soju an internationally respected spirits category by staying true to Korean tradition while incorporating global distilling standards.

Tokki Soju started in Brooklyn, grew up in South Korea, and will expand globally starting in 2023.

Name: Wine School Italia - WSET Qualifications in Italy
Description:
Wine School Italia ha sede a Firenze, sviluppa e fornisce corsi per appassionati e professionisti del mondo del vino e del food and beverage, formando i manager del vino e sommelier del futuro. Offre anche le qualifiche migliori a livello internazionale essendo Approved Program Provider per la Wine & Spirit Education Trust (WSET). Le qualifiche WSET sono riconosciute a livello mondiale come lo standard internazionale nella conoscenza del vino e degli alcolici.

Il team di Wine School Italia è coinvolto in una vasta gamma di attività assieme alla formazione, tra cui fornire consulenza e guida personalizzata a quei professionisti del commercio del vino o dell’hospitality che vogliono migliorare i propri risultati o formare il proprio staff e management team in base alle specifiche esigenze aziendali.

Wine School Italia collabora, oltre che con i più importanti manager del vino nazionali e internazionali, con WineJob.it e l’istituto Europeo di Design di Firenze (IED) per la formazione dei wine export manager attraverso corsi di alta formazione.

I nostri insegnati sono anche disponibili per coloro che avessero bisogno di un servizio di tutoraggio per lo studio e il superamento di esami sul vino e distillati.
Inoltre, grazie al patrocinio e alla stretta collaborazione con il consorzio di tutela del vino di Jerez, è possibile conseguire la certificazione di Sherry Expert con la Sherry Academy Italia, con educatore certificato del vino di Jerez.

Name: Painted Wolf Wines
Description:
We produce unique high quality wines with distinctive South African character. Our focus is on Chenin Blanc and Pinotage, the two benchmark South African grape varieties, and individualistic Cape blends. We source some of the best grapes from carefully selected vineyards, and have achieved multiple international accolades and awards for our wines.
Our vision is to be the leading conservation wine company in the world, producing remarkable and highly desired wines to generate impactful funding for securing a sustainable future for African wild dogs, and for community-based conservation and related causes.

Name: Château de Vauclaire
Description:
Le Château de Vauclaire est un domaine viticole provençal situé à 15km au nord d'Aix-en-Provence.
Vigneron indépendant depuis sa création en 1982, le domaine cultive son vignoble, élève et commercialise ses vins à la boutique du domaine ou chez les professionnels de la gastronomie en Provence, en France et dans le monde.
En agriculture raisonnée depuis 1982, le domaine est désormais certifié Haute Valeur Environnementale (HVE), garantissant le respect de la nature et du consommateur dans la culture de la vigne et la vinification.
Le cadre magnifique qu'offre les 30 hectares de vignes sis entre la Sainte Victoire et le Luberon accueille toute l'année divers événements culturels.
La boutique est ouverte du lundi au samedi pour faire découvrir au plus grand nombre les cuvées du Château de Vauclaire.

Name: Anima Vinum Brasil
Description:
Conhecemos a Bourgogne. Descobrimos os Vigneron Récoltants. Entregamos qualidade.

Atuamos como descobridores de vinhos elaborados por pequenos produtores conhecidos como “vignerons récoltants”.

Nossa seleção de vinhos, antes de chegar nas suas mãos, passa por um processo atencioso, dedicado e preciso, que começa nas mãos de seletos pequenos produtores da região da Borgonha. Eles tem suas histórias enraizadas naquela terra e por isso dominam os processo de feitura do vinho por completo. Da poda a florada, da florada a colheita, da colheita a mesa. Com as próprias mãos os produtores fazem disso uma filosofia e uma forma de expressão, criando vinhos autênticos, exclusivos e diversificados. Eles chegam até você como um cumprimento entre quem degusta e quem produz. Para nós, este é o melhor de todos os brindes.

Name: CUÑAS DAVIA
Description:
Adegas Valdavia, la empresa que da forma jurídica a los vinos Cuñas Davia es un proyecto familiar que tiene como objetivo reivindicar Cuñas, a través de sus vinos, como uno de los terroirs con más historia, calidad y prestigio del Ribeiro.

Antonio García Carrasco, que durante toda su vida compaginó su trabajo en el juzgado con su amor por las viñas, aprendió de su padre lo los principios básicos de la biódinámica, entendida como la interacción del cultivo y el vino con los astros, y el respeto por la sostenibilidad del medio. Con estos principios fundó Valdavia, en abril de 2004. 
Sus hijos Alberto y María, le acompañaron en este viaje y actualmente gestionan la bodega.

Name: Destillerie & Likörmanufaktur Deheck
Description:
Unsere Destillerie und Likörmanufaktur zählt seit Jahren zu den erfolgreichsten Premiumbrennereien in Deutschland und genießt auch im angrenzenden Ausland einen ausgezeichneten Ruf.

Die stetig wachsende Produktpalette an Edelbränden, Likören und Essigen überzeugt durch Regionalität und Natürlichkeit! Das Streben die traditionelle Brennerkunst mit innovativen Ideen aufzuwerten, motivieren Brennmeister Karl-Peter Deheck, Gattin Kornelia und Tochter Barbara, hochwertige Rohstoffe tagtäglich in Hochprozentiges zu verwandeln.

Name: Flametree Wines
Description:
Flametree Wines is located on the beautiful shores of Geographe Bay in the world renowned wine region of Margaret River.

The Flametree is a spectacular Australian tree, at Flametree Wines our vision is to produce brilliant Australian wines of uncompromising quality and character.

Award winning wine maker, Cliff Royle, selects exceptional quality fruit to produce beautifully hand-crafted wines with unique flavour, structure and depth.

The stunning beach house style Cellar Door building is a must see, then taste our award winning wines, browse the art exhibition and relax on the deck with a glass of wine. 

With an open fire place, inviting deck and beautiful gardens Flametree Cellar Door is worth visiting at any time of the year.

The red five-star rating in James Halliday's 2015 Australian Wine Companion reflects the number of outstanding wines in our portfolio. We offer a relaxed wine experience and welcome visitors for personal tastings seven days a week. We also welcome group bookings and private tastings with the winemaker, upon arrangement.

You can also become a member and savour the elegance of our celebrated wines in a twice yearly subscription while enjoying up to 20% discount on all other wine purchases.

Name: Puerto Rico Distillery
Description: Puerto Rico Distillery (PRD) specializes in high-quality artisanal Puerto Rican diaspora rum. Known on the island as Pitorro, it’s been close to impossible to find it anywhere outside of Puerto Rico. PRD led by father-daughter team Angel & Crystal.

Name: Domaine Barmès-Buecher
Description: Official LinkedIn page of the french family domain Barmès-Buecher, located in Wettolsheim, Alsace.

Name: ViniVerdi Sweden AB
Description:
ViniVerdi är ett litet familjeföretag beläget i Stockholm. Vi startade vår verksamhet i början av år 2018 utifrån visionen att berika den svenska vinmarknaden med viner från unika gårdar som i dag inte säljer sina produkter i vårt avlånga land. 

Resan började i Italien, ett land som vi i familjen har besökt vid flertalet tillfällen genom åren och därmed har starka kopplingar till - Italien var således ett givet första val. Vi har idag nära kontakt med små familjegårdar i norra Italien som vi även besöker när vi är i trakterna. Gemensamt för dessa gårdar är deras intressanta historia, genuina tillverkningsprocess samt kärlek till traditionen och hantverket snarare än masstillverkningens industrialiserade maskineri. 

De, liksom vi, är familjeföretag som lever sin passion och vinerna de producerar håller en hantverksmässig kvalitet som förtjänar att lyftas fram. Genom att introducera dessa gårdar på den svenska marknaden vill vi ge alla möjligheten att avnjuta deras unika viner och lära känna historian bakom vinerna som är minst lika intressant.

Att njuta av ett fantastiskt bra vin är en upplevelse!

ViniVerdi

Name: Tenuta Ferrata
Description: La Tenuta Ferrata, così si chiama oggi questa lingua di terra, in nome della storia dell’attività dei fratelli e per la casualità di avere il vigneto circondato quasi a metà da un tratto del treno della Circumetnea, ha al suo interno una villa, vari caseggiati rurali con il vecchio torchio ed una ricchezza che nasce dalla della biodiversità. Alberi di noci, nocciole, tra muri a secco di pietra lavica si alternano a vigne cinte da colate laviche storiche, ciò rende la proprietà unica all’interno di questo tesoro, patrimonio dell’umanità, che è il vulcano Etna.

Name: Agrega Vino
Description: Nossa missão na Agrega Vino é enriquecer a cultura do vinho no Brasil, oferecendo uma seleção cuidadosamente curada de vinhos chilenos artesanais e de qualidade excepcional. Estamos comprometidos em conectar nossos clientes às ricas tradições vinícolas, através de produtos que se destacam não apenas pelo sabor, mas também pelo compromisso com a sustentabilidade e o respeito ao meio ambiente. Buscamos agregar momentos especiais à vida de nossos consumidores, proporcionando experiências únicas e memoráveis a cada taça.

Name: Michael Paetzold | Iberica
Description:
Con 200 trabajadores/as, nuestra empresa, fundada en 1990, está especializada en tratamientos físicos (filtración, clarificación, gestión del oxígeno, esterilización, embotellado, re-acondicionamiento, etc… ) que respetan las particularidades y cualidades de cada vino. Atendemos a alrededor de 7.000 clientes, propiedades, viñedos, bodegas, cooperativas y establecimientos de comercialización de vinos en Europa, América y África. 

En la actualidad nuestro catálogo ofrece 29 prestaciones enotécnicas, adaptadas a cada problemática y a cada necesidad vinícola, además de 19 equipos vinícolas y medioambientales, diseñados y fabricados a medida en nuestro taller de Cadaujac (Bordeaux – Francia). Este conjunto incomparable de soluciones nos permite ser útiles durante todo el ciclo del vino, desde la viña hasta el envejecimiento en botellas. 

En nuestra central de Cadaujac (Bordeaux, Francia) se encuentra el domicilio social, el centro de I+D/diseño enotécnico y el taller de fabricación. Nuestras 7 delegaciones de Francia, Sudáfrica y España y ofrecen una asesoría comercial y técnica sobre el terreno a los viñedos más importantes. 

En España, @Patrick Paulian es el director de ventas de MICHAEL PAETZOLD | IBERICA en el territorio. Él y su equipo están al servicio de más de 200 bodegas, incluidas las más prestigiosas. 

Pensamos desde siempre que no es la herramienta técnica la que hace el trabajo, si no el hombre. Michael Paetzold, el fundador, lejos de la enotécnica limitada a las máquinas, se ha rodeado para sus actividades y su visión de la empresa de un gran equipo humano con perfiles muy diversos. Nuestra escuela interna nos permite instruir y formar continuamente a nuestra plantilla en la conciencia enológica, los conocimientos y gestos enotécnicos desarrollados por Michael Paetzold durante más de 30 años. Esta transmisión de conocimientos teóricos y prácticos garantiza la calidad a largo plazo de nuestros servicios y nuestros equipos.

Name: MacArthur Beverage
Description:
Addy Bassin’s MacArthur Beverages is Washington DC's leading retailer and importer of fine wines and spirits. Over the years we have garnered the reputation as one of America’s best wine merchants by importing wines directly from Europe and reselling them to private clients throughout the United States and the world.

MacArthur Beverages was founded in 1957 by Addy & Ruth Bassin and is located at 4877 MacArthur Blvd., in  Washington DC.  We have been at our current address since 1962.  Ruth Bassin and her two daughters are the sole owners of MacArthur Beverage. Addy Bassin made ‘front page’ news in 1977 when he set the world record for the highest price ever paid for a single bottle of wine, an 1806 Chateau Lafite Rothschild, for $14,450.00. 

In 1985 MacArthur Beverages became the first and only store to offer California Wine Futures. This addition has been extremely successful for the vintners, our customers and our futures program.  With our commitment to bringing our customer the best wines at the best price, our innovation and dedication continues. 

We are Direct Imports:

We own a Federal Import Permit which allows direct importation without the assistance of an intermediary or agent, i.e., a wholesaler.
