Name: King's Court Estate Winery
Description:
King’s Court Estate Winery is a seventh-generation, family-owned and operated boutique winery located in the Niagara Region of Ontario with its ancestral roots in Germany. The head vintner of King’s Court Estate winery is Josef Zimmermann – the 6th generation winemaker in the family lineage. 

He immigrated to Canada in the 1970’s, and then in 1988 established King’s Court Estate Winery in St. Catharines, Ontario. Since then the winery has been producing award-winning VQA Ontario wines. 

According to family legend, Kaiser Wilhelm, a German king, visited the town of Heddesheim in the year 1723. During his visit he demanded his dues be paid by local peasants; in other words, he required they give up a portion of their food and wine harvest to him. Jakob Zimmermann, our great-great-great-grandfather and a local vintner, served the king his wine. Indeed, the king was so impressed by the quality and flavour of the wine! As a result, he immediately ordered a barrel of wine to be sent to his residence. After that tasting the king appointed Jakob and his vineyard as the official winery for the monarchy. Thus, the vineyard’s name became “Königswingert.” This translates to “King’s Vineyard.”

The family estate is in Germany’s Nahe wine region, just off the Rhine River. The Nahe Valley is well-known for growing excellent Spätleses and Ausleses from the majestic Riesling grape. Grapes have been growing in this area since the time of the Romans. The family estate, Weingut Königswingert, is operated by Linus Zimmermann and his successor Gregor Zimmermann. They represent the sixth and seventh generations of Zimmermann vintners respectively in Germany today.

Josef, the youngest descendant of the Zimmermann family, and his wife Siglinde, settled in the Niagara Escarpment region of Ontario, Canada, in 1990. Consequently this resulted in a family operation known as King’s Court Estate Winery.

E-mail: info@kingscourtestatewinery.ca

Name: DOMAINES PEYRONIE
Description:
Au nord du petit village de Saint-Lambert, le Château Fonbadet occupe un terroir de choix, enclavé entre les plus grands crus de l’appellation Pauillac. (château Mouton Rothschild, château Latour, château Pichon Longueville Baron et Comtesse).
La famille Peyronie peut invoquer de très anciennes racines vigneronnes. Déjà présente sur le terroir pauillacais en 1700, elle est ainsi contemporaine des Ségur. Quelques deux cent ans plus tard, au début du XXe siècle, l’arrière-grand-père de Pierre est régisseur du château Lafite-Rotschild, tandis que celui de son épouse Jany occupe la même fonction… au château Mouton-Rothschild. 

Après plus de 10 ans aux côtés de son père Pierre , Pascale Peyronie, juriste de formation,  a pris la suite alliant le respect des traditions et l’utilisation des techniques modernes.

Name: Gladiator Wine Distribution
Description:
Gladiator Wine Distribution is a licensed wine importer and wine distributor in New York and New Jersey. We are committed to bringing the finest handcrafted Italian wines to your establishment, ensuring your customers experience something truly exceptional. Our unique selling proposition lies in our carefully curated portfolio of small-batch, artisan wines from Italy’s most celebrated and undiscovered regions. These wines are not mass-produced; they are crafted with passion and precision by families who have dedicated generations to the art of winemaking.

We partner with restaurants, wine bars, wine shops, and boutique hotels to elevate their wine offerings and help them stand out in a competitive market. Our focus is on quality, authenticity, and exclusivity—each wine we offer is selected for its unique character and ability to enhance the customer experience.

For restaurants, we provide expert guidance on curating wine lists that perfectly complement your menu, creating a memorable dining experience that keeps customers coming back. Wine bars benefit from our exclusive selections and rotating wine flights that give patrons a reason to explore and return. Wine shops gain access to rare, high-quality wines that differentiate their offerings, while boutique hotels can create luxurious, personalized wine experiences that leave a lasting impression on guests.

Our goal is to not only supply you with exceptional wines but also to support your growth and success. We offer marketing support, staff training, and flexible distribution options to ensure your wine program thrives. With Gladiator Wine Distribution, you’re not just adding wine to your inventory—you’re enhancing your brand, delighting your customers, and driving your business forward.

Name: Sullivan Rutherford Estate
Description:
Situated in the heart of Napa Valley, Sullivan Rutherford Estate spans of 26 acres of vineyards and lush gardens. At the center are the family residence and winery which are open to visitors with an advance appointment. 

For nearly fifty years the Estate has been an oasis for world-class wine lovers, artists, chefs, friends, and to this day remains a destination for discerning wine collectors. The Estate was founded in 1972 by James ("Jim") O’Neil Sullivan, a visionary of Rutherford, a premier Napa Valley appellation for Cabernet Sauvignon, on the advice of world-renowned wine pioneer André Tchelistcheff. Jim's passion for creating great wine predated the 1976 Judgement of Paris which famously recognized Napa Valley wines as among the best in the world.

Today, the Estate continues to build on its legacy of growing and crafting world-class Cabernet Sauvignon. Under new family ownership in 2018, a renewed world-class leadership team is deeply investing in its vineyard and hospitality programs; plans are underway to build a state of the art winery beginning in 2021. 

Led by entrepreneur Juan Pablo Torres-Padilla, the family-driven ownership recognized some of the best wines in the world as well as the potential to craft a unique, intimate, selective, top-class wine-centric experience. “We’re building upon the foundation laid by James O’Neil Sullivan, and the estate he created during his lifetime. His deep commitment to the vineyards and innovative winemaking practices present us with tremendous opportunity. We share his values of hard work, discipline, and the pursuit of excellence in all we do, and we're committed to give to the Estate's wines the recognition they deserve as the best in Rutherford, Napa Valley, and the world,” says Torres-Padilla.

Name: Excell
Description:
Laboratorio con su casa matriz en Francia y con sucursales en España y Sudamérica (Chile y Aegentina).
Que se ha convertido en una ineludible ayuda en las especialidades de análisis y de asesorías para los profesionales del: vinos, espirituosos, agroalimentaria y construcción de edificios sensible (of de trabajo, bodegas, naves de barricas, etc.).

Name: Ops Wines Ltd
Description:
PS Wines is committed to the highest standards of quality, taste and value for money.
We have explored the hidden corners of Portugal's wine industry, visiting vineyards and meeting producers to ensure we bring only the best to the UK. We want to share these flavour stories with you.
If you need some advice about what wines would suit you best, we love to share our thoughts and expertise with you. Just give us a call to discuss your needs, and we'll be happy to help.

Name: Moonlight Meadery LLC
Description:
We are a world class, craft winery from Londonderry New Hampshire, specializing in meads: wines made from honey. The diversity of the offerings often leaves people speechless, while the flavors have them asking for it at their local stores. Stop by to find out why "History never tasted so good". Try the oldest fermented beverage, "Romance By the Glass". Distributed nationwide both here in the United States, and Australia.

It all started back in 1995, when Michael, our founder and head mead maker,  tried a cyser (apple and honey mead) for the first time.  Since that first sip Michael has developed a passion, and a masterful skill at making international award winning meads. Michael Fairbrother has started Moonlight Meadery, with a mission to bring ultra premium meads to the market place.  It is more than a product and it is more than a process, it's our obsession.

Our meads will be unique, and unlike anything you have ever tried, you will find it incredible!   We are going to embrace the unique nature of natural honey as minimally processed as possible.

Name: Bodega Margot
Description:
Elaboramos vinos Single Vineyard de alta gama, con uvas propias y en su propia bodega situada en Cordón del Plata, Valle de Uco a 1.100 m.s.n.m. (Mendoza, Argentina).

El prestigio de nuestros vinos y espumantes se ha forjado sobre una calidad sostenida y estilo enológico moderno, que ha sido premiado con sucesivas medallas en concursos internacionales de renombre y altas puntuaciones de profesionales y prensa especializada.

A su vez, los vinos y espumantes de Bodega Margot han logrado diferenciarse en un mercado competitivo a partir de una potente identidad conceptual y diseño de vanguardia.

Name: Vinothentic UK
Description: Created in 2000 by current owner director Francois Domange CMA to represent and promote high quality artisan world wines made by family growers who use ancestral traditional methods of viticulture. The company looks after an exclusive portfolio of growers world wide whose wine can be found in bars, restaurants, independent shops, private clubs and hotels across London, as well as further afield. Vinothentic has a reputation for providing excellent customer service across both the on-trade and in its ex-cellar operations.

Name: Organic Vodka
Description:
The Spirit of The Faroe Islands
The Faroese people have always believed in the power of their water. Our Vodka has been developed especially for the Heavenly water that was discovered 1.5 km. deep in a mountainside on the southern island of Suðuroy
Our Organic Vodka is made of sustainably farmed, all-natural, certified EU-organic ingredients to bring you a significantly better vodka and support a better environment. 
Our Vodka is made and labeled by hand in small batches so you can be sure that each bottle is given the necessary care to create a spirit of the highest level of quality. That’s why you won’t find things like High Fructose Corn Syrup or artificial preservatives or flavorings in our spirits.
When you try, share, or buy our Vodka bottle, you can rest assured we have exhaustively searched for the finest ingredients available. 
Why Organic?
Organic means quality. Starting with crops untainted by pesticides and sewage sludge fertilizers, organic products are already free of chemicals used in the fields that may taint the final product. But organic also means that no shortcuts are taken in the distillation process, like nitrates used in fermentation or chemical “blending agents” added at the end of the process. Organic products only achieve outstanding quality by starting with exceptional raw ingredients and distilling them with care.

Name: 7 Colores - Wines of Chile
Description:
7 Colores is the new Winery of "Empresas Juan Yarur" (7th Biggest Holding in Chile). Our focus is the development of private labels in competitive prices with market oriented quality wines. 

Our philosophy is based on achieving a competitive price delivering an excellent quality for a customized bottled product.

For more information please visit our website: www.7coloreschilewine.cl

Name: Dr. Wine
Description:

Notre concept comprend quatre volets : 

 Un bar à vin haut-de-gamme avec plus de 300 références de vin, 	soigneusement sélectionnées et conseillées par nos sommeliers,

Name: Manchuela Wine
Description:
En el año 1997, un grupo de viticultores y bodegas de vino de la comarca de La Manchuela crearon la Asociación Pro-Vinos Denominación de Origen Manchuela, con el fin de regular, defender, promocionar y comercializar el vino de la futura denominación.

La D.O. Manchuela comenzó a representar a un conjunto de bodegas de vino de las provincias de Albacete y Cuenca que empezaban a destacar internacionalmente por la alta calidad y singularidad de su tipo de vino.

En el año 2000, la Consejería de Agricultura y Medio Ambiente de España reconoce de manera oficial su actividad de regulación, defensa, promoción y ayuda a la comercialización.

En julio de 2017, La Denominación de Origen Manchuela, pasa de ser Agrupación de Productores a Interprofesional Agroalimentaria.

Desde sus inicios, ha desarrollado un gran trabajo de proyección de la imagen y sabor de su vino, tanto en el mercado nacional como en el internacional.

Apostar por la calidad y la imagen de la Denominación de Origen Manchuela es una baza segura que ya está dando sus frutos.

El esfuerzo de sus gentes, el amor por sus tierras y una cultura comprometida con el vino son las razones que garantizan su éxito.

Name: Bodegas Vilano
Description: Bodegas Vilano se ha convertido a lo largo de sus 55 años de historia, en una de las bodegas más grandes de la Denominación de Origen Ribera del Duero. Pero a su capacidad une dos señas de identidad: la calidad de sus vinos y la innovación

Name: Margan Wines & Restaurant
Description: Margan was established in 1996 in the picturesque village of Broke, Hunter Valley which is Australia’s oldest wine region. All Margan wines are Estate Grown and made as well as certified Sustainably Farmed. Margan has been rated a five-star winery (James Halliday Wine Companion) since 2009, twice winner of the Hunter Valley Cellar Door of the Year, Viticulturist of the Year winner and NSW Tourism Hall of Fame winner in recognition of our cellar door, winery and restaurant.

Formed in Bondi in 2004, ASM proudly owns Australia’s number 3 selling vodka brand, VODKA O; Tequila Blu, our award winning Tequila brand made by the world’s most awarded Tequila Distillery; and VDKA 6100, a super-premium Vodka brand made in collaboration with Robert De Niro. Name: Anteroz
Description:
Anteroz is the story of friends who found a flavour and a secret known by few but worth sharing with the whole world: mamajuana, a botanical sugarcane-based spirit aged on a 500-year old Dominican tradition hailed as a source of vitality, the cure to whatever tortures and an aphrodisiac. The stories behind mamajuana and the joy and passion with which the Dominicans serve and enjoy this exotic drink personifies the way they take life itself: as if it is not lived to its fullest, unless you do what turns you on.

To share this message with the world, we set out to create a global brand and spread this message in a bottle.

Name: The Vice
Description:
The Vice Wine is a luxury wine brand made in small batches. Each batch is a blend of hand selected wine barrels that best express the grape varietal and the region that it comes from. The Vice Wine is a result of passionate labor, sustainable farming, a long expertise of the wine industry and a current understanding of the consumer’s wine trend.

We believe that the best wines in the world aren’t the most expensive ones. We thrive at providing the best quality wine at the best value.

Name: Celler Devinssi, DOQ Priorat
Description:
Celler Devinssi és un petit celler artesanal a Gratallops, on elaborem vins DOQ Priorat. El Priorat ho té tot: natura, història, productes d'alta qualitat (vins i olis abans de tot) i molt bones ofertes d'enoturisme. Volem compartir aquesta terra amb vosaltres i us convidem a gaudir d'una experiència enoturística al nostre celler i a les nostres vinyes. Una experiència especial d'enoturisme que ofereix el nostre celler és l'apadrinament de vinyes, per saber-ne més visiteu el nostre web.

Bodega Devinssi es una pequeña bodega artesanal en Gratallops. El Priorat lo tiene todo: naturaleza, historia, productos de alta calidad (vinos y aceites ante todo) y muy buenas ofertas de enoturismo. Queremos compartir esta tierra con vosotros y os invitamos a disfrutar de una experiencia enoturística en nuestra bodega y nuestros viñedos. Una experiencia especial de enoturismo que ofrece nuestra bodega es el apadrinamiento de viñas, para saber más visite nuestro web.

Devinssi Winery is a small artisan wine producer in Gratallops, where we elaborate DOQ Priorat wines. Priorat has it all: nature, history, high-quality products (wines and olive oils before all) and many good wine tourism proposals. We'd like to share this land with you and you're welcome to come over and enjoy a wine tourism experience at our winery and at our vineyards A particular wine tourism experience that you can live at our winery is grapevine adoption, to learn more, please visit our website.

Винодельня Девинсси - это маленькая семейная бодега в Гратальопсе, где мы производим вина DOQ Priorat. У Приората есть всё: природа, история, продукты высочайшего качества (прежде всего, вино и оливковое масло), а также широкое предложение по винному туризму. Мы хотим поделиться с вами нашим краем и приглашаем вам насладиться экскурсией на винодельню и на виноградник. Особое место среди наших винных туров занимает опека над виноградником; чтобы узнать подробнее, посетите наш сайт.

We produce quality organic wines!
From the heart of Abruzzo

Name: Heritage Estate Winery & Events Inc
Description:
Founded in 2014, Heritage Estate Winery and Cidery sprouted from the McArthur’s passion for wine. Peter learned the craft of cider making at Peter Mitchell’s Cider Academy at Cornell University which led to the planting of over 15,000 grapevines and 1250 fruit trees. Peter’s family first settled in the area in the 1850’s so it is no surprise that Heritage Estate features a century farmhouse in addition to over 20 acres of sprawling heirloom grapevines and apple orchards.

ZB Hospitality Group Inc.  are the proud owners and operators of Heritage Estate Winery and Cidery, Barrie’s first and only boutique vineyard and cidery situated in the heart of Simcoe County. Heritage Estate offers beverages uniquely crafted out of 100% Ontario apples, free from additives or preservatives with less than half the sugar content of most larger commercial ciders. The sprawling estate includes a century farmhouse, tasting room, wedding venue and state-of-the-art on-site processing facility.

Name: Ditton Wine & Spirits
Description:
DITTON WINE & SPIRITS buy and sell the world's most sought-after wine, champagne, whisky and spirits. 

Founded in 2004, Ditton has always been intentionally small—never more than six people—to preserve exclusivity and direct relationships with clients. From the start, Ditton runs on values of honesty, reliability and discretion, and on slim margins (more comparable to wholesale than luxury retail) so that collectors, investors and connoisseurs receive unmatched value.

Our specialism is sourcing the finest, hardest‑to‑access bottles: Bordeaux classed growths, Burgundy grands crus, SuperTuscans, Napa icons, and prestige cuvées alongside trophy whiskies like Macallan, Karuizawa, Yamazaki, Bowmore, Pappy van Winkle. We supply both high‑net‑worth private collectors seeking discreet access and merchants who appreciate our unrivalled sourcing experience.

From our base in London we trade worldwide. Our network spans 20years of trusted relationships built on consistent delivery and fair dealing.

Ditton has grown under the radar through reputation and referrals rather than mass marketing. We offer clients discreet access to rare bottles, fair pricing and personal service. We intend to remain small and exclusive while selectively expanding our high‑net‑worth client base.
We are both wholesalers, selling to the trade worldwide, as online retailers. Our client base is international, with an important and very fast growing private client group in the UK.  

We have an excellent reputation for being a reliable source of investment grade wine and whisky, at the most competitive prices.

Name: Franklin Hill Vineyards
Description: Franklin Hill Vineyards is a wine and spirits company based out of 7833 Franklin Hill Rd, Bangor, Pennsylvania, United States.

Name: Podere ai Valloni
Description:
Podere ai Valloni was the first winery to be registered as a Boca doc producer.
The ancient Cà Finazzi started producing Boca in the 18th century.
The Boca doc was born in 1969, but sadly, after only a few years the vines almost disappeared in the whole region.
In 1980 Guido and Cristiana Sertorio bought the old winery and started producing Boca doc again. The enologist Luigi Veronelli first discovered our wine in 1987 praising its qualities in the magazine EV, pleased of this unexpected rebirth.
Since the beginning Podere ai Valloni was not only a winery, but a ‘garden-vineyard’ cultivated with the maximum respect for the environment. Since 2014 we are an organic winery.
Our wine is made only with our own grapes in total traceability. Our yield is only 4000 kilograms per hectare, although the possible yield in this area is 9000. This is because we make a deliberate strict selection at every step of the cultivation, preferring quality than quantity.
For the same reason, we let our Boca Vigna Cristiana mature in oak casks for at least 3 years, and then let it evolve in the bottle for 12 months before we sell it. It’s almost twice longer than the law requires, but we believe that it is crucial to soften the strong tannins of Nebbiolo and Bonarda novarese and harmonize the wine.
We now produce, together with our Boca, also two Colline Novaresi: Sass Russ (50% Nebbiolo and 50% Uva Rara) - a younger, fresh wine, the perfect choice for a good antipasto alla piemontese - and a young Nebbiolo, Gratus (85% Nebbiolo grapes and 15% Vespolina).
Today, Anna and her husband Andrea give continuity to the founders’ dream of a beautiful vineyard and excellent wines, and the younger generation is already growing up...

Name: Château La Pointe | Pomerol
Description:
Château La Pointe, avec ses 23 hectares de vignes, fait partie des propriétés les plus anciennes de Pomerol. 
Le domaine a toujours produit des vins de qualité, mais les professionnels du vin s’accordent à dire que la « Belle » s’était assoupie quelque temps. C’est pourquoi un projet ambitieux a vu le jour en 2008 avec pour objectif d’exprimer tout le potentiel du vignoble et renouer avec le prestige passé. Concrètement, Château La Pointe est passé d’une gestion globale et approximative à une approche extrêmement précise et rigoureuse, parcelle par parcelle.
Et bien sûr, la conduite de l’activité du domaine vise à limiter tout impact sur l’environnement et préserver un terroir unique et précieux.

Name: Fetén Wines
Description:
Fetén Wines es un proyecto de distribución de vinos elaborados en el Massís del Garraf y en bodegas de otras zonas con personalidad, tal y como nosotros entendemos el vino: mediante la agricultura ecológica, respetando el viñedo, la tierra y el medio ambiente, con variedades autóctonas…
Todo ello imprescindible para ser un vino Fetén!

Nuestros vinos sorprenden, te transportan al lugar de origen a través de los sentidos. Conocerás a sus productores y las historias que los han traído hasta aquí.

Combinamos naturaleza e historia para ofrecer una experiencia perfecta, disfrutando del vino y su juego gastronómico: una experiencia Fetén wines.

Name: Ron Caribú
Description: Estudiamos, aprendimos y analizamos los 350 años de la cultura ronera para reinventarla. Nos capacitamos para revolucionar la costumbre, guiar el cambio y marcar la diferencia. Ganadores de premios en San Francisco, New York, Miami, Londres y Moscú.

Name: Rob Into The Wine
Description:
Prestation de service en vin
Formation, dégustation et événementiel

Voici les différentes prestations proposées par Rob Into The Wine :

Pour la dégustation 
- Dégustations privées à domicile pour 6 à 10 personnes.
- Dégustation accord mets/vins pour 6 à 10 personnes
- Dégustation verticales / horizontales (sur demande)

Pour les formations :

- Les bases du vin
- Découverte d’un vignoble
Toutes les formations se font sur une journée.

Pour les entreprises :
- Organisation de TeamBuilding dans votre entreprise pour souder vos équipes atour d’une dégustation avec des jeux d’équipe
- Organisation de séminaires dans des domaines partenaires

Événementiel : à venir.

Vous retrouverez tous les tarifs des prestations sur le site internet de l’entreprise. Pour les demandes particulières, merci de me contacter par e-mail.

L’art divin :
On ne boit pas pour oublier mais on déguste pour se souvenir.
– Philippe Faure-Brac  (Meilleur Sommelier du Monde 1992)

Name: VBC Experiencias
Description: Empresa dedicada a crear experiencia únicas  a través de los sentidos ser humano, el vino, arte y gourmet.

Name: Chareau
Description: We create beautiful, delicious drinks that are all-natural, light, & refreshing using local California ingredients.

Name: Bodega Finca Marañuela
Description:
En Bodega Finca Marañuela producimos vinos naturales sin sulfitos ni aditivos de la variedad listán negro, procedentes de cepas antiguas sembradas en pie franco y en pequeñas parcelas situadas a 400 metros sobre el nivel del mar. El terreno en el que se sitúa nuestra cosecha está asentado sobre suelos volcánicos prefiloxéricos y para cultivarlo seguimos el sistema tradicional de conducción en cordón trenzado, típico del Valle de La Orotava, al norte de Tenerife.
Tras una cuidadosa vendimia manual seleccionada, pisamos la uva, fermentando esta con levaduras autóctonas en lagar abierto. Efectuamos el descube por gravedad, sin intervención mecánica. De la pasta prensada según el método tradicional de la zona, con madera y soga, nacen nuestros singulares vinos, sin clarificar ni filtrar y embotellados artesanalmente.
Location: La Orotava, Santa Cruz de Tenerife

Name: Tenuta Santa Maria di Gaetano Bertani
Description:
The bertani family’s generations of winemaking experience have helped to form a unique philosophy for the creation of fine wines, through meticulous care of the vineyard, sustainable viticultural methods, time-honored techniques, Veronese varietals and the adoption of current innovations. Careful work in the cellar and long aging serve to preserve the product of the vine, bringing a distinct equilibrium to our wines as well as elegance and a great potential for aging in the bottle.

The 16th century cellars of the Villa Mosconi Bertani in the Valpolicella Classica, the Tenuta Santa Maria in the Illasi Valley and the properties at Grezzana comprise a diverse terroir in which the major appellations of Veronese DOC wines may be found.

Name: Bodegas Esteban Martin
Description: Bodegas Esteban Martín, a family business founded in 2003 belonging to the PDO Cariñena, a pioneer in environmental sustainability. The winery has an extension of 350 hectares. vineyards at the foot of the Sierra de Algairén (Zaragoza) and its facilities have more than 400 oak barrels and IFS certification, which opens the doors to quality exports. It currently has a presence in more than 35 countries and the international weight is very high, as it sells 90% of its production abroad, about three and a half million bottles. In addition, one of the company's objectives is to create sustainable wines with the environment and that express the characteristics of the land. In this way they allocate 30% of their surface to organic vineyards and have thus reduced the environmental impact. They were also pioneers with the use of pheromones and now they are also pioneers with ozone spraying; ecological treatment that they already use in 40% of the vineyard. For two years, his wines have been certified as vegan.

Name: Hans Rottensteiner Winery
Description:
For over 50 years we have been continuing on the dream of our grandfather, Hans, in producing our own wine.

Founded in 1956, Hans' focus was selling open wines from the winery to Switzerland. In the 1980’s, his son Toni changed over to marketing bottled wines, and since 2001 he has been supported by his grandson Hannes. Not only have the grapes from the family’s 10 hectares  been processed from the onset, but also that of 60 regional grape growers  as well. This close cooperation has extended for generations and is essentially responsible for the excellent quality of the wines.

We have been consciously committed to the varietal character of the particular wines  with a clear focus on the Bolzano varieties Lagrein and St. Magdalener.

Name: ALPINA WEIN
Description:
ALPINA WEIN ist als Importeur und Distributor weit über die Grenzen Deutschlands und Europas hinaus bekannt und zudem Exklusivpartner berühmter Klassiker wie SASSICAIA, LODOVICO und CONTE COSTANTI aus Italien, ALAIN BURGUET aus dem Burgund, JEAN-LOUIS CHAVE aus dem Rhônetal, PASCAL DOQUET aus der Champagne oder CHATEAU MONTELENA und RIDGE VINEYARDS aus Kalifornien. Last but not least arbeiten wir seit 1983 eng mit den großen CRUS CLASSÉS des Bordelais einschließlich der Premiers Crus zusammen, die über die Hälfte des ALPINA WEIN Sortiments repräsentieren.

Zu unseren Kunden zählen etwa 1.000 Restaurants der gehobenen und Spitzengastronomie, Weinhandlungen im In- und Ausland sowie eine große Zahl privater Weinliebhaber, die die ALPINA WEIN Philosophie - trinkreife Weine in großer Jahrgangstiefe, Vielfalt an Flaschengrößen, perfekte Lagerung und sichere Herkunft - kennen und schätzen gelernt haben.

Im ALPINA WEIN Onlineshop findet sich eines der umfangreichsten Weinsortimente Deutschlands!

www.alpinawein.de/datenschutz
www.alpinawein.de/de/impressum.html

Name: Le Caveau
Description:
Le Caveau vous souhaite la bienvenue sur son compte LinkedIn 

Depuis plus de 50 ans à Lagny-sur-Marne (77), Le Caveau, caviste indépendant, est devenu un lieu incontournable dans le domaine des vins et spiritueux. 

Nous proposons 1 500 références en magasin, pour un stock de plus de 15 000 bouteilles dans notre réserve climatisée : vins, whiskies (200 variétés), rhums (150), gins, vodkas et autres, champagnes et bières artisanales. 

Notre équipe, emmenée par Céline (notre cheffe sommelière 2 étoiles Michelin), sélectionne notre gamme afin de vous apporter une offre différenciante et adaptée à vos besoins.

→ Pour les entreprises :

Vins et spiritueux pour vos événements et cocktails
 Cadeaux d’affaires personnalisés
 Privatisation du Caveau et de son jardin pour des soirées œnologiques exclusives 

→ Pour les restaurateurs :

 Conseil personnalisé pour bâtir ou enrichir votre carte des vins
 Sélection adaptée à votre cuisine, votre clientèle et votre positionnement tarifaire
 Livraisons sous 24h

→ Pour tous :

 Dégustations et soirées thématiques, planches à partager et créations gourmandes
 Ateliers et rencontres avec des vignerons
 
Contactez-nous pour un accompagnement personnalisé.

Notre équipe vous accueille au 43 rue du Pont Hardy 77400 Lagny-sur-Marne

 Du mardi au vendredi : 10h-13h30 / 15h-19h30

 Le samedi : 10h-19h30

 01 64 02 06 77 |  contact@le-caveau.net

L’abus d’alcool est dangereux pour la santé. À consommer avec modération.

Name: CHAMPAGNES & CHATEAUX LTD
Description:
CHAMPAGNES & CHATEAUX LTD is a Wine and Spirits company founded in 1989 in London, United Kingdom. Owned by the highly respected Champagne family of Alain Thiénot, we have had the same management team for the last 35 years and have a close-knit team who work with dedication and joie-de-vivre. 
We owe our success to our principals who vintage after vintage, deliver us astonishing wines with style and character. Very much like us, our wine producers are also primarily privately owned with much the same approach and philosophy as ours. While we look for commercial qualities, it is personality that interests us and our customers the most. While you won't find our wines in big chain stores, you will find them on the tables of some of the UK's finest hotels and restaurants, as well as on the shelves of fine quality independent wine merchants.

Name: Bodega Huellas del Tiétar
Description:
Bodega situada en el Valle del Tiétar; al sur de la Sierra de Gredos.

Pertenciente a la Denominación de Origen Protegida Cebreros.

Name: Heritage Link Brands
Description:
Heritage Link Brands is a globally trusted importer, exporter, and curator high quality, fair trade, organic and sustainable wine, food, and related marketing services. Established in 2005, Heritage Link Brands holds the distinction of being the
largest Black wine importer and producer in the world, with a production capacity of 70+ million liters of wine annually. 

Company founders Khary and Selena Cuffe began with a clear vision to provide social impact goods and services of the highest quality, thereby improving the lives of people around the globe. Their leadership, coupled with sound strategies and social responsibility, has produced a world-class organization rooted in sustainability and transformational business practices.

Name: Wyhus Belp AG
Description:
In der Region verwurzelt und der Innovation verpflichtet.
Alles begann vor rund 40 Jahren, als wir unsere Liebe fürs Piemont entdeckten und viele Weinliebhaber in der Region damit begeistern konnten. Seit dieser Zeit pflegen wir das Wissen um den Wein und um den Genuss. Unsere Faszination für das, was wir tun, ist seit unseren Anfängen ungebrochen. Mittlerweile verwöhnen wir unsere anspruchsvolle Kundschaft mit Weinen, die weit über die Grenzen des Piemonts hinausgehen. 
In den vielen Jahren unseres Wirkens haben wir der regionalen Weingemeinde immer wieder neue Impulse geben können und damit auch Innovationsfreude und Aufgeschlossenheit gegenüber Unbekanntem bewiesen. Dabei ist natürlich auch unser Weinwissen und unsere Fachkompetenz kontinuierlich angereichert worden. Dieses Wissen, diese Leidenschaft und die Freude an nachhaltigen Kundenbeziehungen mit Weinliebhabern, Fachhandel und Gastronomie machen uns auch zum vertrauenswürdigen Partner.

Name: Viña Ranquilhue
Description: Viña Ranquilhue elabora vinos de autor a escala humana. Buscamos uvas en otros valles para transformarlas en vinos capaces de emocionar y ser una experiencia inolvidable.

Name: Athenaeum Beaune
Description:
Depuis 1989, l’Athenaeum est l’adresse incontournable à Beaune pour les amateurs de vin et de sa culture. Située juste en face des Hospices, l’Athenaeum est la librairie indépendante de référence mondiale concernant l’oenologie. C’est aussi une cave qui propose une sélection de vins de Bourgogne en provenance des domaines les plus prestigieux. Vous y trouverez également tous les objets utiles à la dégustation du vin. 
L’Athenaeum est un site unique.

Le magasin, sur plus de 1000 m², se divise en sept espaces dédiés :
•	La cave 
700 références de vins, Bourgogne et hors Bourgogne en provenance des domaines les plus prestigieux mais aussi les vins de jeunes talents à découvrir.
Espace dégustation privatisable
•	Les objets du vin
Verres, carafes, tire-bouchons…
Atelier du Vin, Coravin, Zalto, Lehman Glass, Riedel, Château-Laguiole, Durand, Spiegelan, Ovarius, Forges de Laguiole, Pulltex, Le Creuset, Peugeot, Vinturi
•	La librairie du vin 
Plus de 2000 références (en français et en langues étrangères)
Une offre large de cartes viticoles.
•	Gastronomie, art de la table
Livres de cuisine, vaisselles, ustensiles, accessoires…
•	Librairie de littérature générale
Romans, polars, essais, BD…


•	Décoration et cadeaux
•	Espace jeunesse 
Livres et jeux

L’équipe de l’Athenaeum est là pour vous informer, vous faire découvrir, vous conseiller selon vos goûts et votre budget.
Nous avons à cœur de favoriser le « made in France », de mettre en avant des objets et des marques qui ont une histoire, un savoir-faire, un terroir d’origine. 
L’Athenaeum est le carrefour de passions, un lieu qui fait rimer viticulture et littérature, un rendez-vous indispensable dans le centre de Beaune, capitale des vins de Bourgogne.

Name: Domaine Rémy Nodin
Description: Fondé au 12ème siècle par le seigneur de Beauregard, le domaine de La Beylesse est un corps de ferme fortifié. Théâtre des guerres de religions, il est incendié à la révolution française. Propriété de la famille Nodin depuis 1910, Rémy et son épouse Amandine sont la quatrième génération. Ils continuent à écrire l’histoire du plus vieux domaine en activité de Saint-Péray.

Name: Hunter's Wines
Description: Hunter’s Wines are recognised as one of the pioneers of the Marlborough wine industry and one of New Zealand’s best known family owned wineries. Established in 1979, Hunter’s Wines have won over 200 GOLD MEDALS and more than 40 TROPHIES. Still at the helm today is highly acclaimed Jane Hunter, CNZM, OBE.

Name: Mt. Boucherie Estate Winery
Description:
Located on the slopes above Okanagan Lake in West Kelowna lives Mt. Boucherie Estate Winery. First started as a grape-growing business in 1968, Mt. Boucherie soon became one of the largest vineyard holdings in BC, farming 200 acres of land in both the Similkameen and Okanagan Valleys. 

In 2020, following 20 years of running from a modest tasting room, they opened the doors to a brand-new luxurious wine experience centre. The 15,000-square-foot building features a dining lounge, tasting room and multiple private event facilities with some of the best views in the valley.

Name: Happy Living Philippines Corporation
Description: Bringing you what makes you happy, since 1994 - through a selection of curated and well-loved wines

Name: Bulos Y. Zumot & Co. L.L.C
Description:
Since 1954, Bulos Y. Zumot & Co. has been a prominent figure in Jordan's wine and spirits industry. As a top distributor of renowned international wine and spirit brands, both in the local market and duty-free zones, the company has established itself as a leader in the field.

Originally founded in 1954 as a distributor of local wines and spirits, the company expanded its portfolio in 1962 to include imported international wines and spirits. By 1987, it had obtained licenses to produce Arak and spirits under the trademarks of international owners, further solidifying its presence in the market.

In 1995, the company took a significant step by establishing its first vineyard to produce high-quality Jordanian wines. Additionally, in 1997, it played a pivotal role in the founding of Jordanian Duty-Free Shops.

As a family-owned enterprise, Bulos Y. Zumot & Co. has seen three generations actively involved in its operations, working together to drive sales and marketing initiatives for their esteemed brands. With over six decades of industry experience, the Zumot family remains dedicated to fostering the ongoing growth and success of their brand portfolio.

Name: Domaine Cartier-Potelle
Description:
Domaine Cartier-Potelle, producteur de vins, cidres et cidres de glace situé à Rougemont.

Situé dans un site enchanteur sur le versant sud au pied de la croix du mont Rougemont, le Domaine Cartier-Potelle élabore et désire partager avec sa clientèle, des produits de grande qualité et spécifiques au terroir québécois tel que le cidre de glace.
 
Avec une vue imprenable sur le mont St-Grégoire et toute la vallée montérégienne environnante, venez déguster nos cidres tout en profitant d'une agréable ballade dans notre verger qui compte près de 15 000 pommiers avec plus d'une douzaine de variétés de pommes.
 
Venez nous rencontrer au Domaine pour partager les fruits que la nature nous offre dans un cadre exceptionnel à juste 30 minutes de Montréal.

Name: Domaine Thibert
Description:
Le domaine met tout en œuvre quotidiennement pour récolter des raisins sains et transmettre l'identité de chaque terroir. 

* Vignerons artisans depuis toujours à Fuissé
* Viticulture écologique - en cours de certification en agriculture biologique 
* Transmission d'un savoir-faire 
* 100% autonomes : raisins issus exclusivement de nos vignes
* Approche parcellaire depuis 20 ans
* Élevages de 2 ans pour tous nos vins : stabilité naturelle, moins de sulfites, pas ou peu de filtration

C’est une volonté de notre part de présenter des vins affinés : il s’agit d’une de nos typicité, résultat d’efforts effectués durant 11 années pour la transition.
Les vins que nous proposons sont prêts à être appréciés et peuvent se conserver encore plusieurs années. Ils ont été stockés dans notre cave.

Name: Tonnellerie Mercier
Description:
Créé en 1960, la Tonnellerie Mercier n’a cessé de se développer pour faire aujourd’hui partie des tonnelleries françaises incontournables. Située à Barbezieux (Charente - France), entre Bordeaux et Cognac, son unité de production est certifiée HACCP.

Dans la même veine, gage de sérieux et de traçabilité assurée, l’approvisionnement en chêne français de la Tonnellerie Mercier est totalement intégré. Notre atelier de fente, situé à quelques kilomètres de la Tonnellerie, fournit 100% de la matière première nécessaire à notre production.

Résolument dans l’air du temps et tournée vers l’avenir, pour toujours mieux répondre à vos besoins, la Tonnellerie Mercier vous propose une palette de produits diversifiée et une offre spécifique originale.

Name: TOS DISTILLERIE
Description: T.O.S Distillerie is an heir to brewer’s know-how acquired over the last 19 years from “Brasserie Saint-Germain” known for its beer Page 24. It is a distillery founded in 2017 from the North of France. Our distiller, Katy Gravina is one of the few female distillers in France. It is her know-how that allows us to ensure the quality and authenticity of our products. Committed to the life of the region, we favour local supplies for the making of our products and respect a traditional know-how.

Name: Le Point Gin
Description:
Le Point G Gin est un gin premium originaire de la région de Toulousaine, qui est apparu pour la première fois en 2017, avant que l'avènement autour des spiritueux artisanaux ne se manifeste en France.

Ce breuvage fabuleux est rempli d'histoire... Il était une fois, l’association entre un mixologue et un maître distillateur issu d’une famille fabricante de liqueurs depuis cinq générations. Situé sur la route du Pastel, une position charnière aux portes de Toulouse, des Pyrénées et de la Méditerranée. 

L'élixir est composé de onze ingrédients, avec la spiruline et la violette, comme ingrédients essentiels. Véritable emblème de la région toulousaine, la violette est familière à Benoît Serres, car le grand-père est le créateur de la première liqueur de violette dans les années 1950. 

Cette fleur offre un aspect gourmand et floral au gin, tout en apportant une certaine rondeur pour un alcool généralement très sec. La spiruline quant à elle, procure le côté marin et chlorophyllien et est qualifiée de super aliment. Le point gin est un savoureux mélange entre terre et mer, donnant naissance à un spiritueux surprenant.

Selon Alexandre You, son gin doit inspirer de nouvelles recettes de cocktails. Dans ce sens, le gin étant actuellement dans une phase de renaissance, le spiritueux toulousain se veut plus aromatique et doux que les gins traditionnels ce qui facilite l'association avec en grand nombre de produit. Ainsi, le mixologue cible une clientèle premium, friande de produits locaux et désireuse de profiter de nouvelles saveurs inédites. 

Aujourd'hui le point gin est présent dans 150 points de vente et dispose de prestigieux partenaires à l'instar de chez Castel, institution mythique des nuits parisiennes. 

Plus récemment, les deux associés se sont lancés dans un nouveau parie ; un parfum de gin avec des produits associés tels qu'une bougie ou encore un diffuseur. Cette fragrance pleine de caractère, a été developpé par le maître parfumeur Sylvain Cara.

Name: Sommelierparticulier.com
Description:
Sommelierparticulier.com is a French-based company that mostly helps individuals to build personal wine cellars, and Sommelierparticulier.pro help professionals to create restaurants’ wine menus or manage their wine stocks. Advice is given by famous sommeliers/wine waiters who have been working in Michelin’s starred restaurants. Sommelier Particulier also organize plenty of wine-related events for individuals and companies.

 Sommelierparticulier.com est basée en France et a pour objectif principal d’aider les particuliers à construire leurs caves à vins personnalisées. Sommelierparticulier.pro assiste les professionnels de la restauration dans la création de leur carte des vins et plus largement dans leur gestion globale des vins. Les conseils sont principalement donnés par des sommeliers de renom, ayant travaillé dans des établissements étoilés. Sommelier Particulier organise également de nombreux événements autour du vin, pour les particuliers, mais aussi pour les entreprises.

Name: KTW GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
KIRKs Total Wine - Innovative Oenology and Beverage Technology
KIRKs Total Wine specializes in providing comprehensive consulting solutions for the wine and beverage industry, integrating expert advice with state-of-the-art beverage technology. With an international team, we bring a wealth of expertise and diverse perspectives to every project in the beverage sector.
Our consulting services are tailored to meet the unique needs of wineries and other beverage industries worldwide. We have successfully established markets in numerous European countries and beyond, including Australia. Our extensive industry experience allows us to offer a broad range of solutions designed to optimize production, improve product quality, and enhance operational efficiency.
We offer a wide portfolio that includes specialized oenological products, analytical services, tasting consultations, barrique and tonneaux, diverse accessories, barrel cleaning and cellar hygiene products, premium oak adjuncts, and jars and containers crafted from stoneware, earthenware, porcelain, concrete, and stainless steel.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Das Spektrum des Angebots reicht von der oenologischen Beratung bis hin zu innovativer Kellereitechnologie. 
Neben einem breit gefächerten Portfolio an Barrique- und Tonneaux-Fässern verschiedener Hersteller gehören ein umfangreiches Angebot an Zubehör, Produkte zur Fassreinigung und Kellerhygiene, Holzfass-Alternativen (Chips, Blocks, Staves) sowie ausgewählte oenologische Produkte genau so zum Angebot, wie Spezialbehälter aus Beton und Keramik.

Name: Beverage Control Inc
Description: Beverage Control Inc is a Wine and Spirits company located in 5060 N Royal Atlanta Dr # 21, Tucker, Georgia, United States.

Name: Cape Horn Tequila
Description:
Cape Horn Tequila was born from a voyage most would never dare.

Our founder, Taylor Grieger, a Navy veteran, didn't launch this brand from a boardroom. He launched it from a sailboat. After serving as a Navy rescue swimmer, Taylor set out to round Cape Horn, the most dangerous passage on Earth. Not for glory, but to raise awareness for the silent battles Veterans and first responders face with PTSD.

What started as a mission to survive the roughest waters on Earth became something bigger: a movement to heal through adventure. That journey became the heartbeat of this brand.

"If you make it back alive,
what are you going to do?"

Today, every bottle of Cape Horn Tequila helps fund Skeleton Crew Adventures, our sister nonprofit that takes Veterans and first responders out of the darkness and into the wild—rebuilding trust, purpose, and peace along the way.

Name: Beverage Trading Company
Description: A producer

Name: Gotham East 东戈森
Description:
Shanghai is Gotham East, the leading edge of the largest spirits market in the world. Gotham East shares the sophisticated, convivial drinking culture of the cocktail renaissance with China

Leveraging the founding team's years of global beverage industry experience, and emphasising transparency, integrity, and spirits education, we aim to be the trusted partner for premium spirits brands in the most complex spirits market in the world.

Name: Vinícola Villaggio Grando
Description: Sempre prezando pela máxima qualidade dos produtos, a vinícola vem ano após ano investindo no controle de produção e aperfeiçoamento dos produtos, contando com um vinhedo de 45 hectares cuja produção chega a 300.000 garrafas, englobando tintos, brancos, espumantes e em um futuro próximo, um brandy e fortificados.

Name: Ocone 1910 | Taburno Wine County
Description:
Il legame indissolubile tra la terra e chi la lavora. Sotto la benefica protezione del monte Taburno e il suo ineguagliabile microclima, la Cantina Ocone conferma e rinnova lo storico sodalizio con i conferitori locali. La loro antica sapienza nella coltivazione delle uve è il presupposto imprescindibile di un processo guidato dall'esperienza della tradizione e orientato dalla conoscenza della ricerca moderna.

La nostra è una cantina con 100 anni di storia alle porte del borgo medievale di Ponte, nel cuore del Sannio Beneventano che si estende fino alle pendici del Monte Taburno. Raccontare il territorio in cui nascono i nostri vini vuol dire andare molto indietro nel tempo a rintracciare le origini dell’identità enologica della Campania. 

La viticoltura campana è nata con le prime popolazioni locali, Campani e Sanniti, ma si è sviluppata con la colonizzazione greca del VII sec a.C. che è venuta a confronto con le esperienze etrusche prima e romane poi, che ne ha esaltato le qualità. L’incontro di tali culture ha determinato le scelte di allevamento della vite e le varietà coltivate ancora oggi, frutto dell’introduzione di varietà greche che hanno influenzato la domesticazione di quelle originarie della Campania. In particolare, tra quelle di origine orientale, ricordiamo l’Aglianico, il cui nome deriva da ellenico, il Greco, mentre tra le altre si citano il Piedirosso, la Coda di volpe e la Falanghina. L’origine del Fiano è più incerta attribuibile secondo alcuni al Peloponneso, secondo altri alla penisola italica (ligure o laziale).

Per ricordare la tradizione vitivinicola del nostro territorio, abbiamo identificato i nostri vini con nomi di origine greca e romana che rimandano alle antiche divinità di queste culture e al simbolismo spirituale legato al vino. Esso è sintesi tra territorio e sapere dell’uomo che lo coltiva e ne vinifica i frutti della terra e del sole: in una parola è il nostro terroir.

Name: Black Infusions
Description: Our all-natural, small-batch, premium liqueurs have only two ingredients: dried fruit and booze. They're best enjoyed on the rocks or in easy and creative cocktails. We like to keep things simple. You’ll know why when you taste it.

Name: BL TubeBottling
Description:
Le spécialiste du conditionnement de vin en tube. 

Échantillons, coffrets cadeaux, kits de dégustations, calendriers de l’avent… nous vous proposons un service tout compris et une équipe expérimentée, à l’écoute des professionnels depuis plus de 30 ans.

Le système TubeBottling permet de conditionner du vin en tube sur une ligne d’embouteillage monobloc dernière génération (rinçage + inertage + remplissage + capsulage).
Résultat : une qualité sans compromis et un coût maîtrisé.

Name: V2Vin
Description: Spécialisé dans la vente de vins, bulles, spiritueux mais aussi épicerie fine : découvrez des produits d’une grande qualité, testés et validés par notre équipe d’experts et d’amateurs lors de nos Comités de Dégustation à l’aveugle

Name: Premier Group: Premier Wine & Spirits
Description: Premier Wine & Spirits is one of America's largest and most-awarded wine and spirit stores, and was recently named 2013 National Retailer of the Year by Beverage Dynamics magazine.  Based in Buffalo, NY, Premier serves the Western New York area and also sells wines across the country on its website, WineDeals.com.

Name: Azienda Agricola Mani Sagge
Description: Mani Sagge è una Cantina, Agriturismo e Wine Bar nelle colline UNESCO del Prosecco Superiore DOCG a Conegliano.

Name: FSP Wine
Description:
We are a company of creative, wine enthusiastic, associates who design innovative products, build brands and initiate trends.

Name: DrinkedIn
Description:
Bringing Happy Hour to the World – DrinkedIn an industry specific marketing platform helping you get your brands into the consumer’s glass

Launched in 2009 DrinkedIn has become the largest online community for all things alcohol. Founded by a team of friends who were passionate about their drinking, DrinkedIn was originally a social network for similar minded aficionados. DrinkedIn quickly evolved into a thriving community with over a million users who rely on DrinkedIn to access information on brands, cocktails recipes or find somewhere to drink from over 200,000 bars listings worldwide.

Smartphones provide additional opportunities to engage with consumers and DrinkedIn have developed a suite of mobile apps to help the industry do that effectively. BarFinder brings our bar listings to the palm of a consumers hand to locate all bar in the vicinity. BrandFinder collates data from across industry suppliers and distributors to enable consumers to find their favorite brands no matter where they are. We remove the headache manufactures have chasing down the details of where their brands are being sold. Aside from the mobile app a BrandFinder widget can be placed on a brand’s website or Facebook page to give followers quick access to a complete list of retail outlets. We recognize the value of this data and pay distributors for their contribution.

BarDeals puts a state of the art coupon and loyalty platform into the hands of retailers. With BarDeals outlets can broadcast promotions to consumers in their vicinity, while retaining full control of all deal parameters. BarDeals, BarFinder & BrandFinder integrate such that Bars running campaigns are promoted in the BarFinder. Similarly manufacturers can promote deals featuring their Brands in the BrandFinder as a featured results for related searches. Brands can also purchase detailed analytics on consumer habits. We pay retailers for this data & Brands can utilize this to get shelf space in new on-premise locations.

Name: Chateau Nine Peaks 九顶庄园
Description:
Château Nine Peaks was started in 2008 by Dr. Karl Heinz Hauptmann, a German banker, as his third winery project after two successful wineries in Bessa Valley in Bulgaria and Alira in Romania. 

The Chinese project is based on the belief that great wines can be produced in China. Convinced that high quality is synonymous with distinction, terroir and winemaking, Karl Heinz Hauptmann and the French oenologist Marc Dworkin, decided to search for the ideal site to create the most excellent winery in China. This site was found on Nine Peak Mountain, from which the name of the Chateau and wine was inspired, and began a new heritage in winemaking for the town of Wubei, Laixi in Qingdao City. 

The domain covers 150Ha, mainly planted with Cabernet Sauvignon and Chardonnay, both imported from France to guarantee the highest quality of clones and varietals. Our approach to great winemaking is keeping the traditional French winemaking process under the guidance of Master experts from Bordeaux, complemented with the most modern and sophisticated winemaking techniques from France.The team combines several nationalities and gathers broad international experience, which serve to understand and foster the potential of the Terroir.

Today, the estate is one of the most distinct wine Chateau in Asia and promises to become one of the top Chinese wineries and a major tourist attraction in Shandong province.

Description:

Typical of the importers of the time, Engelstad AS imported lots of different types of goods as well as acting as agents in the import of alcoholic beverages for the Vinmonopolet. Gradually Engelstad became more and more focused on the import of wines and spirits and after a while became the largest agent in Norway, carrying well known brands in all catergories.

Today we are the 6th largest wine and spirit importer in Norway. Together with the other importers within the Solera group we are the biggest group (in L volume) in Norway.

Cet important ODG viticole remplit deux principales fonctions :
•	il assure le suivi et la gestion des conditions de production de son appellation en lien très étroit avec l’INAO : évolution du cahier des charges et du plan de certification, gestion des contingents de droits de plantation, contrôle interne (visites de vignes), délimitation parcellaire,…

Name: TENUTA DI ANGORIS
Description:
La storia della Tenuta di Angoris affonda le proprie radici nel Comune di Cormons a partire dal 1648, anno in cui l’imperatore del Sacro Romano Impero Ferdinando III d’Asburgo (all’epoca questo angolo di Friuli era governato dalla famiglia asburgica) ringraziò Locatello Locatelli per il servizio prestato nella Guerra dei 30 Anni, donandogli 300 campi nella zona conosciuta come “Langoris”.

Sono trascorsi quasi quattro secoli da allora, e la Tenuta di Angoris, alle porte di Cormons, cura con la dedizione di sempre sia i suoi 600 ettari di campi e boschi, sia Villa Locatelli, la storica dimora cuore dell’azienda e custode della tradizione.

Il destino sa giocare bene le sue mosse, e nel 1968 ha lanciato le carte giuste per fare in modo che la Tenuta di Angoris tornasse nelle mani di una famiglia omonima al suo primo proprietario: proprio 320 anni dopo Locatello, Giulio Locatelli acquistò la stessa proprietà, intrecciando in modo definitivo la storia della Tenuta di Angoris con il nome Locatelli.

Marta Locatelli, ricevuto il testimone da suo padre Luciano, ha rinnovato negli ultimi anni i vini e l’immagine della Tenuta di Angoris. Affidandosi alla competenza dell’enologo aziendale Alessandro Bologna coadiuvato da uno staff dinamico e coeso, ha saputo custodire questa terra e valorizzare sapientemente i 75 ettari di vigneto della Tenuta che si estendono nelle zone più vocate alla viticoltura regionale (DOC Friuli Isonzo – DOC Friuli Colli Orientali – DOC Collio).

Name: Peachy Canyon Winery
Description:
Peachy Canyon is a family-owned and operated winery in beautiful Paso Robles on California’s Central Coast; near Hearst Castle and Big Sur.

Peachy Canyon was first put on the map when their ‘Especial’ Zinfandel was named among Wine Spectator’s “Top 100 Wines of the World” in 1992. Although Zinfandels still dominate their tasting menu, you will find Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Malbec, Petite Sirah, Viognier and more in Peachy Canyon’s award-winning portfolio.

The founding Beckett family takes great pride in farming their four estate vineyards on the west side of Paso Robles, in the lauded Templeton Gap and Adelaide sub-AVAs. There, they create wines focused on expression of unique terroir that are suited to all wine lovers, from the accessible Westside Zinfandel to their premium single vineyard series.

Today, the Peachy Canyon team—still headed by Doug and Nancy Beckett—continues to strive for the best their Paso Robles estate vineyards have to offer.

Name: Quinta Vale d'Aldeia
Description:
Quinta Vale d'Aldeia - situada na região da Meda, em pleno Douro Superior – é um projeto que nasce do esforço e dedicação de uma família, cujo principal objetivo visa a produção de vinhos de excelência.
A sua localização, caracterizada por ricos e complexos microclimas, permite obter do generoso solo e de castas selecionadas uma rentabilidade e qualidade verdadeiramente ímpares. A este fator alia-se a utilização de tecnologia de ponta na produção e fabrico do vinho, que faz da Quinta Vale d'Aldeia uma das principais referências vinícolas da região Demarcada do Douro.
A Quinta Vale d'Aldeia posiciona-se no mercado nacional e internacional de forma rigorosa e diferenciada, disponibilizando um vasto leque de vinhos, que vão dos mais leves e aromáticos aos selecionados para degustação mais apurada e exigente.
---
Vale d'Aldeia – located in the Meda region in the heart of the Upper Douro – is a project born of one family’s effort and dedication, with the main aim of producing outstanding wines.
Its location is notable for its rich and complex microclimates, meaning that the generous soil combined with selected grape varieties generate truly unparalleled yield and quality. In addition we use cutting-edge wine-production technology, so making Quinta Vale d’Aldeia one of the leading wine-making benchmarks in the Douro Superior demarcated region.
Quinta Vale d’Aldeia is a quality reference point on the Portuguese and international markets, with a vast selection of wines, ranging from light and aromatic to those selected for more refined and exacting tasting.

Name: Schug Winery
Description: For four decades, Schug Carneros Estate has crafted cool-climate, age-worthy wines from the rolling hills of Sonoma County’s Carneros region.  Founded in 1980 by German-born Walter Schug —  after a pioneering winemaking career at Joseph Phelps — and his wife Gertrud, the winery is now led by their children Axel, Claudia and Andrea. German-American winemaker Johannes Scheid brings modern touches to the family’s century-long European winemaking tradition, which emphasizes balanced wines that respect and represent their terroir.

Name: SHABO
Description:
SHABO Wine Company was founded by the Iukuridze family.  It is based on wine traditions that existed in Ukraine for 2,000 years.
1200 hectares of vineyards and a modern technological complex of the winery are located in the south of Ukraine at a wine latitude of 46.6°. It was the unique terroir of this region that inspired the dream of the founders of the company – to create the Great Wines of Ukraine.
 
Received more than 500 awards at prestigious competitions, including Decanter Wine Awards, Mundus Vini, New York IWC and others. And in 2021, Ukraine for the first time won two golds at the London Decanter, thanks to Chardonnay Shabo Grande Reserve 2015 and Cabernet Shabo Grande Reserve 2017, which received 95 points out of 100
The first and only winery in Ukraine with the status of wines of Controlled Designations of Origin, as well as PDO and PGI
Listed in Michelin restaurants in London and Paris
Export market of 20 countries

Shabo is one of the oldest wine-growing regions of Ukraine, with ideal soils and climate between the Dniester estuary and the Black Sea, on the same wine latitude as Burgundy. At one time, the wealth and prospects of the local lands were appreciated by the Swiss winemakers from Canton Vaud. In 1822, Swiss settlers moved to what is a modern day Shabo, to live and make wines. Thus, creating the first and only fully autonomous Swiss winemaking in the world. They laid down the foundation for top level viticulture and world leading wines.

Description:
Depuis plus d'un siècle, la Maison Bouché conçoit ses champagnes dans le secret de ses caves historiques datant du 19ème siècle, situées entre la Capitale du Champagne, Epernay, et le village premier cru de Pierry. Nicolas Bouché, œnologue, chef de caves de la Maison et arrière-petit-fils du fondateur, met un point d'honneur à l'expression de l'art de vivre à la française, synonyme de raffinement et d'élégance, à travers ses flacons. 

For more than a century, Maison Bouché has been designing its champagnes in the secret of its historic cellars dating from the 19th century, located between the capital of Champagne, Epernay, and the premier cru village of Pierry. Nicolas Bouché, oenologist, cellar master of the House and great-grandson of the founder, makes it a point of honor to the expression of the French art of living, synonymous with refinement and elegance, through his bottles.

Name: Encierra Vineyard
Description:
Encierra is a viticultural project oriented to the production, national sale and export of high value bottled wine. Based on solid experience and knowledge of the sector and together with a privileged area where grapes are produced for the production of high quality wines, Encierra Wine with Peralillo, Colchagua denomination of origin was born.

The Eyzaguirre Echenique family created ENCIERRA as an extension of their winemaking history, which dates back to 1795. The Echenique family has been a wine producer in the Colchagua area for five generations, founders of
Viña Los Vascos who partnered in 1988 with Domains Barons Laffite Rotschild achieving high quality wines which were the first to be exported from the entire Colchagua Valley. In 1996, the Eyzaguirre family sold its stake in Los Vascos, keeping part of the original vineyards.

In 2000, the family started a new wine project, under the name ENCIERRA, Viña Boutique, which produces 35,000 bottles, aimed at the "high End" segment of international markets.

Convinced of the opportunities that exist in different markets to incorporate a wine of these characteristics, the monitoring and permanent presence of the exporter or winemaker with the buyers is essential. To achieve the above, the discipline of knowing, visiting, assisting and educating each of the three actors that interact in a wine export program; the importer, the distributor and the retailer or retail. The achievement of all of the above translates into what we know as Product Loyalty.

Name: Virtus Winery
Description:
Don Mariano, militar de caballería, inculcó el amor y la admiración por estos animales a sus hijos y nietos desde niños.

En 1986, Paloma Escribano hizo realidad su sueño de crear una bodega en Ribera de Duero bajo su visionaria perspectiva de sostenibilidad y respeto por la materia prima, en ausencia de productos químicos. Esto le llevó a ser una de las primeras mujeres viticultoras en la región y pionera en liderar una bodega boutique.

Con el castillo de Peñafiel como testigo, en un microclima formado por el Río Duratón y los cerros calizos que actúan como guardianes del duro clima continental, transcurre ésta historia que resurge para contar al mundo un bonito relato de larga tradición familiar.

De la vinculación entre el caballo y el vino surgió un matrimonio con cinco hijos, Iñigo López de la Osa Escribano tomó el relevo generacional de la bodega en 2012.

Virtus es valentía, sobriedad, vida familiar, superación. Es amor y respeto por la naturaleza, por los animales, es fuerza espiritual y coraje.

Sultán de Beaofour, un caballo Silla Francés con el que Iñigo celebró numerosas victorias en alta competición de salto, ha servido de inspiración para ilustrar los vinos de la gama Virtus.

El caballo de Dalecarlia, un juguete de madera tradicional sueco que se suele regalar a los niños, ilustra las etiquetas de la gama de El Sueco. El nacimiento de Iñigo López de la Osa en Suecia fue el motivo inspirador de esta elegante etiqueta.

Hoy, el futuro de Virtus está asegurado, con una vuelta al origen terrenal de Iñigo López de la Osa que, junto a su mujer Francesca Franco y el apoyo de toda la familia, hacen que el mundo del vino y del caballo se fusionen a galope en una historia irrepetible.

Name: JVS Imports
Description:
JVS Imports was founded two decades ago when Sam Filmus and his family began importing and distributing wines from Eastern Europe.  The business then grew in two important directions. The first was the development of JVS as an importer with a national network of distributors for its products, and the second was the growth of JVS as a wholesaler in California.

Staying true to its roots, JVS offers a wide assortment of beers and wines from Eastern Europe, but Mr. Filmus and his lifelong friend and business partner Val Zhoglo have also cultivated a large (and growing!) portfolio  of brandy, mezcal, vodka, scotch, rum, as well as popular American Craft Spirits – always staying true to the goal of bringing unique and distinct tastes from around the world to the US.

We are a team of dedicated and passionate individuals that come together in harmony to bring our customers a quality product at a reasonable price.

The true testament of what allows us to thrive is the knowledge, dedication, and willingness that our team holds to bring awareness to the consumer and variety to on-premise and retail accounts..

Name: Domaine Mas de Rey
Description:
Au cœur du parc naturel de Camargue, le Domaine Mas de Rey fut fondé au 12ème siècle, époque à laquelle l’Ordre des Templiers s’y installe et érige un temple. Après sa destruction, une magnifique chapelle est reconstruite sur les fondations du temple. Elle devient un lieu de passage sur le chemin de Compostelle. 

Le domaine devient viticole en 1843, date à laquelle les premières vignes furent plantées. 

Depuis 2012, la famille Cornille a entrepris des travaux de rénovation et de restauration en respectant les méthodes traditionnelles provençales. Aujourd’hui, le domaine accueille des événements privés tels que les mariages, les séminaires, les anniversaires, ainsi que des événements publics comme ceux à venir…

Vous pouvez également visiter le domaine et découvrir la large gamme de vins !  Un terroir emblématique qui regroupe des cépages de caractère incluant le Caladoc, le Marselan et le Chasan ainsi que des cépages plus conventionnels tels que le Chardonnay, le Viognier, la Syrah, le Grenache...
