Name: Alacarte Ventures
Description:
Alacarte has designed and built a device for the HORECA sector that reduces the alcohol content of any bottle of wine while maintaining the essence of the original.

The non and low alcoholic drinks consumption is growing very fast worldwide. We believe the wine market needs a solution to compete with this trend.

Our device allows customers to pick any wine and chose the amount of alcohol (or calories) they want reduced through a touch screen. It is fast, easy to use and the bottle remains sealed; no need to open the cork.

Do you want to know more? Visit our website or send us an email.

Name: Statera
Description:
Distillé à la main à partir d'aromates de gin de qualité, Statera est un spiritueux sans alcool contenant des électrolytes qui favorisent l’hydratation.

Appréciez le moment présent et profiter d'une consommation sans modération avec notre gin sans alcool de première qualité.

Name: Cantina Della Volta
Description:
The activity of Cantina della Volta started in 2010 on the initiative of a group of friends, all wine lovers, who asked Christian Bellei to share a new project in the wine sector: give continuity to the production of wines of the Modena area using the Classic Method, widely used in France, better known as the Champenoise Method, namely that of natural fermentation in the bottle.

Christian Bellei represents the fourth generation of wine entrepreneurs in Bomporto (Modena) Italy. The business was started by his great grandfather in 1920 and later inherited by his father Giuseppe, who led the family winery until the end of the nineties.

Giuseppe Bellei, better known in Modena as "Beppe", passed down to Christian the values and passion of winemaking, working hard with his son and involving him in various stages of the wine preparation. Father and son shared various visits in Epernay, France, home to noble sparkling wines, attracted by the charm of the Champagne. The purpose of his trips was to study in depth the processing of the wines by the Method Champenoise and then apply it on the grapes pressed in their cellar of Bomporto.

This passion for the Classic Method is the living legacy that led to the birth of the Christian Bellei’s Cantina della Volta. The members of Cantina della Volta asked Christian to respect a single binding condition: continue making quality wines "in his own way". In other words, wisely profit from the strong wine-making skills and continue improving oenological knowledge of wine acquired from his father and the practice.

Name: Mr.D Wine Merchant LLC
Description: Mr. D's is a direct-to-consumer national wine merchant, bringing a curated selection of the world's finest wines right to your home. We are a new destination for an emerging generation of wine drinkers seeking a more approachable, convenient, and personalized wine experience.

Name: Bernardo Winery
Description:
Welcome to Bernardo Winery!  We're a family owned and operated winery located in North County San Diego. Established in 1889, Bernardo Winery is the oldest winery in Southern California, owned and operated by the Rizzo family since 1927. We are a full production winery, sourcing San Diego grapes and producing our wine onsite. 
Our tasting room is open Wednesday through Sunday for wine tasting and wine by the glass and bottle.
The Kitchen Restaurant serves rustic Italian fare such as fresh pastas and pizza made from scratch, using fresh local ingredients. 
Besides wine and food, we have a village of shops and galleries as well as a coffee roaster, with their unique products and services.  
Bring the whole family to explore our historic winery in San Diego, there's something for everyone to enjoy. 
Bernardo Winery is open Wednesday through Sunday,
Closed Monday and Tuesday. 
Don't miss our Farmer's Market every Friday 9-1
Please note, no pets are permitted on the winery grounds. 
Event venues available for events of all sizes. Please inquire with our event team events@bernardowinery.com

Name: Yorkshire Heart Vineyard & Brewery
Description:
Yorkshire Heart is an award winning family run Vineyard & Brewery based in Nun Monkton, a picturesque village between Harrogate & York along the A59

Here at Yorkshire Heart our hard working team are focused on producing award winning fine English wines from grape to glass in our Vineyard & Winery as well as a fantastic range of quality easy drinking craft beers from the heart in cask and bottles at our modern micro-brewery, we believe in representing the true taste of Yorkshire!

Our team are so proud of the Vineyard and Brewery as it is fast becoming recognised as one of Yorkshire's finest drink producers and a top visitor attraction.

We welcome visitors to the vineyard for tours and tastings, meetings, parties and weddings as well as camping and caravan stays, our knowledgeable team work extremely hard to ensure that everyone who comes along has a fantastic time and we find our customers thrive from our passion for the beauty that we are so lucky to work within every day,

2017 sees plans for us to build our brand new visitor centre at the vineyard with café and shop so we can have even more people come along and visit us!

Name: Dagmar Romania
Description: Dagmar is operating in wine&spirits distribution since 1992. We are building strong partnerships with leading companies from Romania like Alexandrion Group, Cramele Recas and Carlsrom Romania. We are looking first for long time relationships and not only for transactions. In 2011 we were supplier for + 3000 clients in our country. We are searching for new partners in Romania and Europe.

Name: Prestige Wines and Spirits Pvt. Ltd.
Wine District 42 SA
Description:
Spécialisé dans le stockage, la livraison, expertise et le négoce de vins.

Notre cave de stockage, entièrement dédiée au vin, peut accueillir jusqu’à 150’000 bouteilles. Elle se situe dans un bâtiment hautement sécurisé, à proximité de la ville de Genève. En ce lieu idéal, les bouteilles pourront se bonifier en toute tranquillité, à une température comprise entre 12,5 et 13,5 degrés et avec un taux d’humidité se situant entre 65 et 75%.

Livraison du lundi au samedi dans tout le canton de Genève et jusqu'à Nyon.

Name: Wine for the World
Description:
Wine for the World is a New York-based import and distribution company of thoughtful, delicious wines. We represent winemakers that have a positive impact on the world, in their communities, and on the environment.

While this often coincides with artisanal wines that are organic, minimal intervention, and natural, our philosophy is broader than that. We were founded in 2013 on a philosophy to support diversity—be it regional diversity, or the people behind the wine. Within our portfolio, you will find winemakers who are women, people of color, and vintners who are part of the LGBTQ+ community, along with carbon-neutral wineries, Fair Trade growers, biodynamic champions, and regional pioneers. We like to say that we are “region-agnostic” — and instead, “mission-forward.” You’ll find our producers across the northern and southern hemispheres -  each with a unique, compelling vision of what we can achieve through extraordinary wine.

Name: Cardenxe Sotol
Description:
Cardenxe Sotol is the terroir-driven sotol brand at the intersection of art, music and culture. With different expressions - Desierto, Pradera and Sierra - we highlight the natural essence of the earth and place, in what we call a Gastronomic Journey.

With the rapid growth of agave spirits, the sotol opportunity lies in a product that is more natural and aromatic than tequila, yet more friendly and approachable than mezcal. A contemporary spirit which complements the Mexican spirits offering at any venue.

Name: The DrinkersNepal Pte Ltd
Description: As the exclusive importer of over 100 wine labels from renowned brands and small artisan wineries, from old and new world countries, we can offer customers incredible wines at affordable prices

Name: Vignobles Terrigeol
Description:
Le vignoble Terrigeol se compose du château des Matards sur l'appellation Blaye côtes de Bordeaux et du domaine de la margotterie pour les pineaux et cognacs.
Actuellement, ce sont trois générations qui travaillent ensemble, main dans la main, au développement du vignoble et de son activité commerciale.

Name: Henners Vineyard
Description: At Henners, we believe in more than just producing remarkable sparkling wines; we champion the instants that make life truly special. Whether it's raising a glass to love, to friendship, or to the sheer joy of life’s occasions, our wines are the perfect accompaniment to unforgettable moments. From intimate gatherings to grand celebrations, our effervescent creations are crafted to transform any moment into a cherished memory.

Name: Vinoplod Vinarija d.o.o. Šibenik
Description:
The Šibenik winery was established in 1959 and in 1993 it was renamed to "VINOPLOD-VINARIJA" d.o.o. Šibenik. Since our beginning, the company always relied on centuries of winemaking experience that the city of Šibenik and its surrounding areas are renowned for. 

We are beyond proud of the vineyards used in our production process as they are under protection from UNESCO. This is also a testament to human endeavor and will to create in the harshest conditions. 

Our production process has evolved significantly over time and we now offer a great number of top quality wines. Since becoming a member of Meteor Group we will certainly continue evolving and improving what we do as proud producers of wines and spirits.

Follow us as well as Meteor Group of which we are proud members!

https://www.linkedin.com/company/meteor-grupa/

Name: Les Vignerons de Saint-Dézéry
Description: Depuis près d'un siècle, notre passion pour notre terre et nos vignes nous pousse à produire des vins de qualité qui reflètent notre caractère. Attachés à nos valeurs nous produisons IGP OC monocépages, mais aussi des vins d'assemblage en IGP Cévennes et OC, avec des gammes élaborées et modernes.

Name: The Perth Distillery Co
Description: Producer of Small Batch Handcrafted Scottish Gin

Name: Reif Estate Winery
Description: One of Niagara-on-the-Lake's founding family wineries, founded in 1982 by Ewald Reif and later acquired by nephew Klaus W. Reif. Today, Reif produces 100% local VQA wines from its vineyard first planted in 1977. The 125-acre farm is located in the Niagara River sub-appellation where sun-loving grape varieties grow best. The winery is open for tasting and shopping year-round.

Name: ChampagneUniverset
Description: ChampagneUniverset (C-Universet ApS) offers you some of the best champagne and champagne experiences. In partnership with selected champagnehouses and their winemakers you are offered the unique opportunity to design, name -or even blend your own champagne. We are certified in 'champagne-wine'. Book us for a private champagne tasting or join us at our exclusive events posted on our website champagneuniverset.dk/OPLEV. Our direct imports offer a wide selection of +150 champagne varieties from the entire champagne region including the small, unique wine-growers to the legendary brands like Dom Perignon, Krug - just a click away. ChampagneUniverset only provides quality champagne, and is your guarantee for a quality service and some of the most sparking and prestigious experiences and events.

Name: Pakruojo dvaro istorinė Spirito Varykla / Pakruojis Manor Distillery
Description:
Pakruojis manor distillery was restored in 2016 and is dedicated to producing some of the most traditional spirits of the Baltic region, but with new methods and a new vision. 

Our distillery maintains old production methods lead by expert craftsmanship, so that based on tradition and innovations, grains and botanicals are turned into high quality distillates. Pakruojis manor’s experienced craftsmen put all their hart and soul into producing drinks with family-traditions that go back several centuries. These spirit drinks are distilled from plants, herbs and fruits picked locally in the surrounding area of the distillery. 

We distil spirits in our hand-made, authentic, wood-burning distillation copper pots. After setting a fire to heat them up, we start the same process of producing liquors that was used several hundred years ago. 

Handcrafted production is carried out in small batches of 200-300 litres. No computers or robots are used to control maceration or distillation processes. This traditional method that requires considerable experience helps preserve intensity of flavours, maintain the diversity, and gives the distillates an great aftertaste.

Name: Westwell Wine Estates
Description:
We're a family-run English winery dedicated to crafting honest, low-intervention wines that express the character of our land. Located just beneath the Pilgrims Way on the North Downs, our vineyard grows five grape varieties: Meunier, Pinot Noir, Chardonnay, Regent and Ortega; our signature grape. Our wines range from traditional method sparklers and pet nats to skin contact, amphora aged, and collaborative releases with local brewers.

Westwell is rooted in creativity, innovation and sustainability. Winemaker Adrian Pike is known for pushing boundaries while maintaining a deep respect for the fruit. All production is on-site, small-scale and hands-on, allowing close control from vine to bottle.

We focus on long-term ecological health through composting, recycling, and partnerships with circular economy businesses. Our byproducts are reused in skincare (with Pelegrims), brewing and glassmaking. We're proud to create value beyond the vineyard.

Creativity is central to our identity. Galia Pike leads our visual output, from label design to photography and large-scale artworks, building a distinctive brand experience that reflects our roots in the music industry and the arts.

We’re also known for community events that bring people closer to wine: tastings, workshops, cinema nights, theatre, local markets and more. Our democratic winemaking club, Sun Dirt Yeast, invites members to participate in real winemaking decisions, a first in the UK.

We’re listed by Time Out as one of the UK’s best vineyards to visit, and our Google reviews are consistently five star. As we expand production, we remain focused on innovation, connection and quality.

Plant well. Respect the soil. Make great, honest wine

Name: Maison Peyrat
Description:
Fondée en 1920, la Maison Peyrat est un acteur unique de la région de Cognac et de l'univers des spiritueux. 

Maison familiale avec plus de 100 ans d'expérience, nous partageons notre histoire et notre passion à travers notre sélection de spiritueux.

Aujourd'hui, l'entreprise dirigée par Philippe et ses deux enfants Clémence et Édouard, possède Peyrat Cognac et Moko Rum.

Name: Bodega Cavas Andinas
Description: Línea de Vinos de alta, media y baja gama. Vinos de primera calidad de Mendoza, de las mejores zonas de Mendoza, Malbec, Cabernet Sauvignon, Chenin Blanc son algunos de nuestros varietales.

Name: Manchester Wine School
Description:
Owned by award-winning wine writer Simon Woods, we host wine tastings, masterclasses and professional training courses. We are one of Manchester's leading approved programme providers for WSET qualifications for wine industry professionals and enthusiastic amateurs. We also host fun and informal wine tastings across Greater Manchester and beyond, for people who enjoy wine and would like to learn more about it. No previous wine tasting experience is necessary and we do not try to sell you wine at the end of our events. 

Have you thought about a wine tasting in Manchester as a corporate client entertainment event or a social wine tasting event for colleagues? We can come to you, or assist in finding a venue to hold your corporate wine tasting event.

We are the national contract holder for Marks and Spencer Wine Club tastings. Our experience extends to hosting corporate wine tasting events across Greater Manchester for companies such as Pinsent Masons, Laing O’Rourke, BT, The Telegraph, and Bentley Motors. We can create an event tailored to suit your specific requirements and ensure an enjoyable time for all.

Name: KEEL Vodka
Description:
Have you ever wanted to have more than just one cocktail and couldn't because you had a big day tomorrow? 

Or maybe you did have one too many full strength cocktails and then regretted it the next day? (You likely said, "Ugh, I'm never drinking again.")

This is why we created KEEL Vodka. Distilled to just 23.8% alcohol by volume (regular harsh vodkas are 40%) we created it to give you a smarter option. A more refreshing option. An option that allows you to Stay Balanced and enjoy tonight and also tomorrow. 

In addition to being light and refreshingly smooth, KEEL Vodka is Gluten Free, 0 carbs, 0 sugar, and only 58 calories per serving. Farm to bottle, KEEL is 100% American made using the very best non-GMO potatoes from Idaho.

Stay Balanced so you can stay at the party a little longer, have more fun with friends and still able to achieve tomorrow's goals.

Name: STOCK Slovensko, s.r.o.
Description:
Spoločnosť STOCK Slovensko, s.r.o. získala svoju novú podobu v máji roku 2013 fúziou spoločností Imperator a STOCK Slovakia s.r.o. Donedávna si spoločnosť zachovala svoj pôvodný slovenský názov IMPERATOR. V januári 2017 však došlo k zjednoteniu korporátnej identity naprieč všetkými trhmi medzinárodnej skupiny Stock Spirits Group s čím súvisí aj zmena názvu spoločnosti na STOCK Slovensko, s.r.o. Medzinárodná skupina Stock Spirits Group je popredným producentom a významným hráčom na trhu s alkoholickými nápojmi v strednej a východnej Európe. 

Spoločnosť STOCK Slovensko, s.r.o. sa zaoberá dovozom a distribúciou alkoholických nápojov - úspešných a obľúbených značiek rodiny Fernet Stock, vodky Amundsen, originálnej novinky Golden Ľadová z rady Golden, či pravých destilátov značky Kosher, vďaka ktorým sa radí medzi lídrov na slovenskom trhu s alkoholickými nápojmi. Vznik spoločnosti umožnil ešte výraznejšie rozvíjať tradičné slovenské značky alkoholických nápojov a súčasne priniesť mnohé inovatívne novinky. 

V apríli 2017 vstúpila spoločnosť STOCK Slovensko, s.r.o. do novej distribučnej spolupráce so spoločnosťou Beam Suntory, vďaka ktorej prináša na slovenský trh ikonický americký bourbon Jim Beam, francúzsky koňak Courvoisier, ručne vyrábanú whisky Maker’s Mark, škótsku single malt whisky Laphroaig, či írsku whisky Connemara. 

Medzi hlavné hodnoty spoločnosti patrí: osobná angažovanosť, výkonnosť, inovatívny prístup, tímovosť a oslava úspechu. Do nášho tímu hľadáme práve tých, ktorým sú naše hodnoty blízke.

Name: Vine Trail
Description: A progressive, sustainable and open approach to wine since 1989. We source, import, sell and distribute the finest wines from France, Sicily and Northern Spain.

Name: FEDERATION VITICOLE DU PUY-DE-DOME
Description: Le  vignoble des Côtes d’Auvergne doit sa renommée en grande partie au travail de la Fédération Viticole du Puy-de-Dôme. Créée en 1987, elle est le centre de la filière viticole du département qui regroupe 100 vignerons et est Présidée par Gilles VIDAL. Son siège se situe à Aubière dans les locaux de la Chambre d’Agriculture. Ses missions sont variées : promouvoir le vignoble des Côtes d’Auvergne par diverses actions : édition de documentations, participation à des salons, évènements, dégustations... Valoriser ses vins auprès de la clientèle ou encore coordonner, fédérer et informer la filière viticole du Puy-de-Dôme.

Name: Albert Mathier & Söhne AG
Description: Die Weinhandlung Albert Mathier & Söhne ist ein kleiner Familienbetrieb, der sich seit bald 100 Jahren dem Genuss des Weinliebhabers verpflichtet hat. In all dieser Zeit hat sich Erfahrung angesammelt und Tradition gebildet.

Name: H2Vin
Description:
H2Vin was founded in 2009 by Christian Honorez and Master Sommelier Matt Wilkin. Christian has a vast knowledge of the industry and experience of sourcing authentic and individual wines; whilst Matt was the first Australian Master Sommelier and has won many accolades including UK Sommelier of the Year in 2005. The enthusiastic pair complement each other in every way and together have established H2Vin's enviable reputation for offering an exceptional range of wines to restaurants, hotels and independent wine merchants across the UK. 

Our portfolio includes many well-known boutique wines and all our producers are at the very top of their game, aiming to make exceptional wines from quality grapes. It is with this ethos that H2Vin has been created: a wine business dedicated to sourcing original wines made by passionate winemakers that are delivered at competitive prices, exemplary service with diligence and passion.

Name: TSI SA - Geneva
Description:
Based in Geneva, Switzerland, Tovaritch Spirits International SA is the producer of TOVARITCH! Vodka, the globally recognized premium vodka, is the world’s most awarded vodka. With over 145 international accolades from major London, Chicago, and San Francisco competitions, TOVARITCH! stands out for its superior quality and excellence. 
The company is committed to responsible production, promoting sustainable practices and conscious consumption. 
Learn more at www.tovaritch.com

Name: Enopros | Worldwide Beverages Professionals
Description:
There are thousands and thousands of beverages companies daily looking for new partners around the world to promote and grow their own products or brands, most of them are small or medium sized business. Based on this need, we created ENOPROS Platform on the simply promise that helping beverages pros to interact and link one each other, no matter where they are.

ENOPROS provides an essential online tool to breweries, cideries, distilleries, non-alcoholic beverages producers, vineyards, wineries and brand owners to easily attract and connect to potential worldwide business partners but, in the other hand, ENOPROS also allows buyers to search and contact directly to beverages producers and manufacturers from around the world.

We also provide practical assistance, advice and services enabling more effective worldwide business development. We specialiced in marketing and channel development, brand management and importation services in China among many other countries in all continents.

ENOPROS is the most valuable online solution for trading your products and developing your customers and suppliers networks as well as your professional career.  

ENOPROS has a department specialized in Communications & Marketing of Alcoholic and Non-Alcoholic Beverages created to support the Sell Out. The team is composed by Professionals with long experience in the field and consolidated results.

ENOPROS COMMUNICATIONS & MARKETING Department provides the following services:
- Communication and MKT, 
- PR, 
- Press Office, 
- Brand Ambassador, 
- Advertising,
- Market Research,
- B2B and B2C Events

Warmest regards,
Your friends at Enopros
www.enopros.com
We Speak Beverages!

Name: Wielkopolska Manufaktura Wódek
Description:
Wielkopolska Manufaktura Wódek produkuje alkohole w małych partiach oparte tylko o naturalne składniki. Wykorzystujemy zieloną energię a wodę pozyskujemy z własnego ujęcia. Skupiamy się na produktach ekologicznych oraz organicznych. Owoce, zboża czy miód pozyskujemy od lokalnych dostawców stawiając na świadomość ich pochodzenia zapewniając przy tym najwyższa jakość. Manufaktura jak i jej położenie ma dla nas ogromne znaczenie okolica Parku Krajobrazowego Puszcza Zielonka zainspirowała nas by podczas naszej produkcji kierować się zasadą „no waste”.
Jesteśmy nastawieni na różnorodną produkcję. Przygotowujemy wódki i nalewki na bazie spirytusów żytnich, pszenicznych, ziemniaczanych, jęczmiennych oraz na bazie ekologicznych certyfikowanych zbóż.

Name: Nomad Cold Brew
Description: Company dedicated to the distribution and coffee transformation  into beverages, concentrates and derivatives of coffee for human consumption.

Name: Marlborough Wine Ltd
Description:
Wines with a personal touch – and a light touch too.
 
Marlborough Wine was established in 2006 by the Joyce family. Following his career at Apple computers, Kevin Joyce shifted his focus from Silicon Valley to Marlborough, where he purchased land and the Brookdale Vineyard was born. His love of the land means that all our vineyards are fully certified sustainable, protecting them for future generations.

The name Toi Toi, a flowering native grass, was given to the wines to express their majesty and expression of place. The Toi Toi is an iconic part of New Zealand’s landscape from the mountains to the ocean. Resilient and adaptable, it is able to grow in many climates and expresses itself distinctively in each; much like a grape vine. 
This continues to inspire us, and our wines. Curiosity takes us across our country. Our love for the land means that we understand what it creates now and will ensure it will do so for future generations. We know what grows best here and are focussed on creating exceptional wines from the regions where they exhibit their best.

Name: Vinify Wines
Description:
Vinify is a specialist wine merchant bringing you quality products sourced from across the globe but delivered to your doorstep.
 
Hand-picked by our expert team of buyers, our purpose is to find you quality wines that delight your customers and help you build a reputation for providing excellent wines.
 
Vinify is part of the family-owned Bay Drinks Group. We have over 40 years in the drinks profession,and we’re here to bring you the best product.

Name: Inchaffray Whisky
Description: Single farm, Single Cask, Single Malt

Name: Daylight Rum
Description: Expertly crafted white rum using classic French traditions, giving the smoothest taste possible. We use both pot and column stills to create a unique flavor while keeping it clear as daylight.

Name: Tenuta Sasso Chierico
Description:
Scoperta, incontro, incanto

Incastonato in un paesaggio ineguagliabile, dove le colline disegnate dai vigneti sono cornice a una pianura rurale, Gudo è un piccolo paese dove la vite ha radici antiche. Sulla sponda destra del Fiume Ticino, il microclima delle terre gudesi è ideale per produrre vini di altissimo pregio. Scoprire queste terre vuol dire godere di una natura sempre in festa.

Felicemente inserita in questa tavolozza di colori, la Tenuta Sasso Chierico si estende su sei ettari dove le vendemmie si ripetono ottime anno dopo anno. Qui la famiglia Antognini, guarda le proprie viti, vecchie anche di quarant’anni, con gli occhi orgogliosi di chi ha sempre creduto nella qualità, convinta che il terroir vada accarezzato come un figlio. Un incontro autentico con la civiltà della vite e del vino.

Quell’uva coccolata per tutta la stagione e vinificata poi con passione e competenza dall’enologo Luca Biffi, è oggi racchiusa in bottiglie all’etichetta elegante. Vini che hanno l’impronta tipica di questo terroir, vini maschi, ma mai duri. Vini che sono espressione di una puntigliosa e meditata ricerca della qualità. Vini che incantano perché figli della loro terra. Vini di terroir.

Un incontro che non si dimentica.

Name: Shibui Whisky
Description: Shibui Whisky is the only award-winning brand to collaborate with multiple Japanese distilleries to distill, mature, and marry our expressions. We pay tribute to the specialized blending and distilling techniques of two regions, Niigata and Okinawa.

Name: Jeanjean Distribution
Description:
A Saint-Félix de Lodez, berceau historique de l’entreprise située au cœur du plus grand Vignoble du monde, la famille JEANJEAN écrit depuis plus d’un siècle l’histoire des vins du Languedoc.

Une histoire d’exigence et d’amitié partagée depuis plusieurs générations avec nos vignerons, nos clients du monde entier et tous nos salariés.

Une histoire qui se poursuit désormais dans la Vallée du Rhône à Châteauneuf-du-Pape avec Ogier Caves des Papes, en Provence au cœur de la montagne Sainte Victoire avec Gassier, dans le Sud-Ouest à Cahors avec Rigal, dans le Roussillon avec Cazes et dans le Bordelais à St Emilion avec Antoine Moueix.

Name: UVA Wines Ltd
Description: UVA Wines is an importer and distributor of Portuguese Wines in Kenya.

Name: VildMedVin
Description:
Hos VildMedVin er vi vilde med vin!

Hos VildMedVin finder du et kæmpe udvalg af alverdens vin, spiritus, øl og delikatesser. Vores valg af sortiment beror på stor seriøsitet og faglighed - en faglighed som vi sætter en ære i at dele med vores kunder, når vi hjælper med at finde den helt rette vin til menuen og hverdagen eller finde spændende spiritus til samlingen. Vi har et solidt fundament af klassiske vine og spiritus i vores sortiment, evergreens om man vil,  samtidig har vi fingeren på pulsen og får konstant nyheder ind ad døren.   

VildMedVin er ikke specialiserede i ét vinområde, et dogme eller én stil, vi er specialister i god service, seriøst sortiment udvalgt på baggrund af stor faglighed til de bedste priser i Danmark.

Name: Sall Whisky Distillery
Description: Økologisk og Dansk Single Malt & Single Farm Whisky.

Name: Liechtenstein Winery
Description:
Tradition und Herkunft in jedem Glas.

Fein strukturierte Lagenweine wie der Pinot Noir vom „Herawingert“, die neuen Cuvées und Rieslinge vom „Karlsberg“, die jugendlich-frische „Clos Domaine“ mit Grünem Veltliner DAC, Rosé und Zweigelt, eleganter, trinkfreudiger Sekt und mineralische Blaufränkisch und Chardonnay vom Leithaberg stehen für unseren Anspruch, herkunftsgeprägte Weine in international anerkannten Top-Qualitäten zu schaffen.

Name: Brain Brew Custom Whiskey
Description: Did you know that in the 1800s everyone had their own personal bourbon? We are on a mission to return bourbon to its roots by making bourbon of the people, by the people and for the people.

Name: Vertschi AG
Description: Vertschi ist kein weiteres Wässerchen mit irgendwelchen Aromen. Im Gegenteil: Es wird so aufwendig wie Traubensaft hergestellt – einfach aus frühreifen Trauben. Das Getränk, das der Welt des Weins entstamm, überzeugt durch frische und regionale Zutaten und kommt ganz ohne Zuckerzusatz aus.

Name: Chateau Bellamonte, LLC
Description:
It is said that the summit of Mount Kilimanjaro is “where the heavens meet the earth.” It was in this place that Stacey Montoya found the inspiration to launch Chateau Bellamonte. Italian for “beautiful mountain,” Chateau Bellamonte represents Stacey’s parallel journeys to summit both literal and figurative mountains.

Having lost her husband, Carlos, on September 11, 2001, Stacey was left with overwhelming grief and a shattered heart. Deprived of the opportunity to say goodbye, she believed there would be no better place to do so than “where the heavens meet the earth.” So, in January 2007, Stacey reached Uhuru Peak, the 19,341 ft (5,895 m) summit of Mount Kilimanjaro, carrying a 5-pound, heart shaped rock. On that cold winter day, she buried her “heavy heart” atop the mountain, finding solace in knowing it would forever remain close to Heaven and to her beloved Carlos.  

The loss challenged her beliefs about life and how to live it, but the journey to heal put her on a path which honors her husband and his memory, reminding her to live each day to its fullest. 

Today Stacey channels her passion for life into winemaking at Chateau Bellamonte. To honor Carlos’s memory, every bottle bears the inscription, “Where the Heavens Meet the Earth.”  We hope each glass brings as much joy to your life as it does hers!

Name: Jacobite Spirits - Scottish Spiced Rum Distillery
Description:
Jacobite Spirits - the Glasgow-based Spiced Rum distillery which makes The 45 Scottish Spiced Rum, “The Spirit of Rebellion” and Charlie's Chopper, Raspberry Cranachan Spiced Rum.  Started by a group of friends in late 2019, Jacobite Spirits grows with fun, friendship and the spirit of adventure! 

The 45 is a delicious, Scottish Spiced rum authentically hand-crafted from scratch, blending the international spices contained in all great spiced rums with a unique mix of Scottish botanicals - including hints of orange peel, ginger, vanilla, caramel, liquorice and smoked seaweed.

Its strong flavour profile makes it perfect to drink neat as a sipping rum, or with a robust mixer such as ginger beer or ginger ale. And, with rum’s versatility earning its place as the cocktail partner of choice, The 45 is made for mixology!

Charlie's Chopper brings the flavours of a Scottish summer together with an authentic, hand-crafted rum.  Raspberry, Toasted Oats and the hint of vanilla presents a completely natural, unsweetened but deliciously tangy rum that is versatile to drink neat on ice, with a classy mixer or in a fantastic cocktail.  

As the craft spirits market has expanded, rum has grown faster than its rivals in recent years, with flavoured and spiced rums accelerating to the fore as the flavoured gin market flattens out.

Rum is most definitely on the rise and The 45 and Charlie's Chopper is bringing something different to a crowded table. It’s the Spirit of Rebellion!

Name: Byington Vineyard & Winery
Description:
Byington offers a stunning, 95-acre, wine-experience getaway with expansive views of the Santa Cruz Mountains, Monterey Bay, and Pinot Noir vineyards, just minutes from Silicon Valley. We craft award-winning wines in an 18,000-square-foot villa that houses winemaking facilities, wine cave, tasting room, and elegant event facilities. Taste, picnic, hike, and enjoy live music and events as well.

Byington produces Pinot Noir, Cabernet Sauvignon, and Chardonnay wines and other exciting varietals that highlight the diversity of Northern California. The winery is focused on growing and producing premium wines, farmed sustainably using biodynamic growing methods. The wines are handcrafted with focus on natural fermentation methods from handpicked grapes.

Our high quality, small production wines come from our Estate vineyards: 8 acres of premium Byington Estate Pinot Noir in the Santa Cruz Mountains and 36 acres of ultra premium Tin Cross Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon, Chardonnay, Cabernet Franc, Merlot, and Petit Verdot from Alexander Valley. We purchase additional varietals from select vineyards for an expansive array of wines.

Byington’s history dates back to before 1987 with the release of its first vintage. In 2013, Los Altos Vineyards purchased Byington, investing significantly in the vineyard, wine production, and facilities and grounds to provide an optimal wine experience for wine club members and guests. New facilities include solar power production, the Cave Patio, Block 4 Outlook, and hiking trail.

In 2014, strengthening its commitment to producing sustainable, high quality wines, Los Altos Vineyards purchased Tin Cross Vineyards, a 240-acre ranch in Alexander Valley with 36 planted acres of Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Franc, Chardonnay, Merlot, and Petit Verdot. In June 2017, Los Altos Vineyards opened the Los Altos Tasting Room in downtown Los Altos.

Name: Dolium Wines
Description:
About DOLIUM Wines: 
The Dolium winery started operations in over a decade ago with a state-of-the-art underground facility, located in the heart of Agrelo, in the winemaking region of Lujan de Cuyo, Mendoza. Production is currently 120,000 bottles/year, of which we export 60%. 

Dolium’s Key Points:

1.	Location: in the heart of best wine making region in Latin America: Agrelo, Mendoza
2.	17 hectares of prime-land, only half in use for winery and vineyard
3.	First Latin-American Winery with a “B Corporation Certificate”
4.	Eco-tourism growing dramatically
5.	Sustainable underground “Eco-Estate” facility designed for high-end wines with minimal energy use 
6.	Low labor and production costs 
7.	Local and international high reputation of Dolium wines
8.	Over 17 years of producing consistently top world class Malbec wines. Grape sourcing and scouting know-how

State of the Art Winery: 
Borrowing from the techniques used by the Greeks and Romans to store wines for prolonged periods of time by keeping them underground in amphorae, Dolium is the first underground winery in Argentina. This allows it to maintain very stable temperatures year round, avoiding most energy normally used for cooling or heating. All grapes are gravity fed to stainless steel tanks and high-end quality wines age in new French and American oak barrels, while classic reds are kept mostly in stainless with short inter-stave exposure for fruit enhancement. Pumps are avoided wherever possible; wine is moved from one area to another by gravity or with the help of pressurized inert gas. Wines are estate-bottled. Winery is surrounded by 40 acres of land (half in production with 15 to 45 years old low yield vines)which account for roughly half of the input grapes which are always handpicked in full ripeness.

Name: Champagne Figuet et Fils
Description:
Terroir d'exception, la Champagne Viticole s'étend sur un vaste domaine géographique dont les limites ont été définies en 1927. Dès 1908, grâce à Emile Morlot, député-maire de Charly-sur-Marne, la partie axonaise de la Vallée de la Marne est classée en appellation Champagne.

Pionnière et visionnaire, la Famille Figuet installe en 1910 le premier pressoir destiné à son usage personnel ainsi qu'à celui de la commune de Saulchery et des villages alentours. Dix ans après, au sortir de la guerre, elle en installera un second, offrant ainsi aux viticulteurs la possibilité d'élaborer leur propre Champagne.

Nuestra cervecería se encuentra ubicada en La Venta del Astillero , la cual nos da una gran satisfacción el poder generar empleos en esta zona. De igual manera contamos con un línea de prendas de vestir, tales como gorras, pants, playeras, etc.  la cual distribuimos y comercializamos en zonas turísticas de Mexico. Con presencia de Marca en Estados Unidos, Colombia, Ecuador y próximamente en otros países de Europa y Canadá, CORPORATIVO CGO busca afianzarse en el mercado internacional tanto con la exportación, importación y maquila de productos.
Cerveza Artesanal My Pride es elaborada de igual manera en Ecuador, Colombia y Estados Unidos, siempre cuidando los estándares de calidad para cumplir con la satisfacción del cliente final,  lo que nos permite reducir los costos del producto,  así como tramites y costos de exportación / Importación.

UNE HISTOIRE DE PASSIONNÉS

La brasserie artisanale de Die c’est avant tout un esprit d’équipe au service de passionnés de bonnes bières. Aujourd’hui la brasserie souhaite faire partie de ces artisans qui ont l’ambition de créer un lieu où l’on prend du plaisir à déguster ce produit si simple et à la fois si complexe qu’est la bière. Nous partageons nos valeurs ; la passion de la bière artisanale, la convivialité, la qualité et la proximité !

Née dans un petit coin de cave en 2009, l'année 2020 a marqué une étape importante pour la brasserie qui s’est installée dans de nouveaux locaux et a entamé de nouveaux projets, centrés autour du brassage de nos recettes connues tout en faisant de nouvelles expérimentations gustatives.

Name: Liquor World Las Vegas
Description:
HISTORY 

Liquor World Las Vegas was founded in 2002 with a single location, Liquor World Las Vegas has grown to become one of the premier adult beverage retailers in the Las Vegas Valley. 

In 2012 Liquor World Las Vegas expanded to its second location and started servicing customers in the resort corridor. From 2014 – 2018 Liquor World Las Vegas opened 4 additional locations both serving local customers and tourists.  
Liquor World has an aggressive expansion plan in place for the next 5 years with multiple locations planned each year, making them the fastest growing Adult Beverage retailer in the southwest.

MISSION & VISION 

Liquor World Las Vegas strives to be the most convenient destination for all adult beverages in the Southwest.

CORE VALUES 

Liquor World Las Vegas is a family owned and operated organization that is focused on giving back to the community in which we serve.
We are committed to providing the right combination of selection, competitive pricing and customer experience in the most convenient locations.

Name: apros Vermouth
Description:
In the Black Forest, we focuse on the essentials. That's why our vermouths are natural and honest - made with carefully selected wines and enhanced with local herbs and distillates. We enjoy them on the rocks, as highballs or in classic cocktails.

apros White Vermouth

Base:
Pinot Gris from the Kaiserstuhl selected by Johannes von Gleichenstein

Main Botanicals:
bergamot, lemon peel, chamomile, spignel

Character:
Pinot Gris with aromas of cantaloupe, sweet pear and mirabelle. Refined with crisp nuances of bergamot, subtle hints of spignel and fruity apple notes of chamomile. Macerated with local wine distillates.
.
.
apros Rosé Vermouth

Base:
Cuvée of Pinot Gris and Pinot Noir from the Kaiserstuhl, selected by Johannes von Gleichenstein

Main Botanicals:
Rosemary, pink pepper, orange peel, angelica root

Character:
A cuvée of Pinot Gris and Pinot Noir with an ingenious balance between acidity and sweetness. Refined with mild-fruity aromas of pink pepper, the tangy-sweetness of angelica root and rosemary. Typical burgundy-style Rosé in color, combining flavors of bitter orange, a mild spiciness and herbal character, with delicate bitter notes in a long and flowing finish.
.
.
apros Red Vermouth

Base:
Pinot Noir from the Kaiserstuhl, selected by Johannes von Gleichenstein

Main Botanicals:
cardamom, cinnamon, lavender, bergamot

Character:

Pinot Noir from the Kaiserstuhl, matured in large wooden barrels and barriques, with rounded tannins and fruity aromas of local cherries. Refined with refreshing citrus
aromas of bergamot and cardamom, the sweet and savory flavor of cinnamon and well balanced lavender notes. Ruby red in color. The taste is reminiscent of the unique flavors of Pinot Noir, with fruity-floral touches and pleasant bitter tones.

Name: Carrick Winery
Description:
Named after the Carrick Range, we make wines that are estate-grown, wild fermented and certified organic. From our 23.5 hectares, we are proud to craft a diverse range of styles with a focus on quality and small-batches. Our vineyard, winery, restaurant and cellar door are located in Bannockburn, Central Otago. 

Pinot Noir is Carrick's flagship wine and other varieties made include Pinot Gris, Chardonnay, Riesling and Sauvignon Blanc.  

Key figures are Owners Tony and Alison Cleland, Winemaker Rosie Menzies and Viticulturist & GM Cliff Wickman. Carrick wines have received many accolades both in New Zealand and overseas.

Carrick was named the 2021 New Zealand Organic Wine Awards 'Sustainable Winery of the Year.'

Name: Michael De Loach Brands
Description: Michael De Loach Brands provides national sales and trade services for wine producers with a focus on growth, margin improvement, cost savings and brand building

Name: Tequila El Viejito
Description:
Family owned and operated since 1937, Tequila El Viejito has been exporting Tequila to the U.S. and many other countries for many decades.

With a variety of 100% agave products, including:

- Silver (84 Proof)
- Silver 100% Organic (80 Proof, USDA Certified)
- Silver 110 Proof (Still Strength)
- Reposado (80 Proof)
- Añejo (80 Proof, aged for at least 12 months)
- Extra Añejo (80 Proof, aged for at least 3 years)

We seach to provide premium products to true tequila connoisseurs.

Name: Wine & Pro
Description:
La société édite deux types d'évènements. 

Les Wine & Pro s'adressent aux cadres et chefs d'entreprise. Chaque événement est organisé en partenariat avec des clubs d'entreprises et des invités de marque comme Hervé Novelli, ancien Ministre chargé des PME ou Laurent Courbu, Directeur de la CCI Aquitaine. Le Wine & Pro Bordeaux 2014 a rassemblé 300 chefs d'entreprises et l'édition 2015 a rassemblé 450  participants dans les chais de Millésima, négociant en grands crus.

Name: KTW GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
KIRKs Total Wine - Innovative Oenology and Beverage Technology
KIRKs Total Wine specializes in providing comprehensive consulting solutions for the wine and beverage industry, integrating expert advice with state-of-the-art beverage technology. With an international team, we bring a wealth of expertise and diverse perspectives to every project in the beverage sector.
Our consulting services are tailored to meet the unique needs of wineries and other beverage industries worldwide. We have successfully established markets in numerous European countries and beyond, including Australia. Our extensive industry experience allows us to offer a broad range of solutions designed to optimize production, improve product quality, and enhance operational efficiency.
We offer a wide portfolio that includes specialized oenological products, analytical services, tasting consultations, barrique and tonneaux, diverse accessories, barrel cleaning and cellar hygiene products, premium oak adjuncts, and jars and containers crafted from stoneware, earthenware, porcelain, concrete, and stainless steel.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Das Spektrum des Angebots reicht von der oenologischen Beratung bis hin zu innovativer Kellereitechnologie. 
Neben einem breit gefächerten Portfolio an Barrique- und Tonneaux-Fässern verschiedener Hersteller gehören ein umfangreiches Angebot an Zubehör, Produkte zur Fassreinigung und Kellerhygiene, Holzfass-Alternativen (Chips, Blocks, Staves) sowie ausgewählte oenologische Produkte genau so zum Angebot, wie Spezialbehälter aus Beton und Keramik.

Name: Three Fat Guys Wines
Description:
As the legend has been told, the friendship between Daryn, Jason, and Tony had begun after being drafted to play football for the Green & Gold of Green Bay. The three guys soon realized they shared the same passion for ultra-premium wine as they did blocking for the quarterback. Through their many football games, world travels, and tall tales together, “Three Fat Guys” wine was born with a quest to carry on everlasting memories of good times, humbling experiences and astounding victories.
"Enjoy our wine. Embrace your past. Create an unforgettable future. Cheers."
- The THREE FAT GUYS

Name: Veraison
Description:
Tailored Training for Wine Service.

Veraison has been created to meet the specific needs of the on-trade. Its original content has been curated not only by trained educators, but by people with extensive, first-hand experience of the challenges that face the modern on-trade business.

Name: HYPERBOISSONS
Description:
C'est en 1987 que Serge Couësmes, assisté de son épouse Dina et de fidèles collaborateurs (Christophe Vichot,Yannick Gallardo, et bien d'autres) créait une surface de vente entièrement dédiée à la boisson sur 600 m² à Besançon.

UN NOUVEAU CONCEPT ÉTAIT NÉ:
Accueillir les clients, les conseiller, les guider en véritable caviste, tout en assurant un service et une offre de prix dignes de la grande distribution.

AUJOURD'HUI LE PARI EST GAGNÉ !
Le concept HYPERBOISSONS se développe pour mieux vous servir : Ecole Valentin, Dijon, Belfort, Mulhouse, Nancy, Pontarlier et Bourg en Bresse.

PLUS QU'UN CONCEPT : UNE RÉALITÉ EN MARCHE !

Name: Compass Wines and Spirits, LLC
Description:
"Connecting fine wines from all points of the world"

Compass Wines and Spirits is an importer and distributor focusing on bringing hand crafted wines from all points of the world to the restaurants and wine shops of the dynamic and expansive Chicago and Illinois marketplace.

We seek out producers and importers that share our passion for sustainability in the vineyards, craftsmanship in the wine making process and integrity in the employee, supplier and consumer relationships.

We are committed to providing the best service in the industry, delivering a well-rounded portfolio that reflects our peoples' deep commitment to artisanal producers, interesting varietals, and superior quality.

Name: Bodegas Más Que Vinos
Description:
THREE FRIENDS, THREE WINEMAKERS 

Our beginnings as friends go back to La Rioja, where we met in 1998: Margarita Madrigal, Alexandra Schmedes and Gonzalo Rodríguez; three winemakers, each with extensive oenological experience. 

The beginnings of our own winery are located in the family winery of Gonzalo in the town of Dosbarrios, located on the Plateau of Ocaña not far from Toledo. 

Respect for the wine tradition of this area made us create our winery here, basing our work on the philosophy of cultivating the native varieties: Cencibel, Grenache, Malvar & Airén.

Name: Malivoire Wine Company
Description: Malivoire is one of the Niagara Regions leading boutique wineries.

Name: Seven Deadly Gins
Description:
Seven Deadly Gins distils 8 perfectly imperfect and very different gins.  One flavoured gin for each of the seven deadly sins, Pride, Greed, Lust, Envy, Gluttony, Revenge, Sloth and Original Sin, a pure and unadulterated gin, perfect for you to be ginspired to drink it the way you like it.  

We sinned, Seven Deadly Gins actually distils 8 gins!

Name: Héritage Volcanic
Description: "Aux pieds de nos 80 volcans d'Auvergne sur le domaine du vigneron Pierre Goigoux, j'ai voulu sélectionner les plus beaux raisins de notre vignoble, produire des vins expressifs, et accueillir tous ceux qui voudront découvrir et partager avec moi cet Héritage Volcanic!"

Name: Veneno Tequila
Description:
As legend has it, the people of ancient Mexico cultivated civilizations around a mythical deity said to be responsible for the prosperity and demise of humankind. Quetzalcoatl was the God of wind, air and learning, bridging Earth and sky though myth and magic and offering fortune, health and wisdom to his believers through enchanting powers. 
And so, we found our name! Centuries have passed and yet the forklore surrounding Quetzalcoatl contuines to evolve. Today, the legend is referred to as Veneno, the posionous venom of his bite so sought after that people are willing to die in return for its rewards. 
That being said, we're pretty sure you don't have to die for it, but you will want to possess it. 

Our Single Estate Blanco Tequila is a soft, sweet, and silky tickle of citus, hinting of pineapple, orange blossom, or lemon-lime. An herbal touch will trail vapors from sweet to spicy, from citrus to floral, from subtle to dominant.

Our Single Estate Extra Anejo Tequila is defined by distinct notes of chocolate and cinnamon- pepper spice imposing character and class. The harmony of its marked notes of chocolate-nut-hazelnut will beckon further exploration. Its well-acheieved oak notes reveal its softly tempting maturity, spicy personailty & rich, elegant nature.

Name: Weingut Staffelter Hof
Description: Winemaking tradition since AD 862

Name: Cerveza Artesanal Siete Barrios
Description:
Crear a partir de los ingredientes de calidad superior y conciencia ecológica en todo nuestro proceso, cervezas con carácter Extra Premium; para satisfacer a los paladares más educados, así como a los nuevos consumidores en búsqueda de sabores y texturas supremas en una cerveza.

Nuestra inspiración, los visionarios que iniciaron la producción de cerveza en la ciudad de San Luis Potosí a finales del siglo XVIII.

Con esta misma pasión ha sido creada la línea de cervezas 7 Barrios. Pertenecientes a la familia de las cervezas ALES. Son cervezas elaboradas con ingredientes naturales y tradicionales:

· malta de cebada ó trigo
· lúpulo
· levadura
· agua

Y además son cervezas que no han sido filtradas ni pasteurizadas, por lo que se pueden ver rastros de su elaboración (sedimentos de levadura) en cada uno de
nuestros envases).

Name: VADIO Wines
Description: Boutique winery

Name: Idaho Wine Merchant
Description: Wholesaler of Fine Wines and Craft Beer in Idaho.

Name: Distillerie de Wambrechies
Description:
The Distillerie de Wambrechies was created in 1817 by the Claeyssens family, hence its historical name. It was in 2019 that T.O.S Distillerie bought the business of the distillery renamed “Distillerie de Wambrechies”. T.O.S Distillerie was created by the founders of the Saint-Germain brewery, known for its Page 24 beer. It is a company of the Hauts de France, heir to a know-how of brewers acquired during the last 20 years.

When the idea of a distillery emerged in the founders’ minds of Katy Gravina, the brothers Stéphane and Vincent Bogaert, and Hervé Descamps, their wish was to relaunch production of genever, an emblematic spirit of Northern France. As the Claeyssens distillery was experiencing great economic difficulties, it seemed inconceivable to the founders to let this regional jewel disappear. Indeed, the Wambrechies distillery, a pioneer in the production of genever, has been producing it for over 200 years.

Name: Mary Taylor Wine
Description: Terroir-driven, sustainable, interdependent, biodiverse, in-clusive, affordable village-wines from growers and farmers.

Name: Tenute Girolamo
Description:
Tenute Girolamo is a medium sized family owned & operated wine estate located in Puglia, Italy.
Established in 2000, it ownes 50 ha vineyards and has a production of 1,5 million bottles/year.

The production includes three different typologies of wines, which vary in price and quality, trying to satisfy the palate of a larger audience:  
1) Top Line- wines with high contact with oak and extended ageing, 
2) Medium Line - wines with limited contact with oak, 
3) Basic Line – wines with no oak, all stainless steel fermented.

Tenute Girolamo's wines are sold in more than 10 Countries in Europe as well as USA and Canada.
The focus of the company is to grant always, continuity and high quality, as well as:

·         prompt attention

·         timely delivery

·         competitive rates and

·         quick service with a professional touch

Name: Benedict Butterworth Ltd
Description:
We are a small, personal company providing fun, engaging and accessible wine tasting events, both virtual and in-person, for corporate and private clients. 

Specialising in corporate events to boost client engagement for our customers, we've swirled our way through over 100 virtual events since early 2020. We take care of everything, from curating custom 3-4 bottle themed tasting boxes and sheets, personally fulfilling and tracking deliveries, as well as hosting each 2 hour event that can be as wine, business, or fun focussed as you like. Sessions can include presentations from yourselves or guest speakers, and the running order can be customised to your liking - it's your event. 

Beyond tastings we also act as an online bottle shop where bottles from all our tastings can be found. We can provide wines for gifts, event prizes, or just to stock up the office (or home) wine rack. Alongside this, we also run our hugely popular monthly wine club subscription boxes where we showcase interesting and often under the radar bottles.

Please do feel free to reach out and see what we can do to help.

Name: Cellar-Tek Supplies
Description:
Founded in 2004, Cellar-Tek was born from the idea that wineries, breweries, cideries and distilleries wanted honest, local technical support and service from their equipment and supplies distributor. Operating under that model, Cellar-Tek has grown from its humble beginnings in the heart of the Okanagan, British Columbia wine region to encompass 15 employees across the country. Customers are serviced from two stocked warehouses, one located in the craft beer district of Kelowna, BC and the other in the heart of Niagara wine country in St. Catharines, ON.

We are continually searching our global network for the finest quality equipment, products and supplies for the commercial beverage production industry.

Name: SONBERK, a.s.
Description:
Through a unique pairing of soil and sun Sonberk vineyard gives origin to signature wine. Loess soil vineyard Sonberk, first founded in the XIII. century, with an extraordinary view of the most beautiful South-Moravian nature site Pálava Hills is a place with a true genius loci.

Sonberk vineyard stretches over 40 hectares and encircles the winery at the foot of the hill Slunečná (236 m; from German original Sonnberg – the Sunny Hill), which gave the name to the entire vineyard and winery.
 
The vineyard offers ideal soil conditions, which were confirmed also by a geological survey carried out in 2004 in order to assess the most suitable grape varieties to be planted out.

Loess soil, modest elevation and South to South-West exposition make ideal conditions for grape varieties such as Riesling, Sauvignon, Traminer, Pinot Gris, Chardonnay, Pálava, Moravian Muscat and Merlot.

In May 2008 the new winery house designed by Josef Pleskot (AP Atelier, Prague) went into life.

Sonberk winery house is built in a modern way, but using elements, which are old and well known. It represents stability and steadiness, unique in today´s architecture. It is an unforgettable place, that evokes the desire to be returning under the grand roof, under which the whole wine production cycle takes place.

Name: Churchill´s Port
Description: Churchill’s was founded in 1981 by John Graham, making it the first Port Wine Company to be established in 50 years. The Founder wanted to continue his family’s long Port tradition but at the same time create his own individual style of Port. He named the Company after his wife, Caroline Churchill.

Name: Sammy's Beach Bar Cocktail Co.
Description: Founded by hall-of-fame rocker, cocktail aficionado and spirits innovator Sammy Hagar, Sammy’s Beach Bar Cocktail Co. presents a line of naturally flavored low-ABV Sparkling Rum Cocktails. They’re made with Hagar’s award-winning Beach Bar Rum, sweetened with agave syrup, and come in four playful takes on classic flavors wrapped in bold packaging. All have been uniquely crafted to take your mind to the beach with your toes in the sand.

Name: Tenute Rade
Description:
I vini piemontesi del Monferrato DOC e DOCG lavorati secondo i metodi tradizionali ma con tecnologie moderne.
Una produzione dedicata a Moscato, Barbera, Chardonnay, Pinot e Bracchetto.
La passione per l’enologia e l'abilità nell'evolversi insieme al mercato, ha spinto negli anni la famiglia Cusmano a creare tre linee aziendali ben distinte:

CUSMANO CANTINA DI FAMIGLIA:
Dal 1988 creiamo linee di etichette dando spazio alla fantasia,
 ognuna con un significato, una storia e un pensiero alle spalle.

TENUTE RADE:
la migliore selezione dei nostri vigneti da luce ad una linea che rappresenta il nostro territorio e la nostra realtà, dedicata al mondo enoteca ed ho.re.ca.

MAULLI
L'idea è quelle di offrire un'alternativa moderna partendo dal comune denominatore che da decenni rappresenta l'azienda: il vino. Nasce così la linea MAULLI , cocktail ready to drink che vanno dai grandi classici ad abbinamenti con la frutta.

Name: Maisi • მაისი
Description:
LLC Maisi 2020 was established with the aim to create healthy, sugar free product from Georgian fruits and vegetables. We believe that the gifts of nature should be used wisely. Therefore, we produce natural juice from handpicked fruits and vegetable from Georgian farmers. Our factory is located in Natakhtari, Georgia. This area is famous for high quality water which makes our product especially tasty and unique.
Our technologists work on a daily basis to create various juice varieties. Traditionally, Georgia is famous for its grapes and wines. Therefore, we created the special line for grape juice which has unique taste and texture. Our manufacturing site is equipped with brand-new cutting-edge technologies in order to produce high quality product and minimize the negative effect on nature via waste management and energy efficiency.

Name: Lift Collective Organization
Description:
Our culture is changing, and so should wine. A response to this shift, Lift Collective is a multi-channel platform innovating the constructs of the wine world through thoughtful discussion, scholarship opportunities, and mentorship. We're less about behind-the-scenes efforts made by a select few and more about collaboration, conversation, and transparency between our partners and collaborators. Rooted in advocacy, Lift Collective welcomes all people to the chat and is committed to:

Widening the aperture of intersectionality.
Provoking thought and creating dialogue, both on and offline.
Upholding a commitment to doing the work before execution.
Checking titles, designations, and egos at the door.
Lifting our glasses, standards, and awareness, collectively.

Name: Fattoria Terre del Marchesato
Description:
Winery founded in 1954 by Emilio Fuselli.
Craftsmanship, passion, territory and search for quality is what allows the Fuselli family to make refined and unique wines!
Fattoria Terre del Marchesato is a small family-run winery managed by Maurizio Fuselli, together with his wife Giovanna and his three sons: Alessandro, Samuele and Filippo.
The vineyards are located in the heart of the Bolgheri production area, right in the middle of the most important names in the area such as Sassicaia, Ornellaia and Guado al Tasso.

Name: MEZCAL VAGO
Description:
We seek out small batch mezcaleros, who for generations have been perfecting their craft deep in the mountains of Southern Oaxaca.

At Vago, we believe in walking away from the beaten path, losing ourselves in the hills, and searching out the extraordinary.

Name: DISMAVI 2000 SL
Description:
Somos una familia mallorquina con larga trayectoria en el mundo del vino. Seleccionamos y distribuimos referencias locales e internacionales desde nuestras tiendas en Manacor y Santanyí, y también online. 

Ofrecemos envío gratuito, descuentos especiales en tu primera compra y distribución directa a restaurantes, hoteles y particulares en toda la isla. Nuestra selección incluye bodegas emblemáticas de Mallorca y otras que vale la pena descubrir. 

Si el vino te interesa, aquí hay mucho que explorar.

Name: Maize Valley Farm, Market, Winery & Craft Brewery
Description: Winery, Craft Brewery,  Family Farm, Agri-tourism destination located in Hartville Ohio. Hakuna Matata!

Name: Winet
Description: Criada pelo consultor e especialista Deco Rossi, estudioso do mundo do vinho em 2010, a Winet presta diversos tipos de serviços ligados ao vinho: Aulas, palestras, degustações, montagem de cartas de vinhos de lojas e restaurantes e consultoria/venda para clientes finais. Sempre procurando simplificar o processo de compra e deixar tudo mais fácil, gostoso e desenfrescalhado! Bem vindos à Winet.

Name: Domaine Grisoni SA
Description: C'est en 1937 que Louis Grisoni a fondé le Domaine Grisoni à Cressier.  Il souhaitait non seulement cultiver ses vignes mais aussi maîtriser l'ensemble de la chaîne viti-vinicole en élevant ses vins. Depuis là, le Domaine a à cœur de faire perdurer les traditions dans le plus grand respect de la nature.

Name: MBG Impex
Description: Wine importer and distribution company

Name: Mets Vins
Description: Faites le tour de la France des Vins et produits du terroir grâce à la Box mensuelle Mets Vins.

Name: A Virtual Toast
Description: Our virtual events give you the opportunity to treat your clients to exquisite food, exclusive wines, and expert service while giving you the time you need to relate to them in a social setting. Far from a simple wine tasting or a regular zoom call, we deliver a real, shared, fine-dining experience that has been optimized for the virtual world.

Name: Cellarmaster Wines Hong Kong
Description:
Cellarmaster Wines is Hong Kong’s leading online retailer of wines, beers, cider & spirits. With over twenty years’ market experience Cellarmaster Wines brings a wide selection of products from around the world direct to your door in Hong Kong. Our order process is quick & easy and our team is on hand to help you with your selection today.

We partner with bars and restaurants all over the city to bring a range of exciting events to our customers including tastings, drinks parties & dinners. For exclusive access to these events & our weekly wine specials, sign up to our mailing list today.

To speak to a Cellarmaster Wines consultant for assistance or advice today call us on +852 3191 2000 or email orders@cellarmasterwines.com.

Looking for a corporate event provider? Our qualified team will bring fresh ideas to your next event. Email marketing@cellarmasterwines.com or call 3191 2000 to speak to a member of our events team.

Name: Château Toulouze
Description:
Château Toulouze est situé en appellation Graves de Vayres, sur la rive gauche de la Dordogne.
Sur un sol de graves et de sables, Château Toulouze  produit des vins principalement constitués de merlot et de cabernet franc. 
Château Toulouze vit une renaissance : expansion du domaine de 30 à 40 hectares, réfection intégrale des chais, un nouvel œnologue, conversion vers l'agriculture biologique, projet d'œnotourisme ...

Notre gamme se décline en 
- Château Toulouze,  AOP Graves de Vayres, rouge, Médaille de bronze CGA Paris 2022
- Bleu Toulouze, AOP Graves de Vayres, rouge, Médaille d'Argent , CGA Paris 2022
- Rose Toulouze, AOP Bordeaux , rosé 
- Cool Grenouille , AOP Bordeaux , rouge.

Venez les découvrir, les déguster et les partager

Name: Bemberg Estate Wines
Description: Bemberg Estate Wines was born as a result of a longtime dream of having a collection of wines of its own to share with family and friends all over the world.

Name: Cordis Wines & Spirits
Description:
Exclusive Wines & Spirits’ Importers & Distributors | Brand Building for Greece | Gaja, Minuty, Louis Latour, Dujac, Vacheron, Sillver Oak, Samartzis Estate & more



Renewed Portfolio for 2022  www.cavahalari.com/portfolio2022.pdf 


↬ welcome@cavahalari.com

Name: Vinothek Hauser
Description: Die Vinothek Hauser ist ein persönlich geführtes Unternehmen, bei dem Genuss und Qualität im Vordergrund stehen. Ich biete hier ausschliesslich Weine an, die mich selbst sehr begeistern und noch überwiegend unbekannt sind. Da ich aktive Partnerschaften zu den Produzenten pflege kenne ich die Herkunft jedes einzelnen Produkts sehr gut.

Name: WINOTEQA ŁÓDŹ
Description:
Winoteqa to miejsce gdzie porozmawiasz, zdegustujesz i zakupisz wina z Południowej Afryki oraz z całego świata. W naszej ofercie znajdziesz również bogatą kolekcję single malts oraz cygar.

Winoteqa to pomysł zrodzony z pasji do win - tutaj zaczerpniesz informacji o winach, whisky, rumach czy cygarach. Znajdziesz bogaty asortyment win z całego świata ale przede wszystkim z RPA. Oferujemy również warsztaty, degustacje i propagujemy kulturę picia wina oraz wiedzy o winie. Pokazujemy jak łączyć wina z posiłkami, opowiadamy o kulturze winiarskiej czy historii tego szlachetnego trunku.

Name: Weinstüberl & Weinverkauf
Description:
Willkommen im Weinstüberl Solothurn, Ihrer gemütlichen Weinbar mit Weinhandel im Herzen von Solothurn.

Hier geniessen Sie ausgewählte österreichische Weine in familiärer Atmosphäre – ob bei einem Achterl Glas in unserer Bar oder beim Einkauf für Zuhause.

Genussmomente mit österreichischem Flair,
Probieren Sie unser beliebtes Jausebrettl – die perfekte Begleitung zu einem Glas Wein.

Seit über 15 Jahren importieren wir unsere Weine direkt aus Österreich – authentisch, sorgfältig ausgewählt und mit Leidenschaft präsentiert.

Weinverkauf & persönliche Beratung,
im Weinstüberl steht der persönliche Kontakt im Vordergrund.

Wir beraten Sie individuell, bieten Degustationen an und helfen Ihnen, den perfekten Wein für jeden Anlass zu finden.

Weinstüberl in Solothurn – wo Wein, Genuss und Geselligkeit zuhause sind Ob entspanntes Glas Wein am Abend, ein Treffen mit Freunden oder ein besonderer Tropfen für Ihr Zuhause – im Weinstüberl Solothurn verbinden sich Weinbar und Weinhandel zu einem einzigartigen Erlebnis.

Besuchen Sie uns und entdecken Sie die Welt österreichischer Weine – mitten in Solothurn.

Unsere Öffnungszeiten:

15:00 – 23:00 Uhr

November – März

15:00 – 21:00 Uhr
