erleb a glaserl

Name: CHAMPAGNE CUPERLY
Description:
Fondée en 1845 par Charles Cuperly, la Maison Cuperly ne cesse d’innover et de sublimer ses Champagnes.

Maison familiale et indépendante depuis 8 générations, elle perpétue son héritage et son histoire dans la conception de cuvées complexes, uniques et généreuses.

L’exigence et l’excellence font partie du savoir-faire de la Maison Cuperly, du travail de la vigne jusqu’à la vente de ses bouteilles. 

Toujours dans le but de produire exclusivement des champagnes prestigieux d’appellation Grand Cru, les raisins du Champagne Cuperly sont uniquement issues des terroirs renommés de la Montagne de Reims comme Verzy, Verzenay et Mailly-Champagne.

Name: Rouge Tanin
Description:
Rouge Tanin est une entreprise de négoce agricole commercialisant simplement les deux domaines des associées Maguelone et Céline, dans l'Hérault. Vins des trois couleurs, en appellation Languedoc et Grès de Montpellier. 

L'exploitation principale (Mas de Bayle à Villeveyrac) est certifiée iso 14001. Concrètement il s'agit d'une gestion en Haute Valeur Environnementale (80% du vignoble ne reçoit aucun intrant, nous luttons contre le ver de grappe via de la confusion sexuelle pour respecter une méthode naturelle, nos cartons et bouteilles sont allégées, nous avons supprimé la contre-étiquette et bien d'autres exemples pour ce vignoble situé en zone natura 2000).

Nos offres s'adressent aux particuliers mais également aux entreprises et au secteur CHR. Tous nos vins sont livrés et peuvent être personnalisés à votre demande (étiquette au nom de votre entreprise par exemple, pour un mariage etc).

Nos secteurs de vente majeurs sont l'Occitanie et la région parisienne.

Name: Petaluma Gap Winegrowers Alliance
Description: The mission of the Petaluma Gap Winegrowers Alliance is to promote the growers and vintners of the Petaluma Gap and foster the production of high-quality wines crafted from grapes grown in the Petaluma Gap American Viticultural Area (AVA). To cultivate positive relationships with the community by elevating awareness of growing and winemaking practices and an understanding of the winegrowers’ commitment to respect and protect the land. And to continue to advance Petaluma’s 150+ year heritage as a successful wine-producing center.

Name: Vughtse Wijnkoperij
Description:
Welkom bij de Vughtse Wijnkoperij

-- Wijnkopers sinds 1903 --

De Vughtse Wijnkoperij is een zelfstandige wijnspeciaalzaak. Daarmee zijn wij vrij zelf te bepalen wat er in onze winkel staat. We zijn continu bezig onze collectie verder te verbeteren. De ontwikkelingen en innovaties in de wijnwereld gaan door en door. Wij verdiepen ons daarin, om je goed te kunnen kunnen adviseren en de beste keuze te bieden in iedere prijsklasse.

Je vindt bij ons wijnen voor alledag en feestjes tot aan de meest beroemde huizen ter wereld. We hanteren grote merken, maar kopen juist ook graag in van kleinere huizen met een heel eigen karakter. Omdat wij de wijnen zelf proeven en inkopen, kun je er van op aan dat wij de wijnen ook kennen.

De Vughtse Wijnkoperij is gevestigd in het centrum van Vught, dicht bij de uitvalswegen richting Tilburg, Den Bosch en Eindhoven. In Vught is parkeren gratis.

De winkel is voor ons dé plek om je te ontmoeten. We vertellen je graag over de wijnen en de wijn/spijs combinaties. Voor je gemak hebben wij ook een webshop. Zo kun je goed vooraf thuis oriënteren op wat je wilt aankopen en als je geen tijd hebt direct ook je bestelling plaatsen.

We organiseren regelmatig proeverijen, masterclasses en cursusavonden in ons eigen Proeflokaal of elders in de omgeving. Je kunt bij ons ook terecht voor ‘Private Wining” en adviezen over je eigen wijnkelder.

We zien je graag in onze winkel!

Naomi Bisschop
Register Vinoloog

Name: MAGUEY VINOS
Description: MAGUEY VINOS is a wine and spirits company based out of Guadalajara, Mexico.

Name: Alde Gott Winzer Schwarzwald eG
Description:
BERAUSCHEND SCHÖN...
Groß, grün, voller Tannen und Tradition: Der Schwarzwald, Heimat des ALDE GOTT. Für die einen eine sagenumwobene Landschaft, für die anderen ein riesiger Naturpark. Bekannt und berühmt für Kirschwasser, Kuckucksuhr & Co., steht der Schwarzwald für Authentizität und das Besondere. Unsere Genossenschaft liegt nicht nur an den Hängen des Schwarzwalds, sondern auch an der Badischen Weinstraße.

Neben legendären Edelbränden gibt es darum auch ausgezeichnete Weine.

Name: Vinícola Serra das Galés
Description:
Oficialmente inaugurada em 02 de junho de 2007 temos como base a inovação, o arrojo e o pioneirismo. 
A Marca da Vinícola Serra das Galés foi desenvolvida buscando retratar a força do cerrado, sua beleza singular e diversidade, por meio da estilização da Pedra do Cálice, principal monumento e símbolo natural presente na Serra das Galés e também por meio da cor “terra”, predominante na região.
Somos a casa do Muralha, o vinho fino do cerrado, produzido com variedades de uvas portuguesas Touriga Nacional e Castelão, a francesa, Syrah e outras variedades de uva finas internacionalmente conhecidas e apreciadas, como a Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Tempranillo e Malbec.
Atualmente, a propriedade produz mais de 300 toneladas de uva por ano, destinadas à produção do suco de uva 100% integral e dos vinhos Cálice de Pedra – rosado, branco e tinto (elaborados a partir de variedades das uvas Isabel, Violeta, Niágara e Lorena).

Name: Bodvár - House of Rosés
Description:
Enjoy the tradition,

The Bodvár - House of Rosé story began 2006, with the idea to collect the greatest rosé wines from around the world under one brand and make them available to discerning customers. Today Bodvár - House of rosés is the only truly boutique rosé wine house.
Behind Bodvár Rosés is a 160 years of tradition to explore the world in search of unique high quality beverages and other luxury products. We continually challenge ourself to travel the world in search of the greatest rosé wines and judge every new vintage. 
The founder Bodvar Hafström has a great swedish heritage within cognac, cigars and wines. Mr. Hafström's ancestors founded the legendary Grönstedt's Cognac in 1846. Today Grönstedt's is Sweden's most enjoyed cognac in all ages. 
Mr Hafström's great great grand father Waldemar Hafström founded one of the largest premium cigar brands in Sweden in 1855; Hafströms.

"Rosé is a Lifestyle"

Name: Luis Duarte Vinhos
Description:
Luis Duarte Vinhos is a family business run by Portuguese winemaker Luis Duarte and his wife, Dora Simões. The property is located in southern Portugal (Alentejo) at the Monte do Carrapatelo estate, in Reguengos de Monsaraz, very close to the Alqueva Lake.
The estate’s 12 hectares of vineyard enjoy a continental Mediterranean climate. Sustainable farming methods are adapted to each grape variety and vineyard plot. The vines were planted between 2001 and 2002.

Name: Primosic srl
Description:
The culture of the vine is in the DNA of the Primosic family, the genetic heritage that we’ve passed down for many generations. 
Our history, is made of proper nouns: types of earth, naturally favorable for the ripening of grapes – the Collio and Oslavia – but above all, names of the people who, with their work, have helped to grow an ancient tradition.
Primosic winery is located in Oslavia, “cradle” of the Ribolla Gialla grape variety, in the hearth of the Collio DOC area, where the pedoclimatic characteristics create a unique microcosm, nestled between the peaks of the Julian Alps and the Adriatic Sea.
The Primosic family has ancient roots: in the Theresian cadastre of 1751, Primosic was registered as owner of vineyards in Oslavia. The first name is that of Karlo Primosic, who, at the end of the 19th century, supplied the wine merchants, that from the south of the Austro-Hungarian Empire, took the precious product to the capital Vienna.
The “Number One”, the first bottle of the Collio DOC appellation, was produced by Primosic and represents the long company history and the commitment for quality and respect for the territory. 
The winery is now managed by the brothers Marko and Boris, together with their father Silvan, whom carry on the family tradition with unchanged passion; meanwhile, the fifth generation approach the family business with curiosity and respect, in a continuos comparison among different generations.
For Primosic the art of wine is a tailoring work, made with attention and care, aiming to produce unique wines, with personality and character.
The production reflects the philosophy and the values of the family: to interpret the territory means to enhance the grape varieties in a personal way, creating something unique and unrepeatable. Minerality, freshness, but also complexity, structure and elegance, are some characteristics of the wines from the Primosic winery.

Name: Goosecross Cellars
Description:
Located in Yountville, Goosecross is a family winery and vineyard. We produce only 8,000 cases each year, and our winemaker Bill Nancarrow focuses all of his time and energy on growing grapes and guiding their transformation into great wine. Bill crafts our wines to show true varietal character by staying focused on the basics – sustainable farming with attention, care, and diligence in the cellar. 

At Goosecross we took a different path – a path that supports our perspective that producing great wine is not enough and our deep commitment to hospitality, service and connecting with people is tantamount to our mutual success with customers.   

With a robust wine club and loyalty program, legal shipments to nearly every state, a responsive and talented team of people, podcasts and wine education online, recipes matched to Goosecross wines, free concierge services, private labeled wines, and social events make Goosecross one of the most sought after and enjoyed wine destination experiences in the Napa Valley. 

We employ the latest cutting-edge technology and social media tools to keep our website optimized, fresh, and engaging. Get access to Goosecross 24/7 while on the go with responsive web technology right from your iPad, iPod Touch, tablet or smart phone. Our goal is to make our visitor experience here positive and accessible.

Name: Alta Sur - Insumos enológicos
Description:
Somos una empresa nacida en Argentina, con más de 35 años de trayectoria en el mercado, que brinda soluciones vitivinícolas a bodegas de toda Sudamérica.

Hoy en día se consagra como líder en el segmento, con más 650 millones de botellas tapadas en el año, un stock permanente de 34 millones de corchos y 700 contenedores enviados por año.
Somos la única empresa del rubro con base en 3 países, que brinda logística, expertise y soluciones de calidad a la industria del vino.

Además, Alta Sur es garantía de calidad: Siendo los primeros en Latinoamérica en contar con certificación ISO 22000, FSSC 22000 , HACCP, CECA, FDA. Ofreciendo a sus clientes excelencia e innovación en cada uno de sus productos: Tanto para cierres y embotellado, junto con DIAM y su línea de corchos dedicados a vinos tranquilos, espumosos y bebidas espirituosas. Para creación de los mejores vinos junto con La Food,  IYeast, Vivelys Y Boise y una amplia gama de levaduras, nutrientes y levaduras de segunda generación. Y la crianza de los mismos gracias a los productos de Vivelys, Boise y Moreau. Todos ellos creados bajo la más estrictas normas que aseguran la máxima calidad en sus vinos y sin dañar al medio ambiente.

Name: JPG Distributors INC.
Description:
We import, represent, market and distribute beverages in Panama, with national coverage, with the intention of being present in the main distribution channels throughout the country.

We exclusively develop various international brands, which have been carefully selected for their quality, service commitment and product attributes.

Domestic Division // JPG DISTRIBUTORS INC - PANAMA

Carefully selected management team with more than 10 years of
experience in the liquor and alcoholic beverages industry.

The company is 100% focused on liquors, wines and non-alcoholic
beverages.

Name: Premier Beverages Limited
Description:
Premier Beverages was established in January 1995 with the vision of being a specialised, comprehensive beverage supplier. The Company is carrying out successful brand management and distribution for international and local brands and boasts an extensive Wine, Liquor, and Beverage selection. Premier Beverages is one of the leading beverage suppliers to the Hotel and Hospitality Industry.
 
The sales function into two divisions, Wines and Liquor/Beverages. The Wine Sales Division is staffed by two specialists. The Liquor/Beverages Division is headed by a Sales Manager. Under the Sales Manager there are 5 key account salespersons each having responsibility for brands. In addition, route sales are handled by three vehicles. Merchandising is carried out by two Merchandisers who report to the Sales Manager. The sales team service the On-Trade, the Off-Licences, Petrol Stations, and Key Accounts. Our aim is to serve 100% of the beverage trade on the island and we currently service over 1000 customers ranging from large hotels to street vendors. 
 
We are also the leading provider of bottled water on the island, ranging from packaged sizes to the 5-Gallon returnable bottles for the home-office delivery (HOD) market. . All our water products are sold under the Oasis Purified Water brand, which is considered by local consumers to be the water of choice. We are also the leading provider of beverage dispensing systems for juice, coffee and fruit slushes (Granita) to hotels and larger restaurants on the island.
 
Distribution is handled through a new, purpose-built 15,000 square feet warehouse facility. Within this facility there is chilled storage for over 8,000 cases of wine, as well as larger bonded facilities. Receipt, storage, and picking/packing of orders are handled electronically through a Warehouse Management System which ensures 99% pick accuracy and greater throughput in order picking and delivery.

Name: Chateau Palais Cardinal
Description: Propriété familiale depuis 1853, le vignoble du Château Palais Cardinal s'étend sur 26 hectares de Saint-Emilion Grand Cru et 4 hectares de Bordeaux. Nous avons pour objectif de partager notre expérience et notre savoir faire pour vous faire voyager grâce à des vins fins et subtiles, pleins de complexité et de fruits. Depuis 2018 le domaine est co-géré par Nicolas Ballande et sa famille, avec l’aide d’une équipe très expérimentée et sous les conseils de Monsieur Thomas Duclos.

Name: MEIN MAIN GmbH
Description:
Das im Jahr 2019 von dem Hanauer Unternehmer, Eventveranstalter und Investor Khosrau „Rocky“ Musleh und dem freischaffenden Hanauer Künstler und Designer, Lars Contzen gegründete Label MEIN MAIN vertreibt Bier, Apfelwein, Kunst & Mode aus lokaler Produktion vom Hessischen Main. Die Marke steht für die Liebeserklärung an den Fluss und die Dinge, die hier mit viel Hingabe und Leidenschaft geschaffen werden. MEIN MAIN Helles und die Apfelweinprodukte sind in ausgewählter junger Gastronomie und zwischenzeitlich in über 200 Märkten erhältlich. 

MEIN MAIN, das ist Gutes mit Seele, Sinn und Geschmack, voller Herzblut, alles im Fluss, für dich, aus Liebe.

Name: GEM&BOLT Mezcal + Damiana
Description:
GEM&BOLT is a lifestyle brand with a line of fair trade and sustainable Damiana-distilled Artisanal Mezcal.  

Produced by fourth generation Maestro Mezcaleros in San Dionisio Ocotepec, using traditional methods, with no artificial yeast or chemicals, GEM&BOLT was founded by artist-alchemist duo AdrinAdrina & Elliott Coon. Rooted in the sophistication of fine art, celebration, ritual and plant intelligence the duo are powered by the belief that a positive lifestyle elevates consciousness. 

GEM&BOLT is fundamentally committed to improving the lives of all of those who contribute to making the best Mezcal in the world. The company aspires to be the most conscious spirit company in the world—with everything we do elevating the lives of the people who make our product, their families, and the communities they live in.

Name: Domaine Henri Cruchon
Description:
Family Vineyard in Biodynamic Farming in Morges

At the heart of the stunning Morges vineyard, Domaine Henri Cruchon cultivates a mosaic of 16 grape varieties spread across several parcels, each with its own terroir and microclimate, giving our wines a unique personality. Our challenge is to capture the magic of each parcel to express the exceptional character of our environment.

We firmly believe that an environmentally respectful approach is essential to reveal the authenticity of each terroir and grape variety. That is why all our vines are cultivated using biodynamic methods, without any chemical products, thereby preserving our precious ecosystem.

The Vaud vineyard, one of the oldest in Europe, is rich in vibrant history that shapes its identity. The Chasselas grape, the emblematic variety of the Pays de Vaud, remains predominant in our vineyards and proudly illustrates our winemaking heritage. The geographical position of our region, at the crossroads of European cultures, has also favored the introduction of Burgundy grape varieties such as Pinot Noir, which has been cultivated here for over 600 years.

In a constantly evolving world, Domaine Henri Cruchon positions itself as a pioneer. Over the past thirty years, we have diversified our grape varieties with a unique range of selections, enriching the wine landscape of Vaud.

Join us to discover our passion for wine, participate in our tours and tastings, and dive into the fascinating story behind each of our bottles.

 +41 21 801 17 92
 henricruchon.com
 contact@henricruchon.ch

Name: Simple Vodka
Description:
Every bottle of Simple Vodka begins with 9.5 pounds of Idaho Russet potatoes and pure water from the Snake River Aquifer—no added sugars, flavors, or preservatives, just quality ingredients. 

Our unique four-column distillation, powered by wind energy, minimizes waste and energy use, while we recycle wastewater and upcycle potato byproducts to leave a lighter footprint.

The result? A smooth, slightly sweet vodka, perfect in any cocktail or enjoyed neat—celebrated for its quality and taste and honored with a Platinum Award from the San Francisco Tasting Alliance.

At Simple, quality is our foundation, but purpose drives us forward. For every drink poured, we contribute one meal to food relief efforts in America, totaling over 1,000,000 meals so far—and we’re only getting started. Guided by our values of quality, sustainability, community support, and innovation, Simple is more than a brand; it’s a movement that blends enjoyment with purposeful giving, one drink at a time.

Name: DOMAINE DE LA SANGLIERE
Description:
Domaine de la Sanglière depuis 1980  
Safari, apéritif dans les vignes, dégustation  
Boutique en ligne

Name: Steiger Spirits GmbH
Description: Steiger Spirits ist Hersteller qualitativer Spirituosen und verbindet dabei die Innovationskraft eines Startups mit dem Traditionsgeist einer Brennerei. Unsere Produkte stehen dabei für Ehrlichkeit. Bodenständigkeit. Kompromisslose Qualität. FÜR ECHTE KUMPEL.

Name: Bold North Cellars
Description: A family owned and operated winery, brewery, and event center located in the heart of Minnesota Lake Country.

Name: Solo Contigo Wines
Description: Ubicada en el corazón de Los Chacayes, Valle de Uco; nuestra Casa/Bodega abre sus puertas para que puedas visitarla, relajarte y disfrutar nuestro vino.

Name: Therapy Vineyards & Inn
Description: Located on the Naramata Bench in Canada's Okanagan Valley, Therapy Vineyards is a family-owned and operated winery and inn.  Open year-round and boasting a delicious assortment of red, white, rose and sparkling wines, Therapy Vineyards welcomes visitors in its beautiful wine shop, expansive deck area and, for longer stays, the deluxe rooms in the on-site inn.

Name: LiqHub
Description:
LiqHub is India's first online beverage platform which strives to give Knowledge of AlcoBev industry in addition to Delivery Service. Sol Aim is Get Easily, Drink Wisely. 

Rich Content about beverages, Cocktails and others are available on our Portal. Come Gain info of not only about what you are Drinking but also what you are Missing. 

We are also working in getting these exclusive catalog to your doorstep soon.

Name: Podere Brizio
Description:
A jewel in the Montalcino hills, Podere Brizio estate is surrounded by vineyards and olive groves that face in a southwesterly direction, towards the coast. The marine-origin sand and loam soil cover marl and limestone dating back more than 100 million years, making this the perfect terroir for our vineyards, according to a sustainable philosophy that is respectful of the soil and the natural lifecycle of the vines.
33 hectares of land, including over 11 hectares planted to Sangiovese and two hectares of olive trees, all based on Organic agricolture. 
The wine is produced as the finest expression of the land due to the detail-oriented endeavours in the vineyards, aimed at keeping the soil vibrant, healthy and teeming with microbial activity.
Fermentation takes place in steel vats using solely native yeast to preserve the aromas and flavours of the grapes. Wines are refined according to local tradition, in 54 hl untoasted French Allier oak barrels, developing complexity although maintaining fruitiness.

Come un gioiello fra le colline di Montalcino, Podere Brizio, circondato da oliveti e vigneti, guarda a sud-ovest, in direzione del mare.
Il terreno sabbio-limoso, di origini marine, poggia su marne e calcari di oltre cento milioni di anni, rendendo il luogo ideale per allevare le vigne seguendo una filosofia produttiva sostenibile, rispettosa dei suoli e del ciclo naturale della vite.
L’azienda vanta trentatré ettari di superficie totale, di cui oltre undici coltivati a Sangiovese e due ad oliveta. Il vino viene prodotto interpretando al meglio l’ambiente circostante, grazie ad un lavoro in vigna atto a preservare il terreno vivo, sano, ricco di interazioni microbiche. La fermentazione avviene in tini di acciaio con il solo uso di lieviti indigeni, in modo da preservare le proprietà organolettiche dell’uva.
L’invecchiamento avviene in grandi botti di rovere non tostato dell’Alliers, conferendo complessità ma al tempo stesso mantenendo frutto e freschezza.

Name: EFESTĒ
Description: Efeste products include red, white, sparkling, by varietal, sauvignon blanc, blanc, chardonnay, cabernet sauvignon, blends, specials, merchandise, and custom gifts. It is a wine manufacturer and an online seller of textile products and gifts. For inquiries, email and telephone numbers are available on their websites.

Name: Globalviti
Description:
GLOBALVITI es un proyecto consorciado de investigación industrial y desarrollo experimental que pretende mejorar la producción vitivinícola frente al cambio climático a través de nuevas tecnologías,  de estrategias biotecnológicas y del manejo del viñedo.

El consorcio lo componen  ocho empresas: Bodegas Torres, como líder del proyecto, Pago de Carraovejas, Juvé & Camps, Pellenc Ibérica, Bodegas Martín Códax, Viveros Villanueva Vides, Grupo Hispatec I.E y Bodegas  Ramón Bilbao, junto a trece organismos de investigación de referencia nacional.

El proyecto dispone de un presupuesto global de 8,8 millones de euros, cuenta con el apoyo financiero del programa  CIEN del CDTI y se desarrollará hasta julio de 2020.

Name: Petit Perlage
Description:
Selezioniamo ed importiamo una gamma di champagne di piccoli vignerons per i quali abbiamo tracciabilità completa e dai prezzi decisamente competitivi. 
Da oltre vent'anni anni testiamo gli champagne uno ad uno per darvi la possibilità di acquistare prodotti sicuri, buoni, sani e perfetti per le vostre esigenze.

Nel #monferratounesco, Maison Petit Perlage, Bed and Breakfast e Champagnerie, è anche School of Champagne, la prima scuola d'Italia dedicata alla formazione sullo champagne. 
Offriamo la possibilità di fare formazione a tutti i livelli. Inoltre proponiamo master direttamente condotti dai vignerons champenois che periodicamente vengono presso la nostra sede.

Name: Tenuta Cantagallo e Le Farnete
Description: Our work of wine growers begins in 1970 when we bought “Cantagallo” estate which was followed in 1990 by “Le Farnete” estate in Carmignano. Our purpose has always been to bring both estates to a production of high quality. Our estates are located in areas with a high wine-growing and wine-production culture, as stated by the grand-ducal edict of 1716, which was issued by Cosimo de’ Medici and is considered the first law in the world in defence of wine production and of wine trade from prestigious areas. The principle of a wine production of good-quality and personality is summed up in our motto: “One bottle of wine per each vine” (a kilo of grapes per vine). Like our philosophy of production, also our job is expressed in few simple words: “We are a family with its feet in the past, hands that work in the present and its head that works out the future. Our family is strongly anchored to the true values of man, wine growers and olive growers and our purpose is to develop the native species of vines in full respect of traditions. Our hands work in the present because we consider practicality a prerequisite for a production of quality. Our head is turned to the future because we are a generation with our mind open to the changes of society and of consumers.

Name: VESUVIUS MAGMA GIN
Description:
“Ho sempre avuto una passione smisurata per il gin, un distillato pieno di profumi e di sfumature. Ne ho assaggiati molti, provenienti da ogni parte d’Italia e del mondo, ma ne desideravo uno che avesse le caratteristiche identitarie dell’area vesuviana.
Così ho deciso di creare Vesuvius Magma Gin. Un gin che esprime le mie origini e il mio territorio dando valore alla sua storia e ai suoi prodotti, che riemerge dalle ceneri del Vesuvio portando in dono il suo sapore intenso e mediterraneo.”

Name: [KANPEI] MARKETING
Description:
Created in 2011, [Kanpei] Marketing is a bespoke strategic & global marketing consulting company, specialized in wines, champagnes & spirits.

Bringing wine lovers and winemakers together, [Kanpei] Marketing is your outsourced marketing and sales export partner, helping you to leverage your know-how and ensure the future success of your company.

Our main areas of expertise include: 
- Enhancing your marketing and export strategy, and developing your operational plan
- Accelerating the growth of your export markets 
- Training winegrowers and managers, as well as internal marketing and export teams

Name: ADAMVS
Description: Atop Napa Valley’s Howell Mountain rest 80 acres of wild beauty, now known as the ADAMVS Estate. From 2008, vintners Denise and Stephen Adams have farmed these 26 acres using the organic and biodynamic methods they have espoused for decades at their Chateau Fonplegade in Bordeaux, France. This exalted terroir, undulating hillsides of volcanic rock reaching 2000 ft in elevation, married with scrupulous farming and winemaking deliver the ADAMVS estate Cabernet Sauvignon and Sauvignon Blanc; marked by unerring elegance, purity, balance, age-worthiness, and distinction.

Name: Black's Distillery
Description: Award winning spirits, crafted in house from locally grown grains in Peterborough, Ontario, Canada.

Name: Gazaň Winery - vinařství z Moravského Toskánska
Description:
Jsme mladé moderní vinařství, zabývající se výrobou jakostních a přívlastkových vín vyrobených z vybraných hroznů, které zrají v našich vlastních vinicích.

Zakladatelem vinařství je pan Jiří Gazaň, který nezdědil po předcích ani vinohrad, ani zkušenosti „jak víno vyrobit“.  K vínu se propracoval postupem času.  Dá se říct, „že si ho víno našlo samo“. Cílem našeho vinařství je vyrábět menší šarže vín vynikající kvality. Dalším z našich neskromných cílů je vytvoření portfolia zákazníků, se kterými budeme úzce spolupracovat na teoretické i praktické stránce výroby vína. Zda se nám to daří, to musíte posoudit Vy! Naši přátelé, kamarádi, zákazníci...

Name: Vynlyf
Description:
Vynlyf is a marketplace that connects people with amazing wine, stories, and allows them to explore the vast world of wineries, vineyards, and producers. For the adventurous, the curious, the daring, and rebellious at heart, Vynlyf  is the place to go to discover wines you love!

We love wine, but we love people who are interested in wine, curious about it, or can even totally geek out about it even more. All are welcome, all will find value, and all will find new wines to fall in love with. 

Hopefully that speaks to you and who you are as well. If so, drop us a message and lets see how we can work to build the new world of wine!

Name: Millbrook Winery
Description:
Millbrook is a boutique winery situated in the historic town of Jarrahdale in Western Australia, 50 minutes south-east of the capital city Perth. The winery is located at picturesque Chestnut Farm nestled among virgin jarrah forests, with stunning vistas of the rolling landscape.

The origins of Chestnut Farm date back to the nineteenth century when the original owner, Joseph Batt, planted an orchard and the first grapevines in 1860, providing fruit and a few headaches to the local timber-millers in Jarrahdale.

Today, Chestnut Farm and Millbrook Winery, comprising 120 hectares (300 acres), are owned by Peter and Lee Fogarty.

In addition to the vines which line the steep slopes, the property still incorporates an active orchard, as well as a heirloom vegetable garden, olive grove and sparkling lakes.

The name Millbrook was derived from the timber-milling history of Jarrahdale and the Gooralong Brook which is a feature of the town.

Millbrook Winery, together with the iconic Lake's Folly vineyard in the Hunter Valley, New South Wales; Deep Woods Estate in Margaret River, Western Australia; and Smithbrook Wines in Pemberton, Western Australia; forms part of the Fogarty Wine Group.

Name: WineHub USA
Description: Our wine is made in small batches by producers from around the world. These producers focus on bringing their origin stories to life through their wine creations.

Name: viDeli - einfach guter Wein
Description:
www.viDeli.de offers approximately 500 selected wines from the best wine-growing areas for a fair price. We work mainly with small family owned wineries.

viDeli intends to make wine shopping via internet very easy, safe and comfortable. Our idea is to sell good wine made by good wineries to cool people!

Name: LBV Sélection
Description: LBV Sélection est une entreprise de vente de vins en ligne créée en 2017 par Emmanuel Puymoyen. Le concept s'appuis sur une sélection pointue et exigeante de vins qui sont achetés et stockés à Bordeaux.  L'idée est de disposé d'un panel de vins assez large pour répondre aux différentes attentes des clients, sans multiplier les références. Cette gamme est ensuite proposée à un réseau de client  en réponse à des demandes sous la forme d'un panier prêt à être validé. Un petit guide interactif en ligne permet également de trouver les bouteilles en fonction de ses envies et de son budget.

Name: Vodka Lab

Notre mission: vous faire découvrir la bonne vodka!

Retrouvez notre production de vodkas artisanales Vodka Lab, ainsi qu'une sélection des meilleures bouteilles d'Europe de l'Est dans nos boutiques et en ligne.

Name: PISCOS PERSONALIZADOS UPYANA
Description:
Somos Pisco Upyana, una empresa peruana productora de Piscos artesanales con presentaciones en ITALIA y QUEBRANTA.  Nuestro fundo se encuentra ubicado en Aztipia - Cañete.  Ciudad donde se preparan los mejores Piscos de la región. Esto nos permite contar con un Piscos de fino un sabor y excelente textura.  

					Además contamos con un área creativa encargada de diseñar y plasmar su idea en cada botella de pisco, obteniendo así no solo con una botella de buen sabor sino tambien una exelente presentacion y buen diseño. Regala a tus clientes un producto exclusivo y genera mas relaciones a largo plazo.

Nuestros productos son: 

     Botellas Serigrafiadas: Imprime tus logos y dedicatorias para tus clientes y colaboradores, ideal para eventos corporativos, fechas especiales, aniversarios, etc. 

     Botellas con etiquetas Personalizadas: Imprime todo lo que desees desde fotos hasta imágenes con degradado, ideal para cualquier ocasión.
 
     Empaques: Adicionales a tus botellas de Pisco, empaques de madera, conos, bolsas de yute (también personalizadas y de alta calidad).
     Nuestras presentaciones son de 500 ml y 750 ml. 
     Puntualidad en la entrega.


Esperando contar con la confianza de  atender sus requerimientos quedamos atentos.

Atentamente,

Name: Jasper Winery
Description: Jasper Winery is an "estate" style winery in the heart of the Des Moines metro. Stop by any time during our tasting room hours and enjoy complimentary samples of our wines -- then enjoy a glass out on the patio or inside by the fireplace. If you're looking for a space for a wedding reception, business event or baby shower, contact us about renting the winery for your private event.

Name: SLIK FOR VOKSNE
Description:
Esbjergs største vinforretning 

Lækre vine og champagner i overflod, spiritus og smagfulde delikatesser – serveret med et smil og vejledning i øjenhøjde.
 
SLIK FOR VOKSNE har et stort og alsidigt sortiment indenfor kvalitetsvine og spiritus – nok et af de største udvalg i landet. Vi har vine fra hele verden, og de er alle udvalgt specielt til dig.
Vi er entusiaster og vin-nørder, men vi gør meget ud af at fortælle om vinen i almindeligt sprog og uden snobberi. God vin er nemlig for alle.

Vi har kvalitetsvine i alle prislag, lige fra dagligdagsvinen til 70 kr. til de mere eksklusive og dyre flasker til festlige og særlige lejligheder.

Butikken har eksisteret siden midt i 1980’erne, hvor vin-entusiasten David Ben Moyal grundlagde den, og i 2015 har vi samlet vores to butikker i Kongensgade 100. Med de nye lokaler er butikken blevet et moderne vin-mekka for kendere og feinschmeckere.

I butikken har vi:
•	Fine Wine afdeling
•	Smagerum
•	Web-shop
•	Erhvervsafdeling
•	Summerbird-afdeling
•	Privat parkering bag Scandic hotel
. 
Specialister i vin og chokolade

Du kan fordybe dig i butikkens mest sjældne vine i Fine Wine afdelingen, hvor du kan drømme dig på besøg i et vinslots allerhelligste. Alle vores vine er udvalgt med omhu, og derfor har vi stor viden om de enkelte flasker. 

Vi afholder åbne smagninger med forskellige temaer som fx Spanske vine, whisky, champagne eller noget helt fjerde. Det kan du holde dig orienteret om på blandt andet facebook.

Vi gør meget ud af at pakke vores vine lækkert ind, og vi er slår os gerne løs med gavekartoner og trækasser, der er helt oplagte som firmagaver.

Vi er desuden specialiseret i Summerbird, og du kan finde alle lækkerierne fra det danske chokolademærke i butikken og få vejledning af uddannet personale.

Name: Chañarmuyo Winery
Description:
We make unique wines from a hidden corner of Argentina, 1700 mts above sea level of the Andes.
Join the northern experience.

Name: Darling Cellars
Description:
The cool and temperate West Coast climate lends itself to a variety of different micro- and meso-climates which, along with the different soil types, lead to unique grapes which we guide into even more unique wines. With approximately 95% of all our vineyards being Unirrigated (dry land) and roughly the same percentage being bush vines (i.e. not trellised), this is as close as one can get to what nature intended for grapes to be.

These varying factors result in wines that are true to the terroir from which they come and are true to the identity which we have crafted over time for our wines. Investment continues in the winery and cellar with some of the most modern and up to date winemaking equipment in our industry today.

A modern bottling line, new presses, a barrel maturation cellar, a new grape off-loading system and continuing replanting of vineyards, to include noble cultivars, all contribute to our advances in contemporary winemaking.

Name: Salvestrin Estate Vineyard and Winery
Description: Our family has been growing winegrapes on our historic St. Helena vineyard since 1932. Originally planted in 1860 by Dr. George Crane, three generations of the Salvestrin Family have meticulously and sustainably farmed this vineyard. Our goal today is to produce the finest quality winegrapes and showcase those grapes in handcrafted wines that are fruit forward, elegant, balanced and memorably world class. We strive to be good stewards of the land, being sensitive to the environment and the surrounding community by farming our vineyards according to organic guidelines. We invite you to explore our website and learn more about our wines, vineyard and family and to visit us the next time you are in Napa Valley.

Name: Trentham Estate Winery and Restaurant
Description:
Trentham Estate Winery overlooking the peaceful Murray River near Mildura is distinctive among Australia’s notable wineries. 

Outstanding wines produced in a stunning natural landscape, Trentham Estate reflects the Murphy family’s 100 years of grape growing tradition and experience.

60 hectares of vineyards on rich red loam over limestone soils are nurtured by water from the Murray River, creating high-quality wines at an affordable price.

Trentham Estate creates a considered and select range of wines with an emphasis on full fruit flavor and palatability.  Varieties include Verdejo, Taminga, Chardonnay and Shiraz, as well as the newer Pinot Grigio, Vermentino, Maestri and Nebbiolo.  

Nominated for Gourmet Traveller Wine magazine’s prestigious Winemaker of the Year Award and a winner of the International Wine and Spirit Competition for best Shiraz, Trentham Estate is renowned for balanced, food-friendly wines.

A consistency of quality and attention to detail been rewarded with hundreds of wine show medals, trophies and business awards over 30 years.

But it’s a spirit of innovation and a passion for new styles and varieties that assures an exciting new dimension in every Trentham Estate range.

Trentham Estate Wines celebrate a love for life, the Australian lifestyle and the Murphy family’s Irish and Italian heritage.

-	Our life, your wine

Name: Bodega Loncopué
Description:
Somos un proyecto familiar que surgió e el 2011 con el fin de elaborar vinos finos de calidad. 

Día a día nos esforzamos por crear vinos creativos que sean agradables al paladar de cada persona.

Comercializamos nuestros productos bajo las marcas "Terruño Loncopué" y "Finca Los Charabones", en botella de 750ml., damauana de 4,7L y Bag in Box de 3L.

Name: Vinarija Eden
Description:
Eden Winery is located in the village of Ranilovic, near Arandjelovac, just an hour’s drive from Belgrade. It is positioned between the mountains Kosmaj and Bukulja, at an altitude of between 240-260 m.
This family-owned boutique winery uses only grapes from its own vineyards that surround it. The entire production facility, as well as the cellar, are located underground, while the tasting room is at the highest point of the property.
The vineyard was planted during 2014 and 2015 on an area of 7ha and since then it has successfully produced numerous varieties of wine: semillon, sauvignon blanc, and chardonnay from whites, as well as merlot, cabernet sauvignon and cabernet franc from reds.

Opening for visitors is planned for the spring of 2021.

Name: Oinofilia
Description:
Specialty Imports of Greek Boutique wine.

OINOFILIA represents only Greek wine and wineries and imports directly from the smaller, organic or natural wineries in Greece for B2B and B2C sales in Denmark and Sweden.

As insurance of quality, selecting and promoting first–class wine, it is a prerequisite for OINOFILIA visiting the winery in person, tasting the wine, experiencing its setting, terroir and production ways before starting an import and the sale of any wine.

For OINOFILIA it is key building strong bonds with the winery owners, promoting directly to interested parties and as much as possible without extra links of in-between agents.

Hosting and participating wine tasting events - explaining the unique Greek grape varietals, wine regions, wines - and suggesting examples of food pairing – is a key activity for us.

Name: Peter Solberg A/S
Description:
PETER SOLBERG A/S is an independent alternative to the established wine trade when it comes to purchase and sale of fine wines and spirits for pleasure or investment purposes.

Quality and Price
PETER SOLBERG A/S is an internet-based company with low costs for everything but the wine itself. Accordingly, PETER SOLBERG A/S offers a large and attractive assortment of both well-known and less common wines at competitive prices. Our business model allows PETER SOLBERG A/S to pay you a good price when you sell us your wine, be it larger collections or rare individual bottles.

Experience and Passion for Wine
PETER SOLBERG A/S combines years of trade experience with an ardent passion for wine. The sublime does not come cheap, but our mission is to offer wine at a price that honestly matches the quality — both when buying and selling. PETER SOLBERG A/S only stocks quality wine and we offer a large range of rare wines, which can be near impossible to find elsewhere.

Name: Luna Vineyards
Description:
By following this page you represent that you are over the legal drinking age. Please enjoy our wines responsibly. 

Luna Vineyards’ pioneering roots began in Napa Valley over two decades ago, as the first along the Silverado Trail to plant Pinot Grigio. Today, we are still dedicated to innovation – creating uniquely balanced wines crafted to accompany a wide variety of foods and occasions. Our product line includes two premium collections - Luna Black Label and Luna Blue Label. Our grapes are harvested from our estate vineyard and some of the finest vineyard sites throughout the Napa Valley. We are a Napa centric winery, rooted by innovation and continually striving to deliver quality.

Name: Terra Chama Wines - DÃO DOC
Description:
TERRA CHAMA personify the true spirit of the new generation of DÃO wines. We produce high quality with strong uniqueness wines in limited series. Our winemaking has minimal intervention giving room for the nature and terroir assume their roles and show their full potential. 

Our vineyards are located in the very epicenter of DÃO D.O.C., Silgueiros sub region, and based on an integrated production that uses the best agricultural practices, with rational management of natural resources, thus contributing for a sustainable planet.

Name: Viña Doña Javiera S.A.
Description: Viña Doña Javiera es una empresa familiar que rescata la tradición vitivinícola de varias generaciones, quienes a través de las décadas ha preservado el espíritu que dio origen a vinos que datan desde la Independencia, que son reflejo de un trabajo realizado con pasión y dedicación.

Name: Melchior.co
Description: MELCHIOR est une jeune marque française de distribution de vin qui permet aux amateurs de vin de recevoir tous les mois les bouteilles qui correspondent à leurs goûts.

Name: Second City Distillery
Description:
Second City Beverage Co. is reclaiming the culture of small-scale distilling as a craft, returning to the use of quality corn and fresh, local ingredients. Whereas major distillers use the entire run, we only use the “heart” of each batch to yield the best spirits possible.

We ensure that each individual batch meets the highest quality standards, using absolutely no shortcuts. Our products are distilled, bottled and packaged by hand here at the distillery. The pride we feel in our products extends from the selection of quality ingredients, right through to the finished product.

Our portfolio ranges from vodka, gin, rum, bourbon, rye whiskey, moonshine, to bourbon creams. We also offer a cocktail mixer line as well as ready to drink canned cocktails.

Name: Simon Tolley Wines
Description:
Simon Tolley Wines is a boutique, family-run producer in the cool-climate Adelaide Hills, founded by fifth-generation grape grower and viticulturist Simon Tolley. 

With deep roots in South Australia’s wine history and a Bachelor of Applied Science in Viticultural Science, Tolley draws on decades of vineyard experience across major regions to craft expressive, site-driven wines. His focus on estate-grown fruit from the Woodside property yields classic Adelaide Hills varietals — Sauvignon Blanc, Chardonnay, Pinot Noir and Shiraz — reflecting cool-climate precision and balance. 

The cellar door, set in a stylish converted shed with sweeping vineyard views, offers relaxed tastings and local produce pairings, making it a standout destination in the region. Simon’s 2024 Estate Range Sauvignon Blanc has won trophies at the Australian Cool Climate Wine Show and Royal Adelaide Wine Show, earning accolades for its vibrancy and perfume. A recent Adelaide Hills brandy made from smoke-tainted grapes highlights Tolley’s resilience and innovation following the 2019 bushfires.

Simon Tolley Wines combines meticulous viticulture with approachable, flavour-rich wines that speak clearly of Adelaide Hills terroir.

Name: Podere Selva Capuzza
Description:
Il Podere, situato 4 Km a sud del Lago di Garda, si colloca in una posizione collinare molto pregiata e situata all'interno dei confini delle tre principali zone DOC della sponda bresciana del Lago di Garda: Riviera del Garda Classico, San Martino della Battaglia e nel cuore del Lugana.

Produciamo vino in modo sostenibile, rispettando il più possibile la terra che ci ospita. Diamo grande importanza alla biodiversità: il 15% dei nostri terreni hanno boschetti e piante di vario genere. La fauna locale trova da noi un rifugio sicuro: tutti i nostri 30 ettari sono a divieto di caccia.

Completano il podere, il ristorante Cascina Capuzza: cucina con andamento stagionale in abbinamento ai nostri vini. Sarete ospitati in una cascina del 1400 o nel giardino con piante secolari. 

Vi aspettiamo al nostro Podere per una degustazione o una cena, per immergervi nell'atmosfera bucolica delle colline moreniche con un calice di vino in mano!

Completa il tutto, Borgo San Donino coi suoi appartamenti per vacanza: relax e pace immersi nei vigneti.

Selva Capuzza is a small farm dedicated to produce wines exclusively from 6 indigenous grape varities, producing DOC wines Lugana, Riviera del Garda Classico and San Martino della Battaglia. 

We work in a sustainable way, in order to preserve our land. 15% of our podere has different kind of trees, to preserve biodiversity and it is hunting free zone. 
In our Podere you can find the winery, restaurant Cascina Capuzza, located in a 14th century house and Borgo San Donino holiday apartments, for a relaxing holiday surrounded by vines. 

It will be our pleasure to welcome you in our Podere for a tasting or dinner, to experience the beautiful morenic hills with a glass of wine in your hand!

Name: WiVi Central Coast
Description:
WiVi Central Coast (WiVi) 2016 is a newly expanded conference and trade show focusing on wine and viticulture. The two-day event is built on the foundation of the successful VINE Symposium. The expanded showcase brings winemakers and wine grape growers together for an unprecedented collection of trade show booths, product demonstrations and networking opportunities.

WiVi is the newest and largest trade show on the Central Coast showcasing hundreds of new products and innovative ideas.  Attendees will have an opportunity to learn about techniques and technologies from today's industry leaders and look at issues and regulations facing one of America's fasting growing wine regions -- California's Central Coast!

WiVi Central Coast is brought to you by WINE BUSINESS MONTHLY and Precision Ag Consulting.  WINE BUSINESS MONTHLY is the leader in product information and resources for the wine industry, and Precision Ag is a Central Coast viticulture consulting business that understands education and the pulse of the Central Coast. Both companies are working together to create a premiere conference and trade show on the Central Coast.

WiVi brings together a talented team of meeting and event planners paired with the editorial integrity of WINE BUSINESS MONTHLY. The marketing and planning of the meeting is directed by Becky Zelinski, co-owner of WiVi and Precision Ag Consulting. Becky Zelinski has more than 20 years experience planning and marketing events and is the developer of the Central Coast VINE Symposium along with her husband Lowell Zelinski, Ph.D.

The educational sessions are being directed by Lowell J. Zelinski, Ph.D., and Cyril Penn, editor of WINE BUSINESS MONTHLY. Lowell Zelinski is co-owner of Precision Ag Consulting and WiVi. He's a former U.C. Extension agent and CSU professor with more than 30 years experience developing agricultural research and education services. He currently provides viticulture production services on the Central Coast.

Los negocios y el estilo de vida tienen un delicioso punto de convergencia: El Vino.
¿Sabías que es altamente saludable tomar una copa de vino diariamente?
¿Que, saber elegir un vino de manera correcta es una gran herramienta en el mundo de los negocios?
¿Te gustaría saber decidir adecuadamente el vino ideal para una ocasión especial o de negocios?
¿Te gusta el buen vino y quieres aprender a disfrutarlo aún más?
Te invitamos a pertenecer a un grupo exclusivo de personas con intereses comunes, que buscan crecer, tanto en los negocios, como en experiencias para los sentidos y un estilo de vida saludable.
Bienvenido al Club Sommelier.

Name: L'accord divin
Description:
L’accord diVIN est une entreprise spécialisée dans le vin (Formation, conseil, vente, œnotourisme…) à travers toute la France (basée à Toulouse)

Formation au vin & à l’œnologie
Vous souhaitez vous orienter dans le secteur du vin ? Vous avez le projet d’ouvrir un bar à vin ou un restaurant, de travailler dans l’import/export du vin, d’être caviste, … ?
Vous travaillez d’ores et déjà dans le monde du vin (restauration, hôtellerie, tourisme) et souhaitez compléter vos connaissances dans ce domaine ?
Vous êtes simplement un amateur passionné de vin ?
Vous allez acquérir des connaissances solides sur le vin et les spiritueux

Conseils pour les caves, restaurants, bar à vins…
Restaurateur, Caviste, L’accord diVIN vous accompagne dans la création ou le développement de votre établissement.
Tout d’abord, il me faut comprendre l’ambiance de votre restaurant ou de votre cave, vos clients, vos envies, votre cuisine (restaurant), afin de définir vos besoins. A partir de cette analyse, je vous préconise un nombre de références qui me semble judicieux et sélectionne une gamme de vins cohérente.

Découvrez le vin autrement
L’accord diVIN organise tous vos évènements autour du vin. Vous ne vous occupez de rien.
Séjour en immersion au cœur des vignes et du vin dans toutes les régions viticoles Française, à partir d’une demi-journée jusqu’à plusieurs jours ; Soirée/Journée dégustation ou repas accords mets et vins…

Sélection/vente de vins pour particuliers et professionnels
Vous avez un repas (Mariage, baptême, anniversaire, évènement…) et vous cherchez les vins qui pourraient s’accompagner parfaitement, tout en respectant votre budget ?
Vous souhaitez vous constituer une cave à vin privée ?
Vous souhaitez faire un cadeau (coffret de vins, bouteille(s), assortiment…) ?
