Name: Domaine la Suffrène
Description:
La genèse du Domaine La Suffrène prend racine sur plusieurs générations, qui ont su cultiver et transmettre un trésor modelé par la nature au cours de milliers d’années. 

C’est en 1996, que Cédric Gravier reprend l’exploitation familiale, dont la production jusqu’ici destinée à la coopérative va trouver une seconde naissance avec la création de la cave. Accompagné de son grand père qui connait chaque cep de vigne, olivier et pierre de la production pour l’entretenir quotidiennement avec engagement et passion, Cédric Gravier élabore un bâtiment dont le choix du matériel et l’installation a été dicté par une volonté de modernité et de fonctionnalité pour maîtriser au mieux la naissance du vin. Deux générations qui œuvrent dans la même direction et s’alimentent l’une et l’autre pour toujours mettre en relief les qualités inépuisables de ce petit bijou géologique.

Le domaine s’étend sur 60 hectares de l’AOC Bandol, qui comprennent un nombre de parcelles variées quant à leurs caractéristiques géologiques. L’essentiel de la production se situe entre les deux massifs de rudistes (calcaire fossilifère) du Castellet, La Cadière et les coteaux de Sainte Anne du Castellet, L’aire Bandolaise est réputée pour la valeur de son climat, soit 3000 heures de soleil par an, l’influence vivifiante de l’air marin, une pluie qui dépasse rarement les 650 mm répartis sur l’automne et l’hiver. Un sol essentiellement argilo calcaire, la réverbération intense des rayons du soleil sur les coteaux, l’influence maritime qui met à l’abri des gelées hivernales, les reliefs du paysage, tous ces éléments qui donnent des conditions idéales pour mettre du soleil en bouteille.

C’est ici que le cépage phare de Bandol, le Mourvèdre s’exprime dans toute la richesse de sa matière. Il apporte structure, finesse, et une palette aromatique déclinée sur les épices et la réglisse pour les rouges. Pour équilibrer cette expression, il est accompagné des cépages traditionnels de Provence.

Name: Cowiners
Description:
COWINERS te conecta con bodegas artesanales de todos los rincones del país. Ya seas novato, aficionada o amante de los vinos, te ofrecemos una cuidada (y deliciosa) selección mensual entregada en tu puerta. 

Creemos que el vino merece ser entendido y disfrutado por todxs. Eliminamos los tecnicismos porque así es más divertido. Con COWINERS, aprender sobre vinitos y disfrutarlos es más sencillo de lo que crees…

 ¿Y tú, eres Cowiner?

Name: Grape Expectations
Description:
We are an independent, family run wine merchants specialising in wines that are full of character and flavour and are generally not available on the high street. All of our wines have been tasted by us and are recommended for quality and value for money. We spend a great deal of time tasting and selecting our range as well as visiting the vineyards in the hope of bringing you new and interesting wines.

View the shop on Google:
https://www.google.co.uk/maps/place/Grape+Expectations/@51.208969,-1.50658,17z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m2!3m1!1s0x48740780f605c35d:0x1e62b68489227390

Name: BIWA
Description:
BIWA Best Italian Wine Awards premia ogni anno i 50 migliori vini d’Italia. 

La classifica, nata nel 2012 da un’idea di Luca Gardini e Andrea Grignaffini, negli anni ha saputo dare grande visibilità a livello internazionale alle eccellenze vinicole del Paese, da Città del Messico a Londra, da Hong Kong a Bordeaux.
Le 50 etichette italiane inserite in classifica vengono selezionate da un comitato tecnico internazionale composto da giornalisti, critici ed esperti che affiancano Gardini e Grignaffini nei tasting alla cieca di oltre 300 referenze.

La giuria nello specifico è composta da Tim Atkin (Londra), Wine Writer tra i più premiati al mondo e Master of Wine con 25 anni di esperienza, Raoul Salama (Parigi), docente presso la facoltà di Enologia di Bordeaux, giornalista specializzato e degustatore professionale, Christy Canterbury (New York) giornalista, giudice, formatrice e Master of Wine degli Stati Uniti, Daniele Cernilli conosciuto da tutti come Doctor Wine, decano della degustazione e giornalista enogastronomico fra gli artefici del Gambero Rosso fin dagli esordi, Antonio Paolini, esperto critico enogastronomico e degustatore, firma di alcune fra le maggiori testate di settore ha curato la realizzazione di numerose guide e Pier Bergonzi, vice direttore de La Gazzetta dello Sport, Sommelier e appassionato di enogastronomia, fondatore della rubrica “Gazza Golosa”.

In ogni edizione dei BIWA una giuria composta da giornalisti esperti del settore assegna inoltre gli AWARDS2015, dieci premi speciali che puntano a premiare i vini, le aziende e i professionisti che si sono distinti nel mondo vitivinicolo.  La selezione degli Awards per l’edizione 2015 del BIWA è stata affidata a Marco Tonelli (Presidente di giuria), Davide Oltolini, Alessandro Bocchetti, Aldo Fiordelli e Giorgio Melandri.

Name: Miami Club Rum
Description:
Miami Club Rum  "The Spirit of Miami" is the first distilled spirit produced in the City of Miami. It is an artisan, hand-made spirit created in 200-liter batches right in the heart of Wynwood. This ultra-premium platinum rum was inspired by a family tradition that dates back to 1911. Each batch of Miami Club Rum is "Infused with Music" in our proprietary aging process. In our first Major International Competition, Miami Club Rum has been named the Best White Rum in the World by the San Francisco World Spirits Competition.

Sexy! Fun! Delicious! Miami! Miami Club Rum

Name: Kamo Premium Vodka
Description:
ˈKamō is an award winning premium vodka brand like no other. 
Whilst most brands in the market sell the same old format of bottles with a few label changes mixed with the repetitive marketing of the fabricated glitz & glamour lifestyle, we wanted to represent what we stand for - creativity, originality, hard work and dedication to provide what matters the most to consumers when purchasing alcohol - the liquid. 

All of our range is filtered 9 times then distilled 7 times using 100% natural ingredients all with an alcohol ABV of 40%.
The unique taste, smoothness and character of our vodkas is a celebration of research, technique, and ingredients. 

From our unique camouflage bottle designs for each flavour to glass stoppers for our bottles to our GIVE BACK programme to outdoor friendly recyclable, resealable pouches to the world first sustainable grenade shaped miniature, it's safe to say we are not just another drinks brand!

* WORLD's FIRST Camouflage designed spirits range
* 2021 MASTERS Medal Winner at the GLOBAL blind tasting Vodka Masters
* Featured in FORBES Magazine 'World's Best Vodka's
* WORLD's FIRST grenade shaped miniature
* Eco-conscious, recyclable outdoor friendly products
* GIVE BACK - We donate a percentage of all our sales to youth charities and organisations

We have an ethos of changing the way people consume drinks as well as changing lives with our give back programme, ˈKamō Premium Vodka is always looking for open-minded and creative individuals to join our growing workforce.

Name: Marquee Selections
Description:
Founded in 2003, Marquee Selections is an international wine importer dedicated to providing wine lovers in the USA with a portfolio of family estate wineries focused on producing outstanding wines using green, organic, biodynamic and sustainable winemaking practices. 

Our wines are carefully selected from our partner wineries in Argentina, Australia, Chile, Italy, France, New Zealand, Spain and South Africa.

Name: Zaffillo
Description:
Zaffillo propone prodotti di qualità, lavorati secondo i processi tradizionali della distillazione italiana. Zafferello, Limoncello e Arancello fondono gli agrumi al gusto deciso ed unico dello zafferano. 
La nostra Grappa Zeta e Sambuca Safa completano una linea di liquori e distillati elegante e , allo stesso tempo, legata alla tradizione.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

Zaffillo offers quality products, processed according to the traditional processes of Italian distillation. Zafferello, Limoncello and Arancello blend citrus fruits with the strong and unique taste of saffron.
Our Grappa Zeta and Sambuca Safa complete a line of elegant liqueurs and spirits and, at the same time, tied to tradition.

Name: Sotiriou Winery - Οινοποιείο Σωτηρίου
Description:
The story of Sotiriou Winery goes back in 1996, at the historical village of Lesini in the region of Oiniades, in central western Greece.                                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                                                            
Dimitris and Efrosini, a young couple back then, decided to pursue a full time career in wine.  Both born and raised in Lesini, they carried childhood memories filled with aromas and flavours from the local wine varieties. Their love and appreciation for the local wine tradition raised in them the desire to preserve and continue this tradition and served as a motive power for a dynamic start.                                                                                                    
             
Since then, in the 110,000 m2 of privatelyowned vineyards in Paracheloitidas, a region famous since ancient times for their exquisite wines, Sotiriou family produces and bottles local traditional varieties of white and red wines, like Malagouzia, Goustolidi, the traditional Mavroudia and other. 

Today, two years after  foundation, the winery is housed at new buildings, equipped with the latest equipment required for the production and bottling of wine and cellars with the right conditions to mature and store the wine, while construction continues to finish other buildings for wine tasting and other events.

Name: Kekovic Estate
Description: Kekovic Estate is a family company specialising in the production of wine, olive oil and lavender oil. It bases its activities on principles of superior quality, compromise-free approach and sustainable development.

Name: Skunkworks Distillery
Description: Skunkworks Distillery makes premium moonshine in small batches in our shop in Calgary's thriving Barley Belt.

Name: Pātsch
Description:
Pātsch Tequila is deliciously crafted at one of Mexico’s most celebrated organic and additive free distilleries. Every Pātsch expression is made with 100 percent Blue Weber agave that’s sustainably grown and harvested. Our distillery in Jalisco only picks the plants when they are fully ripe and mature which captures their optimal flavor. They are then brick oven cooked and double distilled.

It’s these touches that distinguishes Pātsch as a premium brand that’s designed for sipping or mixing in fine cocktails.

Pātsch is an expression that conveys excitement. It means to get hit in all the right ways. We think our tequila does that when you try it; every sip will awaken your senses with its deep aroma and multilayered flavors. You can sit back and relax with a glass or get up and dance — our expressions are the perfect hybrid of both.

But enough about us; this is about you. The Pātsch experience is different depending on who’s imbibing, and we’re not here to dictate how it’s supposed to taste.

Pātsch is a story about two friends who love tequila.

We invite you to get Pātsched with us.

Name: Deleo Dryck AB
Description: Ledande leverantör av dryck till de största detaljvaruhandelskedjorna i Sverige, såsom Coop, ICA, Lidl mm. Vi tillverkar alla typer av drycker på vår anläggning i Stenhamra/Ekerö utanför Stockholm.

Name: Toser Vini
Description: Toser Vini winery, captained today by the third and fourth generation of the Tombacco family, is the result of the adventure begun in 1919 by the progenitor "Gimetto", who made his deliveries to small retailers and taverns in the Trebaseleghe area, in eastern Veneto. Toser today boasts an extremely varied product offer ranging from bottled in various formats of still, sparkling, and sparkling wines to barrel wines, and is able to meet the needs of national and international customers, with reduced times and complying a high level of customization of the commercial offer. The flagships of the Toser house lines are native wines such as Prosecco and Pinot Grigio delle Venezie.

Name: VINEIS PROJETS
Description:
La société Vineis Projets accompagne et conseille la filière vitivinicole pour renforcer sa pérennité et sa résilience face au changement climatique. Elle dispose d'une expertise sur des thématiques telles que la gestion des risques climatiques, l'adaptation au changement climatique, la construction de cartographie climatique, la création de vignoble.

Elle réalise en outre des études technico-économiques pour les acteurs des filières vitivinicoles et agricoles (impact des aléas climatiques, solutions à mettre en œuvre pour construire la résilience des entreprises…).

Basée sur une approche globale et transversale des systèmes de production, nous accompagnons les entreprises de la filière vitivinicole pour renforcer leur performance. Nous innovons au quotidien pour renforcer la gestion des domaines viticoles en prenant en compte l'impact des aléas climatiques et du changement climatique. Nous activons les leviers permettant de consolider la résilience des exploitations. La gestion des risques, l'évaluation du potentiel de développement sont des outils que nous utilisons pour donner de la visibilité et garder une longueur d'avance.

Name: Wina z Tejo
Description:
Region Tejo, leżący w samym sercu Portugalii niedaleko Lizbony, może pochwalić się tradycjami produkcji wina sięgającymi aż XII wieku, a swoją nazwę zawdzięcza rzece Tag (portugalska nazwa - Tejo). Jej obecność w regionie zapewnia doskonałe warunki do uprawy winorośli, oraz produkcji różnych gatunków wina. Średnia, roczna temperatura waha się tutaj od 15,5°C do 16,5°C. Obecnie tereny winne w regionie Tejo zajmują aż 17 000 ha, a 80 funkcjonujących tu winnic produkuje ponad 63 miliony litrów wina każdego roku. Jednym z charakterystycznych elementów tradycji regionu, jest wykorzystanie naturalnych korków do zamykania butelek. W samym regionie Tejo rośnie ponad 30 000 ha lasów korkowych.

Jedną z najpopularniejszych odmian czerwonych jest Touriga Nacional. Pozwala ona na stworzenie wina o dużej ilości garbników, pełnej strukturze oraz o smaku czarnych jagód, śliwek oraz fiołków. Trincadeira to szczep ciepłolubny, stawiający na pełniejsze dojrzewanie winogron. Charakteryzuje się winami o nutach malin i ziół, niuansami korzennymi , przy jednoczesnym zachowaniu jego kwasowości. Castelão to odmiana dominująca na glebach piaszczystych, dająca wina o wyraźnej strukturze, żywej kwasowości, oraz przyjemnej, rustykalnej naturze, z nutami śliwek, czerwonej porzeczki oraz mięsa. Aragonês to kolejna popularna odmiana, dająca gładkie, owocowe wina z ostrym wydźwiękiem. W regionie Tejo uprawia się również takie odmiany winorośli jak Syrah, Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot i Alicante Bouschet. Wśród białych odmian znajdują się aromatyczna Fernão Pires, żywa Arinto, a także Alvarinho i Verdelho, z których produkuje się większość tutejszych energicznych białych win.

Name: Château d'Anglès
Description:
Château d'Anglès is one of the leading family-run wine estates in the South of France. We craft some of the most expressive and elegant award-winning wines in La Clape appellation on the shores of the Mediterranean.
See www.chateaudangles.com for more information.

Name: The Great Grog Company
Description: We are an independent Wine Merchant based in Edinburgh since 1999. We offer a wholesale and retail service that can cover the whole of the UK. Our range is from across the world with a focus on the unusual, the individual and fun.

Name: Vinspecialisten Stoltz
Description:
Vinspecialisten Stoltz åbnede i marts 2006 som en klassisk uafhængig specialbutik — En butik for livsnydere, hvor kvalitet og personlige betjening sættes i højsædet. Vi samarbejder med to hovedleverandører: Vinoble og Vinens verden. Derudover plukker vi guldet fra andre importører rundt i landet.

Vi har uddannet personale, der er parat til at give den bedste rådgivning om køb af god vin, spiritus m.v.

Vi pakker gaven for dig efter dine ønsker.

Vinhuset Stoltz tilbyder ikke standardløsninger, men ønsker at sikre at den enkelte løsning er tilpasset kundens individuelle behov.

Kvaliteten af vores forskellige produkter i sortimentet skyldes grundlæggende producenterne.

Med vores egne gane som det egentlige styresystem har vi indtaget rigtig mange forskellige prøver både på fast såvel som flydende fødevarer.

Resultatet af de mange timers smagearbejde er afspejlet på vores hylder.

Name: Drayhorse
Description:
Drayhorse equips B2B beverage creators with the tools they need to grow and succeed in the marketplace. We craft the highest quality beverages, beers, and spirits with excellence, hardworking integrity, and passion. Armed with our experiences in launching our own RTD cocktail during the pandemic, we boldly went into the canning business to provide a reliable and efficient service to our clients.

Drayhorse puts a premium on the integrity and quality of the products we craft. We understand the growing pains that every startup and brand faces operationally. The impact of operations in sales and distribution marketing determines brand survival, culling a crowded market.

We have endured because of our commitment to excellence informed by ideals and passion. It is through our challenging experiences, and our expertise in distribution, importation and product development, that we guarantee that we will do right by you as our partner.

Name: Huston Vineyards
Description:
Huston Vineyards is boutique winery at the gateway to the Sunnyslope Wine Trail. We are a family owned business known for our single varietal Huston label wines such as Malbec, Merlot, Syrah, Cabernet Sauvignon, Riesling, Gruner Veltliner, and Petite Sirah. We also have our Chicken Dinner Brands which include a white blend, a red blend, and a Rose'. 

Our wines have been favorable reviewed by Wine Spectator, Wine Enthusiast, and Robert Parker's Wine Advocate. Gold medals have been received from the Sunset International Wine Competition, The San Francisco Chronicle Wine Competition, The American Fine Wine Competition, The Cascadia Wine Competition, and The Great Northwest Wine Invitational.

Name: Vino Vero
Description:
Vino Vero is an independent wine shop, bar and importer based in Leigh-on-Sea, Essex. We were founded in 2013 and specialise in wines from small (often organic/biodynamic), family-run producers from around the world. 

Winner of UK Drinks Retailing Awards 'Independent Wine Retailer' 2018.

We have 300 wines and a growing selection of craft beers and gins which can be enjoyed at home or in our small bar area. We also supply wholesale and corporate customers and have a growing list of exclusive wines that we import directly.

Take a look at www.vinovero.co.uk for more info.

Name: Villa Bibbiani
Description:
Villa Bibbiani is a hidden gem nestled in the Montalbano hills with 1300 years of history. 
The land of Chianti boasts a unique biodiversity, expressed in its vibrant colors and intoxicating scents.
 
Restored in 2018 to surpass its original splendor, 
the grounds are situated among vineyards
and olive groves covering almost 400 lush hectares of iconic Tuscan landscape. 
Currently 40 of them are dedicated to vineyards. Villa Bibbiani's vineyards stretch from the Arno plain up to an altitude of 250 meters above sea level. Our wines embody tradition and a deep respect for nature. 
Grapes are meticulously handpicked, and each wine reflects a unique nuance of our terroir.
Location: Capraia e Limite (FI), Capraia e Limite

Name: Apolinaire AB
Description: I våra flaskor finns bara frukt, bär och örter som är noga utvalda och pressade med kärlek. Vi gör drycker som smakar gott och mycket, drycker som är helt fria från konserveringsmedel, besprutade råvaror och tillsatt socker. Inga konstigheter. Inget onödigt. Bara 33 ekologiska centiliter av det mest smakrika och nyttiga naturen har att erbjuda, tappat på flaska..

Name: DIEL FINE WINE
Description: Premium Weine. Ausgewählte Champagner. Kulinarische Weinreisen und exklusive Tastings.

Name: PERFECTANINO
Description:
Plataforma de experiencias del mundo del vino.
Aquí encontrarás catas, tours, cursos en diferentes zonas de España.
Si eres aficionado o experto en el tema queremos conocerte! ;)

Name: St. Clair Wine
Description:
We’re the wild ones who call cacti house plants, and handle our spice like no one’s business. The ones who find oasis in the desert and scoff at adversity. We fly by balloon, race with roadrunners, and flourish without rain. Grow wine grapes in the desert? Some thought we couldn’t do it. But in 1984, we risked it all to cultivate award-winning wine right here in the land of the daring.

And it’s no wonder we succeeded. New Mexico is a flavor of life unlike any other. It’s soaked into the soil, hand-crafted into each bottle of wine.

Name: Huguet de Can Feixes, S.L.
Description:
The historic Can Feixes estate is nestled in an incomparable setting on the slopes of the mountains north of the Upper Penedès wine region of Barcelona. It forms an ecological environment where the different crops and the varied vegetation interact completely in a perfect symbiosis between the cultivated and wildlands, thus reflecting the best expression of biodiversity in agriculture.

 

For the Huguet family of Can Feixes, respect and protection of the environment are considered integral elements of quality wines. We seek to maximize the balance with the environment to reflect the most authentic expression of its landscape, creating emotions through the jewels that are its extraordinary organic wines. The secrets of this exceptional terroir, which only the fruit and their vines know, are what make Can Feixes and its wines special.

Name: Cava 57
Description:
En CAVA 57 podrás conocer un viñedo, aprender de los diferentes métodos de elaboración del vino al igual que comprar y degustar los vinos y quesos de la región.

Enmarcada por el valle de San Juan del Río, considerado uno de los más fértiles del país, y a los márgenes de la autopista México-Querétaro, mejor conocida como carretera 57, de donde toma su nombre, surge Cava 57.

Name: ADVANCED VITICULTURE AND MANAGEMENT PTY LIMITED
Description: AV&M provides comprehensive wine industry management services including vineyard and winery management, contracting services, consulting and specialist technical services including independent reviews and reports.

Name: MJ Wine Cellars
Description: Our selection of boutique, family-run wineries embody all we stand for: authentic, unique wines made with the passion and knowledge of generations, offering true value and enjoyment to consumers.

Name: 2 Cents Inc
Description: 2 Cents Inc is home to The IX Bourbon Whiskey.

Name: Viñalba
Description:
Viñalba is an exciting range of wines which showcases the depth and elegance which Argentina can offer. It encompasses an eclectic range of grape varieties and wines from both Mendoza and Patagonia. Launched in 2008, it has won 242 medals and 18 trophies in major international wine competitions.

The wines are made by Bordeaux-born pioneer Hervé J. Fabre who was the first to make sing...le varietal Argentine Malbec after recognising the true potential of the grape . Viñalba offers a range of beautifully crafted wines, combining Argentina’s purity of fruit and clear varietal expression with the elegance and complexity which are the hallmarks of Hervé’s classical background. Underpinning all of this is the unshakeable belief in the local terroirs, and determination that all our wines should express these terroirs as elegantly as possible.

Name: TAHITIKI Cocktails
Description:
TAHITIKI élabore des cocktails artisanaux prêts à boire, de qualité, à partir de recettes originales.
Nos cocktails sont composés de fruits frais pressés par nos soins, de liqueurs et sirops élaborés dans notre laboratoire, et de spiritueux rigoureusement sélectionnés.
Nos produits sont conditionnés dans une statuette de 35 cl.
Ces derniers sont également disponibles en bouteille de 100 cl pour les professionnels.

Name: Underwood Wines
Description:
Underwood Wines, an independent wine merchant, party supplier and old and rare alcohol brokerage operating nationally from its Warwickshire base.

Our family has been involved in the wine trade for almost 130 years, with each generation learning from the past and adapting our service to meet modern demands

Name: Oklahoma Man
Description: I'm white man and brewer from Oklahoma

Name: FreshTAP
Description: FreshTAP is a premium packaging company that provides wineries and licensees a cost-effective, hassle free and reliable way to join the rapidly expanding Wine-On-Tap market in stainless steel kegs. As Canada’s industry leader in wine keg filling, packaging, marketing, keg cleaning and logistical services, FreshTAP brings fine wine to the consumer in the most efficient way possible. Our systematic quality control procedures ensure that the wine being served to the consumer is consistently fresh every pour, exactly how the winemaker intended it to taste.

Name: Wine With a View
Description:
Wine With a View is a company dedicated to the concept of
selling wine by the glass through design curated mobile wine 
trucks . This idea, created in 2014 by Barbara Vidal, is a pioneer 
in the area of mobile businesses, having emerged through the 
realisation of the importance tourists attributed to Portuguese 
wine, as a unique attribute when visiting the country. 

Wine With a View is a brand that promotes wine and tourism in 
Portugal, as it seeks to unite two acts of worship, creating a truly 
unique experience: drink a glass of exceptional wine while 
enjoying a magnificent view.

Wine With a View Guests, visiting a national monument
overlooking an outstanding view are offered a unique 
experience of being able to try out a good variety of Portuguese
wines while being able to walk around given the unbreakable
wine glass that they can then keep as a souvenir.

Name: Amber Valley Vineyards
Description:
Every successful product is the fruit of hard work and this applies especially to a vineyard! Our Journey started with a chance meeting of minds between Barry Lewis & Duncan Mercer in 2011 that led to a few vines being planted on an allotment site that year, just before acquiring or planting our main vineyards.  

Barry & Duncan realised they were on to something and quickly planted the first proper vineyards at Doehole and Back Lane in 2012. We produced our first vintage in 2014 for release in 2015 - an aromatic and delicious white and a luscious and dry rose - these were named Lindway White and Lindway Pink, both of which were produced up to 2016.  

It hasn't always been easy. Growing vines in the UK is always going to be challenging and here in the northern climes of Derbyshire it will be particularly so. For example we planted our vines in some pretty challenging snowy conditions in April 2012, also one of the wettest years on record, and then the harvest of 2017 was a write off - thanks to the devastating frosts of that spring. The wines take their name, Lindway, from the neighbouring fishing lakes next door to the vineyard at Doehole, which afforded some protection to the young vines in the hard frosts we saw in Spring of 2014.

In 2018 Duncan took the decision to leave the business and concentrate on other projects he was involved in.  Barry took on the whole business and now runs it with his family.  Barry and his wife Katharine already owned the land so this was an easy decision.  

After the disastrous harvest of 2017 we bounced back with a great harvest in 2018 and will be launching a new range of wines in 2019.  We have also produced our first sparkling wine from this vintage, which will be released in 2021.

Name: Bodega Finca Collado
Description:
En una zona con un gran potencial pero de bajos rendimientos, y donde las viñas crecen al límite. En una Denominación de Origen, Alicante, muy antigua pero que justo ahora empieza de nuevo a prestigiarse. En un mundo donde predominan las grandes producciones, nosotros marcamos nuestro propio camino.
Creemos que podemos aportar nuestro pequeño grano de arena para construir un mundo mejor, haciendo un trabajo que nos devuelve a los orígenes.
Trabajamos de manera respetuosa con la naturaleza, y en armonía con nuestro entorno. En un ambiente que nos permite disfrutar del trabajo y que se traduce en hacer disfrutar a todos los que entienden el vino como un placer.
Somos una bodega pequeña porque queremos y porque pensamos que es la única forma de poder trabajar desarrollando nuestras ideas. La dificultad no nos importa, porque tenemos un espíritu inconformista. No tenemos prisa y, poco a poco, como la viña, avanzamos, mejoramos, creamos los vinos que unen el pasado con el futuro, la tierra con las personas, el trabajo con el placer de vivir.
Estamos convencidos de que un pequeño proyecto como el nuestro, a pesar de las condiciones extremas y de nuestra manera de entender y hacer el vino, puede ser viable y sostenible a largo plazo. Porque somos fieles al territorio y a su historia. Porque no solo aprovechamos el legado cultural, sino que lo investigamos, lo enriquecemos y pensamos en su futuro. Y de esta forma, entendemos que no solo elaboramos vinos, sino que contribuimos a de la creación cultural.

Name: MD Distillery
Description:
We handcraft Still ONE sipping vodka and gin using single distilled, 100% locally sourced sun-baked Alberta wheat. 

What handcrafted means to us:
Mash and fermentation produced in-house using sun-baked Alberta wheat
All our spirits are single distilled in-house
Our infusions are made in-house
We only use real fruit for our infusions
No artificial coloring or preservatives 
Our water is filtered and purified in-house

Name: VINISSIMA | wijnadvies
Description:
VINISSIMA is a young and enthousiastic company for wine consultancy, wine promotion, wine communicatons and wine education. VINISSIMA gives professional support to wine importers, wine retailers, restaurants and wine lovers about wine & food.

VINISSIMAs phylosophy is to give practical and understandable information about wine & food. With a catching passion for and a good knowledge of the product. 

VINISSIMA can arrange custom made wine tastings and wine events. VINISSIMA also can write and edit a wide range of texts for you (e.g. for brochures, newsletters, articles, interviews, webcontent) and can arrange your social media exposure on twitter, Facebook and blogs. 
(See www.vinissima.nl and on twitter: @vinissima)

VINISSIMAs Bubbelblog.nl is a guide on the best sparkling wines of the world. Here you may find reports of a wide range of sparklers, from Champagne to Chili, from Italy to India. Champagne, crémant, cava, Sekt, prosecco, Franciacorta, espumante and Vonkelwijn…it’s all there. 
(See blog www.bubbelblog.nl and on twitter: @bubbelblog)

Rent-a-Vinoloog is a new initiative of VINISSIMA. This service is especially for wine importers, wine retailers and restaurants who temporarily need a wine professional, e.g. additional support at expositions, events, tastings etc., training of restaurant staff or the composition and/or description of the wines on the wine card.
(See on twitter: @rentavinoloog)

Behind VINISSIMA, Bubbelblog and Rent-a-Vinoloog is Ingrid Larmoyeur: registered wine professional (Register Vinoloog), certified wine educator (SWEN Register Wijndocent), communications professional, writer/editor, champagne expert and enthousiastic wine lover. 

More information…? 
Need a wine professional to support your wine activities…?
Mail to ingrid@vinissima.nl 

VINISSIMA | PURE PASSION

Name: Petersons Wines
Description:
Petersons Wines have been at the forefront of the wine industry in the Hunter Valley since 1971 when it was established by Colin Peterson and his parents, Ian and Shirley. Since the first vintage in 1981, Petersons have become recognised for producing premium, award winning wines; a tradition that continues today.
Petersons Wines have two cellar doors in the Hunter Valley. The Cellar Door at Mount View, has been the home and headquarters for Petersons Family Wines for over 45 years. Situated on a hilltop surrounded by vineyards, it has a perfect position with uninterrupted views of Mount Sugarloaf and the Watagan Mountains. Our other Cellar door is located in in the heart of Pokolbin on Broke Road.
Our friendly staff will always provide you with an engaging experience along with a taste of our delicious wines.

Name: WineTales Racconti di Vino
Description:
WineTales is an innovative company whose core business is to accelerate innovation in the world of the Italian Wine through the Digital Innovation, Communication and Storytelling.
Strategic Marketing, Branding & Design, and Big Data Optimization are the pillars of this company for a concentration of passion, competence and innovation able to tell the best stories of the Italian ampelographic heritage and enhance the incredible excellence of the Italian Wine Producers. The project was born from expert people in  communication and finance who want to hand over their skills to put them at the service of the wine world and thus guarantee innovation.

Name: Enclos Importação Ltda.
Description:
A Enclos Importação nasce nas mãos de Vicente Jorge, um dos Wine Hunters mais reconhecidos do mundo do vinho.

Com uma renomada experiência na seleção de vinhos, adquirida com anos de viagens de “hunting”, buscando e selecionando vinhos ao redor do mundo, Vicente trouxe mais de 100 marcas renomadas para o Brasil, através das maiores importadoras do país.

Após milhares de vinhos degustados e mais de mil vinícolas visitadas em 30 países, nasce a Enclos Importação, com o propósito de trazer vinhos altamente selecionados por alguém que sabe selecionar vinhos e que conhece o paladar do consumidor brasileiro.

A Enclos Importação traz um portfólio enxuto, com vinhos marcantes que carregam histórias, desejos e que trazem uma verdadeira experiência enológica aos consumidores.

Name: Kapweine - South African Wines
Description:
KapWeine – The Home of South African Wines.

Wir sind der schweizweit grösste Importeur für Premium-Weine aus Südafrika mit Hunderten von Positionen an Weiss-, Rosé-, Rot-, Schaum- und Süssweinen. Davon stehen täglich eine von uns zusammengestellte Auswahl zur Degustation für Sie bereit. Doch nicht nur den passenden Wein finden Sie bei uns, auch Fleischspezialitäten wie Zebra, Strauss und die beliebte Boerewors können Sie vakuumiert und tiefgefroren bei uns kaufen. An unseren Degustationsanlässen, die mehrmals im Jahr stattfinden, öffnen wir jeweils 60 bis 100 Weine. Sie können diese kostenlosen Events ohne Voranmeldung besuchen und dabei authentisches «South Africa feeling» inklusive Braai/Grill bei uns in Wädenswil erleben.

Name: Wineemotion Canada
Description: “Providing Customers with the Best Wine Tasting Experience”

Name: Lauduc - Maison Grandeau
Description:
A quelques kilomètres de Bordeaux, le vignoble doit son développement à la passion commune de Régis et Hervé Grandeau pour des vins de qualité.

Les 55 hectares du Château Lauduc, s’établissent sur les coteaux, à dominantes argilo-calcaire et graveleux, les plus élevés de la commune de Tresses, à dix kilomètres du centre de Bordeaux.

Exposé plein sud, il est, comme le veut la tradition, planté de nobles cépages ; en majorité de Merlot 70%, qui apporte le moelleux, 20% de Cabernet-Sauvignon pour le côté corsé, 8% de Cabernet-Franc pour la finesse, complété de 1% de Malbec et 1% de Petit Verdot.

Aujourd’hui, le vignoble de 115 hectares, est en conversion biologique depuis 2019. Il est également certifié Haute Valeur Environnementale 3 et est réparti sur 8 communes de l’Entre Deux Mers.

Name: Chabrol Wines
Description:
Wij werken het liefst met kleinere domaines, bodega's en wijnmakers die, boven alles, een goed product willen maken. Wijnen rechtstreeks van een Domaine of Château, variërend van toegankelijke huiswijnen, tot complexer bio-dynamisch, tot prachtige kwaliteitswijnen van bijzondere wijnhuizen die onderdeel uitmaken van de hoogste classificaties. We verkopen de passie, gedrevenheid en kennis van deze wijnmakers en domaines. 

We selecteren alleen authentieke, goed gemaakte wijnen voornamelijk uit de traditionele wijnlanden zoals Frankrijk, Italië en Spanje. Hiertoe behoren wijnen gemaakt van traditionele druivenrassen van de betreffende landen en streken, zodat de vruchten hun volle potentie kunnen waarmaken. Zonder dat er een smaakversterkende, eventueel kunstmatige, trukendoos hoeft te worden toegepast. Wijnen die garant staan voor de terroir en geschiedenis van de streek.

Wijn is onze passie en achter elke fles bij Chabrol zit een verhaal. Een wijn van vijf euro wordt met dezelfde passie en visie geselecteerd als een duurdere wijn en dat maakt Chabrol leuk. Bij Chabrol staat voor elke wijnliefhebber de deur wagenwijd open, dus kom een keer proeven!

It is a family-run artisan company that works with care and attention for the search for taste and quality with a particular focus on sustainability.

Name: Domaine Baudouin Millet
Description:
To have you discover and love our Chablis and Burgundy wines, is to share the enthusiasm we are all about.
 Born of rigorous efforts and perseverance, our wines are consumed for pleasure and conviviality.
As an aperitif, and with shellfish, crustaceans, fish and white meats… flavourful wine-food pairings are numerous.
Experience the passion synonymous with Great Burgundy wines by letting us introduce you to our winery.
We are proud to have been a member of Independent Winegrowers since the estate’s creation and to carry this inspirational charter: Respect your terroir, work your vines, harvest your grapes, vinify and age your wine, bottle your production in your cellar, market your products, improve your skills while respecting tradition, welcome people to and guide them through tastings. Finally, take pleasure in presenting the fruit of your labour and its culture.
It is in this quest for excellence that in 2020, we obtained the HEV(High Environmental Value) certification.

Name: Weber-Vonesch-Wein
Description:
Die Weber-Vonesch AG in Zug ist eine der führenden Weinhandelsfirmen in der Zentralschweiz. Neben einer grossen Anzahl von Privatkunden beliefert Weber-Vonesch zahlreiche Gastronomiebetriebe, Firmen und Festanlässe mit Wein und Spirituosen. Das Sortiment umfasst rund 2‘000 Weine aus mittlerweile 16 Ländern rund um den Globus. Ein spezielles Augenmerk gilt den Weinen aus Übersee. Ausserdem bietet Weber-Vonesch eine umfangreiche Auswahl feinster Spirituosen aus der ganzen Welt.

Neben dem Handel mit Wein und Spirituosen betreibt Weber-Vonesch einen
Wein- und Getränkemarkt in Zug. Dieser bietet ein Vollsortiment an. Das heisst neben einer umfangreichen Auswahl an edlen Weinen und Spirituosen verkauft der Wein- und Getränkemarkt Biere aus der ganzen Welt sowie Mineralwasser, Softdrinks, Fruchtsäfte und Trend-Getränke.

Das Familienunternehmen Weber-Vonesch beschäftigt aktuell rund 20 Mitarbeitende und steht für über 75 Jahre Tradition und Innovation. Viel Engagement und Herzblut prägen diese erfolgreiche Geschichte, und die Tatsache, dass das Unternehmen seinen Werten bis heute treu geblieben ist.

Name: Cantina Bacco S.C.R.L.
Description:
IT: La Cantina Bacco è una realtà imprenditoriale radicata nel territorio di Nettuno, a sud di Roma, dal 1973.
Qui nasce e cresce il “Cacchione”, bianco autoctono della zona che pare esista già dai tempi dei Romani.
Coltivato ad un passo dal mare questo vitigno forte e verace è resistito persino ad un parassita come la fillossera che nel 1800 fece strage della maggior parte dei vitigni europei e ciò grazie ad una peculiare caratteristica del territorio che lo ospita. Pare infatti che su un terreno sabbioso qual è quello di Nettuno, ex fondale marino, tale parassita non sia riuscito a sopravvivere.
Ciò ha garantito nei secoli a questo vitigno di mantenere la propria autenticità tanto che, ad oggi, il Cacchione è uno dei pochi vitigni coltivati ancora a “piede franco” (cioè senza innesto alcuno) in Italia e Cantina Bacco è l'unica impresa a possederne delle coltivazioni attive.
Prodotto di punta della cantina è sicuramente il "Pantastico", vino bianco DOP 100% Cacchione a piede franco, cui si accompagnano altri bianchi nostrani del territorio quali il Bellone nonché i più conosciuti internazionali quali il Viognier, pluripremiato al Vinitaly 2018.
Sempre il Cacchione è alla base dei nostri spumanti, entrambi metodo Charmat, e delle nostre grappe. Seguono ben quattro rossi e una linea interamente bio la quale aggiunge questa ulteriore certificazione a quella già comune a tutti i nostri vini del riconoscimento DOP o IGP.

ENG: Cantina Bacco is the first winery in Nettuno since 1973 and it's still run by the original families who founded it now on their 4th-generation.
Cantina Bacco is notable for it's prestigious wine cultivation, the ungrafted technique, that gives much more balance and quality to the wine. 
It's specialized in Cacchione grapes and the flagship product of Cantina Bacco is the Pantastico, a DOP white wine, followed by other products of the company like sparkling and red wines, spirits and an entire product line of biological wine.

Name: Monate Fela Gin
Description:
We are the new kids on the gin block and we’d like to introduce ourselves! As you may already know, Monate Fela means ‘good times only’ in the Setswana and Sesotho language, two of South Africa’s 11 official languages. With this contemporary gin, we want to celebrate this beautiful Rainbow Nation. Monate Fela Gin is handcrafted in the capital, Pretoria.

Our nine carefully selected botanicals create this perfectly-balanced gin. The ingredients are mostly locally sourced from South African producers, hand-picked at the foot of the Magaliesberg and in Limpopo. The main flavours are the Marula fruit, Moringa, Baobab and Citrus. Do you want to know more about the flavour profiles? Get in touch via Instragram or info@monatefelagin.com

How do you pronounce Monate Fela? Give it a go: Moe-na-ti Fè-la!!

Name: Hans Rottensteiner Winery
Description:
For over 50 years we have been continuing on the dream of our grandfather, Hans, in producing our own wine.

Founded in 1956, Hans' focus was selling open wines from the winery to Switzerland. In the 1980’s, his son Toni changed over to marketing bottled wines, and since 2001 he has been supported by his grandson Hannes. Not only have the grapes from the family’s 10 hectares  been processed from the onset, but also that of 60 regional grape growers  as well. This close cooperation has extended for generations and is essentially responsible for the excellent quality of the wines.

We have been consciously committed to the varietal character of the particular wines  with a clear focus on the Bolzano varieties Lagrein and St. Magdalener.

Name: Nepenthe Wines
Description:
Nepenthe: described by Homer in The Odyssey as an Egyptian herbal drink so powerful that it eases grief and banishes sorrow from the mind.
In 1994, the Tweddell family purchased a premium property in the sub-region of Lenswood in the Adelaide Hills.  The property was carefully selected and planted to 24 hectares of vines with the intent of producing premium wine.  Proven varieties such as Pinot Noir, Chardonnay and Sauvignon Blanc were planted, as well as interesting varieties such as Zinfandel and Pinot Gris.  In 1996, Nepenthe received approval to build its winery, only the second in the Adelaide hills at the time (the first being Petaluma in 1978).   

In the backdrop of the cool heights of the Adelaide Hills, we started producing some soul reposing potions of our own: uncompromising wines of outstanding quality and internationally recognised distinction. Wines that, strangely enough, have been impressing both critics and consumers with their varietal faithfulness and subtle Adelaide Hills nuances. 

From the beginning, our wines have received positive review from the press and numerous medals on the show circuit.

In the first few vintages, Nepenthe wines featured in James Halliday's Top 100, The UK Times Top 100, The Advertiser Top 100, The International Wine Challenge as well as many other feature media articles.

The success of the wines is evident in the market place.  Currently,  Nepenthe sell nationally and are exporting to the United Kingdom, USA, Japan, Hong Kong, Malaysia, Canada, Switzerland, Holland, Sweden, Denmark and Croatia. In all these markets the press and public have warmly received Nepenthe wines.

Name: Château L'Eperon
Description:
Welcome to Château L’Eperon – Where Wine, Hospitality, and Relaxation Meet!
At Château L’Eperon, we’re proud to blend tradition, sustainability, and a touch of modernity to create an unforgettable wine experience.

Here’s what makes us special:
Exceptional Terroir: Our 21 hectares on Bordeaux’s right bank thrive on limestone and clay soils, perfect for crafting outstanding wines.
Sustainability: With an HVE3 certification, we’re committed to protecting the environment and nurturing biodiversity.
Grapes We Love: Merlot, Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Franc, and Malbec—all lovingly cared for to ensure the finest quality.
Expert Guidance: Our wines are shaped by Hubert de Boüard’s team at OENOLAB, adding a touch of mastery to every bottle.
Independent Spirit: As proud members of Vignerons Independents, we value our freedom and passion for winemaking.
Luxury Villas: La Maison L'Eperon - 5-star retreat with a pool, petanque, barbecue, and five en-suite double rooms.
L’Eperonnette - 5-star villa with three air-conditioned double rooms, pool, barbecue, and stunning vineyard views.
Winery Makeover: A sleek new winery with a modern barrel cave.
Tasting & Dining: Enjoy wine tastings and private dining in our elegant degustation space.
Wine Education: Learn and taste through tours, masterclasses, and more.
Event Hosting: Perfect for private celebrations or corporate events.
Our story dates back to 1830, inspired by the same limestone clay soil as St. Emilion Grand Cru. Explore our wines in the classic Bordeaux style or try our new cuvées, a fresh take on tradition.

Their passion and pioneering attitude can be found in every bottle of McQueen Gin.

Rebellious? Maverick? We call it McQueen.

We are The Original Spirits Mavericks, ripping up the rule book and blazing our own path in the spirits industry.

Everything we do is to challenge what you think you know about the gin industry.  We pioneered the flavoured gin industry with our range of world-first flavoured gins.

Name: Jack Ryan Whiskey
Description:
The Ryan’s are artisan Irish Whiskey finishers.

The Ryans are one of the only independent Irish Whiskey Finishers in the world & we still hand bottle and hand finish every Jack Ryan Whiskey at our Dublin home. We craft the finest Irish Whiskeys with premium aged Irish single malts, rare hand-sourced casks & our famed Whiskey finishing process. 

Jack Ryan’s father, Thomas, of distillery and barley-farming stock, came to Dublin from Toomevara, Tipperary at the close of the 19th century, and in 1913 set up his own whiskey finishing hall, on historic Haddington Road. Ryan’s Malt became a Dubliners’ favourite. Jack himself, vintner and whiskey man par excellence, honed the family’s whiskey Finisher’s Touch. 

His son Eunan has revised the family tradition with the Jack Ryan Whiskey Co.

Name: World Wine Services
Description:
Founded by renowned sommelier David Rabaud in 2007, World Wine Services delivers personalized and efficient services in Wines & Spirits to elite clientele and connoisseurs.

We specialize in curating the most interesting and sought-after Wines, Cognacs, and Armagnacs, providing seamless delivery directly to your Yacht, Villa, Private Jet, or Event. Whether it's a special occasion or setting up your cellar, our team responds with utmost professionalism.

In addition to our sourcing expertise, we offer tailored wine training, vineyard tours, and consultancy on cellar management and wine investments. We source directly from producers and supply professional equipment and customized items, including glassware.

Name: APT Weine GmbH
Description:
Bei APT Weine geht es nicht nur um Wein – da geht es um Amore, Passione & Tradizione. 
Wir schenken Dir einmalige Erlebnisse, weil Du bei uns Weine findest, die überraschen, und Geschichten, die begeistern.

Suchst Du Weine, Köstlichkeiten (z.B. Biscuits, Colomba, Panettone) und/oder Geschenkideen, die sich von der Masse abheben? Dann bist Du bei uns genau richtig.

APT steht für "Amore, Passione & Tradizione" – also Liebe, Leidenschaft & Tradition. Das war der Antrieb, der im 2014 dazu bewegt hat, die APT Weine GmbH zu gründen.

„Galli“ ist der Familienname meiner Ehefrau – damit erklärt sich schnell, warum ich begonnen habe, die Weine der "Azienda Agricola Ai Galli" in die Schweiz zu importieren. Mit der Zeit kamen auch edle Tropfen aus der Valpolicella und aus Apulien dazu.

Mit unserer Weinhandlung garantieren wir ein faires Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis. Im Online-Shop kannst Du ganz einfach und bequem bestellen.

Ab Lager in Spreitenbach (Aargau) bieten wir verschiedene Weiss-, Rot- und Schaumweine an. Degustationen lassen sich gegen Voranmeldung ab ca. 10 Personen organisieren. 
Oder degustiere ganz entspannt von zu Hause aus – zum Beispiel mit dem Degustationsset für Weiss- und Rotweine.

Bist Du bereit für ein einzigartiges Erlebnis? Dann zögere nicht und ruf an oder schreib eine Nachricht. 
Weitere Informationen findest Du auf https://www.aptweine.ch/

Cari saluti e alla Salute 

Michele

Description:

 Bridging emotion and technology to help wineries and wine lovers meet through the right story at the right moment. The FYWM App is currently in beta and launching soon.

Rooted in 200+ real-life social wine experiences and a belief that wine is not just a product, but a cultural, social moment worth telling.

Name: Vistavin
Description:
Amoureux du vin, ce site est fait pour vous. 

Vistavin est un projet né à Beaune, au cœur des plus grands terroirs bourguignons. Notre passion pour le vin ainsi que le partage sont les raisons qui nous pousse à vous faire découvrir notre univers du vin. Nous nous appuyons sur des relations historiques privilégiées avec nos partenaires vignerons, dans le but de vous offrir une expérience et un choix unique adaptés à vous.

Ainsi, vous retrouverez les appellations des domaines les plus prestigieux, une magnifique collection de grands formats, de vins bio d'une grande partie des régions viticoles françaises ou encore des talents de demain dénichés juste pour vous. Et en plus, tous nos vins sont en stock prêts à être expédiés dans vos caves.

Description: Vinous Reverie Wine Merchant of Walnut Creek, CA, offers a vast inventory of standard and specialty wines for every occasion. If you are an experienced wine drinker seeking to elevate your current selection or a beginner looking to establish an affinity for wine, we’re here to assist you. At Vinous Reverie Wine Merchant, our passion for providing our patrons with top-rated, critically acclaimed wines is why we offer member-exclusive monthly wine subscription services. If the thought of selecting a single bottle of wine from an aisle teeming with different brands overwhelms you, don’t fret. Vinous Reverie’s experienced staff will answer any questions you have regarding our unique selection of wines—from flavor complexity to ideal food pairings. You will be a master wine connoisseur in no time.

Description: Harlem Standard is Harlem's Whiskey brand. Inspired by the rebellious nature of Prohibition ideologies, jazz music, and the Harlem renaissance, we revive old techniques to distill and blend our spirits for the modern palate and connoisseur. Crafted to be smooth and refined, we work to symbolize uncompromising principles, strength, and multicultural interests.

Name: Cantina di Cesena
Description:
The Cantina Sociale di Cesena is a cooperative established in 1933 as a mutual will of some winemakers to give a new identity to the winemaking process, and that could be able to express the values and the enological vocation at their best.
The philosophy followed by Cantina di Cesena was clear: a real innovation in Romagna’s viticulture that respected the terroir and the features of wines.
Day by day, the original pioneers’ dreams became a reality thanks to several projects and constant investments in the most innovative and modern wine production technologies. In 1988, the brand Tenuta Amalia joins Cantina di Cesena: this important acquisition allowed a further addition of quality wines.

Today, Cantina di Cesena has around 300 small farmers that are associated to us and boasts of having an excellent production thanks to a modern and functional photovoltaic system, which is able to generate 100.000 kW each year, reducing harmful gases. This environmental awareness is also confirmed by a certified production of organic wines and by the "ISO 9001" certification.

We are direct manufacturers with over 80 years’ experience, monitoring  the entire production chain, from the vineyard to the bottle.  The grapes of our wine producers are harvested from high quality vineyards and are heterogeneous;  these are the distinctive traits that distinguish us from all the other winemakers.

Cantina di Cesena exports its excellences worldwide: a real challenge, nowadays like in the past, that we face with the same quality, innovation, responsibility and enthusiasm.

Name: ALLIANCE DES RECOLTANTS
Description:
Parce que l’union fait la force, plusieurs vignerons bordelais cultivant leurs terroirs et vinifiant leurs vins avec passion dans le respect de l’environnement, ont décidé de s’allier pour mieux promouvoir leurs vins sous une bannière collective.
En 2020, ils créent l’association Alliance des Récoltants. 
Au delà de l'entraide et de la promotion collective de leurs vins, l'Alliance des Récoltants est avant tout un label qualité exigeant. 
En effet, le macaron Alliance des Récoltants apposé sur une bouteille certifie que le vigneron et son domaine ont été audités et respectent une charte qualité reprenant 51 points de contrôles et que leur cuvée a été dégustée et approuvée par un jury de Sommeliers International et ont obtenu au moins 86 points sur 100.

Name: BiotecA
Description:
En BiotecA tratamos de cooperar, ayudar y dar servicio al sector vinícola. Para ello hemos ido seleccionando los mejores fabricantes de productos enológicos. 

Desde 1995 somos representantes y distribuidores de diferentes fabricantes que destacan a nivel internacional por su alta calidad. Las marcas que distribuimos incluyen Lamothe Abiet, Nadalié, Nomacorc, Novozymes y Diversey.

El trabajo junto a nuestros clientes nos ha proporcionado una amplia experiencia en la solución de problemas y en la optimización de sistemas.

También trabajamos dando asesoría técnica a diferentes bodegas.

En Bioteca podéis encontrar la máxima calidad en un solo lugar.

Name: LES CRUS FAUGERES
Description:
Leader de l’AOP Faugères depuis de nombreuses années, nous nous efforçons de toujours améliorer notre système de production, le soin et l’attention apportés aux vignes, l’esthétique de nos vins et les services que nous pouvons proposer.

La Cave Coopérative de Faugères a été créée en 1959 par une poignée de vignerons qui avaient déjà à cette époque imaginé une coopérative dédiée à la production de vins de grande qualité.

Dès les années 70, la commercialisation de ses vins en bouteilles fût facilitée par la création d’un caveau de vente aux particuliers.

Le Mas Olivier est né dans les années 90 avec la volonté de créer une marque forte au sein de cette jeune Appellation d’Origine Protégée Faugères.

Après 20 ans d’application et d’investissements, ce vin est désormais reconnu comme un vin de qualité et de caractère.

Aujourd’hui, la coopérative de Faugères relève un nouveau challenge en possédant plus de 55% de la production de l’appellation Faugères.

Name: Spirit of the DAO
Description:
An established liquor company with two award-winning brands, Moonbird Gin and GOATz Rum. 
Moonbird Gin recently achieved a double gold medal at the prestigious 2024 San Francisco Spirits Competition. GOATz Rum earned a gold medal at the same event and was also awarded a Gold at the 2024 International Wine and Spirits Competition.
Moonbird Gin and GOATz Rum have already been featured at some of the top bars in the world including Valerie, Lolita’’s, and The Dead Rabbit.
Each product is supported by their own NFT communities with over 12,000 active members.
Our superior products offer an augmented reality (AR) experience via a QR code on each bottle that is unique in the liquor industry.

Currently selling successfully nationwide in 34 states online through SpeakeasyCo.com and selling on and off-premise in the state of North Carolina.
Contracts signed with multiple distributors with more to follow.

Name: Shiverick Imports
Description:
Shiverick Imports was established in 1986 to source independently grown, terroir-driven wines in an era when big business ruled the wine market. This thoughtful boutique portfolio has grown through the relationships that David Shiverick has built with some of the world’s finest wineries. David’s talent for discovering exceptional, food-friendly wines has delighted savvy wine drinkers with finds from France, Germany, Italy, Portugal, Austria, and the west coast of the United States. Our selections will inspire you – whether you are looking for wine from an unknown vigneron from the Jura or a highly-regarded Grand cru from the Côte de Nuits.

David’s philosophy on choosing wines: Good wine should tell of its origin – there must be an expression of terroir. Great wine should tell of its origin at twenty years. Wine should never be adulterated with characteristics or practices that cloud the true nature of the wine's origin.

Three of the premier estates in the portfolio: Jean-Louis Chave, Max Ferdinand Richter and Domaine de la Solitude, have nearly 1,500 years combined viticulture and wine production experience. This history and generational devotion to these sites reflects David’s advocacy of family-owned businesses, independent-minded growers and natural production methods.

Name: Bordeaux Wine Locators
Description:
Bordeaux Wine Locators is an importer and national distributor of fine and rare wines. We specialize in Bordeaux and vintage Port, while also offering extensive listings of Burgundy, Rhone, and Italian wines.

+ We have one of the largest inventories of old and rare wines in the world.

+ We feature most of the major Bordeaux wines from any significant vintage.

+ Our vintage Port selection spans the years from 1900 to 2003, with all the major houses represented.

+ We offer unparalleled Bordeaux futures service, with some of the largest allocations of the most sought-after wines.

+ Our name, Bordeaux Wine Locators, connotes another specialized service. We take pride in our ability to locate that particular wine and vintage for you or your customers' special needs.

We ship throughout the United States in refrigerated trucks and also use ground and next-day carriers to expedite the delivery of that special bottle or case

It would be our pleasure to serve you. We look forward to hearing from you soon, and please remember as you look through our catalogue, "What is not on our list is as important as what is."

Name: Maison Hamelle
Description:
La Maison Hamelle est une fabrique artisanale installée au cœur de Paris, dans le quartier de Charonne. Nous produisons des spiritueux à partir de macérations de plantes, fruits et épices.

L’ambition de notre maison est de proposer des produits contemporains, singuliers et accessibles, mais dont la complexité pourra ravir les amateurs avertis. 

Il y a 2 ans, Jérôme Hamelle a eu l’ambitieux projet de radicalement changer de vie professionnelle, afin de s’adonner pleinement à sa passion, les spiritueux. 

Sa fabrique artisanale en est aujourd’hui l’expression, avec la volonté ferme de proposer des produits simples, originaux et accessibles à toutes et tous et, ce à partir d'ingrédients de grande qualité (plantes et épices issues de l’agriculture biologique, alcool de grains français), tout en privilégiant des fournisseurs locaux.

Entouré de passionnés, d’amis distillateurs et cavistes ou tout simplement d’amateurs, Jérôme s'est formé auprès de professionnels et s'est inspiré d’ouvrages il y a encore peu oubliés. Mêlant tradition et modernité, il a su développer une vision singulière des spiritueux.

Name: Cave à Aimé
Description:
La Cave à Aimé, c'est une entreprise française créée en 2008 à Mérindol, en plein coeur du Luberon. 

Aujourd'hui, c'est 3 adresses en Provence ! La Cave à Aimé - Mérindol, La Cave à Aimé - Salon de Provence et la Cave de Laurus by aimé - Lauris. 

C'est une cave dans laquelle vous pourrez trouver des vins BIO à 95% ! Mais aussi une jolie sélection de bières artisanales et de spiritueux Made In France.

Enfin, depuis peu, la Cave propose des fromages affinés soigneusement sélectionnés en direct producteurs ou auprès d'artisans fromagers, à la coupe ou en plateau "apéro" à partager. 

La Cave à Aimé, c'est aussi un Bar à vin situé à Mérindol dans le Luberon.

Nous avons voulu créer un lieu authentique, convivial où le goût est à l’honneur et les prix sont justes. Un lieu où le temps s’arrête, ou les bouchons sautent, où l’on se raconte des histoires, où l’accent du sud chante et où l’on prend du plaisir à être ensemble simplement, être ensemble vraiment.

Le Bar à vin propose de nombreuses animations et soirées toute l'année. C'est un espace qui est aussi privatisable pour vos événements jusqu'à 60 personnes.

La Cave à Aimé a lancé en 2020 l'abonnement BOX VIN BIO. Enfin, nous exportons aussi notre savoir-faire via notre agence Made In Luberon Events sur le lieu de votre choix : création d'une ambiance bar à vin sur mesure avec sa terrasse éphémère !

Pour en savoir plus, n'hésitez pas à jeter un coups d'oeil à notre site internet. Vous retrouverez le calendrier de nos événements, nos offres spéciales, nos domaines partenaires, et toute notre histoire. 

A très bientôt.

Aimé

Name: Mutiny Island Vodka
Description:
Mutiny Island Vodka is here to revolutionize spirits with a purpose. Crafted from sustainably-sourced breadfruit and Caribbean rainwater, we bring you the first Island Vodka—a spirit that embodies the vibrant essence of the U.S. Virgin Islands while supporting a sustainable future.

From our flagship Island Vodka to bold Island Infusions like Cold Pressed Puerto Rican Coffee and Smoked Hot Pepper, each bottle is crafted with the adventurous spirit of the islands. Made through a farm-to-bottle process, our award-winning spirits are as sustainable as they are unique.

We’re driven by impact. Every bottle of Mutiny Island Vodka incentivizes the planting of breadfruit trees, promoting food security, environmental benefits, and empowering local communities. Proudly endorsed by the Trees That Feed Foundation, we’re committed to making a lasting difference.

Ready to be part of the next wave in eco-conscious spirits? Visit mutinyislandvodka.com to learn more, follow us @mutinyislandvodka, and watch for upcoming campaigns—your chance to invest in Mutiny’s future!

Interested in joining the Mutiny? Share your info here! https://forms.gle/XXRm2b8c3XRDEGCp9

Name: Tomasello Winery, Inc.
Description:
Tomasello Winery is New Jersey's largest winery, located for almost 90 years in Hammonton NJ.  Tomasello grows nearly 70 acres of traditional vinifera vines and native grapes in South Jersey's Outer Coastal Plain AVA. 

In 1933, days after the repeal of Prohibition, Frank Tomasello started Tomasello Winery with the revolutionary vision of creating wine to match Europe's best.  His two sons, their two sons, and then their two sons have continued the tradition.

Name: Organic Grape Spirit Ltd
Description:
Organic Grape Spirit Ltd is a state-of-the-art distillery based in the UK. At our purpose-built facility, bespoke spirit creation begins with the highest quality organic ingredients. Then, via our revolutionary automated processes we achieve absolute control over every flavour parameter – using a fraction of the energy of traditional pot distillers. The result? Consistently exceptional, distinctive spirits.

But how do we do this?

We employ a low-temperature distillation technology that fractionates the aromatic components of the spirit during distillation so efficiently that we can separate them completely. This allows us to mix them after distillation and determine the optimal concentration of each component. 

We have spent years refining and certifying our hyper-efficient plant and processes. With 100% renewable energy powering our fully automated plant, we can produce up to 1,500 bottles per hour with almost zero waste – and precise flavour profiling to the last drop.

Organic Grape Spirit Ltd is the official manufacturer of Drylaw.

Name: CRU Subscription Specialist Agency
Description:
At CRU, we don’t believe in “all-in-one.” Not in platforms — and not in agencies.

Too often, trying to do everything means doing nothing particularly well. That’s why we’ve chosen to stay in our lane and go deep where it matters: subscription-focused website development, hosting, and support.

For everything else, we’ve built a growing network of trusted partners — specialists in their disciplines — to support our clients with:
• Tech stack implementation & integrations
• Email flows & customer nurturing
• Social Media and Paid Ads
• Tech Stack - CRM implementation and Integration
• Retention strategy, loyalty, and more

This model means you’re not stuck shopping around for multiple vendors or relying on a generalist agency. Instead, you get a focused team for your site and infrastructure — plus access to vetted experts across every other area of your subscription business.

Whether you’re just launching or scaling up, CRU delivers the flexibility and depth today’s recurring revenue brands need.

Name: Debowa Polska
Description:
We established our company in 1982. We have been dealing with the production and distribution of liquors for more than 35 years.

        Until a couple of years ago we were producing brandy type liquors only, now the production covers a wide range as gin, whisky and vodkas. All our newly developed liquors are produced basing on our own recipes, protected with patents.

        Oak Vodka of Poland is our latest product, to which we dedicated more than two years of work. The vodka for connoisseurs, of excellent taste, emerged as a result. The debut of Oak Vodka of Poland appeared to be exceedingly successful in the Polish market, and the cooperation with customers such as MAKRO, REAL, INTERMARCHE, KAUFLAND, PIOTR I PAWEŁ, TESCO as well as SELGROS is the best recommendation.

        Oak Vodka of Poland is also well known in foreign markets, it successfully sells in the USA, Great Britain, Australia, China, Germany, France or in Latvia. Our vodka is currently one of the leaders in its quality and price group.

        The proof of our product's virtues are diplomas and awards won during liquor fairs and exhibitions. We are working on new brands, which will be launched into the market in the near future. We hope that the effects will be equally impressive.

Name: Vino Cado
Description:
Vino Cado – L’expertise du vin au service de vos cadeaux et événements d’entreprise

Depuis plus de 10 ans, Vino Cado accompagne les entreprises dans leurs actions de fidélisation, de récompense et de communication à travers une offre soignée de coffrets de vins, champagnes et produits d'épicerie fine. Nous sélectionnons des cuvées de qualité, issues de domaines indépendants, pour créer des cadeaux sur mesure, porteurs de sens et d’émotion.
 
En 2025, Vino Cado a fusionné avec Oenodyssée, agence événementielle spécialisée dans les expériences œnologiques. Ce rapprochement a donné naissance à Vino Cado Expériences, notre offre dédiée à l’événementiel BtoB.

Notre ambition : faire vivre aux entreprises des expériences autour du vin, du goût et du savoir-faire artisanal, à travers des animations originales et interactives conçues pour renforcer la cohésion d’équipe et valoriser le patrimoine vivant de nos régions.

Name: Fess Parker Winery
Description: Founded in 1989, the Fess Parker Family Portfolio remains a family-owned and operated hospitality collection celebrating the beauty and bounty of Santa Barbara Wine Country. The Fess Parker Family Portfolio properties include the Fess Parker Wine Country Inn, Fess Parker Winery, The Bubble Shack, Epiphany Tasting Room, and Fess Parker Funk Zone Tasting Room in Santa Barbara County, and Fess Parker Family Portfolio Tasting Room opening soon in Napa. Name: Red Eye Louie's Inc.
Description:
Red Eye Louie's Inc is in the spirits industry and connects with distributors nationwide to sell the founding product Red Eye Louie's Vodquila. REL's Vodquila is a special blend of Ultra Premium Vodka and imported Super Premium Tequila. The Vodka is made from multiple grains and distilled SIX times whereas the Tequila is made from Pure Blue Agave Plants and distilled in the Highlands of Jalisco, Mexico.

Since introducing VODQUILA in 2012, REL has introduced two more premium products, RUMQUILA. a blend of Dark Rum/Tequila and WHISQUILA, a blend of Rye Whiskey/Tequila. 

The above blends are sold in 30 plus states in USA and many overseas markets like UK, EU countries, Australia, South Africa, Dubai and Egypt.

Red Eye Louie's Inc is family-owned and operates from the Birmingham, Alabama area with its bottling facility in Florida. Please contact chander.arora@redeyelouies.com if you are interested in distribution of REL's Vodquila.

Name: Mercer Wine Estates
Description: The Mercer family has cared for the land of the Horse Heaven Hills for five generations, dating back to 1886. Since planting the first wine grapes in the Horse Heaven Hills back in 1972, the Mercer family has prided itself on growing a solid base of the Cabernet Sauvignon varietal. Over the years, we have learned that our rich soil and desert climate are beautifully suited for producing elegant tannin structures and enticing flavor profiles. The ability to grow exceptional wine grapes eventually led to the first vintage from Mercer Estates Winery located in Prosser WA in 2005. Our state-of-the-art winery allows our winemaking team the luxury of temperature control and immaculate conditions for fermentation.  The large Prosser facility provides space and efficiencies for true craftsman-style winemaking.  And our barrel rooms allow for long and varied barrel aging programs.  It is with full artistic control that our winemaker blends and creates the new world wines that we at Mercer are so proud to share.

יינות היקב הם יינות אוכל קלאסיים.
הם מורכבים ומרתקים, נגישים ומלאי טעם.
