Name: Label Terravin
Description:
Depuis 60 ans, notre label Terravin sélectionne pour vous les meilleurs vins selon des critères de qualité exigeants. Notre label améliore la qualité du vin vaudois. En d’autres termes, avec le label Terravin, votre Chasselas est sans défaut, il a le goût d’un Chasselas sublimé par son climat et son terroir.

Le climat et le sol influencent le vin. Avec Terravin, nous pensons que le vin exprime l’âme et la richesse de la région dans laquelle il est produit. Notre label vous aide à reconnaître des vins produits dans le respect et l’amour de notre terroir.

Des critères exigeants pour sélectionner les vins avec le label Terravin.

L’évaluation d’un vin s’effectue en prenant en compte le cépage, le terroir et le millésime. Pour avoir le label Terravin, les vins sont évalués à l’aveugle à l’aide de 20 à 25 critères sensoriels. Notre équipe d’oenologues expérimentée évalue en détail la couleur du vin, son arôme, son goût, sa texture et sa longueur en bouche. Nous appelons ces critères d’évaluation des critères organoleptiques.

Nos critères de qualité sont les mêmes pour tous les vins et toutes les régions. Au fil des années, le label Terravin évolue vers une plus grande qualité grâce à des connaissances scientifiques acquises pour la dégustation.

Name: MEDEA SRL - Servizi per l'Enologia
Description:
A Barberino Val d’Elsa, in provincia di Firenze, MEDEA Srl è uno dei punti di riferimento nel campo dell’enologia toscana. 
Con la sua esperienza trentennale, MEDEA si occupa di biotecnologie, materiali di filtrazione, coadiuvanti, detersione e macchine per l’enologia, provvedendo alla consegna al cliente con i propri mezzi.
Location: Barberino Val d' Elsa, Loc. Grillaie, Firenze

Name: Smooth Vines
Description:
Smooth Vines is an online wine store.  We host and sell wonderful wines and other liquors from our South African Boutique Wine Farms.  
https://smoothvines.myshopify.com/

Name: Ole Imports
Description:
Olé Imports began in 1999 with just 3 wines. Our unique portfolio of Spanish wines has now grown to over 100 wines today. My dear friend and partner Alberto Orte and I have searched the Spanish peninsula for wines that share four fundamental elements: terroir, quality fruit, exceptional winemaking and last but not least, wines that present an exceptional value.



“When Olé Imports began in 1999, there were only three wines in their portfolio, and one of the two founders, Patrick Mata (the other founder being Alberto Orte), was not even old enough to consume alcohol! A great success story, this tiny boutique company searches out, as they put it, “unique terroir-driven wines of extraordinary value.” Often such sayings are hyperbole, but not in the case of Olé Imports.

Aside from the wine quality, one of the most admirable aspects of Olé Imports is their attitude concerning social responsibility. Readers are encouraged to check their web site, www.oleimports.com, to see the number of charities with which they are heavily involved, including some of my favorites such as the Wounded Warrior Project.

These wines are among my favorites from this motivated company. While none of their wines are household names, readers should seek them out as they represent sensational values from viticultural regions throughout Spain.”

—Robert Parker, The Wine Advocate

Name: No&Va WS
Description:
Qui sommes-nous ? 

Dénicheur de pépites, nous ramenons sur vos tables nos découvertes.

Nous nous adressons résolument à une clientèle désireuse de conseils, restaurateurs ayant à cœur de présenter une carte de vins vivante, sommeliers des maisons à la recherche d’originalité, bars à vin soucieux d’éveiller la curiosité de leurs clients et cavistes attentifs aux caractéristiques et à la rigueur de leurs sélections.

Nous développons une relation de confiance et de proximité entre nos vignerons partenaires et l’ensemble de nos clients. Dans un esprit participatif, nous personnalisons votre offre et contribuons à améliorer la connaissance des vins de vos équipes afin de coller au plus prêt à l’attente de vos consommateurs.

Name: ViNO - Online Natural Wine
Description: Vini Naturali Online, better known by the acronym ViNO, is an online store of natural, organic and biodynamic wines.

Name: Tenuta Sette Cieli
Description: Tenuta Sette Cieli is located between Bolgheri and Castagneto Carducci, on the coast of Tuscany at 400 meters above sea level. The Estate sprawls out over 80 hectares, 10 of which are set up as vineyards. Dry stone wall terraces separate the different grape varieties grown: Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Franc, Merlot and Malbec, are planted at high density in an ideal terrain for grape viticulture. The Estate overlooks Bolgheri and its landscapes made up of gently down sloping hills that enclose the sea, thus creating a fantastic mild and temperate microclimate.

Name: Et Fille Wines Inc
Description:
Our story is about family. It is how we started, why we make wine, and what we hope accompanies our wines at your dinner table. Et Fille, which means “and daughter”, was co-founded by father and daughter winemakers and is now in its second generation with daughter Jessica making elegantly complex wines inspired by her late father’s legacy and daughter’s future. 

We craft wines from our sustainably farmed vineyards in Oregon’s Willamette Valley. 

Committed to: Sustainable Winemaking, Community, and Diversity and Equity.

Name: Vignobles Alain Jaume
Description: Enracinée au nord de Châteauneuf du Pape, la famille JAUME perpétue le métier de vigneron depuis 1826.

Name: Companhia dos Vinhos do Douro
Description: We produce DOC douro wines in "Quinta do Cabeço".

Name: August Hill Winery
Description:
The August Hill Winery & Illinois Sparkling Co. Tasting Room is located in the historic village of Utica, Illinois - home to Starved Rock State Park, Grand Bear Resort, and many other shops and restaurants. In addition to a wide variety of hand-crafted wines, the Tasting Room offers many other individual creations including artwork by regional artists, gourmet chocolates, artisan cheeses and more. 

August Hill Winery is owned by Mark & Teri Wenzel. Mark watched his grandfather, August Engelhaupt, carefully tend the scenic piece of land that is now the location of the AHW vineyard and winery. Mark shares the passion that Grandpa Augie had for growing premium crops. When he discovered that French-hybrid grapes grow well in our climate, the concept for August Hill Winery was born.

August Hill’s 3-acre vineyard stands atop a bluff overlooking the Illinois River in Peru, Illinois. The first vines were planted in 2003. Each hole was dug by hand, and each vine was carefully planted by hand. The vineyard includes a wide variety of grapes and a large experimental section. The AHW Winery is adjacent to the vineyard and was built in 2004. The wines are made with utmost care and attention to detail. All phases of winemaking, from harvesting, crushing and fermentation, to barrel-aging and bottling are carefully monitored by the winemaker, Mark Wenzel.

Name: Champagne Infinite Eight
Description:
INFINITE 8 Champagne is a blend of desires, passions and refinements. Only the best years have been
selected in a bottle dressed in black enhanced by a label stamped with the number 8.

The symbols of the number 8 and the infinity are indissociable and are synonymous with balance
exception and eternity but it is also and above all the symbol of harmony and perfection.

Champagne INFINITE EIGHT is exclusively proposed in a bottle dressed in black, protecting the
wine from any outside aggression, for better storage conditions.

Thanks to a sensitive varnish, the “Infinity” sign turns red when reaching the right tasting temperature,
ensuring the Champagne freshness.

Name: OTTELLA
Description:
“Le cose migliori si ottengono solo con il massimo della passione.” 
Johann Wolfgang Goethe 

Si racconta che nel 1500, nel cuore della Lugana, siano nati 8 gemelli; lo stemma, conservato nella nostra corte, ne avvalora la veridicità e da il nome all’Azienda OTTELLA, che alla fine del IX Secolo viene descritta come l’unica produttrice Veronese del Lugana. 

... L‘Azienda Agricola Ottella è a San Benedetto di Lugana, Comune di Peschiera del Garda, al confine tra i Comuni di Sirmione e di Desenzano, nei pressi dell’oasi del laghetto del Frassino.

Ottella merita un posto di primissimo ordine all‘interno della denominazione. I suoi Lugana doc si distinguono per un‘impostazione stilistica che punta alla finezza del tono, all‘intensità aromatica e alla mineralità diffusa. Un Lugana doc concettuale contemporaneo originale, amato molto anche fuori dai suoi confini geografici. La filosofia è di creare vini rigorosi nella corrispondenza naso bocca, fini ed eleganti nelle evoluzioni, emozionanti nelle sensazione minerale, l‘idea di vini dalla polpa appagante arricchita nella sensazione salata e speziata dell‘argilla.

“Abbiamo scelto di fare vino, lo ha fatto per primo nostro bisnonno Lodovico, poi Giovanni, ha proseguito nostro padre Lodovico, e lo abbiamo scelto anche noi figli, nel cuore della Lugana, a Sud del Lago di Garda, tra colline Moreniche, argille bianche e clima mite”.

Michele e Francesco Montresor
Visualizza altro

Name: Armagnac du Château de Lacquy
Description:
---- La plus ancienne propriété familiale productrice d'Armagnac, depuis 1711 ---- 
Le Château de Lacquy façonne un Armagnac d'exception dans la plus pure tradition, un produit totalement naturel et unique, fruit de 300 ans d'expérience, d'excellence et de patience. 
www.chateaudelacquy.com 

---- Super premium craft Bas-Armagnac produced by the same family since 1711 ---- 
Château de Lacquy creates an exceptional Armagnac in the purest tradition, a totally natural and unique product, the result of 300 years of experience, excellence and patience. 
www.chateaudelacquy.com 

"A breathtakingly good Armagnac! On the nose this has heady molasses richness suggesting a powerful spirit to follow. Which it is with extraordinary intensity on the palate…yet despite its power there is a teasing delicacy, beautifully wrought jewels of flavour, so deep, so complex, and what a finish! This is a heroic Armagnac, and an Armagnac for heroes! " (IWSC 2018)

Name: Cantina Goccia
Description:
Cantina Goccia was born out of the pure love of Umbria and its unrecognised potential as a superb wine producing area deep in the heart of Italy.

The name Goccia simply means 'drop' in Italian. We are a relatively new venture with very old roots and are based on the union of tradition, passion and innovation.

Umbria gave birth to our unique vineyard and our vision is to create extraordinary wines whose character strongly represents their origin while embracing the latest innovation and research.

We were the first winery in the world to trial and use the paper wine bottle manufactured by the UK company Frugalpac.  We are now leaders in this sector of alternative packaging.
As an organic winery we focus on reducing our carbon footprint and continue to explore alternative packaging options for our wine.

Name: Kiara Wines
Description:
Kiara imports and markets bottled wine from leading wine producers from many countries. This portfolio covers wines from both the old wine countries such as France, Italy, Spain, Germany and new wine countries such as USA, Chile, Hungary, Argentina.

Kiara's endeavour is to provide wine of good quality to price ratio and also all other products and information to wine lovers.

To further meet the goals, Kiara has formed a wine club which provides information on wines of the world, provides wines and accessories at special prices and arranges visits and tours to the wineries.

Explore the range of Finest International Wines at Kiara Wines.

Description: Fondata nel 1960 a Bertiolo, piccolo borgo all centro delle "Grave del Friuli", Cabert è da oltre cinquant'anni sinonimo di autenticità e tradizione del vino.

Name: Royal Sedang Gin
Description:
Royal Sedang is the meeting of French and Vietnamese cultures, seen through the adventure of Charles Marie de Mayrena. He became the last French King after being elected by local Vietnamese tribes as Chief of theKingdom of Sedang in 1888. 
Charles Marie was a great lover of Indochina and its culture, where he spent the rest of his life after marrying a Vietnamese lady. 
Charles-Marie was also a great gin lover, as told in books about his incredible life! Royal Sedang makes the drinker feel as if they are entering into a fresh food market in Viet Nam or enjoying a fruit breakfast at a hotel bar. The aromas and flavors of Lemongrass, Jasmine Tea, Lime…the most alluring in the world! Distillation expertise since 1870. Slow maceration and alcohol reduction process giving Royal Sedang its finesse.

Description: Vinícola brasileira fundada no porão de casa em 2017, por dois enólogos de 21 anos apaixonados por vinhos. Em 2020 a vinícola se estabelece no Vale dos Vinhedos. Em 2021, abre sua operação no Napa Valley. Em 2024, inicia vinificações do Uruguay. De nós para o mundo, do mundo para nós. Vinícola que tem como propósito levar o know-how do novo Brasil de vinhos para todo o planeta.

Name: La Braxéenne Microbrasserie Artisanale
Description:
La Braxéenne est une microbrasserie artisanale basée près de Toulouse.
Nous proposons 10 bières Biologiques de haute fermentation, sans filtrage ni pasteurisation.
Nous accordons une grande importance à la qualité de nos ingrédients et à leur provenance la plus locale possible.
Nous proposons nos bières en vente directe à la brasserie et sur nos points de vente sur la région toulousaine.
Nous proposons également des visites dégustations à la brasserie.
Nous pouvons organiser des afterwork à la brasserie ou en entreprise ainsi que des stages de brassage d’une demi-journée en team building.
Nous pouvons également personnaliser nos étiquettes aux couleurs de votre logo.
N’hésitez pas à nous contacter pour trouver la formule qui vous correspond.

Name: Imexco Drinks
Description:
Imexco Ghana is the leading distributor of the most distinguished and prestigious beverages in Ghana for the last three decades. Imexco Ghana has an extensive knowledge of the local market and an exhaustive repertoire of exclusive drinks. 
The impressive array of drinks caters to the individual demands of our discerning clientele. Our vision is to provide the best beverages in Ghana at the most competitive prices. 
Imexco Ghana is the leading distributor of branded beverages in Ghana, and we aim to maintain our position through continued high quality service, sustainable growth, innovation and good corporate citizenship, which are the hallmarks of our company. 
Our mission is to continue to distribute premium, comprehensive consumer products in an extremely professional manner to ensure sustainable and profitable growth for our stakeholders.

Name: IFCO institut de formation de la vigne et du vin
Description: Installé à Marseille & Paris, l’IFCO est spécialisé dans la formation professionnelle des métiers du vin et propose des formations métiers diplômantes et qualifiantes.

Name: United Distributors Curaçao
Description:
United Distributors Curacao is a leading beverage importer and wholesale distributor representing some of the world's greatest brands.

Founded in 1996, our core business has been the premium spirits industry, representing the world's most prestigious  brands including Johnnie Walker, Old Parr, Buchanan's, Ketel One, Ciroc, Smirnoff, and many more . Since then, our company has expanded to represent some global wine brands such as Trapiche, Santa Margherita, and Banfi, as well as beer icon Guinness and beverage giant PepsiCo.

Our mission is to give Curacao memorable experiences and celebrate life's moments through our award-winning brands. As we grow our portfolio we look for individuals with the energy, passion, and pioneering spirit to help us achieve our vision. We encourage creativity and fresh ideas, and because of our size, our employees are able to get to the hearty of our business and make a real difference in what we do.

If you're interested in a career at UDC, send us a message!

THE BALVENIE DISTILLERY COMPANY LIMITED

Description: Centro Internazionale per la cultura del vino e dell'olio. Corsi professionali da sommelier

Name: Domaine de l'Arjolle
Description:
Domaine familial depuis de nombreuses années, le Domaine de l’Arjolle, telle une belle aux vignes dormantes, s’est réveillé en 1974 avec l’arrivée de Prosper et Louis Marie Teisserenc dont les objectifs sont dès le départ : qualité, diversité et vins plaisirs.

La liberté conférée par l’appellation Côtes de Thongue leur convient tout à fait pour la production de vins de cépages et aussi d’assemblages. Leurs efforts sont récompensés par la première mise en bouteille en 1978. En 1982, les associés de l’Arjolle prennent en gestion le domaine du Château de Margon, situé à trois kilomètres de l’exploitation.

Charles Duby et Guilhem de Fozières viennent renforcer les deux frères Teisserenc en 1985. Ils amènent avec eux une profonde réflexion sur la culture qui aboutit au classement Terra Vitis, charte de l’agriculture raisonnée, respectueuse de l’environnement.

Après un voyage en Californie, Louis Marie se passionne pour le Zinfandel. Passer quelques joutes avec l’administration, un hectare de Zinfandel est planté sur la commune de Pouzolles. C’est de là qu’est produit le Z de l’Arjolle, seul vin français issu à 100% du cépage Zinfandel.
En 1986, Roland Teisserenc, fils de Prosper rejoint l’équipe. Les premières cuvées élevées en fûts de chêne sont mises en bouteille en 1988.
Devant l’engouement des acheteurs pour les vins de l’Arjolle, un chai d’élevage de 800 barriques est inauguré en 2001. Bruno Lapostat, l’architecte, a fait merveille et nous serons très heureux de vous le faire visiter lors de votre passage au Domaine !

Enfin, en 2004, François, fils de Louis-Marie et Roch, fils de Prosper s’installent comme jeunes agriculteurs : 10 nouveaux hectares sont plantés, du Carménère, du Muscat Petits-grains et du Viognier. 

Notre histoire s’enrichit de nos rencontres avec nos clients, répartis dans plus de douze pays différents.

Name: Liquid Mix
Description: Liquid Mix is Western Australia's largest family owned and operated on-premise distributor of Beer, Wine, Spirits and Non-Alcoholic beverages.

Name: La Table de Balthazar
Description:
At La Table de Balthazar, design your timeless experience.
A cellar in the heart of the historic Chartrons district reserved for its members; rare wines to discover accompanied by quality and raw dishes; a place crafted for you, both convivial and refined.

Name: Romdeluxe ApS
Description: Romdeluxe sells Rum under our own RDL (Romdeluxe) brand. Romdeluxe also have the exclusive distrubution of several well known high-end International Rum brands in Denmark. A1710, Cave Guildive, Kintra, The Duchess and Toucan are among our international Rum Brands.

Name: The Online Wine Tasting Club
Description: Learn all about wine with our monthly wine tasting shows with miniature EcoSIP wine samples, delivered through your letterbox in our eco-friendly, lightweight packaging - now available for your wine sampling needs!

Name: Champagne Tarlant
Description: Vignerons implantés à Oeuilly dans la Vallée de la Marne depuis 1687.

Name: VINOS Y BODEGAS "FINCA EL PALACIO"  tj agricultura
Description: We have been dedicated to agriculture for more than 30 years. Throughout the decades, we have cultivated diverse products, but vineyards have always been our primary objective. Therefore, we’ve increased the growing area and built one of the most advanced wineries in the region. Now the time has come for our wines to become known by their own name.

Name: Michigan Wine Collaborative
Description: To enhance the sustainability and profitability of the Michigan wine industry by supporting wineries, growers and other businesses and individuals connected to the industry – today and for future generations.

Name: Les Bons Plans du Vin
Description:
In the heart of the Côte de Nuits, on the Route des Grands Crus de Bourgogne, the cellar Les Bons Plans du Vin is a family business located in Fixin, 15 minutes from Dijon. It is composed of 500m2 of store, 700m2 of stocks. The opening of a wine bar of 150m2 more is planned during the year. The cellar is rich of more than 3500 references of wines (Burgundy, France and abroad), spirits of all types, bubbles (crémants, champagnes), classic and atypical beers, and fine grocery products. 

As an independent wine merchant, "Les Bons Plans du Vin" offers a wide range of products in order to meet the various expectations of its customers, and is constantly seeking to enrich it. It is above all a story of family and passion. 
We are two cousins (Jérémy and Gaetan) passionate about wines and spirits. Since 2012, we make you discover our finds, our nuggets and our favorites. Our goal is to share with you our passion for the world of wines and spirits.
We are committed to finding the best value for money and to help you discover talented winemakers.

All the references available on the site are in stock in our store and our warehouse. You have access to nearly 3500 references of wines from Burgundy, France and the world kept in optimal storage conditions. The store and the online store are one, guaranteeing you the availability of your orders.

Next step: the creation of a wine bar to allow you to taste our nuggets!

Name: Viñedos Don Leo
Description:
Viñedos Don Leo remonta su historia desde 1938, cuando, Don Leo Mendel, judío-alemán, llega a México y empieza a trabajar en el sector agrícola, donde nace su amor y pasión por el campo, transmitiendo estos valores a su familia.

Más tarde su hijo, Arturo Mendel, tuvo la visión de transformar un vino de alta calidad de nivel mundial y crear –en memoria de su padre– Viñedos Don Leo, que inició operaciones en el año 2000 con su primera hectárea cosechada de varietales de uva Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot y Chardonnay, que poco a poco iría creciendo por la excelente calidad de sus uvas.

Viñedos Don Leo se coloca dentro de los 11 viñedos más extremos del mundo, nombrados por VinePair. Localizado en el Valle del Tunal, municipio del Pueblo Mágico de Parras Coahuila, con una altura de 2,100 MSNM, rodeado por majestuosas montañas, este privilegio nos da más horas de frío durante la época de maduración aportando mayor concentración aromática y definición de gustos varietales de nuestras uvas.

Name: Colombin Spa
Description:
Selezioniamo e lavoriamo i migliori sugheri naturali dal 1894, per realizzare i migliori tappi che proteggeranno i grandi vini.
Il lavoro dell'azienda si espande dalle piantagioni del Marocco, della Spagna, del Portogallo fino ai rami della sua struttura tecnico-commerciale intercontinentale: Colombin & Figlio Spa in Italia, Colombin Deutschland Gmbh in Germania, Colombin Yantai Cork&Co Ltd in Cina, Colombin Australia Pty Ltd in Australia e Etrur Maroc Sarl in Marocco. 

Lo staff interno è costantemente impegnato nella ricerca di nuovi processi e nuove tecnologie applicabili alla selezione e lavorazione del sughero naturale.

La Colombin attraverso i suoi Laboratori di Ricerca e Sviluppo, composti dai suoi tecnici altamente formati e le proprie apparecchiature d’avanguardia, effettua ogni tipo di analisi su sughero, vino e prodotti chimici.

Ogni anno vengono effettuati circa 50.000 controlli, per un totale di oltre un milione di tappi analizzati.

Name: Hermansson & Co - Goda drycker är ingen tillfällighet
Description: Hermansson & Co is an industry-leading marketing and sales-driven wine and spirit importer on the Swedish market. Together with our suppliers we launch attractive products through innovative marketing and sales strategies. Our way of creating mutual business success with our partners has led to a meritorious number of strong brands, both at Systembolaget and in the Horeca. Because of our profound experience of the wine and spirit industry, paired with our visionary business approach, it is in our DNA to create long-lasting relationships and to apply responsible approaches from start to finish.

Name: Seapower Trading Co., Ltd.
Description:
Established in 1997, SEAPOWER is the market leader and a renowned professional distributor of Spirits, Wine, Beer and Beverages in Macau SAR, China.   SEAPOWER has exclusive distribution rights in Macau 
for a wide range of major brands from the world’s largest brand owners, and it currently represents two of 
the world's top five spirits companies including global leader and multiple brand owners - Pernod Ricard China. SEAPOWER also distributes the best-in class-wines from all major wine regions of the worlds and
a wide range of renowned beer brands from all over the world.
 
With  a  team  of 80  plus  professionals  led  by  a  veteran  management  team  with  regional  and  global experiences, SEAPOWER has a wide customer base of Hotel/Casino, On-trade, Off-trade & Private clients spread throughout Macau. 

Besides being a world-class distributor of major brands and labels, SEAPOWER is also a brand company appointed by Pernod Ricard China (PRC)  and  we  are  actively  engage  in  close cooperation with PRC in building key brands  with  mid  to  long term strategic of enhancing brand recognition and extending market penetration  to  support  our  core  distribution  business.   SEAPOWER   owns  and run most of our facilities including 10,000 square feet of integrated office space and  70,000  square  feet  of  warehouses  including 20,000 square feet with temperature and humidity control capabilities.  We also own and run a fleet of more than 10 delivery vehicles. SEAPOWER  pride itself for its efficiency and partnership-like relationship with our brand owners, principals, agencies, vendors and our valued customers.

For more information about SEAPOWER  and our product portfolio,  refer to our website at www.seapower.mo

Name: Oro de Castilla
Description: Somos una bodega impulsada por la pasión, la creatividad y la irreverencia. Cada rincón de nuestras instalaciones respira arte, cultura y esa chispa rebelde que define nuestra forma de entender el vino

Name: Les Papilleuses
Description: Entreprise locale et engagée, installée en Languedoc-Roussillon. Elle propose une sélection goûteuse, saisonnière, et éco-responsable sur les marchés et sur les ateliers dégustation chez votre restaurateur et/ou à domicile.

Name: Bodegas Pedroheras
Description: Bodegas Pedroheras is a winery based out of Las Pedroñeras, Spain.

Name: TERRARHONA
Description:

Nos formations de courte durée sont diverses mais toutes centrées sur le marché du vin et des spiritueux, en français mais également en anglais.
Formation certifiante “anglais viticole”
Formation certifiante WSET niveaux 1, 2 et 3
Divers formations auprés des professionnels de la restauration, de la vente de vin et spiritueux et du tourisme

Name: Envie de champagne
Description:
En 2004 germe l'idée de créer le premier site internet spécialisé dans la vente de champagne. Enviedechamp.com est né de cette envie de vous proposer tous les champagnes de grandes Maisons reconnues mais aussi des champagnes de vigneron de très grande qualité. Aujourd'hui, notre petite entreprise familiale est devenue le leader de la vente en ligne de champagne. 
Avec plus de 1200 références disponibles, nous disposons du plus gros choix de champagnes à la vente en ligne.

Enviedechamp.com, en résumé c'est :

- Le site référence pour acheter du champagne en ligne depuis 2004
- Le plus gros choix du web
- Une entreprise familiale passionnée de champagne. Nous avons à cœur de vous conseiller, de vous guider.
- Une grande réactivité pour l'expédition de vos colis : sous 24 heures pour des livraisons en France et en Europe
- Spécialiste d'envoi de cadeaux d'affaires, enviedechamp répond à vos besoins : multi-envois en France et en Europe, personnalisations, mot d'accompagnement... Tout est possible.
- Une grande réactivité du SAV pour résoudre vos problèmes ou répondre à vos questions. Pas de réponses stéréotypées de plateformes à l'autre bout du monde...Nous sommes disponibles par téléphone, mail, tchat...
- Un paiement sécurisé avec la possibilité de payer par carte bancaire, (VISA, AMEX, MASTERCARD...), chèque, Virement et Paypal.

Des garanties ? Bien sûr, tous nos envois sont assurés pour leur valeur réelle et sont remis contre signature au destinataire.

Name: VINIDEAs
Description: A Vinideas Desenvolvimento Enológico, Lda. empresa líder em formação de quadros médios e superiores no setor vitivinícola em Portugal é sócia da rede internacional VinideaNet, sendo responsável pela revista técnica Infowine na língua portuguesa. A VINIDEAs organiza, promove e divulga a transferência de conhecimento entre os vários “stakeholders” da fileira, num processo dinâmico que leva os protagonistas do conhecimento numa viagem à realidade da indústria, e divulga o saber dos primeiros por todos os produtores e técnicos que continuamente procuram atingir a perfeição dos seus vinhos e otimizar os seus processos, num contexto de valorização económica, cultural, social e ambiental.

Name: Pagos Del Rey S.L.
Description: Pagos del Rey is a winery company that produces craft beers, red, young, oak, crianza, reserva, and gran reserva wines.

Name: ITALY AND WINE
Description: Italy And Wine specializes in wine tours. For the curious type wanting to know a bit of viticulture and the wine making process, or the novice wanting to learn how to taste and appreciate quality wines, I will provide a tour which will be entertaining, informative and fun.

Name: Activin
Description:
30 ans d’importation privée!

Importations Activin a été fondée en 1994 par Robert Labelle, l’actuel Chef de la Direction. De 1974 à 1987 il a occupé les fonctions d’analyste et de directeur du Service de la Sélection des Vins à la SAQ. Il a par la suite co-écrit 3 livres sur les vins et fromages avec Jules Roiseux et André Piché. Depuis, il dirige et est propriétaire d’agences de vins.

La création d’Importations Activin en 1994 fait de lui l’un des pionniers de l’ère moderne dans l’art de faire de l’importation privée de vins sur le Québec.

Activin est aussi une entreprise familiale. La nomination de Jean-François Labelle (fils de Robert Labelle) au poste de Président de l’agence de vins Activin depuis le 12 janvier 2021. Riche d’une solide expérience dans le monde du vin depuis 2007, et vice-président de la société depuis 2017, Jean-François a pour mission de maintenir un haut niveau de service à notre distinguée clientèle de la restauration, de l’hôtellerie et des particuliers, et de leur offrir une sélection de vins issue des meilleurs producteurs de la planète.

Fondateur Romain Traste / Œnologue 
De la vigne au management de votre Domaine

Divin Paradis
Description: Agence de Vins et Spiritueux

Name: NONÈvino
Description:
NONÈvino is a boutique service company that offers Italian wine sourcing to retail partners worldwide.

We operate in North America, Europe and Asia, delivering our services to retail and foodservice chains as well as to importers and distributors.

Our fully scalable service portfolio spans from selecting a single wine up to planning and running a full wine project, listing multiple wines varietals originating from different areas.

We offer to our clients not just the sourcing of wine but also the benefit of vetted relationships with industry experts who assist and excel in the proper transportation of wine, regulatory compliance and marketing services.

The suppliers are carefully selected based on their proven professionalism and the certified quality of their products, process and procedures.

We currently source the wine from all the major wine producing areas of Italy.

Our tailored IT system grants seamless and clear communications between producer and retailer providing benefits for both sides of the partnership and fortifying the relationship for long-term development.

Our main regional offices are located in New York, Florence and Tokyo.

Our network of local offices and wine growing regions are constantly expanding.

Name: Tenuta Riccardi - ORODELPO
Description:
L’attuale azienda viene fondata nel 1906 da Ernesto Riccardi il quale, dopo l’esperienza maturata insieme agli altri fratelli, decide di creare una propria azienda agricola nei pressi del borgo medievale di Soriasco.
I primi vini vengono prodotti nel 1912, destinati sia al mercato locale che al mercato milanese e torinese.
Nel 2009 nasce la linea ORODELPO ,vini di qualità destinati esclusivamente al privato.
Con la vendemmia 2013 è entrato in produzione il Cabernet IGT SENZA SOLFITI AGGIUNTI.

Name: Angel's Share
Description: Angel Share specializes in the design, packaging, and distribution of exclusive single malt scotch whisky NFTs to clients throughout the world. Through collaboration and partnerships with our collectors' community, together we are building Nifty Whisky Club.

Name: Wawelskie Alkohole
Description:
Marka „Wawelskie Alkohole” jest lokalną, Krakowską firmą. Wywodzi się z „Miasta Królów Polski” i działa w jego obrębie oraz coraz dalszych okolicach. Czerpiemy z bogatej historii Wawelskiego Wzgórza, u podnóża którego, zamieszkiwał niegdyś groźny smok. Legenda głosi, że biedny smok, którego męczyło ogromne pragnienie z powodu pożarcia owieczki wypchanej siarką, żyłby do dzisiaj, gdyby swoje pragnienie gasił nie wodą z rzeki Wisły, a Piwem Wawelskim. 
Prowadzimy sprzedaż piwa regionalnego, tworzonego zgodnie z zachowaniem tradycyjnych receptur. Jednak zgodnie ze światowym trendem rozwijamy naszą ofertę również o piwa nowszych typów, dzięki czemu pozwalamy naszym klientom odkrywać nowe, niezwykłe smaki. 
Jest to rodzinna marka, działająca na rynku od 8 lat i swoimi produktami nieustannie zachwyca restauratorów oraz ich gości. Lokalny obszar działania pozwala na oferowanie wysokiej jakości produktów, nie uznając przy tym kompromisów.  Z tygodnia na tydzień zjednujemy sobie nowych klientów, zdobywamy ich zaufanie i pokazujemy, że małe jest wielkie. Nasze produkty nie ustępują „większym graczom”- one ich deklasują.

Name: Misha's Vineyard Wines
Description: Misha's Vineyard, named as one of "New Zealand's Top 20 Producers" by Decanter Magazine, (UK)  is located on a spectacular site on the edge of Lake Dunstan in Central Otago - the Pinot Noir capital of New Zealand. The sun-drenched north-west facing terraces of the 57-hectare (140 acre) estate provide the optimal conditions for producing world-class Pinot Noir and a range of aromatic white varieties. Misha's Vineyard's wines are crafted by renowned winemaker, Olly Masters who built his reputation previously with Ata Rangi and who won the IWSC Pinot Trophy on 3 occasions. Owners, Andy and Misha Wilkinson have a 'no compromise' philosophy which requires an exacting sustainable viticulture regime, hand-picking and considerate winemaking methodologies.

Name: Gandolini
Description:
GANDOLINI Las3Marías Cabernet Sauvignon

Name: Classic Beverage Company
Description: Classic Beverage Company offers natural wines, organic wines without sulfites, and organically grown wines. They provide biodynamic wine and vegan wine. They also offer cherry wine gums, raspberry fruit chews, and parma violet candies.

Name: Vinette Wine
Description:
OUR STORY

In African mythology, elephants symbolise social connection and harmony. In the same way, our Vinette wines bring people together to enjoy life and special occasions.
The Vinette elephant is inspired by the story of Benny the Elephant, a male bull resident of the Elephants Sands lodge and campsite in Botswana. Benny took it upon himself to reach out to helping human hands to assist him source water and heal a bad foot wound during a critical period of drought.
Benny the elephant represents the indomitable and powerful spirit of Africa and it’s people – the doers, champions and innovators. Those that love laughter, and love life!
Elephants are also known to have distinctive personalities and are extremely playful animals. They have incredible memories and take care of their own. Vinette celebrates this characteristic sense of individualism (such as Benny’s unique spirit) that combines seamlessly with sociability, loyalty and fun. We represent a spirit of revelling in life, and of making and treasuring memories with friends and family.

Name: Pagne
Description:
At Pagne we are dedicated to brining you the hidden gems from the Champagne region at affordable prices. We have selected 12 top quality Champagnes, ranging from Bruts for every moment of the day to 11-year old Millesimes for that special occasion.

All Champagnes are available via our website (www.pagne.nu). Tasting events and our pop-up store at Doppio Espresso Zuidas have been temporarily suspended, but feel free to contact us for more information or tasting options (COVID-proof available).

We are always there to help you find your perfect Champagne!

Name: ORO Whisky Bar
Description: ORO Whisky Bar is the first place of its kind in Italy, the accomplishment of its passionate founders, proud of a long experience in the whisky industry. The ORO Whisky Bar project consolidates a physical and virtual community created over time. It brings together the customers of Whisky & Co, a Fine Spirits boutique in the heart of Rome and the audience of the Roma Whisky Festival which, in nine editions, saw over 40,000 visitors attend the show. ORO Whisky Bar offers to all whisky lovers a space to share and grow their passion with more than 500 references of whiskies and several proposal of signature whisky cocktails.

Name: Guangzhou Zhujiang Brewery Co., Ltd
Description: Guangzhou Zhujiang Brewery is a wine and spirits company based out of Guangzhou, GNG, China.

From artisan and rare wines to famous Grand Crus.
800 references, 78 exclusive wineries, 150 appellations.

Founded in 2004, we are proud to be one of South East Asia’s leading online fine wines and spirits stores.
We specialize in boutique and hard to find wines that are highly acclaimed and often produced in small quantities.

Our team of professionals is dedicated to providing the best advice on wine selection, wine events and customized wine offers.

Our sister company, Alfa International supplies the HORECA industry in Singapore, Jakarta and Bali with the finest sommelier selection of fine wines from France, Italy, Spain, Austria, New Zealand and Australia.


Mission
At ewineasia.com we are confident that at the click of a button we can help you find and deliver the best quality wines, spirits or gifts for any occasion.

We invite you to visit our online store at www.ewineasia.com and to sign up for our free monthly newsletter featuring upcoming new arrivals, fantastic deals and monthly events.

Name: MORCHEULI Wines&Spirits
Description:
The founders of the winery are united by the love for Georgia,
Georgian heritage and the passion for Georgian wine. Together
they established a wine company that has a winery and
vineyards and partnered with some of the best winemakers
of Georgia. Using both European and Georgian traditional
Qvevri methods, their ambition is to offer the finest wines –
“the wine without compromise” – to the consumers in Georgia
and abroad.
The main production facility is located in Bolnisi district of Kartli
region. Here in 1818 German colonist families from Swabia
founded the Katharinenfeld colony and established vineyards
and wineries because of the unique terrains and climate
of Bolnisi area. We believe that today Bolnisi wines are
underrepresented, and we are committed to promoting local
specialties together with well-established Kakhetian and
Imeretian wine varieties.

Name: Pro Brew Supply
Description: Pro Brew Supply for the brewing industry, a wide range of products from malt, hops, yeast as well as chemicals and hardware.

Name: Weingut Reichsrat von Buhl GmbH
Description: Since its foundation in 1849, the Reichsrat von Buhl winery has been one of the most renowned wineries in Germany and stands for a terroir-driven, timeless style that reflects the origin of the grapes from the best vineyards in Deidesheim and Forst. Reichsrat von Buhl sees its unique portfolio of the best vineyards in the Mittelhaardt region as an obligation to press the best wines and sparkling wines from each vineyard. This can only be achieved in harmony with nature: as an ambassador of natural viticulture, the winery combines the experience of 175 years of viticulture with contemporary knowledge of ecology and sustainability. The aim is to make the origin of the grapes, the 'terroir' as an expression of soil, climate, plants, culture, tradition and craftsmanship, tangible in our wines and sparkling wines.

Name: INSOLITY
Description:
INSOLITY es un lugar de encuentro entre las más prestigiosas bodegas y todo amante o coleccionista de grandes vinos y destilados.

Queremos abrirle las puertas a la exclusividad, descubrirle nuevos vinos y, sobre todo, que disfrute. Le ofreceremos más que productos: historias, emociones y un patrimonio que podrá convertir en un legado.

Con INSOLITY tendrá la oportunidad única en España de crear una bodega que se revalorizará con el tiempo. 

Le invitamos a conocer nuestro universo, y a seguirnos para no perderse nuestras novedades.

Name: Overmountain Vineyards
Description: Overmountain Vineyards is a boutique winery based out of Tryon, North Carolina focusing on French style dry wines. All wines are produced and bottled on property. We have a unique setting to accommodate creative team building  opportunities and corporate meetings.

Name: Crater Lake Spirits
Description: Bendistillery DBA Crater Lake Spirits is an Award Winning, Small-batch Distillery, operating in Bend, Oregon since 1996.  Proud makers of Crater Lake Spirits and Black Butte Whiskey, we just love living in the mountains and making great spirits.

Name: FlyWithWine
Description:
Fly With Wine is operated by a group of wine enthusiasts who live in Napa. We travel around the world and were inspired by solving the complications involved with transporting wine.

The journey started for me with a trip to Burgundy during the hot summer months a few years back. It was there that I discovered a jewel of a winery outside of Beaune producing some amazing wines that I wanted to bring back home to my cellar. The only option the winery had was to direct me to a Mail Box Etc. in a nearby town and risk shipping the wine back to the U.S. illegally in unknown transit conditions during summer. Or, I could pack the wine myself in cheap Styrofoam shippers and put it in the cargo of my plane back home and risk the wrath of overworked baggage handlers at multiple airports along the way.

There had to be a better way to buy, bring home, and enjoy my wines, or so I thought. And now there is. It’s called the VinGarde Valise, and it’s the finest and most versatile wine luggage in the world. So now you can Fly With Wine safely and securely and bring your wine with you wherever you travel.

For interest in corporate gifts, please visit:
https://www.flywithwine.com/pages/corporate-gifts

For interest in the partner program, please visit:
https://trade.flywithwine.com/pages/partner-program

Name: Compoveda Tequila
Description: Compoveda puts flavor first, creating tequilas that elevate any experience- just by sharing a glass. From poolside cocktail hour to fine dining, only Compoveda crafts each expression to be sipped neat or crafted into your favorite cocktail. With Compoveda, every occasion is a Tequila occasion.

Name: The Champagne and Gift Company | Branded Champagne | Fine Wines | Luxury Business Gifting
Description:
A specialist importer of Champagne we pride ourselves on the quality and smoothness of our Champagnes. Creating branded bottles for many large organisations - we create exceptionally crafted gifts with your own private label on the bottle. There is nothing more personal than a gift that has been personalised.  

Our luxury and beautiful bespoke personalised Champagne themed gifts are for both the corporate and the retail world and we wish for all our bottles to arrive looking smart and luxurious but most of all a pleasure to receive!

Our service is designed to help you make a strong impression and reinforce the quality of your company brand. Whatever you have planned our in-house corporate design team is here to offer our vision and expertise to create the perfect corporate Champagne gift for your clients and colleagues.

Our luxury Champagne for corporate gifts and corporate entertaining can be branded with your company name and logo on the label. Our promotional Champagne is ideal for events or handed out as thank you presents to staff and clients. It is an effective way to get your message across and get noticed. Personalised miniature Prosecco, Champagne & Wine are perfect for virtual events.

We have a range of Champagnes as well as Proseccos and fine wines, in a variety of sizes to suit all occasions and budgets. Select from a variety of luxury Champagnes plus a selection of vintages in a range of sizes from mini Champagne to Jeroboams.  Of course, not forgetting optional gift wrap and decoration service, which adds the perfect finish to your Champagne gift. All our orders are individually hand-prepared, so you can be sure your Champagne gift will be a delight to receive.

PA's

If you are a busy PA looking for Executive Champagne gifts for your boss for clients, then our bespoke corporate service may just be what you are looking for -  corporate gifts, client gifts, B2B relationships, customer gifts, end of year awards, employee awards, and employee gifts

Name: Vision 20/30
Description:
Vision 2030 rappresenta il primo progetto per la definizione di una strategia di sviluppo del sistema vitivinicolo italiano, frutto dell’analisi e dell’esperienza diretta, sul campo, di imprenditori e manager delle imprese del vino del nostro Paese.

Un progetto che nasce direttamente dalla filiera vitivinicola e distributiva con il preciso obiettivo di fare emergere le istanze concrete del settore e di riuscire, di conseguenza, a dare risposte il più possibile coerenti ai reali fabbisogni delle imprese del vino italiano e in linea alle dinamiche dei mercati e del rapporto con il consumatore.

Per tale ragione sono stati costituiti sei diversi gruppi di lavoro allo scopo di analizzare (attraverso il contributo tecnico-scientifico di Nomisma Wine Monitor) i sei principali scenari che caratterizzano il settore vitienologico italiano e più precisamente:
1. Equilibrio tra domanda e offerta (gestione del potenziale produttivo),
sostenibilità e innovazione
2. Identità e posizionamento
3. Comunicazione
4. Enoturismo
5. Sviluppo strategico struttura industria vinicola e M&A.
6. Formazione e competenze delle risorse umane

A queste sei tematiche sono state aggiunte due appendici dedicate a due fattori strategici per il comparto vitivinicolo italiano: la sostenibilità e la digitalizzazione.
Si tratta di due temi che sono emersi in maniera trasversale nei lavori delle sei
commissioni a cui si è ritenuto opportuno dedicare due capitoli specifici.

Name: Black Stallion Winery
Description: Black Stallion Estate Winery is a wine manufacturing company located in Napa Valley, California. They produce a variety of wines including Cabernet Sauvignon, Heritage, Limited Release, Prestige Collection, Collector Edition, and Library Selection. The winery is inspired by the historical equestrian center that once thrived on the property, and it honors the world-class terroir of Napa Valley. Black Stallion Estate Winery offers wine tastings, wine and culinary experiences, large group experiences, winery events, and a wine club with membership options and benefits.

Name: Thambapanni Distilleries PVT LTD
Description: A pioneering venture, set up to produce high quality Liqour for the first time in Ceylon's history. Thambapanni Distilleries remains as an organic liquor manifacturing business, maintaining its position as one of the most advanced distilleries in the country.
Location: Kandy Road , Kiribathgoda , Colombo, Western Province

Name: Importation Navino inc.
Description:
Navino est une jeune entreprise québécoise qui importe et distribue des vins Sans Alcool dans plus de 700 points de vente au Québec. Fondé en Janvier 2016, par Nathalie Favreau, l'entreprise à été créée pour offrir une alternative de qualité à tous les gens qui ne consomment pas d'alcool. Navino propose une gamme complète de vins sans Alcool provenant de la France et du Chili.
Les gens consomment moins d'alcool qu'auparavant, soit pour des raisons de santé, en raison de la prise de médicament ( cancer, troubles de santé mentale ou diabètes ) pour aussi répondre à la nouvelle tendance des Sober Party, des Healthy living, pour des motifs religieux ou pour ne pas être feeling à l'heure du lunch ou en après midi....Les gens qui ne peuvent pas ou ne veulent pas boire de l'alcool sont souvent oubliés et doivent se rabattre sur de l'eau,le jus, les boissons gazeuses ou l'eau pétillante.....Pas très Festif !
Notre gamme complète de vins sans alcool est disponible dans la plupart des grandes chaines d'alimentation ainsi que dans les épiceries biologiques et indépendantes du Québec.

Navino distribue également dans le domaine de la Restauration et de l'Hôtellerie.
Les établissements dotés d'un programme de sans alcool complet demeurent malheureusement peu nombreux. Pourtant la demande des boissons sans alcool est grandissante

Name: PH-CH
Description: Fondées respectivement en 1785 et 1851, les Maisons Piper-Heidsieck et Charles Heidsieck font partie des plus anciennes Maisons de la Champagne. Localisées intégralement dans leur terroir, à Reims, elles ont rejoint depuis 2011 le groupe de luxe EPI pour cultiver de nouvelles ambitions.

Name: Mount Pleasant Wines
Description:
Founded in 1921 by legendary Maurice O’Shea: recognised for setting the standard for modern Australian winemaking. O’Shea’s “fanatical perfectionism” saw him create Mount Pleasant’s signature style of elegance, balance and exceptional longevity.
For 100 years, Mount Pleasant has produced iconic, elegant and expressive wines championing the fruit and individual character of our four vineyard sites. Our rare ancestral vines include some of the oldest clone plantings in the country. This makes our Old Hill vineyard, while best known for Shiraz, the oldest Pinot Noir vineyard in Australia.

Name: Carabal Viñedos y Bodega
Description:
Carabal Viñedos y Bodega se encuentra en el municipio de Alía, pequeño pueblo del sureste de la provincia de Cáceres, .ubicado dentro de la comarca de Las Villuercas, cuya capital es Guadalupe.

El proyecto de Carabal Viñedos y Bodega, nace como un reto. Un reto que trata de recuperar la actividad vitivinícola que se había llevado a cabo en la finca décadas atrás, creando un proyecto moderno e innovador para elaborar vinos de alta calidad bajo unas condiciones extremas.

Vinos con un perfil moderno, que expresan características propias, y donde prevalecen los caracteres frutales sobre los de la madera de su crianza. Vinos muy diferenciados entre sí, que evolucionan reforzando su espíritu innovador y su gran personalidad.

Name: Heringer Estates Family Vineyards & Winery
Description:
At Heringer Estates, the grapes guide us in the creation of our wine. Each bottle is crafted with care, with the intent of giving full expression to the flavor of the grape. We believe that the individuality of the grape creates the uniqueness of the wine. With that premise in mind, we nourish our land and nurture our vineyards to produce an excellent wine grape, rich with flavor, reflecting the character of the Clarksburg appellation and region.

Our vineyards thrive in the fertile soils of the Sacramento River Delta. The warm days and cool nights of summer in Clarksburg are ideal for growing wine grapes. Our family put down roots in the delta long ago—winemaker Mike Heringer and vineyard manager Stephen Heringer are the sixth generation to farm in the region. They work in concert with their father Steve Heringer, mother Donna Heringer and sister Stacy Heringer-McElfish. The family honors its agricultural legacy while embracing the excitement of today and the promise of the future.

Heringer Estates wines are created for you. Our hope is that our wines enrich your celebrations with friends and family; that they enhance your meals, get-togethers and quiet times. If Heringer Estates brings a bit more happiness to your lives, then that brings joy to ours.

Name: Vinos Cándido
Description:
Bajo la razón social de Multinivel Iberica S.L., en Vinos Cándido llevamos cerca de seis décadas trabajando en el mundo del vino. Tras más de cuarenta años de dedicación a la intermediación comercial de vinos de Cándido Martínez Escribano, son más de una década la que dos de sus hijos, Ventura y Cándido Martínez, llevamos dedicándonos a la prestación de servicios a bodegas. Ampliando continuamente nuestra gama de servicios y equipos e incorporando las últimas técnicas y equipamiento en cada uno de los procesos del vino.

Contamos con más de 200 clientes en toda España y Portugal, entre los que se encuentran las más prestigiosas bodegas en Denominaciones de Origen de renombre internacional constituyendo uno de nuestros principales motivos de satisfacción.

Nuestro objetivo es colaborar con los enólogos para mejorar sus procesos productivos a nivel cualitativo, proporcionar a las bodegas significativos ahorros en inversión y mantenimiento de equipos, así como de los medios para ello.

Nuestra filosofía de ofrecer un coste fijo por litro de vino tratado proporciona la seguridad empresarial de un control más certero de los costes de producción.

Actualmente estamos presentes en las principales zonas vitivinícolas de España y Portugal, encantados de asesorarle y proporcionarle cualquiera de nuestros servicios para ayudar a su bodega a ganar tiempo y mejorar productividad en sus procesos.

Name: Seadrift Distillery
Description: Seadrift Distillery is Australia's first non-alcoholic distillery. We are dedicated to creating a choice for people to step back from alcohol for one round, one day, one month or a lifetime. We produce botanical spirits distilled from fresh land and sea botanicals, using traditional copper pot stills to create handcrafted small-batch run spirits.

Name: Champagne Étienne OUDART
Description:
Situé sur les Coteaux Sud d’Épernay, Brugny est le lieu de naissance du Domaine Étienne Oudart depuis 1958.

De père en fils, la famille Oudart a toujours été passionnée par les vins et pour ces vignerons du terroir, tout est une question de qualité. Ils cultivent de vieilles vignes aux racines profondes afin d’obtenir l’essence même du terroir dans leurs raisins.

Pour Jacques, 2ème génération sur le Domaine, l’essentiel est de laisser du temps aux vignes et à leurs fruits pour atteindre un équilibre optimal, riche en sucre et en arômes. C’est également dans ce but qu’il a choisi une viticulture durable, travail récompensé en 2018 par l’obtention des certifications « Haute Valeur Environnementale » et « Viticulture Durable en Champagne ».

Le Domaine développe également la diversité ; diversité des expositions, des sols, des cépages, des localisations, afin d’obtenir des vins très expressifs. Dans les caves, un vieillissement prolongé (au minimum 5 années) permet aux vins d’exprimer un caractère d’équilibre entre fraîcheur et maturité.

Name: Les Coteaux du Montguichet
Description:
Présentation du domaine :
Domaine viticole de 6 hectares de vigne à vocation Péri-urbaine certifié en culture biologique
Situé à Chelles en Seine et Marne à seulement 30 minutes de la capitale, nos vignes sont implantées sur un ancien terroir historique de la région avec de très jolis coteaux parfaitement exposés où la présence de la vigne est attestée jusqu'au 19eme siècle.
Domaine viticole Péri Urbain a vocation multiple :
> Production de vin d'Ile de France de qualité, artisanaux, authentiques et originaux.
> Démarche environnement/biodiversité/expérimentations assumée avec la mise en place d'un important projet de viti-foresterie et vignes mariées.
> Distribution en circuit court sur la région francilienne : ventes au domaine et auprès des particuliers, cavistes, bar à vin et restaurants.
> Accueil du public et visite du domaine
> Réception d'entreprises pour événements et séminaires en pleine nature.
> Le Club Montguichet : club des entreprises voué à développer la politique RSE des entreprises au travers d'événements internes fédérateurs et conviviaux.

Name: TENUTA BORGO CONVENTI
Description:
Fondata nel 1975 a Farra d’Isonzo, in provincia di Gorizia, Borgo Conventi deve il suo nome ai numerosi conventi che si trovavano nella zona fin dai tempi antichissimi.

Da subito, Borgo Conventi, con vigneti nelle zone più vocate e una cantina dotata delle più moderne attrezzature, si è collocata fra le aziende vinicole più prestigiose del Friuli, regione famosa per i suoi vini bianchi minerali e dalla spiccata carica aromatica.

Oggi, con i suoi oltre 40 ettari vitati, Borgo Conventi produce vini bianchi e rossi sotto le denominazioni Collio e Isonzo, sia da uve autoctone, come Friulano, Ribolla Gialla, Refosco dal Peduncolo Rosso, che dai principali vitigni internazionali come Sauvignon, Pinot Grigio, Chardonnay e Merlot, che qui hanno trovato espressioni originali e di grande seduzione.

2 vini Cru, inoltre, ottenuti da singoli vigneti posizionati in zone di particolare prestigio, nascono con la finalità di esplorare al massimo le grandi potenzialità del Collio.

Borgo Conventi, Collio, Isonzo. Un trinomio inscindibile fatto di qualità, tradizione e passione

Name: Enoteca Clube de Vinhos
Description:
A Enoteca foi criada a a 22 de Maio de 1984 sendo a sua missão a apresentação de vinhos seleccionados a todos os seus Sócios e Clientes (“não sócios”) e posterior entrega, na morada indicada, dos vinhos escolhidos.

Na Enoteca existe uma equipa profissional de enólogos que em provas cegas decide quais os vinhos que têm qualidade e preço para serem apresentados aos seus Sócios e Clientes.

A Enoteca conta com uma equipa profissional equipada com os conhecimentos necessários para desenvolver todo o processo administrativo e logístico, desde a encomenda à entrega, para além de um serviço exemplar de apoio aos seus Sócios e Clientes.

A Enoteca promove também acções de formação e convívio entre os seus Sócios (cursos, provas, visitas e jantares vínicos).

A Enoteca presta ainda todas as informações relevantes sobre os vinhos que apresenta e sobre o mundo dos vinhos em geral.

São 30 Anos de experiência a aconselhar todos aqueles que vêm no vinho mais do que um simples produto de consumo diário, aqueles para quem o vinho é prazer, história e cultura.

Name: Winefield's Auctioneers Europe B.V.
Description: Winefield’s Auctioneers is established in 2006 by Milan Veld and Martin Derksen. Winefield’s Auctioneers has combined all the aspects of the wine market into one company which attracts international business and private buyers and consigners. Winefield's Auctioneers conducts at least 8 LIVE wine auctions yearly. Most of the European auctions are held at our premises in Amsterdam, but Winefield’s Auctioneers also organises LIVE wine auctions in Singapore and on other locations.

Name: Quigley Fine Wines
Description: Quigley Fine Wines Imports high quality, small production wines from family owned and sustainable wineries throughout Europe. It is our mission to bridge the gap between the winemaker and the wine drinker - to keep the stories behind the wine alive until the cork is popped and the wine can speak for itself...

Name: 14 Inkas vodka
Description:
14 Inkas were the rulers of the largest empire of the Andean mountains. I Peru, more than 3,000 meters above sea level, they used the science, magic and mysticism of their ancestors to cultivate such rugged terrain.
Pachamama - Mother Earth - accepted their offerings and, with love, brought forth the native potatoes at the heart of this exceptional artisan spirit: 14 Inkas, our tribute to the Sons of the Sun. 
#RecuerdaElOrigen

Name: Jiangsu Yanghe Brewery Joint-Stock Co., Ltd.
Description: Jiangsu Yanghe Brewery is a wine and spirits company based out of SUQIAN, JS | Jiangsu, China.

Name: BANISIO
Description: BANISIO was born with the aim of selecting the best wines for the consumer at the best price you can find. For years we have toured Spain, exploring its vineyards, discovering its strains and tasting in its wineries. Falling in love with its rich wine culture and thrilling with its food. Now we bring to the world the expression and taste of this incredible country. We have chosen the best wines from the three most recognized Denominations in Spain (Rioja and Ribera del Duero, for reds; and Rueda for whites). In them we make wines full of character and freshness, versatile and delicious.

Name: Rifters
Description:
A Rifter is a forager or a fossicker from the early gold mining era; they explored the rifts around the hills of Arrowtown, searching for that elusive nugget. At the end of a long day, a refreshing gin was always welcomed.

ABOUT RIFTERS
Rifters is a small batch boutique gin. Handcrafted in New Zealand using flavourful botanicals and pure New Zealand artesian water. Housed in the Central Otago countryside. Made to be enjoyed in good company.

OUR LAND
The mountains, lakes and rivers that surround us have captured our imagination for years. They provide the purest ingredients used to make our gin. They also provide a place for us, locals and visitors to explore, discover and play.

OUR PEOPLE
Rifters was started by a couple of kiwi builders who are pretty fond of gin. One day in the workshop, they decided they might have a nudge at creating their own. A couple of years later and a whole lot of trial, they figured things out.

Name: Cantina La Canosa
Description:
La Canosa Agricola S.r.l. è un azienda vitivinicola che prende il nome da Poggio Canoso, uno dei quattro castelli del comune di Rotella.

La Canosa nasce da un bellissimo progetto di Riccardo Reina, giovane imprenditore del settore Beverage, volto alla riscoperta e valorizzazione del territorio piceno, la cui eccellenza vitivinicola è stata per troppo tempo sottovalutata. Creata nel 2005 dal recupero di un antico casale, la tenuta si trova in uno scenario senza tempo, abbarbicata sulle colline di Rotella a 400-500 mt s.l.m, circondata dall’incantevole paesaggio naturalistico del Parco Nazionale dei Monti Sibillini e non lontano dal mare Adriatico. Posizione, clima e conformazione morfologica fanno di questa zona il terreno ideale per la coltivazione dei secolari vitigni autoctoni del sud delle Marche: Pecorino, Passerina, Montepulciano e Sangiovese.

Name: DrawYourBeer
Description:
DrawYourBeer propose aux particuliers comme aux professionnels une personnalisation de bouteilles, verrerie et accessoires.

Depuis sa création en 2017, nous continuons à favoriser la production locale et artisanale de nos bières expressives.

Depuis 2021, nous proposons la personnalisation de vins et champagnes avec l'activité DrawYourWine.

Name: Liquid Alembic
Description: Alembic – Liquid Education Experience is a creative drinks agency that operates in three specific channels.

Name: Organika Vodka
Description:
Organic Vodka from Poland
#organikavodka
⠀
 Help Amur Tigers with us
⠀
Must be 21+ to follow.

Name: Pizzini Wines
Description: Every wine tells a story, and for us, those stories are often of our family members who inspired the journey from Italy to Victoria’s King Valley, of the special sites and soils we’ve nurtured over the years and the care and attention we’ve bought to telling our Italian heritage, our way.

Name: Bordeaux Provenance
Description:
Five Star Provenance for Fine Wines

Bordeaux Provenance is the first Bordeaux wine merchant to provide infallible ex-chateau provenance, 100% traceability and professional, temperature-controlled storage and transport to ensure that your wine reaches you in optimum condition, wherever you live in the world. 

All wines are sourced exclusively from Bordeaux Winebank, one of the largest holders and managers of “ex chateau” wines and stored in temperate-controlled warehouses in Bordeaux from bottling until shipment. Innovative eProvenance technology ensures that stringent storage conditions are maintained throughout transport.
www.bordeauxprovenance.com

Name: Enbotella
Description:
Empresa española de venta de vinos y espirituosos online. 

Repartimos felicidad embotellada

Nuestro objetivo es recibir más comentarios positivos de personas a las que le amenizamos este año tan... especial y para ello intentamos mejorar cada día. Encontrarás toda la información de los vinos, desde la historia de la bodega hasta los métodos de envejecimiento y elaboración. 

Más novedades próximamente...

Name: Contarini Vini e Spumanti Srl
Description:
Fondiamo con orgoglio le nostre origini a Conegliano, nel cuore delle colline del Prosecco che rappresentano il 55° sito italiano patrimonio dell’Unesco.
La nostra azienda infatti è stata fondata da “il signor Dino” Tombacco nel 1957 e vanta oggi, una struttura di 25.000mq e uno staff di 35 persone. 

Siamo una realtà vinicola che si impegna costantemente a trovare il giusto equilibrio tra passato e futuro, tra tradizione e innovazione tecnologica, per rileggere in chiave moderna dei sapori conosciuti in tutto il mondo che vanno protetti e plasmati interpretando la tendenza mondiale al bere evoluto,  responsabile e di qualità. 


We are proud to be based in Conegliano, in the heart of the Prosecco hills, the 55th Italian site to have been declared UNESCO World Heritage.
Our company was established there in 1957, by “il signor Dino” (“Mr Dino”) Tombacco, and it now boasts a 25,000 sqm facility, employing 35 people.

Our winery constantly strives to find the right balance between past and present, tradition and technological innovation, in order to give this internationally renowned aroma a modern twist. We seek to protect and shape this taste according to the latest trends for a more progressive and responsible, high quality drinking experience.

Name: 666 Pure Tasmanian Vodka
Description:
666 Pure Tasmanian Vodka is Australia's number one premium vodka.
Founded in 2010, the brand counts three products in its portfolio : 666 Pure Tasmanian Vodka, 666 Autumn Butter Vodka and 666 St Ali Coffee Vodka. 
 
Made with the best ingredients from Tasmania : local grown barley and Cape Grim Water,  the quality of this vodka has been acknowledged internationally: 
        - Gold Medal in the Fifty Best Vodkas 2012 blind testing competition 
        - Silver Medal by the Beverage Testing Institute in their International Review of Spirits 2011 and 2012
        - Gold Medal in the San Francisco World Spirits Competition 2010
 
666 Pure Tasmanian Vodka is also committed in the fight against extinction of the Tasmanian Devil by supporting the Save The Tasmanian Devil Appeal.

 
Stay connected :
https://www.facebook.com/666PureVodka
https://twitter.com/666Vodka
http://instagram.com/666vodka
http://www.pinterest.com/666purevodka/

Name: Château Cadeaux
Description:
Château Cadeaux est l’ambassadeur pour le cadeau d’affaires des plus prestigieuses maisons de champagne, vins, gastronomie et chocolats.

Un choix inégalé de coffrets vous est proposé.
Nous pouvons les composer sur mesure selon vos envies et votre budget.

L'équipe Château cadeaux

Name: Rock'n Ball Wines
Description:
Have you ever thought about how much a wine can tell about you?  A journey to discover Italy, its wines, craftsmanship and its culture;  how much this land flows in your veins and how much it can tell about you through its vines.

An opportunity to rediscover one’s origins and share them, through a glass of wine. We will go and look for the native grape variety that best represents you in your region of birth.
The expert team of Rock'n Ball Wines will take care of telling your story, summarizing it in the wine that best represents you and that will have your name.

 • •

Name: Tre Archi Distribuzione
Description:
La TRE ARCHI Vino

TRE ARCHI Vino Team, di proprietà di Luca e Francesco Iaiani, è un’organizzazione che da più di 30 anni opera nel settore del vino, fornendo un servizio di rappresentanza a livello nazionale di molte importanti aziende italiane ed estere, oltre a selezionare ed importare grandi vini di Francia, di Champagne, distillati e vini da tutto il mondo.

TRE ARCHI Vino Team, collocata in un territorio di antica tradizione vinicola prossima alla zona del Ghemme, le Colline Novaresi e il Gattinara, si è saputa adeguare ai cambiamenti che hanno coinvolto la produzione, gli operatori del settore, i ristoratori e gli appassionati del buon bere, sempre più esigenti dal punto di vista della qualità e del servizio.

La TRE ARCHI Vino Team propone il valore di una moderna organizzazione in grado di garantire il meglio in fatto di:

Selezione
Rappresentanza di aziende italiane ed estere
Offerte a prezzi molto competitivi di tutte le referenze, anche per minimi quantitativi
Puntuale servizio di fornitura secondo le esigenze del cliente
Assistenza e consulenza per la creazione di carte vini
Effettuare consegne in tutto il mondo
Con questo nuovo sito la TRE ARCHI Vino Team si prefigge di poter mettere a conoscenza le proprie scelte e selezioni fatte con passione, dedizione, lavoro, e offre a tutti coloro che hanno collaborato, che hanno creduto nelle nostre scelte e nella nostra professionalità il frutto di tanta esperienza raccolta negli anni.

Name: CORTE CANELLA
Description: Un famiglia che ha scelto di volere di più dalla propria terra. Il desiderio di uscire dal coro e creare qualcosa di nuovo, che sappia coinvolgere e stupire. Un vino che possa emozionare e lasciar senza parole.

Name: Social Hour Cocktails
Description:
Social Hour Cocktails was founded by Tom Macy, the former beverage director of the renowned Clover Club in Brooklyn, one of the world’s most highly regarded cocktail bars. The mission behind Social Hour is simple: to create canned cocktails that match or exceed the quality of those crafted from scratch behind the bar.  After multiple years of experimentation, we’re proud to offer the best-tasting canned cocktails on the market. 

Uniquely positioned between canned cocktail convenience and prepared cocktail luxury, each follows an authentic recipe, maintaining the same full proof ABV (10.5%-12%), balanced ingredient ratios, and proper serving size as a handmade cocktail.  The cocktails also include a creative twist that elevates them beyond the typical canned cocktail. The top-selling SKUs are the Yuzu Sunset Fizz and Black Pepper Paloma.

Name: Scarborough Wine Co
Description:
At Scarborough Wine Co. it’s not just about making wine, it’s a way of life. The Hunter Valley is our home and this is where our passion begins, that pushes us to make the best wine we can, to share with you.

Since 1987 we have built a family business from grass roots to become one
of the leading names in quality Hunter Valley wine, specialising in Chardonnay, Semillon and Shiraz, as well as experimenting with new and exciting varieties such as our Offshoot Vermentino and new styles like our Offshoot Red Blend.

Name: Il Palazzone, Montalcino
Description: Il Palazzone is a small boutique winery producing Brunello di Montalcino. Our annual production is between 8.000 and 12.000 bottles of wine. We make a high altitude CRU, Le Due Porte, Extra Virgin Olive Oil and a non-vintage 100% Sangiovese Rosso. Our quality decisions at every turn, in the vineyard throughout the year and in the cellar, mean that our wines are a true expression of each vintage.

Name: Dionis Vins
Description:
Dionis Vins incarne un professionnalisme éthique, responsable, fier d’un patrimoine et d’un savoir-faire souvent séculaires, ancré dans le présent, porteur d’avenir pour le vignoble mondial.  

 Dionis Vins, c’est un esprit qui permet de faire découvrir des vins rares, exceptionnels, des vins en culture biologique ou raisonnée, du monde entier. C’est une philosophie qui réveille des cépages autochtones oubliés, en mettant à l’honneur la passion et la créativité des vignerons récoltants et producteurs.  

Que vous soyez professionnel ou particulier, caviste renommé, sommelier des tables françaises, amateur éclairé ou débutant en matière d’œnologie, Dionis Vins vous invite à des moments de dégustation uniques. 

L’équipe de Dionis partage avec vous des expériences visuelles, olfactives gustatives.

Name: Fattoria di Montemaggio S.r.l
Description:
Montemaggio Estate is an organic winery located in the Tuscan countryside, in Radda in Chianti, in the heart of the Chianti Classico region. Here man and his land live in a harmony that is made of affection and gratitude handed down since forever and renewed at every harvest. In this beautiful land, the owner Valeria and her team respect the rhythms of the countryside, practicing organic agriculture that does not introduce foreign elements in the environment, but uses the eternal and perfect natural cycles to enrich and protect the vineyards and produce very high quality "Terroir" wines. 

Montemaggio mission is to spread the wine culture throughout the world with commitment, love and passion, and offer excellent and authentic organic wine that expresses all the quality of the land from which it is produced. The love and respect Valeria and her team put in the cultivation of the vines is followed by a very accurate selection of the grapes in the vineyard and later again in the vinery. Even in the vinification in cellar, natural processes are followed, the use of barrels is limited in order not to contaminate the taste of the wine with the savor of the wood, and wines are refined in bottles for a long time. It’s a patience-demanding process that gives birth to a product with a very personal taste, an excellent aging potential, as well as healthy and digestible, because it contains no chemical additives. 

At Montemaggio guests and experts are welcome to come and visit the vineyards and Chianti Classico countryside, taste our wines paired with typical Tuscan cuisine, and take part in art and craft classes, workshops and lectures with wine as the main subject. To find out more about Montemaggio, its products and initiatives, please visit the website www.montemaggio.com

Name: BoozCoin
Description: BoozCoin is a utility token; currently in the ICO stages; for the wine and spirits industry. BoozCoin will become part of the ecosystem and operate as a medium of exchange in payment for the wine and spirits market. A sister product being developed is BoozExchange.

Name: Terras de Alter, Lda.
Description:
With the goal of acquainting the world with Portuguese wines, Terras de Alter’s aim is to introduce premium quality Alentejo wine into the international market. Its target markets are mainly Europe and the United States.

Terras de Alter uses grapes produced by its partner companies in the Alter do Chão and Fronteira region, though it also sources grapes from suppliers in the Alto Alentejo according to its specific needs.

It aspires to be a company of family traditions, with quality wines and an international presence, recognised for its excellence and committed to the development of premium Portuguese brands. This is achieved by means of unique positioning in the winegrowing market and a long-term vision, based on the quality and presentation of its wines and the importance of the novelty value of wine brands for the market.

Name: Champagne Christian Muller
Description:
Toutes les belles histoires ont un commencement. La nôtre a débuté il y a plus d’un millénaire grâce à Henry Muller. Depuis, plusieurs générations se sont succédées : hommes courageux, femmes de caractère… tous étaient liés par la passion de la viticulture et par leur attachement au terroir : Mailly-Champagne Grand Cru. 
C’est ainsi que notre savoir s’est transmis à travers le temps. Conscients de la richesse de notre héritage, nous nous efforçons toujours de travailler notre terre et notre production avec autant de courage, de détermination et d’audace que nos aïeux. Rigueur et passion sont pour notre maison, bien plus que des mots : c’est l’ADN de nos cuvées qui rendra vos instants uniques et inoubliables.
Tous nos champagnes sont certifiés HVE (Haute Valeur Environnementale) et VDC (Viticulture Durable en Champagne). 
Ces méthodes consistent à préserver au maximum les milieux naturels, la biodiversité et le caractère des sols dans le but d’une exploitation équilibrée, tout en continuant à vouloir obtenir la meilleure des qualités.

Name: Casa Vinicola Bartali
Description:
Casa Vinicola Bartali s.r.l. - Monteriggioni

Tuscan wines export.
Retail and wholesale markets. Worldwide delivery.
Chianti, Chianti Classico, Brunello di Montalcino, Vernaccia di San Gimignano, Grappa di Brunello, Orvieto, Nobile di Montepulciano, Morellino di Scansano, Bolgheri, IGT Toscana, Montepulciano d'Abruzzo, Vini Italiani.

In 1927, Alberto Bartali and his wife Leda Pucci founded the estate in the heart of the Chianti zone, on the slopes of the hill on which stands the town of Monteriggioni. Under the management of their son Rivo, the estate took on a more important role in the wine market, extending know-how and commitment to a high quality production. The passion and love for the Tuscan land were passed down from Rivo to his children Alberto, Wanda and Maria, and Wanda’s husband Marco, whose joint efforts consolidated and developed the estate.
Today, the family tradition continues with their children Filippo, Linda and Andrea.

P.IVA and C.F. IT00222540528

Name: DISTILLERIE DE FONTAGARD
Description:
DISTILLERIE DE FONTAGARD is a wine and spirits company based out of 1 ROUTE DE LA VOIE ROMAINE, NEUILLAC, France.
Creator of Single Malt Fontagard - www.whisky-fontagard.com

Name: Bordeaux Vins Sélection
Description: Bordaux Vins Sélection is negociant company created in 1999, which distributes the prestigious wines of Bordeaux in various international markets as well as on the domestic French market.

Name: Bebidas Randon
Description: Paixão em fazer bebidas

Name: Soif d'ailleurs S.A.S.
Description:
Fruit de la terre et du labeur des hommes, les vins naissent partout, innombrables, captivants, séduisants, différents, variés, aussi peu connus que les terres et les hommes qui leur donnent vie. Soif d’ailleurs vous invite à leur découverte. Vous les goûterez, nous vous les raconterons.

Au cœur du Marais, nous vous proposons un espace modulable de 100 à 130 m², à 50 m d'un parking public et à deux pas des transports en commun. Vous y tiendrez vos réunions, avec tout l’équipement dernier cri dont vous avez rêvé pour informer, présenter, convaincre et animer. Vous y dégusterez les vins d’ailleurs choisis par vous dans notre collection, avec nos conseils pour que ces vins reflètent l’esprit que vous voulez donner à votre réunion. Nous saurons vous suggérer comment les raconter et comment les mettre en scène. Comment les accompagner, aussi.

Quelle que soit l’occasion, vous y passerez un moment agréable autour d’animations œnologiques. Nous organiserons, si vous le voulez, ce qui va autour. Nous trouverons et raconterons les vins qui rendront votre réunion inoubliable. Demandez, nous mettrons tout en œuvre pour votre satisfaction.
