Professionnels du vin, vous voulez faire déguster vos propres produits ? Soif d'ailleurs vous accueille, vous permet de les présenter. La salle, l’équipement et notre service sont à votre disposition ; nous saurons nous adapter à vos envies et à vos besoins.

Name: Le Single Cast
Description: Le Single Cast est le premier podcast francophone entièrement dédié au rhum et à l'industrie des spiritueux de canne à sucre.

Name: Super Retail Co. Ltd.
Description:
Super Retail Co. Ltd. was founded in 2009 in Phnom Penh - Cambodia, with the first business name Supercheap.

The aim and concept was to have a one stop shop providing all things, liquor and beverage. Beers, Wine and Spirits. Our goal is to have the biggest range and the cheapest prices in Phnom Penh.

Today, Super Retail Group has dominatedthe market in liquor industry including our core business in retail for over 10 years and our marketing and import/distribution business Liquid Assets Fine Wines & Premium Spirits starting to shape the market.

Our retail brands Supercheap and S-liquor will continue to grow from our current 4 stores to the ambitious plan to have over 35 stores nation wide by 2025 and the expansion into the SEA region.

Our strategy is not only to focus on retail but to also diversify into marketing and growing our brands and products.
These includes import & distribution, manufacturing & creating new brands & products, contract manufacturing and producing home brands for our retail & hospitality channels.

The subsidiaries and business units of Super Retail Group was later founded to achieve this vision.
Liquid Assets Fine Wines & Premium Spirits
Kingdom Brewery Limited 
Kingdom Distillery Limited
R2M Solutions

Name: Le Vigne di San Pietro Società Agricola srl
Description:
Le Vigne di San Pietro is a unique “island of land” on the morainic hills of Lake Garda, in the Veneto region, located in the North-Eastern part of Italy.
We have 10-hectar vineyards and are surrounded by a small forest of diverse tree species, creating rich biodiversity, instrumental for the balanced growth of the grapevines.

Name: Top It Off Bottling
Description: Top It Off Bottling (TIOB) is a customer-driven mobile wine bottler, and when you call, we're there! You can count on the Top It Off team to effectively and efficiently service your on-site wine bottling needs. Serving primarily the Northern and Central California wine regions, the Top It Off mobile bottling trucks are equipped to service wineries of all sizes. Our mobile bottling company has quickly earned a reputation for quality, service, price and safety that's hard to beat. With over 75 years of combined expertise in the wine industry, our team is made up of reliable and innovative professionals who intimately know the mechanics of bottling line equipment and the processes of bottling: wine filtration, filling, corking, screw capping, labeling and packaging.

Name: Modal Wines
Description: London-based importer of small-domaine wines made with love and respect. Focus on organic viticulture and low intervention winemaking.

Name: Costaflores Organic Vineyard
Description:
Welcome to Costaflores Organic Vineyard, Perdriel, Mendoza, Argentina.
Three grapes: Malbec + Petit Verdot + Cabernet Sauvignon = one organic red wine (blend) called MTB* – Mike Tango Bravo. The single vineyard behind the world's first wine-backed cryptoasset.

Name: Meyblum & Fils Groupe
Description:
MEYBLUM & Fils Group is active in the wine and champagne industry with the below companies:

- Meyblum & Fils (French wines)
- MVP Wines (Export)
- Monteotti (Prosecco)
- Champagne Balincourt
- Oenocaps (Foils and Sparkling Cages)
- Exposeo (Consultancy Sce)

Our company offers Private Label service for all our product segments.

For further information, please browse each company website.

Name: Trademap
Description:
Trademap is the world’s premier drinks network, matching business buyers and suppliers and enabling them to transact efficiently and safely.

There is no membership fee,  we function in 10 languages so sign up now to start trading with our fast growing network of 53,000 companies.

Name: TerraVentoux
Description:
Le Mont Ventoux comme souche de naissance
Du haut de ses 1909 mètres, le Mont Ventoux est le gardien de la région. Classé Réserve de biosphère en 1990, il constitue un espace de vie où vignerons, soleil et mistral s'unissent pour des vignes de caractère qui ont donné naissance à TerraVentoux.
La cave TerraVentoux est née en 2003 de la fusion de deux coopératives datant de 1929 : les Roches Blanches de Mormoiron et la Montagne Rouge de Villes-sur-Auzon.
Avec les années, les méthodes culturales se sont affinées grâce à un savoir-faire à la hauteur des exigences de qualité :
-sélection de la vendange selon les parcelles et les terroirs,
-âge des vignes,
-cépages…
Les vins témoignent alors d’une formidable énergie à diversifier les goûts et les gammes aromatiques, révélant ce savoir-faire. La Cave produit aujourd’hui des vins AOC Ventoux en rouge, rosé et blanc et offre une large gamme de vins de marque, Domaines et Châteaux.

Name: The Inventor's Gin Co. Ltd
Description: From the mainland, overlooking the Ayrshire coast from Arran to Ailsa Craig, the Inventor's Gin Co. draws inspiration from the land and sea, combining it with Scotland's rich history of world changing inventions and discoveries to hand craft our spirits. Made with traditional gingredients, blended and slowly infused, before being distilled in a copper pot still.

Name: La Tafanera
Description:
La Tafanera es un licor dispuesto a revolucionar el sector de la ratafia. 
Nuestra misión es poder dar a conocer nuestro producto a nivel global con una imagen mucho más moderna y actualizada. Elaborando así, un producto tradicional pero con un punto de vista joven e innovador.

Name: Champagne Charles Heston
Description:
Venez découvrir l’ensemble de nos cuvées, les produits du terroir ainsi que de nombreuses idées et coffrets cadeaux au caveau Charles Heston. Profitez également de notre espace Bar à Champagne avec sa terrasse panoramique sur le vignoble. https://www.champagne-charlesheston.com/accueil/
N’hésitez plus, venez partager un agréable moment de convivialité !
Notre cave est accessible aux personnes à mobilité réduite, aux groupes et cars touristiques et les animaux sont les bienvenus. Nous
proposons une salle entièrement équipée en plein coeur du vignoble pour l’organisation de vos séminaires avec de nombreuses facilités (Parking, Repas…)

A 15 mn du centre de Reims, sur la route touristique des vins de Champagne, notre cave se fera un plaisir de vous accueillir dans son bel écrin sur son site de production au coeur du vignoble à Villers-Franqueux.

Name: Neat Spirits
Description:
Neat Spirits was founded in Auckland New Zealand in 2011 and 2 years later expanded into Australia basing its head office in Melbourne. After 6 year of consistent growth Neat Spirits officially merged with Proof & Company in 2018 to create Asia Pacific's largest Independent Spirits company,

Check out www.proofandcompany.com for more details

Name: PENINSULA VINICULTORES SL
Description:
Península Vinicultores es una compañía de elaboración y comercialización de vinos, fundada en los valores de autenticidad, sostenibilidad y competitividad. 

Desde Nuestra sede en Madrid, gestionamos viñedos y bodegas en toda España. De cada finca elaboramos aquellos estilos de vinos que mejor la definen y que podemos elaborar de la manera más fiel a nuestros valores.

Gestionamos e invertimos en todos los aspectos de las fincas y bodegas que dirigimos, integrando todas las decisiones desde el viñedo a la copa.

Name: Eden Rift Vineyards
Description: Under Vine Since 1849 - Eden Rift is among the oldest, continually producing wine estates in California. A singular mountain canyon, located in the shadow of the Gavilan Range, the 488-acre property rests on the San Andreas Fault only 20 miles from the deep, cold Pacific waters at Monterey Bay. With elevation ranging from 1,200 ft to 1,600 ft, the Central Coast estate benefits from maritime climate, ideal diurnal swings, as well as the coveted calcareous subsoil requisite in the cultivation of vivid, energetic Burgundian varietals (and more).

Name: Jenny and Francois Selections
Description: Small boutique wine importer of mostly French, organic, biodynamic, sustainable, and natural wines.

Name: Easybar Beverage Management Systems, Inc.
Description: Easybar’s complete line of Liquor Accountability Equipment, Draft Beer Systems and Beverage Conduit Systems provide a simple streamlined solution for all of your liquor control and beverage dispensing needs. With over 40 years of experience working with designers, general contractors, and corporate operators in the food and beverage industry, Easybar ensures a package that will be best suited to the needs of the client without any excess materials or expense. Our beverage systems provide consistency, speed, accuracy, and accountability for every product that is dispensed. We simplify the job with one point of contact and one contract.

Name: Jon Basíl Tequila
Description:
Jon Basíl Tequila is one of the first multi cultural millennial owned and operated Spirits Companies. Born in Jalisco and raised in Chicago, our Tequila is a hand crafted blend of high and low land Blue Agave sourced from Tequila, Jalisco. 
This makes it 100% Blue Agave creating a traditional premium product with a modern twist.

Name: Brasserie La Choulette
Description: BRASSERIE LA CHOULETTE is a wine and spirits company based out of 16 RUE DES ECOLES, HORDAIN, France.

Name: WineStein - the smart Sommelier
Description:
WineStein is the first artificial intelligent sommelier.
Access the expertise of top level wine experts and Michelin star chefs with the touch of your fingers, to utilize the first artificial intelligent Sommelier. 
WineStein replaces the stress of chosing the right wine with a fun process, that leads to your perfect wine. You can select your wine based on taste preference, dish or occasion.  A better, easier and more successful process for wine selection leads to increased customer satisfaction and wine sales.  Utilize WineStein in your restaurant, bar and/or retail location to optimize the customer experience and grow your revenue.

Download our free app, to enjoy WineStein wherever you are.

Name: Vinspiration.wine
Description: At Vinspiration, we craft unforgettable wine and culinary experiences that connect people with the heart of local cultures. Through curated tours, tastings, and immersive journeys, we bring together wine lovers, professionals, and producers from around the world. Our mission is to inspire discovery, foster meaningful connections, and celebrate the stories behind every glass. Join us in exploring the world, one sip at a time.

Name: UNCOMMON BRANDS Wines & Spirits
Description: When you partner with Uncommon Brands you unlock the expertise and experience required to help your brand achieve success. We customize your route-to-market, sales, and marketing strategy to your brand needs, goals, and resources.

Name: Bottle of Italy
Description: Bottle of Italy è un Negozio Online di Vini, Champagne, Spumanti, Distillati e Birre! Le piccole realtà italiane di viticoltori sono importanti e devono essere valorizzate sia in Italia e sia all'estero. Con questo obiettivo, nasce Bottle of Italy.

Name: Jorge Ordóñez Selections
Description: Jorge Ordóñez Selections is a family owned and operated third generation national wine importer and agent representing privately held family owned fine wine estates from Spain. Since 1987, we have pioneered the development and growth in the Spanish wine category in the United States, and today, we represent over 25 family owned companies that range from flagship estates to cutting edge growers.

Name: Europa Concept Wines
Description:
A paixão pelo vinho e o desejo por novas experiências sempre fizeram parte de nós. Por isso, criamos a Europa Concept Wines, uma importadora e distribuidora de vinhos de qualidade, exclusivos e com ótimo custo-benefício.

Nossa equipe de especialista descobre vinícolas únicas, para que outros brasileiros também possam desvendar sabores surpreendentes das parreiras do mundo. Visitamos pequenos produtores em busca de produtos de qualidade e realizamos uma curadoria para oferecer uma seleção única de vinhos que tornam cada momento especial.

Name: Major Cellar Company Limited
Description: Major Cellar Company Limited is a wholly owned subsidiary of Major Holdings Limited (stock code: 1389). With 17 years of expertise in fine wine and spirits, Major Cellar is renowned for curating exceptional selections for discerning connoisseurs. Our HKQAA-certified storage facilities in Kwai Chung and retail locations in West Kowloon and Tsim Sha Tsui reflect our commitment to quality.

Name: BABA
Description:
La boîte à boissons angevine est spécialisée dans la création et la commercialisation de boissons apéritives.
La première création de BABA est une eau pétillante alcoolisée de France: bisou.

Name: Motu Viget Spirits
Description: Motu Viget Spirits was founded with the singular goal of producing and marketing the best Michigan wines and spirits. "Motu Viget" is the Grand Rapids city motto meaning "strength in activity". We have a commitment hard work and community. Our hand-crafted wine and spirits pair perfectly with your celebratory moments.

Name: Винарска изба Лозина
Description:
Бутикова изба „Лозина“ е създадена през 2006г. Разположена е на 10км от гр. Плевен, в китното село Биволаре, заобиколено от езеро, река и приказни хълмове.

Философия
Нашата идеята е да създаваме висококачествени вина, както от традиционните за района сортове грозде, така и от утвърдени по-масови сортове. Опитваме се да съхраним старите винени традиции и да предадем любовта си във всяка бутилка. Отделяме специално внимание на гроздето като подбираме продукцията само от най-добрите лозя в околността. Лозята се берат на ръка в малки съдове, запазвайки по този начин всяко едно звънце в отлично състояние до преработването му.

Местност
Лозаро-винарския регион „Дунавска равнина“, от където е и гроздето за нашите вина, е най-големия по територия в България. Почвите, климата и валежите създават едни от най-благоприятните условия за лозовите масиви. Областта е с отлични условия за производство на качествени бели сухи тихи вина и пенливи вина по класическа технология. Червените сортове се характеризират с богат плодов аромат и много свеж вкус.

Оборудване
Избата разполага със съвременно технологично и лабораторно оборудване, отговарящи на всички европейски стандарти. Съдовете за съхранение и ферментация и бъчвите са на български, доказали се, производители.

Name: Peregrine Mobile Bottling, LLC
Description:
We offer PREMIUM MOBILE BOTTLING SERVICES on a KRONES-Engineered bottling line featuring double pre-evacuation KRONES filling technology and rotary labeler with electronic orientation.  We provide power, nitrogen and steam generation as well as compressed air.

We CARE about your wine!  Contact us to Schedule Your Next Bottling: 707-637-7584 - we are here to help you with your bottling needs!

Name: Thinkers Distillery
Description: Located in the heart of the Machane Yehuda Market in Jerusalem, Israel, Thinkers Distillery produces the finest vodkas, gins and bourbons, available anywhere.

Name: Domaine Olliberdie
Description:
Bernard Gatimel, Didier Lacroix et Olivier de Clercq, trois amis chefs d’entreprises dédiés à des projets et des ambitions personnelles se sont un jour lancé dans le pari fou de s’unir autour d’un amour de toujours : le vin.

Le Domaine Olliberdie est situé au coeur du Minervois, terroir historique de la viticulture, au pied de la Montagne Noire.

Name: Famille Pierre Gaillard
Description:
Pierre Gaillard et sa famille signe quatre domaines, qui s'étendent sur les côteaux abruptes du rhône septentrional, de fougères et de Banyuls.

Ils ont en commun leurs paysages pentes et rocailleux : terroir de schiste qui amène sous nos climats ensoleillés beaucoup de caractère, d'élégance et de complexité.

Du nord au sud, la famille Pierre Gaillard a la même exigence et le même soin du détail de la vignes à la bouteille.

Name: Bodega Son Vich de Superna
Description: The winery Son Vich de Superna, in the heart of the World Heritage Site "Serra de Tramuntana", is born with the vocation of making quality wines and respecting the natural environment as much as possible. Vineyards with a thick natural vegetation cover, minimum tillage, reasoned agriculture, exclusive use of organic products and the practice of shepp-grazing to control weeds and fertilizing the plots in a natural way. These practices are part of our way of understanding viticulture and in turn are ancestral to the Serra de Tramuntana.

Name: Vinturi, Inc.
Description:
VINTURI, INC.
Wine which has been allowed to breathe tastes better. As wine breathes, it opens up, and releases its intended aromas and flavors. Traditionally, decanters were used to aerate wine. However, decanting is time consuming, cumbersome, and inconvenient.
Vinturi's patented design speeds up this process with ease and convenience. Perfect aeration in the time it takes to pour a glass.

Simply hold your Vinturi over a glass and pour wine through. Vinturi draws in and mixes the proper amount of air for the right amount of time, allowing your wine to breathe instantly. You'll notice a better bouquet, enhanced flavors and a smoother finish.

It's that fast. It's that easy.

The number one selling Essential Wine Aerator.  Vinturi has sold over 1 million units.  Currently, over 500 wineries use and endorse the Vinturi in their tasting rooms.  Vinturi set the standard for wine aeration tools.  You can also find the Vinturi Essential Wine Aerator at many major department stores, leading restaurants, cruise lines, country clubs, casinos, and hotels.  Vinturi has also been spotted on many Television features and movies.

Vinturi Inc. has offices in London, Carlsbad-CA, and Sao Paulo Brazil

Name: 88 Spirits Corporation
Description: The 88 Spirits Corporation is composed of a diverse group of tequila aficionados enchanted by the world of their beloved spirit…Tequila. We are determined to captivate people worldwide by providing each individual with memorable experiences through our unique spirit products. Our sophisticated products are created with great pride by the most talented people in the industry.

Name: Sbragia Family Vineyards
Description:
SBRAGIA FAMILY VINEYARD IS A DREAM THAT I've had for some time, a small, family-owned winery making limited, individual lots of wine from grapes grown in select blocks of my favorite vineyards. I've always had one foot in Sonoma and the other in Napa. Both areas mean a lot to me emotionally. I'm more attached to Dry Creek because it's where I raised my kids. But the wines that I've made at Beringer are like children, so Napa is also a very special place for me. Either way, the wines are intensely personal, an expression not only of terroir, but of my family's winemaking heritage. 
-Ed Sbragia

Name: Bodegas Pinesque
Description:
Bodegas Pinesque is one of the first commercial winmaking companies in Chihuahua State. Although the company was founded in 2009, one of the cofounders has been wine informally for the last 20 years.

Bodegas Pinesque current line of products include:

5 de Pinesque: a shiraz-cabernet sauvignon blend that is soft and easy to drink.

Novembre: a full-bodied late-harvest cabernet sauvignon. Strong alcohol content with a bit of residual sugar. A different, yet excellent wine.

Peach Chardonnay: a white wine with a touch of peach, great as an apperitive or with a dessert.

Name: FINE spiritueux
Description:
FINE c'est l'agence Cocktail & Spiritueux au service des marques sur le région Rhône-Alpes. 

FINE c'est trois entités dans une agence: 

 Bar événementiel engagé. Nous vous proposons des cocktails à impact écologique faible, à base de produits français & locaux pour tous vos événements professionnels. 

 Représentation, nous sommes le lien entre votre histoire, vos valeurs, votre produit et les bartenders. Nous promouvons vos produits lors de dégustations, masterclass, guest bartending & événements innovants… 

 Formation, nous intervenons dans des centres de formation pour transmettre notre savoir acquis grâce à 15 années de bar.

Name: Más Vino Wine Inc.
Description: Mas Vino Wine Broker Inc. is a professional wine importation business serving British Columbia and Alberta since 2015. Mas Vino proudly sources and imports top-class wines from sustainable wineries in Argentina, Chile and Spain.

Name: Whisky Kingdom
Description: The Whiskey Kingdom features a stellar and diverse collection with a user-friendly powerful interface to recreate an instore five-star experience at your fingertips.

Name: Concannon Vineyard
Description: Established in 1883, Concannon Vineyard is home to the renowned Concannon Cabernet Clones and America's First Petite Sirah. Visit our historic estate in the Livermore Valley Wine Country.

Name: Les Vins du Val de Loire
Description:
Les Vins du Val de Loire (LVVL) is importing wines from france and other european countries to distribute them to a wide reseller network in Belgium and Luxembourg.
It is established since 1979 in the center of Belgium...
Looking for several french wines, especially from the Loire region

Name: J. Mattingly 1845 Distillery
Description: Bourbon 30 Spirits is a craft distillery in Georgetown, KY. The distillery offers its signature product Bourbon 30 and private small batch and single barrel picks under the J. Mattingly 1845 label.  The distillery was started by Founder and President Jeff Mattingly in 2010 and carries forth his family's legacy as distillers of fine whiskey right in the heart of bourbon country.

Name: Tanium Vins et Spiritueux
Description:
Tanium Wine & Spirits is an agency representing and promoting the interests of the producers and wine merchants in Quebec. With a modern, dynamic and strategic approach, we do our best to meet the specific trends and demands of the Quebec market. 
We always do our best to represent with passion, respect, efficiency and know-how the wines and spirits of our producers.
As your representive, our mission aims to boost trade marketing programs for your products and ensure an increasing sales growth

Name: Hammer & Son Ltd.
Description: The proud producers of Geranium Gin, Old English Gin, Reinheart Whiskey, Frederiksberg and Vintre Møller speciality products - made super sustainable and mostly organic without compromising on quality.

Name: Tierra de Cubas
Description: Un concepto diferente, donde historia y modernidad se conjugan para albergar un conjunto de espacios y servicios llenos de sensaciones. Bienvenidos!

Name: Empório Winiarski
Description: Empório Winiarski is a wine and spirits company based out of 1944 R. Francisco Rocha - Bigorrilho, Curitiba, Brazil.

Name: Groupement Interproducteurs Collioure Banyuls
Description:
GIBC (Groupement Interproducteurs du Collioure Banyuls) was created in 1950 when 8 cooperatives joined together. The new union of producers developed a structure and an organisation enabling it to valorise its wines fully. The growers then built up the means for marketing their wines directly, by creating subsidiaries suited to their different types of customer. In 1980, they set up a network of sales reps – the sales force of Cellier des Templiers was born.

By 2008, there were 240 sales reps travelling through France, Belgium, Luxemburg and Holland. Their aim is to build and maintain a close relationship with all the customers of Cellier des Templiers by visiting them at least once a year.


Thanks to their ready for ear for their customers’ needs, the 750 winegrowers who make up Cellier des Templiers make wines that correspond to contemporary tastes. They are continuously looking to create new blends and discover new vinification methods to offer the best their vines are able to give. Their priority is to make wines to please the people who drink them.

Today, Cellier des Templiers offers a broad range of fine wines: 19 Banyuls and Banyuls Grand Cru, 15 Collioure wines and one fine Banyuls Vinegar. Whether you’re a wine professional or simply a wine enthusiast, you’re sure to find something to suit your taste.

Name: Camino del Vino
Description:
Spanish for ‘Wine Path’, Camino del Vino is an online wine business that offers rare, interesting and unusual wines from across the wine world. Offering no more than 30 wines at any given time, we regularly look to improve our selection through direct communication with, and feedback from, our customers to learn what (literally) goes down well! 

With over 10,000 grape varieties in the world, we believe there is more value to be gained from embracing your adventurous side and trying novel wines. We’re also committed to supporting local community initiatives and charities: over lockdown, we hosted several online wine tasting events and raised over £1500 altogether for these organisations. 

www.caminodelvino.co.uk

Name: Cantine Lupo
Description:
Cantine Lupo was created to restore and utilize a farmhouse purchased by our family in the mid ‘90s.

The core of our philosophy is to highlight the rich resources of our home region: Lazio. A territory that once again is being recognized for producing high quality wines. 

Since our first days, attention to quality and excellence have been the essential features of our initiative: constant research and improvement has lead us into the world of wine, and nature. 

Our property is located South of Rome. The nearly 26 hectares, or 64 acres, lies in the idyllic countryside that lays between the slopes of the Colli Albani and the Tyrrhenian coast. 

Cantine Lupo began with a purchase of 10 hectares in the mid 1990s. Slowly our family has added carefully chosen vineyards to bring us to our present dimensions.

Our focus on quality guided not only our selection of vineyards, but also the vines themselves. After long and detailed studies, we chose to replant our vineyards with vines that offer us the highest quality fruit.

Thanks to our typical Mediterranean climate and all of our work in the cellar and the field, Cantine Lupo’s vineyards have begun to yield wines of the highest expression. After a long and slow process we are proud to release our first wine: a merlot named “Primolupo”, followed by Terra Marique (vermentino) and Rosa Merlot (rosé).

Name: Bulles de Champ'
Description:
Bulles de champ’, votre nouvelle box mensuelle de champagne. Offrez un concept qui sort de l’ordinaire, et qui plaira à coups sûr. Partez à la découverte de champagnes de Vignerons indépendants, des petites pépites encore peu connues.

Il était une fois...
Bulles de Champ’, c’est la rencontre passionnée entre connaisseurs et novices dans le domaine du Champagne : Viktor, Camille, Macha, Chloé, Aurélien, Mickaël, Hugo et Martin, tous nordistes et bons vivants, avec une passion en commun : le champagne !
Après moult voyages et périples, nous nous sommes rendus compte que tout le monde connaissait le Champagne, mais pas réellement les différents Vins de Champagne et toutes leurs diversités. C’est pourquoi l’envie nous a pris de promouvoir le Champagne de vignerons à travers la création d’un site internet dédié à la découverte de ces Champagnes confidentiels ; des Champagnes rares et travaillés avec respect. Nous offrons la possibilité de vous faire découvrir des Vins de Champagne méconnus et difficiles à se procurer. Nous ne dénichons que des Champagnes de Vignerons indépendants, en bref, des Champagnes d’Auteurs.
Chaque mois, nous partons en expédition à la recherche d’histoires et de rencontres avec les vignerons, en quête des meilleures cuvées, puis toute l’équipe se réunit alors pour goûter et déguster.

Bulles de Champ' : La box qui pétille !
Comme disait George Sand : “le champagne aide à l'émerveillement “ voilà ce que nous proposons chez bulles de champ’ : l'émerveillement ! Recevoir une box dédiée aux richesses et aux mystères du champagne : le rêve de tout épicurien, non ?
Recevez chaque mois une ou deux bouteilles de champagne chinées spécialement pour vous !
A partir de 29,90€ par mois, offrez un cadeau original, qui fera plaisir à coups sûr !

Pour plus de renseignements, rejoignez nous sur les réseaux sociaux ou sur notre site internet :
Instagram & Facebook : Bulles de champ’
Site internet : www.bullesdechamp.fr
Mail : hello@bullesdechamp.fr

Name: COGNAC RABY
Description:
G & C RABY est une entreprise familiale gérée par Cécile RABY, qui a pris la suite de son père Gérard RABY. 
La famille RABY exploite un vignoble de 40 hectares en Grande Champagne, premier cru du cognac. 
Depuis 5 générations, la famille RABY perpétue la tradition, tout en continuant à développer l'activité de l'entreprise. Aujourd'hui, G & C RABY propose à la vente une large gamme de produits : Cognac, Liqueurs, Pineaux des Charentes, Vins et Jus de raisin. 
Déjà présente sur le marché français, la maison G & C RABY s'est fixée un nouvel objectif : conquérir les marchés étrangers. 
L'entreprise souhaite également transmettre son savoir et mettre en avant son terroir, le vignoble de Grande Champagne, c'est pourquoi elle propose toute l'année des visites au domaine en français, anglais et néerlandais.

Name: Pipers Brook Vineyard
Description: Established in 1974 and nestled in the heart of Tasmanian wine country, Pipers Brook Vineyard in the beautiful Tamar Valley is recognised as one of the pioneering vineyards of the Tasmanian wine industry. Our wines are a reflection of our place, our people and our passion.

Name: General Drinks
Description: Empresa dedicada a la distribución de vinos y bebidas.

Name: Coastal Bend Distilling Co., LLC
Description: Coastal Bend Distilling, Co. seeks to produce the highest quality spirits made in South Texas. Our products are inspired by the people, lifestyle and resources that our great state and region has to offer. Coastal Bend Distilling, Co. is the genuine Texas experience you've been looking for, from our authentic music, lively dance hall, and joyous spirits to the smiling faces of rural America - come and taste to see for yourself.

Name: Vera Wine and Spirits
Description:
Vera Wine and Spirits was founded in 1992, when we were introduced to Brunello di Montalcino.   While we were sitting at the table, seeing friends and families' reactions when drinking the wine, we knew we had to find out how to import more and turn that into a business.  

Starting with 2 wines in the portfolio, we have grown to represent over 17 wineries from around the world.  Each showing the character of the food culture of each region.

It has been a great fortuitous journey over many miles traveled and vintages passed.  We look forward to many more vintages of shared glasses with customers, friends and family.

Name: R.T. LegacySpirit Distilling Company
Description: Makers of Gin. Protectors of legacy.

Name: Martin Ray & Angeline Winery
Description: Martin Ray Winery, located in Santa Rosa, California is one of the Top Rated Wineries that offers Chardonnay, Cabernet Sauvignon and Pinot Noir under $ 20.00 and Single Vineyard Cabernet's from Stag's Leap, Diamond Mountain and Santa Cruz Mountain.  Angeline is one of the fastest growing brands in the country.  Only 7 years old with Russian River and Alexander Valley appellation wines that retail under $ 15.00.

Name: Bag & String Wine Merchants
Description:
Bag & String Wine Merchants is a wine and liquor store with an emphasis on limited production, value and unique wines from around the globe. Our primary goals are to provide unparalleled service, wine education and a selection that meets consumers' needs and budget. 

Bag & String Wine Merchants ~ Purveyors of fine wine and spirits.

Name: Santori Wines
Description:
Our story began in Italy, where wine was part of daily life and family tradition. Those early lessons in appreciating wine, shared across generations, planted the seeds for what Santori Wines would become.

Today, we work with some of California's finest vineyards in Napa and Sonoma, creating wines that reflect both our Italian heritage and our California home. Working with our winemaker Leo, we've built a reputation for quality that's earned recognition including multiple double gold medals.

From our Italian-inspired villa in Marin County to our cave tastings in Kenwood and experiences in Napa Valley, we create welcoming spaces where wine lovers can discover exceptional wines in a setting that feels personal and real.
Each bottle represents our commitment to quality and our belief that great wines are meant to be shared. Plan your next corporate event or gathering at our Villa in Fairfax for a wine country experience that's just a short drive from San Francisco!

Name: Winetribe Aps
Description: Winetribe helps everyone become their own sommelier.

Name: Tenute SalvaTerra
Description: SalvaTerra is a winery that sells wines and spirits.
Location: Loc. Cengia-San Pietro in Cariano, Verona

Name: Wines by the Sea
Description: Wine specialist and Sommelier based on the South Coast of England

Name: Bierwinkelier
Description: Bierwinkelier is your specialist in Beer based out of Utrecht, Netherlands.

Name: The Walls Vineyards
Description: The Pacific Northwest is blessed with some of the world’s finest vineyards. Sourcing from carefully selected sites in Washington and Oregon, we seek to create world-class wines worthy of your enthusiasm. Our wines are made with a minimum of intervention in the cellar so that they may show vintage variation and the unique characteristics of the place in which they are grown. Each site from which we source our fruit was thoughtfully chosen for its ability to produce the highest quality wine grapes in each one’s particular region.

Name: Coolhurst Vineyards
Description: A boutique business in West Sussex creating exclusive and limited edition English sparkling wine, and Côtes de Provence rosé. Mannings Heath, #Horsham

Name: vanWEINS GmbH | Dein Wein. Kein anderer.
Description:
Warst du nicht auch schonmal von der überwältigenden Auswahl eines Weinregales überfordert?
Wir auch.
Die ratlosen Stunden vor dem Weinregal sind endlich vorbei. vanWEINS bietet dir den besten Wein für deinen Geschmack. Dein Wein. Kein anderer.

Name: C&G Winzer
Description:
Wir, die Weingärtner Cleebronn & Güglingen – kurz C&G Winzer, sind ein Team aus leidenschaftlichen, weinverrückten Perfektionisten, die Weine mit großen Emotionen machen – und sehr viel Freude! Denn wir glauben daran, dass Wein Spaß machen und ehrlich sein soll. 

Unsere knapp 250 Winzer und Winzerinnen kümmern sich mit Herzblut um die etwa 300 Hektar Weinberge, die sich durch das Zabergäu ziehen. Mit den damit durchschnittlich 1,5 Hektar sind unsere Wengerter eher Boutique-Winzer, wobei sich ihre Kompetenzen perfekt mit den Fähigkeiten unserer Kellerteams verbinden.  Dieses veredelt schließlich Lemberger, Riesling und Co. zu charakterstarken und fokussierten Weinen, die ungeschlagen in ihrem Preis-Genuss-Verhältnis sind. Nur die Kombination aus Fachkenntnis und Feingefühl, Geduld und Tatkraft, Vernunft und Freigeist bringt unverfälschte, authentische Weine hervor. So, wie wir sie lieben!

Mit den Worten “Einmal mehr können wir nur den Hut ziehen vor Deutschlands bester Genossenschaft – die Top-Weine dieser Kooperative stehen absolut auf Augenhöhe mit denen der Top-Betriebe in der Region...” würdigt der Vinum Weinguide 2026 erneut unsere herausragende Qualität und kürt uns zum Weingut des Jahres in Württemberg! Eine Auszeichnung, die bisher noch keiner Genossenschaft zuteilwurde und damit ein einzigartiger Höhepunkt in unserer fast 75-jährigen Geschichte ist.

Name: Qvino
Description:
Qvino una nuova piattaforma interattiva dedicata alla cultura del vino che coinvolgente consente agli amanti del vino di espandere le proprie conoscenze e orizzonti attraverso esperienze di apprendimento innovative e coinvolgenti.
Un team giovane e dinamico di 20 persone composto da esperti del settore, sommelier ed eccellenze del settore digitale.
Una comunicazione chiara ed efficiente sempre all’ascolto dei desideri dei clienti, capillarità del servizio, evoluzione perpetua in continuo miglioramento dei servizi attuali e alla ricerca e implementazione di nuovi, sono i punti forti di Qvino che si possono riassumere nei 3 valori fondamentali per l’azienda: Affidabilità, Professionalità, Tecnologia.

Name: Vigne Chigi
Description: Dal 2004 curiamo 3 ettari di superficie vitata tra Pontelatone e Formicola per produrre Pallagrello bianco e nero e Casavecchia, igt   Terre del Volturno e doc Casavecchia di  Pontelatone. Dal 2008 commercializziamo i nostri vini in Italia e all'estero. Dal 2014 ci dedichiamo alla produzione del  "Capotempo di Capua" conciato col nostro pallagrello bianco, antico formaggio che si produceva a Capua.

Name: Vinofil Vinkurs
Description: Vinofil  is owned and managed by a dedicated wine enthusiast, Sommelier Svein Lindin. Our goal is to bring the joy of wine to business clients and private consumers. All our lecturers are trained sommeliers and members of Norsk vinkelnerforening (Norwegian Union of Sommeliers). Through journeys abroad and tastings we analyze market trends and give special wine experiences to all our wine course participants and readers online. In Vino Veritas is a renowned supplier of wine experiences and our international partners are very satisfied with our cooperation. Our websites are highly ranked in Google, Yahoo and leading Norwegian search engines.

Name: VERSUS - Vins & Spiritueux
Description:
Our philosophy is to help you uncover the best wines and spirits. We carefully select the best products for you with the primary aim of making sure you enjoy an unforgettable and delicious encounter. 

We are working with some great companies of the European and Asian market and always ready to expand our partnership all around the world.

At VERSUS, you can find the stars of each appellation.  In search of new discoveries, we offer you a whole universe of spirits from France, Scotland, Japan, the United States, Guatemala and many other countries.

Name: Exclusivas Benet S.A. de C.V.
Description:
EBSA es una empresa mexicana, importadora, distribuidora y representante de vinos y licores.
Con más de 85 años de experiencia en el giro, ha logrado consolidarse como una de las empresas de mayor prestigio. Posicionando marcas de vinos y licores en el mercado mexicano como "Casillero del Diablo", "Chateau Mouton Rothschild", el brandy Gran Duque de Alba, el oporto Ferreira, el jerez "Dry Sack", entre otras, así como marcas propias.

Name: Champagne Cheurlin-Dangin
Description: LinkedIn page of the Champagne Cheurlin-Dangin house located in Celles-sur-Ource in Aube en Champagne. House specialized in Champagne. Blanc de Blanc, Blanc de Noir, Rosé and other grape variety compositions are our source of pride.

Name: Prosecco.com
Description:
Prosecco Ventures produces and markets an independent, family-owned portfolio of sustainable Italian wine brands: Bella Principessa, Signorina, and Bella Vino. 

We make our exceptional-tasting Prosecco in partnership with fourth-generation winemakers using the highest quality selection from a single estate in Veneto.

We sell fantastic wines at different prices selected for their high-quality, all-natural ingredients, refreshing taste, competitive pricing, sophisticated packaging, visual appeal, heritage, provenance, authenticity, and memorable names. 

The Company offers consumers a 'taste of the good life' via an inspired portfolio of uniquely familiar, instantly recognizable beverage brands that taste as good as they look, each designed to stand out on the dining table & and retail shelf.

If you're interested in working with us, get in touch and learn more about our key points of difference and branded premium experiences.

We work with outstanding people and operate in large markets, including the United Kingdom, USA, Germany, France, Spain, and Italy. 

Our vision is to establish Bella Principessa as Prosecco's most recognized brand. 

Our mission is to offer consumers a taste of the good life and win over the next generation of experience-seeking drinkers, one sip at a time.

Our cultural values seek to inspire our customers with dreams, elegance, and creativity.

We are building our reputation on obsessive product knowledge, strong customer partnerships, and a commitment to being the best in everything we do. 

The Company also markets the "Angel Spirits Vodka" and "Angels Love Hard Seltzer" brands.

For product range reviews, please call +44 (0) 207.289.9623 or email "hello @ prosecco.com"

Name: Vintage International Services Limited
Description:
Vintage International Services Limited BVI was founded in the year 2002 as a small family owned organisation. The ethos of our company remains unchanged as a dynamic excellence driven organisation. Since then we have gone from strength to strength, expanded all areas of our business and yet the goal of excellence in service is still what drives us and will continue to do so.

Our company headquarters continue to be based in strategic Jabal Ali, Dubai, UAE with state of the art warehousing available in Jabal Ali, Fujairah, Roosendaal and also Bordeaux.

Our portfolio consists of varied fine wines & premium spirits. We have evolved this portfolio over the years to include travel retail distribution in the Middle East along with distribution sales and services across the Middle East, Africa and Europe.  Furthermore Vintage International Services enjoys the privilege of owning and operating various diverse brands including various beers and spirits. 

Our values and vision remain both transparent and uncompromising in our continued quest for excellence.

If you are interested in joining the Vintage team kindly send your CV to hr@visl.com.

Name: Bodega Tukma
Description:
Conozca Nuestra Bodega

Situado en los Valles Calchaquíes del Noroeste Argentino, muy cerca de los cielos andinos, y con viñedos a traves la antigua región del Tukmanao, Bodega Tukma rescata y rinde homenaje a las raíces de la región con sus vinos de altura. Allí, entre dos y tres mil años atrás, el ser humano se volvió sedentario y agricultor; hoy, es uno de los mejores escenarios para el cultivo de vides de notable tipicidad.

Desde Tolombón, el corazón del Tukmanao, Bodega Tukma los invita a que conozcan nuestros vinos de altura.

Name: Gregorian/Գրիգորյան
Description:
Family traditions since 1994. Products made by traditions and modern technologies.
Gregorian wine and spirits
Alcoholic beverage producer from Armenia. We produce high-quality wines, fruit wines, vodkas, brandy, whiskey, etc.

Name: The Whisky Lounge Ltd
Description:
Bringing whisky to the masses through informative and fun festivals, is our mission.

We're about breaking down barriers, myths and legends while promoting the understanding that whisky is a historical and iconic product of almost alchemic origins.

We specialise in hosting our own Whisky Tastings, Festivals and Schools which have become extremely popular. We can also tailor-make a tasting for everything from 10 to 10,000 people whether it be a private party, corporate event, product launch, team building or practically anything.

Please get in touch if you would like to chat through your ideas or get a quote.

Name: 83 Islands Distillery
Description: The Distillery Company Limited is a microdistillery based in Port Vila, Vanuatu on Efate Island. Follow us to know when our next production will be available.

For this purpose, we put at your disposal international resources and a network of experts all around the world.

Description: American Premium Beverage is a beverage distributor that sells to the public at large. APB is housed in a warehouse. For product transportation, handling, and storage, their temperature-controlled warehouse was built using cutting-edge technology.

Name: Sunset Hills Vineyard
Description:
Manage day-to-day requirements of tasting room - including staffing , staff training, wine education, menu planning and food orders, wine sales, retail display and sales, and most importantly - making our guests feel welcome and  appreciated by providing them the best possible experience - to accompany some of the best Virginia wines available.

In addition, Alex is the Artist in Residence at the winery.  The winery gallery features Alex's original watercolors and limited edition prints, and will soon offer art classes at the winery - with accompanying glass of wine!

Name: BlancoTinto
Description:
Online wine shop since 2016. Distribution of Gravner Winery and Michael Wenzel Winery in Spain. 
Our main goal is to display familiar wineries that make great wines, organic, natural, biodynamic and high quality wines.

Name: Champagne Haton
Description:
Fondée en 1928 par Octave Haton, la Maison Champagne Haton s’appuie sur plus de 300 ans de savoir-faire viticole transmis de génération en génération. Aujourd’hui encore, elle perpétue avec exigence l’art de l’assemblage et la maîtrise du temps, au cœur de la Vallée de la Marne.
-
Founded in 1928 by Octave Haton, Champagne Haton builds on over 300
years of winemaking expertise passed down through generations.
To this day, the House continues to cultivate the art of blending and the
mastery of time, in the heart of the Marne Valley.

Name: Cusmano Vini
Description:
I vini piemontesi del Monferrato DOC e DOCG lavorati secondo i metodi tradizionali ma con tecnologie moderne.
Una produzione dedicata a Moscato, Barbera, Chardonnay, Pinot e Bracchetto.
La passione per l’enologia e l'abilità nell'evolversi insieme al mercato, ha spinto negli anni la famiglia Cusmano a creare tre linee aziendali ben distinte:

CUSMANO CANTINA DI FAMIGLIA:
Dal 1988 creiamo linee di etichette dando spazio alla fantasia,
 ognuna con un significato, una storia e un pensiero alle spalle.

TENUTE RADE:
la migliore selezione dei nostri vigneti da luce ad una linea che rappresenta il nostro territorio e la nostra realtà, dedicata al mondo enoteca ed ho.re.ca.

MAULLI
L'idea è quelle di offrire un'alternativa moderna partendo dal comune denominatore che da decenni rappresenta l'azienda: il vino. Nasce così la linea MAULLI , cocktail ready to drink che vanno dai grandi classici ad abbinamenti con la frutta.

Name: NatalieMacLean.com
Description: Natalie MacLean (www.nataliemaclean.com) recommends delicious wines and food pairings and tells you the number of bottles in stock now at your closest liquor stores. She offers mobile apps for iPhone, BlackBerry and Droid. Natalie was named the World's Best Wine Writer at the World Food Media Awards.

Name: Brasserie Volcelest
Description:
Brasserie créée en 2008 par Emmanuel Rey, nous sommes aujourd’hui une
équipe de 9 personnes oeuvrant tous les jours pour vous proposer des
bières artisanales de qualité.
.
Nous brassons dans notre brasserie au Perray en Yvelines, au coeur de la Vallée de Chevreuse.
Non filtrées et non pasteurisées, nos bières sont des produits naturels,
brassés selon la tradition brassicole.

Name: Whisky and Wine Place
Description:
Pierwszy nasz sklep powstał już w 2008 roku. Stworzyliśmy niezwykłe miejsce, w którym oprócz bogatego wyboru różnej maści alkoholi – począwszy od whisky oraz wina, poprzez gin, wódki, okowity, grappy, tequile, mezcale, sotole, calvadosy, brandy, bourbony, miody pitne, koniaki, likiery, nalewki, na winach wzmacnianych kończąc; znajdziesz wiedzę i doświadczenie kadry, chcącej się nią dzielić z każdym zainteresowanym. Poza tym, importujemy wina, głównie z Europy.

Nasze półki zastawiliśmy ponad tysiącem etykiet samych alkoholi ciężkich i kolejnym tysiącem - win z każdego zakątka świata, wypełniliśmy humidor wonnymi cygarami, a w ozdobnych gablotach wyeksponowaliśmy najcenniejsze whisky.

Drugą gałęzią naszej działalności są degustacje. Organizujemy je cyklicznie – są dostępne dla każdego, a o ich organizacji informujemy poprzez Social Media oraz za pomocą newslettera.

Jesteśmy też idealnym miejscem, jeśli chcesz zakupić zestaw prezentowy dla bliskiej osoby lub kontrahenta, ponieważ w asortymencie posiadamy także akcesoria do whisky, literaturę branżową, rzemieślnicze czekolady, kawy i  eleganckie opakowania, przez co wyjdziesz od nas z gotowym prezentem. Z kolei w okresie przedświątecznym i świątecznym mamy przygotowaną ofertę dla klientów biznesowych nastawioną gotowe zestawy prezentowe w różnych wariantach – cenowych, produktowych itd.

W sierpniu bieżącego roku zostanie otwarty nowy sklep, który jednocześnie będzie naszą wizytówką. Punkt ten charakteryzować się będzie największym metrażem, prestiżem, atrakcyjną lokalizacją oraz asortymentem samym w sobie – ponad 3000 różnych etykiet. W doborze odpowiedniego trunku wspierać Was będzie wyspecjalizowana kadra.

Name: Saint Luna
Description:
Contradictions are beautiful. Balanced and provocative. Smooth and edgy. Our moonshine is made with molasses, distilled, and charcoal filtered for a sipping experience you’ll want to savor. Pull down a bottle of the adventurous spirit made for adventurous spirits. Saint Luna- crafted under the stars in New York.
https://saintlunaspirits.com

Name: Lo de Granado
Description:
Hay quienes encuentran placer en “soñar”, pero, si estas leyendo este txt, es porque perteneces al grupo de los que encuentran placer en “hacer”. Y una de las Mayores responsabilidades que tenemos los “haceedores” 
Es la de despejar el camino de obstáculos como el desconocimiento y las falsas creencias , brindando en su lugar información valiosa para aquellos que siguen la misma ruta, en nuestro caso, la ruta del vino

Mauro Charvey CEO y Fundador de Lo de granado

Name: BURDI W.
Description:
BURDI W. is a company built on 3 core values that we care about :
- Promity 
- Quality
- Honesty 

Our aim is to deliver a product born from a secret and ancestral knowledge. 
We elaborate and design all our creations in Bordeaux that, in order to deliver a high quality beverage that meets our ambitions and your expectations.

*All of our products are organic and lab-verified to contain less than 0,2% of THC*

Name: Champagne Gautherot
Description:
Depuis le XVII ème siècle, les Gautherot perpétuent en famille la passion de la vigne et du vin. 
Notre vignoble est enraciné dans les sols argilo-calcaires du sud de la champagne, sur le terroir de la Côtes des Bar à Celles sur Ource, Les Riceys Neuville et Merrey. 

Nos champagnes proviennent exclusivement du vignoble familial, cultivé depuis longtemps en viticulture durable. Nos grands-parents nous apprenaient déjà le respect de notre patrimoine, de la nature et de la terre. 
Depuis 2013 nous sommes labellisés Terra Vitis, et plus récemment en 2016, les certifications Haute Valeur Environnementale et Viticulture durable en Champagne viennent souligner notre philosophie.

Name: Organic & Natural Wine Distribution
Description:
Grossiste spécialisé en vins Bio et biodynamie, avec une sélection de bières Bio. 

Les particuliers peuvent retrouver notre gamme dans nos deux caves :
Les Tonneaux de Saint-Jean, 150 rue Billaudel, Bordeaux
Les Tonneaux des Chartrons, 14 rue Bourbon, Bordeaux

ou sur le site http://monvigneronnaturel.fr

Name: Bodegas Campos Reales
Description:
Campos Reales is one of the leading Spanish wineries producing popular premium wines. Due to becoming recipients of "Best Young Red Wine of Spain" and the "Golden Bacco" awards, Iberia, Lufthansa and British Airways are proudly now on board with our wines.

Nestled in the very heart of the vast central plateau of La Mancha, the Campos Reales vineyards surround the quaint village of El Provencio. Here the Tempranillo grape thrives in the arid Mediterranean climate in sandy, rocky, calcareous clay soils. The warm growing season encourages the development of ripe dark fruit flavors, deep color and long balanced tannins. The abundant pines and holm oaks that surround our vineyards soften the summer heat, allowing an optimum fruit ripening.

Our 4.000 hectares lands holds a wide variety of grapes. Amongst the reds are Tempranillo, Garnacha, Tintorera, Cabernet, Syrah, Monastrell, Moravia, Merlot and Bobal. And the whites: Airén, Macabeo, Chardonnay and Sauvignon Blanc.

Name: Bangkok Beer & Beverage Phuket
Description: One of Thailand's largest wine importers with over 400 labels in the portfolio. Wholesale to hotels & restaurants in Phuket, Krabi and Khao Lak. Wine tastings and wine dinners are organized through its Andaman Wine Club, check out www.andaman-wine-club.com

Name: BOÁR WINES
Description:
Je m’appelle Christian Gelbe-Haussen et je suis un assemblage d’Allemand, de Hongrois et de Suisse. Vous l’avez déjà compris, je suis né pour comprendre les questions liées aux barrières linguistiques et culturelles.
Hárslevelű, Cserszegi Fűszeres, oltalom alatt álló eredetmegjelölés. Voici quelques exemples qui m’ont amené à créer BOÁR Wines Kft., une agence commerciale spécialisée en vins hongrois.
Né et élevé à Genève, j’ai actuellement la chance de vivre à Budapest et de côtoyer des vignerons talentueux, de déguster des curiosités locales et de visiter des régions insoupçonnées des non-initiés.
La voie m’a été ouverte par mon père et mon parrain, deux grands amateurs avertis, qui ont su me transmettre leur passion à travers leurs histoires et des vins d’exception. Dans cette même philosophie, le but de BOÁR est de partager de beaux produits mais aussi du savoir, car une bouteille sans histoire, est selon moi, une bouteille à moitié vide. Ainsi, chaque flacon séparé de son terroir sera accompagné des connaissances nécessaires pour conforter cavistes et sommeliers dans leurs discours et partager avec leurs clients, beaucoup plus qu’un vin.

Name: SIEVA Selection Bokobsa
Description: Notre société produit, importe et exporte des vins et spiritueux cachers.

Name: No.1 Wine & Spirits Limited
Description:
No.1 was launched in 2007 and comes from the beautiful town of Vänersborg, Sweden. Vänersborg provided our founder Glenn Ström with the inspiration to start distilling spirits. The beautiful surroundings of Vänersborg and the pure water of Lake Vänern form the heart of the No.1 range.

Just come as you are, No.1 offers everybody a drink of choice. If it’s a vodka, a gin or a rum – we have it. 

We only use the finest Swedish grain sourced from local farms for the distillation of our No.1 range of premium Vodka and Gin. Distilled three times using the purest water sourced from Lake Vänern, the No.1 spirits range is uncomplicated and beautifully simple. 


No.1 is great for sharing – responsibly. With your friends and family. Great for indoor and outdoor parties and dinners. Skål!

Name: Vignobles Jean Médeville et Fils - Château Fayau
Description:
C'est en 1826 que Jérôme Médeville achète le Château Fayau. Aujourd'hui, 7 générations plus tard, Jean et Marc Médeville sont à la tête des Vignobles Jean Médeville et Fils. Accompagnés d'une équipe jeune et dynamique, ils perpétuent la tradition familiale avec passion, respect et professionnalisme. 

Les Vignobles Médeville comptent désormais près de 200 hectares de vignes répartis le long des deux rives de la Garonne : rive gauche avec les Graves et Sauternes, rive droite avec les Cadillac et Cadillac Côtes de Bordeaux. 

Soucieux de l'impact de leur activité sur l'environnement, Jean et Marc sont engagés dans différentes démarches environnementales. Ainsi, l'ensemble du vignoble est certifié ISO 14001 depuis 2013, HVE (Haute Valeur Environnementale) niveau 3 depuis 2017 et Terra Vitis à partir du millésime 2019. Au Château Gabelot, les trois années de conversion touchent à leur fin, nous vous proposerons une gamme de vins certifiés BIO mais aussi Bee Friendly à partir du millésime 2020.

Name: CASTELLO DI NEIVE
Description: The Castle and its cellars, Santo Stefano vineyard and the other great ones, with a well-documented centuries-old history, demand meticulous attention in every decision, both in the vineyard and in the cellar, aiming to convey all of this to the customer. Tradition, research, and creativity: this is the philosophy of a company that, without neglecting the centuries-old winemaking heritage, embraces new technologies, actively engages in research – both in the vineyards and in the cellars – and is ready to step up its game and experiment.

Name: Domaine de l'Amaurigue
Description:
The DOMAINE de L'AMAURIGUE is a family owned vineyard which produces award wining wines with focus on sustainable agriculture. The vines have outstanding potential in terms of quality. Its 47ha of vines are situated on a unique perimeter offering a micro-climate to each type of vine, which is highly propitious to its development. But the estate also has many other assets.

Rare protection, provided by 150 acres of woods and hills which surround and  shelter these AMAURIGUE vine, comfortably wedged into gently hillsides and facing south and east.

Ideal soil, composed by clay and chalk, with a rich mineral content which comes from the omnipresence of pebbles that accumulate heat in daytime and give it to the vine-stocks at night. Thus obliging the roots to take really deep nourishment.

A varity of vines and the existence of many old one's; grenache, cinsault, syrah, cabernet-sauvignon and carignan for the reds; rolle and ugni blanc for the whites.

Name: Viticulteur Bio en Champagne
Description: Viticulteur bio en Champagne Premier Cru

Name: H3 Vinhos
Description:
Desde 2018, a H3 Vinhos está presente no mercado de importação, comercialização e distribuição de vinhos, destacando-se como uma empresa inovadora e comprometida. Nosso diferencial reside na busca por vinhos exclusivos que trazemos ao Brasil, através de uma curadoria cuidadosa e especializada em brand, trade marketing e distribuição multicanal.

Nosso Compromisso
Nosso objetivo primordial é proporcionar a melhor experiência aos nossos clientes, fornecendo o vinho certo pelo melhor preço. Seja em um restaurante refinado, em um empório charmoso ou nas gôndolas de grandes redes de varejo, buscamos garantir que cada momento seja acompanhado por um vinho de qualidade excepcional.

Foco em Canais Especiais
Dedicamos grande foco às vendas para canais especiais, como restaurantes, empórios, adegas, beach clubs, wine bars e eventos exclusivos. Estamos presentes em todos os lugares onde os apreciadores de vinho buscam qualidade e exclusividade.

Parcerias Estratégicas
Para assegurar agilidade e o melhor custo-benefício em todo o processo, contamos com parceiros de trading especializados no segmento de bebidas. Nossa equipe, altamente qualificada em comércio exterior, trabalha em conjunto com essas empresas para garantir uma experiência satisfatória aos nossos clientes.

Modalidades de Negócios
• Vendas através da H3 Vinhos, com acesso ao nosso estoque;
• Importação direta para o seu negócio;
• Representação junto à vinícola, faturando diretamente da
  vinícola para você.

Name: Price Family Vineyards & Estates
Description: Price Family Vineyards & Estates is a family of vineyards and wineries owned by Bill and Eva Price. It includes 370 planted acres of Sonoma Coast vineyard, spread through out Durell Vineyard, Gap's Crown Vineyard, Walala Vineyard, One Sky Vineyard, and other select vineyards in development listed below. Our wineries include Three Sticks, LUTUM and Head High Winery.

Name: wineUdesign
Description:
At wineUdesign, we specialize in hands-on wine blending experiences that bring people together. Whether you're planning a corporate retreat, team building event, or private celebration, you'll taste, blend, and bottle your own wine—no experience needed. 

Host your event at our Hicksville, NY winery or bring the experience to your space.
