Name: Via Vinera Karabunar Estate
Description:
Via Vinera Karabunar Estate  is located about 80km from the country’s capital Sofia. The region is famous for its high quality wines and spirits. 

The wines from our winery are sold under the brand VIA VINERA, BULGARIAN HERITAGE, CONTOUR and CASTELLUM. They are well accepted both on the Bulgarian and European markets and have always been a measure for quality, satisfying even the most demanding consumers. With gold and silver awards from national and international competitions our wines are building the image of contemporary Bulgarian wine industry.

Name: Divas Beverages
Description:
Divas Beverages is a leading wine based alcoholic beverage company based within the Australian market. We are 100% Australian owned and our products are made in Australia. 

After successfully establishing our Divas VKAT brand in 2011, we have expanded our offerings with additional beverage brands, which include Glades liqueurs, Chingu Korean beverages, and Sachi8 ready-to-drink range.
 
Our business is built on the foundations laid by breakthrough innovations, and new ideas that better serve our customers and consumers.

Name: Holm Oak Wines
Description:
Holm Oak is the labour of love of dynamic duo, Bec Duffy and her husband Tim Duffy. Bec is the winemaker and Tim is viticulturist.
Their complementary skills provide a vision to produce delicious cool-climate Tasmanian wines that reflect their home in the pristine Tamar Valley, and their own personalities – honest, down to earth, genuine and authentic.

Name: BAR àPART
Description:
BAR àPART biedt een groot gamma kwaliteitswijnen, die op ambachtelijke wijze worden vervaardigd in buitenlandse wijndomeinen met de allerbeste prijs/kwaliteitsverhouding (vanaf €5,60/fles).

Ons volledig aanbod bestaat uit Wijnen, Champagnes, Cava's, Prosecco, Sterke dranken, (Relatie)Geschenken, Cadeaubons, Degustatiepakketten, Privé-degustaties, Gin-tastings en een Mobiele cocktailbar voor bedrijven, events en feesten. 

Onze klanten zijn particulieren, bedrijven, horeca-uitbaters, traiteurs, organisaties en verenigingen. 

Ons ruim aanbod wijnen komt van wijndomeinen in Frankrijk, Italië, Spanje, Zuid-Afrika, Argentinië, Californië, Portugal en Oostenrijk. 

We hebben meer dan 100.000 flessen op stock, geven persoonlijk advies en bieden een retourservice voor feesten. 

Geraak je niet in onze winkel? We helpen je al graag verder na een email, telefoon, sms,... en kunnen leveren aan huis, op je werk of op je evenement. 

Contacteer ons vrijblijvend voor meer informatie. Bezoek onze website www.barapart.be

Name: Vinicultura SAS
Description:
Vincultura is an importer and market developer of organic and natural wines in Colombia. Our business is based in Bogota. 

Vinicultura's aim is to promote the development of wine culture in Colombia.
We provide restoration/hotel business, wine retailers, wine professionals, and private wine lovers the possibility to experience and get to love wines of origins and styles underrepresented in the thriving Colombian market.

Currently, we import wines from small-to-intermediate certified organic/biodynamic wineries in Austria and Italy.

Name: Vin de Classique
Description:
Vin de Classique International produces a range of uniquely branded varietal wines aimed to appeal to wine lovers across the board. Our goal is to be market orientated and to provide a unique combination of branding and wine styles at various price points. We supply quality Grapes to Boutique Wine Brands and Producing Wineries, which in return give us access to Top Wine Makers and World Class Production Facilities. We specialize in the sourcing of quality wines for Private Label exports, while we are Passionate about our own Portfolio of Quality, Certified wines which we market both Locally and Internationally. 

Vrede Vineyard Select:
Great care has been taken to match each cultivar or variety grown at Vrede Wine Farm with the Terroir best suited to its cultivation. Such considered viticultural practices combine with peaceful, temperate conditions and exceptional wine-making skills to produce our Vrede Vineyard Select range.

CHARMÉ WINES & SPARKLING:
The name Charmé originates from France and means ‘inspiring delight’. From the beginning of time, people have associated this inspiration with faith and good fortune. Our wines share this inspiration through the universal symbol of peace, the dove. Both evoke soulful emotions of prosperity, devotion, friendship and love. We’d like to share these with you.

BON VOYAGE & CARAVAN
Get on board and let your sense of adventure set sail… exploring the subtle nuances of flavor, palate and color in every glass. Each memorable sips bears tasteful testimony to the origin of the grapes – the cool climate vineyards of the Cape, where the fruit grows plump and full of flavor.

Name: Thomas T Thomas Vineyards, LLC
Description: Thomas T Thomas Vineyards is a boutique family run vineyard and winery located in Philo, California, in Mendocino County's beautiful Anderson Valley.  We grow and produce high quality Pinot Noir and Chardonnay and sell direct to our customers via our mailing list..."We are a small family operation that cherishes its direct connection with the land. We take a holistic approach to farming and strive to always maintain a balanced eco-system for the vineyard as well as the plants and animals that share the land with us.  Our motto is " We put the smile of Mother Nature in every glass"!

Name: Exceptional Spirits LDA
Description: We are introducing some of the most exciting premium brands in the spirits industry to the Iberian market. We are dedicated to growing the market for premium spirits in Iberia through education and awareness, while positioning our partner brands at the forefront of the industry. We are actively seeking partners who share our vision for storytelling, exploration & education through imaginative & memorable engagements with quality spirits.

Name: Burgess
Description: Burgess is the culmination of 150 years of farming tradition on the slopes of Howell Mountain. From the Swiss-Italian ancestors who first planted our Estate Sorenson Vineyard to the present day, we strive to create wines of elegance and finesse that honor our roots in the Napa Valley.

Name: Domaine des coteaux blancs
Description:
Le domaine : 
Situé à Chalonnes sur Loire, au cœur de l’Anjou noir, Le domaine des Coteaux Blancs, tire son nom des terroirs pentus sur lesquels étaient nichés jadis des pierres blanches aujourd’hui disparues. 
Sur ces coteaux ensoleillés abrupts (certains atteignent plus de 40% de pente) nous produisons majoritairement de grands vins blancs, issus de chenin, mais aussi quelques Anjou rouge, Côteaux du Layon, Cabernet d’Anjou et Rosé de Loire sur une vingtaine d’hectares. Une palette de vins colorée au style assurément ligérien.

Famille Hilpert & co : 
C’est la passion du vin qui pousse la famille Hilpert a acquérir cette belle propriété en 2015. Emilie, la fille ainée est à la tête du vignoble. Arnaud, le cadet représente les vins dans le sud-ouest. Les parents Jean-Jacques et Marie-Christine ne sont jamais bien loin.
Non issue du monde viticole, notre famille a su s’entourer dès la genèse de cette aventure. Modestie Banchereau orchestre la partie technique du raisin au vin, accompagnée de Mickael et Sylvain. Thibaud Boudignon, vigneron émérite de l’Anjou, apporte ses conseils afin d’obtenir la plus belle expression de notre terroir.

Le Domaine des Coteaux Blancs c'est avant tout :
    - Le fruit d’un travail collaboratif dans une approche éco-responsable toujours en quête de perfectionnement. 
      Notre démarche est honnête et transparente. Nous travaillons sur le long terme pour une agriculture raisonnée. 
    - Des vinifications naturelles avec beaucoup d’attention et peu d’interventions.
    - Des vins honnêtes et franc de goûts, à la recherche de la plus belle expression de notre terroir.
Location: chalonnes sur loire, Pays de la Loire

Name: Global Fine Wines Beers & Spirits Pty Ltd.
Description:
Today we represent the produce from acclaimed family winemakers and vignerons in Australia, New Zealand, Italy, France, Spain, Germany, Argentinia & Chile  as well as European and Australian craft breweries and distilleries.  All meticulously manage their vineyards and wine-,  beer- and spirit making processes to capture the true terroir expression in their wines, beers and spirits. We are also flattered to see our wine and beer selected by some of the country’s finest wine managers and sommeliers.  They recognise not  only  the high quality and sound value, but also the marvelous unique taste sensations.

If you are in the trade (e.g. work for a restaurant or wine retailer, consult to the wine industry or write about wine) then simply ask us for our latest catalogue, which we will happily provide you.  Also we are happy to provide more in-depth information about each of the wines, beers and spirits upon your request.. Simply click on ‘Contact’ and complete some basic information. If you are indeed in the trade, we will email you the information requested.

Name: Volando Tequila
Description: Sourced from the world’s finest agave fields, Volando tequila has been curated with passion and intention. We went in search of a distillation partner who not only embodied the heritage of Tequila but, possessed the boldness and passion for unmatched craftmanship and a unwavering commitment to quality. Exploring the premier agave growing region of the world - Los Altos de Jalisco, Mexico we discovered Casa Aceves.

Name: K and L Wines and Spirits UK
Description:
For the past decade, K and L Wines and Spirits have been providing the discerning wine buying trade and public with a selection of boutique wines made to the highest standard. All the wines represented are carefully selected and personally evaluated by our panel of wine experts and enthusiasts. We specialise in the supply of a unique range of exclusive wines to the markets of the United Kingdom, France, Spain and the Benelux countries. K and L Wines and Spirits UK is a direct importer so you are assured of the best possible prices. K and L wines online presents you with the oppurtunity to access these exclusive wines so, buy wines online from us with confidence.

Our history 
 
K and L Wines and Spirits UK Ltd – Importers and Distributors of Great and Award Winning Wines 
 
K and L Wines and Spirits South Africa was established in 1999 by liquor marketing icon BJ Lankwarden and traded successfully for a number of years. In 2002 the company was bought by a small consortium, which spearheaded significant growth in the South African market.  
K and L Wines and Spirits UK is now established and supplying the UK market with our balanced portfolio of great wines.
 
"K and L Wines and Spirit's vision is to bring Choice and Enjoyment to the wine loving public who are yearning for something a little different"
BJ Lankwarden .. CIRCA 1999

Name: Neal Family Vineyards
Description:
Our winemaking philosophy is an extension of the beliefs we have in the vineyard: naturally healthy fruit produces the best examples of premium varietal wine. We have eliminated the addition of extraneous chemicals and synthetic materials into the growing cycle of the vines. This enhances the inherent and distinctive influences of vineyard terroir, producing the ultimate flavor profile of the wine. 
Regenerative Organic Certification  | California Certified Organic Farmers | Biodynamic

Name: Republic Restoratives Distillery
Description: A small batch, women-owned distillery and craft cocktail bar in the heart of Washington, DC.

Name: Hestan Vineyards
Description:
Hestan Vineyards is a 41-acre vineyard located on Napa Valley's eastern slopes at the base of Okell Hill.  Individually farmed blocks planted to all five Bordeaux varietals--Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Petit Verdot, Cabernet Franc and Malbec--blanket the rolling hills overlooking the vineyard's 11-acre pond.

Consulting winemaker Mark Herold began working with the Hestan estate in 2002, creating his hallmark opulent wines with the 2002 Hestan Cabernet Sauvignon and the  2002 Meyer Cabernet Sauvignon. Both were a critical success.

In 2005, winemaker Jeff Gaffner began the Stephanie project to showcase all five of the Bordeaux varietals planted at the estate.  He produces a Stephane Red Wine, (Bordeaux blend) , Merlot and Cabernet Sauvignon from the property.

This harvest (2009) Thomas Rivers Brown is taking over production of the Hestan wines from Herold. Considered one of the rising stars of Napa Valley, Thomas made history as the youngest winemaker to receive two perfect 100 point scores from Robert Parker.

Hestan Vineyards owner Stanley Cheng notes, "We feel very excited and privileged to have winemakers of such accomplishment interpret our vineyard's terroir in such wonderfully expressive styles.  We think our entire portfolio of wines--Hestan, Meyer and Stephanie--will continue to improve with each vintage."

Name: Reed & Co. Distillery
Description:
Located in Bright, Victoria, Reed & Co Distillery was established in 2016 by hatted-chefs Rachel Reed (the ‘Reed’) and Hamish Nugent (the ‘co’). 

Intrigued by the use of distillation to manipulate the flavour of
food, they started experimenting with botanicals they used in cooking to produce gin.

Distilling then became the heart of their creative process, resulting in small-batch spirits inspired by their Alpine home and their love of Japanese fermentation traditions. 

The family-owned distillery operates a cellar-door tasting bar, Spirit Lab, an Izakaya-style restaurant and cocktail bar, Koji Bird.

Reed & Co. is currently the first commercial Shochu producer in Australia and, in 2025, Reed & Co. was awarded 'Champion Victorian Gin' for its NEO Yuzu New World Gin - a huge accomplishment for a regional distillery.

Learn more at www.reedandcodistillery.com

Name: Bordeaux wines
Description:
A passion for excellence in life & style. 
An appreciation for the craftsmanship and heritage of winemaking. 
Welcome to the world of Bordeaux wines. 
Must be 21+

Name: Santa Sofia s.r.l.
Description:
Santa Sofia headquarters and cellars are in Pedemonte (Verona), one of the most beautiful and attractive zones in the Classic Valpolicella area. Villa Santa Sofia was built by the famous architect Andrea Palladio in 1560 and since 1996 has been included among UNESCO’s World Heritage Sites.

Already in the mid-800, the company was known for the excellent quality of its wines. The wines are produced from grapes carefully selected coming from the most suited and best exposed hillsides in the surrounding area. But the wine tradition of the place has more ancient origins: part of the old cellars were already used for the ageing of wine in the 14th and 15th centuries.
Over the years, Santa Sofia has built up and maintained a reputation which has seen it increase successfully from a "small estate with high quality" to a company which has become one of the most significant realities in the Veronese winemaking world, pursuing a “strategy of excellence” – as Giancarlo likes to call it. Focused on the tradition and on the importance of maintaining wines with a very easy-drinking style, he applies itself also in the selection of wines from other Verona areas. 
All that allowed Santa Sofia to position their wines in more than 50 countries around the world.
The company has recently bought a new vineyard in Briago, Valpantena, reaching the goal of a 53 hectares propriety.

Today the Begnoni family lives enthusiastically their role as witnesses and guardians of this great wine tradition.

Name: Champagne Le Gallais
Description: Charlotte Le Gallais et son équipe exploitent 4 hectares dans un domaine clos, à Boursault dans la Vallée de la Marne.

Name: Albino Armani Viticoltori dal 1607
Description:
The name Albino Armani has its roots in 400 years of history, winegrowing and passion for wine. 
A dynamic reality, which since its inception has looked favorably on growth and development, but also on conservation. 

Today, the ambitious family project boasts five privately owned estates, composing a total of 330 hectares of vineyards. The family vineyards are situated in three major Italian winegrowing regions: Veneto, Trentino and Friuli-Venezia Giulia.

Name: Hewitson
Description:
Established in 1998 Hewitson winery is situated in the heart of the Barossa Valley on the historic Seppeltsfield Road and boasts some of the oldest vines in the world. Our fruit is sourced from these historic, dry-grown vineyards in the Barossa Valley and also from single site vineyards in Eden Valley, McLaren Vale and the Adelaide Hills.

At Hewitson, we believe great wines are an expression of the soils they are grown in and the season they grow. Through knowledge and experience we strive for balance, structure, concentration, power and breeding. Proudly, through solar energy, water recycling and encouraging natural biodiversity, Hewitson brings these wines to your table environmentally sustainable.

Name: BODEGA D´WASI-LUNAHUANÁ
Description: Fundada en el año 2018 por la familia Sánchez Nue. Iniciando sus actividades de producción de cremas de pisco, posteriormente agregando en la línea de productos macerados, vinos y piscos en diferentes variedades.

Name: sipit
Description: Η πρώτη εφαρμογή στην Ελλάδα που εξειδικεύεται στο αλκοόλ! Delivery σε 60' στην πόρτα σου μέχρι τις 12 το βράδυ!

Name: DeCiao Cocktail Seltzer
Description:
Get to know our twists on world-famous cocktails, made in Amsterdam! At DeCiao Seltzeria, we capture the flavors from real fruit to create the most exciting cocktail seltzers. Cheers to that! 

DeCiao's Cocktail Seltzers are crafted in Amsterdam with only 63 calories per can, no sugar, vegan, gluten-free, and contain 4.5% alcohol. 

Our three boutique Cocktail Seltzers:

Raspberry Cosmopolitan - A sweet start of the raspberry and orange flavors are finished with the sourness of the lime.

Spicy Pineapple Margarita - The sweet pineapple, sour lime and the spicy kick of the habanero is a match made in heaven.

Triple Ginger Moscow Mule - Three types of spicy-and-sweet ginger are complemented by the refreshing flavor of cucumber and lime.

Name: Beer World
Description:
Beer World is New York's largest independent retailer of beer. We started in 1999 and today, we operate 15 megastores having over 4000 varieties of beer, numerous assortments of cigars and tobacco along with redemption centers, lottery, growlers, crowlers and on tap beer. 
We ardently take orders for weddings, corporate events, parties & more. Join our hundreds of thousands of beer enthusiasts from around the globe for all things booze.

Name: Gentleman Farmer Wines
Description: Gentleman Farmer Wines is a boutique winery in Napa Valley, founded by vintners Jeff and Joey, who value hands-on craftsmanship and the celebration of life's simple pleasures. They create small-batch wines that embody the spirit of Napa Valley, blending traditional techniques with a modern, personal touch. Their offerings include unique wine experiences at the Gentleman Farmer Bungalow, a space designed for intimate gatherings and a deeper connection with their wine-country lifestyle. They also offer a Wine Club for exclusive access to limited-production wines.

Name: Azienda Vinicola Gabriele
Description:
Our company has been established in Pantelleria in 2015. 
We produce two main DOP wines from Zibibbo grapes: 
DON KLOCKS, dry white 
BAGGHIU the "Passito" of Pantelleria
Our goal has been from the beginning and will be for the future, to offer a product that reflect the exceptional terroir of Pantelleria.

————————
La nostra azienda è stata fondata a Pantelleria nel 2015. A Pantelleria produciamo due vini da sole uve Zibibbo:
DON KLOCKS bianco secco e BAGGHIU il Passito di Pantelleria tutti e DOP. Il nostro obiettivo è stato sin dall'inizio e sarà, offrire un prodotto di alta qualità, che rispecchi il territorio eccezionale che l'isola di Pantelleria offre.

Name: LUCANO 1894 S.R.L.
Description: FABBRICAZIONE DI LIQUORI, AMARO LUCANO (MARCHIO REGISTRATO), SCIROPPI, DISTILLATI, VINI E SIMILI.

Name: Château Taillefer Lafon - Vignoble
Description:
Dans la plus pure tradition des grands vins…

Château Taillefer Lafon est le premier vignoble au Québec autorisé à utiliser le terme « Château ». Cette désignation, traditionnellement réservée aux grands vignobles européens, est fièrement justifiée par l’édification d’une somptueuse construction répondant à ce type d’appellation.

Étant, à ce jour, le plus important producteur québécois de raisins provenant de « vignes nobles » (vitis vinifera), le Château Taillefer Lafon propose une gamme de produits de qualité exceptionnelle et de niveau international.

Name: Château de Piote
Description:
Le Château de Piote est un domaine familial de 10 hectares près de Saint-André-de-Cubzac. Virginie Aubrion, la vigneronne, a repris le vignoble en 1998, et y travaille aujourd'hui avec ses fils. La décision de travailler en bio et biodynamie a été naturelle : faire du vin sain, de qualité et à prix abordable était l'objectif. 
Les 8 cépages de la propriété font la base de 11 vins différents : blanc, rouge, rosé, clairet et même crémant !

Name: Vignobles de la Coquillade
Description:
Les Vignobles de la Coquillade sont composés de 30 hectares de vignes, dont 17 situés autour de l'hôtel Coquillade Provence, près de Gargas. Les autres vignes bordent les villages de Gordes et Oppède.

La diversité des sols permet de cultiver différents cépages comme la Syrah, le Grenache et le Cinsault, ainsi que le Caladoc, le Marselan et le Chenanson.

C'est cette diversité qui nous offre la possibilité de produire des vins de caractère, reflétant toute la beauté de notre terroir. Nos vins sont en appellation Ventoux et IGP Méditerranée.

Deux éléments sont essentiels : un sol riche en humus et une biodiversité importante. Depuis 2022, l'ensemble de notre production a été convertie en Agriculture Biologique.

Travailler d'une manière aussi respectueuse que possible de l'environnement et mettre en place des opérations durables, aujourd'hui pour demain sont notre leitmotiv.

Des progrès considérables ont été réalisés, mais le monde et la viticulture évoluent. Nous voyons tous les signes du changement, caractérisés par le réchauffement climatique, la dégradation de l’humus, l’accumulation de CO2 dans l’atmosphère et la perte de biodiversité.

Depuis septembre 2021, nous sommes l’un des premiers domaines viticoles climatiquement neutres du sud de la France et nous compensons chaque émission de carbone par de nombreux projets de reforestation en Ouganda ou de création de fourneaux de cuisine propres au Kenya. 

Nos cuvées : 
> Prémices, le premier venu de l'année
> Aphélie, le plus fruité et frais
> Elyo, le structuré et gourmand
> Solale, la cuvée d'exception

Le champ lexical du cosmos a été choisi afin de lier le travail réalisé en biodynamie. L'aphélie est la distance maximale entre la terre et le soleil. Elyo de - Eile - signifie éclat du soleil en Grec. Solale, dérivé du mot soleil et - Solal - guide en hébreux.

Name: Wine That's Fruit
Description:
This is wine, but not as you know it!
Wine made from fruit
～Natural ingredients & vegan
~ Sulfite free
～No additives or preservatives

Five mouth bursting flavours to savour: Whitecurrant, Apple, Strawberry, Raspberry and Blackcurrant.

Name: Compagniesdrift
Description:
The co. is owned by the Meerlust Workers Trust, consisting of workers from several farms in Stellenbosch. 
The main services are wine storage, labeling and rework services to the wine industry. 
We are wine producers since 2015. Although most of our stock is locally distributed, we also export to Germany, Singapore and the US and have capacity for new markets. 
We have 3 wines; a Chardonnay Unwooded, Chardonnay Pinot Noir and a Cabernet Sauvignon Merlot. 
The Chardonnay is a pale wine with a vibrant green hue in the glass. On the nose, aromas of white pears and apricots with nuances of lemon. 
This versatile wine can be aged for up to 2 years in ideal conditions.
The grapes are carefully selected for the unique diversity in flavour they bring to the wine. Grapes are harvested by hand.
This wine highlights the diversity of the Chardonnay grape and focuses on the elegant fruit profile that the grape has to offer when fermented in tank at moderate temperatures.

The Chardonnay Pinot Noir(PN) just won a bronze medal at the Old Mutual Trophy Awards Show. Purchases lets us donate to breast health awareness.
This blend consists of 25% PN allowing for nuances of pomegranate, cherries, and various red fruit flavours to be detected on the nose, besides the tropical flavours from the Chardonnay. 
Salads and cold meat with capers or pastas will be a great food companion with this wine. 
Vineyards on South facing slopes and within proximity to the Atlantic Ocean, were carefully selected. 
Picking of the grapes was done by hand in the early morning.

The Cabernet has Intense black currant plum and spice on the nose, these flavours follow through on the palate coupled with a rich juiciness and soft, silky tannins. Perfect for roast meat and game.
Can be aged from 4 - 8 years from vintage.
The wine in matured in seasoned French Oak barrels for 14 months.

Name: Ceylon Spirits
Description:
Are you frustrated with the limited selection of spirits, wines, and beers that stores and supermarkets offer?

Have you stood in a queue to get your bottles and thought “Never Again” but repeated the process over and over again because you had no other choice?

We bet you answered “Yes!”. We did as well and that’s why we started “Ceylon Spirits” with the goal of spoiling you with choice by bringing you high quality spirits, fine wines, and excellent beers!

Our experienced team of connoisseurs’ curate the best brands from across the world to bring you an ever-growing library of brands ensuring that you don’t have to compromise on choice.

Name: By the Dutch
Description:
"By the Dutch" was founded in 2015 with the mission to bring spirits with a Dutch heritage back in the spotlight. The company built around VOC (East Indian Trading Company) was born to tell a story of tradition and craftsmanship to the world. 

By the Dutch embodies advocacy, quality, tradition and history. The company is present in 25 markets (United-States, United Kingdom, Italy, Sweden,..). The spirit portfolio includes Old Genever, Dry gin, Batavia Arrack Rum (Aged & Non-Aged), Advocaat (Egg Liqueur) and three cocktail bitters.

Name: Wein- und Sektkellerei Josef Drathen GmbH & Co. KG
Description: We are a family-owned wine and sparkling wine winery founded in 1860 and offer a wide range of products with wines from the most important German wine-growing areas (Mosel, Pfalz, Rheinhessen, Nahe, Franconia, etc.) as well as international wines, sparkling wines, wine cocktails, wine based drinks and mulled wines. As a "one-stop-shop" we offer our customers the possibility to order everything from one source and with "private label". More than 60% of the bottles sold leave our company with private label.

Name: English Oak Vineyard
Description:
This is a BIG challenge! 5m consumers in the UK drink sparkling wine at least once each week. The UK produces 2m bottles of sparkling wine per year. Now that's an opportunity!

In February 2007, Sarah and I set out on a lifetime journey, no crusade, to create a business that would play its small part in responding to this challenge, the challenge of changing the sparkling wine buying habits of a nation and so English Oak Vineyard was born. 

23,000 vines now contribute positively to our Eco system and to the production of a range of truly delicious  award winning sparkling wines. Of our Engelmann Cuvée brand, judges at this years UK Vineyards Association wine competition said:

"Pale gold hue, very fine fizz, clean and fresh with brioche and bitter croissant accenting yellow plum fruit, very attractive nose, Brut-style, lively, bright and light, brittle mousse texture, good length. Very nice wine."

Now doesn't that make you want to try a glass?  

Here in the UK, over 400 vineyards like ours, compete to be the 'brand of choice' of 26m wine Consumers. In the main, we don't compete with each other, but with products imported from abroad and lined up bewilderingly and anonymously along supermarket shelves. Our challenge is, not only to run and develop strong successful businesses, but equally important, to offer a genuinely appealing alternative. In a world obsessed with efficiency and quality to the point of bland uniformity, it is still possible to have quality AND character.

Name: Skipstone
Description: Skipstone is a small production wine and olive oil estate tucked between two stunning hillsides in the mountains above Alexander Valley in California. We aspire to perfection in every aspect of our winegrowing and estate farming and draw inspiration from the unparalleled potential and promise of the earth. Uncompromising in our standards of sustainability and our treatment of the land, we are committed to nurturing the precious resource that is our 200 acre estate. Blessed by nature, we listen intently to the terroir of our vineyards, and in turn, our wines speak eloquently of their origin.

Name: Airfield Estates
Description: Airfield Estates is a family owned winery based in the heart of the Yakima Valley.  We produce an extensive range of blends and single varietal wines sourced from our estate vineyard that provide exceptional quality at accessible price points.

Name: Handcrafted Wines, LLC dba Handcrafted Wines of Kansas
Description: Distributorship for the state of Kansas of select wines and micro brews

Name: Salut Wines
Description:
Salut Wines - Independent Wine Retailer and Wine Bar

One of Manchester’s finest independent wine retailers, Salut offers over 450 wines to drink in or take away. Our broad and dynamic range is all hand picked by the Salut team.

Enjoy a large and varied selection of wines by the glass from our ever-changing house wine menu or grab a glass and take the time to taste new and exciting wines from our Enomatic wine dispensers. Our friendly and knowledgeable team will always be on hand to offer any assistance and advise on any specific requirements.

We choose our food with as much care as we choose our wines and the options change regularly. Take your pick from our sharing platters – cheese & charcuterie, or our tapas options. We have a range of vegan and gluten free options available. Take a look at our menu on our website https://salut.co.uk/menu/

We offer structured tastings for corporate events, less formal networking events, private tastings or you can just use our space to hang out with your friends or colleagues. Every event we host is personally tailored for the group, and we’ll work with you to create the perfect one for you.

If you need a calm, warm space to work from our upstairs is the perfect spot with speedy fiber-optic wifi and 5G coverage. Give us a call to book your spot - 0161 234 2340

Name: Seven Sisters Vineyards
Description:
In her quest to change the destiny of, and build a legacy for, the Brutus family, Vivian Kleynhans started the Seven Sisters wine brand in 2005.

Vivian and her six sisters, however, realised that to truly reach their dreams they had to find a home for their business where they could grow and maintain their vineyards. They approached the Department of Rural Development and Land Reform and in 2009 they were awarded 8,7 hectares of land in Stellenbosch.

The seven Brutus sisters and their baby brother, who grew up in a small fishing village called Paternoster, situated on the outskirts of Cape Town, left the tranquillity of their sleepy town at a very early age when the family was evicted from their home. They yearned to return but were not able to do so given the unfavourable circumstances of the time. Twenty years later, the sisters reunited to create fine wines and launched their Seven Sisters range.

Since being awarded land the family, under Vivian’s guidance, have turned the barren piece of land into a wine farm. In 2013 they established their own vineyards which resulted in them also producing their own Brutus Family Reserve range.

Name: Piazzo Comm. Armando
Description: A family company few kilometers from Alba that has been one of the pioneers of Barbaresco for over 60 years. The Piazzo winery was born from the dream of Armando Piazzo and Gemma Veglia, who in the 1960s dediced to stay and believe in their land, the Langhe of "La Malora" by the writer and partisan Beppe Fenoglio. The far-sighted and counter-current idea of investing then in the main grape variety, the Nebbiolo, was a winning bet. Today the company owns 70 hectares of vineyards , whose 60% is nebbiolo grown. In addition to Barbaresco and Barolo, our depth range of wines offers a quality panorama of the typical wines of Langhe and Roero, with fine, cleanliness and attention to details.

Name: MORGANTE
Description:
The Morgante Winery is located in Grotte, it represents one family's initiative to employ five generations of viticultural experience.
The family manages 200 hectares among arable, vineyards and almond trees in a hilly region located approximately 350 - 500 meters above the sea level. The territory is ideal for viticulture with a Mediterranean climate and soil that ranges from clay to calcareous and marny. 
In 1989, the Morgante decided to vinify their own grapes.
In 1997, with  Riccardo Cotarella the Morgante family found a common desire to continue their research into producing great red wines from Nero D'Avola.

Name: Farthinghoe Fine Wine Limited
Description: Farthinghoe Fine Wine is the wine merchant for the 21st Century. A boutique merchant based in the beautiful Oxfordshire village of King's Sutton, we pride ourselves on providing the levels of service, advice and enjoyment you deserve.

Name: Simonnet-Febvre
Description: La Maison Simonnet-Febvre produit et élève aujourd'hui une large gamme exprimant les différents terroirs du Chablisien et du Grand Auxerrois.

Name: ŒnoQuebec
Description:
ŒnoQuebec offre son expertise oenologique, viticole et agronomique sous forme d’accompagnements complets ou ponctuels des producteurs de vins, de cidres et d’autres boissons alcoolisées.
De la stratégie de la gamme de produits à la mise en bouteille, ses consultants – œnologues diplômés – apportent tout au long du processus de production leur expertise et un soutien technique d’aide à la décision.

Name: Domaine Rabasse Charavin
Description:
Domaine familial depuis 6 générations, situé à Cairanne.
Vin de France, Côtes du Rhône, Côtes du Rhône village, Plan de Dieu, Cairanne et Rasteau

Name: 21 Holdings LLC
Description: 21 Holdings LLC (21H) is a wholly-owned subsidiary of The Jel Sert Company and has all the advantages of an established, sizeable infrastructure as its parent company. 21H is a fully licensed and bonded distillery, winery, and brewery that specializes in ideating, developing, and manufacturing alcoholic freezable novelties. This includes its own brand in SLIQ Spirited Ice, in addition to those made on behalf of contract manufacturing and licensing partners.

Name: Captain Morgan
Description: Captain Morgan is an online store of cocktails, wine, and spirits.

Name: Blend - All About Wine
Spirit Revolution
Description: Aviation is the golden thread that connects the founders in this story; indeed it is not a stretch to say it runs in the very veins of our bloodline, from our parents onto us. With this thread, comes a combined 5 decades of travel, experiences and of course sampling some of the finest spirits in the world.

Name: C.C.C. Vins de Bordeaux
Description: Vente de vins de Bordeaux, aux particuliers et professionnels, en France et à l'export

Name: adam. Vodka
Description:
Adam Vodka is handcrafted for friends, by friends. Our fresh corn is grown in the rich cornfields of Minnesota, at which point it is processed and distilled to be filtered and bottled in the Pacific Northwest of the USA, where craft cocktails and smooth tasting libations are concocted with the greatest care. We incorporate the highest-grade ingredients to maintain the absolute best end product for you to enjoy. Our vodka is distilled 5x and filtered 5x using lava rocks local to the Northwest region. The porous minerals act as nature’s sponge, capturing the impurities to leave behind a clean, smooth spirit. It is our pleasure to bring you an organic vodka that’s so delicious you can sip it by itself (which is how vodka was originally consumed).

• Double-gold medalist @ 2021 San Francisco World Spirits Competition
• Gold medalist @ 2021 Denver International Spirits Competition
• Gold medalist @ 2021 SIP Awards
• Silver medalist @ 2021 New York International Spirits Competition
• Silver medalist @ 2021 Bartender Spirits Awards

Name: La Maldita Wines
Description: Vinos sexis, divertidos y únicos elaborados con #garnacha de Rioja

Name: An Original Brand
Description:
‘Game Changing’ Support for Founders and senior leadership in start up to scale up businesses looking to accelerate their growth.

An Original Brand, offers unique support for Brand founders and senior leadership, a bolt on for your business without the need for an expensive hire.
Offering support across sales and marketing, direct founder coaching and advice.

Specialising in

• Go to market strategies and actioning them
• Distribution growth solutions – Ecommerce, retail, on-trade • Recruiting vs growing with Agency’s
• 1 2 1 Founder advisor

Name: Vinyes Domènech
Description: Originària de Falset, la família Domènech ha volgut recuperar una de les finques més emblemàtiques de la comarca del Priorat, amb l'interès renovat per descobrir i crear nous vins. El celler, fundat l'any 2002, està situat en una de les regions més famoses del món per a la criança de vins negres: Capçanes - Priorat - Espanya. La nostra passió és compartir els nostres vins, Teixar i Furvus, amb totes les persones amants del món del vi.

Name: Failla Wines
Description: Failla Wines began in 1998,  born of the opportunity to make expressive wines from single vineyard locations across California's western Sonoma Coast.  Ehren Jordan, never one for slowing down rapidly expanded the Failla stable from 2 wines in 1998 to over 30 wines two decades later.  Our expansion into the Pacific Northwest is indicative of Ehren's forward-thinking nature, and desire to constantly challenge himself with excellent vineyards in different regions.

Name: Boutique Connection
Description:
Only authentic artisan wine that you won’t find in supermarkets will be delivered monthly or bi-monthly to your doorstep. The perfect subscription for someone (enthusiasts and novices alike) looking to discover a wide range of the most unique and small batch wine, made right here in New Zealand. Crafted by winemakers who have the opportunity to express themselves and aren’t restricted to what commercial wine ‘should’ be.

We have over 60 New Zealand boutique wine producers from Central Otago, Nelson, Marlborough, Martinborough, Waipara, Waitaki Valley, Hawke's Bay, Matakana and Northland. 

Have a scroll through our website to learn about our fantastic producers!

Name: bibiôverre
Description: Une future cave en ligne de vins bio ou issus de la biodynamie à consommer au verre bibioverre.com (en cours de développement).

Name: Château des Garcinières
Description:
Rosé, red and white wine - AOC côtes de Provence
French riviera
Sale, tastings and visits at the vineyard

Name: The Vineyard & Brewery at Hershey
Description: The Vineyard & Brewery at Hershey produces the finest in "PA Preferred" quality wine and craft beer in a fun, experiential atmosphere. With over 20 varieties of handcrafted wine, to 10 varieties of craft beer and hard cider, The Vineyard & Brewery at Hershey is truly the best of both worlds.

Name: Merser Rum | B Corp
Description:
Merser is an artisanal golden rum, blended in London.

At Merser & Co,  we have brought back to London the craft of rum blending – the way rum used to be made. We source the very best of rums from Jamaica, Barbados and Dominican Republic aged for up to 12 years before blending them together with skill, care and pure London Rum passion.

Our rum is then stored in barrels in small batches in London for a period of six months – each barrel has just enough for 400 bottles of rum. This process is called “Double Barrel” allowing the different flavours and aromas of the rum to gently harmonise together for a smoother, refined finish – the way rum should be made and enjoyed.

Merser & Co is London’s first Rum Blending House for more than 100 years and marks a return to rum blending by the Hayman Family, best known not only for their eponymous range of gins, but also as one of London’s original rum merchants.

Merser Rum. Distilled in the Caribbean. Made in London.

Name: Napa Valley Distribution, Inc.
Description:
Your Vision. Our Wines. Custom Beverage development and distribution. End-to-end enterprise solutions turning your vision into reality. Wine, beer, spirits, coffee, water, energy, tea kombucha, sake, sparkling Wine, force carbonated/canned beverage and more!

We currently work throughout California and the US. . That being said, Napa Valley Distribution is poised to be the premier distribution and custom beverage development and production company to the Philippines and other Asian markets specializing in California and Napa Valley Beverages. NVD obtains a portfolio of the trendiest brands and lifestyle beverages on the market. We strive for innovation in a historical industry that expects a traditional continuation. The reinvention of the wine and beverage industry for us means marching off the map, yet never compromising the quality of the product itself.

Name: Torrevilla Viticoltori Associati Società Cooperativa Agricola
Wine's Link Limited
Description:
Wine’s Link International Holdings Limited (Stock Code: 8509) is a major wine company based in Hong Kong. Our core business is wine wholesale and retail.

We put our long-standing passion for wine into practice, on the one hand by sourcing the finest quality of wine worldwide and offering first-class service to our customers. We have strong background on sourcing premium fine wine, particularly we have close relationship with négotiants in France. We have diverse range of vintages from classic wine regions. All wines are purchased from trusted source and handled by professional hands. Wine’s Link strive to provide with you ultimate wine experience. Our team is always ready to offer professional wine advice and latest market information. Here you can find hidden gems or rare vintages that are nowhere to be seen in the market.

Our passion for wine makes us a perfect long-term partner in your wine journey.

Name: Mas Doix
Description:
5th Generation family winemakers, rooted in the Priorat since 1860s.

We replanted all our vineyards in 1902, after the Philoxera and we made vineyard our way to survive in the Priorat, until brothers Valentí and Ramón Llagostera in 1998 decided to create his own winery in the Priorat (where both spend his childhood) and making his own wines.

After 20 years we are glad to say that we are still full of passion and respect for this way of life.
Organic Certified Vineyards with biodynamic practices, because we care about the environment and we want to preserve it. 
Always with manual labor in our metamorphic schist "Licorella" soils and berry by berry selection, to guarantee 100% premium quality grapes. Because we believe that it's all about the grapes.

Nowadays our 4 wines: CRESTES, SALANQUES, DOIX AND 1902 are Fresh, Balance and Elegant, with a limited production and all the essence of the Priorat’s Terroir.


Why Mas doix?

Sense of Place: To elaborate distinctive and fine wines that transport you to the Priorat, and make you feel it in the purest way. 
Sense of Purpose: To preserve and enhance a way of life since S.XI century.
Sense of Joy: To celebrate life and enjoy with friends.

Name: Thinking Tree Spirits
Description: A women-led distillery creating farm-to-flask spirits made with locally sourced grains and fruit.

Name: VINEO vins et spiritueux
Description: VINEO est une agence de vins et spiritueux jeune et expérimentée qui développe et fait les succès de ses partenaires vignerons à la SAQ et au Québec.

Name: DOMAINE JEAN YVES MILLAIRE
Description:
Tout a commencé en 1950 lorsque Jean Garnier, le grand-père de Jean-Yves Millaire, achète 6 hectares de vignes sur les communes de Saint-Michel-de-Fronsac et Fronsac. En 1979, l'exploitation est mise en fermage pour 18 ans. C'est en janvier 1998 que Jean-Yves Millaire décide de reprendre l'exploitation familiale.
Rejoint par Christine, son épouse, ils exploitent maintenant 20 hectares répartis sous trois appellations différentes : AOC Canon Fronsac - AOC - Fronsac - AOC Bordeaux.

Les appellations Fronsac et Canon-Fronsac se situent sur la rive droite de la Dordogne au confluent de deux rivières, la Dordogne et l’Isle. Cette particularité protège le vignoble et lui assure un climat privilégié. Le relief est très varié avec beaucoup de coteaux et des sols argilo-calcaires issus de l'érosion des roches mères garantissent un grand terroir.

Le travail de vigneron, axé sur la qualité et le respect de notre Terre, a naturellement conduits vers l'agriculture biologique et la biodynamie. En effet, grâce à des techniques de cultures visant à n'employer aucun herbicide, fongicide, insecticide ou autre pesticides de synthèse, les Vignobles Millaire vous présentent des vins naturels, l’expression pure de leur terroir.
Le travail au sol est privilégié, l'enherbement, l'effeuillage et surtout un suivi très minutieux de chaque parcelle car, dans la culture biologique, tout est basé sur l'anticipation et la prévention.

La vinification se fait de façon naturelle, sans artifices, grâce au savoir-faire du vigneron. La symbiose retrouvée entre l'homme et sa vigne vont permettre à nos vins d'exprimer toute leur quintessence.
Partagé avec Public

Name: egb wein + wir / Einkaufsgenossenschaft Biel
Description:
Bei uns finden Sie Weine, Spirituosen, Olivenöl, Aceto und Zubehörartikel zu attraktiven Preisen.

Unser Geschäftsauftrag:
- Wir garantieren unseren Kunden ein ausgezeichnetes Preis-/Leistungsverhältnis bei den angebotenen Produkten. 
- Kundenzufriedenheit ist unser höchster Qualitätsanspruch. Beanstandungen nehmen wir ernst und bieten Lösungen.
- Wir beschäftigen kompetente, motivierte und engagierte Mitarbeitende. Ihnen bieten wir moderne Anstellungsbedingungen.
- Wir handeln kostenbewusst, fair und kompetent gegenüber Kunden, Lieferanten und Geschäftspartnern.
- Wir respektieren unsere Umwelt und setzen uns für erneuerbare Energien ein.
- Den Mietern über unserer Geschäftslokalität bieten wir qualitativen Wohnraum zu moderaten Preisen.

Name: Icon Vins Fins - Québec
Description: Icon Vins Fins est un acteur important dans l’industrie des vins et spiritueux depuis 1978. La forte croissance des dernières années a permis à Vins Fins L’Agence d’accroître le rayonnement de sa passion et de solidifier son leadership dans un marché hautement concurrentiel. Nous nous distinguons par notre agilité et instinct commercial, la rigueur de notre service à la clientèle, notre transparence et notre orientation axée sur les résultats. Vins Fins L’Agence représente plusieurs marques déjà bien établies qui jouissent d’une forte notoriété sur le marché québécois.

Name: KARLOFF & TATRA DISTILLERY
Description:
SINCE 2002 OUR FAMILY BUSINESS HAS PROUDLY BEEN CRAFTING PRODUCTS IN THE TOWN OF KEŽMAROK, SLOVAKIA. WE SOURCE OUR NATURAL PRODUCTS WITH UTMOST CARE AND AN EMPHASIS ON QUALITY, TASTE AND UNIQUENESS. OUR PASSION IS OUR WORK. WE POUR OUR HEART AND SOUL INTO WHAT WE MAKE AND TAKE GREAT PRIDE WHEN OUR CUSTOMERS ENJOY OUR PRODUCTS. TATRATEA HAS WON THE HEARTS OF MANY ALL ACROSS THE GLOBE AND WE TAKE PRIDE IN THIS LOCALLY - OWNED, WORLD-FAMOUS PRODUCT COMES FROM OUR FACTORY. 

The company's products have been numerously and prestigiously awarded for both taste and design. Key recognitions include the RED DOT DESIGN AWARD, the SUPERIOR TASTE AWARD, the PENTAWARD, and the INTERNATIONAL SPIRITS CHALLENGE.

TATRATEA is the company’s brand leader, with its global english name now officially used thanks to growing exports. TATRATEA is a range of unique herbal tea liqueurs. With alcohol content ranging from 17% to 72% and an array of enticing flavours, everyone can find a drink to suit their taste.

In 2016 company started to produce CZECHOSLOVAKIA VODKA, which is made from the silky-smooth Kojetín spirit and pure water from the Tatras. The uniqueness of Czechoslovakia Vodka is in its MULTISTAGE FILTRATION. The whole process gives it the necessary sparkling cleanliness.

For more information on Karloff, its brands and its vision, please visit : www.karloff.sk, www.tatratea.com or www.czechoslovakiavodka.com

Name: Vinœmotion
Description:
VinŒmotion est né d’une volonté d’allier ma passion du vin, de la nature, à l’extension croissante des problématiques environnementales qui préoccupent grandement mon esprit. 

Depuis plusieurs décennies, la qualité de l’environnement se dégrade, les activités de l’Homme sont à l’origine de cette détérioration. L'usage des produits phytosanitaires, herbicides, insecticides ou fongicides au sein de la milieu viticulture, constituent une menace pour la biodiversité et pour la santé des consommateurs. 

De nombreux vignerons bataillent pour respecter leurs terroirs d’origine et produire des vins en adéquation entre terroir, vigneron et cépage, tout en intégrant la notion d’éco-responsable au quotidien dans le travail de la vigne à la cave. Ces vignerons ont tous l’intime conviction qu’il est temps de restituer à la nature ce qu’elle nous a donné, en adoptant des modes de production tournés autour des vins vivants. 
En association avec ces vignerons, j’ai décidé de m'investir corps et âme dans ce combat qui est le nôtre, afin de promouvoir une agriculture saine pour permettre aux consommateurs d’entrer dans une démarche de consommation responsable et durable. 

Notre principal objectif consiste avant tout dans une démarche d’accompagnement et de soutien aux vignerons qui s'engagent pour l’environnement. Pour ce faire, nous œuvrons au quotidien pour leur apporter une visibilité auprès d’éco-consommateurs avertis et des amateurs de vin sur le territoire national et international.
VinŒmotion a aussi pour objectif de répondre aux besoins grandissants des consommateurs en matière de connaissance des labels environnementaux, des différentes pratiques viticoles en alliant transparence et pédagogie. Pour ce faire, nous proposons une sélection de vins regroupant les 3 modes de viticulture les plus respectueux de l’environnement, à savoir l’agriculture biologique, l’agriculture biodynamique, l’agriculture naturelle.

Name: Satryna Tequila
Description: Satryna is a small batch artisanal tequila producer committed to making the smoothest tequila in the world. We are as passionate about our exceptional quality as we are about delivering ultra luxury with an edgy eclectic individuality . Extraordinary levels of attention to detail is bestowed on each and every hand crafted bottle ensuring a truly incomparable experience. Our limited edition bottle celebrates the Mexican festival of “Día de Meurtos” - The Day of the Dead.

Name: Tonel Privado
Description:
Tonel Privado nació con la misión de ser el proveedor preferido de vinos, espumantes, espirituosas, y accesorios complementarios de los productos orientados a clientes que buscan excelencia. 

En el año 1976 comienza nuestra historia en el barrio tradicional de Belgrano. 
Tonel Privado por aquellos años se convertía en un claro referente del buen gusto y refinamiento.

Su expansión fue gradual, ubicándose estratégicamente en sitios clave de Buenos Aires.
Con una expertise adquirida a través de sus más de 30 años en el mercado, se posiciona como la cadena de tiendas especializadas más avanzada del mercado.

Nuestra marca es un sello de distinción el cuál representa  Modernidad, Innovación, Confianza, y Calidad.

En la constante búsqueda de superarse y satisfacer las necesidades del consumidor, presenta una nueva sensación de compra a la altura de las más modernas tiendas del mundo.

Name: Vignobles Rousseau (SCE)
Description:
Producteur Libournais de vins d’AOC de qualité, en respect de l’environnement et de l’humain.
Démarches sociales, environnementales et de qualité via plusieurs certifications et labels : Vignerons Engagés, Terra Vitis, HVE.

Name: Pico Maccario
Description:
The wine-growing center Pico Maccario has a history of noble passions, a strong bond with the traditions of the past, a professional business environment.
The two brothers Pico and Vitaliano Maccario, founders of the centre, are united in their love for wine, passion inherited along with the land from their grandfather Carlo.
In the golden triangle between rivers Tanaro and Belbo, there is one of the most important Italian wine production “terroir”: the area of Barbera d’Asti and Barbera del Monferrato.
Here a well balanced and harmonious landscape is to be found, marked by the geometry of the vineyards shaped like the tiles of a big mosaic.

Name: Vergenoegd Löw Wine Estate
Description:
Vergenoegd Löw The Wine Estate is one of the oldest wine farms in South Africa, known for its red wines. It is a provincial heritage site in the suburb of Faure in the Stellenbosch wine production region and covers an area of 160 hectares. The name translates from the Dutch word “Vergenoegd” meaning “delighted, amused”.

Situated on the lower reaches of the Eerste River, the vineyards on this piece of land are cooled in summer by south-westerly breezes from the False Bay. The geographical location gives Vergenoegd Löw The Wine Estate a good positioning for wine production.

The role of nature in the sustainability of wine production has always been respected at Vergenoegd Löw The Wine Estate. The approach of minimal interference is followed in the vine cultivation concerning the use of pesticides and herbicides, as well as during the winemaking process. All viticulture practices are done by hand, which creates an intensive attention to the vines.

Vergenoegd Löw The Wine Estate is unique in the use of Indian Runner Ducks as part of our pest control program. The Indian Runners “work” in the vineyards by eating snails and other insects. More than 1000 Indian Runners are herded into the vineyards daily to forage for snails and insects. The Parade of Ducks (walking to and from the vineyards) has become a major public attraction at Vergenoegd Löw The Wine Estate.

Name: North Shore Distillery, LLC
Description: We are the original craft distillery in Illinois, established in 2004 by a creative husband and wife team with a deep passion for spirits and cocktails. We make incredibly delicious spirits by hand – spirits that are not possible on a mass production scale – with fresh, original flavors.

Name: Wetterstadens Bryggeri AB
Description: Wetterstadens Bryggeri AB - Ständigt flödande

Name: Cerbaco Distribution
Description:
For 35 years, Cerbaco has tirelessly sought the finest Spirits, Aperitifs, and Liqueurs—revealing authentic treasures. Our collection holds confidential, artisanal gems celebrated for true quality. Choosing Cerbaco means choosing quality, honesty, and value.

Our journey began alongside France's top-tier restaurants, where exclusive products thrived, avoiding commercial spirits. These establishments connected us with trustworthy producers, affirming our worthiness. Upholding this ethos, we've expanded our range to encompass exceptional Gins, Whiskies, Rhum Agricole, Calvados, Aperitifs, Armagnacs and more—selecting not the most famous but the absolute best.

Name: The McLaren Vale Distillery
Description:
McLaren Vale Distillery is a premium single malt whisky producer. We collaborate with some of Australia’s most respected and celebrated winemakers and brewers to create spirits of true provenance.

Awarded Brand Innovator of the year in 2018 by Icons of Whisky, the next evolution of our brand will incorporate a new hospitality space expected to open early 2023.

We are located on the northern end of McLaren Vale, with world-class views overlooking undulating vineyards, the perfect backdrop to enjoy unique tasting experiences, and play host to special events and weddings.

Name: SWIT COMPANY - Rare & Fine Wines Merchant
Description:
Established in 2019, SWIT COMPANY was founded to bring you the finest wines from around the world.

As importers and distributors in Switzerland and beyond, we meticulously and passionately curate wines from prestigious and renowned terroirs and winemakers, as well as emerging or lesser-known terroirs and winemakers with unique approaches to winemaking or environmental considerations.

We are constantly searching to identify these new winemakers, enabling us to offer you the very best of what is available today.

Furthermore, we are fortunate to be able to provide you with some of the rarest wines in the world, including vintage variations, special sizes (half-bottles, magnums, double-magnums, and more), as well as access to en primeur wine sales.

Name: OnVinum
Description:
Meet online, trade worldwide!

OnVinum facilita a las bodegas el acceso a mercados internacionales, sin importar la capacidad económica que tengan para invertir en ellos.

Regístrate gratis y utiliza esta herramienta para mostrar tus productos de forma ilimitada a todos los agentes de la cadena de distribución que te interesen, en todos los países que lo desees, sin salir de tu casa. 

Gracias a un sistema que matchea los intereses de los compradores con lo que ofreces, puedes conectar con compradores de mercados que te interesen e iniciar una relación comercial. 

Empieza ya a vender tus productos en todo el mundo!

Ahorra tiempo y dinero y empieza a vender ya!

Name: Domaine de Valdition
Description: Le Domaine de Valdition d’une superficie de 240 hectares est situé en Provence, au cœur des Alpilles, entre Orgon et Eygalières et près de Saint-Rémy de Provence.

Name: La Dolce Vita Wine Tours
Description:
LA DOLCE VITA WINE TOURS is a boutique tour operator offering educational wine vacations in Italy, Spain and Portugal.

Small, intimate groups allow full immersion in local wine culture. Converse with winemakers, indulge in gourmet wine dinners, discover places you’d never find on your own. 

3 TYPES OF WINE TOURS:
• Epicurean –  Gourmet wine tours with a dose of culture, cooking & sightseeing
• Wine & Walking – Morning hikes, afternoon tastings
• Wine Intensive – For the dedicated wine lover

ACCESS, ACCESS, ACCESS
We’ve forged relationships with top wineries that  guarantee entry and a warm, Italian-style welcome.  

USER-FRIENDLY WINE EDUCATION
From the casual imbiber to the serious connoisseur, wine enthusiasts of all types enjoy a learning experience in situ. Expert guides and winemakers offer insights into:
-	The art & science of winemaking, from grape to glass
-	Current hot debates in Italian winemaking
-	The ABCs of how to taste
-	How to read an Italian wine label
-	Wine & food pairings 

HISTORY, CULTURE, ART & CUISINE
In addition to having wine expertise, company co-owner Claudio Bisio is a history buff and Patricia Thomson trained in Renaissance art history. So every tour is infused with Italy’s rich history and art treasures.

Name: GDO PRO
Description: The only booking system from the wineries!

Name: Bodegas Pinoso
Description:
The cooperative was founded in 1932 with a clear objective – to group wine production of different vine-growers who had their proper cellars until that moment. Other vine-growers were joining on the cooperative very soon and family wineries started to disappear. 

Since 80 years, LA BODEGA DE PINOSO winery selects and processes the fruit of the best vines in order to create great wines. Our commitment to quality, innovation is acknowledged and rewarded with many international prizes and the confidence of thousands of our customers in different countries (USA, Canada, Japan, The Netherlands, Denmark, Germany, Belgium, China…). We are a young team, which joins together technical and trade experts, bound on leaving behind a past of wine-in-bulk production.

WINERY

The equipment of the winery occupy a plot of 40.000 m2, of which 8.000 are constructions that  house  machinery of production, stainless steel tanks with temperature control (18 with capacity of 60 000 kg, 11 of 100 00 kg) a bottling machine (1000 bot./hour) and a cellar with French and American oak casks (90). 

We also have an experimental winery with tanks of 2000 L where we can investigate possibilities of making new wines and permanent improvement of the quality. 

We offer the unique combination of thousands of years of tradition and experience with modern technology. The results speak for themselves....fabulous values. 

VINEYARDS

La Bodega de Pinoso can be considered as one of the most important wineries of the Denomination of Origin Alicante.  We own about 1.800 ha of vineyards at the average age of 25 years, some vines are 50. We produce approximately 6.000.000 litres per year. About 55% of this production comes from organic farming. 
Comprising 70 % of our vineyards, Monastrell, an indigenous variety defines character of majority of our wines, complemented by other excellent varieties such as Tempranillo, Syrah, Cabernet Savignon, Merlot, Garnacha Tintorera, Macabe, Airén and Sauvignon Blanc.

Name: CUT RUM
Description:
CUT RUM makes real rum for real people. 

No pirates, no sea monsters, no pin-up girls. Just quality authentic rum using only natural ingredients to produce the best tasting rum for people who know the difference

Name: L'Estabel
Description: Héritiers d’une terre d’une grande beauté, réputée depuis des siècles pour la forte typicité de ses vins. Nous avons à cœur de vous révéler ce paradis viticole unique en Languedoc. Venez nous rendre visite à Cabrières pour découvrir nos vins !

Name: Vintage Malt Whisky Company
Description:
The Vintage Malt Whisky Company - family owned and run spirits merchants, specialising in Islay single malt whisky. Established 23 years ago, it exports a portfolio of premium brands to more than 30 countries around the world. 

At Vintage Malt, we believe that having fun is a serious business.

Name: Scolaris Vini
Description: Scolaris is an old name in the Collio, a family business now represented by fourth generation Gianmarco - his father was an extremely popular figure in the region and Scolaris recently tripled its bottled production under his stewardship, to more than a million bottles a year.

Name: Hall Of Fame Vodka
Description:
Hall Of Fame Spirits is the oldest American Indian family owned/BIPOC Lifestyle liquor brand founded in 2015. Our mission is twofold. First and foremost is to inspire the world’s best American-made Ultra-Premium Spirits (Vodka is our 1st release) while never losing sight of our ancestry/challenges for generational success. Second, is to create a distinctive minority owned brand (BIPOC) that bottles and elicits all the intensity, emotions, valence, and fandom that endears us to sports and makes us true emotionally vested fans!
 
Our journey has taken us to the some of the best sporting events in the world to tell our unbelievable story and what we have found has truly been amazing. Hall Of Fame Vodka embodies the spirit of competition and the dedication it takes to achieve excellence in life. We are the ultimate fans of triumph over adversity, the journey against all odds, the spectacular moments that keep us on the edge of our seats, and that we never tire of seeing on replay! An athlete who turns it on to mount a comeback, the coach that inspires a team’s victory, or the teamwork and grit that perseveres despite loss is the foundation that is building this brand. Being able to Embrace Adversity on this journey is a blessing and a gift.
 
We have created an American hand-crafted spirit that stands on its own merits; multiple award winning, premium ingredients, gluten/sugar and additive free. A grand slam: A martini quality vodka, an iconic unforgettable trademarked brand along with a patented bottle design in conjunction with the world-renowned artist - Rene Garcia Jr. We have produced a company second to none, and one that truly honors our love of spirits, sport and our heritage. We hope you have many opportunities to enjoy Hall Of Fame Spirits, in honor of the same reasons we founded our company.
Cheers, Bubba

Name: Domaine de Blanville
Description:
Le Domaine de Blanville est un domaine familial créé en 1997 par Béatrice et Bernard Nivollet d'environ 68 hectares à Saint-Pargoire (34). Margaux et Charlotte, leur deux filles se préparent au passage de témoin dans quelques années.

 HVE 3 depuis 2019, le Domaine entame sa conversion bio depuis les vendanges 2021.

 Sur l'aire d'appellation AOP Languedoc Grés de Montpellier et AOP Languedoc Pézenas, nous travaillons sur la méthode des climats bourguignons avec des vins majoritairement monoparcellaires ! 

 Château Haut-Blanville
Cuvées historiques de Blanville avec des vins monoparcellaires, souvent monocépages, vieilles vignes, tous les vins sont élevés en barriques neuves et/ou anciennes (de 6 à 36 mois), vins de garde

 Les Créations
Cuvées pensées et créées par la jeune équipe, vins jeunes, sans élevage et avec une vraie originalité comme L'Imprévue (Cinsault sans sulfites)

 Domaine des Celtis
Jeune Domaine créé en 2018 sur l'appellation AOP Languedoc Pézenas, vins très fruités, sans élevage, s'apprécient dès leur jeunesse

 Distribution à l'international (20aine de pays) : Chine, Etats-Unis, Cambodge, Japon, Brésil, Allemagne, Belgique, Suisse, Luxembourg, Danemark, Autriche, France ... etc.

Name: Dehesa de Luna, Finca Reserva de Biodiversidad
Description:
Dehesa de Luna es una finca de unas 3000 Ha.de extensión situada en el término municipal de la Roda,Albacete. En la finca conviven diversas explotaciones agrícolas, entre las cuales se encuentra el viñedo. La primera añada que lanzó la bodega fue en el año 2005, siendo nuestra producción actual de unas 50.000 botellas al año.
El respeto por el medio ambiente y la biodiversidad que nos rodea, son los principales valores de nuestra empresa, junto con el afán de superación contínuo y la búsqueda de las máximas cotas de calidad de nuestros vinos

Name: Wijnkooperij de Lange bv
Description:
At Wijnkooperij de Lange we import and sell fine wines to the gastronomy, high end wineshops and private persons throughout the Netherlands. Wineproducers like Champagne Henriot, Domaine d'Auvenay, Coche-Dury, Henri Boillot, Bouchard Père& Fils, Château Rayas, Domaine de la Grange des Peres, Case Basse di Gianfranco Soldera, Az. Agr. Tua Rita, Emidio Pepe, The Sadie Family and De Toren Private Cellar are in our exclusive portfolio. We have a strong position in the Dutch gastronomy and for our private customers we founded a private wine club in 2019: Cuve 38, A Unique Wineclub. The members of this private wine club have access to our most exclusive wines.

Wijnkooperij de Lange is exclusief importeur van wijnhuizen uit Europa, Zuid-Afrika en Nieuw-Zeeland. Wij hebben een nauwe samenwerking met de top van de Nederlandse gastronomie waar wij trots op zijn. Dit komt mede door ons assortiment met wijnhuizen als Champagne Henriot, Coche-Dury, Domaine d'Auvenay, Henri Boillot, Bouchard Père et Fils, Château Rayas, Domaine de la Grange des Pères, Case Basse de G. Soldera, Az. Agr. Tua Rita, Cascina Penna-Currado, The Sadie Family Wines en De Toren Private Cellar. In 2019 hebben wij een wijnclub opgericht: Cuve 38, A Unique Wineclub. Leden van deze wijnclub hebben toegang tot de topdomeinen uit ons assortiment.

Name: Vine Arts Wine and Spirits
Description: Vine Arts Wine and Spirits is Calgary's most creative wine shop. Located in the heart of Victoria Park, Vine Arts features a diverse selection of wine, craft beers, specialty spirits, bitters and cocktail ingredients.

Name: Cunning Spirits Merchants
Description:
At Cunning Spirits Merchants, our expertise lies in aged spirits sourcing and holistic consulting services for distilleries and brands. Whether you're looking to find rare whiskey, develop best-in-class liquid for a new brand launch, or grow your existing distillery operation, we can help. With over a decade of experience, some our our achievements include:
- 200+ market products developed
- 20+ world's best or best-in-class awards for whiskey, rum, brandy, tequila, vodka, gin, RTD/RTS, and flavored products
- 4 patented and proprietary technologies developed and implemented
- 3 full beverage development programs tested, launched, and scaled
- Over a dozen celebrity partnerships established and fostered
- Over $25M raised on start-up projects from angel investors and private equity organizations
- Product sold and shipped into 5 continents and over a dozen countries
- Multiple facilities designed, permitted, and qualified
- Many brand portfolios fully developed, launched, and commercialized

We provide best in class liquid, actionable advice, and tested guidance for all things spirits.

Name: Ten Minutes by Tractor
Description:
Ten Minutes by Tractor is an acclaimed Mornington Peninsula winery specialising in Pinot Noir and Chardonnay.  

In addition to our winery we have two restaurants: a two hatted fine dining restaurant - Ten Minutes By Tractor and a french bistro - Petit Tracteur. 

We are passionate about what we do here and strive to create a unique and personal experience for each of our guests. Those people we are looking for will have, above all, a passion to learn and move forward in an encouraging, professional team environment; they will also have experience in similar situations and a wide-ranging knowledge of produce, technique, wine, service and hospitality in general.

We have considerable experience in employing people with 457 and 417 visas and welcome applicants from all around the world for short (6 month) or longer term employment.

Name: Barcelona Brands SL.
Description:
We are a venture created out of necessity of making innovative and category challenging premium concepts and brands within an all too dull drinks industry.
A young Mediterranean inspired company driven to create, develop and distribute innovative and unique product propositions, within old fashioned, boring, or forgotten categories.
We want get consumers alike involved again and change the category forever.
We define our own rules focusing on premium high rotation brands. We call them Signature B Brands.

Name: MacRostie Winery
Description: Producer of single vineyard wines--Wildcat Mountain Vineyard-- and regional blends from Sonoma Coast and Caneros.

Name: Liquid Brand Exports
Description:
Supporting up-and-coming drinks businesses to build international brand presence and achieve long-term global success. 

Our aim is to share knowledge and expertise to enable brand owners to better understand what is required for exporting their drinks. We offer advice to companies new to exporting and also to those looking to further develop their exporting strategy or perhaps target new markets. Our approach is tailored to suit each company’s specific needs, whether that is becoming the export department for the business; leading on all exporting plans, or mentoring company staff so they learn the ins and outs allowing the brand to remain in full control.

We can support with every aspect of exporting, from market research, market selection and prioritisation, to logistics, market entry and documentation.

We have gained a lot of experience from working in various markets around the world and are able to help your understanding of local markets, so you are fully prepared to do business abroad.

Name: Gramofon Wine
Description:
Located in the heart of the most important vineyard areas of Romania - Dealu Mare, Gramofon Wine finds itself near the city Urlati, among the surrounding vineyards, in a wonderful landscape, that fills your heart with joy and positivity, far away from all the busy rhythm of everyday life
The vineyard was replanted starting 2009, at distance of 2.2m, each variety of grapes is distributed in relatively small areas in order to allow a rigorous and efficient care.

The vision of the brand is to express the harmony of wine in the most plain and natural way..

Our wines develop in an organic way, complex winemaking techniques and processes are meant to enrich and perfect each flavor and taste in order to obtain exceptional results.

Name: OENOLYSE Laboratoire d'oenologie D.PERALDI
Description:
Le laboratoire OENOLYSE, au cœur des vignobles de Provence,
propose une palette de compétences et d’expertises
mise à disposition à travers une équipe dédiée
et des outils analytiques performants.

Name: LES VINS DE CRUS
Description:
Founded in 1975, Les Vins De Crus is one of Bordeaux's leading export wine merchants.
The company distributes the most famous châteaux (classified and assimilated growths) but can also offer a whole range of delicious exclusive Bordeaux wines.

Name: HvadDrikkerManTil?
Description:
Vi tror på at mad og vin er to elementer i en totaloplevelse. Både når du selv sætter dig til middagsbordet med familie og venner og når dine kunder - der har fået en flaske vin af dig - gør det.
Derfor vi tager udgangspunkt i vin og mad på samme tid, og når du køber vin hos os, så er der altid opskrifter og anbefalinger med, som sikrer en god oplevelse.

Name: Byrne Vineyards
Description:
Byrne Family: Estate Grown; Sustainably Made.

Byrne Vineyards are a significant family owned wine business, celebrating 50 years as vignerons.  

Three generations and with 350 hectares of vineyards in the Clare Valley and Riverland, South Australia, Byrne are one of the largest South Australian grape growers. Crafting from estate grown fruit, using sustainable winegrowing methods, Byrne Vineyards are proudly building wine brands for Australian and International markets. 

Environmental sustainability is integral to the business which has won multiple awards including SAWIA Environmental Excellence 2013 Award for water usage and the United Nations World Environment Day 2014 [Finalist].

Peter Gajewski winemaker [ex Penfold’s Senior Winemaker] and Phil Reedman Master of Wine make up the winemaking team while the vineyards are managed by Terry Byrne and his team.  The Australian office is based in Norwood close to Adelaide and International country offices are in Europe, UK and China.  The Byrne team are strongly committed to service and collaboration in meeting market needs through our valued partnerships.

The brand portfolio includes Byrne Family, Thomson Estate 1838, Antiquarian, Scotts Creek, Criminal Minds, Devlins Mount, Thievin’ Devlin and exclusive labels tailored to client opportunities and bespoke to suit specific needs.

New developments in DOUBLE PASS Shiraz, large plantings of Riesling and the new Pairings wines.  Eco-Tourism accommodation soon to be among the vineyards overlooking the wetlands at Scotts Creek.

Byrne Vineyards - the preferred international partner for Australian wine.

Name: Cellars Direct Ltd
Description: A team of experts with more than 20 years experience and a complete understanding of the needs of our customers and producers. We operate in the UK and EU as the commercial arm for a group of premium wine producers. With an absolute focus on a limited number of like-minded, non-competing producers, we achieve results through expertise, agility and trusted relationships.

Name: North Shore Distillery, LLC
Description: We are the original craft distillery in Illinois, established in 2004 by a creative husband and wife team with a deep passion for spirits and cocktails. We make incredibly delicious spirits by hand – spirits that are not possible on a mass production scale – with fresh, original flavors.

Name: Lombardi Wines
Description:
Founded in 2013 by Christine & Tony Lombardi, Lombardi Wines honors a rich family history of wine, food, and tradition. Together, with Winemaker Cabell Coursey, they craft small lots of Chardonnay and Pinot Noir from some of the finest vineyards along the Sonoma Coast. The Pinot Noir is made with care from a family of growers in Petaluma, where the Lombardi family has been since 1947.

The majority of wine will be sold direct-to-consumer. If you would like to join the mailing list, please visit www.lombardiwines.com. Information surrounding a unique allocation of wines will be distributed via email a few weeks prior to each release. To learn more, please visit www.lombardiwines.com.

Name: Vignobles Dauré - Château de Jau
Description: Fondé au XIIème siècle par les moines cisterciens, cet important domaine d’une centaine d’hectares est aujourd’hui la propriété de la famille Dauré. Situé au cœur de vallée de l’Agly, dans l’arrière-pays du Roussillon, le Château de Jau est pionnier dans l’œnotourisme en créant le premier restaurant vigneron dans les années 70 et un espace d’art contemporain. La petite route qui conduit au château se faufile dans un décor méditerranéen où oliviers, cyprès et vignes se partagent le territoire donnant à l’ensemble un air de Toscane.

Name: Accuro Limited
Description:
We amplify Nature’s aging progress letting you create mature wines and spirits in a fraction of the time.

Our technology can be used in barrels or tanks and at any stage of the process, and can be viewed in real-time.

Each of patented devices are internet-connected - providing winemakers with real-time insight into their maturation programs, and greater peace of mind throughout the process.

Name: Rones y Bebidas del Caribe - Yazoo
Description: Especializados en la producción y envejecimiento de ron. Igualmente desarrollo y envasado de productos para terceros.
Location: San Pedro de Macoris, San Pedro de Macoris

Name: Bodegas Eresma - La Soterraña
Description:
Bodegas Eresma - La Soterraña nace de un proyecto ambicioso de varios amigos, amantes incondicionales del vino y vinculados al sector desde hace años. Entre ellos hay enólogos y viticultores.

Su pasión por el vino – y la variedad verdejo en particular – les impulsa a la realización de un capricho, elaborar un vino blanco verdejo acogido a la DO Rueda con el único propósito de la calidad y distinción del mismo. Por ello, Bodega la Soterraña se yergue en el año 2006 en la localidad de Olmedo, tierra tradicional de reyes y caballeros en España y zona vinícola de calidad por excelencia dentro de la Denominación de Origen.

La primera cosecha de los vinos de Bodega La Soterraña es la de 2006, inaugurándose con un gran éxito a nivel nacional por la calidad y sabor de su vino Eresma, cuyo nombre hace honor al río que cruza la localidad de Olmedo.

Hoy en día, Bodega La Soterraña y sus vinos tienen ya un gran historial de reconocimientos, excelentes críticas, muy buenas puntuaciones en guías y revistas especializadas y diversos premios y galardones a la calidad, nacionales e internacionales, situándose así a la cabeza de los vinos de gama alta de la D.O. Rueda.

Nuestros vinos se elaboran tras vendimias perfectamente controladas de viñedos situados en las zonas de calidad de la DO Rueda.
