Cepas centenarias, vendimia manual y una selección previa de uva hacen que nuestros vinos – cuya cuidadosa elaboración se complementa con la utilización de la más alta tecnología – adquieran un grado de valor seguro en calidad, sabor y distinción dentro de la DO.

Name: Les Trois Pinardiers
Description: L’équipage déniche tous les mois 3 vins “coup de cœur” sélectionnés parmi plus de cinquante bouteilles dégustées à l’aveugle. Ce travail minutieux nous permet de vous offrir une nouvelle approche du vin : proposer une petite sélection d’une centaine de références se renouvelant chaque mois !

Name: Biricik Wine&Spirits
Description:
BİRİCİK Winery is a group company. In addition to the wine producing company, it operates viticulture, accommodation, cafe restaurant, transportation,
excavation, gas station and continues its commercial activities in many areas.
The Production Start Date of Biricik Winery dates back to the early 1950's. When it was first established; While wine production continued by hand squeezed
and in earthen pots, then in reinforced concrete stone warehouses and then in oak barrels, the foundations of today's modern facility were laid by improving the
bottling and packaging method.
Until the beginning of 1997, the wines produced and offered for sale only in barrels, are now on sale as bottled and packaged. Biricik Winery has come a long
way in wine production and has become the number one wine producer in our country by making its existing facilities very modern and suitable for today's
conditions. The wines we produce are spread all over Turkey with our fleet of 14 trailers; we supply the products to the market through a total of 66 Distributors in
the Marmara, Aegean, Central Anatolia and Mediterranean regions and total 700sales representatives at On‑Trade, Off Trade, HoReCa Sales Channels and Key Accounts.
Our local wines production capacity of approximately 25,000,000 liters/year, we both make a significant contribution to the regional economy and provide employment opportunities to a large extent.

Name: World Wine & Whisky
Description:
The story starts many years ago. As a youngster, I got interested in wines and whiskies. Not just any wine- and whisky bottles but the rare ones, very well known, belonging to special selections. As you may imagine, I could hardly afford these. I did several studies into wine and whisky, to learn more about the two products and to improve and deepen my knowledge. Family and friends joined my hobby and advised me on the choices I should make. From all over the world I got offers of the best and the finest selections. On travels to Scotland, France, Spain, the USA and Asia (Japan, China and Taiwan), I met many people, who are the masters in their area. That’s why I choose our name ‘World Wine & Whisky’.

My hobby finally became my work. My network increased as well as my personal collection of special fine & rare wines and whiskies. Finally I took the plunge and decided to start a webshop with the help of my family and many good friends, who joined my network. Knowledge is key. 

The webshop www.worldwinewhisky.com has been online since July 2017. In close cooperation with Wine Company De Ware Jacob, we are offering a fine and rare selection of wines and whiskies to the market. Exclusive and unique to our customers. We also hope to function as a spindle in our network and will constantly look for the best of the best and the ones that are hard to find. Why? Have you ever heard of the old saying: Life is too short to drink bad wine? Well, here we are.

Contact us at: 
- Mail: service@worldwinewhisky.com
- WhatsApp: +31 (0)6 4666 8880
- Website: www.worldwinewhisky.com
- Our webshop is open 24/7
- Our shop in Amsterdam is open by appointment only.

Address of our store: 
World Wine & Whisky
Herenstraat 41
1015 BZ Amsterdam
The Netherlands.

For other questions: service@worldwinewhisky.com.

Name: KARLOFF
Description:
SINCE 2002 OUR FAMILY BUSINESS HAS PROUDLY BEEN CRAFTING PRODUCTS IN THE TOWN OF KEŽMAROK, SLOVAKIA. WE SOURCE OUR NATURAL PRODUCTS WITH UTMOST CARE AND AN EMPHASIS ON QUALITY, TASTE AND UNIQUENESS. OUR PASSION IS OUR WORK. WE POUR OUR HEART AND SOUL INTO WHAT WE MAKE AND TAKE GREAT PRIDE WHEN OUR CUSTOMERS ENJOY OUR PRODUCTS. TATRATEA HAS WON THE HEARTS OF MANY ALL ACROSS THE GLOBE AND WE TAKE PRIDE IN THIS LOCALLY - OWNED, WORLD-FAMOUS PRODUCT COMES FROM OUR FACTORY. 

The company's products have been numerously and prestigiously awarded for both taste and design. Key recognitions include the RED DOT DESIGN AWARD, the SUPERIOR TASTE AWARD, the PENTAWARD, and the INTERNATIONAL SPIRITS CHALLENGE.

TATRATEA is the company’s brand leader, with its global english name now officially used thanks to growing exports. TATRATEA is a range of unique herbal tea liqueurs. With alcohol content ranging from 17% to 72% and an array of enticing flavours, everyone can find a drink to suit their taste.

In 2016 company started to produce CZECHOSLOVAKIA VODKA, which is made from the silky-smooth Kojetín spirit and pure water from the Tatras. The uniqueness of Czechoslovakia Vodka is in its MULTISTAGE FILTRATION. The whole process gives it the necessary sparkling cleanliness.

For more information on Karloff, its brands and its vision, please visit : www.karloff.sk, www.tatratea.com or www.czechoslovakiavodka.com

Name: Cavas Rosell Boher
Description:
Somos una bodega con más de 25 años de experiencia y 125 de tradición en la elaboración de espumantes elaborados exclusivamente bajo el Método Champenoise.

Entre nuestros vinos tranquilos destacan los varietales Casa Boher y las líneas Gran y Fincas.

Cavas Rosell Boher, una bodega con historia y tradición, pero sobre todo, con futuro.

Name: LGV Wines - Le Grand Verre
Description: French Organic Wines in 6.3 oz Bottles - Specialized in Women-led Estates

Name: Iconic Wineries of British Columbia
Description:
Iconic Wineries of British Columbia is a carefully curated collection of the region’s finest wineries, each a means to discover the diverse microclimates of the Okanagan Valley.

The Iconic Collection provides an educational portal for anyone interested in discovering more about British Columbian or Canadian wines.

Name: Associació | Col·legi d'Enòlegs i Enòlogues de Catalunya
Description: Els fins primordials de l'associació són els d'obtenir el reconeixement legal de l'activitat dels enòlegs, la seva protecció jurídica i qualsevol altra acció que pugui millorar el seu funcionament com a col·lectiu professional. Altres objectius són el foment, l'organització o la participació en qualsevol acte, conferència, seminari o activitats tècniques relacionades amb la vitivinicultura, tant dins l'àmbit de l'Associació com amb terceres persones o entitats.

Name: Klein Roosboom Boutique Winery
Description:
At Klein Roosboom the elements combine in perfect harmony to create the enviable conditions that make our wines so special. Our unique terroir allows each grape variety to be grown in the locale climatic conditions that suite it best. Our South facing slopes are suited to Merlot, Cabernet Sauvignon and Shiraz. Our wines happily lodge their roots into rich Hutton, Oakleaf and Clovely soils, extracting nourishment from the earth.

Klein Roosboom is also home to Jéan Restaurant.  Executive Chef, Lorianne Heyns loves to cook outside of the barbed wires to spoil guests with a seasonal menu that constantly changes.

As the fresh Atlantic breeze cools our vineyards, the crisp Cape air shapes the flavours of the grapes, and in turn, the quality of our wines. We also receive an average annual rainfall of between 400 and 650mm, allowing our farmlands to flourish and thrive.

We invite you to discover our piece of heaven that we bottled on earth. Taste our terroir, feel our delicate sea breeze and share our endless passion.

Winetasting; Tuesdays - Sundays: 10h00 - 16h30

Name: Mas de l'Ecriture
Description:
Depuis plus de 25 ans maintenant, sur nos beaux terroirs du Languedoc nous faisons du vin pour nos amis et pour adoucir le cours du temps. Rejoignez nous et venez partager avec nous notre passion.
Le Mas de l'Ecriture est un Domaine de 10 hectares en exploitation. Nous produisons exclusivement du vin rouge, décliné en 3 cuvées : L'Emotion, Les Pensées, L'Ecriture. Chaque vin est fait avec le même soin.

Name: Château Sauman
Description:
Situé à une trentaine de kilomètres de Bordeaux, au coeur de la région vallonnée des Côtes de Bourg surnommée « La Petite Suisse », le château Sauman surplombe l’estuaire de la Gironde.
La propriété a été rachetée en 2018 par Adef Résidences, association à but non lucratif dédiée à l’assistance des personnes dépendantes, qui y a transposé ses valeurs humaines et environnementales. Sous la houlette de Jérôme Donzeaud, directeur d’exploitation, assisté de Gregory Dallalonga et de Anne Elyse Montador, oenologues, ainsi que de toute son équipe, le domaine s’évertue à produire dorénavant des vins structurés tout en conservant une rondeur et un fruit dominant.

Name: ALABE - Associação dos Laboratórios de Enologia
Description:
A ALABE - ASSOCIAÇÃO DOS LABORATÓRIOS DE ENOLOGIA é uma associação sem fins lucrativos, criada por escritura pública realizada a 5 de Junho de 1996.

- Ensaios interlaboratoriais de análise físico-química e sensorial.
- Desenvolvimento e a divulgação de equipamentos de análise físico-química, microbiológica ou sensorial. 
- Atividades de normalização, certificação e acreditação. 
- Conferências, seminários, reuniões técnicas e atividades similares.
- Áreas de atuação:  vinhos, bebidas espirituosas e bebidas à base de vinho, assim como a produtos enológicos.

Estatutos disponíveis em https://alabe.pt/docs/geral/Estatutos%20Novos%20escritura26.05.2023.pdf

Name: Casa Vinicola Canella
Description: Negli anni 80, Luciano Canella già noto produttore di vini frizzanti e spumanti dell’entroterra veneziano e trevigiano e attento osservatore del mercato e delle esigenze dei consumatori, s’interessa alla nuova tendenza di prediligere bevande poco alcoliche, sane e poco caloriche. Gli viene così l’idea di produrre un cocktail a base di spumante ma, diversamente da quanto si apprestano a fare diversi imprenditori in Italia, ricalcando quanto avveniva negli States, decide di utilizzare frutta fresca e della migliore qualità, spremuta come per i cocktail fatti al momento. La scelta cade sul Bellini, il cocktail veneziano, famoso nel mondo e finalmente dal 1988, dopo tantissimi studi e ricerche sulla possibilità di imbottigliare e far durare senza l’utilizzo di conservanti questa preparazione speciale, la Cantina Canella produce il Bellini in bottiglia. Oltre allo spumante di propria produzione, Canella utilizza le pesche della succosissima varietà Maria Bianca selezionata dai migliori raccolti dell’Emilia Romagna e successivamente coltivata in proprio nella tenuta di San Donà in modo da seguire da vicino tutte le fasi della coltivazione. Le pesche bianche vengono infatti lasciate sull’albero finché hanno raggiunto il perfetto grado zuccherino e quel profumo che solamente la maturazione al sole sulla pianta può garantire. Vengono poi sbucciate, liberate dal nocciolo e spremute per essere mescolate allo spumante prodotto anch’esso in loco da uve provenienti dalla zona. Pertanto il cocktail Bellini, veneziano in tutti i sensi, può essere apprezzato in tutto il mondo ed in qualsiasi momento dell’anno.

Name: The Fabulous Ladies' Wine Society
Description:
The Fabulous Ladies' Wine Society is Australia's wine site for women! 

On the website you'll find... 
- Wine news 
- Reviews 
- Information 
- Women-only wine events and 
- Fabulous wine deals 

...all created by women, for women who love wine, and for women who simply want to learn more about the fabulous world of wine.

The Fabulous Ladies’ Wine Society provides women with the wine information that THEY want. If you're sick of the testosterone fuelled, high falutin’ and (let’s face it) downright yawn-inducing way in which this most deliciously wonderful beverage is communicated – especially to women - then you'll LOVE us. We’re putting the FUN and FEMININITY back into wine!

Kick up your heels, grab your glass and enjoy the flow of womanly wine wisdom.

Name: Mawhitipana Ridge Estate
Description:
Māwhitipana Ridge Estate is a single-site vineyard located on Waiheke Island in a sunny coastal valley, producing limited vintages of high quality Syrah and Marsanne. 

We are two families with a shared passion for creating something special, with ‘awata’ or soul. Together, we are deeply committed to kaitiakitanga - protecting and enhancing the land or life force for our children, future generations and the local community. 

Hand produced, our wine naturally expresses the character of our site, from the heavy clay soil to the coastal elements, sunny slopes and low-intervention, sustainable growing techniques. With award-winning winemakers, Michael Wood and Heinrich Storm we produce wine in a way that honours the distinct characteristics of the unique site, soil and vines.

Name: Liquid Gold Wine & Spirits
Description:
Liquid Gold Wine & Spirits is at the forefront of a revolution in the Philippine wine & spirits industry, setting new standards and transforming the way people experience and enjoy alcoholic beverages. With a modern and innovative approach, we seamlessly encapsulate the rich heritage of wine & spirits while infusing it with cutting-edge creativity, building a brand that resonates with the youthful and trendsetting demographic of wine curious and enthusiasts.

In a world where quality and convenience are paramount, Liquid Gold stands out as a lifestyle brand that elevates the wine & spirits-drinking experience to new heights. 

Our mission is to inspire consumers to embrace a lifestyle that values high-quality wine & spirits as a symbol of elevated taste and sophistication.  We make wine & spirits accessible and easy to enjoy by encouraging our consumers to savor the finer things in life while staying on-trend and relevant.

Name: ÔDEVIE - CREATIVE SPIRITS
Description: WITH THE OBJECTIVE TO CREATE AND PRODUCE VERY HIGH-QUALITY FRENCH SPIRITS, WE STARTED ODVEVIE CREATIVE SPIRITS IN 2010. TODAY, THE COMPANY BASED IN PARIS MARKETS 2 GINS AND 3 RUMS. THE COMPANY IS RENOWNED AS THE BEST IN CLASS CRAFT SPIRIT PLAYER. OUR PRODUCTS HAVE BEEN AWARDED AND ACLAIMED INTERNATIONALLY .

Name: All Angels Vineyard
Description:
All Angels is our family-run vineyard, a hidden-gem in the heart of historic, rural Berkshire, where we produce luxury English sparkling wine. 

Planted in 2011 and named after the Parish in which the vineyard sits, the essence of everything we are working to achieve can be expressed in three words: Exclusivity, Community, Sustainability. 

Raise a glass of English wine with us! 

#Enborne #BerkshireLife #Lambourne #HistoricBerkshire

Name: Oak Solutions Group
Description: Oak Solutions Group is a premium oak products company focused on providing expert advice and unparalleled selection to the wine and spirits industries. Utilizing our proprietary science and technology, we work with the world's best winemakers and distillers to achieve their visions. Oak Solutions Group distributes three product lines: ēvOAK, trū/tan and Innerstave.

Name: The Whisky List
Description:
The Whisky List is Australia’s #1 whisky website, otherwise known as Australia’s online home for whisky and spirits. The Whisky List has a strong focus on education through their popular virtual tastings, exclusive bottlings, personalised recommendations, as well as partnerships with independent online retailers, The Whisky Show and numerous whisky bars and distilleries across Australia. 

Since launching in 2018, The Whisky List has helped over 500,000 Aussies find their next bottle of whisky from 8,200+ bottles across 75+ retailers. As of June 2020, every 3 seconds, someone searches for a bottle of whisky on The Whisky List. 

The Whisky List is free to join at thewhiskylist.com.au

Name: Paccot - Domaine La Colombe
Description:
Depuis près de 60 ans, le Domaine La Colombe recherche la vérité du terroir. Par un travail lent et patient, « pas à pas », pour comprendre la personnalité de chaque parchet. Par des méthodes de culture et d’élevage respectant les rythmes naturels. Par des exigences sans compromis tout au long de la vinification. 

Notre ambition est de contribuer à révéler le potentiel des grands terroirs vaudois - notamment par des assemblages novateurs - lorsque la complémentarité permet de progresser vers ce but ! 

Les méthodes de culture, en biodynamie, cherchent à faire vivre le sol. La cave est équipée de fûts de chêne et d’une cuverie permettant un élevage du vin fidèle à la complexité des arômes. L’ensemble de la vinification est guidé par la dégustation, dans le respect de la personnalité de chaque vin.

Name: Russian River Valley Winegrowers
Description:
The Russian River Valley Winegrowers (RRVW) is a community of farmers and winemakers promoting the exceptional grapes and world-renowned wines reflective of the diversity within the Russian River Valley AVA. We are multi-generational stewards of our land and natural resources, continuously innovating sustainable practices for the future in our premier region known for its distinctive Pinot Noir, Chardonnay, and other grape varieties.

It’s a legacy that began in the 19th century when immigrants from Mediterranean countries settled in the Russian River Valley and began planting vines. While most vineyards were "gardens" for personal family consumption, commercial wineries sprang up, and by the dawn of the 20th century there were nearly 200 wineries operating.

Today, every vineyard in Russian River Valley tells a story. With deep roots in California’s viticultural history, our visionary winemakers use exquisite fruits to craft wines you can’t find anywhere else.

Name: Tiiz marketplace
Description:
@Tiiz_app le caviste nouvelle génération 

Tiiz vous livre vos vins, bières et spiritueux en moins de 30 minutes* et à température de dégustation. 

Vous êtes en soirée, repas, afterwork et commencez à être à sec ? Pas de panique, quelques clics suffisent pour continuer la fête et vous faire livrer vos boissons par nos coursiers. 

Tiiz a ce qu’il faut pour sauver n’importe quelle situation. Envie d’un bon vin ? Du champagne frais ? Le nécessaire pour une soirée Mojito ?

Téléchargez l’application TIIZ et choisissez parmi une large sélection d’alcools. Nous proposons du rhum, vodka, whisky, bière, et plein d’autres types d’alcools. 

Inscrivez-vous et choisissez votre mode de paiement en toute sécurité.

Retrouvez TIIZ sur Facebook, Instagram et Tiktok et sur notre site internet : www.tiiz.fr

Service réservé à un public majeur. L’abus d’alcool est dangereux pour la santé, à consommer avec modération.

* Ce délai peut-être supérieur en cas de fortes demandes ou d'intempérie.

Name: Les Millésimes de Sophie
Description:
Ateliers œnologiques, dégustation de vins pour les entreprises et les particuliers.

À partir de 6 personnes. 

Contactez-nous pour une étude personnalisée.
Location: Saint Philbert de Grand Lieu, France

Name: EBW Consulting spa
Description:
Dalla passione per il vino e dal fascino del mondo che gli ruota attorno è nata EBW Consulting, un’azienda il cui obiettivo è rendere disponibili alla propria clientela i vini più ricercati e rari al mondo.
L’esperienza nel mondo del vino ha una storia di circa cinque anni, svolta come attività di collezionismo da privato, ma la passione, come ogni buona tradizione, è stata veicolata di padre in figlio.
Il management della società, che proviene dal settore della revisione dei conti e della consulenza presso società multinazionali, ha maturato sensibilità ed accuratezza nel rapporto con i clienti, nonché una grande attenzione nella gestione dei processi aziendali.
Il core business aziendale consiste nel commercio di vini rari e d’annata, ma anche di quelli recenti (utilizzati sia come asset, che per la commercializzazione).

Oltre al vino, sono trattati anche i migliori distillati di pregio, in particolar modo whisky, cognac e rum dei produttori più quotati; anche qui l’attenzione è rivolta soprattutto alle vecchie annate e alle edizioni più rare ed esclusive.

EBW intende infatti garantire alla propria clientela una gamma di prodotti selezionata subito disponibili per l’acquisto, essendo in ogni caso in grado di procurare qualsiasi tipo di vino in tempi relativamente brevi ed ai prezzi più concorrenziali (rispetto ai competitors del mercato).
EBW valuta e acquista intere cantine da collezionisti privati, previa verifica delle condizioni di invecchiamento dei vini (luogo e temperature idonei), e stato degli stessi.

Name: Pinkster Gin
Description: We're the pink gin pioneer, tickling taste buds since 2013. Made with raspberries (real ones, the ones that grow on bushes) and no added sugar, Pinkster is the natural choice. Try us this weekend for a lush, yummy and mighty pretty G&T.

Name: Wein-Bauer, Inc.
Description:
Wein-Bauer, Inc. is a national wine import company based in Illinois. For over 40 years we have represented and built wine brands from countries such as Germany, Austria, Portugal, Argentina, etc. We are family owned and operated since 1980. 

Prost!

Name: Iron Balls International
Description:
Iron Balls was created in the heart of Bangkok by Ashley Sutton, a straight-talking, self-made designer and ocean explorer from Australia. 

After having created some of the most jaw-dropping bar designs across Asia, he decided it was about time he created his own distillery: Iron Balls gin was born. When he isn’t working on his next project, you’ll find Ash on remote reefs out in the Indian ocean.

Iron Balls Gin is a premium gin meticulously made in Southeast Asia using a secret recipe of locally sourced fresh ingredients including: pineapple, coconut, citrus fruits, ginger, lemongrass, coriander seeds and juniper. A boundary-breaking tropical gin with BALLS. 

East Meets West; Iron Balls Vodka is a premium rye vodka made in one of Germany’s oldest distilleries. Our German rye is harvested before full ripeness and then fermented. The mash obtained is then five times distilled, first through a series of columns, and uniquely finished in a copper pot in the Black Forest.

Name: Adrian GmbH
Description: Adrian GmbH is a copper still manufacturer and a spirit producer based out of 31 Hauptstr., Großheubach, Germany.

Name: Sparrow Imports
Description: Industry Veterans Rebecca Jensen Running and Sommer Walker created Sparrow Imports in 2020 to address the growing need for international artisan spirits. Crafted by a love for entrepreneurs and small family distillers, Sparrow Imports seeks out the finest craft spirits from around the world. Jensen - Running and Walker have spent their careers focusing on premium spirits and the relationship between growers and producers and retail. With over 25 years on spirit experience they focus primarily on the National Account Footprint both On and Off Premise. With a love of sharing the history and stories of brands they have created a unique partnership that brings small batch producers into the National landscape. If you are looking for partners to introduce you to the largest clients in the US Retail business we welcome you. Join our family of premium artisan brands, we look forward to raising a glass to your success.

Name: Quinta da Almiara
Description:
Surrounded by its 160 hectares of vineyards, Quinta da Almiara is located in a place of outstanding scenic beauty, in Ventosa parish, in the municipality of Torres Vedras, and close to the sea.

Quinta da Almiara’s land has a privileged location for wine production: the vineyards grow in gentle hills that receive every day the ocean breeze. The result is wines with expression and personality that enhance the pleasure of any meal. Wines are exclusively made from high quality grapes produced on the property and from selected red and white grape varieties.

Quinta da Almiara’s centenary past was preserved by Constantino family. Through hard work and passion they built a dream that can be seen at the renovated Quinta da Almiara: a family owned winery with history, quality wines and an exclusive space for wine tourism and events.

Name: Adega Condes de Albarei
Description: Adega Condes de Albarei is a wine and spirits company based out of Castrelo, Galicia, Spain.

Name: K Vintners and Charles Smith Wines
Description: In 2006, Charles Smith created Charles Smith Wines: The Modernist Project, which centers around the trend that most people generally consume wine without delay. The intent is to create wines to be enjoyed now, but with typicity of variety (Merlot that tastes like Merlot) and true to the place of origin. The wines are full of flavor, balanced, and approachable.

Name: DO5 HISPANOBODEGAS
Description:
The wineries Garci Grande (Rueda), Gormaz (Ribera del Duero) and Valdelacierva (Rioja) form the Hispanobodegas wine group. Each winery has its own identity, marked by our winemakers, the typical characteristics of each appellation, its varieties, the geographical characteristics of each area and respect for tradition and terroir.

With a portfolio of wines rated between 90 and 95 points by different national and international critics, the group is present in both the domestic market and in international markets with offices in the United States, Mexico and China.

Name: Microbrasserie Second Degré
Description:
Des brasseurs autant passionnés que déjantés.
Des bières à boire au Second Degré.
Un lieu qui va devenir ton nouveau QG.
Des rimes un peu lourdes et non maitrisées.
Location: Magny le Hongre, Ile de France

Name: Julia Kemper Wines
Description:
Julia Kemper wines is managed by the new generation of a traditional Portuguese family that nourishes a great passion for wine since 1614. 
Julia de Melo Kemper, undertook the family’s farm of Quinta do Cruzeiro at Mangualde, Dão and continued its winemaking heritage, becoming totally embodied and involved with the project. 
That brought JK Wines to its current mission of incentive the passion for Dão wines throughout the World in a way that is differentiated, and both innovative in perfect harmony with nature.
Our elegant and fine lines are driven from extensive knowledge and dedication, traditional passion with the vineyards, organic farming techniques and the perfect conditions of the Dão’s microclimate which grants our wine unique and rich organoleptic qualities.

Name: Asheville Distilling Company
Description: Asheville Distilling Company (Asheville, North Carolina) are the makers of Troy & Sons Platinum Whiskey, Troy & Sons Oak Reserve and Blonde Whiskey. The distillery opened June of 2011 and is producing premium ultra-smooth moonshine and whiskies. Troy & Sons products have won national and international medals in world whiskey competitions.

Name: La Cave de Rungis
Description:
Au cœur du marché de Rungis depuis 1988, grossiste en vins, champagnes et spiritueux, nous vous proposons de découvrir plus de 2 000 de références avec 100 000 bouteilles en stock.

La Cave de Rungis propose un très large choix de références en vins français et champagnes (plus de 300 producteurs y sont représentés) et un stock permanent sur 1 600 m².

Tous les grands crus y sont disponibles ainsi que des vins moins connus mais néanmoins très intéressants, 
33 marques de champagne, plus de 200 références d’alcools et spiritueux (Cognac, Armagnac, Whisky, Rhum, Vodka...).

La Cave de Rungis fût créé en 1988 par Antoine d’Agostino, figure incontournable du marché de Rungis depuis 1969 et ses amis les frères Aubert, propriétaires d’une douzaine de châteaux dans le bordelais (Saint-Emilion Grand Cru Classé «Château La Couspaude», Saint-Emilion Grand Cru «Château Haut Gravet», Montagne Saint-Emilion, Lalande de Pomerol...)

Nos vins sont sélectionnés par une équipe de professionnels qui met son savoir-faire à la disposition de ses clients pour répondre au mieux à leurs attentes. Nos clients se composent principalement de traiteurs, restaurateurs, de professionnels issus des métiers de bouche et de comités d’entreprise. 

Toute l’équipe de « La Cave de Rungis » se fera un plaisir de vous faire découvrir dans une ambiance conviviale la qualité et la variété de ses produits. Nous vous accueillons du lundi au Vendredi de 5h à 13h. N’hésitez pas à nous contacter ou à nous rendre visite pour plus de conseils !

Name: Madhuloka Liquor Boutique
Description: Madhuloka is the leading chain of liquor boutiques in Bangalore. Like everything else in life, Madhuloka belives that it must be a pleasant experience to go and buy liquor-therefore the convenient, friendly and pleasant environment. This is the principle on which Madhuloka - The Liquor Boutiques are designed. The stores are spaciousand are airmed to making the experience of purchasing liquor very special. Madhuloka provides a wide variety of quality products from India and abroad. Stop by our stores to have very pleasant experience of liquor shopping.

Name: Wilson Artisan Wineries
Description:
We are a family-owned and operated company based in Geyserville, California.  We are continuing to grow, and our company is now comprised of eleven wineries across Dry Creek Valley, Alexander Valley, Sonoma Valley, Mendocino County, Anderson Valley, and owns over 600 acres of vineyards.   Our newest venture is Coyote Sonoma, the place to be in Healdsburg with delectable food, wine, beer and cider.   We have live music, karaoke, and trivia on a weekly basis.  We also have three beautiful bed and breakfast inns located in Healdsburg.

Ken, born and raised in Ontario, Canada, is robust and passionate about his vineyards and wineries. It was Ken’s wisdom and vision that created the diversity of vineyard sources over the years. These vineyards provide the premium quality fruit that has brought notable recognition to the Wilson Artisan Wineries. Diane and Ken also own Healdsburg’s historic Grape Leaf Inn, the Calderwood Inn and the Camellia Inn.   In addition to our eleven wine brands: Wilson Winery, Mazzocco Winery, deLorimier Winery, Soda Rock Winery, Matrix Winery, Jaxon Keys Winery & Distillery, Pezzi King Vineyards, Rockpile Vineyards, Coyote Sonoma, St. Anne’s Crossing Winery and Greenwood Ridge Vineyards.

Name: Château Fonroque
Description:
" Le choix de la biodynamie en 2002 était une transgression, une aventure, une recherche de satisfaction intellectuelle. Aujourd'hui, c'est une évidence sereine soutenue par l'étude et l'intuition." Alain Moueix 

Le domaine de Fonroque étend ses 17.60 hectares de vignobles à quelques centaines de mètres au nord-ouest du bourg de Saint-Emilion. Il se répartit sur un plateau calcaire et un coteau exposé à l'ouest. 
Berceau de la Famille Moueix qui s’y installe dès 1931, le Château Fonroque est également pionnier en biodynamie à Bordeaux : les travaux et la mise en place de la biodynamie par Alain Moueix ont conduit le Château Fonroque à être le tout premier grand cru classé certifié en biodynamie en 2008. Il continue d’apporter son expertise au sein de la propriété acquise en 2017 par la Famille Guillard. 



« Choosing Biodynamic in 2002 was a transgression, a journey, a quest for intellectual satisfaction. Today, it is a serene obviousness which is backed up by the study and intuition.” Alain Moueix 

Château Fonroque extends its 17,6 hectares of vines a few hundred metres north west of the village of Saint-Emilion. The vineyard is spread over a limestone plateau and a west-facing hillside. 
The family Moueix settled down in Château Fonroque in 1931, making Château Fonroque their first home in Saint-Emilion. The estate is also the pioneer in biodynamic in the Bordeaux region: the work undertook by Alain Moueix led Château Fonroque to be the first ever grand cru classé to hold the biodynamic certification in 2008. Alain Moueix keeps providing his expertise and skills for the estate which was acquired by the Guillard Family in 2017.

Name: Terrazze dell'Etna
Description:
Terrazze dell’Etna è natura, è passione, è l’Etna e ciò che da queste atipiche e  uniche terre si può produrre: è la volontà di creare, in un posto dove è possibile, dei vini d’eccellenza.
Nel 2008 la famiglia Bevilacqua recupera, nel versante Nord dell’Etna, i vecchi terrazzamenti di contrada Bocca d’Orzo, situati a partire da 600 metri fino a 950, contando oggi 36 ettari tra vigneti, uliveti, boschi di castagne, ciliegi e querce.
L’anfiteatro di terrazze raccoglie come in un abbraccio i vitigni autoctoni dell’Etna: il Nerello Mascalese e il Nerello Cappuccio, cingendo a se anche altre varietà di carattere internazionale quali lo Chardonnay, il Pinot Nero e il Petit Verdot.
Il Nerello Mascalese, è il vitigno principe dell’azienda, un filo rosso che lega l’intera produzione.
Gli alberelli antichi di età superiore ai 60 anni danno vita al Cirneco: Etna Rosso il cui nome è un omaggio al cane da caccia autoctono del vulcano, che possiede uguali caratteristiche del vino in termini di eleganza e forza.
Dalle vigne più giovani nascono il Carusu, un giovane Etna Doc che ripercorre in chiave moderna la storia dei rossi dell’Etna, il Rosato Etna Doc dalle rosee sfumature e infine il Ciuri, un elegante ed unico vino, nato dalla vinificazione in bianco del Nerello Mascalese.
I vitigni internazionali danno vita a due Spumanti Metodo Classico e due Rossi IGT Sicilia.
Il Cuvèe Brut un blanc de blanc da uve Chardonnay, il Rosè Brut un blend di Pinot Nero e Nerello Mascalese, il Cratere, un rosso che lega il Petit Verdot all’autoctono Nerello Mascalese, e il Pinot Nero, un elogio al padre dei vitigni.

Name: Maison Sichel SA
Description: Maison Sichel is a beverage manufacturing company that offers a wide range of hand-crafted wines and beers.

Name: Stable Craft Brewing
Description:
Stable Craft Brewing is a farm brewery located in the foothills of the Blue Ridge Mountains of Central Virginia. 
We are in the business of crafting farm fresh beers for thirsty beer lovers in Virginia. 

Stable Craft Brewing grows our own hops and brews our hand-crafted beers from our own artisanal water source, making our beers a truly Farm to Glass experience. 

Plan a visit to our farm to take in the beautiful mountain views, visit with the horses of our farm, or walk around our hop fields. Our taproom serves up 16 varieties of farm fresh beers and we proudly serve a locally sourced pub style menu. Stop by our farm store and pick up our locally designed brewery apparel, growlers, glasses or take home some bottles of your favorite beer.

Stable Craft currently distributes our Throatlatch Imperial Farm Ale, Britchin Brown Ale, Appalachian Divide American Blonde and Night Latch an American Stout to several locales in Virginia.

Name: Turner Stillhouse
Description:
We are an independent craft Tasmanian distillery founded in 2018 and located at Tamar Ridge, just 15 minutes from Launceston in the iconic Tamar Valley.  We produce premium Three Cuts Gin/Vodka and Rosevears Whisky.

Three Cuts Gin is Tasmania's highest award winning Gin and one of the highest International ranked gins. Rosevears Whisky includes a range of Tasmanian Single Malts, and our Three Grain Whiskey, Tasmania's first "Bourbon Style" whiskey with 100% Tasmanian grains.

Name: Artisan Wines
Description:
Artisan Wines is a boutique winery close to lake Neusiedl in Burgenland.
Our understanding of an artisanal production is a sustainable, regional!! (our grapes are not sourced from anywhere else) production of wines with great respect for our nature and the environment. Every vintage we try to produce outstanding wines from gorgeous grapes. As each year is different (at least in our region) each wine will be slightly different too.

Name: Lawrenny Estate Distillery
Description:
Lawrenny Estate is a 400 acre property located in Tasmania’s Central Highlands, just over an hour’s picturesque drive through the Derwent Valley, northwest of Hobart. 

Lawrenny Estate Distilling has been established as one of only a very few ‘paddock to bottle’ Estate single malt whiskies in the world. The barley grains are grown and harvested from the Lawrenny fields then mashed, fermented and distilled using the pure waters that flow through the Estate. 

Lawrenny has a range of award winning Gins including Van Diemen’s Gin, Highlands Gin and Double Gold winning 1818 Settlers Gin, that all represent an element of Lawrenny Estate

Name: The Block Distilling Co.
Description: The Block Distilling Co. does things the hard way. The long way. Taking raw ingredients, using industrial equipment, blending culinary and chemistry methods to create artful, unapologetic spirits. It’s not the only way, but it’s our way. Because a good drink does not discriminate. So here’s to assembling a community of punks & politicians, prostitutes & priests. The ones on top, the ones trying to get there, & those in-between. The weird, the wise, the weathered & worn. The tessellated, the one-off, the business professional & the artist. We made this for you. This is your spirit(ual) awakening. Full stop.

Name: ZUNANI AG
Description: ZUNANI stands for luxury in a glass and the highest indulgence. Enjoy white truffles in a completely new, exclusive way – in the glass! We dispense with the use of artificial flavors and thus guarantee an incomparable taste experience that will inspire you.

Name: Vino Vault
Description: Store your valuable wine collection in one of Vino Vault's many highly-secure vaults. Manage your inventory on our sophisticated inventory platform that tells you what you have, tasting notes for each wine and when to drink it, along with market valuations for insurance purposes. Buy, sell and trade your wine through our vast network of storage customers to help monetize your valuable collection.

Name: Wine Distributors List
Description: A contact list with wine distributors, importers, agents and magazines from more than 130 countries in the world. Instantly available in workable format, you have the chance to double your sales and profit.

Name: The Great Wine Co.
Description:
Wine is all about people. We are a company run by wine people. Our mission is to introduce you to the people who craft this wonderful drink with care, attention and passion. By doing so, we want to foster connections, share enjoyment and encourage enthusiasm.

We bring you the full, kaleidoscopic picture of vineyards, places and people. In our seasonal world, we’ll bring you what’s good on the day, and point you to the right wines for the season’s flavours.

We know that great wine experiences are personal, so we’ll always put you, the wine drinker first. Allow us to listen and learn, and we’ll make sure that you get the right wine, for the right reason.

Name: Celler lavinyeta
Description:
La Vinyeta és una petita explotació de vinya i olivera al mig de l’Empordà, a Mollet de Peralada. És una empresa jove, familiar, fruit de l’esforç i les il·lusions. L’origen d’aquest projecte es remunta al 2002 quan es van adquirir un parell de vinyes velles —d’edats compreses entre 55 i 80 anys— de Samsó i Garnatxa. A partir d’aquest moment es realitzaren noves plantacions fins a les 40 ha actuals. El projecte es va consolidar el 2006 amb la construcció del celler i l’elaboració dels primers vins. A partir de l’any 2009 el celler La Vinyeta és un dels primers cellers que ha entrat a formar part de la Producció Integrada, un sistema de conreu respectuós amb el medi ambient.

La Vinyeta is a small vineyard and olive farm situated at the heart of the Empordà, in Mollet de Peralada. It is a young, family company that is the fruit of effort and ambition. The origin of this project dates back to 2002, when two old Carignan and Grenache vineyards – aged between 50 and 75 years – were purchased. From that moment on, more and more vines were planted, up to the present 40 hectares. The project was consolidated in 2006 with the construction of the winery and the making of the first wines. In 2009, La Vinyeta became one of the first wineries to adopt Integrated Production, an environment-friendly cultivation system.

Name: ENOVINA
Description:
Desde el año 2014 Enovina presta diferentes servicios a las bodegas de vino. Los que destacan por la alta calidad de los tratamientos.

Nuestro foco es no alterar la calidad del vino, solo extraer lo que no es deseable o potenciar lo que se tiene. Dentro de nuestros tratamientos destacan la reducción de Acidez Volátil y la reducción de Etilfenoles a los que recientemente hemos agregado la Reducción de Aromas a Humo en los vinos.

Otros tratamientos destacables son: Reducción/ Adición de Grado Alcohólico por medio del Alcoff, Concentración de Vinos, Pasteurización y Gestión de Gases con De(O)s.
Location: San Bernardo, Región Metropolitana de Santiago

Name: Mac Y A/S
Description:
Mac Y A/S - Importer and distributor of fine spirits from all over the world.

Our business was founded on the desire to bring quality spirits to the Danish consumer, giving them a chance to appreciate the many fine, quality spirits that exists in the world. 

Today our main business lies within the Ruhm and Whisky sector, but we also carry many other, unique and exciting spirits such as Grappa, Vodka, Gin and many others, and we represent no less than 1088 products from 22 countries.

Name: Vigneti Villabella
Description:
Vigneti Villabella è l'azienda agricola del gruppo Cristoforetti Delibori, ha sede a Calmasino in provincia di Verona, nel cuore del Bardolino classico, sulle colline moreniche che si affacciano sul Lago di Garda.

Fondata oltre 40 anni fa da Walter Delibori e Giorgio Cristoforetti, Vigneti Villabella è una realtà vitivinicola che esprime le migliori potenzialità del territorio, creando vini unici, autentici, operando in un contesto etico responsabile, mantenendo l'equilibrio tra uomo, paesaggio e natura.











Vigneti Villabella produce tutti i grandi vini classici veronesi a denominazione di origine controllata come il Bardolino, il Chiaretto, il Valpolicella, il Ripasso e l'Amarone, il Lugana, il Custoza, il Soave ed il Garda. Completano la gamma I cru di Villa Cordevigo.

Cuore pulsante dell'azienda agricola Vigneti Villabella è la Tenuta di Villa Cordevigo a Cavaion Veronese, un'oasi viticola e paesaggistica a conduzione biologica, che conserva integra l'anima del luogo nel rispetto dell'ambiente che circonda Villa Cordevigo Wine Relais, villa veneta del '700 adibita all'ospitalità e alla promozione dei vini prodotti.

Name: Weinkontor Freund GmbH
Description:
Alles aus einer Hand – seit 40 Jahren!
Wir bieten Ihnen ein ungewöhnlich breites und professionelles Spektrum an Wein, Spirituosen und Delikatessen aus einer Hand an, mit dem Sie Ihre Kompetenz und Ihr Fachwissen voll unter Beweis stellen können. Worum noch mit vielen verschiedenen Lieferanten arbeiten? Sparen Sie sich diese Zeit. Unser Sortiment ist weitestgehend exklusiv und perfekt auf die Bedürfnisse des Fachhandels, Fachgroßhandels und der Gastronomie zugeschnitten.

Name: Guidance Whiskey
Description:
A young whiskey that is rare and perfect for the novice & the aficionados, Guidance Whiskey was founded in 2018 for the exceptional professional with a sophiscated palate for a deceptional smooth sipping spirit. 

Guidance Whiskey can be found

Name: Renbjer Fine Spirits AB
Description:
Renbjer Fine Spirits är en importör och distributör av premiumdrycker med fokus på kvalitetssprit till den svenska restaurangmarknaden. Vi säljer även till Systembolaget samt har egna varumärken vilka vi distribuerar i Sverige samt exporterar till utlandet. Företaget grundades 2004 och är flerfaldigt nominerade till ”Årets Branschförbättrare” av Bartenders Choice Awards och vi drivs av en passion för kvalitetsprodukter med målet att bidra till att utveckla en kvalitativ dryckeskultur i Sverige. Vi arbetar i huvudsak med mindre producenter och varumärken som bidrar till att öka mångfalden och utbudet i Spritbranschen.

 Renbjer Fine Spirits was founded in 2004 and has since  helped to improve the bar and spirits scene in Sweden. With a focus on quality products we build distribution through out Sweden on-and off-trade as well as the travel retail. We have our own direct distribution to bars and restaurants reaching any client north to south as well as working with all national and most local wholesalers. We also supply the Swedish consumer monopoly. Since 2024 we supply the B2D, B2B and B2C in Denmark with a selection of excellent products. This way we offer producers a distribution solution for both the Swedish  and Danish  market.

Name: Pousio HMR
Description:
No coração do Alentejo, na Vidigueira, nasce a história da Casa Agrícola HMR, S.A., construída ao longo de mais de três décadas de dedicação ao terroir.
Em 1989, foi plantada a primeira vinha, dando origem, três anos depois, à colheita inaugural e à criação da marca Vidigueira. Com o tempo, juntaram-se-lhe as marcas Pousio, Quatro Caminhos e Marmelar.
Movidos pelo desejo de revelar o melhor da região, os produtos da Herdade do Monte da Ribeira são fruto de um trabalho feito com paixão, dedicação e respeito pelo ritmo da natureza. Um projeto que nasce do amor à terra e que leva à mesa vinhos, azeites e mel de elevada qualidade, onde se refletem o sabor, a tradição e a alma do Alentejo.

Name: Les Vins Amédée
Description:
Les Caves Amédée sont un groupement de producteurs récoltants sur les appellations AOC Luberon et AOC Ventoux.
Fondé dans les années 60 sous l'impulsion d'Amédée Ginies, la signature AMEDEE est désormais un gage de qualité pour le consommateur. Nos viticulteurs sont engagés pour leur territoire avec une certification Haute Valeur Environnementale (Niveau 2), certification bio, démarche agriconfiance, ainsi que le Label "Parc Naturel Régional".

Name: WINEducator Asia
Description:
WINEducator has it’s HQ in Singapore since 2016 and is the 1st & only WSET Approved Programme Provider (APP) in Yangon, Myanmar.
We offer various trade support and consumer course/workshops in Asia such as:

    - WSET UK certified wine courses Level 1 and Level 2 and Level 3 (coming soon)
    - F&B Service Training
    - Beverage Up-selling Training for Sommeliers
    - F&B End-to-end Operational Solutions
    - Masterclass Tastings
    - Train-the-Trainer workshop 
    - Corporate Dining (& Wine) Etiquette Workshops
    - Corporate / Team-building Wine Appreciation Events
    - Wine Portfolio Management

Most importantly our Educators are Certified Adult Educators (ACTA) who deploy a androgogical E-learning approach that ensures Learners enjoy and discover learning through active learning. The “wine language” will be unpretentiously enriching and approachable to the novice and discerning palate with an Asian-centric touch.

Name: Boroli -Società Agricola s.s.
Description:
The Borolis are a Piedmontese family who have been in business in the region since 1831; first in textiles, then editorial, and now in winegrowing. 
In the 1990’s, Silvano ed Elena Boroli felt the need to extend their interest and endeavors. 
They wanted something that would bring them closer to nature and away from the demands of the contemporary business world. 
As Piedmontese, the choice was almost an obligation: making wine in Langa.  
A passion transformed into work. What could be better? 
Wine production isn’t the easiest work it’s consuming, subject to nature, and success can’t always be predicted. 
But it’s exactly for these reasons that success in this area can give great satisfaction. 
In 2000 Achille, the third of the four Boroli children entered the family wine business. 
The culture of wine, includes many things besides the wine itself. 
In the Boroli’s case, quality is always the common denominator, in their role as wine producers as well as the product itself.

Name: KMW | Karim Mussi Winemaker
Description:
KARIM MUSSI WINEMAKER 

Wine Labels: Altocedro, Abras, Alandes, Qaramy, Los Poetas
Main Wine Growing Areas: La Consulta (Uco Valley), Maipù (Mendoza), Cafayate (Salta)

"I try to make authentic wines reflective of a place. My three pillars of winemaking are
elegance, balance and freshness. I’m a huge fan of Bordeaux, but really my models are those 
producers who are genuine and make great wines that aren’t necessarily trendy.”

—---- 

Karim Mussi Saffie es enólogo y empresario de Mendoza (Argentina) por vocación y formación. 

Desde sus comienzos, ha basado su elaboración de vinos en tres pilares fundamentales: la innovación, la conciencia del terruño y la sostenibilidad del viñedo. Su obsesión por encontrar la fruta más pura, así como la expresión más honesta del lugar, le ha llevado a buscar viñedos antiguos y originales en lugares con características propias a lo largo de la cordillera de los Andes que puedan transmitir la esencia de cada terruño. Esto da lugar a vinos distintivos, que destacan por su equilibrio, elegancia y capacidad de envejecimiento. 

La Cava de Karim Mussi

En 2013 abrió las puertas de Bodega Alandes, una encantadora bodega de adobe, construida en 1904, ubicada en la histórica región de Maipú, Mendoza. 
 
Siempre ha sido la intención de Karim compartir con sus amigos del vino las etiquetas más exclusivas de los distintos proyectos dentro de la marca KMW. Por lo que se da la bienvenida a aquellos visitantes que quieran explorar esta centenaria bodega, experimentando y conociendo la identidad que hay detrás de cada una de nuestras marcas de vino: Abras, Alandes, Altocedro, Qaramy, entre otras. Algunas ediciones limitadas y joyas de nuestra colección de biblioteca son parte de una experiencia íntima y personalizada que tienen quienes nos visitan. 

Para quienes nos quieran visitar, escríbenos a visitas@karimmussi.com o llámanos a +54 261 4668048.  Si eres un amante del vino, esta experiencia es definitivamente para ti!

Name: PARRAMON EXPORTAP SL
Description: PARRAMON EXPORTAP SL is a family company wich produces natural and micorgranulate cork stoppers for wines and special stoppers for liqueurs, distillates, oils, essences and other products based out of VEÏNAT SERRES, 64, CASSÀ DE LA SELVA, Girona, Spain.

Name: Società Agricola Giusti Dal Col s.r.l.
Description:
Giusti Wine nasce nel 2004 dalla volontà dell’imprenditore Ermenegildo Giusti di rientrare nella propria terra d’origine diversificando la propria attività principale – l’industria delle costruzioni sviluppata in quarant’anni di lavoro nel West Canada – con la produzione vitivinicola.
All’acquisto del primo piccolo vigneto ha fatto seguito un massiccio piano di investimenti – complessivamente 50 milioni di euro - che stanno portando Giusti Wine a diventare la principale realtà privata del territorio con, a regime nel 2018, 100 ettari vitati a fronte di una superficie complessiva di oltre 125 ed una avveniristica cantina di vinificazione dalla capacità produttiva di 2,5 milioni di bottiglie l’anno.
I terreni della Giusti Wine sono divisi in una decine di Tenute in larga parte ubicate sui pendii del Montello e nella piana alluvionale della destra Piave.

Name: Cayman Distributors Group
Description: Cayman Distributors Ltd. is a leading distributor of beer, wines and spirits in the Cayman Islands. Established in 1968 , the company has grown to be one of the largest importers of fine wine, as well as offering the Islands largest selection of beers and many of the world’s premium spirits brands.

Name: Muscardini Cellars
Description: Through Muscardini Cellars, the Muscardini family shares their zest for life and profound appreciation for the fruit of the vine with the Muscardini Cellars artisan wines. The mission of Muscardini Cellars is to culminate the knowledge, tradition and respect of more than a century of family experience in the industry with wines that artfully capture flavor and spirit.

Name: Oslo Wine Agency
Description:
Oslo Wine Agency is a group of companies and consists of four subsidiaries with different
strategies and ways of working, but with a common approach to quality and wish to
succeed in becoming the best wine importer in Norway.

We like to do things our own way and to think outside the box in our search for quality producers and products offering something extra to each customer group.

The combination of having a great network of producers and many years of experience
from the trade enables us to offer the Norwegian consumers distinct wines with
personality, functional packaging fulfilling the consumer needs to a great
price.

We work with a long-term approach in close partnership with our producers, doing our
very best to guide them to success in Norway.

Our way of working and in-depth knowledge of the market has been one of the key factors of our success. We are proud to have in our portfolio some of the best-selling wines in Norway (including the number 1 product in the market) and our team is behind
many success stories in the Norwegian market.

We sell our wines to the monopoly, HoReCa and Duty free sector, always with the aim to
offer distinct wines and value for money.

Please contact us at post@oslowineagency.no

Name: MyChampagne
Description: MyChampagne er et livsnyderkoncept, der tilbyder kvalitetsprodukter nøje og direkte udvalgt fra hele verden heriblandt Champagne, Caviar og Montecristi Superfino Panama hat. Vi vil gerne give dig det bedste, som livet har at byde på.

Name: Swiftwater Cellars
Description: A destination winery located at Suncadia Resort in Washington state's Cascade Mountains.  Product line includes Syrah, red and white Bordeaux blends from Columbia Valley as well as Pinot Noir and Chardonnay from Oregon's Willamette Valley.  Consulting Winemaker Tony Rynders and Associate Winemaker Linda Trotta bring a combined 50+ years of winemaking experience to the project.  Envisioned, founded and operated by the Watts family, the facility includes a restaurant, The Hoist House, and overlooks the first tee of Suncadia's Rope Rider golf course.

Name: Barossa Distilling Co.
Description: Based in the heart of Australian wine country, Barossa Distilling is an award winning craft spirits producer creating incredible liquids driven by great flavour and inspired by discovery. Producer of the Worlds Best Flavoured Gin 2024 at the World Gin Awards (London).

Name: Mosto
Description:
Independent winegrowers, wines off the beaten track.
Mosto proposes quality regional Italian wines, produced from indigenous grape varieties by independent winegrowers. These wines go off the beaten track and are the expression of beautifully diverse terroirs and of the burning passion of winegrowers for their land. 

Deep knowledge fed by field experience.
Mosto grants a great deal of importance to knowing each producer personally and to visiting their vineyards and cellars. This essential field experience allows us to ensure the highest quality of our wine selection, as well as to reflect in the best possible way the stories and know-how of their authors.

Experience the Italian enoteca.
Mosto is also the desire to honour the symbiosis between wines and their terroirs, specific cultures and gastronomies. At home or at our venues, we organise thematic wine & food pairing dinners: an oenological and culinary journey through the Italian regions.

Name: Bodegas Pago de Larrainzar
Description:
Bodegas Pago de Larrainzar es una bodega familiar moderna, basada en una gestión integral del viñedo y la  bodega, que parte de la mejor uva como base para un tinto excelente, con fuerte personalidad, adaptado a los gustos actuales.

Tempranillo, Merlot, Cabernet Sauvignon y Garnacha, de diferentes clones y portainjertos, son las diferentes variedades de uva que se extienden por las 15 hectáreas que ocupa nuestro viñedo. La vendimia se realiza a mano con doble selección de la uva, primero en el viñedo y más tarde en bodega.

Creemos en el ensamblaje, partiendo de decenas de vinos diferentes, según las diversas variedades, diferentes tonelerías, distintas capacidades y grados de tostado de nuestras barricas de roble francés, renovadas cada tres años. Un trabajo de gran finura al que aporta su saber nuestro prestigioso enólogo, Ignacio de Miguel.

Name: Champagne Veuve J. Lanaud
Description:
Family-operated Champagne House, first founded in 1919 in Epernay (the Capital of Champagne).

Today we are located in the renown Côtes des Blancs village Avize, one of the only 17 Grand Cru classified villages in all of Champagne. 

The production of our House is managed on a daily basis by two brothers, Edouard and Jonathan Gauthier, 4th generation producers. 

The vineyard is comprised of 12 ha, which are judiciously planted in the terroirs of 14 different villages in the Champagne region.

Renown in France as well as internationally as a reference of quality, our House, well compensated by the number of mentions in guide books and awards from various competitions, offers a range of champagnes rich in diversity as well as in quality. 

Our champagnes are ideal for an aperitif and sublime when paired with an entire meal, so ideal as a champagne to be included on the wine list for members of the trade (HoReCa).

Active in both the production of and the communication of our champagnes, we are frequent participants at a variety of well-known domestic (France) and international trade fairs (B2C as well as B2B). Upcoming professional trade fairs include PROWEIN in Düsseldorf, Vinitaly in Verona and LIWF in London to name a few.

Name: Aubi & Ramsa +21 ICE CREAM CO.
Description:
Suzanne Buenfil and Rafael Ramsa got into the ice cream business 12 years ago, while living in California. From a small plant, they were both in the retail and wholesale side of the business. Since the beginning they started creating unique flavors, and exploring the use of liquor in ice cream. The interest in alcohol infused ice cream took all of their attention, and they continued focusing solely in perfecting a formula that would make both the liquor and the ice cream protagonists, creating a novelty like no other.

Rafael and Matias Aubi met 7 years ago, while working as Creative Directors for an agency network. Together they developed the brand's concept, feel and look, and the first 21+ Ice Cream store in the world.

The name of the brand comes From the last name of the co-founders.

The brand is not uniquely Miami. The brand has a global proposition, just like any other wine or spirit brand. Having said that, we hope to be able to take Miami to the world, just like other brands do with their places of origin as signature.

The ice cream includes no preservatives, coloring or unpronounceable ingredients; it's 100% natural. We use only top shelf, premium and super premium liquor, and all of our ice cream and sorbets contain 4.9% ALC/VOL. 

The Highland Truffle made with Macallan 12 is definitely our most popular flavor. Kentucky Créme Brûlée made with Four Roses Single Barrel Bourbon, Agave Dulce de Leche made with Milagro Tequila,Choco Hazelnut Martini made with Hendrick’s Gin and Strawberries and Rosé made with Verve Clicquot Rosé are also popular flavors. At the moment we have 20 flavors with the idea of expanding to 30 different ice creams and sorbets.

Name: Heres SPA - The Wine Hub
Description: Heres Spa è una società di servizi del mondo del vino. Nasce nel 1997 da un'idea di Cesare Turini nel tentativo di creare una piattaforma di scambio in cui aziende e consulenti possano collaborare nell’elaborazione di una brand identity. Negli anni che seguono Heres valica i confini nazionali diventando un player fondamentale per il rinnovamento del settore vitivinicolo in Italia, Ad oggi si occupa di Consulenza manageriale e del brand-building delle aziende vitivincole, Distribuzione Ho.re.ca di vini di qualità, shop online per Ho.re.ca, Marketing, eventi e masterclass.

Name: Armagnac Ravignan
Description: Producteurs d'Armagnac depuis 1732

Name: J & L WINES, INC
Description: Central California Distributor of fine alcoholic beverages. Based in Paso Robles, locally owned and operated since 1981.

Name: Château Valandraud - 1er Grand Cru Classé
Description:
né en 1991 dans un garage, Chateau Valandraud est un 1er grand cru classé de Saint Emilion depuis 2012, dont le chai bioclimatique est basé dans on écrin naturel de Saint Etienne de Lisse . Vous pouvez également séjourner au Logis de Valandraud, meublé de tourisme 5*
Pour réserver une visite  : visit@thunevin.com
Pour réserver un  séjour : valandraudlocation@thunevin.com

Name: The Wine Syndicate
Description: The Wine Syndicate is a progressive importer of high quality wines into Western Canada. Our objective is to offer our clients unparalleled service, and a versatile portfolio of producers who share a common goal of hand-crafting great wines in a manner respectful to the natural environment we all share.

Name: Luis Pato
Description:
For centuries the Pato family has been involved in wine business and started to put Bairrada on the map. More than 30 years ago Luis Pato  went off with a suitcase full of bottles of Baga and other indigenous grape varieties from his well beloved vineyards. Open minded sommeliers, importers and wine aficionados were blown away through these terroir driven wines from an unknown region with even more unknown grape varieties! The future for these indigenous grapes looks assured, the heritage of old vines will be maintained and the Rebel's spirit will go on!

Há vários séculos que a família Pato está ligada ao mundo do vinho na região da Bairrada. Há mais de 30 anos, Luis Pato levou a sua mala cheia de garrafas de Baga e outras variedades autóctones das suas vinhas e deixou atónitos escanções, importadores e enóﬁlos curiosos com reﬂexo real do que a região podia oferecer aos seus vinhos: frescura (graças à inﬂuência do Oceano Atlântico), fruta (do solo argilo-calcário, em meia-encosta das pequenas montanhas à volta de Óis do Bairro), elegância e delicadeza (da fermentação e do estágio em carvalho, usado de forma equilibrada), e com um grande potencial de envelhecimento. Hoje, o futuro das castas autóctones parece assegurado, o património das vinhas velhas será mantido e o espírito do rebelde prevalecerá.

Name: Champagne Liébart Régnier
Description:
Maison Liébart-Régnier was established in 1960. Located in the heart of Vallée de la Marne, this family wine estate grows all seven Champagne grape varieties at Baslieux-sous-Châtillon and Vauciennes. 
This diversity of grape varieties, combined with the terroir, offers a broad aromatic spectrum for blends but also for some truly unique Champagnes.

Name: Chinnery Spirits Ltd
Description:
Chinnery Gin captures the flavours of the Old China Trade, distilling the most delicate of the botanicals individually under vacuum at low temperature to extract the best possible flavour.

Botanicals:
Osmanthus Flower, Oolong Tea, Cassia Bark, Grains of Paradise, Liquorice, Sweet Orange Peel, Coriander Seed, Angelica Root, Orris Root and Juniper.

Name: Bartender Spirits Awards ES
Description: Muéstrate en frente de bartenders y gerentes de bares de USA.

Name: Santa Barbara Vintners
Description: The Santa Barbara Vintners is a nonprofit 501 (c) 6 organization founded in 1983 to protect and promote Santa Barbara County as a world-class wine producing region. The Association includes winery members whose annual production is at least 75% Santa Barbara County (or sub-AVA) labeled, grower/vineyard members and industry associate members.  The association produces festivals; educational seminars and tastings; provides information to consumers, trade, and media; and advocates for the protection of the wine industry.

Name: SoDivin
Description:
We are specialized in selling Grands Crus and vintage wines on the internet. 
We offer a wide range of vintages and highly sought-after wines (Petrus, Mouton Rothschild, Domaine de la Romanée Conti...). 
Our cellars have more than 125 vintages from 1735 to 2020 and some 6500 references.

Founded in 2001, we were pioneers in online wine sales. E-commerce was still in its infancy in France at this time.
The idea was born from a man’s passion for wine and a simple desire: “To allow lovers of great wines not to have to wait 10, 20, even 30 years to taste great vintages”.

Our services include:
- Same-day shipping
- Dedicated contact person
- 24-jour delivery
- English speaking customer service
- Shipping to more than 80 countries
- Specially designed packaging
Our guarantees:
- Expertise of each bottle by our team
- Diagnosis indicating the condition of the label and capsule, the level of the wine
- Collection of expert notes and comments (Robert Parker, Jancis Robinson, Wine Spectator...)
- Careful preparation and shipping

Name: Clos de Chacras
Description: Emplazada en un edificio de 1921, la bodega de tradición familiar produce vinos de alta gama y ofrece una gran experiencia enoturística y gastronómica.

Name: Diemersfontein Wine & Country Estate
Description:
Rich Family Stories, unparalleled terroir, the ‘accidental’ birth of an iconic South African wine, a brand bestowed with illustrious accolades and true transformation in the wine industry will be part of your journey in creating your own Diemersfontein moment.

Diemersfontein is a champion and an icon of transformation in the SA Wine Industry through education, empowerment with Thokozani and music

Our transformation journey has always been about bringing real change to people’s lives. It is crucial to focus on training and development as an absolute necessity to achieve sustainable economic empowerment of our employees

Premium quality wines made with passion and integrity and the go-to brand for any style of Pinotage, but famous for being the original coffee chocolate pinotage

There exists a passion at Diemersfontein that is impossible to overlook. The Diemersfontein range of wines encapsulates the magnificence, elegance and grace of this estate and the passion of its people and makes every sip of our wines a magical experience.

Name: Cave Spring Vineyard
Description:
Great winemaking finds its origins through a marriage of vision, passion and patience. 

More than three decades ago, the Pennachetti family helped to pioneer the cultivation of noble European grape varietals on the Niagara Peninsula with the planting of their first Riesling and Chardonnay vines at Cave Spring Vineyard. In the years since, Cave Spring Vineyard has established itself as one of Canada’s most acclaimed wineries, earning a reputation for crafting elegant and distinctive cool-climate wines in the heart of Ontario’s wine country.

We invite you to explore the origins of our fine wines.

Name: Distillerie du Viaduc
Description:
Fabrique artisanale de spiritueux naturels.
55 avenue Daumesnil, Paris 75012

Name: Distillerie REIMONENQ
Description:
Distillerie de Sainte Rose
Guadeloupe

Name: Castelli del Grevepesa
Description:
Castelli del Grevepesa è, sotto il profilo della produzione e dell'uvaggio conferito, la più grande realtà vitivinicola del Chianti. 
Costituita nel 1965 su iniziativa del Cavalier Gualtiero Armando Nunzi, nasce per riunire sotto un'unica realtà i viticoltori provenienti dai vari territori del Chianti Classico fiorentino. 
L'intento è quello di preservare le tradizioni secolari della viticoltura toscana, del territorio e delle usanze contadine, producendo vini di alta qualità  nel rispetto delle disposizioni sia normative che consortili.
La mission è ambiziosa e punta a valorizzare al massimo i territori agricoli del Chianti, attraverso la produzione di vini qualitativamente eccellenti, immessi sul mercato a prezzi di vendita  più che competitivi.
Location: San Casciano in Val di Pesa, Tuscany

Name: ROCKS Whiskey Chilling Stones
Description: ROCKS is the leading & premium choice for whiskey stones in the world, bringing you unmatched quality granite for those who appreciate the full spectrum of whiskey enjoyment. Our commitment to creating exceptional products has lead us to be recognised for our amazing unboxing experience making our brand the finest one to celebrate a special occasion. As we thrive to deliver a one of a kind experience with authenticity at its core, we seek to merge tradition and craftsmanship with contemporary minimalist design. Each gift set tells a different & special story that embodies excellence. Tailored for the whiskey connoisseur, discover the art of being unique.

Name: Or Pourpre
Description:
Or Pourpre est une start-up française qui repense la dégustation du vin en donnant la parole aux vignerons. 

Notre objectif ? Ne plus laisser le hasard définir votre prochaine bouteille.  Pour cela nous vous proposons un coffret de dégustation dont les bouteilles sont sélectionnées parmi les 85 000 vignobles français. 

Nous travaillons en circuit court avec des vignerons indépendants à qui nous donnons la parole. Un constat simple : personne n’est mieux placé que le vigneron lui-même pour vous parler de son vin. 

C’est pourquoi chaque coffret sera accompagné d’un podcast et d’une fiche de dégustation par bouteille. Vous serez alors guidé par la voix du vigneron pour que vous décryptiez la richesse et la complexité du vin en bouche. 

Il ne vous reste plus qu’à offrir, partager et déguster les vins que nous vous avons choisi. C’est un bon moyen de mêler la découverte au plaisir tout en soutenant les vignerons, garants d’un savoir-faire reconnu à travers le monde. 

Et pour rendre l’univers du vin encore plus accessible, nous allons plus loin en vous proposant des podcasts, des interviews ou encore des articles sur cette industrie et les acteurs qui la compose. 

Retrouvez notre chaîne de podcast La Grappe disponible sur toutes les plateformes (Spotify, Soundcloud, Apple Podcast...).

Name: Vinho do Porto
Description:
Port is allang geen ouderwetse drank meer die alleen s winters gedronken wordt. Het is een verhaal: van zon, traditie en vakmanschap uit de Dourovallei, gevangen in een glas.

Bij Vinho do Porto willen we dat verhaal opnieuw vertellen. We brengen port en Portugese wijn tot leven: eigentijds, authentiek en met oog voor beleving. Van zorgvuldig geselecteerde flessen tot inspirerende pairings, tastings en evenementen. Alles draait om één ding: wijnliefhebbers inspireren met een glas, een verhaal en een ervaring.

In een wereld vol voorspelbare chardonnay en merlot kiezen wij voor karakter en herkomst. Voor familiehuizen, eeuwenoude wijngaarden en smaken die je meenemen naar het hart van Portugal.

In 2025 namen wij Vinho do Porto over met de wens om te vernieuwen en te groeien, zonder het klassieke karakter te verliezen. Wij geloven dat port niet alleen gedronken, maar ervaren moet worden. Of je nu een kenner bent of gewoon wilt genieten van iets bijzonders.

 Bezoek onze website: www.vinhodoporto.nl en reis mee door de wereld van port en Portugese wijn. Ontdek de veelzijdigheid van Portugal, één glas tegelijk.

Name: Decantify
Description:
Decantify is a disruptive, digital-first wine marketplace that is on a mission to authentically connect wine lovers and winemakers and bring the vineyard experience into the comfort of the consumer's home. 
By combining an extensive portfolio of quality wines, great prices and effortless online experience, Decantify is building the ultimate wine experience for you.

Name: Santa Rosa Stainless Steel
Description: Santa Rosa Stainless Steel is a stainless steel tank fabricator specializing in the wine, beer, spirits, water, beverage and food industries.  The company is based out of Santa Rosa, California and continues to provide custom tanks for customers all over the US, North America and more...

Name: WinEdukacja by Republika Wina
Description:
Nasza specjalność to winiarskie warsztaty sommelierskie dla firm. Prowadzimy je zarówno online jak i stacjonarnie. Naszymi klientami były największe korporacje w Polsce oraz firmy z branż usługowych, finansowych, prawniczych, consultingowych itp.

Skontaktuj się z nami degustacje@republikawina.pl w celu uzgodnienia szczegółów.

Warsztaty winiarskie prowadzone przez najlepszych sommelierów w Polsce.

Jeśli szukasz sposobu na integrację pracowników, bez obowiązkowego ściągania ich w jedno miejsce, to poznaj nasz nowatorski produkt - warsztaty winiarskie online ! 

Przeprowadziliśmy kilkadziesiąt degustacji online dla największych firm w Polsce. Posiadamy również wieloletnie doświadczenie w prowadzeniu warsztatów stacjonarnie.

Magda: "Duża wiedza prowadzącego. Błyskotliwość i poczucie humoru!"

Karolina: “To było najlepsze spotkanie online w jakim miałam przyjemność uczestniczyć! Dziękuję :)”

Sebastian: “Ja przede wszystkim zapamiętam polot i pasję z jaką opowiadasz. Mega!”

Rafał: “Najlepsza impreza online”

Sprawdź szczegóły: https://r.republikawina.pl/ofertab2b

Name: ELK COVE VINEYARDS INC
Description: The first vineyard and winery in the Yamhill-Carlton AVA, Elk Cove is led by 5th generation farmer and 2nd generation winemaker Adam Campbell. Family owned since 1974 & 100% estate grown.

Name: De Wijngalerij
Description:
De Wijngalerij is een startend bedrijf dat zoekt naar eerlijke verhalen van echte boeren, prachtig vormgegeven flessen en vooral spannende wijnen. Door het enorme aanbod op de markt de dag van vandaag mag er in onze ogen extra aandacht zijn voor kunstzinnige vormgeving en pakkende verhalen achter de wijnen.

Wij kiezen voor wijnboeren die passievol en haast allemaal biologisch te werk gaan. Echte wijn, met liefde gemaakt. Daarnaast delen wij mooie wijnverhalen die u terug doen verlangen naar vakantie. kunstzinnige vormgeving en eerlijk gemaakte wijn.

Wij nemen u mee naar: de kunst van het proeven! Uiteraard horen wij graag welke kunstwerken jullie thuis willen inlijsten en welke juist niet. Want zoals een goede galerij betaamt, verandert ook onze collectie door de smaak van ons publiek.

De consument helpen in het massale aanbod dat er tegenwoordig op u af komt, dat is ons doel. Dat is ook de reden waarom u bij ons gratis kunt proeven en uw vragen kunt stellen, voordat u iets koopt. Wanneer het op wijn aan komt, zijn wij uw muze. Een betrouwbare partner, met wederzijds enthousiasme.

Team De Wijngalerij

Name: Copestick Murray Ltd.
Description:
Established in 2005, Copestick Murray manages a wide portfolio of branded wines, beers, spirits, and mixers, as well as managing large private label supply agreements. We boast a diverse customer base ranging from leading supermarkets and national specialist chains to independent retailers, national on-trade, wholesalers, restaurants and private clients.

Our parent company, Henkell & Co, is Germany’s largest sparkling wine producer and a leading producer of wines and spirits in Europe. With subsidiaries in 20 countries and exporting to over 100 countries worldwide, we work closely together to broaden our portfolio for the UK market and grow international distribution of our in-house brands.

Name: "BONBUVANT" - Mixologie & Spiritueux
Description:
“BONBUVANT” nom (français épicurien)
Marque dédiée au monde de la mixologie et des spiritueux,  autour de la notion du “savoir mieux boire” et de la volonté farouche d’apprendre à consommer différemment.

Name: Ferré I Catasús
Description:
Ferré I Catasús, 
Som un celler familiar dedicat a l'elaboració de vins i caves ecològics amb la idea del plaer i l'atreviment. Un celler amb l'ànima del modernisme català, amb l'anhel de transformar les costums, amb voluntat de trencar les normes. Sortir del que és convencional amb productes amb una estètica referent de modernitat, provocació i art.
Sortir dels hàbits amb noves maneres de'elaborar vins, perquè és el moment de canviar, de cuidar la terra i el medi ambient.

Trencar les normes, crear-ne de noves, aquest és 'esperit de Ferré i Catasús.
Perquè a Ferré i Catasús pensem que el millor vi és el que a  tu t'agrada!

-

Somos una bodega familiar dedicada a la elaboración de vinos y cavas ecológicos, con la idea de placer y atrevimiento. Una bodega con el alma del modernismo catalán, con el anhelo de transformar las costumbres, con una voluntad de salir de las normas. Salir de lo convencional con productos con una estética referente de modernidad, provocación y arte. Salir de los hábitos con nuevas maneras de elaborar vino, porque es el momento de cambiar, de cuidar a la tierra, al medio ambiente. 

Romper las normas, crear nuevas, eso es el espíritu de Ferré I Catasús.
Porque en Ferre i Catasus creemos que el mejor vino y cava es el que a ti te gusta. 

-

We are a family winery dedicated to the production of ecological wines and cavas, with the idea of pleasure and daring. A winery with the soul of Catalan modernism, with a desire to transform customs, with willingness to go outside the rules. Going out of the conventional with products with referential aesthetics of modernity, provocation and art. Leaving behind habits with new ways of making wine, because it is time to change, to take care of the land, the environment. 

To break the rules, to create new ones, that is the spirit of Ferré I Catasús.
Because at Ferre i Catasus we believe that the best wine and cava is the one you like.

With the finest soft white wheat, pure glacial water and a lot of passion, we have fulfilled our grandfather’s dream of creating a truly exceptional, unique spirit, which embodies our Irish heritage.

We are Gik Live! and we will change the world.

Name: Barristers Block Wines
Description:
The Barristers Block label was created in 2004 by Jan Allen with the opening of the Cellar Door in 2008.

Located at 141 Onkaparinga Valley Road, Woodside in picturesque surroundings it enable us to maintain our standard of excellence, we ensure we obtain fruit from those regions which are known for providing the best fruit in a particular varietal.
