 In 2021 Vinicon has created and established new routes to market for a number of high quality estates, effectively launching, managing and building their brands.

Name: Champagne Alain Edouard
Description:
Alain Edouard est une maison de Champagne mettant en lumière le terroir champenois.
Elle rend la dégustation du Champagne accessible tant au niveau culturel que financier en proposant des produits et un accompagnement haut de gamme à des prix défiant toute concurrence.

La maison de Champagne Alain Edouard propose des cuvées Blanc de Blancs millésimées issues de ses parcelles de Chardonnay situées dans le Sud de la Côte des Blancs. Pauvres en sulfites et peu dosées, elles vous plongent dans le terroir de la maison en réunissant les trois critères nécessaires à l'obtention d'un Champagne terroir: la terre, le climat et les hommes.


Goûtez à l'effervescence d'une grande année - http://www.alainedouard.fr/

Name: Peregrine Wines
Description:
Taking a 'hands on' approach to winemaking since 1998, the McLachlan family strive to produce wines that embody the absolute best of Central Otago.

This passion for the land runs in our family, and is a hallmark of Peregrine as a business.

Name: Abingworth Vineyard
Description: You can find Abingworth Vineyard nestled at the foot of the South Downs in the historic village of Thakeham. This family-run venture aims to bring fun and value to the local community and visitors. Watch this space for updates on our English wine!

Name: Charbay Distillery
Description:
The family is one of the early pioneers in the modern American artisan distillery movement. We began distilling in California in 1983 with Alambic Pot Still Brandy and haven't stopped since. Our lineup includes whiskeys distilled from bottle-ready beer, brandies distilled from Napa Valley grapes, vodkas flavored with 100% real fruit or tea, and rum distilled from sugar cane syrup. 
Our family also makes wines, ports, and aperitifs - using brandy they distill in their Alambic Pot Still (check out www.charbaywinery.com).

Marko is Generation XIII to carry on the family's European heritage of fermenting & distilling. It's hard to find someone with a more genuine love of the art form, grounded in solid experience. His 25-year apprenticeship covered every category of distilling. Only when he'd sourced, distilled, and taken to market his very own spirit, his father said he'd earned the right to be called a Master Distiller.

"This family is hands-on and it shows in the quality of everything they bottle. Their sincerity is appreciated by writers and consumers alike." Robert Plotkin, a present-day authority, said: "No one family in the history of our great Union has contributed more to the welfare and general happiness of her citizens."
https://www.winemag.com/2019/09/05/wsa2019nominees/

Name: Hong Kong Wine Judges Association
Description:
Hong Kong Wine Judges Association is a non-profit making organization, intends to promote the wine appreciation culture by conducting wine competitions with constructive review & comment by experts and critics. We have allied a team of professional, experienced wine specialists from different segments of the industry, namely sommelier, winemaker, journalist, educator, lecturer, executive chef and merchant.

Our goal is to maintain close contacts with wine judges locally and from around the world to explore possible collaboration in advancing wine judging standards. The Association will also pay close attention to related developments in Greater China and APEC region and seek out opportunities for collaboration.

We believe a wide range of services may be delivered in form of event competition, advice, guidance and training that can be developed in line with international wine judging practices, to help members progress and grow professionally and eventually become part of the wine judging community.

香港葡萄酒評審協會乃一非牟利機構，旨在以大公無私的態度，舉辦葡萄酒品評活動，建立以公平及公正為原則的平台，歸納來自社會各界的葡萄酒愛好者及專家們的意見，協力提升香港及大中華的葡萄酒文化及評審水平，以配合香港政府將香港塑造成為亞洲葡萄酒貿易中心的政策及方向。

我們的團隊成員來自業內、外不同領域，包括國際知名品酒師、釀酒師、葡萄酒專欄作家、大學講師、星級總廚及資深酒商，務求從不同角度將意見共融，採立合適的國際葡萄酒評審系統而製訂最具華人特色的專業準則。本會將會與世界各地的葡萄酒文化機構及葡萄酒評論家緊密聯繫，互相交流，亦會緊貼大中華及亞太經合地區的相關發展，尋求合作的機會，進一步提升本地的葡萄酒評審水平，與國際接軌。

我們相信憑藉適當的專業指引及系統培訓，必定能夠與國際葡萄酒評審工作同步發展，亦可協助本會會員增進知識及專業地發展，最終成為葡萄酒評審業界精英。

Name: Willis Publicity
Description:
Willis Publicity is the UK’s leading specialist in branded point-of-sale solutions for the drinks industry, proudly supporting brewers, spirit brands, and soft drink companies for over 25 years.
Our team brings together point-of-sale experts, sourcing specialists and a dedicated in-house design department, backed by multiple UK production facilities. From plastic injection moulding and wood fabrication to resin casting and print, we have the capability to deliver at every stage. Together with our trusted network of long-standing international supply partners, we provide a complete service covering barware, outdoor items, signage, merchandise, and dispense solutions.
With deep technical expertise, decades of industry experience, and strong client partnerships, Willis Publicity is uniquely positioned to manage any project and help your brand stand out where it matters most.

Name: Vine Cliff Winery
Description:
Vine Cliff Winery is a family-owned winery located in the Oakville appellation of the Napa Valley. We proudly create premium Napa Valley wines that capture the essence and magic of the region. Our current varietals include Cabernet Sauvignon, Chardonnay, Malbec. We maintain estate vineyards in Oakville. 

Vine Cliff Wine Experiences can be reserved daily at the Estate. Please visit our website for more information. 

Vine Cliff Winery was established in 1871, when 500 acres were carved out of the George Yount estate. One of the first bonded wineries in the United States, and the first in Napa to plant Bordeaux varietals on a commercial scale, Vine Cliff was one of the region’s most successful wineries through the end of the 19th Century. A series of natural problems drove the winery under in the early 20th Century, with the land remaining fallow until it was purchased by the Sweeney family in 1985. 

Experience the wines of Vine Cliff at our Oakville Estate. Open Daily for reservations. 
Address: 7400 Silverado Trail, Napa, CA 94558. 

Please visit us at www.vinecliff.com for more information and to make your reservations or call (707) 944-1364 or email info@vinecliff.com.

Name: HOLDVÖLGY
Description:
Our winery is in the heart of the Tokaj wine region in Hungary, just a few miles from Europe’s geometric centre. The Mád basin holds a special position in the world of winegrowing because of its unique soil, macroclimate, and microclimate. Settled as early as the 15th century, Mád is identified in ancient documents as a borough. It was a meeting point for barons, counts, lords, and wine merchants, making it a pivotal location for winegrowing and the wine trade.

HOLDVÖLGY operates on an area of 27 hectares. Our estate is situated on 22 parcels within seven different vineyards in the best areas of the Mád basin. Our cellar is one of the oldest cellar systems in the region, with some sections dating back as far as the 16th century. Our cellar is also one of the longest, measuring 1.8 kilometers.

The history of the winery started with a one-hectare birthday present.
By 2006, the Estate had grown to 26 hectares.

The goal was and still is to achieve the vision of creating an iconic brand by international standards.
In the eve of this 21st Century and taking into account all the major wine regions of the World only Tokaj and more particularly the Mád Basin would give us the means to succeed in our quest.

Name: USA Ratings ES
Description: Para las marcas que buscan obtener un reconocimiento más amplio dentro del mercado estadounidense, el evento USA Spirits Ratings es una oportunidad fantástica para estar frente a los creadores de tendencias más influyentes de la industria.

Name: Jos Beeres Wijnkoperij
Description:
Jos Beeres Wijnkoperij is misschien wel de meest sfeervolle en de ruimst gesorteerde wijnkoperij van Noord-Nederland. Sinds de oprichting in 1879 staat deze zaak voor kwaliteit, service, innovatie en de juiste sfeer; en dat is vandaag nog zeker het geval.

Een bezoek aan deze gerenommeerde zaak in Groningen is een ware ontdekkingstocht in de wereld van wijn. De kelders, het proeflokaal, de proeftuin en de ruim opgezette winkel vormen een aangename en charmante omgeving voor een kennismaking met het bijzondere assortiment. Bovendien kun je vanaf 2009 ook in de vestiging op Terschelling terecht voor je wijnen. Hoewel hier slechts een beperkt deel van het assortiment getoond wordt, is het hele gamma hier ook verkrijgbaar.

Het assortiment wordt gekenmerkt door een unieke veelheid aan smaken. Van oudsher zijn de klassieke wijnlanden breed vertegenwoordigd maar ook de trend om te genieten van Nieuwe Wereldwijnen wordt bij Jos Beeres gevolgd, met de aankoop van wijnen uit ArgentiniĂŤ tot Nieuw-Zeeland. Naast de ruim 1100 soorten tellende wijncollectie tref je bij Jos Beeres een bijzondere collectie aan met eau-de-vies, likeuren, Armagnac, Cognac, calvados en eigen distillaten. Worden de verschillende smaken je te veel? Om de smaak te neutraliseren staan 35 verschillende soorten water op de proeftafel. 

Geen gelegeheid om 1 van onze winkels te bezoeken? Geen probleem; Op onze webshop vind u het overgrote deel van onze wijnen online te bestellen. Wij brengen uw bestelling natuurlijk franco thuis! (In NL vanaf 12 flessen)

Name: J. & A. MITCHELL & COMPANY, LIMITED
Description: J. & A. MITCHELL AND COMPANY, LIMITED is a wine and spirits company based out of SPRINGBANK DISTILLERY WELL CLOSE, CAMPBELTOWN, United Kingdom.

Name: Medlock Ames
Description:
Bell Mountain is a special vineyard. It took us two years of searching to find this hidden parcel located at the southwestern tip of Alexander Valley which overlaps into the Russian River Valley. Bell Mountain Ranch is tucked away on Chalk Hill Road and covers 340 acres of which only 50 are planted to vines. A handful of acres are home to our 800 olive trees, our orchard, and our market garden for seasonal vegetables and flowers. We chose to leave the majority of land in a natural state - reserving it for oaks and wildflowers.

Preservation of the land is at the core of our values since day one. To ensure the natural habitat is protected, we’ve built a wildlife corridor that cuts through our vineyards, shepherding the animals through our property and safely depositing them to our neighbors, the Pepperwood Reserve, a 3000 acres wildlife sanctuary.

This vineyard is unlike any other and combines steep hillsides with growing conditions similar to that of Bordeaux – perfect for Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, and Sauvignon Blanc.

Name: NG Vins
Description:
NG Vins is a fine wine trading company based in Arles, Provence.

Our mission is to offer our customers a refined selection of fine wines produced with passion and talent from around the world.

We specialise in setting up wine cellars for individuals and professionals, consulting and organising events for private and professional clients (dinners, tastings, vineyard discoveries, corporate gifts, etc.).

Name: Awin Barratt Siegel Wine Agencies
Description:
Awin Barratt Siegel Wine Agencies LLP is a UK based family-run wine importer specialising in wines for independent retailers. It was formed in 1983 and today has 22 employees based in 2 UK offices. ABS represents over 90 producers and family-run wineries from around the globe in the UK market. 6 times winner of the IWSC's "Wine Importer of the Year"

Spirits: Ó Catháin Irish Whiskey, Ouzo Pelagos, The Story Gin

Name: Palliser Estate Wines of Martinborough Ltd
Description:
Palliser Estate is a boutique vineyard with an international outlook. For over two decades our people have been carefully looking after our corner of New Zealand. Proudly owned by a small number of loyal and passionate New Zealanders was planted in 1984, one of the pioneers of the Martinborough region.  Martinborough only produces 1% of New Zealands’ wine but is synonymous with growing making great wine.  
Acclaimed Pinot Noirs and Chardonnay, vivid Sauvignon Blanc, and elegant aromatics are all produced in this most southerly Wairarapa sub-region, which boasts free-draining soils and a cool, dry climate.
With our organic vineyard programme under the careful eye of head Winemaker Guy McMaster, Palliser has excitingly begun a new era with the aim to make iconic wines that link us to our Martinborough home in every sense.  We have six vineyards situated on the revered Martinborough Terrace, 35% of which are under organic management (3 vineyards certified under BioGro NZ) with the aim to take this to 100% by 2025.  
All our wines are 100% estate grown. Were the first CEMARS certified winery in the world – 2009 (CEMARS certification is for emitting industries to measure their greenhouse gas emissions).  
We have a stylish cellar door open 7 days a week, all year around, providing a warm welcome and great selection of wines for tasting – whether its’ a personal tasting through our range, or a leisurely lunch enjoyed in our Summer Restaurant or in the beautiful courtyard and park like surrounds.

Name: Argento Wine Company
Description:
The Argento Wine Company is a young, international team of 12 people who are passionate about producing and selling great Argentine wine. 

Since its launch in 1999, Argento has blazed a trail around the world, promoting the potential of Argentine wine and Malbec. Today it is the leading wine brand from Argentina in Europe and is sold in more than 50 countries.

The strength of our brand is its intrinsic connection to our country of origin, we offer consumers a rich proposition that is immediately understood.  When you drink Argento, you get to experience a slice of life in Argentina.

Name: Edelwhite Gin AG
Description: Die Edelwhite Gin AG ist ein kleines Start-up, das hochwertige Spirituosen produziert, designt und vertreibt. Unsere Produkte haben in den letzten Jahren bereits unzählige nationale und internationale Auszeichnungen gewonnen. Wir sind stolz, behaupten zu dürfen, dass unsere Gin- und Vodka-Herstellung von A bis Z Handarbeit ist. Regionalität steht bei uns im Fokus: Mit Leidenschaft und Stolz unterstützen und involvieren wir Unternehmen aus der Region.

Name: Domaine de la Rivière
Description:
Our family’s goal is to craft unique, limited production, age-worthy wines that create memorable experiences. 

Great wines begin with high quality grapes. We are focused on growing and sourcing ultra-premium fruit from the Middle Reach of the Russian River Valley, a narrow stretch of land that runs north-south along the Russian River's banks between southern Healdsburg and Forestville. Known for its mix of sun and fog, the area promotes a long, well balanced growing season producing wines with rich, velvety fruit flavors that are distinctive to vineyards located in this region. 

We produce Pinot Noir, Chardonnay, and Rosè.

Please visit our splash page and join us on our journey at www.domaineriviere.com

Name: Brothers Drake Meadery
Description:
We make mead. Simply put mead is wine made from honey, but, more poetically, mead is the drink of the gods, cherished from the time of the Pharaohs to the Emperors of China.

Brothers Drake Meadery is bringing a legend to life. Mead, also known as honey wine, is arguably the oldest alcoholic beverage documented. References to mead abound in our mythos, history, literature, medicinal remedies, etc. Made from the fermentation of honey, mead is a beverage in a category of its own that dates back beyond the reaches of human history.  

Honey is available in numerous varietals defined by their floral source; this makes for an amazing array of mead flavors and characters. Just as with beer, wine, and other spirituous beverages, the addition of other ingredients (e.g. fruit, herbs, and spices) can be added to exponentially multiply the possible flavors of mead. 

The Meadmasters of Brothers Drake take pride in their ability to craft palate-pleasing meads with modern methods.  We NEVER add sulfites to our mead and we use a no heat method that keeps all the flavor in the bottle.  

Everything we make is GLUTEN-FREE.  Mead is quickly becoming the best choice for consumers with certain sensitivities.

At Brothers Drake Meadery you will discover mead in a variety of flavors and ranging from dry to sweet. Join in the exploration of the limitless potential of mead. 

Drink a Drake!...and savor history reborn in Ohio!

Name: Clos LaChance Vineyards
Description:
HISTORY: In 1987, co-owners Bill and Brenda Murphy decided to plant a few rows of Chardonnay in their Saratoga backyard for landscaping purposes. A few years later, the wines produced from this small backyard vineyard were good enough to sell to the public. It was at this point that Clos LaChance formed into a full fledged winery. The first commercially released wines were from the 1992 vintage.

In 1996, in order to ensure a continuing supply of high quality fruit, Bill and Brenda established CK Vines, a vineyard maintenance and installation company specializing in "back-yard" vineyard development throughout the Santa Cruz Mountains appellation.  

WINERY LOCATION: Located in San Martin, CA (20 miles south of San Jose). The Murphy’s opened the winery production facility in 2001. Hospitality Center, including tasting room, patio, and banquet and wedding facilities, opened to the public in May of 2002. Adjacent to CordeValle Resort & Golf Course’s 6th hole.

TASTING ROOM: CLC’s welcomes visitors daily, offering a wonderful selection of wines and breathtaking views of the South Bay's Wine Country. The winery offers a variety of wine tasting programs and tours to choose from and small production wines, tours of the cellar and a demonstration vineyard presentation. The winery also offers a handful of special events throughout the year. 

ESTATE VINEYARDS: CLC produces quality and affordable wines from 150 acres of  Estate Vineyards. The vineyard is planted to a diverse collection of varietals that are ideal for the growing conditions. The Estate Vineyard  possess excellent soils, little precipitation during the growing season and the warm days and cool nights necessary for ripe flavor development and great natural acidity.

Name: La brasserie barge
Description:
Qui sommes-nous ? 
La brasserie artisanale, La Barge, est une fabrique indépendante née dans la forêt de Rambouillet en 2016. 

Nous proposons aux cafés, hôtels, restaurants et bars, de servir à leurs clients une authentique bière artisanale locale. Nous brassons les bières que les consommateurs veulent boire de nos jours. 

Fraîche, légère et fruité, La Barge est un souffle contre la standardisation des goûts, un plébiscite pour la richesse des saveurs.

Toutes nos bières sont brassées selon les méthodes traditionnelles avec seulement les ingrédients suivants: eau, malt, houblons et levure 100% naturel. 
Nous brassons actuellement 3 bières : une blonde (5,2°), une blanche (5°) et une ambrée (7°), et sont disponibles en fût en inox de 30L, ou en bouteilles de 33 cl et de 75 cl.

Le projeeeeeeet : 
La brasserie barge est lauréat du concours "Réinventer la Seine", ainsi nous avons remporté l'Appel à projet Innovant (API) lancé par la mairie de Paris en 2017. 

Nous avons pour objectif de brasser de la bière dans un local à Saint Denis (dans les anciennes Ecuries de la Briche situé à la confluence entre le canal Saint Denis et la Seine) puis de la distribuer de manière innovante en péniche sur la Seine.
En 2019, la brasserie barge sera francilienne, et aura son local terrestre et sa péniche !

A partir d'une dizaine d'escales du Grand Paris, le bateau sera relayé par des triporteurs électriques qui
assureront la livraison finale, limitant ainsi la congestion du réseau routier et offrant une meilleure performance
écologique que la distribution traditionnelle de bière.

Cette activité industrielle et de service animera ainsi les bords de Seine de manière performante et éco-
responsable.

Soutenez le projet sur nos réseaux sociaux: 
https://www.facebook.com/labrasseriebarge/
https://www.instagram.com/la_brasserie_barge/

Name: Vartender: Whiskey Concierge
Description:
Born from the frustration of organizing their own personal whiskey collections, the co-founders of Vartender have developed a new app for whiskey lovers to help them build and organize their personal collections and maximize their whiskey enjoying experience.  

Vartender distills the most useful advice to help whiskey lovers make the most informed purchase decisions and places that at their fingertips when they need it most.  Initial app features include a free inventory tool with barcode scanning that instantly recognizes more than 1,000 whiskeys (and growing). Vartender also houses the most comprehensive pricing data ever compiled into one resource; the latest news on upcoming whiskey releases from favorite distilleries; and crowd-sourced insights on tasting notes, all to empower and inform users before making a purchase.

Whether you are a novice who has just recently tasted whiskey for the first time or an experienced whiskey connoisseur, you will find that Vartender enhances your appreciation for whiskey and whiskey culture.  In addition to the many functions specifically designed to empower whiskey enjoyment and purchase, Vartender will deliver original content showcasing American distilleries, the craft of whiskey making, and venues to enjoy whiskey.

Vartender will be available on IOS and can be downloaded for FREE from the App Store as of 9/16/2020.  The Android version is in development.  

Please visit the following for more information:
IOS Link to App Store (when we have it)
https://www.vartender.com/
https://www.facebook.com/Vartender-583706202321701

Press Contacts and Partnership Inquiries:
pr@vartender.com

Vartender, LLC is a Service Disabled Veteran Owned Small Business launched in 2020.  The Vartender application is the first digital tool launched by Vartender, LLC, with the express purpose of providing expert advice on building and curating your liquor collection at your fingertips.

Name: Rönnvikin Viinitila
Description:
Rönnvik, yksi Suomen suurimmista ja palkituimmista viinitiloista, tarjoaa vierailijoilleen idyllisen ympäristön nautinnollisen kesäpäivän viettoon. Reissaajia palvelee tallikahvila Pikku-Valakka, josta saa tilan omien tuotteiden lisäksi muita lähialueen herkkuja. Silmänruokaa tarjoavat kiinnostavat näyttelyt paikallisesta taiteesta ja tilaviinin historiasta. Viinitila toimii niin kesämatkailijan keitaana kuin ryhmämatkailijan elämyskohteena viinipruuvinkeineen. Tilalla järjestyvät myös mieleenpainuvat kokoukset ja ainutlaatuiset juhlat.

Viinitilan päärakennuksen rakennutti aikoinaan kihlakunnan kirjurina toiminut kamreeri Schrey, jonka kunniaksi Rönnvik lanseerasi vuonna 2014 oman nimikko-calvadoksen. Tuskin olisi raittiuden kannattaja Schrey arvannut, että Rönnvikistä tulisi viinitila ja kulinaristien paratiisi. Kamreeri nimittäin antoi potkut rengilleen Jeremiakselle liiallisen syöpöttelyn ja juominkien vuoksi.

Rönnvik tarjoaa aistinautintojen lisäksi näköalapaikan menneisyyteen. Kamreeri Schrey on helppo kuvitella mittailemassa tilansa maita ja Rönnit maatilan töiden parissa. Ja jos hyvä tuuri käy, saatat nähdä salaperäisen valkean neidon hiipimässä iltahämärissä. Neidon kerrotaan heittäytyneen Ilmoilanselkään Kokkostenkärjestä, josta löytyikin muinainen kalmisto.

Kamreerin kuoltua vuonna 1869 tilan osti Vihtori Aleksanteri Kustaanpoika. Hän otti sukunimekseen Rönnvik, ja 1900-luvulla nimi lyheni Rönniksi. Tilaa myös laajennettiin tallilla ja navetta-sikalalla. Rönnin suku on hoitanut tilaa yli 150 vuotta ja vaalinut Rönnvikin kaunista miljöötä ja perinteitä. Rönnit ovat myös uudistaneet tilaa rohkeasti. Perinteisestä maatilasta on kasvanut maamme suurin viinitila, jonka palkituissa tuotteissa hyödynnetään kekseliäästi suomalaisen luonnon antimia.

Name: Laffitte Family Winery
Description: We are two brothers living in Gascony. Our family LAFFITTE lives on these territories since Medieval Time! There are archives at the town hall of Ayzieu (our village) which find traces of our family since the 15th century! "La Fitte" meant "Stone" in Gascon. In our family, there has always been only one son. This is why the property was transmitted on from father to son since centuries... Now, it's the first time when there are 2 sons so 2 brothers Laffitte (Christophe et Sébastien). Our family has always produced armagnac. Our parents begun to make wine. We continued the work of our ancestors and we have conceived and developed our 2 brands of wine. Thus, “Le Petit Gascoûn” et “Domaine Laffitte” were born!

En présence des membres du bureau :
Jean-Paul Barès, président du Wine & Business club – Toulouse
Davy Atlan et Sébastien Poncin, vice-présidents du Wine & Business Club – Toulouse
Cendrine Martinez, chargée des relations publiques du Wine & Business club – Toulouse

Name: Donna Enrica - Fine Wines from Italy
Description:

With our wine selection we want to offer you a range of the best known and most popular Italian wines, with the aim of helping you create an assortment of excellent products, saving time and costs.

Aurelio’s passion for the good wine brings him to match best tasting with iconic and design bottles.

Name: Mas d'en Gil
Description: Mas d’en Gil es el resultado de tres etapas históricas, de tres visiones que han aportado a la finca una suma de cualidades excepcionales para la viticultura, la elaboración y el comercio de vino. Francesc Gil, el fundador de la finca en 1860, encarna la intuición de los inicios y el entusiasmo por el progreso, tan propia de su siglo XIX. Los siguientes propietarios, la familia Barril, consolidaran a partir de los años 1930 la calidad agrícola que rebautizaron como Masía Barril. Con ideas avanzadas, como la agricultura ecológica y el uso de levaduras indígenas. Con la decisión capital de embotellar vino, Rafael Barril Figueras junto con Magdalena Vicente Herrando fundaron un nuevo Priorato a la antigua usanza. En 1998, la familia Rovira Carbonell compra la finca y recupera el nombre histórico de la propiedad: Mas d’en Gil. Es la materialización del sueño de Pere Rovira, uno de los grandes profesionales del vino del Penedès acompañado de su esposa Pilar Carbonell, galerista de arte contemporáneo y sus cuatro hijas. Poco después, en 2000, salen al mercado los primeros vinos con la Marca de Mas d’en Gil bajo la dirección comercial de Pilar Rovira Carbonell, la hija mayor. La hija pequeña de Pere Rovira, Marta Rovira Carbonell, introduce la agricultura biodinámica en la finca y actualmente dirige la empresa, con el apoyo de su padre y de su hermana mayor Pilar.

Name: MOORLAND SPIRIT COMPANY LIMITED
Description:
The Moorland Spirit Co was set up at the end of 2014 by founders Walter Riddell, Valentine Warner, Cairbry Hill and Nick Strangeway with a desire to make the finest gin in the world - brought from the wild juniper at Hepple through the pioneering distilling system we call the Triple Technique. 

In 2018 we have a strong position at the top end of the on and off trade markets in the UK and are building our relationships with distributor partners in the US, Germany, Italy and Denmark.  About a third of our volumes are exported.

Also in 2018 we are introducing two new products that are built on our dual principals of using the freshest possible source of ingredients with an innovative and technically dependent distilling system. 

We are proud of the accolades including winning Distillery Innovator of the year from the Spirits business in 2018, a double gold medal and a five plus stars from Simon Difford, one of the most demanding spirits critics in the UK for Hepple Gin.

Name: AROMA WINEBAR ENOTECA
Description:
Il locale nasce da un progetto fatto di esperienza, collaborazione e soprattutto passione per il mondo del vino; la cantina spazia dai vini italiani a quelli francesi, privilegiando le eccellenze di piccoli produttori e dando particolare risalto ai vini del territorio, soprattutto al ricercato Derthona Timorasso.

Periodicamente vengono organizzati corsi di avvicinamento al vino, serate a tema, degustazioni vini, incontri con i produttori, feste private, organizzazione di eventi informativi, aperitivi in lingua, aperibusiness e tante altre interessanti novità.

Name: Parcellaire.com
Description:
Parcellaire est un spécialiste de la vente privée de vins d’exception. Nos relations privilégiées avec les vignerons assurent à nos clients une traçabilité optimale des bouteilles, ainsi que la possibilité d’acquérir des vins rares et des millésimes à maturité.

Nous organisons régulièrement des événements œnologiques à Paris. Par ce biais nous créons le lien entre les domaines prestigieux et nos clients fins connaisseurs.

Nos vins les plus rares sont proposés à une clientèle sélectionnée qui ne nourrit pas d’intérêts commerciaux ni spéculatifs.

Name: Résonance Wines
Description:
Expressive Wines with a Burgundian Accent

Founded in 2013, Résonance sits in the Yamhill-Carlton AVA, in a hidden part of Willamette Valley just west of the small agricultural town of Carlton. The seeds for our project had been planted when Maison Louis Jadot set out to establish its first winery outside of Burgundy.

Name: VALKYRIE SELECTIONS, LLC
Description: VALKYRIE SELECTIONS, LLC is a company based out of 113 W NORTH ST, Healdsburg, California, United States.

Name: Organic Wine Review
Description: Organic Wine Review’s mission is to popularize organic and biodynamic wines one short, irreverent and informative video review at a time.  The site is a video blog that helps consumers find and learn about organic and biodynamic wines from the world over.

Name: Tim Smith Wines
Description:
Born in a ‘light bulb moment’ on a study tour to France’s Rhone Valley, Tim Smith Wines was established in 2001 with our first vintage in 2002.

We are still unashamedly heavily influenced by the wines of the Rhone Valley, but with a very healthy respect for our regional Barossa wine style. We see no point in trying to reinvent the wheel when the wine styles and regionality we enjoy in the Barossa has been around for nearly 180 years; the region must be doing something right. 

However, Tim's inner wine geek can't help tinkering and responding to our different yearly vintage challenges.

Just as importantly, we want to try and demystify a lot of the elitism about wine; it’s a social lubricant after all, it should be fun!

Name: Bayfield's Hotel Group

Name: Cantina Dorgali
Description:
Cantina Dorgali si trova tra mare e montagna, nel centro della costa orientale della Sardegna, nata nel lontano 1953 è stata fondata per collaborazione e merito di un gruppo di agricoltori dorgalesi. 

L'unione è la nostra forza!
L'azienda è da oltre mezzo secolo tra le realtà più importanti del mondo vitivinicolo sardo. Il Cannonau ne fa da padrona, vitigno principe della vitivinicultura regionale che in quest'area, per le sue peculiarità pedo-climatiche riesce ad esprimere caratteri varietali finora poco conosciuti. 

L'espressione moderna di una tradizione millenaria.
Ad oggi, Cantina Dorgali affronta una nuova sfida: la realizzazione di un nuovo progetto che riqualifichi le produzioni passando per la valorizzazione della cultura, della storia e delle tradizioni del territorio. I cambiamenti migliorativi iniziano dalla vigna, attraverso una diversa cultura e coltura delle produzioni, puntando sulle basse rese per ceppo e programmando tutte le lavorazioni fino alla vendemmia. In cantina poi, le tecnologie non sono sofisticate, ma adeguate all’esigenza di esaltare le caratteristiche varietali del cannonau e degli altri vitigni autoctoni presenti nel territorio. Grazie a questa nuova filosofia il territorio si riappropria della sua vera identità, ritenuta la base per la crescita e la valorizzazione di tutti i vini prodotti.

Oltre 60 anni insieme.
La nostra cantina supera orgogliosamente il pregiudizio verso i sardi nato dalle parole attribuite a Carlo V "pocos, locos y mal unidos" rispondendo a tale concetto con oltre 60 anni di tenacia, crescita e innovazione.
Questo ci ha portato ad ottenere riconoscimenti importanti come "la medaglia di Cangrande" nel 2016 consegnataci dal Presidente della Repubblica in occasione del Vinitaly e numerosi premi conferiti ai nostri vini in occasione delle rassegne più importanti nazionali ed internazionali.

Name: Domaine de la Colombette
Description: Domaine familial depuis 4 générations, La Colombette se situe aux portes de Béziers, face à la Mer Méditerranée. François et son fils Vincent Pugibet ont largement contribué au renouveau du vignoble languedocien. Depuis plus de trente ans, ils sont reconnus pour la qualité de leurs vins et leurs innovations. En 1995, la Colombette reçoit le titre de Meilleur Chardonnay du Monde puis en 2009, après dix ans de recherches sur la réduction d’alcool, la gamme Plume est récompensée. Aujourd’hui, Vincent Pugibet est totalement investi dans la création et le développement de nouveaux cépages résistants qui permet une viticulture sans pesticides.

Name: Wine Machinery Group
