Name: PRIVATE CASK IMPORTS, INC.
Description:
Private Cask Imports, Inc. is a licensed U.S. national importer, brand marketer and developer of international and domestic super-premium spirits and fine wines.

Private Cask Imports offers clients, suppliers and partners a clear understanding of the vast, complex U.S. market which can be challenging for newcomers. Our founder and CEO has worked in the wine and spirits industry for more than 20 years, establishing a loyal network of national wholesalers and key retailers, thanks to a proven track record of delivering growth, revenue, and consumer pull.

The company’s focused approach is led by the increasing consumer demand for authentic and  crafted wines and spirits. The portfolio is featuring exclusively unique and exceptional brands made by passionate winemakers and distillers mostly in small batches or limited productions. It makes our entire team very proud!

Name: Château de Saint Cosme
Description:
Situé au coeur de l'appellation Gigondas, Saint Cosme est un domaine historique d’un genre unique. Son site de vinification Gallo-Romain, constitué de cuves de fermentation taillées dans le rocher, est parvenu jusqu’à nous dans un parfait état. Il donne une idée précise de ce que devait être la vie de nos proches ancêtres, les gallo-romains. Acquise par notre famille en 1490, la propriété a vu se succéder 15 générations de vignerons. Elle comprend 22 has de vieilles vignes d’une moyenne d’âge de 60 ans. Elles donnent de petits rendements. Le terroir de Saint-Cosme est une mosaïque géologique liée au grand bouleversement des Dentelles de Montmirail. Saint Cosme se situe exactement au point de croisement de deux failles géologiques, dans un microclimat froid et tardif : l’équilibre, la fraîcheur et la finesse caractérisent nos vins. 

C'est en m'appuyant sur ce passé vigneron que j’ai créé en 1997 un négoce que l'on peut appeler "Négoce-Vigneron". En effet, lors de mes différentes pérégrinations dans le Rhône, il m’a semblé que de grands terroirs étaient peu exploités, méconnus ou ignorés. Certains lieux me plaisaient et m’ont donné envie d’essayer. J’ai donc souhaité être un négociant « à l’ancienne », c'est-à-dire pratiquer ce métier avec une attitude de vigneron. Rechercher de l’esprit dans les terroirs et les vignes, travailler méticuleusement sur de petites cuvées, cheminer avec des vignerons qui aiment leur métier, transporter mes vins en fûts pour ne pas les abîmer, essayer de mettre du beau dans chaque jour. À Saint Cosme, nous réalisons le maximum de travaux à la main. Je souhaite vinifier des vins qui expriment leur terroir, leur origine, avec pureté et précision; des vins qui ont de la personnalité et de l’équilibre. Je veux qu’ils soient aptes à vieillir. 

Louis Barruol, propriétaire.

Name: Azienda Agricola Cascina Piano s.a.s
Description:
Collocata sulle rinomate sponde del Lago Maggiore lombardo, tra i comuni di Angera e Ranco, Cascina Piano è oggi una riconosciuta realtà di riferimento per il livello qualitativo della propria produzione di vini IGT “Ronchi Varesini”. 
Nata nel 2003, Cascina Piano si è posta come antesignana della certificazione IGT Ronchi Varesini improntando la propria mission aziendale alla qualità, alla sperimentazione e ad un profondo legame con il territorio dei “Ronchi Varesini” e del “Lago Maggiore”.
La qualità perseguita ambiziosamente dall'azienda è sintesi di territorio, ricerca, innovazione e sviluppo. Gli standard sono regolati dall’“IGT Ronchi Varesini” con una continua tensione verso il miglioramento per garantire un sempre più elevato livello di prodotto. 
Cascina piano sceglie e persegue la valorizzazione di vitigni autoctoni, riproducendo varietà in parte abbandonate e la selezione di nuove varietà da inserire nell’IGT.
Il disegno delle etichette ispirate agli affreschi dei territori, i nomi di battesimo dei vini riferiti alla storia e alla toponomastica locale ed i detti e le filastrocche dialettali riportate sulle bottiglie raccontano dei valori storici ed artistici locali.

Name: Becker Vineyards
Description: Becker Vineyards specializes in the production of various wines.

Name: Château Carignan
Description:
Château Carignan is located 10km to the east of Bordeaux in the Premières Côtes de Bordeaux AOC. The dominant grape variety is Merlot, which is in its element on the clayey limestone hillsides and offers supple, well-rounded wines. Perched on the banks of the Garonne River, the Premieres Cotes de Bordeaux enjoy a temperate climate, which plays an essential role in the cultivation of the vines.

Although labor in the vineyards is considerably more difficult on sloping terrain, and although the yields are generally lower, the grapes benefit substantially from this increased exposure, resulting in greater concentration and complexity. The result: wines which are pleasant and fresh; wines which can be enjoyed young, with aromas of ripe fruits and with lovely, velvety tannins.

30% of the vineyard is over 40 years old and 70% between 8 and 25 years old. The grape varieties planted are 65% Merlot, 25% Cabernet Sauvignon and 10% Cabernet Franc.

The grapes for the Château Carignan wines are hand harvested, machine harvesting is used for the other wines. 
Sorting tables and a private winery with small heat controlled tanks ensure full control of parcel selection for wine making. Maturing is in 100% new oak casks for the Château Carignan Prima and in one or maximum two wine casks for the Château Carignan. The entire production is estate bottled.

Name: Mildiani and friends
Description: Here you can travel into the world of Georgian viniculture and choose your favorite among an impressive assortment of 500 wines of different tastes and grape varieties presented on site.

Name: Glenbey
Description:
From the glens of Scotland to the shores of Lebanon, Glenbey is the first ever premium Scotch whisky with a Lebanese signature.

Glenbey is a premium authentic whiskey which takes great pride in its Lebanese roots. It is a cheerful and loving tribute to Lebanon that celebrates the strength, resilience, and untamable happiness of its people.

Savor it with pride and joie de vivre, the Lebanese way.

Name: Le Ruby de Lya
Description:
Cavistes et producteurs depuis plusieurs générations, Benjamin Bardet et Gildas Doret font découvrir à travers la France notamment dans le département de la Gironde et des Bouches-du-Rhône leur savoir-faire ainsi que leur passion du vin.

Implanté au Château le Bernet en passant par le Château Garance Haut Grenat et depuis peu implanté à Velaux.

Name: Bodegas y Viñedos O. Fournier
Description: O. Fournier Vineyards & Wineries operated in Spain, Argentina and Chile.

Name: Mammoth Brewing Group
Description:
Mammoth Brewing Group has been brewing
award winning craft beers since its inception in 1995.
Located in a world-class location that receives nearly
3 million visitors annually, Mammoth Brewing
Company's goal is to transcend what it's like to live
and play in the High Sierra via beer.

Name: Hacienda Molleda winery
Description:
In Tosos, in the province of Zaragoza (Spain´s Northeast) at an altitude of 750 metres and atop a hill surrounded by a sea of vineyards stands the Meléndez-Molleda family’s winery. The highest winery in Cariñena (Carignan)´s P.D.o.O.
The Hacienda Molleda winery stands in the centre of the estate, surrounded by its vineyards and by breathtaking landscapes towards the Algairén Sierra. A beautiful Mudejar style building, with caravista brick walls, windows with semicircular arches, in accordance with the area’s Mudejar tradition.
The estate
The viticulture family estate with the highest altitude and largest extension of the PDoO rainfed land, origin of the winery which was built to only produce its own grapes.
The winery
It´s designed in two levels, so that in the process of producing the wine, gravity is used, in a fall in which the grape gradually transforms into wine.
The facilities
The aromas of the wine and the toasted flavors imparted by the barrels immerse you in an ambience that conveys this family’s passion for winemaking. With a production capacity of 1,325,000 litres of wine, the facilities combine innovation with tradition. Stainless steel storages and French and American oak barrels which have been selected for every type of wine.
The wines
The soil´s character and the essence of the old Garnacha (Grenache) and Cariñena (Carignan) vines provide us with a treasure-like concentrated fruit. Wines with a strong varietal character, which are also round and balanced. That´s how the wines of Hacienda Molleda, GHM, Finca la Matea and Tierra de Andros are, our most emblematic wines.

Name: Well Crafted Wine & Beverage Co.
Description: We are an importer and distributor of fine wines and craft beverages from around the world. We are based in Virginia and service restaurants, wine bars, and wine retailers across Virginia, Washington D.C., and Maryland. We represent a curated portfolio of handcrafted wines from around the world to include Napa, Sonoma, Santa Barbara, Washington State, Oregon, Virginia, France, Spain, Italy, South Africa, South America, Australia, and New Zealand. Our team of fine-wine professionals helps our customers ensure they have the right wines to fit their program's specific needs.

Name: De Watère Champagne
Description: Founded in 2011, De Watère produces eco-sensitive Premier Cru Champagnes in Avenay-Val-d'Or, France. The company specialises in handmade premium products as a contrast to modern mass market champagnes. Its award winning Cuvées are being sold in Europe and the United States.

Name: VINOFED
Description:
VINOFED is the World Federation of Major International Wine and Spirits competitions and currently regroups 18 major competitions.

With observer status at the Organisation Internationale de la Vigne et du Vin (OIV), VINOFED collaborates in the development and revision of OIV Standards for International wines and spirits as well as guidelines for competitions. Vinofed obtains OIV patronage for its members. VINOFED audits each competition to exacting standards.

The aim is to ensure absolute credibility for VINOFED members and to ensure the authenticity and high quality of wines and spirits that obtain awards, and to give them the right to carry the VINOFED label.

VINOFED gives the producers the assurance that its products have been assessed according to well-defined guidelines by competent international tasters. It strengthens consumer confidence by guaranteeing the quality of award-winning products.

Name: 45th Parallel Spirits
Description: Local hand crafted, small batch, premium distillery.

Name: Destilerias de Constantina
Description: Anises y licores de calidad inigualable y sabor único elaborados de forma artesanal

Name: Le Paris des Sens - Agents de Vignerons Artisans en bio & biodynamie / Saké français junmai
Description:
Nous représentons des vignerons passionnés qui travaillent tous en bio et biodynamie : leurs vins sont PRÉCIS, VIBRANTS et avec de l'ÉCLAT. 
Il s'agit des domaines suivants : 
- CHAMPAGNE COESSENS (Côte des Bar)
- ROMAIN HENIN (Aÿ)
- HAMEAU TOUCHE BŒUF (Rhône septentrional)
- DOMAINE DU NOZAY (Sancerre)
- DOMAINE BELMONT (Lot)
- MAS DE LA LUNE (Roussillon)
- LES LARMES DU LEVANT (saké junmai français)
- CA BOIT LIBRE (Savoie)
- BRASSERIE DU MONT SALEVE (Bières artisanales)
- DOMAINE DE THALIE (MÂCON BRAY)
- CHÂTEAU DEL RANQ (Pic Saint-Loup)

Name: VINIBEE
Description:
Commandez les vins bio / naturels d’Artisans Vignerons engagés dans le respect de l’Homme, de l’Environnement et des Terroirs.
Abonnez-vous à nos Formules Box pour recevoir 2 ou 3 bouteilles de vin bio, biodynamique & naturel chaque mois.

Name: Liquid Spirits Club
Description:
Liquid Spirits Club is an e-commerce business with the ultimate goal of providing new wine tastes and experiences to its customers.
The main product are Mystery Wineboxes each one containing 2 different wines from different wine portuguese producers.
There are 3 main channels:
- monthly subscription 
- winebox gift 
- corporate segments (customized)
 
Liquid Spirits Club is always looking for new and interesting partnerships. If you are interested to know more details please reach out at geral@liquidspiritsclub.com

Name: Domaine Gayrard
Description:
Situé sur les hauteurs du vignoble de Gaillac au cœur du Sud-Ouest, notre jeune Domaine est installé à l’orée de Causses, sur un plateau calcaire à 300m d’altitude.
Installés depuis 2013, nous avons choisi de revenir sur nos terres familiales pour y réintroduire la vigne, renouant ainsi avec une tradition ancestrale de près de 5 siècles.

Conduit en Agriculture Biologique depuis 2016 notre vignoble s’étend aujourd’hui sur une trentaine d’hectares composés de jeunes vignes replantées au fil des ans autour de chez nous et de vignes plus anciennes reprises en 2018 sur les coteaux du Gaillacois. 
Depuis notre arrivée, nous nous attachons chaque jour à recréer un vaste espace naturel diversifié et respectueux de l’environnement pour redonner vie au sol et développer une meilleure biodiversité. Dans cette optique, nous travaillons nos vignes en Biodynamie depuis 2 ans et développons des cultures complémentaires appropriées à notre terroir (oliviers, arbres truffiers, fourrage pour nos voisins éleveurs, plantes médicinales…).

En cave, nous utilisons peu d’intrants (levures indigènes, faibles sulfites…) et choisissons des macérations courtes afin de proposer des vins porteurs de l’identité de nos terroirs, fins et fruités.
Nos cuvées sont essentiellement issues des cépages autochtones de notre région tel que le Loin de l’œil, le Braucol ou encore le Mauzac, avec le défi d’en révéler le caractère et les saveurs.

Name: Cayman Islands Distilleries
Description: The Cayman Island's first distillery.  Currently launching Seven Fathoms Rum, a super-premium entry to the spirits market in the Cayman Islands, the UK, South Florida, and several other Caribbean islands.  CID is also able to handle contract distillation and bottling.

Name: Shelburne Vineyard
Description:
Fine Wine Handcrafted in Vermont.  From the shores of Lake Champlain, welcome to Shelburne Vineyard.  
From vine to glass, we strive to make the finest quality wine from Northern Varietal Grapes grown right here on our vineyards and regionally sourced from other Northern growers.  With a lush Vermont landscape as its backdrop, our state of the art winery and tasting room sits nestled among the vines.  We invite you to visit, try our award winning wines and experience a taste of place.  As a pioneer in Vermont wine making, we are committed to sustainable agriculture and responsible vineyard practices and take pride in our stewardship of the land.  Stroll our vineyards.  Pack a picnic.  Sip a glass of wine on the patio.  Enjoy what Vermont has to offer.

Name: Weinland Nahe e.V.
Description:
The wine-growing region on the Nahe and the tributaries Glan and Alsenz has 2,000 years of wine-making tradition. Protection against cold winds by the high Hunsrück, mild temperatures and lots of sunshine create an excellent climate for winegrowing in this sunny valley with low-rain. Although the Nahe is one of the smaller German wine regions, its extraordinary range of soil types is second to none. This is because of its turbulent geological history. For this reason, the region is able to grow a range of varieties and produce a large diversity of wine styles. The steeper sites of volcanic or weathered stone, and those with red, clayish slate seem predestined for elegant, piquant Riesling wines of great finesse and a light spiciness. More than a quarter of the vineyard area of 4239 hectares is planted with it.

For more information visit www.weinland-nahe.de

Name: C-bev
Description: C-bev operates on the french On Trade and acts as Sales Agency and Consulting Company

Name: Château Laroze
Description:
En 1610 mes ancêtres Gurchy étaient déjà viticulteurs à Saint-Emilion et en 1882 ils créèrent le domaine familial de Laroze. Je pris la suite de mon père en 1990 après son départ à la retraite. 

Grand Cru Classé de Saint-Emilion depuis le premier classement de 1955, Château Laroze étale ses 27 hectares de vignes au pied du coteau nord-ouest de Saint-Emilion et du village médiéval. Le vignoble s’enroule autour du Château. 

Labour des sols, enherbement, drainage des parcelles, amendements organiques, refus des désherbants favorisent naturellement la pénétration des racines dans le sol fait de silice et d’argile, pour s’y nourrir, nous offrant des vins riches, savoureux, élégants et gourmands. 

L’équipe qui m’entoure et moi-même mettons tout notre savoir faire dans la mise en valeur et l’expression de ce magnifique terroir.


Notre devise :
Le Ciel, La Terre, Laroze

Name: Maison RIGAL
Description:
C'est au cœur du Sud-Ouest, dans la vallée du Lot que se situe la Maison RIGAL, enracinée à Cahors depuis 1755. 

Depuis plus de 250 ans, cette maison historique a élaboré un savoir-faire rare, garantie de tradition, d'authenticité et de qualité sur une gamme de vins de Cahors et du Sud-Ouest.

Découvrez toute la richesse des vins de cette région où il fait bon vivre à travers la signature unique de la Maison RIGAL et ses propriétés partenaires dont Château de Chambert aux Grands Malbecs élevés sur les hauts coteaux calcaires de Cahors.

Name: Rappahannock Cellars
Description:
Open daily year-round since 2001, Rappahannock Cellars has established themselves as a leader at the forefront of the Virginia wine industry. Their experienced winemaking team, coupled with careful tending of the vineyard and exacting knowledge of the cellar, is producing exquisite internationally recognized wines – truly earning their tagline “Revolutionizing Virginia Wine.”

As a truly family owned and operated business, don’t be surprised to be served by one of their own.

Name: OATH GIN
Description:
Created by F1 star Valtteri Bottas and Olympic cyclist Tiffany Cromwell, OATH tells the story of passion and authenticity, perseverance and grit.
A passion for the authentic, an authentic passion for gin.
OATH is an innovation in distilling and a revelation of flavors, combining improbable yet perfectly balanced natural ingredients. A pairing of the minds between two athletes and two opposite continents, the extreme cold conditions of the North and the unforgiving Antipodean heat, the softness of oats and the crispness of apples, distilled together into the smoothest possible New Western style gin. 

Using an innovative vacuum distilled process, OATH has captured the soft tones of oats, creating mellow base notes for this unique gin.  Our main ingredient, water, is as unique as our family formula. Indeed, according to UNESCO, our naturally filtered spring water is the purest in the world.

Oath is an ode to the improbable, the unexpected, the marriage of minds and cultures, the Finnish Sisu and the Aussie grit, of oat fields and apple orchards, all transformed into a perfectly fresh and incredibly smooth gin.

This is O/\TH - a family formula.

Name: Four Friends Drinks Ltd (Napo)
Description:
It all began during lockdown.  A Polish couple in the UK, looking to cheer up two of their closest friends, made a lemon-infused vodka drink inspired by a 100-year-old recipe from their homeland.  The homemade drink was delivered and went down ridiculously well.  

So well in fact, that these four friends became Four Friends Drinks, and Napo was born.

Today Napo offers a range of handcrafted, spirit drinks infused with natural fruit – launching with Lemon. 

Napo isn’t a shot but a more sophisticated drink to be enjoyed straight and super chilled, or over ice.  Its about sharing, laughing, and fun with friends.  It’s about living life.  Most of all, its about never taking it for granted. 

Share the Napo. Share the Moment.

Name: Rowlee Wines
Description:
Rowlee is situated in the cool climate, high altitude wine region of Orange, in the central highlands of New South Wales, 250 kilometres or three and half hours drive west of Sydney. A place of gastronomic dreams, the Orange region is a
haven of vineyard-dotted hills, bountiful agricultural land and a thriving local food scene.

Name: Adega Cooperativa Ponte de Lima
Description:
A Adega de Ponte de Lima foi fundada em 1959 em Ponte de Lima – a vila mais antiga de Portugal. Com cerca de 2000 produtores é uma das maiores da Região dos Vinhos Verdes, que com os seus familiares e trabalhadores, constitui a estrutura mais relevante do ponto de vista económico e social do Concelho.

Vinhos autênticos, genuínos e de alta qualidade num terroir com uma influência climática atlântica, de castas únicas, reforçado por um apoio técnico aos associados e uma inovação do processo produtivo, permitem vinhos premiados a nível nacional e internacional!

Adega de Ponte de Lima (Ponte de Lima’s wine cellar) was founded in 1959 in Ponte de Lima – the oldest Portuguese village. With around 2,000 producers, Adega de Ponte Lima is one of the most substantial cellars in the Vinho Verde region. The business employs local families and workers consequently representing great importance on the economic and social factors in Ponte de Lima

Adega de Ponte de Lima offers authentic, genuine, and high-quality wines in terroir with an Atlantic climate influence, that are originated from unique wine grape varieties. The entire process holds technical support to the local producers/winemakers, and innovation in the production process. Adega de Ponte de Lima’s wines are nationally and internationally awarded!

Name: Cambridge Winery
Description: Located in beautiful Cambridge, WI, Cambridge Winery was established in 2013 to produce high quality boutique wines and to provide hospitality facilities and services that complement its winery and vineyards. In November 2014, Cambridge Winery opened a wine tasting room in Madison, WI, which features hand-selected, proprietary wines from California’s Central Coast, produced and aged under its own label in collaboration with a renowned winemaker in the region. In the spring of 2015, Cambridge Winery purchased 28 acres of land in Cambridge and began planting its vineyard. In October 2015, Cambridge Winery acquired a large, beautiful facility on Hwy 12/18 in Cambridge adjacent to our vineyard to use as the Cambridge Tasting Room & Banquet Facility.

Name: Out Of The Box
Description: Out Of The Box provides DTC fulfillment, shipping and creative marketing solutions to wineries who want the little details to be a big deal by bringing in our 40+ years of Direct To Consumer wine experience and creating the 3PL shipping solution we’ve always wanted for ourselves.

Name: Tagaris Winery
Description: Tagaris Winery and Taverna Tagaris provide the perfect pairing of fine wine and Mediterranean inspired cuisine in Richland, Washington, the heart of the Columbia Valley appellation in Washington State's wine country and convenient to Seattle, Spokane and Portland.

Name: Vinho & Ponto Vila Clementino
Description: Somos uma importadora de vinhos localizada na Vila Clementino.

Name: Grupo Meddis
Description: En 1980, el socio fundador de GRUPO MEDDIS, dada su gran afición al mundo del vino, decide embarcarse en este proyecto en el que poder ofrecer a sus clientes vinos de alta gama y de una calidad acreditada tanto por los críticos y revistas especializadas, así como por los reconocimientos a nivel internacional que año tras años consiguen las bodegas de todos los lugares del mundo con las que trabajamos.

Name: œnphinée
Description:
Grâce à son expertise unique en œnologie, physique et nouvelles technologies, œnphinée est la référence Vins et Spiritueux , agro alimentaire et agriculture pour détecter qualités , prévenir les risques et renforcer des savoirs faites et process.
œnphinée souhaite ainsi répondre aux défis actuels des filitères agricoles et viticole: enjeux de développement durable, responsabilité sociétale, autonomie et valorisation des professionnels. 
A l’aide de ses solutions innovantes et de ses capteurs numériques, œnphinée propose des outils d’aide à la décision permettant la mise en valeur des pratiques professionnelles responsables et exigeantes des acteurs des filières tout en complétant et valorisant leur savoir-faire unique.

Permettre à l’ensemble des acteurs de la filière Vins et Spiritueux et plus largement du secteur agricole et agro-alimentaire de mettre en valeur leurs savoir-faire uniques grâce à des applications numériques simples d’usage, leur garantissant autonomie et prise de décision responsable et mesurée, voici l’enjeu d’ œnphinée .
œnphinée commercialise son 1er programme RDI un 1er capteur dédié Tonnellerie et ambitionne le développement capteur Spirit deb 2024.

Name: Comte de Monte-Carlo
Description:
FRANÇAIS DE NAISSANCE, MONÉGASQUE DE COEUR, LE CHAMPAGNE COMTE DE MONTE-CARLO INCARNE L’ÉLÉGANCE MODERNE ET LE CHARME D’ANTAN DANS CHAQUE BOUTEILLE.

C’est de cette rencontre entre ces vignerons champenois et l’élégance raffinée de Monaco qu’est né le champagne Comte de Monte-Carlo.
En partageant ce goût pour l’excellence, Monte-Carlo Lifestyle vous propose un vin d’exception aux arômes subtil et empreint d’élégance.
Prestigieux par nature, authentique par ambition, nous vous offrons un voyage entre luxe et tradition.

Une marque de Monte-Carlo Lifestyle

Name: Wine & Flavors
Description:
Company dedicated to Olfaction education and Wine Aromas: Aromatic Universe, Categories of wine aromas, Fragrant chemicals identified in wines, Flaws, Barrel aromas, Aromatic chemicals of varietals, Positive aromas of wines, Wine Aromatic profiles, Sense of Taste, mouth feel, Blends (consulting)... 

Some Clients: Pétrus, Lafleur-Pétrus, Château Cheval Blanc, Château Margaux, Château d’Yquem, Roed...erer Champagne, Mumm, Opus One, Robert Mondavy Winery, Tim Mondavi, Silver Oak, Kendall Jackson, Dominus Estate, Dalla Vale, Instituto dos Vinhos do Douro, Porto Catholic University, Université d’Œnologie de Bordeaux, Asociacion de los Enologos de la Rioja, Torres Bodegas, Domecq Bodegas, Consejo Regulador de la Navarra, Raventos i Blanc, Herdade do Esporao, clients in Chile, Argentina, etc…

Name: Champagne Plançon & Fils
Description:
Elaboré aux portes d'Epernay, capitale du Champagne.

Notre travail dans la craie est notre savoir-faire et nous voulons vous le faire partager

Name: Brasserie Jukebox
Description:
La Brasserie Jukebox c’est avant tout une histoire d'amitié et de passion pour la bière Craft. 
Implantée au cœur de Cognac, Jukebox est une brasserie moderne par son approche de la bière et ambitieuse par les défis qu’elle se lance. Chez Jukebox nous voulons proposer à chaque fois, la meilleure version possible de nos créations et pour cela nous nous plaçons dans une démarche d’amélioration continue. Jukebox c’est aussi une brasserie à l’image de ses créateurs, une brasserie à l’atmosphère accueillante, un lieu populaire où règne la bonne humeur.
Côté bières, nous brassons une variété de bières Craft d’inspirations diverses, guidées par le principe de l’équilibre et l’accessibilité des goûts. Nous voulons que les consommateurs, quelques soit leurs sensibilités n’aient pas à choisir entre l’audace des goûts et la finesse des styles classiques et 
contemporains. A travers notre gamme permanente, nous mettons à l'honneur les subtilités et la diversité du houblon, la richesse et l’onctuosité des malts grillés ou encore l’acidité naturelle des lactobacilles. Nous exprimons notre créativité et notre liberté d’expression à travers notre gamme de bière éphémère, qui peut suivant nos envies, mettre à l’honneur un style de bière, les fruits d’une saison, les épices d’une région ou encore notre terroir via des élevages en barriques plus ou moins funky.
Nous brassons l’ensemble de ces bières avec passion, le souci du détail et la volonté de proposer la meilleure version possible.

Name: Château Bel-Air La Royère
Description:
Originaire de Charente, producteur de Cognac, la famille Chevrier, quatrième génération de vignerons a eu le coup de foudre en 1992 pour cette ancienne propriété girondine. 
Après de gigantesques efforts pour remonter le vignoble, elle donne naissance à un vin racé, souple, soyeux et devient la référence de l'appellation avec Bel-Air La Royère.
Armée d'une équipe majoritairement féminine dans les vignes comme au chai, Corinne Chevrier travaille son vignoble avec authenticité et toujours à la recherche de l'expression du terroir.
Nous sommes une exploitation viticole, à taille humaine de 14 hectares. Notre taille nous permet d'innover chaque année et d'expérimenter de nouvelles techniques afin d'obtenir des vins de qualité et de caractère. Notre ambition nous a permis de nous développer à l'international. 
Corinne Chevrier toujours à la recherche d'originalité et de perfection, met en valeur le cépage Malbec en créant d'étonnants assemblages Merlot-Malbec.
Le Malbec (ou Côt), cépage ancien du bordelais, a retrouvé ses lettres de noblesse depuis peu grâce à des vignerons passionnés tels que Corinne.
Largement mis en avant dans les vins du Château dès 1995, il enrichit les cuvées de notes épicées et de nuances profondes.
Parfaitement adapté au terroir, l'assemblage Merlot-Malbec se révèle sur des notes toutes en finesse. 
Nos vins séduisent par la maturité de leurs fruits et la densité de leur matière. 
Nous vivons au rythme des saisons de l'apparition du 1er bourgeon à la récolte. 
Toujours en quête de qualité le château Bel-Air La Royère a signé en 2016 la charte de l'Agriculture Biologique après plusieurs années en culture raisonnée. 
Ce retour aux sources favorise l'épanouissement des vignes et garantit de belles matières. Le domaine est maintenant labellisé bio et que tous les vins sont certifiés AB depuis le millésime 2019.

Name: Winbirri Vineyards
Description: Winbirri Vineyards

Name: WITL SA
Description: Audacieux et libres dans nos choix, tout en respectant les spiritueux et artisans avec lesquels nous travaillons, notre ambition est de vous proposer des whiskies authentiques mais atypiques. Notre devise : Whisky Is The Limit

Name: St.Gría - Fábrica de Sangría y Barra
Description: Reinventamos la Sangría! Elaboramos nuestras sangrías con destilados como Whisky, Vodka con Jengibre Natural, Vodka con Té de Menta, Vino Espumoso, Tequila y más. Atributos: Vegan Friendly, Gluten Free, Hecho en Puerto Rico.

Name: Fabbrica Pienza
Description:
Fabbrica è situata nel cuore della nuova DOC Orcia, a pochi passi da Pienza. I nostri vigneti si estendono su 35 ettari, tutti biologici, e comprendono principalmente Sangiovese. Assieme al Sangiovese coltiviamo altri vitigni a bacca rossa tra i quali il Syrah, di cui produciamo un vino in purezza. La volontà di innovare in questo territorio unico ci ha portato a piantare ed innestare anche una ampia selezione di uve bianche, tra le quali il Vermentino che coesiste con Viognier, Roussanne, Marsanne e del Petit Manseng.
Ad oggi, la produzione è limitata a 40,000 bottiglie. Dall'inizio del 2020, la parte produttiva è gestita dall’enologo Tim Manning, che oltre ai vent'anni trascorsi in Toscana, ha sviluppato la sua esperienza sia in Oregon che in Nuova Zelanda. Conosciuto per il suo approccio naturale e discreto, caratterizza il suo lavoro con parcellizzazioni/micro vinificazioni, follature, macerazioni lunghe, e l’uso del raspo inspirato al Méthode Dujac che ha scoperto col Pinot Noir nella Willamette Valley adattandolo poi al Sangiovese. Le vinificazioni e l‘invecchiamento avvengono in vasche di cemento non-vetrificate Nomblot, botti grandi e tonneaux borgognotti.

Name: Korta Katarina Winery
Description: This, very exciting, new Croatian Winery - Korta Katarina - is climbing the ranks fast when it comes to recognizable world-class wine.  As Consulting Sommelier for this new project, I am working to help educate, nationally distribute and create sales for our wines across the country.  With the addition of traveling to Croatia, we are working closely with our team abroad to brand manage and market our portfolio from an international perspective.  The Korta Katarina Wines are fabulous and our team - undeniably, first class.  Try them to believe it ~ Korta Katarina, A New Experience in Wine!

Name: Winterset Cidery
Description:
The Cidery is the first of its kind in Iowa built in a post and beam building adjacent to its apple orchard with over 30 varieties of heirloom, cider, and dessert apple trees.  The site also boasts some beautiful scenery.  

The spacious tasting room at the Cidery is comfortable and informal with vaulted ceilings and wood floors, or you might enjoy the view of the orchard and countryside from the roomy outside deck.  It’s the perfect location to enjoy a taste of the heartland with your friends and family!

Pandemic positioned e-commerce platform which will continue the new era of retail.

Name: Simple Comme Bacchus
Description:
Simple comme Bacchus – Caviste indépendant & ateliers œnologiques en Guadeloupe

Chez Simple comme Bacchus, nous croyons que le vin doit rester un plaisir accessible, élégant et convivial.

Notre mission : faire découvrir des vins et champagnes issus de vignerons passionnés, tout en partageant la culture œnologique à travers des ateliers ludiques et pédagogiques.

 Ce que nous proposons :
	 Une cave en ligne : sélection pointue de vins biologiques, champagnes et pépites de petits producteurs.
	 Ateliers & initiations à la dégustation : pour les amateurs curieux comme pour les passionnés, en partenariat avec des restaurants gastronomiques.
	 Événements privés (EVJF, anniversaires, mariages, séminaires d’entreprise).
	 Livraison rapide en Guadeloupe (24-36h).

 Une volonté de rapprocher chacun de l’univers du vin… simplement.

 Basés en Guadeloupe – nous faisons voyager vos papilles dans le monde entier.

Name: Die Spirituosenakademie
Description:
Die Spirituosenakademie war 2004 der erste Ausbildner in Österreich und der Schweiz, welche speziell die Spirituosenkurse des Wine & Spirit Education Trust angeboten haben. Die Zusammenarbeit der Spirituosenakademie mit dem WSET in London gewährleistet ein zertifiziertes Ausbildungsniveau auf höchster Stufe.

Spirituosen- & Weinkurse des Wein & Spirits Education Trust in London, bis hin zum Level 3! Die perfekt aufbereiteten und mit viel Hintergrundinformation ausgebauten Seminare des WSET haben sich zu einem weltweit erfolgreichen System entwickelt. 

Seit 2019 bieten wir zusätzlich die Ausbildung zum "The Whisky Ambassador" sowie dem neuen "The Gin Ambassador" an!

Name: VINO SAPIENS ALPES
Description:
Agent et distributeur de vins, bières et spiritueux dans les Alpes

Basée à Chambéry en Savoie, VINO SAPIENS est la bannière sous laquelle opère Carret Frères, marchand de jolis vins depuis plus de 30 ans. Fondée à Moutiers en Tarentaise en 1988, Carret Frères a développé une forte intimité avec son territoire, tant auprès de la restauration que du vignoble savoyard. Reprise en 2014 par Sébastien Toursel, à la retraite de son fondateur Yves Carret, l’entreprise perpétue sa tradition de proximité et de service dans la gastronomie, permettant la rencontre entre vignerons d’excellence et restaurateurs ou cavistes d’excellence.

VINO SAPIENS se veut un acteur positif de l’écosystème de la gastronomie. Un acteur utile au plus grand nombre, respectueux des autres acteurs, et transparent sur ses actions.

Nos intentions:

Défendre le beau et le bon, révéler les talents et les terroirs.

Sélectionner des produits gourmands et propres, parmi les meilleurs producteurs, et leur offrir une tribune dans la belle gastronomie.

Faire du vin, de la bière et des spiritueux une valeur ajoutée décisive pour la restauration et l'événementiel.

Offrir aux producteurs et à la clientèle professionnelle un service d'excellence et ajusté aux besoins.

Animer le territoire dans la convivialité, la performance n'exclut pas la rigolade !

Name: Thoran Distillery
Description: Thoran Distillery is currently producing Icelandic gin made with wild botanicals, and developing Icelandic Single Malt Whisky made from naturally filtered glacial water, organic barley and distilled using geothermal energy.

Name: Prowine Brasil
Description: Conectando Vinhos e Pessoas
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Podere 414
Description:
Azienda vitivinicola, cantina, vineria stagionale, shop. 
“414” è il numero attribuito al Podere durante la riforma agraria del 1960 in Maremma Toscana. In questo meraviglioso territorio conteso fra mare e collina, con passione e dedizione produciamo i vini Podere 414:

Morellino di Scansano D.O.C.G.
Flower Power I.G.T. Toscana
Trebbiano Toscano I.G.T. Toscana
Passito Aleatico I.G.T. Toscana
Badilante I.G.T Toscana Sangiovese

Name: Domaine Georges Vernay
Description:
Domaine emblématique de la Vallée du Rhône, le Domaine Vernay est réputé pour ses Côte-Rôtie et ses Condrieu.
Christine Vernay, qui assure la direction du Domaine et la vinification depuis plus de 20 ans, a succédé en 1996 à son père (Georges Vernay, reconnu pour avoir sauvé l’appellation et le cépage viognier) et à son grand-père (Francis Vernay), à l’origine de la création du Domaine.

Le Domaine, avec ses coteaux abrupts, est aujourd’hui entièrement certifié Viticulture Biologique, travaillé avec passion et investissement.

Name: Bodegas Obergo
Description: Bodegas Obergo was born to rescue the old tradition for Garnacha winemaking in the Valle de Secastilla. Thus, the winery rescued old Garnacha vines planted decades ago with an unique target: to craft the best wine of Somontano.

Name: SCEA DU TAB
Description:
Créée en 2016 par une bande de copains amateurs de bons vins, la SCEA du TAB est une exploitation viticole & vinicole située à Bizanet dans les Corbières. Elle exploite aujourd'hui 18 hectares de vignes de différents cépages: Macabeu, Carignan, Syrah, Grenache noir et un plantier de Mourvedre. Et parce que la vigne traverse le temps et l'histoire, nous exploitons encore une vieille vigne de 1944 en cépage Carignan.
Nous produisons du bon vin des Corbières AOP et IGP en respectant les valeurs de la terre et de la vigne. Nos labels HVE4 et Terra Vitis en sont de belles preuves de reconnaissance. 
Blanc, Rouge ou Rosé, ces vins pleins de soleil sauront vous séduire par leur palette d'arômes dense, leurs couleurs délicates... Soleil, plaisir et convivialité au rendez-vous!

Name: Vinum Import
Description:
Vinum Import is a sales and marketing company for wines and spirits. Part of Arcus ASA listed at the Oslo Stock Exchange

Vinum Import has partnerships with world-class wine producers, such as Bodega Garzón, Santa Carolina, Rust en Vrede and Champagne Leclerc Briant to name a few.

www.twitter.com/vinumfinland

Name: Wandering Wines
Description: We travel the globe and discover wines and experiences based on the places and people we meet. Through our expeditions, our crew has formed a bond that transcends borders. We aim to connect families, friends and cultures through our shared love for unforgettable journeys, life-changing experiences, and great wines. We are Wandering Wines.

Name: Bewine Vinhos
Description:
Um recurso confiável para os entusiastas do vinho, seja de compras para si, para um grande evento ou para enviar um presente.
Nós nos esforçamos para oferecer uma grande seleção a preços baixos, entrega conveniente e informações que ajudam a apreciar o vinho com confiança.

Nossa sede fica no Campo Belo, em São Paulo, onde possuímos um show room com atendimento especializado e personalizado. Nossos funcionários são especialistas em seus campos - seleção de vinhos, desenvolvimento de softwares, logística e serviço - para que possamos entregar ao cliente uma experiência única e satisfatória.

Operamos também o Blog Wine Is Cool, onde ensinamos e escrevemos sobre diversos assuntos do mundo do vinho, desde história até a escolha da taça correta, de uma maneira leve, fácil e descomplicada para leigos e iniciantes.

Name: LA DISTILLERIE D'OUESSANT
Description: La Distillerie d'Ouessant produit des boissons spiritueuses et bières.

Name: Champagne W
Description:
Le Champagne W est un brut Blanc de Blancs 100% Chardonnay issu d’un des dix-sept vignobles classés GRAND CRU, ce qui donne au Champagne sa qualité exceptionnelle et confirme sa réputation de boisson de «luxe».

Fruité, riche, rond, frais et élégant, il est le reflet du Champagne Moderne. Très en vogue sur la Côte d’Azur, son design et son goût unique séduisent une clientèle haut-de-gamme lors d’apéro ou de private party.

Le W est principalement présent sur les plages privées – lors d’évènements: opening boutiques, soirées privées, mariages – dans les bars à vins, les restaurants, les hôtels…

Name: Rüdemann & Ernst GmbH
Description: Rüdemann ist ein kleines nebenberufliches Liebhaberprojekt von zwei Jagdfreunden, Abenteurern und Hundeführern, welches in der Coronakrise ins Leben gerufen wurde um die nicht immer leichte Zeit kreativ zu nutzen und etwas Positives aus ihr hervorzubringen. Rüdemann stellt feine Brände für Jäger und Naturfreunde her und legt viel Wert auf Handarbeit, Produktqualität und neue Traditionen. Mehr Infos unter www.jagdschnaps.de

Name: Champagne Jean Laurent
Description:
Viticulteur en Champagne dans l'Aube, la maison Jean Laurent produit des champagnes de qualité depuis trois générations, dans le respect du terroir et des méthodes traditionnelles.

L'abus d'alcool est dangereux pour la santé. A consommer avec modération.

Name: Vinařství Vajbar
Description:
Středně velké rodinné vinařství s moderním přístupem k vínům, vinařství i životu.
Specialista nejen na rosé, frizzante a aromatické odrůdy.

Bronislav Vajbar založil své vinařství v Rakvicích v roce1994. Jde o klasický případ vinaře, kterého k vínu přivedli předci. Rodinná tradice pěstování hroznů a výroby vína sahá až na konec 19.stol.
Devatenáct let se neslo v duchu postupné rekultivace a vysazování vinic i zdokonalování, zvětšování a modernizace technologie. Do roku 2000 byly finance směřovány do výsadby vinic, od roku 2000 přicházejí do technologie. Řízené kvašení, pneumatický lis, kvalitní mlýnek se ukázaly ve skokovém nárustu kvality.
Na začátku léta 2013 se konkretizují myšlenky na změnu systému uzavření lahví a také na jejich nový, moderní, design, který lépe napoví o charakteru vína. Začíná se tak psát úplně nová historie vinařství. Většina vín je nyní uzavřena moderním šroubovým uzávěrem, který umožňuje vyrábět mnohem čistší, zdravější a aromatičtější vína s nižším obsahem oxidu síry. Pouze vína určená k delšímu zrání v láhvi jsou uzavřena přírodním korkem. Všechny láhve pak dostaly novou moderní ambaláž. QR kódy propojují každou láhev s webovou prezentací, na které najdete podrobný popis vína, jeho analytické hodnoty a třeba i recepty na dobroty k vínu.
Nový přístup zavál nejen do oblastí komunikace se zákazníky a milovníky vína, ale projevil se i v absolutní kvalitě vín. Vinařství získalo zcela rekordní počet medailí na domácích i zahraničních soutěžích. Jen v prvním pololetí to bylo neuvěřitelných 63 medailí, mezi nimiž se najde Cena ministra zemědělství ČR Víno&Delikatesy 2014 nebo Zlatá medaile Le Mondial du Rosé z Cannes.
Vína z Vinařství Vajbar můžete koupit v desítkách vinoték po celém území ČR nebo pohodlně v novém eshopu.

Name: Le Moulin de La Roque
Description:
C’est en 1950 que Le Moulin de La Roque voit le jour dans un ancien moulin à blé situé à la Cadière d’Azur. La vinification de ses vins commence en 1964 par la volonté de ses vignerons. 

Nos vins bénéficient de l’appellation Bandol selon un décret d’AOC de 1941. Le Mourvèdre, son cépage phare, est présent au moins à 50% dans l’assemblage de Bandol Rouge. Nous travaillons avec des rendements limités (inférieurs à 40 hI/ha), des vignes d’au moins 4 ans pour les rosés et 8 ans pour les rouges avec des vendanges exclusivement manuelles. Nos vins rouges sont élevés 18 mois en fût de chêne.

Le vignoble du Moulin de La Roque riche de ses 1500 parcelles pour une surface globale de 305 Ha est réparti sur les 8 communes de l’appellation. C’est cette diversité qui constitue une de nos richesses.

Depuis 2007, nous nous engageons dans une démarche de développement durable. Nous visons à intégrer cette dynamique à l’ensemble de nos activités et relations avec nos partenaires. 

En 2012, nous ouvrons les portes de notre cave semi-enterrée bâtie selon des normes éco-environnementales sur un site exceptionnel au pied du village du Castellet. Ce site intègre au coeur du vignoble un chai alliant tradition et progrès technique, avec un lieu d’accueil pour le public et une salle de dégustation.

Le Moulin de la Roque poursuit sa démarche environnementale et sociétale ; et obtient ainsi en 2019, la certification HVE niveau 3.  

Depuis, nous ne cessons de mettre en oeuvre tout notre savoir-faire afin de vous faire vivre une expérience unique.

Name: Angeles Wine Agency & Jeff Welburn Selections
Description: Distributor of wines from America, France, Italy, Germany, Austria, Spain, Portugal, Argentina, Australia and New Zealand. The portfolio includes an extensive French and Spanish collection and covers all needs from value wines to small production to Grand Cru Burgundy.  Domestically we are proud to offer Qupé, Oakville Ranch, Palazzo, Moshin, and other great producers.

Name: « La Bonne Cave » - Ets Martinière
Description:
Cadeaux d’entreprise, coffrets gourmands, vins et spiritueux d’exception : depuis 100 ans, les Établissements Martinière transforment chaque dégustation en expérience unique.
Et parce que tradition rime avec confort, nous perpétuons aussi l’activité historique de livraison de fioul et charbon à domicile, sur simple rendez-vous.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
NOTRE MISSION : SUBLIMER L’ART DE LA DÉGUSTATION

Entreprise française familiale depuis près de 100 ans, les Établissements Martinière vous accueillent dans nos boutiques de vins, bières et spiritueux à St Martin en Haut et St Laurent de Chamousset.

Vous cherchez un cadeau d’affaires ou un cadeau gourmet pour vos proches ? Bouteille personnalisée, panier garni apéro, coffret gourmand avec ou sans alcool… nous avons ce qu’il vous faut !

Nous proposons une sélection soignée de vins blancs et rouges, de vins et spiritueux sans alcool, de bières locales, de whiskys japonais et d’ailleurs, de rhums arrangés et bien d’autres trésors spiritueux, sans oublier notre épicerie fine et nos produits du terroir.

Nous organisons également des cours de dégustation de vins et spiritueux, et mettons à votre disposition du matériel évènementiel : tireuses à bière, fûts, cubis de vin, remorques frigorifiques, tables et bancs. Livraison gratuite autour de Lyon et dans les Monts du Lyonnais.
________________________________________
DU VIN POUR VOS SOIRÉES, DU FIOUL POUR VOS HIVERS

Parce que tradition rime avec confort, nous poursuivons également notre activité historique : la livraison de combustibles à domicile sur simple rendez-vous.
•	Fioul : domestique, grand froid, gasoil, GNR
•	Charbon : Boulet Starcite
•	Charbon de bois : Écogrill
•	Additifs pour fuel et gasoil

Name: Torre a Cenaia
Description:
La Tenuta Torre a Cenaia occupa un’area di circa 500 ettari nel comune di Crespina Lorenzana, in Val Tora ai piedi delle colline pisane e a un passo da Pisa e Livorno, raggiungibili entrambe in pochi minuti grazie alla SGC Firenze-Pisa-Livorno (uscita Cascina in direzione Pisa, uscita Lavoria in direzione Livorno).

E’ un piccolo grande mondo a sé in cui il tempo sembra essersi fermato e il paesaggio toscano esprime al meglio il secolare equilibrio tra uomo e natura. Dal suggestivo borgo di Cenaja Vecchia, un lungo viale di cipressi immette nel cuore verde della Tenuta: campi coltivati, orti, laghetti e stagni, vigneti, boschi secolari, antichi casolari sparsi un po’ ovunque a ricordare l’epoca in cui il lavoro della terra era condotto a mezzadria.
La riserva faunistico-venatoria offre un riparo e un luogo di sosta per molte specie di uccelli, che trovano negli ambienti acquatici della Tenuta l’ambiente ideale per vivere e riprodursi. Grazie a questo, Torre a Cenaia contribuisce al ripopolamento di specie autoctone nel territorio circostante.

I 30 ettari di vigneti esprimono il meglio di sé in vini dal raffinato carattere toscano. In particolare, la presenza dei Monti Pisani che proteggono dagli influssi del nord, la vicinanza alla costa e la brezza marina che spira da occidente favoriscono la produzione dei bianchi e del Vermentino: il pluripremiato Cenaja Vermentino è da sempre il fiore all’occhiello della produzione vinicola della Tenuta. Ma anche il Sangiovese, il toscano verace “sangue di Giove”, e altri vitigni trovano nel suolo argilloso di Cenaia un luogo in cui allignare e fruttificare rigogliosi.

Oggi proprietà della famiglia Coppini, Torre a Cenaia è una dinamica realtà che coniuga al meglio la sua storia millenaria e le sue tradizioni con le scommesse del futuro. Agricoltura, produzione di birra agricola artigianale, ristorazione e turismo si sposano con l’originaria vocazione vinicola.

Name: Madonna del Latte
Description: The ancient estate of Madonna del Latte is located in the hills between Orvieto and Lake Bolsena. The vines flourish on the slopes of rich, sandy volcanic soil at an altitude of 450 meters, where they optimally absorb the benefits of abundant sun and ventilation.

Name: Domaine Valcolombe
Description: Domaine Valcolombe, un lieu enchanteur où beauté, harmonie et bien être se disputent à l’ombre de grands vins élégants et charmeurs. Le vignoble s’étire sur un terroir généreux entouré de cyprès et d’oliviers, gardé par une vieille bastide provençale au pied des collines de Tourtour. Le Domaine produit une gamme complète de vins, en rosé, blanc et rouge qui enchantera vos papilles et accommodera idéalement vos mets gastronomiques suivants leurs caractéristiques oenologiques. À découvrir absolument pour tout épicurien !

Name: Wine Originals
Description: The Global Platform For Wine Labeling

Description:
We perform all kinds of food and drinks related Events and Tastings.

Voor alle drinks and food gerelateerde Events en Proeverijen.

Attitude change training of one day. Quick, funny, tasty and a perfect tool for your managers. Want to find out how? Call us.

Name: Brilliant Gin
Description:
Brilliant Gin a London Dry Gin from The Really Brilliant Company producing small batch spirits.

We are long-time connoisseurs of gin who wanted to create something daringly different, for the people who love gin as much as we do.

To tantalise the thrill seekers we’ve selected the most flavoursome botanicals, crafting a singular artisan gin that’s robust and clean, but ever so delicately balanced.

Name: Kanarie
Description:
Tijd voor bombarie. Met bombarie, afgeleid van het Franse woord ‘bombarde’, verlangen we stiekem naar een beetje reuring in de tent, naar spanning en sensatie. Dat is waar we voor staan. Dat gevoel van saamhorigheid met een vleugje baldadigheid. 
 
Wij willen dat die saaie kringverjaardag uitloopt tot een feest waar je ‘u’ tegen zegt, dat men na afloop van het luxe diner ‘Kanarie’ noemt als het culinaire hoogstandje en dat er na acht lauwe biertjes uit vieze glazen wordt gehunkerd naar die fris en fruitige verademing die we de Kanarieshot noemen. 
 
We zijn inmiddels geland in kroegen, cafés en restaurants, maar ook in slijterijen en supermarkten. Geen stress, je kan ‘m nu ook gewoon snel en makkelijk via deze website bestellen, heerlijk vanaf je eigen thuis.
 
Proost, lieve mensen!
 
Team Kanarie

Name: H.M.Borges - Madeira Wine - Since 1877
Description:
EN |
The H.M.Borges, Sucrs. Lda. was founded in 1877 by Henrique Menezes Borges, who devoted his entire life to searching for a selection of wines produced on the Madeira Island, in order to put them aging. 
The company is still in the Borges Family and it is managed by the 4th generation.
The company’s facilities are located in an emblematic building in the center of Funchal, near to the Madeira Wine Institute. This centenary building was constructed at the end of the 19th century and, at first,  was a cereal grinding factory, it retains all the original architectural traits and it is here that H.M.Borges concentrates all of its activity, from the production, aging and bottling to the shop and tasting room.
.
.
.
PT| 
A H. M. Borges, Sucrs. Lda. foi fundada em 1877 por Henrique Menezes Borges, que dedicou toda a sua vida à procura de uma seleção de vinhos produzidos na Ilha da Madeira, para o seu envelhecimento. 
A empresa continua na família Borges e é gerida pela 4ª geração.
As instalações da empresa estão localizadas num edifício emblemático no centro do Funchal, perto do Instituto do Vinho da Madeira. Este edifício centenário foi construído no final do século XIX e, inicialmente, era uma fábrica de moagem de cereais, mantém todas as características arquitectónicas originais e é onde a H.M.Borges concentra toda a sua atividade, desde a produção, envelhecimento, linha de engarrafamento até à loja e sala de provas.

Name: Bodegas Carlos Serres
Description: El vino tiene historias. Y la historia está llena de vino. La de Carlos Serres es una de ellas. Una de esas que suceden una vez en la vida y permanecen en el tiempo. En 1885 Carlos Serres llegó desde Burdeos a Haro, Rioja Alta, en un viaje sin retorno, siendo el único francés que permaneció en la villa jarrera una vez superada la filoxera. Una historia nacida en 1896 y que ha permanecido durante más de un siglo. Procedente de Francia, donde esta plaga había comprometido la elaboración de vino, este afamado consultor de vinos francés encontró en Haro el terruño perfecto para elaborar vinos finos de estilo bordelés. Hoy, más de 125 años después, en Bodegas Carlos Serres seguimos RECUPERANDO EL RECUERDO de aquellos días donde el Rioja empezó a latir, siendo una de las 16 bodegas centenarias que han ayudado a escribir su historia.

Name: Gall & Gall Heemstede
Description:
In onze Gall & Gall winkels in Heemstede vindt u wijnen en een volledig assortiment slijterij producten. Naast de standaard Gall & Gall formule zult u een Plus + ervaren door:

Name: Princeton Corkscrew Wine Shop
Description:
The Princeton Corkscrew Wine Shop offers one of the best selections of hand-crafted, family-owned wines you will ever find --- anywhere. Our entire shop is temperature-controlled day and night to preserve the quality of the wines in our inventory. Begin your discovery by browsing our online catalogue of artisanal wine from farmers who truly care about the land they work and the wines they produce. www.princetoncorkscrew.com

Come discuss wine with us in our local LinkedIn Group, 'Le Princeton Wine Forum': https://www.linkedin.com/groups/7430908

Name: Vinos de los Herederos del Marqués de Riscal SA
Villareuse Winery

Name: Koonara Wines
Description:
'Koonara' is the name of Dru and Nicole Reschke’s property in Coonawarra which has been in the Reschke family for over 100 years.

Our family vineyards are chemical-free, and we only use organic elements on our vines - not only because they are safer for our family - but it helps build complexity in our grapes. We were the first vineyards in Coonawarra to be Certified to Australian Organic Standards.

We let selected native flowers grow long in our vineyards to attract good bugs which eat our bad bugs, so we have no need for pesticides - we have not used any herbicides or pesticides for over 10 years.

We are creating high quality wines which have below organic levels of sulphur, no residual sugar, are vegan friendly, no oak substitutes, and are aged in 100% fine-grain French Oak Hogsheads barrels.

Our wines are available in amazing independent bottleshops and restaurants, across Australia. If our wine is not in your local bottleshop – ask them to get it!

We are supported by a team of dedicated Sales Managers around Australia, who strive to deliver excellent and personalised customer service.

Every day we continually look for new ways to make things better. Read about the other cool things we are doing at koonara.com.

Name: Zinfandel Advocates & Producers
Description:
Zinfandel generates an enthusiasm and magic that captures our American pioneering spirit in a bottle. This distinct varietal engages our imagination and attention like no other, uniting winegrowers, winemakers and wine enthusiasts in the pursuit of the preservation and recognition of Zinfandel as America’s grape.

Through the Association of Zinfandel Advocates and Producers (ZAP), Zinfandel enthusiasts study and celebrate the Zinfandel grape, connect with one another, and educate the public about Zinfandel’s place in America’s history and culture. A 501(c)(3) non-profit organization, ZAP was founded in 1991 at a time when Zinfandel was the underdog with a cause. A small group of passionate winemaking pioneers and Zinfandel lovers joined to create a movement that would elevate the understanding and status of Zinfandel wine – rightfully establishing it among the premier varietals of the world.

Today, ZAP comprises hundreds of producer members and thousands of advocates, and Zinfandel is now recognized and respected internationally as a world-class red wine that tells an inspiring American story. Its historic association with the Wild West, the Gold Rush, and rugged individualists taming unexplored territory, reminds us of a nation coming of age despite the odds.

ZAP members revel in Zinfandel’s mysterious history and its evolving story fuels the embers of discovery, entrepreneurship and agriculture that are truly American. ZAP is one of the only organizations that has established and provided funding for education and research to study the history, genetics and propagation of a wine varietal to ensure its future. 

Just as Zinfandel differentiates itself with approachable yet unmistakable flavors that provide a discerning sensation for the palate, ZAP and its members create a dynamic community in pursuit of a bright and distinctive future for America’s grape.

Name: Tanca Gioia Carloforte Winery
Description:
The Tanca Gioia Carloforte Winery is located in Carloforte, on the island of San Pietro (Sardinia). Here are produced the wines U-Tabarka.

The landscape is characterized by rugged and wild coastline with a picturesque waterfront and a riot of colors and scents of the Mediterranean scrub.

The winery Tanca Gioia unique to the island, was founded in year 2000 thanks to the courage of the two founders. they took advantage of the very favorable climatic conditions and the composition of the volcanic soil and decided to grow, in the vineyards spread over multiple levels, only indigenous and traditional grapes such as Vermentino di Sardegna, Carignano, Bovale (Bovaleddu), Moscato di Sardegna and the Nasco Aromatico.

The company is well suited for important red wines, but proposes some white wines decidedly original and interesting as the “Perdigiournou” (dry wine assembly of Vermentino, Moscato and Nasco grapes) or “Giancu”, pure Vermentino.

With the curious name of “U-Tabarka” given its wines, the company wants to pay homage to the history of their land: the name derives from Tabarka, a Tunisia’s village famous as a colony of Genoese fishermen who had to abandon it in year 1738, then moved on Island of San Pietro (Sardinia, Italy).
Carloforte village still reminds us of the Liguria’s villages: the dialect very similar to Genoese dialect and closely packed buildings, similar to the Ligurian alleys.
Location: Carloforte, Isola di San Pietro - CI

The following analysis is included for every sample:
Wine: Ethanol, TA, pH, VA, Glucose/Fructose, Malic Acid, Lactic Acid, Free and Total SO2.
Juice: Brix, TA, Tartaric Acid, Malic Acid, pH, Glucose/Fructose, Ammonia, Alpha Amino Nitrogen and  Potassium.

Monthly Service Levels:

1.) Premier: $500/month*, 50 samples, add'l samples are $10
2,) Standard: $375/month, 25 samples, add'l samples are $15
3.) Basic: $200/month*, 10 samples, add'l samples are $20

Description:
In 1962, sweeping views of the Napa Valley charmed our grandfather Caspar Escher into purchasing land in the Mayacamas Mountain range above the Rutherford bench. Together, with our grandmother Virginia Crowley Escher, they created a rustic getaway from their busy, city lives in San Francisco.

The passing of our grandfather inspired us to preserve his legacy.  We diligently rekindled our dormant grove of century old, mission olive trees and enriched the land with fruit trees, a garden, bee hives and an idyllic vineyard.  Atop those rocky, hillside soils, we organically farm 13 planted acres of Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Franc and Petite Verdot vines.

We are blessed with the rich terroir to produce Cabernet Sauvignon, Extra Virgin Olive Oil and Wildflower Honey all from our estate. Every harvest we experience the humble purity of our family's land. It is now our pleasure to invite you to share it with us.

Caspar Estate wines express the unique terroir of the land, with firm tannins, fresh acidity, and remarkable structure. With 200-300 cases produced annually, Caspar Estate wine is offered by Allocation only.

Le vignoble s'étend sur les appellations Châteauneuf-du-Pape, Côtes du Rhône et Vin de France et est en conversion vers l'agriculture biologique depuis 2020.

Description: Sucos sucos frescos orgânicos prensados a frio. Fazemos encomendas para eventos, vendas em academias, lanchonetes e empresas.

Name: Kartal Winery
Description:
KARTAL winery has been founded as a result of family tradition as well as deep respect for wine and grapevine.
Our mission is to continue the bond between nature and mankind through nectar from Gods.
Our winery, which is located in Skopje, the capital of Macedonia, has a small capacity of 200.000 liters per year, the most contemporary wine processing and riping equipment as well as carefully chosen grapes from Skopje vineyards enable very high quality and pleasure with every drop of wine.
Mergence of tradition and science is an ideal combination which our enologists have turned into perfection. These excellently balanced wines, their sort characteristics, fruit nuances and the love devoted deserve your attention.
Every single bottle that has been caressed by our staff thousand times has witnessed changes in mood, reaching frontiers of the mind, years of hard work, passing of seasons and patient but steady fulfillment of the ultimate goal.

Name: Constellation Wines Japan KK
Description:
Wine importer-distributor.
Wines from America, Canada, Italy, Australia, New Zealand and South Africa.

Name: ATIAN
Description: ATIAN Gin is premium, locally-sourced, vapor-distilled rose gin handcrafted in small batches.

Name: Sherwood Estate Wines
Description:
"Winemakers with the personal touch"

Since 1987 Dayne and Jill Sherwood have been making wine in the Waipara Valley region of North Canterbury, New Zealand.  Today Sherwood Estate Wines is one of the largest family owned Sustainable Vintners in NZ.  

Sherwood Estate is one of the few remaining New Zealand wineries to manage every aspect of the wine-making process.  We grow, make, bottle, warehouse, dispatch and sell the Sherwood Estate range all with our own facilities and people.  By putting our heart into every aspect of every bottle of wine made over the last 30 years, we have earned the enviable reputation of exceptional quality and absolute reliability.

Name: Cervejaria Quatro Poderes
Description:
A Cervejaria Quatro Poderes nasceu em 2018 do sonho de um cervejeiro brasiliense de levar suas produções caseiras para o público em geral. Marcelo Naves, CEO e fundador da empresa, buscava explorar a riqueza do Cerrado, seus aromas e sabores, para proporcionar uma experiência única ao paladar.

Atualmente, o catálogo da cervejaria conta com 10 cervejas de linha além do projeto Quatro Poderes LABs, onde temos a oportunidade de proporcionar experiências com diferentes estilos, maltes, lúpulos e leveduras, sempre em lotes únicos e exclusivos.

Alguns dos destaques apresentam frutos da região como complemento aos estilos de cervejas tradicionais, enquanto estilos clássicos são trabalhados a fim de levar a melhor experiência da cerveja artesanal ao consumidor.

Com comercialização por todo território nacional, a produção é no próprio Distrito Federal e chega aos clientes em barris, garrafas, e agora, em latas.

Name: CUILLIER
Description:
Champagne Cuillier, Unique terroir in Champagne

Between tradition and modernity, we constantly mix our attachment to tradition and ancestral know-how with our constant search for new techniques. Never short of experimentation, we have as a compass only our obsession with quality. We have steadfastly preserved the philosophy of respect for the soil and the living of our ancestors by continually seeking to improve it.

Name: Percipio Wine
Description:
GREAT WINE, Inc. is the world's first company to produce wine based on people's wine personality or “vinotype.” It inspires clients to discover their unique preferences and perspectives by providing them with wines that cater to the taste of different “vinotypes.” It is GREAT WINE’s goal to give respect to the uniqueness of individuals and uniqueness of each wine.

Urban-style Tasting Room is located at 958 111th Ave NE Suite 103, Bellevue WA 98004.

Awards
- 2018 American Small Business Champion by SCORE, the nation’s largest network of business mentors, with the support of Sam’s Club. The award includes an all-expense-paid trip to a training and networking event, SCORE mentoring, and publicity throughout the year.
- 2018 Stevie American Business Startup of the Year Award.
- Apex Manual – the most widely published luxury lifestyle magazine in China – named GREAT WINE, Inc. “The Representative Winery of the USA.”
- In 2017, GREAT WINE Tasting room was awarded Qminder Best Wine Tasting Experience.
- Danni Lin, Founder and CEO of GREAT WINE, Inc. elected 30 under 30 by 425 Magazine, a prominent business magazine in the Greater Seattle Area.
- Danni Lin, Founder and CEO of GREAT WINE, was included in Medium's “Best Businessmen of 2017” list
- Danni Lin, Founder and CEO of GREAT WINE, was included in Huffington Post’s “Limit Breaking Female Founders” list.

Name: Cenatiempo Vini d'Ischia
Description:
"Il nostro vino deve esprimere la natura vulcanica e marinara della terra ischitana".

E' l'idea grazie alla quale, nella prima metà del secolo scorso, è stata fondata la Cenatiempo Vini d'Ischia, con una impostazione familiare che conserva il legame con la storia: è rappresentata in modo emblematico dalla nostra cantina del 1600, un'opera stupenda scavata nella collina di Kalimera.
Per rappresentare al meglio il territorio, l'azienda si è dotata di una struttura ampia e articolata. Accanto alla gestione diretta, coinvolgente e appassionata del vigneto, ci prendiamo cura della trasformazione delle uve, dalla raccolta fino all'imbottigliamento, e della distribuzione ai clienti, grazie al coinvolgimento di collaboratori e partner motivati e competenti.
La viticoltura di Ischia è nella maggioranza dei casi una viticoltura di montagna. Da sempre la vite è presente dalla linea di costa, a pochi metri sul mare, fino a 600 metri di altitudine e, ovviamente, le vigne ideali sono quelle ospitate su terrazze strette che ricevono la maggiore insolazione possibile.
E' il contesto culturale e ambientale di quella che viene definita "la viticoltura eroica": quasi tutte le attività non sono meccanizzabili se non in minima parte, e c'è bisogno di un vero e proprio eroe contemporaneo (il vignaiolo), obbligato a quadruplicare le ore di lavoro rispetto ai suoi omologhi che operano in pianura. Il risultato di questo insieme di elementi caratteristici si è tradotto nella conservazione di vitigni spesso unici, o almeno rari che, adattatisi per secoli in questo habitat, ci danno vini dalle caratteristiche difficilmente riproducibili in altri luoghi.
Seguendo questa straordinaria tradizione di tutela attiva della biodiversità, nella nostra vigna ci ispiriamo ai principi dell'agricoltura biodinamica per la cura del suolo.
Il nostro vino si fa in collina, e sul mare.

Name: Kalsnava Distillery
Description:
We are Kalsnava Distillery, a premium bulk organic grain-neutral alcohol manufacturer in Northern Europe established in 1937. With 80 years of history, we have developed from a small regional supplier into today’s EU-certified modern organic alcohol company. The plant was renovated from 2007 through 2014 by the previous owners and now under the ownership of Noblewood Spirits we are due to undergo significant investment again in 2023.

Over the last 15 years, Kalsnava Distillery has become a dependable supplier of food-grade neutral alcohol in the Baltic countries. In 2020, the company achieved the ECHA REACH and BIOCIDE Article 95 registrations. Our customers are a mixture of Brand owners bottling their products, bulk alcohol distributors, cosmetics, and pharmaceutical companies. We are continuing to expand our sales in European Union countries and worldwide.

Let us talk about how we can help your business!

Name: Cantina Terracruda
Description: Cantina Terracruda ha origini recenti, ma la passione che la anima ha radici antiche. Nasce dall’unione e dalle idee di tre soci che hanno seguito la loro vocazione credendo nelle potenzialità di un territorio, nel quale la produzione di vino era prevalentemente realizzata a carattere familiare. Senza dimenticare le proprie origini, ma con lo sguardo rivolto al futuro, il progetto parte nel 2000 con l’acquisizione di oltre 20 ettari di vigneti, di cui 10 già impiantati con uve autoctone, e altri 10 rimpiantati con varietà locali, in particolare l’uva Aleatico, utilizzata per la produzione della Doc Pergola. L’attività si concretizza nel 2005 quando la Cantina Terracruda, sotto la guida dell’enologo Giancarlo Soverchia, inizia a vinificare internamente in una struttura nuova e tecnologicamente avanzata, con l’intento di unire tradizione e innovazione. Un territorio che è crocevia per la produzione di vini di qualità. Qui, infatti, è possibile produrre tutte e tre le Doc della provincia di Pesaro e Urbino: il Bianchello del Metauro, il Colli Pesaresi Sangiovese, l’Aleatico di Pergola. Terracruda infatti  ha scelto di valorizzare solo i vitigni autoctoni, che meglio esprimono l’essenza del territorio, avviando la produzione di vini Doc e recuperando inoltre  antichi uvaggi locali, ormai quasi del tutto scomparsi come Incrocio Bruni 54 e Garofanata. Tutti i vigneti vengono coltivati con metodologie a basso impatto ambientale, accuratamente selezionati e vendemmiati a mano, nel rispetto della terra e del suo frutto più prezioso, l’uva, per regalarvi ogni giorno un sorso di questa terra. Inoltre dal 2017 tutta la produzione è in totale conversione al biologico per garantire vini sempre più genuini ai clienti di tutto il mondo.

Name: Foundation Billecart-Salmon
Description:
In memory of everything the Clos Saint-Hilaire parcel has given back then, in the name of solidarity and our values of sharing, the Billecart-Salmon Foundation wishes to take action for its local community and strive for environmental well-being.

We have decided to act through:
* Food inequalities
* Ecological transition

Maison Billecart-Salmon will donate a percentage of cuvée Clos Saint-Hilaire's sales to support various projects undertaken.

More information on

Name: Vendanges, vins & spiritueux JM Sàrl
Description: Vendanges, vins et spiritueux, est une vinothèque basée à Lausanne vous proposant des vins essentiellement suisses, français et italiens. Spiritueux, bières et objets liés au vin élargissent l’offre. De l’apéritif au dessert, une épicerie fine accompagne et propose des accords mets-vins. Ces produits, souvent en bio-biodynamie, incarnent tous un respect du terroir et de l’environnement, un engagement et une réflexion. Les vendanges, c’est une histoire d’attention, d’énergie, d’expériences et de précision, de passion, de mains et de sourires. Les vendanges, c’est le partage et c’est cela que je souhaite vous transmettre avec mes propositions et lors de dégustations, d'événements, de workshop adaptés suivant vos besoins. Alors venez faire vos vendanges, à Vendanges, vins et spiritueux!

Name: Poulton Hill Estate Vineyard
Description:
Part of an exciting movement of English winemakers, Poulton Hill Estate was founded in 2010 and is situated in the idyllic Cotswold countryside. 

Our 9,750 vines have been planted on the warm and sunny south-facing slopes of Poulton Hill Estate. These vines can produce up to 20,000 bottles of wine a year and we also produce English spirits, from grapes harvested by hand.

These range from the white Bacchus, Seyval Blanc and Phoenix to the red Pinot Noir, Regent and Rondo. The grape varieties complement our climate, geography and soil perfectly. These are carefully blended and balanced by our experienced contract winemaker and distiller to create our range of white, rosé, red and sparkling wines and spirits.

Name: Champagne Romain Tribaut
Description: Maison de champagne à Romery (51480) FRANCE

Name: Carpevinum
Description:
Da sempre appassionata di vino e delle sensazioni che regala, decido di condividere con voi opinioni, suggerimenti ed esperienze che girano intorno a questo meraviglioso mondo.
Tutto questo è racchiuso in Carpe Vinum: il “diario” in cui custodisco le mie memorie dionisiache.
Con l’auspicio di essere preziosa come una buona bollicina d’annata, ma schietta come un vino di pronta beva.

Elena Citton
Blogger @ Carpevinum

Description: En Onucoop envasamos vinos tanto de mesa como ceertificados por la D.O. Condado de Huelva, en cristal de 750 y 150 CPC, en bag in box de 2,3,5, 10 y 15 Lts. Realizamos todos las combinaciones posibles con variedades, graduaciones, formatos, marcas y diseños. Name: DesignWine srl
Description:
DesignWine is a revolutionary blend of Wine culture and Design emotions combined with a unique Retail experience. 

Our vision is to be market leaders in direct Wine sales and category pioneers in the world of Design.

Our goal is to offer exciting new experiences through a unique range of products: special Wine selections, exclusive furniture & accessories designs and exceptional Gift packages.

Name: Skipjack Distilleries, LLC
Description: Skipjack Distilleries is a craft distillery, established in 2014, in the state of Maryland dedicated to the production of traditional and premium brand rum, whiskey, gin and eventually bourbon.  The founder, Daniel Bowman, has considerable knowledge of brewing and distilling and has established Skipjack Distilleries to share his passion for high quality spirits.  The craft distilling movement has been expanding on the west coast of the United States for over a decade. However, the east coast of the United States, particularly the mid-Atlantic and northeast regions, have not yet seen the emergence of new craft distilleries even while demand has steadily increased.  Combined with international demand, the industry has reached a tipping point of growth. Skipjack Distilleries is poised to capitalize on this opportunity and will focus on the consumer demand for craft distilled products that are uncommon in quality and variety, while paying attention to traditional styles and methods.  The distillery is founded as a Chesapeake Bay oriented business and embraces the local folklore, history and ecology of the region while collaborating with various Bay businesses and groups to grow local support.  Opening date is anticipated for early 2016.

Name: Sash&Fritz GmbH
Description:
Sash & Fritz – das ist deutscher Wodka, der russische Tradition mit deutscher Präzision und Perfektion vereint. Nur die besten, sorgfältig ausgewählten Zutaten, wie 100 Prozent deutscher Weizen und klares Quellwasser aus dem Erzgebirge, werden in einem sorgfältig durchdachten Herstellungsverfahren zu qualitativ hochwertigstem Wodka verarbeitet. Das Ergebnis: Manufaktur- Wodka auf höchstem Niveau mit erk- ennbaren Aromen von Getreide und gelben Früchten sowie einer sehr dezenten, leicht wahrnehmbaren Süße. 

Ohne unnötige Verfahren oder Zusätze – und ganz bestimmt nicht absolut neutral.

Name: Colene Clemens Vineyards
Description:
Discover our rustic tasting room and winery set above sprawling vineyards, an enchanting old barn, and extensive views of the Pacific Coast Range and Bald Peak. Located in Oregon, Colene Clemens produces estate grown Pinot Noir and Chardonnay from the Willamette Valley's Chehalem Mountains AVA.

Open daily from 11 am to 5 pm.

Name: Interbrands Norway AS
Description:
Gjennom bred og godt dokumentert markeds-ekspertise har vi bygget både merkevarer og Interbrands Norway siden starten i 2006. Vi har godkjennelse som importør av alkohol-holdig drikke med fokus på salg, markedsføring og merkevarebygging av vin og brennevin.

Både eiere, ledelse og ansatte har lang erfaring i bransjen, med kompetanse innen hvert sitt område. Sammen bygger vi på verdier som høy etisk standard, profesjonalitet, gjennomføringsevne, glødende engasjement, samt lokal tilnærming av globale merkevare-strategier.  

Vår strategi er merkevarebygging. Ved hardt arbeid og ekstrem fokus oppnår vi vårt mål; langsiktig bærekraftig vekst for våre partnere. Gjensidig tillit gjennom åpen og konstruktiv kommunikasjon er rammen for et langt og godt samarbeid.

Vi har vært konsekvente med vår strategi helt fra starten, og etter seks år med hardt arbeid har vi oppnådd resultater som taler for seg selv;  Omsetning i volum har økt fra 100.000 liter i 2006 til 2,3 mill. liter i 2015. 

Norden
Vårt nettverk dekker fire nordiske land; Finland, Danmark, Sverige og Norge, samt Tax-Free markedet og det som nå kalles Travel Retail. Her kan vi tilby unike og spesial-tilpassede markeds- og distribusjonsløsninger.

Name: WineWorks CJSC
Description: Based in Armenia, WineWorks (formerly Semina Consulting) was originally a wine consulting firm. WineWorks now operates as a full-scale winery incubator, offering winemaking and viticultural services, as well as strategic winery management and marketing support to wine brands. Vahe Keushguerian founded WineWorks in 2010 after working in wine business in the US and Italy. Our mission is to work with both farmers and producers so that together we can contribute to the growth of our nation’s wine industry.

Name: Vins Etc.
Description:
Vins Etc…est une agence promotionnelle spécialisée en vins fins créée en 2004 par Robert Brouillette. C’est le fruit d’une passion personnelle et du désir de promouvoir des vins ayant de grands rapports qualité-prix, des vins de plaisir, des vins gourmands.

Nous travaillons qu’avec des producteurs authentiques, respectant la nature et le terroir, des passionnés. Bref, comme nous! Nous sommes des passionnés cherchant à travers le monde, des vins de plaisir, et ce, au meilleur prix possible.

Nos vins proviennent de différents pays tels que la France, l’Australie, le Chili, les États-Unis et une forte concentration de ceux-ci proviennent de l’Italie et de l’Espagne. Nous sommes reconnus pour avoir une sélection rigoureuse de vins de qualité offrant des niveaux de prix très compétitifs qui répondent aux attentes de nos clients.

Notre clientèle est diversifiée; particuliers, entreprises et bien sûr, licenciés (Restos, Hôtels et Clubs de Golf). Nos stocks assurent un approvisionnement continu à tous nos clients, et ce, tout au long de l’année.
