Nos vins sont tous offerts en importation privée, ils ne se retrouvent pas dans les succursales de la SAQ. Notre équipe offre un service personnalisé qui permet de commander directement avec nous par le biais de ce site web, par courriel ou par téléphone ; c’est simple et rapide !

Finalement, notre devise est d’avoir du plaisir et de le partager avec vous!

Name: Distillery District Bottlers
Description: The goal of Distillery District Bottlers is to provide a multifaceted solution to distilleries through fulfillment by way of modern E-commerce, product development, direct-to-consumer and private labeling.

Name: Domaine Chavy-Chouet
Description:
Family owned wine estate of 13 hectares in Meusault, Bourgogne. We produce Meursault, Puligny-Montrachet, Chassagne-Montrachet, Saint-Aubin, Volnay and Pommard.

We produce about 100 000 bottles a year and we export to many different countries worldwide and always looking for new distributors in countries we are not distributed yet.

We supply very famous restaurants and hotels worldwide like Alain Ducasse, Gordon Ramsay, Helene Darroze, NOMA, Flocons de sel, L'Arpège... 

You can find our wines in France, UK, Luxembourg, Belgium, Netherlands, Czech Republic, Germany, Italy, Spain, South Africa, Cambodia, Cayman Islands, China, Japan, USA, Australia...


visit our website www.chavy-chouet.com  and you are welcome to visit us in Meursault. 
cellphone +33660880010

Name: Galante Vineyards
Description:
Galante Vineyards our philosophy is simple: grow the finest grapes possible and let the fruit express itself in the wine. Since all of our grapes are estate grown, each bottle of wine we produce embodies the characteristics of our unique region, exhibiting the natural flavors that are born from the land. 

The Galante Family has a long history in the Monterey area. Owner Jack Galante's great grandfather, J.F. Devendorf, was the founder of the town of Carmel. He later built the Pine Inn and the prestigious Highlands Inn. In 1969, Jack's parents purchased a 700-acre cattle ranch in rustic Carmel Valley. While still maintaining a working cattle ranch, the Galantes, in 1983, began growing premium grapes on their property, specializing in Cabernet Sauvignon. In 1994, Jack Galante decided to build a winery and use some of his grapes to produce ultra-premium estate bottled wines. Today Galante is recognized as one of the premier Cabernet Sauvignon producers in Monterey County and all of California.

Name: deLorimier Winery
Description:
It is the quintessential destination winery for those special occasions and events.  The extensive vineyard grounds and Cabana Courtyard have been designed to handle dream weddings and corporate events.  With its commercial kitchen, two-bedroom guest house, and two private suites, deLorimier is the perfect spot for your dream-come-true party or event in wine country.

Stop by and taste our award-winning wines while enjoying one of the many great art exhibits in our gallery tasting room.   Picnic in the vineyards or stay a few days in our guest house.  Whatever you do, check out deLorimier Winery on your next visit to Sonoma County's Wine Country.

Name: City Orchard
Description:
City Orchard was founded by the serendipitous meeting of three like-minded Houstonians .  The objective is simple; create the best ciders from the best ingredients in a welcoming environment.  

With family-owned farms along the shores of Lake Ontario, City Orchard taps deep into the roots of Great Lakes Apple Country. We bring the heritage of our cider culture and orchards to our favorite city.

We press carefully selected apples on the farm, truck the juice to Houston, and produce traditional ciders in an urban setting – we are an orchard in the city. A little unorthodox – but this is Texas. We manage the process from tree to glass. Real Apples, Real Cider.

Name: Cantina Berritta
Description:
L'azienda agricola Berritta nasce dalla grande passione della Famiglia Fronteddu, composta dai coniugi Antonio e Maria Paola e dai figli Serena e Francesco i quali coltivano la vite e l’ulivo da diverse generazioni.

L'azienda si trova in Sardegna precisamente a Dorgali nella provincia di Nuoro, zona classica del Cannonau. Attualmente possiede una superficie coltivata a vigneto di circa 10 ettari nell’agro di Dorgali, precisamente nella vallata di Oddoene, zona particolarmente vocata per produrre ottimo vino.

La grande passione della viticoltura, con tutti i suoi intriganti aspetti e sfaccettature, è sicuramente di Babbo Antonio che l’ha trasmessa, coinvolgendo tutta la famiglia. Serena e Francesco, infatti, qualche anno fa hanno costituito una società, la FranSer, che si occupa della produzione e dell’imbottigliamento dei vini.
Il vino, prodotto con metodi assolutamente artigianali, viene prodotto ed imbottigliato nella nostra cantina di Viale Kennedy a Dorgali.

I nostri vigneti, per il 75% sono di varietà “Cannonau”, il vitigno più conosciuto in Sardegna e che trova nella nostra zona e in tutta la costa orientale, il suoi abitat classico.

L’attuale produzione di vino è di circa 6000 litri. Nei prossimi anni prevediamo di arrivare a produrre 30/40 mila bottiglie di ottimo vino.

Name: Chateau Paradis 83
Description:
Les archives du domaine viticole remontent à 1681.

Le « Château Paradis », domaine d’une quarantaine d’hectares situé dans la vallée du massif des Maures au cœur du plus ancien vignoble de France, produit ses vins à partir des meilleurs cépages de l’aire d’appellation « Côtes de Provence » : Syrah, Grenache, Mourvèdre, Cabernet-Sauvignon, Cinsault et Carignan pour les rouges et les rosés, Ugni blanc, Rolle (Vermentino) pour les blancs.
Les vins que nous élaborons offrent une remarquable diversité aromatique et possèdent tous, incontestablement, le caractère solaire tellement typique de notre climat méditerranéen.

Nos chais ainsi que nos aires de stockage ont été entièrement rénovés, notre vinification se fait par pressurage direct et notre production est « mise en bouteille au Château ».

Nous œuvrons chaque jour davantage pour vous offrir le meilleur de notre terroir.

Name: Prince Știrbey | Știrbey Winery
Description:
REBIRTH OF A TRADITION

For over 300 years the wines of Prince Știrbey family are grown according to a core of well-developed principles, preserved by each generation. Our wish is to respect them and pass them to the future generations, as well:

Discovery of traditional grape varieties
We are adepts of traditional grape varieties, evolved over the centuries and adapted to the pedoclimatic conditions of a wine region. Only there they can fully develop their personality. Vinifying them separately, we are only producing single grape wines, in order to reveal the individual character of each variety.

Discovery of Terroir
Soil, climate, flora and fauna, as well as customs of people working in our vineyards and in our winery, they all stongly influence the development of our grapes and wines – giving each single parcel a specific character – synthesized as Terroir or, in a profounder understanding, Genius Loci – the spirit of the place. Our aim is to convey this Genius Loci in all our wines.

Nature has priority
We are convinced that the forces of nature are able to give us much healthier and durable products than any human technical intervention could. We are nurturing the grapevines only by manual work and not mechanically, reducing chemical treatments down to a minimum. At vinification we respect the nature’s rythm in fermentation and aging, thus not forcing the process through technical interventions.

Stirbey Quality Seal
For many generations, Prince Știrbey family has actively contributed to the development of the Romanian nation. Thus, Prince Stirbey became a synonym for excellency. We guarantee that by their outstanding quality, all Prince Știrbey wines deserve bearing this name as a quality seal.

Name: Millerkey
Description:
Somos expertos y guías de nuestros consumidores. Identificamos todas sus necesidades y lo que los motiva a comprar ayudando a nuestros proveedores de todo el mundo a entender el verdadero gusto de los mexicanos.

Somos una importadora/distribuidora que opera en todo el territorio nacional y nuestra especialidad es nuestro enfoque comercial para la detección de nuevas oportunidades en puntos de venta con un monitoreo constante para logro de objetivos.

Nos encargamos de que los consumidores conozcan y se casen con las marcas para que las ubiquen fácilmente cada que visiten el supermercado con personal altamente capacitado. Impulsamos tu venta!

Generamos reportes con información detallada del Punto de Venta. Control total del stock y monitoreo de la competencia.

Name: Vinorama Weinversand
Description:
Vinorama - weil guter Wein Freu(n)de macht.

Vinorama Weinversand GmbH wurde 1988 gegründet und ist ein Tochterunternehmen von Morandell International. Der führende Weinspezialist Österreichs befindet sich zu 100 % in Familienbesitz und wird heute in der 4. Generation von  Dipl.-Bw. (FH) Christoph  und  Mag. Mario Morandell  geführt. 

Vinorama richtet sich an Privatkunden bzw. Endverbraucher in Österreich und Deutschland und betreut Weinfreunde sowie Firmenkunden, die nicht in der Gastronomie oder Hotellerie tätig sind. Die Schwerpunkte im Sortiment liegen auf Weinen aus Österreich, Italien, Frankreich und Spanien. Mit Weinen aus der Neuen Welt wird das umfangreiche Sortiment komplettiert. Ergänzend dazu bietet Vinorama ausgewählte Craftbiere und Spezialbiere, exzellente Spirituosen, hochwertige Olivenöle sowie attraktive Geschenkkombinationen.

Unsere Kunden können nicht nur aus einem Sortiment von mehr als 2.000 Weinen wählen – als führender österreichischer Weinversender bieten wir auch die Gelegenheit, Wein authentisch kennen zu lernen. Veranstaltungen wie die  Wachauer Donauriedenfahrt  laden zum Verkosten und Genießen ein.

Kundenfreundlicher Service und eine schnelle, reibungslose Auftragsabwicklung sind uns ein großes Anliegen. Sie haben Fragen? - Das Vinorama-Team berät Sie jederzeit gerne persönlich!

Name: Maison Nobleza
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page de Maison Nobleza, agence d'importation de vins et spiritueux.

Welcome to the Maison Nobleza page, a wine and spirits import agency.
Discover scents and flavors that transport you to unique places.

Name: Yasss
Description:
Yasss canned beverages was launched in the summer of 2021. The first product in the Yasss line of tasty bev's is our semi-bubbly rosé. Made with Cinsault and Grenache grapes from the Gard region of France, Yasss Rosé has bright notes of strawberry and watermelon, and heavenly aromas of orange blossom.

We like to say that our wines pair well with "Memories in the making". This is because our wines are selected to accompany every moment, big or small, whether paired with a breezy picnic brunch or paired with friends and a jammin' playlist on a rainy day.

Name: WINE COLORS
Description:
Inserida no Instituto do Vinho do Douro e Porto (IVDP) e em outros organismos dinamizadores do setor, como a ViniPortugal, a Wine Colors desenvolve vinhos comemorativos e históricos com produtos endógenos portugueses únicos e certificados, como os vinhos do Porto, produtos que beneficiam de projeção mundial e muita tradição. As nossas edições centram-se na comunicação evocativa da identidade nacional de forma vincadamente histórica, para que possam servir de registros e de verdadeiras recordações das efemérides.

Na Wine Colors ajudamos a tornar estes ícones ainda mais famosos, conferindo-lhes um carácter premium alusivos a efemérides nacionais e internacionais, realçando os traços de união da História de Portugal e do mundo. Colocamos a máxima dedicação no respeito de toda essa entrega e trabalho, pois é a única maneira de proporcionarmos algo de especial e exclusivo para cada um dos nossos clientes.

Name: Booze Brothers
Description: We select the finest spirits with amazing background stories and with tastes you have never experienced before. Every month or three months we deliver you a unique looking bottle which you can not find in the liquor store around the corner. We try to surprise you and will not only deliver you a bottle but we deliver you a story or a piece of history. So do you dare to 'drink outside the box'?

Name: Donoso Group
Description:
Donoso Group is representative of different oenological projects that rescue the character of the Maule valley from mountain range to coast, producing wines of worldwide recognition.
With almost 30 years of experience in international markets, presence in Brazil, Asia, Europe and USA. It is concerned to maintain the quality of its products from the 5 fields it handles, the selection of the grapes, the styles of winemaking that represent the character of the different Terroirs until reaching the bottle, recognizing our French heritage and mixing them with new technologies for deliver the best wine in the region.

Name: Ardent Spirits, Inc
Description: Craft Brewery & Distillery

Name: RELAIS DE FRANC MAYNE
Description:
L'établissement Le Relais De Franc Mayne est installé dans un vignoble de 7 hectares, à 1 km du village médiéval de Saint-Émilion, sur l'ancienne voie gallo-romaine.

Cet établissement propose 12 chambres décorées selon une thématique invitant au voyage et offrent une vue imprenable sur le vignoble, le parc environnant ou la cour intérieure du château. Au cœur du relais, un salon, une salle à manger et une salle de billard sont à disposition de nos clients.

L’hôtel possède également une piscine naturelle et un magnifique jardin.

Le relais Franc Mayne est le lieu idéal qui allie confort, relaxation et découverte. En effet, durant leur séjour, les clients pourront découvrir tout le savoir-faire de la création d'un grand vin de Saint-Emilion.

Le Relais De Franc Mayne est situé à 45 km de Bordeaux et à 90 km de Bergerac

Name: Wine Pro Italy
Description:
WineProItaly is an innovating platform focusing on B2B. It connects Italian wineries to international buyers.
Throughout wine tasting events in different areas worldwide, and free delivery sample in strategic cities. 
It helps professional in the industry to taste and get esclusive offers directly from the best Italian wineries.
- New business opportunities
- Time reduction between supply and demand
- Great offer for products

Name: West Wines
Description:
West Wines is a family winery in Sonoma County owned by the Akerlind Bonde family, a Swedish-American family with a passion for growing grapes and making fine wine.

Winemaking for our Cabernet Sauvignon wines and blends combines the best of traditional Bordeaux winemaking and New World modern techniques.  We also produce fine Sauvignon Blanc, Chardonnay, Viognier and dessert wines.

Name: Alpine Vibes
Description:
Une start-up suisse, Alpine Vibes collabore avec la Distillerie Morand pour propager l'esprit des Alpes à travers des recettes novatrices !

La montagne est un endroit convivial par excellence où l'on aime partager ses émotions en fin de journée: un exploit sportif, un moment de détente, un paysage découvert…

Comment capter l'esprit unique des Alpes pour propager ces bonnes vibrations ? C'est le défi qu’Alpine Vibes a relevé en créant une boisson moderne, inspirée des traditions locales et respectueuse des montagnes. A la recherche d’un spécialiste du domaine, la start-up a décidé de collaborer avec Morand, en raison de son expertise dans la distillation d'alcools traditionnels mais aussi pour son expérience des fruits et des plantes Alpines. La recette d’Alpine Vibes ? Des spiritueux novateurs, le tout infusé avec des plantes traditionnelles des Alpes: le génépi, l'edelweiss...

Qui dit Alpes dit aussi environnement. Alpine Vibes soutient les actions de sensibilisation et de nettoyage dans les Alpes via 1% for The Planet.  

Les trois références :

ALPINE GIN by Alpine Vibes : L'amertume typique de ce gin suisse combine harmonieusement des arômes de génépi et d'edelweiss des Alpes ainsi que la douceur des notes fruitées du Valais.

ALPINE VODKA by Alpine Vibes : La puissance aromatique de cette vodka botanique Suisse est délicatement articulée autour d'une combinaison subtile d'arômes de génépi et d'edelweiss des Alpes et de la douceur des notes fruitées du Valais.

MEXALP : Le secret de cette création suisse est de sublimer la complexité fumée du mezcal traditionnel avec combinaison unique des arômes de génépi et d'edelweiss des Alpes  soulignée par la douceur des notes fruitées du Valais.

A déguster très frais sur glace, seul ou en cocktail !

Name: Curatolo Arini
Description: INDUSTRIA VINICOLA.

Name: Clos Centeilles
Description:
Clos Centeilles is a family winegrowing enterprise devoted to viticulture, created by the willpower of its founder, Patricia Boyer-Domergue, and of her daughter, Cécile.

Clos Centeilles is found in the heart of the Cru La Livinière appellation, the first of the Languedoc crus, recognised since 1999.  An authentic walled vineyard of 12 hectares surrounding our family winegrowing holding, 23 grape varieties planted, 13 cuvées, artisanal production and manual work!  Grape varieties native to the region but unjustly forgotten, passionately cherished by Patricia Boyer-Domergue and her daughter, Cécile.
The winegrowing estate of Clos Centeilles is, by itself alone, a conservatory for heritage (historical, genetic and gustatory) and a creator of the flavours of tomorrow !

Name: Pure Land Sake
Description: There is a place where we exist in a higher state of consciousness free from suffering, a celestial realm of enlightenment called a Pure Land. Brewed in Kyoto Prefecture by one of the most respected family-owned breweries in Japan, Pure Land Sake is handcrafted using all natural ingredients - pristine mountain water renowned for its purity and softness, locally grown rice with pesticide free cultivation and traditional brewing methods passed down through 15 generations of family history.

Name: City Wine Collection Ltd
Description:
Welcome to City Wine Collection Ltd, an independent wine merchant operating from retail premises in Richmond Upon Thames, on the western outskirts of London. City Wine Collection was originally opened in 2003 by Norman Gardner and Zoran Ristanovic as the City of London Retail outlet for Norman Gardner Wines, a wholesale wine business established in 1979. Our main business activity is design and management of wine cellars providing access to some of the greatest wines in the world to a wide range of private clients.  We pride ourselves on working directly with a number of high quality producers in France (Domaine Chatelain in Loire, Domaine Samuel Billaud in Chablis, Ch Fleur Cardinale in St Emilion), Spain ( Bodegas Aalto, Mauro, San Roman and Sastre), Italy ( Giacomo Fenoccio in Barolo and Sesti in Brunello di Montalcino) and New Zealand ( Kevern-Walker estate).As importers, City wine Collection also supplies number of high quality restaurants and independent merchants all around the globe. All the wines listed on our web site are in stock and have been sourced by Zoran either En Primeur or on release from authorised agents in the UK. This way we can reassure our clients, both private and trade, of perfect provenance  for all our mature stock. 

The stock is offered lying under bond at London City Bond – Vinotheque or duty paid from our shop in Richmond.

Name: Grace Family Vineyards
Description: Founded in 1978, Grace Family is a winegrowing estate in St. Helena, California in the heart of the Napa Valley. For over forty years, Grace Family has centered itself on a mission to promote, above all else, the flourishing of the human spirit.

Name: Four Dogs Fine Wines & Spirits
Description:
Four Dogs Fine Wines & Spirits opens August 12! WE DELIVER!

Four Dog Fine Wines & Spirits is a new liquor store opening beside the Whole Foods in Basalt, Colorado. We offer our customers a large selection of fine wines, liquors, and spirits. 

If you do not have time to stop by the store, Four Dogs Fine Wines can even have your order delivered at no extra charge. 

We will be holding wine tasting events each week at Four Dogs Fine Wines and Spirits starting on August 17th, 2012. The weekly event will be held each Friday from 4PM - 7PM.
General Information

Four Dogs Fine Wines & Spirits is located beside the new Whole Foods on Reed St in Basalt, Colorado. We are located near Highway 82 at Willits Town Center, Basalt, Colorado.

Name: Tri Spirits
Description: We are an extension of your team committed to driving results through industry knowledge, extensive relationships and dedication to the brands that we serve. We start by putting a face to your brand with our distributors, retailers and their staff.

Name: Uncorked Monthly
Description:
Hello and thank you for helping Uncorked Monthly become the premier online wine publication for the wine 101 crowd.   As you get to know us, you will find that we are passionate about the wine industry and consumers that want to learn about wine. This is the main reason why our founder Mark Powers started Uncorked Monthly.   Building relationships with Vineyard/Winery owners and their winemakers is the premise behind our New Bottle Experience. It helps us establish a closer relationship and understanding of the people behind it all and their passion for the wine.  

For Mark our founder, it’s all about bringing a new way for everyday wine lovers to explore wine. He believes that through our exclusive Featured Interviews and New Bottle Experiences, we are able to deliver an experience that doesn’t exist today for consumers. This approach makes them feel more connected to the vineyard/winery and their wines.   Uncorked Monthly is cutting through the stereotypical stodginess of wine and getting behind the winemakers “why” and their passion behind the wines they produce for all of us to enjoy.    Thank you for your time and consideration in helping Uncorked Monthly become the premier online wine publication for the wine 101 crowd.   

 Mission Statement

To bring wine industry people, their passion, and their stories to the world.

Name: Cellar Door Society
Description:
Cellar Door Society is disrupting the online wine space by challenging the way things have always been done, to provide Australian winemakers and wine lovers with a better way. 

An online marketplace where people can discover Australia’s best small producers and learn the stories behind the wine and those who made it.

Our innovative direct to consumer model means the wine gets shipped directly from the winery to the customer, who pays the winery directly. By cutting out the middleman, our software ensures the profit from the sale goes directly into the wineries’ pocket, no delayed payments. 

Our members can shop confidently, assured they will receive exceptional quality wine and happily, knowing they are buying from and supporting those who made it. 

But we’re more than just an online wine shop – we’re building a community of passionate wine lovers. We share our wine and cellar door experiences to help promote small businesses and share knowledge to help our members find great wines, because life is simply too short to drink bad wine.

Name: Solid Wine AB
Description: Vi säljer vin huvudsakligen till restauranger. Genom att leverera bra produkter och ge våra kunder den service som vi själva skulle önskat oss, vill vi alltid överträffa deras förväntningar.

Name: Locanda Italia
Description:
Locanda Italia nasce nel 2016 con l’idea di commercializzare prodotti enogastronomici di qualità attraverso differenti canali di vendita interconnessi tra loro. Vogliamo richiamare le sensazioni dell’Italia genuina e tipica, l’Italia dei sapori e delle ricette originali di una volta, che riconducono la mente ai luoghi di aggregazione e di acquisto tipici dei piccoli paesi di provincia. Il contrasto tra queste sensazioni e la natura digitale di questo progetto ha l’obiettivo di comunicare un senso di fiducia, competenza e autenticità al cliente che qui troverà gli stessi vantaggi dell’acquisto nel negozio dietro l’angolo. 

Collaboriamo con partner strategici e autorevoli di esperienza ultradecennale, sia sul prodotto che nel settore del digitale. Questi ci garantiscono una linea di prodotti sempre disponibili, di grande qualità e in quantità, oltre che un occhio sempre attento alla ricerca di specialità enogastronomiche selezionate tra piccoli produttori artigianali.

Name: Weingut Kallfelz
Description:
Das Weingut Albert Kallfelz in Zell-Merl an der Mosel, Rheinland-Pfalz, zählt zu den besten Weingütern Deutschlands. Unter dem Motto „Vom Idealisten für den Individualisten“ führt Inhaber Albert Kallfelz das renommierte Familienweingut bereits in dritter Generation. Mit seiner Leidenschaft und seinen Visionen hat der den anfangs kleinen Betrieb über die Jahre zu einem stattlichen, erfolgreichen Weingut ausgebaut.

Heute umfasst das Weingut 49 ha Rebfläche. Die KALLFELZ Riesling Steillagen „Merler Königslay-Terrassen“ sowie die Merler Lagen „Stephansberg“, „Adler“ und „Fettgarten“ gehören zu den besten Weinlagen der Welt. Seinen außergewöhnlichen Charakter ziehen die KALLFELZ Weine aus dem Mosel-Grauschiefer an süd-südwestlich ausgerichteten Lagen mit einer Hangneigung von ca. 30 bis 70 Prozent. Albert Kallfelz bietet seinen Kunden Spitzenweine in jeder Qualitätsstufe zu einem idealen Preis-/Genussverhältnis. Eine Spezialität des Weinguts ist das KALLFELZ Riesling Hochgewächs.

Name: Wine Cellar Experts, LLC
Description:
Wine Cellar Experts provides complete wine cellar construction and outfitting services to fit the specialty needs of our clients. 

We maintain the highest standards in our building practices throughout all phases of our commercial and residential work. This has proven to be an incredible advantage for our clients and company. 

Our staff brings extensive experience in all aspects of wine cellar creation, from initial consultation through outfitting and decorating your new cellar.

Name: Sipologist Social
Description:
Wine tasting classes and events that explore taste with a scientific twist.

Everyone has unique taste buds. And at Sip Soc we know a great wine is only the one that suits you. That’s why our wine tasting workshops are a mix of pointers, titbits and quirky experiments to help you pin down exactly what you like. You won't find any pretentious jargon or sales pitch - just clear practical advice in a fun, sociable setting. 

Leave with all the skills you need to pick a glass of something delicious off the menu, wherever you are, and ensure you get the best quality for your money.

Whether you want to learn solo, continue your tasting journey or host an event with your friends, Sipologist Social is here to help.

Name: La Curieuse Compagnie sas
Description: À La Curieuse Compagnie tu retrouveras le charme de l’ancien et l’élégance du moderne. Chaises Tolix et tabourets d’une autre époque d’un côté, plafond insonorisé en fibre naturelle, bouteilles rangées dans des casiers design en bois sur tout un pan de mur de l’autre. Dans cette cave on aime venir prendre un verre de vin nature sélectionné par les deux tenanciers après un périple de plusieurs mois passé à rencontrer des vignerons... Viendez Beuvez Vivez !

Name: Montaukila
Description:
Montaukila was founded with the vision of establishing a new, refreshing lifestyle tequila brand that looks great and tastes even better.

with that in mind, we developed Montaukila from the ground up with a specific flavor profile accompanied by a laid back  yet premium aesthetic perfect for everyone, that's sure to enhance any occasion that calls for the spirit of tequila.

Name: Veni, Vidi, Bibi S.A.R.L.
Description:
- Boottle est un site web de vente de vin. Du moins à première vue. En réalité, Boottle est un projet d’intention visant à rassembler acheteurs et Producteurs de/Négociants en vin autour d’une plateforme de vente directe afin de raccourcir le chemin (et les coûts) entre les uns et les autres.

- Boottle appartient à une entreprise privée qui ne reçoit -ni ne demande bien sûr- aucune subvention publique et donc, ne coûte pas un centime aux contribuables. Boottle est cependant à la fois viable et indépendant grâce à la marge (de 12,5% en moyenne) instaurée sur les vins vendus, marge générée par le travail effectué pour le site web et la logistique puisque nous nous occupons de tout, encaissement, livraison et service après-vente y compris.

- Aucun producteur/négociant ne paye quoi que ce soit pour que son/ses vin(s) soit/soient proposé(s) à la vente sur Boottle. Il n’y pas d’espace privilégié ni de publicité possible sur le site web. Enfin, c’est le producteur/négociant lui-même qui décide le prix de vente de son/ses vin(s) sur Boottle.

- Boottle est, à la fois, à disposition de tous les producteurs et négociants qui veulent vendre leur vin, et de tous les amateurs ou professionnels qui souhaitent en acheter. Nous ne présélectionnons aucun vin car nous ne nous considérons pas dépositaires du goût de nos clients. Ainsi, le droit des vignerons à pouvoir proposer leur vin à la vente sur Boottle s’arrête simplement là où commence celui des amateurs à (ne pas) vouloir l’acheter.

Name: Carlo Russo's Wine & Spirit World
Description:
Wine and Spirit World has been family-owned and operated for 60 years. Owner Carlo Russo's career began in 1947 as one of the owner/pharmacists of the Ho-Ho-Kus Pharmacy; a store similar to a small department store, which included a soda fountain that served breakfast, lunch and dinner. The pharmacy had a liquor license, and Carlo turned his attention towards wine.

Carlo was an innovator in his time, educating customers, conducting wine seminars, and leading wine tours to Europe. Quickly, Carlo Russo's Wine & Spirit World was acknowledged as one of a very select group of fine wine shops in the greater Metropolitan area. Carlo's son, Chuck, joined the team in 1973 and now owns and operates the store, continuing the tradition and legacy left by his father. Together with his wife Maria, and a knowledgeable staff, the family continues to provide excellent service and impeccable wine expertise to our valued customers.

Name: MYH Fine Wines
Description: MYH Fine Wines is based in Hong Kong and Beijing (servicing the entire Mainland China market). We are the exclusive agent for Zalto wine glasses from Austria in the Hong Kong, Macau and Mainland China markets. We also trade in a variety of prized and investment grade wines. At this time, we are not representing specific wine/spirit brands in Asia, but focused on introducing superb and varied wines/spirits of interest to our clients on a non-exclusive/representation basis.

Name: Fearless Wines
Description:
OUR MISSION:

CREATE WINES FOR THE FEARLESS: ENTRUSTED TO THOSE WHO ARE PASSIONATE FOR THEIR DREAMS AND FIERCE IN THEIR TENACITY FOR LIFE.

OUR WINE:

OUR WINES ARE CRAFTED AUTHENTICALLY WITH YOU IN MIND. WE SCOUR CALIFORNIA IN SEARCH OF UNIQUE VINEYARDS THAT ARE SUSTAINABLY FARMED AND UTILIZE INNOVATIVE FARMING METHODS TO PRODUCE SOME OF THE HIGHEST QUALITY GRAPES AROUND.  

THE VAST MAJORITY OF OUR WINE IS SOLD DIRECT TO CONSUMER.  IN DOING SO, FEARLESS WINES CAN INVEST DEEPLY IN THE QUALITY OF OUR GRAPES, ENSURING WHEN YOU DRINK A BOTTLE OF FEARLESS, YOU ENJOY A WINE OF THE HIGHEST QUALITY WITH VARIETALS NOT WIDELY KNOWN.

WINE FOR THE INNOVATORS, THE CONNECTORS, THE MOLDERS OF OUR FUTURE. THE FEARLESS.

Name: DIANELLA
Description: An organic winery on the rolling hills of Vinci

Name: Montebello Brands, Inc.
Description: Montebello Brands, Inc. is a wine and spirits company based out of 1919 Willow Spring Rd, Baltimore, MD, United States.

Name: Vinicola CIDE s.r.l.
Description: ACQUISTO DI VINI INVECCHIATI E LORO IMBOTTIGLIAMENTO, VINIFICAZIONE, COMMERCIO VINI E LIQUORI, IMPORT-EXPORT VINI E LIQUORI E LAVORAZIONE VINI PER CONTO TERZI. ISCRIZIONE ALL ALBO DEGLI IMBOTTIGLIATORI - CCIAA DI TREVISO - N. 8 DEL 20.01.2005.

Name: baglio bonsignore società agricola srl
Description:
Baglio Bonsignore Società Agricola srl, was founded in 2016 by the will of the founders, Debora Greco and Luigi Bonsignore.Luigi Bonsignore, Manager for over 25 years, today CEO of a leading company consulting firm with a managerial past around Italy and Europe and Debora Greco up to two years ago engaged in the family winery where he has worked for over 15 years and eager to deal with a project of his own.
The company combines family values and entrepreneurial values that have led the two founders, united in life and parents of three wonderful children, Simone, Pietro and Carlo to create a highly sought-after and sought-after business project.
Behind the dream a clear entrepreneurial project:
• the creation of four wines starting from Cubburo, a CRU of nero d'avola and Syrah aged in French oak barrels for eight months and refined in bottles for another 6 months and the OJ Grillo  and completing the range, a Nero d'Avola DOC and a Syrah. With a production of 7000 bottles for the 2016 vintage and over 25000 bottles for 2017.
• the realization of the dwelling to welcome, in a territory full of history and beauties such as the territory of Naro near  Agrigento, Tourists who love the countryside, good wine and Sicilian gastronomy that will be completed by the end of 2019.
Located in the district of Giddio in the countryside of Naro, the farm covers an area of about 13 hectares of which 7 hectares of vines and 3.5 hectares to be planted. The varieties present are nero d'avola, merlot and syrah for the reds and the cricket for the white. The remaining hectares are planted with olive groves and orchards.
On the property there is a beam in discrete structural conditions dating back to the end of 700 of about 850 square meters that once renovated will be used as a high-class relay and restaurant. Also on the site there is an ancient stone construction on which it is possible to think of obtaining a small cellar for the production of quality wines on site.

Name: Founding Fathers Distillery, LTD.
Description: Located on 100-acre working farm along Deep River in Guilford County, NC is Founding Fathers Distillery, LTD. Founding Fathers is a small batch, craft distillery offering fine sipping whisky and rum, meticulously hand made by Co owners Jeff Cooper and Marta Smith Price.

Name: Collbaix, Organic Vineyard
Description:
Collbaix \\ Award-winning Organic Vineyard \\ P.D.O Pla de Bages, Barcelona, Spain

Our organic production process combined with the type of soil and micro climate in Bages (Barcelona, Spain) deliver very fresh fine wines with a kind concentration and an excellent capacity to age. We produce a range of award winning Reds (Great Gold and Gold Awards at the latest Catavinum World Wine Contest), a very special White (native grape variety - Picapoll) and a fantastic Rose. All of them, Protected Denomination of Origin "Pla de Bages".

To elaborate our products, we cultivate two plantations in El Bages county. One of them, El Molí estate, gives us our name and is located in a spot overlooking the Montserrat mountain range, on the foot of the Collbaix hill.  The second estate is in Plans de la Casa Nova, in Monistrolet de Rajadell.

Our ecological farming process respects the local land, flora and fauna, using organics products only. The soil is maintained with leguminous plants, which avoid erosion and enrich it, reinforcing the biological cycles. 

The region’s unique microclimate is ideal to grow our vines and olive trees. In Pla de Bages (the Bages plateau), we enjoy a mid-mountain Mediterranean climate, with scarce rain and acute temperature fluctuations. The land is mainly made up of loam and clay soils.

Contact: 
Albert Pijuan, Export Manager
collbaix-export@cellerelmoli.com
es.linkedin.com/in/collbaix

Name: SaPinoT
Description:
SaPinoT is specialized in juicy, elegant and highly drinkable wines 
Bert, Tom and Kris are 3 friends that have been working in the wine business for over 20 years. When their paths crossed it did not take long for Sapinot to arise out of their shared passion.

The name Sapinot refers to the typical characteristics of their favorite grape, Pinot Noir, which is synonym for Finesse, Elegance and Juiciness.

It goes without saying Sapinot has a strong connection to Burgundy but the search for ’Sapinot’ wines has also led us to other regions like the Loire valley, Champagne, Languedoc, Corsica and even beyond the French borders.

We would love to share our passion with you

Name: San Diego Wine Storage
Description: San Diego Wine Storage offers customized wine and craft beer storage solutions for collectors, investors, retailers and importers. The company provides private lockers and walk-in cellars from 12 to 200 cases for both case and bottle racked wine storage. Other services include pick-up and delivery, moving services, cellar management services, online inventory management, and valuation services. SDWS also accepts direct wine shipments on behalf of their customers at no charge. The company's secure, climate-controlled facilities are located in San Diego and Solana Beach, California.  Visit San Diego Wine Storage at www.sdwinestorage.com.

Name: Pla de Morei
Description: Organic boutique winery located in La Torre de Claramunt. Recovering the wine legacy in the Anoia region.

Name: Ett Bördigt Bryggeri
Description:
Bördig;  fruktbar,  produktiv,  rik. Det är den gängse tolkningen av ordet.
Bördig uttalat utan"r" , med ett mjukt "d" och med ett Göteborgskt "ö" blir  bôdig. Det vill säga schysst och hygglig.
Det är det Ett Bördigt bryggeri är. Schyssta öl tillverkat av schyssta medarbetare I en schysst miljö.
Vi gör öl vi själva älskar. I en mycket liten skala och med mycket hantverk.  Det har vi gjort för hemmabruk I många år men eftersom vi är bôdiga vill vi låta fler få del av ölen. Det ger oss inget annat val än att skala upp något. Inte mycket men tillräckligt för att vara bôdiga mot fler som uppskattar en god hantverksöl.

Name: Vegas Valley Winery
Description:
We invite you to come to our winery & tasting room to savor a truly unique taste of Las Vegas. We are located only 20 minutes from the bright lights and bustle of the famous Las Vegas Strip, yet a world away from the neon. You will feel warmly welcomed as you enter our intimate tasting room to enjoy a wine tasting, handcrafted wines by the glass or purchase a few bottles to take home with you. 



Each of our Nevada made wines has a story to tell. A journey from vine to wine, years in the making, to end with a finale of pleasing your palette. Tour the winery during your visit and gain a greater appreciate and understanding of this age-old art & craft of winemaking. 



No reservations are needed for parties of fewer than 10 guests. We are receiving guests 7-days per week.   Take a look at our news & events page for opportunities to enjoy a wide variety of special attractions from yoga to paint parties to live music. Private tours, private parties & special events inquiries may find more information on our Private Events page. 



Guests enjoy a wine tasting experience & wines by the glass. Ask about a tour of the winery or use of the private party space among the wine barrels. It is truly a unique Las Vegas Experience. 

A Neighborhood Tasting Room & Wine Lounge

Located in the Henderson Booze District next to Grape Expectations Nevada School of Wine, we invite you to come today and experience our wine, one tasting or one glass at a time. 



The intimate atmosphere makes for a unique & special date night destination, social meeting spot and even your next book club meeting or card club. Contact us to reserve a table  or two for your small group.

Name: THE AIMSIR DISTILLING COMPANY, LLC
Description:
The Aimsir Distilling Co. makes grain to glass spirits that capture the warmth that radiates when conversation flows.

THE AIMSIR DISTILLING COMPANY, LLC is a company based out of 2117 NE Oregon St, Suite 202, Portland Or 97232.

Name: Alkimia priorat
Description:
Alkimia is a project with extensive experience in the wine sector, which began in 1982. 

Alkimia currently has wineries at DO Montsant and DOQ Priorat. Our vineyards are completely ecological and biodynamic. In addition, our warehouses are eco-sustainable, so that all the energy necessary for its operation is obtained through renewable energy, sunlight and wind, also recovering rainwater through special deposits located underground. 

Our wine productions are very limited and exclusive. We are proud to offer you wines of the highest quality, which are pampered throughout the production process, taking care of every last detail. With all this, we encourage you to taste our wines and enjoy our project, which will surely be an unforgettable experience.

Name: DÉCADA Spirits, INC.
Description:
DÉCADA Tequila has been tested side by side against the most popular brands on the market, and time after time DÉCADA Tequila stands alone in flavor profile and smoothness. DÉCADA won BEST OF CLASS at the 2015 International Consumer Spirit Awards and was also awarded a 94pt/Exceptional Gold Medal rating by the prestigious Beverage Testing Institute. DÉCADA is able achieve this by allowing their agave to age 10yrs, as opposed to only 7. The extra time allows the brix (sugar) content of the agave to fully mature, which creates the flavor in the plant that leads to DÉCADA's one of a kind soft and fruity profile. DÉCADA Tequila has the natural ability to be used as the leading spirit in just about any traditional cocktail, DÉCADA eliminates the stigmas of tequilas limited placement on a menu. Whether someone is new to the category or is a long time tequila aficionado, DÉCADA will transform their taste instantly.

DÉCADA is a forward thinking brand that aims to break the mold that the tequila industry has become complacent with. DÉCADA provides consumers with a new tequila experience. Up until now, every tequila brand has modeled themselves after the brand(s) that came before them. This is seen in not only the marketing, but also the short, stumpy, hard to grip bottles of these brands. DÉCADA pushes a higher level of innovation in which the fastest growing spirits category has needed in both taste and functional packaging. DÉCADA represents a society that people can and want to be a part of, a society that embraces an evolution to an entire spirits category, while paying homage to it's history and methodology.

Name: Brasserie Tri Martolod
Description: TRI MARTOLOD est une brasserie coopérative artisanale, basée à Concarneau.

Name: Russian Vodka Holding
Description:
Русский Водочный Холдинг занимается производством и дистрибуцией таких известных брендов как MEDOFF, МЕРНАЯ и НА БЕРЁЗОВЫХ БРУНЬКАХ. Компания имеет более 50 собственных представительств в крупнейших городах России, а ее продукция продается во всех регионах страны через сеть более 120 локальных дистрибуторов, а также в самых крупных федеральных розничных сетях.

Понимание потребителя является ключевым фактором успеха нашего бизнеса. Мы делаем все возможное, чтобы предложить нашим покупателям наиболее качественный продукт, который отвечал бы их ожиданиям – и рациональным и эмоциональным.

Профессионализм и эффективность. Именно эти качества наших сотрудников позволяют нам работать на крайне конкурентном рынке и реализовывать возможности наших брендов.

Компания РВХ сложилась организацией динамичной, способной оперативно реагировать на вызовы рынка и предлагающей инновационные решения во всех аспектах бизнеса. Мы высоко ценим и поддерживаем дух предпринимательства в нашей компании – основное качество, обеспечивающее ежедневное поступательное движение.

Мы понимаем, что культура потребления алкогольных напитков является важнейшим фактором долгосрочного и устойчивого развития индустрии спиртных напитков в целом. Наши бренды призваны пропагандировать именно позитивные стороны отечественной питейной культуры, сопровождать особенные события в жизни наших потребителей и дополнять собой сложившиеся традиции российской гастрономии.

Мы испытываем гордость за собственные бренды, неизменное качество и эффективный бизнес!

Name: GUN BREWERY LIMITED
Description: GUN BREWERY LIMITED is a wine and spirits company based out of HAWTHBUSH FARM HAWTHBUSH FARM GUN HILL, HEATHFIELD, United Kingdom.

Name: Tika Wine Int
Description:
Tika Svanidze Vancko is one of the leading figures in promoting Georgian, family-orient- ed traditions and culture to the world. She is a philanthropist; she is a diaspora leader and great businesswoman. But most importantly she is a mother of three, constantly trying to retain, flourish and expand her 150-year-old family legacy and traditions to the world.
Ms. Svanidze Vancko’s name is associated with the development of international luxury tourism in Georgia throughout the last decade. She has joined and substantially developed Georgian diaspora worldwide.
She has also greatly contributed to promo- tion of Georgian culture by hosting multiple exhibitions outside of Georgia, bringing a taste of Georgia to cities around the world.
Ms. Svanidze Vancko story starts from Kakhe- ti, Georgia. As a child, young Tika spent her summer vacations with her grandparents in the sunny Village of Mashnaari, Sighnaghi district of Kakheti – known for its vast vine- yards and rich wine-making culture. She inherited a distinct love for vineyards and vintage traditions from her grandfather.

Name: Liberty Village Wines and Spirits
Description:
Inhale, savor and sip in style in Stillwater, Minnesota. Liberty Village Wines and Spirits is a family-owned wine shop with a diverse inventory of wine, beer and spirits that are hard-to-find. Come and experience our unique and boutique wines. We sample and taste almost every bottle in our inventory to ensure you get the quality and value you are looking for. And, we invite you to “try before you buy” for free on selected wine every Friday and Saturday. Our inventory is constantly changing, so please stop in often to experience the best selection and value in the area. 

We strive to go beyond your expectations. Our friendly and knowledgeable staff wants to help you through the shopping process with individual attention. As one customer, Robin from Shoreview, said about our store, “I had my own personal shopper; it was the single best shopping experience I’ve ever had in a liquor store!” 

See it for yourself today. Liberty Village Wines and Spirits is your choice for the finest wines, beers and spirits in the St. Croix Valley.

Name: Stottle Winery
Description:
Stottle Winery produces hand-crafted, small lot, ultra-premium wines from some of the best vineyard sources in eastern Washington.  Our wines are fermented in stainless or barrel fermented and oak aged.  We currently produce 13 different wines at our winery in Lacey, WA.

You can find our wines at any of our three tasting rooms located in Lacey (at the winery), West Seattle, and Hoodsport.  Our wines are also available a few selected wine shops, wine bars, and restaurants located around the Puget Sound.

Name: LES FRERES BRASSEURS
Description: LES FRERES BRASSEURS est une Brasserie Artisanale qui brasse depuis 2001 des bières traditionnelles, qui en assure leur commercialisation.

Name: Urlar
Description: Urlar is a small family owned vinyard in NEw Zeland specialising in Premiuim organicly grown grapes. Our wines are proudly available all round the world from New Zealand to the US to Australia to the UK, Germany, to Slovakia.  Have a look at our website for more.  www.urlar.co.nz

Name: ABCON INTERNATIONAL WINE MERCHANTS
Description: ABCON WINES TORONTO

Name: Elevate Wine Store
Description: We specialise in curating wine packs that showcase some of the Mornington Peninsula's finest wines. Order online and have it sent to yourself or as a gift, anywhere in Australia.

Name: E16 Winery
Description:
E16 Winery composes of estate Rhone varietals, Barbera, single-vineyard coastal pinot noir's and chardonnay from California vineyards graced with the optimum confluence of soil, climate and human curation. The E16 winemaking team partners with grape growers who share a commitment to sustainable viticulture and a devotion to the fruit’s inherent varietal expression. This camaraderie is woven with a passion for excellence and respect for the fundamentals of thoughtful farming to produce noble wines having a true sense of place.

Robert Jones, Founder and Winegrower
Robert Jones is a third-generation winegrower who learned life-long lessons as a young man working in the vineyard with his grandfather, Alipio Paculba. Among these lessons were the importance of attention to detail and the honor of labor. These teachings have become the foundation of his philosophy of life.

Jones ventured to the Russian River Valley in the early 1990s accompanied by a small group of wine industry professionals. Their mission was to immerse themselves in the artisan wines made from the region’s quintessential, cool-climate grapes — pinot noir and chardonnay.

During this period of discovery, Jones marveled at the subtle nuances and intricacies that could only be captured in the glass by the region’s small-lot producers. He was introduced to an early champion of the wine region, Winemaker Daniel Moore, a authoritative voice among the community of celebrated vineyardists present at the time.

Jones and Moore, harnessing their shared values and passion for pinot noir and chardonnay, sought likeminded winegrowers to establish the cornerstone of their winemaking program. With pristine fruit in hand, Moore’s expertise adds the final stroke of color across the canvas of E16 Wines.

Each and every bottle produced by E16 Wines is a reflection of the land that is farmed with care and dignity by our distinguished winegrowing partners.

Name: Chiesanuova
Description: Onze prijswinnende limoncello is 2 jaar op rij in de prijzen gevallen op het International Wine & Spirit Competition in Londen. Dit jaar mogen wij onszelf de beste limoncello ter wereld noemen na het behalen van een gouden medaille met 95 punten!

Name: Les produits de Denis
Description:
Produits du terroir artisanaux, fabriqués à petite échelle à Le Muids.

L’aventure a commencé avec le produit phare, le Caprice de Madame, apéritif doux à base de vin rouge et petits fruits.

Recette reprise des grands-parents et fabriquée dans le carnotzet familial, médaillée au concours des produits du terroir en 2007.

D’autres créations ont petit à petit vu le jour au gré des envies et des produits du jardin, plusieurs d’entre elles également médaillées.

Des rencontres avec d’autres producteurs de produits artisanaux sur les marchés ont donné lieu à des échanges, certains produits ne sont pas fabriqués mais distribués par Denis.

Name: Le Domaine d'Henri
Description:
Le nouveau domaine chablisien de Michel Laroche et ses enfants. 

Louis - Jean Victor - Henri - Michel - et ses enfants : transmettre un héritage à la prochaine génération. 
En créant le Domaine d'Henri en 2012, à partir des vignes que son père Henri lui avait transmis à la fin des années 60 pour développer le Domaine Laroche, Michel a souhaité se recentrer sur ses racines chablisiennes. 

Le domaine fait aujourd'hui 18ha, il en fera 22ha en 2019 lorsque l'ensemble des vignes encore louées seront exploitées par le domaine. 
Petit Chablis, Chablis, Premier Cru Côte de Troësme et Premier Cru Fourchaume. 
C'est sur ce dernier climat que le domaine tente de montrer son savoir faire : les 5 parcelles situées sur les lieux dits de l'Homme Mort, l'Ardillier, Fourchaume et Vaulorent agées de 25 à 80 ans sont exploitées puis vinifiées séparément dans des cuves d'acier inoxydable et quelques pièces de chêne afin d'exprimer le caractère unique de chaque terroir : finesse, minéralité, tension, fraîcheur... 3 cuvées de Fourchaume sont donc issues de nos terroirs :
Chablis Premier Cru Fourchaume
Chablis Premier Cru Fourchaume Vieilles Vignes 
Chablis Premier Cru Fourchaume Héritage.

www.ledomainedhenri.fr

Name: CHAMPAGNE VALERIE JACQUESSON
Description: Vente de champagne

Name: Rakle Reklam Pazarlama San. Tic. Ltd. Şti
Description:
Glass decoration and bar&service equipments supplier

In order to make your special moments more enjoyable, has prepared for you tasteful, colorful and extraordinary products.  
We are sure that you also will be able to find an appealing design, when you check our collection.
RAKLE, accompanies you also with exciting wine glasses customized for your special days, for you and organization as well as its unique collection.
RAKLE also acts as a solution partner to corporate companies in case of demand for all kinds of glasses, plastic and metal service equipments with or without logo.

Name: Good Wine Cru
Description:
The Good Wine Cru was borne out of a love for wine and a desire to do a little more for the environment. We represent the local growers and producers of Australia, who produce beautiful wines, using sustainable practices that demonstrate a consideration for the environment. Many of the talented people we work with are certified Organic or Biodynamic, whilst others might be too busy making wine to complete the paperwork. Either way, we stand for those doing a little good, to produce something great.

We don’t take ourselves too seriously and we’re always up for a good time. We’re constantly on the lookout for good wines made by good people, and when we find them, we love to share them with you. The Cru are a community of like-minded people who enjoy beautiful wine but want to know where it comes from and how it was produced. This is a safe place, so you’re free to ask questions and encouraged to experiment. This is your journey and we are just here to help facilitate it and to have some fun along the way.

Name: Wine Pourings
Description:
There is so much to enjoy about wine, but so little time!

Wine Pourings is your essential guide to learning more about wine, helping you get more pleasure and enjoyment from your wine and importantly showing you how to get better value for your wine dollar. 

There is an old saying that we love at Wine Pourings:
“Drinking good wine with good food in good company is one of life’s most civilized pleasures.”

This is what we can assist you to do by providing our clients with a wide range of services all related to wine.  We provide information on wine, reviews, an events calendar, hosted events and party services.

We strive to be the website of choice for all things wine in Australia while also featuring international news.   Visit us to learn more about good, great and fine wine and make the most of your time and money when it comes to drinking wine.

Name: The Oxford Wine Festival
Description:
Calling all wine lovers! Taste your way around the world, with hundreds of award-winning, rare, and unusual wines in Oxford next September.

Taking place on the 18th and 19th September at the beautiful Oxford University Exam Schools, you won't find a better opportunity to explore and celebrate the whole wonderful world of wine. Love champagne? Want to explore the best of English wine-making, or the grand Chateaux of Bordeaux? Or are you looking for wines and grapes you've never even heard of? We've got you covered. Sample from hundreds of exciting wines from over 25 countries, plus live jazz, artisan foods and a tutored tasting program from the UK's leading wine educators.

Name: GOVIN Grands Terroirs
Description:
A GOVIN Grands Terroirs nasce com o firme propósito de ser um novo modelo de negócio do vinho, com soluções mais integradas a serviço desse universo e suas nuances. Com base na oferta, divulgação e no atendimento exclusivo e personalizado, onde o foco é o apreciador de vinhos finos. GOVIN Grands Terroirs uni expertise, profissionalismo e entusiasmo.

Queremos partilhar com você nossa paixão por vinhos.

Sejam todos bem vindos.
Equipe GOVIN Grands Terroirs

Name: Manog - Enoteca Italiana no Porto
Description:
Como Representantes e Distribuidores em exclusivo para Portugal e  motivados pela nossa autenticidade e paixão fizemos uma seleção das  melhores marcas, com destaque para vinhos e espumantes, para que  possamos oferecer aos nossos clientes (revendedores e setor horeca) uma  excelente relação qualidade/preço.
Dentro da variedade de produtos que dispomos, que em breve irão ser mais  diversificados, desejamos-lhes uma ótima navegação pelo nosso site.
Esperamos também que faça uma visita ao nosso Show-Room no espaço comercial no Porto.

Name: McCabes Wine & Spirits
Description: McCabes Wine and Spirits, a store on the Upper East Side of Manhattan, has a knowledgeable staff with extensive offerings of Single Malt Scotch, Sake, Wines and Kosher products.

Name: Giants & Gentlemen Old Tom Gin
Description: Old Tom. New Gin. Giants & Gentlemen Old Tom Gin pays homage to the traditions of Victorian-era style gin, with a modern twist. Its unique recipe, highlighting an aromatic blend of Juniper Berries, Lemon & Orange Peel and subtle hints of vanilla and elder flower, are perfectly arranged to create an unprecedented gin experience. The flavour profile is mellow, smooth and well-mannered, delicious neat yet stands tall when mixed with tonic. Winner of five SIP awards, local and female founded.

Name: Ferger-Módos Winery Hungary, Szekszárd
Description:
In the  Ferger-Módos  Winery  in  Epreskert  the  characteristics  of  the historic wine region of Szekszárd, 2000 years of tradition and nearly 30 years of experience of winery combines with the latest technology. In the winery 2,000 square meters are available for storing barreled and bottled wines in controlled temperature.

These wines,  analyzed  in  these  modern  laboratories,  may  be  treated expertly if needed, stored, and they are filled in special bottles in the bottling unit and labeled uniquely. The capacity of the storehouse is more than 400,000 bottles. It is possible to store the  wines either in cases without label, or in cardboard boxes with labels. The Módos Winery trades not only table wines and bottled wines, but also the very high quality and limited wine specialities. The excellent quality is ensured by the combination of the traditional and the most advanced technology.

In      distributing barrel-wines         in      catering      trade we     also   opted for development. We accomplished this with a special packing technology, the so-called Bag-in-Box, which makes it possible for the nectar to get to the guests’ glass in a more aesthetic and hygienic  way, because of the special cooler designed for BIB and the inside valve system. This way we may dispense with the bottles and plastic cans.
www.modosboraszat.hu

Name: New Zealand Chinese Liquor Limited
Description:
We believe that within the heart of every person lies honour and glory gifted by the Creator, as well as expectations of perfection and eternity.
Accordingly, we put this belief into our products; we take the purest water, the finest ingredients, calligraphy by master calligraphers, product design brimming with artistic talent, exquisite French bottles and lids, a century's worth of distillation equipment and technology from New Zealand, millennia of Chinese tradition, as well as the beautiful violet colour that completes the rainbow.
All of these elements combine to produce this unparalleled bottle of fine liquor.
TAIZI

我們相信在每一個人的心中都有造物主賜予的尊榮, 
以及對完美和永恆的期許. 
因此我們將這份信念放在我們的產品之中, 
我們選擇最乾淨的水, 最優質的原料, 大師揮毫的書法, 
充滿才華的產品設計, 法國精緻的瓶子與蓋子, 
紐西蘭百年的蒸餾設備及工藝, 中國人千年留下的傳統, 
還有天上虹彩最後收尾的美麗紫色.
這所有的元素綜合起來造就了這瓶獨一無二的美酒
太紫

私たちは、人はそれぞれに創造主から与えられた栄誉と賞賛、そして完全永久なるものへの憧れを胸に宿していると考えます。
そこでその思いをこの一本に込めました。中国一万年の伝統と、ニュージーランドで過去百年間に培われてきた醸造技術を組み合せ、最高の清水と原料だけを使用しました。精巧なフランス製ボトルに高名な書家の書を配し、気品ある紫色でまとめたデザインは、芸術の香りに満ちています。
これらすべての要素が重なり合い、比類なき品質の高級酒が誕生しました。
太紫

Name: Pacific Wine Services
Description: Pacific Wine Services (PWS) is a "custom crush" facility that provides state-of-the-art winemaking services in Paso Robles, California. Over the past decade we have provided small and mid-size wine brands with barrel storage, case good storage, de-stemming, tank fermentation, and bottling services. If you are a local winemaker looking for excellent customer service, please give us a call.

Name: MUST
Description: MUST is a new wine venue in Harpenden that provides the finest range of wine from around the world; with a luxurious wine bar complete with an evocative wine tasting room and venue for private events. Offering delicious cheese platters, charcuterie boards and fresh food daily MUST is focused on providing the ultimate in wine and food enjoyment.

Name: Spirit Thief Distilling Co.
Description:
When three thieves from Tasmania’s whisky industry chose to explore the marriage between spirit and heavily-charred ex red wine casks, the outcome was uncertain. 

What they discovered years later, was a complex arrangement between oak, spirit, char, tannin and flavour profile that was both bold, elegant and unique. This laid the foundations for what would become an exploration into single malt whiskies matured in varietal specific red wine casks. 

Capital investment and further collaboration would be required. Procuring some of the world’s rarest red wine matured whiskies from award-winning, distinguished distilleries around the globe at the outset, through to uniting our own spirit with our distinct curated wine barrel collection; Spirit Thief now creates unique, limited edition single malt whiskies.

We welcome you to journey with us.

Name: Sunderland Beer Company Ltd.
Description:
Sunderland Beer Company is a premier drinks wholesaler servicing the North East of England.  We offer an extensive range of products including leading, competing and house brands all at competitive prices while providing a friendly and reliable service to all our customers. 

Our extensive range of products include: Draught (Beers, Lagers, Ciders, Bitters) bottled beers & ciders, alco-pop’s, spirit’s, soft drinks, energy drinks and mixers to pubs, clubs, restaurants and home bars throughout the North East of England. Also branded glasses and line cleaners. You can find all the major and popular brands at Sunderland Beer Company including Carling, Fosters, Carlsberg, Stella Artois, Becks, John Smiths, Worthingtons, Bacardi, Smirnoff, Magners and Gordons to name a few.

Three main benefits of trading with us:

> We offer a free, reliable, flexible and fast 7 days a week delivery service to all our customers.
> We will attempt to match and/or beat any genuine 'like for like' quote.
> Our business is family established, family owned and family operated and we have four generations of industry experience across both the on and off trade, we will assist you in anyway we can to help make your business a success.

Name: Wine Paulinia
Description: A Wine Paulínia é uma loja virtual, inspirada na busca pela identidade e excelência do Vinho Nacional, comprometida a compartilhar produtos de alta qualidade, quebrando o paradigma do vinho nacional.

Name: DNA Distillery
Description:
DNA Distillery is the legacy of our ancestors; a tradition passed down from generation to generation, from Europe to Australia.

To us, it is bottled magic - culture, tradition, passion, joy. Distilled and sealed. Best enjoyed neat with a newspaper in hand.

DNA is a tribute to the friends, loved ones, mentors and strangers that have shaped our journey. A tribute to those that came before us and those that will come after us. Whether you call it rakija, grappa, moonshine, ouzo, or arak - or whether you’ve never tried this before in your life - there’s one thing you can bet on: we’re about to change the way you drink.

Name: Casa E. di Mirafiore
Description:
"Ringrazio coloro che onorano le mie cantine e sarò grato a tutti che vorranno, nell'interesse dell'enologia e dell'agricoltura, essere larghi della loro opinione e dei loro consigli" Fontanafredda, ottobre 1890, E. di Mirafiore

Quando nel 1859 Vittorio Emanuele II decise di innalzare Rosa Vercellana al rango nobiliare, scelse come titolo "contessa di Mirafiore e Fontanafredda", con un rimando sia alla residenza torinese sia alla tenuta di Serralunga d'Alba, acquistata l'anno precedente. Il titolo nobiliare fu trasmesso, di conseguenza, al figlio Emanuele e, successivamente, al nipote Gastone, rampolli del neonato casato di conti le cui origini si intrecciano indissolubilmente allo sviluppo e all'espansione dell'azienda vitivinicola da essi stessi condotta e alla diffusione internazionale del Barolo.

Il nome Mirafiore, oggi, si traduce in una nuova gamma di vini unici e particolari per origine, carattere e personalità, che presentano al mercato il rigore e l'importanza della tradizione dei grandi rossi di Langa. Sono contenuti in una bottiglia appositamente realizzata con l'85% di vetro riciclato, che riprende le fattezze del contenitore in uso nei primi anni del Novecento.

Name: Total Beverage Group of Companies
Description:
Ambicon provides “on-the-ground” consulting for setting up Micro brewery or brewpub. We have expertise in evaluating, optimizing and developing solutions. Ambicon consultants have an average of more than 30+ years experience in executive positions, at end-user and vendor corporations. Ambicon plans your equipment layout, you benefit from our experience.

Ambicon undertake end to end project consultancy starting from project report and place selection, designing the best possible equipment, taking care of pesky business problems like regulatory issues and organizing for you a brewer or brew master along with providing necessary training and delivery of raw materials such as malt and hops.

We specify the necessary infrastructure, provide you the layout plans and assist you with your preparations with your professionals.

Name: Havnens Vinotek
Description:
Stor passion for vin og den indre købmand er driverne for min forretning. Jeg holder meget af vin og elsker at udforske vinens verden på kryds og tværs af druer og lande. Vin er ikke bare vin. Jeg sælger kun vin jeg kan stå inde for og som jeg selv vil servere for mine gæster. 
Vingaver skal ikke være reklamesøjle med virksomhedens logo. Vingaver skal signalere kvalitet. Derfor tilbyder jeg ikke at lave logovine. Skal din virksomheds logo fremgå på en vingave kan det fx være på en trækasse.
Giv en god vin og din virksomhed vil blive huset!

Name: Bride Valley Vineyard
Description: Family owned Dorset vineyard creating award-winning, single estate sparkling and still wines. On site Cellar Door, with tours and tastings throughout the season.

Name: Onyx Spirits Company
Description:
Onyx Spirits Company is a spirits distillery located in Connecticut producing Onyx Moonshine; the world's first ultra premium American moonshine and the first legal moonshine to be made in New England.  Onyx Moonshine is currently available throughout Connecticut, Massachusetts, Rhode Island and upstate New York.  

Onyx Moonshine sips like a top shelf whiskey and mixes better than vodka.  

- Official spirit of the 2012 GRAMMY Awards.

- Named "Best New England Micro-distillery for 2012," by Yankee Magazine.

Name: Palmina Wines
Description:
Palmina is more than a winery.  It is a philosophy, a passion and a strongly held belief that wine is an extension of the plate, a component of a meal and a means to bring people together. 

Formed by winemaker Steve Clifton in 1995, Palmina produces a full range of wines crafted from Italian varietals grown in Santa Barbara County, California. Palmina is not trying to emulate the Italian versions of those wines, but rather translate the history of those grapes to the growing conditions and vineyard sites of the very unique characteristics of Santa Barbara County. The wines are Italian by inspiration with flavors rooted in Santa Barbara, and all are intended to be a delicious component of a meal.

Palmina wines can be found in restaurants and bottle shops throughout the United  States, Canada and Japan as well as directly from the winery, and can be tasted at the tasting room in Lompoc, CA.

Name: JM CAZES SELECTION
Description: Famille JM Cazes is a manufacturing company that produces a wide range of wines and hosts various events and tasting tour experiences.

Name: Laurel Vines Vineyard and Winery
Description: Laurel Vines is a company based out of Lockington, East Riding of Yorkshire, United Kingdom.

Name: HANNA Winery and Vineyards
Description: Winery in Sonoma County

Name: Vignobles Gabard
Description:
Vignerons passionnés par notre métier, nous sommes producteurs de vins de Bordeaux en Blanc, Rosé et Rouge. Nous vendons en direct à la propriété, mais aussi par correspondance ou sur notre boutique en ligne. Nos valeurs : le travail bien fait, le respect de la nature (certification HVE), la qualité, la bienveillance, et la confiance. 
Le contact, l'échange et le partage avec vous sont de vrais moments de plaisir. Nous vous invitons à découvrir nos vins château La Croix de Queynac et les déguster, c’est eux qui parlent le mieux de nous. Si vous êtes dans la région, venez nous rendre visite au Vignoble Gabard, pour un moment d’échange, de découverte, de dégustation … et peut-être que vous repartirez avec quelques bordeaux !
www.vignoblesgabard.com
Vente directe à la boutique du vignoble, du Lundi au Vendredi de 9h à 12h30 et de 14h à 18h.

Name: Adami
Description: Adami da oltre 90 anni produce solo Prosecco (Valdobbiadene Docg e Prosecco Doc Treviso) nelle sue varie tipologie ed espressioni, sia tradizionali che particolari, legate alle diversità di ogni singola collina.

Name: Bele Casel
Description:
It all started over 40 years ago when my father, a winemaking student, met my mother, but above all he met my grandfather Ilario, a great farmer.
Once my dad finished his studies he started working in a distillery, helping my grandfather in the land and in the “cellar” in his spare time.
It was during those years that a baby boy called Luca, his sister Paola and a business named “the County” were born.
These children, here now to tell you this story, grew up with their maternal grandparents, since mum and dad were following an adventure that was far greater than their own dreams: every day, after finishing their daytime jobs, they would go down in the cellar to try and consolidate, day after day, their efforts and sacrifices.
These memories are still very much alive in our heads. The whole family would be busy bottling 2-300 bottles in one day, sticking labels by hand on each bottle, we would deliver on Saturdays to meet personally the few clients we had.
But in the space of a few years the whole world underwent great radical changes; in the wine business everyone started targeting foreign markets and greatly increasing their sales.
In the evenings, over dinner, we used to wonder where we were going wrong, and why all our hard work and sacrifices to produce high quality wine weren’t paying off yet.
Then, suddenly, one day we received a phone call from an American importer looking to buy prosecco, and surprisingly, he’d contacted us too.
It was a cold and rainy day when the person in charge of finding “the best prosecco around” arrived, and we were very, very tense. We were aware of the quality of our product but we also knew that our cellar, a basement just a little bigger than a garage, couldn’t compete with all the big wineries in the area. Our English wasn’t very good either, and we didn’t consider ourselves salesmen but simple producers.
Imagine our faces when we heard that we had been chosen amongst all the other producers!

Name: Woodvale Vintners
Description:
Guided by generations of local horticultural and viticultural knowledge on both his father’s and mother’s side, and assisted in particular by his father Mort Mitchell, Kevin Mitchell's philosophy is to keep things small and discrete, giving each wine the chance to perfectly depict the characteristics of the Skilly Valley and the conditions and microclimates of each vineyards.

This attention to detail, both in the vineyard and in the winery, was recognised with a debut five-star rating in its first Halliday Wine Companion review, with Woodvale also listed as one of the Top Ten New Wineries of 2018. Those early successes have since been backed up by outstanding vintages in a select range of varietals, including Riesling, Shiraz, Cabernet Sauvignon, Mataro, Semillon, Pinot Gris and Grenache.

Name: Vinarija Dračevica
Description:
Rooted in the sun-drenched hills of Zeta, Dračevica is a boutique family winery dedicated to authentic Montenegrin winemaking. We cultivate native grape varieties with care and precision, transforming them into small-batch wines and spirits that reflect the soul of our land.

Our current lineup:
Bodin–Bold red Vranac, rich in tradition and depth.
Obolon–Experimental orange Muskat Krokan, unfiltered and full of character.
Kosara–Traditional lozova rakija, double-distilled for clarity and warmth.

Name: OVID Napa Valley
Description: Organically farmed, long-lived wines crafted by Austin Peterson from the Pritchard Hill geography of Napa Valley.

Name: Classic Wines, Inc.
Description: We offer a unique wine business model .  Our hybrid approach includes importation, distribution, marketing and sales. We enter into agreements with wineries,  importers, distributors, brand ambassadors as well as directly with customers. Our focus is to provide excellence in servicing the highly competitive market. We go above and beyond in meeting the expectations of customers and facilitate the critical need to place their wines at the critical time and place they require.

Name: ROBERT YOUNG ESTATE WINERY, LLC
Description: ROBERT YOUNG ESTATE WINERY, LLC is a real estate company based out of 4960 RED WINERY RD, GEYSERVILLE, California, United States.

Name: Cantina del Castello
Description:
Cantina del Castello si trova a Soave lungo la via principale nel cuore del borgo medievale. Il paese, cinto dalle mura del maestoso castello, è famoso per la produzione di vino di qualità, dal sapore fresco e avvolgente.
I prodotti della cantina sono lo specchio del territorio e nascono con l’obiettivo di esaltare le caratteristiche del Soave nel rispetto della tradizione.

Offriamo tour con degustazione in cantina, eventi privati e non e possibilità di acquisto presso il nostro wine shop.

Per maggiori informazioni contattateci via email o visitate il nostro sito internet

Name: Casa da Senra Wines
Description:
O vinho CASA DA SENRA é produzido pela mesma família desde 1647, estando agora na 10ª geração. Na Quinta dos Abrigueiros reconverteram-se as vinhas de acordo com modernos processos de produção, tirando partido do excepcional "terroir". 

O vinho apresenta aromas florais com notas de pêssego e mel. É fresco e elegante, com uma excelente estrutura e persistência na boca, característica da casta Loureiro. Tem merecido as melhores apreciações como a notação de 90 pontos por Robert Parker e a medalha de ouro para o melhor Vinho Verde Loureiro pela CVRVV.

No ano passado lançámos uma Edição Limitada irrepetível - Casa da Senra Premium, Alvarinho e Loureiro, D.O.C.. O segredo está em descobri-lo!

Name: Texas Wine Collective
Description: 4.0 Cellars, the unified tasting room, retailer, and wine club featuring Texas wine pioneers Brennan Vineyards, Lost Oak Winery, and McPherson Cellars, has relaunched as the Texas Wine Collective. The move allows them to take Texas wine to new heights through enhanced vintner collaboration, expanded tasting room capacity, new guest experiences, and the ability to develop innovative wine brands that express the region’s unique character.

Name: Vignobles Raguenot
Description:
C’est une belle histoire familiale qui se perpétue. Fondés en 1967, les Vignobles Raguenot prospèrent grâce aux esprits pionniers et visionnaires de Lise et Philippe Raguenot. En 1997, leurs deux filles Emmanuelle et Marie-Pierre associées à leur mari respectif, Daren Miller et Eric. C’est une belle histoire familiale qui se perpétue. 

Fondés en 1967, les Vignobles Raguenot prospèrent grâce aux esprits pionniers et visionnaires de Lise et Philippe Raguenot.

En 1997, leurs deux filles Emmanuelle et Marie-Pierre associées à leur mari respectif, Daren Miller et Eric Lallez, reprennent le vignoble du Château des Tourtes en appellation Blaye-Côtes de Bordeaux. Tous les quatre sont en reconversion de carrière, et grâce à leurs expériences et leurs talents, ils empruntent le métier de vigneron, après avoir chacun repris une formation dans les domaines
de la viticulture et de l’œnologie.

C’est en 1998 que nos quatre mousquetaires vont acquérir le vignoble du Château Haut Beyzac en appellation Haut-Médoc. Forts de leurs compétences, de leur motivation et surtout de leur passion pour le monde du vin, ils s’appliquent à gagner une forte notoriété au niveau international grâce à un suivi, une régularité dans le travail et une qualité irréprochable. C’est ainsi qu’ils ont acquis une reconnaissance qui depuis la création des Vignobles Raguenot n’est jamais démentie. Ils ont au palmarès plus de 100 médailles en 25 ans, et de multiples articles de presse qui couronnent, chaque année, leur engagement dans le métier de vigneron. 

Dorénavant les Vignobles Raguenot représentent plus de 100 hectares du vignoble bordelais.

Bienvenue dans le club des Vignobles Raguenot !

Name: ADS Group / Alpha Sales
Description: ADS Group – Alpha Sales is a distributor and importer of spirits on the Belgian and Luxemburg market since 1985. As a Leader on the ON trade market, we are distributing more than 1500 references in spirits, aperitifs and champagnes of national and international brands. We are also exclusive importer for more than twenty brands for whom we position their products on our markets.
