Name: WineWorld Limited
Description:
Explore the world of wines with WineWorld! 

WineWorld is your solution to wine functions: We help you source the perfect wines at competitive pricing; offer private wine lessons; and host fun corporate or private wine-themed parties.

Our difference: Carefully selected by our procurement team, each wine is an indication of quality! We strive to offer a diverse and exciting portfolio, including rare local grapes. With a virtual model, our operation is streamplined so that we can pass the most savings to our members. We encourage you to explore the world of wine with us!

Name: Regency Wines
Description:
Regency Wines is an Exeter based Wine Merchant bringing the very best wines of the world to the West Country. We're a specialist wine partner to the licensed trade with an extensive portfolio of wines and premium spirits.

Our aim is to provide our customers with complete wine package which extends from helping select wines that will best suit the business right through to wine lists design and printing, training, events and ongoing support.

We are proud to be different to most drinks companies. We are a specialist wine and spirit merchant, with a passion for great customer service.

Our first key strength is our people. Many of our employees have spent years working in the licensed trade or wine and spirit industry before joining Regency Wines. This gives us a comprehensive understanding of our customers’ needs and desires.

The aim is to provide a full wine service to our customers and help them sell more wine by working alongside them as a wine partner rather than just a supplier.

Name: Australia's Wine List of the Year Awards
Description:
Australia's Wine List of the Year Awards

Australia’s Wine List of the Year Awards were established in 1993 by Tucker Seabrook, Sydney’s first Wine and Spirit Merchant (established 1838).

The aim of the Awards is to recognise and reward the enormous investment by restaurant owners, managers and sommeliers in the time, skill and resources that go into developing the best quality wine lists and cellars.  At the same time the Awards pay tribute to the dedication and talent of those individuals who create these lists for Australia’s best restaurants, hotels, clubs, wine bars, pubs and cafes – large and small.

Still the most prestigious national awards in their field, the awards have played a major part in lifting the standard of Australia’s wine lists over the past three decades. Chairman of Judges for the first 11 years (1994 – 2004) Huon Hooke commented on the occasion of the 20th anniversary of the launch of the Awards: ‘Standards have improved out of sight since 1994, and each year, the bar keeps rising.’

Importantly, the awards have also impacted the public’s interest in fine wine generally and improved their appreciation of those establishments that have participated in and been celebrated in the Awards over the years.

Since 2016, Drinks Association have been the official Awards Trade Communications Partner, and since 2021 QANTAS Magazine / Travel Insider have been the official Awards Consumer Media Partner.

Peter Forrestal, currently enjoying his twentieth year as Chairman of Judges and a member of the judging panel since 1993, endorses Huon’s comments and salutes the rise to prominence of Australia’s sommeliers over the past 30 years. ‘Not only does Australia now boast an abundance of sommeliers but those we have are as well educated and as experienced as those of any country in the world. They have been fortunate to have a vigorous and enthusiastic support from industry bodies such as the CMS, WSET and Sommeliers Australia.'

Name: Vini Veneti
Description:
Vini Veneti translates as "Wines from Veneto".

Veneto is a substantial wine-producing region in the northeast corner of Italy.

Veneto is the largest DOC wine producer in Italy, with 55% of this production being made up of white wines, and the 2 types of sparkling, Frizzante and Spumante

It is famed for producing the hugely popular white wines such as Prosecco, Soave and Pinot Grigio, as well as the incredible Valpolicella range of Red Wines, including the delicious full-bodied Ripasso and the hugely popular, ‘King of Italian wines’ Amarone. #Amarone #Ripasso #Lugana #Soave #Valpolicella

The Veneto region is responsible for producing some of the best and well-known, DOCG, DOC and IGT classified wines, available anywhere in the world.

Vini Veneti has been created to import a selection of these wonderful wines, direct from Independent Producers in this Region, especially for you to enjoy at home.

Vini Veneti has been created to import a selection of these wonderful wines, direct from Independent Producers in this Region, especially for you to enjoy at home.

Name: Wine & Business Club Nantes
Description:
Le Wine & Business club a été fondé à Paris en 1991 par Alain Marty.
Le club de Nantes, lancé en 2013, se réunit huit à dix fois par an au Radisson Blu.

En présence des membres du bureau :
Gérard Allio, président du Wine & Business Club – Nantes
Anne-Isabelle Le Boulba, Sébastien Mathieu, Alain Raguideau, Frédéric Robin et Eric Warin, vice-présidents du Wine & Business Club – Nantes
Thierry Jahier, vice-président, secrétaire du Wine & Business Club – Nantes

Les soirées s’articulent autour de trois temps forts : cocktail, intervention d’un invité d’honneur (chef d’entreprise, économiste, personnalité du monde des médias, auteur…) et dîner-dégustation de vins élaboré par le nouveau Chef du Radisson Blub, Erwan Nobelt, en présence d’un vigneron.

Name: Ruby Hill Winery
Description:
In 1883, John Crellin planted vineyards into a red clay knoll and named it Ruby Hill after the rich red soils found throughout the property. By 1889, Ruby Hill Winery was one of the largest and most revered producers of wine in the Livermore Valley. In 2002, Mike Callahan purchased the 105 acre parcel (West side), known as Ruby Hill and Rubino Estates Winery. Partners Sharon and Mike Callahan, Jennifer and Mike Lloyd and Annette and Mike Brown began their partnership with the opening of our Tasting Room in 2007. Ruby Hill Winery quickly became a popular location for visitors of the Livermore Valley and what started off as a hobby quickly blossomed into something more.

Sharing a hands-on approach and passion for wine, the three families are involved in all aspects of the winery business. Whether it's helping on the bottling line, sorting grapes at harvest or working the quarterly wine club release parties, one of the family members will surely be found!

Our philosophy at Ruby Hill Winery is simple. It begins in the vineyard growing the best grapes possible, then continues in the cellar where our winemaking team hand-crafts each wine to perfection. Our wines are balanced and approachable, they can be enjoyed now, or can be treasured for the years to come. We offer our wines at a reasonable price so everyone can enjoy them. Our staff is friendly and knowledgeable and will ensure that your tasting experience is unforgettable.

Name: Santa Maria Valley Wine Country Association
Description: The Santa Maria Wine Country Association works as a single community voice to elevate, protect and promote the premium wines of this historical, coastal growing region.  Members include: Alta Maria, Byron, Cambria, Central Coast Wine Services, CORE Wine Group, Costa de Oro, Cottonwood Canyon, Kenneth Volk Vineyards, Native 9, Presqu'ile Winery, Rancho Sisquoc Winery, Riverbench Vineyard, Sierra Madre Vineyard, Tantara Winery, Toretti's Family Vineyard, Tres Hermanas Winery, Vaquero Cellars, Waltzing Bear Wines, Bien Nacido Vineyards, Dierberg Vineyard, Rancho Ontiveros Vineyard, Rancho Real Vineyard and Solomon Hills Vineyard.

Name: Azienda Vinicola Tramontana S.R.L.
Description: In Calabria la famiglia Tramontana è da sempre associata all'idea del buon vino. Le origini dell'attività risalgono agli ultimi anni del 1800.

Name: Open Wine
Description:
Open Wine is one of the leading wine service providers in Mainland China. Open Wine was founded in January 2010 with a clear focus of importing, distributing and marketing, distinctive wines at competitive prices. Our brand portfolio has been carefully selected and consists of some of the world's finest wines from many of the greatest wine producing regions in the world. With offices and showrooms in Shanghai and Chengdu and coverage in numerous provinces, Open Wine's core business principal is a commitment to providing quality wines, wine education, and professional services to all our customers.

开品是中国内地主要的进口葡萄酒供应商之一。成立于2010年1月,开品致力于进口、分销及营销独具特色 的世界各国葡萄酒。我们精挑慎选出来自多个世界闻名的葡萄酒产区的优质葡萄酒,将其以极具竞争力的 价格引进中国。在上海及成都设有办事处和展示厅;业务面覆盖多个省份。开品的核心宗旨是向所有我们 的客户提供优质的美酒、葡萄酒知识培训和专业的服务。

Name: Walsh Vineyards Management
Description: WALSH VINEYARDS MANAGEMENT is a vineyard management leader, located in the Napa Valley, offering a wide range of services for a modern vineyard operation. In operation at 1125 GOLDEN GATE DRIVE, NAPA, California. Serving the Napa / Sonoma / Pope Valley / Healdsburg wine growing region for more than four decades.

Name: Wine Press Northwest
Description: It is crucial to us that Wine Press Northwest is about wine. Everything we write about focuses on wine. If we write about food, it is about how it goes with our wines. If we write about travel, it is about touring the Walla Walla Valley, Yamhill County in Oregon or Idaho’s Snake River Valley. We have not deviated from this principle since launching this quarterly publication in 1997.

Name: Bahari Rum
Description:
Bahari, The African rum collection.
The word “Bahari” means “ocean” in Swahili, embodying our passion for Africa and its richness. Our logo, inspired by the traditional dhow (a traditional East African sailing boat), symbolises our commitment to authenticity and adventure.
The story of Bahari begins in Kenya, where two French individuals from Burgundy crossed paths. Their French expertise seamlessly blended with African terroirs, giving birth to The African Rum Collection.
Each bottle in our collection is the result of meticulous exploration of African lands, their unique terroirs, and various distilleries. 
Bahari reflects the geographical and cultural diversity of the African continent. More than a spirit, our rums invite you to discover Africa’s hidden treasures, immerse yourself in its rich history, and celebrate its cultural diversity.

Bahari, la collection des rhums africains.
Bahari signifie "océan" en Swahili, cela incarne notre passion pour l'Afrique et ses richesses. Notre logo, inspiré du boutre traditionnel, symbolise notre attachement à l'authenticité et à l'aventure.
L'histoire de Bahari commence au Kenya, où deux Français originaires de Bourgogne se sont rencontrés. Leur savoir-faire français s'est harmonieusement mêlé aux terroirs africains pour donner naissance à ‘La Collection des Rhums Africains’.
Chaque bouteille de notre collection  est le fruit d'une exploration minutieuse des terres africaines, de leurs terroirs uniques et de différentes distilleries. Bahari reflète la diversité géographique et culturelle du continent africain. Plus qu'un simple spiritueux, nos rhums sont une invitation à découvrir les trésors cachés de l'Afrique, à s'imprégner de sa riche histoire et à célébrer sa diversité culturelle.

Name: Wine School of Excellence
Description:
Wine School of Excellence (WSE) is a friendly, lively and vibrant ‘independent’ wine education company and passionate about wine.  Using a different approach to most companies involved in the trade, by incorporating more creative and innovative training styles and methodologies, they have delivered large corporate training programmes to many multi-national organisations both in the UK and abroad.  

As an approved programme provider with the Wine and Spirit Educational Trust (WSET), the leading industry educational body,  they run courses from novice to professional for the on and off trade as well as the wine enthusiast.

WSE tutors, all WSET approved and graduates of the coveted WSET Level 4 Diploma, are professional and experienced corporate trainers who use their knowledge and skill in modern training techniques to add the WOW factor to their wine courses and wine events. Be it grape growing, wine making or styles of wines, their aim is to make all aspects of the courses easy to understand and absorb. These very practical courses, delivered in a fun and relaxed atmosphere, also incorporate describing and recommending wines to guests/customers, the equipment required for wine service, why and when we decant wine, how to open and serve still and sparkling wine and much much more! 

WSET Courses include:

Level 1 Award in Wines/Spirits/Wine Service
Level 2 Award in Wines & Spirits/Spirits
Level 3 Award in Wines & Spirits

Interested in developing your wine and spirits or perhaps your/your staffs wine service knowledge and skills? It’s really easy. Just choose a course, give them a call or book directly online. They would really love to hear from you!

Name: Domaine Firmin Dezat
Description:
Nous sommes Vignerons de Père en Fils depuis 1550, je suis la 18eme génération à travailler et vinifier les terroirs de mes ancêtres. Le Domaine a pris une autre dimension avec l’arrivée de mon grand père André en 1948. 
   Le Domaine s’étend aujourd’hui sur 23 Ha de vignes répartis entre les Appellations Sancerre principalement, Pouilly Fumé et Menetou Salon.  
   L’identité de mon domaine et de mes vins s’inscrit dans la ligne directe des terroirs d’où ils proviennent. Ce sont les sols qui donnent l’identité aux vins, nous vignerons, nous sommes là pour accompagner la nature dans l’élaboration de vins de caractères.

Name: Vinolyze
Description:
Vinolyze is the wine recommendation engine to help retail grow wine sales online and increase customer LTV through personalized recommendations.

Online wine sales have one of the lowest conversion rates (1%) across industries. For businesses, it’s missed sales opportunities (up to 140%). On the other hand, up to 93% of consumers struggle to select wine, especially when buying online. 

We have built a wine recommendation system that matches consumers with wine online and solves these problems.

Our product is a widget that can be easily embedded into a retailer website or app and helps businesses sell more wine and helps consumers navigate through the wine selection process. 

It works through these 3 steps:
1. asking consumers a few simple questions to understand their taste profile
2. classify the business's wine assortment based on unique algorithms and data 
3. provide wine recommendations tailored to the consumer taste.

Name: Tenuta Casteani
Description:
Tuscany, one of the foremost Italian wine regions, has among its areas of excellence the cattle growing Maremma region, extending along the Tyrrhenian coast. Tenuta Casteani, represents one of the most prestigious wineries in this corner of Tuscany. Founded in 2002 by dedicated and passionate winemaker Mario Pelosi.
The property comprises 80 hectares of which 15 makeup its vineyards. Intensely flavored vines have historically been cultivated in this region, due to the strong fertile nature of its historic clay soil. The mild Mediterranean climate, tempered by the neighboring sea throughout the year, prevents drastic climatic changes. The Maremma region’s warm and stable microclimate is enhanced by sea breezes that cool the grapes during the hottest summer days. Spring rains in this region promote a superior and healthier ripening of the grapes, giving the wine greater concentration and perfumes.

Name: Vinícola Mirantus
Description:
We're Mirantus, a non-traditional winery that believes experiences go beyond just moments. 
At Mirantus, you can have you own vine, take care of it, follow its growing, handling it yourself and make a great wine... your story inside the bottle!

Name: Misterbubbles
Description: Experience Mister Bubbles, the ready-to-drink craft long drink cocktail at home. Mixed perfectly by a professional bartender, each sip will make you appreciate the smell and taste of a high-quality product. We're here to offer you the perfect cocktail experience wherever you want to have it: in your home, at a party with friends, at the beach, and wherever you like. Choose your favorite flavor and with a simple click, Mr. Bubbles will soon be in your hands ready to enjoy.

Name: Foraging Vintners
Description: We are a craft winery based in the beautiful Isle of Man. From our seaside winery, we produce non-grape based varieties of sparkling wine, ciders, ginger beer and now a range of rum.

Name: Evergreen Beverage Canada Inc.
Description: Evergreen is a licensed agent in the province of Ontario representing local and imported producers of premium wines, beers and spirits. Evergreen is also a leader in representing legalized cannabis producers to authorized provincial jurisdictions upon legalization and regulation in 2018.

Name: Società Agricola Valpanera
Description:
Cantina Valpanera is a winery located in the Friuli-Venezia Giulia region, in north-eastern Italy. Founded in 1970, the winery is located in the municipality of Fiumicello Villa Vicentina, an area renowned for the production of high quality wines.

The Valpanera winery stands out for the production of typical wines of the region, with a particular emphasis on the native vines of Friuli, such as Ribolla Gialla, Refosco dal Peduncolo Rosso and Malvasia. Furthermore, the winery also grows international vines such as Merlot, Cabernet Sauvignon, Chardonnay and many others.

The philosophy of the Valpanera winery is based on the use of modern and sustainable production techniques, with particular attention to the care of the vineyards and the selection of the grapes. The winery's oenologist works with passion and dedication to produce wines that reflect the territory and authenticity of Friuli.

The wines of Cantina Valpanera are often appreciated for their freshness, aromatic complexity and elegance.

The Valpanera winery welcomes visitors for tastings and tours of the cellars, offering them the opportunity to discover the secrets of wine production and to savor the wines of the cellar in a welcoming and evocative environment.

The Valpanera winery stands out for its ability to combine the traditions of the great Friulian wines with innovation and attention to environmental sustainability. As a member of the SQNPI (National Integrated Production Quality System), the winery is committed to following sustainable agricultural practices and respecting the surrounding environment.

We are currently working to obtain a second sustainable certification and to bring our line of wines to vegan ok certification.

Name: Rocca di Castagnoli
Description:
The village of Castagnoli rises from the heart of the Chianti Classico, on a hill that was already well-known to the Etruscans: surrounded by woods, vineyards and olive groves, it dominates the valley from its lofty situation, taking the mind back to ancient times.
The farm extends over around 850 hectares, ranging in altitude from 380 metres to 860 metres. 72 hectares are given over to vineyards, with a prevalence of Sangiovese, the grape that forms the basis of the exellent Tuscan wines produced here.
In 1981 considerable restoration work was carried out to the house and castle, and innovative production criteria were applied to the vines and the cellar. A highly modern vinification cellar was created, while the cellars belonging to the medieval castle were given over to the aging in barrels made from the best French oak. This is where we aim to achieve wines of great personality, elegance, complexity and balance, to be enjoyed over time.
The geological characteristics of Castagnoli, with its deep soil rich in limestone and rock fragments, combined with a climate distinguished by a wide range of temperatures and a careful clonal selection of the grapes, hep us produce pleasing, elegant and complex wines with a structure and acidity that make them suitable for long agings. 
Some of these wines, like the Chianti Classico Rocca di Castagnoli, the Riserva Poggio a' Frati and our IGT Tocana or Supertuscans are very much sought after, both in the Chianti area itself as in the rest of Italy and abroad.

Name: Wines Connect Co. Ltd.

Based in Hong Kong/ China, Wines Connect is committed to providing wine lovers with knowledge of wines of different styles from different wine regions.  Through casual wine tasting or tutored workshop, participants will explore more of the hidden taste of wines and escalate the pleasure of enjoying wines.

In addition, Wines Connect also provides a wide range of services for different clientele - from wineries, wine distributors/ resellers, F&B operators, private collectors, to corporations/ individuals looking for wine event ideas or marketing & promotional activities.  

We could be your

* Marketing Communications Agency

No hassle, just throw us your problem, then we will bring you the solutions at affordable price.

Remember, Wines Connect is here to get you enjoy good wines, and good life.

"Wine connects the ancient and modern culture, lifestyle, the wonders of the Nature and science and arts of winemaking.  More important, wine brings people closer to one another - it enables us to have good time with friends and enjoyable life."
- Ms. Jennifer Luk, Wine Consultant, Wines Connect Co. Ltd. -

Description: Négociants en vins depuis 1900, les établissements BRUSINA-BRANDLER se spécialisent dans la distribution des Grands Crus de Bordeaux auprès de la restauration française et européenne, ainsi qu'auprès de 25.000 clients particuliers et institutionnels, parmi lesquels figurent la Présidence de la République, l'Hôtel Matignon, l'Assemblée Nationale, le Sénat et le Corps Diplomatique français.

Name: Saven
Description:
O projecto Lua Cheia-Saven resulta da paixão pela individualidade e o carácter  que os fundadores deste projecto, Manuel Dias e Francisco Baptista, mantêm com o Douro há mais de duas décadas. A Lua Cheia-Saven quer apresentar ao mundo o que de melhor se produz em Portugal. A paixão pelos vinhos começou no Douro, mas alastrou-se, mais tarde, por outras regiões.

A história da empresa começa em 2009 com a produção de vinhos brancos de Murça, Douro, uma área esquecida pelo progresso, mas que produz vinhos únicos com identidade própria, como os vinhos Secretum e o Andreza Códega do Larinho.

Em 2010, dá-se início ao investimento numa adega em Martim, Douro, e dois anos depois, no berço do Alvarinho, Sub-região Monção/Melgaço mais um investimento é efectuado numa adega e em duas Quintas: Carvalheira e Barqueira. Aqui se produz, por exemplo, o vinho Nostalgia. Foi também criada uma parceria exclusiva em Barcelos, região dos Vinhos Verdes, onde castas como o Loureiro, o Alvarinho e o Sauvignon Blanc foram plantadas. As marcas Maria Bonita e Maria Papoila nasceram aqui.

Em 2013 surge uma nova parceria no Alentejo, através da vinificação em adegas de terceiros, através da escolha e compra de uvas que pretendíamos da zona de Estremoz. A marca Album é o ex-libris desta região.

Em 2014 foi comprada a Quinta do Bronze, em Vale Mendiz no coração da região de Pinhão, onde se produzem as uvas que dão origem aos nossos melhores vinhos do Douro. A marca Quinta do Bronze faz jus à qualidade deste terroir. Será aqui que num futuro próximo surgirão os nossos Vinhos do Porto.

Em 2017, a Lua Cheia-Saven estendeu a sua presença em mais uma região, o Dão. Começou-se com um tinto, o vinho Insurgente, mas em breve nascerá um branco da casta Encruzado.
 
Desfrute dos nossos vinhos!

Name: Stefano Farina Wines
Description:
Tenute Stefano Farina is owner of five farms in Italy in three different Regions:

- North Italy:
* Piedmont - La Morra (Cuneo) - "Cascina La Traversa" where we produce Barolo DOCG and Barolo
  Riserva DOCG
* Piedmont - Diano d'Alba (Cuneo) - "Cascina San Quirico" where we produce Dolcetto di Diano d'Alba
  DOCG, Barbera d'Alba DOC, Nebbiolo d'Alba DOC, Langhe Rosso "Le Brume" DOC, "Silenzio" Barbera
  d'Alba DOC in barrique, Barbaresco DOCG, Moscato d'Asti DOCG and Langhe Chardonnay DOC.

- Center Italy
* Tuscany - Panzano in Chianti (Firenze) - "Fattoria Le Bocce" where we produce the most important Tuscany
   wines such as Chianti Classico DOCG, Chianti Classico Riserva DOCG, Super Tuscan Il Paladino Rosso
   Toscano IGT, Solers Rosso Toscano IGT, San Leolino Rosso Toscano IGT, VinSanto del Chianti Classico
   DOC
* Tuscany - Subbiano (Arezzo) - "Fattoria di Albereto" where we produce Chianti DOCG "La Ginestra", Super
   Tuscan "Sassaia" Sangiovese IGT, Passito "Passo Albereto" IGT, Late Harvest "Novembre" IGT

- South Italy
* Apulia - Salice Salentino (Lecce) - "Masseria La Rosa del Salice" where we produce Primitivo del Salento
   IGT, Salice Salentino DOC, Rosso del Salento "Donna Giovanna" IGT, Rosato del Salento IGT and Bianco
   del Salento IGT

Name: Touch Vodka
Description:
TOUCH Vodka is a Florida-based distillery that manufactures one artisan, ultra-premium vodka and three citrus-infused vodka selections. 
 
TOUCH’s artisan, ultra-premium vodka is known as the "liquid aphrodisiac." It is not flavored with honey but rather, it is uniquely distilled from Florida's finest, wildflower, blended honey and American grain - all under the careful care of our team of master distillers.  It is the only artisan, ultra-premium vodka that is made this way. We utilize traditional, old-world methods and state-of-the-art technology to ensure consistent quality and excellent taste. 
 
TOUCH also produces Key Lime, Valencia Orange and Ruby Red Grapefruit selections that are infused with natural oils of locally-sourced fruit which, results in unique, 80-proof vodkas with no added sugar or coloring.   As a result, these vodkas are not overpowering but are easily mixed with any juice or beverage.

Name: La Compagnia del Cavatappi
Description:
Il nome La Compagnia del Cavatappi nasce nel giugno 2006, quando l'azienda ha cercato di meglio identificarsi come operante nel campo della vendita dei vini. Inizialmente vendeva solo i prodotti delle regioni del sud Italia: Basilicata, Calabria, Puglia, Campania; in seguito, visto il crescere dell'attività e l'incremento delle vendite, ha deciso di trattare anche prodotti di altre regioni italiane. La ricerca continua di nuovi fornitori permette di ampliare l'offerta dei prodotti a catalogo.
Il sito lacompagniadelcavatappi.com è gestito da De Gusto di Maria Domenica D'Imperio, azienda a conduzione familiare. Si occupa della vendita vini online, Prodotti Tipici e di Gastronomia.
La Compagnia del Cavatappi ha sede a Lauria (PZ), in Basilicata, a pochi chilometri dall'uscita Lauria Sud dell'Autostrada Salerno-Reggio Calabria.

Name: Azienda Agricola Cottini Marco
Description:
La storia dell’Azienda Agricola Cottini Marco è una storia radicata nel tempo, nata agli inizi degli anni ’30 dalle sapienti mani del nonno che con la produzione delle prime bottiglie, destinate prevalentemente al consumo personale, diede inizio ad una lunga tradizione che portò la famiglia Cottini a fare della propria passione un vero e proprio lavoro come produttori di vino. Siamo a Fumane, nel cuore della Valpolicella, storica zona di produzione dell’Amarone Classico. L’azienda rispecchia l’identità di Marco che, insieme con la moglie Renata e la figlia Carlotta, gestisce con amore e dedizione tutte le fasi della filiera produttiva dando vita ai grandi classici della Valpolicella, concedendosi tuttavia il diletto di alcuni vini del Lago di Garda, leggeri e freschi, e di altri prodotti autoctoni. Ciò che davvero contraddistingue l’Azienda Cottini è la particolare attenzione per l’uva. Questo concetto, apparentemente banale, è in realtà il segreto dell’incredibile qualità dei vini Cottini Marco. 
Ogni buon vino non può che nascere da un grande vigneto!

Name: Lake Chelan Winery
Description: Located in the last privately owned apple packing shed in the valley, Lake Chelan Winery is the pioneer of the Lake Chelan Valley wine industry. The expansive grounds feature free tastings of our award-winning estate wines, a 3,000 square foot gift shop, working vineyards and winery tours. The BBQ in the Vineyard is open daily May through October. Relax and enjoy our famous BBQ and live music and dancing every Friday night with a bottle of estate wine in the heart of the vineyard. At Lake Chelan Winery, we show our appreciation to all of our customers by throwing the best parties and events in the valley and are always family friendly. The tasting room is open daily at 11am year round.

Name: Gino Pinto Inc.
Description: Gino Pinto Inc. was established in 1968 by Gino Pinto and is a family owned and operated business located in Hammonton, New Jersey. Gino Pinto Inc. imports winemaking equipment, juice, and grapes and distributes these products to our home winemaking and winery customers here in the U.S. Fresh Californian, Chilean, South African and Italian wine grape is transported to our warehouse facility in Hammonton where it is sold throughout the country.

Name: Original & Distinctive Limited
Description:
Original & Distinctive (O&D) is a discerning company that specialises in providing quality, niche premium fine wine and artisan drink products from small producers to: up-market hotels & restaurants, wine bars & private member clubs; select wine merchants & specialist shops; other fine wine wholesalers; private clients; and, an increasing number of discerning consumers who have an appetite for all things artisanal.

Aimed primarily at buyers who typically prefer ‘hand crafted’ drink products that are creative and stylish and, not readily available in the supermarkets chains, our carefully chosen portfolio includes a selection of quality products that are not commercially distributed in large quantities.

O&D source original & distinctive beverages - quality, niche premium fine wine and artisan drink products from small producers in France, Italy, Spain and the UK, including: Fine Wine, Grower Champagne, Premium Sparkling Wine, Original Still Wine, Craft Beer, Traditional Cider & Perry and Distinguished Spirits.

Suppliers to such respected up-market establishments as The Lanesborough hotel at Hyde Park, the Bleeding Heart restaurant & the Don wine bar in the City of London; we have also worked with select wine merchants & specialist shops; and, other fine wine wholesalers - such as Jeroboams Fine Wine & Champagne Merchants; The Sampler; and, Vanquish Wine of Mayfair.

Name: Covalent Spirits
Description:
Covalent Spirits is a distillery and tasting room with an experiential, educational, and experimental twist. Located 40 min from Baltimore and 75 min from DC, we are dedicated to bringing distilling back to Westminster, MD. In chemistry, "covalent" refers to a bond formed through sharing. That is the essence of our company -- bonding and connecting by sharing a drink, a memory, and a community. That is the "covalent spirit." 

Covalent Spirits will be producing a variety of spirits, experimenting with various techniques and flavor profiles. Our product line will include vodka, gin, liqueur, brandy, and whiskey (bourbon and rye).

We are targeting to open in spring 2022.

Name: Revel Wine California
Description:
In early 2008, Revel Wine was relaunched with the goal of representing a new generation of farmers and cider makers, winegrowers and winemakers, many of whom work with natural, organic or biodynamic practices in their vineyards and farms, and rely on spontaneous fermentations with wild yeasts. 

Over the past twelve years they have grown from a California focus to including wines from Oregon, Washington, New York, Vermont, Maryland, and Texas (as well as imports from Greece, Spain, Italy, France and Germany). In 2015 they added three American craft cider producers and have since grown this part of the portfolio to include other producers from California, Maryland, New York, and Vermont.

Name: Ciudad Condal GmbH
Description: We are a small Cava and Olive Oil business in Zurich, Switzerland. All our premium products are made by family owned companies in Cataluña.

Name: Cantine Campana s.r.l.
Description:
La passione per la vite ed il vino viene tramandata attraverso generazioni nella famiglia Campana, oggi moderne attrezzature consentono di controllare al meglio ciò che la natura cambia nei vari passaggi dall’uva al mosto, al vino alla bottiglia.
Le Cantine Campana sono situate ai piedi delle colline in posizione di favore, allo sbocco della Val d’Arda e della Val Chero; dalle pendici di queste valli provengono la maggior parte delle uve e dei vini prodotti.
La sincerità dei nostri vini e la corretta applicazione delle pratiche enologiche e dei controlli su tutto il processo di lavorazione, è la garanzia della soddisfazione dei nostri clienti che premia il nostro lavoro per un costante miglioramento.
Cantine Campana si impegna ogni giorno per far conoscere i suoi prodotti e la qualità in tutto il mondo.

Name: Sektkellerei Hans Sartor GmbH & Co KG
Description:
Founded as a typical german Sektkellerei over 80 years ago in Koblenz.
Nowadays, Sartor produces mainly wine, sparkling wine and wine based beverages. But, besides these products several kinds of other pressurized alcoholic as well as non-alcoholic beverages are developed and packaged at the Sartor facility in Polch (Germany-RLP). The Sartor team also develops and evaluates new concepts and is always focused on high efficient and quick decision paths.

Name: Global Wine Cellar
Description: GWC has one of the most extensive wine & sake selections in the region with over 5000 references from some of the finest and most sought after vineyards & breweries. We are now representing over 50 international-acclaimed brands names from regions and countries like the might of Burgundy, Alsace, Rhone Valley, Italy, Spain, Portugal, Australia, New Zealand, England & Japan.

Name: CASA SOLA WINERY
Description:
Casa Sola Winery is a boutique winery located in the western part of Chianti Classico, halfway between Florence and Siena in the subzone of San Donato in Poggio. With an unchanged passion, we have been producing wine and oil for three generations, encapsulating the warmth and authenticity of our land and expressing all the experience and dedication of our history.

Our passion for wine and oil is reflected in our commitment to organic cultivation. We respect the land and nature, adopting sustainable agricultural practices that result in quality products while fully respecting the environment.

We produce:
Chianti Classico DOCG, Chianti Classico Riserva DOCG, Chianti Classico Gran Selezione DOCG, IGT Toscana white and red, Vin Santo of Chianti Classico DOC, Supertuscan based on Cabernet and Merlot, Extra Virgin Olive Oil and balsamic dressing.

But we don’t stop at production alone: we also offer unforgettable oil and wine tourism experiences, inviting our guests to immerse themselves in the beauty of our estate and taste our wines in an authentic and welcoming environment.

We offer a range of services including cellar tours, guided tastings, vineyard walks, and panoramic picnics. With our authentic Tuscan hospitality and the breathtaking landscape that surrounds us, we guarantee an unforgettable experience for wine lovers and travel enthusiasts.

Through a network of importers and logistical partners, we are able to ship our products worldwide. If you want to learn more, contact us at info@fattoriacasasola.com

Name: Sources de L'Oppidum
Description:
Le domaine des Sources de l'Oppidum est situé en un lieu ancestral et immémorial, sous la protection d'un oppidum grec, celte puis romain.

A Gaujac, dans les Côtes du Rhône au coeur du Gard, le vignoble, d'un seul tenant, compte 19 hectares dont 15 plantés en vigne (AOP Côtes-du-Rhône et IGP Cévennes). Il se situe à 20 kms à l'ouest de Châteauneuf-du-Pape et à 15 kms au nord-est d'Uzès à une altitude de 100 mètres. Son sol sablo-limoneux, argileux avec galets et graves, est arrosé par des sources centenaires et confère à son vin un caractère frais.

Name: Beach House Winery
Description:
Beach House Winery is an award winning winery located on the ridgeline of the “Sleeping Indian” in South Morro Hills in Oceanside, California. Offering ocean and panoramic views of San Diego County, Beach House Winery is the first vineyard “Vigna al Mare” (Vineyard at the Sea) and winery established in this beautiful seaside community.
 
Our passion is providing fine wines produced with time-honored processes to be enjoyed with family and friends. 

Cheers!

Name: LA PART DES ANGES DISTILLATION
Description: LA PART DES ANGES DISTILLATION is a wine and spirits company based out of 29 IMPASSE CORNE DE CERF BELLEMENE, ST PAUL, France.
