Name: Adegas Castrobrey S.L.
Description:
Adegas Castrobrey, es una bodega familiar, actualmente dirigida por la tercera generación.
Una bodega diferente dentro de la D.O Rias Baixas.
, siendo la más interior de la D.O, situada en zona montañosa,  cuyo viñedo se encuentra en un valle a 100m sobre el nivel del mar y con una media anual de  2400 horas de sol,  1100ml/m2 de pluviometría, 14 grados de temperatura media y un 80% de humedad... una climatología atlántica.
Edafológicamente el suelo del viñedo está formado por arcilla, cuarzo y hierro, con la base de piedra de caldas (granito) que forma toda la cuenca del río Ulla hasta Villagarcía de Arosa. 
Se utiliza la "viticultura etrusca" mediante "emparrado" y con cepas de albariño, treixadura, Godello y caiño tinto de +de 60 años,  de las cuales se ha hecho  una selección masal , eligiendo 186 cepas, y así a partir de ellas se están creando las nuevas plantaciones.....para tener un total de 10 has propias (actualmente controla 8,9 Has que se reparten en 13 parcelas en las parroquias de Camanzo de abajo y de arriba.  7 parcelas están situadas al lado de la bodega y conforman 5,61 hectáreas, y otras 6 parcelas se reparten entre las parroquias de Añobre y Cira, conformando el resto de las Has. )....
Desde el año 2000 trabajamos con "cubierta vegetal" permanente, No se usan herbicidas ( ovejas), y se está basando en una viticultura sostenible y reforzando la biodiversidad del viñedo.
La bodega fue fundada en 1982, y  esta dentro de la D.O.Rias Baixas subzona del Ulla desde el año 2000. Sus viñedos están situados en los antiguos dominios del Convento de San Salvador de Camanzo....auténtica "viticultura monacal".
El vino emblema de la bodega es el SINPALABRAS castrobrey (Albariño de esas cepas más viejas) , después tenemos la COLECCIÓN SINPALABRAS con diferentes crianzas y elaboraciónes  , y los SINPALABRAS PARCELARIOS ....Y por último nuestros BOCABAJO castrobrey de Orujo, hierbas y cafe.

Name: Don Tomasi
Description:
Alle pendici dell’area archeologica del Monte Jato, a circa trenta chilometri da Palermo, in una terra assai fertile e generosa troviamo la Cantina Don Tomasi, nata nel 2004, dal grande legame con la propria terra dei Signori Terrasi, Ales, Gumina, Grippi e Riggio. La consapevolezza di dover offrire ad un mercato così impegnativo,  un prodotto di  grande qualità, ha reso sempre più tenace e vitale l’impegno degli imprenditori che hanno nella passione e nella dedizione la propria caratteristica principale. L’Azienda si trova ad un’altitudine media di 350 m s.l.m., i cui vigneti sono allevati a spalliera con densità per ettaro di 4000-5000 piante. La tipologia dei terreni è di medio impasto e sabbiosi. I vigneti , accuratamente seguiti da tecnici competenti, sono coltivati con metodi bio-compatibili, controllati e certificati . La raccolta viene evasa manualmente e posizionata in cassette di plastica. La cantina , la cui capacità è di hl 2.500, è dotata delle più avanzate tecnologie per la vinificazione, la maturazione e l’invecchiamento dei vini,; essi passano dalla pressa a polmone alle barriques in legno di Allier, alle modernissime macchine per l’imbottigliamento. Tali processi, studiati e seguiti ad ogni step, fanno si che il prodotto finito, pronto per il consumatore, sia di ottima qualità e che vada a posizionarsi in un target di riferimento elevato.
La vitalità, l’intraprendenza e la capacità imprenditoriale dei giovani produttori, titolari della cantina, ha consentito di mettere a punto un’azienda dinamica il cui obiettivo certo è quello di coniugare l’alta qualità del prodotto alle sempre crescenti esigenze di un mercato sempre più impegnativo ma esigente e competente.

Name: Furthermore Wines
Description:
We are obsessed with Pinot Noir...

We are fortunate to collaborate with the best coastal growers throughout California to create single vineyard designate wines that demonstrate the nuances of each site as well as Pinot Noir's breadth of expression in California.  We hope that you enjoy our pinot as much as we do.

Name: the3bottles
Description:
Our main business is to provide UK wine producers with the tools and techniques to increase their direct to consumer sales – online, in the tasting room, at the cellar door and more.

We build websites designed to sell wine for you (not just to show how clever we are!) Usability and best practice in online selling are at the hear of everything we do.

We know that people are at different stages of their journey and have different internal resources available.  Wherever you are on your marketing journey, we’ll help you get a few steps further up, in a way that adapts to your needs and is always supportive.

Of course the harder you work your website the better it will deliver – we often describe our role as that of building the racing car and yours to drive it.

Included with our websites is 2 weeks of hand-holding. We’ll be by your side as much as you need us, every step of the way. All included in the price.

Name: Torii Mor Winery
Description: Torii Mor was established in the premier Dundee Hills wine regions as one of the first commercial vineyards in the Pacific NW.   The LEED certified winery with a zen flair produces premium old-growth Pinot Noir, Chardonnay, Rose', Pinot Gris, Port and other classic wines and operates an estate tasting with stunning views of the Willamette Valley and a charming Woodinville, Washington tasting room.

Name: Heartland Wines
Description:
At Heartland we talk lovingly of our vines and soil, of our hard work and attention to detail and of the time taken in barrel and bottle to make the wines we offer. But what does it all mean? What is it all for? The end result is all that matters. It is that moment when you open a bottle of Heartland and discover all those sensations we have strived to include. It is the moment when the aromas, the texture and the flavours combine to fill your senses so you can taste it from where you are. Savouring the IT that we are all so passionate about.

The Heartland story began in the late 1990’s when winemaker Ben Glaetzer became excited about the outstanding quality of fruit being grown in some of South Australia’s lesser-known regions, in particular Langhorne Creek (https://www.wineaustralia.com/discover-australian-wine/south-australia-wines/langhorne-creek)
Together with industry veterans, Scott Collett, Grant Tilbrook and more recently Nick Keukenmeester, they have grown Heartland into an award-winning winery. Today Heartland sources all of its fruit exclusively from Langhorne Creek and makes only red wines.

Name: Domaine les Hautes Briguières
Description:
Le Domaine « Les Hautes-Briguières » est situé dans le Vaucluse à Mormoiron, petit village sur le versant sud du Mont Ventoux .

Le Domaine d’une superficie de 42 hectares, a la particularité d’avoir des terres sur 2 terroirs différents : à Mormoiron sur une colline de 350 mètres d’altitude et à Blauvac sur des terrains argilo-calcaire. Les parcelles de vigne bénéficient d’un ensoleillement maximum .

La géologie du site est typique de la région Provence : un sol d’argile et de calcaire avec des parcelles disposées en terrasses .

Notre famille pratique une Agriculture variée, ainsi notre exploitation est représentative des différentes productions que l’on peut rencontrer en Provence et sur le pourtour méditerranéen : huile d’olive , cerises  et raisins muscat

Name: Groskopf Warehouse & Logistics
Description:
For the past 35 years, the Groskopf team has served the wine and beverage industry's trucking, warehousing, and logistical needs. We are committed to personalized customer service and implement the best quality assurance to creatively meet our customers' requirements.

We offer full-service storage, consolidation, and distribution of wine and spirits from our facility strategically located to accommodate California, Oregon, and Washington wine-producing regions, as well as the import-export market through the San Francisco Bay ports and interstate highways.

Name: Truvino
Description:
Truvino takes pride in creating and distributing premium quality wine and spirits for an affordable price. All of our wines are carefully created and selected to fulfill the needs of our New Jersey market. 
-------------------------------------------
Blu Prosecco
Vita Bella 
Costa Bella 
Kyle Cellars
Vodka Z 
Glen Silver Scotch 
San Nicola 
Grandmas Sangria 
Good Fucking Wine 
1405 Premium Gluten Free Vodka

Name: Global Wine Export
Description:
Global Wine Export is a U.S. based wine exporter that sells wholesale premium wines to distributors in countries worldwide. We export Syrah, Chardonnay, Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Pinot Noir, Pinot Gris, Riesling and many others. 

Our wines are grown in the premium wine-growing areas of the Western United States, including Oregon, Washington and California. With temperate summers, warm days and cool nights, these regions have ideal climate and soil to grow premium grapes and produce the finest wines in America.

Name: Matador Vodka, LLC
Description: Spirits Company located and distilled in Louisiana, distributed by Republic National Distributing Company (RNDC).

Name: Golden Ram Imports
Description: Golden Ram Imports was founded by Sylvia Golden and Michael Ramsey to deliver food-friendly wines from around the Globe. Each of our wines is carefully selected to be a perfect match with food. In addition, we are the exclusive importer of wines bearing the "Wine4Food" seal. These wines are great discoveries curated by a team of food and wine experts. Here at Golden Ram our dedicated team works hand-in-hand to demystify the wine buying experience. Join us and discover the gems Golden Ram Imports has waiting for you!

Name: SanLorenzo
Description:
SanLorenzo is an authentic family winery in Montalcino, Tuscany, dedicated to Brunello di Montalcino and to the pure voice of Sangiovese.

Our work begins in the vineyard, where careful farming and respect for each vintage guide every decision. In the cellar, we favor precision and balance over excess, crafting wines that are expressive today and built to evolve with time.
Our portfolio includes Rosato, Rosso di Montalcino, Brunello di Montalcino, and Brunello di Montalcino Bramante. Each label is a different perspective on the same place, with a clear focus on elegance, texture, and longevity.

We welcome visitors for tastings and winery experiences by appointment, offering a warm and informative way to discover our wines, our cellar, and the Montalcino landscape that shapes them.

From our family to your table, SanLorenzo shares the authenticity of Montalcino, one bottle at a time.

Name: Hospitality Gin
Description:
Gin with a purpose

We’re using 100% of our profits to support the UK hospitality industry and its employees until the COVID-19 pandemic is over.

Back our crowdfunder and pre-order your bottle now:
bit.ly/hospogin

Name: Amorosso Fine Wines
Description:
Amorosso Fine Wines source the wines from both finest premium and boutique family-owned wineries directly from the country of origin.

We represent over 50 wineries around the world with exclusivity in Hong Kong & Macau.

Name: Shelter Distilling
Description:
Crafting Adventure in the Heart of the Mountain West 
 
Nestled in the heart of the Mountain West, Shelter Distilling is a testament to the fusion of tradition, innovation, and an adventurous spirit. Our roots run deep in the untamed beauty of towering granite peaks and alpine meadows, where we harness nature's bounty, from pure alpine snowmelt water to Heirloom Blue Corn and grains harvested across the American West. 
 
As a purpose-driven distillery, we passionately commit to innovation and progress, crafting a diverse array of one-of-a-kind spirits, including whiskey, bourbon, gin, agave, canned cocktails, and craft beer. Each creation boasts unforgettable flavors that mirror the breathtaking nature surrounding us. 
Guided by our adventurous hearts, we blend traditional distilling principles with modern techniques and a hearty dose of experimentation, resulting in unique and bold flavors that capture the essence of an outdoor lifestyle well-lived. Passion fuels our purpose, and the quality of our spirits reflects the dedication we bring to every bottle. We invite you to embark on a sensory journey where tradition meets innovation, and the spirit of the Mountain West comes alive in every sip at Shelter Distilling.

Shelter Distilling is a craft Distillery, Brewery, and Kitchen with locations in Mammoth Lakes, CA, and Montrose, CO. Founded in the spirit of adventure, Shelter blends innovation with tradition to create high-quality spirits, beer, and food. Our restaurants and bars are open daily, offering a welcoming space for the community to gather, enjoy handcrafted drinks, and experience bold flavors.

GET LOST. SEEK SHELTER.

Name: Casa da URRA
Description:
The Casa da Urra is located at the heart of a 180 – hectare estate near the picturesque hamlet of Urra, overlooking the delightful city of Portalegre. It is situated in an attractive location among vineyards, pasture for sheep and montado or dehesa landscape, in the Alto Alentejo region, not far from the Spanish frontier. The house, originally in a state of ruin, was completely renovated by a couple of art and lovers, doctors by profession.

The Casa da Urra wine-making undertaking, launched in 2007, was later extended to agritourist and wine tourism, offering a wide range of recreational and leisure activities: a pool with views of the city and the hills, a gym, a tennis court, a children’s playground, a library, a meeting room, a multi-purpose room, a picnic area, visits to vineyards, the orchards and the poultry fram, as well as hunting excursions, wine-tasting, horse-riding, rambling and cycling are just some of the options available.

Name: Azienda Agricola Olivetta
Description:
The Olivetta winery is situated amongst the rolling hills of the Monferrato.
 Since four generations, we produce and bottle our own wine, following the tradition that ensures high quality.
…..Every time you open one of our bottles, we hope you will rediscover and remember the land that is at the heart of such a ‘divine’ product…

Name: CHATEAU FONT BARRIELE
Description: Si la terrasse rhodanienne de galets roulés qui abrite notre vignoble pouvait parler, elle raconterait certainement l’histoire d’une famille de vignerons qui, depuis 4 générations, tente patiemment d’extraire de ce terroir l’expression délicate et puissante d’un vignoble séculaire, fils de la méditerranée. A la préservation du patrimoine vigneron s’ajoute la protection de l’outarde canepetière, espèce d’oiseau protégée, nichée en plein cœur de nos vignes, dans la zone Natura 2000. A la charnière des appellations Costières de Nîmes et Côtes du Rhône, à la convergence d’Arles, de Nîmes et d’Avignon, le château Font Barrièle est un joyau discret au cœur d’un trésor d’Histoire.

Name: Compass Wines
Description:
The secret is out, Seattle's best wine shop isn't in Seattle!  Instead we're 80 miles north in Anacortes Washington.  As easy as a few clicks, we'll have your wine delivered via UPS or FEDEX, easier than driving across town.  Being voted Seattle's best wine shop in 2016 was a huge honor, and we're proud to continue bringing you our great selection of boutique Washington wines as well as, what some would say, the greatest selection of wines around. 

From Washington Cabernets to the Syrahs of the South African Swartland, we've got you covered.  Compass Wines is known for its selection of rare and hard to find wines from both Washington and the world.  So dive into our cellar and see our great selection of wines.  If you can't find what you're looking for, or have questions, feel free to call or email us, we'd be happy to assist you.

Name: I Vini di Valentina
Description:
Sélection de vins italiens artisanaux, des domaines familiales qui respectent l'authenticité de leurs produits depuis de générations.
I vini di Valentina" est aujourd'hui une grande réalité d’importation et distribution de vins italiens sur le territoire français. Toujours attentive à la recherche de qualité, la société sélectionne et distribue des vins bio, des vins biodynamiques et des vins naturels, produits uniques qui reflètent au mieux le terroir italien.

Name: Thinking Outside the Bottle
Description:
Thinking Outside the Bottle is a classic storytelling website, plus. We offer writing and communication services for the drinks industry. We also have a features section on the site where write about the people and places that inspire us and aren’t reaching consumers through traditional media outlets.  

We also offer writing and communication services for the drinks industry

Name: Château des Arras
Description:
Bâti au XVe siècle en tant que fort militaire, le château s’est transformé au fil des ans pour devenir un lieu de production idéal pour les vins de Bordeaux. Son vignoble d’un seul tenant de 21 hectares est clos par un mur d’enceinte de 3 kms, unique pour la région.

La famille Rozier vieille sur cet écrin depuis 1899. Depuis 2013 la jeune génération s'investit sur le domaine familial.
Anne-Cécile Rozier, forte des ses expériences professionnelles, a rejoint la propriété en septembre 2013 pour prendre en charge la partie technique de vignobles. En septembre 2014 c'est au tour de Marie-Caroline Rozier de rejoindre la propriété pour y apporter son expérience dans la communication et la commercialisation. 
Toutes les deux ont bénéficiés du savoir-faire et de l’expérience de leur maman Claudine Rozier, qui a beaucoup œuvré à la notoriété des vins du château. 

Les vins sont produits de manière traditionnelle avec passion. Afin d’en garantir la qualité toutes les étapes, de la vinification jusqu'au conditionnement final, sont effectuées à la propriété. 
Nos vins:
- Le Rosé des Arras
- La cuvée Gaïa - Bordeaux  blanc
- La cuvée Rhéa - Bordeaux Supérieur Rouge
- La cuvée Traditionnelle - Bordeaux Supérieur Rouge
- La cuvée Prestige - Bordeaux Supérieur Rouge
- La cuvée Elles - Bordeaux Supérieur Rouge

Médaillés tous les ans depuis 1980

Le château continue d’évoluer grâce à la jeune génération qui vient apporter ses idées, son dynamisme et continue à faire du château un vrai espace d’accueil et de convivialité.

Name: All-Vaso Delivery de Bebidas
Description: Somos una plataforma segura, fácil y práctica, donde puede comprar una amplia variedad de bebidas alcohólicas, cervezas, coolers, botanas y más, tu aplicación de alcohol a domicilio. Todo lo que necesita para su fiesta, reunión o evento, lo entregamos en menos de 30 minutos.

Name: Cellier Wine Tanks
Description:
Manufacturers of premium concrete wine tanks in Cape Town South Africa
 
Hand crafted tanks with superior functionality and unparalleled aesthetics

World wide shipping available

Name: Wine Marketing Group
Description:
Wine Marketing Group is a brand development and full-service marketing agency focused on the beverage sector. We create effective market positioning for wine brands using thorough research, evocative storytelling, unforgettable experiences, and captivating design.

What we do
Strategy is in our DNA, it drives us to select and implement the ideal marketing solution for each individual brand. It all starts with a full analysis of the brand strengths and the competitive landscape. We offer the following services: branding, social media, brand positioning for U.S.distribution, influencer marketing, email campaigns, public relations, print and digital design, customer relationship management, and event planning. Our worldwide reach and deep connections in the wine industry enable us to position your brand to not only get distribution but to build awareness and sell to consumers worldwide.

Name: PEI|TASTING|TOURS
Description:
Our one of a kind premium Tasting & Tours company showcase’s Prince Edward Islands finest artisanal Craft Beer & Cider Brewers, Vintners, and Distillers.
PEI|TASTING|TOURS offers unique memorable experiences, that showcase the often-hidden beauty and culture of Prince Edward Island. We take pride in being a locally run tour company that provides guests with exceptional experiences and great memories. Our tour guides are super friendly, energetic and happy to meet and guide guests from around the world. We are more than just a transportation service! We are professional and experienced certified tour guides. We are committed to ensuring that your experience exceeds your expectations by delivering service, value and topnotch quality.
With the increase of online events, we have been catering to our guests via LIVE Virtual Experiences. Virtual Cocktail hours offer a way for you and your family, friends, or teams, to come together when the world can't come to Prince Edward Island.

Name: Brothers In Arms Vineyards
Description:
Brothers in Arms vineyards is the home to the oldest officially recorded Cabernet Sauvignonin the world. In 1891 two acres of Caberent Sauvignon and two acres of Shiraz,which today make our flagship wines-brohters in arms. These were planted by William Formby, the great-great grandfather of today's owner Guy Adams...and the reasoning behind our Formby & Adams label. Guy and his wife Liz have two children who represent the sixth generation of the family to live on the estate - now you know why we have the No.6 and Sixth Generation labels!! Today the estate is over 750 actares enjoys a maritime climate - mild to warm days with cooling afternoon sea breezes and often chilly evenings ensure our wines retain flavour, elegance and softness - balance, structure and texture.

澳洲兄弟酒庄是世界上有记录的最古老的赤霞珠之家。早在1891年，威廉芳碧先生在庄园种下了第一批赤霞珠和设拉子各2英亩，今日用于酿造老树兄弟系列葡萄酒。如今酒庄由家族第五代传人盖.亚当斯掌管，为了让子孙后代记住庄园创始人威廉芳碧，他创立了芳碧&亚当斯品牌,他于太太利兹育有一儿一女，为了庆贺第六代的诞生和对第六代的美好憧憬，他创立了第六代和兄妹品牌以示对子女的鼓励和期望。兄弟酒庄拥有750英亩葡萄园，坐拥海洋性气候，白天艳阳高照温暖柔和，午后微微细风，夜晚凉爽，这些先天自然条件赋予葡萄健康成长酿造果味丰富，口感优雅柔和，结构平衡，酒体丰润，层次丰富的葡萄酒

Flgship wine/旗舰酒: Brothers In Arms / 兄弟老树系列
Labels/自有品牌：Brothers In Arms /兄弟老树系列; No.6兄妹系列；Formby & Adams芳碧.亚当斯系列； 6 Generation第六代； Killibinbin思你冰冰；, Formby's Run枫派；HD Adams青花神韵

Name: At Lolo’s
Description: Sometimes, it’s hard to slow down and make time for real conversations with friends on a Friday night. We’ve simplified the cocktail-making process and added our thought-provoking questions directly onto the label, so you can enjoy great drinks and meaningful moments at home, surrounded by the people who matter most.

Name: Fine West China
Description:
Fine West International Trade was established in Chengdu, the food capital of China, in 2014. We are a professional importer specializing in global fine and rare wines. As one of the leading wine trade companies, we have cooperated with more than a thousand importers and distributors in China, assisting them with selecting, purchasing and transporting products.

Our Vision: to make liquor and beverage trade super easy. We sincerely look forward to long-term steady business partnership with global fine wine merchants and wineries.

Our Team: 50-200 people, including experienced wine experts with ISG, WSET-3 and WSET diploma, offer professional insights and advice on selecting wines. Our supply chain management team provides international wine logistics service for Chinese clients, able to directly import products overseas. We ensure the complete closed loop of “selecting wines”, “purchasing wines” and “transporting and finishing custom clearance” for international trade, to make everything convenient and buy what you have seen. 

Our Channels: we have mature market channels and business partners ranging from elite hotels, fine restaurants/cafeterias, private customers, fine wine shops, wholesalers to retailers in China.

Our Warehouses: located in Shanghai, Chengdu and Hong Kong with air conditioning to ensure the products quality, covering fast and reliable logistics all over China.

Name: Paradocx Vineyard Llc
Description: Paradocx Vineyard Llc is a Wine and Spirits company located in 1699 Fairville Rd, Chadds Ford, Pennsylvania, United States.

Name: Qvevri Wine Georgia
Description:
Qvevri Wine Georgia is family owned and women-led wine distribution company that brings Georgian wine to California, we import the wine from Georgia and sell it DTC and wholesale. We support winemakers that have been making wine for ages and with the same traditions as 8000 years ago. 
Our mission is to introduce the great heritage that Georgia has — its Wine.

Name: Misty Mountains - Georgian Chacha
Description:
The Misty Mountains brand symbolizes the essence of Georgian Chacha, originating from the pristine Caucasus Mountains. 

The Chacha Reserve, crafted from a blend of Saperavi and Tavkveri grape varieties, undergoes a meticulous ageing process of 16 months in oak barrels, resulting in a refined and distinctive character.

Name: WineSur
Description:
Empresa argentina especializada en la Comunicación del sector vitivinícola y Turismo del Vino. WineSur opera desde el año 2007 y trabaja con las bodegas e instituciones más importantes del país.
WineSur tiene el compromiso de ser la ventana de los vinos argentinos en el mundo y el nexo de hacia el turismo vitivinícola.

Name: Mmmm...Enjoy. Wines
Description:
Premium, Award-Winning Italian Wine and Lifestyle Brand making life's moments effortlessly enjoyable.

With expressive flavors, fun, holographic labels, interactive QR codes and more, we help anyone feel confident walking down the wine aisle and grabbing a bottle of Premium Italian Wine.

*No Unnatural Additives  *Low Sugar  *Vegan-Friendly  *Gluten-Free  *Chicago, Women-Owned

Prosecco DOC Extra Dry Millesimato - 87 Points, USA Wine Ratings
Prosecco Rosé DOC Brut Millesimato - Silver, Global Sparkling Masters
Pinot Grigio Delle Venezie DOC
Rosé Venezia Giulia IGT

Must be of legal drinking age; always drink responsibly.

Name: Kandowater
Description:
Kando c'est une jeune entreprise québécoise située au Centre-du-Québec.
Notre but : offrir LA solution à la consommation d’eau contenue dans des bouteilles de plastique!

Name: BODEGAS GUIMARA
Description:
Bodegas Guimara offers a splendid range of Spanish quality wines.

Our wines come from Spain’s top wine-growing regions and all of them carry the ‘DO’ quality label (Denominación de Origen). 

Bodegas Guimara is a registered trademark of BRUSIL.

Name: Chiselled Grape Winery, LLC
Description:
Wineries have been blending different grape varieties into complex fusions for as long as they have been bottling this delightful, fermented fruit.  But, knowing that there was so much more to be discovered, we longed for a wine experience unlike any other. We wanted to experience the marriage of a mysterious and enchanting cold-weather grape from New York with the romance of France’s fruit. We wanted to taste the beautiful depth of an Italian harvest, the seduction of a Chilean grape, and the mystery of Australian soil, artfully mingling in one beautiful glass of vino. We sought to craft flavors that complemented each other in ways no one had ever discovered before. We wanted more than complex, more than balanced. We wanted magnificent. We knew that to discover this magnificent experience, we would have to carve it out ourselves. So we did, and Chiselled Grape Winery was born.

The Wine Makers
Harald Tomesch and Allan Haas, the founders of The Chiselled Grape Winery, have known each other for what feels like a lifetime.  But, long before Harald and Allan came together to make wine, they were both inspired by Jazz music. Reveling in improvisation, fusion and the unexpected, their love and appreciation for the elusive art that is Jazz music has proved to be very much alive in their wine-making philosophy.

Name: Rétha Spiritueux
Description:
Rétha puise son inspiration sur le  littoral atlantique pour créer des spiritueux à l’identité océanique. 
Fondée il y a sept ans avec une vodka unique à base de pommes de terre primeurs de l'Île de Ré, Rétha s'est depuis spécialisée dans des spiritueux innovants. 
Les créations, telles que les gins aux algues et les alcools d'algues « yodise «, reflètent l'engagement à valoriser les matières premières maritimes. Venez découvrir l'essence du terroir océanique !

Name: Le Caveau Bugiste
Description: Wine producer in Bugey, le Caveau Bugiste is recognized for the quality and diversity of its wines.

Name: Copenhagen Wine
Description:
Copenhagen Wine focus on high-end wine trading.
Main market is currently Denmark.
Ecologic and biodynamic wines are the ground stone of the company philosophy.

Name: Campo del Monte
Description:
This winery is totally managed by our family. We have been producing high quality wine and Extra-Virgin olive oil since 1978. 
Our main production is wine: we make 8 different labels, two white wines, five red wines and one Vin Santo. Our wine making is included in Chianti DOCG and Valdarno di Sopra DOC's area.
We also produce Extra-Virgin olive oil and hazelnuts.

Name: Turatello Italia Spa
Description:
Primary Italian Firm, leader in the beverage, operates in the Italian market since 35 years through a network made up of more than 100 salesmen and able to deliver also 5 beer boxes everywhere. 
Communication through traditional media as: radio, placarding, fairs, advertising pages on both specialised and non specialised reviews, thematic parties.
Among its most important brands: Bière Du Demon, Oberdorfer, Foster’s, König Pilsener, Bulldog, Slalom.

Name: Old Humble Distilling Company
Description:
The Old Humble Distilling Company is an award winning whiskey distillery. We are based in Humble, Texas and distribute whiskey throughout the world. Our Boomtown Bourbon has been featured in music videos and is the centerpiece of a new feature length movie currently in development. Our Straight Whiskey and Special Reserve have both been featured in a James Bond profile. Finally, our Double Oak Straight Rye has been mentioned in several articles and podcasts discussing the resurgence of craft rye. All of these whiskeys have won awards from London to San Francisco and they’re just the beginning of what we’re working on.
We are currently distributed across the state of Texas and in 43 additional states across the country and internationally. We’re always seeking new retail partners and looking to expand our physical retail footprint on the ground.

Name: Narcisi Winery
Description: Narcisi Winery is a facility combining winemaking traditions with modern technology. All grapes are harvested and processed with stainless steel equipment and tanks. The winery's process is focused on naturally preserving the true character of the grape through the use of minimal filtration and the addition of a few sulfites and other preservatives.

Name: Foyt Winery & Museum
Description:
Founded in 2008, each of our wine offerings produced is labeled with a number and story that's significant to A.J. Foyt's career, either a car number (his famous No. 14 was the first) or a year in which Foyt won an important race. These stories are designed to help people learn, respect and acknowledge what A.J. Foyt has accomplished and what his name means to American motorsports, the Indy 500 and its fans.

We craft our wines from small vineyard selections in Napa Valley and Sonoma County. Our wines are produced in a style born from the same passion that reflects our heritage; bold, expressive and smooth. Our passion is to provide exceptional wines to be shared with your friends and family creating memories of happiness that stand the test of time.

Our Fredericksburg, Texas location will be opening April 2021!

Name: JARDESCA California Aperitiva
Description:
Jardesca California Aperitiva is our botanically infused, all-natural, low alcohol aperitif that marries 10 botanicals with a blend of 3 artisanal California wines. We created Jardesca to be a light, delicious and quintessentially Californian alternative to European aperitifs.

Made to be served over ice, we think Jardesca is perfect before meals, with brunch and for easy entertaining.

Name: BordeauxWinesUK
Description: Promoting the modern reds, dry whites, rosés, sparkling and sweet wines of Bordeaux in the UK

Name: Vinizi
Description:
Ateliers de dégustation de vin à Orléans, présentés et organisés de façon conviviale et ludique.

Les animations œnologiques ont lieu à votre domicile, ou sur le lieu de votre choix à l’occasion d’un événement (mariage, fête des voisins, anniversaire, EVG/EVJF, séminaire, team building, etc…).


Nous avons créé Vinizi afin d’aller à la rencontre d’amateurs de vins, partager nos connaissances, nos trouvailles et notre vision de ce milieu de découvertes et plaisir.
Notre objectif ? Apporter les vignes, le fruit du travail des vignerons et le terroir jusqu’à vous !

Charlotte est diplômée du WSET (Wine and Spirit Education Trust) et du CCAVF (Certification des Connaissances Avancées des Vins de France), elle parcourt la France et les territoires viticoles du monde pour dénicher des pépites de petits (et moins petits) vignerons. Simon est issu d'une formation en management touristique international, il gère aux côtés de Charlotte les réservations et le développement de notre structure.

Name: Black Sears Vineyards and Winery
Description: Black Sears, a family-owned-and-operated vineyard and winery, produces 100%-varietal, estate-grown wines crafted in small lots: highest elevation Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Franc, and Zinfandel from the Napa Valley's famed Howell Mountain region.

Name: Monte Carlo Wines
Description:
Born in 2020, Monte Carlo Wines is the story of a group of friends who share a passion for the excitement and glamour of Monte Carlo and a love for the quality of Provence Rosé. Endorsed by the Monaco Principality, we are thrilled to introduce and bring our Monte Carlo wine collection to you.

Our MC Prestige is produced from our beautiful vineyard on the slopes of the Cadière d’Azur, Provence’s smallest and most prestigious region. Our vines have over 3000 hours of sunshine annually, which is essential for ripening the grapes and improving the following year's quality. Sea breezes from the valley of Saint-Côme keep the grapes cool and dry. This micro-climate is what makes our Prestige cuvée such a unique gastronomic rose.

Originating from an old family vineyard in the Bandol region, we work with rigorous quality controls whilst respecting the bio-dynamic cycle of the vine, all learnt from previous generations of vignerons. The Bandolais region is spoilt by nature, which is one of the reasons we like to work with the bio-dynamic cycle as we protect our environment and harness the energy from nature.

It is crucial not to forget the significant ingredient: “our friend, the Mourvèdre grape”  This black variety, with its complexity, structure and full-bodied characters, gives the Prestige Cuvee its unique character and longevity.

Name: Best Wines of Belgium - Beste Belgische Wijn - Meilleur Vin Belge
Description:
Jaarlijkse verkiezing Beste Belgische Wijn
Election annuelle Meilleur Vin Belge
Annual election Best Belgian Wine
A contest of quality 
An organisation of Vereniging Vlaamse Sommeliers

Name: PV - Kaffe & Cocktails
Description:
Hos PV - Kaffe & Cocktails får du en god oplevelse når du tørster efter en god kop kaffe , en lækker cocktail , eller festlig stemning!

Få mere info: 

Website: Pustervig.dk
Facebook: PV - Kaffe & Cocktails 
Instagram: PV - Kaffe & Cocktails

Name: ZeeWijn
Description:
Over Us
The company  was born with the objective of bringing the best products from Portugal to the World. With its great grape production capacity, Portugal has a wide variety of types of wines spread across the country, divided into thirteen producing regions, producing a very wide variety and quality wines and recognized worldwide.

 Today our services are initially focused on the Netherlands and Belgian, where in this material we will present our suppliers and products, all products certified and approved in Portugal, we have already started the release with the local market, in order to streamline distribution.

 The principle of our work is the trust and responsibility to make commitments and honor them, with a varied range of products and with very attractive prices, we would like to present the best of Portugal.

 With a unique aroma and very recognized all over the world, we at Importugal decided to serve as a link between these great producers and companies, in order to bring the best Portuguese wine.

Name: GRUP TESI
Description:
GRUP TESI 
Antiga casa de Tesi Mascarell.
Grup Tesi es una de las principales distribuidoras de vinos, cavas, licores y destilados de Cataluña.
Fundada en 1965 por Umbert Tesi, actualmente está dirigida por la segunda generación, en estos 50 años dedicados a la distribución hemos trabajado con las principales marcas y bodegas, manteniendo clientes entre los restaurantes y locales de ocio más representativos de la ciudad. 
Disponemos en Granollers de nuestra nave logística y centro de distribución con más de 3000m2 destinados a mantener un gran stock que junto a  nuestra propia flota de reparto nos permite un servicio de entrega de pedidos rápido y eficaz.
En la Calle Princesa, en el cosmopolita Barri del Born se encuentra nuestra tienda especializada, con una amplia muestra de vinos, cavas, destilados, generosos y una de las líneas destinadas exclusivamente para coctelería y bartenders.
Grup Tesi siempre ha liderado el sector creando el CLUB BARTENEDER de BARCELONA un espacio exclusivo para los mejores profesionales y Coctelerias.

Name: Folicello Società Agricola S.s.
Description: Il Folicello è una azienda vitivinicola biologica a conduzione familiare di Castelfranco Emilia (Modena), costituita da Marco e Antonella nel 1980. Al Folicello produciamo vini autoctoni senza solfiti aggiunti e succhi d'uva biologici di qualità.

Name: TRUMAN VODKA
Description:
TRUMAN is a 100% Organic sipping Vodka that is a true farm to table spirit. 
We grow, harvest, and hand-select our Organic Wheat, and source Alpine spring water from the heart of Austria. The incredibly soft texture of the Organic Wheat combined with the low calcium, low sodium Alpine spring water, contributes to the astounding mouthfeel of Truman. 

We are committed to a truly authentic and clean Vodka. Thats why we never add any sugars, additives or glycerin. 

We copper pot distill 3 times, with each separate phase carefully monitored and maintained to ensure that perfection and balance has been reached. The invaluable advantage of home-grown ingredients, up cycled water, custom built systems, and self-sufficient energy have directly impacted our commitment to being carbon neutral and sustainable.

Embodying the narrative of what it means to be true to yourself. We aim to spark a desire in those who drink Truman, one that will ignite the passion to not be afraid of breaking stereotypes, and norms, that will instead allow them to feel confident and comfortable with who they are, and who they are choosing to create memories with.

Truman is a brand that poses the question, what is a True (Hu)man? 

Anyone can be a Truman if they remain true to themselves. 

Pease sip responsibly.

Name: CAPEL VALE WINES
Description: Capel Vale has been crafting intensely fruit driven, powerful yet elegant wines from the cool regions of Western Australia since 1974. Family owned, Capel Vale has established mature vineyards in Geographe, Pemberton, Mt Barker and Margaret River, and produces wines that reflect the distinct climate and soils of each region.

Name: Hillerød Vinklub
Description:
Det begyndte som en sjov ide blandt Hillerød-venner, og nu er Hillerød Vinklub en realitet. 

Vi vil sammen med medlemmerne arbejde for lækre vine i glasset, gode fælles indkøb og en masse hyggelige stunder for alle Hillerøds vinelskere.

Name: Tequilart Inc. Montreal
Description:
Tequilart Montréal is a 
Commercial agency authorized by  SAQ 
(Societé des alcools du Québec)
and the LCBO, (Liquor Control 
Board of Ontario). We are specialized in representing and
Promoting  Latin American Beer, Wine and Spirits . Our products stand out by their quality and their designation of origin.

Name: Ledgestone Vineyards Winery and Tasting Room
Description: The vineyard and tasting room is located in Greenleaf, Wisconsin was established in 1999 by two passionate wine lovers. It sits on a 15 acre property with 10 acres of planted vines and a beautiful tasting room and winery. In 2017, winemaker's Adam Magnuson and Katrina Cegledi began to write their chapter in LedgeStone's history by purchasing the property.

Name: HUNTER LAING & COMPANY LIMITED
Description: HUNTER LAING & COMPANY LIMITED is a wine and spirits company based out of 16 PARK CIRCUS, GLASGOW, United Kingdom.

Name: Wijnhandel Van den bussche
Description:
Wine shop Van den bussche. A family business with tradition in Ghent since 1870.
With more than 1000 wines in our range, you can visit us for French, Italian, Spanish and Portuguese wines. We also have new world wines, including wines from Uruguay, Argentina, South Africa, New Zealand, Lebanon and Georgia.

In addition to wines, we also have more than 1000 spirits in our range. Including Malt Whiskeys, Gins, Rhums, Porto, Sherry, Cognac, Calvados, Grappa, Armagnac, Jenever, Bitters, Vodka, Tequila and Liqueurs.

Name: Vini Ruj
Description:
La 𝐓𝐞𝐫𝐫𝐚 𝐝𝐞𝐥 𝐂𝐚𝐫𝐬𝐨 ospita dal 𝟏𝟗𝟑𝟒 la produzione dei vini della nostra famiglia. Ormai da ben quattro generazioni! 
Cosa rende unico il nostro vino? 
Il 𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐫𝐞𝐧𝐨: pesante, argilloso e ricco di sostanza minerali.
La posizione tra il 𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐞 e le 𝐦𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐠𝐧𝐞 è fattore importante per la produzione delle uve.
L’𝐞𝐬𝐜𝐮𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐦𝐢𝐜𝐚: favorisce l’aumento dei profumi.
E infine la 𝐁𝐨𝐫𝐚 fondamentale per la buona salute delle viti.

Name: Weingut Frenz
Description: Seit mindestens dem Jahr 1800 betreibt Familie Frenz das Weingut in der Gemeinde Saulheim in Rheinhessen.

Name: Sybaris - Wine & Spirits AB
Description: Sybaris Wine & spirits AB is a Swedish beverage importer with passion for high quality beverages and environmental sustainability. Sybaris strives to give the modern Sybarit (pleasure seeker) great beverages from producers around the globe with passion for the craftsmanship and respect for the sustainability of our environment.

Name: Liberge Vins
Description:
CHASSEUR DE VINS ET D'HISTOIRES
Spécialiste des vins de propriétés | Distribution dans toute la France !
#LibergeVins

Name: VIGNOBLES ROBIN
Description:
Créé par Nicolas et Alexandra Robin, les Vignobles Robin, regroupent, le Château de Laussac, le Château Rol Valentin, le Clos Vieux Taillefer, le Château Gontet et le Château Angelot Robin. 
En recevant plusieurs dizaines de médailles et un grand nombre de témoignages de la part de ses pairs et des médias.
On retrouve les crus des Vignobles Robin sur les meilleures tables de France et dans plus de 15 pays dans le monde.

Name: Kylix Wines
Description:
Kylix Wines was founded in 2005 with the expressed intention of focusing on the handcrafted and vineyard specific wines that family and estate wineries excel at producing.

With a view that great wine can be found around the world, our International portfolio includes exceptional wines from renowned wine regions as well as producers from up and coming regions that are bursting onto the world wine scene.

In an ever increasingly competitive and complex Ontario beverage alcohol market, Kylix Wines' founder Zoltan Fekete's 30+ years of experience have insured that our partner suppliers receive the best possible opportunities to introduce and develop their wine presence with all channels of the market.

Whether you are new to wine and looking to find your way around established countries and regions, or you are an oenophile with specific tastes, we are certain our portfolio and focus on handcrafted wines that embody a "sense of place" will delight your palate.

Name: Vignobles Arrivé
Description:
Depuis des générations, la famille Arrivé produit des vins & spiritueux dans la prestigieuse région de Cognac et sont également pépiniéristes. 
Propriétaire de quatre exploitations viticoles, la famille dispose d'un large panel de produits: Pineau des Charentes, Cognacs, IGP (vins de Pays Charentais), Crémant, Vins pétillants, Bières, Liqueurs et Jus de raisins.
Soucieux de l'environnement, la famille Arrivé et toute son équipe travaillent dans le plus grand respect de l'environnement afin de préserver la nature et la santé de nos futures générations. Elle détient, pour la plupart de ses produits, les labels certifiés bio AB et Ecocert.

Name: Yuengling Collectors Club
Description: Yuengling Collectors Club objectives are to foster and promote the collecting and preservation of Yuengling breweriana, to further the knowledge of both historical and current data pertaining to Yuengling manufactured items and merchandise for present and future generations, and to promote friendship and goodwill amongst both members and non-members alike.

Name: Ron Empotrador
Description:
Empotrador is a rich blend of carefully selected Caribbean rums. A smooth, distinctive white rum with subtle tropical flavors. Enjoy it with friends or with strangers.

Made in the Caribbean, bottled in Amsterdam.

Name: Wines And More!
Description:
Wines and More! is the premier liquor store in Milford CT. It has a wide selection of Wine, Beer, Liquor, Barware, and more! A knowledgeable staff is always readily available to assist with any needs.

Come and explore some new and exciting drinks at one of our weekly wine, beer & spirit tastings in the store.  We also offer special order services.

Name: Le vin des voisins
Description:
Le vin des voisins est un e-commerce de vin qui propose chaque mois une nouvelle sélection de vins bio de producteurs à taille humaine. 

Marc Roisin sélectionne uniquement de véritables coups de cœur qu'il consomme à titre personnel, de préférence bio, en provenance de propriétés situées pas trop loin de la Belgique. Découvertes et valeurs sûres se côtoient sans à priori ni snobisme dans une gamme qui va de 9 à 25 euros.

Name: Cadman Fine Wines
Description:
Founded in 2004 by our Chairman Giles Cadman, Cadman Fine Wines specialise in the world's finest, most sought-after wines from great and historic vintages, plus real finds from small producers; wines which embody classic regional styles, plus unique cuvées crafted from rare, indigenous grape varieties that cannot be found on the high street.

Our wines are intelligently and skilfully sourced by our experts from field trips and wine fairs. All our wines are made by skilled winemakers, who know that great wines are made in the vineyard, not the cellar, and who really care about the contents of the bottle and making their terroirs shine through.

We provide customers with all information, tasting notes and reviews to make an informed buying choice. We do not list the same wine in subsequent vintages unless it is of equal (or superior) quality to the current vintage.

Name: Adkins Family Vineyards
Description: Adkins Family Vineyards has Award Winning Wines created with clean, sustainable farming methods located in Wilton CA. Our tasting room is proudly located in Elk Grove California.

Name: Gottardi Feine Weine
Description: Die Welt der Weine ist riesengroß und ständig in Bewegung: neue Weine, neue Länder, neue Stilrichtungen, neue Techniken und neue Produzenten. Qualität in dieser Flut von Neuheiten zu finden braucht Zeit und Engagement. Wir hören nie auf zu suchen und verschaffen uns für Sie den Überblick. Denn wir wollen sichergehen, dass unser Angebot immer das Geniale und Gute umfasst, den neuesten Trends entsprechend, egal ob alt oder neu.

Name: InterVin LLC
Description:
ABOUT US
InterVin (International Wine) was founded in 2017 by two wine professionals with over 40 years experience in the beverage and hospitality industry. After trying many unique wines from around the world and developing relationships with wineries, we saw a huge need in the industry. There were many incredible wines that were inaccessible to consumers in the United States. Over the years, we’ve worked to build a strong portfolio of wines/spirits and import/distribution channels to fill that need.  
 
WHAT WE DO
InterVin is the bridge between wineries/distilleries, importers/distributors, and consumers.  We help wineries and distilleries find importers in North America, then help the importers find distributors. We also work with the importers to help distributors with managing the brands to optimize market saturation. This is done through cooperation between the wineries/distillers and distributors to develop and align joint marketing strategies.

InterVin seeks to provide the highest quality representation through our European and North American partnerships.
We use our expertise to help our European partners navigate the North American markets as well as give assistance in positioning their respective brands within each market. Through our varied importer and distributor relationships, we help each winery/distillery find the perfect import partner in each market. Then assist in managing their brand strategies to better position them for market growth.

Our goal is to keep pace with rapidly expanding markets due to increased consumption, government support, and online purchasing. Our job is helping our partners keep an ever increasing pace in a global scale.  Through this work, we continue to provide successful partnerships and lasting relationships.

https://www.instagram.com/intervinllc/

Richard Mackinnon: richardm@inter.vin
Rachel Helms: rhelms@inter.vin

Name: Schubert Wines Limited
Description: A world search, which also included France, Germany, North and South America as well as Australia for the ideal area with perfect conditions for viticulture, especially for Pinot Noir, brought Kai Schubert and Marion Deimling, graduates of the German Viticulture and Oenology University in Geisenheim to the Wairarapa, New Zealand. Schubert vineyards are closely planted and the unique climate produces low yields and internationally award winning wines with intense and complex character; predominantly exported to currently 25 countries.

Name: Distilleria Pagura
Description: Distilleria Pagura is the oldest grappa distillery in Friuli that has been stabilished in 1879 by Campagna Domenico. After 5 generations the family still respects the same philosophy and artisanal method in order to produce a superior quality product that express their territory. The character and success of Pagura’s grappa is probably in the simplicity of the distiller itself and in its ability to produce a distinct and extraordinary grappa.

Name: Poggio al Sole
Description: Der Weinbau hat in der Familie Davaz eine jahrzehntelange Tradition. Im Einklang mit der Natur entsteht mit viel Liebe und Arbeit die Basis für die grossen Weine von Poggio al Sole. Der Weinkeller mit seiner konstanten Temperatur und den modernen Anlagen ermöglicht es, das hochwertige Traubengut sorgfältig und schonend weiterzuverarbeiten.

Name: Azar Family Brands
Description: Azar Family Brands (AFB) was founded in 2010 by husband and wife, Trey and Kimberly Azar. Our dream is simple, to be a leader in the adult beverage industry by carefully crafting a portfolio of timeless brands. AFB is the parent company to Seersucker Southern Style Gin, Cinco Vodka, and Tastes Like Chicken (TLC) Vodka. Enjoy one of our cocktails at your local bar or in the comfort of your home. You're Invited! For additional information or inquiries contact us at info@azarfb.com

Name: Pfeiffer Wines
Description:
Pfeiffer wines is a family owned and operated winery, located within historic Rutherglen - a region with a rich wine heritage, spanning over 140 years.

Our historic winery cellars, and our century old Sunday Creek bridge are situated in an idyllic setting on the banks of Sunday Creek, an anabranch of the mighty Murray River.

Pfeiffer wines produce premium, handcrafted wines of elegance - crisp whites, full-bodied reds and the internationally extolled Muscats and Topaques - luscious, intense fortified wines which are the heritage of the Australian Wine Industry

Name: Probulkwine
Description:
Your Strategic Wine Source
Bulk Wine from Chile And Argentina... for now!

Our Mission:
We use our know-how, network and strategic local information to assist world bulk wine buyers to find and design their wine according their price and quality requirements.

We are oenologists and agronomists, experienced in the process of elaborating high end wines, as well as entry level wines. We can demand the same high work standard from our suppliers for bulk wines as for high end wine without affecting the cost per liter. Since wine is our passion, we focus on quality and we are extremely precise in our wine process and instructions, which we personally supervise in order to achieve the best result possible.

Our experience in the wine industry, delivering to the most demanding wine sellers in the world has given us a deep understanding of how the wines have to be according to the markets where they will be consumed. The quality and consistency of the product are essential. We are here to give you that guarantee.

Blending, a specific knowledge important to the final product, is among our best skills, and is the key to achieving a good quality/price ratio.

Name: Leave Your Sword
Description: Brewing & distributing handcrafted kombucha, 100% tea based, unfiltered, unpasteurized, organic, sustainable, no additives, aged. ABV 2.5%. Produced in Amsterdam Noord, aiming on revealing tea flavors through the fermentation spectrum.

Name: Frant
Description:
Frant is the result of years of travelling around Poland in search of the most interesting premium vodka and related spirits. 

Visiting small, family-run distilleries, suppliers and archives we noticed that the most exciting and innovative ideas in the world of Polish vodka rarely have the chance to reach consumers in Poland and abroad. 

We’ve decided to breathe new air into the world of Polish vodka with innovative approach to ingredients, processes and design.

Frant. Modern Polish Vodka & Spirits.

Name: Azienda Agricola "I Scriani"
Description: Il reparto cantina dell’Azienda “Scriani” è curato attentamente per seguire da vicino tutte le delicate fasi di vinificazione. La tradizione familiare prevede infatti operazioni di particolare attenzione e delicatezza.

Name: WooWine
Description:
woowine.com est le premier site communautaire avec géolocalisation, dédié à tous les amateurs et passionnés de vin. Ce projet est né de notre volonté de rassembler, au sein d’une même communauté de WooWiners, novices et fin connaisseurs, vignerons, cavistes, bars à vins, restaurants, épiceries fines… 

Ici, nous vous parlons du vin de manière simple et conviviale et nous vous invitons à partir à la rencontre d’hommes et de femmes passionnés et unis par une même volonté : vous conseiller en prenant le temps de vous faire apprécier et découvrir leurs vins et spiritueux.

Name: VINOX79 GmbH
Description: VINOX79 is your online trading partner for excellent, carefully selected top wines and champagnes. VINOX79 stores wines and champagnes of the best vintages, guarantees maximum quality and the authenticity of all products and delivers exclusively by insured shipping.

Name: Champagne Naveau
Description:
Une maison familiale située au coeur de la Côte des Blancs. 

Un vignoble premier cru, reflétant parfaitement toute l'expression de nos Terroirs et du Cépage Chardonnay.

Nos cuvées mettent en valeurs les particularités de notre vignoble, on retrouve ainsi une forte dominante de Chardonnay - des vins vifs et expressifs alliant avec délicatesse richesse et finesse.

Name: Champagne Berger
Description: Indépendante depuis sa création, la Maison BERGER, fondée  à Trélou sur Marne, voit aujourd’hui la quatrième génération perpétuer l’exigence de la qualité. En constante quête d’excellence et de perfection, la Maison BERGER façonne ses champagnes, mêlant traditions ancestrales aux technologies les plus modernes. Les champagnes acquièrent leur juste maturité  dans la cave voûtée  Élégants et harmonieux, ces champagnes célèbrent avec grâce tous les instants précieux.

Name: Castello Tricerchi
Description:
Castello Tricerchi wine Estate is situated on the northern side of Montalcino. It extends for 400 hectares, 13 of which being covered with Brunello di Montalcino and Rosso di Montalcino vineyards. 

In the centre of the Estate stands the Castle, built in the 13th century by the Altesi family; in 1441 it was completed by the Tricerchi family, and today it is winery and home of their direct descendants, the Squarcia family.

The vinification and aging cellar have been in the same place ever since the 15th century. Everything in this part of the castle is as it was 600 years ago and traditional methods have been conserved, with the inevitable help of technology. 

Our work is driven by passion,aiming at valorizing the terroir respecting our traditions. All necessary factors to produce a noble wine, like Brunello di Montalcino.

Pursuant to the Ministerial Decree of 1982, the Tricerchi Castle was declared an artistic and historical heritage of Italy.

Name: Las vegas Wine Academy LLC
Description:
Las vegas Wine Academy is a close-knit team of passionate professionals.
Our backgrounds combine Wine Industry expertise with decades of International experience in Hospitality, Retail, Culinary, Sales, Media, Recruitment, Real-Estate or Event planning.
We love working together, we love what we do and we are excited about what's ahead!

There is no statement more powerful than Sir Francis Bacon's one, "Knowledge is Power". 
At Las Vegas Wine Academy, we are eager to provide the best online and in class training to people willing to expand their wine knowledge or just broaden their wine tasting spectrum. We are proud to help professionals to improve their competence, certified their employes and organize team-building events.

Our goal is to combine instruction, practice and guidance to help people acquire new skills, advance their career or simply gain more familiar about Wine and Spirits.

Whether you are a curious mind, a Wine enthusiast or Industry professional, with Las Vegas Wine Academy, you can now learn and taste wine on your own schedule, at your own pace and have fun doing it!

Cheers!

Solenne & Team

Name: A2V- Apoio a Vitivinicultores
Description:
Numa atitude pioneira em Portugal, a A2V desenvolveu e criou unidades móveis de elaboração de vinhos e espumantes, levando até ao produtor os equipamentos e know-how necessários. Com forte implantação na região dos vinhos verdes, disponibiliza ainda um serviço ‘garrafa-na-mão’.

A A2V encontra-se presente na península ibérica, com doze unidades móveis, onde transportam todos os meios e equipamentos associados à elaboração de vinho, desde a vindima a colocação da garrafa na caixa, pronta a ser comercializada.

Outra área de negócio na A2V é a espumantização móvel, é precisamente neste âmbito que a empresa marca a diferença no mercado onde opera, executando um acompanhamento completo e personalizado ao cliente, no sentido de, em conjunto, perceberem quais os critérios essenciais à obtenção de resultados com elevados padrões qualitativos, e qual a melhor forma de os reunir.

Não obstante, a A2V segue um caminho de distinção, e ao longo da sua existência desenvolveu outras áreas de negócio, onde executa serviços complementares à elaboração de vinhos e espumantes, e que passam pela comercialização de equipamentos de ocasião, engarrafamento de diversos tipos de líquidos, tais como sangria, cerveja artesanal e água, entre outros, filtração, rotulagem, fornecimento de rolhas e garrafas, para além de serviços de consultadoria, que incluem criação de imagem, legalização da adega, registo da marca. 
A A2V dispõe ainda de um laboratório independente, onde é realizada uma análise sumária a mosto, vinhos e aguardentes, tanto para clientes da empresa, como para terceiros.


A A2V deu vida a um outro projeto, e desenvolveu um centro de vinificação, que permite um serviço ‘garrafa-na-mão’, onde o cliente pode usufruir de todos os serviços disponibilizados nas unidades móveis, mas numa unidade fixa, desde o transporte da uva, passando pela vinificação do vinho, até à expedição e gestão de produto acabado.

Name: Vignobles Gouache
Description:
Un voyage aromatique et sensuel au milieu des vignes…

Extraire l’essence du terroir médocain et en sublimer toute la singularité.
Défendre une culture de la vigne raisonnée et respectueuse de l’environnement.
Offrir des moments de plaisir à travers la dégustation de vins élégants, subtils, voluptueux mais aussi typés et sans concession.
Autant de défis qui nous animent au quotidien.

Bienvenue au cœur des Vignobles Gouache !

Name: Weingut Lamm-Jung KG
Description:
Unser Erbacher Weingut hat eine 250jährige Geschichte. Aktuell bewirtschaften wir ca. 15ha Weinberge im Rheingau, die sich von Eltville-Erbacher über die Steillagen von Rüdesheim bis zu den Hängen von Lorch erstrecken. Diese auch für Rheingauer Weingüter ungewöhnliche Vielfalt an höchst unterschiedlichen Lagen und Böden lässt das ganze Spektrum des Rheingaus in unseren Weinen erleben. 
Hand in Hand: Unsere Weine sind eine doppelte Meisterleistung. Man nennt Winzer heute auch „Winemaker“. Das passt zu uns. Denn wir sind echte Macher und stolze Handwerksmeister mit den Prinzipien Qualität und Verlässlichkeit.
Der Meister der Technik: Inhaber und Quereinsteiger Günther Weisel
Handwerksmeister, Geschäftsführer eines Handwerksbetriebes mit hoher Leidenschaft zum Genuss und zu Wein, sowie enger Verbundenheit zu unserer Region, dem Rheingau.

Mit seinem Großvater stand er als Bub im Assmannshäuser Steilhang und half bei der Traubenlese mit. Mit den Jahren wuchs sein Wunsch, irgendwann mal eigenen Wein zu trinken. Im Jahr 2015 lernte er Paul Will kennen.  Er hatte sofort das Gefühl es passt und fragte Paul: „Wenn ich mal ein Weingut kaufe, würdest Du es führen?“ Er sagte „Ja“.
Und ein halbes Jahr später, 2016, rief Günther Weisel ihn an. Er hatte das zwar alteingesessene, aber mittlerweile stillgelegte Weingut Lamm Jung gekauft. Paul Will nahm die Herausforderung an.

Der Meister der Reben: Betriebsleiter und Weinküfermeister Paul Will.
Qualitätsfanatiker und Winzer aus Überzeugung und Leidenschaft.
Er ist jung, aber erfahren: Sein Handwerk lernte er beim Weingut der Hochschule Geisenheim und bei Schloss Reinhartshausen. Er wurde als jahrgangsbester Jungküfer Hessens ausgezeichnet, absolvierte die Meisterprüfung in Weinsberg und arbeitet anschließend als Kellermeister in den renommierteren Sekthäusern Solter und Schloss Vaux. Jetzt ist er mit Leib und Seele Betriebsleiter bei Lamm-Jung.

Name: Buiese Distillerie
Description:
La Distilleria Buiese è un'azienda artigianale a conduzione familiare, specializzata nella produzione di grappe, distillati e liquori. Una storia che parte da lontano: tutto comincia nel 1918, quando Giuseppe Buiese acquista una piccola distilleria e la casa padronale dai conti Miani, a Ceresetto di Martignacco.

Fin da subito, la qualità dei nostri prodotti ci ha distinto, portandoci a ricevere premi e riconoscimenti già dagli anni Venti, sia in Italia che all’estero. Nel 1962, il testimone passa al figlio Remo, affiancato dalla moglie Orlanda, che con passione porta avanti il mestiere di famiglia. Quello stesso anno, la distilleria si trasferisce a Martignacco, dove nasce un nuovo stabilimento con alambicchi moderni e uno spaccio aziendale.

Negli anni, la struttura è stata più volte ampliata, fino al 1999, quando viene costruita l’attuale sede, dotata delle migliori tecnologie disponibili nel settore.

Dal 2003 è Cristiano a guidare l’azienda. Animato da una forte passione per il mondo dei distillati, si dedica fin da subito allo sviluppo di nuovi prodotti, amplia il magazzino d’invecchiamento e installa nuovi impianti di distillazione all’avanguardia, coniugando innovazione e tradizione di famiglia.

Nel 2022 abbiamo inaugurato il nuovo negozio aziendale, riportando a nuova vita il capannone costruito nel 1962. Un progetto che rappresenta la prima ristrutturazione e conservazione tipologica di un edificio industriale di quell’epoca nella zona, unendo memoria storica e funzionalità contemporanea.

Oggi produciamo circa 150.000 bottiglie all’anno, con la stessa cura artigianale che ci accompagna da più di cent’anni.

Name: Bulk Wine
Description:
Chi siamo?

Bulk Wine è il sogno di un imprenditore da una vita, Loris e della sua splendida moglie Antonietta.

Insieme hanno scelto una passione da condividere e da far crescere. Da amanti del buon vino, hanno progettato un locale accogliente che vuole diventare un punto di riferimento per Monza e per tutti coloro che amano il vino o che vogliono sperimentare il vino sfuso e tutti i suoi vantaggi.

Come scegliamo le cantine da proporvi?
Noi di Bulk Wine scegliamo il vino da mettere in negozio nei nostri fusti, nelle nostre cisterne e nelle bottiglie con passione e cura.
Alcuni sono gli stessi vini che abbiamo avuto modo di conoscere negli ultimi anni e che ci hanno da sempre convinto, ma tutti sono comunque vini che prima proviamo e che selezioniamo personalmente solo da cantine affidabili e professionali.

Cosa ci farà essere soddisfatti?
Saremo soddisfatti se vedremo clienti affezionati che dopo aver provato per una volta uno nei nostri vini, scelgono di tornare.
Saremo soddisfatti se i nostri clienti scopriranno il vino sfuso e capiranno che è un’alternativa estremamente intelligente, comoda e di risparmio. Saremo soddisfatti se entrando nel locale, chiunque, dal cliente abituale a quello di passaggio per la prima volta, si sentirà come a casa e ben accolto - anche solo per scambiare due chiacchiere.

Name: Quist Wine
Description:
Quist Wine

Vi har gennem mange år haft en lidenskab for de italienske vine og køkken. Dette har givet os mange spændende oplevelser i støvlelandet. Specielt er vores kærlighed faldet for områderne Toscana og Veneto. På disse rejser har vi besøgt et utal af byer, hvor vi har smagt specialiteter som lokale oste, salami, oliven, tapanader og sidst men ikke mindst vin fra topproducenter.

Vores vision med Quist wine er, at vi vil ”plukke” et udvalg af producenter, hvor kvaliteten og kærligheden til håndværket vægtes højere end kvantiteten - Vinmagere som ligger vægt på at leverer det ypperste til den rigtige pris og som alle har en historie at fortælle med deres vin.

Fælles for de producenter vi arbejder sammen med er, at Quist Wine ønsker en tæt kontakt med disse, lige fra deltagelse i vinhøsten til årlige besøg hos dem, for at følge med i udviklingen af deres vine.

Disse skønne oplevelser vil vi gerne dele med andre som sætter pris på et glas italiensk kvalitets vin, og som ønsker at blive betaget, overrasket og forkælet på smagsløgene.

Description:

By producing only small lots and using only the finest natural ingredients we are able to produce artisanal products of distinction.

We provide follow up and feedback on sales inquiries internationally, domestic consolidation and logistics, international shipping, international logistics and delivery of wine, customized and targeted marketing activities for customers, credit terms for international clients, direct market education and feedback from the market to the wineries. “CGI”, being based in California, is your customer and manages all of the risk in doing business internationally. “CGI” wants to make it easy for you and the only thing we require is your participation. This service is “no cost” for you and the two primary requests we have are generally in regards to the Export Documents required and necessary wine samples needed to either introduce your products or satisfy international customs requirements.   

"Bringing The Best Wine In The World To The World"

Name: Reddy Wines
Description:
Reddy Vineyards is the leading Texas vineyard and award-winning boutique winery rooted in the deep red soils and soaring elevation of the Texas High Plains. One of the largest, most diverse and well-established vineyard plantings in Texas, Reddy Vineyards has pioneered premium wine grape growing for the Texas wine industry since 1997 with unparalleled expertise and experimentation. 
 
Dr. Vijay Reddy, a fifth-generation farmer, settled in West Texas in the 1970s earning a PhD in plant science and soil chemistry eventually planting grapes when the Texas wine industry was just emerging. Today, he grows 38 Vitis vinifera varieties and sells his sought-after premium wine grapes to more than two dozen of the state’s wineries at each harvest.
 
Reddy Vineyards produces small amounts of modern, stylish, hand-crafted luxury wines that reflect the culture and craft of Texas fine wine. The custom-built estate winery uses state-of-the-art equipment, traditional fermentations and French-oak barrel aging to produce wines that showcase the region’s bold fruit and refined textures to create exciting red and white blends and single varietal selections exclusively from the family’s estate vineyard. Reddy Vineyards wines are hand-crafted to exacting quality standards and are 100% authentically Texas. Reddy Vineyards wines are available exclusively in Texas directly from the winery and at fine wine shops and fine-dining restaurants across the state.

Name: Champagne Victoire
Description:
The Cuvée Victoire is an ultimate creation based on the talent and inspiration of pure “Champenois”. In 1989, Jean-François and Christophe Rapeneau not only wanted to be heirs but also wanted to showcase their excellence They were inspired by the theme of the deities of Greco-Roman mythology with the sculpture "Hebe and the Eagle of Jupiter" to create an exceptional Cuvée: La Cuvée Victoire , symbol of Success and Celebration. 
From the family vineyard and produced by a meticulous selection of terroirs mainly classified Premier Cru. Building on its success, Champagne Victoire has become a brand only sold in the international markets. 

Drink responsibly. L'abus d'alcool est dangereux pour la santé. A consommer avec modération.

Name: SIP Certified
Description:
When you find the SIP seal, you can be assured that growers are preserving and protecting the natural environment, treating their employees and community with care, and have sound business practices with a long-term view that protects both the present and the future.

The program is unique in that it:
•	Allows use of the seal on the bottle
•	Maintains a rigorous threshold for eligibility
•	Requires third-party inspection
•	Addresses social responsibility
•	Prohibits high risk pesticides
•	Provides regulatory relief in Regional Water Board 3 

SIP Certified is committed to standards based on science and expert input, independent verification, transparency, and absence of conflict of interest. Conscientious consumers have a choice they can make – one that supports both the land and the people that create their favorite wines.

Description:

Depuis cette date, une équipe jeune et dynamique vous propose une sélection des meilleures productions locales.

Laetitia, notre sommelière, a su développer une gamme de plus de 200 appellations pour vous apporter toujours plus de satisfactions.
Notre site internet est à l'image du service que nous proposons depuis déjà plusieurs années aux clients de notre caveau. Notre priorité est de sélectionner les meilleures appellations, meilleures millésimes et toujours aux meilleurs prix. 

En effet, notre proximité nous permet de rencontrer régulièrement les viticulteurs de la région et de débusquer chez chacun d’eux, des vins de tout premier plan.

Nous considérons qu'il est dans notre devoir de guider les consommateurs dans leur sélection et leur recherche. 
À travers un classement facile d’utilisation et instinctif, nous proposons une sélection détaillée, illustrée de photo et d’explications, notamment des conseils d’associations mets/vins.

Name: Mediterra Winery
Description:
MEDITERRA WINERY is based in Kounavi, a village that lies at the heart of the Appellation zone of Peza in Crete. Mediterra produces wine from the island’s indigenous grape varieties since 1973, with knowledge and passion. The company's effort is to bring out the special characteristics of international varieties and exploit the viniculture potential of Crete.

The name of the village where the winery is situated is a great proof of the long winemaking tradition, since it is directly related to the historical wine-presses “Kanaves” that are found on the islands of the Archipelago.

MEDITERRA WINERY distributes wine not only in Greece, but in 25 countries all over the world. Mediterra's product line has been awarded in domestic as well as in international wine competitions. The terroir of the vineyards selected, along with the certification by four quality systems - from vineyard to the final products - guarantee that every bottle of wine holds its unique flavor.

Name: Domaine ARLAUD - AOC St Véran
Description:
Nous produisons en famille un vin blanc d’appellation "AOC St Véran" dans la commune de Leynes (71) depuis 3 générations. Notre production est artisanale, tant dans les méthodes utilisées que dans le volume (1000 à 2500 bouteilles max. Par an, selon les années).

Nous respectons les traditions en ramassant le raisin à la main et en le pressant dans un (très) ancien pressoir en bois.
La vinification est assurée par nos soins également ainsi que la mise en bouteille.
Le résultat est un vin de qualité qui ne laisse pas indifférent.

Son prix ? 48€ le carton de 6 bouteilles.

Nous ne vivons pas de cette activité, il ne s’agit que de couvrir nos frais d’exploitation dans le but de maintenir cette tradition familiale et culturelle (plus personne ne presse de cette façon dans la région).

La meilleure façon de vous faire une idée, c’est de le goûter !

Pour toute commande, écrivez-nous à domaine.arlaud@gmail.com

Name: LCHAIM kosher vodka
Description:
L’CHAIM Kosher Wine & Spirts
Celebrate Life….L’CHAIM is a message of unity and inclusiveness. The theme to life is a compelling concept. L’CHAIM brings together all people from everywhere regardless of social, political, cultural, economic or religious backgrounds. L’CHAIM represents the spirit of America, past and future. Our history, through world-class blending and distilling expertise and our future, through our new product offerings bring people together from all places. Our sourcing experts have researched the highest quality, best tasting ingredients and most forward thinking base of suppliers around the world to launch this phenomena.
Purer, Smoother, Premium, Kosher and Gluten Free…
We started with L’CHAIM kosher vodka; designed to be savored by spirit connoisseurs and everyday drinkers alike.
It is micro-distilled, made of organic corn, gluten free GF and certified OU kosher. We recognize that this time-honored method of ensuring purity and cleanliness requires more effort than ordinary wine and spirits. It takes more time and energy and costs a little bit more, but it’s well worth it. Read more about our vodka, wine and other products.
Beyond the obvious…..
It happens countless times each week – a customer receives a drink from one of our many on premise account mixologists, but each interaction is unique. it’s just a moment in time – just one hand reaching over the counter to present a drink glass to another outstretched hand. But it’s a connection. We make sure everything we do honors that connection – from our commitment to be the highest quality, purest and kosher vodka in the world, to the way we engage with our customers and communities. 

Read more about our products and check us out on Facebook

Name: School of Wine, Perth, Western Australia
Description:
The School of Wine an independent Perth based wine education company, here to teach you everything you ever wanted to know about wine - sniffing it, swirling it, assessing it and drinking it. Education classes and tastings held at restaurants and bars around Perth, Western Australia. 

We are also available for hire
- Private wine tastings and Hens Parties at your home or choice of venue
- Corporate events for Social Clubs, Christmas Parties or Team Building
- Food & Beverage Industry training to up skill staff with fun and useful professional development

 What is independent wine education and why is it important? Well, it means we're genuine.
- We won't give you the "hard-sell" on wines we try (but if you want to know where to buy them, we will tell you!)
- We are unbiased, meaning we show wines with no agenda, but tell you the stories behind the wine/varietal/winemaker/region/making process of each wine we show
- We give a balanced viewpoint. If you come to one of our events and find a wine that you isn't to your liking, we will chat with you to explore a positively critical (and not cynical) review so you can figure out your palate for the future
