Name: Carlisle Winery & Vineyards
Description:
We are a small Sonoma County winery specializing in the production of old-vine, vineyard designated Zinfandels and red Rhone varieties (Syrah, Grenache, Mourvèdre, and Petite Sirah). 

We have also recently added our first whites, two blends from historic, old-vine vineyards plus Sonoma County's first ever Grüner Veltliner. While we like our wines to be bold and intensely flavored, each reflecting its vintage and vineyard, we also strive to create wines of balance, complexity, and nuance.

 Our goal is always the same - grow and source outstanding fruit, do as little as possible to it, and bottle outstanding, pleasurable wine at the fairest price possible..

Name: Cape Cod Winery
Description: Cape Cod Winery is located on Oxbow Road in East Falmouth, just a couple of short miles to the beach.  Our Winery is a place of relaxation, and we invite you to join us in one of our many seating areas placed over our crushed seashells to sip and savor the flavors of Cape Cod.  With over 10 different varieties of wine and sparkling wines to choose from there surely is something for everyone, whether it is our beloved Rose Mermaid Water, a refreshing Sauvignon Blanc, or a Cabernet, our wines will bring you that tranquil Cape Cod feeling.

Name: Powder River Vodka Co.
Description:
When is a vodka not a vodka? When it has 25% less ethanol and is made with all-natural flavors of course.

In the beginning, we were just a couple of dreamy man-kids with an idea for a cheeky all-natural spirits brand from our homeland in the pristine mountain country of eastern Oregon. We were sick of the drab, same ole' same ole' penicillin tasting vodkas in your drunk uncle's cabinet. And we also thought the flavored vodka products the big brands were pumping into the market were lame AF. Too much sugar. Too much fake shit. No story. No beauty. No fun. No value.

No mas.

So we channeled our frustration and created a fundamentally better alternative. Powder River is a brand of naturally flavored, 60 proof small batch spirits you can actually enjoy w/out honestly wanting to kill yourself the next day. 

We employ maximum simplicity for maximum flavor. Our spirits are handcrafted from mash-2-cork, gluten-free, keto friendly, contain zero additives, zero carbs and zero added sugar. We take a small mountain town, artisanal approach to our craft, using only the purest all-natural ingredients possible:

1. Non-gmo, organic sweet corn distilled 6ishXs.
2. Filtered w/ clean Elkhorn Mountain water more Xs than we'll admit.
3. Accented w/ Fresh pressed English Cucumber juice to taste.

That's it.
Elegant. Floral. Smooth. Subtle. Sweet. Clean. Consistent. Better.
Quality over quantity every time, love.
-PRVCO

Name: Celler Jordi Doménech
Description: Bodega dedicada a la elaboración de vinos de calidad bajo la Denominación de Origen Calificada Priorat, establecida en Poboleda,Tarragona. Vinos elaborados de forma artesanal y buscando siempre la elegancia y finura en todos sus productos. Tipicidad de un "terroir" extraordinario.

Name: Bodega Isasmendi
Description:
Our vineyards are located at 2500 masl, in Cachi, a small town in the Calchaqui valleys in Salta, Argentina. The climate is continental with 300 days of intense sunlight, almost no rainfall and very high diurnal range. We irrigate our vines with snow meltwater coming from the "Nevado de Cachi", a 6300 masl´s peak in the Andes.

Up in the Andes, the temperature difference between day and night is around 20 ºC. This condition allows the grapes to ripen during daytime and retain acidity during nighttime achieving phenolic ripeness without losing freshness. 

This climate also is beneficial for the vineyard sanity. Because of the lack of humidity and the intense sunlight, our vineyard is less prone to the attack of pests and diseases. This allows us to treat our ungrafted vines with organic and biodynamic methods.

We produce around 15000 bottles a year, all made from grapes obtained from our 3.5 Has single-vineyard. Malbec, Torrontes, Tannat, Merlot and Syrah are the main grape varieties our wines are made of. We harvest them by hand and in small crates and we ferment them in micro vinifications of 400 kg.

Name: Heirloom Brand
Description:
CURIOSITY MEETS HERITAGE

In 2016, Heirloom Brand sprang forth from the seeds of Bittercube, with one goal in mind, to produce vibrant liqueurs with whole botanicals. This was a natural progression for a company focused on producing bitters of unmatched quality with real botanicals. In fact, the foundation had unknowingly been planted many years prior, with the very first batches of Creme de Flora resting alongside experimental batches of bitters in 2009. The founders of Bittercube, the nationally recognized line of slow-crafted bitters, along with Heirloom co-founder and longtime Bittercube employee, Brandon Reyes, have thoughtfully developed a line of liqueurs, which expertly blends curiosity and heritage by offering innovative and exciting flavor profiles on centuries old liqueur recipes.

Name: ALEMAT
Description:
Viticoltori - Wine Producers in Ponzano Monferrato (AL) - Italy

The idea of ALEMAT started long time ago in Savio Dominici’s  heart and mind back to the end of the 80's of last Century. Of course everything started from a bottle of wine tasted in the marvellous hills of our Piedmont and from the friendship with one the best winemaker of Langhe.
Love for wine and vineyard grows into the years until ALEMAT becomes a reality in 2012 when another crucial encounter makes possible what before was just a dream. Passion pursued for years materializes thanks to the collaboration with a careful winemaker in Monferrato. Wine cellar is managed with the help of one the best oenologist available on the market. 
The company starts with a lot of enthusiasm and with the fundamental help of the family and friends.

Alemat nasce nel cuore e nella mente di Savio Dominici alla fine degli anni 80, la scintilla parte naturalmente da una bottiglia di vino, degustata nelle prestigiose colline del nostro Piemonte e dall'amicizia con uno dei più sapienti produttori langaroli.
L'amore per il vino e per la vigna accrescono negli anni finchè Alemat diventa una realtà nel 2012, quando un altro decisivo incontro rende realizzabile ciò che prima era solo un sogno.
La passione coltivata da sempre vede nella collaborazione con un attento vignaiolo monferrino la possibilità di concretizzarsi. La gestione della cantina è condotta con la consulenza di uno dei migliori enologi piemontesi.
L'azienda viene fondata col massimo entusiasmo e col sostegno irrinunciabile della famiglia e degli amici.

Name: Buiese Distillerie Srl
Description: La Distilleria Buiese è un'azienda artigiana specializzata nella produzione di grappa, distillati e liquori che opera da quasi un secolo. Fondata nel 1918 a Ceresetto di Martignacco da Giuseppe Buiese, il quale acquistò una preesistente distilleria e la relativa casa padronale dai conti Miani. Fin dalle sue origini l'azienda si è distinta per la notevole qualità delle sue grappe e dei suoi liquori e sin dagli anni Venti ha ricevuto importanti premi e riconoscimenti in ambito nazionale e internazionale. La crescita della Distilleria Buiese è stata continua e proficua. Nel 1962 il capostipite Giuseppe cede il passo al figlio Remo che, supportato dalla moglie Orlanda, si dedica con immutata passione e rinnovato entusiasmo a questa nobile arte.  Lo stesso anno la distilleria si trasferisce a Martignacco, dove viene edificato il nuovo stabilimento e vengono rinnovati gli alambicchi, che permettono l'avviamento di una moderna produzione di grappa e acquaviti di frutta, realizzando inoltre lo spaccio aziendale. Diversi ampliamenti si sono succeduti nel tempo, fino al 1999, quando si realizza la costruzione dell'attuale distilleria, che vanta le migliori innovazioni tecnologiche oggi presenti sul mercato. Nel 2003 la guida della storica azienda viene ereditata da Cristiano che, mosso da una vibrante passione per l'affascinante mondo dei distillati si dedica fin da subito alla creazione di nuovi prodotti, realizza un nuovo magazzino d'invecchiamento e installa i nuovi impianti di distillazione che utilizzano avanzate tecnologie rispettando pienamente l'esperienza fine di tre generazioni di distillatori. La produzione è di circa 250000 bottiglie annue.

Today, the company to boost its sales, the tip of the marketing, it changes the face and the bride, the idea of a Fan, although this instrument has ancient origins, its maximum diffusion can be found in the ‘600 and ‘700, in France, in the middle of the baroque age, its use was widespread in the whole of Europe, and especially in the South of Italy, where the scorching heat, it facilitates the use. The choice of an object, such as the Range, weaves together the culture of wine, with the historical culture of a symbol that was born as the object that is used to cool, and then become a powerful tool of political communication and not only that, beloved by the ladies, belonging to the nobility and the high bourgeoisie, to communicate in code with the right man; the language of the Fan varies with the court of belonging, a language that, even in code, was highly communicative. In Sicily the fan was a communication tool: the woman sat on the doorway and with distinct movements of the fan "spoke" to her favorite man. And it is precisely to the communicative effectiveness of the fan, that grottarossa vini aims, communicating to its customers, the entire wine production chain, from production to marketing, for greater transparency towards customers to acquire their trust, requirement and fundamental value for the company.

Name: Dr Plonk Wines
Description:
I started my winemaking journey in Redheads Studio McLaren Vale with a collective of like-minded souls under the direction of Alpha Box & Dice founder Justin Lane and La Curio winemaker Adam Hooper back in 2004, where the first of the Good Doctor’s Tonic was bottled. In 2009 divine intervention landed me on a 40 acre plot of dirt covered in grape vines at the base of the Willunga foothills, already the home to shiraz and cabernet planted from 1995-96. I had the joy of chain sawing sauvignon blanc to make way for grafting mourvedre and tannat in 2009. As I got to know the vineyard more and under the watchful tutelage of esteemed viticulturalist Richard Leaske, the region’s Mediterranean micro-climate led me to plant some beautiful alternative varieties in montepulciano and carignan, perfectly suited to my land. 

Having been raised on a wheat and sheep farm, working the land comes second nature and I’m focused on improving soil health and biodiversity, leading to healthier vines and high-quality fruit. When it comes to managing the vineyards we follow organic principles, avoiding synthetic chemicals, inoculating with soil bugs, reducing reliance on fossil fuels, and using renewable energy from solar panels. 

There’s a place in my creative journey for both the traditional and the alternative. We’re so lucky living in a coastal wine region. Our vineyard celebrates some of the regional flagships in shiraz, mourevdre and cabernet. Having a deep understanding of my vineyard helps me to work with varieties like montepulciano and carignan, to get the most freshness, vibrancy and youthful characteristics possible. 

I’m passionate about sustainability and the whole process of grape growing and winemaking and have the privilege of working with the fruit from planting the canes, tending the vines, picking, putting wine to barrel and then bottle.

Name: Kaesler Wines
Description:

Carefully working with Mother Nature we have breathed new life into our old vines, carving a distinct path that takes us well beyond the traditional Barossa Shiraz. Our goal is clear – to transcend the ordinary.

Pairing heritage with forward thinking, we adopted the practice of regenerative farming. It’s a passion that resonates through each vine and echoes in every sip. It’s our profound love of the land that unearths the true and distinct character of the Barossa Valley in our wines.

Quelques domaines à découvrir : le domaine Pradels-Quartironi, le domaine Puech Auger, le domaine des Lauriers, le Château de Lancyre, le Château Ollieux-Romanis, le Prieuré Saint-Jean de Bébian, le Château Les Bugadelles, le domaine Haut-Lirou, le Mas des Armes, ou encore le Mas de Madame.

Bien-sûr, les terroirs des autres régions de France et du monde sont eux aussi disponibles : Bordeaux, Bourgogne, Gascogne, Vallée du Rhône… avec les domaines tels que le domaine de Joy, le domaine Seguin-Manuel, le domaine François Villard, ou encore Châteauneuf-Du-Pape domaine des Sénéchaux.

Name: Bourassa Vineyards
Description:
The turning point for Vic Bourassa, owner and proprietor, really occurred over a lunch he had in 1999 with the godfather of California wine, Robert Mondavi.  The chance to talk wine about the wine business with one of the most influential winery figures in the world was to be savored and appreciated.

At some point during that memorable lunch Bourassa uncorked a bottle of his own homemade Napa Valley Pinot Noir and after a few evidently pleasurable sips Mondavi began to encourage the novice winemaker to enter the winemaking field as a professional, not just as an amateur. It was at that very moment that Bourassa Vineyards was born, though it was not official, until two years later when Vic and Kathy Bourassa opened for business.

The first wine produced under the new ‘official’ Bourassa Vineyards label was a traditional Bordeaux blend called Harmony3. It received tremendous attention from both consumers and the media. All of the 400 cases produced sold out very quickly, and Bourassa Vineyards was on its way. A Napa Valley Zinfandel followed the Harmony3 bottling, and on it went, without pause.


The wines – no matter what the varietal – are painstakingly hand-crafted in small lots. The winery carefully creates rich, complex blends using grapes from premiere, self-maintained Napa Valley vineyards. 



Vic and Kathy Bourassa believe their responsibility as vintners and winery owners is two-fold. The first is to educate, the second is to entertain and promote . Want to know about what toast means when it comes to oak barrels? Vic shows you a cross section of a barrel, each stave toasted to different degrees. Curious about the importance of cork? He brings out a section of cork tree and begins to talk about the importance and harvesting practices of cork. And so it goes, the educational experience and the tasting experience seamlessly and enjoyably commingled.

Je perpétue le savoir-faire des vins de garde et de l'élevage traditionnel en fûts de chêne français pour les grands millésimes.
Nos vins sont distribués en France et nous nous développons à l’export.

Located in the Loire Valley, the Legrand family estate is in the heart of the vineyard of Saumur-Champigny. The Legrand family has been working the vineyard since the 17th century. The vineyard of 17 hectares is composed of 100% cabernet franc. A small plot of Chenin produce a cuvée of AOC Saumur Blanc (dry white wine). Name: Sommelier's Choice
Description:
Wir möchten unseren Kunden charakatervolle, authentische Weine näher bringen, also Weine, die klar die Handschrift ihrer Winzer tragen und den unverwechselbaren Charakter ihrer Region wiedergeben. 

Bei unzähligen Besuchen auf Weingütern in ganz Europa konnten wir feststellen, wie wichtig die Region oder im besten Fall die Lage für die Entstehung eines Weines mit Typizität, Eleganz und eigener Aromatik ist. Der Winzer ist stiller Begleiter und Biograph. Jedes Jahr aufs Neue offenbart er uns spannende Geschichten von der Traube bis ins Glas. 

Kompromisslose Sorgfalt im Weinbau und in der Kelterung stehen bei uns an erster Stelle. Um es in unsere Auswahl zu schaffen, müssen die Weine in jeder Preisklasse allerhöchsten Ansprüchen genügen. Unseren Kunden möchten wir Weine präsentieren, die jeweils zu den besten ihrer Art gehören – sei es eine Flasche für den alltäglichen Genuss oder ein Gewächs von besonderer Güte und Komplexität, das nach einem einmaligen Moment verlangt.

Diese hohen Ansprüche an uns selbst und an die ausgewählten Provenienzen fundieren auf einer enormen Erfahrung und intensiver Auseinandersetzung mit allen Facetten der Önologie – als Beruf und auch als alles vereinnahmende Freizeitbeschäftigung.

Name: Highball Distillery
Description:
Highball Distillery is committed to creating high-quality spirits from regional, organic ingredients through the use of environmentally-sustainable production practices.

Created by small-batch process, Elemental Vodka begins with organic soft-white wheat grown in the Pacific Northwest region. Each batch begins with 1000 lbs. of grain which is cooked in our custom, hand-built kettle and fermented in a 200 gallon fermentation tank. After fermentation, the grain and mash is returned to the kettle for the first distillation. Our proprietary distillating process involves two passes through our custom-built 8 ft. copper-packed column. After distillation, the vodka is filtered through activated carbon for several days until the desired result is achieved.

The entire process from grain to bottle is performed entirely within the Highball Distillery facility utilizing 100% wind-powered energy.All ingredients and processing is certified organic. The degree of control and attention to detail for every step of the process sets us apart from other vodka distilleries and results in an incredibly smooth, slightly sweet-tasting vodka unique from all others on the market.

Name: Økovin - specialist i økologisk og biodynamisk vin og spiritus
Description:
En smagsoplevelse vi gerne vil dele med dig
For nogle år siden var min kone og jeg på ferie i Sydfrankrig. Her boede vi i en lille landsby, og nød den dejlige mad, og den berømte sydfranske afslappethed.

Selvfølgelig nød vi også de gode vine, som blev købt hos den lokale vinbonde, hvis aftapning særligt faldt i min smag.

Bernard Bouyssou, som han hedder, fortalte, at årsagen til den fine kvalitet formentlig var, at han for længst havde lagt giftsprøjten på hylden, og at familiens vinmarker blev renset og plejet ved hjælp af håndkraft.

I betragtning af at en traditionel vinmark kan blive sprøjtet 24 gange i løbet af et år, er det noget af en bedrift!!

Mødet med Bernard Bouyssou, inspirerede mig til at oprette Økovin, der siden har udviklet sig til at være Danmarks største forretning med speciale i økologisk og biodynamisk dyrkede kvalitetsvine.

Vi har op mod 150 forskellige varer på lager på vores dejlige landbrugsejendom i Vestjylland. 
Jeg viser dem gerne frem næste gang, du kommer forbi, ligesom vi gerne præsenterer dem for selskaber.

Hvert år drager jeg fortsat sydpå for at finde de bedste økovine til vores forretning.
Derfor er økologi og kvalitet to sider af samme sag i Økovin.


Jens Lindby, økologisk vinhandler

Name: Jackson Hole Still Works
Description: Jackson Hole Still Works is the first craft distillery based here in the heart of Jackson Hole, Wyoming, creating award-winning spirits from the raw materials farmed in our neighboring Wyoming communities.  Good friends, owners, and partners Chas Marsh and Travis Goodman are passionate about capturing the hard work ethic of the western frontier into every bottle they produce and turning out the highest quality grain-to-glass craft spirits on the market.  Each small batch is produced by hand at Jackson Hole Still Works starting from local Wyoming grains and crisp mountain water flowing from the peaks of the Tetons.  JHSW’s product offerings currently boast vodka and gin, with more to come. Highwater Vodka is a naturally gluten-free, crisp, and velvety spirit crafted from Wyoming farmed corn and oats.  Great Grey Gin is an ultra small batch spirit with a unique botanical blend. Great Grey Gin yields a perfect balance of citrus, spice, and fresh floral notes in conjunction with the traditional juniper essence. Daily tours and tastings are available at the distillery. Come on by 3940 S Eagle View Drive or email info@jhstillworks.com

Name: Liquorificio d'Abruzzo
Description:
Siamo un’azienda nuova e dinamica, attenta ai valori e alle tradizioni della nostra Regione.
Quattro soci con una passione comune, la montagna.
Proprio da questa passione, nasce la voglia di condividere i frutti che la nostra terra ci offre con i nostri cari ed amici.
LA NOSTRA PASSIONE: L’INFUSIONE
L’Abruzzo è una miniera dal valore inestimabile dei tesori della natura, una terra che conserva i costumi, le tradizioni e tramanda di generazione in generazione le ricette tipiche della lavorazione dei prodotti.
Abbiamo iniziato a produrre i nostri primi elisir per diletto e man mano che abbiamo acquisito maggiori conoscenze tecniche ci siamo spinti nelle infusioni più diverse.
La giusta ispirazione è arrivata grazie anche all’aiuto dei nostri nonni che con le loro ricette custodite gelosamente, frutto di una vita semplice e a stretto contatto con la natura, hanno saputo farci stringere quel connubio indissolubile con il territorio.

LA NOSTRA IMPRESA: Il Liquorificio d’Abruzzo
La produzione dei nostri liquori nasce da una semplice sinergia: il nostro sapere e il rispetto verso la nostra Terra.
Con una particolare attenzione ai frutti che la natura crea attraverso il ritmo ed il dolce susseguirsi delle stagioni.

Nasce così nel 2012 il Liquorificio d’Abruzzo con una missione molto semplice: restituire al territorio un sapore autentico, dalle sensazioni quasi primordiali. 

UN PROCESSO INCENTRATO SULLA QUALITA’
La nostra attenzione verso la continua voglia di genuinità sa guidare le nostre scelte verso materie prime di eccellenza. Esse vengono attentamente selezionate e garantite da consorzi scelti tra i più virtuosi.

I processi di lavorazione seguono attentamente i loro ritmi, senza forzature e manipolazioni dettate da esigenze di mercato.

Name: Paula Kornell Sparkling Wine
Description:
Paula Kornell Sparkling Wine is the namesake brand of one of Napa Valley’s leading women in wine, who has lived and breathed this premier wine-growing region all her life. With two sparkling wines that draw on California’s past while attracting contemporary lovers of champagne and bubbles in general, Paula builds on the legacy of her family’s winery Hanns Kornell Champagne Cellars, the first to use “méthode champenoise” in California.

Paula Kornell Sparkling Wine is about crafting wines that are stylish, sophisticated, and engaging, and—importantly for Paula—food-friendly. Designed to be drunk with friends and family, raise a toast to California’s history and the rich pleasure of enjoying Paula Kornell Sparkling Wine.

Name: AROME Spirits Corp
Description: "Where are all the really great sipping rums?" Andrew Troyer, Founder of ARÔME Spirits, has spent his career in the luxury automotive and luxury yachting market.  This experience is evident in the design and quality of ARÔME 28, his first aged spirit release.  Focusing on exceptional quality and creating an unforgettable experience is the mission ARÔME Spirits.  Andrew's journey to create ARÔME began with searching for the most amazing aged rum.  This led him to an iconic Cuban-born and trained rum mastero with over 50 years of experience distilling, aging, and blending rum. Utilizing the expertise of the rum master and reserve of aged rum in Panama.  Utilizing the 50+ years of the rum mastero's experience, the blend was perfected and ARÔME 28 created.  Andrew believed that the presentation should compliment the quality of the rum inside the bottle, and so the creation of the bottle design, gift box, and even the label required a high level of attention to detail, an eye for contemporary design, and persistence.  It was a work of passion that took several years to complete in order to produce a product he could be proud of and stand behind.

Name: BERRY WINE
Description:
Berry Wine c'est LA sélection de vins et spiritueux centre-val de Loire. Notre volonté est de proposer une carte alternative à celle des spécialistes du secteur. Nous attachons une importance particulière au terroir, à l'histoire des viticulteurs et de leurs vignobles. Nous affectionnons les rencontres et les moments de convivialité avec nos partenaires et nos clients à l'occasion de dégustations. 

BERRY Wine, c'est aussi la découverte, le partage entre amis et l'accord mets-vins avec sa marque LARD DU VIN  ! Convivialité garantie !

Name: Vini & Agriturismo Isola Augusta
Description:
Isola Augusta da oltre 50 anni si occupa della produzione di Vini Doc, Spumanti, Grappa, Olio extravergine d’oliva e Miele. L’Azienda è ubicata nella zona Doc Friuli Latisana, nella parte orientale della provincia di Udine, vicino alle spiagge di Lignano Sabbiadoro. 
Tutti i vigneti sono condotti con sistemi a basso impatto ambientale e le uve prodotte vengono vinificate all’interno delle nostre cantine, dove ci occupiamo personalmente anche dell’imbottigliamento e della vendita seguendo tutte le fasi della filiera. 
Oltre ad una vasta gamma di vini bianchi e rossi possiamo annoverare tra la nostra produzione diversi vini autoctoni tra i quali il Friulano, la Malvasia Istriana, il Verduzzo Friulano, il Refosco d.p.r., la Ribolla Gialla e lo Schioppettino. 
Isola Augusta dispone anche di 10 appartamenti agrituristici a disposizione degli ospiti che vogliono trascorrere alcuni giorni immersi nella natura, un agriturismo e un punto vendita aziendale.

Name: Domaine de Tanella
Description:
Domaine viticole familial de 80 hectares à Figari Corse du Sud, certifié Haute Valeur Environnementale
Eleveur de brebis et producteur de fromage fermier

Name: Astoria Wine Group
Description: Astoria Wine Group is a wholesale wine and spirits broker based out of historic French Camp, California, United States.

Name: LAGENAM Consult.
Description:
LAGENAM signifie « bouteille », « carafe », ou « flacon » en latin. 

Vivant et travaillant avec et pour ces « flacons », pour la mise en avant de produits exceptionnels, nous décidons en 2018 de partager nos connaissances et notre enthousiasme par le biais du service et du conseil.

Notre ambition : partager un univers et transmettre une passion ! 
________________________________________________________________________

- Conseil et formations pour la filière “Vins et spiritueux”
- Événementiel dégustation, en cadre particulier et entreprise
- Construction/Représentation/Distribution de marque
- Caviste à domicile
________________________________________________________________

- Agent DRUNKEN HORSE GIN
- Agent WEMYSS
- Agent KINGSBARNS
- Agent DARNLEY’S GIN
- Agent THE WHISKY LODGE (Orcines; James Eadie; Bristol Classic Rum)
- Agent L'EAU DES VIVANTS

- Ambassadeur SCOTCH MALT WHISKY SOCIETY - Lyon
________________________________________________________________

Consulting. Formation. Dégustation.
Au service des professionnels comme des particuliers, LagEnam Consult. propose des prestations et sessions dégustation autour des spiritueux (Whisky, Rhum, Cognac, Armagnac, Tequila et Mezcal…) ainsi qu’un conseil affiné pour composition de carte, constitution d’une sélection de qualité et formations produits.

Sélectionnons ensemble, pour et selon vos besoins, un voyage au cœur d’histoires et de cultures intemporelles !

Plus d’infos sur : https://lagenam.fr/

Name: Sangría Yaya
Description: Somos un emprendimiento dedicado a la Elaboración y venta de Sangría Yaya, realizada en base a la autentica receta de la Yaya, una exquisita y tradicional Sangría para disfrutar con la familia y amigos en  cualquier ocasión.

Name: Quinta da Ribeirinha
Description:
(ENG) Quinta da Ribeirinha – A family wine story in the heart of Portugal’s Tejo region 

Located in Santarém, at the heart of the Tejo wine region, Quinta da Ribeirinha is a family-owned winery with several generations devoted to the art of winemaking.
From vineyard to bottle, we manage every stage of production — vineyard care, winemaking, bottling, sparkling wine production, and labeling — ensuring each wine reflects the authenticity, quality, and character of our terroir.
Our portfolio embraces two complementary approaches:

    Vale de Lobos – Our core range, deeply rooted in tradition and regional identity. Elegant, balanced wines that showcase Portuguese varieties such as Castelão, Touriga Nacional, and Fernão Pires, alongside well-adapted international grapes like Syrah, Merlot, and Sauvignon Blanc, among others.

    Contracena – Our creative, experimental label. Limited-edition wines that go off the beaten path — unexpected blends, unconventional winemaking techniques, and bold varietal expressions — crafted to surprise and delight curious wine lovers.

We craft wines that combine authenticity with excellent value, perfect for discerning customers seeking independent producers with a distinctive voice.

Name: SH Jones Wines
Description:
SH Jones is a family owned company that has been selling wines and spirits to discerning customers since 1848. Our producer partners are like minded businesses spread throughout the wine world, many of whom are also family concerns.

Our shared values mean that we strongly support sustainable and environmentally friendly practice. We re-use and re-cycle all our packaging and are working to be carbon neutral.

We focus on quality and value and list only those products that we would enjoy ourselves. So we can strongly recommend all our drinks: They deliver on quality and value and we think you’ll love them too!

If you are a restaurant, hotel, pub or indeed any establishment needing a regular drinks supply, then do get in touch. We know the importance of friendly, personal and efficient service and we will be very pleased to help with your requirements.

Name: Château Sigognac
Description:
Le Château Sigognac est un Cru Historique du Médoc, situé en bordure de Gironde, il a contribué au fil des siècles à la réputation de cette région mondialement connue par la constance et la qualité de ses vins.
Sur ce terroir exceptionnel, s’opère une véritable alchimie entre les sols argilo-calcaires et le climat de l’Estuaire, donnant au vignoble le potentiel idéal pour produire de très grands vins.

Le vignoble d’étend sur 50 hectares où Merlot, Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Franc et Petit Verdot expriment tous leurs potentiels. L’attention portée au tri et à l’éraflage de la vendange nous permet de gagner en finesse et de révéler la « rondeur » des raisins pendant les vinifications. L’élevage en barriques de chêne français durant 12 à 15 mois vient finir d’enrober les tanins de nos vins.

Name: Revolution Experiment LLC
Description:
An innovative spirits company established to introduce new and exciting products to market.  We take risks to bring discovery and experimentation to the adventurer in all of us.

Current Spirits portfolio includes Karate Cowboy, shattering the norm in the SAKE category.

Keep an eye out for our 2017 Spirit Launches expected, more to come...

Name: Spiritz UG (haftungsbeschränkt)
Description: Spiritz UG is a German beverage startup based in Elsenfeld, Bavaria. We are specialized in the development, production and marketing of exotic and innovative beverages (alcoholic and non-alcoholic). When developing the drinks, the focus is on high quality, sustainability and the avoidance of artificial additives and refined sugar, in order to offer our customers a unique taste experience. In addition, we attach great importance to transparent supply chains and resource-saving work processes, from the raw material supplier to the end consumer. Thus, we contribute to a positive development of our environment and continuously improve our processes to become more efficient. In addition, dealing fairly and sustainably with customers, partners and suppliers is our top priority. In order to make a positive contribution to the general public, we also combine the enjoyment of exotic drinks with social commitment and nature conservation. For this reason we use part of our profits to support social projects and environmental protection around the world. If you have any further questions, please send us an email to info@spiritz-drinks.com

Name: World Wide Wine, LLC
Description:
•	Founder of World Wide Wine, which operated as a leading Importer and Distributor of premium high-quality fine wines, champagne and artisan spirits in Illinois, Massachusetts, Florida, Louisiana, Texas., California. and Ohio. Successful distributor relationships formed and maintained.
•	Between 2008 and 2015 I made twenty-eight trips to Italy, Spain, France, Portugal and Argentina to increase my knowledge of wine varietals, production methods, terroir, winemakers and farmers. This allowed me the ability to import value driven high quality wines from over 29 different producers.
•	Maintained sales to over 100 on-premise accounts like (Morton’s, Coco Pazzo, Chicago Cut) and off-premise accounts like (Benny’s, Liquor Barn, Caputo’s), supervised all wine/champagne tasting events and supported local charity events throughout the years. 
•	Implemented a business model supporting sales, education, and brand development

Name: CSG Vini Sfusi - Bulk Wines by TINAZZI
Description:
LE RADICI STORICHE
CSG è il settore vino sfuso espresso dalla famiglia Tinazzi, nata in Veneto e diventata grande in Puglia, da cinquant’anni ambasciatrice nel mondo del vino italiano.

LA NUOVA CANTINA
CSG offre al cliente vini sfusi pugliesi raccolti e lavorati nella nuova sede produttiva Cantina San Giorgio a Faggiano, Taranto. 

IL PROTOCOLLO CSG
CSG lavora il prodotto sfuso con un severo Protocollo di tracciabilità totale dell’intera filiera per offrire al cliente vini di alta qualità garantita e costante.

CSG
Da cinquant’anni nel mondo del vino, la famiglia Tinazzi produce in Veneto e Puglia. 
Nella nuova sede produttiva CSG si lavora il prodotto sfuso con un severo Protocollo di tracciabilità totale dell’intera filiera per offrire al cliente vini di alta qualità garantita e costante.

La nostra cantina ha una capienza di circa 80.000 Hl ed è dotata di serbatoi di acciaio inox termo-condizionati con volumi che vanno dai 10 Hl ad un massimo di 2.500 Hl. 
I vinificatori hanno una capacità massima di 600 Hl cadauno. 
Le uve provengono dai 65 ettari vitati di proprietà, a cui si sommano circa 210 ettari provenienti da conferitori esterni.

LE CERTIFICAZIONI
La nostra azienda è certificata BRC – IFS e Operatore Biologico Reg. CE 834/07 e 889/08 in tutte le fasi di lavorazione; abbiamo iniziato nel 2021 l’iter di certificazione “Equalitas - Vino sostenibile”, che otterremo entro l’anno.

Per info e contatti
CSG
è una divisione di:
SAN GIORGIO SRL
Via Pitagora 1 – 74020 Faggiano – Taranto – Italy
Tel. +39 0995924445

SIMONA CEGLIE - Ufficio Commerciale:
simona.ceglie@csgbulkwines.it

www.csgbulkwines.it

Name: Fort Garry Brewing Co Ltd
Description: The Fort Garry Brewing Company Ltd is a brewery in Winnipeg, Manitoba.

Name: Domaine LE GUELLEC-DUCOUET
Description:
Domaine Le Guellec-Ducouet : L’Excellence de Gevrey-Chambertin
Situé au cœur de Gevrey-Chambertin, l’un des joyaux de la Bourgogne, le Domaine Le Guellec-Ducouet incarne l’alliance parfaite entre tradition et innovation. Fondé en 2018 par Michaël Le Guellec et Arnaud Ducouet, notre domaine familial fait revivre un héritage viticole remontant à 1920, avec des parcelles historiques comme le prestigieux "Clos Champ" (planté en 1930) et "Les Jeunes Rois" (planté en 1965).
Notre Mission : Sublimer le Terroir de Gevrey-Chambertin

 Une viticulture durable :
Certifiés Haute Valeur Environnementale (HVE), nous travaillons nos vignes avec passion et respect pour la nature. Nos pratiques raisonnées favorisent la biodiversité et préservent l’équilibre naturel du sol.

 Des vins d’exception :
Avec une production limitée à quelques milliers de bouteilles par an, chaque cuvée est un hommage à l’identité unique de Gevrey-Chambertin. Nos vins, comme le "Clos Champ" et "Les Jeunes Rois", se distinguent par leur élégance, leur puissance et leur remarquable potentiel de garde.

 Reconnaissance :
Nos cuvées sont saluées par les amateurs et les critiques pour leur finesse et leur authenticité. Nous sommes fiers de contribuer à perpétuer l’excellence des grands vins bourguignons.

Pourquoi nous suivre sur LinkedIn ?
 Découvrez les coulisses de notre domaine : nos méthodes artisanales, nos engagements écologiques et les actualités autour de nos cuvées.
 Rejoignez une communauté passionnée par le vin, la Bourgogne et le savoir-faire viticole.
 Collaborez avec nous : que vous soyez distributeur, restaurateur ou simple amateur, nous serions ravis d’échanger avec vous !

 Localisation : Brochon (Gevrey-Chambertin), Bourgogne, France
 Contact : domaine@leguellec-ducouet.com | +33 6 77 76 91 78
 Site web : www.leguellec-ducouet.com

Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure viticole !

Name: Washington DC International Wine & Food Festival
Description:
Whether you’re a seasoned oenophile or a new wine lover, the Festival’s main event will delight your palate with 100 international wineries pouring more than 600 wines for you to sample. Throughout the afternoon, you can taste your way through some of the world’s great wine producing regions including; Spain, France, Italy, Greece, New Zealand, and the U.S.

New this year is the International food pavilion. This delicious VIP experience will lead your palate to tastes from around the globe paired with premium wines. Your passport will guide you through six continents including Europe, The Middle East, North and South America, Australia and Asia. Pair class wines with bites of savory French passaldieres; traditional Italian prosciutto & mozzarella pannini; flavorful Spanish jambon as well as delicious and sustainable Alaskan wild salmon.

Name: LSESU Bacchus Wine Society
Description:
The LSE SU Bacchus Wine Society has been focused on wines and spirits education at the London School of Economics for over 100 years. The largest social society at the LSE, Bacchus warmly welcomes experienced and inexperienced drinkers alike. Furthermore, the Society is extremely diverse, containing undergraduates, postgraduates, PhD students and professors from around the world.

Bacchus endeavours to educate our members through professionally-guided tastings, culturally themed events and events that act as a platform for sponsors to introduce themselves to the Society’s membership. Our members are active lovers of wine and spirits and seek out not just LSE-based events, but engage with London's broader wine and spirits scene.
We accomplish this through numerous off-campus events, where students can relax and discover the city in which they study and may go on to make their home.

These events help students shape their tastes through unique and memorable experiences throughout their time at the LSE, often tailored by our partners and donors. The Bacchus committee works hard to expose members to premium products and world-class speakers by connecting them with carefully-selected brands, organisations and individuals.

Name: SPIRITS LAB BAVARIA GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Spirits Lab Bavaria is the "home of madness" of Fabian Klohs and Markus Oswald.

With our three brands BASSA BAVIEA, CIELO and MONK Distillery, the constantly growing brand portfolio now includes over 15 products.

From Amaro and Gin to Mezcal ("Mexcal"), Ouzo ("Duzo"), Rum ("Ruam") and Vermouth, Spirits Lab Bavaria offers an extensive range of handcrafted spirits from Bavaria.

Spirits Lab Bavaria sees itself as a creative lab in which we not only produce our well-known portfolio, but also want to constantly develop ourselves and the world of spirits." - Fabian Klohs

The focus is on production for the company's own brands and the development of products for the hotel, catering and corporate sectors. However, the "laboratory" anchored in the company name should also be taken into account.

"This is where we tinker, distil, macerate and taste. With a lot of flavour, manual work and a penchant for madness," says Markus Oswald with a grin. "The idea is not to reinvent the wheel, but to give it a higher profile."

Name: Left Bend Winery
Description:
Left Bend crafts distinctive wines from small vineyards scattered throughout the Santa Cruz Mountains.  The name “Left Bend” refers to the slight leftward bend in the San Andreas Fault, which helped form the Santa Cruz Mountains.  

Wines currently available at www.leftbend.com and at our Los Gatos Tasting Room include:

Name: Landa's Distillery
Description: Craft Distillery in the south of France passionate about making our unique Organic Pastis, Vodka, Gin and Whisky 100% Home Made

Name: Fries Family Wines
Description:
In an era of significant corporate ownership in the Northwest wine industry, our wineries and vineyards remain a close-knit family operation run by two generations of a Northwest farming family.

On Memorial Day Weekend of 1993, the family opened the doors to their first winery venture, Duck Pond Cellars, in Dundee, Oregon. Over the past two decades, the family has grown the brand into one of the leading producers of Oregon Pinot Noir and Pinot Gris. 

The Fries family has always been passionate about full-bodied red wines such as Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot and Syrah. This love prompted their 1992 acquisition of a 540-acre parcel of land on Eastern Washington’s Wahluke Slope, an area particularly suited to growing hot-climate varietals. The family dubbed the site Desert Wind Vineyard and spent three years planting Chardonnay, Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Syrah and a handful of other varieties. 

In 2001, they launched the Desert Wind brand to showcase their handcrafted wines from these vineyard sites. The Desert Wind facility in Prosser, Washington, is a destination unto itself. Perched on a bluff overlooking the Yakima River, its Southwest-inspired exterior houses a tasting room, event space, restaurant area and four overnight guest rooms. Ever the hard workers, family members were very involved throughout the entire process of designing and building the facility.

Name: The Gin Birds
Description:
Australian Craft Gin Subscription and Digital Gin and Tonic Store.

Founders of Australia’s first Consumer Gin Awards GinNation.

Distillery to doorstep,introducing Australian gin lovers to the best homegrown gins with the Gindex

Supporting Australian distillers through Gin Events 

Online Research and Taste Brand Testing

Name: Just Rioja Wine
Description:
Welcome to Just Rioja Wine - a passionate wine company I run in my spare time. I am offering:
1: Amazing wine experiences, wine - wine tastings - Rioja specialties, help with wine tours
2: Honest wines, only wines from a handful of the very best small bodegas familiares, in La Rioja.
3: Innovative AND Traditional wineries
Through my many annual trips to La Rioja I have tasted unique wines are not distributed in Denmark I also want others to have the opportunity: To taste the "real Rioja"
All Bodegas I have visited several times, they are very carefully selected, and I guarantee top qualities.
I offer wines from all three sub-areas in La Rioja - Rioja Alta, Rioja Alavesa and Rioja Baja.

Name: Simply Wine
Description: We organize our shop by tasting notes rather than region to better help connect you with wines you'll love, many of which are sustainable, organic or biodynamic. We also have a small spirits selection with a mix of well known brands, craft distilleries and locally made offerings. We offer 1-hour local delivery daily through our website.

Name: Lorenza Wine
Description: Lorenza Wine Company was founded in 2008 to make bright Mediterranean style wines from the sandy soils of Northern California. Owned and operated by the mother-daughter team, Melinda Kearney and Michele Lorenza Ouellet. Look for Lorenza in top restaurants and specialty shops. Join Le Club for regular deliveries.

Name: FIRST DRINKS (K) LTD
Description:
First Drinks (K) Ltd. is a company that leverages the international experience with the local knowledge. It’s network of directors identify and access beverages trending in leading global cities and introduce them to East Africa, Great Lakes & South Sudan, with Nairobi Kenya as the hub. We are a regional importer with a distribution footprint and capacity for both alcoholic and non-alcoholic brands throughout East Africa

First Drinks (K) Ltd identity’s market opportunities, form brand partnership and provide route to consumer for international premium brands. We work with our brand partners’ strategic vision, business model and propagate brand culture
Our strength and success is based on experience, human resource and a flawless trade strategy execution grounded in elaborate market knowledge and consumer insight

Name: Piccione Vineyards
Description: Piccione Vineyards is an Italian-owned and operated boutique vineyard and winery located in Swan Creek, just north of Charlotte, NC. Founded in 2010, Piccione Vineyards brings its Sicilian roots to the heart of North Carolina's wine country. In Vino, Salute.

Name: AUX VINS DE LA HALLE
Description:
Cave à vins sur la place du marché de Milly la forêt. 

Un tour des régions viticoles de France vous est proposé. Le rapport prix/plaisir est le seul objectif. Une belle sélection de spiritueux a été faite pour ravir vos papilles et pourquoi pas les surprendre.

 Que vous soyez un professionnel ou un particulier si vous avez un cadeau à faire, je sais répondre à votre demande.

Name: Ah So Insights
Description:
The wine and spirit industry has been slow adopt new ideas and techniques for sales, management, and branding. Ah So Insights embraces the notion that emotional intelligence and diversity should be more highly valued. The status quo isn’t good enough because it favors serving the past more than it values its stakeholders. It’s all a rather funny paradigm for this, the thing we call the hospitality business. 

So, what can you expect from Ah So Insights?

- A roadmap for new salespeople. Let’s face it. No matter where you land your first gig, this job doesn’t come with much in the way of training. Luckily, there’s no need to figure it all out from scratch. Let Ah So Insights be your mentor.

- Best practices for experienced managers and salespeople. Design smarter incentives, size up your competition, price your products properly, and find and hire talent like a pro. Pick up MBA skills when you don’t want to bother with reading the Harvard Business Review.

- Great ideas from other disciplines reimagined for the wine and spirit biz. Wine and spirits are boring. People and the things they do are interesting. Learn from people outside of the (Champagne) bubble.

- Techniques for wineries and distilleries working with importers and distributors. When you recognize that speaking to a brand or portfolio manager once a month isn’t getting the results you desire, Ah So Insights offers ideas into improving your business beyond the cellar door.

- Thoughts on branding: products, people and companies. Because we’re all snowflakes and owning who we are isn’t as simple as having an Instagram account.

Name: McKahn Wines
Description: McKahn Wines is a Napa Valley based wine brand dedicated to crafting limited production Rhone style wines of quality and character from some of the best vineyards in California.

Name: Terres Millésimées
Description:
Located in Saint-Emilion,Terres Millésimées is a story of friendship between the Johnny R.Saadé family, owner of two wine estates in Lebanon (Chateau Marsyas) and Syria (Domaine de Bargylus) and Stephane Derenoncourt, winemaker-consultant.
The wine cellar of Terres Millésimées benefits from a large choice of wines from Saint-Emilion and the Bordeaux region at large as well as a selection from other French and international wine-producing areas. With a tailor-made service, Terres Millésimées has been chosen by the monthly magazine Gault & Millau among the seventy best wine cellars in France.

Name: Eno Fine Wines
Description: ENO is a fine wine shop in the revitalized heart of downtown Providence.  We specialize in small boutique productions, those hard to find trophy items, and a great inexpensive selection of wine that is unique from most other stores in the region. We also have an extensive craft beer and spirits selection.

Name: Azienda Agricola Falcone Fausto
Description:
Vini di Nicchia 
Facciamo vino di qualità in un modo molto curato, scegliamo i migliori grappoli della pianta per vinificare, rispettando il ciclo della natura e i processi biologici in conversione bio.

Name: Bully Hill Vineyards Inc
Description: Bully Hill Vineyards provides wine and spirits. They are the producer of wine and restaurant, wine shop, two gift shops, and a wine museum. They also provide the restaurant with serving a range of cuisine from seafood to smoked barbecue, prepared salads, and other seasonal favorites. They also offer tasting room with fun and educational wine tastings.

Name: El Camino Wines
Description:
For fine Spanish wines and cava's selected by Berend Crans and Sijmen de Ranitz visit El Camino Wines B.V. at elcaminowines.nl. We are a very young company, started by two very senior guys who used to be lawyers for more than 40 years. And we know eachother for more than 62 years.
Bad luck for many of our friends: we only sell in the Netherlands.
We hope to have selected a number of fine wines in a wide price range and we trust that you will be able to find some wines of your liking on our site.
Suggestions and comments: info@elcaminowines.nl

Name: Ancien Wines
Description: Ancien Wines is a producer of fine Pinot Nour, Chardonnay and Pinot Gris Wines from select vineyard properties in Napa, Sonoma, Oregon and Central Coast

Name: Monte Cicogna
Description:
La Famiglia Materossi, proprietaria e fondatrice della Azienda Agricola Monte Cicogna a Moniga del Garda sulla sponda bresciana del Lago di Garda incomincia l’attività vitivinicola con il suo fondatore Pietro Materossi fin dal lontano 1908.

Oggi dopo più di un secolo di storia i fratelli Materossi, alla quarta generazione: Maria Grazia, Alessandro, Luigi, Chiara e Cesare continuano l’eredità  lasciata dal Padre Piero con la stessa filosofia e impegno del passato. Alessandro segue il cuore della azienda nelle vigne e nella cantina di vinificazione mentre Cesare cura la parte amministrativa e commerciale nel segno della continuità  aziendale. Gli insegnamenti, la passione e i segreti passati di padre in figlio sono custoditi e traghettano l’azienda nel XXI secolo con la stessa eccellenza di un tempo.

Name: Crafted Artisan Meadery, LLC
Description:
Located in rural Northeast Ohio Crafted Artisan Meadery specializes in award-winning, handcrafted Mead. Through the labors of the honeybees and flora around us we transform their work into one of the oldest fermented beverages in the world.

Look for our products at fine craft beverage retailers throughout Ohio, Florida, Virginia, DC, Kentucky, Indiana, or Chicago with more markets being added in 2015.  For more information find us at www.craftedmead.com or on our facebook page.  Also visit our tasting room just outside of Akron, Ohio on Thursdays/Fridays from 5:00-10:00 and Saturday from 11:00-10:00 for tours, tastings, on-premise sales, and retail bottles sales.

Description: LATITUDE WINE LIMITED is a wine and spirits company based out of 5 CHERRY TREE WALK, LEEDS, United Kingdom.

Name: Parson Gin
Description:
This is a true story.

Parson premium gin is inspired by the real Parson Russel terrier dog named Gin that spends most of his time in the popular rooftop bar managed by his owner.
 
The dog Gin knows hundreds of cocktail recipes by heart as he witnessed them all. He also knows many secrets that were shared in the bar. Would you like to know some?

The dog's owner loves two things the most: his dog and gin. That's why he named his dog Gin and that's why he started creating exceptional premium gin and named it after his dog. Parson premium gin is here for all those who love unique stories and desire the best.

Name: The Sampler (UK) Ltd
Description: The Sampler is a supplier of wines. They provide products that include red, white, sparkling, rose, orange, sweet, and fortified. They offer products that are available for shopping online. An online inquiry form is available on the company's website.

Name: Macerados Kay Pacha
Description:
Somos un equipo Peruano – Alemán y venimos operando desde el 01 de Agosto del 2016 en la Provincia de Cañete (Lima, Perú) a través de la elaboración de Macerados únicos a base de pisco Quebranta y seleccionadas frutas, hierbas, raíces y especias, creando sabores innovadores con aromas intensos. Maceramos sabores peruanos con virtudes alemanas para brindarte experiencias incomparables. ¿Te falta tu Schnapsidee?
Nuestras banderas dan color a nuestro logo, y nuestra imagen está basada en la historia de cómo el pisco obtuvo su nombre a raíz de la palabra quecha Pisku que se utiliza para denominar a un ave que se encuentra en la región del valle de Ica del Perú, a su vez se relaciona con el co – fundador de apellido Alemán Vogel que en traducción al español significa ave. La unión de colores e imagen da vida a Kay Pacha, un mundo de macerados, aquí y ahora.
El objetivo de nuestra empresa familiar es poder ofrecer a nuestros clientes productos que los acompañen en sus momentos especiales y hacerlos una experiencia incomparable. Puedes disfrutar de nuestros Macerados Kay Pacha en muchos momentos y en muchas ocasiones. Cuando te has graduado de la universidad o hiciste algo especial en tu trabajo, cuando pides nerviosamente la mano de tu novia o si simplemente quieres pasar una noche relajante con tus amigos o familiares. Las ocasiones en tu vida son numerosas y variadas y tan coloridas como tu vida. Por ello, por medio de nuestros sabores te ofrecemos una gama interesante de opciones para acompañarte en estos momentos importantes.

Nuestros licores naturales & peruanos bajo recetas & normas alemanas:

Macerado de Kión
Macerado Sueños Navideños, macerado a base de la canela
Macerado de Café
Macerado de Café con Rocoto
Macerado de Naranja con Café
Macerado de Naranja con Durazno
Macerado Malteado, un excelente macerado a base de la malta negra

Los Macerados Kay Pacha están obtenibles en diferentes presentaciones y también como regalos personalizados y regalos corporativos.

Backpack Wines are all about enjoying delicious, versatile wines in their most straightforward and laid back form - in a can, perfect for a night around a campfire, the wedding of your best friend and all those moments in between.  Have fun, enjoy life, make things easy - skip the cork and grab a pack. 

Backpack Wine

Name: The High Road wines
Description:
For those whose sense of taste favours the elegance and complexity of classic Bordeaux-style reds, The High Road is the perfect destination.

Established in 2003 as a boutique négociant producer, The High Road has cultivated a considerable reputation amongst Bordeaux aficionados.

The brand has been built on four unwavering pillars of distinction: exclusive sourcing of quality grapes perfected by the Stellenbosch Terroir, a single-minded focus on Bordeaux Varietals, an insistence on using a considered selection of fine French Oak barrels, and our proprietary High Road Practices.

Guided by our consultant winemakers for the past 15 vintages, we have succeeded in producing exceptional vintage-specific wines with the elegance, intrinsic depth and distinction of a classic Bordeaux red at their core.

The epitome of Bordeaux, yet expressing a sense of place that is uniquely Stellenbosch.

Name: The Whisky Works
Description:
We are a luxury whisky experience company based out of New Delhi, India and we curate whisky experiences for our clients - private and corporate - for every occasion.

We are home to India's 1st Certified Woman Whisky Ambassador from the UK and we are here to spread the whisky love because if there is one thing we know, it is that THE WHISKY WORKS!

A right hand to wine industry, Vinret is helping wine businesses make money by bridging the gap between customer and business. With more than 31.4 billion wine bottles bought and sold yearly*, and 36 billion manufactured across 150+ countries and regions, Vinret promotes wine-to-people-to-business connection, relationship and enjoyment around the world.

Name: OT Società Agricola srl
Description:
Oliviero Toscani, famous photographer, lives in Casale Marittimo (PI) where he founded this big farm where we grow olive trees, vineyards and we breed horses, cow and pigs.

OT by Oliviero Toscani is a small production of red wine of about 12.000 bottles for vintage 2006, that will grow to 35.000 by vintage 2010 produced on our farm near Casale Marittimo (PI) in Tuscany, Italy.
The project is followed by winemaker Attilio Pagli who has blended Syrah (50%), Cabernet Franc (35%), Petit Verdot (15%) for the 2006 vintage.
Our product has had a very positive response from both the press and consumers. Moving forward we believe that the creativity and support of La Sterpaia (www.lasterpaia.it) is our added value. La Sterpaia, owned and operated by the Toscani family, is a full service communications company that successfully manages the identity of some of the most successful international brands. We believe that combining a strong visual presence with the highest level of wine craftsmanship will bring OT by Oliviero Toscani success. Being a niche producer that’s just launched its product, we’re still looking for the best partners to understand and align with our philosophy. We believe this venture has great potential and look forward to realizing this vision.

Name: Schneider's of Capitol Hill
Description:
Schneider’s of Capitol Hill is a family enterprise owned by brothers Rick and Jon Genderson. They now have been joined by Rick’s son Josh, who is the fourth generation in the business. All three are proud residents of Capitol Hill.

The Genderson family has a long and storied history on the Hill that dates back to the dim decades before Prohibition. In 1915, Rubin Genderson, Jon and Rick’s grandfather, purchased a bar on the corner of 10th and C Streets, SE. Known as Walter’s, the establishment sold beer brewed down the street at the National Capitol Brewing Company. Rubin’s family lived above the bar.

Unfortunately for Rubin, Prohibition arrived in the District in 1917. It forced Rubin to officially sell “near” beer. In the meantime, the real stuff continued to be brewed upstairs in the bathtub. The police occasionally fined the bartenders, but otherwise life proceeded. Rubin, however, decided the tailoring business was a safe bet and moved to the Stanton Park area. His brothers eventually divested themselves of the bar altogether.

In 1949, Abe Genderson, Rubin’s son, returned to the liquor business in partnership with his father-in-law, Max Schneider. Their new establishment was known as Schneider’s. There were only two other employees, Jon’s and Rick’s mother Charlotte and Ester, their grandmother.

Schneider’s has now been a Capitol Hill institution for over 60 years. Jon, Rick and Josh maintain the same commitment to customer service, selection and low prices as did Max and Abe.

Name: El Tío del Vino
Description:
El Tío del Vino, aquí entendemos el vino de otra forma y eso es lo que aconsejamos a nuestros amigos que por esta misma razón repiten con nosotros.

Te recomendamos tu Vino para cada momento, para que hagas en casa con tu pareja, tus amigos, etc… un maridaje perfecto donde mezclar sabores y momentos inolvidables. Danos tu menú y te proponemos el vino, no fallaras nunca ponemos nuestro conocimiento a tu disposición.

También en El Tío del Vino  disponemos de vinos a Granel, para que saborees la tradición del buen hacer, Pedro Ximénez, Dulce, Montilla, Vermut, etc… vuelve a lo tradicional como hacían tus abuelos llévate un Vino con tradición y saboréalo, TE SORPRENDERA

Además como sabemos que vas a tener momentos especiales en tu vida, Boda, Bautizos, Despedidas de solteros, Cenas, etc…, te proponemos que personalices tus botellas, nosotros nos encargamos si quieres de hacerte un diseño.

El Tío del Vino, donde lo que nos preocupa no es tener clientes, es tener amigos que se encuentren a gusto con nosotros. Llámanos o envíanos un correo y haznos tu propuestas, te daremos nuestro consejo y solución.

Name: PELONIC pour Gallusette
Description:

L'abus d'alcool est dangereux pour la santé, à consommer avec modération.

Name: Terroirist.com
Description: Terroirist was launched in November 2010 to revolutionize the wine blogosphere by covering everything in the wine world, daily. Since its launch, Terroirist has received several accolades, including “Best New Wine Blog” at the 2011 Wine Blog Awards. The blog has also been highlighted in the New York Times, Washington Post, and many other top publications.

Name: GEORGES BARBIER OF LONDON LIMITED
Description:
We are one of the finest wine importers / merchants in the UK and started our company in 1983 with the concept of sourcing wines from small, independent wineries who respect tradition and the environment.  This, inevitably, leads to quality wines with a distinctive regional flavour and individuality.  We decided to concentrate on wines from France and Spain as these countries offer a wealth of diversity, not only from the classic areas such as Bordeaux and Rioja but from lesser known areas where real gems can be found!

Our team can offer you in-depth information on all of our products and would be more than happy to discuss your requirements and to advise you of any products that we feel might prove of interest.  Although our main business is supplying top end hotels and restaurants in the UK, we are always delighted to receive private enquiries as we hope that we can share our love of wines with like minded people.

Name: Nova Cellars Winery
Description: We specialize in create hand crafted beverages and experiences.  We currently own and operate Nova Cellars Winery, Fractured Grape Wine Cellars, Knockin Noggin Cidery and Winery, Liquid Fusions Olive Oils and Balsamic Vinegar's, n Brew 32 Craft House and Nova Distilling.  All of our locations feature a unique blend of theme and personal experience.

Name: RENE COFFEE PADS MAGMAR Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Our family business was founded over 27 years ago and now the second generation of owners lead the business.

We offer a  wide variety of coffees and teas under our brands René and Celmar. Our business has been built on many years of experience of traditional coffee and tea production but more importantly we have been at the forefront of the dramatic market trend of new single serve coffee and tea products. We have invested in the best state of the art machinery to ensure that we can supply this ever growing single serve market by being able to offer our customers the best quality product options.

We have been a coffee producer  since 1991.  We offer coffees packed in several  kinds of universal  single – serve systems –  Coffee Pads, Compatible Coffee Capsules (Nespresso, Dolce Gusto, K-Cup).

We offer a wide variety of different bean coffees including Single Origin, Fairtrade and Organic which can be selected for roasted bean, ground or any of the single serve options.

Over  the years  we have built a strong, harmonious  and well trained  team of experienced people.

We have our own large roasting  and packaging facility.  Our manufacturing process covers each activity within the supply chain,  from the purchasing  of green coffee beans, roasting,  grinding , packaging and  distribution.

We sell our products not only under  our  brands and Rene,  Celmar and  Castello, but also as  a private-label  products  under retailer`s and  distributor`s labels or brands. We sell our coffees and  teas not only in Poland but also throughout Europe. Although we focus primarily on Europe we  al have customers in the Middle and Far East.

We are also a producer of all kinds of tea (black, green, herbal, fruit) packed in PYRAMID , also TEA capsules  as well as double chamber teabags.

Name: Garrafeira Antiga
Description:
A Garrafeira Antiga surgiu como um complemento à atividade da empresa de comércio de antiguidades ANTIQUOESTE, e dedica-se ao comércio de todo o tipo de bebidas antigas colecionáveis. Temos um grande stock de bebidas, sempre em renovação e repartidas por vários subgéneros. Navegue na nossa loja online e se tiver alguma questão a fazer entre em contacto, estaremos ao seu dispor!
A Garrafeira Antiga é uma loja online que fornece aos consumidores produtos de alta qualidade sem terem que sair de casa. A nossa loja é sinónimo de qualidade e garantimos uma diversidade única de produtos para qualquer orçamento.
Procuramos servir os nossos clientes com uma oferta cada vez mais ampla e diversificada de bebidas, com o intuito de despertar o prazer de desfrutar daquilo que melhor a história nos pode dar…

Name: The Corkcierge Company
Description: The Corkcierge Co. was founded with the mission of bringing better Wines and Spirits into Nigeria, from independent winemakers and distillers all around the world, direct to our verified clients and customers.

Name: Distillerie Oushkabé
Description: Oushkabé est un projet de microdistillerie artisanale spécialisée dans les spiritueux d'inspiration écossaise.

Name: Sabotage Wine
Description: We could be your personal Jesus, but we just import natural wine

Name: Víno Matyšák
Description:
Family winemaking of Peter Matyšák was found in 1991 in a 300-hundred-year vineyard house in the center of Pezinok. Today the former winemaking building became a restaurant called "Vinum Galeria Bozen". Modern winemaking has been built from scratch in 2002, in a part of Pezinok, that is called Glejovka (due to the old glue factory). Cellar is equipped with a state-of-the-art technology allowing wine production of the highest quality. In 2006 a separate cellar for wine maturing in oak and barrique barrels was added to winemaking. The essential element of wine is primarily quality raw material which comes from the best vineyards of Lesser Carpathian and South Slovak wine region. Víno Matyšák successfully collaborates with the leading vine-growers for more than two decades, there is enough raw material for production of stable selection of wine and other products.

Accept our invitation, freshen up, enjoy the best what we have for you, gain experience for more intensive and valuable life!

Yours sincerely, 
Peter Matyšák

Name: Weingut Cowell
Description: We are a small winery located on the Mosel focusing on handcrafting unique and high-quality wines.

Name: Nordic Distillers
Description: Our vision is to inspire individuals to create positive shared experiences. Our mission is to deliver the indulgent Kringle flavor to create happiness. Maker of Kringle Cream liqueur. Woman-owned.

Name: Azienda Agricola Fratelli Aimasso
Description:
Produzione e vendita da oltre 50 anni, di Vini.
Nel cuore delle langhe a Diano d'Alba a pochissimi chilometri da Alba, produciamo i nostri nella nostra azienda con i vigneti che la circondano totalmente.
Ogni anno produciamo il nostro rinomato dolcetto DIANO d'ALBA, che dal 2010 è diventato DOCG.

Name: Barnstormer Distillery
Description: Barnstormer Distillery is not your typical distillery. We are do things differently (in good ways) than your typical distillery. We are true believers in “Craft” Distilling. Like the Barnstorming pilots of the 1920s, we don’t use fancy instruments or automatic controls. We use Ssight, sound, taste and smell to make our Spirits. We use both hot and cold distillation to highlight flavors of the Midwest. We grow our own fruits, herbs and vegetables on our 22 acre farm to flavor our “from the farm” series Vodkas.

Name: Siboney Cellars
Description:
Siboney Cellars (See-Bo-NAY) is located on Wine Road 290 in the beautiful Texas Hill Country wine region.  Siboney is building a custom, full production winery, estate vineyard on a limestone plateau, and intimate tasting room, replete with tours and tasting experiences featuring spectacular views, just 4 miles west of Johnson City. 

Founders Miguel and Barbara Lecuona established Siboney in 2017.  The logo signifies the brand promise, with a grapevine bud placed in the center of an architectural quatrefoil window.  The window calls to mind a detail design found in missions in San Antonio, as well as atop the Cathedral of Havana, tying in the journey of the family from Cuba to Texas. The bud-burst is extracted directly from a photograph Miguel took while studying in Bordeaux - a 50 year old first growth Cabernet vine from the historic 2009 Vintage. Together, they create a motif that symbolizes the hope and promise of annual renewal, at any age.

In 2019, Miguel and Barbara forged a dynamic partnership with Bill and Mary Anne Waldrip, and together, the team acquired the beautiful, terraced 52 acre site to build the winery and plant the first estate vineyard.

Tastings and site tours are available on weekends under shady heritage oaks.  and at the terrace vineyard while winery construction continues.
Thursday evenings are special in the Summer and early fall -- Twilight Tastings are offered from 6-9PM, capturing the transition of light and the simple experience of conviviality with friends at sunset in a beautiful natural setting.

Book a tasting at: https://www.siboneycellars.com/visit

The new Siboney Wine Club is open to new membership. Follow the construction of the new facility blog and catch live broadcasts online via social media.  For more information contact Miguel@siboneycellars.com

Name: Tramonte Distributing Co
Description: Tramonte Distributing Co. distributes alcoholic beverages. Tramonte Distributing prides itself on being a solid corporate citizen. Tramonte is at the forefront of the effort to encourage responsible consumption, sponsoring a safe ride program during key holiday periods. Tramonte also offers certified TIPS training to retailers. They are a major contributor to and are actively involved in a variety of both local and national charities.

Name: Atze's Corner Wines | Barossa Valley
Description:
Estate grown vineyards making single vineyard, low yielding, Old Vine, unique varietal and blends of premium wine from the Barossa Valley, South Australia.
Founded by 6th generation Wine grower Andrew Kalleske, Atze's Corner Wines is named after what the locals have long since referred to as Atze's Corner. This is were Atze's Corner oldest surviving vineyards sit, aged 61 and 100 years, they produce special and rare wines.

Name: Liquorhum
Description:
Liquorhum est un site de vente aux enchères de Rhum par des particuliers et par des professionnels.
Présentez vos bouteilles aux enchères ou enchérissez sur ceux des vendeurs sur la plateforme.

Name: Thompson's
Description: Distillée et vieillie en fûts de chêne du Limousin, la gamme Thompson's est la seule gamme d'eaux de vie de raisin issues d'une seule et unique distillerie bordelaise.

Name: Leuta Boutique Winery
Description:
The ‘LEUTA WINE’ project represents our most important challenge, the way in which we want to communicate our philosophy, our way of making the sometimes difficult choices we have to make.

However, we believe that in addition to the wine product, which is establishing itself in the oenological panorama even abroad, there shall also be a reality, a structure that is able to express our way of being.

From this point of view, nature is not a restriction or an obstacle to be surmounted, but rather an extremely important element, with which we have to live and to interact in a constructive and favourable way.

The Leuta Estate in San Lorenzo is a restocking area where hunting is not allowed; although we respect the ideas of the others, sometimes we take different, autonomous ways.

Name: ARION VINS
Description:
Commerce de vins et alcools par correspondance
Recherche de vins particuliers
Offres hebdomadaires
Préparation de livre de cave
Conseils relatifs
Cadeaux d'entreprises
Expéditions, livraisons à domicile gratuite entre Genève et Lausanne,
Organisation de voyage, repas dégustations...

Name: Casavino Winery
Description:
Arizona based Casavino Custom Winery provides a unique experience that is unlike any other. For over a decade, Casavino Winery has specialized in teaching customers how to make quality wine - no experience is necessary. Casavino Winery uses fresh juices from our California vineyards as well as juices from vineyards all around the world. We have a University of California-Davis enrolled wine maker that leads our wine production team.

Come out to the winery, relax and taste some of our multiple award-winning wines. Pick a varietal to make on site. One of our expert wine makers will walk you through the process and when your wine is ready for bottling, you (and your friends!) return to the winery to bottle your wine and take it home with you.

Included in the batch price is professional label design with our in-house graphic artist for a one of a kind superior and stunning label. Individual bottles of wine are available for purchase at the winery. You can also find our wines at restaurants and retailers throughout the valley.

Casavino Winery also provides restaurants and retailers with unique solutions to increase wine sales and further brand their company.

Name: Soldier of the Sea Distillery
Description: Whiskies and bourbon produced at Soldier of the Sea Distillery is made, bottled, and labeled by hand. Grain and honey is locally sourced for both our aged and un-aged whiskeys.

Name: La contre-étiquette
Description:
Marchand de vin depuis plus de 5 ans, par le biais de notre site internet et de notre cave dans le 10ème arrondissement  de Paris (36 rue sainte Marthe), nous sélectionnons pour vous des vins singuliers et pointus, pour la plupart issus de la biodynamie ou de la culture biologique, et soutenons dans le même temps ces vignerons indépendants guidés par leur passion. 

Une démarche singulière et engagée, à contre-courant des sélections habituelles et standardisées : plutôt que de vous proposer un nom ou une réputation, nous préférons vous faire découvrir aujourd’hui les producteurs de demain.

Petite anecdote, une contre-étiquette correspond aux mentions que l’on peut trouver parfois au dos d’une bouteille, et qui apporte des informations sur le cépage, le terroir, les notes gustatives, le producteur… En quelque sorte, la face cachée d’un vin.

Name: Vinícola Alto do Gavião
Description:
Nosso “terroir” é um antigo pasto desgastado situado na Serra da Mantiqueira. Nossos vinhedos foram plantados em 2.019 a 800m de altitude, na beira de um pequeno açude. Temos muito sol e grande amplitude térmica, sem histórico de geadas e cerca de 1.250mm de chuva por ano.

Plantamos 21 variedades de uvas tintas e brancas. Após alguns anos de testes vamos selecionar, para ampliar nossos vinhedos, as variedades que apresentarem a maior qualidade no nosso terroir.

Todos esses testes combinados com as características de clima e solo junto com o intensivo cuidado do nosso time garantem que teremos, a partir de 2.022, excelentes vinhos "de inverno".

Name: DOMAINE DUMETRIER
Description:
DOMAINE DUMETRIER 

Located in Romania, Dobrogea region, on the Danube’s banks, between the communes of Cochirleni  and Rasova, the Domaine DUMETRIER project includes the vineyard, the winery, as well as a hotel, spa,  restaurant and farm that will be used as the restaurant's supplier. Within the hotel there will be a bar and a  conference room, and the spa will have two saunas, two massage rooms, a Turkish bath, indoor and outdoor  pool. 
In this harmonious and sustainable universe, we want to offer our guests a unique experience that  brings together wine, gastronomy, architecture, nature, people and culture. 
We paid special attention to the architecture, so that the winery and the rest of the complex, which stretches over two hectares, can integrate naturally into the Danube landscape. 
The Domaine DUMETRIER vineyard is located near the banks of the Danube, covering 2 hills on an  area of 73 hectares. It was planted in 2011 protecting the characteristics of the chosen terroir and starting  with the year 2021 all the surface is ecological. In this balanced ecological environment, we also integrated  varieties less planted in Romania such as Malbec, Mourvèdre, Semillon, and Negru de Drăgăsani. Classic  varieties are added to them, such as Chardonnay, Sauvignon blanc, Merlot, Cabernet sauvignon and Syrah. 
Each Domaine DUMETRIER wine expresses the purity of the variety, the naturalness of the fruit, the  expression of the terroir and passes through a rigorous internal selection. 
The construction of the winery will be completed at the end of 2023, and the hotel, restaurant and  spa will open their doors to guests in late 2025.

Name: Vinícola Raízes do Baú
Description:
A Vinícola Raízes do Baú está localizada de frente para a monumental Pedra do Baú no coração da Serra da Mantiqueira. 
Somos uma vinícola de pequena escala de vinhedos e vinhos de colheita de inverno, que foca em produzir uvas de altíssima qualidade, para então, obtermos vinhos finos fantásticos, que representem fielmente toda a complexidade do terroir da Serra da Mantiqueira, que contam a história de cada safra. 
Criamos e desenvolvemos experiências enoturísticas imersivas com o objetivo de aproximar cada visitante do vinhedo por meio de informações e conhecimentos compartilhados de forma próxima, informada e descomplicada, transformando, impactando e melhorando sua relação com o todos os processos de fabricação e consumo do vinho para sempre.

Name: Elif A.Ş.
Description:
Elif Turizm Ticaret ve İşletmecilik A.Ş.

Firmamız Elif Turizm Ticaret ve İşletmecilik A.Ş. , Numan Gümrükcüler tarafından Alanya’da dağıtım ve pazarlama alanında faaliyet göstermek amacıyla kurulmuştur. Sektördeki istikrar ve başarılarıyla hizmet alanını genişleterek 2010 yılında Antalya’da satış , pazarlama ve dağıtım faaliyetlerine başlamıştır.

Elif A.Ş Numan bey’den sonra oğulları Mustafa Gümrükcüler ve Hüseyin Gümrükcüler yönetiminde saygın geçmişi ve yenilikçi bakış açısı ile bir çok farklı sektörde  yatırımlar yaparak ticari yelpazesini genişletmiş, başarısını Turizm, Otelcilik ve İşletme sektörüne de taşımıştır.

2005 yılında Redtower Restaurant, 2007 yılında Pupa Café ile Alanya’da yeme içme sektörüne değer katan işletmeleri faaliyete geçirmiştir. Elif A.Ş. bugün Kaleiçi meyhanesi ile birlikte 2 gözde işletmesiyle hizmet sektöründe faaliyetlerine devam etmektedir.

Elif A.Ş., ilk kez 1997 yılında kurulan Numa Konaktepe Otel ile birlikte otelcilik alanındaki faaliyetlerine başlamış ve 2017 yılında kurulan Numa Bay Exclusive Otel ile birlikte sektörde hızla ilerleyişine devam etmektedir.

Bugün Elif A.Ş. kendisine misyon olarak edindiği Türk Turizminin dünyadaki seçkin bir elçisi olma anlayışını gerçekleştirebilmek adına Numa Hotels çatısı altında iki oteli ile hizmet vermektedir. Her yıl Almanya, Hollanda, Rusya, İngiltere ve daha bir çok ülkeden konuklarını geleneksel misafirperverlik anlayışından ödün vermeden ağırlamakta, sektörün dinamiklerini yakından takip ederek güven duyulan bir marka olma yolunda istikrarlı bir şekilde ilerlemektedir.

Şirketimiz ortalama 600 kişiye istihdam sağlamaktadır.
