Name: Antica Casa Vitivinicola Italo Pietrantonj
Description: L’Azienda Pietrantonj racconta una storia di oltre due secoli fatta di passione, tradizione ed innovazione. Risalgono al lontano 1791 le attestate testimonianze dell’attività della nostra famiglia da sempre dedita alla viticoltura e all’agricoltura. Da ben 8 generazioni l’attività vitivinicola ha luogo nei tenimenti di Vittorito e Corfinio siti nel cuore della Valle Peligna, luogo di origine del Montepulciano d’Abruzzo e culla sin dall’epoca romana della più pregiata e decantata produzione vinicola. Oggi le tenute di proprietà si estendono su una superficie totale di circa 100 ettari di cui 60 vitati. Le uve vengono vinificate nelle cantine storiche aziendali situate nel centro del piccolo borgo medievale di Vittorito.

Činjenica da je diverzitet autohtonih sorti zemalja zapadnog Balkana (Adria region) ogroman, donosi ideju da se stvore jedinstvene kupaze autohtonih sorti regiona. Vodjen tom idejom naš osnivač Stevan Karić uvodi termin Adria cuvee (kupaža, blend) koji podrazumeva korišćenje regionalnog sortimenta kako u crvenim tako i u belim kupažama. 
   Konačni cilj je unapredjivanju i promocija autohtonih sorti Adria regije.

Name: Az. Agr. Menegotti
Description:
L’Azienda Agricola Menegotti è situata nell’incantevole cornice delle colline Moreniche di Custoza, territorio ideale per la produzione di vini di elevata qualità. Un’esperienza di più di mezzo secolo che si tramanda da tre generazioni, partendo dal nonno Antonio Menegotti che già negli anni ’50 produceva vino.
Negli anni ’70 i figli Vittorino e Giorgio acquistano i primi vigneti di proprietà del Conte Mendini, di cui il nonno Antonio era fattore, e nel 1972 inizia la prima produzione a marchio Menegotti, con le linee DOC di Custoza, Bardolino e Bardolino Chiaretto.
Negli anni la passione e la costanza per il lavoro porta l’Azienda a diversificare l’offerta con altre tipologie di prodotti in particolare quella degli spumanti metodo classico, di cui l’Azienda Agricola Menegotti può considerarsi punto di riferimento nella provincia di Verona, per la qualità della produzione, nella quale spicca il Custoza spumante, con 24 mesi di fermentazione in bottiglia.
Tra gli anni ’90 e 2000 entra in Azienda la terza generazione rappresentata dai nipoti Antonio e Andrea.
La saggezza della tradizione è tramandata all’attuale generazione, Antonio e Andrea applicano con perseveranza e impegno costante i metodi e la cura dei padri.
Un lavoro che non cede ai lusinghieri compromessi del mercato, l’obiettivo è quello di mantenere e rendere la massima espressione qualitativa del territorio con un atteggiamento favorevole all’innovazione.
Bianchi, Rossi o Spumanti hanno come denominatore comune l’eleganza, che è ottenuta attraverso l’equilibrio di tutte le componenti del vino, equilibrio da cui deriva un prodotto armonico e di grande piacevolezza.

Name: Winemarket Pty Ltd
Description:
winemarket.com.au is your doorway to the inner sanctum of the Australian wine industry, your insider on the ground with access to the kind of deals the big retailers wouldn't see in a month of sober Sundays. That's because while they're knotting their silk ties and reconciling their restaurant expenses, we're working side by side with our winemaking mates, kicking Barossa dirt off our boots and trying to shift shiraz stains off our jeans.

Based in the Barossa Valley, we have an ongoing relationship with a huge number of winemakers. We're part of the winemaking community, not a bottom-line driven behemoth that feeds off it. They know us and trust us. We shake hands. That means we can get the deals no-one else can. Often they're small lots, vintage changeovers, export order left overs and the like. They come in fast and we intend to get them out the same way. All you have to do is click a button.

Real wines from real people and real places
Fair prices. We don't have big overheads so why should you pay more than you should
Straight talk. If it's a quaffer we'll tell you, just as we will when we get a super premium wine at a great price.
Every wine tasted by our expert buyers before they sign the cheques.
If we wouldn't drink why would we sell it?
A Quality Guarantee. If you're not happy, we'll refund your money
Simple and transparent pricing

Name: Andegavia
Description:
Andegavia Cask Wines produces ultra-premium and luxury-class wines in proprietary, sustainable cask-style packaging. Andegavia is the first sustainably packaged, luxury ecommerce wine brand focused on direct-to-consumer delivery. The brand was born out of the belief there had to be a better, greener way to enjoy really good wines everyday. Andegavia launched in mid 2014 and the response to our award winning wines and equally intriguing 3L packaging has been really good. In just a short time, Andegavia has successfully established its brand, built a D2C business with direct shipping to 35+ states and has begun to attract interest from major national retailers. 

Andegavia has been showcased as a leader in this emerging space by Forbes, Wine Spectator's Market Watch, N Magazine and BevNet. Andegavia is well positioned to capitalize on existing market trends and all indicators suggest that consumers are gravitating towards high quality wines in alternative packaging.

Name: Railroad Brewing Co. - Il Birrificio di Seregno
Description: Birrificio. Centro sociale. Punto di ritrovo. Non siamo a chilometro zero, ma a chilometro vero, autentico. Spinti dalla sete, abbiamo girato il mondo, bevendo nelle peggiori bettole del pianeta, visitando i birrifici più punk della storia, alla ricerca di nostri simili.Ma abbiamo scelto di tornare qui, a casa nostra, dove tutto è iniziato. Dove spesso il cielo è grigio ma i cuori, come le pinte, sono sempre in alto.La sobrietà non ci appartiene, in molti sensi. L’unica cosa che facciamo con serietà è la birra, in cui mettiamo tutti noi stessi per raggiungere qualità, ricette originali e sapori diversi.Per il resto preferiamo prenderci in giro, essere quello che siamo. E divertirci. Questo è il nostro retrogusto ed è ovunque: sulle etichette, sulle bottiglie, nel nostro birrificio.

Name: Azienda Agricola Urlari
Description:
Azienda Agricola Urlari is unique amongst Italian wineries in that it integrates the best elements of wine making from around the globe.

Italy contributes the lands, the Tuscan sun and perfect micro climate, Sangiovese grapes, and most importantly, a passion for great wines.  Urlari embraces the Italian wine industry's philosophy that the most critical factor in making great wine is the purity and intensity of the grapes.  

The Bordeaux varietals, cabernet sauvignon, merlot, cabernet franc, Alicante bouchet and petit verdot were imported from France and planted, with the Tuscan Sangiovese plants, in 2006.  These varietals were selected for their individual strength and character, and for the potential result when they are artfully blended.

Jean-Philippe Fort, one of the most recognized and respected wine makers from Bordeaux, joins our team as our winemaker.  Jean-Philippe has worked with Michel Rolland's team for more than 20 years, consulting 70 wineries with more than 40% Grande Cru classe.  He brings the French touch and his personal style and vision for blending Bordeaux wines.  He was drawn to work on our project in Tuscany, his first time working beyond French borders, by the opportunity to create a wine that incorporates all modern thinking and theories from farming to winemaking to marketing.

For more information about our wine venture, please visit our website www.urlari.com

Winery and farm-hotel.
Our estate lays on the hills facing the lake Garda.
The estate is 5 acres of vineyards, kept like a garden, and a Maison de Charme that can turn your visit into an unforgettable experience. The farm-hotel is situated very close to the cellars, and is only a few minutes from the lake and half an hour from Verona town centre.
After studies and research, our oenologist brought the traditional wine to perfection. We deal only with local species of vine.

Name: EcoWinery
Description:
EcoWinery è un progetto startup, nato per guidare le aziende vitivinicole verso una produzione più sostenibile e offrire una wine experience innovativa e green a tutti gli amanti del vino. 

Progetto vincitore PIN - Iniziativa promossa dalle Politiche Giovanili della Regione Puglia e ARTI e finanziata con risorse del FSE - PO Puglia 2014/2020 Azione 8.4 e del Fondo per lo Sviluppo e la Coesione.

Name: Léonard Vins et Terroirs
Description:
Nouveau concept de distribution de vins et de produits du terroir alliant réseau de vente traditionnel et site novateur de vente en ligne. Motivés et passionnés, nos conseillers vous proposeront par l’intermédiaire de dégustation des produits authentiques et d’exception.
Véritable lieu de partage notre site vous offrira la possibilité d’échanger avec notre communauté sur le bien boire et le bien manger.
Points forts : Pouvoir déguster des produits régionaux issus de producteurs de qualité, tout en bénéficiant d’un site innovant ou vous retrouverez : vidéo, événement, photos, petites annonces, recettes et forums sur le monde du vin et de la cuisine.

Name: CoBees Enterprise Ltd.
Description:
CoBees is a wine and liquor import agency and supplier based in Burnaby, British Columbia. We specialize in Korean liquors and high-quality, gastronomic wines.

We sell to provincial liquor boards, private liquor stores,
and restaurants in British Columbia, Alberta, Saskatchewan, Manitoba, Quebec, Nova Scotia, and Prince Edward Island.

Name: Vinum Occitanis
Description:
From the southern shores of France to the canyons of the Gard river, discover everything Languedoc-Roussillon and its wines have to offer.

With its selection, Vinum Occitanis offers an authentic look at the richness of its terroir. Renowned and smaller appellations, emblematic vineyards and hidden family estates are represented in our diverse catalogue, as a bubbling celebration of the colourful notes of our region.

Eco-labeled and renowned for their environnemental commitments, the wines we select embody a savoir-faire we intend to highlight.

Name: kwäf
Description:
Kwaf is an Ontario based wine club that curates the best of Ontario wine and delivers it directly to your door. Created for wine discovery, Kwaf is built on the relationships people have with and around outstanding Ontario wine.

Visit www.kwaf.ca

Name: Winenot Blind Tasting
Description:
L'associazione si occupa di organizzazione di eventi di degustazione alla cieca, finalizzata alla promozione di prodotti enogastronomici del territorio e alla conoscenza di altre realtà enologiche mondiali.
Le serate che proponiamo affrontano temi diversi, mettiamo a confronto regioni, vini, stili differenti, sempre rigorosamente alla cieca, in modo da poter confrontare vini differenti senza essere condizionati dall'etichetta e da pregiudizi sui diversi vini in degustazione.
L'associazione è nata nel 2020 dall'idea di 6 ragazzi under 30, tutti impiegati nel mondo del vino, che si sono adoperati per la creazione di un associazione che avesse come punti cardine l'amicizia, la condivisione e la passione per il mondo del vino e di ogni sua sfumatura.

Name: French Delight Ltd.
Description:
French Delight advocates for the promotion of French wine culture in China and Hong-Kong through their wine selection from the best wine growing regions of France, selected and imported directly from French independent owned vineyards for unique tasting. 

As your dedicated guide to the French wine regions, French Delight is delighted to offer you the opportunity to discover their traditional wine selection, unmatched for finesse, taste and quality.

The stepping-stone to your professional future, French Delight is also at your disposal for corporate wine gift boxes in order to improve and enhance your relationships with your customers, partners and co-workers.

French Delight offers a complete guideline service for each request by ensuring a “door to door” service with premium products at the arrival. 

At French Delight, we have the required wine for every occasion and budget to offer wine drinkers.

Name: Domaine de la Madone - Fleurie
Description:
The Domaine de la Madone is located on the slopes of the Madone hill in FLEURIE. This hill is often considered by connoisseurs to be the best of local climates. It enjoys exceptional sunshine and its soil is composed of pink granite suitable for the Gamay grape variety. This estate has been the property of the Despres family for 6 generations. 
Arnaud Despres produces different references of Fleurie as well as Viognier.

A privileged location for the quality of the wine as well as for the pleasure of the eyes. The remarkable view of the Beaujolais crus vineyard made the Despres family want to share it with you by opening a winegrower's inn. The restaurant offers on the terrace or in the panoramic room some home-made regional products that accompany the wines of the estate.

Finally, to enhance your enjoyment of the region with its summer activities, hikes, museums, zoological park ... the family offers two accommodations in the heart of the vineyard with respectively 7 and 9 places each.

While waiting to welcome you at the domain, we wish you a good visit on our linkedin page !

Name: Hell 'n Blazes Brewing Company
Description: A Fine Craft Brewery and now a full service comfortable restaurant, located in the heart of Historic Downtown Melbourne, FL. Hell 'n Blazes Brewing owns and operates in a fully renovated 120+ year old historic building. Great care was taken to maintain the historic look and feel while upgrading everything. Truly a special legacy for Melbourne and Brevard County. Our menu features traditional American Pub Food with a fresh, never frozen, twist.

Name: AC Distillery - Andean Culture Distillery
Description: Producimos, vendemos y exportamos productos culturales bolivianos sustentables; específicamente: whiskys y destilados hechos con materias primas, métodos e insumos nacionales, diseñados por artistas y diseñadores locales.

Name: Celeste Vin
Description:
Celeste Vin imports high quality wines from Piedmont and Tuscany. 
We deliver to danish restaurants, companies and private customers, and offer customized wine tastings. 
We focus on classic wines, biodynamic viticulture and family owned wineries. 

Celeste Lønstrup’s love towards Italian wine started in the North of Italy, where she lived and worked as an apprentice at the world-famous winery, La Spinetta.

Over the years, she developed strong relationships with Italy’s best wine producers. 
Celeste’s love for wine became the passion of her life - and still is today.

Name: Wines Unlimited
Description: import and selling wines from around the world

Name: Navarro Vineyards & Winery
Description: Navarro Vineyards was founded in 1973 by Ted Bennett and Deborah Cahn. Their children Aaron and Sarah Cahn-Bennett have now joined the family business. Navarro grows Gewürztraminer, Pinot Noir, Pinot Blanc, Chardonnay, Riesling, Pinot Gris and Muscat Blanc.

Name: LA CAVE DE LINA
Description: www.lacavedelina.fr

Name: Château Peyrabon
Description:
Propriété de la société de négoce bordelaise Millésima (Groupe BERNARD) dirigée par Fabrice BERNARD

Le Château produit 3 vins :
- Château La Fleur Peyrabon, AOC Pauillac, l'un des 5 Crus Bourgeois de l'appellation
- Château Peyrabon AOC, Haut-Médoc
- Château Pierbone AOC, Haut-Médoc (2nd vin Ch. Peyrabon) 

La propriété est aujourd’hui composée de 44 hectares en production :
=> 37 ha situés en appellation Haut Médoc
=> 5 ha en appellation Pauillac

Name: Arts du Vin
Description: Arts du Vin est une agence d’importation privée en vins et spiritueux. Elle vous propose des vins de terroirs authentiques, dans le meilleur rapport qualité/prix sur le marché Québécois et au Canada.

Name: Dutch's Spirits
Description:
Dutch’s Spirits is an Original New York Distillery devoted to the production of premium, handcrafted spirits.Through a Farm to Bottle approach, Dutch’s Spirits is devoted to the production of premium, handcrafted spirits - producing artisanal beverages of the past through innovations of the present, while protecting the natural resources on our estate.

First “organized” in 1932 during the twilight of Prohibition, our land was the site of an extensive bootlegging operation reputuedly financed by the iconic mobster, Dutch Schultz. Now, almost 80 years later, Dutch’s Spirits is reviving the distillery foundations and revitalizing its land as kept by the Adams family for generations. Harvest Homestead Farm will become a self-sustaining source of ingredients for its unique beverages.

Name: Enotecca Winery & Resorts
Description:
Two decades ago, brick by brick and vine by vine, Enotecca started a daring venture: to create the wines we had always dreamed of. Our ambition was for our wines to stand toe to toe with the very best of the Old World.

We set out to unlock our terroir’s hidden secrets and, fortunately for you and us, produce wines that distinctly speak of a unique time and place. Our age-worthy wines have been captivating the senses and palates of fine European and Asian wine aficionados for over 15 years and have graced the wine lists of many Michelin Star restaurants throughout Europe.

Expect nothing less than the extraordinary. Our hands-on approach, labour-intensive work, and meticulous selection process uphold our unwavering standards. Each bottle is a masterpiece unto itself.

Welcome to a world where every bottle tells a story and every sip is a celebration.

Name: Dourocaves
Description:
A DOUROCAVES - PRODUÇÃO, TRANSFORMAÇÃO E COMÉRCIO DE VINHOS, S.A. 

Estabeleceu-se em 1992 e tem a sua sede em Loureiro concelho de Peso da Régua, no coração da Região Demarcada do Douro. Numa fase inicial, a sua atividade centrava-se essencialmente na produção de Vinho 
Generoso, tendo como principais clientes algumas das mais prestigiadas firmas exportadoras de Vinho do Porto nomeadamente a Gran Cruz, Symington, Taylor's, Porto Poças, Wiese & Krohn e Soc. Vinhos Borges. Mais recentemente, em paralelo com a linha de produção e comercialização de Vinho Generoso, tem desenvolvido a sua atividade também na área dos vinhos de consumo a granel e engarrafados.

Name: Tanktemp Mechanical LLC
Description:
Tanktemp Mechanical is a full-service mechanical contractor specializing in commercial and industrial HVAC, refrigeration, and piping systems. We help businesses—from healthcare facilities to food production plants—design, build, and maintain critical infrastructure for climate control, process cooling, and mechanical efficiency.

Tanktemp Mechanical delivers cutting-edge temperature control systems and chilling solutions for craft beverage producers, including breweries, distilleries, and wineries. We provide turnkey systems designed to maintain precise temperature control throughout fermentation, storage, and packaging. Our team partners with clients to engineer scalable solutions that improve product consistency, production efficiency, and energy performance.

Core Services:
HVAC and refrigeration system installation and maintenance
Sheet metal and piping fabrication
Process mechanical design-build projects
Glycol chiller systems
System design, installation, and support
Custom-engineered chilling solutions
24/7 emergency service and preventive maintenance programs

Name: La Genevoise du Terroir
Description:
La Genevoise du Terroir produit ou distribue les boissons genevoises aux hôtels, restaurants et privés.

Nous proposons différents vins et bières genevoises.
Nous produisons nos sirops et confitures artisanales.
Plusieurs autres boissons sont à venir...

Si vous êtes amateurs de produits locaux, sais et étiques alors contactez-nous

Name: Made in Flavours
Description:
Made in Flavours is a Swiss company born out of passion for high quality products.
The selection of all products is made personally by us where the criteria is quality, quality, quality.
Our model is that we only sell what we like for us and what we recommend to friends.
We are passionate about our culture, in particular the wine heritage and rich gastronomy. It is a pleasure to bring you the best of these flavours.
We work directly with the producers, we go and meet them to discover their history. We also want you to get to know them, so in every product you can explore every history behind it.
We travel to find and discover the best producers that offers extraordinary quality products who are passionate and enthusiastic about introducing their products to the world and just need to be applauded and encouraged.

Name: La Micro Winerie
Description: A la fois brasserie-école et chai décontracté, la Micro Winerie se joue des codes et brasse les univers de la bière artisanale et du vin ligérien. Venez y réaliser, sous forme d'ateliers de 2 ou 4 h votre propre bière ou personnaliser votre cuvée de vin de Loire ! Une expérience exceptionnelle à partager et à déguster ensuite entre amis, collègues ou à l'occasion d'un séminaire !

Name: Bangalore Wine Trails
Description:
Bangalore Wine Trails is a discovery platform for the wine-curious that strives to inspire, educate and make the wine exploration process more inviting.

We believe the key to truly understanding and appreciating wine is to taste as many varieties and styles of wine as possible. And there are plenty! Through our curated slow dining experiences, tips on easy-to-create wine and food pairings at home, unbiased wine reviews, and information about wine tours, we help wine-curious individuals to navigate the fascinating world of wine. And for those looking to sharpen their wine knowledge, we cover the basics in a simple, bite-sized manner.

Our multi-course wine dinners, curated in partnership with the finest restaurants in Bangalore, are the most popular. These slow dining experiences are by invitation only and provide an easy hack for wine enthusiasts to get acquainted with different styles and brands of wine on the market.

To join our growing community and access member-exclusive culinary experiences, sign up here: 
https://www.bangalorewinetrails.com/curated-experiences

Name: Whispering Eye Tequila (W.E.T.)
Description: Manufacture of Premium Tequila. Whispering Eye Tequila (W.E.T.) Triple Distilled Tequila for Sophisticated and Distinguished Tastes.  W.E.T. will be launched in several US States in May 2011.  The Tequila is manufactured in the state of Jalisco Mexico and is owned by T2LJ Brands, L.L.C. in San Antonio Texas.

Name: Cantina Roeno
Description:
A family winery from North of Italy. 
Local and authentic wines.

Name: EmmaLily, Inc
Description:
EmmaLily Vineyards was named after our two daughters — Emma and Lily. We are a small family run winery located in Morgan Hill, specializing in the art of making memorable Cabernet.

Our love for Cabernet has continued to grow as our palates continue to evolve. My wife Laura likes a fruit forward wine yet balanced with earthly flavors. I on the other hand like less fruit on the front and big complex, long finishing wines. We have tried to make both styles.

Our micro fermentations are bottled in 25 to 300 case lots for release through limited distribution and direct to consumers. Our current release is available to order direct from us and on our website. One third of our wine is bottled in large format, with the remaining two thirds in regular 750 ml bottles. The large format bottles allow our wine to be shared with friends and family on special occasions or just because life is way too short not to enjoy now.

Thank you to our family, friends and wine club members for believing in our dream and experiencing each part of the wine making process with us — especially the hard work during harvest, bottling, blending and of course tasting…

Cheers,
Steve & Laura

Name: Duch Sadu
Description:
Marka Duch Sadu zadebiutowała na rynku alkoholi rzemieślniczych w 2021 roku, po 4 latach intensywnych prac i doskonaleniu rzemiosła produkcji alkoholu metodami tradycyjnymi. Od samego początku projekt skupił się na produkcji alkoholu z jabłek. Wybór tego surowca nie był przypadkowy, nie ma bardziej charakterystycznego owocu dla Polski niż jabłko. Polska jest największym producentem jabłek w Europie i trzecim na Świecie, a nadal na rynku alkoholi ciężko jest odnaleźć wysokiej jakości alkohol, który powstał z jabłek. Ogromna ilość gatunków jabłek, które różnią się smakiem i aromatem, otwierają przed nami nieskończone możliwości w tworzeniu wyjątkowych i różnych alkoholi. Najwyższą jakość produktu końcowego otrzymujemy dzięki współpracy z sadem ekologicznym Eko Jabłonka i wykorzystaniu tylko owoców z certyfikatem BIO. Jakość owoców ma kluczowe znaczenie na efekt końcowy otrzymanego alkoholu.
Nasze trunki zostały docenione m.in. na Warsaw Spirit Competition, w sumie zdobyliśmy 9 złotych medali i jeden srebrny. Od 2018 regularnie pojawiamy się na najważniejszych festiwalach alkoholi w Polsce, docierając z naszymi trunkami do coraz szerszej grupy odbiorców, którzy chętnie wracają do naszych trunków i z niecierpliwością wyczekują nowości.
Naszym największym hitem jest Wódka Trawa Żubrowa. Połączenie Wódki Jabłko w Butelce, która powstaje z okowity jabłkowej ze staranie wyselekcjonowaną trawą żubrową, tworząc niepowtarzalny smak i aromat w kieliszku.
Duch Sadu jest zalążkiem kolejnej destylarni rzemieślniczej, którą chcielibyśmy ulokować w Polskim zagłębiu jabłkowym. Chcemy odtworzyć historie polskiego gorzelnictwa i przypomnieć konsumentom, jak ciekawy może być alkohol wyprodukowany z jabłek. Skupiamy naszą działalność na produkcji alkoholi nie starzonych, ale również i starzonych w wyselekcjonowanych beczkach dębowych. Mamy dostęp do najróżniejszych beczek z całego świata, dzięki współpracy z Manufakturą Beczek.

Name: LABORATOIRE SICRE OENOLOGIE
Description:
Laboratoire d'analyse et de conseil œnologique depuis 1976, au cœur du Beaujolais et de la vallée du Rhône septentrionale.
4 œnologues-conseils au service des vignerons.
2 Bureaux dans le Rhône : Cercié et Ampuis.

Name: Animus Distillery
Description:
Animus Distillery was founded in 2015, by four friends with a shared passion for producing world-class spirits. Initially starting with round-the-clock research and development in our Fitzroy North garage, we quickly outgrew this space and expanded to a larger rural property, before establishing our distillery in Kyneton, Central Victoria. Capturing the soul of the freshest ingredients for our gin is central to our production philosophy.

We use the highest grade of 100% Australian grain spirit, triple filtered using our custom gravity-fed carbon filter system, to provide the cleanest base for capturing the soul of our botanicals. We grow many of the botanicals on our property, and use a vapour pressed production approach for our distillation. Our gins are produced in small batches, where our botanical baskets are changed frequently throughout the production of each batch, to extract the freshest, richest flavours from our balance of Australian native and international ingredients. Whilst labour intensive, this approach allows us to taste our gins throughout the production of each batch, balancing each element with the sensibility of a fine chef to ensure we reflect the exquisite balance and intensity we aim to showcase with our botanicals. Our gins are released over-proofed at 50% alcohol, to best express the richness, intensity and complexity of our ingredients.

Sustainability is a core part of our business philosophy. Our extracted botanicals are reutilised to create fertiliser for growing our next generation of botanicals, and sustainable practices are foremost in everything we do, including in our packaging, which we encourage you to recycle. Our business ethos is to minimise our footprint on our planet through cascading resource utilisation and by constantly improving the efficiency of our energy use. Wherever possible we have also been upgrading our energy infrastructure to renewable sources.

Name: BluRack
Description: We help craft spirits get to market using a outside sales approach.  By combining resources we are able to lower the barrier to entry and make the off premise more accessible.

Name: KIND WINE
Description:
Problem: We do not appreciate moments that connect us as humans due to the fast-paced nature of our world today. 

What we stand for: We remind people of what makes us human by delivering the best wines and spirits that foster authentic human connections, bonds, emotions, and moments that last forever.

Name: Domaine Karanika
Description: Domaine Karanika owns 5 hectares vineyards in the cool climate appellation of Amyntaio in Northern Greece. We produce sparkling wine from Xinomavro (methode traditionel), rose, white wine from Assyrtiko, and two red wines from Cabernet Sauvignon - Xinomavro blends.

Name: The Mixologer
Description:
We turn personal and corporate gifting into a full-sensory experience, with premium ingredients, elevated packaging, and seamless fulfillment.
Each kit includes everything needed to craft the perfect cocktail at home, with optional brand customization for a lasting impression.

We do the legwork.
You get the impact.

Name: Fusion Whisky Ltd
Description:
Our fusion whiskies celebrate the best of Scottish and international whisky, they represent friendships that extend over oceans and beyond national borders, and they demonstrate an innovation that honours Scotland’s past and embraces our shared future. 
We launched the business in October 2015 with the pioneering fusion, The Glover, a beautiful dram made with Scotch from Glen Garioch and Longmorn distilleries as well as single malt whisky from the legendary Hanyu distillery in Japan. 
We made three Glover whiskies, a 22 year old, 18 year old and a 14 year old. These whiskies celebrated the life of 'Scottish Samurai' Thomas Blake Glover, an Aberdonian merchant who played a profound role in helping Japan industrialise in the late 19th century.    
Following on from the global success of The Glover, we are now in the process of creating new fusion whiskies in partnership with international distilleries.  
Created using single malt casks sourced by Adelphi’s master blender Alex Bruce, our fusion whiskies harbour captivating tales of balance and beauty, of exquisite flavours and complex aromas. 
These iconic and forward-looking whiskies also celebrate the story of great Scots who helped shape our modern world; Scots who took with them the best of this country to craft new lives in distant shores, hundreds if not thousands of miles from their homeland.

Name: Lone Oak Brewing Co.
Description:
Lone Oak Brewing Co is a locally owned and operated, forward-thinking, craft brewery in Gateway Village of Borden-Carleton, PEI. It is also a Full Service restaurant known as the Lone Oak Brewpub in Charlottetown, PEI.

Our focus is on innovation and quality while striving to use local ingredients. Agriculture is an important pillar for the Island economy full of talented professionals, which is why we stand behind our farmers and their products.

Lone Oak Brewing Co is excited to be bringing top quality products and service to consumers from PEI and around the world.

Name: Le Chant des Caves
Description:
Le Chant des Caves est une jeune startup créée en 2017 par une équipe de passionnés, avec l’ambition de créer une sélection unique et diversifiée de vins et champagnes de tous types issus des petites productions familiales et des jeunes vignerons passionnés des quatre coins de l’Hexagone.
Nous travaillons en direct avec nos vignerons car ils sont les garants de la qualité des vins et des champagnes que nous vous proposons. Nous validons avec eux, l’ensemble du processus de mise en vente d’un produit : la photo, la description, les accords mets/vin jusqu’au prix de vente qui doit être le plus juste pour tout le monde.
Ensuite, nous nous occupons de toute la logistique, de la préparation de la commande, l’emballage dans des cartons spécialisés jusqu’à la livraison chez vous. Tous les produits vous attendent sagement dans notre local thermorégulé à Boulogne-Billancourt. 

La satisfaction de nos clients est la pierre angulaire de notre stratégie de développement. Nous répondons à toutes vos demandes, réalisons des sélections personnalisées, écoutons vos retours et portons une attention toute particulière à toutes vos commandes.

En bref Le Chant des Caves c’est une sélection de vignerons passionnés, une logistique spécialisée et une équipe au petit soin pour ses clients.

Name: Madrigal Family Winery
Description:
Madrigal Family Winery is a small, family owned winery, in the heart of the Napa Valley.  Our Calistoga winery specializes in small lot Cabernet Sauvignon, Petite Sirah, Zinfandel and Sauvignon Blanc.  Founded in 1995, we are celebrating our 20th anniversary.  

Please come and enjoy our wine country hospitality!

Name: XXIV Karat Wines
Description:
XXIV Karat Wines is committed to bringing excitement and memories with each bottle sold. Founded by Arizona State University alumni, the team embodies the soul of what XXIV Karat brings to the social scene. After countless bottles bought and numerous memories made, the boys of XXIV Karat sat down to develop what would turn out to be the the hottest new product to hit the industry. They live life all in, and have branded a product that focuses on just that. Starting off as just a dream, XXIV Karat has evolved into a brand that is both affordable and exclusive, providing memorable experiences to all those who enjoy her flavor. Whether it be in the hottest nightclubs in the world, poolside at your favorite resort, or a gift for your best friends wedding, each bottle of XXIV Karat Wine is designed with one thing in mind, fun! 

Contact us at (949) 214-4027 or email Info@XXIVKarat.com

Name: Vincape & Co., Limited
Description:
Vincape & Co., Limited is a dynamic sales, marketing and distribution organization committed to bringing quality and exclusive products from around the world to Chinese consumers. For its fine wine and spirits business expansion in China, it establishes Vincape International Trading (Shanghai) Co. Ltd, through acquisition of Fast Moving Consumption Goods business section of Reiss Co., Ltd, which operates diversely, to import and deliver outstanding quality wines and spirtis from their overseas origins worldwide to Chinese consumers. 

By adding the distribution channels and resources of Reiss Co. in the business field, Vincape International Trading (Shanghai) Co., Ltd builds an extensive distribution network across the country and has business in more than 30 cities and areas where are the main markets for fine wines in the fast booming Greater China through its agents/sub-distributors. 

Our members in the dynamic team work closely under the leadership of Mr. Stanley Wang, who has rich experience in fine wine and fine food industry and has been engaged in this field since 1994. And we always strive to provide effective and professional market solutions and service to diverse clients with our professionalism, enthusiasm and efficiency.

Name: Pinard
Description:
Cave à vin à Nantes 
Fournisseur de cuvées personnalisées

Name: Star Union Spirits
Description:
Star Union Spirits is a craft distillery that specializes in the manufacturing of craft American fruit & grain distilled spirits.  Tapping into the rich historical heritage of the Illinois Valley, the company is located in the iconic Westclox building.  

www.facebook.com/starunionspirits/

Name: Vinconnexion
Description:
Vinconnexion crée le lien entre le vin et les médias
Un service de relations presse spécialisé dans les vins et les spiritueux du monde, impulsé par une connaissance affirmée du vin et de la filière boissons, le savoir-déguster, des compétences techniques, une ouverture permanente sur le monde.
Vinconnexion est implanté de longue date dans tous les vignobles de France, avec des extensions hors de l’Hexagone, notamment vers Madère, Moldavie, Italie, Géorgie, l’Ecosse (Scotch Malt). Vinconnexion communique avec la même passion sur un produit, un vigneron indépendant, une Maison, une région…

The basis of our internationally-orientated specialized agency is the wine sector, from vine-growing terroirs through global markets.
The trust of the world of wine. 
Qualified in Winemaking (University of Dijon) and Master of Wine studies (London) ; member of professional trade-wine tasting committees, from the Wine Challenge in London to the General Agricultural Competition in Paris, and the Paris Sommeliers Association ; wine-growing field trips in the world, USA, Québec, China, … ; vineyard owner.

An international perspective.
Diplomas from the Higher Institute of Translation and International Relations (Lyon) and the British and Spanish Chambers of Commerce, ten years with the United Nations, in charge of an online library platform (W.H.O.) .

Over the past twenty five years, Vinconnexion has established a unique network of wine industry communication at home and abroad (Europe, the USA, China,…), that contributes naturally to its competence in recommanding a strategy of international Press Relations.

Name: Walsh Vineyards Management - Mobile Optical Sorter Rental Division
Description: Our optical sorting equipment comes in a variety of custom configurations, for use at the winery or in the vineyard, that are ideally suited to your winemaking goals. We provide expert staff, a power generator, air compressor and destemmer at no extra cost. This allows optical sorting to seamlessly integrate with a winery’s overall harvest process flow. Contact us now to reserve a spot and discuss your needs!

Name: Waterpocket Distillery
Description: Waterpocket Distillery is a Utah-based craft distillery focusing on creative and flavorful spirits with a local character.

Name: Tenute Lu Spada
Description:
Tenute Lu Spada is a boutique wine company located on the outskirt of Brindisi, a city whom territory is historically considered to be “the land of wine”. Our mission is to revive the terroir ancient tradition by retrieving the native grape varieties and old bush trained wines while preserving the surrounding biodiversity. Our grapes are in-fact organically grown and certified by Codex. The Estate is composed of two allotments for a total of 29 hectares.
The Negroamaro variety is the most extended, over six hectares (aged over 50 years) plus 15 hectares dedicated to younger vineyards. We also cultivate Malvasia Nera di Brindisi, Susumaniello, Minutolo, Vermentino and Primitivo. The limestone and clay-rich soils, the favorable climate conditions, the proximity to the sea and to the protected area of the Cillarese park, contribute to the high quality grapevines which give birth to our elegant wines, rich in aromas and flavors.

Name: WARFIGHTER BREWING COMPANY
Description:
ESTABLISHED in 2011, we are the FIRST American micro brewery and brew pub dedicated to the employment and advancement of able and disabled veterans.

Mission
To create jobs for vets through the manufacture and marketing or beer and beer products.

The United States Department of Defense (DOD) uses the term “warfighter” to describe anyone serving in a military capacity under the American flag. This term is designed to be as neutral and all-inclusive as possible, and it is frequently used in declarations which are meant to apply to all service members and all services. Members of the public are less likely to describe people as warfighters, although the term is slowly catching on, especially in the video gaming world.

Name: DOMAINE VERZIER
Description:
La domaine, située sur les hauteurs de Chavanay (Loire), propose une gamme de vins typique de la Vallée du Rhône nord.
Deux IGP Collines Rhodaniennes (Syrah & Viognier) ainsi qu'une sélection de Saint Joseph (Rouge & Blanc), Condrieu et Côte Rôtie. Dans quelques temps, une nouvelle cuvée issue du Vignoble de Seyssuel viendra étoffer la gamme.
Vous pouvez venir découvrir nos vins directement au caveau ou sur nos différents salons tout au long de l'année.

Name: Volcanic Hills Estate Winery
Description: In May 2010, the doors of the family owned and operated estate winery, Volcanic Hills, opened. The idea for the name came from Boucherie Mountain, a 60 million year old extinct Volcano located in West Kelowna, just 8 minutes from the Kelowna Bridge. The building is 15,000 sq. ft. which includes an expansive tasting counter, spacious wine boutique, production facility, a children’s play area and lots of parking. Currently we have 20 wines for you to try.  Build your own wine experience and memories at Volcanic Hills Winery today!

Name: Dos Hermanos Cerveja Artesanal
Description:
A Cerveja Artesanal DOS HERMANOS foi idealizada em 2014 pelos irmãos Atila Barros e Marco Barros, que, como apreciadores da boa cerveja, buscaram trazer para o mercado nacional uma cerveja puro malte, feita com ingredientes selecionados e livre de aditivos químicos.

Inspirada nas histórias de alienígenas contadas nos livros e documentários de TV, a Cerveja Artesanal DOS HERMANOS é uma experiência sensorial de outro mundo!
Apaixonados por ufologia.
Ufologia (ou ovniologia) é o estudo de todas as hipóteses, evidências ou registros visuais dos ufos. UFO é a sigla de Unknown Flying Objects que significa Objetos Voadores Desconhecidos. É o mesmo que OVNI - Objetos Voadores Não-Identificados, de onde deriva a palavra "ovniologia".
Porque não dar um sabor melhor ao tema regando a conversa com uma boa cerveja de outra galáxia?
São inúmeras as evidências que surgem sobre o fenômeno, desde fotos, sons, filmes ou relatos gravados por quem supostamente viveu alguma experiência relacionada.
O fenômeno dos UFOs está intimamente ligado ao universo místico e sobrenatural. As lendas e contos populares também fazem parte do processo fantasioso, nada melhor que somar estes temas a nossas marcas e render boas risadas e experiências sensoriais.
Faça contato com estes alienígenas:

Hermanos Cerveja Artesanal 
Contatos: (21) 99973-1707 –  (21) 98305-9754 whatsapp
E-mail: cerveja2hermanos@gmail.com
Instagram: @doshermanoscerveja
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Redamancy Vineyards
Description:
Redamancy Vineyards Premium Wine and Extra Virgin Olive Oil

The creation of Marc and Antoinette

The home of Redamancy is situated on the slopes of Devon Valley in Stellenbosch, Western Cape, overlooking False Bay and framed by the Helderberg Mountains.  Devon Valley is famous for its small wineries and unique styles of soils that have the influence of the cool sea breeze from the False Bay.  

Redamancy Vineyards endeavours to produce high quality grapes and wines, olives and olive oil respecting ethical principles and under organic circumstances thereby creating employment that will improve the standard of living of the people who make our products.

Name: Chabot Armagnac
Description:
A Legacy Woven Through Time

Chabot’s history is a testament to the enduring artistry and passion of Armagnac craftsmanship. From its roots in the heart of Gascony to its emergence as a global symbol of luxury, the brand continues to honor its heritage while shaping the future of fine spirits. Chabot Armagnac stands as a timeless bridge between tradition and innovation, celebrated by connoisseurs around the world.

Name: Spallanzani vini srl
Description:
La ditta Spallanzani vini situata ad Arceto di Scandiano (RE) in via Caselette 1, produce e commercializza prodotti sfusi del settore vitivinicolo dal 1888;

Oltre a svolgere l'iniziale attività di produzione e commercializzazione di mosti e vini sfusi di tutte le principali regioni italiane, è in grado di fornire merci utilizzabili non solo nel settore vitivinicolo, ma anche da aziende farmaceutiche, dolciarie, conserviere, di produzione di bevande ed alimentari in genere.

                                                    PRODOTTI

MOSTI:   desolforati, concentrati e cotti anche idonei ABM, mosto concentrato           rettificato
VINI:        bianchi, rossi, frizzanti e spumanti, IGT

La nostra gamma è disponibile anche biologica nelle seguenti tipologie: 
- BIO 834/07
- BIO NOP 100% ORGANIC
- BIO 100% ORGANIC in equivalenza NOP

Assolutamente unici e tipici della zona sono i vini e concentrati ROSSISSIMI ad alto potere colorante, utilizzati anche nel settore alimentare oltre che in quello vinicolo.

Per informazioni visitare il sito www.spallanzanivini.com o rivolgersi a info@spallanzanivini.com

Name: Saraja
Description: Saraja  is a new wine project born from the idea of Mark Hartmann, Enrico e Marco Faccenda, Giulio Corti, Emanuele Schembri. The five partners have in common passion for wine, but moreover a strong believe in the Sardinian land. This vision guided them in the acquisition of a propriety of 75 hectares, 49 of vineyards, and others vineyards managed in Romangia for the production of Cannonau and in Sulcis for the production of Carignano. The winery is located in Gallura, land vocated since ever to viticulture and for Cru of Vermentino. Saraja is not only the name of the brand it is the name of where the vineyards are located.  The style and expression of the wine Sa Raja are far from international taste, they are totally registered in the Mediterranean taste. The winery is a challenging concept: the first that overlooks on the sea and with a unique view and modern technology.

Name: Régis & Sylvain - Clos de Somméré
Description:
After their respective careers in finance and winemaking, Régis and Sylvain, two cousins from Marseille, bring together their passion and love for wine.
Convinced that the world has entered an insatiable quest for wines of excellence, with the ambition of elevating the wine-drinking experience, Régis and Sylvain cannot but notice a gap in the offer. The fact is that it cannot seem to quench the thirst of the growing global middle class and meet its ever-demanding expectations.
To make up that deficiency in some way, they decided to give a new face to wine production by creating their own brand at the end of 2017: Régis & Sylvain. A brand synonymous with quality, identity of terroir, reasoned production and moderated prices. In order to achieve that, they prefer to go to the four corners of France rather than acquire a vineyard. They can thus vinify grapes and bottle their wines in regions providing them with the opportunity to meet those criteria.
Based in the heart of Marseille, the outreach of their wine trading company has already spread to four continents.

Name: Weingut Simon Gattinger
Description: Wein zu kreieren bedeutet für uns, im Einklang mit der Natur und mit Respekt bei der Arbeit im Weingarten und Keller, das fundierte Wissen über den Rebstock und die Weinwerdung so einzubinden, dass wir das Beste aus den Rieden und Sorten erzielen. Nach dem Leitsatz: „WENIGER IST MEHR“ setzen wir nur so viele Maßnahmen, wie unbedingt notwendig sind und diese zum richtigen Zeitpunkt. Die Wachau verleiht unserer Arbeit Kontur, zeigt uns Grenzen in der Bewirtschaftung der Terrassen auf und lässt uns teilhaben an der Schönheit des besonderen Donautales zwischen Melk und Krems. Bei der Handarbeit legen wir Wert auf die Liebe zum Detail, vergessen dabei nicht auf die Tradition und keltern Weine mit unverwechselbarem Charakter in den verschiedenen Kategorien.

A marriage of longstanding Stellenbosch roots and a pioneering spirit.

Libertas Vineyards and Estates is a leading producer and marketer of premium South African wines. We are proud custodians of fine wine brands steeped in a legacy of craftsmanship and innovation.

Our vineyards are spread across the diverse landscape of the Cape Winelands - each brand telling a unique story of origins, people and place.

Our home in the wine heartland of Stellenbosch is the hub of a global partner  network where our passion and expertise offer engaging wine experiences to consumers worldwide.

Our brands of pride include Alto, Nederburg, Durbanville Hills, Plaisir de Merle, Pongracz, Fleur du Cap, Allesverloren, Zonnebloem and Chateau Libertas, as well as the unique heritage assets of  Oude Libertas, the Vinoteque and Winebank, Mountain Cellar and Fine and Rare Auction.

Name: Market Vineyards
Description:
Market Vineyards is a limited-production boutique winery showcasing award-winning wines of ultra-premium quality from Washington State's most notable vineyards in Red Mountain and Columbia Valley. Brought to life by 4 partners (Steve Anderson and Daniel Schulte of Kansas City and Matt Riesenweber and Bob Bertsch of Washington), our wines are handcrafted by one of the most legendary winemakers in the country (Charlie Hoppes). 

With a particular focus on Bordeaux-style and 100% single varietal reds, we take pride in offering stunning wines produced with exceptional fruit from exclusive Red Mountain and Columbia Valley vineyards. Meticulous attention to detail is evident throughout all stages of production: custom French oak and American oak barrels are strategically selected to brilliantly complement each vintage and varietal. 

Our Tasting Rooms are located in Richland and Woodinville.

Name: CHAMPAGNE COMTESSE GERIN
Description:
Négociant Manipulant issu d'une famille de vignerons situé au pied de la Montagne de Reims vinifiant 5ha30 dont l'intégralité est en propriété et produisant 150.000 bouteilles.
Depuis 3 ans, le Domaine a été repris par deux personnes passionnées par le monde viticole et exploitant déjà le Domaine de la Madrague (Côtes de Provence) et le Château Jean Voisin (Saint-Emilion). 
C'est sous l'impulsion de Philippe GANTOIS, Directeur d'Exploitation, que les cuvées Comtesse Gerin, s'affirment, comme des Champagnes que l'on retrouve sur des tables prestigieuses de la plus haute gastronomie et auprès des plus grandes institutions de la République Française.
Ayant comme mentor en oenologie à la Faculté de Bordeaux, Denis Dubourdieu, Jean Claude Berrouet et suivant les conseils éclairés de son ami et oenologue Philippe NARCY, il se tourne vers des champagnes fins et équilibrés avec une juste maîtrise des dosages mais aussi et surtout en adéquation avec le terroir du vignoble.

Name: Skillogalee
Description:
Skillogalee is set amongst wooded hills in the heart of the picturesque Sevenhill subregion, part of South Australia’s world-renowned Clare Valley, one of Australia’s oldest wine regions.

Established in 1970, the family-owned vineyards and winery have been releasing award-winning hand-crafted wines for over 50 years. Our grapes are grown in our own sustainably managed vineyards and produce wines with an exceptional expression of place.

In addition to being a highly-regarded regional wine producer, our historic cellar door and restaurant have been open daily for over 30 years and have become a cherished destination for generations of people from around Australia, and around the world.

Name: Single Serve Packaging
Description:
The Single Serve is an innovative wine packaging solution that offers a ready to drink, single serve prefilled glass of wine, which is hygienically sealed in a convenient and stylish outdoor, polyethylene terephthalate (PET) plastic wine glass. The plastic wine glass is made out of a high quality PET and holds 187ml wine. To maintain wine quality and freshness the wine is covered under a blanket of inert gas, giving a shelf life of 1 year. It can be consumed in places where glass is considered to be unsafe, illegal or environmentally unsound. The finished product is 100% shatter proof and in fact near unbreakable.

We work with wine producers to provide an alternative packaging solution that solves the problems of glass, liquor license laws, health and safety laws, and carbon credit calculations. The single serve takes wine where it could not comfortably go before, giving wine companies access to new markets. (www.singleserve.com.au)

Name: Bodegas Pago de Ritos
Description:
Somos una empresa familiar dedicada al arte de cultivar las vides y elaborar vinos de Madrid.

Nuestro viñedo de los años 40 está situado al suroeste de la comunidad de Madrid, en la conocida Cuenca del río Alberche. Es una de las zonas mas bajas de la Comunidad de Madrid (450 metros por encima del nivel del mar), esto le confiere unas características únicas.

Tenemos dos variedades: Tempranillo y Garnacha. Exclusivamente nuestra deliciosa garnacha es elaborada cada año, obteniendo un vino joven D.O. Madrid de muy alta calidad.

Actualmente estamos dirigidos hacia pequeños sectores de restauración situados por Madrid, Extremadura y zona Norte de España, y a la venta online en nuestra web.

Name: Domaine Pélaquié
Description:
Depuis le XVIème siècle, la famille Pélaquié cultive la vigne en Vallée du Rhône méridionale. Aujourd’hui, à la tête de l’exploitation de 100 hectares située à Saint Victor la Coste dans le Gard, c’est Luc Pélaquié qui entretient la tradition familiale. Chaque année nous travaillons à confectionner des cuvées subtiles et audacieuses d'AOP Côtes du Rhône, Villages Laudun, Lirac et Tavel.
 Certifié HVE3
 France Qualité Tourisme

Le Domaine est ouvert du Lundi au Samedi, de 9h00 à 12h00 et de 14h00 à 18h00

Ici on accepte les cartes bancaires, les chèques et les espèces.


The Pélaquié family has been growing vines in the southern Rhône Valley since the 16th century. Today, at the head of the 100-hectare estate in Saint Victor la Coste in the Gard department, Luc Pélaquié is the man who continues the family tradition. Every year, we work to produce subtle, bold AOP Côtes du Rhône, Villages Laudun, Lirac and Tavel wines.

The Domaine is open from Monday to Saturday, from 9.00 am to 12.00 pm and from 2.00 pm to 6.00 pm.

We accept credit cards, cheques and cash.

Description: Bone Spirits Distillery produces bulk whiskey from our local farms. We do our own cooking, fermenting, distilling, all under the same roof. We offer products from distillate to 8+ YO bourbons with different mashbills such as corn/rye, corn wheat and four grain. Award-winning bulk bourbon available in IBC totes.

Name: Soare sekt a.s.
Description:
Soare sekt a.s. patří mezi největší vinařská uskupení v České republice. Ve svém portfoliu má široký vinařský sortiment – sekty, šumivá vína, tichá vína, šumivé vinné nápoje, nealkoholické šumivé vinné nápoje, vinné destiláty a nealkoholické šumivé nápoje pro děti.

Historie společnosti Soare sekt se opírá o tradici malé rodinné firmy, založené v roce 1991. V současné době má úspěšné uskupení mateřské firmy Soare sekt a.s. zázemí v německé společnosti Sektkellerei Schloss Wachenheim AG.

Nejsilnější značky společnosti Soare sekt jsou už řadu let vyváženy do mnoha zemí celého světa.

Mezi nejznámější řady tichých vín, které reprezentují společnost, patří kolekce Exclusive, Víno Valtice a Collection Mondiale.

Sekty vyrobené metodou Charmat jsou zastoupeny značkami Mucha Sekt a Carskoe Igristoe.

Trhu nealkoholických šumivých nápojů pro děti vévodí značka Robby Bubble, exportovaná do více než 20 zemí světa.

Name: Champagne Bénard Fils
Description:
Fondée en 1987 et Champagne de Vignerons, la marque Champagne Bénard Fils est située dans un petit village de la Marne, Hourges.

Le vignoble Bénard Fils se situe à 20 kilomètres à l'ouest de Reims. Brigitte et Bruno vous accueillent sur leur exploitation transmise de père en fils depuis 3 générations.
Dans le respect d'une culture raisonnée du vignoble, toutes les étapes de l'élaboration de nos champagnes sont faites dans nos caves, du pressurage à la mise en bouteille, afin de maîtriser la totalité de la qualité de nos vins.

Name: LA MAISON DU VIGNERON
Description: Maison du Vigneron is a winery that offers an array of Jura wines and cremants.

Name: Vini Pintaudi
Description:
It was the beginning of the 70s when Basilio Pintaudi, a farmer from Piraino, a little town in northern Sicily, founded the Cantina Vini Pintaudi and started the production of white, red and rosé wines that were originally sold in bulk in the local market. Over the years, the activity of the Vini Pintaudi company grows, enough to push Basilio to move the winery to a larger location, the one where it is currently located, and to start the production of monovarietal wines such as Nero d'Avola, Chardonnay , Insolia and Syrah.

In 1997, after the death of its founder, the reins of the winery were taken over by Basilio's wife, daughter and son-in-law who decided to start bottling and invest in the purchase of a new highly advanced bottling plant.

Since 2017, the management of the winery has passed into the hands of his grandson Basilio Catrini who has perfected himself on bottled wines and has tried to create a true corporate brand with the latest line of A Maré, Masciné, Davé and Ciaulé. In particular, in 2018, Mascinè won the silver medal at the First National Wine Competition "Venere Callipigia".

That of the Cantina Vini Pintaudi is a story of heart, tradition and love for the land and its fruits that is combined with innovation and technology to offer high quality wines on the market with the authentic taste and strong and distinctive character of Sicily.

Name: Vines and Ink

Name: De Beaurepaire Wines
Description:
De Beaurepaire Wines is a family-owned and operated single-estate producer of 14 French-style wines available in Australia's finest restaurants, premium hotels and iconic bars, as well as the cellar door. In 2018, De Beaurepaire Wines won 2018 Australian Wine of the Year out of 10,000 wines judged.

De Beaurepaire Wines is located on the hills above Rylstone, in the Central Ranges of NSW (south east from Mudgee and east of Bathurst and Orange).

Starting with the first vine planting in 1998, De Beaurepaire Wines has grown into a renowned boutique producer of French-style wines. Total vineyard size is 53 hectares within a 200-hectare property with a focus on Burgundy & Champagne (chardonnay & pinot noir), Rhône Valley (shiraz & viognier) and Bordeaux (cabernet sauvignon, merlot, petit verdot, semillon) varieties.

Name: Infinitum Brewing
Description:
MEET THE RISING LEGEND

Infinitum Brewing is a Polish brewery that has set ambitious goals for itself since its inception in 2017. Its founders strive not only to become the best brewery in the world, but above all to convince everyone that beer can be as noble as whiskey, cognac, or wine. This approach, which sets the brewery apart from the competition, ensures that Infinitum Brewing is gaining increasing recognition in the world of food & beer.

The unique brewing process of Infinitum Brewing, combined with freezing and ageing in barrels previously used for wines or strong spirits (whiskey, rum), makes their beers perfectly suited for food pairing, cocktails, or simply savouring their exceptional taste and aroma. This approach to creating beers is gaining increasing recognition among connoisseurs.

As the only Polish brewery, Infinitum Brewing won a prestigious award - a gold medal at the Japanese International Beer Cup 2019. In April 2023, the brewery achieved another international success by winning three medals at the prestigious Korea International Beer Award. In a short time since its establishment, the brewery has gained recognition on the global beer scene. Infinitum Brewing beers can be found in the best restaurants in Poland, such as the only Polish Michelin-starred restaurant - Bottiglieria 1881, or the renowned Warsaw-based Nolita.

The achievements of Infinitum Brewing, its innovative approach to brewing beer, and it's gaining international recognition attest to the highest quality of the beers offered. Thanks to the continuous improvement of recipes and attention to detail, Infinitum Brewing has become synonymous with exceptional flavours and aromas that are worth discovering anew.

Name: VuQo Inc.
Description:
"Before Tequila, There was VuQo"

Not too many people know that tequila, the world famous Mexican spirit, traces its roots to the Philippines. 

During the 16th century Manila-Acapulco Galleon Trades, Filipino seafarers brought the technology of distilling coconut nectar to Mexico, applied it to mezcal and agave to make the first tequilas!

According to historian Tony Burton, in his book "Western Mexico, A Traveller's Treasury:"

"Even the word 'tuba,' which means 'coconut wine' in the Filipino Tagalog language, is used in Jalisco for mezcal wine before it is distilled into tequila. This is probably because the first stills used for mezcal distillation were Filipino in origin."

VuQo Premium Vodka is the reinvention of that old world technique, modernized for the 21st century. 

VuQo is based from coconut nectar, distilled continuously and filtered multiple times to create a smooth, crisp vodka of utmost quality.

Name: Wine Packagers of Australia & New Zealand
Description:
Channeling their combined expertise and knowledge in wine packaging, the members of Wine Packagers of Australia expanded their membership last year to include WineWorks NZ.  Accordingly, a name change to Wine Packagers of Australia & New Zealand (WPANZ) is appropriate

  Members meet quarterly to discuss 
•	manufacturing capability issues, 
•	innovations in packaging and packaging equipment, 
•	legal compliance issues, 
•	supplier performance, and related industry changes

With an accumulated 162 years in the contract packaging industry, their knowledge of wine packaging is unparalleled.

How does WPANZ help the wine industry?
The Association believes everyone in the wine supply chain plays an equally important role in bringing collective knowledge and expertise to the table to drive change.
Technical forums
•	The introduction of their technical Forums in 2015 has provided a collaborative platform for suppliers, manufacturers, designers and members to address technical issues, information gaps, and technology developments across the Australian and New Zealand wine industries. 

In November 2019, WineWorks co-hosted New Zealand’s first Wine Packagers Forum on 28 November. The half-day event was a huge success with over 120 participants.

www.SizeMeUp.com.au  – label dimension calculator
•	An industry first and funded by members, SizeMeUp is a web-based visual aid and guide to calculate label dimensions that fit the bottle of choice. The site contains over 70 of the top 750ml and small format wine bottle SKUs in Australia and New Zealand.  This is a free site and is mobile and tablet friendly in English and Mandarin.

The Association’s Forums, previous and ongoing trials are made possible with the ongoing support of their industry partners.

To know more about Wine Packagers of Australia & New Zealand please head to https://wpa.org.au/

Name: Fritz Underground Winery
Description:
Fritz Underground Winery has a unique picturesque setting on top of a hillside in the northernmost region of Dry Creek Valley Sonoma. This makes for stunning views and relaxing atmosphere. Fritz is a small family-owned winery that was founded 35 years ago.
 
Using the hillside to our advantage, at Fritz Underground Winery all the wines are made using gravity flow, which is gentler on the grape juice and cost-efficient for the winery. Using gravity instead of pumps to move the juice through winemaking avoids some of the typical buffeting that can be damaging the wine. Our delicate Pinot Noir grapes especially benefit from the use of gravity flow.

Name: LA SOURCE DES VINS
Description:
La Source des Vins est installée à Dijon, au cœur de la cité historique et capitale des ducs de Bourgogne. 
Le caveau est situé au carrefour de la Cathédrale Sainte Bégnine et du Parvis St Jean, sur le parcours touristique de la chouette. Cette situation permet d'être au plus prés des domaines et de bénéficier de leurs produits aux meilleurs conditions. 
La Source des Vins, car c'est un retour aux sources. C'est d'abord du terroir, en particulier du terroir bourguignon, qui a valu à ses climats d'être classées par l'UNESCO. C'est ensuite des hommes de la terre, dont le savoir et la passion assurent l'excellence des produits.
La Source des Vins entend privilégier des caractères en proposant des vins et spiritueux en provenance directe de la propriété.
C'est enfin un lieu où sont organisées, ponctuellement ou sur commande, des dégustations associant mets et vins.

Name: Tenuta Arabona
Description:
Tenuta Arabona is a family run organic winery founded by Maria Antonietta and Domenico in 2006. We are located in Manoppello, in the Province of Pescara, in Abruzzo.

The company's origin dates back to the 60's, when Domenico’s parents, passionate winemakers, created a farm. Since the 80’s Domenico started to dedicate himself to the company, increasing it by size and starting a slow and deep restructuring. In 1991 the company obtained the organic farming certification.

Today our estate includes 25 hectares of vineyards and 1,5 hectars of olive groves. We mainly cultivate Abruzzo’s typical vines, such as Montepulciano, Trebbiano, Pecorino and Passerina.

Our winery, built in 2006 is equipped with the latest technologies for winemaking, yet rooted in ancient traditions.

Our goal is to offer to our costumers a unique and original wine, rich in tasteful aromas of our territory. Tenuta Arabona wines are sold in Italy and also exported in several Countries

Name: Abbema Wines B.V.
Description:
Welkom bij Abbema Wines!

Het is alweer enige tijd geleden dat Abbema Wines in het leven werd geroepen. Intussen zijn wij uitgegroeid tot een serieuze partner voor de Horeca ondernemer die kwaliteit, service en onderscheid hoog in het vaandel heeft staan. Als ex-hoteliers en restaurateurs vinden wij het van enorm belang dat de Horeca ondernemer zich kan onderscheiden. Is het niet mooi wanneer men een wijnkaart ziet zonder wijnen van Horeca groothandels of brouwerijen? Dat is de reden dat wij nog ouderwets waarde hechten aan de locatie van de te proeven Abbema-wijnen. In tegenstelling tot de Horeca groothandels en brouwerijen is wijn geen bijproduct maar is het ons hoofdproduct en tevens het enige product waar wij ons mee bezig houden.


Als één van de zeer weinige gecertificeerde wijnkoperijen van Nederland heeft Abbema Wines in het land van de duizenden wijnkoperijen en wijnhandels haar plaats weten te veroveren. Wij zien daarom ook onze toekomst zonnig tegemoet. U bent van harte welkom bij één van onze proeflokalen gelegen aan de Appelgaard te Hendrik-Ido-Ambacht of bij “Wijn aan de Kade” te Rotterdam.

Name: BASSIS WINERY S.A.
Description:
Information on our history, people, events...
 
The long-standing experience and eight decades worth of hard earned knowledge on viniculture render the Bassi family a dynamic player in today's competitive Greek quality wine market.

 The company was established in 1925 by a pioneer named Anastassios Bassis. Later, it was passed on to his son Konstantine, who expanded the operation and established a model winery in the area of Avlona, in Attika. This model winery fully utilizes the concept of gravity in wine making. 

Today, it is up to Bordeaux-maker Tassos Bassis,chemist-enologist, to continue the viniculture tradition of the renown wine maker family, who is determined to outmatch his father and grandfather by introducing the estate’s first bottled brand.

Name: Broc Cellars
Description:
Broc Cellars was nothing more than an idea not that long ago, formed by Chris Brockway, about making wines that were “site specific”. Where the wines true character came from using only sustainably, organically, or biodynamically grown grapes from areas that most would consider marginal climates.

Believing that vineyards develop ‘true’ character and complexity when they have to struggle to survive. This can come from many different aspects: poor nutrient and water holding capacity, steep slopes, cool temperatures, or from old vines that are dry farmed.

In the cellar we try to continue this practice using minimal intervention, in an effort to let the grapes speak for themselves. We are a ‘low wattage’ winery in the sense that we have very little modern equipment. Grapes are pitchforked whole-cluster into the fermenters, fermentation is allowed to happen spontaneously, all wines are basket pressed, with little/no sulphur used in our wines until bottling.

True asphalt winemaking, in an urban winery.

Name: Wolf Blass Gallery & Museum
Description:
Over 60 years of Australian wine history and the fascinating life of Wolf Blass is now on display and open to the public at the Wolf Blass Gallery & Museum, Hahndorf.

Learn from the wine industry great whose innovation and determination from humble beginnings in East Germany has helped pioneer the Barossa to the world stage. With the Wolf Blass collection previously housed at Wolf Blass Wines now in the care of the Wolf Blass Foundation, these prominent pieces of viticulture and winemaking equipment, as well as artefacts, memorabilia, personal decorations and accolades collected over time, will now be lovingly housed in the heart of Hahndorf. 

This endeavour encompasses a cooperage museum, local artist display, a dedicated function space suited for business, educational and personal events, a tasting room with locally sourced tapas and an outdoor pavilion to enjoy special release Wolf Blass wines amongst the ambience of Hahndorf. 

Join us as the Wolf Blass Foundation continues to support the growth of the Australian wine industry and let the Wolf Blass Journey educate and inspire you to experience and create quality, character and consistency.

Name: Baglio Diar
Description:
Azienda vitivinicola di Marsala nata dalla dedizione e l'impegno della famiglia Di Girolamo che fin dai primi anni '50 è legata alla produzione del vino. Baglio Diar segue una viticoltura certificata biologica nel pieno rispetto del territorio e per garantire la massima qualità e sicurezza dei propri prodotti.
Nei vigneti sono coltivati prevalentemente vitigni autoctoni e le bottiglie si presentano con un design esclusivo per esaltare la cultura siciliana tanto nel bicchiere quanto in etichetta. 

Sicilian winery located in Marsala was born thanks to the dedication and commitment of the Di Girolamo family that is linked to the wine production since the early '50s. Baglio Diar follows certified organic production to respect environment and to guarantee the quality and safeness of its products.
In the vineyards are grown mainly native grapes and the bottles stand out by an exclusive design to represent the sicilian culture both in the glass than on the label.

Name: Poggio Nicchiaia
Description:
Poggio Nicchiaia, azienda agricola giovane di spirito e di volontà, è inserita nel contesto di una meravigliosa tenuta toscana di centinaia di ettari, che si sviluppa nelle colline a circa 40 km a sud di Pisa, adiacenti al comune di Peccioli.
La cantina, tecnologicamente all’avanguardia, si trova a Montelopio, un grazioso borgo dal sapore di altri tempi, situato a pochi Km da Peccioli.
Tanta è la passione in azienda e forte è la volontà di produrre vini che nel rispetto dei canoni della tradizione toscana ne rappresentino una lettura moderna, una squisita evoluzione del gusto, non modaiola bensì rispettosa dei valori del piacere che durano nel tempo.
La coltivazione in vigna segue una elevata focalizzazione nell’interazione tra vigneti e micro clima volta a migliorare la ricchezza e complessità del frutto. A partire dalla vendemmia il team di enologi accompagna, con i migliori supporti tecnologici di cantina, lo svolgimento del frutto nelle sue diverse fasi al fine di ottenere un risultato che soddisfi le caratteristiche organolettiche e la loro corrispondenza con quelle del territorio. Rispetto della tradizione ma anche amore verso l’innovazione e volontà di accettare e superare le nuove sfide sono le caratteristiche degli uomini e donne di Poggio Nicchiaia, che con passione, intendono offrire vini all’altezza del vero blasone toscano.

Cantina:
Via San Martino, 7
56037 Peccioli - PISA
