Name: Solera Finland
Description:
Royal Unibrew A/S has acquired 100 % of Solera Beverage Group. Since 2022 Solera Finland has been part of Hartwall.

Solera Finland was a part of the Solera Beverage Group, which had been the fastest growing beverage group in the Nordic countries during the 2010s. The group imported approximately 50 M litres of alcoholic and non-alcoholic beverages annually. Solera Beverage Group employed 140 people, 30 of them in Finland.

Name: Le Favole Wines
Description:
In the foothills of Pordenone, in the hills to the north of the town of Caneva, the Le Favole winery is nestled in karst rock surrounded by vineyards.    
A natural amphitheatre of rolling hills in a small and cosy valley, protected from the cold northern winds of the Cansiglio plateau, where we combine modern wine making methods with its ageing process in barrels.
Carefully selected vineyards with low yields per hectare give life to a collection of absolute quality, born from the patience of those who show great dedication to wine, without haste, as if it were a daily, sacred ritual in pursuit of excellence. 
The wines of the Le Favole estate, in fact, preserve the essence of Friuli Venezia Giulia, all these unique and typical scents of an exclusive area where the particular climate, karst rock on one side and proximity to the sea on the other, create a magical meeting of sensations to savour, deep emotions to surrender to.


Nella pedemontana pordenonese, tra le colline a nord dell’abitato di Caneva, incastonata nella roccia carsica si trova la cantina Le Favole circondata dai vigneti.  
Un anfiteatro naturale di dolci colline in una piccola e raccolta valletta, protetta dai freddi venti di settentrione dall’altopiano del Cansiglio, dove coniughiamo le moderne metodologie di vinificazione e i processi di invecchiamento del vino nelle botti.
Selezionatissimi vigneti a bassa resa per ettaro danno vita a una collezione dalla qualità assoluta, nata dalla pazienza di chi al vino riserva grande dedizione, senza fretta, quasi si trattasse di un sacro rito quotidiano che ricerca l’eccellenza. I vini della tenuta Le Favole, infatti, custodiscono tutta l’essenza del Friuli Venezia Giulia, tutti quei profumi unici e tipici di un territorio esclusivo dove particolare clima, roccia carsica da un lato e vicinanza al mare dall’altro danno vita a un magico incontro di sensazioni da assaporare, a profonde emozioni alle quali abbandonarsi.

Name: Copperwing Distillery
Description: Spirits from scratch . . . cocktails with class! Copperwing Distillery makes the finest hand-crafted spirits in Minnesota. Copperwing's cocktail room in St. Louis Park is at the forefront of cocktail culture in the Twin Cities, exclusively using Copperwing's signature line of spirits and liqueurs to create the most outstanding cocktails around. Pick up a bottle or stop in to see what it's all about.

Name: Texas Roads Winery
Description:
We sell Texas wines by the bottle or by the glass. We want to educate the wine lovers about the many Texas wineries in the North & North East counties of Texas. Everyone knows about the Hill Country but  few are aware of the wineries in their own county.
Check our event calender for things happening- Karaoke every Thursday. Texas Music Live most Sat nights
Join us next time you are in this area.
Join us on Facebook-please

Name: Spirits360
Description:
Sprits360 decided to take a different approach from its competitors in the market who were simply looking to augment the current three-tier network. We wanted to change the game and offer consumers what they wanted: the ability to buy spirits, wine and beer directly from their favorite craft brewery, distillery or winery.

We only get paid when the customer sells their product. Our stake in the game is beyond just selling software and services, our social marketing team works with our clients to help sell their products not only in their home state but to help them join our syndicate of states where they can ship product. The result – we have grown 150% and now operate in KY, NY, CA, VA, MD, WA, OR, PA, AK, NV, NH, ND, NB, OH, OR, VT, and D.C. Our customers can ship to multiple states and internationally.

The Spirits360 platform includes everything distilleries, breweries and wineries need: E-commerce portal to manage your orders, inventory and customers, Distillery portal built for you, Compliance Engine for laws and taxes, Integrated Shipping, Point of Sale, Club and Tour scheduling for your tasting room.

We believe a simple philosophy: If you do all the right things, great customer service, great products, with great people, success always follows for your customers and your business.

Name: Lembraza
Description:
Hace 12 años un joven publicista gallego con talento llamado Joaquín, repleto de energía, entusiasmo, inquietudes, amigo de sus amigos, amante de la gastronomía, emprendedor y queridísimo por la gente de las Rozas, funda el restaurante Lembranza (RECUERDO ) logrando convertir el restaurante en un referente de la zona, basándose en la idea de calidad, a precios asequibles y trato excelente al cliente.

Joaquín nos deja hace unos años, quedándose sus padres a cargo del negocio, guardando para siempre su huella.

Ahora nosotros hemos decidido dirigir este recuerdo, con ciertos cambios para que el espíritu lembranza siga vigente.

- Gastronomía gallega de calidad a precios asequibles: con productos traídos directamente de nuestra querida comunidad.

- Vinos gallegos y de otras denominaciones

- Variedad de Ginebras Premium, ron, vodka, licores, paxarán,whisky, bourbon...

-Catas de vinos impartidas por nuestros someliers y por las propias Bodegas.

-Catas de Ginebras, tequilas, cervezas, ron... de la mano de las propias marcas.

-Futuras visitas guiadas a Bodegas 

Como profesionales en el sector vinícola, esperamos que todo aquel interesado en este increíble universo, se acerque a conocernos y nos ofrezca su opinión para mejorar constantemente. Porque el mundo del vino es una profesión apasionante y creativa (desde la recolección de la uva, hasta su almacenamiento o diseño de etiquetas y publicidad) y sobre todo, haceros partícipes de la premisa de que "el vino es un arte", concretamente EL UNICO ARTE QUE SE PUEDE BEBER" y esta es la idea principal de esta aventura, para que todo el que se acerque, se lleve un precioso recuerdo de nuestro querido Lembranza.

Name: Puente-Internacional, Inc
Description:
Bridging the world of beer, wine, and spirits.

Puente-Internacional, Inc is Sonoma, CA company that specializes in development, importation, distribution of spirit, wine, and beer brands.  Our brands represent economically responsible and sustainable models of production and sourcing.

Name: Ajornada
Description:
Most spirits brands sell a product. Ajornada is building a belief system.

The spirits market is dominated by legacy brands with generic storytelling. Ajornada is different. It’s not just a spirit, it’s a cult in the making.

At Ajornada Cachaça, we’re proving in real-time that a brand built on mythology, rituals, and cultural immersion can create devotion, not just consumption.

We aren’t marketing cachaça. We’re building the world of Ajornada.

We aren’t selling bottles. We’re converting believers.

We aren’t competing. We’re creating a whole new category.

Name: Charlois
Description:
The history of the Charlois group took root in the middle of the 17th century in the Bertranges forest, with the stave* maker Jacques Charlois.
 
In 1928, after eight generations of working in the forest, Eugène Charlois established a wood splitting mill at Murlin – the Maison Charlois.
 
Situated in the heart of the Nivernais, deep in the largest oak forests of France, the company contributed to the preservation of this gem which contains the finest oaks in France. It specialised in the selection of oaks, the crafting and natural seasoning of staves with respect for good forestry practices**.
 
Whilst resolutely in step with the modern era, the Charlois Group, created by Sylvain Charlois in 2005, preciously preserves historic family values and skills.

Since its creation the Group has diversified into a range of complementary activities all with oak and the forest as their focus. An arborescence of skills that fall into three broad categories :
 
OAK GENERATION is dedicated to the village of Murlin, cradle of the Charlois family, and supports art and culture, the enhancement of local heritage, agriculture and agroforestry.
 
OAK COLLECTION brings together forest ownership & promotion, unusual and exceptional constructions in wood, cosmetics and hospitality.
 
OAK NATION, as a key player in the world of prestigious cooperages, brings together all the professions upstream and downstream of barrel production, such as forestry, sawmilling, stave production and seasoning, large cask making, valorization and recycling of used oak barrels, production of oak products for winemaking, transportation & logistics and engineering. OAK NATION also incorporates a specialized laboratory in agri-food industries and a Research and Innovation department.

Name: Quinta das Peixotas
Description:
A Quinta das Peixotas compreende uma área de cerca de 30 hectares e localiza-se na Região demarcada do Douro, norte de Portugal.
Dispondo de um terroir muito especial, a meia-encosta sobre o rio Douro, o vinho Quinta das Peixotas é um vinho DOC (denominação de origem controlada) Douro, tinto de mesa seco fino. As castas dominantes são a Touriga Nacional, a Touriga Franca, a Tinta Barroca e a Tinta Roriz, inseridas ao longo da exploração de forma selecionada e vinificadas utilizando técnicas ancestrais.

Name: Nine Wines
Description:
A NW é uma empresa que desenvolve o seu negócio na comercialização de vinhos e como complementaridade dispomos de café e produtos de mercearia fina.
O nosso objetivo é superar as expetativas e necessidades dos nossos clientes, com produtos e serviços únicos, que permitam uma otimização de recursos e meios.
Comprometemo-nos a atuar de forma simples, eficiente, com soluções especificas e adequadas aos diferentes segmentos do mercado. 
Somos uma equipa dinâmica e multiespecializada, que privilegia o contacto personalizado, de proximidade e informalidade com todos os nossos 
parceiros de negócio.

"Precisamos de todos para chegar mais longe!" é o lema na vida do nosso fundador Helder Checa Cambey.

Name: DYONISOS WINES SpA
Description:
DYONISOS WINES SpA., a recently established winemaking company that can count on an extensive know-how due to the combined experience of the shareholders. Each one of them all directly or indirectly related to the wine industry from production up to distribution to the final customer. Some mayor shareholders are:
* Pascal Marty, a renowned French oenologist who has received international recognition with the icon wines as Almaviva (Concha y Toro/Baron de Rothschild), Opus Wine (Robert Mondavi / Baron de Rothschild) and Lota (Cousino Macul), that all have won 94 points and above in Wine Spectator of Robert Parker.
* Arturo Cousino, Chairman of the Board of Directors of Cousino Macul, a winery with more than 150 years of winemaking experience and belongs to the top 5 of wineries producing the most expensive Chilean wines.

Name: R9 Wine
Description:
Vi er en anderledes vinbutik, der udelukkende har økologiske/biodynamiske vine, der kan drikkes nu.

Vores lokaler er indrettet enkelt og med masser af dansk kunst og udover at du kan shoppe vin i åbningstiden, så afholder vi også forskellige arrangementer hvor passion er i højsædet tilsat et godt glas vin og masser af hygge.

Har du lyst til at afholde en privat vinsmagning eller et andet team arrangement i vores lokaler er du meget velkommen til at kontakte os - så finder vi ud af det.

Name: Vincenti Imports and Distribution LLC
Description:
Vincenti Imports & Distribution is a family owned company focused on the importation of high quality wines from around the world.  We strive to match our customer’s requirements and expectations to our national and international suppliers and their products.

Our passion and energy for discovering new and varied sources of supply, throughout the world, has helped us build successful and sound business relationships, across the supply chain. This in turn ensures our customer’s discerning pallets are never disappointed.

In so doing, we provide the highest level of exposure, expertise and experience to all our business partners.

While we continue to deliver whatever wines our customers want, we do focus some of our efforts on expanding the presence of South African wines in the US market.

As native South Africans we believe the 400 year old wine industry, in South Africa, produces good value and top class wine.

Name: Celler La Botera
Description:
“La Botera” Vins, està emplaçada a Batea, una de les localitats de la comarca de la Terra Alta amb tradició vitivinícola més arrelada, i que no només ha mantingut sinó que ha augmentat considerablement en els darrers anys.
La seva constitució data de l’any 1986, i va néixer amb la vocació de transformar i comercialitzar el fruït produït pels seus socis, tots ells pagesos, que viuen en primera persona el món de la vinya i del vi.
Als seus inicis “La Botera” Vins només comercialitzava vins a dojo i engarrafats, però actualment ofereix vins joves blancs, negres i criances de gran qualitat, amb les característiques i la diferenciació que els imprimeix la Denominació d’Origen Terra Alta.

Name: Chuck's Fine Wines
Description:
Nestled in the heart of Chagrin Fine Wines, inside a beautiful century building rest hundreds of wines from most wine growing regions of the world, craft beer, cheese and snacks awaiting your discovery.

The most knowledgeable staff, we pride ourselves on a unique customer experience. 

We have offered delivery and curbside pick-up for over 25 years. Come join the fun at one of our weekly wine tasting, monthly beer tastings and beer schools.

Name: El Vino Loco - E²T bv
Description: Speciaalzaak in Spaanse, Portugese, Oostenrijkse, Italiaanse, Griekse, Argentijnse en Belgische wijnen. Alcohol vrije dranken, Bio-Vegan-Belgisch.

Name: Agricosimo Vigneti & Cantina
Description: agriCosimo is a modern company that combines the teachings of generations of winemakers with scrupulous management of all stages of production. This conjugation is detailed in the Corporate Mission: To produce wines through careful attention to the cultivation of vineyards, respecting nature and the integrity of the product, and rigor in the processes of transformation of the grapes, refinement and aging of wines to motivate customers to choose agriCosimo.

Name: Breitenbach Wine Cellars
Description:
Breitenbach Wine Cellars is located just 4 miles from I-77 at the Dover/Sugarcreek exit.  Take SR 39 west and look for our sign on the right.  Our retail store, Der Marktplatz, is located right next to the wine cellar.  Here we have a large selection of unique and local gifts as well as gourmet foods.  We offer free samples of Ohio’s Grand Champion Swiss cheese and smoked meats at our deli counter.

•	Wine tasting of your choice of 40 Breitenbach varieties
•	Summer Barbeques
•	Clean and comfortable restrooms
•	Breitenbach fruit wines include Blackberry, Raspberry, Rhubarb and more!
*                   Cafe Breitenbach is open Mon-Sat for lunch serving salads, paninis and pizzas!


Don’t miss the 18th Annual Dandelion May Fest and Great Dandelion Cookoff May 6 &7.  Along with entertainment, food and crafts we will be giving a “behind –the-scenes” tour of the winery.  Breitenbach is one of a few wineries that make dandelion wine and the only winery to have a Dandelion Cookoff with samples of dandelion foods.

Name: Waiheke Winegrowers Association
Description:
Just a 35 minutes ferry trip away from downtown Auckland, Waiheke Island has become known as New Zealand’s "Island of Wine".

A Wine and Food experience destination of New Zealand and home to a dedicated group of award-winning winegrowers.  Our members successfully matched the unique maritime climate and ancient soil structures to the selection of classical grape varieties in order to produce red and white wines with distinctive varietal character.

We encourage sustainable vineyard and winery practice while sharing knowledge and enjoying friendships and welcoming visitors to our unique food and wine destination to sip, stay, play and dine with us.

Name: Casa Mate Organic Tequila
Description: Casa Mate Tequila is a brewing company that offers organic tequila. The company was founded in 2022 and is headquartered in Newport Beach, California, United States.

Name: IVORY Vodka
Description:
Il n'y a pas d'histoire sans héros,
Il n'y a pas de héros sans quête,
Il n'y a pas de quête sans joyau
Il y a IVORY

Laissez vous surprendre par sa douceur !

Name: Comercial de Alimentación Williams S.L.
Description: Working in Salamanca and province, get to know our book, our wineries and our products. Distributors and wholesalers of wines, spirits, beers, coffees, preserves food, ... Dedicated to HORECA and hospitality for more than 30 years.
Location: Carbajosa de la Sagrada, Castilla y León

Name: Aldo Sohm
Description:
We provide cellar consulting to private clients, wholesale and retail Zalto glassware throughout the United States, sell the exclusive Aldo Sohm branded Laguiole wine key, collaborate with Kracher Winery (Austria) on the Sohm and Kracher wine collection, and occasionally do speaking appearances (primarily for corporate education or entertainment). Aldo Sohm Inc. continues to developed lines of business through Aldo's experiences in the industry. 

Aldo's formal sommelier education began in 1998, when a mentor invited him to witness the “Best Sommelier in the World” competition in Vienna. After finishing his Sommelier exam, the same group leader approached Aldo about competing. He won “Best Sommelier in Austria” in 2002 and defended the title until 2006, returning to compete after he moved to the US in 2004. Then, in 2007, after winning "Best Sommelier in America," he joined Le Bernardin as Chef Sommelier. The team opened Aldo Sohm Wine Bar in 2014. Encouraged by the experience of designing his wine key with Laguiole after taking home "Best Sommelier in the World 2008," Aldo pursued partnerships with Zalto and Kracher to continue learning about crafts that complemented his love for wine.

Name: Cervejaria Straat Bier
Description:
A Cervejaria Straat nasceu em Holambra, e é uma homenagem à cidade e seus habitantes.
Seu nome é uma junção de Holanda, América e Brasil = Holambra.
Estrategicamente localizada no Portal da Cidade, o que inspirou o nome da Cervejaria, já que Straat significa “Rua” em holandês. Pertence ao Grupo Carmona, empresa Paulista que atua há 40 anos no mercado de equipamentos para chopp e distribuição de bebidas alcoólicas e não alcoólicas.
O principal símbolo da Marca Straat é o Moinho, construção típica da arquitetura holandesa, também representado na cidade de Holambra, o Povos Unidos é o maior moinho da América Latina.
A Cervejaria Straat produz cervejas artesanais de qualidade, com mais puros ingredientes.
Nosso mestre cervejeiro cuida da cervejaria com coração e alma, respeitando sempre os padrões de higiene e qualidade. Proost!

Name: Gourmisto
Description: Gourmisto s’appuie sur ses relations solides avec ses fournisseurs pour vous proposer des ingrédients qui sont le reflet d’un savoir-faire, d’un terroir, du travail méticuleux et acharné des hommes qui font les produits d’exception.

Name: Château de Bel
Description:
Le Château de Bel est un domaine d'environ 10 ha situé au sud de Libourne en Gironde. Nous pratiquons une culture raisonnée dans le plus grand respect de la vigne puisqu'il est impossible de faire du bon vin sans bons raisins. Ce respect se poursuit dans les chais avec des cuves en béton sans contrôle de température, afin de travailler au mieux le produit. Un vieux pressoir vertical nous donne de très belles presses afin de démarrer au mieux une élaboration qui peut s'étendre sur près de 2ans. 

Au sein de notre gamme vous trouverez un vin pour tous les plaisirs puisqu'elle est composée de Bordeaux rouge, blanc et rosé, de 2 Bordeaux Supérieur dont la cuvée "La Capitane", de 2 Montagne Saint-Emilion, du Saint-Emilion Grand Cru "Aux Plantes" et du Pomerol "Le Clos du Canton des Ormeaux". Le petit dernier est un vin hors normes puisqu'il s'agit d'un pur Cabernet Franc à découvrir très prochainement.

Name: QueroPerú
Description:
Somos una empresa dedicada a la venta de vinos y licores, para deleitar el paladar de nuestros clientes con productos nacionales e importados, siendo estos exclusivos y de alta calidad.

Gracias a los exquisitos aromas y sabores de nuestras bebidas de alta gama, buscamos crear gratos recuerdos que perdurarán en el tiempo; con Quero, todo momento es especial.

Contáctenos
WhatsApp: 940 922 712
Correo: info@quero.com.pe
Web: www.quero.com.pe
Envíos a Lima y Provincia.

Name: Comte Delavie Champagne
Description:
COMTE DELAVIE, c'est la naissance d’un nouvel emblème de la noblesse du Champagne à travers le monde. La création d’une entreprise qui s’engage à reverser chaque année 30% de ses bénéfices au profit d’actions solidaires ou d’organisations internationales soigneusement sélectionnées pour leur efficacité et leur transparence.

Avec COMTE DELAVIE, vos moments précieux deviennent magiques et célèbrent la vie, tout simplement. Pour chaque coupe bue, vous participez à un mouvement de bienfaisance mondial. « Toast for the Planet » est le premier mouvement de célébration responsable créé par la marque ; faisant rimer Fêter avec Solidarité. 
---
Beyond its best quality Champagne, COMTE DELAVIE dedicates 30% of its profits to organizations involved in the preservation of all species living on Earth.

Join the ranks of the game changers and become the ambassador of COMTE DELAVIE’s successful project. Participate to the “Toast for the Planet” movement, when every celebration serves a bigger purpose by becoming a tribute to Life. COMTE DELAVIE, when party hard means doing great.

Name: Bad Dog Distillery
Description:
We are a custom crafted distillery located in Arlington Washington. We create quality Whiskey and bourbon in the most traditional ways from the highest quality ingredients. Every detail is custom from our copper still to the organically grown, local Washington wheat and corn, every step of the process is overseen by our master distiller Dave.

Bad Dog Distillery's vision is to make premium spirits by using simple traditional methods. In addition to making your favorite Whiskey or bourbon we are a business that supports our community. We like to share our story and give back to the community we live in.

Name: MOUNTAIN Distilling
Description:
MOUNTAIN Distilling is about innovation at its core. Every product and every process is about an exploration to create something truly breathtaking, elevated one-of-a-kind spirits.

We begin from a blank canvas to see where the journey takes us. Often left of center and brimming with adventure, the resulting spirits we make are full flavoured and unique.

We welcome you to come with us on that journey of discovery. From Single Malt’s shaped by native wood maturation, Gins infused with locally foraged botanicals, Vodkas with altitude, Agave spirits distilled right here in Australia, and premixed drinks that take any occasion to the next level.

Name: WINEVOX
Description:
Founded in 2003, Winevox helps a range of wine properties and merchants to develop their export markets. This assistance focuses on three main areas: training, marketing consultancy and translation.
Winevox is a also WSET provider in Bordeaux.

Name: Famille Collovray & Terrier
Description: We are winemakers. For three generations, we have cultivated vines. We are deeply attached to our land; it reflects who we are, both unassuming and ambitious. We are a family, bound by blood and extended by passion. Together, we form a strong and supportive team, driven by a desire to improve every day. We cultivate our vines using organic farming methods; we replant hedgerows to shape the landscape and promote biodiversity; and we work to reduce our carbon footprint. Our goal is to improve customer satisfaction and guarantee wines accessible to all without ever compromising on quality. Our greatest achievement remains the continued trust of our 1,900 customers worldwide each year.

Name: DP Winery
Description:
Since the second half of the 1800s, the ancestors of the D'Andrea family have always been linked to their lands, working on them, producing and marketing their products. Over the decades, the family has written its own history in various regions, from Abruzzo to Tuscany, to arrive in Calabria and Sardinia. Regions rich in a millenary food and wine history, it is our duty to make them known to the world. Hence the desire of the fourth generation heirs of the D'Andrea family not to lose the culture and tradition. We decided to retrace their history in a food and wine project. 

We strongly believed in the great potential of Montepulciano and other local grapes and the need to give a new future to Abruzzo viticulture has grown in us. We decided to write a new story inspired by local wine and food traditions and attentive to the pursuit of absolute quality. For this reason, the idea of “Tenuta DP in Abruzzo” came to life.

We are linked to the historical Abruzzo vines, to the traditions of places where they are grown. Our wine tells about its native land to the world. We are son of a millenary culture that feeds our passion for wine and good food. The attention to fruit that gives life to our wine gave us perfectly balanced bottles, with a unique flavor.

We aim to reach the entire world to offer a wine tasting experience that is pure poetry. A wine that is an interpretation of Abruzzo, in name of strength and constant gentleness of its flavors.

Our vision: We are inspired by the power of the authentic Italian food and wine tradition; it is our duty to spread their virtues around the world.

Our mission: To reach the world and offer the traditional Italian food and wine taste experience, grown in the homeland of our family. Quality, passion, and care for our customers are our strongest values.

Name: ESTRELLA DEL SOL SERVICES SA
Description: ESTRELLA DEL SOL SERVICES SA is a wine and spirits company based out of C/ LOS PERALES S/N - POLIGONO CAÑADON, MIJAS, Spain.

Name: Vigneron.Club 3.0
Description: Sélection et ventes de vins part internet. Organisation de dégustations et événements oeunotouristiques.

Name: Casa Fioresi - Cachaças d'Alambic Weber Haus
Description:
CASA FIORESI est bien plus qu'une simple entreprise ; c'est une passion vivante qui fait le pont entre le Brésil et la France. Fondée par Everton Fioresi, un entrepreneur brésilien fort de +20 ans d'expérience dans le commerce et la logistique, CASA FIORESI s'est établie en France en 2015. Avec un Master en Management et Commerce International, Everton, aux côtés de sa femme Flávia, a réalisé un rêve : partager les trésors de la Cachaça artisanale brésilienne avec le marché français.

En tant que distributeur exclusif de la renommée distillerie WEBER HAUS, nous nous engageons à offrir des Cachaças 100% artisanales et bio. Avec plus de 15 variétés soigneusement sélectionnées, nos produits incluent des Cachaças blanches parfaites pour les cocktails, des Cachaças vieillies en fûts de bois nobles, ainsi que des Gins artisanaux infusés aux arômes brésiliens. Nous avons veillé à maintenir des stocks importants ici, en France, pour garantir une disponibilité constante et rapide pour tous nos clients.

Nos clients — restaurants, bars à cocktails, cavistes, épiceries fines et grossistes en spiritueux — font confiance à CASA FIORESI pour leur approvisionnement en produits de qualité. Notre approche axée sur les circuits courts nous permet de valoriser les producteurs tout en assurant un approvisionnement fiable et régulier.

Mais CASA FIORESI, c’est également une expérience immersive. Nous organisons des MASTERCLASS dans les grandes villes françaises, où nous partageons notre amour et notre expertise de la Cachaça. Ces ateliers sont l'occasion de plonger dans l'histoire, les arômes et les subtilités de ce spiritueux emblématique, élaboré à partir de pur jus de canne à sucre.

Nous sommes ici pour répondre aux besoins de nos clients, en leur offrant non seulement des produits d'exception, mais aussi la tranquillité d'esprit. Avec CASA FIORESI, vous choisissez un partenaire solide, prêt à vous accompagner dans votre découverte des merveilles du Brésil. Rejoignez-nous!

Name: Trophée des Bourgognes et des Loires
Description:
Le Trophée des Bourgognes is an independent blind tasting competition on the wines of Burgundy created in 2019 by two former students. It gathers domaines from all around Burgundy, as well as students from the most prestigious universities. It takes place at the Chateau de Meursault in the heart of the Côte de Beaune

Students are asked to taste and guess a selection of wines based on specific criteria such as vintage, village, appellation, Climat, estate, as well as to answer 60 theoretical questions about the history, the viticulture, and vineyards of Burgundy. The blind tasting is separated into three flights of wine a white flight, a red flight & a mystery flight.

We felt that burgundy was an unreachable region and none of the students could ever afford these wines, let alone taste them. We wanted to change this.

We wish to break the status quo & demystify this magnificent region. Our aim is to show the diversity & beauty in the soils, the people, & the wine making. While young wine enthusiast learn to appreciate some of the best expressions of Pinot Noir & Chardonnay.

The first edition took place in October 2019.

Name: Deerfield Ranch Winery
Description: Deerfield Ranch Winery is located in Kenwood, the heart of Sonoma Valley, is an award winning, certified organic producer, winery crafting 15,000 cases annually. Robert Rex and associate winemaker, Cecilia Valdivia, and their team, make small lots of handcrafted wine from more than 26 carefully selected vineyards in Sonoma County. Specializing in blended wines, Deerfield is at the forefront of this modern yet traditionally based style and on the cutting edge of California winemaking techniques. Deerfield wines are renowned for their brilliant colors, rich and wonderfully complex flavors and a long finish. They tend to be fruit forward, with gentle tannins and low acid. The wines are crafted to appeal to the new, younger wine drinker while exhibiting complexity and depth that a studied wine geek or connoisseur will recognize and enjoy.

Name: Arizona Wine Growers Association
Description: The AWGA is a non-profit  trade organization that is the only association or agency committed to assisting Arizona's wine growers in achieving their full potential by providing access to education, marketing assistance, legislative support and timely market information. We provide a unified voice to assure that wine grape growing in Arizona remains an economically viable industry for our future generations.

Name: Tacchino Wine
Description:
Da oltre tre generazioni la famiglia Tacchino produce vini di riconosciuta qualità.
Alessio e Romina rappresentano la nuova generazione, ereditano la passione per queste terre dal nonno fondatore e dal padre e, con il supporto di tecnologie per la produzione e la consulenza di esperti enologi, aggiungono valore a un vino già buono per tradizione.

L’Azienda Vinicola Luigi Tacchino nasce a Castelletto d’Orba, nell’Alto Monferrato piemontese, verso la seconda metà del secolo scorso. Tra queste terre prestigiose e ricche di tradizione inizia la produzione del bianco Gavi e dei rossi Dolcetto d’Ovada e Barbera del Monferrato che rimangono ancora oggi le perle più preziose dell’azienda. Insieme a queste, l’amorevole e sapiente lavorazione delle colline dell’Alto Monferrato ha prodotto nel tempo vini altrettanto preziosi che affiancano i prodotti più tradizionali.

Name: Castellroig · Finca Sabaté i Coca
Description:
A sólo 50 km de Barcelona, Castellroig disfruta de todas las virtudes de una de las culturas más atractivas de hoy en día. Dinámica y abierta, la cultura mediterránea invita al ocio, a pasear y a disfrutar.

Castellroig • Finca Sabaté i Coca es una empresa familiar que elabora vinos y cavas de calidad desde principios del siglo XX. Dos familias ubicadas en el Valle del Bittles que a lo largo de los años han sabido mantener su pasión por la tierra y el vino y que, a través de cuatro generaciones, han logrado transmitir la personalidad propia de unos vinos únicos nacidos, elaborados y criados en esta zona tan particular.
La familia Sabaté y Coca abre las puertas de su masía para que puedas disfrutar del sol y la tranquilidad mientras catas los vinos y cavas, conoces la verdadera historia del vino en el museo privado que ha sido creado y conservado durante generaciones y visitas la bodega donde se preparan todos los vinos y los cavas.

Tras el éxito en el mercado nacional de los vinos y cavas se exportan a Brasil, México y Japón, entre muchos otros.

Name: Fizz Champagne & Bubbles Bar
Description: Fizz Champagne & Bubbles Bar was built on the idea that more people needed to celebrate the everyday. Fizz is a place where guests realize they can drink champagne in their everyday life and not save it for a special occasion. Fizz offers guest a unique and boutique champagne experience with bottles, glasses, flights, and fizztails not found in stores.

Name: Vino Wines
Description: We offer a sale or return with our event servicing, while we would love for you to buy online and offer this we would much rather see you in store and discuss your specific needs. If you need further assistance please contact info vinowines.co.uk or go to our Wedding Events area in the about us section.

Name: English Wine Tasting & Tours
Description:
In case the name wasn't a give away, English Wine Tasting Tours  run wine tours to English Vineyards from London and the South East. 

Join a group of fellow wine lovers, as we whisk you away into the beautiful English Countryside for a day tasting award winning English Wines.  The day includes tour and tasting at two vineyards, a gastro-pub lunch, transport and of course one of our English Wine expert tour guides. Tours run every Saturday from May through to November, and depart from central London. 

We also offer private tours for both large and small groups.  All our tours are in executive mini-buses/mini-coaches depending on the group size.   We can replicate our existing tours, or create a bespoke tour specific to your group.

 These are ideal for corporate days out, client entertainment and special occasions through to specialist interest groups such as wine societies and clubs.

The English Wine Industry has seen huge growth in the last decade, and English wine is becoming increasingly popular both in the UK and internationally.

But quite simply the best way to try English Wine, is at the vineyard where it was made.  Not only do you get to see all the love and hard work that goes into every bottle, but you also get to try all the many wines that are only available at the cellar door. 

Our wine tours not only give you the opportunity to try some of our award winning wines, but they a great fun day out in the country side.  We are wine tour operators that create fun days out and exceptional events all focused around English wine and food.

Name: SCR Spirits
Description: SCR Spirits offers accessible, high-quality alcohol, while promoting local artisanship.

Name: Víno z Modry
Description: Občianske združenie Víno z Modry je apeláciou a združenie vinárov a vinohradníkov v Modre. Tvoríme víno, apeláciu a naše mesto. Našim cieľom je pozdvihnúť víno z modranského vinohradníckeho rajónu aby ste si ho mohli užiť. A to jednoducho tak, že vám budem garantovať pôvod a kvalit našich vín.

Name: Peppermint Bar & Kitchen
Description:
Peppermint Bar & Kitchen currently operates in Swansea & Cardiff.

Peppermint Bar & Kitchen Cardiff is positioned just on the edge of the city centre on the corner of Mill Lane. Peppermint Bar & Kitchen Swansea can be found in the middle of WInd Street in the city centre. We strive to offer quality products & service from our food to cocktails.

Name: Tenuta Carobbio
Description:
Carobbio is located in the Golden Valley in Panzano in Chianti, between Florence and Siena, in the middle of a natural amphitheater. The estate covers about fifty hectares, among ancient vineyards, olive groves and lush forests. In love with these places that recalled his origins, thirty years ago Carlo Novarese began a project to restore the lands, the vineyards and the cellars to their former glory, surrounding himself with a group of people who, with passion, still carry on his vision. Carobbio combines tradition with the most innovative techniques and cultivates its own vineyards producing important wines, of great vigor and aromatic complexity.

OUR PRODUCTS

The Classics: Carobbio Chianti Classico best expresses the peculiarities of a unique territory, thanks to its body, fullness and richness.
Chianti Classico Riserva, made only in the best years, is produced by selecting the grapes of three vineyards, located on different soils: clayey in the lower part and rich in rocky components in the highest part, where galestro and alberese allow the grapes to express their best characteristics. 

The Cru: Leone (Sangiovese in purity), Pietraforte (Cabernet Sauvignon) and Magaldo (Merlot) are emblems of the perfect link between excellent quality and creativity.

The young wines: Terra Rossa Rosato, obtained from the soft pressing of whole Sangiovese grapes, enhances their freshness, resulting in an elegant and enveloping wine, while Piluka Pinot Bianco represents a bold choice in a territory dominated by red grapes.

The meditation: Vin Santo Occhio di Pernice, which offers a range of unexpected spicy aromas and flavors.

The Extra vergin olive oil: obtained from cold pressing and under nitrogen, extra-virgin olive oil is produced exclusively from fruits harvested by hand from the company's olive groves.

Name: SCEA CHATEAU LA MARGILLIERE
Description:
Le Château Margillière se situe au milieu des vignes, au cœur de la Provence verte à Brignoles sur l’aire d’appellation des Coteaux Varois en Provence.
Un écrin de verdure bordé d’une source millénaire qui raconte une histoire venue de la période romaine. Ce terroir unique anciennement appelé La Rouge est un terroir exceptionnel pour le vignoble qui puise toute sa force de la terre.

Depuis 1998, la famille Caternet restaure et rebâtit avec soins cette ancienne magnanerie et les bâtiments du 17ème siècle. Lors des travaux un autel votif de l’ère romaine est ainsi retrouvé.
En mars 2016, la Famille Bunan vignerons à Bandol rejoint l’activité du Château Margillière.

Name: Royal Elite Vodka
Description: Royal Elite Vodka is a line of supreme luxury vodka products, available in two distinctive types which are the Royal Elite Purple Label of eight-times-distilled Supreme Luxury Vodka and the Royal Elite Gold Label of the seven-times-distilled Gluten Free vodka made from the juice of Quince fruits.  All products are Alpha Grade vodka and quartz filtered.  Royal Elite Vodkas are produced in Uzbekistan by the venerable Tashkentvino distillery, founded in 1867.

Name: Akua 2.0
Description:
Akua 2.0 is a Multi-Enterprise with the aims of developing the Black Economy with innovation and product production.

Haze Gin is a Premium Artisan Gin which is a dedication to both our Ghanaian and British Heritages. Our Gin is distilled and infused with luxury and delicate botanicals popular from Europe and West Africa

Akua 2.0 is also very dedicated to seeing the Diaspora give back to both Africa and the Caribbean. Being of Ghanaian heritage ourselves we have seen the benefit of collaborating and building business relationships with people back home. 

We are developing a e-guide travelling app called "Mah Landi" the first virtual guide tool for all visitors and people who love Ghana.

Name: Le Vin du Bâché (VIDUBA)
Description: We offer delightful tasting events, we sell you excellent natural and dynamic wines and can store your wines in our own monitored and naturally evolving cellars.

Name: Decante This
Description:
Decante This was originally established by Leigh Dryden in 2010 in Zurich, Switzerland and was conceived as a means of turning a passion into a profession. Leigh started his career as an agricultural economist but his lifelong passion for wine has never left him. 

Most of his career has been spent working for international companies outside of Australia and has taught him to understand the value of great products, relationships and quality. 

When Leigh returned to Australia in 2011, he brought Decante This with him, and was thereby able to introduce the Australian market to wine regions and winemakers that had never had an avenue into our region before. 
Decant This is built upon the premise of delivering a select range of premium high quality wines that  come from environmentally sustainable, small, family owned and operated wine producers. 

We are very proud of the close personal relationships we have fostered with each winemaker and each wine, having visited each vineyard and understood the way our wines are produced from vine to bottle. Our wines have come from Germany, Switzerland, USA, France, New Zealand and South Africa but all are produced by artisan winemakers on a small scale, making them unique, very high quality, and often very limited. 

The next chapter in the Decante This story has now opened. Our new partner, Daryl Fisher, brings with him a passion for wine equal to Leigh’s, as well as extensive knowledge of the Sydney wine market. Having started his career in retail at Vintage Cellars, Daryl studied at University of Adelaide, Roseworthy.

Decante This is now proudly representing a select range of Australian winemakers, based on the same principles as our international range, artisan winemakers producing very high quality wines with sustainability and integrity. 

Leigh and Daryl are both deeply passionate about what we do, the wines and winemakers we represent, and hope to share our enthusiasm and some great wine with you.

Name: P. Rovira Rovira SL
Description:
Pedro Rovira pone a su disposición su conocimiento y su pasión por los vinos de España, para ofrecerles toda su riqueza y su diversidad. Y es en sus regiones donde las gentes que se dedican al cultivo de la vida y la elaboración del vino convierten esta profesión en un arte.

«Hay más filosofía y sabiduría en una botella de vino, que en todos los libros.» Louis Pasteur (1822-1895)
Location: Santa Margarida i els Monjos, Cataluña

Name: Wine Point
Description: The top Romanian exclusive importer and distributor of medium, premium and superior premium-priced wines. Online wine retailer set to offer the best value for money. View our portfolio here: www.winepoint.ro. Follow us on social media to learn more about our selection and events.

Name: Winzz GmbH
Description:
Wer ihn kennt, der weiß: Unser Winzz ist ein absoluter Gourmet.

Sein Lieblingsgetränk ist und war schon immer die Weinschorle. Nicht süß aber auch nicht zu trocken darf sie sein!

Gleichbleibende Qualität schätzt er ebenso wie die Möglichkeit, einfach einen prickelnden Schluck aus der Flasche zu nehmen.
Natürlich gut gekühlt und vor allem immer und überall in gleicher Qualität. Umweltfreundlich in der 0,33 l Mehrweg Pfandflasche. Ideal für unterwegs.

51 % bester, badischer Wein einer Winzergenossenschaft, gemischt mit 49 % spritzigem Waser. Für einen feinperligen, einzigartigen Geschmack.

Name: Enoscuola di Luca Gardini
Description:
enoscuola.it

Il mercato è un luogo di scambi. Luca Gardini, grande comunicatore del vino, decide di ‘scambiare’ il suo sapere (sommelier campione del mondo) relativo al vino.
Lo fa in un luogo quotidiano come il Mercato Centrale a pochi passi dal centro di Firenze. Nella città che ha ospitato il rinascimento L’Enoscuola di Luca Gardini ambisce a riscrivere le regole dell’assaggio, candidandosi come il luogo in cui prenderà vita il rinascimento della degustazione. 

L’Enoscuola di Luca Gardini non vuole fare accademia, ma dare alcune ‘pillole di degustazione’ attraverso cui riuscire a leggere ogni vino. Nonostante lo staff della scuola sia composto da professionisti della degustazione e della comunicazione inerente al vino, il ‘sapere’ non viene trasmesso dall’alto ma in maniera trasversale. 
Se il vino italiano è cambiato deve cambiare anche il modo di raccontarlo e di farlo comprendere. Luca Gardini ha perciò deciso di stilare una serie di regole per la cosiddetta ‘degustazione quotidiana’. Semplici concetti, spiegati attraverso uno stile moderno e per nulla autoreferenziale, che non mirano alla ricerca dei descrittori, ma all’individuazione di quelle che sono le caratteristiche fondamentali per comprendere un vino nel 2014.
 
Largo ai concetti della Degustazione Quotidiana:

Semplicità: Un vino che arriva al gusto spesso è già un grande vino.

Franchezza: Intesa come rispetto del territorio e delle caratteristiche varietali.

Bevibilità: Il vino non va annusato 100 volte e poi bevuto, ma va consumato, perché la bottiglia ‘buona’ è quella che, appena finita, te ne fa aprire una seconda.

Pulizia: Il vino non deve avere difetti. Basta con chi cerca di nascondere le imperfezioni enologiche dietro un paravento stilistico.

Sensibilità: Ovvero il rispetto per il palato altrui.
 
La formula, più che mai snella e immeditata, è quella di 4 vini in 40 minuti. 
Poco tempo, info semplici, tanto sapere e tanto sapore di vino con la firma di Luca Gardini.

Name: LVG La Vieille Garde
Description:
Founded in 2003, La Vieille Garde designs and manufactures wine cellars, commercial display refrigerators and a wide variety of wine racks and accessories. The company has completed more than 3,000 commercial and residential projects as original as each other. With the experience of more than 10 million bottles protected over the years, LVG offers a variety of products to keep your best wines in optimal conditions and present your best products with panache.

The DNA of La Vieille Garde is described by the alliance of many strong links. Whether by mastering the principles of custom refrigeration, the reproduction of impeccable storage environments, through the manufacture of all architectural elements, each of LVG's links is driven by the attention to detail, without compromise.

Name: Vignerons Indépendants de Haute garonne et Tarn et garonne
Description: Vignerons indépendant du Tarn et Garonne et de la Haute Garonne

Name: C2 Sourcing
Description:
C2 SOURCING  is a buying office + innovation center focused on the merchandising industry. With offices in Shanghai, Beijing, Hong Kong, and recently in Madrid, we cater the industry main players and effectively fulfill their purchasing needs, which at this point in time cover operations in over 15 countries all over Europe, Latinamerica and USA.

We work with solid brands such us Ron Barcelo, Elit Vodka, Larios, Dom Perignon, Moet & Chandon, Viola Beer, Cutty Sark, Corona Extra, Belvedere Vodka.. among others, adapting to very demanding standards from their marketing departments and promotional campaigns.

The strength of the C2 Concept leans on two basic principles:

- CONNECT: Optimizing the product “added value chain”, our main strength is reaching a DIRECT CONNECTION among preﬁltered/highly qualiﬁed suppliers and B2B end clients, shortening all intermediation, which ultimately provokes the price increase. That brings extremely competitive quotations and the most strict control over the suppliers, as shown in our website's CLIENTS AREA, where orders follow up simply reach next level, avoiding all the classic communicative/quality control problems that usually happen while connecting the Chinese source with ﬁnal clients worldwide.

- CREATE: Far from being a conventional sourcing platform, the interaction between factories and clients also let us also enjoy a R+D/Creative team, that we call TREND LAB and that combines the efforts of Chinese/ western designers and engineers, working hand by hand with factories in the development of that UNIQUE concept that our clients always dreamt of and never had the chance to ﬁnd. This advantages let us: accelerate customized designs, save important costs attached to communication mistakes and be permanently active at international trend hunting, which allows us to suggest all kind of new opportunities to our clients via Newsletter.

Name: Le Vallon - Vignerons du Rougier
Description: La cave du Vallon est située en Aveyron, dans le vallon de Marcillac, au cœur d'une nature préservée. Dans ce vignoble de moyenne montagne, les vignes sont plantées majoritairement en terrasses sur un terroir d'argile ferreux appelé "Rougier" en référence à la teinte si particulière de sa terre. Ce terroir spécifique permet au Fer Servadou dit Mansois, cépage unique, de développer des arômes enchanteurs. Les vendanges de l’appellation se font exclusivement à la main. L’AOC Marcillac est une petite appellation qui produit des vins fruités, légers et gouleyants qui sauront vous séduire.

Name: Time For Wine
Description:
Time For Wine helps individuals and professionals select the best wines from regions all over France and throughout the world.
Wines are available for sale through monthly selections and wine tastings.

Name: Les Frères Moine
Description:
L’aventure des Frères Moine démarre en 1980. François et son frère Jean-Yves s’installent à Villeneuve, commune de Chassors, à une vingtaine de kilomètres au nord de Cognac. Nait alors ce nom, les Frères Moine, qui résonne aujourd’hui encore comme une institution dans le paysage des propriétés familiales du Cognaçais. Pendant 25 ans, les deux hommes vont patiemment explorer toute la richesse de leur vignoble afin de produire des cognacs, des pineaux des Charentes et des vins charentais de haute qualité.

François a transmis sa passion de la vigne à ses deux fils, Yann et Gabriel qui aujourd’hui poursuivent l’œuvre des Frères Moine sans en dénaturer le nom. Chacun avec sa personnalité et son parcours apporte ses idées nouvelles et sa pierre à l’édifice solidement ancré dans la tradition.

Grand Prix d'Or dans la catégorie "Initiatives créatives et Originalités" aux Trophées de l'Œnotourisme 2020 organisés par #terredevins et #atoutfrance.

Name: Baglio Aimone Winery & Vineyards
Description:
The Farm consists of 25 hectares all planted in vineyards, located in the heart of the Natural Reserve “Preola Lake and Gorghi Tondi”, inside the area of Mazara del Vallo (TP) at the Gorghi Tondi place. 

The fields of Baglio Aimone are spread all around the owned ancient "baglio", which stands on top of the ridge of a charming hill in the heart of the Natural Reserve, from which the sight dominates free the vineyards, the Preola lake and the surrounding Mediterranean vegetation

The complete area has been included in 1991 within the protected areas of the Regional Plan of Parks and Reserves, formally established in 1998 and managed by the Italian Association for the World Wild Life Fund (WWF Italy).

Giovanni Paladino
General Manager

e-mail: info@baglioaimone.it
phone: +39 3932910350

Name: KosherWine.com
Description:
We're transforming the Kosher wine experience with unique sourcing, competitive pricing, and lightning-fast delivery. Explore our diverse selection of premium Kosher wines from around the world. Enjoy unbeatable value without compromising quality. Get your favorite Kosher wines delivered to your doorstep promptly. Join us as we redefine the Kosher wine experience. 

#KosherWine #WineLovers

Name: WINE CONSULTING
Description:
Wine is passion, and we are passionate about wine.

We are dedicated to supporting wine businesses and associations through consulting, branding & market research. 

Founded in 2003 and with a strong experience & expertise in wine industry distribution, retailing & marketing.

With our core team based in Buenos Aires and very soon in Manitoba, we work in all current and emerging wine consuming markets, mainly focused in marketing & promotional activities, international fairs and media presentations & launches.

Name: Azienda Agricola Le Masciare s.r.l.
Description:
A boutique, family-owned winery covering some 20 hectares, and located in the hills surrounding Paternopoli, a small town in the heart of Irpinia, south-Italy. This is a land of great wines and olive oils, and Irpinia's unique, indigenous grape and olive varieties make up all of Le Masciare's land. 

We produce an exceptional range of red, white and rosé wines, made from the indigenous Aglianico, Fiano, Greco and Coda di Volpe grapes. 

Our company has been making organically certified EVOO (extra virgin olive oils) since 2001 and is in conversion to organic farming for our wines since 2018.  

We are actively looking to expand the distribution of our products, both nationally and internationally, please feel free to contact us if you are looking to complement your range of high quality wines.

Name: Quinta do Mourão - Port Wines
Description: Between Tradition and Innovation: Today, the project lands on the shoulders of the 3rd generation. Miguel Braga, one of the current owners, was only 10 when his father started it. And so he would spend most of his childhood in this beautiful region, for which he had always felt a great attraction. That's why, after his father passed away, with no hesitation, Miguel decided to continue the work previously initiated and make it grow. Today, Quinta do Mourão, has 14 people working together on modernization and sustainability of the project, always focused on increasing the quality of the wines but still following the Tradition.

Description: Weingut Jordan is a family wine estate in Great Reipersdorf near Pulkau in the “Weinviertel”. Since 1858, there has been a noteworthy tradition of winemaking in Groß-Reipersdorf near Pulkau. Since 2010 Simone Jordan runs the family winery in the fourth generation, she is actively supported by her partner and her parents. To be winemakers, for the family means to capture the fascination of nature to be sensitive with it and bring the best quality of grapes into the cellar. The Motto of the winery is “Outstanding wines are made in the vineyard and not in the cellar”

We focus on clean, varietally-correct wines at accessible price points.

Name: Callisto Spirits
Description:
Rum is ready for a rebirth, and Callisto is leading the charge. We have created the world’s first Californian Botanical Rum by creating a blend of rums that pairs perfectly with a handful of carefully chosen, locally sourced botanicals, to create a genuinely unique, innovative, and delicious final product. Dry, floral and smooth, Callisto is a spirit unlike anything you have tried, complex enough to be drunk on the rocks; versatile enough to create any type of cocktail. 
@callistospirits.co

Name: Dawn's Dream Winery
Description: Dawn’s dream has always been to help create dreams for others by donating her product, money or time to support nonprofit organizations both locally and globally.  Dawn’s passion for helping women and children equals her passion for making wine. Dawn has produced award-winning wines of exceptional quality and elegance while maintaining a business model that allows for the opportunity to give back.

Name: 8 Chains North Winery
Description:
8 Chains North is a boutique Loudoun County winery located just 8 miles west of Leesburg, Virginia. The winery includes an inviting Tasting Room, extensive outdoor seating, a dog park, and beautiful private event spaces perfect for weddings and special occasions—all with stunning vineyard views.

Under new ownership since August 2021, the winery retains the former owner as vineyard manager and winemaker, whose focus and attention to detail is in the vineyard, where great wines are made. This philosophy is evident in our handcrafted Old World-style wines. Enjoy the fruits of our labor in every glass.
