Name: Sciences Po Champagne Tasting Club, Reims Campus
Description:
Le Champagne Tasting Club est le club d'oenologie étudiant de Sciences Po Paris sur le campus de Reims, créé en 2010. L'association a pour but de faire découvrir et d'organiser des rencontres entre les étudiants du campus rémois et le monde viticole champenois.  

Le Champagne Tasting Club organise une vingtaine de dégustations par an, en invitant maisons et acteurs champenois, au sein du collège des Jésuites de Reims.

Name: La Philosophe Vodka
Description:
Marque de vodka indépendante et 100% française élaborée en Charente, La Philosophe est une eau-de-vie faite à la main qui incarne bien le savoir-faire français en termes de distillation. 
Les amateurs apprécieront une vodka au nez frais, avec des notes d'agrumes. Longue et minérale en bouche, finement épicée, au final suave, voire crémeux, La Philosophe est une vodka haut de gamme unique en son genre.

Élaborée à partir d'un alcool de blé et d'une eau de source charentaise, le produit est dilué pendant presque trois mois afin d'apporter une parfaite homogénéité entre les molécules de l'eau et de l'alcool. Durant ce processus de réduction lente, la vodka ne subit aucune filtration et ne contient aucun sucres ajoutés.

La marque véhicule une image plus gentleman, plus noble de la vodka, en proposant un produit fin et élégant dans un contenant spirituel et à travers une symbolique recherchée.

Venez nous découvrir sur notre site internet : http://laphilosophe.fr et découvrir le cycle de vie de notre produit au travers d'un film de présentation sur https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bhzbe26MZkc .

Name: Tequila Sheela
Description:
Texas and women owned organic, 100% agave spirit.

The Spirit:
Sheela Marshall and Natalie Merrick are lifelong friends.  Sheela was born in India where natural flavors are plentiful.  Natalie grew up on a Texas ranch where values were cultivated.  Together they created Tequila Sheela, a sophisticated spirit made to savor and enjoy.

One may not have guessed that an Indian immigrant and a small town Texas farm girl would form a deeply-rooted friendship when meeting in Dallas, TX over fifteen years ago.  Even though the ladies were from opposite sides of the globe and from different cultures, they bonded over similar pasts.  Both came from large families with a deep pride in heritage.

In 2014 the women journeyed to Jalisco, Mexico and discovered a master distiller who shared their pride, values, and passion for natural and organic ingredients.

The Tequila:
Blanco is unaged, Reposado is aged for 11 months in American oak barrels, and Añejo is aged for two years in American oak barrels.

All three are smooth enough to be sipped and also make excellent cocktails.  Our favorite cocktails include Blanco Margarita, Reposado Sunrise, and Añejo Old Fashion.

Salud!
Sheela & Natalie

Name: Das Ginwerk
Description:
wir brennen darauf, den LIEBLINGSGIN DER WELT zu destillieren

Wie kaum eine andere Ginmarke verfügen wir über einen einzigartigen doppelten Erfahrungsschatz. Zum einen ist bei uns das Brennen Familiensache – mittlerweile in der dritten Generation. Und zum anderen leben und lieben wir die weitläufige Natur bei uns in Süddeutschland. Wir verfügen über 850 eigene Obstbäume und nutzen nur handverlesene Botanicals.

wir brennen darauf, immer die BESTE QUALITÄT zu erzeugen

Wir haben den höchsten Anspruch an die Qualität unserer Produkte. Somit auch an die verwendeten Botanicals und Früchte. Die Früchte für unsere Gins sind auf Streuobstwiesen rund um unsere Heimat gewachsen und handverlesen. Dazu nutzen wir Wasser aus eigenen Quellen und verwenden nur Botanicals bester Qualität. Das ist unser Herzblut und die Leidenschaft, die in jedem Gin zu spüren ist.

wir brennen darauf, nur die BESTEN BOTANICALS zu verwenden

Wir verfügen über 850 Obstbäume und sogar über eine eigene Kirschsorte, die ungefähr um das Jahr 1923 vom Urgrossvater in unsere Region gebracht und mit unserer heimatlichen Kirsche gekreuzt wurde. Das Ergebnis begeistert in unserem Sloe-Gin ‹fine cherry› bereits beim Öffnen der Flasche, der wenn Duft sich im Raum verteilt. Alle Früchte werden bei uns einzeln von Hand verlesen und danach mit 100% Handarbeit weiter veredelt. Auch alle weiteren Botanicals werden nur von uns persönlich auserlesen und unterliegen unserem sehr strengen Qualitäsansprüchen.

wir brennen darauf, immer wieder
UNVERGESSLICHE GENUSSMOMENTE zu erschaffen

Wir kreieren dank unserer grossen Innovationsfreude und unserer Liebe bis ins kleinste Detail immer wieder neue einmalige Rezepturen für unvergessliche Geschmackserlebnisse. Dafür stehen wir. Kein Wunder, dass unser Gin bereits mit dem ersten Schluck zum Lieblingsgin avanciert und wir bereits von Anfang an mit internationalen Awards ausgezeichnet worden sind. Das Wichtigste ist und bleibt das Geschmackserlebnis.

Name: Casa Clara
Description:
We respectfully harvest what the land has to offer and with passion and skill we unveil the best that nature has afforded us!

Casa Clara was born from the inventiveness, wisdom and accumulated experience of its partners. Clara, after whom our house is named, has decades of experience working in wine in the Alentejo: she is our cornerstone and is still involved in the daily work of our company.

Our family’s history and legacy have naturally led us to form a company with the objective of producing, in Alentejo, wines based on authenticity, quality and sustainability. Both our properties are based in the heart of the Alentejo. At Herdade da Capela (in sub-region of Moura) and Quinta de D. Maria (in sub-region of Vidigueira), we harvest the grapes and pick the olives from which we produce our wines and olive oil. 

Our logo, the cross, the names and the labels of our wines (Capela, Monte da Capela and Herdade da Capela) are all inspired by the chapel located in the middle of the vineyards. The brands were created with the size of the locations in mind. Capela (Chapel is the entry level brand), Monte da Capela (The Chapel's Hill is our mid-range) and Herdade da Capela (Chapel's Vineyards being the top range). All these wines embody who we are and what we do best.

From the olives of our trees at Quinta de D. Maria, we produce olive oil. It will always be a limited production, as the fruit is obtained exclusively from the existing indigenous varieties in our olive groves that are over 25 years old. They are cultivated in line with sustainable production methods and with great respect for the Alentejo traditions.

Casa Clara will soon be complete with a wine tourism element. This project will unite landscape, architecture and culture.

Name: Tenute Baldo Agricola
Description:
Love for the territory and passion for the world of agriculture are the elements that drive the Tenute Baldo Agricola The company owns 60 hectares of vineyards which spread over the DOC and DOCG communes of Torgiano and Montefalco. 40 out of these 70 ha which stretch out on the wonderful hills of Torgiano, are planted with Grechetto - elegant white grape variety unique to the Umbrian region. Other international varieties such as Pinot Grigio, Chardonnay, Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot and Sangiovese which is the most important red grape of the Torgiano denomination, flourish here as well. The remaining 20 ha of vineyards owned by the Tenute Baldo Agricola spread over the picturesque hills of Montefalco. This is the only area in Italy apt to the noble grape of the Sagrantino wine. Merlot, Cabernet Sauvignon and Sangiovese grow here as well. 
Traditional methods of farming together with technological innovations coexist to add meticulous attention to the crop for the limited production of the most typical wines of the area. The Tenute Baldo Agricola's production ethic has always included respect for the environment, hand in hand with innovation. Sustainability is at the core of the business. To reach its sustainable targets, the firm focuses on reducing the presence of sulphites in its wines – through natural adjuvants and specific oenological practices –, as well as using renewable energy sources and 100% natural stoppers, for some of its wines. Moreover, the Tenute Baldo Agricola works with partners to efficiently implement and handle waste management and recycling. The Tenute Baldo Agricola team consists of experts specialised in the various stages of wine making, to follow the process of grape growing, selection and harvest, as well as the aging and bottling of the wine. They also manage the constant technical supervision and quality control to guarantee the excellence of every single product of the line ''Tenute Baldo''
Location: Bastia Umbra, Umbria - PG - Central Italy

Name: Rosenblum Cellars
Description:
In 1978, Rosenblum Cellars opened in Alameda, California; a place known more for its docks and shipyards than for winemaking. But then again, Kent Rosenblum, “The King of Zin,” always did things a little differently from the status quo.

When most of the established wineries in California were focused on their estate-grown wines, Kent chose to explore some of the unrecognized and underappreciated grape-growing areas of Northern California. He met families who had been growing grapes for generations; dedicated growers passionate about their vineyards, who worked tirelessly to grow the best grapes possible from old vines their families had planted years before.

Their efforts showcased the difference between mountainside and valley floor grapes, the importance of soil types and their influence on the taste of a wine. Kent was fascinated by the character and complexity of the Zin grapes produced by these old vines, and was determined to capture this spirit in a bottle.

Kent took grapes back to Alameda and began to make wines, acknowledging the contributions of his friends by placing the vineyard’s name on the bottle. Working out of a factory building near the docks, Kent and his crew looked more like longshoremen than winemakers. But the wine they made spoke for itself.

From single-vineyards in Sonoma and Alexander Valley to strictly selected regional blends, Rosenblum has made more than 50 Zinfandels earning 90 or more points from Wine Spectator. It’s an eye-opening track record for Zin lovers, but at Rosenblum, guided by commitment and craft, delivering sumptuous wines is just business as usual.

Come by our urban tasting room at Oakland's Jack London Square to taste our world-class, award-winning wines in a stunning waterfront location. Cheers!

Name: Bona
Description: BONA est une gamme de boissons gazeuses de la société International Drink company. Le groupe algérien propose une variété de goûts destinés à toute la famille.

Name: Bodegas Arúspide
Description: Bodegas Arúspide ha buscado siempre la diferenciación basándose en la calidad y la innovación, apostando por el potencial de sus terruños.

Name: Burntshirt Vineyards
Description: 30 acre Estate Winery in the mountains of Western North Carolina. Two vineyards at 2200 feet and 3400 hundred feet. Growing all red Bordeaux Varietals and 6 white varietals and hybrids to include Gruner Veltliner. Case production around 5500 from approximately 90 tons of fruit. Two locations, one in Hendersonville at the low elevation vineyard and the other in Chimney Rock which includes a restaurant.

Name: Bodegas Cañaveras
Description:
It’s been 130 years since our ancestors started in the world of wine …

Being brought up among barrels and wine-friendly blood, the fifth generation comes up. The surname “Cañaveras” influences a lot, it means a big responsibility and at the same time, we are trying to offer a young and fresh point of view.

After more than a century of history of this company Bodegas Cañaveras S.L., the female descendants, my sister, Ana María, and I  are making their way / are stepping forward in this male business.

Thanks to our perfectionist and non-conformist character, the learning of our winemakers, we are going to welcome a new future in Bodegas Antonio Cañaveras.
Location: Santa Cruz de Mudela, Castilla-La Mancha

Name: Varaschin Matteo & figli
Description:
Varaschin Matteo & figli nasce nel 1930 a Valdobbiadene, in un piccolo paesino, San Pietro di Barbozza, nel cuore delle colline del Prosecco.
La grande passione di Matteo è la nostra forza e continuiamo questo sogno ormai da quattro generazioni...
Il nostro ingrediente segreto è il tempo che da sempre rispettiamo.
"Casa Brunoro" è la sala degustazione puoi conoscerci e degustare qualcosa in compagnia nel nostro giardino estivo, mentre all'interno si rivive la storia del Prosecco nella cantina più antica di Valdobbiadene dove è presente la suggestiva cella vinaria...
Il futuro radicato nella tradizione.

Name: Au Fil Des Vins
Description: Au Fil Des Vins est un service de dégustation de vins à domicile. Le but étant de vous faire découvrir six cuvées minutieusement sélectionnées, en vous présentant l’esprit du vigneron et de son domaine.

Name: Colorado Association for Viticulture & Enology (CAVE)
Description: CAVE is a member-based association that exists to encourage and support enology and viticulture in Colorado. CAVE organizes the state's largest wine festival each September in Palisade, Colorado Mountain Winefest, its primary fundraiser, as well as a regional Trade Conference each January, VinCO

Name: Mandeville Liquor Store
Description:
Mandeviile Liquor Store is the leading liquor store in Manchester, carrying a wide variety of liquors and other products, and, most importantly we offer our products at an EXCELLENT price.

If we don't have a product,talk to us, we will try and source it for you.

Opening Hours:
Mondays-Saturdays 7:00am-8:00pm
Sundays 8:00am-3:00pm

We are open on Public Holidays!

Name: Averill Creek Vineyard
Description:
Averill Creek Vineyard was planted in 2001 by owner Andy Johnston. Lured by its climate and its great potential for Pinot Noir, Andy ultimately settled in the Cowichan Valley, selecting and planting our 30 acre site on the side of Mount Prevost on a moderate southeast facing slope, just a few kilometres from the coastline. 

Winemaker Brent Rowland joined Averill Creek in 2018, with an extensive international background working for such renowned producers as By Farr in Australia, Calera in California, Escarpment in New Zealand and most recently at Pearl Morissette in Niagara. Now with 21 international harvests, Brent’s focus is on highlighting the texture, freshness and poise indicative of Vancouver Island style. 

Our aim is to produce honest wines that reflect our site and the vintage, but that first and foremost give pleasure. By intervening less, we are able to provide a clear segue from vineyard to glass.

Name: Puklavec & Friends
Description:
The best things in life should not be kept to yourself, they should be shared with others. This describes the essence of Puklavec & Friends: a refreshing winery from Slovenia.

Puklavec & Friends is a new and refreshing winery in Slovenia. The company primarily produces white wines from vineyards in the Podravje region, near the borders with Austria, Hungary and Croatia. It produces up to eight million litres of white wine per year. The vineyards in the Jeruzalem-Ormož hills are rooted in an excellent terroir that serves as the foundation for promising wines. The terraced vineyards are also ideally suited to take optimal advantage of the climate, creating the best conditions for crisp and fruity white wines. All of the grapes are picked by hand.

Quality is a very high priority at P&F. The winemakers offer a wide selection of high-quality wines, including a selection in the top-premium price segment as well as a range of wines created especially for the hospitality industry. The winery produces 28 different wines and sparkling wines from thirteen grape varieties, including Sauvignon Blanc, Pinot Grigio, Italian Riesling, the local Šipon (a variety of Furmint), Traminer, Chardonnay and Pinot Blanc.

Name: Marqués de Berol
Description:
We have been producing wine for more than a century. Marqués de Berol has been producing wine renowned for its freshness, fruitiness, originality, and competitive prices. Our vineyards are situated in Finca Berol, Falces, near the Arga river, spanning 127 hectares. We cultivate various grape varieties, including Garnacha, Merlot, Syrah, Tempranillo, Petit Verdot, Cabernet Sauvignon for red wines, and Macabeo and Sauvignon Blanc for white wines.

At our winery, we have the privilege of working with Mr. Manuel Rojas, our oenological specialist who is a Winemaker in the third generation with 50 years of experience. With his guidance, we utilize a blend of time-tested traditional winemaking techniques and state-of-the-art technologies to craft exceptional tasting wines that are both unique and affordable.

Name: Don Julio Licorería
Description:
Después del confinamiento total, EL TÍO sale a repartir la diversión a toda LIMA junto a sus sobrinos porque #CHAMBASIHAY. 

Pide ahora tus provisiones y no te quedes sin una sana diversión.

Name: IN VINO FRANCES VERITAS
Description:
We are a middle size French company specialised in the import of European wines in Latine America and South Asia. 

We strive to develop the importation of wines from Small and middle size Vineyards from all across Europe to the Grand Export : Sth America and Asia
We want to promote small / middle wine producers with the highest standard of production and quality.

One of our mottos is...  to democratise the French and European wine in South America by selling it at more  "Accessible Prices"... when possible !

Name: Nicolas-Jay Estate
Description: Nicolas-Jay is the story of a three-decade friendship between famed Burgundian winemaker Jean-Nicolas Méo and visionary music entrepreneur Jay Boberg, and their shared love of Oregon Pinot Noir. It is also the story of their desire to build something lasting together, while creating a distinctive expression of great Willamette Valley Pinot Noir. At Nicolas-Jay, this is achieved by applying viticultural and winemaking experience gained from working with the grands crus of Burgundy to the finest grapes from Oregon. This includes fruit from the older vines of Nicolas-Jay’s own organically farmed Bishop Creek Vineyard on the hillsides of the Yamhill-Carlton appellation, as well as grapes from other top Willamette Valley vineyards, including Nysa, Momtazi and Zenith. From this fruit, Jean-Nicolas, Jay and talented Associate Winemaker Tracy Kendall make alluring and expressive wines that convey the special character of Oregon Pinot Noir.

Name: SPRY Craft Drinks ltd
Description:
SPRY is a British all-natural, ethically conscious, crafted sipping spirit made to be enjoyed at a leisurely pace and to be savoured - just like the moment it’s enjoyed in. We strive to create transparency of what we drink - not just the great fresh ingredients but we also provide nutritional information for each product.

Our Danish roots have given us the unique ability to match our drinks with food, these being enjoyed together during all meals of the day. Drinks can create memorable moments - like a dish, every element can be controlled and personalised, with the added bonus of easing tensions, breaking ice and spicing up conversations – a new adventure awaiting, around every corner!

Our bottles are refillable, and our packaging is completely plastic-free and biodegradable! 

We are committed to be environmentally responsible and source the majority of our ingredients from local growers in Kent. We strive to be as ethical and environmentally friendly as possible and to take care of the world we live in. 

Our planet is our future! So, let’s protect it together.

Name: DRINKern
Description: DRINKern as a team willing to inspire, entertain, and educate everybody who is fascinated about what happens in and out of the glass. From Cocktail recipes to home bar tips to bottle suggestions, DRINKern is a one stop junction. Our objective is to convey the attitude that is propelling the beverage industry forward, the connection between beverage and history and location, the desire to innovate, and yes, happiness that connects. We also feel that the worlds of wine, cocktail, beer, and spirits have more in common than most people know. We've brought them together to show how their beliefs are intertwined in so many ways. We hope you like it as much as we enjoyed creating it.

Name: Dineen Vineyards
Description:
Dineen Vineyards is located in the hills of the Lower Yakima Valley. We are a family owned and operated viticulture business with one of the premier sites in the state and highly acclaimed Estate wines.

Few Washington State wineries own Estate vineyards. Dineen Vineyards is one of them and we understand that the quality of our wines begins with the land, in the vineyard. Our mission is simple – growing exceptional wine grapes to ensure quality from vine to glass

Our meticulous management practices ensure the health of the vine and quality of fruit from planting through harvest. Our boutique wine making processes balance science, art and passion to produce elegant wines in limited quantities.

The Dineen Vineyards wines first released in 2006, are styled to highlight the diversity of our Estate Terroir. The own-rooted vines tend to produce rich and deeply colored wines with soft and elegant tannins and balanced acidity.

Name: M7 Wine Solutions
Description: At M7, we know that what makes our partners successful is that every winery offers something original, something special; our goal is to carry each unique experience from tasting room to delivery. M7 Wine Solutions isn't merely a fulfillment and logistics provider, rather we're the winery's partner, an extension of the winery.

Name: Winery Khutsuri / მევინეობა ხუცური
Description: "Winery Khutsuri” is established upon the ancient traditions. The company works over maintenance of the unique vine culture and wine making both using ancient methods and modern technologies; consequently, the Company produces high quality wines.

Name: Voyageurs du Vin
Description:
Le spécialiste des vins étrangers

Chez Voyageurs du Vin nous vous invitons à un véritable tour du monde des meilleurs domaines à travers 5 continents, 25 pays, 343 producteurs et plus de 1200 vins.

Une véritable sélection des vins proposés

Nous vous proposons uniquement les meilleurs vins des domaines les plus captivants à travers le monde. D’ailleurs leur excellence est reconnue régulièrement par des publications spécialisées telles que Wine Spectator, Wine Enthusiast, The Wine Advocate, International Wine Cellars, the Australian Wine Companion ou lors de concours internationaux.

Un site indépendant

Nous sommes un site indépendant et par conséquent nous sommes libres de tout fournisseur, producteur ou distributeur. Ceci est notre garantie sur l’impartialité de notre sélection.

Notre ambition

Partager avec vous notre passion des vins du monde et de vous les faire découvrir.
Tous les mois nous allons vous surprendre en vous proposant des nouveautés pour toujours combler votre soif de découverte et éveiller vos sens.

Bon voyage!

Name: MixWine Importadora
Description:
MixWine is a  family owned Brazilian company specializing in importing fine wines & spirits from around the world.

We are passionate about our industry and attribute our success to our supplier partnerships, strong relationships with integral players, our dedicated team and our diverse client base.

Our focus is to promote and grow our brands while making them leaders in their categories.

Name: Luxium Wines
Description: Luxium Wines S.L. is committed to provide you with all your bulk wine needs. Our aim is to support you in finding the right product, therefore we work with reliable partners around the world to provide you with the best information, experience, inventory and service in the global wine market.

Name: Bonnievale Wines
Description:
For those looking for a real wine experience that is truly unpretentious, BONNIEVALE WINES promise delightful wines that consistently exceed expectations.

Over more than half a century Bonnievale Wines has built up a sustainable grape supply network from 100 grape producers. The fertile land in the Bonnievale valley boasts a variety of geology, geography and climate, creating a varied terrain that is evident in the grapes produced here.
The area extends to within 100km from the ocean and includes two rivers and hills and mountains that offers a variety of slopes and micro-climates.

Bonnievale Wines’ wine makers get to play with this rich palate, picking and choosing from the treasure chest of terroir potential. With the strict policy of ‘only bottling the best’, Bonnievale Wines has managed to establish a reputation for consistently over-delivering on quality.

A consistent performer in local and international wine awards, Bonnievale Wines has built up an impressive trophy collection.
Export growth stems both from an expanded business with long standing customers, and from new customer business. Exporting approximately one third of its total production per year has helped us hone our export logistics service into a valuable business asset.

Name: Les Vins de Mlle MICHEL
Description:
Vins, Méthodes Traditionnelles, Champagnes ... pas juste une étiquette ... Les Vins de Mlle Michel sont la pour vous les faire découvrir ! 

Nous sommes la pour vous conseiller pour tous vos événements !!

Nous organisons des dégustations où vous pouvez retrouver nos produits du moment !

Nous proposons également des dégustations "Privées" à domicile ou dans votre entreprise, idéal pour passer un moment convivial ! 

Pensez à nous pour vos cadeaux, nous réalisons des coffrets cadeaux PERSONNALISES ... choisissez vos accessoires qui accompagneront votre bouteille ! Vous pouvez même ajouter le logo de votre entreprise ! 

Au plaisir de vous conseiller !

 Laurine MICHEL
06.12.77.43.43
contact@lesvinsdemllemichel.com

Name: Select Drams Ltd.
Description:
Established in 1988, Select Drams is a very successful family run wholesale business specialising in miniatures, gifting and a wide selection of spirits. We have an extensive range of whisky, rum, gin and vodka from around the world – although with a particular focus on those from home shores.  Over the past 30 years we have built an enviable reputation based on our outstanding customer service from first contact to delivery.  Whilst we have a wide range of products, we are always happy to try and source any we don’t list that you might be interested in.

We care passionately about our products and service and would encourage you to experience this for yourself. If you have any queries, please do not hesitate to contact us and we will do our very best to help you out.

Name: Le Masciare
Description:
A boutique, family-owned winery covering some 22 hectares, and located in the hills surrounding Paternopoli, a small town in the heart of Irpinia, south-Italy. This is a land of great wines and olive oils, and Irpinia's unique, indigenous grape and olive varieties make up all of Le Masciare's land. 

We produce an exceptional range of red, white and rosé wines, made from the indigenous Aglianico, Fiano, Greco, Falanghina and Coda di Volpe grapes. 

Our company has been making organically certified EVOO (extra virgin olive oils) since 2001 and is in conversion to organic farming for our wines since 2018.  

We are actively looking to expand the distribution of our products, both nationally and internationally, please feel free to contact us if you are looking to complement your range of high quality wines.

Name: Drink with Sasha
Description:
A place to discover and buy the most interesting wines and spirits the world has to offer as curated by Sasha; master mixologist and charming swashbuckling adventurer   

As a company mantra, we follow Sir Winston Churchil’s maxim that ‘good taste is easily satisfied with the best’ and as such scour the globe for the very finest drinks to offer you every day. 

Sourced from the best producers on the planet from the very finest ingredients, our curated selections are available with standard next day delivery across the UK. 

We love our Earth and are a dedicated green-led company; for every bottle purchased we will plant a tree in your honour (and a tiny forest for those who subscribe). Our delivery boxes are environmentally friendly (100% recyclable cardboard) and delivery is carbon neutral wherever possible because delivering amazing drinks should not come at the expense of the planet.

Name: Denzien Urban Distillery
Description:
New Zealand’s first urban destination distillery, making brazen craft gin in a gorgeous copper still right in the heart of the city. Popular for tutored tastings and distillery tours, it’s the perfect place to learn about the distillers art over a tipple or two.

A haven for the Gin-curious, combining the luscious aromas of a commercial distillery with an industrial chic Tasting Shop. Located in Lombard Lane it rubs shoulders with fashion and food, providing a welcome distraction from the pressures of urban life.

Founders Mark and Eamon set out to build a living Gin R&D Lab, distilling innovative small batch city gins right in front of their customers. They’re serious when they ask for your feedback on a new release, it’s going to inform the next batch. And patrons agree, participating in the Trial & Error process is both educational and tasty. 

Notorious for a musical backdrop belying the owners generational tastes, the glass fronted building is light-filled and the perfect place to indulge in a cocktail or a tasting flight whilst learning why the Gin Renaissance is fundamental to the future of mankind.

And better still, if you like what you taste you can take a bottle home – even the distiller’s experiments.

Name: BASTIA BEVANDE DISTRIBUZIONE S.R.L.
Description: COMMERCIO ALL' INGROSSO E AL DETTAGLIO DI BEVANDE ALCOLICHE - NON ALCOLICHE E DI PRODOTTI ITTICI CONGELATI

Name: Burntshirt Vineyards
Description: 30 acre Estate Winery in the mountains of Western North Carolina. Two vineyards at 2200 feet and 3400 hundred feet. Growing all red Bordeaux Varietals and 6 white varietals and hybrids to include Gruner Veltliner. Case production around 5500 from approximately 90 tons of fruit. Two locations, one in Hendersonville at the low elevation vineyard and the other in Chimney Rock which includes a restaurant.

Name: Million Vodka
Description:
Million Vodka is the brain-child of Golden Spirit’s CEO, Mark Golden, who wanted to bring his American dream of owning a Million to the world. Hand-crafted in an award-winning, state-of-the-art distillery, Million Vodka is the ultra premium in vodka. Made from 100% American grains, the vodka is distilled five times and triple-filtered to ensure a supremely smooth, pure taste by our master distiller, with over 20-years experience.

It’s this sophisticated taste that arouses your senses and awakens your imagination to live and celebrate with swagger… like a millionaire. Beautifully adorned with America’s most iconic skylines, Million Vodka invites you to celebrate the nightlife in your city with passion and pride. After the first lavish sip, you will understand the luxury of having a Million and wonder why you didn’t upgrade your life sooner!

Aside from the decadently smooth taste, Million Vodka also has the tip of it’s finger on the pulse of your city, setting you up with hottest of luxury events and premium contests. Million has sponsored events hosted by top celebrity superstars and world-renowned athletes, such as Jamie Foxx, Ladainian Tomlinson, and Tyrese Gibson. We are always keeping an eye out for the next big event that will have you face-to-face with the stars, sipping on America’s ultra premium vodka.

With Million vodka, you truly own the night.

Name: PANNELL ENOTECA
Description:
Creating wines that reflect our sense of place and our way of life is what we do best.

We love the unusual, celebrate provenance and encourage exploration by making wines that suit the food we make and the way we live. 

Our approach brings together decades of winemaking experience with growing insights, to create wines that offer a new way of thinking; inspiring a generation of winemakers that delight in the different, trusting what the land can produce.

Our wines tell the story of region and vineyard – the journey of Pannell Enoteca.

Name: Kind of Wild Wines
Description:
Zero-Sugar, Organic & Sustainable Wines for a Better Planet
Kind of Wild is a collection of global wine discoveries devoted to rewilding the planet. We partner with top growers around the world to craft premium, kinder wines that are certified organic, zero sugar and void of harmful additives.

Kind of Wild was launched by Jordan & Adam Sager to create a brand that merged global wine discoveries with forward thinking, mission-focused sustainability.

Having 50 years of combined wine industry experience with their family importing company, the brothers knew that key relationships with top growers and winemakers all over the world would pave the way.

Following the launch, their path crossed with renowned celebrity chef, best-selling author and award-winning television personality Katie Lee Biegel. The encounter led to an instant connection, and the trio realized they shared a mutual passion for transforming wine experiences, by recognizing amazing and delicious wines could be produced responsibly.

Katie soon became co-founder and integral part of the team, lending her unique culinary perspective, captivating personality, and inspiring creativity.

Together, this impressive partnership aims to redefine the wine landscape, pushing boundaries and exceeding expectations.

Name: Dolce Vita Wines
Description:
DolceVitaWines is the wine company that specialises in importation and distribution of Italian wines in the UK.

The company was founded several years ago by a group of friends with the main goal of introducing to London a portfolio of Italian wineries united in their winemaking belief that wine should enrich equally body and mind with its natural conversion of “grapes to wine” and with nothing else in between.

The current portfolio of the company includes more than 200 wines from 46 wineries and 19 wine regions in Italy. The quality of the wine is the main selection criteria for the wine scouts of Dolce Vita Wines when considering adding the wine to the portfolio. Majority of the wineries are small domains producing a limited number of bottles per year, almost half are also certified biological and some are biodynamic. 

DolceVitaWines mainly works with HoReCa sector in London focusing on fine restaurants, hotels and wine shop. The company also organises wine tasting events and provides wine consulting services.

The philosophy of the company is to create long term and strong collaboration both with wineries in Italy and business partners in London providing personal approach and sharing passion to wine.

Name: COLLE VILLANO
Description:
Sita in uno dei luoghi più vocati del Friuli Venezia Giulia e precisamente a Faedis (Udine) nei Colli Orientali del Friuli, l'Azienda Agricola Colle Villano è un azienda agricola a conduzione familiare.
L’azienda nasce dall’ attaccamento al territorio.I vini D.O.C. che nascono da questi vigneti diventano ambasciatori del Friuli nel mondo: ne rappresentano la qualità, la capacità, la cura.
Ogni anno più di 100.000 bottiglie si diffondono, in tutta Italia e in tutto il mondo.
Particolare attenzione viene data alla cura dei vigneti dove si gestisce tutta la produzione rispettando l’ambiente circostante e cercando di ottenere sempre uve perfettamente sane,mature.
In cantina il lavoro viene svolto con l’ausilio delle migliori tecnologie moderne rispettando e continuando la tradizione friulana.
È presente una sala di degustazione dove saremo lieti di farvi degustare i nostri prodotti, cercando di farvi innamorare di questa splendida terra.Ai confini orientali dell’Italia. Al centro della rinomata zona di produzione D.O.C. C.O.F.

Name: Arômes et cie.
Description:
Arômes et cie. is a wine agency accredited of the Société des alcools du Québec (SAQ). It represents producers and exporters of wines and spirits from all parts the world including France, Italy, Spain, Portugal, Chile and the United States. Arômes et cie also imports high end gourmet products. 

Arômes et cie takes care of the introduction, representation, promotion and marketing of their products within the province of Québec.

Feel free to contact us.

Name: SANS Wine Co.
Description:
A forward thinking company since day one, SANS continues to be the leader in organic wine production, alternative/eco-friendly packaging, label transparency and the ever-evolving and changing wine scene. SANS
creates true products: first to market for naturally made, certified organic canned wines and low-alc wine spritzers in the US.

SANS was founded by husband and wife team Jake Stover and Gina Schober in the summer of 2015 during a drive through the Russian River Valley. Gina convinced Jake that if they focused on organic, premium wines packaged in eco-friendly cans, they could carve out a niche in the wine industry and fulfill a hole for consumers: high quality, organic canned wine. SANS produces the only USDA certified organic canned wines in the US.

Featured in: The New York Times, Food & Wine Magazine, Wine Spectator, Wine Enthusiast, Wine Business Monthly, SF Chronicle, LA Times, Forbes, VinePair, Wine & Spirits and The Washington Post.

Name: Enesepro - Wine export
Description:
Enesepro is a portuguese company with about twenty years of activity, including consultancy, event organization, catering and, in recent years, representation and export of international wines and spirits. The company has a long tradition and a great knowledge of the international market of prestigious wines and spirits, having therefore created some exclusive brands associated with producers of excellence. It´s experience and know-how in promotional marketing, communication, activation of brands, organization of events and professional training in the sector, namely in Africa, have allowed the company to conquer some important markets, consolidating and improving it´s portfolio, with emphasis on Monte da Lua Gamma, already an iconic brand in a market as competitive as Angola's. Enesepro now intends to extend this success to more markets, leveraging its know how and its portfolio.
The company's main objective and commitment is to export and activate its brands in international markets,  being its Mission - To show and affirm, internationally, the excellence of our products. The company intends to find importers who want to establish strong long-term relationships. Enesepro's strategy involves frequent monitoring of the market, contributing to the promotion and dissemination of its brands in different markets.
Enesepro has a strong and differentiated portfolio, which includes our exclusive brands and brands we represent. In relation to  the portuguese wines, the most established wine regions were selected: Alentejo and Vinho verde region. All wines & spirits have a strong identity and a very good price-quality ratio.

While we were remaining true to tradition, we have been able over time to make our wines modern. The award-winning Barbera Le Cave and the Pico Gonzaga produced with the best Barbera of the year, represent the Cru of the Company.

Completing the offer is a perfectly convened Alba Rossa ( a grape variety created with Barbera and Nebbiolo ) and a perfectly Brut millesimato fermented for 44 months at 12°C constants in natural quarries inside the Castle.

Name: Bottled Cocktail Company

The Bottled Cocktail Company was established in 2020 by a group of friends who are passionate about cocktails and flavours. With over 20 years combined experience in drinks development, brand strategy and hospitality management, we worked for some of the best bar concepts in London, as well as created and launched spirits brands in the UK market. 

Our range of bottled cocktails is developed in our laboratory using only the finest ingredients, along with techniques used in the perfumery and culinary worlds, to blend, mature and manipulate flavours before bottling each cocktail, offering a different - yet familiar - selection of iconic bar classics.

We also provide Private Label Cocktails service, Drinks Development Consultancy and Events Management. Get in touch today to discuss how we can help you bring your products and concept to life.

Description:
La société 20survin est un site de vente de vin en ligne. Vous retrouverez un très grand nombre de références de vins rouges, blancs, rosés, champagnes et spiritueux. 
Elle a été créée en 2007 par deux passionnés de vin. Notre cave se situe près de Lille et contient environ 20 000 bouteilles. 
Tous nos vins sont vendus à l'unité et sont livrables dans toute l'Europe en 48 heures.
Nous proposons aussi un système d'abonnement afin de découvrir tous les mois, livrés chez vous, un nouveau vin avec une fiche descriptive.  
Nous travaillons en partenariat avec un sommelier qui goute nos vins. Il en fait une description et donne des idées de plats. 
Notre site à des prix très compétitifs.  
Nous répondons à toutes vos questions et demandes immédiatement par mail ou par téléphone.
Le siège se situe à Paris : 5 rue de Charonne

Name: Smith & Sheth
Description:
We are in the business of creating great wines that bring great pleasure. As contemporary negociants Steve Smith MW and Brian Sheth seek out the exceptional. Hand selecting the best grapes from the finest vineyards. Establishing steadfast relationships with the land, growers and makers who form the DNA of our CRU. The French call it "terroir" – a sense of place. In New Zealand we have our own defining word - Tūrangawaewae - our place to stand in the world. This word describes the special connection of a people and the land they live, love and work in. Our wines reflect the magic and alchemy of this relationship and the true beauty of these places. It is our privilege to share the pleasure, culture and craft of wine with you.

Steve Smith MW and Brian Sheth share a love for the same things: fine wine, Aotearoa New Zealand and enjoying life’s pleasures. They met in Hawke’s Bay over a glass of Chardonnay and in 2014 realised their vision of founding a wine dream together. That dream was to craft impeccable wines from vineyards of exceptional quality and to create experiences where they could share these wines with like-minded people.

Steve Smith MW has a formidable reputation in the wine industry: renowned for establishing Craggy Range in Hawke’s Bay and Martinborough, he is also one of few qualified Master of Wines to be based in New Zealand. Brian Sheth, from Austin Texas, is an investor and wildlife conservationist, with a strong affiliation and love for New Zealand.

Our DNA is expressed through our wine and woven into our visual language. Central to our label designs are the DNA strands that define the different grape clones used in our wines. Chardonnay, Sauvignon Blanc and Syrah: the essence of these varietals is illustrated on our bottles and captured within them. Our logo, S&S entwined, is our DNA helix representing the foundations of our story: Smith and Sheth seeking the exceptional.

Name: Milton Keynes Wine School
Description:
This page will introduce you to The Woburn Wine Company

ABOUT US

The Woburn Wine Company is the most refreshing thing to happen in wine in the Beds/Herts/Bucks area since the monks first planted vines at Warden Abbey in the 12th Century. 

Yes, we’re new – we started trading in April 2011 – but we have over a quarter of a century of experience in the wine and spirits trade.

We are based just outside the picturesque and historic town of Woburn – home to the famous Woburn Abbey, Safari Park and Championship Golf Courses.

Woburn Wine Company is run by George Atkinson-Clark. George started working in the wine trade in 1985 for Justerini & Brooks, and has worked for Chateau Mouton Rothschild, Veuve Clicquot Champagne, Louis Latour burgundy, Cloudy Bay and FE Trimbach Alsace amongst many others. For ten years he was Managing Director of Champagne Ruinart UK. He has extensive experience in advising and selling to Trade, Corporate and Retail customers. 

WHAT WE DO

Our aim is simple. We sell wines that we consider are the best value for money in their particular region and price bracket. That does not mean we sell everything from everywhere, but more that we select which are the best value for money in the regions we have identified. We believe in value for money at all levels from a bottle of everyday drinking wine at £7 to a classed growth claret at £70. Many of our wines have been sourced by Master of Wine David Round from individual and interesting growers throughout the world.

We supply a range of wines from selected regions and at varying prices to Trade, Corporate and Retail customers. We arrange tastings for customers which can be more formal or light hearted and irreverent. We provide advice on food and wine matching, and cater for parties and events.

Name: GP Imports Inc
Description: GP Imports is an independently owned importer and distributor of fine wines servicing the chicagoland market. Since 2014, GP Imports has offered the highest quality wines to the regions finest restaurants and retail outlets. We place a premium on customer service by providing the most conscientious, dedicated and knowledgeable staff in the industry.

Description: Is it even possible to grow grapes and make wine in Norway? Come see for yourself! We are currently growing grapes and haskap for winemaking. Our very first wine will be ready for tasting some time in 2022. But you can still come visit our vineyard this summer.

Name: MoldoVin
Description:
We love wine

Based in Copenhagen, Denmark, MoldoVin is providing the Danish wine market with high quality Moldovan wine. Our team has years of experience in online retail and world wide distribution. We are committed to providing our clients with fantastic service and great wines.

MoldoVin aims to be the foremost distributor of Moldovan wine in Scandinavia. We bring the outstanding wines of Moldova into the homes and onto the tables of Scandinavian wine enthusiasts.

Name: Quercia Al Poggio
Description:
Quercia al Poggio è situata a circa 400 metri s.l.m., in località Monsanto, nel comune di Barberino Val d’Elsa.

L ’azienda di proprietà della Famiglia Rossi si estende su una superficie di 100 ettari: una riserva naturale ricca di boschi dove viti e olivi vengono coltivati seguendo i criteri dell’agricoltura biologica.

Il centro aziendale è un ottocentesco borgo rurale contadino e in parte un ex convento dei frati Vallombrosani della vicina Badia a Passignano.

Dal 1997 Michela e Vittorio hanno dato inizio a un profondo rinnovamento dell’azienda vitivinicola, a partire dal graduale reimpianto dei 15 ha di vigneti, fino alla sistemazione delle cantine e all’introduzione di una selezione di legni di media grandezza accuratamente scelti per preservare le caratteristiche originali del Sangiovese e degli altri vitigni autoctoni tradizionali presenti in azienda.

Name: My 121 Tutor
Description:
My wine tastings are suitable for a wide range of events from business and corporate networking, to fundraising for local clubs and societies, birthdays or parties and I particularly enjoy hosting wine tastings in restaurants where the emphasis is on food and wine pairing. A popular choice for many, it also gives me the opportunity to explore the flavours of different cuisines from my love of travel.

My interest and long term passion in wine began over 25 years ago and I have studied and been awarded multiple awards and accreditations by the Wine and Spirit Education Trust (WSET), I also teach a number of wine courses for Kent Adult Education.

I love to share my knowledge about wine at every opportunity. Known as the 'The Wine Lady', my wine tastings are lively and vibrant; we share laughter and I guarantee that you will leave with more knowledge than when you arrived and probably a lot more passion for wine!

Name: Oldman Spirits GmbH
Description: Wir von Oldman Spirits sind auf der nie endenden Suche nach einzigartigem, exotischem Genuss. Als unabhängiger Abfüller sowie Hersteller mit Sitz in Schleswig-Holstein widmen wir uns dem hochwertigen Rum ‒ ohne Kompromisse bei der Qualität und mit abenteuerlichen Entdeckungen vor Augen.

Name: La Minute Blonde Mauléon
Description:
La Minute Blonde, bar à bière, cave à bière, vin et spiritueux !
Nos passionnés vous conseillent dans un endroit chaleureux et convivial pour trouver au mieux, parmi notre large choix de variétés, les bières qui vous conviennent le mieux pour partager un moment fort et vous faire découvrir des saveurs surprenantes !

Name: ParadiseSpringsWinery
Description: Located in the quaint town of Clifton, Virginia and bordering Bull Run River, Paradise Springs Winery and Vineyard is the closest winery to Washington DC and the first in Fairfax County. Serving as the gateway to Virginia Wine Country, the property features an 1800’s log cabin, which was renovated in 1955 by a protégé of Frank Lloyd Wright. Tastings, tours, wine dinners, private events, and much more can be found at this intimate, family run, destination winery. Come experience the old world country nestled only a stone’s throw from Washington DC.

Name: Weingut A. Gessinger
Description:
The Gessinger family has been making wine in the Mosel since 1680, with a focus on Riesling. Current owner & winemaker is Albert Gessinger, with involvement from his daughter, Sarah.
The Estate consists of 8 acres or 3.2 hectares. The plantings are broken down as follows: 80% Riesling, 15% Spatburgunder (Pinot Noir), 5% Dornfelder (new red wine clone developed in 1956). All vineyards are located in the middle Mosel town of Zelting. Weingut Gessinger joined the Bernkastel Ring in 1899 and for years their wines only appeared at their September auction. Gessinger is quite small, less than 2,000 cases and all his whites are 100% Riesling planted on Devon Slate (best soil type of the area).

Location: Zeltingen, Germany
Wine Region: Germany - Mosel
Winery Acreage: 3.2 hectares (8 acres)
Varietals Produced: Riesling, Pinot Noir, Pinot Blanc

Name: Sweet Valley Wines
Description: Established in 2004, Sweet Valley Wines is Washington State's 500th Winery. The Winery is situated in beautiful Walla Walla Valley and creates limited quantity boutique wines from the vineyards of Birch Creek, Forgotten Hills, Golden Ridge, Les Collines, McKinley Springs, Pepper Bridge, Seven Hills, Spofford Station and Va Piano. With the help of mother nature's Walla Walla appellation, our winemaker, Josh McDaniels, combines old world techniques with new world technology to create the winery's signature red blend, Double Barrel Red, Cabernet Sauvignon, Syrah, Merlot, and Viognier. Our rich, bold and balanced red wines showcase vineyard origins and the Walla Walla Valley appellation. While our fruit forward, crisp and bright white wine showcases the vineyard origins of the Columbia Valley and Horse Heaven Hills appellation. Affordability combined with a unique tasting experience that friends and family can enjoy together is the driving force for the winery. Thus goes our slogan, "Good Wine, Good Times, Sweet Memories."

Name: The Vindemia Wine Trading Companies
Description:
Vindemia Wine Trading Companies (VinTC) are a collection of independent fine wine merchants
specialising in sourcing and distributing iconic, mature wines from the world’s most celebrated

Each company specialises in wines from particular regions of the fine wine world.

Name: Envoyer Fine Wines
Description: At Envoyer Fine Wines, founded in 2009, we offer a different way to buy wine. We scour the earth for the best wines at the best prices. This takes us straight to the top suppliers around the world. When we find an exceptional wine at an unbeatable price, we bring that offer straight to you. With no middleman, we import the wine directly to our warehouse where it's available for pickup or shipping to you. Never pay retail price again.

Name: Stay in Touch With
Description:
Stay in Touch With: The social network that brings together all wine lovers and all professionals (winemakers, wine merchants, restaurateurs...).

Follow and comment on the most beautiful wine estates and their exceptional cuvées, be delivered to your wine shop while minimizing the ecological impact of transport thanks to the «Slow Green Delivery».

Name: Midtsommar
Description:
Welcome to Hebnes Vingard – where Nordic nature meets craftsmanship and authentic flavour experiences.

At Hebnes Vingard, located in the heart of Ryfylke with views over the beautiful Sandsfjorden, we grow both grapes and honeyberries. Since our beginnings in 2020, we have been driven by a passion to create something truly distinctive – handcrafted, small-scale flavours rooted in place, reflecting both the Norwegian landscape and our commitment to quality.

We cultivate more than 6,000 grapevines on a small-scale basis, alongside a dedicated field of the distinctive super-berry haskap, also known as honeyberry. Our vineyard is south-facing and sheltered, allowing the plants to benefit from generous daylight in the cool climate at 59 degrees north.
Here, our engaged team is always ready to share knowledge and stories from our unique vineyard. Every plant is carefully tended to create the best possible growing conditions, and every tasting experience we offer is thoughtfully designed and handcrafted.

We offer:
Guided tours and wine tastings
During the summer season, we welcome guests for guided tours and tastings of our products. We also create tailor-made experiences for groups – ideal for corporate gatherings, anniversaries, or a memorable outing with friends.
Small-scale food experiences

Through close collaboration with local food producers, we offer seasonal, locally sourced flavours that complement our wines and products, making every visit a distinctive and memorable experience.

Name: ALIMENTACION Y BEBIDAS DIAZ CADENAS SL
Actium Limited
Description:
Located in Hong Kong and China (Shenzhen), Actium Ltd is a leading wine importer and distributor in French wines from all regions including Bordeaux, Burgundy, Champagne, Rhone Valley, Provence and South of France.

Our aim  is to promote local high quality French wines to the Asian region (Hong Kong and China primarily) and the cultural values around these domains. We continuously review our selections to only provide the top products in their price range. We also control the sourcing and the logistics to guarantee the authenticity and the quality of the wines.

Name: Flying Otter Vineyard and Winery
Description:
Welcome to the Flying Otter Vineyard and Winery

Our family operated vineyard and winery is the culmination of a life long love of wine. It has been said that wine is sunshine in a bottle. We agree with that sentiment and also firmly believe that the sunshine is meant to be enjoyed with friends and family while sharing good times and good food. 

We stay focused on the basics - sustainable vineyard practices using a great deal of hand labor, starting with the planting of the vine until we harvest the grapes. This hands on approach and attention to detail allows us to produce the best quality grapes that can be locally grown, because you can't make great wine unless you start with great grapes. We have selected cold climate hybrid wine grapes that have been developed not only to survive our sometimes harsh climatic conditions but to actually thrive in our particular terroir and produce some wonderful, unique tasting wines.

The objective of our winery is to provide a friendly, unintimidating wine experience. Whether you are a wine expert looking for something new and different, or a wine novice just entering the wonderful world of wine, we welcome you. We hope that you enjoy our wine and your wine experience.

Name: Amcellars

Fine American wines and more

Importing and selling American wines from California and Oregon in Luxembourg since 2011
Exclusive distributor for Peter Michael winery

AMCELLARS’s business purpose is to exclusively import exceptional American wines to Luxembourg. We also rely on the opinion of renowned wine experts like Parker Wine Guide, Wine Spectator or Wine Enthusiast, who hold American wine in high esteem.

Description:
Distillerie S.I.M.A.L. (Società Industriale Mastantuono Alcool Liquori) was founded in 1951 by Raffaele Mastantuono who moved the old distillery, Distilleria Mastantuono, from the family building in Sant'Antimo (NA) to a newly born industrial area in the outskirts of the ciy, over a surface of 4000 sq meters.
After almost 60 years, the company is still in the hands of Mastantuonos who reached the fourth generation.
From an handmade production as it was in the 30's, Distillerie S.I.M.A.L. hase become a reference point for the Italian market, its logo is Quality Expression and Quality Guarantee.
With a production capacity by over 60.000 units over day, S.I.M.A.L. offers a total supply chain to satisfy every kind of customer's request with the highest quality standard guaranteed by industrial production.
The plant is divided in three different production departments to optmize the production process:
- Alcohol for Food Processing & Denatured Alcohol Dpt
- Liquers Dpt
- Alcoholic Bagna Dpt

Name: Premium Drinks Pty Ltd Trading as The Hop and Spirit Company
Description: Importer,wholesaler,Distributer and Marketer of Craft ales and Organic Spirits- we have a small but premium Portfolio Brands Include BrewDog Craft Ales UK,Adnams Brewrey UK,Fruli Belgium and Mikkeller Craft Ales Denmark ,Our Clients Include Large supermarket Chains and small Independent Retailers ,as well as Australias Finest Bars and Restaurants

Name: WinePass BR
Description: A WinePass nasceu para conectar vinhos e vidas. Compra e entrega de rótulos exclusivos, curadoria de qualidade e um clube de vinhos exclusivo, com diferentes planos para você escolher aquele que melhor se encaixa nas suas expectativas.

Name: Illusion
Description: Illusion is a small family-operated winery located in the hills above Lyle, Wa., in the Columbia River Gorge. The winery tasting room is open on many summer weekends and features free tastings of our current releases. The winery produces 500 cases of wine each year. It's available at several Puget Sound-area grocery stores and at select locations in the Columbia Gorge.

Name: Amsterdam Wine Co
Description: We are true wine enthusiasts who are eager to guide our customers on a joyful journey through the wine world by drinking thoughtfully and drinking adventurously.  We provide our customers with an expertly curated and ever-changing selection from the world’s finest wine producers; both the well-known as well as the up and coming.  We don’t buy on scores.  We taste every wine that comes into our store and assess them based on style and value.

Name: ShopOnWine
Description:
Quante volte ci capita di organizzare un pranzo o una cena? Quasi tutti i giorni, no?
La prima cosa a cui pensiamo qual è? Non c’è dubbio.  “Cosa mangiamo? “ 
Dopo aver stilato il menù, arriva la fatidica domanda: “Che vino beviamo?”
Da anni ci insegnano ad abbinare una pietanza ad un vino specifico prediligendo i criteri di scelta partendo dal vino stesso ma nella realtà avviene esattamente il contrario.
Il consumatore ha il bisogno concreto di dover abbinare un vino ad una ricetta oppure ad un menù completo senza poter usufruire del servizio di un sommelier professionista a sua disposizione.
Per questo motivo nasce ShopOnWine.
ShopOnWine è il primo servizio interattivo di “Personal Sommelier” dove scegli il tuo vino partendo da quello che mangi.
Con una semplice ricerca per cibi avrete a disposizione una lista di vini abbinabili a quello che sarà il vostro menù suddiviso per macro ingredienti, poi sarete voi stessi a fare la scelta migliore.
Con ShopOnWine sarete finalmente liberi di scegliere.

Name: SES TALAIOLES
Description:
The magical Ses Talaioles, the history of its ancient tower, its never-ending light, the atmosphere of traditional rural living that still exists here, the passion of our winemaker and the sense of family on the estate – these are the elements that subsists the spirit of this paradise.

In addition, there is the unique terroir and the newest know-how of experienced winemakers; the wine originating here should mirror all of this.

A materialization that emerged from the distinctive location of the “Espiritu de Ses Talaioles” and could not have originated in any other location in the world. A quintessentially authentic result from the combination of these ingredients and realities is, and remains, our goal.

Name: Breaks Gin
Description:
Lodernde Leidenschaft. Gin ist nicht gleich Gin, und Gin ist nicht nur in. Wir brennen aus langjähriger Leidenschaft und verwenden ausschließlich frische Kräuter, Früchte und Gewürze in bester naturbelassener Qualität; viele davon aus der Region.

Facettenreiche Vielfalt. Gin braucht Zeit, Geduld und Erfahrung. Viele Handgriffe, viele einzelne Zutaten – das macht die Gin-Herstellung zum aufwändigen Handwerk und Breaks Gin in all seinen Varianten zu einem vielschichtigen, außergewöhnlichen Produkt.

Was macht Breaks Gin so außergewöhnlich und lebendig? Er trägt Besonderes in sich. Den Flair der Fächerstadt, urbanen Lebensstil, dicht und heterogen, immer wieder überraschend und auf seine eigene Weise angenehm vertraut. Die Aromen aus Karlsruher Kupferkesseln, heimatverbunden und mit Botanicals vom Fuße des Schwarzwalds. Das Wissen aus Jahrzehnten, mit der Erinnerung an jemanden, der die Natur schon im Namen trug und der die Leidenschaft bei Breaks-Gründer Harald Reinholz entfacht hat.

Englisch gedacht, in Deutschland gemacht. Unter dem Label Breaks Gin bieten wir außergewöhnliche Produkte und immer wieder limitierte Sondereditionen. Alle handschriftlich nummeriert und mit Ausweis des Brandes, alle nach traditioneller London-Dry-Methode destilliert. Pro Batch füllen wir etwa 600 bis 800 Flaschen à 500 ml, zwei Brände pro Tag, alles in unserer Karlsruher Manufaktur und immer von Meisterhand.

Name: 5 Infused Vodka
Description: Family owned, small batch infused liqueur producer based in Winsted, MN.  Founded on the indelible principles of all natural ingredients used to make great tasting craft spirits.  We produce a line of small batch infused vodka liqueurs using real fruit and spices.

Name: DUNLEAVY VINEYARDS LIMITED
Description: DUNLEAVY are an English Wine Producer based in Bristol and North Somerset

Name: Radici Natural Wines
Description:
Wine Marketing and Sales services.

We are mainly focused and specialized on Natural, Organic and Biodynamic wines.

Name: Red Bev Oy
Description: Importing, distributing and marketing beverages from all around the world on the Finnish market. We cover all sales channels, both on-trade and off-trade.

Name: Pure Wild Spirits
Description:
Pure Wild Spirits Ltd was founded in November 2016 in London, United Kingdom. We take pride in introducing unique ingredients to the to the alcoholic drinks market. We are establishing a new category: Wild Spirits, identifying great quality, full-flavoured premium spirits distilled using naturally occurring wild ingredients.  

We launched with Freya Birch Spirit, our core product, a 40% ABV, clear alternative to Vodka or Whisky. Inspired by Freya, the Nordic goddess of love, fertility and war and gold, our spirit encompasses her values and legacy: she was also ‘Wild By Nature’: independent, a leader, natural and spirited. Freya Birch Spirit upholds the ancient traditions of the far north and embodies Freya’s spirit in every drop of uniquely distilled birch sap. 

Freya Woodsmoke was then introduced to the market in November 2017. Natural and distinctive like its sister product, Woodsmoke is infused with the smoke of sacred woods, apple for love, birch for fertility and chestnut for strength. We celebrate the rituals of Freya’s worshippers, who would dance around campfires built with these woods, praying for love and fertility.

Name: WineAdvise
Description: WineAdvise is dedicated to offering the most customized wine advisory experience for any needs you may have as a collector. WineAdvise offers expert advice to manage any collection, and is comprised of a team of professionals with more than 30 years of experience in the wine and fine arts industry.

Name: Mr.Liquor
Description: Specialisti in liquori e aperitivi.

Name: VINI CASSARA'
Description:
Marzo 2007- Le prime bottiglie dell’azienda di “Antonello Cassarà” sono finalmente sul mercato, per scrivere una nuova pagina di storia del vino siciliano.

Un sogno che attraversa tre generazioni.

Cominciato sin dai primi del Novecento con il nonno Rocco che si dedicò alla promozione e alla commercializzazione del Bianco Alcamo, trasmesso a Nicolò che avviò la sua attività vitivinicola negli anni ’30 con la costruzione della cantina e realizzato nel 2007 con Antonello, agronomo, attuale titolare dell’azienda. Alla produzione dei vini sfusi si affiancò, negli anni ’60 quella dei mosti concentrati. Tale attività divenne prevalente negli anni ’80, dopo il trasferimento dello stabilimento dal centro urbano all'azienda agricola di famiglia, in contrada Fiume sede, oggi, della produzione dei vini di alta qualità espressione della zona di produzione dell’Alcamo Doc.

E’ ad Alcamo, città di grande tradizione enologica, nota per la produzione del Bianco, che l’azienda Cassarà produce autentici vini siciliani.

I vigneti della famiglia Cassarà si trovano nelle colline del territorio dell'Alcamo DOC e vengono coltivati con un grande perizia, amore e nel rispetto assoluto della natura. A pochi chilometri dalla cantina si trovano il tempio ed il teatro antico di Segesta, incastonati in una posizione strategica da cui si può ammirare il territorio agreste circostante che si protrae fino al mare del Golfo di Castellammare.

Name: Jeggli Weine AG
Description:
Wir stehen für Ursprung, Authentizität und genussvolle Weinkultur und glauben, dass Erfolg nur durch Qualität bei den Weinen und im Service entsteht: Quality wines - Quality wins oder bei uns dann eben Quality win(e)s!

In unserem Weinangebot finden Sie tolle Weine aus vielen Ecken der Welt, aber nicht nur solche, die man an jeder Ecke finden kann.

Die meisten Weine kommen von Winzern und Weingütern, die wir seit vielen Jahren von Besuchen und wiederkehrenden Begegnungen persönlich kennen. Und so kommt es, dass wir nur Weine anbieten, die wir auch selber gerne trinken und von denen wir selbst begeistert sind – nur so können wir auch Sie begeistern!

Name: Kings River Winery
Description: Kings River Winery is a small, premium boutique winery and event venue located in the Central Valley.

Name: Distillers Way LLC
Description:
Distillers Way is a distilled spirits production and distribution company that is focused on providing a better class of house brand spirits. Spirits that are equally suited for pouring out of the well and displaying on the top shelf. Spirits that match the pride and passion our customers pour into their own brands, whether they are grocery stores, restaurants, hotels, or other spirit retailers.  
At Distillers Way we challenge the idea that house brand spirits must sacrifice quality in order to offer a slightly lower price. Distillers Way offers the freedom to create new brands with high-quality spirits, spirits that our customers are proud to put their name on, while continuing to offer an affordable price point.
Distillers Way prides itself on being a flexible and responsive, able to source and design house brands from an extensive list of spirits, bottles, labels and closures to fit any price point and style.  We focus on creative, regulatory, and production processes so that our customers can focus on exactly what you do best.

Name: CASA VENTURA IMPORTS INC
Description: Casa Ventura Imports was founded by Basilio Rodriguez Grueso in the Pacific northwest; a family owned & operated importer & purveyor of premium wines from Spain & Portugal.  At Casa Ventura we believe the best wines come from excellent viticulture; the wine is born long before we see it in the bottle.  It is born in the soil and in the hands of those who know & understand agriculture.  Distinguished wines, unique traditions & pure passion from small family owned producers throughout various regions of Spain & Portugal.  It's all about the land and the people...

Name: Cave Nicolas Madeleine
Description:
Nicolas Madeleine, la plus grande cave Nicolas de France.

Notre équipe vous réserve un accueil des plus chaleureux sur ses 3 étages. Les 7 cavistes de la boutique vous conseillerons afin de trouver le nectar adapté à chacune de vos envies !

Retrouvez toute la sélection des Vins et Champagnes traditionnelle de Nicolas et plus encore. Le Sud-Ouest, le Languedoc-Roussillon, la Provence, ces vignobles pionniers de l’agriculture biologique et raisonnée sont à l’honneur chez Nicolas Madeleine dans une sélection exclusive et indépendante !

Pour les amateurs d’esprit, Nicolas Madeleine c’est aussi une sélection qui vous fera voyager :

Whiskies : Ecossais, Irlandais, Américains, Japonais, Taiwanais, Indiens...

Rhums : Martiniquais, Jamaïcains, Philippins, Vénézuéliens, Guatémaltèques, Dominicains …

Retrouvez aussi des Vodkas, des Vins de Porto, des Apéritifs, des Liqueurs et des Eaux de vies !

Nicolas Madeleine c’est également la possibilité de déguster nombre de ces nectars gratuitement en boutique lors des dégustations organisées chaque semaine !

Alors à Bientôt !

31 Place de la Madeleine
75008 Paris

Métro station "Madeleine" - ligne 8 / 12 / 14

La boutique: 01 42 68 00 16
Le Bar à Vins: 01 44 51 90 22

Ouvert du Lundi au Vendredi de 10h à 20h30 et le Samedi de 10h à 20h

Name: Mas Gabinèle
Description:
Nous avons créé en 1998 un vignoble au cœur de l’appellation Faugères, avec pour philosophie de produire peu, mais très bon.
Le Mas Gabinèle est un domaine viticole de 20 hectares situé sur la commune de Laurens, au cœur de l’appellation Faugères.
Le sol est constitué de schistes gréseux. Il s’agit de sols très pauvres, donnant de faibles rendements : la production oscille suivant les années entre 20 et 30 hectolitres par hectare en moyenne.
La conduite du vignoble respecte au maximum les équilibres naturels suivant les principes de la lutte raisonnée. Le Mas Gabinèle est certifié de Haute Valeur Environnementale.
Les vendanges sont manuelles avec tri à la parcelle de raisins très mûrs.
Les macérations sont longues, entre 20 et 30 jours suivant les cuvées.
Les vinifications sont conduites en douceur pour éviter des extractions trop fortes, l’objectif étant de produire des vins « aimables » : agréables, fruités avec des tannins souples et ronds et cependant de bonne garde.
La qualité est ici une obsession, ce qui nous oblige à améliorer sans cesse notre travail, du vignoble à la cave.

Name: Vinos Chilenos SpA
Description:
Vinos Chilenos re.al SpA es una empresa dedicada a potenciar el mundo relacionado con el vino, entregando servicio de vino de honor, para conmemorar celebraciones partículas (premios, aniversario, trayectoria, ascenso), también se utiliza cada vez más, al terminar un evento artístico, como la presentación ante la prensa de un nuevo espectáculo, de un libro o la inauguración de una muestra de arte.

Tenemos también la comercialización de vinos chilenos con servicio de e-commerce (comercio electrónico), con promociones que van acorde con el mercado,tenemos merchandising  para regalos (familiares,  corporativos, personales) o simplemente para regalar a quien estimes conveniente, nuestro merchandising esta enfocado en potenciar la creatividad y el carácter único de nuestros asociados. visita nuestra tienda y déjanos tu impresión.

Nuestra misión Ser líderes del buen servicio, tener una comercializadora  de vinos en donde la amabilidad, cordialidad, manejo de valores positivos estén siempre por delante, queremos ser transparentes y enfocarnos en cumplir con lo que planteamos, nos rodearemos con gente emprendedora, esforzada y los fidelizaremos para así crear las mejores propuestas a nuestros clientes, queremos ser llamativos e únicos.

Nuestra visión como tendencia siempre nuestro foco estará en el crecimiento sustentable y nos esforzaremos en ocupar materias primas que aporten positivamente en el cuidado de nuestro planeta.

En el ámbito social estaremos bien ligado a lo humano, en proyectos que causen un impacto real en la ciudadanía, la transparencia en nuestras acciones se verán reflejadas en nuestro actuar.

queremos mostrarnos al mundo como un referente del buen comportamiento tanto en entregar un buen servicio, como el de asesorar a nuestros clientes de principio a fin en el uso adecuado de nuestros productos, queremos llegar a unificar estos valores y crear una empresa solida y reconocida a nivel nacional e internacional.
Location: Las Condes, Región Metropolitana de Santiago

Name: Hard To Find Wines
Description: Hard To Find Wines specialise in boutique wines and champion small artisan wine makers, believing that it is the passion of these family run wineries that ensure the best quality wines. As wine suppliers, we have a passion for discovering and introducing customers to fantastic new wine, which is being distributed from right across the globe.

Name: Caissin
Description:
Caissin est l’entreprise officielle de confection et de vente de caissins, des coffrets en bois personnalisés,  conçus pour la présentation et la conservation d'assortiments de vins de garde. 

Nous réalisons la vente de caissins, sur notre site Web et chez nos partenaires. Un cadeau original, dans une caisse en bois gravée par le feu au nom du receveur et assortie d'un mot personnalisé. Le caissin est composé de deux à douze bouteilles du millésime correspondant à l’année de l’événement à célébrer. 

L'entreprise a la particularité de vendre des millésimes qui ne sont pas encore produits, bien avant les primeurs mais aussi d'ajouter un service de qualité, avant, pendant et après l’achat. 

Caissin donne de la valeur aux événements qui vous sont chers.

Name: Carringtons Wines
Description:
Carrington’s was established when two brothers began selling a selection of directly sourced wines from a range of small growers alongside the classic, established producers with an ambition to supply a diverse array of quality alcohols to the North West and beyond. 

That was over twenty-five years ago and our locations in Manchester continue to stock a myriad of wines, a wonderful and unusual array of rare and sought after spirits as well as world, continental and local beers, something in which Carrington’s was instrumental by bringing German and British beers to the mainstream UK market in the mid 1990’s. 

In providing superior bottles at a reasonable price, sourcing innovative products and placing an emphasis on customer service and follow-up, Carrington’s continues to supply quality products, engage with our customers and build on our history as wine, spirit and beer merchants.

Name: BY THE GLASS USA
Description: The innovative, professional-grade wine serving systems from BY THE GLASS allow you to raise the quality and selection of your wine offerings while increasing revenue and profits. Start or improve your wine-by-the-glass program and create more satisfied customers. BY THE GLASS offers you the best solutions in quality and ease of use.

Name: Les inVINcibles
Description:
Based in South of France, we handpick rising Artisan vine growers from surprising “terroirs”.
We’re bringing you back the lost origins of French wines & the true meaning of what “terroir” stands for.

From sustainable practices to humble farmers that follow early monks’ practices, we work with vine growers that dedicated their life to create wine masterpieces. 

Les inVINcibles is promoting years and years of vine growing tradition with the same philosophy; growing organic, biodynamic or natural berries.

Why Les inVincibles?

It’s wine simplicity. It’s an attitude.
It’s harkening back to lost ways of living.
It’s a philosophy.
Yours & Ours.

Name: PourMore
Description: For the connoisseur in all of us. Pour More is a spirits club focused on helping consumers find, learn about, and enjoy spirits. We are currently focused on whiskey, bourbon, and scotch. By partnering with our vendors we source high quality and hard to find liquors for our members and customers. We use propriety algorithms and the results of our Spirit Genome Project to predict which spirits customers will enjoy - helping them find their next favorite drink! So go ahead, and pour more - we got you covered.

Name: CELLIER LINGOT MARTIN
Description:
Le Cellier Lingot Martin est situé à Poncin dans le département de I'Ain à quelques kilomètres de la commune de Cerdon.
La cave est reconnue pour sa production de Cerdon AOP (rosé pétillant en méthode  ancestrale) ainsi que pour sa
production de Bugey AOP. Cette région viticole est située à 30 kilomètres à I'Est de Bourg-en-Bresse sur I 'axe Lyon-Genève,
La cave a été créée en 1970 et compte aujourd'hui un regroupement familial 4        associés :
Jean-Luc et Frédéric Guillon, David Boley et Eric Vucher. 
Les 3 cépages principaux de la cave sur les 48 hectares de vigne sont : le gamay, le chardonnay et le poulsard. La production moyenne annuelle est d'environ 400 000 bouteilles.

Name: MasterGlass
Description: Here at MasterGlass we’re passionate about wine and learning. We’re committed to providing a platform for customers, wine producers and sommeliers to connect and share a customized learning experience, while enjoying great wine. We hope our products can be enjoyed by individuals and couples looking to broaden their wine understanding, as well as by families and groups or friends or colleagues, who want to learn together.

Name: Gardet Frères
Description:
Gardet Frères facilite vos commandes de champagne et de coffrets cadeaux champagne en ligne.

L’histoire de Gardet Frères commence en 1929 quand Norbert Gardet s’installe à Marseille en tant que courtier en vins.
Au fil du temps, nous avons développé la possibilité de commander une sélection de champagne sur le web, avec toujours un excellent  rapport qualité prix.

Nous proposons un service de livraison de champagne partout en France métropolitaine et en Corse, ainsi qu'une gamme de cadeaux champagne personnalisables, comme les coffrets "Champagnes et Chocolats" ou "Champagnes et Foie Gras".

Nous avons récemment élargi notre offre au marché du mariage et autres réunions familiales.

Name: Masstengo
Description: Wine for a new world!

Name: Lost Ark Distilling Co.

Name: FLORIDA Hard Seltzer
