Name: SOPEXA / FOOD & WINES FROM FRANCE, INC.
Champagne Jean & Bernard
Description: L’élégance à la française, telle est l’obsession de Jean & Bernard! L’expression par le vin d’un terroir et d’un savoir-faire soigné est au coeur de nos valeurs. Le terroir de la Montagne de Reims et le léger dosage confèrent à ce Champagne une intensité et une finesse de bulle caractéristiques de notre style.

Name: Parvada Comunidad Vinícola
Description: Parvada es un proyecto integral, ubicado en Parras Coahuila. Contamos con nuestra propia bodega de vinos, donde nos dedicamos a producir y comercializar vinos de la más alta calidad. Además dentro de nuestra bodega tenemos un restaurante con comida gourmet donde nuestros visitantes podrán pasar tiempo de calidad con vistas a nuestros viñedos y extensa nogalera. También contamos con un Fraccionamiento de tipo Campestre con una casa club equipada con amenidades de primer nivel. Dentro de Parvada tenemos un salón de eventos con capacidad de hasta 750 personas. Próximamente contaremos con un hotel boutique y un conjunto de villas de lujo rodeadas de nuestro viñedo

Name: Multum Gin Parvo
Description: Based in England's smallest county, Rutland, and inspired by the county motto Multum-in-Parvo or Much-in-Little, we designed a range of Gins to capture the essence of this wonderful area. Using ingredients that have been sourced locally, we’ve come up with some beautiful and unique gin flavours that we hope you enjoy as much as we do.

Name: Impero Wine Distributors Texas
Description: IMPERO WINE DISTRIBUTORS specializes in Italian wine, offering a broad, carefully sourced selection of wines that can satisfy any range of price whilst consistently guaranteeing exceptional quality.

Name: Flying Couch Brewing
Description: Flying Couch Brewing was founded in 2011 as a gipsy brewery and has since 2015 changed to a physical self-owned brewery located in the northwestern part of Copenhagen.

Name: Wines Espania
Description:
Wines Espania es una marca que nace dentro la corporación WinesBarcelona.com para atender a clientes que demandan nuevos vinos españoles exclusivos y de alta calidad. Nos centramos en la importación, distribución y comercialización de nuevos vinos de alta calidad procedentes todas la regiones de España que se adapte a los gustos del mercado en Puerto Rico y EEUU, que aporte variedad en su género y dote de una exclusividad constante de vinos de origen español que proporcione más allá del vid, una experiencia única al paladar exigente del consumidor en Puerto Rico y EEUU.

Contamos con más 400 Bodegas Españolas operando en toda España, con una carta que aporta una variedad de más 1000 vinos para abastecer periódica y recurrentemente a todos los Hoteles, Restaurantes, Coleccionistas y Establecimientos de productos Gourmet en Puerto Rico y EEUU.

"Donde no hay vino no hay arte ni historia, y muchos menos, cultura" 

Wines Espania is a brand born inside the corporation WinesBarcelona.com to attend customers demand of  new exclusive wine from all the regions of Spain. We focus on the import, distribution and marketing of high-quality new wines from Spain to suit the tastes of the market in Puerto Rico and the U.S., to provide variety in its genre exclusivity dowry constant wines Spanish origin beyond the wine provides a unique experience to the consumer demanding palate in Puerto Rico and the U.S.

"Where there is no wine there is no art or history, much less, culture"

Name: CAVE DES PRODUCTEURS DE JURANCON
Description: CAVE DES PRODUCTEURS DE JURANCON is a wine and spirits company based out of 53 AVENUE HENRI IV, GAN, Aquitaine, France.

Name: Scrap Yard Brewing Company
Description:
Scrap Yard Brewing Company is the newest craft brewery in Pittsburgh with plans to open in early 2010. We will brew handcrafted ales and lagers with only the finest ingredients that are sure to satisfy everyone from the beer savvy to novice drinkers.

We will host several flagship beers that will be available year-round. In addition to these, we will brew seasonal beers that compliment the season and give our customers something to look forward to. One thing that sets us apart from other breweries is that we let our customers dictate what we brew. Registered users will be able to vote via our website for the beer they want us to brew. The votes will be tracked and users can view the results via a graph until the last day, in which the winner is announced.

Name: California's Finest (wine import)
Description:
Welcome!

We're proud and pleased to present California’s Finest wine. We have always been on the lookout for good Californian wines here in The Netherlands. Since we have found them difficult to find, we decided to import them ourself! Through our website you will be able to find some of California’s finest wines. Did you know that California is the third largest producer of wine in the world? Due to California’s warm climate and excellent wine making, some of the best wines are produced in California. Our wines are imported from the area’s of Napa Valley and Sonoma. 

All of our wines are brought to The Netherlands with great care, including our specially conditioned transport and storage, so that you can taste the true California flavours. We hope you will enjoy our wines as much as we do, and should you have any questions or comments please let us know.

Our areas of expertise are:
    * Import
    * Distribute
    * Sell
    * Intermediary

Take a look at our website for more information.

Name: Land of Basarabia
Description:
Land of Basarabia  is a new generation of winemakers of Moldova, our European experience enabling the trademark to build its market behavior strategy in an absolutely different way. Our priority task is not short-term earnings, but gaining full-value market positions. 

The uniqueness of our wines is not a chance or luck. Our corporate style comprises a scientific approach to every stage from growing to bottling, thorough manual filtration of ripe berries to identify the unsuitable units, separation of the stalk prior to the pressing process, we leave 2.3 – 3 kilograms of bunches only on every vine, which means that we decrease the vintage approximately three times but the intensity of the grapes increases several-fold, which enables us to receive wine with high alcohol by volume without a single gram of sugar or outside preservatives.

Name: DOMAINE DE MONDEVILLE
Description: DOMAINE DE MONDEVILLE is a company based out of 9 RUE DE CHAMPAGNE, Champignol Lez Mondeville, Grandest, France.

Name: WINES BARCELONA
Description:
Wines Barcelona Inc. is a corporation that was thinking as a pioneering new wine business opportunity in Barcelona to be incorporated in Puerto Rico and US as authorized company of importing and distributing wine from Spain to the Puerto Rico and US Market. Further in 2012, we begun working with Miami, Florida Market to serve clients that demand our premium brands and services. Our company specializes in the import, distribution and marketing of high quality wines from these best D.O. from Spain, Italy, France and South America to suit the tastes of the Puerto Rico and the US Market. We provide a really unique wine experience to satisfy the discerning palate of the PR and US clients.

A unique experience of art, history and wine culture!

"Where there is no wine no art or history, nor culture"

Wines Barcelona Inc.

Wines Barcelona  Inc. es una corporación que nace como un proyecto pionero en Barcelona, que inicia a la venta y comercialización de vinos solos de la DOCa Priorat  y DO Montsant de España en Puerto Rico, y posteriormente en 2012, se extiende a la ciudad de Miami, Florida para atender clientes que demandan nuestras marcas y servicios. Aactualmente, nuestra Corporación se especializa en la importación, distribución y comercialización de vinos de alta calidad procedentes de vinos premium de Europa y Sur América que se adapten a los gustos del mercado en Puerto Rico y EEUU, que aporte variedad en su género y dote de una exclusividad constante de vinos de origen español que proporcione más allá del vid, una experiencia única al paladar exigente del consumidor en Puerto Rico y EEUU.

Name: Wine Couture Ltd.
Description:
Wine Couture is the new rebranded tradename for Women inspired by Wine.

Wine Couture is the UK's first wine club for women. It aims to give women the chance to discover more about wine through tating events tutored by female sommeliers, winemakers and Masters of Wine, gourmet dinners, tours and a host of other complementary lifestyle occasions.

You don't have to be a member to come along to an event, but joing Wine Couture gives you access to all our benefits, including discounts on events, invitations to exclusive tastings, guidance on food and wine matching and lots more. We want members to feel that Wine Couture is their personal sommelier, helping them to select wines.

Wine Couture has opened as well its doors for the 'other half of the population' in offering some special wine tasting events for mixed groups - targeting in particular corporates, clubs and private. For more information go to www.winecouture.co.uk

Name: Backed By Bees
Description: Natural craft mead, raw unpasteurized honey and whole local foods are our speciality.  From bee to bottle we are changing how people approach local.

Name: Pivnita Savu
Description:
Încă de la începuturile noastre umile, amprenta pe care am lăsat-o a fost un angajament ferm față de calitate.

Înainte de a pune piciorul în vie, mâinile pe strugure și vinul în pahar, totul a început cu o viziune: aceea că toată familia va lucra cot la cot pentru a produce cele mai bune vinuri și pentru a valorifica la maxim potențialul uriaș al acestei zone.

Name: Tanktemp Glycol heaters & chillers for wineries and breweries
Description:
Tanktemp delivers cutting-edge temperature control systems and chilling solutions for craft beverage producers, including breweries, distilleries, and wineries. We provide turnkey systems designed to maintain precise temperature control throughout fermentation, storage, and packaging. Our team partners with clients to engineer scalable solutions that improve product consistency, production efficiency, and energy performance.

Core Services:

Glycol chiller systems and fermentation temperature control
System design, installation, and support
Custom-engineered chilling solutions


Westside Mechanical is our service division. 
Westside Mechanical is a full-service mechanical contractor specializing in commercial and industrial HVAC, refrigeration, and piping systems. We help businesses—from healthcare facilities to food production plants—design, build, and maintain critical infrastructure for climate control, process cooling, and mechanical efficiency.

Core Services:

HVAC and refrigeration system installation and maintenance
Electrical contracting, service and install. 
Sheet metal and piping fabrication
Process mechanical design-build projects
24/7 emergency service and preventive maintenance programs

Name: Nottingham Cellars
Description: Established in the summer of 2009, Nottingham Cellars was founded by father and son team, Jeff and Collin Cranor. Our philosophy of winemaking is to work with only the finest winegrape growers in the Valley. From there, we seek to do justice to the fruit by producing wines of exceptional character showcasing the best that the region has to offer. We handcraft our wines in small lots. Our dedication to careful production and attention to detail in every phase of winemaking comes through with every sip.

Description: MKT Distillery is a distillery in development based in Katy, Texas.  We plan to distill whiskey, silver whiskey, flavored white whiskeys (aka Moonshine), vodka, and gin.

NW Florida's Premier International Wine Importer and Distributor

Our signature brand is DiBacco Wines from Abruzzo. Our family heritage in wine production dates back to 1950.
We are family owned and operated, so personal attention and strong relationships are important to us.
"In vino veritas"...Pliny the Elder

Name: Tenuta Vandelli
Description:
Tenuta Vandelli nasce nel 2011 sulle basi dell'Azienda Agricola Vandelli che dal 1960 circa si occupa di Viticoltura nel territorio di San Michele dei Mucchietti nella fascia pedecollinare della provincia di Modena, pochi chilomteri a sud di Sassuolo sulla riva destra del fiume Secchia.

Grazie alla tenacia e alla passione per la Vigna e grazie all'esperienza acquisita negli ultimi cinquant'anni da Valter Vandelli, che con il supporto della famiglia si è deciso di intraprendere questo progetto che ha come obiettivo il mantenimento e la valorizzazione di un grande patrimonio di qualità, costituito da circa dieci Ettari di Vigneti coltivati a Vitigni tipici del Modenese: Lambrusco Grasparossa di Castelvetro, Salamino di Santa Croce, Ancelotta, Malbo Gentile, Spergola e Pignoletto.

Famiglia, territorio e qualità sono i punti fondamentali che ispirano il nostro lavoro quotidianamente e che si traducono in cura ed attenzione reverenziale per la vigna, sistemi di potatura finalizzati a basse rese, vendemmia manuale per la raccolta delle uve, sistemi di vinificazione e spumantizazione all'attualità della tecnica enologica, cura e ricerca fino al packaging delle nostre bottiglie.

Frutto della vendemmia 2012 è la produzione 2013 che seppur quantitativamente limitata ha già raggunto eccellenti livelli qualitativi "I Vini Del Bacino":
Lambrusco Grasparossa di Castelvetro DOP
Spumante Rosè Extra Dry di Lambrusco Grasparossa di Castelvetro DOP
Spergola Colli di Scandiano e Canossa DOC

Name: Refined Wine Club
Description:
Refined Wine Club is the only kosher wine club in Europe.

Based in London and dispatches to everywhere in Europe, our wine club is second to none. 

We have three tiers depending on the level of the member, we dispatch a case of 4 wine bottles once every 3 months.

Due to our connections with the best kosher wineries around the world, we can offer our members exclusive and rare wines which are almost impossible to find.

Looking forward to seeing you as a member.

Name: Norman Hardie Winery & Vineyard
Description: Norman Hardie Winery is located in beautiful Wellington, Ontario, Canada. Located on a clay-limestone hill, Norman Hardie puts his years of experience to the test, handcrafting fine wine in this emerging cool-climate wine region. Guests can enjoy his wine at boutiques and restaurants across Canada and around the world. Also located at the winery is an outdoor wood-fired pizza oven, operating May-October, serving thin-crust pizzas, fresh salads, local smoked trout, and fresh PEI oysters to pair with wine by the glass. Home delivery of their wines is also available through their online store.

Name: Domaine du Mont d'Or
Description: Wines For connoisseurs, explorers of exceptional terroirs.

Name: The Grapevine - Kosher Wine
Description:
Established in 2006, The Grapevine carries an extensive range of fine kosher wines and spirits from around the world. It is our philosophy that there are too few high quality Kosher wines available in today’s market. At The Grapevine we appreciate that a fine wine can be the perfect accompaniment to a meal, enhance a special occasion or mark an exceptional event. A quality wine can also make the perfect gift. We therefore make it our mission to bring to you exceptional quality Kosher wines from all over the world including Australia, Chile, Spain, France and Israel among others. Any and every Kosher wine that is available to the United Kingdom can be found at The Grapevine. We have an expert team of wine connoisseurs at your service to assist with selecting the perfect wine for any special occasion or for year round drinking. 

Of course, wines are not our only speciality. We also carry a comprehensive selection of liqueurs and spirits. From whisky to vodka to Drambuie, single malts or blends, Scottish, Irish or Russian, the choice alone is intoxicating. 

Our exclusively arranged presentations make a perfect centrepiece at a special occasion or provide a memorable gift for friends, family and colleagues. Each arrangement is expertly designed and hand crafted in store and delivered without any purchase information attached. 

We are also able to source, subject to availability and a sourcing fee, any wine or spirit of any vintage. Our combined years of experience in delivering superior Kosher wines to thousands of customers in the UK speaks for itself.

Name: Henebery Spirits, Inc.
Description:
First and foremost we are Whiskey Craftsmen and we are very passionate about our field. Crafting Whiskey came very natural to us due to our passion for not only the art of distilling, but for the spirit as well. This passion of ours is far from new, in fact it’s a family tradition. In 1851 Matthew Henebery set the stage for our family by entering the Whiskey distilling industry; he turned rectifying whiskey into a lifelong profession.

Similarly to our “Humble Boss,” Matthew Henebery, we believe and stand firm by strong family conviction. We are a dedicated family owned business and we are fortunate to have such great ideals passed down to us. As a proud family business it is our honesty, conviction, and integrity that leads us to work hard to achieve Celebration.

To accomplish this we will now and always demand the absolute best ingredients. As a policy we have decided to utilize only the finest natural ingredients, ensuring the most satisfying and flavorful product possible. We will not sacrifice our products integrity by settling for anything less than perfect. Like our predecessor, Matthew, we will listen carefully to the demands of our customers and provide accordingly.

We have created a superior and innovative infusing technique that undoubtedly sets us apart. From the start of our distilling process to the end we are mindful of our product and incorporate our infusion throughout its entirety. We have mastered our innovative process and are able to add sophisticated flavor, which in turn creates a sophisticated product.

Matthew Henebery lived a life of superior conviction; he not only spoke of his ideals but he demonstrated them by his everyday actions. His actions are why his ideals will never die, and we at Henebery Spirits inc. have learned from his moral aptitude and promise to stay true to our beliefs. He taught more than anything to be humble, to be honest, and to work hard to achieve ultimate celebration.

Name: Black Oystercatcher
Description:
The Black Oystercatcher is a family-run wine farm at the cool southernmost tip of Africa.

Our unique region crafts our cool-climate wines, creating penetrating fruit flavours, and a distinctive minerality. But we’re more than a winery: we’re a destination. We offer fresh farm-style snacks from our deli, as well as wood-fired pizza, both enjoyed on our veranda or in our venue. Enjoy a wine tasting and shop for local crafts and produce in our tasting room and gift shop. And stay over in our self-catering cottages overlooking the biodiversity-rich Agulhas Plain.

Name: Rum Sixty Six
Description: Rum Sixty Six is a fine sipping rum.  Tropically aged for 12 Years giving a character and complexity comparable to spirits twice this age.  Distilled, aged and bottled at Foursquare Distillery, St Philip, Barbados by the Barbados branch of my British-Barbadian family.  One of the last independent family-owned distilleries in the Caribbean. Enjoy it straight or on the rocks.  We're out to challenge Single Malt Whiskies and fine Cognac!

Name: Crew Cocktails
Description:
Founded this year in 2022, Crew Cocktails set out to create delicious canned cocktails, no fuss - just great tasting drinks to enjoy on the go or at home.

A portion of all sales are donated to The Seafarer's Charity that support seafarer's worldwide and their families.

monvinnature
Description: monvinnature.com is an e-commerce site dedicated to natural, biodynamic, organic wines and without added sulfites. This site was born from the meeting of two enthusiasts united by a common idea: to discover the wines that are important to us and respect our vision of viticulture. Because behind each wine, there are passionate women and men, we highlight the work accomplished for each wine and on their fields. For each vintage, we ask Sommeliers, Cellar Master or the Vintners themselves to taste, analyze and advise on food / wine pairings on video.

Name: Knudsen Vineyards
Description: Established in 1971 by Oregon wine industry pioneer Cal Knudsen and his wife Julia Lee, Knudsen Vineyards is one of Oregon’s oldest and largest family-owned vineyards. It is also the original site of Bonded Winery No. 52, the first commercial winery in the Dundee Hills. The 130 acre vineyard in the heart of the Dundee Hills AVA includes a mix of old-vine blocks and new high-density blocks planted with “Old World” Dijon clones. Knudsen Vineyard was a primary supplier of grapes to Knudsen Erath Winery from 1975 through 1986 and has been a leading supplier of fruit to Argyle Winery since 1987. In 2014, the Knudsen family returned to winemaking under its own label. Knudsen Vineyards releases a vintage Chardonnay every spring and a vintage Pinot every fall. Become a mailing list member at www.knudsenvineyards.com for news and updates.

Description:
Croatian Fine Wines Limited imports, distributes, markets and retails quality award winning Croatian wines within the UK.

To date, our primary focus has been on Croatian wines from award winning wine producers from the Istrian Peninsular, which is widely recognised as a premium wine region of Croatia. We intend to increase our range of Croatian wines by also including the best wines from Dalmatia, Croatian Uplands and the Slavonia and Danube wine regions.

Name: Winery Row - Paso Robles
Description:
Winery Row - Paso Robles is a beautiful new development featuring 16 freestanding wineries. Each purpose built winery will be approximately 10,000 square feet and consist of a wine processing facility, a barrel storage facility and a tasting room. All 16 wineries will feature unique exterior facades and lush landscaping. Winemakers looking for a new home now have the opportunity to lease a winery of their own.

Located at 2550 Dry Creek Road in Paso Robles, California, Winery Row will offer tourists a one-stop opportunity to taste a wide variety of wines in a lush setting. In addition to wine tasting, future plans call for two restaurants, shopping, RV park, 350 seat event center, treehouse lodging, and 100 room boutique hotel.

Name: Maison Coquard-Thomas
Description: Maison Coquard-Thomas vous offre aujourd'hui l'opportunité de découvrir un cognac unique, moderne et authentique, dans le respect des traditions et de l'histoire, avec cette volonté d'en faire une boisson accessible au plus grand nombre, curieux et connaisseurs.

Name: Champagne Royal Riviera
Description: Founded in Monaco in 2013, as oficial license to the Prince of Monaco Palace. Champagne Royal Riviera is elaborated under the traditional method in Epernay, France, and today continue as a celebration of the Monte Carlo and French Riviera lifestyle.

Name: Don Valley Brewery
Description:
Don Valley Brewery (DVB) combine the ultimate desires for great beer and good tunes.

We carefully handcraft cask beers, that are available all year with more styles planned for 2021.  Look out for our ‘White Label’ selection of seasonal cask ale specials.  All cask is supplied in 9G Firkins or 20L BIB.

Continually striving to accommodate all tastes and sustainability of today’s discerning beer devotee, using only natural ingredients we carefully hand craft a core range of three craft ales which are also available all year in 30L key kegs.

Only fresh fruit ingredients are used in our unique recipes, no fruit syrups or extracts to be seen here.  There is no substitute for quality when it comes to the taste of our beers. 

We do it with love and passion, it's more than a job, it's a way of life

Name: VBV WINES
Description:
ABOUT ME 
Welcome to my Linkedin page! I am Virginie Valton. 
After 10 years as an export manager for the Bordeaux trade, I created VBV Wines in 2015 to provide personalized consulting to wholesalers and importers of French wines and spirits.

Passionate about wine and export, and curious to discover the specificities of each market, I have developed lasting relationships with my clients.
I will guide you step by step to find the wines best suited to your clientele, adapting to your market.

INTERNATIONAL
I sell my wines to international importers and wholesalers in over 30 countries. I am an export specialist, and I will be happy to put my expertise to work for you. Especially since my knowledge of foreign languages will facilitate our exchanges.

MY SERVICES
Whether you have a very clear idea of what you are looking for or you are lost in the many different appellations, I rely on my contacts and partners in all the French wine regions to offer you the wines best suited to your clientele.
The contacts and partnerships that I have forged over the years now allow me to work in close collaboration with some thirty owners in all the vineyards of France.
My catalogue has over a hundred carefully selected wines. I offer three services that will allow you to find the French wines and spirits that will appeal to your customers. I guarantee it. 
- B TO B SALES
 I analyse your needs and find the French wines that your clientele is looking for.
- CONSULTING
 I will accompany you step by step in studying your market and analysing your needs
- BUILDING YOUR BRAND
 I work with you to build an exclusive brand within your market.

I invite your to discover my website
https://vbv-wines.com/en/home-b-to-b-export-of-french-wines/

Want to work with me or find out more?
Let’s schedule a discovery call to discuss your project, or you can write and tell me about your needs.

Name: Familia Rosso Wines

Desde el Piamonte italiano llegó a nuestra tierra la pasión vitivinícola que Rodolfo Rosso integra en la creación de los vinos de FAMILIA ROSSO.

La pasión y tradición vitivinícola de las actuales generaciones, está presente al convertir cosechas de alta calidad de uvas en los mejores vinos de la Familia, para que lleguen a las copas del mundo como fiel reflejo de compromiso y dedicación en crear momentos únicos.

The OCWS donates thousands of dollars in scholarships each year to several California institutions of higher education for enology, viticulture and culinary arts.

Name: ViniComm
Description:
ViniComm kicked off as a start-up project in 2013 in Burgundy, developing further on in Barcelona. Its name is a combination of two words Vini ("Wine" in Latin) and Comm, standing for Commerce and Communication.

Our mission is to evolve the wine business, enhancing the communication between producers and consumers. The objectives are to spread wine culture and endorse the social aspects of wine consumption. 

The project founder Olga Verchenko is an MSc in Wine Business (BSB), DipWSET student and a wine professional with 10 years of commercial experience.

ViniComm Partners and Collaborators operate in several countries around the globe. And we are ready to propose to both business and consumers a vast array of services.

Get to know more at www.vinicomm.com.

Name: Giannikos Winery
Description: The Giannikos Winery is a family owned organic winery based in Corinth on the Peloponnese in Greece. We own 8 ha of vines on two sites, one in Corinth around our winery and the other in Mycenae, near the famous archaeological site and birthplace of Greek viticulture almost 4,000 years ago. We believe that a good wine has its roots in the vineyard from healthy and natural vines. That’s why we cultivated and produce strictly organic. Today we are considered as one of the leading organic wineries in Greece and we export 80% of our production all over the world. All our wines are single varietal because we are convinced that this way, we can show our passion for quality and give each grape variety the attention that it deserves. We have been awarded several times at international wine competitions such as AWC Vienna and Millesime Bio.

Name: Corporación Vinoloa
Description:
Desde la ilusión y el esfuerzo continuo nace Corporación Vinoloa, empresa familiar dedicada a la fabricación y distribución de vinos. Trabajamos cada año para mejorar la calidad y el servicio de nuestros productos y así poder añadir siempre un punto de diferencia, el cual satisfaga las necesidades de nuestros clientes.

Calidad, tradición y futuro en una botella. Corporación Vinoloa es la suma de un elaborado proceso que va desde la fruta en la planta hasta el gusto en boca de un maravilloso jugo de dioses.

Nuestras novedosas técnicas en I+D se traducen en un exquisito sabor, capaz de conquistar al más exigente de los paladares. Además, nuestra incansable búsqueda por la excelencia da como fruto una nueva imagen, un nuevo vino, una nueva marca.

Fruto de nuestro esfuerzo, compromiso y un entorno cálido y cercano, nos hemos convertido en una verdadera revolución dentro del mundo del vino en nuestro país.

Nuestras vendimias seleccionadas nos alejan de vinos jóvenes o de mesa, especializándonos en vinos de crianza y reserva en busca de alcanzar la excelencia con nuevas marcas que salgan de lo común, pero sin perder la esencia del buen vino tradicional.

Name: Think Wine Marketing

Name: Vicino srl
Description:
From the producer to your home means putting ethics, the history of people and the land at the center. 
Vicino is the first digital marketplace for the sale of wine at the real cellar price. Vicino is the most complete solution dedicated to producers for direct sales as in the winery. 

We live in an era where the average order counts more than the history of the product, we want to overturn this conception and put at the center the story of the producers. We are the bridge that brings wineries into the homes and hearts of customers. 

Buying a wine will be supporting a producer. An ethical solution to spread culture and start off on the right foot in the era of digital sales.

Name: Vignoble de Pomone inc.
Description:
Situé à Coteau-du-lac sur un magnifique site, à 45 minutes de Montréal, c'est en 2009 que Sylvain a planté ses premières vignes. Il caressait secrètement ce rêve depuis la quarantaine.  Il étudia la viticulture et s'entoura d'experts et se fit beaucoup de nouveaux amis vignerons.  En 2010, il a construit lui même sa maison, en 2013, le chai. Pendant ces constructions, il plantait des vignes à chaque année.  Les récoltes de raisins étaient vendues à plusieurs vignobles québécois.

Sylvie, passionnée du vin et de la terre est entrée dans sa vie.  Un peu fous, ils ont décidé de produire du vin, et c'est à ce moment que le Vignoble de Pomone est officiellement créé.   

Petit à petit, à force de travail, de passion et de persévérance que le Vignoble de Pomone, en juillet 2019 à commencé a vendre ses vins de qualité prisés par les plus grands restaurateurs et consommateurs.

Name: Ignite Energy
Description:
Ignite Energy offers a unique range of healthier alternative energy drinks and alcoholic premixes as well as juices . 

Ignite Energy also provides event planning services, specialising in booking entertainment, venues, catering, music and offers a range of MC's, comedians and artists.

WHAT MAKES IGNITE NOT JUST ANOTHER ENERGY DRINK?
Enriched with a range of Vitamins and Milk Thistle that maintains liver functioning, lowers cholesterol and increases antioxidants, Ignite Energy is ready for your day.

It comes in two distinct flavours- Mint Mojito and Fruits of the Forest- both developed carefully to cater to the preferred tastes in the South African market.

Name: Steinfels Wine Auctions
Description:
Steinfels Wine Auctions is Switzerland’s oldest wine and spirits auction house. It was founded by Dr. Eric Steinfels in 1975 and acquired by the siblings Marc and Corinne Fischer in 2002. In 2023 wine entrepreneur Luca Hoefer took over Steinfels from the Fischer family.

Today Steinfels enjoys an excellent reputation for its expertise and services amongst wine and spirits connoisseurs around the globe. The Steinfels team consists of eight experienced wine and spirits experts. Marc Fischer remains active in the company to assure a smooth transition to Luca Hoefer and a continuous support of the many loyal customers.

The Steinfels team provides wine and spirits lovers with advice and valuations for whole collections but also for single bottles. In the Steinfels auctions wines and spirits always find their market price when sold.

Name: VAENI NAOUSSA
Description:
It is a giant producer representing 50 per cent of the local wine production, which comes from an area renowned for its exquisite red wines. The co-operative counts 200 members -experienced vine growers- who are driven by their profound love for quality wines. That vital human factor, combined with the use of advanced technology, can guarantee the quality of the wine, which is mainly sourced from Xinomavro, an indigenous variety dominating northern Greece.

The winery is staffed with qualified experts and operates according to the European standards. It is situated within the boundaries of the viticultural region, which is an advantage for the product itself. What characterizes the company's course is experience, reliability and an artistic feeling.

Today the VAENI wines are exported to China, Russia, the USA, Canada, Kazakhstan, Australia, Dubai, N.Zealand, Japan, Ukraine, Belarus, Germany, the Netherlands, Sweden, Austria, Belgium, Switzerland, Czech Republic, Poland, England, Serbia and Cyprus. Their distinctive superiority can be identified right from the first drain.

Name: Despert & co
Description: Ons verhaal start ruim 100 jaar geleden bij de Franse familie Despert die na de eerste wereldoorlog wijn begint te importeren in België. Aanvankelijk bestond het aanbod dan ook uitsluitend uit Franse wijnen. Doorheen de jaren en na heel wat te hebben afgereisd op zoek naar verborgen en vernieuwende pareltjes, vind je ondertussen ook andere wereldwijnen en dranken in ons gamma. Sinds 2000 zet onze huidige zaakvoerder Marc Bergmans deze traditie verder en heeft hij Despert & co verder uitgebouwd tot de gerenommeerde speler in de drank- en wijnwereld die we vandaag kennen. In onze winkel in Sint-Job-in’t-Goor kunnen wijnliefhebbers, zowel particulieren, bedrijven als horeca klanten terecht voor advies op maat.

Name: Pacific Vintners
Description:
A group of wine loving tech and logistics investors looked at the Australian wine industry and thought ‘we can do this better.' Gathering industry specialists and with the expertise of local universities and industry associations, Pacific Vintners was born.
We have grown into a customer focused medium to large volume wine partner to clients around the world. In 2019, our record year, we exported 720 containers of wine to markets around the globe. In recognition we were awarded Wine Exporter of the Year by South Australia's Chamber of Commerce.
We own 250 hectares of vineyards across South Australia, producing a diverse range of varieties and styles. Our flagship winery, Massena Wines, is one of the Barossa Valley's most reknowned small producers. James Halliday's Wine Companion rates it 5 red stars.
Our modern brands meet consumer needs and have strong shelf presence, making them easier to sell through. Our pricing ensures our customers and our customer's customers can make strong margin returns.
If you are looking for private label supply, we offer clients a diverse range of wines made from our own vineyards. We also have in house packaging design to bring your label ideas to life.
Visit our head office in Adelaide, Australia's Wine Capital or book a video meeting to meet the team. Alternatively, head to Massena Wines in the Barossa Valley where we are developing a luxury cellar door experience.
Pacific Vintners' mission is to improve the environment, help grow university research and bring betterment to all our downstream customers.

Name: Fox Fitzgerald Brands Ltd
Description:
Fox Fitzgerald Brands Ltd was originally established as a whisky broker and trading business in 2010 and has emerged as a brand owner and, as an investor in and sales agent for, some of the most exciting projects in the world.

We also own brands such as Rest and Be Thankful , which will be repackaged and relaunched in 2021, Peat’s Beast, a heavily peated single malt sold in over 30 markets and will launch a range of premium brands in various spirit categories over the coming years. 

With offices in the UK and France and over 100 years of combined experience in the spirits industry, Fox Fitzgerald Brands will continue to be at the forefront of the growth in authentic provenance driven premium spirit brands for many years to come.

Name: Grand Cru Uruguay
Description:
Installed 15 years ago in Uruguay with the aim of bringing to our customers a wide collection of labels from the main wine regions of the old and new world.
We invite you to discover a wide and exquisite line of wines.
Location: Punta del Este, Departamento de Maldonado, Uruguay.

Name: Breakaway Tours Wine & Events
Description:
Breakaway Tours is passionate about wine & hospitality, fanatics about top-shelf customer service and thrive on sharing that with others! Founded in '95 by Jill Tweedie, a Level 1 Sommelier & Level II WSET and longtime local, her commitment to continually reinvent and deliver the finest wine & culinary experiences on the Central Coast is contagious. With over two decades of experience and carefully curated connections, clients enjoy unmatched access & privileges. Venture off the beaten path and beyond the tasting bar...

Bespoke, Private Wine Tours are for any sized group, experience or ambition, three hours or three days! If you’re new to wine, they’ll dispel the myths and intimidation that can follow and teach you the basics; rest assured, no wine snobs here. They are foodies however and their winery picnics are off the hook or maybe you prefer fine dining? Simply ask. 

Drink deeper with an array of in-depth wine experiences: vineyard walk/gator ride, production tour, barrel tasting, blending trial and more. By not running on fixed routes, they welcome the opportunity to hand craft your ideal wine country experience and offer easy on-line booking.  

Specialty Tours/Services: Distillery, Culinary & Farm Tours, Hearst Castle, Castle/Wine Combo Tours, Private Winery Dinners, Harbor Cruises, Wine Blending Trials, Cooking Classes, Olive Oil Tasting, Ziplining (Zip n Sip), Transportation

Large corporate groups are their wheelhouse; bringing understanding of the unique nature and expectations that are inherent to such. Trust your board retreat, client appreciation, team building, sales training or just your tax write off to the leader in the industry. 

Visit their website, view their past corporate clients, take a sigh of relief, pour yourself a glass of wine, and submit your RFP on-line today. Until then ~ Cheers!

Name: B SPIRITS
Description:
Autenticamente brasileira, mas com aroma cosmopolita: essa é a B. A cachaça que tem seus processos fincados nas raízes da tradição, mas que se sofistica a partir de sua experiência pelo mundo.

 

Queríamos transportar o destilado mais antigo do Brasil para o nosso tempo. Rompemos, assim, com os códigos convencionais da indústria para oferecer os sabores do nosso próprio modo de vida: de quem ousa viver em constante experimentação, na busca da sua expressão mais genuína.

 

Os rótulos não nos interessam, por isso os substituímos por um design do futuro, com a simplicidade arrojada que utilizamos para nos reinventar. A cada receita, atualizamos uma nova maneira de se estar no mundo e de se beber cachaça.

 

Produto do fascínio pela espontaneidade e vivacidade do nosso país de origem, a B acredita que só elas podem dar corpo à pura autenticidade. 

Envasamos a nossa para que você também ouse despertar a sua. Cheers.

Name: Azienda Agricola Nicolis
Description:
Dal 1951 ci dedichiamo alla produzione di vini pregiati, intrecciando il nostro percorso personale con la storia e le peculiarità della Valpolicella.

La storia della nostra famiglia è legata da sempre all'arte della viticoltura; viviamo nel cuore della zona classica, a San Pietro in Cariano, e la cura della terra fa parte della nostra quotidianità sin dall'infanzia.

È una sensibilità trasmessa da nostro padre Angelo, che ha trasformato la sua passione in raffinata enologia.

Il nome Nicolis racconta la storia di una famiglia, in cui ciascuno ha una missione che ruota attorno alla terra ed al vino; la cura dei vigneti, accuditi con passione da Giancarlo, la vinificazione raffinata e genuina, garantita da Giuseppe.

Originally known as Pioneer Vineyards, the site was first planted to table grapes in 1927 and today is known as one of the oldest continuously producing vineyards in British Columbia.

Today, several blocks of "old vine plantings" – 1978 Riesling and 1985 Pinot Noir, Pinot Meunier and Chardonnay make up the backbone of our 53 acre vineyard.

Name: Priorat B&D Lab
Description:
Welcome,

We are Priorat B&D Lab. In addition to being a winery and micro-distillery, Priorat B&D Lab is an experimental laboratory, full of projects to be developed in the coming years, linked to the tradition of the lands that surround us but with an eye on current times. Original distillates and drinks, made to measure, recovering old recipes and adapting them to the new moments of consumption. The aim is to professionalize craftsmanship, bringing the past to the present by introducing and improving production methods and improving the treatment, use and selection of raw materials. We elaborate products of author, with soul, alive and innovative, because innovation is our DNA but safeguarding the origins in all the creations made.

Precious Vodka exemplifies the essence of humankind and partners perfectly with friendship and fun, transcending generations, creating precious moments that together, build an unbreakable bond. That’s what is precious to us. 

#WhatIsPreciousToYou

Name: Palm & Vine
Description:
Palm & Vine is a wine blog dedicated to helping wine lovers explore the world of wine while cultivating food and wine memories that will last a lifetime. At Palm & Vine you'll find wine reviews, wine region guides, winery reviews, and original recipes for the perfect food and wine pairings from a certified sommelier. Plus, wine-oriented travel stories for when you're craving a getaway. Food, wine, and travel are my greatest passions in life and if you enjoy them, too, then this blog is for you! 

So what do I know about wine anyway? My passion for wine prompted me to dive headfirst into the wine industry from a career in marketing and public relations. Since making the best decision of my life, I have worked in sales at one of the top 10 Paso Robles wineries and worked two vintages as a cellar hand experiencing the winemaking process firsthand. First, at that same winery in Paso Robles followed by a vintage in South Australia in 2020. I also obtained my WSET 2 with distinction, so I officially know a thing or two about wine. Now I'm dreaming up even bigger plans! Stay tuned on the blog to see what I'm up to next.

Description:
Barafaka family operates in the space of vineyard since 1920 in the area of Nemea ,where because of the history of our region and especially our family , our grandparents were growing vineyards.From the early age, we were dealing with the vineyards, there was the place that we were playing, there we grew up.These vineyards grew up our parents, us and our children.These vineyards gave us the right to create targets in our lives and make dreams.

Estate Barafaka is a creature of Christos Barafakas.On 2002, in the modern winery, begins the first vinification of 80 acres of the family’s vineyards in Nemea, which is one of the biggest wine growing-region of Greece with ambassador the Agiorgitiko and international varieties of grapes.

Estate Barafaka produces 150.000 bottles per year, from which the labels are the following:Ampeloy Idea Nemea red, Ampeloy Idea White and Ampeloy Idea Roze.Also the label Nemea P.O.P, An aged wine, ‘Fessi’ from the varieties Agiorgitiko-Cabernet Sauvignon an aged wine, too.’Xilia Xronia’, is the name of the white wine from the variety Chardonnay, an aged wine for 3 months in barrels and at the end ‘Fylaxto’ a sweet wine from the variety Asirtiko. All of the Barafaka’s wines have participated in competitions and have won gold and silver awards in some very popular and international wines.

Name: Cantine dei Marchesi Incisa della Rocchetta
Description:
The Marchesi Incisa della Rocchetta is one of the oldest and most respected winemaking families of Italy with its historical estate in Piedmont. 

The history of the Monferrato area in Piedmont and that of Marchesi Incisa della Rocchetta, a family whose origins date back to before the eleventh century, are very intricately linked. For centuries, the Incisa family has owned vineyards and produced its own wine, an activity most likely started by the Benedictine monks, who were given in the Medieval times the right to plant vines in the hills of the family estate in Rocchetta Tanaro. You can still see traces of the presence of monks in the Sant’Emiliano votive chapel, which stands in one of the estate’s vineyard still owned by the family after so many centuries.

In the nineteenth century, the Marchese Leopoldo Incisa (1792-1871), a member of the Royal Academy of Agriculture in Turin, made significant contributions to research and knowledge in the fields of enology and grape varieties of that period.

The legendary Sassicaia was created by another member of the family, Mario Incisa della Rocchetta, a true visionary. He married the Countess Clarice della Gherardesca and moved from Piemonte to Bolgheri in Tuscany. With the winemaking heritage of his family in Piedmont and truly innovative ideas, Mario created a new style of wine - Sassicaia- the first "Super Tuscan" red wine produced by Tenuta San Guido that, to this day, remains the benchmark for its category. 

Since then, the Marchesi Incisa family produces wines within two separately owned estates: the historical family estate in Rocchetta Tanaro in Piedmont and the estate in Bolgheri in Tuscany.

Cantine dei Marchesi Incisa della Rocchetta is the estate in Piedmont. 

The company vision is to share a greater cultural perspective of Piedmont through terroir-driven wines and to produce top quality wines achieving balance, harmony and complexity that can only come from experience, dedication and passion.

Name: Hawkins Distillery
Description: We are a family-run distillery based in Sheffield. Harnessing the city's heritage in making world-beating products we are focused on making the absolute best Gin's we can. Our distiller handcrafts each batch of Gin with the utmost care and attention to detail to every stage of the process. We hope you enjoy drinking our spirits as much as we enjoy making them.

Description:
TERRA to winnica ulokowana w malowniczej, świętokrzyskiej, dolinie rzeki Opatówki, pomiędzy Opatowem a Sandomierzem. 2,5h drogi od Warszawy czy Krakowa.
Winnica jest całkowicie otwarta dla gości. Możecie spacerować po niej z kieliszkiem wina w reku cały dzień. Czeka na Was nie tylko degustacja naszych win ale również kameralny PIKNIK na winnicy dla dwojga, KOLACJA dla przyjaciół, czy wino o ZACHODZIE SŁOŃCA - kameralna degustacja z widokiem na Góry Świętokrzyskie.

Name: West Sonoma Coast Vintners
Description:
The West Sonoma Coast Vintners is an association of wineries and growers who are passionate about farming along the mountainous coastline of western Sonoma County. Our members create wines that evoke the complexity of the region — wines expressive of our unique community.

Our Mission
The West Sonoma Coast Vintners is an association of wineries and growers who are passionate about farming along the mountainous coastline of western Sonoma County. Our members create wines that evoke the complexity of the region — wines expressive of our unique community.

Our Region
The West Sonoma Coast, part of Sonoma County, has distinguished itself as one of the world’s leading regions for top quality Pinot Noir and Chardonnay. It contains many distinct growing areas including Annapolis, Fort Ross/Seaview, Occidental, Freestone, Green Valley and the Sebastopol Hills.

Our association of wineries and growers is dedicated to preserving and protecting the history, landscape and culture of the West Sonoma Coast, and to promoting its wines to the media, trade and public.

The West Sonoma Coast Vintners also seeks to facilitate collaboration among members in the region, and to provide a forum for its members to discuss issues important to them. At our core, we are a community of farmers.

This is our home, not just our livelihood, and we are proud of it.

Description:
We are a leading company in Spain in the production of balsamic, gourmet, and organic vinegars, of the highest quality and exclusive flavor.

With more than 25 years of experience, we are committed to offering the customer a unique and unrepeatable reference vinegar, which is achieved thanks to a perfect balance between artisan vinegar and innovative facilities.

Our product range is characterized by a wide variety of flavors that give dishes an elegant and exceptional touch thanks to the Yuca's, Darro, Vegallana, and Leia brands.

Name: Bacana Sangria
Description: Handcrafted sangria, made in Portugal. We are proud of our heritage and have always maintained a tradition of excellence. You could even say we are very ‘hands on’ from vine to bottle. The finest grape varietals from local farms are carefully hand harvested. The wine is then handcrafted in small batches and blended with the perfect balance of fruit to be refreshing, smooth and slightly frizzante. Serve chilled!

Name: Crown Range Cellar
Description:
We are a kind of non-traditional wine producer that strives to break the mould and embrace the philosophy that it is not only possible, but desirable, to create exceptional, premium wines (and foods) unfettered by the limitations of land ownership.

Over lunch in a local central Otago Japanese restaurant, we took inspiration from the outside view of the South Island’s Crown Range. Being our spiritual home we decided this is where our adventure would begin. Crown Range Cellar was born off a scribble on a napkin. Fitting, because the area surrounding the Crown Range was the primary source of our much loved produce.

We wondered, could the envelope be pushed? Could great wine be made outside the confines of the norm? Questions among many that we would answer as Crown Range Cellar developed. On our side, we had youthful enthusiasm and wise industry experience. To answer our questions we aligned our vision and techniques. We would push boundaries and freely experiment with different styles of winemaking. We would ensure our produce was characterised by the carefully chosen land and fruit parcels. To this day our vision is our bearing and we stay true to our philosophy.

Exciting possibilities beckoned and today we are unobstructed by any one location, free to create exceptional produce. We pair ideal land and conditions with committed artisans to create magic. We believe that no one really owns land; we are merely just looking after it for future generations. As such, our Crown Range Cellar family is made up of in-house masters focused solely on their area of expertise.

Name: Crianza Beverage Group AS
Description:
Crianza Beverage Group AS is an Norwegian alcoholic-beverage company founded in 2009 by Johan Manon Ceron. Crianza is proud to represent some of the finest family-owned wine estates to the Norwegian market. 

Crianza Invest is based in Asker Norway. 

Companies:

Crianza AS
Salud AS
Cerveza AS

Name: LDV Winery
Description:
LDV Winery is a family-owned & operated vineyard and winery in the foothills of the Chiricahua Mountains in Southeastern Arizona. Our main retail & tasting room location is in Old Town Scottsdale. However, tours & tasting can happen at the vineyard by appointment.

Our focus is on Rhone-varietal grapes (Viognier, Grenache, Syrah, & Petite Sirah) & single-variety wines that are an authentic expression of our vineyard. The unique vineyard characteristics include volcanic soils & high altitude (5,000 feet) mountain terroir. LDV Winery believes great wine is the result of smart farming & very little manipulation in the winemaking process. Our wines are vegan, gluten free, zero-residual sugar, & produced with below the national average of sulfites (preservative). Our wine's are additive-free. Our operation is committed to sustainability including energy & soil conservation, recycling, and practical organic farming practices.

"LDV Winery treats every vintage like the once in a lifetime event that it is. Our wines are an expression of the grapes grown in our vineyard each year," says Curt Dunham, LDV Winemaker.

The LDV vision is to be in the top echelon of fine wine grape growers & producers with a reputation for crafting highly-acclaimed wines of great value. Our company philosophy focuses on relationship building with our employees, suppliers, & customers. We cherish our long-time customers that have become part of the LDV family & welcome new wine enthusiasts by creating an environment where people become vested in the winery's success.

Name: Bossa Brazilian Gin

Name: The Wine Rascals
Description:
Hi,

We’re the Wine Rascals.

As you may have deduced from our not-so-subtle branding, we’re about supporting families, not factories. Over the past few years our Motley crew of rascals have scoured all corners of the map for a selection of wines that, with 20 years of experience under the Champagne Warehouse banner, we know is exceptional.

Don’t let those 20 years of experience fool you though; we’ve still not lost our youthful spirit in the wine game, and we’re as flexible as ever! For that reason, we make it our mission to keep up with the ever-changing tastes and values of the modern market, and to make sure that we always have something for both them... and you!
The Rascal Charter simply states that we source these wines to be enjoyed by all, to exhilarate, not intimidate the sippers of the UK.

This means that (brace yourself for the buzzwords!) we proudly represent numerous organic and sustainably-minded vineyards within our extended family, who, in turn, offer vegan, low Sulphur and low sugar wines.

Name: Wine Aromas - Le Nez du Vin
Description:
Wine Aromas is the exclusive United States distributor of Le Nez du Vin, the internationally recognized reference for wine and spirits sensory education. The organization provides structured sensory tools and educational programs used by professionals, institutions, and serious students to develop olfactory accuracy, consistency, and descriptive precision.

Built around rigorous methodology rather than casual tasting, Wine Aromas supports education across wine, spirits, and coffee through standardized aroma kits, curricula, and training resources. These tools are designed to translate sensory perception into repeatable, professional competence.

Wine Aromas operates at the intersection of education, industry, and practice, serving wineries, distilleries, educators, certification bodies, and corporate training programs throughout the United States. Programs are deployed in academic settings, professional certification, and internal training environments where sensory literacy and consistency are critical.

The company’s role is not to promote products, but to establish a shared sensory language and reference framework that supports evaluation, quality control, and professional development across the beverage industry.

An ambition to enhance the cadence of those moments by creating Gooseneck Vineyards was a natural evolution. 
They left behind their corporate way of life to produce their own version of the American Dream. Built on the foundation of authenticity, quality, and passion, they seek out the best grape growing regions in the world to bring their favorite varietals into your glass. This is always done with grace and style, wrapped in the fabric of our New England culture, and is guaranteed to enhance life’s every day moments.
Working hard to make it look easy, they continually seek out ways to deliver wines that over-deliver, yet are always true to the grape variety. Touched by terroir and endowed by history, they are proud to put their wines on your table tops and into your wine glass.

The brilliant, or shiny, aspect of these stones as they are warmed by the sun is also the source of inspiration from which the name of Chateau Brillette is derived. Estate of 45 ha of vines in one piece.

Name: Domaine des closiers
Description:
The Domaine des Closiers is located in Parnay, in the heart of the Saumur Champigny appellation.
The closiers were the winemakers who worked in the vineyards and who lived in the cave dwellings at the foot of the hill.
The estate covers 24 hectares on clay-limestone soil. The vines are 35 years old in middle age.
About 95% of the vineyard is planted in Cabernet Franc to produce rich and fine wines in AOC Saumur Champigny. We also have a few plots of Chenin which are used to produce the AOC Saumur (white wine).

To understand the typicity of our wines, you have to climb to the top of a limestone cliff overlooking the Loire. Placed on the hillside, the plots of the estate express all the richness and nobility of the terroir of Saumur Champigny.

Our plots are among the most beautiful in the appellation. They are mainly grouped in the commune of Parnay and located on the hillside.

Name: Azienda Agricola Coppacchioli Tattini
Description:
La famiglia Coppacchioli, originaria dell'Abruzzo, si trasferì a Cupi alla fine del 1700 in seguito al trasferimento di un parente prelato, originariamente priore di Norcia.

Qualche generazione dopo, Lucio Achille, primogenito dell'attuale famiglia Coppacchioli ha avuto l'idea di riscoprire i vitigni autoctoni locali ancora esistenti (varietà Vissanello) e incolti da un secolo. Nel 2016 papà Angelo e l'ultima nata Ginevra (oggi 27 anni) hanno deciso di dar vita al progetto con la partecipazione entusiasta e il sostegno di mamma Manuela e la sorella Gaia. Nel 2014 ha avuto luogo la prima vendemmia, vinificando i tre tipi di vitigni: Chardonnay, Pinot Nero, Vissanello.

Cupi di Visso è sempre stato il nostro posto nel mondo.

Name: Dom Wina Polskiego
Description:
Nic nie dzieje się z przypadku…
Tak również stało się tym razem, kiedy podczas pobytu w restauracji zaproponowano nam wino z jednej z Podkarpackich winnic. Było to piękne i owocowe wino ze szczepu Solaris, które idealnie schłodzone dotknęło duszy i zmieniło ją na zawsze. Zaraz po powrocie wiedząc jaka to winnica i jakie wino rozpoczęliśmy poszukiwania sklepu, miejsca gdzie możemy szybko i sprawnie dokonać zakupu. W żadnym sklepie jednak nie udało nam się znaleźć tego wina. Aby dokonać zakupu wybraliśmy się więc bezpośrednio do winnicy.
Tam okazało się, że wina z tego gatunku i rocznika już nie ma. Skończyło się. My jednak z odmienioną dusza rozpoczęliśmy wędrówkę po winnicach Podkarpacia w poszukiwaniu tego ideału, którego zasmakowaliśmy po raz pierwszy. Wino to stało się dla nas świętym gralem i nasza podróż trwa dalej.
 Aby podzielić się naszymi doświadczeniami i umożliwić Państwu skosztowania tych wyjątkowych i unikatowych win, postanowiliśmy połączyć pasję z przedsiębiorczością i tak powstał Dom Wina Polskiego.

 Dom to miejsce, do którego chcemy wracać, Dom to miejsce które daje nam szczęście i odpoczynek od codzienności.
 
Zapraszamy do zapoznania się z oferta naszego sklepu i zasmakowania Podkarpackich win. Spieszcie się, ponieważ wina w naszej ofercie są unikatowe, często są to krótkie i niewielkie zbiory. Czasem jest to 1000 butelek, czasem 500, a czasem tylko 100. Dołączcie do naszej podróży i cieszcie się winem bo „Wino nie tylko się pija. wino się wącha, obserwuje, podziwia, smakuje, sączy, delektuje i o winie się mówi.” Król Edward VII

Zapraszamy do współpracy restauracje, hotele, sklepy które chciałby nie tylko zaproponować swoim klientom unikatowy smak wina, ale również podkreślić swój regionalny charakter.

Name: Purple Hands Wines
Description:
Who is Purple Hands?
When two good mates get together, one the Chief Winemaker with a major winery, the other with a passion for wine –  the inevitable had to happen and Purple Hands Wines was created.
Craig Stansborough and Mark Slade started Purple Hands in 2006 from humble beginnings. Just over a tonne of hand picked Shiraz was crushed and barrel fermented in Craig’s shed making around 100 dozen. Then came the hard part – finding a name for their new wine brand.

Why the name Purple Hands?
Anyone who has made red wine will know what a pair of purple stained hands looks like!
A red winemakers’ hands become stained purple during vintage due to the constant contact with grape skins and the juice. And of  course when winemakers are busy, they wipe their hands on their shirt.
That was the inspiration behind Purple Hands Wines.
We experimented with some white t-shirts, some red wine and some fun in the garden. The rest was left to the label designer to translate our concept to the label.

What is the Purple Hands mission?
Our mission is to produce fruit driven wines with elegance and texture that reflect the vineyards from which they are sourced.
The aim is to make balanced wines so they can be consumed as young wines, but will also become interesting and enjoyable older wines.
That means you can enjoy them now, but we are confident our wines have the potential to cellar if you have the patience. Our first vintage was in 2006 where we started with our Barossa Valley Shiraz. We now have a range of wines that showcase different varieties and vineyards from the Barossa Valley and an Adelaide Hills Pinot Gris.

Name: Ginskolen Værløse
Description:
Drømmer du om at destillere din helt egen gin med dine foretrukne smagsnoter? Så har du muligheden på en workshop hos os. Du bliver guidet gennem hele processen - lige fra sammensætning af botanicals til destillering og måling af alkoholprocent. Og du går fra workshoppen med din helt egen flaske GIN (70 cl).

Har du lyst til blot at smage gin og eksperimentere med varianter af tonic, så er du meget velkommen til en ginsmagning - hjemme hos dig, hos jer i virksomheden eller hos os i Værløse. Her introduceres du til gins oprindelse og fremstillingsproces, og vi går i dybden med de gin-typer, som er på menuen.

Description:
Welcome to Shady Lane Cellars, an exquisite boutique winery nestled on the picturesque Leelanau Peninsula in Northern Michigan. Our estate winery is dedicated to crafting exceptional wines that embody the unique terroir of this breathtaking region. From the moment you step onto our serene property, you'll be captivated by the beauty of our vineyards and the passion we pour into every bottle.

As you explore the Leelanau Peninsula, a region renowned for its natural beauty and wine-growing heritage, we invite you to experience the magic of Shady Lane Cellars. Name: Mad Rose Group
Description:
The Mad Rose Group was borne from Neal Rosenthal’s passion for terroir – all its elements and expressions – and his unyielding desire to connect those who are curious to places and people around the world. 

Each of the five organizations that comprise the group tells the story of place with a unique voice and through singular platforms:

Rosenthal Wine Merchant – for more than 40 years, an importer of wines from the most acclaimed small, family-owned domains of Italy, France, and Switzerland.

Mad Rose Journeys - a collection of curated journeys that transport travelers to the source of the finest, and often least-explored, wine, food, and cultural sites of France, Italy and Switzerland 

Mad Rose Specialty Foods – offering a range of artisanal culinary products from France and Italy that transform the dining experience and stimulate the palate and imagination

RWM Selections – a series of wine clubs and special offerings available to private clients that provide insight into terroir and access to the entire RWM portfolio of wines 

La Closerie les Capucines - a 17th century maison d’hôte in the heart of the Jura region of France designed for an intimate travel experience

The Mad Rose Foundation – supports education, the artisan, the environment, individual expression

Underlying the work of each of these entities is the support for and belief in the power of the artisan, the entrepreneur, the small family enterprise and, above all, respect for the natural world.

Name: Intersection Estate Winery
Description:
Intersection Estate Winery is founded on a 10-acre vineyard planted at high density on Oliver’s Golden Mile.  Since the winery’s creation in 2009, the name Intersection has referred not just to the geography of the vineyard - poised at a critical junction between the Golden Mile, Oliver, and Black Sage growing regions - but also to the philosophical intersections of lifestyle, of cellar and field, and of the art and science of crafting exquisite wines.
Focusing on terroir-driven wines that are true to the soil of Oliver’s historic Golden Mile, the team at Intersection takes pride in crafting small-lot wines with enormous character. The vineyard is cultivated with natural, sustainable, and organic farming techniques, and grapevine varieties are matched to the varying slope, aspect, and soil composition to allow even ripening and honest expression of fruit flavours and aromas. Also dedicated to the betterment of wine knowledge and education for all visitors to the valley, Intersection is host to the valley's first public wine tasting school: the Vinstitute.
So whether you come to enjoy a cross-section of Merlots from different soil types, to experience a blind-tasting class, or just to chat with the “most educational staff in the valley,” you’ll be glad you crossed Intersection’s path.

Name: Royal Park Fine Wine & Liquor Agency
Speight's Gin
Description:
Artisan, small-batch gin
Pioneered using a traditional copper still.
Made in Yorkshire using the finest locally-sourced ingredients. 

Using only the finest medical grade botanicals makes our gin stand out from the crowd. After rigorously experimenting for eighteen months; with many different botanical combinations – Speight’s Signature Gin was born.

After the success of the Signature Gin, we turned our attention to the fruit gins. We had so many requests for rhubarb gin, so our Head Distiller Danny got to work.

Bilberry and Huckleberry were the next flavours to follow – quite similar in taste – although a different berry. A bilberry is a European blueberry and a Huckleberry is a wild North-American blueberry. The Bilberry has a sweeter taste whereas the Huckleberry has a shaper taste on the palate.

Each gin has its own unique recipe therefore the botanicals are different for every flavour. 

For our fruit gins we combine the freshest locally sourced produce with our botanicals- this is why our fruit gins are bursting with flavour.

Our Rhubarb Gin was ‘Highly Commended’ at the Gin Guide Awards 2020, whilst our Signature Gin won ‘Best Distilled Gin’ out of thirty countries

Name: Global Vin
Description:
Virksomheden blev i 2011 grundlagt med henblik på at samle alle de bedste vine i Verden et sted, så man ikke behøver at skulle henvende sig flere steder og med et bredt sortiment på vin er det lykkedes os
at imødekomme de flestes ønsker.

Sortimentet her på siden er kun et lille udsnit af hvad vi kan levere.

Vi arrangere vinsmagninger til firmaer og private, og er leveringsdygtige i logo tryk på flasker samt gaveæsker.

Vores primære målgruppe er Erhvev og Restauranter, men alle er selvfølgelig velkommen til at kontakte os.

Vi har til huse i Helsingør, men har konsulenter kørende i hele landet og er derfor selvfølgelig leveringsdygtige hvor som helst.

Name: Château Grand Secret & Petit Secret
Description:
FRANCAIS :

Château Grand Secret est l’expression d’un savoir-faire et d’un terroir d’exception, à la manière des plus grands crus de Bordeaux. Ce vin "haute couture", tout en finesse et en élégance, invite au rêve et au mystère. Château Grand Secret est un vin qui éveille nos sens.

Petit frère du Château Grand Secret, Petit Secret se dévoile en rouge, blanc, rosé et effervescent. Comme un petit frère, il est insouciant, il croque la vie sans attendre. Petit Secret est un vin gourmand, une ode à la joie et au plaisir.

Jean LISSAGUE est un enfant du vignoble bordelais. Il a fait ses premières armes dans le négoce de vin avant de diriger pendant 8 ans l’appellation Blaye Côtes de Bordeaux. Un homme d’audace et épicurien exigeant qui incarne la nouvelle génération des vins de Bordeaux.


ENGLISH :

Château Grand Secret is the expression of a know-how and of an exceptional terroir, in the style of the greatest Bordeaux wines. This "haute couture" wine, with its finesse and elegance, invites you to dream and mystery. Château Grand Secret is a wine that awakens our senses.

Little brother of the Château Grand Secret, Petit Secret is revealed in red, white, rosé and sparkling. Like a little brother, it is carefree, he tastes life without waiting. Petit Secret is a gourmet wine, an ode to joy and pleasure.

Jean LISSAGUE is a child of the Bordeaux vineyards. He made his debut in wine trading before managing for 8 years the Blaye Côtes de Bordeaux appellation. A man of daring and demanding epicurean who embodies the new generation of Bordeaux wines.
Location: Saint André de Cubzac, Nouvelle Aquitaine

Name: Direct Wine Cellars
Description:
Have you ever travelled across the globe and been fascinated by the different sights, sounds, smells, tastes and culture? 

If you haven't, let us tell you, it's a must do! After spending so much time travelling, falling in love with other cultures and cuisines and dancing the night away with beautiful bottles of wine that complemented the culture so perfectly, we just wanted to bring these experiences home to Australia with us. 

That is why we started Direct Wine Cellars, a wine importing company focused on giving Australian consumers a taste of different cultures from around the world. 

First, it was Italy, then France and specifically, Champagne, then South African and South American and it continues to grow! Why buy from a store when you can buy at wholesale prices online with us? 

So get your favourite people together, organise an international dinner party and settle in for a night of fun with the perfect bottle of wine to match it with. Need assistance? Let us know and we will be happy to help! 

Yours in Vino

Angelica and Scott

Description:
THE FARM is a 10-acre vineyard in Niagara’s Twenty Mile Bench, planted to Pinot Noir.  The Neudorf vineyard was originally planted with Pinot Noir in 2000 for Le Clos Jordanne and aptly named “La Petite Colline”, meaning “little hill”, a nod to the gentle slopes that permeate the plot. The project was led by renowned winemaker, Thomas Bachelder, now a close friend of the Neudorf family.  The vineyard was farmed organically from the get-go, a decision that remains a pillar of the Neudorf approach.

The property is rooted in traditions of gathering family & friends, and where Peter and Dora Neudorf call home.

The cellar door opens once a year for guests to taste new releases, and enjoy live music and local food.

Name: Vignobles Vellas Océan Indien
Description:
Depuis sa création en 2016, VVOI s'engage à distribuer ses produits avec une attention particulière aux trois facteurs clés du respect du vin :

Transport Maritime : Containers réfrigérés à 18 degrés pour éviter les chocs thermiques.
Containers Complets : Pour éviter les ruptures de charge et les températures élevées.
Stockage et Livraison : Régulation stricte des températures à 18 degrés.

Nous développons notre clientèle Café Hôtel Restaurant avec une approche de partenariat, proposant des produits atypiques et classiques, tout en offrant des solutions à forte valeur ajoutée.

VVOI est le distributeur officiel de CORAVIN dans la zone Océan Indien. La technologie Coravin permet une conservation optimale des vins pendant des semaines, des mois, voire des années, offrant ainsi aux professionnels et amateurs la possibilité d'explorer et de savourer n'importe quel vin, à tout moment et en toute quantité.

Le Domaine du Mas du Pont, situé près du Pic Saint-Loup et qui s'étend sur 160 hectares de vignes, bois et pâturages est le centre logistique principal pour nos productions. Ce domaine est un lieu de culture et de traditions autour de la vigne, du vin, de la gastronomie et des taureaux.

Nos vignobles, couvrant 570 hectares entre le Sud-Ouest, le Languedoc, le Rhône et la Provence, comprennent 14 propriétés en propre représentant plus de 320 hectares :

Domaine Mas du Pont
Domaine Valinière
Domaine Laurens
Mas de Louis

Château Furiosa
Château Grand Blaquière

Mas de Mussen

En outre, nos vignobles en contrat de fermage couvrent 250 hectares additionnels.

Nous nous efforçons de maintenir des standards élevés de qualité et d'innovation pour satisfaire nos clients et partenaires à travers le monde.

Name: Sociedade Agricola João Teodósio Matos Barbosa & Filhos
Description:
Desde pequeno que João Teodósio Matos Barbosa passeava com o seu avô, fundador da empresa Caves Dom Teodósio, observava as vinhas e o trabalho que lá se desenvolvia. É desta vivência que nasce a sua paixão pelo vinho e vontade de pertencer ao projeto familiar. Aprendeu e desenvolveu conhecimentos nas Caves Dom Teodósio, onde acabou por crescer com a empresa, caso de sucesso Português e marca referência no panorama vitivinícola nacional.
Em 1997, decidiu fundar a sua própria empresa familiar com produção a partir de uvas exclusivamente próprias, em produção integrada e biológica – vinhos de autor onde o João pode expressar-se e deixar os terroirs das duas regiões escolhidas também se expressarem.
Cada uma das duas regiões, Tejo e Alto Alentejo, têm as suas adegas e respetivas marcas: Ninfa no Tejo (Adega Porta de Teira em Rio Maior) e Lapa dos Gaivões no Alto Alentejo (Adega Valle de Junco em Esperança, Portalegre).  Nessas duas propriedades fazem-se vinhos de autor, autênticos e únicos. Qualidades reforçadas pelo facto do enchimento de cada colheita ser realizado de uma só vez.
