Name: Australian Wine Partners
Description:
DISCOVER AUSTRALIAN WINE
Located amongst the picturesque South Australian wine country, Australian Wine Partners create lasting partnerships with premium local wine producers to conceive unique and exclusive brands for the global stage. With almost 20 years of international wine industry experience, our expertise covers the sourcing, development and distribution of Australian wine brands for the Asia Pacific, American and European markets. With clever marketing and distribution strategies we take Australian wine brands from local hero to internationally renowned.

OUR COMPANY
Australian wine has long been sought after in the diverse global wine market and continues to present significant growth opportunities for many countries. We have spent many years immersing ourselves in, and from time to time living in emerging international wine markets, representing estate and artisan producers on the world’s stage. At Australian Wine Partners, we set out to curate a genuine and exclusive wine offering for international markets, complementing Australia’s world leading regional and artisan wines.

Sourcing & Exporting
AUSTRALIAN WINE BRANDS
We partner with Australian wineries and vineyards to provide proprietary, exclusive and regional brand and winery supply solutions, from wine sourcing to packaging development, bottling, export approvals, shipping and market entry.

Creating Wine Brands
AUSTRALIAN WINES FOR INTERNATIONAL MARKETS
We are committed to the development of importers’ exclusive wine brands, producing complete ranges from Australia’s premium wine regions, to import under our customers’ own brand and wine specifications.

Marketing & Distribution 
OF AUSTRALIAN WINE INTERNATIONALLY 
Our extensive wine industry expertise and international experience provides a leading and proven marketing and distribution network to successfully establish and grow new and established wine brands across the Asia Pacific, American and European markets.

Name: Nakal Gin
Description:
Nakal is a super premium craft gin for the connoisseur who appreciates their palate being taken on a complex journey of intriguing flavors and sensations. Nakal’s ambition is to disrupt the conventional while reflecting the excellence of its distinctive origins.

Nakal Gin is distilled and bottled in Switzerland using authentic Southeast Asian botanicals such as pandan leaves, calamansi limes and cassia. Unlike any other gin Nakal is created by distilling three unique spirits that are each cut tight from the hearts, unfiltered and then blended at 46% ABV to achieve an intensely smooth and aromatic gin.

Nakal was initially launched June 2019 in Geneva, Switzerland with a focus on high end cocktail bars and is available on www.nakalgin.com. EU and Swiss distributors are welcome to contact us for commercial opportunities.

Name: Orpheus Wines
Description:
Orpheus Wines is a young family-owned Santa Rosa winery offering sustainably built, artfully crafted wines that celebrate life and community.  Inspired by the Greek demigod Orpheus, arbiter of music and poetry, Orpheus Wines was created in 2011 out of the blending of passions and talents of a Winemaker, an Artist, and a Visioneer.
Winemaker Marc Krafft brings a multitude of skills and talents to his winemaking process, drawing on years of experience in the wine industry as well as his previous career in the medical field and passions for dance, music, and the culinary arts.  The result is a set of premium, food-friendly wines that delight the senses.
Our business was founded upon three guiding principles:

Artistry ~ Winemaker Marc Krafft listens for, and honors, the melody inherent in each varietal–getting out of the way of the grapes so they can express their fruit.  Art director and acclaimed wire sculptor Steve Lohman has designed exquisite labels that capture the beauty and richness of our wines. If you enjoy the artwork on our bottles, you’ll love wearing it on our 100% cotton T-shirts and sweatshirts

Community ~ by collaborating with organic farmers, joining the chamber of commerce, and serving our wine at local coffee shops and restaurants, we are building Orpheus Wines into a business that brings people together and supports local small business and nonprofits

Sustainability ~ we intend to lead in this realm with innovations in green winery practices, including reusable and recyclable Zork bottle closures and wine in kegs

Name: Azienda Agricola Giorgio Pantano
Description:
Azienda Agricola Giorgio Pantano is a family-owned company in northeast Italy. Our company produces many different varieties of grapes, including Prosecco DOC, Chardonnay, and Pinot Grigio. However, grapes are not only our main interest. We are also developing a new way of growing grapes in the era of automation with this simple idea in mind.

MAKE VINE GROWING SAFER AND MORE ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY

Our company was founded in 1882 by Pietro Pantano in Candiana, Italy. Since then, we have focused on both cultivating grapes and developing innovations in vine growing. Our vineyard was the first in our region to implement the use of machines for maintaining the fields, and the first to grow Prosecco grapes.
The idea of building a robot came to Giorgio ten years ago to improve the lives and safety of the employees who tended the fields. With more than twenty years of experience in computer programming, including experience at IBM and three software design companies, Giorgio designed Rovitis to bring together his two life passions: wine and technological innovation. We have used Rovitis to spray and dust our fields since 2008.

Description: SOMM SUMMIT is an educational symposium designed for wine & spirits enthusiasts, sommeliers, wine sales and hospitality professionals with an emphasis on international wine, craft beer, artisanal spirits, enology and viticulture.  This three-day conference features educational seminars, wine-beer-spirits tastings and discussions led by prominent master sommeliers, masters of wine, and professors of enology and viticulture, brewers and distillers.

Name: HILE Water Ltd
Description:
Hile Water Oy is a new and unique water supply company with the task of ensuring the ecological use of water resources in the Saariselkä region of Finland. In order for this important task to be successfully carried out, we will build the world's first spring water packaging facility based on respect for environmental values, and it will be located in the Saariselkä organic collection area in Finnish Lapland. The facility will produce untreated, uniquely clean spring water for both the domestic and international markets. We will be investing heavily in the development of water brands and in increasing the company's brand capital. 

We are a responsible and reliable company for which water is not just a chemical compound among others but a resource that gives vitality to all living things. The company is a participant in the Finnish Food Export Programme bearing the name Food From Finland.
When a customer buys Hile Water, he or she knows exactly what the water contains and how it was produced. At the same time, the customer contributes to supporting ethically sustainable production and biodiversity conservation.

For further information, please visit our website at www.hilewater.com

Brothers Drake Meadery has been redefining what mead can be since 2007. We craft premium honey wines from raw Ohio honey, local fruit, and select spices—continuing to set the standard for American mead innovation.

Name: Gouffier
Description:
Fondé au milieu du XIXe siècle par Charles de Saint-Rapt, le domaine Gouffier est situé à Fontaines, village d’eau en pays de vin jouxtant Mercurey et Rully. Dans les années 1950, Madeleine Gouffier étend le domaine sur Mercurey. Son fils Jérôme Gouffier, ingénieur naval de formation, hérite de la propriété en 1993 et développe la vente en bouteilles.

Voisin de la famille Gouffier, Frédéric Gueugneau écrit depuis 2012 une nouvelle page de ce domaine  historique en Côte Chalonnaise, en y associant une activité de négoce de vigneron.

Gouffier vinifie aujourd’hui une mosaïque de 22 cuvées représentant toute la diversité des terroirs de la Côte Chalonnaise : Bouzeron, Rully, Mercurey, Givry et Montagny.

Name: Trois Moineaux
Description:
Passion, innovation et authenticité

L’aventure des Trois Moineaux a débuté dans un garage de Lasalle à l’automne 2015. À ce moment,  Louis était loin de se douter que son rêve de faire du vin à partir de fruits du Niagara à la maison se matérialiserait aussi rapidement. Trois ans plus tard, c’est lors d’un souper avec ses deux amis rencontrés lors d’un cours en sommellerie à l’ITHQ en 2012, que Louis a réussi à convaincre Jean-Sébastien et Francis de se joindre à cette belle aventure. Pour nous, le vin est rassembleur et il est synonyme de partage et de convivialité !

Notre logo est inspiré du dicton l’union fait la force. En effet, trois moineaux ensemble sont plus forts qu’un seul à l’image du conte, les musiciens de Brens.

Nos vins sont disponibles en importation privée au Québec depuis novembre 2019.

Name: Amphorium, LLC

Amphorium is a creative wine & spirits management company. Our goal is to effectively convey a brand's image by helping them navigate toward the intended destination in both the on-premise and off-premise marketplace. 

Our aim is to represent producers who create premium wines & spirits, with unique, terroir driven and handcrafted philosophies. We believe that a well crafted product is the key element to a successful result.

With 25+ years of combined experience in our established importer, distributor and logistics network, we have the ability and strategies to place a product within elite distribution outlets to facilitate the successful integration and long-term market position of our brands.

Our practical, technical and creative entrepreneurship provides our brands with the highest level of commitment to reach its optimum market potential.

We personally ensure that every account we work with is supported with our current marketing, sales and technical materials. Ultimately, this translates to the brand's market longevity, success and sales performance from the ground up.

Amphorium flourishes on lasting commitments. We believe that the only way to achieve this is to listen to what every brand wishes to communicate and what it desires to become in the eyes of its customer.

Name: Enchanted Mountain Spirits, Inc
Description:
Enchanted Mountain Spirits, a small farm distillery located in Jamestown, NY,  a passion for high quality spirits, and hope to share that passion with you by producing spirits of unrivaled quality.  
Enchanted Mountain Spirits will produce Knockboy Vodka and Knockboy Poteen (said puh –cheen or poh -teen).  Our spirits are based on the O’Neill family recipe, which is over two centuries old. Each batch is crafted in custom made traditional copper pot stills using only the middle of the run. 
What makes us different is our recipe and how we maintain the tradition of O'Neill style distilling. We use local organic late harvest potatoes to produce a more favorable spirit. Together with locally sourced molasses and honey lets everyone sample the flora our part of New York.
We at Enchanted Mountain Spirits believe everyone can be family. The Enchanted Mountain Spirits family works tirelessly to ensure we deliver spirits that our ancestors would be proud to share with your family. 
We warmly invite you to become part of our family,  join us on the mountain, and 
"Let Your Irish Out!"

Each fruit is manually selected, cut and checked before continuing its transformation into juice and then cider. 

What is the advantage of transforming an apple into cider? The capacity of longevity and conservation of the raw materials.

Группа Dénovie - один из лидеров в индустрии виноделия Республики Молдова, а также один из самых значительных экспортеров вин и дистиллятов. Дистрибьюторская сеть охватывает четыре континента. Молдавское вино, произведенное Dénovie Group представлено на таких важных рынках, как Германия, Швейцария, Польша, Чехия, Словакия, Беларусь, Украина, Китай, Япония, Южная Корея, США и Нигерия.

Dénovie Group владеет лучшими виноградными плантациями (около 350 га) в Республике Молдова, располагает ультрасовременными технологиями в производстве элитных вин, а их выдающиеся качества были признаны более чем 60-ю наградами полученными на самых престижных международных конкурсах. Name: Società Agricola COLMELLO DI GROTTA s.r.l.
Description:
L’azienda Colmello di Grotta è stata fondata nel 1965 da Luciana Bennati, madre dell’attuale proprietaria
Francesca Bortolotto che ora la conduce assieme alla figlia Olimpia Possati. Siamo, pertanto, alla terza
generazione di donne del vino.
Attualmente l’azienda si estende su 21 HA di proprietà, dei quali 15 vitati con varietà internazionali ed
autoctone,  prevalentemente a bacca bianca. 
I vini prodotti, nella misura di circa 75mila bottiglie annue, sono di due tipi, DOP Collio e DOP Isonzo del Friuli. Infatti, caratteristica specifica di Colmello di Grotta, è di essere attraversata dal confine che separa i terreni DOP Collio da quelli DOP Isonzo, pur trattandosi di 15 ha di vigneto   in   corpo   unico.   La   distinzione   non   è   puramente   amministrativa   o   burocratica,   poiché   le
caratteristiche dei due tipi di terreni sono diametralmente opposte, e di conseguenza anche i vini che ne
derivano. Il terreno del Collio è marnoso e derivante dall’antico sollevamento di fondali marini (la famosa
“ponka”) è molto drenante e minerale: i suoi vini ne rispecchiano l’indole, con strutture complesse,
mineralità spiccate, bouquet discreti ed eleganti, potenziali di invecchiamento di grande interesse. I vini
dell’Isonzo, radicati in quello che anticamente era fiume, pertanto suoli alluvionali compatti in superficie e
sassosi a circa 2 metri di profondità, sono caratterizzati da strutture più larghe e cremose, con bouquet più
intensi, speziati nei rossi.

Name: ENOTRENDS LLC
Description:
Wine is an Experience!

An experience of people. An experience of places and history. An experience of great stories. An experience of the senses.

Enotrends shares its experiences in this fascinating universe. Join us to search the trend!

Enotrends is located in Chicago. To share the trend we are set up as a wine foreign importer and distributor for the State of Illinois. We currently work with wineries from Spain, keeping in touch with our roots.

Enotrends brings to the American market high quality terroir wines. Wines with a genuine history. Wines grown in the vineyard. Wines with personality for the minds eager for new sensations.

Enotrends collaborate directly with the winemakers to bring their product to market, becoming their partners. It’s not about a middle man trying to squeeze the last dime. We search for environmental and economical sustainable projects, making our part in the supply chain an element of such sustainability. Looking to position the winery brands and products at a fair price for the consumers and the producers.

We also support our distribution and retail partners. Getting involved in the trend. Learning and sharing. Being close to the consumer. Our thirst for learning serves as a two-way bridge. Description:
Vinux es una app gratuita que te permite aprender sobre el mundo del vino de manera divertida y dinámica a través de juegos interactivos, y después poner en práctica estos conocimientos en una red de experiencias únicas.

Vinux pretende cambiar la manera como se mira al mundo de los vinos. Muchas veces visto como algo reservado, complicado y elitista, el consumo de vino per cápita en España entre los jóvenes es de los más bajos de Europa.

La barrera que existe para entrar al mundo del vino es enorme, ya que para aprender solo existen herramientas caras y que consumen mucho tiempo, como cursos de cata o libros muchas veces demasiado técnicos y aburridos.

Vinux quiere revolucionar este sector, creando una alternativa que transmita esta cultura del vino de manera mucho más sencilla, moderna y divertida, a través de una app que utiliza técnicas de "gamification" para crear una experiencia 360 y diseñada para ser compartida con amigos y familia.

Además, este aprendizaje de complementa con un seguido de actividades únicas integradas en el juego, como visitas a bodegas o catas a ciegas, para que sin ningún compromiso u obligación cada usuario pueda ir entrando en el mundo del vino al ritmo que prefiera, para así disfrutarlo a su máximo.

Si te interesa el mundo del vino, no lo dudes: vinifícate con Vinux.

Name: Paris Wine Girl
Description:
Paris Wine Girl is a renowned blog overseen by Grape Girl Media, a full-service creative and communications agency with a specialized focus on the wine industry. Initially launched in 2017 by Emily Lester, an American Sommelier, as a blog to entertain and educate wine enthusiasts, the platform has significantly evolved, harnessing the power of digitalization to provide robust marketing and communications solutions to businesses within the wine industry.
Collaboration sits at the heart of Paris Wine Girl, with the blog now featuring a diverse range of contributors. These collaborative relationships extend to our partnerships with both local and international organizations, further extending our reach and influence in the wine industry.

At Paris Wine Girl, we believe in the power of storytelling and strive to share the narratives of the winemakers, the regions, and the wine itself with our global audience. 

The Grape Girl Media agency excels in curating unique digital strategies and creating high-quality content, with an emphasis on showcasing the prestigious wine regions of France. Our expansive suite of services includes, but is not limited to, the orchestration of private wine tours, consulting on international wine projects, and assisting in wine import and export logistics, particularly into the US market.

Name: ChampagneGuide.net
Description: ChampagneGuide.net is a comprehensive online guide to the wines and wine producers of Champagne, featuring detailed profiles of over 100 Champagne houses and estates, as well as tasting notes for nearly 600 champagnes currently on the market. Written from the perspective of a professional wine critic who lives full-time in the Champagne region, the guide is updated continuously throughout the year, offering a unique and dynamic resource to the region and its wines. Subscription to ChampagneGuide.net is US$89 a year.

Name: Azienda Agricola Carlo Centrella
Description:

Name: Azienda Agricola Cantrina
Description:
Cantrina is a tiny rural village in Valtènesi located in the municipality of Bedizzole, in the Brescia hinterland of Lake Garda in Lombardy.

“When, at the beginning of the 1990s, I created the estate that I run today together with Diego Lavo, I decided to give it the name of our little village, Cantrina. The Estate is small and completely family-run. In all we cultivate just under 8 hectares of land, split up between three different sites. We have planted 45,000 vines, initially concentrating mainly on international varieties, although we are now “rediscovering” some local vines as well. Following out first (somewhat experimental) bottles in the 1990s, the wines began to take on a distinctive style with the 2000 vintage.

Our goal is to express in our wines the unique characteristics that our small plots of land confer on the various types of grapes that we grow. We like to interpret our work in the vineyard and in the winery as an open-minded “exercise de style”, that is to say free from preconceived ideas or conditioning of any sort, but with maximum respect for the singular characteristic the nature bestows on the fruits of our vines. Our wines convey the character of their terroir and of the people who make them, based on these elements and on my past experience in the sphere of the arts, I have sought to give our wines a very creative-and consequently unique-imprint.

Name: Kauri Winemaking

Name: Azienda Agricola Botti

With the change of management, Fabio Bovina increased the surface of vineyards and enlarged the business, transforming the winery with innovative agronomical and enological concepts. Même si ses origines sont dans le mâconnais, Laurent est un enfant du village et son objectif a toujours été de s’y installer et créer son domaine.

Aujourd’hui, il exploite près de 18 hectares de vignes répartis entre Loché, Montagny et Mercurey dont 6,4 Ha en appellation Montagny 1er Cru.

À l’origine installé dans d’anciennes prisons moyenâgeuses avec des caves pittoresques et étroites, le domaine déménage en 2018 au « Château de Buxy », en plein centre de la commune, permettant ainsi la construction d’un caveau de dégustation et garantissant un outil de travail à la hauteur du développement de l’exploitation viticole.

Name: Cork Quality Council
Description:
The Cork Quality Council has served the cork and wine industries for 25 years since its founding in 1994. The non-profit group of US cork companies has achieved several noteworthy accomplishments, beginning with the development of a standardized visual quality system for natural corks. The group then developed a series of quality standards to be applied to all cork shipments received for the US market. Adherence to these standards is subject to CQC audits and, in some cases, third party testing. 

Working in conjunction with ETS Laboratories, The CQC developed a chemical screening test for TCA that has been implemented throughout the international wine and cork industry. The CQC screening method allowed for accurate detection of TCA at concentrations of 1 part per trillion, and created a benchmark that allowed cork producers to better evaluate their sources of wood and cork production techniques.

Today, TCA is a rarely detected in cork screening operations.  The level of TCA found in CQC cork shipments is now reduced by 98% since screening methods went online in 2002. The Cork Quality Council continues to audit results from all quality initiatives, and routinely adjusts standards to create continuous improvement.

Name: Punico Liquori
Description:
Punico Liquori nasce a Marsala, città situata nell’estrema punta occidentale della Sicilia, famosa in tutto il mondo per il suo omonimo vino liquoroso.

Proprio da questa tradizione nasce l’esperienza del noto enologo Vito Maltese, riconosciuto oggi tra i più grandi liquoristi e marsalisti. Per celebrare il 50° anniversario della sua carriera, Vito ha fondato con i figli Annalisa, Ignazio e Sabrina la Punico Liquori, una realtà giovane e in continua evoluzione, già nota in tutta la Sicilia per il suo fiore all’occhiello: l’Amaro Punico.

Oltre ad esso, l’azienda ha dato vita a liquori e infusi di grandissima qualità: il limoncello Millelumie, il liquore ai fiori di agrumi Zahare, i due Marsala Superiore DOC Dolce e Secco, i liquorosi Malvasia e Zibibbo e il Vino alla Mandorla, ai quali si sono poi aggiunti l’amaro all’arancia Punagrò, le grappe Mille, la morbida e la barricata, e il gin siciliano Ugin.

Prodotti raffinati e di qualità, realizzati con ingredienti naturali e procedimenti rispettosi della tradizione, per offrire ad ogni sorso una piccola scossa di piacere decisa e intensa.

Name: Decantare
Description:

The company´s scope covers the commercialization of wines and all the product related to: accesories, gourmet class dishes, extra virgin olive oil, etc, all of them produced by recognized Spanish companies.

Our company lays in four columns:
 + Online business: Decantare.com, on an early stage focused on inner Spanish market but with international vocation.
 + Decantare Wineshop: Local shops, first point of sell opened in Torremolinos (Málaga-Spain).
 + Wholesaler: of some of the more recognized brands of the spanish wine cellars as well as new producers who represents the new generation tasting likes.
 + Export services: We directly manage several wine cellars from the main Spanish regions (Rioja, Ribera de Duero, Rueda, Cava...), delivering products all over the world.

We have our juices shipped to us from around the world and process and ferment the wines right in downtown Port Washington, WI.  We also provide a service called U-Vin or bottle on premises where you can come in to the winery and with our help make your very own batch of wine.   We have a full selection of Vintner (wine) and Zymurgy (beer) making supplies for the home hobbyist.

Name: Hunt & Speller Ltd
Description:
The Company

Hunt & Coady Limited is a company of two - Jane Hunt MW and Tina Coady.  We specialise in the organisation of wine-tasting events of a generic nature. 

Amongst many these are our regular annual and ongoing events are:

•‘The Definitive Italian Wine Tasting’ – London 1999 – 2010
•‘France Under One Roof’ Tasting – London 2002 – 2010
•Argentina Wine Awards – Mendoza, Argentina 2007 - 2010

Personnel

Jane Hunt MW has worked in the UK wine trade since 1977.  Awarded the Vintners’ Company Travel Scholarship in 1981 and Master of Wine qualification in 1985, she has the advantage of both an in-depth knowledge of wine as well as over 33 years working experience.  Her work has covered a wide range of sectors to include sales, purchasing, teaching, lecturing, examination, marketing, journalism and generic promotion. She is one of two Regional Chairmen for the Italian Panel of the Decanter World Wine Awards.  She is fluent in Italian and speaks conversational French.
 
Tina Coady, originally Jane’s assistant when running the generic promotional bureau for Wines of South Africa during the 1996 – 1998 period, has been involved with marketing and event management in the wine trade for over 15 years.  She has additional and particular experience in promotion to the ‘on-trade’ sector.  Her computer skills and sophisticated database management permit exceptional attention to detail!  She has training to Wine & Spirit Education Trust Diploma level.

The Philosophy

Inspired by the original movement of Leclerc retail organisation in the sixties in France, Cœur de vins wishes to create a united movement of independent wine makers willing to succeed as a team. When it is hard to succeed alone, Cœur de Vins offers a system of mutualisation in different sectors, Purchases. Multi Channel sales, Logistic, Vineyards, Marketing etc.
The aim of our system is to control from the beginning to the end, in full transparency with our partners, all the economic chain.

Recent History and Organisation

May 2014: Creation of Coeur de Vins and sourcing of the wines. We are working now on an exclusive basis with more than 60 producers in France. We cover all the wine production regions in France.

Name: Starfield Vineyards
Description:
At Starfield Vineyards we believe that great wines are sourced from “Star Fields” — unique sites where fruit can develop the optimal balance of aroma, flavor and texture. It is our philosophy and passion to make amazing wines that are in harmony with the vineyards and reflects the distinct terrior our “Star Fields”. We are proudly Estate grown on the El Dorado County side of the Sierra Foothills.

Winemaker and Owner, Tom Sinton brings to Starfield three generations of grape growing experience and a passion to create extraordinary wines that reflect the unique terroir and beauty of our Estate vineyards. Each block of our Estate vineyard showcases distinct qualities that shine through to make expressive, complex and rich wines. 

Our entire team is not only committed to making exceptional small lot wines but equally dedicated to providing unparalleled guest experiences for the quintessential and unique wine country experience. 

This property, vineyards and wines are truly special. We hope you’ll fall in love as we have and join us in experiencing wine in a completely new way.

Visit us online at www.starfieldvineyards.com.

Name: Domaine de l'Ours Bleu
Description: Le Domaine de l’Ours Bleu produit des vins de Saumur en agriculture biologique (100%bio depuis 2021). Nous proposons des vins de Loire d’appellations saumur et saumur-champigny. Découvrez et commandez en ligne nos vins bio saumur Rouge, saumur Rosé, saumur Blanc et fines bulles rosé en direct du producteur.

Name: Vignobles Labuzan
Description:
C’est au début du XVII -ème siècle que l’on trouve les origines de la famille Labuzan dans le village de Portets ( qui signifie littéralement « le Port à l’Est de Bordeaux ») situé sur un plateau qui domine la Garonne et d’où sont déjà expédiés, par barriques et bateaux, les vins à destination de Bordeaux tout proche et vers l’Europe du Nord.

A cette époque, suivant un rythme annuel, nos aïeux sont, au grès des saisons, viticulteurs, vendangeurs , tonneliers , chasseurs ou aubergistes.

Mais l’aventure ne démarre réellement qu’en 1847 avec les premières bouteilles de Château des Gravières – Graves de Portets...

Aujourd'hui 7 générations se sont succédées avec toujours la même passion et un parfait enthousiasme.

Name: Vitis Vinifera
Description:
Vitist Vinifera is a premium and luxury wine Importer, Wholesaler, Distributor and Retailer of boutique, family-owned wines and one of the main distributors of French, Italian, Spanish, German and Portugal wines in Myanmar. 

Vitis Vinifera offers a unique blend of taste and quality which carefully curated, and services inspired by global influences, powered by local expertise. We directly collaborate with wineries and are exclusive importer and distributor of all our wine brands and its products. 

Vitis Vinifera prides itself with an unwavering commitment to wine enthusiast by representing lifestyle, class, affluence, and providing truly extraordinary quality at reasonable prices.

Our knowledge of and passion for our products, combined with a commitment to customer service, have enabled Vitist Vinifera to build lasting relationships with a sophisticated and demanding customer base.

Furthermore, Vitis Vinifera wine & Sprit introduces and enforces best practices in excellent customer service, competitive pricing, curation of wines, from wedding event to corporate event services, B2B marketing consulting to its clients with a broad selection of boutique and family-owned exotic wines, and sustainable & responsible business practices through educating the consumer on appreciation of wine including training related to wine service to local businesses and wine enthusiasts with a genuine wine appreciation education.   

To us, we are passionate about exploring, sharing and growing the wine culture, transmitting the extraordinary journey from harvesting the grapes to the finale bottled experience.

Name: Le Riche Wines
Description:
Le Riche Wines is situated in the picturesque Jonkershoek valley, in close proximity to the historic town of Stellenbosch and surrounded by the majestic Hottentots Holland Mountain range.   With views stretching to Table Mountain, the property has a cosy, yet awe inspiring ambiance.  Built in 1911, the winery has an old South African feel, but has been tastefully restored to provide a platform to create ultra premium red wines in a classic old world style.  Production is 5000 x 12 cases a year, with the Reserve range consisting of only about 500 cases. The wines are rare, but worth sourcing.

Le Riche Wines was founded by Etienne le Riche in 1996 and is now run as a family concern.  Coming from an illustrious career in the South African wine industry, Etienne decided to create a winery where he could express the cultivar he had grown to love and respect, Cabernet Sauvignon.  The approach was simple, to illustrate the nuances of Stellenbosch Cabernets as best possible. Preferring not to be inhibited by estate classification, he chose to select grapes from the best possible terroirs Stellenbosch had to offer.  The resulting wines have shown great elegance and class, consistently proving to be of superb quality and maturation potential.

Name: Château Cantelaudette - Vignobles Chatelier - AOC Graves-de-Vayres
Description:
Située en plein cœur du vignoble bordelais, à mi-chemin entre Bordeaux et Saint-Émilion, la région des Graves de Vayres est située sur la rive droite de la Garonne et la rive gauche de la Dordogne, en aval de la ville de Libourne. 

Un système de terrasse témoigne de l’enfoncement de la Dordogne dans sa vallée. En fonction de la hauteur, nous avons différents types de sols.

Climat océanique où les entrées maritimes jouent un rôle thermorégulateur important. En bordure du fleuve, l’appellation bénéficie des effets modérateurs de la masse d’eau, mais aussi d’un micro climat particulier, dû au relief plus escarpé de la rive opposée et à la proximité du tertre de Fronsac.

Name: Blanco & Lynds Fine Wine Distributors Ltd
Description:
For over 12 years our team have been sourcing inspiration from across the globe, seeking out the true pioneers of wine, and building a portfolio that encapsulates a wealth of talent, all the way from small artisan winemakers to iconic names. 
Our main philosophy is to select the finest products when it comes to wine and spirits, working with experience producers, whatever the size, with the belief that with passion and dedication we will end it up delivering the finest products to our clients. We carry wines from all over the world, but have particular fondness for wines from lesser known grapes and regions, as they offer incredible value for money. Most of these wines that we carry are from small producers which follow sustainable practices, some of them certified organic and even biodynamic.

Name: The Bloomsbury Distillery

Name: JoannaMiro.com
Description:
Il nostro quotidiano si struttura attorno all’attenta cura dei prodotti e delle aziende affidateci per la vendita in export. 

Poniamo la massima importanza alla costruzione di un’opportuna immagine di essi, e ad un equo posizionamento dei medesimi sui mercati di riferimento, nonché al processo di auspicabile fidelizzazione dei clienti finali durante l’intero processo di compravendita.

Il nostro è un approccio sistemico ed è riservato in egual misura ai produttori quanto agli importatori, fondato sui principi etici di una solida e leale partnership commerciale.

La stessa ottica prettamente funzionale al profitto di tutti i partner permea ogni evento da noi siglato. Name: Supernatural Wine Co.
Description:
Supernatural Wine Co. is a producer of certified organic, naturally vinified, low sulphur white and orange wines from a north-facing hillside estate in Hawke's Bay, New Zealand. Our philosophy relies on great terroir and traditional processes. Our aim is to produce world class wines, naturally and organically.

We now produce three wines – The Supernatural (Sauvignon Blanc), Green Glow (skin- fermented Sauvignon Blanc) and Spook Light (skin-fermented Pinot Gris) and we are aiming to introduce new naturally vinified wines in the future.

Soils are lime-rich clay with volcanic influence, slopes from 5 to 30 degrees and plantings in Sauvignon Blanc and Pinot Gris. Soil is Matapiro sandy loam over Kidnappers Group fossiliferous sandstone overlain by carbonaceous mudstone, tephra, ignimbrite. Vine age is 10-11 years.

The site has proven pedigree being in proximity to and on similar soils, slope and aspect as Te Mata Coleraine, one of New Zealand’s most accoladed vineyards. 92% of NZ’s vineyards are on flat land with alluvial gravel soils, so this soil and site produces a very distinctive wines in a New Zealand context.

Supernatural Wine Co. is fully certified organic with BioGro New Zealand (www.biogro.co.nz) and in 2015 we started following biodynamic farming principles.

Name: DYOGENA
Description:
Dyogéna est une jeune société de service spécialisée dans le nettoyage, le détartrage et l'aseptisation des fûts et barriques par ultrasons haute puissance.
Cette technologie novatrice préserve les arômes du bois, restaure l'oxygénation ménagée et détruit les bactéries et levures encore présentes dans les fûts et barriques telles que la bactérie acétique ou la levure de Brettanomyces.
L'action mécanique des ultrasons, la faible utilisation d'eau et d'électricité rend ce procédé respectueux de l'environnement.
Tournée vers l'innovation, Dyogéna a procédée en coopération avec l'ISVV de Bordeaux ainsi que l'INRA à la validation des résultats exceptionnels obtenus sur les vins issus de fûts traités par Ultrasons Haute Puissance.
L'utilisation régulière d'un nettoyage par ultrasons haute puissance permettra de prolonger la durée de vie des fûts et barriques et garanti l'élimination totale des levures et bactéries en profondeur dans les pores du bois.
Ses unités mobiles interviennent dans toutes les régions viticoles françaises mais aussi espagnoles et italiennes dans un délai très court.

N'hésitez plus, "Dyogénisez" vos fûts

Name: Everwise wine LTD
Description:
中国广州永醇酒业，香港永富酒业及香港永富美酒会等同属澳洲永富酒业总公司的海外分公司，目前 本集团客户遍布澳大利亚及邻近国家。香港业务除本销外亦遍及邻近东南亚等国家。

很荣幸澳洲政府授予香港分公司为：“澳洲葡萄餐酒优良荣誉进出口商”。

此一荣誉确实得来不易！本集团当必同心同德以百尺竿头更进一步的奋斗精深，勇往直前为优良价廉 物美的葡萄酒服务广大群众。

在澳洲总部我们储存了不少于3000多种优质的葡萄佳酿，其中包括一些陈年和非常罕有的名牌珍藏。 我们还拥有部分世界名牌佳酿为东南亚地区国家总代理。

本集团业务范围主要包括星级酒店、大集团饮食业机构、高级私人会所、中西餐厅、航空公司及邮轮 等，其中部分有：香港喜来登酒店集团 香港赛马会 香港州际大酒店 香港半岛酒店 香港游艇会 香港港龙航空 国际丽星邮轮等。

香港分公司属下的永富美酒会经营模式独特，深受客人欢迎。我司现致力将该模式推向中国内地为大 众提供优良服务。我司积极地，频繁地举办和参与有关葡萄品酒会，浅谈讲座，晚宴酒会及其它形式 的大规模宴会。

About Us

Founded in 1997, Everwise has established a distinguished identity of an “Australian Fine Wine Specialist” and is one of the major importers of Australian wines. We have been nominated repeatedly as the most successful independent Australian Wine distributor in South East Asia. Currently, we are serving Melbourne-Australia, Hong Kong, Singapore, Malaysia, Japan, Korea and China.

Apart from expertise in Australian wines, we are also into Premium French, New Zealand, Italian, Portugal and Spanish wines. Our Australian warehouse stocks over 3,000 different wines including some very sought after vintages and rare wines.

We are the distributor of a number of prestigious labels including Punters Corner, Hungerford Hill, Step Road, Pirie Tasmania, Cable Station Road, Champagne Mansard, Domaine Marchand Freres – Bourgogne, Chateau Monlot – Saint Emilion Grand Cru, Chateau Palmer – Margaux etc. and our wholesale department supplies wines to major hotels, private clubs, restaurants and airlines.

We are also active in the wine shows, organizing wine tasting, wine dinners and other types of wine functions frequently.

Name: vintar.it
Description:
Promuoviamo la cultura del vino attraverso soluzioni tecnologiche accessibili a chiunque voglia occuparsi di vinificazione, conservazione e distribuzione del vino.

La nostra "mission" è coniugare tradizione ed innovazione, nel produrre e conservare vino di qualità, escludendo l'uso di prodotti chimici non naturali.

La gamma di prodotti, che comprende Vinificatori e Botti Refrigerate, si rivolge a cantine vinicole, enoteche, ristoranti e semplici appassionati.


Design e scelta dei materiali si ispirano alla tradizione secolare dei mastri bottai italiani. Progettazione ed innovazione tecnologica sono votate al risparmio energetico ed alla difesa dell'ambiente. Brevetti e produzione completano la filosofia VINTAR : promuovere e sostenere il MADE in ITALY.

VINTAR e' una sfida tecnologica e sentimentale, volta a promuovere il buon gusto ed il senso della tradizione. Un modo per fare di una storia italiana, quella del vino, un'arte ed un piacere alla portata di tutti nel mondo.

Name: Pagnel Wines

BORN TO FULFILL THE DREAM THAT PAGANELLI’S ANCESTORS HAD IN THE LATE NINETEENTH CENTURY ITALY: TO PRODUCE A WINE THAT COULD REPRESENT THE ESSENCE OF ITS LAND. WORKING ALONG THE MOST PRESTIGIOUS WINEMAKERS, AND ALWAYS CARING FOR ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY, VERTIENTE PAGNEL COUNTS WITH ALL THE IMPLEMENTS TO ASTONISH THE WORLD WITH ITS WINES.

WE PUT OUR FAMILY TRADITIONS AND VALUES IN OUR WORK. NEVERTHELESS, IN VERTIENTE PAGNEL WE’RE ALWAYS INNOVATING IN ORDER TO PRODUCE A TOP QUALITY WINE, AND IN TANDEM WITH OUR DIFFERENT BRANDS, AMAZE THE WORLD WITH THE INHERENT QUALITY OF CHILEAN TERROIRS.

THE WINARY OPERATES THE FINEST TECHNOLOGY TO ENSURE AN OPTIMAL QUALITY PRODUCED BY OUR SELECTED GRAPES, WICH COMBINED WITH OUR METICULOUS WINEMAKING AND AGING PROCESS, PRODUCES A BALANCED, EXPRESSIVE AND EXCEPTIONAL WINE.

WE FIRMLY BELIEVE IN THE BENEFITS AND ENERGY THAT THE SOIL AND SUN CAN POUR INTO THE VINEYARDS; IN VERTIENTE PAGNEL WE WORK SYNERGISTICALLY WITH NATURE.

Name: McHenry Distillery Italia - LTB Global S.r.l.
Description:
A production reality immersed in nature that knows how to use and not exploit its unique botanical resources in the world.
Mc Henry Distillery - Italia

The McHenry Distillery is the southern whiskey and gin distillery of the south. With its family heritage it makes it the southernmost family-run distillery in the world. Its southern position exploits the cool-humid-maritime environment, giving the distillate the right conditions to make the most of its time in wooden barrels. The property also has its abundant pure spring water which becomes the heart of its spirits.

William McHenry Distillery is located on one side of Mount Arthur which is on the Tasman Peninsula.

The purest air can be found in this part of the world. Cold air wraps around the globe at latitude 43 °, leaving South America without crossing another land mass, until it reaches the southern tip of Tasmania about 17,000 km later. At this point the cold air and the rippling waves of the ocean have erased all the distant memory of man’s influence..
The Mc Henry family produces in the traditional way one of the best gins in Australia. The attention to detail and the very high quality of the product make it a UNIQUE GIN.
The use of native botanicals, unavailable in other countries of the world, make it a unique product. The pure spring water contributes significantly to its exceptional quality.

Description: www.spiritsisters.co.uk

Name: Yannick Prévoteau Champagne NL
Description: Combineer decennialange traditie en ambacht met een verfrissende kijk op een duurzame productie van champagne en je krijgt de kwaliteit van Yannick Prévoteau Champagne. Kwaliteit die gekenmerkt wordt door een onderscheidende stijl. Uitzonderlijke, delicate en harmonieuze cuvées die je móet proeven!

Name: Lebovitz
Description:
The history of the Lebovitz winery began seventy years ago in Governolo, province of Mantua. Situated in the fertile Po Valley where the River Mincio flows into the Po, the company continues with the same principles and enthusiasm for Lambrusco as when it started out. 
The manageable size of the winery and its modern technologies allow us to focus on quality, with particular attention to improving the organoleptic characteristics while respecting the typical nature of the product.
In all these years we have gained great experience that combined with constant commitment enables us to express the tradition of the local area in our production of the highest quality Lambrusco Mantovano.

Name: Sunday Best Distillery
Description: We create craft spirits from mash to bottle. Created by women with the best ingredients for your Sunday best.

Name: >VINI TIAI
Description:
Sulle colline dell’alta Valpolicella a Molina, nel cuore di una terra da sempre votata alla produzione di eccellenti vini, nasce TIAI, società agricola con vigneti propri.

Località famosa per le cascate e per aver dato i natali nel 1842 all’ultimo cardinale di Verona, nostro prozio Bartolomeo Bacilieri, essa si colloca fra la la Valpolicella ed i Monti Lessini a 640 mt. s.l.m., posizione privilegiata che conferisce alle uve che coltiviamo particolarità uniche.

Territorio, Innovazione, Ambiente ed Impegno sono i valori che ci ispirano nel portare avanti il sogno di chi prima di noi ha coltivato queste terre e seminato ciò che noi oggi raccogliamo,  per offrirlo a voi.

Name: Fogline Vineyards
Description:
Fogline Vineyards is both a winery and a concept. Launched in 2009, we make small lots of Pinot Noir, Zinfandel, Syrah and Chardonnay. Our home vineyard is located in the Sonoma Coast appellation, at the top of Sonoma Mountain. This area of the Sonoma Coast is known as the Petaluma Gap, noteworthy for the wind and fog that blows in through a gap in the costal hills. These conditions create the distinct environment needed to grow world-class Pinot Noir and Chardonnay. In addition, we source fruit from the top of Bradford Mountain in the Dry Creek Valley appellation. At 1200 feet of elevation, this organically grown vineyard produces Zinfandel and Syrah with distinct mountain-grown characteristics.

We choose our locations for growing and sourcing fruit based on a number of factors. Our name speaks to one that we consider essential – fog. We believe that mountain fruit grown above the fog line creates more balanced, focused wines. The additional exposure to sun throughout the growing season enables the vines to get an earlier start in the morning. Additionally, temperature inversion results in warmer nights and cooler days than vineyards at lower elevations. This allows the fruit to ripen both physiologically (getting the sugar to the right level) and phenologically (reaching the point where it tastes fantastic), while lessening the need to leave the fruit hanging for extended periods.

Name: Cabral Porto & Douro
Description:
Chez Cabral Porto & Douro, nous privilégions la mise en marché de produits portugais d'exception.

Cabral Porto & Douro se positionne aujourd'hui comme une marque moderne et dynamique, un assortiment enviable et unique de vins, portos et brandy (Aguardente) provenant d'une des plus grandes régions vinicoles du Portugal: le Douro.

Nos produits, vendus et appréciés depuis plusieurs décennies, reçoivent régulièrement des prix et distinctions dans divers compétitions internationales, réaffirmant leur qualité hors du commun.

Name: Slijterij Het Borreluur
Description: Het Borreluur, uw gezellige slijterij met de beste service!

Name: Gin Akin
Description:
Akin est un gin inspiré par le terroir, les arômes du vin et le travail du chai. C'est un distilled gin français composé uniquement d’ingrédients bio, à déguster pur ou à sublimer en cocktail. 

Produit en quantité limitée, « Batch n°1 » est notre première création. Un assemblage de notes typées gin et d’arômes inspirés par les terroirs
de la Rive Droite de Bordeaux. Intense et élégant.

Name: Verslunarfélagið Nava ehf
Description:
Verslunarfélagið Nava ehf er ungt og framsækið fyrirtæki sem sérhæfir sig í innflutningi, heildsölu og útflutningi.
Aðalstarfsemi félagsins er innflutningur á léttvínum frá Marquéz De Arviza & Ruiz-Clavijo Family Estates, Rioja á Spáni

Name: Vignerons de nature USA
Description:
A group of French, passionate, talented and environmental conscious winemakers. 
Distributed in many states in the USA.

Name: Domaine Eric Rominger
Description:
Notre Domaine est niché à Westhalten, au pied du Grand Cru Zinnkoepflé culminant à 430 mètres, au coeur de la Vallée Noble, au sud de Colmar. La Vallée Noble est protégée des vents dominants et des intempéries par le massif vosgien. On y produit des grands vins depuis plusieurs centaines d’années. L’affaissement de la fosse rhénane est à l’origine de la mosaïque de terroirs présents en Alsace. Cette complexité nous amène à cultiver nos parcelles et vinifier nos productions individuellement, afin d’exprimer au mieux l’originalité de chaque climat. 
Pour conserver à nos vins toute leur richesse et vous la faire découvrir, nous cultivons notre Domaine en agriculture biologique et Biodynamique (Demeter), dans le plus grand respect des équilibres naturels. Les sols sont labourés ou griffés, selon le rythme du vignoble et la météorologie du millésime. Les soins, pour la plupart manuels, sont adaptés à chaque parcelle selon ses besoins. La vigne peut ainsi optimiser sa croissance en puisant les différents éléments nutritifs dont elle a besoin.
L’alliance des techniques ancestrales et actuelles nous permet d’exprimer au mieux les terroirs du Domaine et vous offrir des vins uniques et inimitables.
Nous avons beaucoup de plaisir à produire les différentes cuvées et nous espérons partager ce bonheur avec vous lors de vos différentes dégustations.

Name: Clos de la République
Description:
Des vins élaborés dans le plus grand respect des cépages et des terroirs

Le Clos de la République de Patrick Fonjallaz est un domaine viticole situé dans le Lavaux dans le village d'Epesses.

L’activité des Fonjallaz dans le Vignoble de Lavaux remonte au 16e siècle et en fait l’entreprise familiale la plus ancienne de Suisse. Patrick Fonjallaz, représentant de la treizième génération, en est l’actuel propriétaire. Le domaine est de 34 hectares qui sont vinifiés à la propriété. A cela s’ajoutent les récoltes d’une quinzaine de viticulteurs, parents ou voisins.

Le Clos de la République propose des solutions pour l'organisation d'événements pour entreprises et particuliers allant de séminaires et galas d'entreprises à l'organisation de team building, de dégustations et d'anniversaires.

Le Clos de la République dispose de l’une des plus belle vue du vignoble en terrasses de Lavaux et sur le lac Léman et vous accueille du Lundi au Samedi midi, mais également le dimanche après-midi à la belle saison par beau temps pour découvrir sur place une grande sélection de vins élégants.

Name: werk2weine
Description:
Riesling ist Lebensgefühl und Leidenschaft
Rieslinge zu machen ist für uns nicht einfach ein Job, sondern Leidenschaft und Engagement. Als Rheingauer gehört es bei uns schlicht zum Leben dazu. Unser Weingut ist lebendig und es gibt viel zu entdecken. Am besten, Sie kommen uns besuchen und erleben es selbst

Name: János Pince Organic Viticulture & Winery
Description: Family-owned traditional winery and organic viticulture were founded around 1878 in the Tokaj wine region, Hungary. The company of good wines!

Name: VINO PUNTO 3
Description:
VINO.3 offre un valido supporto a tutte quelle aziende, sul mercato italiano ed estero, che hanno la necessità di realizzare strategie commerciali vincenti.
Grazie alla capacità di venire incontro alle singole esigenze dei suoi clienti, VINO.3, attraverso attività di supervisione della rete di vendita, procedure gestionali ed operazioni di marketing mirate, fornisce un servizio tailor made, finalizzato all’aumento delle vendite di tutti i prodotti del cliente.
Un servizio ad hoc così efficace è garantito non solo, dalla totale autonomia di VINO.3, ma soprattutto dalla consolidata conoscenza ed esperienza pluriennale del settore, e dalla determinazione dei suoi professionisti, che hanno il coraggio delle proprie azioni.
Perché per VINO.3 il successo del cliente viene sempre prima di tutto.

Name: Champagne P. Louis Martin
Description: Founded in 1864 in Bouzy (Grand Cru village) Champagne P.Louis Martin is synonymous of Family and Passion and reveals a unique expertise preciously handed down through the generations. Through the quality of the vineyards and the excellence of methods, which remain respectful of the vinification process, P. Louis Martin champagnes offer you the heritage of an inimitable style. L’abus d’alcool est dangereux pour la santé. A consommer avec modération. Drink responsibly.

Name: COPA
Description:
After making wines for several years in Chile, we were amazed by Itata vineyards, their history, potential, and people. So, we created COPA and establish our winery in Itata itself, to produce wines from centenary vines with no irrigation.
We chose the vineyards and work in tandem in a long-term relationship with local producers to assure the quality of the grapes.
The aim is to obtain the best of the Itata characteristics and transmit them into the bottle.
Pure and honest wines are made for people that want to taste wines that come from vineyards that are unique in the world.
Wines are produced of Cinsault and País grapes from vines between 80 and 150 years old. Complex, elegant and structured wines made in the Raulí wood open tank and ageing in old oak barrels.

Name: MYWINECLUB.IT
Description:
My Wine Club è un concetto rivoluzionario nel palcoscenico italiano dell’offerta di vino online…unico nel suo genere. Non è uno dei tanti siti di vendita online di vino, ma è un vero e proprio wine club personalizzato sui tuoi gusti e sulle tue esigenze!! 

MWC è infatti il primo club del vino in Italia dedicato agli amanti del vino, appassionati esperti e non, curiosi di intraprendere un percorso esperienziale di degustazione attraverso centinaia di vini unici e costantemente supportati dal nostro team di esperti.

MWC è stato pensato e realizzato appositamente per soddisfare tutti i gusti e le esigenze di ogni singolo associato. Basterà infatti iscriverti al Wine Club che preferisci, definire la quantità di bottiglie e la cadenza con cui ricevere la tua wine box ed al resto ci pensiamo noi.

Inoltre potrai riacquistare sulla tua vetrina privata, le bottiglie che più ti sono piaciute ad un prezzo assolutamente esclusivo e conveniente. 

Con la tua l’adesione al MY Wine Club ti regalerai l’opportunità di entrare in una laboratorio esperienziale del gusto, dove potrai degustare vini unici che provengono da tutte le regioni d’Italia e del mondo e che sono stati scrupolosamente selezionati dal nostro team di esperti.
Ti stupiremo con proposte dedicate e calibrate direttamente sui tuoi gusti, mantenendo un’attenzione particolare alla convenienza delle tue scelte. 
I migliori vini al miglior prezzo!

MY Wine Club ti offre un servizio personalizzato unico:

Ogni socio potrà infatti contare su un servizio creato appositamente sui propri gusti e secondo le proprie esigenze. 

In base al profilo che hai scelto riceverai direttamente a casa tua una wine box di proposte che saranno appositamente selezionate per te dal nostro team di esperti. Potrai scegliere tra decine di combinazioni, secondo tutte le tue esigenze, dal numero di bottiglie, alla cadenza, fino alla tipologia.

Ti accompagneremo in un viaggio alla scoperta di eccellenze enologiche del territorio italiano!!

Name: PANE E VINO s.r.l.
Description: Enoteca, Gastronomia Specializzata. Vendita di Vini, Distillati e prodotti di gastronomia. Creazioni di Corsi di Degustazione. Produzione di "VìVì - Vino di Visciole" - Bevanda dolce della tradizione delle Colline Marchigiane

Name: Unwritten Wines
Description:
Boutique Napa Valley Winery located in St Helena, specializing in Cabernet Sauvignon.

Our 2014 vintage is a highly sought after, limited production wine, made from grapes grown on the historic Lewelling Ranch. The Lewelling family has been in the grape growing business for six generations and their ranch, located in the heart of St. Helena, is known for producing some of the most alluring Cabernet Sauvignons in all of California.

Available for purchase:
www.unwrittenwines.com

Name: In Fine Spirits
Description: Every wine, spirit, and craft beer we offer is crafted by people who share our passion for quality – who want you to share it, too. We update our offerings regularly to ensure value, quality, and selection – even our most frequent visitors will always find new territory to chart!

Name: BrasserieLORO
Description: Fabricant de bières artisanales, 100% françaises

Name: Focus Cellars
Description:
Focus Cellars is a wine agency whose prime objective is to represent foreign wine producers at the Société des Alcools du Québec, (SAQ), in order to supply and sell these products in Quebec. Various distribution channels have encompassed Focus Cellars to work closely with all categories of the SAQ. Our products can be found in the “general section” of most SAQ stores including the "Express", "Classique", “Sélection” and "Signature" specialty boutiques.  

Focus Cellars also caters to a number of connoisseurs and private events/collectors who prefer consignment wines to add to their cellar collection(s).

Focus Cellars' goal has always been to offer customers with premium imported products at exceptional value and our ambition remains to further expand our portfolio. Our clients encompass a large scope of licensed establishments such as Restaurants, Bars/Lounges, Clubs, Banquet facilities, Golf Clubs, and Hotels chains. A first-class partnership with these clients has enabled us to build a solid and experienced reputation.

Name: Pearl Wine Company
Description: PWC is a full service wine, beer and spirit bottle shop located with two location in the Denver Metro Area. We opened our doors November, 2015 with the vision and culmination of 20 years in the wine, beer and spirit industry.  Featuring some of the best craft beers available, like Weldwerks, Knotted Root, and Westbound & Down to Alchemist. Our wine selection exclusively features family owned and operated wineries along with 5 certified sommeliers on the floor to assist with your selection. PWC has been voted 5280’s Reader’s Choice Best Bottles shop 4 out of 5 years!

Name: Blend Brothers
Description: Established in 2018. Blend Brothers are purveyors and connoisseurs of fine wine and spirits. With a growing portfolio of local and international products, Blend Brothers pride themselves in offering access to the great fine wine and spirits from around the world.

Name: Soir d'ivresse
Description:
France is globally recognised for its long wine history, which dates back to the 7th century BC (when the first Greek trading posts were established on the Southern shores). Today, wine undoubtedly remains an integral part of French culture, the latter having been heavily influenced by wine’s cultivation throughout the ages, such that France is known as ‘The country of wine’.
Today, France has no less than 85,000 wineries, the vast majority of which consist of small winemakers who sell directly to local private clients, while not having the infrastructure to sell internationally.
 
With this knowledge, Thomas Mangin - winemaker in Roussillon - and Adrien Niclot - China-based sommelier - decided to bring several winemakers together and launch the concept of ‘Soir d’Ivresse’.
 
By gathering these winemakers’ productions under one label ‘Soir d’Ivresse’, this union aims to create a link between international wine lovers and those small French winemakers. The French poetic name ‘Soir d’Ivresse’ recalls the first evening when this group of winemakers decided to launch their common project to promote their wines.

Name: The Whisky Speaker
Description:
To bring together and host creative tasting events to everyone who wants to have a better understanding of the world of whisk(e)y. 

Having a passion for the water of life since enjoying a distillery tour on a  family holiday in Scotland 2006, has lead me to share my findings with likeminded people. 

Since 2018 I've also had the honor of being a qualified distiller with the Institute of Brewing & Distilling (IBD).

So weather you're a novice, enthusiast or whisky connoisseur and need someone to host an evening of fun then look no further. 

Since 2021 I've become a freelance whisky brand ambassador and happy to meet new and old faces in a crowded room across the UK. Talking all matters of matured and new make spirits! 

Since 2022 I've also had the honor of working with the Department for Environment, Food & Rural Affairs to create a Geographical Indication (GI) for establishing English Whisky as a recognised drinks category. 

In 2023 I've worked to complete my first publication on the subject of UK Craft Whisky so watch this space! 

In 2024 an exciting whisky society will be launched so watch this space!

Name: Bodegas Pentecostés
Description:
En Bodegas Pentecostés creemos en ese pacto silencioso entre el hombre y la tierra; en donde la tradición, el trabajo y la emoción dan forma a nuestros viñedos.

Nuestras fincas, son las únicas con  denominación de origen Rías Baixas del Valle Miñor y en ellas se cultivan las uvas más selectas de albariño, loureiro, treixadura, godello y caíño. Siempre con mimo y dedicación.

En Bodegas Pentecostés elaboramos el vino disfrutando de cada paso del proceso para dar vida a nuestro vino albariño o,  nuestro varietal, con base de albariño y, sutiles toques de godello, loureiro, treixadura o caíño. Dos vinos con los que poder saborear el Valle Miñor.

Name: Rhum&Sens
Description:
Créée en 2014, Rhum&Sens est une marque de rhums dediée aux femmes. 
Faisant appel aux 5 sens, la marque met en avant de nouvelles saveurs.
Nous fabriquons des rhums arrangés artisanaux en y apportant des produits frais, du rhum et des épices de qualité afin de garantir un produit haut de gamme.

Laissez-vous séduire par nos rhums agricoles:
-le rhum lime
-le rhum planteur
-le rhum orange, mangue, passion
-le rhum ananas, mangue, passion
-le rhum framboise, ananas, passion

Name: La Pèira
Description:
La Pèira is a wine estate in Southern France. Located in the Terrasses du Larzac AOC the Domaine has attracted critical acclaimed from all quarters:
