WINE BEHIND THE LABEL

Name: Etched Images, Inc.
Description:
Etched Images had a humble beginning. In 1989 David Lincoln, a long-time Napa Valley resident, converted a hen house and began a one-man operation of etching and painting wine bottles for Napa Valley wineries. These bottles were used by wineries as donations to local and national charity auctions, such as the Napa Valley Wine Auction.
In 1993 Etched Images introduced an innovative dipping wax called NoChip Dip. This dipping wax had an appealing bright shine and didn’t chip & flake like the French wax presently in use.
Another early innovation was the popular technique developed by David Lincoln was Blackened bottles. This process simulates a full bottle of red wine and is a cost effective marketing tool. 
Etched Images has earned a reputation for high quality design, workmanship, and service, thus putting the Company in a position to compete for business from a strong, growing market. 
Etched Images is truly proud of its relatively small but handpicked staff of 22 and our great reputation!

Name: Corner 103
Description:
Corner 103 was founded by Lloyd Davis as a result of his passion for wine and recognizing that most people are intimidated by it.

Committed to continuing his track record for producing award-winning wines, Sonoma County was selected as the ideal location to introduce his newest brand. 

Corner 103 is crafting limited production wines that showcase each varietal as well as the region in which they grow. Each wine comes from a different American Viticulture Area (AVA) of Sonoma County. In selecting a varietal, Lloyd took into consideration the soil conditions, weather and vineyard location, all of which affect the flavor characteristics of the grape. This allows him the ability to create very approachable wines that reflect the true quality of that region. 

Corner 103 is also about creating a unique experience where wine is explored and discussed in a relaxed and fun environment. Lloyd wants you to learn all about his wines in a friendly, non-intimidating way. As a result, you will explore seven wines in a seated comfortable environment. There will be no more than 10 guests at any time.

Name: AKO wine & spirits AB
Description: AKO wine and spirits import premium wines and spirit products from around the World into the Nordic marketplace.

Name: Four Seasons Wines Ltd.
Description: Four Seasons Wines is privately held  and one of the wine manufacturing companies in India.

Name: Thicker Than Water Wines
Description:
Thicker Than Water wines is a family owned and operated wine producers with a passion to create not only amazing wines, but also a memorable experience and service that resonates the McLaren Vale region. 

For us, many of our values and beliefs are embodied in family, and the words ‘Thicker than Water’ felt like the perfect reflection of this and in turn the ideal name of our brand. We see our customers as an extension of this and want to create a sense of community, belonging, and relationship in a world where people want to be a part of something. We want to take you on a journey, we want you to change how you feel and we want to share some bloody good wine!

Operated by Mary and John Greer, who along with their son and winemaker Campbell Greer and son and daughter, Mark Greer and Laura Odell, they share over 60 years of Industry experience. 

With a vision to 'Capture the essence of a time and place by constantly striving to create the World's most memorable and desirable wines'.

Name: MORACO sarl
Description:
Moraco is a distributor of a wide range of quality alcoholic beverages and spirits across Lebanon. We have a varied client base which includes wholesalers, class A supermarkets, mini markets, restaurants, pubs, and hotels.
We import from Germany, Italy and Poland and are sole distributors of Lebanese products as well.
Our products include:
Chateau Ora
Chateau de la Plaine (Lebanese & Italian Organic Wine)
Paradis Vin
Scavi & Ray (Sparkling Wine)
Zago Sparkling Wine
Perla Rosa sparkling wine
Warsteiner Beer
Polishland Vodka
Cazcabel Tequila
Clan McGuire Whiskey
Chateau Khoury (Wine & Arak)
and many more.

Name: Fadandel.dk ApS
Description: Fadandel.dk sælger single malt whisky, der er aftappet ved fadstyrke. Fadandel.dk er importør og har derfor mulighed for at hente kvalitets whisky hjem fornuftige penge uden fordyrende mellemled. I shoppen er der også mulighed for at købe whisky tilbehør (sample flasker, Glas og andet tilbehør). Endvidere, er der mulighed for at købe andele i de fade Fadandel.dk ejer, og på den måde blive medejer og få nogle gode flasker til billige penge. Fadandel.dk hjælper også privatpersoner og foreninger, med hjemtagelse af aftappede flasker/fade.

Name: Vinicola Punto y Aparte
Description:
Las reglas de ortografía señalan que el punto y aparte establece el fin de un párrafo dando comienzo a uno nuevo donde se desarrolla una idea distinta pero dentro de una misma lógica siguiendo el hilo conductor del texto.
 
Con esta nueva serie de vinos que comienza con el Punto No. 1 queremos deleitar a nuestros clientes con vinos que representan nuestro amor por el vino y en especial por los vinos mexicanos de Baja California.

Puede parecer extraño a primera vista utilizar un signo de puntuación como concepto para este nuevo proyecto vinícola, pero no es menos cierto que nuestro proyecto vital, tras más de 10 años de historia, ha transcurrido por diferentes fases y justo ahora estamos escribiendo las primeras etapas de un nuevo capítulo.
 
Las familias Poncelis Urrutia y Espino Poncelis continúan disfrutando su pasión por elaborar vinos de calidad que se suman a la interesantísima propuesta del Vino Mexicano.

Esperamos que los disfruten, Salud !!

Name: Cellar 55 Premium Wine Storage
Description:
Established in 2006, Cellar 55 is a premium wine storage facility serving the greater Portland/Vancouver metro area.  Our 9,000 square foot, state of the art facility maintains a constant 55 degrees and 70% humidity.  We are located just minutes from I-5 in downtown, historic Vancouver, WA.  

We provide wine storage to private collectors as well as commercial bonded wine storage for wineries, importers and distributors.  We can accommodate any wine collection - from a couple of cases to 500+ cases of wine.

Name: UBALM / Une Bouteille A La Mer
Description: Vente de Spiritueux de Micros-Distilleries Français

Name: Bainbridge Vineyards
Description: Bainbridge Vineyards is home to authenticity and craft; specializing in delicate, award-winning white wines grown in the Puget Sound AVA. We produce 1,200 cases of wine annually - exclusively from our certified organic estate vineyards. Woman-owned and woman-led, draft horse-powered, and B Corp certified - we live sustainable agriculture and responsible stewardship.

Name: Bunnell Family Cellar
Description:
Our Bunnell Family Cellar and RiverAerie brands are distributed in select markets throughout the United States including: Oregon, Illinois- Chicago, Louisiana, North Carolina, New Hampshire, Florida....COMING SOON to West Virginia, Wisconsin, Texas, Michigan, and Ohio.

Review the Washington section of the April 30 Issue of the Wine Spectator and you will notice that Bunnell Family Cellar CLEANED HOUSE!! You've got to get a bottle of Bunnell with scores like 93!

Please check out our tasting room and wine bar featuring Susan Bunnell's delectable culinary creations...
www.wineoclockwinebar.com!

Name: DR Distillery LLC
Description:
At DR Distillery, we proudly hand craft & distill whiskies, rum, & vodka using techniques handed down over the generations. Local grains, spring water, copper stills, a “backwood’s” heritage, and proud craftsmanship come together in every distilled spirit we produce.

The distillery is located on a farm outside Slippery Rock, PA and we have a tasting/sales area where you can sample our spirits, purchase bottled spirits and purchase mixed drinks crafted with our spirits. Gather around our hand hewn stone bar, enjoy the scenery and relaxing environment on the front porch, and see how DR Distillery spirits are handcrafted in our free tours. 

From grain malting to cooperage to propagation of our own yeast strain, DR Distillery is committed to constantly expanding what we do. The “old timers” who taught us whiskey making & self-reliance did it themselves and made quality whiskey they were proud of. Folks loved it then and we believe folks will now. There are easier ways to make whiskey, just not DR Distillery hand crafted whiskey.

Name: South Coast Distillery
Description: South Coast Distillery was established in early 2017, and operations finally began in December 2018. In April 2019, their first commercial release 'Batch Zero Gin' was awarded Gold at the Australian Distilled Spirits Awards, and went on to take out Champion Australian Small Batch Spirit. It was also awarded a Silver Medal at the 2019 San Francisco World Spirits Competition. Batch Zero has been re-released as Sublime Gin and is available now.

Name: Simply Sommelier
Description: Simply Sommelier is a sommelier service for private individuals, corporations and restaurants.  We have a range of services from organizing tasting events at private parties to designing and managing wine lists for restaurants.

Name: Beaujolais Wine Company
Description: Started in 2014 with a portfolio of wine producers in the Rhone-Alps region of France, we are an entrepreneurship that is focused on introducing new and small wineries to India.

Name: Chez Madiran
Description:
Vous êtes plutôt bons vins ou plutôt beaux souvenirs ? 
Nous, on sait faire les deux ! 

Côté vins, on est accompagnée de 20 vignerons de l’appellation Madiran au grand coeur en bio, Hve ou encore en agriculture raisonnée dont la seule ambition est de combler vos papilles.

Nous vous proposons aussi de venir à la rencontre de ces vignerons :  dégustation insolite, pique-nique épicurien, initiation à l’oenologie, visite de domaines, faites nous part de vos souhaits... on se chargera de les réaliser.

Name: Katy Moore Wines
Description: Katy Moore Wines was created by a Bon Vivant/Sommelier with the goal of making great wines accessible to Ontarians. We import and represent a handful of small family operated wineries from around the world. If you are looking for a fun group event let Katy Moore Wines help. We make wine shopping easy by offering cellar stocking (think personal shopper for wines) that are tailored to your tastes and selected by Katy Moore, Sommelier. Lastly, we offer group tastings and staff training for the hospitality industry as well as the private sector. If you love wine and want to have great bottles every time without the stress of purchasing from the LCBO let Katy Moore Wines be of assistance. * all wines & Spirits come through the LCBO or importers via the LCBO.

Name: Wanderlust Wines (US)
Description: Wanderlust Wines is a direct-to-consumer focused company that partners with wineries to help them establish a foothold in the United States wine market, build brand recognition, as well as grow and maintain a direct customer base in the US.

Name: Wapato Point Cellars
Description:
Our wines are made with a clear focus on quality that begins in our local vineyards. Hand picked, sorted and crafted, the cool climate of Lake Chelan lends itself to growing the perfect wines.

We're looking for dynamic sales reps to lend their flair for the exotic in marketing our wines throughout Western WA & beyond.

Name: G.H. Martel Collection
Description:
The G.H.Martel Collection offers an unprecedent Heritage of Champagne Houses and Brands but also Growers producers from the most prestigious Terroirs. Independant family owned and operated by the Rapeneau Family, who has been producing Champagne for over a century.
Today with a 4th generation of “Savoir-Faire” and with an ownership of 200 Hectares of Vineyards, we have become one of the largest Champagne producer as a Family. 
Through the quality of our land and the excellence of our methods, our Champagnes offers an inimitable style created to delight and make every great occasion special.

Champagne G.H.Martel Cie - Champagne Victoire - Champagne Charles de Cazanove - Champagne Ernest Rapeneau – Champagne Vieille France - Champagne Château de Bligny  - Champagne Charles Orban – Champagne Paul-Louis Martin 

Drink responsibly – L’abus d’alcool est dangereux pour la santé. A consommer avec modération.

Name: Dayse
Description:
Dayse is a new kind of social drink - alcohol-free, functional, and designed to support how you want to feel.
We blend adaptogens and nootropics to create refreshing drinks that help you unwind, focus, or uplift your mood - without the downsides of alcohol. Rooted in culture and crafted for modern lifestyles, Dayse is leading a shift toward more mindful, feel-good drinking.

Name: Be Tini Spirits
Description:
Be Tini Spirits is a low calorie premium cocktail. Only 20 tini calories per ounce! Be Tini cocktails are made with the most premium spirits. Lemon drop, Appletini, & Cake contain 6 times distilled vodka. Lime Margarita contain premium silver tequila. 
Our Mission also includes making a tini difference by supporting numerous charities throughout the year. 

You can find more information about Be Tini by visiting our website at www.betinispirits.com

Name: Les tonalités du vin / Nicolas Fouilleroux
Description:
Divins Accords propose :
- des formations en oenologie, des sessions de prépararation aux examens type WSET, Som, Masters.
- l'organisation d'événements liant musique et dégustation de vins, 
- des dégustations didactiques et thématiques en entreprise ou chez des particuliers,
- du conseil en vin notamment pour la constitution et l'organisation de cave, de cartes des vins.

Name: Stafford Distillery
Description: We are a craft distillery based in Stafford specialising in premium Gin, premium wheat Vodka, naturally flavoured vodka and liquers. Contract distilling welcome.

Name: Cavaway Retail Shop
Description:
Welcome to the biggest range of alcoholic drinks in Cyprus!

Our House of Drinks is a one of a kind store over 1000 sq/m whose purpose was to gather all brands of all importing and local companies and host them under the same roof. We also provide bartending lessons, a wine and whisky club whilst organising events.

Name: Bespoke Cellar Pte Ltd
Description:
Bespoke Cellar is passionate about people and wines! 

We are a boutique wine importer and distributor, specializing in contemporary, boutique hand-crafted premium wines. We select established boutique wineries which are dedicated to making wines of distinction from their vineyards in their region.  These wineries share the same values as Bespoke Cellar, they are passionate in producing memorable wines for their customers.
     
Bespoke Cellar has the courage to be different. From the wines selection to the way we conduct our business. We strive to provide our clients with personal and unique experiences through their interactions with wines and wine-related activities to enhance their enjoyment, and made their encounters with our wines a memorable one.

We import directly from the wineries, reducing any additional costs from the value chain, bringing value-for-money wines to our customers.  We know the wineries’ owners personally and are frequently in dialogues with them; providing feedback on the clients’ needs and tailoring the range of wines for our discerning clients.

Name: Gourvid
Description: We import wines from carefully selected family wineries located in some of the best sub-regions of Argentina, Chile, Brazil and Spain. We focus on artisan, single vineyard, small production, estate grown, environmentally friendly wines.

Name: Redoux Wine
Description: Redoux Wine was formed to implicitly bring boutique, family owned wines and wineries to the Texas wine enthusiast.  Redoux started with one winery out of Napa, California, and has since grown to help wineries from all over the world find a home in the Texas marketplace.

Name: LA VIS S.C.A.
Description: La Vis is a vineyard and winery that produces and sells wines.

Name: Rex Pickett's Sideways Brand (#SidewaysWine)
Description:
Named "Sideways," after the Oscar-winning movie that my novel gave birth to, these are affordable wines for the anxious and subversive youth of today who will right the wrongs of this imperiled planet of ours. Let the revolution begin. 
Cheers – Rex Pickett

Name: GustUP.com - Sourcing spirits with a story to tell
Description:
GustUP research and imports from around the world new ideas for the Food and Beverage industry and aims to serve as a new distribution of professionals ho.re.ca.

GustUP offers only products are hard to find or rare, for which it’s the exclusive distributor for the Italian or European market. GustUP supports small distilleries around the world in accessing structured and complex markets such as Europe, participates in the development of new foods, invests in medium-term projects directly in the countries of origin.

Due to the specific characteristics and potential of the individual producers, some products advertised on this site will be provided by reservation only.

You can also contact us also if you want to search for specific references, if you want to study product lines to mark or if you want to coordinate customizations. We are always looking for Italian and foreign partners to jointly develop products and innovative ideas.

Name: Wheeler's Raid Distillery
Description: We are a small craft distillery located in Nolensville, TN! Our focus here at Wheeler’s Raid is on HONORING the craft, traditions, and heritage of bourbon! Our process allows us to preserve quality from barrel to bottle.

Name: Cutler's Artisan Spirits
Description: Cutler's Artisan Spirits is a micro-distillery dedicated to producing the finest locally crafted spirits, including Vodka, Gin, Whiskey, and other experimental spirits. Located in the heart of downtown Santa Barbara's Funk Zone, just 2 blocks from Stearn's Wharf, the beach, and the Amtrak station. Cutler's Distillery is surrounded by over a dozen top quality local wineries/tasting rooms, breweries, restaurants, bars, and other craft businesses. The distillery is a result of years of hard work by owner and head distiller, Ian Cutler, who continues a long family history in the spirits business dating back to the prohibition era. Come visit the distillery, meet Ian, and see how a passion for crafting spirits translates into top quality products.

Name: Pirathon Wines Pty Ltd
Description:
Pirathon Shiraz showcases and celebrates the pinnacle north-western Barossa region and pinnacle Barossa grape with a complex and distinguished wine.

Pirathon Shiraz is a full bodied wine encompassing the great flavour, texture and structure of the north-western Barossa. Higher altitude, gullies, hills, slopes, and undulations provide different topographies, microclimates and individualistic parcels of grapes with unique flavours and characters from their own site.

Grapes for Pirathon are grown by dedicated high quality growers in the Greenock, Moppa, Belvedere, Stonewell, Seppeltsfield, Koonunga and Ebenezer districts of the north-western Barossa.

Many of these growers' families have been growing grapes here for generations.

The grapes for Pirathon Shiraz are traditionally handcrafted in open top fermenters and basketpressed before maturing in barrel. Each vineyard adds its own exclusive dimension to Pirathon Shiraz and combined they produce the ultimate blend.

Name: Bon Wine
Description: Specialized in negotiation and exportation between France and China. Good connections with French vineyards and Chinese clients.

Name: Super Cellars
Description: Super Cellars is a liquor store that sells beer, wine, and spirits.

Name: Vinetrade
Description:
Vinetrade is a platform for building and managing wine portfolios. We make it easy for collectors, investors and merchants to buy, sell and track the value of fine wine online.

Our aim is to bring much needed transparency to the fine wine and wine investment markets and provide a consumer orientated, online service.

Name: Mosso Wines
Description:
In 1909 the brothers Juan Bautista and Antonio Mosso - Italian immigrants -  built their winery in Luján de Cuyo, with a capacity of five million litres. The wines were produced from French grapes, today known as Malbec, grown in the estate located in Lunlunta, Maipú, Mendoza. In the 80´ the tribulations and trials of the economy significantly reduced the company´s assets; but the owners never tried bankruptcy tricks. The winery closed its doors after 82 years of hard work, leaving in its descendants a deep wound of work tenacity and austerity 

In 2002 cousins Ernesto and Pablo Mosso, Juan Bautista and Antonio´s respective great-grandchildren, followed the family tradition and began making wines again. Their flagship wine is Malbec, which is produced the family´s old vines grown in Lunlunta. By Appellation Law # 25.163, Mosso Estate, located in Lunlunta, had obtained, the right and protection to use the appellation LUNLUNTA. Due to its unique characteristics grapes carrying the appellation LUNLUNTA are considered fit for producing high quality wines

Mosso´s philosophy in this new phase is to produce premium wines, avoiding any sacrifices to product and packaging quality. No short-term course action is taken, even if finantially attractive, when it is against the company´s goal of producing high-end wines. The vineyards are carefully monitored by the Agronomist Juan Giugno, who implementes a strict quality control regimen  throughout the winemaking process. “Famiglia Mosso” wines are exclusive, limited in production. Boutique wines, produced at a Boutique winery

Name: Le 4e mur
Description:
Bar secret speakeasy pour amateurs de cocktails.
Secret speakeasy bar for cocktail amateurs.
www.le4emur.com

Name: Moseley Family Cellars
Description: Moseley Family Cellars is an offline and online store that offers a comprehensive range of red, white, and rose wine products.

Description: cantina, vigneto a conduzione naturale, camere e appartamenti vacanze, prima colazione da forno e ristorazione a km 0. Agriturismo e piscina.

Name: Crooked Palm Distillery
Description: "Enjoy an island-style cocktail with exceptional taste and no compromise in flavor!! Shipping Now Available #simplyparadise

Name: CUMBERLAND BREWERIES LIMITED
Description: Cumberland Breweries produce delicious real ales, lagers and stout including Finn McCool, Corby Ale, Corby Noir, Corby Fox & Corby, Blonde.

Name: Champagne Camus-Laluc
Description:
Champagne Camus-Laluc est un domaine situé à Sarcy. 
Dans un petit village de 244 habitants situé à 18 km de Reims et 25 km d’Epernay (capitale du champagne). Il se situe dans la Vallée de l’Ardre.
Nous sommes Récoltants Coopérateurs, c’est-à-dire que nos raisins sont emmenés en coopérative pour y être pressés. Le mélange avec des raisins d’autres terroirs confère à notre champagne son goût particulièrement apprécié.
Nos vignes sont plantées pour la plupart sur des coteaux. Nos plants sont exclusivement composés de Pinots-Meuniers. Leur bonne adaptation aux terroirs calcaires en font un cépage de prédilection en Champagne et sont utilisés uniquement pour l’élaboration de vins effervescents.

Name: SĒPIŌ Vineyard
Description:
SĒPIŌ Vineyard er startet af tre brødre – Christian, Michael og Carl Martin Borcher. I 2007 besluttede vi os for at forfølge vores drøm om at producere californiske vine.

Efter års søgning nord for San Francisco i Californiens Wine Country fandt vi et stykke jord med de helt perfekte forhold: en 25 hektar bjergside på toppen af Mayacamas bjergene mellem Sonoma og Napa Valley. Bjergtoppen havde aldrig før været dyrket, endsige beboet, og var omgivet af mere end 1.000 hektar naturreservat – et naturskønt, uberørt og fantastisk smukt bjerg med en rivende flod, gigantiske redwood træer og, vigtigst af alt, en 3 hektar sydvest vendt skråning med to typer stenet, vulkansk jord. Perfekt til vindyrkning!

SĒPIŌ vinene frigives direkte fra vores vingård to gange om året og sælges udelukkende via vores allokeringsliste, som du kan skrive dig op til på http://sepiovineyard.com

Name: Favourite International pvt Ltd
Description: Favourite International Pvt Ltd imports and distributes wines and non-alcoholic beverages from multiple countries.

Name: Donesvi
Description:
Wine Club
Wine tours
Wine tastings
Spain
Andorra

Name: Aperitif Hour LLC
Description: Aperitif Hour is a cocktail, wine & spirits communication and education company. We specialize in lifestyle and educational presentation to connect our clients with top bartenders, sommeliers, world press and refined consumers.

Name: Lucidity Wine Merchants
Description:
Importers and distributors of fine artisanal wines.
We represent wines that are clear expressions of the grape(s) they are made from, of the place where they are made and of the grower that has made them.
For us, clarity of expression is paramount and more important than dogmatic winemaking. We only work with small, artisanal winegrowers practicing sustainable/organic/biodynamic farming and low-intervention winemaking.

Name: WINE GURU
Description:
WINE GURU is a french wine merchant founded in 2020, and managed by Antoine COUILLABIN LOISELIER.

The company focuses on peasant winegrowers producing organics, biodynamics, & natural wine but not only enclose ourselves in organic, what matters the most is the tasting, the terroirs, and the producer's work above all !

We work on B2C with event & online sales,  and also on B2B markets as a wine talent agent, specialized in the French & European Horeca market and e-business .

Name: Le Cartel des Spiritueux Familiaux
Description:
5 Producteurs, 5 Appellations se trouvent réunis autour d’un savoir-faire, d’histoires familiales, de convictions et de spiritueux à fortes personnalités.

L’ARMAGNAC : les Bas Armagnac Darroze, artisans éleveurs d’Armagnacs en Gascogne
LE CALVADOS : le Domaine familial Louis Dupont, producteur de Calvados et de Cidres en Basse Normandie
LE MARC DE BOURGOGNE : La Maison Jacoulot, productrice de Marcs et de Fines de Bourgogne, 
de liqueurs et de crèmes de fruits en Bourgogne
LE WHISKY : Maison Michel Couvreur éleveur de Whiskies en Bourgogne
LE COGNAC : Domaine Drouet, producteur de Cognac Grande Champagne 1er Cru, en Charente 

Plus que l’amitié et que le plaisir de partager leurs spiritueux mutuels, des valeurs les réunissent :

L’HERITAGE : Les 5 Maisons du Cartel des Spiritueux Familiaux s’inscrivent dans une histoire familiale, dont le nom est devenu le gage fort d’une qualité, chacune portant l’héritage de fortes personnalités, précurseurs dans leurs 
domaines. Cette transmission de générations en générations, s’est faite par le respect d’un savoir-faire, dans le 
prolongement de techniques et de connaissances, ainsi que de gestes acquis et perpétués dans le temps. 

LE SAVOIR-FAIRE : Un point commun à tous est cette patience et cette gestion du temps, nécessaire et 
incontournable, qui sauront révéler un terroir, un distillat et obtenir les saveurs et les équilibres espérés. 
En revanche, par un savoir-faire personnalisé, un soin donné à chaque détail, un respect et un amour du spiritueux, chacun révèle un esprit unique et reconnaissable par tout amateur.

LA DIVERSITE : Une fois l’esprit de chaque maison bien identifié, il est de la curiosité de chacun d’essayer, 
de risquer, et de proposer. Justement, grâce à des racines profondément ancrées, chaque Maison du Cartel propose 
de nouveaux horizons tout en respectant son héritage.

L’ARTISANAT : Sans sûreté, remettant toujours tout en question, le travail de distillateur, d’éleveur, d’assembleur devient un art. Par une production limitée, privilégiant toujours la qualité à la quantité, privilégiant le geste à 
l’automatisme, l’âme des membres du Cartel se retrouvent dans leurs bouteilles.

L’HORIZON : Tels des ambassadeurs, distribuées dans de nombreux pays, les bouteilles qui portent l’image de ces 5 maisons emmènent avec elles un goût de la France.

Name: Land of Promise Wine
Description: Land of Promise produces Sonoma Coast Pinot Noir made exclusively with grapes grown at Terra de Promissio

Name: Antalva Imports
Description: Importers and Distributors of Fine Spanish and Portuguese Wines

Name: Selective Spirits, Inc.
Description: Importor, distributor and marketing company of fine premium Spirits from Mexico. We represent some of Mexico's top artisan Tequila and Mezcal distilleries. Some of the brands in our portfolio are: Tequila Cava Don Anastacio, Caballito Cerrero and Tequila El Toril.  We are also working in a new Certified Organic Mezcal, a 5 year old Mezcal certified by Consejo Regulatorio de la Calidad del Mezcal, A.C.

Name: Chronic Spirits
Description:
Chronic Spirits is an ultra-premium range of alcoholic beverages for the discerning and enlightened drinker. This is the future; until legalisation allows more psychoactive ingredients to come into our lives, we are still championing themost accepted and fully legal party ingredient, alcohol. 

The flavours and tastes have been crafted with cannabis.However, the psychoactive ingredients, THC and CBD, are not present for legal reasons.
We begin our story with making something legendary, all-inclusive, for everyone, yet…

Northern Lights is exquisitely unique. It connects with the collective dynamic; smooth and satisfying, reaching every inch of your being. A drink that silences the noise and puts everyone into the clear.
The Chronic Spirits brand offers high-end alcoholic spirits layered with rich natural cannabis botanical flavours.

We aim to capture the imagination through our drinks and inspire creativity and innovation, such as the Chronic Spirits world-first ultraviolet activated wrap-around label.

Name: dvedeci.cz
Description:
Dvě Deci - Učte se degustovat a objevujte vína z pohodlí domova s www.dvedeci.cz. Projekt pod záštitou celosvětově uznávaného sommeliera Jean Michel Deluca.

Petit Gurman s.r.o. is operating the brand Dvě Deci by le Petit ballon and the website www.dvedeci.cz
It is because we didn't know what to buy but knew it was not the right quality that we started this project. 

Our principles :
- Wine must answer to one simple question : is it good? yes or no. 
- There is only one border in wine: between the good and the bad.

Name: Absolute Organic Wine Limited
Description: Importers of quality Organic Biodynamic, Vegan and Natural wines into Ireland.  Our wine list is growing Organically.  Our Winemakers are all independent Organic & Biodynamic, Natural and Vegan certified growers.

Name: Pierro Margaret River Vineyards
Description:
Family-run vineyard in the heart of Margaret River, paradise wine country just south of Perth, Western Australia. Founded in 1979 by Dr. Michael Peterkin, who continues to run the winery with his loyal team and son Nic Peterkin.

Dr. Peterkin was the first winemaker in Australia to make the red Bordeaux Blend and the first in Western Australia to promote the Semillon/Sauvignon blend which has since become the most popular wine to come out of WA.

Best known for his award-winning Chardonnay (5th most drunk Charonnay in Australia) and the L.T.C (Little Touch of Chardonnay) Semillon/Sauvignon blend, which graced the table of the Australian Prime Minister in its Special Christmas Edition form.

Dr. Peterkin has spent the last 15 years refining his red wines to match the perfection of his whites, and the attention to detail has paid off. His Cabernet/Merlot Reserve and LTCf (Little Touch of Cab. Franc) rate consistently high with the critics.

Wines sold throughout Australia, China, Belgium and the UK. Available in London through Jeroboams and Laytons.

Name: FirstCellars.com
Description:
"If we would not spend our own money on it, we don't sell it”                                                            
                                                           - First Cellars rule #1

Buying good wine in China is complicated, so we started FirstCellars.com. We offer high-quality, good-value wines and other alcohol beverages at attractive prices delivering anywhere in China. Its not just something we say, it’s our promise.

Name: The Winery at Sovereign Estate
Description:
Sovereign Estate is located on the scenic North Shore of Lake Waconia and boasts an impressive Estate Vineyard of over 30 picturesque acres. The vineyard was planted in stages with Marquette being the first in the ground in 2007, followed shortly by LaCrescent and Frontenac Blanc. Ten years after the original vineyard was planted, an additional 20 acres were added to the Estate which include Frontenac, Frontenac Gris and Itasca, as well as more Marquette and LaCrescent.

We produce only the highest-quality fine wines and have approximately 12 different varietals and vintages at any given time. Many of our wines have received national recognition at esteemed competitions and been awarded medals, including Double-Gold, from the prestigious San Francisco Chronicle Wine Competition.

Ben Banks serves as Head Winemaker and Isaac Sovereign as Head Viticulturist. 

The Winery at Sovereign Estate is a family-owned and managed estate vineyard and winery. Open year-round for retail wine sales, wine tastings, bistro dining, live music, festivals, and so much more!

Name: Natures Bounty Wines & Allied Products Pvt.Ltd.
Pulido~Walker Cellars
Description:
Pulido~Walker Cellars is a limited production family winery crafting extraordinary single vineyard designate Cabernet Sauvignon wines authentic to their unique terroir made by award-winning winemaker Thomas Rivers Brown. 

We chose three remarkable vineyard sites where the natural alchemy of geography, soil, climate and clone combine to yield a 100% Cabernet Sauvignon and Chardonnay greater than the sum of its parts. 

The first--Melanson Vineyard is located on the steep slopes of Pritchard Hill among some of the most highly regarded and closely held vineyard properties in Napa Valley. 

The best 15 acres of our Mount Veeder Estate are now planted -- 75 % to Cabernet Sauvignon and 25% to Chardonnay. 

Pulido~Walker’s Policy Estate Vineyard is located on State Lane in the center of the Yountville appellation north of Kapscándy, surrounded by spectacular views of the Mayacamas and Vaca mountain ranges as well as the Stags Leap Palisades.

Pulido~Walker is the journey in the "patient pursuit of the possible."

Name: The Wine Exporter
Description:
The Wine Exporter is an independent entrepreneurial company which represents and supports Italian companies dealing with international trade activities (both import and export) and interested in growing on foreign markets.

Founded in 2017, Greenpollice is a member of Confcommercio Imprese per l'Italia and Confcommercio Imprese per l’Italia.

Thanks to years of accrued experience and to its consistently up-to-date organizational structure, The Wine Exporter is a strategic gateway for foreign companies interested in either exporting their products to Italy or importing Italian products.

The Wine Exporter represents Italian companies that are committed predominantly to commercial activities abroad: trading, export, import, countertrade, buying-offices, export management, small and medium enterprises, etc; as well as the services related to such activities.

Collaboration is open to all companies resident in Italy and interested in international trade activities, or that provide assistance to such companies in the promotion and furtherance of import/export activities (i.e. financial and logistic services, export credit insurance, certifications, etc.).

On the other hand, The Wine Exporter supports foreign companies interested in the Italian market by assisting them in the search for potential Italian business partners, (suppliers, buyers, distributors, agents and so on), offering a consolidated wealth of professionalism, contacts and knowledge.

Name: El Brabantino
Description:
El Brabantino started as a small wine boutique in Madrid and is an international point of reference for different and exciting wines in Madrid. Since 2012 we have been exporting the best wines under our own El Brabantino label meaning that you can still enjoy our wines outside of Spain.

The name El Brabantino derives from the region we’re from ; the province of Brabant in the Netherlands. The company was founded in 2012 and has been growing  into a ´Madrileño´ hotspot where a diverse and international crowd enjoys our wines and participates in our events. We love to experiment, find new wines and share our discoveries with our customers. We are especially interested in smaller wineries from lesser known wine regions, as they usually produce extraordinary wines at very affordable prices.

Furthermore, we organize all sorts of wine related events, such as wine tastings, wine tourism, presentations, visits to wine fairs, local distribution and  import & export.

Name: Amroth
Description: Amroth connects beverage alcohol Suppliers with Retailers and Consumers using a seamless and modern approach.

Name: Elvama
Description: Gegroeid uit een passie zijn we in 2010 begonnen met het importeren van Zuid-Afrikaanse wijnen en producten in Belgie. Zuid-Afrika heeft een wijnhistorie van meer dan 3 eeuwen. Elvama wil klasse wijnen in België verkopen. We speuren de markt af naar wijndomeinen die vooral passie uitstralen, dynamisme tonen en streven naar perfectie. Niet de kwantiteit is belangrijk, wel de kwaliteit. Daarenboven streven we ernaar om de wijnen betaalbaar te houden. Naast de wijnen voert Elvama een aantal exclusieve producten in die u de typische Zuid-Afrikaanse ervaring bieden: gins, kruidenmixes, pesto’s, marinades, jams, chutneys, tonics tot en met lifestyle producten zoals handtassen.

Name: Maison Grand Royal
Description:
MGR is a unique company of it's genre, a  blend of two cultures. Founded in Bordeaux in 2014, We have cultivated a pioneering relationship with many of the most prestigious producers in the Bordeaux and Champagne-Ardenne regions. 

Our wines are results of researches driven by passion and love for the vines in partnership alongside the most inspired winegrowers coupled with their unique terroirs. We pride ourselves through the aspiration that every detail is relevant to the art of winemaking. 

Our quest is inspired by the sense of pioneer-ship, a balance between extravagance, refinement and tradition. We never settle or sacrifice quality. Our commitment to this passionate journey is creating great beverages with the end result of providing a unique product of epitome with elegance and sophistication. 

We aim to introduce to the fast growing Nigerian market, a trend of gem of the most impeccable quality and the knowledge that are relevant to the wine consumer.

Name: Catoctin Breeze Vineyard
Description: A boutique family-owned winery committed to producing quality wines where terroir and passion is reflected in each bottle produced.

Name: White Rose Estate
Description: White Rose Estate is a small, artisanal winery producing roughly 3,500 cases annually. White Rose specializes in handcrafted whole cluster Pinot Noirs with the goal of illuminating the complex and evocative nature of classic Pinot Noirs. We employ a modern approach in combination with traditional winemaking techniques that embraces and contributes to the path that generations of winemakers have laid before us. With meticulously maintained grounds, sweeping views of the Willamette Valley, and the warm and inviting aesthetic of the tasting room, one is transported through a timeless experience.

Name: Tin Barn Vineyards
Description: Popular artisan winery specializing in single-vineyard offerings from Napa and Sonoma.

Name: BOXX Wine Racks Denmark
Description:
BOXX Wine Racks develops and refine wine racks for wine storage and wine displays, for all industries in the wine business.
Our production is based in Weifang in Shandong Province in China, from where we distribute our products to clients all over the world.

We also manufacture OEM and Private Label wine racks and wine accessories for our export clients, and do 3rd party manufactoring of other types of products.

Name: Mezcal Exhibit
Description:
Mezcal Exhibit 2020.  17 to 20, June, 2020
The Artisan and Ancestral Mezcal Exhibit. The world wild true Mezcal expo. Where Mezcal buyers, producers, experts and Mezcal lovers meet. Make your booking.
https://mezcalexhibit.com
Location: Col. Nápoles. Benito Juárez, Ciudad de México

Name: Cedev
Description:
At  CEDEV,  our  mission  is  to  find  one-of-a-kind vineyard and it’s wines bring them to  you  through.  We manage  a  collection  of  exceptional wines from Europe’s best wine regions.

We  bring  you  our  new  classics  and  exclusive  wines  made  for  us by  renowned  producers,  so  for  example:  exceptional  offerings from  family  estates  (bodega)  of  Spain  in  Rioja,  Monsant  etc…or from  the  Falesco  domain  and  more  in  Italy,  and  of  course prestigious  “Grand  Crus”  from  selected  French  Chateau,  from Bordeaux  region  (Margaux,  Graves,  Lalande  de  Pomerol  etc..) as well as a Burgundy selection and  “Champagne”.

Name: Cantina Colline Pisane
Description:
Una Cantina che percorre la storia della viticoltura Toscana; più di 50 anni di selezioni, passione e attenzione verso il cliente senza mai dimenticare le proprie origini delle tradizioni Toscane. 
Fondata nel 1961 per volontà di 11 viticoltori proprietari delle più grandi Tenute Agricole dell'epoca è oggi una realtà Italiana molto importante anche in campo internazionale, facendo della qualità e del territorio gli obiettivi principali. 
Toscana, terra dove si fondono arte, storia e cultura creando un'affascinante fusione di bellezza e gusto. Qui, e soprattutto in tutto  il territorio, si conservano ancora ben radicate le tradizioni contadine che si intrecciano con le nuove tendenze del mercato enologico, esprimendo con forza una vocazione vitivinicola dalle enormi potenzialità.

Name: Big Wine Glasses
Description: Big Wine Glasses aims to simplify and improve upon the wine glass buying experience. Big wine glasses allow wines to open up more fully, releasing all the amazing layers and notes in the taste of a great wine. Try our Big Wine Glasses today!

Name: The Wine Connection
Description: The Wine Connection is an online store that offers wines and gift packs.

Name: Pilot Knob Vineyard
Description:
Pilot Knob Vineyard - Named for the prominent volcanic formation some 6 miles southeast of the vineyard, Pilot Knob brings a new perspective to wine making in Texas. Perched on a ridge overlooking the beautiful Texas Hill Country, Pilot Knob provides an ambience that is uniquely Texas, while delivering a wine experience that is unlike any Texas has ever offered. 

Pilot Knob Vineyard encompasses 112 acres in the Texas Hill Country, just 2.5 miles west of US 183, 14 miles north of Liberty Hill and only 50 miles north of downtown Austin. Pilot Knob sits on the edge of a sweeping ridgeline, overlooking lightly treed rolling hills sloping downward with panoramic hill country views reaching as far as 15 miles. The terrain of the site provides gradual undulations, with elevations from 1,151 feet above sea level to 1,100 feet at its furthest southwest and southeast corners.

Ultimately, Pilot Knob will have 92 acres of vines with six distinct varietals, selected for their exceptional flavor and compatibility with the region.

In the spring of 2011, a Tasting Room opens on the site, and the fruits of our labor (so to speak) will begin to be processed into a wine that will make Texas proud. An amazing experience then awaits the wine lovers who come to visit Pilot Knob.

Name: Mastiha World Ltd.
Description:
Mastiha World Ltd is a startup of young Greek expats and graduate students, which was set up in August 2014 to import two very special mastiha liqueurs to the UK: Kentos and Enosis. Both liqueurs are the premium authentic spirits of the Chios Mastiha Growers' Association (or 'Union', the leading producer and seller of mastiha worldwide) and are handcrafted and bottled on the island of Chios in Greece. 

Mastiha liqueur is made using the aromatic resin of the mastiha tree, which only grows in the southern part of Chios. A combination of the resin crystal distillate, locally sourced agricultural alcohol and finest crystal sugar give our liqueurs their extraordinarily unique and delicious taste. Kentos (meaning 'embroidery' and at 20% abv) takes its name from the mastiha harvesting process, and is an exceptional natural digestif. Enosis (meaning 'Union', at 30% abv) is a superfine exclusive spirit, that offers endless opportunities for cocktail recipes. Together, these spirits represent only the best that mastiha liqueur has to offer: an unparalleled natural, rich and original experience. 

Mastiha World has entered into an exclusive partnership with the Growers' Association to bring the authentic mastiha liqueurs to a UK audience, and is the only UK incorporated and VAT-registered company that specialises in mastiha. We are proud to represent only the finest quality authentic mastiha spirits, and our team is committed to providing personal rapport and direct hands-on support to our customers.

Name: Domaine des Trottières
Description:
Founded in 1890, and Owned by the Lamotte family since 1985, Domaine des Trottières is in Thouarcé to the Heart of Loire Valley, Anjou & Coteaux du Layon Region. Independent winemaker, we’re certified in sustainable agriculture. We produce 18 Wines in 9 AOP…
Anjou Anjou Villages Rosé de Loire Rosé & Cabernet d’Anjou
Anjou Blanc Coteaux du Layon Bonnezeaux Crémant de Loire
Domaine des Trottières offers you the benefit of its acknowledged and consistently rewarded expertise, with a wide range of wines that combine respect for tradition with an innovative approach. The region's characteristics are combined with originality, respecting the heritage and traditions of our Terroir, while at the same time innovating for the future customers.

Name: Juliet & Romeo Wines
Description:
A good bottle of wine can easily transport you back to your favourite place and reconnect you to those deep feelings. A cosy British evening or a warm summer’s night in Greece. 

A glass of fine wine will carry you back to the Mediterranian coastline because no other drink has the potential to captivate an audience as wine does. 

Discover Juliet & Romeo: complex as human nature, simple as love!

Name: Cantina di Sona srl
Description: Cantina di Sona, grazie alla posizione geografica strategica del suo sito industriale, è in grado di offrire servizi logistici e di imbottigliamento di alto livello per il settore vinicolo.

Name: RockWines
Description:
RockWines es un proyecto personal que nace por la inquietud de la enóloga  Patricia Roca que deseaba volver a sus raíces como enóloga.

El nombre es un juego de palabras donde se mezcla el apellido Roca y "vino" (wines) en inglés. Se buscó que el nombre jugara con un toque moderno y a la vez resignificar la palabra "ROCK".

Patricia cumple el sueño de volver a hacer vinos y en 2018 se sumó con su proyecto al grupo de emprendedores que realizan sus vinos en IIVO, Incubadora de Innovación para el Vino y la Oliva (www.iivo.cl ) ahí nace su primer vino; Rocksé, un rosado 100% de Cinsault que ganó en su primera versión la medalla de oro en “Mundial du Rosé” en Cannes, Francia.

Name: Vino Vena
Description:
Import of high quality Italian wines

Winemaking is an art! Controlling a complex interplay between climate, soil, grape and production technique. We represent winemakers who bring these elements to a unique balance. The winemaker-artist fits the description of a stubborn character who is willing to pursuit quality without making compromises. The residue is a bottled peace of liquid art. We are always looking for atypical and unknown wines and grape varieties with exceptional qualities.
 
We strive to make these consumable pieces of art available to a group of passionate wine enthusiasts, professionals and novici. There is a certain amount of afford an attention required to appreciate these high quality wines in their full value. We are offering a helping hand by accompanying the most extravagant wines with specially selected recipe. In addition we have our “enoteca project” in witch we offer sequential years of one wine model in a box, in this way you can experience the signature with al it`s different facets. There is of course an introduction box available with one bottle of each wine model and wine tastings at request.
 
We invite you to the exciting and challenging world of wine!

Name: Puglia Wine Tour
Description: Wine Tour for WINE LOVERS Wine Tour for BUSINESS Collaboration and Tour Operator are welcome!

Name: PAOLO LAZZARONI E FIGLI S.P.A.
Description: PRODUZIONE DI LIQUORI, DI SCIROPPI PER BIBITE ANALCOLICHE LA FABBRICAZIONE, IL COMMERCIO, LA RAPPRESENTANZA DI LIQUORI, DISTILLATI, SCIROPPI, BIBITE, MARMELLATE, VINI, ESTRATTI VEGETALI E PRODOTTI AFFINI E CONNESSI, BISCOTTI, PRODOTTI LIEVITATI DA FORNO NONCHE  QUALSIASI GENERE ALIMENTARE FRESCO, CONSERVATO, SURGELATO

Name: Loring Wine Company
Description:
My name is Brian Loring and my obsession is Pinot Noir. OK, I'm also pretty crazy about Champagne, but that's another story. While in college, I worked at a wine shop in Hollywood (Victor's), where one of the owners was a Burgundy fanatic. So, my very first experiences with Pinot Noir were from producers like Domaine Dujac, Henri Jayer, and DRC. Needless to say, I found subsequent tasting safaris into the domestic Pinot Noir jungle less than satisfying. It wasn't until I literally stumbled into Calera (I tripped over a case of their wine in the store room) that I found a California Pinot Noir that I could love. But it would be quite a while before I found someone else that lived up to the standard that Josh Jensen had established. I eventually came to understand and enjoy Pinots from Williams Selyem, Chalone, and Sanford, but I really got excited about California Pinot Noir when I met Norm Beko from Cottonwood Canyon at an Orange County Wine Society tasting.

I'd made about 3 trips around the booths at the tasting without finding a single good Pinot Noir. So, being the open minded person that I am (remember I passed him up 3 times), I stopped at the Cottonwood booth. I was BLOWN away by Norm's 1990 Santa Maria Pinot Noir. After a few years of attending every Cottonwood event and asking Norm 10,000 questions about winemaking, he offered to let come learn the process during the '97 crush. I checked sugar levels, picked, crushed, punched down, pressed, filled barrels, and generally moved a bunch of stuff around with fork lifts and pallet jacks! It was the time of my life... I was totally hooked. And even though I hadn't planned it, I ended up making two barrels of Pinot Noir. That was the start of the Loring Wine Company. What had started out as a dream 15 years earlier was now a reality - I was a winemaker!

Name: Hermit Woods, LLC
Description:
About Hermit Woods: Founded in 2011, Hermit Woods is a small boutique winery, Eatery, and home of The Loft, the Lakes Region's newest music venue. We are known for crafting fine wine, meads, and ciders and producing farm-to-table cuisine. Our wines and ciders are local (as much as possible), vegan (except the honey wines), gluten-free, raw, and made from non-certified but mostly organic fruit. We always use whole fruit and gentle hand processing. We style our wines, meads, and ciders after classic dry European wines and ciders. Hermit Woods sees over 25,000 visitors in its tasting room and Eatery every year and offers over 80 performances of Jazz and World Music on The Loft stage. Our wines are available throughout New Hampshire and are distributed directly to consumers in 39 states. 
 
Hermit Woods Winery and Deli is located at 72 Main Street in Meredith, NH, and is open seven days a week year-round. You can visit their tasting room 7 days a week, year-round.

Name: Fleur De LA Imports
Description: Wine and Spirits Wholesale business specializing in imported products.

Name: Dameli Wines
Description:
DAMELI, or “at Melina’s”, was established in 2014, marking a breakthrough in the Greek wine market. It is more than fair to say that Melina hand-picks a selection of exquisite wines from wineries composed of not only Italian origin but of origins from all over the world.

DAMELI’s selection is, for the most part, representative of renowned wineries that are dedicated to cultivating vines with love and respect for the soil, emphasizing the importance of sustainable practices. Our goal is to offer eclectic wines that will guide the consumer through a pleasant journey; how typical of the magical world of wine? We proudly allow you to discern wines that will excite your tastebuds and your desire to share the bottle with those who delight you care most. We are always in search of special Wine varieties to complement our product line and satisfy our customer's needs and tastes.

Name: Magnum Cellars
Description:
Magnum Cellars manufactures and distributes high-performance and professional cellars at an excellent price-quality ratio.
Our cellars allow you to keep your wine in the best possible conditions while integrating perfectly with the surrounding aesthetic.

Name: DOMAINE DE BELLE FEUILLE
Description:
Domaine de Belle Feuille – Vins & Terroir en Côtes du Rhône

Depuis 2001, le Domaine de Belle Feuille, situé à Vénéjan (Gard, Occitanie), incarne l’alliance d’un terroir préservé et d’un savoir-faire.

 Notre vocation
Cultiver avec respect, révéler les nuances du terroir, partager le fruit de nos vignes. Nos vins — rouges, blancs, rosés — s’inscrivent dans les appellations Côtes du Rhône, Côtes du Rhône Villages et Villages Chusclan. 

 Nos engagements

Viticulture raisonnée / haute valeur environnementale

Valorisation du patrimoine local
Accueil, découverte et partage (visites, dégustations, animations) 
Production de vins de caractère, accessibles et expressifs

 Ce que nous offrons

Une gamme diversifiée de vins issus de notre terroir

Expériences immersives : dégustations, visites guidées du chai, événements

Une boutique (physique + en ligne) pour accéder à nos cuvées

Partenariats œnotouristiques locaux

 Pourquoi nous suivre ?
Parce que nous croyons au lien humain, à la transmission, et à la mise en valeur d’un territoire. Nous souhaitons inspirer les amateurs de vins, les acteurs du tourisme rural, et les passionnés de terroir.

Name: JAMAS Wine
Description:
JAMAS Wine er din leverandør af kvalitetsvin fra Spanien.

Vores fokus er på at levere spændende og overraskende vinoplevelser til dig, dine kunder og medarbejdere. Vi sætter en stor ære i at levere en vinoplevelse, som får din virksomhed til at fremstå positivt.

Vi opererer med små dedikerede og ikke nødvendigvis så kommercielle vingårde, som i Spanien primært sælger nationalt til restauratører. Vores styrke består i et godt oparbejdet netværk i Spanien, samt passionen for at introducere de "skjulte vinperler" i Danmark fra de mindre vingårde.

Kort sagt: Vi hjælper dig med at opdage spansk vin - sandsynligvis fra en vinbonde du ikke kender - og et område du ikke havde drømt om.

Velkommen til JAMAS Wine.

Name: Bordeaux Wine Associated
Description:
Bordeaux Wine Associated is a dynamic and innovative approach to offer wines from six worldwide known Bordeaux Châteaux.
This joint-venture is committed to long-term development. It is a stable and privileged partnership of winegrowers offering wines through both traditional and modern approach. The result is a new approach with a consistent range of high quality Grands Vins de Bordeaux.

Name: La Cave du Chaignot
Description:
Installée au numéro 20 de la rue Monge au cœur du centre-ville de Dijon, la Cave du Chaignot possède plusieurs cordes à son arc. Propriétaires récoltants et négociants en vins, nous proposons également de faire découvrir la dimension culturelle de la vigne et du vin par des dégustations commentées.
Nous disposons de Grands Crus mais aussi d'appellations moins connues ainsi que de vins bios que vous ne trouverez pas en grandes surfaces.
Située au centre-ville de Dijon, notre cave du XVIII emé siècle nous permet de réaliser l'élevage de nos vins dans de très bonnes conditions. 
Mais c'est également un cadre idéal, spécialement aménagé, pour proposer des dégustations à tous types de publics.  
Notre connaissance des terroirs bourguignons, de l'activité viticole et vinicole nous permet de vous faire découvrir à l'occasion de ces dégustations toute la richesse des climats de Bourgogne, classés au patrimoine mondial de l'Unesco.

Name: Etude Wines
Description: Etude Wines is a vineyard that produces wine and spirits.

Name: Tonghua Grape Wine Co., Ltd.
Description: Tonghua Grape Wine is a wine and spirits company based out of TONGHUA, JLN, China.

Name: Embouteillage Dumas
Description:
Mise en bouteille et filtration à la propriété depuis 1976, 
1 œnologue à plein temps
Entreprise aux normes HACCP depuis 2003, certfié ECOCERT

1 table d’accumulation

Name: BRASSERIE WILL'S
Description:
La Brasserie Will’s est une micro-brasserie artisanale née à l’initiative de Guillaume, son brasseur. Passionné par la bière depuis de nombreuses années, il a peaufiné son savoir-faire auprès de maîtres brasseurs avant de créer la Brasserie Will’s en 2015 . En décembre 2019, Guillaume reçoit le titre de Maître Artisan, la plus haute distinction de l’artisanat.
En plus d’une gamme de bières traditionnelles présente tout au long de l’année, le brasseur vous fera découvrir à travers ses bières spéciales des créations originales et surprenantes, brassins uniques en quantités limitées.

Enfin, parce que la Brasserie Will’s est aussi un lieu d’échanges et de partage de connaissances, vous pourrez venir participer à un stage d’initiation au brassage pour apprendre les secrets de fabrication de la bière. Lors de ces ateliers de création, vous brassez votre propre bière sur un poste individuel, reviendrez la mettre en bouteilles quelques jours plus tard et pourrez la déguster en famille ou entre amis.
Toutes les bières de la Brasserie Will’s sont créées, brassées et embouteillées sur place, selon une méthode traditionnelle de fermentation haute. La Brasserie Will’s propose des bières qui allient créativité, goûts, qualité et passion.
A travers une démarche responsable, la Brasserie Will’s utilise 100 % d'ingrédients issus biologiques.
Pour aller plus loin dans cette démarche, la Brasserie Will’s purifie son eau afin de garantir la qualité gustative et sanitaire. Les rejets sont limités grâce à une organisation adaptée et à l’utilisation de produits respectueux de l’environnement. Enfin, la Brasserie Will’s met en place des partenariats locaux pour réutiliser les résidus de brassage, nourriture riche pour les animaux de la ferme et compost de premier choix.
Nous avons fait le choix de rester une petite structure à portée exclusivement locale. Vous ne retrouverez donc pas nos bières artisanales partout car nous souhaitons garder une production artisanale.
Location: Orée d'Anjou, Pays de la Loire

Name: Lasorda Family Wines
Description: Lasorda Family Wines is a family winery founded by Baseball Hall of Fame manager Tommy Lasorda. We embody Tommy’s fearless spirit and passion in our winemaking, and in doing so, seek to honor and preserve his legacy as baseball’s true ambassador. Our collection of award-winning wines embraces the best of Paso Robles, a region known for its unique and diverse climate combined with a distinct landscape.

Name: Enoteca Pontevecchio
Description: We are a Wine shop in the center of Florence, Italy that specializes in wine from small boutique productions from all over Italy. In addition to wine we sell extra virgin Olive Oil and a variety of Balsamic Vinegar. We provide educational wine tasting for tour groups, visitors and anyone who wants to learn more about Italian wine. Tony Sasa is the owner and has brought his love of wine and music to life in this eclectic and welcoming shop in Florence. Tony travels often to share his love for wine and food all over the world.

Name: First Colony Winery
Description: First Colony Winery is nestled at the foothills of the Blue Ridge, the heart of Virginia Wine Country. The only winery in North America with a traditional thatched roof, First Colony celebrates the rich historical traditions of Virginia's settlers while embracing the innovations of modern winemaking with unique, award-winning blends. Visit First Colony for breathtaking sunsets, charming Old World gardens, meticulously manicured vineyards, and newly renovated tasting room and event facilities. The warm hospitality and elegant atmosphere will make you feel like kicking back and staying a while.

Name: Uncorked Spirit
Description: If you're looking for a popular wine, a rare bourbon, your favorite craft beer, or a fun place to shop for all things beer and wine themed, Uncorked Spirit can help. With over 100 different craft and domestic beers, a variety of wines, bourbons and whiskey, the perfect bottle is waiting for you. Enjoy the "Sip and Shop" option while you browse the selection of drinks, gifts, BBQ sauces, boutique men's and women's clothing, home decor and gift baskets. An indoor/outdoor wine garden is available for your next party or event. Best gaming lounge in town!

Name: Bird Valley Distillery
Description: The Bird Valley Distillery is an established producer of luxurious genuine fruit distillates with a large-scale portfolio. We proud ourselves on declaring, that we do not use any artificial scents or colorings and our goal is to deliver only the highest quality possible.

Name: J Wrigley Vineyards
Description:
J Wrigley Vineyards produces exquisite, highly rated wine to include Wine Enthusiast's Top 14 Wine in the World for 2018.  The tasting room is located at the top of the hill, providing stunning 360degree views of the Willamette Valley.  Come for the wine, stay for the view and warm hospitality.

Our facility is available to rent for weddings, corporate events as well as our overnight guest accommodations.

Name: Horizon Beers
Description: A Canadian agency importing premium Belgian trappist beers across Canada.

Name: Prima Vini Wine Merchants
Description:
We are a family-owned, full service wine & spirits merchant located in Walnut Creek, California (SF Bay Area) with over forty years of operation. Our goal is to provide an experience with value that is highly memorable and personable. 

We specialize in hard-to-find wines from all over the world in both our wine shop and restaurant. Forty years in the business has allowed us to forge personal and lengthy relationships with the premier wineries of California, Italy, France, Spain Portugal, Germany, Austria and the southern hemisphere.  Our wine selection is broad, yet focused and our wine list in the restaurant is extensive-covering 50 pages worth of selections. All the while, our staff is focused on providing friendly, knowledgeable and professional service. 

In addition to shipping wine throughout the United States, we're also known for our events. We host local and foreign winemakers in the wine shop for monthly tastings as well as in our restaurant for regular wine pairing dinners. 

Restaurant Website:
www.primawine.com

Name: Skjold Burne vinhandel - Bjerre-vin
Description:
Fysiks butik med salg til private og erhverv
Skjold Burne, Bjerre-vin ved Thomas Bjerre er din lokale vinhandel - både når det gælder privat og erhverv.

Julegaver
Gaveløsninger 
Vi holder også jævnligt vin/gin/portvin/rom-smagninger
Vi har altid vingaver og gavekurve pakket klar til at tage med, og du er velkommen til at forudbestille en gave efter eget ønske. Vi maler desuden selv vores kaffe og har et stort udvalg i special varer.

Name: Young Hearts Distilling
Description: Downtown Raleigh’s First Distillery & Restaurant. Cocktails & food focused on local producers, botanical forward spirits, amari, gin and more.

Name: Bellview Winery
Description: Bellview Winery is operated as an estate vineyard and winery, producing estate-grown wines. They use estate-grown grapes to make red, white, blush, and dessert wines. In order to maximize airflow, ensure adequate sunlight exposure, and achieve our desired yield, they use specific training techniques.

Name: Zurab Kviriashvili Vineyards
Description:
Small family-owned “Zurab Kviriashvili Vineyards” is located in center of Alazani Valley, 7-9 km right side from the river Alazani was founded in 2002. Estate grown wines since 1990.
Even though family has a several centuries history of natural wine making, in 2003 Zurab Kviriashvili started construction of the new wine cellar in Telavi, which has 12 Qvevri vessels with a quantity of 9 tons and still tanks for transferring the wine after complete traditional wine making process.
The company has Rkatsiteli and Saperavi vineyards in the territory of Gulgula and Artana villages in Telavi Region.
In 2018 the new vineyard of Kisi, Khikhvi, Mtsvane and Saperavi grape plantlets were planted in 1,5 ha in Telavi Region.
The company is producing natural Qvevri wines since 2013 in accordance to the Georgian traditional method. 
In 2012, Zurab Kviriashvili created the first Qvevri shape label, which is used for the company's products.
The company is participating in different symposiums and exhibitions.
The wines of "Zurab Kviriashvili Vineyards" have been participated and obtained different awards on various international symposiums and exhibitions.
In 2018 and 2019, the wines of LLC "Zurab Kviriashvili Vineyards" were presented at the Swiss exhibition - EXPOVINA, RAW WINE Festival in New York and Los Angeles (USA), JAZZ&WINE Festivals in Malta and Georgia.
From 2018, the wines of "Zurab Kviriashvili Vineyards" Ltd were exported in Switzerland, Austria and Malta. 
From 2019 “Zurab Kviriashvili Vineyards” Ltd become member of Natural Wine Association.

Name: Champagne Jean Dumangin
Description:
Récoltant manipulant depuis 5 générations, le Champagne Jean Dumangin est une exploitation familiale située au coeur de la Montagne de Reims. 
Visite des caves et dégustation sur rendez-vous (y compris le week-end)

Name: Le Chai - Cave à Vin
Description: Installé depuis 1995, nous sommes spécialisés dans les Vins Biologiques, Biodynamiques et Naturels ainsi que dans la plupart des Spiritueux. Nous commerçons auprès des particuliers mais aussi auprès des restaurateurs et entreprises soucieux d'améliorer leur image ainsi que la qualité de leur offre.

Name: Radio-Coteau
Description: Radio-Coteau works closely with select cool-climate coastal vineyard sites in Western Sonoma County and Anderson Valley to produce wines with vibrant, balanced fruit and a distinct sense of place. We are dedicated to regenerative agricultural practices encompassing both Biodynamic and organic farming. In conjunction with a natural, non-interventionist approach in the cellar, our mission is to accurately reflect the unique character of each site and season. The winery is situated in Sebastopol, and the estate vineyard is located in the hills above Occidental, California.

Name: Bodega Alan de Val
Description:
Adega Alan es una bodega de ámbito familiar y artesanal, enmarcada en la Denominación de Origen Valdeorras. La bodega Alan de Val se funda en el año 1993, a partir de la experiencia heredada de padres y abuelos, dedicados desde siempre al viñedo, al vivero, a la elaboración y venta de vinos.

En el año 2006 se construye la nueva bodega, enclavada en la comarca de Valdeorras y rodeada por la Finca “Pedrazáis”. En esta nueva etapa se incorporan nuevas técnicas y conocimientos con el fin de obtener los mejores vinos.

En Adega Alan damos enorme importancia a la viticultura. En 2006 empezamos a elaborar vinos de finca, buscando la peculiaridad, la singularidad de cada viñedo. 
Trabajamos las uvas Godello y Mencía, elaborando variedades jóvenes y vinos de finca que llevan el nombre de la misma, "Pedrazáis". 

Nuestros viñedos centenarios de Garnacha Tintorera resultan en los vinos Escada y Escada Lembranzas, este último envejecido durante 9 meses en barrica.

Hemos recuperado la variedad Brancellao con un monovarietal de producción limitada, A Costiña, que lleva el nombre de la finca de la que procede.
Location: A Rúa de Valdeorras, Galicia / Galiza

Name: Il dolce far niente
Description:
Il dolce far niente is an Italian saying which means: the sweet art of doing nothing. 

My goal is to embrace this lifestyle in The Netherlands (and to inspire people worldwide) to make people stress less and enjoy life better. 

The lifestyle will be supported by good Italian wine and food. I am 'Vinoloog van de Wijnacademie' and am specialized in Italian wine and I am always looking for special discoveries. With a wide range of wines I can fulfill different wishes and requests. 

In collaboration with an Italian food partner I can also offer a wide range of high end Italian food.

Name: HISTOIRE D'HOMMES ET DE TERROIRS
Description:
La société Histoire d'Hommes et de Terroirs a été créée en décembre 2009 pour assurer la commercialisation de vins produits par Thierry Lurton ainsi que pour développer l'activité oenotouristique à Camarsac.

Depuis, elle s'est, en plus, donnée pour objectif de vous présenter d'autres vins de grande qualité, provenant de grands terroirs, des vins prêts à boire, ayant eu leur temps de garde dans de bonnes conditions puisque conservés à la propriété ou par nos soins à Camarsac.

Ces vins proviennent, pour la plupart, de vignobles familiaux que Thierry Lurton connait et apprécie depuis de longues années, mais aussi d'autres grandes propriétés bordelaises et d'horizons plus lointains tels que la Croatie et ses cépages autochtones cultivés depuis des millénaires.

THE WINERY
Organic ∞ Sustainable ∞ Local
Free Range Flower Winery is a family-owned urban winery that produces hand-crafted wines in small batches from organic, locally sourced flowers.

Our process marries the garden winemaking traditions of women from centuries past with the innovative spirit of today's San Francisco Bay Area food and drink culture.

Dedicated to sustainable practices that yield world-class wine and build community, we welcome partnerships with local farmers, makers, artists, mixologists, event planners, and community-minded organizations.

Name: Queens Winery
Description:
How do you say Thank You?

We can help you with a Custom Engraved Wine Box and Bottle. We can keep you Top of Mind with that special customer or friend.

From our new winery in Garland Texas we precisely control every aspect of wine making to produce the finest honey wine anywhere. Our wines are made exclusively from honey and are completely free of grapes. We proudly produce Honey Wines over grape wines because of all the flavor, purity, ecological, and health benefits of honey over grapes.

Honey has wonderfully nuanced flavors and aromas locked with in, just waiting to be opened up by our winemaker, and enjoyed by you. When you think about the small variety of wine grapes and the awesome number of flowers that bees visit, you begin to realize how much there is out there that you’ve been missing.

Every ingredient matters when making honey wine. That is why we ensure the purity of the honey that we use by working closely with providers to ensure that all our honey comes from America and is True Source Certified by an independent third party. The purity of our water is also of the up-most importance. We have worked hand and glove with water purity engineers to design the custom system implemented at our winery.

Honey wine is the oldest form of alcohol known to mankind, or womankind for that matter. It predates written history and even the wheel and axle. So enjoy our honey wine. The most ancient of drink produced with the most modern precision.

Name: WineStein, The Smart Sommelier
Description:
Almost 90% of the population says they know almost nothing about wine. For all these people, WineStein developed the world’s first Artificial Intelligent Sommelier.
 
Our mission is to make the world of wine, accessible and understandable for anybody, anywhere, any time. In order to do this, we combine knowledge of top wine experts and the knowhow of a Michelin star chef, with our artificial intelligent software.  Our self-learning algorithms enable you, to always find the perfect wine, for your meal, occasion or your taste preference. 

All our applications are very user friendly and easy to implement. WineStein can be used in supermarkets, liquor stores, hypermarkets, restaurants, hotels and casinos, or as a tool for your sales force. Of course you can also try it yourself by downloading WineStein from the App-store.

Name: Château de Vacques
Description:
Situé sur un des coteaux les plus élevés de la région, le vignoble de 12 hectares du Château de Vacques est magnifiquement exposé plein sud et produit une grande sélection de vins rouges, blancs et clairet des appellations Bordeaux et Sainte Foy Bordeaux. Les vins de Vacques sont régulièrement sélectionnés dans les guides et concours de référence tels que le Guide Hachette, Gault et Millau, le Parker des Vins de Bordeaux, le Concours Général Agricole de Paris et le Concours Général Agricole de Bordeaux.

Le Château de Vacques 

Le Château de Vacques mets également à votre disposition deux gîtes ruraux: La Maison des Vendangeurs et L'Annexe. Idéals pour passer vos vacances en famille ou entre amis, les gîtes sont des anciennes maisons de vignerons. Rénovés avec tout le confort moderne, leur style traditionnel a été préservé. La position privilégiée de ces gîtes, au sommet d'un des plus hauts coteaux de la vallée, vous permettra de profiter du soleil du Sud-Ouest de la France au bord de la piscine du domaine tout en dégustant les vins délicieux produits sur place.

Name: Fontana di Papa - Vini d'Italia
Description:
Cantina sociale vinicola dei Castelli Romani.

La casa vinicola affonda le radici nella storia: il nome fa riferimento ad una fontana che aveva la funzione di ristorare i viaggiatori, costruita per volere di Innocenzo XII alla fine del XV secolo.
 
La storia evolve e nel 1959, ad Ariccia, nasce Fontana di Papa, riprendendo il concetto di ristorazione appartenente alla fontana omonima e trasferendolo nella produzione del vino. 

Nel corso degli anni si sono sviluppate diverse e sempre più moderne tecniche di lavorazione, rendendo così il prodotto di qualità. Il vino della Cooperativa si è, dunque, affermato sul mercato nazionale italiano. Il marchio Fontana di Papa ha, inoltre, conquistato molta notorietà in Europa e in alcuni paesi del resto del mondo. 

I vini Fontana di Papa sono frutto di un lavoro, iniziato più di 50 anni fa, di persone che hanno dedicato amore e passione al vino, e ne dedicano ancora.

Name: Al Monte di Livio
Description:
Al Monte di Livio è un’azienda di produzione vitivinicola e vendita inserita nelle colline di Colceresa, Vicenza conosciute nel mondo per la produzione di  vini DOC di qualità. 

Una cantina di innovatori, studiamo e selezioniamo abbinamenti particolari attraverso l’utilizzo di diverse qualità varietali . 

Al Monte di Livio è una cantina  e un luogo di incontro moderno, che custodisce un passato di tradizione, valori e passione per il vino, con uno sguardo all'innovazione e alla produzione vitivinicola di qualità.

Name: Four Brothers Mead
Description:
We Make What We Love!

Combining our Old Norse heritage with our love of mead, we came together to start a little project called Four Brothers Mead. Through the initial support of our family and friends we started to take root. Once exposed to others outside of that small sphere is when we started to explode! Requests to sample our mead began pouring in from coast to coast and every continent in the world. We have established relationships along Old Norse trade routes with our fellow mead lovers. What started as a small idea of four Veterans coming together to make what we love, has quickly exploded to a globally requested Old World drink worthy of the Gods. As many of our patrons have told us, “Odin Would Be Proud!”

Name: wineshopasia.com
Description:
Wine Shop Asia is a Hong Kong-based online shop, selling wine, spirits, wine fridges, glasses, corkscrews and other wine-related accessories to Hong Kong customers.

Our portfolio consists of wines from over 50 family-owned wineries from all around the world, including Louis Roederer, Antinori, Louis Latour, Billecart-Salmon, Torbreck, Shaw + Smith, Domaines Ott, Dow’s Port, to name a few!

Our climate-controlled Hong Kong warehouse stocks a consistent amount of our wines which can be delivered to you anywhere in Hong Kong within 24 hours after your order has been placed.

We also offer the service of organizing themed wine events in offices, restaurants and other various venues, tailored to best suit your needs. Please contact us for further information.

If you are looking to buy wine online in Hong Kong, then look no further than Wine Shop Asia.
