Name: Domaine du Bois de Saint Jean
Description:
The Domaine du Bois de Saint Jean is a family vineyard, runned by two brothers : Xavier and Vincent Anglès.

The Anglès family is present in the small city of Jonquerettes, located near Avignon in the South Rhone Valley, since 1620.

Nowadays the Domaine du Bois de Saint Jean owns 50ha and produces the appellations : Côtes du Rhône, Côtes du Rhône Villages Gadagne, Vacqueyras and Châteauneuf-du-Pape.

The Domaine du Bois de Saint Jean is open Monday to Saturday from 8:30 to 12:00am and from 2:00 to 7:00pm. Wine tastings are possible. 
For groups please email us at : xavier.angles@wanadoo.fr .

Name: Vallerosa Bonci
Description:
Vallerosa Bonci. Acini di saggezza, gemme di innovazione.
Vallerosa Bonci è un'azienda vitivinicola familiare conosciuta per la varietà di vini di uve di Verdicchio dei Castelli di Jesi DOC e DOCG e di spumanti di qualità.
La nostra azienda vinicola nasce ufficialmente nel 1962, ma la nostra tradizione di vignaioli risale ai primi del novecento, quando Domenico Bonci avviò in Cupramontana la propria cantina di Verdicchio dei Castelli di Jesi. Il nipote Giuseppe Bonci per primo intuì le grandi potenzialità del Verdicchio, creando il primo grande "cru" da questo vitigno, il San Michele e i primi spumanti di qualità. Negli ultimi venti anni Vallerosa Bonci ha ottenuto oltre quaranta riconoscimenti, vincendo tra le altre cose per dieci volte i Cinque Grappoli Bibenda e per sette volte i Tre Bicchieri del Gambero Rosso.
La quarta generazione della famiglia Bonci prosegue sulla strada della vinificazione di qualità, nel rispetto della secolare tradizione familiare,  ma con grande attenzione ed apertura verso l'innovazione.

Name: Northern Hope Winery
Description:
Northern Hope is a small boutique winery, established in 2017 by Richard and Samantha Edwards. We're located in Lancefield, Macedon ranges, 80km's North of Melbourne.

We're still in our infancy as a vineyard but incredibly passionate about crafting a selection of wines that will truly reflect the soils and climate of the Macedon Ranges.

Our Macedon Ranges vineyard produces Pinot Noir with a plan to plant more grape varieties in the near future.  We look forward to sharing our wines and property with you.

Name: Sussex Vineyards Ltd.
Description:
Our Vineyards sit either side of the hilltop village of Mayfield, amongst the rolling hills, woodlands and deep-cut ghylls of the Sussex High Weald. 

They are surrounded by bluebell woods in springtime and over-flown by Red Kites and other hawks in summer.  They are an evocation of this unique Sussex countryside at its best.

Within our two vineyards (Hobdens and Lakestreet) we grow Pinot noir, Pinot Meunier, Chardonnay, Pinot gris and Pinot blanc.

With almost 9 hectares under vine, we grow lower yielding Burgundy clones, which mature richly in our High Weald terroir, alongside Champagne clones for structure.  This carefully selected combination allows us to create wines with enticing fruit flavours, aroma & complexity.

Our aim is to produce limited editions of top quality distinctive English Fizz from perfect fruit, aged for an optimal period & offering the fullest possible expression of our Mayfield High Weald terroir.

We are committed to growing the best quality grapes and treating them with respect and minimal intervention in the winery.

Our House Cuvée is a Rosé, for which we have a great passion. We also make Blanc de Blancs & Blanc de Noirs lees-aged sparkling wines.

We make for those who like to revel in the differences between vintages, tasting the changing nuance of season, place & vineyard parcel.

With our limited-edition cuveés we mix traditional winemaking skills with contemporary innovation in our quest for the perfect English Fizz.

We hope you enjoy browsing our website and can be tempted to try our wines.If you are keen to buy & enjoy our lovely wine, please order promptly to ensure supply. We will arrange delivery to suit you.

To order our wines please email:   Gerard@sussexvineyards.com 

To discover more about our vineyards & winemaking philosophy, please go to:

<http://www.sussexvineyards.com>

Our D1 Collection is beautifully adorned with the artwork of renowned Chinese artist Jacky Tsai, whose “Floral” & “Stained Glass” Skull designs decorate our rectangular bottles
giving instant standout in a crowded category.
Innovation is at the forefront of every product we develop, our D1 Potato Vodka is so pure and well balanced, due to our innovative production techniques, we don’t filter it or add sweeteners. Our DJ’s Cold Infusions are a category first for pairing specifically with Spirits & Wine, not only enhancing the drinking experience but creating “show stopping” theatre either
at home or in bars & restaurants. 
Our founder Dominic Limbrey didn’t stop there though, he
also invented the “Poura” that safeguards product quality & integrity, saving staff time and their companies money, what a guy!
Who Are D.J. Limbrey Distilling Co. Limited then?
Daring, Distinguished, Different, and Definitely someone you should be working with.

Name: PONET SPIRITS
Description:
Ponet Spirits is a collective  of Inventors, Explorers, Creators and Artisans of  planet Earth with the mission to develop and share seriously superb spirits. 

We source plants and botanicals in many countries and collaborate with Master Distillers to create spirits by combining our recipes with their savoir-faire.  The art of blending spirited liquids from various origins is  our secret knack.

The spark was the desire to revive the Ponet family's tradition of Jenever distillation that started in 1763. It inspirited us to develop a range of spirits  with the help of Craftsmen and Experts from all over the world. Our story started in 2016 with the creation of the Bishop’s Gin and continues today with the launch of the Mezcal Telegram.

Cooperation and sharing is at the heart of our working process and is our sublime way to deliver passion in a bottle.

We invite everyone to discover the craft of transforming, extracting and distilling some of nature’s wonderful  flora into  our spirits.

Name: Organski Podrum
Description:
Organski Podrum online boutique presents a hand-picked selection of wines from our extensive stock, each from our cellar in Belgrade. Founded in 2020, Organski Podrum offers a wide selection of organic, bio and natural wines direct from independent and artisanal Serbian winegrowers.
Organski Podrum is dedicated to natural wines. Our goal is to help as many people as possible discover the great variety of Serbian natural and organic wines, because today drinking healthy is smart drinking. This is why we, at Organski Podrum, offer unpretentious and authentic wines, wines that are not only pleasurable but also healthy and representative of their “terroir” – wines of true character.

    We defend and promote craft winemakers who spurn industrial production models; artisans respectful of nature and ecosystems, working honestly and without artifice.
    We celebrate their courage to resist temptation to use easy production methods, to reject fertilizers, insecticides or synthetic yeast.
    We honor the wine masters who embrace honest winemaking – from the grape to the bottle – allowing them the freedom to express themselves.
    We welcome the growers with whom we have established friendly relations and who regularly present their wines at the tastings we organize at our cave.
    We promote wines that embrace the real, full character of fruit and minerality, wines whose personalities are not masked by any artifice.
    We defend and advocate healthy wines, wines that are non-chemical and easily digested; wines with a frank and sincere taste, clean aromas and wines that have not suffered from the misuse and abuse of chemicals.  
    We hope to advance those wines that reflect their terroir and climatic conditions on which they depend, great wines which differ with each vintage.

This yields a wine that is both robust and remarkably complex. 

Our boutique Cabernet has rich aromas of crème de cassis, blackberry jam, black cherry and dark chocolate. The mid-palate reveals bright notes of violets and sour cherries, with undertones of black pepper and wet stone.

Name: Maison César Thibon
Description: La Marquisette César Thibon, c’est la Marquisette traditionnelle, que l'on a plaisir à élaborer et à partager entre amis ou en famille. C’est la recette du grand père Thibon, l'originale! Devenus grands, ses petits-enfants l'ont subtilisé pour vous faire découvrir cette boisson. L'un d'eux eu l'idée de la mettre en bouteille, lors d'un grand repas familial, où la marquisette était servie à l'apéritif. Il demanda conseil à trois de ses cousins qui travaillaient dans le vin. En Janvier 2012, les quatre petits enfants de César Thibon créèrent leur Marquisette. Mais n'attendez pas d'eux qu'ils vous donnent la recette!

Name: Weinmanufaktur Albert Glas 阿尔贝特 格拉斯酒庄
Description:
Tradition verpflichtet !
Als Weinbauern demonstrierten unsere Gründungsväter der Familie Albert Glas 1832  am Hambacher Schloss für die deutsche Demokratie. Dies gilt als Meilenstein in der deutschen Geschichte.
Damals wie heute verfolgen wir unsere Ziele im Wein ohne Kompromisse. Qualität und Tradition müssen gewahrt werden. 
Das Weingut Albert Glas bewirtschaftet heute einen Familienbesitz von 20 ha Weinbergen in den besten Lagen unserer Region. Mit jungem und innovativem Denken jedoch immer in enger Harmonie mit der Natur vinifizieren wir Weine, streng nach unserer Tradition, auf höchstem Niveau. Diese innige Leidenschaft zu unserem Beruf spiegelt sich in unseren außergewöhnlichen und lebendigen Weinen wieder.
Weingut Albert Glas bietet Ihnen eine große Vielfalt an typischen deutschen Rebsorten wie Riesling, Burgunder und Dessert Weine wie Eiswein, aber natürlich auch internationale Rebsorten wie Cabernet Sauvignon und Merlot von höchster Qualität.

保持优良传统！
作为葡萄种植酒农，我们阿尔贝特 格拉斯酒庄的先辈参加了1832年在家乡哈姆巴赫城堡的德国民主运动，该运动是德国历史发展上的重要里程碑。
从始至今，我们的努力和目标是，毫不含糊的保证和保持葡萄酒的优等质量和优良传统。
阿尔贝特 格拉斯酒庄在我们地区的最佳地理位置上拥有20公顷的葡萄园。以年青、创新的思维，和与大自然的亲密和谐，严格按照我们的传统和最高的质量级别，生产我们的葡萄酒。我们对这一事业的亲切激情体现在我们充满活力的、独特的葡萄酒之中。
阿尔贝特 格拉斯酒庄向您呈现了多种典型的德国葡萄酒品种。如：雷司令、黑比诺以及冰酒等甜酒。当然，还有非常优质的国际品种如赤霞珠和美乐等。

When we started in the business of quality bottled wine, we opted for a good quality-price ratio in order to make this product of long tradition in our region reach all palates of the world.

We use traditional grape varieties in our region, such as Tempranillo, Verdejo and Pietro Picudo, giving our wines the best of themselves.

Our wines are characterized by being aromatic, fruity and very soft on the palate.

Name: Le Ginestre Winery
Description:
Historical origins
“CANTINA LE GINESTRE” is a wine-growing family business located in the village of Grinzane Cavour, in the Langhe hills, a Unesco Heritage, in Piedmont, North-West of Italy. The small Ginestre hamlet was already marked on land registry maps as far as the 1700s, and it has always been inhabited by wine-growers, who have passed on their passion for working in the vineyards with the skills that are still theirs today. Some of them, who worked in the property of Camillo Benso Count of Cavour, architect of the Unification of Italy, were the Audasso family’s forefathers. Nowadays in the Mask Room of the Castle of Grinzane Cavour it is possible to see the Land Registry Maps of the 1783, where our property is marked, as it once was called, the “Region of the Ginestre”.
tHe Family
After 17 years in which the Count was mayor in Grinzane Cavour, when the estate was sold, the land was purchased by local farmers, including the Audasso’s forefathers, who continued the wine production. Sadly, this tradition was interrupted by Second World War. Michele Audasso joined the Army and he disappeared in Russia. Only in the 80s his son Franco, with the help of his wife, Giulia, started the vinification of the vineyards of “Le Ginestre”, carrying on his father’s legacy. Today Gian Luca and Barbara, their son and daughter, pride themselves on continuing the family tradition

Name: F. Olazabal & Filhos, Lda
Description:
Em 1877 D. Antónia Adelaide Ferreira, já proprietária do maior património agrícola do Douro, comprou em hasta pública 300 hectares de terra virgem à câmara de VN de Foz Côa. O seu sonho era de construir a partir do nada uma exploração modelo, concretizando nela toda a vasta experiência acumulada ao longo da sua vida de empresária duriense. 

Este projecto ambicioso foi totalmente levado a cabo entre 1887 (foto da pedra escrita) e 1895. Foi a última e mais significativa realização daquela Senhora, que no entanto pouco dela gozou, pois morreu em 1896. 

Desde então a quinta manteve-se sempre na posse dos seus descendentes. A partir dos anos 70 o seu trineto Francisco Javier de Olazabal assumiu a sua gestão e iniciou um longo processo de aquisição de partes indivisas dos seus familiares e comproprietários, e em 1994 tornou-se juntamente com seus filhos, único proprietário da Quinta. Até então as uvas da Quinta eram vendidas á empresa AA Ferreira S. A., fundada pelos descendentes de D. Antónia, e estavam na base de alguns dos seus melhores vinhos. Essa ligação continuou até 1998, ano em que Francisco Javier de Olazabal decidiu renunciar ao cargo de presidente de A. A., Ferreira S.A. para se dedicar juntamente com seu filho enólogo Francisco de Olazabal y Nicolau de Almeida, à produção, envelhecimento e comercialização dos vinhos da quinta, através da criação da sociedade F. Olazabal & Filhos, Lda.

Name: BIBO POTABILE SRL
Description:
Siamo Ilaria, Gabriele e Stefano.
BIBO POTABILE nasce dalla volontà di portare nel calice vini naturali, artigianali e autentici, selezionati tra produttori che lavorano in armonia con la terra.

Non siamo semplici distributori: siamo Cercatori di unicità, Custodi di un patrimonio agricolo e culturale, e Narratori di storie che meritano di essere condivise.

Selezioniamo e distribuiamo vini naturali, biologici e biodinamici, sempre artigianali e identitari.
La nostra selezione è unica: vini non industriali e non reperibili ovunque, pensati per locali che vogliono distinguersi.

Lavoriamo con un metodo chiaro e strutturato, basato su organizzazione, rapporto umano e cura.

Enoteche, ristoranti e wine bar oggi devono differenziarsi in un mercato competitivo.
Il vino naturale è in forte crescita, la ristorazione lo inserisce sempre più in carta e i clienti cercano autenticità, territorio e storie vere.

Il problema?
Molte distribuzioni propongono gli stessi vini, rendendo difficile emergere.

La nostra risposta è semplice: vini unici, artigianali e non reperibili ovunque, che abbassano le barriere dove altri competitor sono già presenti.

Con BIBO POTABILE non offri solo un prodotto:
offri una storia, un’identità e un’esperienza che i tuoi clienti riconoscono e ricordano.

Siamo il partner ideale per:
• enoteche che vogliono proporre vini artigianali
• ristoranti che cercano vini naturali per rinnovare la carta
• wine bar che puntano su autenticità e originalità
• agenti che desiderano rappresentare un brand con identità forte e metodo chiaro

Vuoi distinguerti davvero?
Scrivici per scoprire una selezione di vini naturali, artigianali e unici, pensata per locali che vogliono proporre qualità, autenticità e carattere.

Name: South Australian Wine Bottlers
Description:
Locally owned and operated by the Grigoriou family, South Australian Wine Bottlers provide key bottling infrastructure for wineries and “Buyers-Own-Brand” packaged wine. We have invested large amounts in world-class MBF machinery and facilities to help us in our mission to become SA’s most trusted name in wine logistics and management. Bottling, labelling, storage and distribution are highly specialised processes, and SAWB are industry experts, producing and packaging over 1,000,000 cases of wine per year for supply into both the domestic and international markets.

Our dedicated winemaker provides technical support to bottling operations for pre and post bottling analysis, as well as analytical support for all cellar adjustments, We also have the ability to blend wine to suit your brand’s characteristics and customer preferences.

Our Managing Director is a board member on the Australian Wine Packers Association and takes pride in our manufacturing quality and consistency. Our line is HACCP and Organic certified, which means we have to undertake rigorous quality assurance practices throughout the whole facility.

Name: Cape Landing
Description:
Established in 1998, Cape Landing produces premium wines carefully crafted from fruit harvested annually in our own privately-owned vineyard in the Margaret River Wine Appellation of Western Australia.

After the establishment of the major wineries in the Margaret River region, Cape Landing was one of the first independent vineyards established to supply fruit to Margaret River region wineries, and fruit from Cape Landing has featured in many award-winning wines produced by regional wine makers.

2018 will see Cape Landing offer its own single vineyard wines for the first time. Production will initially be limited to approximately 1,200 cases per vintage year, comprising Chardonnay, Sauvignon Blanc, Shiraz and Cabernet.

The grape varieties developed at Cape Landing have been carefully selected to represent the unique ‘terroir’ of the vineyard – particularly the local soil types, and the climate in the Forest Grove area, south of Witchcliffe.

Situated midway between Cape Naturaliste and Cape Leeuwin, Cape Landing benefits from a Mediterranean style climate of wet winters and warm dry summers. The cooler climate and longer growing season enables Cape Landing to produce fruit which delivers unusually refined Cabernet Sauvignon, gamey Shiraz, citrusy Chardonnay, and refreshingly complex 'SSB' blends of Sauvignon Blanc and Semillon.

Het slagingspercentage ligt zeer hoog, mede door het werken in kleine groepen! Geen zaaltjes  in hotels of restaurants, geen grote klaslokalen, maar een prettige proefruimte in de wijnschool.

Daarnaast zijn  er met regelmaat Nederlandse sommeliers  in De Eerste Soester Wijnschool om een masterclass over een wijn-stijl of wijnstreek te geven!

The South Burnett region is located approximately 250km north-west of Brisbane, Queensland. It is increasingly recognised as one of Australia’s most exciting wine regions. The South Burnett region experiences low humidity, good soil structures, cool nights, and a reliable water supply. The South Burnett Region has quickly expanded to become one of Queensland’s leading wine regions.

Clovely Estate has been producing high quality traditional wines and alternate varieties and wine styles for more than 20 years. The company is consistently recognised amongst Australia’s best with many awards to its name. The winery, located in Murgon, South Burnett delivers approximately 40,000 cases per year.

Name: Natural Wine Stories
Description:
Wine is probably the most chosen product when you ask people what they think of when they have to think of a "natural made" product. They think of roguish men and women stomping grapes with their feet in those big oaky barrels. 
Unfortunately, when we look at regular supermarket wines, the reality is quite different today... For the vast majority of those conventional wines, little or no hands (or feet ) are involved in the production process. The intent of "Natural wine" is to first and foremost put the grape back in the leading role it deserves. The winemakers will try to add as little as possible during the winemaking process but also to take as little away as possible. The use of chemicals, non-native yeasts and pesticides is obviously out of the question. They also try to use as few sulfites as possible. Not surprisingly, "minimal intervention" wine is one of the many synonyms for natural wine. With minimal interventions, they want to let the wine and not the winemaker do the talking.The natural winemakers are also convinced that the presence of diversity in the vineyard results in the best taste for the grapes. Think of wild flowers & herbs but also the presence of animals such as little pigs. This creates a hotspot of life where the fauna and flora help the winemakers control disease and pests. This way, instead of having a negative impact on the environment, they try to make a positive contribution. Finally, it is also worth mentioning that most natural winemakers are independent, creative and socially engaged people. Not infrequently, a portion of the proceeds will go to charities or non-profit organizations that are close to their hearts.It may well be that your first experience with natural wine is not an immediate hit. You can't compare the taste of Natural Wine with regular wine. It takes some time and a lot of tasting. But I can guarantee you: once you get the hang of it, you will never want anything else.

Name: Vuelo Tequila - Blach Spirits Group, Inc.
Description:
Our award-winning artisanal tequila is handcrafted with the finest attention to detail.  We begin with handpicked estate grown blue weber agaves which have matured for 7 to 9 years.  

Our agaves are then slow cooked in natural clay ovens for 72 hours, fermented and copper pot distilled.  

Our Gran Reserva Plata is allowed to rest for 4 months to ensure the utmost quality.  

Our Gran Reserva Reposado is rested in French and American oak barrels for 9 months and meticulously blended to achieve its smooth and remarkable finish. 

Our Gran Reserva Añejo is aged in Napa Valley red wine barrels for 2 years to achieve its exquisite finish and delicate notes.  
Our Gran Reserva Extra Añejo is aged in whiskey and red wine barrels for 5 to 7 years to achieve its luxurious complexity.  

We are deeply honored to share our voyage with you.

Name: Authentic Artisanal African Spirits
Description:

What started as a personal passion for Tequila, grew into an appreciation for mezcal, and quickly evolved into an obsession with Agave Spirits. 

After discovering South Africa's very own version of Agave (Agave Americana, growing in the famous Karoo region) and its burgeoning Karoo Agave spirits brands (like Leonista, Three Agaves & The 4th Rabbit) - following an extensive research and development phase - our passion eventually developed into an understanding of the opportunity behind to introduce "Karoo Agave", and the finest African spirits we have to offer, to Europe and the world… It’s time Africa invaded Europe!

So, 350 years after the Dutch settled in the Cape region, we have established the reverse route to Europe (from Cape Town to Amsterdam) for Southern Africa's finest spirits.

We dubbed them: AAA Spirits. 

Authentic. Artisanal. African. Spirits.

Name: Van Belle Academy
Description:
Van Belle Academy offers WSET (Wine and Spirits Education Trust) Certified Classes in English for Levels 1 & 2 in Amsterdam, Netherlands. 

We are available for private group teachings for your business. 

Why Van Belle Academy?

Our teachers have collectively been in the Wine and Spirits industry for over 40 years, working not only within education but every point of the 'three-tier' system, importer, distribution, supplier, as well as hospitality and sommelier. 

Students will gain informative instruction about wine and spirits. 
Weekly reviews of learning outcome and assess comprehension, with tasting analysis, and guided direction towards a possible career within the Wine and Spirits industry. 

It is our goal to foster the next generation, instilling passion, insight, and wisdom into our students.

What you will learn?

The characteristics of all the major, and several minor, grape varieties of the world, the styles of wine they produce and how to recognise them by the label.

How wine grapes are grown.

How to store and serve wine.

How wine is made, and the differences between the key sparkling, sweet and fortified wines and spirits of the world.

The principles of food and wine pairing.

How to describe wine using the WSET Systematic Approach to Tasting Wine (SAT).

Need more information, or want to schedule a call? 
Contact us at julee@vanbelleacademy.com

Description:

Einzigartigkeit, die begeistert

Authentizität, die verbindet

Name: WINEFING
Description:
Winefing is a start-up aspriring to be the first French web plateform of online reservation of accommodation in the vineyard and aims to become a national leader in the field of wine tourism. It has been created by Julie Dolon, Lisa-Marie Heuty and Livia Gonzalves, three students from Bordeaux passionate about the wine lifestyle and patrimony. It was during a visit to the Sauternes Region, in the South West of France, that they found it was strictly impossible to book an accommodation easily. No website is gathering the offers and the market fragmentation makes complicated the development of wine tourism in France. The structuring of the market is demand from both side of the wine world and visitors who wish to discover it. The concept idea is the result of enriching encounters with winemakers experiencing difficulties in the implementation of their supply and difficulties in attracting visitors, although they are more and more in the French vineyard.
Winefing will provide to winemakers a solution to valorize their accommodation supplies through a communication and marketing relay. Winemakers that offer or wish to offer a wine tourism solution on their vineyard will be able to register for free on winefing.com to provide more visibility to their offering and attract visitors, especially foreigners mainly from Europe and the United States. 
The fundamental value of Winefing is the respect and the democratization of the French wine product. Winefing will help all winemakers to discover their traditional know-how. In the long term, winefing aims to expand to other wine producing countries, particularly in Europe where the wine tourism supply is exploded.

Name: Bieropolis
Description:
Bieropolis.com met à l'honneur les micro-brasseurs, ces petits producteurs passionnés qui brassent des bières d'exception.
Nous sommes au service de vos papilles et voulons vous faire découvrir les meilleures bières de micro-brasseries.
Chaque mois, recevez 6 nouvelles bières artisanales avec leur guide de dégustation et ses goodies. Vous avez bien entendu la possibilité de recommander vos bières préférées ! Tout est fait pour que VOUS soyez le héros de cette aventure brassicole.
Santé !

Name: Domaine La Pleine Lune
Description:
Située au coeur de la magnifique vallée du Rhône en Suisse, à Saint-Pierre-de-Clages, notre cave illustre parfaitement la richesse d’un terroir unique, celui de Chamoson. 90% de celui-ci est situé sur un cône d’alluvions, grâce à cela, Chamoson, ce n’est pas un terroir, mais plus de 20 pour une superficie de 400 hectares. 
Le domaine de la Pleine Lune, c’est un choix enchanteur pour ceux qui apprécient les bonnes choses.

Name: WINEGINEERS
Description: Herkömmliche Glühweine sind eine echte Zuckerbombe. Unser 78° Bio Glühwein braucht das nicht! Wir stellen den Geschmack unserer Weine und Gewürze in den Vordergrund und produzieren in Handarbeit – 100% vegan, biologisch und hausgemacht. Als Grundwein verwenden wir hochwertige und regionale Bio-Winzerweine von familiengeführten Weingütern aus Rheinhessen. Da wir diese ausschließlich mit echten, hochwertigen Gewürzen und frischer Orange und Limette würzen hat unser Glühwein keine fertigen Gewürzmischungen oder Gewürzextrakte nötig. Erlebe den Geschmack – Bring Würze in dein Leben

Name: Dank Vodka
Description:
Dank Vodka was founded on Originality, we strive to become a premiere spirits brand synonymous with high quality. 
We take bold risks with a balance of exceptional ingredients, innovative process and versatile flavors that push the boundaries of what is possible. We set the standard of raising the standard!

We pride ourselves on taste, we believe you should appreciate the quality of your spirit. We are not a copy cat brand or a premium brand that is just, “branding”. 
We filter our vodka for a clean and pure taste, use high alkaline water, don’t pack our vodka with any byproducts and we use the oils from citrus fruits instead of “natural flavors”, sugars and citric acids. 

Dank is not just a Vodka, you can make any Vodka, Gin, Tequila or Rum cocktail with Dank & it just tastes better be side Dank is clean and those citirus oils are extremely versatile. 

Don’t just enjoy what you drink, respect it & Dank it up. 

Cheers to The Higher Times in Life with Dank. vodka. 

Dank You & Dank Responsibly.

Name: FEB Distributing Co
Description: F.E.B. Distributing Company, founded in 1934 by Salvador J. Bertucci, is a manufacturer and distributor of alcohol-based products in Gulfport, Mississippi. They offer a full-line of products including domestics, imported beers, craft beers, wine coolers, flavored malt beverages, and light wines. The company has a rich history of serving the Mississippi Gulf Coast and has expanded its services over the years. F.E.B. Distributing is known for its comprehensive beer selection and commitment to providing quality products to its customers.

Name: Summerside Vineyards Winery & Meadery
Description:
Two of life’s great pleasures are travel and wine. Historic Route 66 & the I-44 Vinita exit is the setting for the tasting room, winery and meadery. The sound of music welcomes you, and the gift shop offers wine accessories and gift baskets. Enjoy tasting a delicious range of our Made in Oklahoma wines and meads from dry to sweet, white to reds produced, blended and bottled right here in our cellar.
Like most Oklahoma wineries, visitors will enjoy a friendly tasting room atmosphere where we help make choices easy for the casual wine drinker. We especially welcome Historic Route 66 fans to the home of Route 66 Red Wine.

Name: TPF Wine & Liquor Advisor

Somos una empresa con 35 años de trayectoria, enfocada en el desarrollo, producción, distribución, comercialización y exportación de bebidas alcohólicas y no alcohólicas de alta calidad con excelentes niveles de servicio y altos índices de satisfacción de sus clientes.

COMERCIALIZAMOS
La marca SAN MARINO, licores saborizados número Uno en México y HABANA la segunda marca más importante de Jarabes en el país.

Nos caracterizamos por contar con un excelente portafolio de productos, un equipo de trabajo calificado y orientado a satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes

Name: Seven24
Description: seven24, s..r.o. is the owner and operator of the website about-southafrican-wine.com. The company is an importer and distributor of South African wine and related products in Slovakia and its neighbouring countries. Currently it is the largest importer and distributor in the region and growing. Take a look at our site and maybe you will find a wine to suit your taste and pocket.

Name: Tallarini Wine
Description:
Bellezza, Armonia e Passione. 
Solida, come tutte le cose bergamasche, l’azienda coniuga la produzione 
e la maturazione dei vini con l’accoglienza ai visitatori.
Articolata in tre sale - lavorazione, conservazione e degustazione - la cantina si divide tra le grandi vasche d’acciaio per i bianchi e le botti in legno per i rossi e i vini da invecchiamento.
Lungo le pareti si conservano e affinano le 240.000 bottiglie prodotte ogni anno, in attesa di aprirsi al palato di appassionati, degustatori o semplici amanti del buon vino.
Ogni vino Tallarini trae la sua grande qualità già nei vigneti: bassa resa, ricerca del perfetto momento della vendemmia, selezione manuale dei grappoli.
Tecnica e tradizione assicurano il miglior risultato finale: legni di piccole dimensioni, barrique e tonneau per i grandi vini; acciaio per i bianchi più giovani. Pressatura soffice, criomacerazione, taglio bordolese ed appassimento accurato delle uve sono i metodi utilizzati e rispettati con scrupolo. 
L’affinamento finale avviene sempre in bottiglia: può essere di pochi mesi per i vini di pronta beva, fino a diversi anni per i vini di lungo invecchiamento.

Name: VIGNAIOLI CONTRA' SOARDA
Description: Vignaioli Contrà Soarda, located on the slope of “Saint Michael” hills, in Bassano del Grappa, at the foot of the Asiago plateau. The vineyard has been created to re-discover the site’s vocation to vines and olive tree growing.

Name: Stony Run Winery
Description: Estate Winery in Berks County, Pennsylvania

Name: Premier Wine Blends
Description:
Premier Wine Blends, the Winemaking Experts for Winemakers!

You started a vineyard because you’re passionate about wine and producing great wine for others. Our services help you focus on that passion rather than worrying about the business of producing great wines. Through our custom wine making services, we can help you craft high quality wines that truly represent your brand and reputation.

Looking to expand your company’s wine selections or augment your production volume?  Need additional cash flow for your winery?

Premier Wine Blends can help you fill the gaps in several ways:

1.  Consulting Services 
We offer advice about how to craft a custom wine blend that is distinctive and has all of the characteristics of your winery.  We have studied the science of custom wine blending, and practiced the art of blending—and have won awards for our products.

2.  Wine-buying Service
We know it takes time and effort to make a quality wine—five to seven years from a vine that is planted today. We can assist you with the quick purchase of high-quality wine that is ready to bottle. Through our network of resources, we can locate wine that fits the style and image of your winery.

Name: Vintage and co
Description:
Vintage and co est le site e-commerce de la Maison RYST-DUPEYRON fondée en 1905, au coeur de la Gascogne, par Joseph Dupeyron, bouilleur de crus.

Aujourd'hui, la maison continue à élever ses Armagnacs DUPEYRON et développe également une activité de négoce de Grands Crus de Vins.

Ainsi, le site Vintage and Co est spécialisé en vente d'alcools millésimés tels que les vins, armagnacs, portos, whisky et champagnes.

Name: DISTILLERS OF SURREY LIMITED
Description: Distillers Of Surrey is a family run distillery in the heart of Surrey, Ripley.  Lead by Simon and Lianne Sherlock, this distillery sets itself apart with its unparalleled focus on craftsmanship and quality, championing British ingredients, seeking sustainable and ethical partners and suppliers and producing spirits with distinction.

Name: X Winery
Description: X Winery & Amicus were created in 2000 by an MS/MBA candidate with the idea of creating niche wines to satisfy needs in the marketplace without any overhead. Our passion and commitment is to build on what our predecessors (over the last 4000 years) have accomplished, and provide wines in underserved segments. Our company is focused on innovation, efficiency, service, and imagination and we have a deep desire to satisfy wine lovers the world over. We do not own any vineyard property allowing us to focus on sourcing the best fruit.  We utilize a family vineyard cooperative for most of our fruit and, when we can't use it, we will find their fruit a good home.  Our goal is to please, spark conversation, and to bring reward to all that find our wines.

Name: Revolution Wines
Description:
Revolution Wines are a UK based wine merchant with a focus on French and South African Wine. We trade with restaurants, hotel groups, corporates, outside caterers, wholesalers and retailers. We have a particular focus on private clients seeking wine for investment and private cellars.

Revolution Wines are the official representatives of the Cape Wine Academy in London. The Cape Wine Academy provides a range of social and professional wine courses for individuals and tertiary institutions and specialises in creating bespoke wine-tasting events for corporate clients.

Name: Wijnkoperij Henri Bloem Arnhem
Description: Wij, Michel en Marja van Tooren zijn sinds 1 december 1997 eigenaar van Wijnkoperij Henri Bloem in Arnhem. In de afgelopen 20 jaar hebben wij ons plekje in de Arnhemse wijnwereld verdiend. Bij ons vind je een zeer ruim assortiment (ca. 1000) wijnen uit de hele wereld, tegen zeer aantrekkelijke prijzen. Door onze ervaring in de horeca (in een vorig leven 11 jaar eigenaar geweest van Restaurant Het Wolvenbosch in Wolfheze) hebben wij een grote affiniteit met wijn/spijs. En voor ons is een klant nog altijd een gast in onze winkel. Eigenlijk verkopen wij geen wijn, maar gezelligheid. Gezelligheid bij een feestje, een dinertje met vrienden, een bruiloft, een receptie. Overal waar een glas wijn van Henri Bloem op tafel komt, hopen wij dat we een glimlach op de gezichten kunnen toveren.

Name: Illahe Vineyards
Description: At Illahe, our goal is to make wine as naturally as possible from soil to bottle. We work by hand on small lots with age-old techniques and materials. Our focus is to grow and make quality Pinot Noir and white wines that express the vintage and their varietal characteristics. We don't use enzymes or additives. Some of our wines are made entirely by hand, with no electricity or modern mechanization. We use a gentle wooden basket press and age our Pinot Noir in French and Oregon oak.

Name: Enolo-Go S.A.
Description: Your dream, your work, your wine!! Custom made micro vinifications. Enjoy producing your wine with us! whether in Chile or Argentina you can select your grapes from some of the best terroirs in this part of the world to produce top quality wines! COntact us in www.enolo-go.com

Name: The Bruges Gin Society
Description:
A great venue with no room for addictions, but where a nice and tasty passion is shared and benefits from all the space to be well-cultivated.

Our goal is to expand our knowledge and share it with anyone who is into gins, tonics, and the fascinating world around it. We can offer you:

Gin Tastings: we can organise a private gin tasting, revealing the secrets of gin and tonic, by tasting everything pure, learning the tips and tricks, and going into history. At the end, we conclude with some perfectly served G&T...

Gin Bars: a gin bar can be a great added value to your party, your event or your venue. We always serve you the best G&T-serves, as they would be for ourselves, always with the necessary background information...

Gin Advice: if you need any advice or information whatsoever, whether it be background info for your gin menu, your gin offers, or gin reviews, you can contact us.

Name: Waypoint Spirits
Description:
The Waypoint Spirits Story-

Earlier this year one of our partners was walking down the beach with his dog on Fishers Island with a bloody mary in hand watching the sailboats out on Long Island Sound, and recognized that he was in a great place having a special moment and that it was important to stop and take note of this particular point in his life. This realization of the importance of these moments and all of the stops along our journey was the genesis of the Waypoint name and philosophy. Over the last few months we have started to make note of when we are at those Waypoints, and to stop and appreciate them big or small, whether it be watching your child walk across the stage at high school graduation, sitting with family and friends over a meal, looking out over a mountain range, or simply having a conversation with someone you've just met. As we try to spread the Waypoint philosophy we invite you to take note of those moments and share them with us.

Join us in the Spirit of Adventure!

Name: Planet Wine
Description:
Planetwine.it Vendita Vino Online, la migliore selezione di vini italiani di piccole produzioni e di ottima qualità a prezzi molto competitivi, speciali selezioni e promozioni.

Siamo amanti del buon vino e con entusiasmo affrontiamo l'esperienza nel mercato enologico con Planetwine.it un marketplace rivolto a wine lovers come noi a cui proponiamo degustazioni di vini italiani prediligendo le eccellenze di piccole produzioni frutto di duro lavoro, di rispetto per madre natura e delle tradizioni.

Ci rivolgiamo ad intenditori e a tutti coloro che desiderano arricchire il menu di una cena, accompagnare una ricetta oppure fare un regalo speciale.

Seguici, percorreremo insieme le strade del vino di tutta Italia presentando regioni, territori, cantine ed etichette accuratamente selezionate. Forniamo informazioni vitigni e disciplinari che riteniamo indispensabili a comprendere ed apprezzare non solo la confezione ma il contenuto.

Tutti i vini su planetwine sono stati attentamente selezionati e tra questi puoi scegliere quello che più stuzzica la tua curiosità, sarà comunque un'ottima scelta. Ma puoi anche lasciarti consigliare approfittando delle promozioni Planetwine Collection create con il giusto rapporto qualità/prezzo.

Un efficiente sistema di logistica e solidi rapporti commerciali ci consentono di adottare i migliori sistemi di conservazione al fine di garantire la qualità dei prodotti. Adottiamo il massimo delle precauzioni per il trasporto e la consegna delle bottiglie confezionate con un particolare imballo protettivo.

Effettuiamo spedizioni in tempi rapidissimi consegnando la merce entro 24/48 ore dalla definizione dell'ordine attraverso i migliori corrieri nazionali

Puoi pagarci sia con bonifico bancario che con carte di credito in quanto aderiamo a circuito Paypal leader mondiale delle transazioni online.

Name: Vinatur! Natural Wines
Description: Vinatur is a global online retailer of artisanal natural wines made without intervention or additives, including sulphites. We offer private tastings, events and bring you to the winemaker with our one-of-a-kind wine tours! It is about integrity, treating our customers in an honest and fair manner. And, vitally, it is about providing an unsurpassed level of customer service.

Description:
Dream Wines is a wine importer-distributor dedicated to boutique wineries throughout the World. Dream Wines aims to promote unique and high quality wine brands in the Asian market. 

The company believes that sharing the inspiring stories and vision behind each wine will spark more than good conversations amongst the wine lovers. With a vision to inspire, Dream Wines aspires to awaken the inner passion in individuals that flow far beyond the glass, inspiring them to pursue their dreams.

Name: Champagne Michel Mailliard
Description: Depuis 1894, la Famille Mailliard est présente dans la production de Champagne à Vertus, au cœur de la Côte des Blancs. Les Champagnes de Michel Mailliard (1er Cru) présentent la typicité des champagnes issus de la partie sud de la Côte des Blancs: ils sont légers et délicats, clairement empreints du Chardonnay, symbole de finesse et d’élégance, amples, souples et toujours frais, simples et complexes à la fois. Nous possédons également un Atelier de Dégustation, qui est installé au 11 boulevard Jean Brion à Vertus, au-dessus d'une grande cave inscrite à l'inventaire des monuments historiques. L'entreprise possède également 3 divers hébergements dans les alentours pour sublimer l'expérience en Champagne des clients : L'Atelier de Dégustation avec ses 2 suites, La Méditation de Thaïs, une maison de vacances pour 8 personnes et le Petit Château de St Mard, une magnifique demeure familiale entièrement rénovée.

Name: Champagne Philippe Landreat
Description:
Le partage est notre raison d’être. Partager une philosophie fondée sur la générosité, sur l’amour des bonnes choses, et qui prône l’excellence.

À la vigne, le caractère familial s’exprime par une grande exigence et une extrême minutie. Des valeurs précieuses inculquées par Philippe et qui font la fierté de la Maison. Son bon sens paysan prône une viticulture raisonnée pour le plus profond respect du terroir. 

Assemblages, millésimes, parcellaires, cuve inox ou fûts… les idées ne manquent pas. En cave, rigueur et patience sont les maîtres mots. Avec le temps, les vins prennent les contours définitifs de ce qui fait le style Philippe Landréat : des vins créés pour être partagés !

Name: Champagne EGROT et Filles
Description:
Découvrez un champagne de Vigneron issus de notre terroir d’Aÿ, Mutigny et Louvois. 
Une passion et un savoir qui se transmettra pour la future génération Lily et Camille.

Name: Aqua Vitae Institute
Description:
Aqua Vitae Institute (www.aquavitaeinstitute.com) is the world’s largest center for alcohol education and we are proudly located right in Center City Philadelphia.  Aqua Vitae is a private licensed bartending school dedicated to educating both sides of the bar; bartenders and consumers.  We believe in toasting to the joy of life and celebrating the rich history and virtue of spirits, while teaching students and professional alike to respect the trade, perfect the craft, and drink consciously. 

Aqua Vitae is has a state-of-the-art, fully equipped, fifteen-seat bar where guests come to enjoy mixology tasting paired with culinary delights, in an intimate and beautiful setting.  We provide a space for learning, experimentation, mixology tastings and focus on celebrating the craft of making cocktails and pairing it with complimentary tapas. We invite the most respected and specialized bartenders in the industry to demonstrate the art of crafting cocktails with our guests. Let’s travel the world together, one sip and bite at a time.

Name: MT3 Group Srl - EspressoWine
Description:
EspressoWine è il bicchiere di vino, pronto da bere, che fa il suo ingresso nel mercato italiano per dare all’eccellente qualità del vino Made in Italy un nuovo formato. E’ una soluzione monodose, igienica, pratica, facile da trasportare e 100% riciclabile. 

Il vino è confezionato in atmosfera protettiva, in bicchieri in PET alimentare da 187 ml sigillati ermeticamente tramite una tecnologia brevettata a livello internazionale: le proprietà organolettiche del prodotto vengono così preservate sino al momento della consumazione.

EspressoWine - your single serve ready-to-drink glass of Italian wine. 
100% recyclable 187 ml PET glasses - wine is conditioned in a protective atmosphere and sealed trough a patented technology - the organoleptic properties of the wine are protected until consumption - reduced serving times - no glass for a safer product.

Name: Château Rousselle

Château Rousselle est une domaine viticole de 23 hectares situé sur les coteaux de Bourg et de Blaye. 
Vincent Lemaitre, propriétaire du château depuis 1999, est devenu vigneron par passion avec l'idée de créer des vins à son image.
Aujourd'hui, le merlot est prédominant sur le vignoble mais les cépages Malbec et Cabernet Sauvignon sont aussi cultivés.

Name: Thorn Hill Vineyards
Description:
Owned and operated by Jack and Amy Thorn of Lancaster, PA, Thorn Hill Vineyards specializes in hand-crafted artisan wines of exceptional quality. 

At Thorn Hill Vineyards the focus is on small production, single vineyard wines from properties that are the most distinctive in their appellation. Thorn Hill’s grapes come from vineyards in Napa Valley, Sonoma and Lake County, California and are of the highest quality, resulting in premium wines of consistent excellence. As a winemaker, Amy Thorn strives to create full bodied, intensely flavored, richly textured wines of structure, depth and balance that reflect the specific qualities of each vineyard site.

Amy and Jack invite you to explore their full line of premium California wines.

Name: Der Weinheuer GmbH
Description:
Beim Weinheuer findet man alleine über 1.800 verschiedene Weine aus Europe und Übersee –  vom Einsteigerwein bis hin zu einer ausgewählten Kollektion an Top-Weinen und Großformaten. Neben den Weinen werden Champagner und Prosecco ebenso angeboten wie eine feine Auswahl an Grappen, Malt Whiskey, Gins und anderen exklusiven Sprirituosen. 
Auf mehr als 600 qm warten vielfältige Produkte darauf, entdeckt zu werden – in jedem Preissegment und in hoher Qualität. Die Kunden werden persönlich von erfahrenen Sommeliers beraten. 
In der vinophilen Athmosphäre der denkmalgeschützten, hohen und hellen Räumlichkeiten finden regelmäßig Events statt. In der vinophilen Eventfläche mit großer Showküche werden den Kunden immer neue Events zum Thema Wein und Kochen angeboten. Selbstverständlich kann die Eventfläche auch für Privat- oder Firmenfeiern exklusiv angemietet werden. Ob ein Teamevent mit Kochkurs und individuellem Wine-Tasting oder einem Show Cooking Event , bei dem Sie und Ihre Gäste sich bekochen und verwöhnen lassen - wir bieten unseren Kunden individuelle Angebote in jedem Preissegment.

Name: Wine Country Walking Tours
Description:
Experience the best that Wine Country has to offer on guided walking tours of charming downtown Healdsburg. Working with local wineries and gourmet food artisans, Wine Country Walking Tours specializes in creative, fun, and entertaining adventures exploring Sonoma County fine wine and cuisine.

Discover for yourself why certain wines taste better with specific foods by sipping and nibbling your way through Wine Country in a fun and welcoming atmosphere.

With the gentle guidance of a resident expert, enjoy innovative wine and food pairings in private seated tastings. Mingle and chat with the winemakers. Stroll historic Healdsburg and meet the locals. Learn about the art of wine and food as well as local history and current trends, all while making new friends. It’s a wine and foodie lover’s dream come true.

Whether you’re celebrating a birthday, anniversary, enjoying a romantic getaway, or relaxing with friends, Wine Country Walking Tours blends of the best of the season with the magic of Wine Country for a special wine and food adventure.

Spending the night in Healdsburg. Be sure to visit the Healdsburg Lodging website for more information on lodging options. Some inns and hotels are offering coupons to discount our TasteMakers Tour – look for the TasteMakers logo on the list of lodging.

CALL 707-758-4725 TODAY TO MAKE YOUR RESERVATION!!!

Name: Winetasters Society of Toronto
Description:
Winetasters Society of Toronto is one of Toronto’s oldest and largest non-profit club offering fine wine tasting events to members for over thirty years. Our membership year ends June of each year and members pay an annual fee of $55 to help cover mailing and cellar costs. Dual membership at a shared address is $85.

Members get access to tastings and other events for an additional event based fee. If space permits, members may bring guests.

Members gather for tastings on the second Wednesday of each month from September to June. For nine of the tastings we meet at the North York Memorial Community Hall (5110 Yonge Street) where there is a subway stop for your convenience and safety. The events are structured as a blind tasting of 8 wines plus a mystery wine. A guest speaker leads the group through the tasting by introducing the wines of the evening with pertinent information about the region, the winemaker, the vintages, and taste profile we can expect. After tasting the wines the speaker and the members share their impressions of the wine.

In December our format changes. A special party is held where a large variety of wines are available – you create your own tasting event! Old, new, traditional and novel – wines of every kind and price are available along with some great finger foods.

In addition to the tastings, dinners are planned as the opportunities arise. The food and wine pairings are carefully planned with the chef of the restaurant to provide an interesting and enjoyable evening

Most wines for tasting events come  from Winetasters’ extensive cellar, which has been built up over the last twenty years and stored under ideal conditions.

Tastings are priced on a break-even basis, using the historical cost of the wines plus room rental, glassware, insurance, and cellar costs. Members may bring guests for a premium over the member price.

Description: Hey friends! We are a new crafty brewery and we made JUICEBOX because we think the world needs something less serious right now. Why’d we call it JUICEBOX? Visit our website and click on The Legend to discover the amazing story of Jim Juicebox. Your first sip will transport you back to a simpler time when you could enjoy concerts in the park, hug your friends, and just hang out. Our goal with JUICEBOX is to make tasty adult beverages that make you say “Oh sh*t, that’s good.” The recipe is simple: brew quality Ontario craft beer with the best ingredients and then blend it with amazing tasting lemonades and fruit punches. The result is a taste adventure. Please enjoy responsibly.

Entre el romanticismo, los viajes y las apasionantes historias de grandes generaciones dedicadas a ofrecer la mejor experiencia en vinos, nace Mercado de Vinos{MdV}.

Disfruta con nosotros de un viaje a través de la historia del viejo continente, contado a través de los aromas, texturas y sabores que durante siglos han permanecido y ahora están con nosotros.

Bodegas con tradición de generaciones de familias trabajando por este sueño son Mazzei, Tedeschi, Argiano y Quinta Do Vale Meao; y jóvenes que acogidos a sus historias de familia imponen un nuevo concepto en vinos orgánicos, como es el caso de Sitios de Bodega.
Una amplia gama de historias y sueños que puedes venir a vivir con nosotros en nuestra tienda y que sólo puedes vivir en Colombia a través de Mercado de Vinos{MdV}.

Description:
Thank you for your interest in our wines. Our certified organic vineyards are nestled in the foothills above Glen Ellen where the Sonoma Valley, Sonoma Mountain and Bennett Valley appellations come together.  We produce our signature Syrah and Zinfandel wines, a delightful Syrah Rosé, and a limited production Chardonnay. 

Keith and Cherie Hughes pursued a shared vision in 2001 with the purchase of two organic vineyards in Glen Ellen, California. Initially, their intention was to grow exceptional fruit, a goal that evolved into making superb wines that reflect the unique terroir of their land.

 Before coming to the Sonoma Valley, Keith and Cherie made their home and pursued individual careers in Dallas, Texas. Keith was Chairman and CEO of Associates First Capital. A Ph.D. clinical psychologist, Cherie worked with children, adolescents and their families in her private practice and also acted as a consultant to schools, developing a school violence prevention program.

 Today, Cherie and Keith work together to manage Hughes Family Vineyards. "It is extremely important to us to be involved every step of the way - from the flowering of buds in the spring, to harvest in the fall, to enjoying our great wines with our friends and family."

Name: Les Sentiers Pourpres

La passion du terroir bourguignon:

Les Sentiers Pourpres (www.lessentierspourpres.ch) est le fruit de notre passion pour la Bourgogne, berceau familial, qui nous offre depuis notre enfance tant de souvenirs et d'émois gustatifs. 

Notre projet a muri au gré de nos rencontres avec les vignerons, des nombreuses dégustations dans les foires, les caves ouvertes et les salons. 

Chacun de ces moments nous a ramené invariablement à la conviction qu'il fallait partager notre passion pour cette Bourgogne des terroirs, celle qui n'est pas toujours dans la lumière des guides, mais qui offre des vins authentiques et sans concession, comme les artisans vignerons qui les élèvent. 

Nous rassemblons pour les amateurs de vins tous nos coups de coeur, du Chablis jusque dans le Maconnais. Blancs, rouges, rosés et crémants,  dans une large palette d'expressions du terroir.

Romain Vanolli

Name: Domaine de la Bessiere
Description:
C’est en 1987 que Thierry Dézé reprend quelques vignes et s’installe vigneron.

Aujourd’hui, le Domaine de la Bessière compte 15 hectares composés essentiellement de Saumur-Champigny, mais aussi de Saumur Blanc et de Saumur Brut.

Vigneron indépendant, tous les vins sont vinifiés dans les profondes caves en tuffeau.

Fait assez rare, Thierry Dézé élabore lui-même ses Saumur Brut. Le vignoble est conduit avec rigueur, toutes les vignes sont palissées, enherbées, l’utilisation de produits phytosanitaires limitée, taille courte, suppression des contre-bourgeons,effeuillage, vendange verte permettant de contrôler la production à la parcelle.

A la cave : 
– Tri manuel de la vendange
– Cuve thermorégulée
– Maîtrise des remontages
– Micro bullage permettant d’extraire en douceur matières colorantes, tanins, composés phénoliques, etc…

Name: Sevsamora Winery
Description: Sevsamora Winery (Marani is a Georgian name for place, where wine lives) was established in 2015. Company owns 7 HA of vineyards The fusion of typical Georgian Qvevri (Amphora) Marani and Modern style winery is build up under one umbrella, on 300 sq. territory, that is equipped with state of the art, brand new machineries from Bucher Vaslin. Sevsamora’s this unique Marani gives an opportunity to make wines both traditional way and steel fermented. Separate and quite area, so called Gvirabi (tunnel) is dedicated for Qveri fermentation and aging. Next door to the Gvirabi, you can easily get to the most historical place of the Marani, that is WINE Museum, here time changes and you are 8000 BC years back. As a part of the Wine Museum you can discover a specially designed tasting room, the enoteca and the most comfortable conference space for business discussions and negotiations. Behind these doors, you you’ll find the demo vineyards, terraces and recreation zone for the tourists. We have to admit, that in the nearest future, next to the Marani a classical type winery will be constructed on 500 sq. land. Now the project is under construction. Sevsamora Marani is a place of new developments, leisure and pleasure . Place where you can discover the most unique wines and exciting environment of that corner.

Name: Altamura Vineyards and Winery
Description:
Altamura Vineyard and Winery

Altamura Vineyards and Winery was established in 1985 by Frank and Karen Altamura and is the only winery located in Wooden Valley. Well-known wineries such as Stags' Leap Winery, Pahlmeyer, and Caymus purchase grapes from this area, yet Altamura is the first to capture the uniqueness of the area in a bottling. Frank and Karen have a decidedly hands-on approach to every step of the growing and winemaking process. Thus a natural production limit is established and the wines reflect this deep commitment to quality.

Winery and Gardens
Our family's passion for food comes paired with our wines from Altamura Vineyards and Winery, located in the bucolic portion of Napa Valley known as Wooden Valley. Here, at the Altamura Ranch, we make our family of estate wines, including those featured at Ciccio.

The "ranch" has been in our family since 1855. It not only produces our world class vineyards, but a bounty of vegetables and herbs as well!



Ciccio
Ciccio is the family owned and operated Italian-inspired restaurant by Frank & Karen Altamura and their two sons, Frank and Giancarlo. 
In the kitchen, CIA trained Executive Chef Polly Lappetito cooks the farm fresh cuisine and wood-fired pizzas.

Location
Ciccio is situated on the northern end of Yountville in Napa Valley, California. The building was originally built as an Italian Grocery Store in 1916 and has since been remodeled to create a warm and inviting environment for others to enjoy our food and wine.

Name: Kulara Estate
Description:
Kulara Estate vineyard is located in the Ebenezer district in the northern most reaches of the Barossa Valley, Australia’s oldest and renowned wine-producing region in South Australia.

Our vineyard is steeped in history. The land was initially acquired in 1856 during early colonialism by Mr. John Ridley, an English gentleman, who resided in the city of Adelaide. Mr. Ridley leased the land to a German settler Mr. Gunter Kuhn who cleared and prepared the land for cultivation. Mr. Khun painstakingly nurtured the vineyard for 5 years until 1861.

At this time the Barossa Valley was being settled by German families who were planting vineyards and establishing settlements. To this day, many of the stone cottages and Lutheran churches throughout the Barossa Valley are testament to the 19th century wave of German settlers.

Mr. Ridely moved back to England in 1863 and sold the property to a Mr. Steiner who continued to cultivate grapes. 

The vineyard was eventually acquired by the Riebke family - a well known and respected wine producing family who held the vineyard and maintained the vines until it was purchased by the Stavrakoulis family.

The vineyard is now known as Kulara Estate with the Stavrakoulis family paying homage to the traditional owners of the land and adopting the Aboriginal word for stone axe, ‘Kulara’ in its name.

Our premium range of Australian wines include:
*Rocky Bay Wines
*Lightning Creek Wines
*Rare Penny Wines
*Matilda's Ghost Wines
*The Orator

The business continues to thrive with Edgemill Group exporting our wines to China, Hong Kong and Singapore.

OUR FUTURE
Future aspirations for Kulara Estate include a winery tour, a cellar door and a restaurant where family and friends can gather among the Jacaranda trees to share a platter of locally produced gourmet cheeses and small goods accompanied with a glass of wine from our amazing Kulara Estate portfolio.

Name: Istenhegyi Borház
Description:
Az Istenhegyi Borház egy tokaj-hegyaljai családi borászat Rátkán. Száraz és édes furmint borainkkal, 13 fős falusi vendégházunkkal várjuk a bort kóstolni és pihenni vágyókat Zemplénben! Boraink a helyszínen és webshopon is elérhetőek.

Istenhegyi Borház was founded in 2011, in Rátka in the Tokaj Wine Region. This legendary volcanic wine region in North-East Hungary has been famous for its natural sweet wine for centuries, and now it is getting noticed about the dry white wines too. Our family winery was founded to show the joy of winemaking, the beauty, and the values of this region to our guests and pass it on to the next generation. We are welcoming our guests for wine tastings and also to stay a few days in our renovated farmhouse in the Zemplén hills to enjoy hiking, chill, and a glass of Tokaji wine from Istenhegy.

Name: Vinmaps LLC
Description:
A unique blend of science and art, Vinmaps adorn the walls of wine lovers all over the world.  Swirl, sip, taste and connect in a visceral way with the wine regions of Italy, France, Spain, Napa Valley, and Washington state, to name a few of our 42 (and growing) list of featured maps.  

Prints are available on frame grade paper or canvas.  We also are pleased to offer our maps framed or on canvas gallery wrap - ready to hang in your wine cellar, bar, tasting room or office.  

Wine gifting made easy.  When you need a memorable gift with a touch of luxury look no further.  Every printed map is a carefully wrapped in craft paper with a satin ribbon tied around and placed in its own tube.  Framed pieces are quickly and custom produced and shipped to your desired destination.

We recently have also introduced our line of Spirits maps, which includes our captivating Kentucky Bourbon and Speyside Scotch Whisky.  More titles to be announced in 2019.     

We pride ourselves on providing the highest level of customer service and will do our very best to serve you as quickly and seamlessly as possible.  

Discover more and add further enjoyment to your wine and spirits experience with Vinmaps.

Name: Ginesis

Ginesis is about celebrating the leap of faith, embracing a new beginning and inspiring others to achieve greatness.
Crafted with the freshest botanicals in the beautiful South Florida, Ginesis is distilled 6 times, graced with a hint of avocado then finished in American white oak for a light gold body and a clean smooth taste.

Description:
Great Southern Waters (GSW) is the premium water company for the Southern Island of New Zealand. 

Our fresh water source connects through the foothills of the Southern Alps in a deep confined aquifer that spends over 600 years filtering to us from glaciers high in the mountains.

The town closest to our site is named Tai Tapu, which is derived from the Māori words ‘wai’ which means water, and ‘tapu’ which means sacred
or solemn.

Great Southern Waters is a 100% New Zealand owned and operated company.

Today Winkelshoek has several other divisions within the holding company, but our core is still the production, bottling and distribution of wine locally and internationally.

Name: Grape Agents

Name: Dennis Vineyards
Description:
Dennis Vineyards is located just outside of Charlotte, NC. It sets the bar for creating top-quality Muscadine Wine, Vinifera Wine, and Fruit & Berry Wines.

Dennis Vineyards has 2 wedding venues, multiple ceremony sites, 2 ponds, a gazebo at the smaller pond, about 13acres of vines that produce double to triple the grapes of the other regional vineyards, about 20 acres in total, over half a million gallons a year capacity, highly maintained bottling machine from Italy, all the wine making equipment for that capacity, over 25 wines produced including some french varietals, two houses that sit on the property, as well as the third grape harvester ever made for muscadines and custom made pruning equipment and the above normal level of farm equipment.  The vines were planted by founder Pritchard Dennis and his wife Lynda after they took a trip to Spain in the 1970s.  They discovered their passion and deep appreciation for wine. Upon their return, Pritchard, the multiple business owner that he was began to research all things wine.  With books upon books, notepads and calculators, he devised his plan as he had done many times in the past, which included Brick Plant, Farms, Concrete Plant, Airport development, Commodities Tradings, small-scale fishing business, the vineyard, and finally the winery.  The idea cultivated and matured until finally in the late 1980's he decided to take the plunge into making his first batch as a hobby winemaker. They were so happy with the results that they made more batches and began donating wine to the local Lutheran Church they attended.  Word spread that he had fantastic wine.  1997 the family founded the Winery and in no time they made national news for having the highest antioxidant and Resveratrol content of any winery commercially available according to a Perdue University study.  Won almost every win contest in NC and a lot of the Southeast US while entering.  After 20+ years of a multi-award winning brand and a loyal customer base.

Name: Vino Nostro Ltd
Description:
Vino Nostro Ltd is and independent wine importer and merchant founded in 2011 by two long-time friends and business colleagues, with a specific focus on placing onto the UK market wines of exceptional character and distinction, sourced from as yet untapped wineries across the world.
The idea was borne out of a weekend break in Zagreb, Croatia in April 2011 where we had the pleasure of discovering (and re-discovering) some quite exceptional local wines.
We pride ourselves in our wine selection and we truly hope you will enjoy the tastes we are bringing to you.

Name: The Wine Concierge
Description:
Freda Mooncotch is The Wine Concierge. I am not a sommelier or even consider myself an expert, more like a novice who is completely in love with everything wine, travel, food, adventure and people…this is my zeal for life and I love to share my adventures and experiences with everyone! I have managed to gather 45k followers on Twitter and although I don’t understand this whole social networking thing it seems to work well for me.

I love domestic and international travel, old and new world wines, especially red wines and the people who make and drink them. Think of me as Your Wine Concierge! I’m not getting paid to do this so all of my recommendations are born from pure love! Since there are a ton of excellent sites that already pair wine with food and describe them so much better than I can, I am writing from a different angle…one that will tell you the stories behind finding these wines, the experiences and the people I met while drinking them. They say do what you love and you’ll never work a day in your life. I love finding unique red wines from around the world that are affordable and yummy!

Name: MOVINO, spol. s r.o.
Description:
We are the largest wine producer in the Central Slovakia vineyard region and our wine-production know-how extends back to 1972. But our expertise didn’t result only from producing wine, but also from growing the very grapes that go into it.

We grow our grapes in our very own vineyards which are located around the vineyard villages of Čebovce, Príbelce, Nenince, Bušince, Veľký Krtíš a Veľké Zlievce. Altogether, we manage 220 ha of vineyards in a region that hasn’t been affected by any heavy industry or highway construction. The entire grape production is grown as a so-called integrated production. The goal of integrated farming is to have higher quality yields and to get them in a way that wouldn’t put a strain on the environment. Maintaining, or put more precisely increasing the soil’s fertility and the environment’s diversity is at the heart of integrated farming. A preferential treatment is given to natural mechanisms that guarantee environmental protection with regard to economy and social demands. In terms of wine-growing, we greatly emphasise the harmony between biological, technological, and chemical measures.

Name: Deutsche Fußballnationalmannschaft der Winzer - WEINELF
Description:
Die WEINELF Deutschland e.V. wurde im November 2005 in Ingelheim gegründet und ist stolz darauf, die Deutsche Fußball-Nationalmannschaft der Winzer zu repräsentieren. Die Vereinigung bringt fußballbegeisterte Winzer und Weinprofis aus sämtlichen deutschen Weinanbaugebieten zusammen, um die europäischen Kulturgüter Wein und Fußball zu verbinden. In den Reihen der WEINELF stehen stets zwei rein sportliche Halbzeiten im Fokus, gefolgt von einer genussvollen „3. Halbzeit“. Der Grundsatz von „Wine in Moderation“ liegt den Mitgliedern seit Gründungsbeginn besonders am Herzen.

Viele der Winzer:innen mussten aufgrund der anspruchsvollen beruflichen Verpflichtungen in ihren eigenen Weingütern ihre fußballerischen Karrieren frühzeitig beenden. In Benefizspielen vereinen sie nun beide Welten. Die Qualität des Fußballspiels der WEINELF erntet Anerkennung und Lob, sogar von namhaften Gegnern wie der Traditionsmannschaft Eintracht Frankfurt oder der Weisweiler Elf aus Mönchengladbach. Zu den herausragenden Erfolgen der Mannschaft zählen der Gewinn der Europameisterschaft 2014 in der Schweiz, die Auszeichnung mit dem Preis der Deutschen Weinkritik 2018 sowie die besonderen Besuche bei Bundeskanzlerin Angela Merkel in Berlin und bei Papst Franziskus in Rom.

Unter dem Leitspruch „Die Wahrheit liegt im Wein und auf’m Platz!“ begibt sich die WEINELF seit über zehn Jahren nach Nürnberg. Dort findet jährlich unter der Moderation von Katrin Müller-Hohenstein die Gala zur Verleihung des Deutschen Fußballkulturpreises statt. Die WEINELF ist längst ein geschätztes Mitglied und freut sich über Begegnungen mit Persönlichkeiten wie der Staatsministerin für Kultur und Medien, Claudia Roth, sowie Fußballgrößen wie Uwe Seeler, Otmar Hitzfeld und dem Walther-Bensemann-Preistr

Name: Margherita & Arrigo s.r.l.
Description:
L’Azienda Bidoli è un’azienda vinicola che si trova nel cuore del Friuli Collinare, in una posizione strategica, non lontano da San Daniele. Fondata nel 1924, oggi è gestita dalla “terza generazione”: Arrigo Bidoli, responsabile tecnico ed enologo, e Margherita Bidoli, responsabile vendite.
Nel 2002 i due fratelli Bidoli hanno deciso di spostarsi e di costruire una nuova cantina che pur essendo tecnologicamente moderna conserva al suo interno tutte le antiche tradizioni di famiglia.
La nuova cantina è stata costruita ristrutturando la più antica fornace della regione (risale al 1890) e mantenendo la sua struttura.


The Bidoli estate, founded in 1924, can boast three generations of passionate wine growers.
Nowadays it is managed by Arrigo Bidoli, Wine-maker and technical manager of the company, and Margherita Bidoli, export-manager.
The company is located in a very strategic place, in the hearth of Friuli, near San Daniele.
The new winery was built in 2002 in an ancient brick factory dated back to 1890; even if it’s equipped with the most technological systems, all the old family traditions have been maintained.

Name: Tenute San Giovanni
Description:
Love for places, roots, traditions. Tenute San Giovanni have the goal of transmitting these values through their wines, their creativity, their ingenuity.

Mottarossa is a red with ancient values, decisive and strong. It conveys the pride of a unique territory, where history and beauty meet. An intense and fragrant wine with hints of red fruits, velvety tannins and good persistence.

Each sip of Calomeno is a journey to the origins of Magna Graecia, with a look to the future. A velvety white like a caress of time, fragrant like orange blossom, fresh like an exotic fruit. A miracle of nature, from Greco Bianco grapes and native varieties.

Unique as the land they represent.
Location: San Giovanni di Sambatello, Reggio Calabria

Name: Kiona Vineyards and Winery
Description: Kiona Vineyards and Winery is a family-owned business located on Red Mountain, Washington. They specialize in estate-grown wines, owning and controlling the entire production process from grape to bottle. With a focus on longevity and quality, Kiona Vineyards supplies grapes to over 60 wineries in the Pacific Northwest, emphasizing their expertise in vineyard sourcing. Their commitment to family, farming, and producing exceptional wine sets them apart as leaders in the region, ensuring a legacy that spans generations.

Name: Connect Vinhos
Description:
Somos um e-commerce especializado em vinhos, com loja física situada na Vila Mariana, na cidade de São Paulo/SP.

Oferecemos uma seleção exclusiva de rótulos nacionais, desde vinhos clássicos, ícones a boas descobertas de pequenos produtores e vinícolas consagradas, que fazem seus vinhos com excelência em território nacional.
Temos como propósito descomplicar o consumo de vinhos, disponibilizando em um único lugar,  rótulos de todas as regiões vitivinícolas do Brasil. 

A curadoria do mix é feita pela proprietária da Connect Vinhos, Tatiana Totel, administradora de empresas de formação, natural de Porto Alegre/RS. Por quatro anos, morou em Caxias do Sul/RS, onde entrou para a Confraria do Champagne da Serra Gaúcha, iniciou uma trajetória de estudos, conhecimento e visitas às vinícolas da região, degustando o que há de melhor dos vinhos nacionais tornando-se uma apaixonada pelos vinhos do Brasil e uma caxiense de coração.

Em dezembro de 2019, para acompanhar a família, transferiu-se para a capital paulista, onde iniciou seus estudos pela Associação Brasileira de Sommeliers - RS e vislumbrou um excelente potencial para colocar um antigo sonho em prática.

Nascia então a Connect Vinhos, um e-commerce de vinhos nacionais com o propósito de conectar pessoas e encurtar distâncias. Pra nós, vinho é conexão, vinho é vida, vinho é gente conectada.

Convidamos você a conhecer o nosso site e conectar-se com as nossas escolhas. Sejam muito bem vindos!

Description:
BJVC est une agence d'import en vins et spiritueux active au Québec depuis 9 ans.

Fort de ses nombreuses années d'expérience dans le milieu vinicole, Emmanuel Beaucousin, propriétaire, parvient à sélectionner avec finesse des vins en provenance de différents pays et régions dans lesquels la terre et la situation offrent des crus de grande qualité.

- L'import privé 
- L'entrée de produits en SAQ 
- La promotion individualisée des produits et des partenaires

En constante évolution, l'entreprise cherche aujourd'hui à forger de nouveaux partenariats, découvrir et gérer l'importation de nouveaux produits.

L'équipe BJVC.

Name: Reid Brothers Distilling
Description:
Reid+Reid Gin’s are distilled in a craft distillery located in the heart of Martinborough, New Zealand. The distillery was founded in 2015 by brothers Stew and Chris Reid. The brothers mission is to produce a world class, unique, New Zealand gins, distilled with native botanicals, that challenges the perception of "classic" gins while promoting New Zealand's unique natural flora.

Reid+Reid Gin’s are uniquely Kiwi, in that it is produced with three native New Zealand botanicals: Kawakawa, Horopito, and Manuka. 

Kawakawa is a relative of black pepper and a complex botanical, bringing savoury, spicy and floral characters to the gin, while horopito shares white pepper characteristics. Manuka is the most commonly known of the native botanicals used and brings floral hints, along with a gingery warmth.

Reid+Reid Gin’s are developed and produced by Reid+Reid’s head distiller Chris Reid. Traditionally a wine maker, the concept of a producing a product with a ‘sense of place’ is ingrained in his outlook.

Name: Pilot Fish Ltd
Description:

Name: Wine Place
Description:
Noi siamo Wine Place!

Wine Place nasce dalla passione e dall’amore per il vino, unito alla professionalità e l’esperienza dei suoi membri.

Si prefigge l’obbiettivo di far conoscere ed apprezzare il vino più ricercato, il nettare che vi lascerà a bocca aperta e vi trasmetterà grandi emozioni.

Il vino non è una bevanda priva di significato, in realtà è una sorta di creatura viva capace di evolversi e legare a se sensazioni, emozioni, ricordi, un marchio indelebile nei nostri ricordi capace di descrivere al meglio un territorio.

È per questo che siamo sempre al lavoro per scoprire le perle che vi trasmetteranno questa avvolgente esperienza

Name: Gin Lane 1751
Description:
Gin Lane 1751 is authentic as it gets when it comes to classic gin.

Gin Lane 1751 produces a handcrafted family of gins of a classic Victorian style, originating in an age when there was a bold predominance of juniper berries, hints of star anise and a refreshing citrus finish.

Name: Domaine Julien Masquin
Description:
C’est en 1936 que mon grand-père, Paul Masquin, décida d’agrandir le Domaine qui ne comptait que quelques parcelles. 
Le travail de deux générations me permit en 1998 de reprendre la gestion du Domaine. Après une dizaine d’années consacrées à la restructuration et à la mise en place d’une culture raisonnée et raisonnable, nous vinifions nos premières cuvées en 2009. Nos vins  sont issus d’assemblages parcellaires, subtil équilibre entre tradition et modernité. 
2017 sera une nouvelle étape dans l’histoire du Domaine avec la création d’un tout nouveau chai de vinification et d’élevage. Un nouvel outil qui nous permettra d’exprimer pleinement notre passion.
