Name: CAVE BANYULS L'ETOILE
Description:
Avec l'amour d'un terroir, la passion de la vigne et du vin, depuis 1921, la Cave l'Etoile vous présente ses vins et vins doux naturels d'Appellation d'Origine Protégée : Banyuls, Banyuls Grand Cru et Collioure.
Nos pères fondateurs ont su nous transmettre leur passion de la vigne et du vin ainsi que les valeurs de la coopération. Ils purent exprimer tout leur talent dans cette cave majestueuse.
Pour procéder au vieillissement des grands vins, de grands foudres furent acheminés par la mer en provenance du centre de la France. Arborant fièrement les couleurs catalanes, ces grands foudres façonnés par les contemporains de Marcellin Albert, de Raymond Poincaré et de Jean Jaurès, contiennent toujours nos plus vieux millésimes ; des cuvées de plusieurs décennies qui ont fait la réputation de l'Etoile au sein et au loin des frontières roussillonnaises.
De nos jours encore la grande majorité des membres de notre cave sont les descendant de nos fondateurs et sont attachés à faire briller leur Etoile.

Name: Leyack Group Consulting
Description:
Making the most with what you've got.

You already are running a winery, and the day-to-day has a way of filling up your schedule.
It's tough to look at your operations with fresh eyes while you are in the thick of it.

That's where we can help.

With a fresh set of eyes, a diagnostic mindset and a specialized toolbox.
The right tool can make any task more efficient, faster, more effective.

Wine is agricultural, artisanal and meritocratic -find the right vineyard, work smart and hard, and you can make great wine.

Yet, small wineries often struggle to compete in a crowded market inundated with large companies with matching marketing departments and budgets.

It's this battle that drives us; rooting for the underdog. To help you find that piece of the market to can claim as your own, because you've earned it.

Y así, mientras vemos madurar la uva, los sarmientos irán perdiendo su verdor, ganando en leña; transformación gradual que comenzará en las bases, los mayores, dirigiéndose hacia las puntas, los jóvenes, en ese periodo natural de agostamiento, la propia vida.

Name: Château Réal d'Or
Description:
Notre vignoble produit des rouges remarquables, puissants et charpentés pouvant vieillir plusieurs années en cave. Il est issu d’un assemblage de Cabernet sauvignon, de Grenache et de Ssyrah. L’alliance de nos cépages, apporte à notre rouge une robe très colorée ainsi qu’une matière voluptueuse.
La délicatesse du Grenache lui révèle sa profondeur et son élégance. Le Cabernet sauvignon lui procure sa séduisante couleur tendit que la Syrah lui offre une belle complexité.
Nos cuves tronconiques, assurent une qualité exemplaire pour les fermentations. La totalité du vin est élevé en barriques de chaîne français durant une période de 12 à 14 mois.

Gustativement, les arômes intenses plairont aux palais exigeants. Vous découvrirez ces saveurs subtiles de cèdres et des parfums de violette, son bouquet de fruit des bois mais aussi ces notes de vanille et de poivre. Son évolution provoquera des notes de truffes et une belle souplesse encore. Sa structure tannique le flatte et le Grenache lui apporte une réelle note gourmande.

Name: El Dorado Wine Grape Growers Association
Spirits Of Bhutan - K5 Himalayan Whisky
Description:
Scotland meets Bhutan

The Kingdom of Bhutan is known for its peaceful, harmonious way of life. So it’s no surprise that these qualities – balance, beauty – are equally present in the nation’s preeminent whisky. Blended and bottled by hand in the foothills of the Himalayas, K5 Himalayan Whisky is a special blend created in honor of the coronation of the 5th King of Bhutan’s ascension to the throne. Distinguished and dynamic - it lives up to its namesake.

K5 Himalayan Whisky starts with a 100% organic triple-distilled grain spirit and natural Himalayan mountain spring waters from Bhutan. It ends with a special blend of 8-and 12-year old malt whisky from Scotland, bringing together the best of east and west. The result is a blended whisky that is smooth and supremely approachable. Versatile, with notes of sweetness, spice and peat, K5 is delicious in any form or fashion – neat, on the rocks or in a favorite cocktail.

K5 is the first and only Himalayan whisky available in the U.S. - an exclusive opportunity to experience a masterful malt blend from one of the farthest corners of the world.

It is a homage to different types of craftsmanship at the highest level. Fine art meets traditional ways of creating premium champagne and porcelain.
The glossy pure white bottles are decorated with 24 carat gold to highlight the brand and its wind rose symbol.
The Champagne is the true expression of selected Premiers Crus vineyards from the prestigious terroir of  Montagne de Reims showing an outstanding elegance and fineness.
 

Avec ses bouteilles exquises au coeur de porcelaine, la société Cuvée Sensorium propose une veritable et merveilleuse innovation dans le monde du Champagne.
C'est un hommage à différents types d'artisanats au plus haut niveau qui associent l’art, la tradition champenoise et la porcelaine.
Le flacon d’une blancheure pure et brillante est décoré d'or 24 carats pour mettre en valeur la marque et son symbole: la rose des vents.
Le Champagne quant à lui représente la véritable expression d’une sélection rigoureuse de vignobles Premiers Crus du prestigieux terroir de la Montagne de Reims, gage d'une élégance et d'une finesse exceptionnelle.

Name: La Mondianese (House of Ruchè)
Description:
Welcome to the captivating world of "La Mondianese," a wine estate that blends passion, tradition, and innovation in the heart of Monferrato, a renowned area in the district of Asti with a rich viticultural history. 

Founded to create superior-quality wines, we are committed to producing unique wines that capture the essence of the terroir and satisfy the most refined palates.

Born from the vision of a wine enthusiast who aimed to harmonize ancient traditions with modern innovation, La Mondianese has built over time a winemaking reality dedicated to the beauty and diversity of its vineyards. 

Located in an ideal microclimate and surrounded by breathtaking landscapes, our vineyards are cultivated with care and respect for the environment, imparting distinctive and complex characteristics to our wines. 

Each bottle tells the story of our terroir, reflecting the dedication and generosity of nature.

Our winery, equipped with modern technologies, holds at its core a profound respect for tradition. 

Our expert winemaker works passionately to transform grapes into wines that express authenticity, elegance, and complexity. 

Every stage, from harvest to maturation, is carefully attended to ensure the highest quality.

The range of our wines offers a variety to please all tastes, from refined Ruchè to robust Barbera d'Asti produced in stainless steel tanks and aged in oak barrels. 

Our selection mirrors the diversity of our vineyard. We also produce fresh and aromatic whites and rosés, balancing fruity and mineral notes to perfection.

You are invited to discover and taste the excellence of La Mondianese, where each bottle is a celebration of our commitment and the richness of the terroir.

Name: Cantina San Diego
Description:
Cantina San Diego: a culture in winemaking from Italian Marche region back to 1917, with a view to the future.

San Diego winery towers over a promontory near Tolentino in Marche region, middle-east of Italy.
The holding hail from 1370, when Franciscans “Clareni” built a monastery to St.Diego, between fertile fields and a stunning landscape.
From 1917 the family is owner of the estate and in 2009 San Diego winery was founded.
The estate consist of 11 hectares planted to vineyards on clay soil, rich in potassium and sea fossils.
We follow internally in the winery all the productive cycle based on respect, strictness and quality: from the vineyard to the bottle.
We integrate an high quality wine production (bio-conversion, low yield per hectare, hand picking) with the most advanced science for the production on premium wines. Definitely this is our mission!
San Diego winery represent a culture in wine making handed down from 1917, but with a view to the future.

Description:

Name: Girl On The Hill Vineyard and Lavender
Description:
About my vineyard and Zinfandel wine...
Girl On The Hill is a boutique vineyard developed in 2001 and located on Mt Vaca of the Blue Ridge Mountains making my vineyard the highest elevation in Solano County at 2620 feet. This elevation, our eastern exposure and moderate temperatures from neighboring Napa County creates an extremely unique micro climate. 

You will enjoy a 100% estate grown Zinfandel from a certified clone grafted onto an original California root stock from the Frank Evangelho vineyard in Contra Costa County. This root stock dates back to approximately 1889 making the vines perfectly suited for our hilly and dry environment. The unique combination of location and history is one that simply can not be duplicated!

About my lavender...
High atop Mount Vaca on the border of California’s Napa and Solano Counties, Girl on the Hill lovingly tends to naturally grown lavender plants in order to create one-of-a-kind eye and neck pillows, dream pillows and sachets filled with the fragrant dried flowers of this miraculous plant. Grown in accordance with the USDA standards for organic farming, the lavender is planted, tended, harvested, dried and cleaned in small batches by myself.

Girl on the Hill mixes the lavender buds with flaxseed and hand fills pillows and sachets sewn from fabrics sourced on my travels, like cozy cashmere, organic cotton, and luxurious charmeuse silk, duponi silk and silk brocade.

See my website to order lavender products and wines.  Thank you!

Name: Tertini Wines
Description:
At Tertini, we are dedicated to sustainably producing premium, cool-climate Pinot Noir, Riesling and Chardonnay, as well as alternative varieties such as Arneis, from our high-altitude vineyards perched along Australia’s Great Dividing Range. Nestled above 500m in the Hilltops and over 700m in the Southern Highlands, this ancient volcanic landscape provides fertile and mineral-rich soils, in turn produces wines with beautiful, cool-climate mineral characters that reflect our unique terroir.

The first vines in the Southern Highlands region were established where our Yaraandoo Vineyard stands today, by German vigneron Joseph Vogt, who in 1855 recognised the region’s potential to produce quality grapes. Along with his wife Caroline and their nine children, Joseph carved out a living selling his wines to the miners who tracked between the Joadja Creek shale mine and Berrima township. After the original vines were destroyed by bushfire some 60 years later, the area was given over to cattle farming until 2000, when Tertini’s founder Julian Tertini followed in Vogt’s footsteps and re-established vines on the property.

Our estate vines are carefully hand tended throughout the year and experience low cropping to ensure the subtle, elegant complexities typical of fruit from these regions end up in the bottle. We believe that to taste and enjoy our wines is to truly savour the wonder of the Great Dividing Range. From our home in the picturesque Southern Highlands to the slopes of the Hilltops, Tertini Wines go above and beyond to deliver a truly elevated wine experience.

Please contact Craig Moxey for Australia Wholesale Orders and International Sales & Distribution
Cellar Door: 02 4878 5213
Mobile: 0418 115 206
Email: sales@tertiniwines.com.au

Name: Estate Crush
Description:
As Lodi’s first dedicated custom crush winemaking facility, Estate Crush has the capability to manage our clients’ grapes from crush to bottle.  Estate Crush is designed to handle more than 350 tons per harvest (with lot sizes down to one ton), and has the facility, equipment, staff and expertise to allow our clients to focus their time, energy and resources on building their brand and selling their wine.

The state-of-the-art facility is specially designed for small to medium lot, handcrafted luxury wines and supported by a highly trained and experienced winemaking staff.

Estate Crush’s entire crush pad process is contained in a sanitary indoor environment, including indoor tank storage to maximize winemaking control.

Wij kiezen bewust voor kleinschaligheid, zowel in onze handelsactiviteit als in onze selectie van wijnhuizen en wijnbouwers.  Passie blijft het centrale thema en de tijd en ruimte voor het persoonlijk aspect blijven onze belangrijkste motivatoren in onze aanpak. Name: Tranquility Farm & Otium Cellars Winery
Description:
Tranquility Farm and Otium Cellars is a Boutique Winery & luxury event farm located just outside of the picturesque town of Purcellville in Northern Virginia. With its roots in old Franconian tradition, Otium produces quality wines from one of the best Western Loudoun County terroirs.

The Winemakers have created unique, complex wines with Austrian and German varieties such as Grüner Veltliner, Grauburgunder (German Pinot Gris), Blaufränkisch, Dornfelder, and Zweigelt. Other varieties you may find in the tasting room include Chardonnay, Merlot, Malbec, and Cabernet Sauvignon.

Otium’s vines were first planted in 2007, with the first vintage in 2009. The tasting room opened in April of 2012.  The winery’s unique terroir is what makes the wines so high in quality. The soils, moderate elevations, excellent drainage and temperate climate produce intense, complex wines. The winemaking philosophy is that premium wine is made through a year-round effort in the vineyard, long before it even arrives to the cellar.

The farm is part of Goose Creek Farms & Winery, a private equestrian facility dedicated to boarding horses.  Lodging is available with our 12 bedroom country home with heated outdoor pool. For more information on boarding and lodging please contact 540-338-2027.

We look forward to the pleasure of your company.
// Leisure, Peace & Tranquility

Name: hum Spirits
Description:
Inspired by the great amaros of Italy, celebrated mixologists, Adam Seger of Chicago and London’s Joe McCanta infuse organic rum with fair trade hibiscus, organic ginger, green cardamom and kaffir lime to create the beautifully balanced spirit called hum. At a bold 70 proof, hum is best enjoyed on the rocks with lime and a splash of soda. Enjoy it tall with tonic, ginger ale or cola. Or, add it to your favorite beer or sparkling wine. Don’t stop there….replace sweet vermouth or orange liqueur with hum to kick up the classic negroni, manhattan or margarita. Finally, end your evening with your favorite ice cream drizzled with hum. Mmmmmm. The applications are only limited by your imagination.

Sip responsibly - because no one has had a bad humming experience.

Name: Bodegas Campos de Enanzo
Description:
Más de 70 años dedicados al cultivo de viñedo y elaboración de vinos de calidad.

Bodegas Campo de Enanzo está localizada en Navarra, España.Las inmejorables condiciones naturales y climatológicas han hecho de Murchante un lugar de tradición vitícola. En este privilegiado entorno se encuentran nuestras 400 hectáreas de viñedo

Éstas se reparten en diversas variedades: Tempranillo, Merlot, Cabernet; Chardonnay, Viura, Garnacha.

Desde el respeto por la naturaleza y el fruto que obtenemos de ella, las cosechas que nacen de nuestros campos son exhaustivamente controladas con rendimientos no superiores 6.500 kilos por hectárea.

El resultado es una cosecha total de 4 millones de kilos de uva conseguidos con las técnicas más innovadoras para potenciar las virtudes propias del fruto.

Con este espíritu, Bodegas Campos de Enanzo ha sido siempre pionera en la utilización de las últimas tecnologías para la elaboración de nuestros vinos. 

La gama actual de vinos de DO Navarra, que ofrecemos al mercado son:
BASIANO, en honor al excepcional pintor de nuestra tierra.
KARRIKIRI, en recuerdo a esos toros que paseaban libres en los campos navarros.
REMONTE, juego tradicional de cesta punta que llenó nuestros frontones y animó nuestras veladas.
Vinos 100% Navarros: Tierra, Cuerpo y Alma.

Name: Domaine Babatzimopoulos
Description:
In 1971, a new, beautiful place steals the heart of Anestis Babatzimopoulos, owner of A. Babatzim & Co. A place where wine was traditionally produced; the slopes of mountain Vertiskos. There he installs the first test vineyard, after which he expands it, at the same time applying the rules of organic cultivation to 100s of sq. meters, making it the first organically cultivated vineyard in Greece. The constant expansion creates the need for a new winery at the center of the vineyard and in 1999 the construction begins.
Today, Domaine Babatzimopoulos is open to visitors from all over the world. It has its own winery producing wine only from the vineyard, aging cellars, tasting rooms, seminars rooms, a restaurant and a cafe. The winery produces white, rose and red wines solely from the grapes of the vineyard. Among the 26 varieties cultivated in ideal climate conditions are the foreign varieties Cabernet  Sauvignon, Merlot, Syrah & Ugni Blanc, and the Greek varieties Xinomavro, Roditis, Malvasia & Malagousia.

MCW also acts as a brokerage house trading both nationally and internationally with regular exports to more than thirty countries around the world. The Managing Director, John Morgan, has forty years of experience in buying and selling fine wine.

Wine is bought direct from the producer or from an extensive network of trade and private cellars in the UK and continental Europe. We are constantly seeking to add to our stocks and always pay top prices for well-cellared wine.

P. S. has chosen an assortment of high quality wines to share the knowledge about wine culture with other wine amateurs.

凭借专业的品酒师和葡萄酒专家的建议，和O.N.A.V全国品酒协会-意大利葡萄酒大师协会（一个意大利政府支持的官方葡萄酒专家协会）的支持, 萧乐缇甄选隹酿选择了一些高品质的葡萄酒, 为跟鉴赏家分享葡萄酒的文化.

Name: Champagne Aubry
Description:
C'est à Jouy-lès-Reims, au cœur de la Petite Montagne de Reims que Pierre et Philippe Aubry, descendants d'une lignée de propriétaires viticulteurs depuis 1790, ont entrepris une véritable œuvre de mémoire en décidant de faire renaître quelques cépages perdus, autrefois cultivés en Champagne .

Dotés de solides connaissances - Pierre, œnologue, est diplômé de l’École Nationale Supérieure d'Agronomie de Montpellier, Philippe a étudié la biologie - et de l'expérience acquise auprès de leur père, les deux aventuriers du goût ont ainsi gagné leur pari : allier le classique à l'original. Ils savent aussi bien produire une gamme de vins pour les amateurs en quête d'une haute et permanente expression du champagne, qu'une sélection de cuvées rares. Cette collection reflète plus encore qu'un esprit maison, une réelle philosophie qui se résume en quelques principes : rigueur, respect des traditions, originalité et créativité .

Rigueur de l'agronome qui privilégie la qualité du raisin, avec l'attention portée au rendement de chaque vigne ; rigueur de l'élaborateur qui utilise les meilleurs outils actuels ; respect des traditions avec un pressoir à large maie, la sélection du "cœur de cuvée" et l'élevage sous bois ; originalité d'une démarche individualiste qui s'inscrit contre toute standardisation du vin de Champagne ; créativité illustrée par la recherche de type archéologique des cépages anciens, en vue de faire revivre les vins de cette fin du XVIIIème siècle qui aima les bulles frémissantes et vit naître la maison Aubry.

Name: Ferment - Orange Wine Centre + Wine Store
Description: Housed in a carefully preserved heritage building, Ferment, the Orange Wine Centre, has a sleek contemporary European interior emphatically announcing that the Orange wine scene has arrived. Traditionally a more boutique region than some of Australia’s major wine-producing belts, Orange has retained its historic charm and interest while quietly benefiting from modern winemaking methods. Now Ferment’s state-of-the-art Enomatic wine dispenser allows visitors to sample and purchase a range of exceptional local wines, all carefully curated by The Wine Man himself, Peter Bourne. The official cellar door for Cook's Lot, Carillion Wines and Topers, Ferment’s full selection showcases wines from the Central Ranges of NSW and beyond, inviting patrons to experience a wide range of local wines while exploring the heart of Orange. The township is an excellent place to start your wine tour, with Ferment’s wine list the perfect introduction to the region’s greatest drops. As with any dedicated wine venue serious about its mission, matching the wines with a delicious array of gourmet seasonal produce is one of Ferment’s understated strengths. Settle in with your chosen glass of wine, an ever-changing cheese board, charcuterie plate and tasty tapas. Local gourmet produce including Kangaroombie Vinegar Brewery’s barrel-aged vinegar and other artisanal edibles are also available. Better yet, buy a bottle, hire a bike, pack a Ferment gourmet hamper and find yourself a pretty spot in the countryside for the perfect picnic.

Name: The Brewer's Apprentice
Description:
Specializing in all things craft beer; The Brewer's Apprentice sell's good beer, fresh. 

We have 48 rotating taps to fill your Growlers, Howlers and tall cans with our canning machine. We also have a cooler of curated local and international selections, wine and cider. Visit our webpage or the Untappd app to see our current selections!

In our private tasting room - we host Educational Sessions, Beer tasting events, and are available for private bookings. Beer tasting events must be booked in advance. 

We specialize in all things craft beer, and also offer a subscription service, special buys programs, and a growler club. 

We also offer commercial distribution, holding partnerships with other Calgary Local Businesses.

Name: Cantina della Porta Rossa
Description:
Siamo produttori piemontesi di vini di alta qualità. Le Langhe sono una terra rinomata per i suoi vini e la gastronomia di qualità, area universalmente riconosciuta per il tartufo bianco, di cui se ne percepisce il sentore nei nostri vini.

Mettiamo la nostra esperienza al servizio del vostro palato. Lasciatevi guidare attraverso i sensi dell'olfatto e del gusto, alla scoperta di sensazioni intense. L'emozione e il segno di un grande vino si ricordano sempre.

Siamo tradizionalisti da sempre, quindi niente barrique. Selezioniamo, invecchiamo, affiniamo i grandi vini di Alba.

Name: Bandwagon Drinks Ltd.
Description: We believe in creating high quality spirits either under one of our own brands, or as a bespoke "white label" for clients. Offering as much invovlement as needed, down to brand design and serving suggestions.

Name: Sky River Mead
Description:
Sky River Meadery was established in 1997, and released our first wines in 1999. Mead, or honeywine, is an ancient form of winemaking, with roots throughout Europe, Africa and Asia. Our goal at Sky River Mead is to reintroduce the world to exquisite mead and honey wine, all while making them more approachable and food friendly.

All of Sky River's Mead & Honey Wine are Award winners.

Name: Velo Winery
Description: Vrem să vă facilităm accesul la vinuri mai bune. De aceea lucrăm numai cu produse acreditate in agricultura ecologica pentru a obtine struguri de cea mai inaltă calitate. Apoi, in loc să ne trimitem vinurile către distribuitori si comercianti cu amanuntul, le trimitem direct către dvs. Împartasim calatoria noastra pe parcurs, pentru că vrem să stiti exact de unde vine vinul pe care îl beti si cat economisiti in acest proces. Aceasta este Velo Winery.

Name: The Bartists
Description: Immersive mixology

Name: Die Flüssigfütterung
Description: Wir sind Deine Brennerei für edle Brände. Unser Ziel ist es, gemeinsam mit Euch, Spirituosen nach Euren Vorstellungen und nach Eurem Geschmack zu kreieren. Bei uns werden nicht einfach nur Flaschen beklebt oder irgendein Schnaps vermarktet: Von der Getreideverarbeitung bis zur fertigen Flasche werden alle Prozessschritte in liebevoller Handarbeit ausgeführt. Name: Van Dort Wijnspecialist
Description:
Wij zijn een familiebedrijf met passie voor het mooie product wijn. Het bedrijf is opgericht in 1994 door Ab en Ina van Dort. Inmiddels overgenomen door Mieke. Die ook door de wijnpassie gegrepen is. Vinologenopleiding op zak. wij verkopen met veel plezier onze kwaliteitswijnen.

Onze wijnen importeren wij merendeel zelf. Wijn is een persoonlijk product en via een proeverij weet u wat u koopt en heeft u nooit een miskoop! Twee keer per jaar houden wij een grote overzichtsproeverij. Zelfs producenten zijn dan aanwezig om u kennis te laten maken met hun wijnen en kunnen er alles over vertellen.Wij houden deze overzichtsproeverijen één keer in het voorjaar en één keer in het najaar. Houd onze agenda dus in de gaten, want dat zijn evenementen waar je bij moet zijn!

Description:
The company ADIG was founded in 1993 as a family company by Ivan Stoev and was initially focused on distribution of products for wine production. The company is seated at the city of Plovdiv, the heart of Thrace which has been known since ancient times with the cultivation of vineyards and production of wine. In 1997 ADIG became representative of Sofralab, a world leader in the production of oenological products, which have already been well known to the Bulgarian wine producers. At the beginning ADIG was representing only French companies but over the years it increased the number of partners with Italian companies, all of them being leaders in the wine industry. With the development of the market, ADIG divided its activity into two and established ADIG AGRO, which is specialized in vineyards and orchards and ADIG remained at the service of the Bulgarian wine producer.

The main activity of the company follows two directions:
•distribution of products for wine production and storage by leading world manufacturers
•consultation and advice in the field of viticulture and wine production by French and Italian specialists.

ADIG is an exibitor in the International wine growing and winemaking exhibition „Vinaria“ ever since its creation . The purpose of ADIG is always to satisfy its customers and to build an image of industry leader. The company believes that its future is determined predomonantly by the positive assessment of its customers and partners. Cooperation between ADIG and company‘s customers goes beyond the supply of best raw materials and equipment; it also includes solutions for issues arrising during the process of wine production

Description:
Cradled in the heart of the Tuscan hills in Montepulciano, La Ciarliana is owned by Luigi Frangiosa, who started the Vino Nobile wine production in 1996 thus fulfilling a lifelong dream,  started with his grandfather 50 years earlier and inherited through his father Santo Pellegrino. 
La Ciarliana is named after an intimate and deeply suggestive chapel nestled in the vineyards surrounding our estate, whose bell tower also inspired our 21 hectares family run winery’s logo.
Our modern and recently restored wine cellar is made up of an underground production area for the winemaking and aging processes, a cosy intimate wine tasting-room and a welcoming wine room, opened on a panoramic terrace overlooking our vineyards and on a garden porch, where we are glad to welcome wine lovers and travellers wishing to taste our bottles and experience our wine activities.

La nuova location in viale della Repubblica 23 a Prato è studiata per poter gustare al meglio i vini in un ambiente confortevole e accogliente, abbinandoli con una proposta gastronomica di eccellenza, dalla pausa pranzo all’aperitivo e nel fine settimana anche a cena o dopocena.
Offriamo inoltre servizi di banchettistica con la possibilità di richiedere il servizio di sommelier professionisti anche per cene o eventi privati.

Name: Chehalem Mountains Winegrowers
Description:
Welcome to the Chehalem Mountains! The Chehalem Mountains’ dramatic terrain & diverse soils make extremely complex & delicious wines.

Many of Oregon’s oldest and most celebrated vineyards thrive in the Willamette Valley’s largest viticultural area, the Chehalem Mountains. A mere 20 miles southwest of Portland, towering hilltops and a patchwork of marine, volcanic, and windblown sediments provide an idyllic home to more than 250 vineyards and wineries. Large swaths of Willakenzie series and Laurelwood soils further define the Chehalem Mountains with two nested AVAs, Ribbon Ridge and Laurelwood District. The diverse composition of soils, terrain, and climate are fundamental to our distinctive wines, contributing unparalleled complexity and joy to every sip.

Name: Buscareto
Description:
Buscareto nasce con Claudio Gabellini ed Enrico Giacomelli, locali e stimati imprenditori IT, che nel 2002 decidono di investire nel mondo del vino rilevando tre importanti proprietà vinicole nelle aree più vocate della Regione Marche.  L’azienda prende corpo in una nuova Cantina, un Brand una Produzione Vitivinicola insieme ai “tecnici” Vito Camussi, Marco Rosini e lo storico enologo marchigiano Giancarlo Soverchia.

Dopo 13 anni di duro lavoro, esperienze e relazioni, nel 2015 Claudio ed Enrico, impossibilitati a seguire l’azienda in prima persona decidono di delegarne la Gestione ad un Manager Professionista, il quale interpreta la “mission” impostando i processi operativi e decisionali in una sorta di nuova formula cooperativa.

Name: VINO SAPIENS
Description:
Enoteca - Media Company
Raccontiamo storie di cantine e di vini geniali. La Selezione Vino Sapiens comprende delle nicchie molto specifiche: da noi non troverai tutto, ma soltanto alcune tipologie di vino. In particolare vini OSSIDATIVI, vini provenienti da uve P.I.W.I. e vini spumanti che definiamo TATTILI. E poi, naturalmente, ci sono le nostre Cantine del cuore...

Il nostro approccio al mondo del vino non si limita a considerare le etichette come mera merce di scambio. Per noi il vino è innanzitutto relazione. Per questo è fondamentale conoscerlo, conoscere i produttori, i territori, il modo di fare che cambia in base al modo di intendere la vita. Ci sono vite, persone e storie dentro ogni singola bottiglia. 
Le racconteremo insieme assaggiandole in un calice.

Name: Vin-Aire Wine Aerator
Description: Pour a couple ounces of red wine into a glass from a freshly opened bottle.  Then take a second glass and holding the “Vin-aire” over it, pour the same amount from the  freshly opened bottle also.  Notice aeration happening as the wine inhales air through the side openings and then swirls down through the “aire funnel” before it reaches the glass…  raise the first glass to your nose, smell the aroma, then taste the wine.  Then, do the same with the second glass.  You will notice the difference immediately the wine in the second glass will have a more open bouquet to allow you to identify  more smells and then the taste will be smoother, softer tannins and a very strong finish.  That will be the reason that you will use the “Vin-aire” whenever you serve red wine.  It comes in a handy holder that you can take to your favorite restaurant or friends house!

Name: One Brick Wines
Description:
MAKING WINE WE CAN ALL ENJOY!

We want to make wine that is bold and fun at the same time. Wine that is for everyone and every occasion.

BOLD & APPROACHABLE

You shouldn't need a degree in wine to feel comfortable drinking it with your friends. We want to make wines that we can all enjoy. Wines that are great with a fabulous meal or take-out on a tired Wednesday night.

Wine can be beautiful. We want to create bold wines. Wines with subtle hints in the aroma and nuance in the flavor. We want to dazzle the senses and engage the mind. We want to make wine that wine lovers will enjoy.

One Brick is both comfortable and beautiful. We worked hard to make sure it tastes great but also doesn't need to just be for special occasions. These wines are amazing with food or just sipping on the couch watching Netflix.

Name: Journey's End Wine Company Limited
Description:

In 2018, Journeys End Wine Company Limited was bought by Stredic Thompson.

Journey's End Wine Company Limited is a Jamaican manufacturing company that manufactures products in the alcoholic beverage industry. We specialize in wines, fruit wine to be exact. We have our own brand known as 'Flavours Of The Past', we also offer manufacturing services and white labelling services to select clients.

Flavours of the Past is unique in many ways, but perhaps the most interesting fact is that our wines are made in small batches from authentic Jamaican products such as Ackee, Sorrel, Ginger, Pimento Berry, Sugar Cane, Noni, Passion Fruit, Pineapple, Honey Orange and Soursop with plans to add more flavors in the coming years.

Name: VINANOVA
Description:
Œnologue consultante expérimentée (30 millésimes vinifiés) et passionnée, je réalise de l'accompagnement technique viticole et œnologique durables.

- De la conception de vignobles à la mise en marché des vins j'apporte une vision synthétique,pragmatique à la fois scientifique et technique. 

- Particulièrement sensible aux problèmes environnementaux et économiques, je favorise et accompagne les conversions à l’ agriculture biologique, mais aussi la mise en place de pratiques respectueuses de l'environnement et des hommes (HVE, AB, Biodynamie ou l’intégration de la phytothérapie végétale).

Mes conseils, véritables transferts de compétences tendent à raisonner et argumenter les process de fabrication avec de solides ancrages scientifiques pour vous accompagner vers des process bas intrants voir sans intrant.
 
- Une solide connaissance des marchés et des acteurs de la filière me permet d'adapter la conception des produits et de nouer des partenariats commerciaux pour mes clients.

Rigueur et expertise en dégustation me permettent aujourd'hui un référencement comme dégustatrice professionnelle auprès de nombreuses instances et concours.
Expert près la cour d'appel de Bordeaux depuis Janvier 2011. 
Je revendique une éthique d'objectivité rigoureuse, véritable garantie pour ma clientèle d'aucun parti pris commerciaux.

Name: The Corkery Wine & Spirits
Description:
We are very pleased to announce that California Wine Merchants has officially become the Corkery!

So what’s changed? Lots, and all good stuff! If you’re familiar with our store, you may remember that we closed for some renovations not long ago, and that ever since we reopened with a beautiful new look, our selection of wines and spirits has been diversifying and growing as well. Not only that, but our long time general managers, siblings Darek and Joanna, are now the owners as well! What does this mean for you? It means that the now family owned and operated Corkery will be offering an even greater selection of wines and spirits, with even more competitive prices, brought to you by the same knowledgeable and awesome staff you know and trust.

What to look for in the months ahead? We have lots of great changes still to come. For one thing, while we still love California wines, we are busily tasting and selecting wines from all different countries around the world for inclusion into our distinctive array of offerings. We are expanding our inventory, but we are doing so in such a way as to make sure that only the best wines end up on our shelves.  Look for prized vintages and everyday greats from places like Australia, Spain, Argentina, New Zealand and many others. And it’s not just our wine selection that’s growing. We now have a broader selection of spirits including acclaimed Japanese whiskies. We’re also adding different styles of wines, like Sake, Port, Grappa and many others. Look for special tastings of these delectable additions in months ahead. We are updating to state of the art POS and we will even be introducing mobile technology to make your shopping experience as versatile and convenient as possible.

We are crazy excited looking forward to all of this, and we hope you are too!

The Corkery Team

Name: Philipson Wine Trading
Description:
Philipson Wine is the leading importer of quality wines from all over the world including Bordeaux Cru Classé

Philipson Wine ApS blev grundlagt af Christian Philipson i 1987 under Christian Philipsons femårige ophold i Bourgogne, hvor hans interesse for at handle med vin blev vakt. Philipson Wine indførte i 1992 Postordre-salg, hvilket gjorde, at Philipson Wine kunne skære alle de fordyrende mellemled mellem vinproducent og kunde væk. 30 år efter er Philipson Wine en af Danmarks førende vinforretninger, med landsdækkende levering fra dag til dag. Philipson Wine er endvidere blevet kåret til Gazelle i Børsen seks år i træk, hvilket gør os til en Supergazelle, samt en af de tusind hurtigst voksende virksomheder i landet.

Philipson Wine er en ung, dynamisk virksomhed, der siden 2002 har solgt vin online på Internettet. Dette er gjort med så stor succes, at Philipson Wine i dag, er Danmarks største online vinhandel og førende importør og distributør af kvalitetsvine fra hele verden.

Philipson Wine går direkte til vinproducenterne og køber rigtigt og stort ind på de rette tidspunkter. Vi klipper alle fordyrende led som agenter, grossister og mellemhandlere væk. Denne strategi sikrer til enhver tid Philipson Wine's kunder en meget konkurrencedygtig kvalitet og pris og det er derfor vores priser generelt lavere end hos vinhandlere og supermarkeder. Philipson Wine sælger direkte til restauranter, virksomheder og private i hele landet fra vores domicil i Kokkedal. Da vort salg er baseret på hele kasser (12 fl.), har vi mulighed for at have en meget mindre avance end den traditionelle vinhandel eller supermarked, og dermed tilbyde markedets mest interessante priser på kvalitetsvin.

Netop fordi vi også er vinelskere, ønsker vi at give Dem den bedste vinrådgivning og være behjælpelige i alle spørgsmål. Alle Philipson Wines medarbejdere er, i kraft af deres mange års erfaring i vinbranchen, altid i stand til at yde Dem en kvalificeret og personlig betjening. Foruden vores showroom i Kokkedal, har Philipson Wine også en Erhverv- og HoReCaafdeling, som altid står klar til at hjælpe.

Name: LA CEPA WINERY
Description:
Como resultado de nuestro amor por el vino y la cocina nace en 2018 La Cepa Winery, un lugar pensado en sus inicios como boutique (grab and go) de vinos, en donde encontrarías además de conocimiento, acompañamiento para seleccionar siempre el vino con tu personalidad y tu momento.

Desde el comienzo se proyectaron catas y cursos, que llevaran al amateur a profundizar en temas que le permitieran ser más confiado a la hora de hablar y seleccionar su vino; pero sobre la marcha nos fuimos dando cuenta y nuestros clientes nos fueron diciendo el camino que querian recorrer con nosotros. 

Abrimos barra, las catas se suspendieron y la cepa se convirtió en wine & food, ya no eramos solo una boutique sino que ofreciamos la experiencia de tomarte el vino con nosostros, mientras te comias una deliciosa tapa española.

Hoy 2 años después de nuestros inicios y con una coyuntura que genera mucha incertidumbre en el futuro, somos La Cepa, todo ha cambiado desde entonces porque ahora somos online, pero nuestra esencia siegue intacta: llevar momentos alrededor de la cultura del vino.

Name: Petraea Plus, LLC
Description:

Read it when you're bored, hungry, or shopping for barrels and want to get to know your barrel rep. :-) 

#blog #wineblog #cadus #theoakcooperage #winebarrels #barrellady #winelife #momlife #saleslife #bread #quarantine #petraeaplus #vineyards #winemaking #wine #winegrowing #wineries

Name: Destilería Sacrificio
Description:
Destilería Sacrificio was concieved in 2012 with a singular goal in mind: to create the finest handcrafted mezcal available. Their distillery, located in the heart of Tlacolula, in the Oaxaca Valley, is dedicated to producing mezcal that is truly noble - made 100% from agave.

What sets Destilería Sacrificio apart is our unwavering commitment to preserving the ancient tradition of mezcal-making while utilizing sustainable ancestral and modern techniques to ensure the longevity of the agave plant. Each bottle of mezcal produced by our distillery embodies the unique flavors and scents of Oaxaca.

We take pride in offering our high-quality mezcal in the United States, Mexico, Germany, Spain, and Switzerland under Mezcal Sacrificio and Mezcal Akul brands.

Name: Whyte Horse Winery
Description: The charming lake resort community of Monticello, Indiana, is where you will find Whyte Horse Winery. With a tasting room set in a renovated 1886 farmhouse decorated with elegant wood and antiques and a modern processing and banquet facility, Whyte Horse is the result of vision and a passion for fine wines.

Name: Watershed Premium Wines
Description: Premium Wines and Award Winning Restaurant - located in the Margaret River wine region, Watershed boasts a selection of premium wines, breathtaking views across rolling vineyards and amazing menus.

Name: Linked Vineyards
Description:
Linked Vineyards is the collaboration between family, friends and community. 

We Produce 100% Estate Cabernet Sauvignon from Knights Valley, Sonoma County in the hills on the west side of the Mayacamas Mountain range where the slope, volcanic soils and 1,200 foot elevation make the vines work exceptionally hard.

Name: Vivanza Winery
Description:
Vivanza Winery is a manufacturer / distributor of high quality Spanish wines. Our main facility is located in Spain-Alicante where the wine is created. 

The new Vivanza winery was build in 2009 on the native soils close to the old “La Alberquilla” winery

The facility is equipped with the latest technologies on winemaking  
From the reception of the grapes to the fermentation of the must, the grapes are treated in the best possible way and monitored throughout the different production stages 

Our cellar is constructed such that it is possible to create the best wines from the different grape varieties harvested at its optimal maturation point 

The use of French and American oak barrels, to mature the wine, enriches the quality and flavour

The whole process from grape to bottle satisfies the highest quality standards and this has resulted in our wines being sold worldwide

Name: Messnerhof Weingut . Tenuta . Winery
Description:
Der „Messnerhof“ ist ein kleines Weingut, das sich der Erzeugung von hochwertigen,  typischen und authentischen Weinen verschrieben hat. Es liegt in St. Peter, im klassischen  Magdalenergebiet am Stadtrand von Bozen.

Il maso “Messnerhof“ è una piccola azienda dedita alla produzione di vini tipici di gran pregio. Si trova a San Pietro, zona classica di produzione del vino “Santa Maddalena” alla periferia di Bolzano.

The “Messnerhof” is a small winery that specialised in the production of high-quality wine that is typical of its area. It is situated in St Peter, at the outskirts of Bozen and in the middle of the wine-growing area of the “St Magdalener“ wine.

Name: Terres Blanches Wine Merchants
Description:
We are a family-owned and operated French wine importer, dedicated to working with independent vignerons, who farm honestly and produce authentic world class wines. These producers are about as far from a luxury wine estate as you can get. There are no fancy on-site tasting bars, lounges, patios or restaurants. There is a cellar, perhaps a barn for equipment, the vineyards and distinctive wines that reflect a sense of place.    

We believe the best wines come from healthy grapes, cultivated using biodynamic or organic principles, fermented using natural yeasts and crafted with minimal inputs in the cellar. To us, it’s a simple truth that vignerons who employ biodynamic or organic methods have an intimate understanding of their vineyards and the raw materials (grapes) produced from each individual parcel. While difficult to quantify, this level of understanding  almost always translates into something delicious in your glass.

Our producers do not strive to make a homogeneous product in each vintage. Their wines are a unique reflection of the challenges experienced throughout the year. Whether it be forces of nature such as frost, hail and vine pests, or something as simple as a broken-down tractor, there’s a constant struggle.  It takes patience, persistence and support of a community to successfully produce high quality wines while embracing these challenges.

Unlike other agricultural products, wine has a way of connecting us to the place and to the fascinating people who nurtured the grapes from vine to bottle. We feel very fortunate to represent the wines of these dedicated vignerons, and we are honored to bring not only their wines to your table but also their stories.

Name: Villa Creek Cellars
Description: Villa Creek Cellars is a small family winery growing and producing certified organic and biodynamic wines. We work with the best Rhone grape growers on Paso Robles' west side as well as our own estate fruit to create wines of integrity, earth, and soul. Our Demeter and Stellar certified vineyard, boutique winery and rustic, modern tasting room speak to customers seeking wine that resonates authenticity. Our production level remains at 3000 cases so we can touch every bottle.

Name: A l'anqueVin
Description:
Une Cave à Saveurs pour le plaisir et la gourmandise de tous, autour du Vin, mais également autour de produits artisanaux issus des nos belles régions viticoles.
Avec ou sans label, des vignerons, des brasseurs, des conserveries, des producteurs et artisans choisis avec amour pour leur démarche et leur philosophie éthique inscrites dans le respect des notions de terroirs, biodiversité, environnement et traditions pour le plaisir de la découverte et de la gourmandise.
Pour les plus "Grands" certes mais également pour plaire aux plus petits qui veulent se familiariser avec le bon goût de nos terroirs.

Name: LIGNE | W SARL
Description:
LIGNEW company has been created in 2008 in France by wine expert, Sébastien Lézier, with the
aim of participating in good times spent around the table with family, friends or on more romantic
moments.

It is not about efficiency of our accessories which we believe are among the best in the world. It is,
also, not only about design!

... It is about pleasure: pleasure to spend time with good people, pleasure to share a good dinner, a
good wine of course, pleasure to discuss, to laugh, to love...

And if our creations participate in generating the appropriate atmosphere that drives to great
moment, then we succeed what we wanted to achieve.

We think our creations to be touched, looked at, discussed about... Like good wines!

... It is all about pleasure and sensuality.

Name: Don Vinardo
Description:
Somos un blend. Un equipo raro o poco habitual. Nos gusta el vino, y creemos que alrededor de una botella pueden darse esas vivencias que nos hacen bien. Pero como la gran mayoría, no somos "especialistas"… entonces queremos probar, aprender y divertirnos, porque al fin del día se trata de pasar un buen momento alrededor de un buen vino.
Toda esta magia está bajada a la realidad por la sommelier Mariana Achaval. Ella elije los vinos y completa la hoja de cata que te van a llegar todos los meses a tu casa.

Name: Vins du monde - Le blog
Description:
Les vins français sont parmi les meilleurs au monde. Les meilleurs, vous affirmeront certains ! Soit, mais que cela ne nous empêche pas d’aller à la découverte des pépites qui se font ailleurs.
Terroirs ancrés au plus profond de l’histoire, climats en constante évolution, cépages endémiques, savoir-faire accumulés de génération en génération : il n’existe pas deux vins identiques sur terre. Chacun est à l’image du sol et du vigneron qui l’ont fait naître. Certains sont exceptionnels, d’autres décevants, mais tous nous racontent une histoire.

C’est la mission de ce blog : vous raconter les vignobles qui tracent leur chemin aux quatre coins du monde.

Sur Vins du monde, nous apprécions les traditions ancestrales, savourons les innovations du secteur, et accompagnons nos lecteurs à la découverte de la diversité !

- Les traditions, car elles nourrissent les savoir-faire uniques de nos vignerons. C’est grâce à elles qu’ils ont appris à dompter la nature et les lois de la chimie pour créer des vins d’exception.

- Les innovations car elles bouleversent nos façons d’apprécier le vin. Nouvelles technologies, nouvelles applications : toutes ces mutations permettent d’embarquer de nouveaux amateurs de vin dans cette aventure universelle.

- Les découvertes enfin, car elles nous ouvrent des horizons enrichissants. Originales, elles constituent des expériences qui nous font sortir de notre zone de confort, pour le meilleur !

Sur Vins du monde, nous fournissons également des services aux professionnels du vin : 

- Vignerons, importateurs, distributeurs, créez votre page web sur vinsdumonde.blog en quelques clics pour promouvoir vos vins auprès d'une audience francophone d'amateurs de vin.

- Restaurateurs, cavistes, amateurs de vin : consultez-nous pour la constitution de votre cave ou carte des vins du monde

- Acteur du e-commerce du vin : profitez de notre audience ciblée pour promouvoir votre innovations autour du vin

Name: Vinclick
Description:
The idea of Vinclick was born in December 2016 by two friends, around a table, in good company, drinking good wine.

From there the dream of being able to bring the precious and beloved Italian wine to everyone's home, breaking down the barriers of classic distribution, in simplicity and in the shortest possible time.

What seemed like an unattainable dream became a reality at the beginning of 2018 thanks to the commitment and willfulness that has distinguished us since the beginning.

Our mission: to share the aromas and flavors of our beautiful country, through one of its most noble products, THE WINE.

---------------------
L’idea di Vinclick nasce nel dicembre 2016 da due amici, intorno ad un tavolo, in ottima compagnia, bevendo del buon vino.

Da lì il sogno di poter portare il pregiatissimo e amatissimo vino italiano a casa di tutti, abbattendo le barriere della distribuzione classica, in semplicità e nel minor tempo possibile.

Quello che sembrava un sogno irraggiungibile diventa poi realtà all’inizio del 2018 grazie all’impegno e alla caparbietà che ci ha contraddistinti fin dall’inizio.

La nostra mission: condividere i profumi e i sapori del nostro Bel Paese, attraverso uno dei suoi prodotti più nobili, IL VINO.

Name: Wine Marketing Hub
Description:

We want to use that experience to support the growth of the Australian wine community by providing experienced marketing support to small and medium sized wine producers.

If you need marketing resources and are not ready to employ a team, or if your team need support we can assist you.

Name: Прайм Резерв (Prime Reserve)
Description:
Один из крупнейших импортеров и дистрибьюторов элитной алкогольной продукции. Эксклюзивно представляем в Беларуси торговые марки мировых лидеров отрасли: Moet Hennessy (Hennessy, Glenmorangie, Ardbeg, Moet & Chandon, Veuve Clicquot, Dom Perignon, Cloudy Bay, Terrazas de los Andes), Diageo (Johnnie Walker, Captain Morgan, Singleton, Talisker, Cardhu, Bell's, White Horse), Edrington (The Macallan, The Famous Grouse, Highland Park), Jagermeister, Proximo Spirits (Jose Cuervo, Bushmills), лучшие дома вин (Cusumano, Marchesi Frescobaldi, Concha y Toro, Botter, Grupo Baron de Ley, Spier, Bosca, Mare Magnum).
Мы осуществляем прямую дистрибуцию и продвижение всей импортируемой продукции во всех регионах страны.
Лучший опыт мировых лидеров рынка в продажах и маркетинге мы адаптируем и применяем в Беларуси, чтобы обеспечить брэндам, которые мы представляем, лидирующие позиции в своих категориях.
С 2021 активно развивается новое направление - электронные сигареты (одноразовые и закрытые системы с картриджами).

Name: Charlie T Locklear Vineyard & Winery, Inc
Description: Charlie T Locklear Vineyard & Winery, Inc. was formed November 2006. This has been a dream of my fathers for a better part of my adult life. As far back as I can remember my father has nurtured some type of fruit on the family farm that was passed to him by his father. He has made wine from the fruit grown on the farm for approximately 30 years. This knowledge was passed to him by his parents, the late John and Emily Locklear. My father explained that it was my grandmother that made the wine and my grandfather that harvested the grapes. As my father continued to work with his vines, he learned to root the few native vines he had with different varieties of cultivated Muscadine vines. My mothers' father was influential in this area and was a great help to my father as he rooted flowers and shrubs, this knowledge was easily transferred to the grape vine. These were valuable lessons that would come in handy later when the vineyard was planted.

Name: Cellar Maker Imports Ltd.
Description: We are a boutique wine and spirit importer based in Calgary, committed to bringing the highest quality products to the Western Canadian market. These products are hand-selected by the team at Cellar Maker Imports; backed by decades of experience in the wine and spirit industry.

Name: Stanburn Winery
Description: Just like our vineyard, Stanburn Winery is a family adventure. Since 1999, our family has owned and operated a 19-acre vineyard in scenic Patrick County, Va. We have gone from growing grapes to making our own wine. We have Vidal Blanc  (dry white), Chardonnay (dry white), Traminette (dry white), Highly (semi-sweet blend), Bull's Blush (semi-sweet blush), Cabernet Franc (dry red), Chambourcin (dry red), Big A Red (red blend, dry), Barbera (Italian dry red), Poorhouse (sweet red), and Meadow Breeze (sweet white). We grow approximately 50 tons of grapes each year, depending on the season. We offer tastings, vineyard and winery tours, and hold four festivals throughout the year.

Name: Agaves y Raíces El evento de MEZCAL más grande de México, 2 y 3 de marzo 2019
Description:
Agaves y Raíces es el evento de Mezcal más grande de México, un evento 100% familiar que rescata y enaltece a la bebida espirituosa más ancestral de nuestro país.
Buscando promover el consumo responsable de está bebida, la difusión de nuestros productores mexicanos y fomentar la cultura de consumir lo hecho en México, decidimos crear un espacio en donde los fanáticos del mezcal, puedan degustarlo, presenciar sus procesos de elaboración, adentrarse en su historia, disfrutarlo y divertirse.
Rodeados de naturaleza, vegetación y con más de 2 hectáreas disponibles, podrás degustar mezcal de más de 120 productores mexicanos, adquirir artesanías, presenciar espectáculos, conciertos y talleres, mientras que para los más pequeños habrá zona infantil con juegos, entretenimiento y personal de cuidado, todo, acompañado de una amplia oferta gastronómica típica mexicana. 
¿Cuándo?: 2 y 3 de marzo del 2019

 Horario de 11:00 am a 8:00 pm

Name: Persoonlijkwijnkado.nl
Description:
Stuur een echt persoonlijk wijn kado!

Wil je een echt persoonlijk kado sturen? Aan een vriend of vriendin, collega of zakenrelatie? Of misschien wel aan je eigen geliefde? Geef dan iets waarmee je iets zegt. Met Persoonlijkwijnkado geef je een wijn die past bij het karakter van de ontvanger. Dat maakt het heel speciaal. Zo geef je iets dat écht anders is. Je stuurt een kado om nooit meer te vergeten en dát van de allerbeste kwaliteit. Want de selectie van onze wijnen vindt plaats door gecertificeerde wijnkenners met jarenlange ervaring.

Persoonlijk wijn kado

Persoonlijkwijnkado is de bijzondere wijnkadowinkel van GEEFMETKARAKTER. Hier bieden wij alleen wijnen aan van topkwaliteit, in diverse prijsklassen. Op basis van de door jou opgegeven karaktereigenschappen selecteren wij de best passende wijnen. Zo geef je een ‘eigen wijn’ kado. Op een stijlvol kadokaartje leest de ontvanger waarom deze fles wijn bij hem of haar past. Als je dat wilt, voeg je nog een persoonlijke boodschap toe. Hoe speciaal is dat! Bestel je voor 15.00 uur, dan heeft de ontvanger het morgen in huis. Uiteraard prachtig verpakt in een stijlvolle geschenkdoos.

Relatiegeschenk of zakelijk kado

Wil jij een collega of zakenrelatie verrassen? Met een verjaardag, jubileum of gewoon om te bedanken voor de samenwerking? Stuur dan een persoonlijke wijn van Persoonlijkwijnkado.nl. Geef eens iets anders en maak een onvergetelijke en karaktervolle indruk.

Zelf wijn kiezen?

Wil je de ontvanger zelf een wijn laten kiezen die bij zijn of haar karakter past? Bestel dan een persoonlijke wijn kadobon. Hiermee kies je zelf een wijn die past bij je persoonlijkheid. Natuurlijk kun je met deze de persoonlijke wijn kadobon ook bestellen uit onze webwinkel.

Name: GOT WINE?
Description: A proposta do Got Wine? é desmistificar o consumo do vinho, mostrando que a bebida pode ser consumida em diferentes ocasiões na rotina do paulistano. Desde um clássico happy hour, um cineminha, um sábado a tarde com os amigos  e  dezenas de opções diferentes. Our extensive commitment to the selection of our wines, the service we deliver to our clients and our passion for the trade make us a truly exceptional organization fully committed to every aspect of our industry. Amongst our team you will find the most knowledgeable, passionate individuals delivering you an array of unforgettable wines to fit any of your needs.


Founded in Chicago, IL Affinity Wine Imports brings great brands to distributors nationwide and serves retailers, restaurants and boutiques in Chicago, New York and Las Vegas. We know you will find not only our wines but our experience to be truly exceptional.

Description: L'Enoteca regionale del Roero rappresenta l'intera produzione dei vini del Roero ed è sede dell'ufficio turistico del Roero

Name: Invinitum
Description:
Invinitum.se är en av Sveriges första butiker för vinförsäljning. Vårt fokus ligger på att erbjuda våra kunder kvalitetsvin från vingårdar med hantverksmässig produktion. Våra kunder är nyfikna på unika viner från Europa. Hos oss har kunderna möjlighet att välja om de vill beställa färdiga temalådor, komponera egna blandlådor med 6 eller 12 flaskor eller om de så önskar beställa enstaka flaskor. Vårt sortiment består av röda och vita viner, roséviner, söta viner och mousserande. Invinitum.se erbjuder kunderna personlig service, 100% nöjd-kund-garanti, trygg e-handel, säker hemleverans, vintips och rådgivning av våra erfarna sommelierer.

Invinitum.se grundades 2007, när lagen om distansförsäljning kom. Invinitum.se drivs av Invintitum ApS som bedriver försäljning mot privatpersoner via e-handel. Vi betalar alkoholskatt och svensk moms. Genom vårt dotterbolag Invinitum AB säljer vi även till HoReCa. Vi har ett flertal restauranger i Sverige som erbjuder sina kunder våra viner. De viner vi säljer finns inte att köpa på Systembolaget.

Name: Château Armandière
Description:
Bernard Bouyssou, vigneron indépendant à Cahors, vous propose une gamme de vins élaborés dans le plus grand respect de la tradition, depuis trois génération.
Ce vignoble en terrasses du Sud-Ouest, aux sols argilo-calcaire, de silice et graves, offre une grande diversité d'arômes et de saveurs.
Des vins savoureux que l'on n'oublie pas.

Name: NEST VINI E CICCHETTI
Description:
Vous êtes passionné de vin italien?
Vous voulez gouter une fine sélection car, pour vous, la qualité est tres importante? 

Je m’adresse à :

 Tous ceux qui aiment les dégustations à domicile, qui ont envie de prendre le temps avec quelqu’un qui l’emmène en voyage, qui aiment le partage et la gourmandise et qui aiment l’Italie.

 Tous les épicuriens qui aiment les bonnes choses et qui recherchent la qualité et qui ont besoin de conseils. Et ils peuvent commander en ligne sur mon webshop sans devoir se déplacer en magasin.

 Une clientèle professionnelle, comme des sociétés qui travaillent en lien avec l’Italie, qui recherchent des idées cadeaux pour leur clients/personnel ou un team building autour du vin.

  Des restaurants qui sont à la recherche de nouveaux vins à mettre à l'honneur sur leur carte et qui ont envie de mettre sur la table des vins qui gardent le contact avec leur vignerons.

Si vous partagez avec moi et mes fournisseurs l’amour du bon vin et des bons produits, alors faisons connaissance!

Name: FAP GRAND CRU SL
Description: Somos una importadora y distribuidora de grandes vinos del mundo. Somos especialistas en los vinos de Burdeos y todos los vinos extranjeros que se venden a través de "La Place".

Name: Wine Decoded
Description:
WINE DECODED Started 40 years ago when our Chief Wine Hacker, Paul Kaan, was 2 years old. 

Simple recipe really! A party + very generous guest + a glass of champagne left on my highchair = An empty glass when they returned

A spark ignited & nurtured touring the wine regions of Australia on family holidays. A bonfire lit studying winemaking & then making wine at DeBortoli’s, Yering Station, Yarra Yering, Domain Bernard Moreau et Fils, Champagne Devaux, Legras et Haas, in Margaret River, Moldova & now for WINE DECODED!

WINE DECODED is more than just a winery, more than just a bottle shop …
It will be the Ultimate Wine Playground! Sharing Everything that’s Good about Wine!

The Most Important Ingredient is YOU!

We want you to come play! Join us & be part of a community that loves wine just as much as you.

Name: AHP VIN
Description:
Lidt om AHP VIN
AHP VIN er et lille vinfirma, der tilbyder Vinforedrag, Vinsmagninger,   Vinkurser, Vinskole, Vinrejser samt salg af vin. AHP VIN kan præsentere  mange spændende vine fra hele verden.

Hvem står bag AHP VIN
Bag AHP VIN står Annie Holm Pedersen, som er foredragsholder og vinguide med et bredt baggrundskendskab til vin og spiritus. Annie er udlært tjener fra Hotel d´Angleterre i København, videreuddannet som faglærer med hovedfag i vin og spiritus og har i en årrække undervist på Hotel- og Restaurantskolen i København. I 1999 startede Annie sit eget firma, AHP VIN, og udover foredrag og undervisning bliver Annie brugt som vinguide på forskellige vinrejser. 
Annie er medstifter af Vordingborg vinklub VOR VIN, som er en aktiv forening med over 100 medlemmer. 
I 2001 blev Annie optaget i Vinbroderordnen Confrérie Saint-Etienne d´Alsace Frankrigs ældste vinbroderorden, som stammer helt tilbage fra det 14. århundrede.
Annie er medlem af flere vinklubber, møder mange vinfolk og hendes bibliotek rummer en lang række vinbøger og tidsskrifter. Annie deltager i forskellige vinarrangementer og er hele tiden opdateret med, hvad der rør sig i vinverden.
Interessen for vin er stigende i Danmark, og der er rigtig mange som synes, at det er spændende og lærerigt med et vinforedrag, vinsmagning, vinkursus ell. lign. Annie kommer ud til virksomheder, foreninger, private m.fl. og holder ofte vinarrangementer på bl.a. restauranter og kursusvirksomheder.

Vi er rigtig stærke i firma aftaler og firmagaver...

Name: LADO Wines - Lagar d'Ouro Boutique Wines
Description:

Organizamos provas de Vinhos na nossa Garrafeira onde poderá também disfrutar de um copo ou simplesmente adquirir uma garrafa dos nossos produtores.

Name: Grand Cru Wine Bar & Boutique
Description: Grand Cru Wine Bar & Boutique is an independent and locally owned and operated wine bar and fine wine shop. Our focus is all about wine and bringing it together with a wide spectrum of wine lovers ranging from casual sippers to experienced oenophiles and everything in between.

Name: Firehouse Wine Cellars
Description: Firehouse Wine Cellars is a locally owned and operated winery in the heart of downtown Rapid City, SD.

Name: Chateau Ad Francos
Description:
The Castle of Ad Francos is a time machine travelling
since the sixth century, at the time of the conquest of Aquitaine by the king Clovis. A trace of the appellation "Ad Francos» (belong to the Francs) has been found in a book from 1004. Ad Francos has become with time the current village of Francs,
which has given its name to the appellation Francs-Côtes de Bordeaux.
Unique village of France named Francs, this place is at
the heart of history.

Name: Blue Light Distillery
Description:
Established in 2018, we make the world's first Caribbean Gin only steps away from a white sand beach. 

With a unlimited resource of island sourced botanicals, our gin is smooth and fresh to mimic the beautiful Island vibes.

Name: Russian Hill Estate Winery
Description: Russian Hill Estate, a family owned and operated winery, is located in the heart of the Russian River Valley. Using the utmost care from vineyard to bottle, Russian Hill is dedicated to the production of world-class Pinot noir and Syrah. The key philosophy of the winery is to maintain the highest degree of excellence in viticultural and winemaking practices to allow wines to fully express the various vineyards that are their source.

Name: Terroir Tentation
Description:

Name: Juiceline
Description: A Juiceline egy hazai márka, mely magas minőségű, tartósítás nélküli, hidegen-préselt zöldség és gyümölcsleveket gyártó és forgalmazó cég Budapesten. A szenvedélyből kinőtt vállalkozás célja 2015 óta, hogy egyszerűbb megoldást kínáljon az embereknek egy egészségesebb életmód kialakításához. Palackjaink 1,8-2,5kg közötti nyers zöldség és gyümölcs tartalma segíti feltölteni a szervezetett és hozzájárul a naponta ajánlott 5 adag zöldség és gyümölcs fogyasztáshoz ebben a mai rohanó világban. Papp-Horváth Nikolett, a Juiceline alapítója saját magán és családján tapasztalva a levek jótékony élettani hatását, vált mindennapi juice fogyasztóvá és változtatta meg életét egyszer és mindenkorra.

Name: The Spirited Bond Ltd
Description: At The Spirited Bond we aim to foster a special community in which collectors can experience and enjoy the changes in their whisky as it matures, sharing in their discoveries and success. Members can get creative with their casks, participate in live whisky tastings hosted online and on-location, exchange their drams & tasting notes and work together to discover some of the best whiskies in the world.

Name: Chateau Grona Group
Description: The “Chateau Grona” Group (Odessa, Ukraine) originates from agricultural colony founded in 1927 by the French Jewish Fund ICA in Bessarabia -the land of a millennial history of winemaking . During 87 years of its history, just like the entire Ukrainian Bessarabia, the winery survived political changes, economic successes and trials. But all these years, our winery is one of the best-known and most respected wineries of Bessarabia . Today, the “Chateau Grona” Group consists of two companies: JSC “GRONA” (viticulture and agriculture) and “AGRO-YUG, LLC” (winemaking and wine trade). At present the Group does the complete cycle of the winemaking – growing grapes on own vineyards (339 hectares), production of bulk and bottled wine, and wine trade. Agricultural division of the company also grows crops on an area of about 800 hectares.

Name: Meritaj, Inc.
Description:
Meritaj was established in 2013 by Guldal “GiGi” Lindberg as the importer of fine wines from Turkey to the United States. After meeting several Turkish wine producers at an international wine conference, Lindberg, herself a native of Istanbul, saw a unique opportunity to bring Turkey’s world-class wines to a growing US market. An MBA and former investment banker, Lindberg became a certified sommelier at the International Culinary Center where she trained to establish the foundation for her import & export company which is based in Emerald Hills, California.

Wiyana was the word for wine used by the ancient pre-Hittites who lived in Anatolia between 3,000 and 4,000 BCE. Yet, Turkey, through no fault of its terroir or native grapes, has gone unrecognized as a wine-producing nation for centuries. But the 21st century ushered in welcome changes for this historic homeland of wild vitis vinifera.  In 2001, the state abolished its monopoly on alcohol and the wine industry was privatized and regulated. Although Turkey’s fledgling domestic market remains suppressed by punitive taxes, wine quality has soared drawing the attention of industry opinion leaders and wine enthusiasts from eager export markets around the world. As Turkey seeks a global market for its wines, Lindberg and companies like Meritaj, will play an important role in the renaissance of Turkey’s wine culture.

As an ambassador for fine wines from Turkey, Lindberg brings her innate understanding of Turkish culture and cuisine to bear in establishing a niche for the native grape varieties of Turkey and varietally-correct, award-winning expressions of international varieties. “The truly fine wines of Turkey, those that demonstrate the quality and immense potential of Turkish producers, are only now making their way to the key markets of the world,” said Lindberg. “By bringing fine Turkish wines to an eager and growing market, Meritaj is proud to be taking part in the renaissance of Turkey’s wine heritage.”

Name: Azul y Garanza Bodegas
Description:
Vineyards Explorers & Wine Dreamers

AZUL Y GARANZA is now a more complete and exciting viniculture experience with the addition of the new projects we are developing in other wine regions of Spain, personally linked to each of us, enriching ourselves with new varieties, soils, climates, collaborators and wines.

We explore and cultivate wild-natured vineyards in 5 different Appellations of Origin in total, full of biodiversity and astonishingly beautiful, in organic farming, to create wines which are not only a clear reflection of the place they come from, but also tell those who drink them who we are and what the flavour of our dreams taste like.

Azul y Garanza Bodegas (D.O. Navarra):  Low-productivity vineyards located in the area of influence of the Bardenas Reales Desert in Navarre, in a clay / calcareous soil. 

Dit Celler (D.O. Montsant): The vineyard, with 20 to 75 years old vines, is in the Llabería mountain range in the municipalities of Capçanes  and Tivissa, surrounded by forest with influence of the Mediterranean Sea. 

Entre Vinyes (D.O Penedés & Cava): The vines, which are more than 60 years old, are grown in chalky soils under the influence of the Mediterranean sea.

Altamente Vinos (D.O. Jumilla): The vines, of a very low productivity and a large part of them ungrafted, are located in a valley at an altitude of 900 metres, between two mountain ranges on a shallow chalky soil.

Name: Epic Negociants
Description:
A negociant (‘ne-go-sion’) is a French term for a winemaker who buys grapes and makes wine from multiple vineyards to bottle under their trusted brand. The quality of what's in the bottle dictates the trust in the brand.

Our network of growers and winemakers are industry royalty, some are the decendants of founders of the Australian wine industry, others are founders of the new age industry. All of them own the best sites in their region and make the best wine. For Epic Negociants.
Making great wine is one passion, sustainability is another. We are leaders in experimenting with carbon emissions reduction in the wine industry. From packaging formats to logistics and our digital operations, we are doing our best to prove solutions which can be rolled out to improve the industry's carbon footprint.
Welcome to our family owned and run negociant business. My name is Andrew Browne and I have been involved in the international wine community since my family planted vines in 1982 to establish the renowned Scotchmans Hill winery in Australia. After growing up in the vineyards and winery and many years studying, tasting and working in the European wine markets and our family wine business, we founded EPIC NEGOCIANTS to make a difference.

Our network of organic, biodynamic and sustainable grape growers and winemakers in the finest regions produce our exceptional wines.

Epic Negociants is ACO (Australian Certified Organic) and biodynamically certified and uses efficient supply chain, sales channels and product formats to eliminate unnecessary costs and reduce CO2 emissions.

Epic Negociants supports The Ocean Cleanup ridding the world's oceans of plastic using passive technology.

Name: Vins Divins S.à.r.l.
Description:
Vins Divins est une société qui importe des vins Naturels au Luxembourg et qui souhaite faire découvrir des vins plus sains, sans pesticides, sans produits chimiques ni artifices. 

Qu'est-ce qu'un vin Naturel ? 

Les vins Naturels ou « Nature » sont issus d’une culture et sans pesticides la plus naturelle possible mais aussi qu’une vinification et d’un élevage sans intrants chimiques ni artifices...

Leur définition par les producteurs de vins nature : « Le vin, ça doit rester du jus de raisins fermenté, un point c’est tout ».

Notre démarche s’adresse aussi bien aux 
► Sociétés qui souhaitent organiser un évènement, 
► Amateurs privés 
► Professionnels des métiers de bouche.

Pour les entreprises, "Vins Divins" propose de créer une dégustation sur mesure autour d’une thématique, dans le cadre de tout événement, qu’il soit interne à la société ou plutôt destiné à l’attention de ses clients.

Pour les privés, "Vins Divins" vous propose de passer une soirée conviviale, à la découverte de quelques vins nature en compagnie d’une douzaine de personnes qui aiment le vin. Car il ne faut pas nécessairement être connaisseur pour apprécier le bon vin. Pendant la dégustation, l’animateur fera découvrir les secrets de la confection des vins nature agrémentés de quelques explications sur les vins dégustés et leurs producteurs. A la fin de la dégustation, les participants pourront faire l’acquisition des vins qu’ils auront préférés.

L’approche de "Vins Divins" vis-à-vis des professionnels est de développer un partenariat avec des restaurants ou traiteurs qui ont une culture de la cuisine de qualité révélant les produits Bio et qui accordent de l'importance au respect du produit. Notre objectif est d’être « l’offre alternative naturelle » aux vins conventionnels.

Pour plus d’informations, n’hésitez pas à nous contacter :
   Tél. : +352 26 19 67 18
   Email : info@vinsdivins.lu
   https://www.facebook.com/vinsdivins.lu

Name: Vins Alsace Hertzog
Description:
Vigneron indépendant, élu vigneron de l'année 2017 par le Guide Hachette des VIns, situé à 5Km de Colmar la capitale des vins d'Alsace, et non loin d'Eguisheim le village préféré des Francais 2013 ainsi que Kaysersberg celui de l'année 2017.

Exploitation familliale depuis 3 générations d'environ 8Ha en lutte raisonnée pour préserver notre vignoble et la richesse du sol.

Nos vignes sont en enherbement naturel, alternées pour la plupart pour profiter d'une meilleure exposition au soleil jusqu'aux vendanges manuelles. (Nous prenons soin de notre vignoble comme si c'était une appelation Grand Cru avec les memes traitements que les viticulteurs bio).

Un vin ressemble souvent au viticulteur d'autant plus que nous produisons et élevons nos vins nous-même. Nous faisons donc des vins plutôt secs pour les entrées de gamme et sur le fruit pour les autres cuvées grâce aux vignes travaillées sur un sol argilo marno calcaire et à un lieu dit "Bildstoecklé" qui font toute la spécificité de nos vins.
Nous offrons un vaste choix de vins gastronomiques mais aussi de vins plus ronds ou d'autres plus en subtilité afin que vous puissiez trouver des vins à votre goût. 
 
Pour les amateurs de vins légèrement plus tanniques ou sur des notes boisées, certains de nos vins sont même élevés en fût de bois à la célèbre cave des Hospices de Strasbourg abritant le plus vieux vin du monde datant de 1472.

Visite et dégustation gratuite. N'hésitez pas à nous contacter pour tout renseignement.

Name: Wine Queen
Description:
This blog is dedicated to all women in the wine world, women winemakers and everyone who would like to know about wine made by a women. It's also a platform for all people interested in wine who want to learn more about wine styles, how to chose a good wine and pairing.

I truly believe that wine made by a women has a completely different taste and view. I support and admire all women winemakers and I am entirely passionate about the fact that women decided that wine will be their profession and life.

I love wine, because wine made me find who I really am and what I want. In wine I found the motivation to continue learning and living, wine makes me discover a new culture, country, language and terroir and I find this fantastic. Drinking wine for me is like traveling in just one sip.

Something about the Wine Queen:
WSET Advanced Level, University of California Davis Winemaking Certificate, Internet Journalism London Journalism School and the most important: school of life.

I would love to hear from you so don't forget to leave your comments, questions and suggestions and never forget drinking in moderation.

Cheers!

The Wine Queen.

Name: Calisco Spirits
Description:
If you thought you knew California Brandy, you have another drink coming!  Calisco is ae clear, California craft brandy, created by bartenders and sommeliers.

Distilled from the finest California wines and produced in the style of South American piscos, Calisco showcases the brighter side of grape brandy with notes of citrus, floral, green fruits, and melons, alongside bergamot, cinnamon and white pepper.  Calisco is rested in steel tanks for a minimum of 2 years, preserving the original characteristics of the grape varietals in our blend, resulting in a more refined and complex final product.

At 38% ABV, it remains smooth and slides effortlessly into the glass with your favorite mixer. While Calisco can be savored neat or over ice, it’s been intentionally blended for infinite mixability. It notably enhances the crushability factor of your favorite classic cocktails. When used as a split base with other clear spirits, particularly agave and cane spirits, it completely raises the bar.

It’s clear why Calisco is your bartender's new favorite brandy.

Name: Il Pollenza
Description:
Il Pollenza is situated in the province of Le Marche; in an area that is characterised by vineyards, grain fields and farming villages. The 220 hectare estate lies partly in the town of Tolentino and partly in Pollenza.
Count Aldo Brachetti-Peretti purchased the estate in the early 1980s and transformed it into a winery. He wanted to return to his family’s roots, whose history lies in Le Marche.
Previously, Aldo lived in Rome, where he spent 36 years working in the oil and energy sector. He had yearned to return to the land that his family had called home for so many years and found what he was looking for in Il Pollenza. 
Aldo saw the potential of turning the estate into a winery. “This is a good place for vineyards because we are around 30 kilometres from the sea and 30 kilometres from the mountains – it’s a perfect balance,” says Aldo. “The area is also well suited to grape cultivation because of its micro-climate, humidity and calcerous rock and limestone soil.”
