Name: wine N
Description:
Wine N은 2010년부터 자연주의, 친환경, 기농 와인을 전문으로 수입하는 회사입니다.

곽동영 대표  국내에서 프랑스 정부가 인증하는 최고 수준의 소믈리에 자격증 BP (Brevet  Professionel)을 정식으로 취득한 최초의 한국인이며, 다양한 현장 경험과 지식을 토대로, 아직 알려지지 않은 보석같은 와인들을  국내에 들여오는 데에 힘쓰고 있습니다.

Wine N은 수입하는 와인의 모든 와이너리를 직접 방문하여 밭 상태, 포도의 재배 방법과 환경을 모두 고려하여 그 품질과 맛이 보장된 와인만을 엄선하여 수입합니다.

Why choosing to import solely organic products ? Most certainly not to follow a trend. But because it is our inner conviction that progress doesn’t mean more products but better products. And it is exactly what the winemakers we are working with do. Having the most utter respect for the environment and for your health.
However we don’t import just any organic wine.Our selection is made after tasting to retain only wine with such an exceptional taste it will make you happy until the next day. 

Why!! 왜, 기농 와인만을 고집하냐구요? 요즘 대세이기 때문에? 절대 그렇지 않습니다. 저희 와인의 첫 선별 기준은100% 테이스팅입니다.

세상에 맛있는 와인은 너무 많이 있습니다.
와인을 마실 때 즐거움과 감동을 느끼는 것은 와인을 마시는 가장 큰 이이겠지요, 하지만 저희는 그 순간만이 아닌, 다음 날까지 기분 좋을 수 있는 와인을 발굴해 내고자 합니다.

Name: Blackenbrook Vineyard
Description:
The seven grape varieties of the Blackenbrook Family Vineyard prosper in the balanced maritime climate and the Moutere clay soil on the 20 hectare block halfway between Nelson and the Abel Tasman.  


Daniel and Ursula Schwarzenbach are proudly hands-on, nurturing the grapes from the soil to the bottle in their sustainable vineyard and gravity-fed winery. 


This is a small winemaker with a big vision.  The Blackenbrook family has a genuine determination to improve the style in each vintage but inspite of all the awards, they prefer to let you judge for yourself, without the hype. 

 
 “Let our wines speak for themselves.”

Name: VINDIOU

Vindiou is born from a dream of 5 childhood friends who always had in mind to start a business together ... They finally decided to share their devotion for ORGANIC wines in launching a dedicated Wine bar/cave in June 2016.

You have, as many, preconceived ideas regarding Organic wines ... let us a chance to convert you and come to visit us in Vindiou in the old-city of Nancy !

VINDIOU

Name: Terra di Seta
Description: Terra di Seta is an organic farm with winery, agriturismo and restaurant in the heart of Chianti Classico. Located a few kilometers from Siena (about 10) and close to the village of Vagliagli. Terra di Seta focuses on welcoming tourists, production and commercialization of wine, oil and honey.

Name: Distillerie Wanner
Description: Entreprise familiale spécialisée dans la production de nobles spiritueux. Gins, absinthes & whisky sont tous produits de façon artisanale et dans une quête absolue de qualité. Distillerie primée de plus de 180 médailles lors de concours de spiritueux locaux, nationaux et internationaux et élue, en 2019, distillateur de l'année.

Name: Wilhelm Kern GmbH
Description: Wir sind eine familiengeführte Weinkellerei im wunderschönen Remstal bei Stuttgart. Seit 2018 erzeugen wir unsere Weine zertifiziert nachhaltig nach den Richtlinien des Verbandes FAIR'N GREEN.

Name: Worldwide Wine & Spirits
Description: Founded in 2000, Worldwide continually aspires to be a premier distribution partner to their suppliers and customers.  They take a progressive approach to the industry and their market by presenting products of quality and value that meet the demands of their customers.  Built on a cornerstone of hard work, great service, and unwavering integrity, their cohesive culture allows us to exceed their suppliers expectations and to identify and strive to meet their customers needs. Their portfolio of Wine, Spirits, and Beer has been carefully selected by their dedicated and talented team and is distributed throughout the state of Kansas.

Name: Indiana Association of Beverage Retailers
Description:
The Indiana Association of Beverage Retailers (IABR) is the voice of the package store industry in Indiana. The association represents the interests of an estimated 1,000 package store owners by promoting responsible retailing, developing sound public policy initiatives and building stronger communities with local advocates. Our diverse board of package store owners from around the state helps create a sound foundation for the future of these multi-generational businesses. For every dollar spent in a small business, more than 52 cents is generated back into the local economy – more than three times the amount generated by a national chain.

As responsible retailers, we remain committed to our communities by ensuring that all advocacy boards, local and state elected officials as well as the public and our customers are educated about our industry and initiatives, such as Indiana's Lifeline Law. With a diverse board of package store owners from around the state, we work to create a sound foundation for the future of our communities, families and businesses.

This association is currently managed by Tamm Capital Group based in Indianapolis, IN.

Name: Sunset Collection Import Export PC
Description:
www.sunset-collection.com
Εταιρία Εισαγωγής Σαμπάνιας και Αφρώδη Οίνου. Ιδρύθηκε το 2014 και τα γραφεία της βρίσκονται στην Αθήνα. Επίσημος Εισαγωγέας της Σαμπάνιας  CATTIER στην Ελλάδα. 

Σε αντίθεση με τις πολυεθνικές που διοικούν τις γνωστές μάρκες Σαμπάνιας και Αφρώδη Οίνου, η Εταιρία μας Εισάγει Σαμπάνιες πρώτης ποιότητας, που παράγονται κάτω απο άριστες Προδιαγραφές.

Description: Ecluse Wijnen wil liefhebbers laten genieten van wijn.

Name: Beersmiths
Description:
Beersmiths is based in Gothenburg, Sweden, and was established in 2015 by Dave and Malin Barratt.
Dave, an Englishman, has been a passionate beer brewer for more than 35 years and when the chance came to have their own brewery they embraced it fully.

Name: adVINtureWines
Description: Your new place to discover wine online!

Name: Le Caveau Fine Wines
Description:
We are a fine wine shop located in Chamblee, Georgia specailizing in wines made by artisanal producers that are typically made in small quantities and estate bottled.

 We offer a personally curated selection of wines with a focus on Burgundy, the Rhone Valley, Piedmont, Tuscany, the Loire Valley, Austria and Germany. We also support organic, biodynamic and natural wines from many of these regions and eclectic wines made very traditionally. We also take a similar approach to our beer selection, focusing on small producers who make unique American and International craft beer.

Name: La Caja de Vinos
Description:
Desde el año 2013 comenzamos con nuestra primera tienda en la la calle San Felipe Neri 2. Actualmente contamos con cuatro mas. En la calle diego de León 26, en la calle Toledo 75, en la calle Bruselas 40-B de las Rozas en el Poligono de Europolis y en la Calle Escofina Poligono P29 de Collado Villalba. 

Con tantos años de experiencia y con los profesionales más adecuados decidimos crear nuestra tienda online “La caja de vinos”. Así poder ofrecer nuestros productos no solo a nivel local sino a nivel Nacional. De ahí, la creación de esta e-commerce, sencilla, resolutiva y dinámica.

De tal forma que siguiendo nuestra política de precios (de nuestras tiendas) de caja completa y precios por botella, premiando así al máximo los precios por caja completa. Conseguimos posicionarnos en una situación de mercado muy alta para dar estos servicios. Conjugando los precios tal cual los tenemos en nuestras tiendas y tratando de dar el mejor servicio de transporte (Cobrando los costes directos de transporte, facilitando al cliente que aun con portes pueda conseguir unos precios muy atractivos). 

Tratamos de dar soluciones a todos nuestros clientes. Nunca cerrando la puerta, al revés, la abrimos de par en par para que todos podáis conocernos y os aprovechéis de todas nuestras ventajas y oportunidades.
Location: Las Rozas de Madrid, Comunidad de Madrid

Name: Wag & Co. Wine Distribution
Description:
Here at Wag & Co. we aim to please... with wine, it’s hard not to! We have a carefully crafted portfolio to suit all of your vino needs, whether you’re curating your next wine list or looking to fill the shelves of your fine wine store, we’ve got you covered. 

So don’t be shy, get in touch!

Take it easy, Sam Wag

Name: Frontier Brands Inc.
Description:
Frontier Brands was founded by seasoned distilled spirits and wines executives with a plan to bring the sales, marketing, distribution, and operational expertise of a mega-company to bear on select, high potential brands carefully chosen for their growth potential. We helped to build some of the world’s most valuable brands. Now we are going to do it all over again.

Our mission and vision:
We intend to be the world’s premier marketer of hand-crafted, micro-distilled spirits brands. Our mission is to bring a new kind of excitement to the distilled spirits business through compelling, authentic, high-quality new brands. Our vision is for a company that competes nationally and internationally -- small and focused enough to give our brands and customers careful attention -- while aggressive and agile enough to make a dent in the industry establishment.

Name: Lincoln Peak Vineyard
Description:
On the farm just north of Middlebury, VT, Lincoln Peak Vineyard grows 12 acres of cold-hardy winegrapes and makes 10 different wines exclusively from estate-grown grapes.  The Granstrom family has been farming here for more than 30 years (apples and strawberries before grapes), and the grapes thrive on Champlain Valley's sunny warm summer days and cool nights.  

Our signature red wine, Marquette, is still making converts to Vermont wine, and our rich, sweet Late Harvest is finishing many a meal with dessert in a glass.  Thanks to the support and enthusiasm of our fellow Vermonters, we're able to sell all of our 25,000 bottles annually within our home state.  We're grateful to be farming and making wine in such a vibrant, interested, and thirsty community.

Name: Luxury Liquid Assets
Description: Luxury Liquid Assets, a Wine Marketing & Brokerage, focuses on the development and execution of image-enhancing brand management strategies and programs that result in improved product sales for their client’s brands. We represent family owned, small production wineries with a conscience.

Name: Wine Bank Limited
Description:
The Wine Bank is equipped with 24 hour cool room facilities to ensure that your wines are stored in the perfect conditions to allow them to mature as the wine makers intended. Our cool room is free of UV light, and temperatures will be controlled between 11-17 degrees. Humidity will be controlled between 55-80%, providing the perfect storage conditions. Our facility will meet the stringent requirements as set out by the HKQAA.

The Wine Bank is conveniently located in Tsuen Wan, less than 60 minutes drive across the boarder from Mainland China, and 20 minutes from the Central Business District and the Hong Kong International Airport. Being situated in One MidTown, a brand new A-grade building, you will be greeted by a high class marble lobby as you enter, as well as panoramic harbour views and 5-star toilets and shower rooms. Parking and loading areas are also available for cars and lorries.

Name: Pure Spirits Est.
Description:
Import and Distribution of some of the World's Purest Beverages. 
PSE Import and distribute major International and local Brands
Our Distribution Channels Cover most of the Lebanese Market and some of the Middle Eatern Countries in the Region including North Africa.

Name: Wilderotter Vineyard
Description: Wilderotter Vineyard is a family-owned vineyard in California's Shenandoah Valley that produces award-winning wines.

Name: VinusClub
Description: VinusClub is a fine wine subscription for both individuals and businesses. Built by a team of Master of Wine, VinusClub set its ambition to provide the best taste fine wine for all of our clients. For Individual service: $300 for two luxury bottles or six bottles of fine wine every quarter. For business client: we design and select wine for your company around your budget and occasions.

Name: 1847 Wines
Description:
WELCOME TO 1847 WINERY & VINEYARDS! 

Enjoy an opportunity to experience our portfolio of 1847 premium wines. Our story starts with the very origins of the Barossa Valley. Immerse yourself in our 175-year history as you enjoy your experience with our outstanding cellar door team. After your tasting our guests are welcome to enjoy a walk around our beautiful gardens and estate. 

The land grant on our historic Rowland Flat property was proclaimed by the Governor in 1847. The origins of 1847 Wines began with Bavarian migrant Johann Gramp, who in 1847 planted the first commercial vineyard in the Barossa Valley. 

We look forward to welcoming you to 1847."

Name: Pacific Grove Brewing Company
Description:
Pacific Grove Brewing Company (PGBC) is located on the coast of California’s beautiful Monterey Bay. Whether you’re taking a leisurely stroll to the beach to catch a few waves, or enjoying the incredible scenery of California’s amazing redwood forests – PGBC has the perfect beer for your adventure.

“California’s Last Dry Town.”
-Seriously. Pacific Grove, CA was the VERY last town in California to allow the sale of alcohol. Until 1969 the sale of alcohol was strictly prohibited within its city limits. Luckily for us (and you) alcohol is allowed now, and to honor those who couldn’t get delicious, ice cold, refreshing brew, we’ll crack open a cold one and keep you in our thoughts. Cheers!

Name: Luxury Liquid Assets
Description: Luxury Liquid Assets, a Wine Marketing & Brokerage, focuses on the development and execution of image-enhancing brand management strategies and programs that result in improved product sales for their client’s brands. We represent family owned, small production wineries with a conscience.

Name: Make It Happen Company S.A.S
Description:
Distribuidora de vinos y licores premium y ultra premium, para el eje cafetero. Make It Happen, además de distribuir al sector horeca, tiene como propósito, hacer un gran esfuerzo por llegarle al consumidor final; dado eso nació la tienda Club de la Cata, en la ciudad de Manizales, donde se capacita al consumidor directo, con el objetivo de educar y demostrar el valor de los productos, el trabajo que hay detrás de ellos y la trayectoria por su historia. 

Se ha creado un trabajo muy de la mano con los importadores, los cuales han brindado un gran apoyo con talleres, capacitaciones y un excelente acompañamiento; tanto al personal de la distribuidora, como a los clientes.

Name: Château Darius
Description:
Le Château Darius, domaine produisant de grands vins, est situé dans la légendaire appellation Saint-Émilion, la plus réputée et prestigieuse du monde.

La famille Pommier est maître depuis 1863 du Château Vrai Caillou. La propriété domine plus de 100 hectares dans le vignoble de l'Entre-deux-Mers et produit les Bordeaux les plus renommés.

En 1990, les Pommier deviennent propriétaires de sept hectares qui occupent un terroir d’exception au cœur de Saint-Émilion. Nait alors le Château Darius. Darius, roi Perse appartenant à la dynastie Achéménides est à l’origine de ce nom rendant alors hommage à l’un des petits-fils d’origine iranienne des époux Pommier.

Depuis sa naissance en 1990, le Château Darius embrasse l’élite des vins en affichant la dénomination Saint-Émilion Grand Cru. La famille Pommier administre la preuve qu'un Saint-Émilion de caractère, au profil classique et sobre, peut être élaboré selon des règles de vinification modernes.

Notre vin est grandement plébiscité par les experts, et fut plusieurs fois récompensé, notamment par le Guide des Vins Dussert-Gerber 2017 et par le Guide Hachette 2017 qui a attribué à notre vin 2 étoiles sur 3, ainsi que par la médaille d'or du Concours de Bordeaux 2011.

Name: Wine & Philosophy Pte Ltd
Description: Wine & Philosophy is an online platform for the distribution of wines from selected appellations, and for the dissemination of wine knowledge. The Wine & Philosophy team is based in Singapore and has extensive experience of the wine industry and an in-depth understanding of the wines of the world.

Name: Monika Caha Selections, Inc.
Description:
MONIKA CAHA SELECTIONS, INC.

Founded in 2003, Monika Caha Selections is a portfolio of high quality Austrian wines that represent excellent value.  Today, our portfolio consists of more than 70 wines from 9 boutique producers, some from wine regions never before represented in the US.  All of the wines are hand selected by founder Monika Caha, herself a native Austrian.  She meticulously chooses wines that consistently demonstrate the balance and elegance to marry well with food, combined with just the right degree of complexity, structure and finesse. 
Monika believes that winemaking is a craft, an art wrought of nature.  Her appreciation for passionate and dedicated winemakers led her to travel extensively throughout Austria, tasting, researching and developing relationships with these artisans.  Rather than representing only one or two regions, Monika has built a critically acclaimed portfolio of the finest artisanal vineyards, with the goal of representing each of the sixteen diverse wine regions.  Currently representing nine regions, Monika Caha Selections reflects the extraordinary range of terroir throughout Austria.  Monika has exclusively selected family owned vineyards, whose estate grown grapes are hand-picked. Their commitment to natural wine making methods range from sustainable agriculture to biodynamic. As a native Austrian, Monika has a long standing knowledge of these winemakers consistent performance as quality producers, many of whom come from generations of wine producers. Critically acclaimed, Monika Caha Selections is a world-class Austrian wine portfolio, currently enjoying great success in the New York metropolitan market.

Name: ALLY Wines
Description: ALLY Wines is looking to change the narrative around US wines.  Our wines represent value in what they bring to the consumer.  Our wines are expressions of purpose and place from winemakers that are love their vines and their wine.

Name: Puerto Viejo Wines LLC
Description:
Puerto Viejo Wines is a wine importing company focusing mainly on wines from Chile and Argentina.

We believe in delivering the best possible value to our customers. Our wineries are all family owned and operated and very unique in style. When opening a bottle of any of our wines you will be pleasantly surprised with your discovery.

Name: Tequila 916
Description:
In Tequila 916  lies a heritage, a symbol of struggle and victory, a trophy that crowns the efforts of our heroes to forge a new nation for future generations.

That ninth month and that sixteenth day have been marked on the calendar with shining letters which stand out among other important dates in the collection of commemorations of our fledgling nation.

Our struggle is over; nevertheless time will surely bring new battles for the next generations as each time brings its own difficulties, so ordinary people might become heroes. We believe that in each fellow countryman there is a soldier who will keep alive our heritage.

Name: Le Vin des Anges
Description:
C’est au cœur du quartier de Montreuil, niché au pied de l’église Saint Symphorien que Pascal et Sylvie, passionnés de bons vins, vous accueille à la cave le Vin des Anges.

Ces deux amoureux d’œnologie perpétuent la tradition familiale puisque Pascal n’est autre que le petit fils d’un expert de vins de Bourgogne et les parents de Sylvie étaient eux-aussi de véritables passionnés, diplômés d’œnologie et fins experts.

Découvrez au fil des saisons, les meilleurs vignobles sélectionnés par Pascal et Sylvie, véritables épicuriens et amoureux de bons vins.

Name: DIVINS
Description:
DIEU SAIT QU'IL EXISTE DE BONS VINS, NOUS AUSSI !
Cette phrase résume parfaitement l'état d'esprit qui nous anime depuis des années. Passionnés par les vins, nous parcourons la France pour aller à la rencontre de vignerons talentueux. De ces découvertes naissent des marques de vins que nous commercialisons en apportant un soin particulier à l'aspect visuel de nos cuvées.

Nous proposons également des outils d'aide à la vente tels que des cartons personnalisés, des 1/4 de box présentoirs, des affiches .....

Name: Americana Vineyards Winery
Description: The award winning wines of Americana Vineyards and Founding Member of the Cayuga Wine Trail offer something for every palate.

Name: SCEA du Vieux Puit, Vignobles Bouillac
Description:
RESPECT FOR THE TRADITIONS, SKILLS AND SECRETS OF THE ANCIENT COMPILED NEW WINEMAKING TECHNIQUES. 
Our expertise : from roots to glass
Independent winegrowers but also wine-growing nurseries. It is an asset to be able to use one’s knowledge of the grape variety and the soil to make our wines.

Name: Rio Seco Vineyard & Winery
Description:
Long-time San Luis Obispo county residents Tom and Carol Hinkle began their wine adventure years ago. After successful teaching careers, Carol at two local high schools and Tom at Cal Poly SLO and a twenty eight year stint in major baseball. The Hinkle’s seriously began to investigate the possibility of farming premium wine grapes. Searching for vineyard property, the Hinkle’s looked at over two hundred parcels of potential vineyard land before discovering the perfect spot in the spring of 1996.

Once owned by a Hollywood movie producer, the beautiful 63 acres nestled among rolling hills and the Huer Huero Creek was destined to become home to this small, family-owned vineyard and winery. The big red barn, now the winery and barrel room building, was originally constructed to accommodate the catering needs and food service for the actors on the set of a 1984 movie.

Happily, the Hinkles have found this small Eastside ranch the perfect setting for their Rio Seco adventures. In the planning stages since the early 1990s, these 30-year San Luis Obispo North County residents are finding their ultimate retirement dream slowly beginning to take shape.

Name: Sunset Meadow Vineyards

Family-owned & operated, our vineyards span over 170 acres from the Litchfield Hills to the Berkshire Mountains. Here at Sunset Meadow, we pride ourselves on offering you high-quality, locally grown, and sustainably farmed wines. We offer award-winning, estate-grown wines available through our Tasting Rooms, as well as various wine shops/restaurants in Connecticut & Massachusetts.

Our Tasting Room in Goshen, CT is located inside a converted 1800's German Bank Barn and we recently expanded, opening a new tasting room in the scenic Berkshires. Both locations are open year-round for tastings and are available for private parties and events.

Name: At Wine Ltda
Description:
Corredora de Vinos & Uvas 

Somos una empresa dinámica, dedicada al corretaje de vinos y uvas. Aunque constituida recientemente sumamos mas de ocho años de experiencia en el rubro, con una puesta en marcha innovadora. 

Enfocamos toda nuestra energía para entregar en el mejor tiempo posible, plena satisfacción a tus requerimientos, cubriendo todas tus necesidades y contar con tu plena satisfacción.

Nuestra Mission: 
- Satisfacer plenamente las necesidades de nuestros socios comerciales
- Crear soluciones integrales para cada requisito
- Entregar siempre la mejor alternativa de negocios
- Velar por una gestión eficiente, veraz y agil, en todos los servicios encomendados

Nuestro mayor compromiso: “Que tu desafío sea nuestro mayor objetivo”
Apostamos a ser tu mejor aliado comercial, tus objetivos son nuestras obligaciones, tu transacción nuestro propio negocio. Siendo parte en tu negocio, nuestro principal objetivo es lograr tu absoluta satisfacción.

Adicionalmente ofrecemos una gama de servicios a nuestros socios comerciales facilitándoles todo lo que requieren para un negocio exitoso

“Las distancias para At Wine no son un impedimento”

Contamos con personal para verificar la totalidad del proceso en terreno si tu empresa así lo requiere.

Name: Marjolaine Roblette Geres Wine Consultant
Description:
Founded in 2010 in Hong Kong and now established in Singapore, Marjolaine Roblette Geres Wine Consultant focuses on wine marketing, communication and events for wine importers, regions and producers, corporate companies and private clients.

- Tailored-made wine events for corporate companies (team building, clients events...)

- Innovative wine events, masterclasses and workshops for importers, producers and institutions
- WSET Level III and Ecole du Vin de France wine program

Name: Vinomarket
Description:
Hikayemiz ve fermentasyon mikrobunu alışımız, üniversite sıralarında Biyoteknoloji dersimize gelen sevgili hocamızın detaylı bir şekilde gençliğinde yaptığı bir Bordeaux hasadını anlatışıyla başlar. İzleyen 25 yıla yakın süre, fermentasyonun peşinde, butik/artizan ölçekten, endüstriyel boyuta, milyonlarca litre üretim tecrübesi edinmekle geçti.

Amerika’ da Finger Lakes’ ten, Almanya Rheingau’ ya, Yeni Zelanda' da Marlborough’ dan, İtalya Alto Adige’ ye ve tabi Türkiye’ nin bağlarına uzanan bu yolculukta üretim kültürü farklılıklarını öğrenmek, bu sürecin en keyifli parçasıydı.  

Bugün, kendi serüvenimizde edindiğimiz tüm bilgi ve tecrübeleri, şarapçılık ve biracılık hizmetinde kullanmanın gururunu yaşıyoruz.

Vinomarket grubu olarak, şarap ve bira yapımı üzerindeki sis perdesini kaldırmayı hedefliyoruz. Burada, gerekli tüm alet, ekipman, hazır başlangıç setleri, popüler şaraplık üzümlerin konsantrelerinden hazırlanmış şarap kitleri, maya, maya besini, kimyasallar ve meşe türevlerini bulabilirsiniz.

En az şarap kadar derin bir kültüre ve geçmişe sahip bira, ilk bakışta zor gibi görünse de, doğru teknik, alet, ekipman ve hammaddelerle, aslında, şaraptan daha zor değildir. Dünyadan sunduğumuz bira kitleri, laboratuvarımızda test edilmiş ve kalitesini ispatlamış ürünlerdir. Tecrübeli biracılar, kaliteli malt, maya ve yan ürünlerle "All Grain" (Tam Tahıl) uygulayarak kendi reçetelerini yaratabilirler.

Web sitemizde satışını yaptığımız ürünler ve şaraba dair yapılan danışmanlıklar tamamen hobi amaçlı şarapyaparlara yöneliktir. İlk kez şarap yapacak olanlar için hazırlanmış şarap kitlerimiz ile temiz ve dengeli şaraplar üretmek Vinomarket ile artık çok kolay ve keyifli.

Name: The Disputed
Description: Back in 1841, there was a place on the map named the Disputed Territory. A dangerous place where only the brash and fearless survived. Out there, whiskey was acquired by any means. Our brand of whiskey was born there. Built on great taste and storytelling to get you through the grit and grind. We acquire the territory's best spirits and bring them to you

Name: Kentucky Par

Kentucky Par Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey. 50% Alc./Vol.
Distilled & Bottled in the Commonwealth of Kentucky since 1933.

Name: Abnormal Wine Company
Description:
Reviving the age old trade of the wine negociant, Abnormal Wine Company carefully selects, sources, vints and bottles the most sought after wines from around the world. Vinting over forty wines in its first year, AWC retains a vast assortment from which it supplies its wine club members. Be it red or white, port or sherry, sweet or dry, AWC has a bottle for every palate

Name: Africavin - Vins & Spiritueux
Description:
Nous sommes un groupe de vignerons et de sociétés productrices de vins et spiritueux en France mais aussi en Italie et au Chili. Au fil des années, nous avons unis nos forces pour développer et promouvoir nos vins sur le continent Africain.

Une structure unique où le lien avec les vignerons est préservé tout en garantissant une simplicité de fonctionnement et un accès facilité aux meilleurs Châteaux et Domaines.

Notre rôle est de vous accompagner afin de construire un développement pérenne sur vos marchés en Afrique.

Distribution active et partenaires dans les pays suivants : Côte d'Ivoire, Cameroun, Bénin, Nigéria, Kenya. 
Prochainement : Ghana, République Démocratique du Congo et Tanzanie.

Name: Barton's Wines & Spirits Ltd.
Description:
British Spirits Club is a fast growing, independent retailer and subscription service of premium alcoholic products. From humble beginnings in Essex, UK, BSC is now serving customers nationwide thanks to genuine word of mouth recommendations and positive feedback. Privately owned, we are committed to providing a first class service to everyone we supply, including some of the best venues and companies throughout the country.

Our experts seek out the newest and finest drinks from independent distilleries allowing us to offer the best advice for any scenario or venture. With over two thousand lines currently available and an ever expanding collection, we can provide the best and brightest drinks on the market for the discerning drinker alongside the familiar brands the nation loves.

Our passion is to bring a constant stream of new and exciting bottles to our customer’s doors whilst giving you a chance to experience the latest in what the industry has to offer. Whether a cutting edge new blend never before seen, or an old rarity not readily available, we aim to ensure our customers never go without something new to experience; and we want to make it affordable for everyone. If you find the same product cheaper elsewhere, we will refund you the difference so you can be confident you are getting the best possible deal.

Trade
Do you have a bar you want us to stock? Then get in touch! We offer flexible ordering and next day delivery, tailored to work for you the way you need it. To find out more about what difference we could make to your business, contact us at sales@britishspirtisclub.com for more information on how to set up a trade account with a dedicated account manager.

Have something you want to show us?
We are always looking for new, exciting products to pass on to our customers. If you have an interesting product you would like us to consider stocking, please contact us at sales@britishspiritsclub.com and we will be happy to take a look!

Name: SPIRITS OF THE USA LLC
Description:
Spirits USA was formed back in 2007 by Founder and Managing Partner, Michael Gerard who along with Kenny May founder of Clyde May's Whiskey and Jonny Allen who has worked in the Food and Beverage Industry as a mechanical production expert for over 40+ years, came up with the idea of a new and innovative way to finish spirits without compromising the taste nor the tradition of distilling.

After 7 Years and many barrels later, Quantum Purity was developed and patented creating a new 21st century way of finishing the distilled spirits by removing at least 50% of the natural impurities in alcohol including the high heat caused by methanol and butanol resulting in ultra-pure and smooth spirit that results in All Flavor...No Burn!

Name: PicciRillo winemakers
Description:
Ogni uomo é un individuo e come tale ha una sua identità di pensiero diversa da tutti gli altri, confrontarsi in un gruppo di lavoro fa nascere delle soluzioni inedite e impensabili per una mente singola.

PicciRillo Winemakers snc rappresenta la nuova generazione di consulenti, enologi ed agronomi che accompagnano i loro clienti nella produzione di un vino, dal suolo all’imbottigliamento, fino al bicchiere.
Il continuum di queste componenti getta le basi del pensiero, delle azioni e delle sperimentazioni della nostra azienda.

La costante presenza tra i vigneti, ci aiuta ad ascoltare ed osservare da vicino il territorio, in modo da accompagnare passo dopo passo la crescita della pianta, elidendo azioni a calendario e tal volta inopportune per la vigna, per l’ambiente e per l’uomo.

Tecniche intuitive e non sistematiche sono alla base delle nostre decisioni, al fine di definire una filosofia di produzione adatta al luogo, che permetta di ottenere vini identitari e singolari, dei vini che raccontino una storia.

Ascoltando i nostri clienti, noi proponiamo diverse soluzioni in modo che la scelta finale sia sempre la migliore, appropriata alla loro situazione, in questo modo ogni raccomandazione é perfettamente giustificata, senza lasciare spazio al caso, senza magie ne ricette.
Affidarsi alla nostra società di consulenze permetterà di:
•Avere un supporto tecnico.
•Avere uno sguardo dall’esterno e quindi indipendente su ciò che é realizzato in azienda.
•Posizionare il proprio vino rispetto ad altri potenziali concorrenti mirando al miglioramento continuo.
•Beneficiare di una visione mediatica.
PicciRillo Winemakers é questo e tanto altro.

LE VIN DE CAVE VITICOLE GROMBALIA RACONTE UNE HISTOIRE, CELLE DE SON TERROIR ET DE LA FAMILLE QUI LE CULTIVE DEPUIS 1947.
Nous façonnons le vin de la Cave Viticole Grombalia pour qu’il exprime pleinement sa séduction intense et son élégance naturelle.
Sa séduction naît de la richesse de ses arômes où les fruits rouges et noirs côtoient les fleurs. De la minéralité, des épices et des notes boisées rehaussent sa longue finale parfumée. Son élégance naturelle vient de la texture caressante de ses tanins et de son style, à la fois moderne et classique.

Name: Ecluse Wines & Lock Vineyard
Description:
As home to a San Francisco Chronicle’s Sweepstakes winning Best Red Wine, we at Écluse are dedicated to producing limited production, handcrafted, award-winning wines from our very own Lock Vineyard.  Our family owned boutique winery is a true reflection of this special place we call home.  Nestled in the gently rolling hillside terroir on the desired Westside of the Paso Robles AVA, we feature Bordeaux and Rhone style wines, as well as our fabulous Zinfandel. 

We have always believed that in order to create great wine, you have to start with great fruit.  We began as growers ourselves, sourcing our fruit to local, prestigious winemakers. Steve decided to produce a few barrels of our Lock Vineyard fruit by using a minimalistic winemaking approach. Then after winning several awards and medals for his amateur wines, Steve decided to take the plunge and produce the first vintage of our Écluse Syrah and Écluse Cabernet Sauvignon from our very own Lock Vineyard. This 2001 vintage was released in 2003 and was exceptionally well received. 

In 2008, we decided to build our own winery on our 30 acre Lock Vineyard. It has proven to be extremely beneficial to have our winery and vineyard in the same location. The first vintage we made onsite produced our most highly allocated wine to date, our 2008 Cabernet Sauvignon from Lock Vineyard, which received the Sweepstakes Award for Best Red Wine from the San Francisco Chronicle, the largest competition of American wines in the world!

Name: Vendimia
Description:
Vendimia is a new importer of Chilean wine, founded by caring and dedicated people, with a mission to introduce Chile's new generation of winemakers to wine lovers in the UK and Europe.

A new movement in Chilean winemaking is capitalizing on the country's privileged heritage to produce innovative, thoughtful, and beautiful wines.  Our goal is to showcase this new style, and to help our clients enjoy broader and deeper Chilean wine experiences.

London has a long history as a center of fine wine in the United Kingdom and the world. The city will serve as the home of our passion and will allow us to share Chile’s unique and extraordinary wines with like-minded people.

“Life is too short to drink bad wine”.

Name: La Casa de las Vides
Description:
La Casa de las Vides, Bodegues i Vinyes, somos una bodega de nueva planta que se asienta sobre lo que, desde 1783, ya fue una antigua bodega: la bodega de la Finca El Galtero de Agullent, en la Vall d’Albaida, al sur de la provincia de Valencia.

Durante dos generaciones, desde1955, la familia de Francisco Gandia nos hemos dedicado al mundo del viñedo. Como Vivero Seleccionador abastecemos de vides a las mejores bodegas españolas, Cultivamos nuestros propios viñedos en las fincas ”El Galtero”,”El Catalí” y “La Vega”.Las tres situadas en la Vall d’Albaida, el valle al que los árabes dieron el nombre de la “Vall Blanca”, por el color de sus tierras, de sus casas y por su clara luminosidad.

La vinificación era el último eslabón clave que nos quedaba por desarrollar, y así completar el ciclo productivo del vino. Tomamos conciencia de ello y el año 2005 decidimos crear nuestra propia bodega, ésta, su bodega: La Casa de las Vides, Bodegues i Vinyes.

Infundir al vino nuestro sentimiento familiar, nuestra experiencia, nuestra total dedicación, nuestra vida. Ese saber hacer que se transmite de padres a hijos. Ese vivir íntimamente con la tierra y con nuestros vinos.

Queremos contagiarles nuestro entusiasmo por la tierra y las viñas, nuestra pasión por las uvas y el vino. Que estos vinos nuestros lleguen al alma de todos los que creemos en la misión de estrechar y cultivar las relaciones humanas. Les invitamos a adentrarse con nosotros en este mundo apasionante del ”Elixir de Dioses”: todo un placer para los sentidos.

Description:

Operates a unique of its kind info portal and online shop offering a portfolio of individually selected boutique rakia from different countries on the Balkans.
The company also conducts direct sales to businesses and private clients.

Mission:Our mission is to satisfy our clients’ needs by delivering preselected by us high quality rakia at competitive, affordable prices in a convenient for our clients way.
In addition to that, we consider rakia a heritage of the Balkans and would like to promote it as such while at the same time respecting the individuality of the Balkans.

Vision: Our vision is to develop our business by focusing on a selection of carefully preselected rakia brands that really deserve it and offering them to our clients while offering in parallel on demand exclusive services to our clients based on their needs. In our view, a good rakia should meet high quality standards as well as certain content requirements regarding healthiness and environmental responsibility while at the same time being fairly priced for what it offers.

Values:

•	We respect the needs and wishes of our clients.

Name: Vincent J
Description:
Le Régnié Vincent J provient d'une très jolie parcelle de 2ha30 plantée de vieilles vignes, située dans un magnifique secteur, au lieu-dit 'Les Bulliats'.  Agés de plus de 50 ans, ces Gamay (100%) encore vigoureux tirent le meilleur de leur terroir, et nous offrent un vin élégamment structuré, d'une belle profondeur, aux délicieuses notes de fruit rouge.  

Malgré le fait que ses arômes et son Fruit le rapprochent de certains vins de Bourgogne, et bien qu'il puisse aussi revêtir l'appellation Gamay de Bourgogne, le Régnié Vincent J reflète au mieux la typicité de son "climat", de son sol fait de granite rouge tantôt alluvionnaire, tantôt argileux, parsemé de-ci, de-là, de cailloux concassés.  Ses vieilles vignes, s'y nourrissant de ces minéraux singuliers, lui confèrent ainsi une identité propre.  La raison pour laquelle l'appellation Régnié, lui convient tant. 

Au "climat", ainsi qu'à une conduite culturale bienveillante du vignoble, s'ajoutent aussi les bienfaits de la macération semi-carbonique, très répandue dans le Beaujolais.  Ce choix de vinification permet ainsi de se concentrer majoritairement sur le Fruit.  C'est notamment une des raisons pour laquelle la vendange n'est jamais foulée,  afin de garder les baies les plus intactes possible et de permettre une étape importante de la vinification.   Cette étape, qui est une des phases les plus intéressantes de la macération carbonique, se passe ensuite à l'intérieur du raisin où, à l'abri de l'air (anaérobie), la fermentation permet de capturer les arômes les plus "juteux" de la baie, ce qui confère aussi au vin son savoureux "croquant"... 
 
Régnié, un des dix Crus du Beaujolais, contigu de Morgon, se situe entre Lyon et Mâcon, enclavé dans les jolis Monts du Beaujolais, à deux pas de la sortie Belleville sur l'A6.  N'hésitez pas pour y faire une petite halte!

Pour tout information ou commande via email: vincent@vincentj.eu

Name: Xwine.se
Description:
The idea of xwine
is to enable our customers to order their wine straight from the vineyard and with

interesting environments.
We believe that you should feel the personal contact with the vineyard
and the winemakers when you enjoy the wine!

Several of Xwines shareholders has more than 10 years experience in the operation
and ownership of our own vineyard.

The various aspects of wine experiences combined with deep knowledge and experience of transport / logistics to consumers in the Nordic countries, international

Description: Somos una pequeña bodega innovadora situada en la provincia de Ourense, amparada por la Denominación de Origen Monterrei. Abrimos nuestras puertas para que nos conozcas y compartas con nosotros tu pasión por el mundo del vino.

Name: Duck Hunter Wines
Description:
Few things in life are more enjoyable than good conversation over fine wine. At such moments, the mind runs free, ideas flow and friendships strengthen. Wherever you are, the world becomes a little smaller.

At Duck Hunter Wines, such moments are our greatest inspiration. Our aim is to create and share fine wines that warm the moment.

Duck Hunter is a partnership and close friendship forged between Mark Wilson, and Locky and Rosie Mulholland.  We couldn't achieve what we do without the help of one of New Zealand’s best-known (and award winning) winemakers, Mr Kim Crawford. 

Mark has been in the restaurant business for over three decades, so knows the importance of having great wine to accompany good food. Rosie is an ex bank manager who handles production and export logistics, and is an avid promoter of NZ Sauvignon Blanc. Locky now runs his own logistics company in the the south pacific but still actively promotes our family of wines.

Together we share a passion to present high quality New Zealand wine at affordable prices.

Name: Sparkling Direct
Description:
We are a privately owned company and have been trading since 2002. We have become one of the UK’s leading online drinks retailers and  although we may not be a household name, we provide a stunning selection of Champagnes, Wines and Spirits, sold mainly as gifts and delivered across the UK and the rest of Europe. For that extra bit of reassurance feel free to check out our online reviews from real customers.

Every order is hand picked and packed in our warehouse by a great, conscientious team who pack each gift as if it was being delivered to a member of their own family. Our buying team source only products that we can all be proud of, quality is key, whether its in the taste of the product, how it looks or in the case of packaging both design and sturdiness - we want our gifts to arrive how they are pictured on the website. 

From a single Champagne delivery to a 100 bottle wine delivery, we can fulfill your order and deliver on a date of your choice, simply select the exact delivery date from our calendar and if you are wanting a weekday delivery then its always free!

Simply order online or by phone by 4pm (GMT) and we will pack and send your order the same day for delivery as soon as the next working day if thats what you choose.

If you cant find something you are wanting from the selection of over 1600 gifts we stock, then please let us know and we will try to source it for you.

Thanks for your time reading this.

Name: The Lake House Denmark
Description:
Founded in 2006 by Garry Capelli and Leanne Rogers, The Lake House Denmark is a picturesque restaurant, cellar door and winery located on the banks of an idyllic lake in Denmark, Western Australia. 

Visitors to The Lake House can taste the property's award-winning wines, feast on gourmet food platters, buy handcrafted speciality foods range Vinofood and try natural skincare range Winespa.

Name: Madrona Wine Merchants
Description:
We at Madrona Wine Merchants look for wines with exceptional quality, complexity and distinct style at a reasonable price.  We love the wines we choose and like to share with others. 

We like to drink wine everyday and think you do too, so we mostly focus on wines that are affordable (although we’ll also stock a good selection of wines for special occasions).  We look for selections that are good deals but possess the quality that separates Bargain Wines from true bargains.  

How do we pick the wines?  We taste them.  We sample hundreds of wines to find the ones we think are good enough to carry.  It’s nice to know that some wine critic has bestowed a high rating on a given wine, but if it doesn’t taste good in our glass you won’t find it on our shelves. We will also offer plenty of tastings, so you can decide what you like for yourself. 

We think our shop is a great place for those who like to think about what they drink, as well as those who just want to enjoy a good bottle. Stop by the shop and see for yourself.

Name: La Cour des Vins
Description:
Notre histoire
Tout à commencé en 1992, lorsque nous avons ouvert Rue Stalingrad à Périgueux. Dans une volonté de croissance et embellissement, nous avons décidé de nous installer au cœur du centre ville de Périgueux. 
A la partie cave, nous avons ajouté une partie restauration, où vous pouvez venir le soir en fin de semaine déguster des tapas d'exception accompagnée de vins ayant été choisit avec précaution. 

Nos vins
Notre gamme de vins est très large puisque nous proposons toutes les AOC de France, mais également plusieurs vins étrangers. La cave se compose de 2500 références qui en font sa richesse et sa diversité.
Depuis 25 ans, nous cherchons à travers le monde des propriétaires et des vins racontent une histoire. La sélection est réalisée suite à des moments de partage, ce qui est notre priorité. C'est pourquoi nous proposons des vins de toutes les gammes, allant des vins cultes très rares et très prisés à des vins plus humbles mais qui n'ont pas de quoi démériter.

Nos Alcools
Nous proposons une petite gamme de spiritueux et d'alcool. Vous y trouverez également des produits choisit avec soin comme des Porto Vintage, des Cidres d'exception, des Pastis de l'Île de Rée, des Cognacs, des Armagnacs, des Rhums, et encore beaucoup d'autres. 

Nos produits d'exception
Le fondateur Olivier Courrier a choisi d'allier son passé de cuisinier à ses connaissances pointues dans le vin. Il a donc ouvert un bar à vins dans la même enceinte que sa cave, afin que les clients puissent directement voir et choisir leur vin à déguster. 
Grâce à cette activité, il propose à la vente des produits raffinés tels que des huiles d'olive, du caviar de Neuvic, des Sardines de Galice, ou encore des jus de fruit d'Alain Millat.

Description:

In response to the COVID-19 crisis, we have developed SnoSan, an 80% ethyl alcohol hand sanitizer in strict compliance with WHO Formula #1.

Name: LAC Products
Description:
Lebanese Arak Corporation a.k.a. LAC Products was established over eighty years ago in Lebanon under the name Carlo Winery. Founded by Garabed Kurkjian in 1938, it grew under his sons Krikor and Garbis, then grandsons Garo, Ara and Brett. Carlo has evolved from its origins in Lebanon to a modern international beverage company in the United States.

Suffering immeasurable losses during the Lebanese Civil War in the mid-seventies, the Carlo Winery in the Bekaa Valley was completely destroyed. Recouping from these difficult set-backs, Carlo Winery found a new home in Los Angeles, California two decades ago. The third and fourth generations of the Kurkjian family continue to carry on the 80 year old tradition of excellence with the evolution of Carlo Winery to LAC Products.

At the present, LAC Products, along with its non-alcoholic division, Carlo Beverages, is a recognized producer, and custom bottler in the United States, and importer, distributor and wholesaler of beer, wine, brandy, spirits, juices, waters and many other fine products from Europe, Armenia, the Middle East, Russia and increasingly form all over the world. Technology and tradition are merged in the continual success of LAC Products. Our company strives to provide its market with fresh new products grounded in Armenian, Arabic, European and world history and tradition.

We invite you to share the fruits of our labor as we dedicate ourselves to the future commitment of excellence.

Name: Fugitives Spirits, LLC
Description: Fugitives Spirits is a Nashville based craft spirits company that is dedicated to making the best small batch whiskies, using sustainably raised organic and heirloom grains, grown locally by Tennessee farmers. Copper pot distilled to perfection, each batch of whiskey is hand-crafted and hand-cut to extract the boldest flavors and nuanced aromas. Locally farmed, fermented, distilled, and bottled by hand, Fugitives Spirits offers a True Taste of Tennessee Terroir and extraordinary flavor in every sip. We are proud to say that every bottle helps Tennessee farmers “do good business”. This is our testament to the creative spirit of the Nashville community and our love of the Tennessee farmlands.

Nous avons récemment augmenté notre surface de vigne et commençons à commercialiser nos nouvelles cuvées de rouges et bulles en complément de celle que nous proposons depuis 25 ans. Nous avons une distribution axée sur l'export mais souhaitons nous recentrer sur la France.

Nous souhaitons donc collaborer avec des agents français pour une distribution auprès des cavistes et de la belle restauration dans de nombreuses  régions françaises, notamment Paris et Ile de France.

Nous recherchons aussi d'une part des distributeurs, importateurs ou cavistes pour l'export et principalement la proche Europe et l'Asie.

Notre notoriété est importante, les articles de presse ainsi que les guides en sont le reflet. Avec une nouvelle gamme de produit, complète et cohérente nous sommes surs de pouvoir intéresser de nombreux professionnels.

N'hésitez pas à nous contacter si une collaboration vous semblait possible.

A bientôt.

Name: ZAFA Wines
Description:
Here at ZAFA Wines each collection is inspired by the fruit first. ZAFA wines are intentional in every way—no fining, filtering, additives, or funny business. No herbicides or pesticides in the vineyard, just fermented juice from responsibly farmed living fruit. Simply put, wine is farming.

What’s in a Name?

If you ever wondered why we named the company ZAFA...you should know it’s a literary reference to the book The Brief Wondrous Life of Oscar Wao by Junot Díaz. Fukú and Zafa are key words in the novel.

The very interesting yet confusing birth of fukú is one that dates back more than 400 years ago to the discovery of the Americas and the beginning of the slave trade. Fukú derives from a long line of traditions, especially, “the perfect blend of bad luck mixed with mayhem that one could fall into or get thrown at by the biggest sorcerer: life.” Along with fukú, the words zafa is also very present in the text. In contrast, it is used to, “counter fukú.” Zafa is a counterspell.

Everything that ZAFA Wines LLC is and everything we are pursuing as farmers, winemakers, and a as business. The company was founded and is owned by a black woman - a counterspell to colonization in America. It is a ZAFA.

Onder Twentse Ketels valt ook het merk Squaremountains en haar opvallende assortiment bestaande uit (Peated)Genever, GinSane en Vodka. Deze zijn te bestellen in de gloednieuwe webshop.

Een eerlijke geur, smaak en afdronk van de toegepaste natuurlijke ingrediënten zijn de referentiepunten waar de volledige aandacht op ligt tijdens het distillatieproces. Zo ontstaat een optimale beleving bij het drinken van een glas van Twentse Ketels.

Stokerij Twentse Ketels is gesitueerd in Haaksbergen (Squaremountains). Vanaf najaar 2019 is de stokerij volledig geoutilleerd en komen inmiddels een 20-tal producten uit de koperen ketels. Onze distillaten worden in de horeca geschonken en staat bij de betere slijterijen in Oost-Nederland prominent in het schap. Wij maken onze producten op ambachtelijke wijze met zoveel mogelijk regionale ingrediënten. Wij leveren ook specifieke distillaten aan bedrijven voor jubilea, personeelsuitjes, relatiegeschenken. Sinds mei 2021 zijn wij uitgebreid van 1 naar 2 personen.

 

www.twentse-ketels.nl     www.squaremountains.nl

Name: Swiss WineArt - VinArt - WeinArt AG
Description:
Wieso AlpenWein? Seit tausenden von Jahren wird im Alpenraum Wein angebaut. Seit der Zeit der Römer wuchs jedoch die Rebfläche wie auch die Anzahl der Rebsorten kontinuierlich an. Das gesamte Gebiet wurde in seiner Identität weitgehend von der Weinkultur mitgeprägt. 
Das Alpenmassiv erstreckt sich von Süden her betrachtet, vom ligurischen Meer, östlich von Marseille, über die Hochalpen, bis zu seinen östlichsten Ausläufern oberhalb der Pannonischen Tiefebene. Die in diesem geografischen Umfeld gedeihenden Reben bilden somit die Basis für die Entstehung von AlpenWein, der als Begriff zu einem Wort geworden ist und mit der Kultur verbunden eine untrennbare Einheit bildet. Diese bietet seit Jahren die Grundlage für den den Handel mit grossartigen, kulturbehafteten Weinen. So unterschiedlich wie die einzelnen Traubensorten in den Rebbergen, so sind auch die Menschen in den verschiedenen Regionen, die die Kraft des Terroirs nutzen und mit ihrem Wissen aus den Trauben die edelsten Kunstwerke in liquider Form zubereiten. Wallis Rhone - Lac Léman bildet das Hersstück des Angebotes!

Name: LE CANTINE DEL CARDINALE
Description:
Le Cantine del Cardinale, come realtà aziendale, nascono circa 10 anni fa, in un paesino delle colline marchigiane, Serra de’ Conti.
In realtà la Visciolata del Cardinale nacque molto prima, dall’intuizione di un uomo, Giovanni Cardinali, che
rispolverando antichi cimeli di famiglia, recuperò tra le varie scartoffie una antica ricetta di un suo antenato,
risalente alla metà dell’Ottocento. La ricetta parlava di questo “Vino di visciole”, una tipicità marchigiana ben
nota a Giovanni come a gran parte dei contadini marchigiani. Il metodo di produzione e tutta la lavorazione
erano però molto differenti dalla ricetta tipica del pergolese. Quest’uomo, già nonno di sei nipoti, con la curiosità di un bambino iniziò a tentare di riprodurre questa antica ricetta e a proporre la sua “Visciolata” a parenti
ed amici.
Furono proprio loro, gli habitué di casa Cardinali, a “battezzare” questa tipicità come Visciolata del Cardinale.
E come, dal contadino che produce il suo vino in casa, si è arrivati a “Le Cantine del Cardinale”?
Giovanni al suo fianco aveva Amalia, sua moglie e madre dei suoi tre figli: Giselle, Luca e Cristiano.
Furono proprio loro, tre figli già grandi, con ognuno la propria famiglia e con realtà lavorative diverse, a pensare di poter trasformare questo “hobby” del loro padre in un vero e proprio lavoro.
Di qui, il sogno: riuscire a creare un’azienda in cui le Visciole sarebbero state protagoniste di ogni prodotto.
Il sogno aveva un nome: “Le Cantine del Cardinale”.
Un’azienda a conduzione familiare, in cui Giannì, così veniva chiamato Giovanni, Giselle Luca e Cristiano
decisero di credere fin dal primo istante.
Di lì a poco nacquero numerosi prodotti “Visciolati”. Luca, un vulcano di idee dall’indole creativa, non si
stancava mai di sperimentare nuovi utilizzi di questo antico frutto, mantenendo la tradizione e l’artigianalità in
ogni nuova creazione, valori fondamentali della filosofia di Giannì .

Name: Coteaux des travers
Description:
The estate Coteaux des Travers whose word Travers means rising sun side, perpetuates the tradition from father to son.
It was in 1920 that Robert's grandfather began cultivating the vines. The years followed and production expanded in 1976 from the bottle sale.

The vineyard of Rasteau has the particularity of being strong in clay with a unique exposure on slopes. The vineyard of Cairanne is quite fragmented, it was mixed with sandy soils, clay and garrigue.

The average age of the vines is 45 years old.

Since 2010, we are in organic farming. This implies that we do not use chemical fertilizers, phytosanitary treatments are only used with sulfur and copper organic fertilizer (used if necessary). We work the soil on its totality.

The harvest is done 100% by hands in a small box, the winemaking is done in a traditional way, with destemming.

With a vibrating sorting table and ten people we make a strong selection of each cluster of grapes before they are relocated in concrete or wood tank.

We produce an average of 55,000 bottles a year we sell in France and abroad.

Description:
WineSimple offers personalized wines scientifically matched to your palate and delivered to your door.  We’ve worked with one of the co-founders of Pandora and a group of statisticians to build our dynamic wine algorithm and have a top-tier team of founders, advisors, and board members.  All wines are individually tasted by a team of sommeliers, who profile each wine across a number of taste attributes.  Based in San Francisco, the company has raised over $1M+ in seed funding to date with leading angel investors.

How It Works:

Step 1: Take our scientific Taste Quiz.

Step 2: Get matched wines delivered.

Step 3: Drink and rate.

Step 4: Get even better matches. 

We're always on the lookout for talent.  Interested in working with us? Drop us a line via LinkedIn, and let's connect.

Name: casa de uco
Description: CASA DE UCO offers vineyard tours, wine production, and luxury accommodations.

Name: CasaVitis
Description:
O Amor por 3 coisas vinhos brasileiros, experiências e pessoas. Foi com isso em mente, que surgiu a Casa Vitis voltada à organização de eventos enogastronômicos e clube de assinatura de vinhos do Brasil.

Nossa missão é levar o vinho direto dos produtores para todas as mesas do Brasil, para que nossos clientes e amigos desfrutem de experiências únicas provando novos rótulos, participando de atividades, harmonizações e experiências sensoriais incríveis.

Nosso propósito é ajudar todas as pessoas de nosso país a descobrirem vinhos e espumantes únicos produzidos de forma singular por grandes enólogos e profissionais da área.

Nossa meta é nos tornarmos referência como parceiros e distribuidores, promovendo o crescimento do consumo de vinho, do enoturismo, de nosso clube, das feiras e festivais de vinhos em todas as capitais e nas maiores cidades do Brasil.

Viva a diversidade do Povo Brasileiro e dos seus sabores e riquezas nacionais. Venha valorizar os produtores do Brasil e faça parte do melhor clube de assinaturas

Name: Otis Kenyon Wine
Description: Otis Kenyon Wine is a family owned and managed winery with deep historical ties to the Walla Walla Valley. We handcraft limited quantities of elegantly structured and affordable Bordeaux and Rhone varietal wines from our estate and other proven Walla Walla Valley vineyards.

Name: Maran Winery
Description:
The origins of Maran date back to 1828-30 when Sargis and his wife Maran repatriated from Persia to the Armenian province of Vayots Dzor. Sargis’s son expanded the vineyard his parents had planted and called it Marani as a tribute to his mother. After the collapse of the Soviet Union, the descendants of the family revitalized the traditions, launching the first commercial wines under Maran brand. The head of the company is considered one of the forefathers of modern Armenian winemaking and has extensively worked on the concept of Armenian terroir for many years, promoting indigenous Armenian varieties. The company nowadays owns 6 ha of vineyards in the Vayots Dzor province, which sells the wines in the local market as well as exports to Europe and Russia. The wine brands include Noravank, Bagratuni, Malahi and the latest one, Halde the underwater aged wine.
And so, after almost 200 years the traditions of Maran winemaking still thrive and are encapsulated in these wines.

Name: Tenuta La Meridiana
Description: Family-run winery focused on premium and best quality/price ratio Barbera d'Asti Docg and other wines of Monferrato, in Piedmont. We have a new approach, oriented to help our partners to introduce the products on the market, and to support them all time long (marketing, promotion, commercial activity). 11 Warranties to guarantee these results.

Name: The Distillery Tour Company
Description: We provide a superb whisky experience. Whether you know exactly which distilleries you want to visit and when, or want us to propose an itinerary for you based on your availability and tastes, we are confident that you will have a truly unforgettable, hassle free Scottish experience.

Name: terroirs du Monde Éducation
Description: Ce site décrit la viticulture de 42 pays et est accessible dans toutes les langues du monde.  Particulièrement adapté pour les sommeliers préparant les concours nationaux et internationaux.

Name: Vinicia
Description:
Descubre un nuevo espacio para compartir momentos y sensaciones, donde los amantes del vino podrán disfrutar de su pasión en Lleida.

- Más de 2.000 referencias en vinos nacionales y de importación
- Gran selección de whiskys, rones, licores y destilados.
- Zona especial Gintónic, con más de 150 enebros y gran variedad de tónicas.
- Conservamos la tradición del vino a granel.
- Todo tipo de artículos con los que podrás descubrir el ritual de abrir, servir y beber vino.
- Regalos.
- Servicio a domicilio. 
- Amplia selección de vinos de Costers del Segre.

Name: Wine Pro Traveler
Description: We are travel professionals that specialize in trips to the world's great wine regions.

Name: Napa&Bordeaux, LLC
Description: Napa&Bordeaux, LLC is a company created by the Villanueva family in California to select the best terroirs from which ultra-premium quality wines can be produced. The first terroir selected is in Bordeaux, France, from which two wines, "Lateralite Droit" and "Lateralite Gauche" are already aging in French Oak barrels in Bordeaux. These wines are excellent representatives of the best wines produced both in the Right (Droit) Bank as in the Left (Gauche) regions in Bordeaux. They can easily compete with the Grand Crus Classe wines which currently achieve so high prices in the international market. The next step for the company is to select great terroirs from Napa, California to continue the tradition of high-quality wines.

Name: Vitis Jenifera
Description: Vitis Jenifera is a small production run winery started in 2017 by Winemaker Jennifer Leslie. The brand has quickly become known the excellent caliber of the wines it has released into the market and for its stylish and irreverent labels. Visit www.vitisjenifera.com to explore this upcoming brand's exciting story.

Name: Personal Wine Cellar Glenville
Description:
The Personal Wine Cellar Story:

Personal Wine Cellar marks the latest, and soon-to-be greatest chapter in our family's great legacy in Wine & Liquor sales.  With nearly a decade of service in wine and spirit sales, patriarch Brian L. Craig finally sees his dream of opening his own store realized.

Together with his daughter Lyssa, and his son Jurian, their 20+ years in the liquor service industry bring not only knowledge of a wide range of products, but a warm and friendly atmosphere to shop, chat, or sample.


Our mission is not to stock it with our favorite wines and spirits, but to fill it to the brim with your favorites.

Name: La Cepa - Vinhos
Description:
Seja extremamente bem-vindo à nossa página! 

A La Cepa nasceu da paixão por vinhos, e este é nosso maior objetivo, tornar vocês apaixonados por este mundo incrível. 

Atualmente trabalhamos com vinhos de 12 países e entre eles, são 200 rótulos selecionados especialmente pelo nosso diretor, um vasto conhecedor de vinhos. 

Conheça nossos produtos acessando nosso site, ou nos visitando em nossa loja física localizada em São Bento do Sul - SC.

#TakeYourTimeForWINE
Location: São Bento do Sul, Santa Catarina

Name: Domaine Ladry
Description:
Domaine Ladry (Vins de Madiran et Pacherenc de Vic Bihl)


Les vignes sont constituées de 5 Ha de Tannat et 1,1 Ha de Petit Manseng, tous deux classés en AOC  
 Le Tannat permettra d’obtenir du Madiran et le Petit Manseng du Pacherenc de Vic Bilh sec et moelleux.  
  
 Les vignes sont pour moitié en coteaux et en plaine avec une exposition sud ,sud -est sur la commune de Semeacq dans les Pyrénées atlantiques.

Name: Deer Run Winery
Description: Deer Run Winery located high above the north western edge of Conesus Lake in the town of Geneseo, New York.

Name: Amaronna
Description: La famiglia Bruccoleri, dedita da anni al settore enogastronomico di Niscemi, patrimonio mondiale del carciofo violetto, ridà vita ad un’antica ricetta tramandata dai propri avi; Amaronna, l' amaro delle ricche proprietà digestive e balsamiche.

Name: Wyflo
Description: Wyflo brings the cellar door experience to you. We are making wines from family owned wineries accessible, fun to explore and easy to enjoy for every wine drinker.
